If you’re in Madrid book this spot :)
Cheers!

The host was very kind. The apartment is in a central area of Madrid near subwaystation with many bars and restaurants. Arturo is an artist and so the apartment is very special but for one night it was ok for me.

What a fun place to stay! The art brought me happiness, and it's walking distance to everything you could want.
If I ever make it back to Madrid, I will try and stay here again.
Si te quieres quedar en un lugar con perfecta ubicación y con mucha identidad , es aquí! Mi estancia fue muy buena y Arturo muy atento.
La casa es tal cual las fotos, muy acogedora! Arturo muy amable y atento.

El piso se encuentra muy bien ubicado en pleno centro de Madrid. Sin embargo presenta muchas desventajas, el piso se sitúa en la última planta de un edificio antiguo sin ascensor y las escaleras que te llevan al domicilio se encuentran en un estado bastante decadente no apto para personas mayores ni para personas con niños. Las fotos no se corresponden  con el estado actual del piso y además el cuarto que se alquila, que indica q es privado, no dispone de llave por lo que siempre está abierto.  El pasillo del domicilio es intransitable ya que se encuentran todas sus obras por el suelo. En definitiva, un desastre. Sin duda es un piso al que no volveré.
lo recomiendo ampliamente
arturo is veryfriendly and the house is so convenient! the art pieces painted by him are lovely too

Some very smooth vibes flowing in here! Arturo is so kind and very helpful. Location is the best if you want to visit the city but skip travelling by public transport.
We had some amazing sleep here, which tells a lot about the place 😍 and the books, and the marble sink, and the art... Go there if you enjoy LOOKING at things. Definitely worth recommending.

Arturo’s flat was a perfect stay in Madrid with fantastic location right by Gran Via - we only caught the metro once throughout our stay as we were so well located we were able to walk everywhere we wanted to go! Arturo is also an incredible host, fast communication, very friendly and accommodating and spoke fantastic English (although we apologise that our Spanish was not better so that we could talk to you in your native tongue !!). The flat is also incredibly well decorated with Arturo’s art and is a one of a kind stay (it has the “wow” factor!!!). If you’re reading this review considering staying here this is your sign to choose Arturo’s place - it was a highlight of our trip in Madrid :)
Unique Airbnb on town.

La ubicación es inmejorable y Arturo es muy amable y atento. El departamento es muy cómodo y la habitación amplia. Para estancias cortas es ideal. Por otro lado, es conveniente saber que es un cuarto piso y no hay ascensor (fue pesado porque tenía una maleta grande).
Me encanta la ubicación! El hogar está magical!!!

La casa di Arturo è in una posizione fantastica, vicina a tutto ma silenziosa. L'ambiente è accogliente e gradevole.  L'unica difficoltà l'abbiamo incontrata con il riscaldamento: la casa non ha un impianto di riscaldamento ma ci sono delle stufe elettriche nelle camere, per noi che siamo freddolosi risultava un po freddo, soprattutto negli ambienti comuni.  Arturo è stato molto premuroso e ci ha offerto la sua stufa (più grande) nella nostra camera da letto, per cui solo negli ambienti comuni la temperatura risultava un po bassa. Sicuramente ideale per l'estate.
Todo de acuerdo a lo descripto. Muy buena ubicación y un gran host. Es Arturo súper amable. Recomendable.
Un anfitrión muy muy agradable y excelente ubicación
Have you ever dreamed of a night at contemporary museum of art? Arturo’s place is a concept! It probably has the most unique vibe you will ever experience in the center of Madrid. Great value!
he cancelado porque no coresponde a que esperaba .
Piso increíble, con un alma suya
Really great location and a unique place to stay!

A magical experience for our first night in Madrid. Arturo and his assistant were super accommodating and helpful .We felt like we were staying in an art museum. The art made us happy, the other guests were respectful and we had a beautiful night of rest. A great location with a fantastic host. Will return if ever I am in Madrid again.

La ubicación es muy buena y la secretaria de Arturo muy amable pero él jamás se comunicó con nosotros. El departamento no tenía ni un solo cuchillo ni siquiera para untar. El agua caliente se nos acabó el primer día y por suerte estaba su secretaria para cambiar la garrafa. Estaba bastante sucio y desprolijo. Un solo baño pequeño para demasiados huéspedes. Cuando cambiaban los huéspedes no nos avisaban. No muy recomendable. Toallas viejísimas!!!!!
Great location and a wonderful experience overall.

Great location, centric but quiet. The apartment itself is really a thing to tell your friends about! Our stay was pleasant overall. Arturo's assistant was very polite and attentive. Would've loved to stay more time :)

Excelente ubicación, el lugar original y hermoso lleno de arte!, limpio y buena atención de parte de Rica.
Muy restrictivo el Check in, debería ser continuado dentro de un horario establecido, poner horarios cortados para la gente que viaja es complicado.
muy bien
房子在最中心的地段，出门便有各种公交车站，出行非常方便。谢谢Arturo的助理Rica告诉我们附近有免费的公交车🥰他们都是热心的人。房子如图所示，很古老，四处都是作品和细心的装饰，简直是由艺术作品打造的空间，第一次体验住在艺术馆，感觉很不错！Arturo很有趣，谢谢这些天的招待！All best wishes to you! 😁
Excelente lugar, excelente ubicación y excelente trato. la habitación es muy cómoda así como la casa en general, además de que todo está súper cerca. Muy recomendable y práctico.

La estancia donde Arturo está buena cuando necesitas algo súper bien ubicado y desenfadado. El espacio es muy curioso y está excelentemente localizado, muchos restaurantes, plazas, transporte, zonas emblemáticas están a una distancia caminable.
Apartamento em excelente localização, perto da avenida principal, metros, pontos de ônibus. Casa muito bem decorada!

Unique apartment in a great location. The apartment is really central and you can walk to many places in the city. Plenty of restaurants and bars nearby makes the trip even easier for those who enjoy these kind of experiences. Communication with Arturo was easy and hassle free!

We loved our stay at Arturo’s airbnb. From the wonderful art to the perfect location, it was great! Arturo is very helpful and very kind!
It really made our vacation great!
Cool space, really in the heart of the city
Beautiful place and right in town! Highly recommend!

le debut du sejour a commencé sur une mauvaise communication , nous avons perdu une partie de l'après midi a attendre que la personne vienne faire le ménage avant d'ouvrir l'appartement. (il etait annoncé une ouverture entre 14 h et 17 h qui s'est modifié a 19h..un prix de départ de 48 € est passé 91...bref on s'est sentis piégés car trop tard pour chercher un autre logement.

Dieses Apartment ist nicht für jedermann - es ist schon lange nicht renoviert worden und entsprechend lassen sich z.B. einige Fenster nicht mehr öffnen. Es ist im obersten Stockwerk eines Hauses und wird entsprechend etwas wärmer. Auch Wandtapeten, Teppiche und Einrichtung sind älter und etwas heruntergekommen. Wenn einem das aber nichts ausmacht, findet man sich in einer einzigartigen Unterkunft inmitten von unzähligen Gemälden und Kuriositäten. Und das mitten im Herz von Madrid. Zentraler zu wohnen ist kaum möglich.
Great stay in Madrid. Very accommodating, Rica and Arturo were both very nice and made things easy. Brilliant location too.
Great stay. Kind hosts!

Real artistic place, perfectly located - walking distance to all important in the city, near by 7/24 bus stop to/from airport.
Just to warn - 4th floor, no lift.

I wanted a very central location as I was attending a wedding in central Madrid and this apartment was absolutely perfect as everything is just around the corner and there is a good little supermarket close by. Rica was very helpful and welcoming and often popped in. The apartment was very clean and little things like having toiletries to use in the bathroom helped me as I travel very light. The apartment is exactly as described in the details but it's on 4th floor so there are 8 sets of stairs to climb as no lift. I had good contact with Arturo who was also very helpful even though he was away at the time. If I go back to Madrid I would definitely rebook. There were other guests in the apartment and no locks on the door so best to keep your valuables/passport with you but I felt very safe there. Madrid is a beautiful vibrant city and Arturo's place was perfect for what I wanted.
fantastic location and room
Fue corta pero el apartamento tenía lo necesario, excelente ubicación
Original apartment, very well placed in Madrid and a nice host Rica.
Очень красивая, необычная и аутентичная квартира в самом центре Мадрида. Гостеприимная Рика, спасибо за все!
감사합니다.

Arturo's place is very well located. Close to everything we wanted to see and do around Madrid.
He was very friendly and welcoming, gave us local tips.
His place is really cool, full of artworks.
Definitely recommend his place if your looking for a more alternative experience.
I will look him up if I ever come back :)

Idéalement situé, Madrid peut se visiter à pied au départ de l'appartement d'Arturo. L'arrêt de bus de l'aéroport est à proximité, c'est le seul transport en commun que nous avons utilisé.
Présent mais discret, Arturo a été disponible
pendant notre séjour. Merci pour l'accueil !

Highly recommend this crib for other artists and musicians- you’ll feel right at home with all of the paintings and books and it’s easy access to the gran via, Main Street and transportation to get anywhere. Rica is also extremely sweet and helpful!

Perfect location in the center near all commodities and cool neighborhood.
Very good and flexible welcome from Rica.
Thanks again we had an excellent stay
Excelente ubicación y además flexibles a la hora de llegada, ya que tuvimos un retraso con nuestro vuelo de llegada y Arturo y su socio se mostraron muy flexibles y atentos.

Très bien placé dans un quartier vivant et avec des restaurants pour toutes les bourses. A proximité de 2 métros et de bus dont le bus direct pour l’aéroport.
Rica nous a très bien accueilli.
Appartement d’artiste
Un seul bémol pour moi qui suis âgée et avec un problème cardiaque, l’appartement est au quatrième étage sans ascenseur. Et ce n’est pas précisé dans l’annonce. Merci Arturo et merci Rica

We had a blast staying at Arturo's home! The place had a cool vibe, with artsy decor and personal touches that made it super unique. It felt like staying in a creative, inspiring spot and gave our trip a special touch.
Rica was a total gem. She was super nice to both of us and went out of her way to help in any way possible. We couldn't have asked for a better host!
As for the location, it was just perfect. It was super close to Gran Via and El Buen Retiro, which made exploring the city a breeze. We'd definitely recommend this place for anyone looking for a one-of-a-kind stay in a fantastic location with an amazing host!
Si no hubiéramos estado hospedados en casa de Arturo, nuestra visita a Madrid no hubiera sido la misma. Muy acogedor el lugar, a minutos caminando de los destinos turísticos, limpio y muy organizado.

El departamento es muy agradable, la paredes y los techos decorados y muchas obras de arte en todos los ambientes. Todo muy limpio y ordenado, la cocina totalmente equipada y la habitación amplia y cómoda, de hecho es una habitación doble con lugar de sobra.
La zona es céntrica, cercana a todos los puntos de interés, pero el departamento es sumamente silencioso.
Arturo es un excelente anfitrión, siempre atento a nuestras necesidades. Nos espero hasta tarde a nuestra llegada para el check in, y nos dió recomendaciones de lugares para comer y visitar. Sin duda volvería!
Arturo was amazing will definitely come back

Estancia excelente, el piso se ajusta perfectamente a la descripción: como lo indica Arturo en su anuncio, es una "casa museo". Es un hogar muy bien ubicado y sobre todo atípico, lleno de colores y obras de arte, que no se parece a ningún otro y del cual uno no se puede olvidar. Nos encantó descubrir su multitud de pinturas, fue una experiencia madrileña en sí misma, una más que añadir en mis cesta de experiencias madrileñas y un lindo recuerdo con mi padre.
Arturo ha sido muy simpático, muy acogedor, y siempre disponible para comunicarse con nosotros, ayudar o resolver cualquier duda.
Volveré y os lo recomiendo!
Arturo is a very friendly host and the beds were great. It really felt like staying at the home of Arturo

Nuestra estancia en el apartamento a pesar de ser muy corta no fue la esperada. Si es cierto que el apartamento está bien localizado y es tal como se muestra pero, el apartamento sufría de varias cosas. Para empezar nosotras pensábamos que íbamos a estar hospedadas únicamente nosotras, por el contrario había dos inquilinas más y no se nos avisó. Si nos
hubieran dicho que había dos inquilinas más, no hubieras escogido este apartamento. También el apartamento tenía muchos objetos personales del propietario, como espuma de afeitar o gel de baño. Por último algunos de los objetos estaban en mal estado, la puerta de la entrada costaba en abrir bastante y nuestra habitación no contaba con pestillo. A nuestro mal pesar de hacer esta valoración pero, nos sentimos engañadas. Espero que mejoré estos detalles para sus próximos inquilinos ya que el apartamento tiene muy buena ubicación.

Arturo's place was super cool and he was extremely friendly and helpful!
His place is quiet and cozy. His art is everywhere too. He's a great host but an even more amazing artist!

Very hot with limited cooling, but if you travel during the cooler months, the atmosphere is incredible. Riddled with artwork, Arturo’s place itself is someplace worth visiting during your stay in Madrid. His assistant Rica is also a very lovely woman. Very nice and very informative.

Muy buena ubicación, no tuvimos que tomar autobús en ningún momento solo para ir y venir del aeropuerto.
Muy amable quien nos recibió . Con todas las instrucciones y recomendaciones.
We loved staying in the home of Arturo. His assistant was so helpful and kind we felt right at home. Would stay again!
Todo bien, Rica muy amable con nosotras! la ubicación excelente
Arturo siempre fue muy gentil, una comunicación directa y clara, el alojamiento es excelente y la ubicación inmejorable. Regresaré...
Es un espacio único y muy particular, con una ubicación perfecta para conocer y disfrutar de la ciudad ! Arturo siempre atento y accesible !
Todo fue excelente🤩
Un lugar que recordar y un anfitrión estupendo! Estoy seguro de que volveré
Amazing place, would be glad to visit again 😁
El alojamiento super bien ubicado, Arturo muy atento y amable.

Estancia genial en casa de Arturo. Hemos venido varias veces ya, y siempre nos sentimos muy a gusto. La ubicación está perfecta, la calle está super tranquila, justo al lado de Gran vía para poder visitar Madrid con facilidad, y sobre todo las pinturas de Arturo son un encanto!

Arturo was really friendly, and we felt really comfortable in the apartment. the bedroom was really big and comfortable and private. Arturo recommended us some good places to good, and let us comfortable to have a good stay.
The location was amazing, and next to everything. I recommended Arturo's place, and I'm looking forward to going back to Madrid.

la casa di arturo è molto particolare, sei ospite a casa di una persona cordiale e accogliente. I suoi consigli sono stati molto utili e la casa è in una posizione che ti permette di raggiungere a piedi tutte le zone centrali di Madrid. Unica difficoltà se fa un po' freddo la mancanza del riscaldamento ma ci è parso di capire sia una condizione comune a tutte le case della zona
El apartamento es súper original y hace la estancia muy divertida. Arturo es muy muy amable y te hace la estancia muy agradable
Arturo is a friendly host, attending to all our needs. His house is also very unique, unlike any place we had ever seen before!

Como siempre una estancia excelente en casa de Arturo, su hogar es tranquilo y encantador. Gracias por acogerme una y otra vez y por los buenos momentos compartidos, lo aprecio mucho. Lo recomiendo calurosamente!

Unser Aufenthalt war sehr angenehm. Arturo nimmt sich allen Anliegen seiner Gäste direkt an und man merkt, dass er gern Gäste hat und ihm daran gelegen ist, dass diese sich wie zuhause fühlen. Im Zimmer fühlten wir uns sehr wohl, es war ruhig und ziemlich geräumig. Insgesamt war es eine sehr besondere Erfahrung, in einer so speziellen Wohnung zu leben.
Ett unikt boende som ligger mycket centralt och är otroligt mysigt! Arturo var mycket tillmötesgående med lokala tips och en trevlig värd och jag kommer gärna tillbaka
was a nice stay
Such an awesome and unique space! My friends and I loved this Airbnb and Arturo was very friendly. Great location. A memorable stay for sure!

Estancia genial como siempre. A mi amiga le gustó tanto como a mi cada vez que vuelvo. Muchas gracias Arturo por los momentos compartidos contigo y con tus amigos, por la comida rica, la música y el arte 😁. Súper recomendable!!
À bientôt!
Really cool spot! Arturo was an amazing host. Loved the interior and the location was right in the city Centre so it was really easy to get around. Great paintings too!

Buen anfitrión Arturo, nos dió buenas recomendaciones y el departamento esta muy bien ubicado.
tiene cerca muchos restaurantes, un super dia a la vuelta. ¡Lo recomiendo !

Una estancia fantástica en el piso de Arturo. Realmente es un lugar muy único, con arte y decoraciones por todas las habitaciones. Hay mucho color e interés por todos los espacios. Funcionalmente, es bueno también con una sala, una cocina bastante grande, y un baño con nada de quejarme. El cuarto fue muy bueno también, la cama pareció limpia y había suficiente espacio. La ubicación es fantástico, solo unos pocos minutos a pie de las zonas más importantes de la ciudad en Gran Vía. También la calle con el piso es muy tranquila y bonita, y hay muchos bares y restaurantes cercanos. Además, Arturo es un gran carácter y un artista talentoso. Tuvo muchas recomendaciones y fue muy fácil cuando necesité ayuda rápidamente. En general, recomiendo este piso mucho!
Excelente ubicación, se llega caminando a casi todo. Muchos bares, restaurantes, tiendas cercas. Muy lindo lugar. Arturo muy amable :)

Nous avons séjourné quelques jours chez Arturo avec notre petite fille et nous étions ravis de l'appartement très beau avec toutes les oeuvres d'art et beaucoup de style. le logement est très bien situé pour visiter tous les quartiers de Madrid ! Arturo est très accueillant, sympathique et nous a donner des conseils de visite et partage quelques beaux moments ensemble !! nous reviendrons avec plaisir et je recommande vivement :)

Excelente anfitrión, nos ayudó con recomendaciones locales y siempre tuvo una respuesta rápida a nuestras inquietudes. Recomiendo mucho quedarse en su casa, es una experiencia única entre arte y descanso.

¡Increíble estancia en un oasis artístico en el corazón de Madrid!
La ubicación de este alojamiento es inmejorable, a poca distancia a pie de la Gran Vía y de muchos otros lugares de interés de Madrid.
La propiedad en sí es muy interesante. Se nota que Arturo, el propietario, es un artista, ya que el lugar está lleno de diferentes obras de su trabajo. Esto le da al espacio un ambiente único y creativo que realmente nos encantó.
Arturo fue un anfitrión excepcional. Fue muy comunicativo y se aseguró de que tuviéramos todo lo que necesitábamos durante nuestra estancia. También nos dio excelentes recomendaciones sobre qué ver y hacer en Madrid.
¡Recomendamos este alojamiento a cualquiera que visite Madrid! Es un lugar perfecto para relajarse y disfrutar de la ciudad.
Vriendelijke host, perfecte locatie en een heel fijn verblijf gehad, dank Arturo!

This Airbnb offered a cozy, art-filled space with bold, vibrant decor. It's located in the heart of the city, making major attractions like museums and the palace easily walkable. Arturo was helpful, providing great local tips. Amenities like laundry facilities added convenience. Highly recommended for its comfort, location, and privacy.
we had a very relaxed stay with very friendly Arturo! it's an accommodation to remember :-)
Arturo fue muy simpático con nosotros, la verdad que nos hizo sentir muy bien en nuestro día por Madrid el poco tiempo que estuvimos, volvería a este apartamento si tuviese que volver a Madrid!
Excelente ubicación, solamente hay que subir bastantes gradas para llegar a la habitación, pero todo lo demás perfecto

Casa encantadora, muy original y con obras muy interesantes. Arturo muy amable y servicial. La ubicación es 10/10. La única pega que le ponemos es que la ventana de la habitación no tiene persianas y entraba toda la luz y claridad, por lo que si eres de esas personas que necesita oscuridad para dormir como nosotras, te recomiendo llevar antifaz o algo para taparte. Por lo demás, muy recomendable. Gracias Arturo! :)

el alojamiento excelente a 2 minutos de la gran via donde se encuentra  el hotel de CR7, a tres minutos del metro, restaurantes,terrazas 0 bares y tiendas de ropa por donde quiera el anfitrión y el alojamiento  el mejor de todos los diez paises de europa en donde me hospede

We love Arturo’s place. We moved from one room to another in his place which was very easy. His place is near so much but quiet and beautiful. And Arturo was very kind and helpful. We hope to be back to Madrid and Arturo’s. Thank you.
Excelente estancia, ya he vuelto varias veces porque Arturo es una persona genial y su hogar es encantador. Me trae paz y me siento como en casa ! Merci beaucoup !! 😃 100% recomendable!
Was a wonderful stay at Arturo's place and Rica made us feel right at home - plus, Rica made an extra efforts for us just to keep our luggages a bit longer, really appreciated!! We will be back :-)
Amazing place. Rica and Arturo are great host

Hospedarse aquí es todo una experiencia, mucho arte por donde veas dentro del cuarto. La zona super exclusiva en la Gran vía. Muy limpio, host muy amable y pro activo. Su asistente te recibe y te hace sentir en casa.

Great stay in arturo’s place. Very walkable to every Madrid sightseeing you could imagine. Rica was very helpful and helped us checked in with no problems. The place was very vibrant and had comfortable beds.

Very interesting, unusual space in a fairly central area. Seems it’s half studio for the owner and half apartment. Arturo’s assistant Rica was lovely and very helpful. It is on the fourth floor (so five flights of stairs) and has no AC, so it’s quite hot in the summer and not for people with limited mobility.
The neighborhood has a slightly sketchy feel at night with a few guys loitering or sleeping on the street. I don’t think it’s a problem, but it got very quiet after midnight. There are nice bars and restaurants nearby (apparently it’s the gay district).
As it is a room in a flat, there’s no self-checkin and Arturo had us coordinate with Rica to get in, with available times in afternoon or late evening. If you really need flexibility or an odd arrival time, this place might not be for you. Airbnb always offers cool places and I liked the space, but I might stick to more independent stays in the future due to that added stress.
Buena ubicación cerca de la plaza de Cibeles y la gran vía. La asistenta Rica (quien nos recibió) muy amable y excelente persona.

Destacada atención por parte del anfitrión. Desde el primer momento estuvo atento a nuestra llegada. Por otro lado, la asistente del anfitrión siempre fue muy amable y proactiva. Nos brindó instrucciones precisas para llegar.
Recomendaría tomar en cuenta que el hospedaje está ubicado en un 5to piso para personas con movilidad limitada.

Wonderful stay at Arturo’s place. The host and his assistant, Rica, were extremely responsive and helpful during the whole stay. The apartment has a lot of charm. Please mind that it can be very warm during summer as it is on the top floor.
Accueil au top! Logement atypique et très chaleureux. La localisation est juste parfaite, nous avons adoré.
Otra estancia muy agradable. El piso fomenta la calma, Rica es muy simpática  y sonriente y siempre hay un cuadro nuevo en el que fijarse.  Muchas gracias ✨️

We enjoyed our stay at Arturo's place! We were welcomed by Rica upon entry who was delightful, incredibly accommodating, and provided us with helpful reccomendations during our stay!
The apartment provides a unique experience for lovers of art and is perfectly located in a LGBTQ+ friendly neighbourhood. 🌈🪭

This place is so unique! I loved it. Arturo was super friendly and his assistant Rica too. We had an amazing time. Plus it’s 5 min away from Gran Vía, so you have lot’s of shops, restaurants and views super near.
The only thing it’s missing is an elevator.
I will definitely be back! Totally recommended.
Amazing location and cool bohemian apartment. Arturo is a kind multi-lingual, and responsive host.

Arturo is a very nice host. He recommends very good restaurants, and he gives us a lot of help during our stay, even he doesn’t have to. The place is like what is presented, beautiful, art, full of characters. This is definitely one of my favorite experiences in airbnb.

Nous avons passé un excellent séjour chez Arturo, qui est accueillant et agréable. Il nous a proposé des recommandations. Et nous avons eu l’incroyable chance d’assister à la présentation de ses dernières œuvres. Un grand merci pour ce partage!!!
Estuvo genial, lo mejor es la ubicación. Muy amable arturo.

Fun and quirky place to stay close to everything! Lovely food places all around, Gran via a street over, supermarket 2min walk. Super comfy and clean. Arturo was so lovely and gave us lots of recommendations for our stay.
Estancia genial, como cada vez que vuelvo me dio mucha ilusión veros ☀️🌈. Arturo y Rica siempre muy amables y nuevo arte para disfrutar!!

La ubicación es excelente en el centro de la ciudad, las fotos son muy parecidas al hospedaje, Arturo nos dió muchas recomendaciones.
Las sábanas tenian pelo de mascota, por lo que no han sido lavadas para nuestra estadía.
La tostadora tenía suciedad impregnada, al parecer de mucho tiempo.
Las instalaciones parecían tener un estilo rústico en las fotos, lo cual nos encantó pero en realidad el piso y algunas paredes no están terminadas, falta mucho mantenimiento y se ve muy precario.
It’s exactly as described by other guests. An extremely unique stay. I’d def recommend for a couple.

Nos encantó nuestra estancia en el piso de Arturo! Era muy fácil llegar, las camas eran muy cómodas y el piso era muy bonito y chulo con el arte. La asistente de Arturo, Rita, estaba disponible para responder cualquier pregunta y fue muy amable. El piso también estaba muy céntrico, lo que facilitaba explorar Madrid. Muchas gracias!
房源位置很好，在市中心，Arturo回复消息很及时，他的助理Rica也特别热心，还给我们提供了游玩建议。房子很漂亮，虽然马德里的冬天有点冷，但是房间提供了很多毯子！

La ubicación del departamento es perfecta, estás muy cerca a todo. Quisimos ver la cabalgata departamento los reyes magos y estábamos muy cerca. Muy céntrica. Rica, quien nos recibió y vive en casa es lo máximo, muy atenta y delicada.
El edificio es un poco antiguo y oscuro, y no sabíamos que estaba en cuarto piso, es bueno saberlo por si traes maletas. El departamento es muy particular, literalmente es un taller de un artista lleno de cuadros y detalles de arte y cosas curiosas. Se comparte el baño y la cocina, felizmente no hubo nadie así que estuvimos solos! Gracias Rica por tu hospitalidad.
Otra estancia maravillosa en casa de Arturo (por eso suelo volver una y otra vez!). El arte colorido no deja de traer paz. Gracias Rica por el entusiasmo y las conversaciones 🙂 Hasta pronto!
Buena ubicación cerca de las calles principales, su asistente Rica muy amable y atenta persona, una bonita estancia
房间充满艺术气息，是旅行中性价比较高的选择。

This is a real artist's apartment located in Chueca, the hippest neighborhood in Madrid. The location is fantastic. Very easy to catch an early morning cab back to the airport (2 min walk to the main road full of cabs). You are staying in a real person's apartment, not a sterile airbnb owned by a foreign investment company. Fantastic
Todo excelente y la atención de Rica más que bien, super atenta y al pendiente de nosotros.

El lugar muy bonito, todas la amenidades, cocina baño todo. La locación es perfecta la zona muy tranquila y cerca de todo!
Todo queda caminando, perfecto.
Nos recibió Erika, super linda atenta pese a todos los problemas que tuvimos con nuestros vuelos muy atenta y al tanto de nuestros horarios. la verdad excelente!
La ubicación del apartamento bien, pero hay muchos cuadros de pinturas y telas en el techo que guardan mucho polvo

The flat is very unique and has more character than any airbnb i've been to. The room has a window to the backyard so it's very quiet at night. The lady that welcomed us was the nicest person, she gave us many advices and was super helpful and sweet. She even helped us with our laundry and really made us feel at home.
The bathroom and kitchen were big and clean, i have nothing bad to say about this airbnb.

Effectivement l'appartement d'Arturo est unique et surprenant . C'est une expérience en soi de découvrir les œuvres d arts et déco !
Un grand merci à Rica, hôte discrète et chaleureuse
Excelente atención de Arturo y Rica. El espacio no podría estar mejor ubicado!

Do not believe the ratings less than 5.
It is an airbnb that is amazing.
Those who did not give 5 stars- perhaps you do not understand what beauty is. What are the missing stars? Is it that Arturo was too kind, too thoughtful, and his home too delightful? Stop being fools.
Train your weak body so you will climb the stairs to see the beauty for yourself!
Stay now, you will not regret it!
Siempre es un encanto volver en casa de Arturo! ✨️ Y Rica siempre fantástica y amigable, muchas gracias por su sonrisa y entusiasmo! 😃 À très bientôt

位于市中心的房间！离一切值得前往的地方都很近，步行即可抵达普拉多博物馆。房东本人不在民宿，但细心的安排了助手Rica女士来帮助我。Rica是一位非常友善热心的女士，房间总是被整理得很干净，认真热情的解决所有我提出的问题，在我身体疼痛时为我提供药物，推荐周边的景点和博物馆给我，让我感到非常的温暖和舒适。房间的布局有着强烈的独特的艺术风格，让我惊叹不已，我非常推荐！
需要注意的是房间位于4楼，没有电梯，搬运大型的行李会有些困难。

What a fantastic time! We loved staying here. Not only is the place beautiful but neighborhood great and host friendly. Rica especially was very kind and had many great recommendations. We loved our stay and recommend anyone who can stay here does!

The place was exactly as described. Arturo was always on point with communications and instructions, which made our check in very seamless.  Rica (Arturo's assistant)  was  excellent. She made our trip to Madrid very memorable. Very attentive, always on point with communication. She even took the time to show us around Madrid for the duration of our stay. We were able to have dinner without reservation at Botin (Guinness world book of records as the oldest restaurant in the world).  She was very well versed about Madrid. Showed us the oldest sandwich restaurant in Madrid. All that she recommended were very. I would have liked to have been able to meet our host Arturo but he was out of town. He seemed to be a very interesting person.  Location was very excellent. I regretted not walking around the neighborhood sooner. There were so many interesting quaint restaurants and bars within a 5 min walking radius. If and when I go back to Madrid, I would definitely stay there again.  Thank you.
Le falta aire acondicionado, hace demasiada calor.

Die Lage der Wohnung ist toll und auch die Assistentin Rica ist sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit.
Auch die gemalten Bilder sind sehr schön anzuschauen. Dennoch ist der Standard der Wohnung eher einfach und im Sommer ist es trotz Ventilatoren einfach sehr heiß, so dass es zumindest uns schwer gefallen ist, zu schlafen.
Wir empfanden die Wohnung für den Standard zu hoch bepreist (180 Euro die Nacht) und wir haben in Madrid eine Woche vorher für geringeres Geld in vergleichbarer Lage ein Apartment mit Klimaanlage und ohne shared facilities gehabt.
Auch wenn wir uns bewusst sind, dass unsere Einschätzung eine kritische Rückmeldung nach sich ziehen könnte, ist es uns wichtig unsere Wahrnehmung anderen Reisenden zur Verfügung zu stellen.

Staying at Arturo's place is like staying at a museum. There is something new to see even if you've looked at a spot several times. The entire apartment is filled with character and charm. The bedrooms are extremely spacious, as is the shared kitchen and bathroom. Arturo's assistant Rica was very helpful with recommendations and making us feel welcome. She kindly helped with our laundry and made our stay enjoyable. The location is absolutely perfect, right off Gran Via and within walking distance of every tourist attraction. The metro and bus stops are close by in case you need to access those as well. Overall, this was a very memorable visit and we highly recommend staying here!
Great time and lovely host

The property was exactly as described
We had a really enjoyable few days with good communication with the owner and his employee who was attentive to our needs and helped us 24/7
Thank you very much
definitely recommend this place!
Amazing place
A beautiful AirBnB with incredibly generous hosts, and located in a great part of Madrid with quick access to transit
Grazie mille!

Ev bir müzeden farksız. İçeride sanat eserleri bulunuyor bu büyüleyici. Rica ve Arturo çok ilgili insanlar. Klima yok fakat vantilatör bulunuyor. Eğer ağır bir valizinin varsa evin dördüncü katta olduğunu ve asansör bulunmadığını göz önünde bulundurun.
Good stay in Madrid. well located, comfortable, easy coordination. I recommend.

+++ emplacement idéal / 2 lits / Rica hôte d'accueil très aimable / café thé à disposition
- - - 4 étages très sportifs / chaleur nocturne importante / ventilateur bruyant

What an amazing Easter break in Madrid at Bibiana and Gigi’ place! Their flat is absolutely lovely (we loved it, the decoration was so cool). The bedroom is small but very cute and comfortable :) :). Furthermore, the flat was in the very centre of Madrid which was very convenient! Everything was just 5-10min walk! Bibiana and Gigi were unfortunately not there during our stay (they were on holiday!), but their cousin was there and she was very very nice! She gave us plenty of advice of places to go (Taberna Malaspina, Casa Patas for flamenco, Mercado San Miguel… all very good and recommended!). Bibiana and Gigi are for sure very nice people!!!! :))) They were answering our emails quickly and have been very helpful! We absolutely LOVED our stay in Madrid and will stay at their place again if we go to Madrid again! Thanks for everything! Pauline and Paul
Very nice flat and great location !!! Very easy to discover the best places of Madrid from this location.

Bibiana y Gigi son unos estupendos anfitriones, muy amables, acogedores y preocupados de sus huéspedes. La ubicación de la buhardilla es casi inmejorable, a una cuadra de la Plaza de Sol, desde donde se puede llegar a pie a la mayor parte de los puntos de interés en el centro histórico de la ciudad. Gigi hace unas pastas maravillosas.

El único pero es que la pieza es pequeña y el techo muy bajo, pero esa incomodidad se compensa con la facilidad para usar otros espacios y por la amabilidad de los anfitriones.

After visiting Madrid while staying with Bibiana, my wife and I headed over to Portugal and was scheduled to fly to Barcelona after. We forfeited our ticket to Barcelona and returned back to Madrid for another 4 days with Bibiana, Gigi and their lovely and adorable daughter, Mia.

Located less than 5 minutes walk away from Puerta Del Sol and Sol Metro as well as Plaza Mayor, you couldnt ask for anything more central. The apartment is decorated with many lovely souvenirs from their own travels from South America, to Asia and even Europe.

One point to note is that the room is up in the attic, where a little climbing is required on a daily basis, nonetheless, they have installed a very solid retractable ladder. The room has a nice window which gives you a rooftop view of the city center and also a nice breeze at night. The room and house is clean and the neighborhood is safe.

It is a bonus if you enjoy having a little girl in the house as Mia is a bundle of happiness and does not get in the way at all.

Thanks for the lovely memories Bibiana, Gigi and Mia and hope to see you all in the future.

I stayed over the weekend at Bibiana and Gigi's place, and even though it was close to the hustle and bustle of Sol, the apartment was quiet and we were able to get sleep when we wanted.

The apartment is beautiful and comfortable. I felt like it was home.

Bibiana is a gracious host. She gave good recommendations on places to see and in which restaurants to eat. I was traveling with my elderly father, and she was accommodating to his special needs. During downtime between sightseeing, I was able to relax and hang out with Bibiana and her adorable and friendly Mia.

Thanks again for a memorable time in Madrid!

Nuestra estadia en Puerta del Sol fue excelente!  La habitacion es pequena, pero para el tiempo que nosotros pasamos alli fue perfecto.   Tiene una vista espectacular de la ciudad y entra un fresquito bien rico en las noches. El apartamento esta bien situado y bien cerca  de Plaza Mayor.  Si vienes del Aeropuerto de Barajas es bien facil llegar y la parada del tren esta a solo pasos del apartamento.  Bibiana fue tremenda anfitriona y muy atenta a nuestras necesidades y a darnos direcciones para lugares que queriamos visitar.  La decoracion de su apartamento es bien preciosa y todo viene de un lugar diferente de donde han viajado.  No conocimos a su esposo porque el estaba de viaje, pero su adorada Mia es un amor y bien graciosa.  Recomendaria que se quedaran aqui y que aprovechen cada segundo de su tiempo en esta ciudad tan preciosa y con tanto que hacer.  Para la proxima me sentare con calma para poder ver todas las fotos de los lugares que han visitado ..... Gracias por el sabroso gazpacho :)

Bibiana provided a wonderful place for our stay in Madrid..the room is clean, quiet and cozy and the location is perfect!  Bibiana was helpful in providing information to the places to eat and visit.  We even visited one her favorite eating places called Malaspina for tapas.  I recommend this room for one or two people who are looking for a great host and room in Madrid.  Muchos Gracias.

Staying with Bibiana was a pleasure, especially it being our first time booking through airbnb.  Mia is such a little bundle of joy and as we only spoke with Gigi once over Skype (he works in Italy during the week) he also was very nice and helpful.  The apartment couldnt have been in a better neighborhood but was quiet to sleep at night.  We both felt safe and well taken care of!  Our only comment about the room is that we are both tall (5"7-6") so we coldnt stand up in the attic loft, this was not a problem for us but just a note.

We had a great time at Bibiana & Gigi's place!!

The apartment is really central, you can do everything by foot from there. Inside it is comfortable and very charming, beautifully decorated. The room has a nice view on the roof of Madrid.

Bibiana & Gigi are two lovely host, welcoming and open. They gave us great tips for restaurants and bars.

We recommend this place for an enjoyable stay and real life experience in Madrid.
Nous avons bien aimé notre sejour chez Gigi et Bibiana. On est au centre de Madrid. Nos hôtes, nous ont bien accueilli et nous ont bien conseillé.

Best location in the cutest flat.  We loved our stay, the flat was very clean and central to everything.  We rarely had to use the metro.  Only downside was it was hot in the attic so we ended up sleeping in the living room, which was fine :)

The location of this appartment could not be better for exploring Madrid. From Puerta del Sol you can reach almost all sights by foot. We were very happy with our stay altogether as the appartment was accomodating and clean. Since Bibiana & Gigi were not in town, we had the place to ourself.  The only drawback of our stay was that our bedroom was right under the roof, making it fairly hot. If you come to Madrid in August (the month everbody leaves the city...) you should definitely take this in to consideration.

We had a great stay at Bibiana & Gigi's. The apartment is very well located. You can pretty much walk to everywhere. The place itself is amazing. It's artistic, clean and comfortable. We didn't get a chance to meet with Bibiana & Gigi but they were always helpful and responsive. We couldn't ask for a better place to stay! Highly recommended.

We had amazing time in Madrid. The apartment is perfectly located to the museums, restaurants, walks etc. Beautiful apartment as well, Bibiana and Gigi weren't there when we stayed so we had the apartment to ourselves, but they were extremely helpful by phone beforehand, organizing the keys, and location from airport. I would highly recommend staying here

After a few weeks of my wife and I traveling through Spain, coming to Bibiana and Gigi's was an amazing experience. Bibiana immediately made us feel at home and at ease. She has a very warm personality, and we loved talking to her after our days in Madrid about our experiences, life and advice on future world travels.

The room and flat are great, and gives you a really cool view from the rooftops of Puerta Del Sol. The place is easily accesible, clean and super comfortable. I would recommend their flat anytime, and I really hope we get to see Bibiana and Madrid again soon!

Thanks you Bibiana!!

We arrived in Madrid very early in the morning but Bibiana was able to let us check in which was so nice of her.Her apartment is wonderful and well located in the middle of the town center and next to a metro station.Her daughter is a wonderful and lovely girl.Always made us smile.everything was well prepared and we got all and any info we need.I cant wait to go back to Madrid and I know exactly where I will be staying again + will recommend to all my friends who will be going to madrid to stay at their place...hope to see bibiana again and her lovely family..

A cozy but lovely apartment right at he heart of the Madrid. Its 1 min walk away from plaza de Sol, the centre point of madrid city.
Bibi and Gigi are super nice and they really let you treat their place as home. Their little girl is very sweet and cute.
If you dont mind climb up to your root top room, this is certainly a good place to stay. BTW, if you are a big guy, it can be less comfortable tho.

Bibiana is absolutely lovely! Their daughter is incredibly adorable and their house oh so quaint. I can't say enough good things. She made me feel at home, introduced me to her family, and helped me anytime I needed anything, I didn't get to meet Gigi, but I'm sure he's just as great! As for location, you couldn't be more in the heart of the city! Room is a bit small, as it is the attic, so if you have big luggage you may need to leave it downstairs as I did. The bed was very comfy, the view from the attic is wonderful and it was a delightful first place to stay in madrid. When confused on finding it...just look for the big Calvin Klein poster in the plaza and their piso is right behind that. It served as a great landmark for me.

we have a fantastic expirence for two days cause this room.
how romantic this is!!
we felt just like be a character in children's classic stroy.
if you want you would see a star at night in your bed
you wanna special experience? Don't hesitate to choice this!
SURE ENOUGH, HOST IS BEST!!!

I very much enjoyed my stay at Bibiana and Gigi's place, they certainly made me feel at home in their cozy apartment! It was nice to come home in the evening and to sit down with Bibiana (Gigi was out of town) at the dinner table for a cup of tea and the day's review (and for possible pointers for the next day). I also enjoyed meeting their little daughter Mia and Bibiana's mum (who lives nearby and  who looks after Mia occasionally), the trip to the park was a real treat! Their house is smack in the centre of Madrid, I was able to walk to the big museums (an absolute must) and to other places of interests. The metro and train are 2 minutes away (I did a trip to a little town outside Madrid) and another 2 minutes walk to a big supermarket in the nearby department store. The apartment itself is not terribly large (like so many in Madrid), it is clean and the space is very nicely and artistically decorated. The communication prior to my arrival was prompt, warm and constructive and I felt very welcome once I had arrived. Thank you Bibiana and Gigi for your hospitality and kindness, very much appreciated! I fully recommend this place, hope to see you again! Kind regards, - Rene

We had such a lovely time staying at Bibiana's during our time in Madrid. Bibiana's was a fantastic host, very respectful and enjoyable to sit and chat with, and her daughter is absolutely adorable! The location cannot be beat, and you have everything you need right at your fingertips. We would recommend Bibiana's place to anyone and would love to stay again!

A nice house with perfect location in Madrid!! You can go almost everywhere in few minutes!! And Maria was really really nice.. She gave me a lot of information which is really really useful!! And she also took me to some place which only local people go. And she is really talkative. I recommend it!!!  :)
L'appartement est effectivement très central.

Maria was very friendly and we got all informations we needed. She is very relaxed. The house is very central and the most tourist things are in walkingdistance. The room is in the basement and the temperature was very good for sleeping at night especially during the hot summer. The bed is not the one you see on the pictures. Instead it was a futon bed wich was very hart to sleep on. All in all the facilities were bacic but for us it was ok.

Maria did everything and provided all information needed that my arrival from the bus station to her home was really smooth and easy. The location of Maria's house was close to perfect for my itinerary in Madrid. I didn't need any means of public transport to visit Prado and Reina Sofia, many bars around her home and at the end I walked only 10 (15?) to catch my train. She was kind and her English is very good!

María es bastante accesible y siempre está dispuesta a ayudarte durante tu estancia. El barrio lo conoce a la perfección por lo que es una fuente infinita para aconsejarte sobre el mismo. La descripción de la habitación era lo que me esperaba si bien en la foto sale algo mejorada. En cuanto al barrio es lo mejor de todo, estar en esa casa en pleno barrio de Lavapiés es un privilegio.

Bibiana, Gigi and little Mia are wonderful, friendly and ready to help anytime!

We will suggest their place not just because of the location which is just perfect but also for the warm, cheerful and friendly welcome we received. Sure we will contact them again for our next trip to Madrid!
Bibiana and Gigi are such an incredible host!! The apartment it's beautiful in an incredible area. So glad we spend three nights there :)

Bibi y Gigi, los anfitriones, son excepcionales: amables, simpáticos y dispuestos a darte una mano. El departamento está excelentemente ubicado, con impecable comunicación a cualquier punto de Madrid. La habitación es amplia, si bien un poco incómoda para quienes pasamos cierta edad. De todos modos, lo dicho anteriormente compensa esto con creces. Lo recomiendo enfáticamente. ¡Ideal para jóvenes!

.
Bibi y Gigi, los anfitriones, son excepcionales: amables, simpáticos y dispuestos a darte una mano. El departamento está excelentemente ubicado, con impecable comunicación a cualquier punto de Madrid. La habitación es amplia, si bien un poco incómoda para quienes pasamos cierta edad. De todos modos, lo dicho anteriormente compensa esto con creces. Lo recomiendo enfáticamente. ¡Ideal para jóvenes!

We had a lovely time staying in this very lovely and quiet flat around Puerta del Sol. Bibiana was very welcoming and friendly and also her Mum was very lovely. They gave us great insider knowledge on where to go. The flat is small but everything you need is there. The flat is in a great location with many sights, good restaurants and bars all within a few minutes walk. We walked everywhere. I would recommend the flat for its location and for the warm welcome and very reasonable cost. Just consider well if you can manage the stairs and the low roof in the bedroom. We did enjoy our little nook and we really slept like babies and enjoyed it very much.

Genial, es la primera palabra que podría decir, tanto en paz que radia la casa y sus caseros...en localización que mejor que a dos pasos de dos y sin ruidos. Fácil de llegar y sin pérdidas.

Original y alternativo... me encantó.

Un adorable appartement d'artiste, chambre mansardée très bohème-romantique. Très bon accueil de Bibiana et de sa petite fille Mia ;o)
Bien que situé en plein centre (à 2 pas de sol et de la plaza mayor), la chambre est très calme car dans le toit. Gracias Bibiana y Mia!

We stayed two night's in Bibi & Gigi's nice apartment. The location is great and you are right in the middle of Madrid. You can reach basically all important locations by foot and also be at the airport in little more than 30min.
The apartment has all the necessary facilities and is well maintained (no wonder, since the hosts live there themselves). The room is right under the roof and quite cozy - especially if sunshine is falling through the window. It's perfectly fine for spending the nights while exploring the city during the days. However, if you plan to spend a considerable portion of the day inside, I guess it would be better to pick something bigger.

All in all, I can certainly recommend this location,

We spent 4 days at Bibiana´s and Gigi´s place - it was a pleasure! As everybody is saying: perfect location! Couldnt be any better! Unfortunately we couldn´t meet the hosts .. that was a pitty. But nevertheless Bbiana tried her best to make it as comfortable as possible. The apartment is quite small, but you have everything you need - I would totally recommend the place!

Perfect! Thank you so much Bibiana and Gigi!  You can not have a better location in all of Madrid! Beautiful decor and very clean.  I would stay here every time I come to Madrid.  I did not feel well and they made me feel at home, often making me dinner or lunch, fresh pasta and went out of their way to make sure I had everything!  Gigi took me on a walk through Madrid that I really enjoyed.  I feel very blessed to have found this wonderful place and to meet this beautiful family.  I would recommend anyone to stay here and will visit again!

We loved staying in Bibiana's attic, with its skylight. Bibiana, her mother and adorable daughter were extremely friendly and helpful. The neighborhood is in the center of the city and close to everything. The shower is in a separate room from the toilet, which actually turned out to be great since one person can go to the bathroom while the other is showering. The attic does have a rather steep ladder that might be a problem for people with bad knees or similar issues. All and all, though, a great place to stay.

If you're heading to Madrid and looking for somewhere affordable, convenient, relaxing and welcoming then this is the place for you. With an incredible location (so central), an awesomely quirky interior and the best hosts, who became friends of ours over our 4 day stay, we could not recommend Bibiana & Gigi's place more highly!
They also offer the best local tips on where to go and what to eat!

Enjoy!

We had an amazing time in Madrid staying at Bibiana and Gigi's place. It is situated in the very center of Madrid and really close to the metro. The room looks just like the pictures, it is small but cosy. Because the room is at the backside of the house, there was no noise from the streets whatsoever so you can sleep peacefully. Bibiana was a lovely host. She is very open to questions and willing to help you in any possible way. We would recommend this place to anyone who would like to visit Madrid!

Very characterful apartment, but the best thing is the location which couldn't be more central and you can walk everywhere. I did hit Madrid on the first really hot weekend (38 degrees), Bibiana has a fan in the room, but it might not suit people who prefer air conditioning in summer heat. Bibiana and her mother couldn't be more helpful, and Bibiana was full of great eating recommendations.

I couldn't personally know Bibiana and Gigi cause they were on vacation. Anyway Bibiana's mother waited for me to show the aparment and was kind enough to eplain me the best places in madrid. The apartment is really nice and the room offers a spectacular view over the rooftops of madrid. The location is perfect, in the very centre of the city! I would recommend this place to anyone!

I love Bibiana's place. It is very convenient location and in the center of Madrid. The most important is we felt very easy and comfortable staying there. Bibiana is very friendly and helpful. We hightly recommend this place!
Bibiana and her mother are very friendly and great hosts. Lovely and charming apartment right in the center of the city. Highly recommend staying here.

This place is a great location with wonderful hosts. The room is slightly short (tough for tall people to stand up straight), but the location and warm feel make up for the tight quarters. I give it 2 thumbs up.

Our stay with bibiana and gigi was very nice, the location is perfect for a short weekend in madrid, in walking distance to all the places to see and go out. Overall we had a nice weekend and bibiana and gigi were always around if we needed any advice or help.

Bibiana and gigi are very nice people. They made us feel at home at once and were happy to give us advice and tips about where to go. They are very open minded people and were excellent hosts. The room is quiet and the location of the place is perfect! Would stay there agin!

it was great time to stay in Bibiana's place. Bibiana is very friendly and kind. The location is super nice cuz we didn't need to take metros. Every main attractions are just nearby and very easy to reach. It was a nice experience to stay:)

Bibiana was an amazing host! Her and her mother were always willing to help with any questions or anything and they were fun and easy going to be around.

The location is the best available in my opinion in Madrid. It is right in the heart of the city besides Puerto Del Sol. From there you can basically walk anywhere.

5/5 STARS!

I hope so visit again soon!

Très bon séjour à Madrid dans l'appartement de Bibiana. En plein cœur du centre, vous avez tout ce qu'il faut à la sortie de l'immeuble. Bibiana et sa famille sont vraiment adorable, et toujours prêt à vous rendre service. La chambre est bien conçue, après avoir monté l'échelle ! J'y retournerais quand j'aurais envie d'une autre petite virée à Madrid.

El lugar esta estratégicamente ubicado para conocer los lugares más turísticos de Madrid a pie. Bibiana y su familia son excelentes anfitriones ya que nos orientaron bastante para conocer mejor la ciudad, además de verdaderamente convivir con los huéspedes haciendonos sentir realmente en casa. 5 estrellas.

Bibiana y Gigi han sido unos anfitriones encantadores, siempre atentos a todo lo que necesitáramos y que, además, nos han dado muy buenas recomendaciones acerca de la ciudad siempre que lo hemos necesitado. Si volvemos por Madrid, su preciosa casa será, sin duda, nuestra primera opción de alojamiento ya no sólo por su comodidad y localización, sino por el buen ambiente que en ella hay. 100% recomendado!

*******

Bibiana and Gigi have been the perfect hosts, always attentive to whatever we would need and also providing very good advice on nice places to visit and eat in when needed :). If we come back to Madrid, their lovely house will be our first option to stay in, not only because of its comfort and perfect location but also for its very good vibe. 100% recommended!

The apartment of Bibiana is in a strategical position for visiting Madrid. It's at walking distance from the main attractions and less than 2 minutes walking from Puerta del Sol, therefore we rarely took the public transportation. We also appreciated very much the hospitality of Bibiana and her mum, who gave us many tips and with whom we had very nice conversations.
The only criticism we can make is that the attic room is really small, you cannot stand up in it, therefore is a bit challenging to dress up or walk around. It is really only a place were you can just sleep and nothing more. Anyway, considering the price, the location and the kindness of the host it is more than an acceptable compromise!
Thank you very much and hasta luego!

Gigi y Bibiana han sido muy buenos anfitriones con nosotros. Ofrecen ayuda en cada momento y son encantadores. Nosotros hemos entrado un poco con el pié izquierdo por un malentendido causado por la página de Airbnb, pero todo ha salido muy bien y hemos tenido una estancia estupenda. Gracias!

Maria is a wonderful host. She gave us detailed instruction how to get to her house, gave us some advices what to visit.
House has a great location and a lot of interesting minutiaes inside. It's very nice and creative. Room is clean, comfortable for staying for couple nights.
Todo perfecto! La habitación preciosa como toda la casa, y Maria una chica super servicial, te lo agradezco! La pena es que se acabo! Jeje Un saludo !

Maria was such a warm and welcoming host, helped me with my luggage and showed me around the house.  I had a bit more space than expected since I was able to use a sitting room just outside my bedroom.  The neighborhood was very interesting, quite Bahamian and multicultural, as well as convenient to shopping, the Metro, and museums.  I could even walk to the train station to catch the airport shuttle.

Lo mejor de hospedarse aquí es la amabilidad y disponibilidad de María, la anfitriona, que es super atenta y flexible. El barrio está muy muy bien, la calle es tranquila y a pocos metros tienes tiendas y bares de todas clases y colores. Además se puede ir andando por todo el centro de Madrid, en mi caso solo cogí el metro una vez. La habitación está bien, la mayor pega es que da al interior del edificio y no tiene ventana, por lo que no hay mucha ventilación.
Acogida correcta! me ha esperado incluso tras retraso de avión. Muy disponible. ubicación ok, habitación funcional

Maria has a very nice place and was very accommodating. Location is very good, close to metro and walking distance to a couple great markets. Not as touristy as the area to the north, which I liked. The only thing I didn't enjoy about this particular room is that it has no windows. But the rest of the apartment is comfortable, and there's even a nice living room with a projector and beanbags if you want to have a movie night. Thanks for the great time, Maria.
Maria is so good and kindness host!! She play with my son.She taught me way to plaza and station. Location is good!! Near the center of Madrid and so good town"lavapies"thank you!

The stay at Marias flat was fine. You can use the kitchen (which i didnt do:) ) and you can walk to puerto del sol or latina by Walk. The quarter is not high class or gentrificated but its cheep and always full of people.

The room was clean and so the bathroom. You also have a big extra room for hanging around.

Maria was nice to me and told all i wanted to know.
Everything was perfect ! Thank you so much Maria for your hospitality :)

Maria es una gran anfitriona, la habitación es como la muestra el anuncio, el piso se encuentra muy bien ubicado ya que todo queda cerca. La casa es cálida, las infusiones de Maria son deliciosas, solo tengo agradecimientos por haberme recibido en su casa y ser tan amable.

We had an amazing time in Maria's place! We never used plunked transportation once, everything was a short walk and easily navigable. The room was clean, no windows but it did have access to a patio outside. The room would stay dark and is very quite so set an slam if you have a tendency to sleep in!

María fue encantadora desde el primer momento, muy amable y dispuesta a ayudar en lo que fuera necesario. No obstante, no puedo recomendar la habitación por ciertas pegas: la cama/futón era súper dura e incómoda; hay obras en el mismo edificio y en los adyacentes y las obras comienzan temprano, la habitación dice estar insonorizada pero no es verdad, se escucha todo; da a un patio interior súper sucio que provoca que, al abrir la puerta, entre todo al interior. La casa tiene mucho encanto, pero creo que es cara para la calidad de la misma.

Maria is a great host and she'll make you feel right at home.
Her place is perfectly located from which to explore Madrid. All in walking distance. Recommend it highly!

Nice house in a great location!! It is just in the center, very close to metro station and even you can walk everywhere if you want. Maria was kind and friendly. It was a pleasure to meet her. Thank you for everything Maria :)
Excelente atención, lugar cerca del todo. .. y lo mas inportante.... tranquilo.!!! Gracias María por todo!

Der Aufenthalt bei Maria war durchaus angenehm. Sie ist eine sehr bemühte, hilfreiche und freundliche Gastgeberin. Dies trägt zu einem positiven Wohngefühl bei.
Die Lage der Unterkunft ist mitten im Herzen der Stadt, umgeben von vielen kleinen Bars und Lokalen. Es entspricht eher einem Studenten- Viertel. Darüber hinaus kommt man von dort aus ohne Probleme überall hin: zu Fuß und mit der Metro.
Das Zimmer ist angenehm ruhig, da es im Souterrain liegt und nicht zur Straße hin zeigt. Es wirkt auf dem Bild etwas geräumiger und, das sollte man unbedingt wissen, es hat kein Fenster. Dafür jedoch eine Tür zu einem keinen, betretbaren Hof. Somit ist es dunkel, allerdings hält man sich bei Stadturlauben nicht allzu lange in seinem Zimmer auf. Die Küche bietet "zur Not" eine schöne "Ausweichmöglichkeit".

La casa de Maria me gustó un montón, la decoración es muy original y acogedora. La zona muy central, cerca de la estación de Atocha para coger el AVE, el museo Reina Sofía y en el barrio de Lavapies donde hay muchos bares, restaurantes y sitios interesantes. Maria me dio un montón de consejos buenos donde ir para comer, escuchar música y mas, así que pude disfrutar mucho de la zona! Gracias por la estancia!

It was very nice living in Maria's house. The place is perfect for all sightseeing trips because it is located in a very cool and central neighborhood, near to the subway and buses. The room is small but comfy and maybe the most quiet room in Madrid, which is nice after a long day of walking through the city! Maria is a friendly host and very helpful with check in and out. Love to see you again!

Maria was very kind and welcoming. She greeted me at the door and showed me around the house. She was also very caring. The neighborhood is great. This listing is in a perfect place to explore Madrid.

Maria was so kind and welcoming. We communicated before my arrival on how to meet up and exchange keys and her welcoming me to the AirBnB, and she asked about my train arrival times so she could make sure she was home. My friend and I ended up missing our train and had to catch a later one, but had no way of communicating and she was waiting for us at the AirBnB the whole time!
She also recommended to us an amazing cute restaurant in the neighborhood, which is very authentic and homey.
The apartment is really cool and nicely decorated, and very clean. The Wi-Fi is strong which I feel like is important when you are traveling. We were put in the back room, which was really nice and charmingly decorated and the main apartment Wi-Fi apparently isn't strong there, so Maria had a separate Wi-Fi for that room which was nice!
The AirBnB is close to a few metro stations on different lines, which is very convenient. Every cafe and restaurant in the neighborhood seemed very authentic and not touristy. I remember on my last night I forgot to get a postcard and walked around for 30min near the apartment and couldn't find any souvenir shops - unfortunately I couldn't find a postcard but that also just shows how authentic and untouched this neighborhood is!
There were also a lot of cool and hip bars in this neighborhood.
Also Maria is such a great host. We had a very early morning flight and so she called us a taxi at 5am.
Such a sweet woman and if I'm ever in Madrid again I would hope to be hosted by Maria again! :)

We had the pleasure of experiencing Marias's hospitality and nice apartment. Maria was incredibly flexible when our flight was slightly delayed. Thank you Maria. The area is really nice and charming. and we found many good restaurants and bars nearby. There was a nice kitchen that we shared with Maria and the other guests. The room was nice, but there was no windows to let the sunlight in. Instead there was a door to a small patio that we could open to get some fresh air. Compared to the price everything was fine. Maria was very welcoming and invited us to different things in the neighbourhood that she also took part in.
Inolvidable , sobretodo por la ubicación de la casa y por el encanto y amabilidad de la dueña María. Tiene un par de habitaciones de ensueño. Gracias. Volveremos

Maria is really a very good host. Waiting for us when we arriving and Tell us many information about the city. The room is really beautiful just like the picture shows. And with really good location, 2 minutes walking to the subway station and almost can go most of the famous places just by walking. We had really a very good time here.

Maria is a great host. very welcoming- and also great with my kids. Clean place, location was great, and loved the door to the patio for the fresh air in our room. Also kids were feeling at home right away.
the apartment is an experience by itself- very interesting build. Makes you feel living in Madrid right away.
thank you!

The host Maria is really nice, the place is centrally located and you find everything you need nearby. Everything is clean, the kitchen you share is fully equiped and the host is always happy to give you some local recommendations. I had a nice two weeks stay here.

Great location, clean and spacious area. The only issue is that the air to the apartment came from the porch which was connected to my room. So I had to keep both the door to the house and the door to the porch door open the whole time, which was fine except the neighbors were loud one night. But headphones fixed that. The rest of the amenities definitely make up for that, definitely a highly recommended apartment. Maria was kind and very helpful and warm.

María es muy símpatica y te hace sentir como en casa, echamos buenos ratos de conversación en  estos días :) . La casa es muy bonita,  la habitación es bastante íntima, y los espacios comunes muy agradables. Estuve genial por allÍ!

Maria was a really lovely host, she has a very big heart, and is very generous. I had a really nice month with her! I love the neighbourhood, and the house is very well equipped. Thank you so much Maria!

Estupendo fin de semana y gran anfitriona Maria. Muy atenta.
La habitación perfecta y la casa super tranquila en un barrio céntrico que permite ir andando a cualquier parte del centro de Madrid sin problemas.

Maria is an absolutely fantastic host. I stayed in her home for a number of months and it couldn't have been better. The room is very private with your own patio. There is a beautiful glass door separating the bedroom from the terrace, creating a peaceful and relaxing ambiance. It’s the perfect place to read and have a coffee. The interior of the bedroom and the entire house is beautifully decorated with many items sourced by Maria from around the world.

Outside the bedroom is a lovely living room with a sofa and television. It's very comfortable, good for both working and relaxing.

The kitchen is stunning and fully equipped. Perfect to share a meal and conversation.

I highly recommend staying with Maria; the neighborhood is in my opinion absolutely the best place to be. There is a great little Cinema just a minute’s walk away, playing a nice selection of classics, film noir, nouvelle vague etc. Additionally, it is just ten minutes walk to The Reina Sofia, The Prado and Retiro Park. Lavapies, La Latina and El Rastro (the famous market on sundays) are also just minutes away walking.
Maria and the other roommates were really nice to us. The situation is very convenient and close to everything. Thank you for your help and your kindness!

J'étais déjà venu à l'été 2014 chez Maria et rien n'a changé (ou presque, le nouveau canapé est vraiment cool !). Quartier agréable avec des spots à tapas recommandés par Maria (testés et approuvés). Si vous voulez un conseil, elle est toujours là. Et pour dormir, pas un bruit. Bref, on recommande !

We loved staying here. Our room had a private patio and next to a common living room. The room was comfortable and the restroom was close by. The decor was super cool and close to the metro. Great eateries in the community.

Maria is extremely sweet! The room is exactly how it looks in the picture and has an out door space as well which was nice. The bed is super comfortable. The living room is beautiful as well with comfy seating and pillows. The bathroom is small but functional. The kitchen is perfect and Maria provided me with a good amount of space for my own food. There is always coffee and her coffee machine makes a great cup. The wifi is great throughout the house. She keeps the house very clean as well which I appreciated.  Maria also provided me with some day, and night, life suggestions to do which all turned out to be great fun! She is an awesome person and her home is beautiful!

Nice and very clean appartment in the heart of Lavapies.
Maria is so sweet and really helpful for any recomendations needed.
I'll be back for sure when I'll be in Madrid again!

We had really a lovely stay a Madrid thanks to Maria! Maria is a very warm, sweet and helpfull person. She provided us city maps, documentation, and gave us many tips on what to do every day in Madrid and where to eat related to our desires! The house is really charming, the kitchen is spacious and fully equipped ; we had our own place in the fridge and the cupboard. Our bedroom was nice, very quiet and closed to a lovely living room. We felt like at home and had nice conversations with Maria. The area is friendly, full of life and close to everything, you have just between 10 and 20 minutes walk to the most interesting places from the city.
We highly recommend staying with Maria!

Fue la primera vez que usamos la aplicación y sin lugar a duda la volveríamos a utilizar, Maria fue muy amable al tomarse el tiempo para darnos informacion de la ciudad así como un mapa, eso nos ayudó a sentirnos más orientados, la habitación realmente cómoda con lo necesario tal como estaba descrito. Lo mejor la ubicación fuimos siempre caminando a todos los lugares eso fue lo mejor así que 100% recomendable.
Bibiana and Gigi are amazing hosts! Very accommodating and genuinely friendly. A cozy place to stay in a great area....nice place to come home to. Would definitely recommend!
La ubicación es perfecta, era una habitación acogedora, limpia y ordenada. Bibiana y su hija fueron encantadoras con nosotros.En todo momento nos ayudaron en todo.

All in all it was a beautiful stay in Madrid. Maria is very friendly and nice. The flat is like in the pictures and well located, near to Atocha station, so you can reach everything easily. There are also many cafes and supermarkets around. In case you are interested in Flamenco, you are just 2 minutes from the most important and known Flamenco school in the world. Thank you Maria for your hospitality and nice conversations!

Maria was very easy to contact and so friendly and helpful---  stayed in her downstairs (shared bath) room--- cosy, good firm bed with comfy cotton sheets! No window, but a door to private indoor courtyard lets in some natural light. Wonderful big eat-in kitchen.  Location is perfect--right in "happening" Lavapies ---- lots of cafés, tapas bars and easy walk to Prado, Retiro, etc. But best was how welcoming Maria was and how quite the room was for sleeping!

María was the perfect host for my mother that was traveling alone and is not used to travel. She helped her in every way possible. To my mother it felt she knew her for a long time since the first moment. The room was clean and quiet.

Maria is a lovely host. She welcomed us in and gave us great information about the city. This made it really easy for us to get around with the map she gave us. Maria is a nice woman who was always available to help us with any queries we had.

The room in the photos is what you get. It feels very private and spacious. The place is very central and easy to walk to places like Atocha and Sol which have great connections to other parts of the country. Great value for your money, we definitely recommend this place!

La casa de María es, realmente, un hogar. Junto a mi novia nos fuimos a vivir a Madrid, y estuvimos las 3 primeras semanas en la habitación en lo de María. Y nunca dejamos de sentirnos como en casa.
La casa es muy linda y acogedora, la habitación donde estuvimos es bien fresquita, ideal para el verano, y muy tranquila. La cocina está muy equipada y buena, y la ubicación es ideal. Entre Antón Martín y Lavapies, se puede ir en menos de 3' a cualquiera de los dos barrios, muy diversos y muy interesantes culturalmente a la vez.
Sea para una corta estadía o para un tiempo más prolongado, la recomiendo 100%.
Y sobre todo, a su anfitriona, María, con quien hemos compartido grandes charlas y nos ha guiado bastante en nuestra inducción a vivir en esta ciudad genial que es Madrid. Más que agradecidos.

We stayed in Madrid for four days while back packing around Spain. This was our first stop and really made it easy to transition into the rest of Spain. We had an amazing time in Madrid and can not wait to get back. Maria was very hospitable. She is very knowledgeable about the city and helped us plan our trip around Madrid. She had very good tips and made it easy. We got our own keys and could come and go whenever we wanted. The apartment is very close to everything and we could walk everywhere. We had an amazing time and would use this AirBnb again.

María es na excelente persona y muy profesional en su trabajo de anfitriona. La casa tiene lo suficiente para estar cómodo. Cada día se esfuerza más por ofrecer mejores estancias.  El barrio es verdaderamente paradigmático de lo que es Madrid. Nos quedamos muy a gusto por la ubicación de la casa. Caminando se llega a muchos sitios de interés y, si de tapas y trago se trata, hay para escoger.

Maria is lovely! And is a very nice host where you can have interesting conversation with too:)
The room is Beautiful and has like the whole house a very cosy ambient and the room is fresh especially with it being very warm in Madrid, so slept very good.
The neighbourhood is like a little village, so very confortable and central (15min from central station Atocha)


Maria un abrazo for you!

X Jeroen

Maria was a fantastic host. Very friendly and welcoming, and she gave great recommendations as well. Perfect location for exploring Madrid, and the room stays cool even on the hottest of summer days. Wish I was able to stay longer!
Maria was an excellent host. The communication before arriving was really helpful. She was available for us when ever we needed and her place was lovely. Just a short walk to Sol.

This is a beautiful house in the heart of the old Madrid. Should be experienced!
There are different rooms/options to choose from, all of Maria's listings are in the same house.
I really loved staying here: you're in a cool, quiet place still meters from bars etc, and very close to Prado/Sofia/Thyssen. Maria was very helpful when I arrived and then if I had questions or needed suggestions during my stay.

Maria es una persona excepcional. Nos sentimos súper cómodas en todo momento. La casa está en una zona desde la cual puedes acceder a todos los lugares de interés. Durante los 5 días sólo cogimos el metro en una ocasión!
La habitación tiene acceso a un patio y es muy fresca. Tuvimos muy buena temperatura.

Fascinado y encantado de quedarme en la casa de Maria!! Ella es una persona genial!!! D buen ambiente y super amable!! T explica todo lo d la casa!! T da indicaciones de como moverte en Madrid!! Mi cuarto fue increible!!! Quiero regresar por siempre a la casa de Maria!! Muy limpio, privado, con una decoracion q se merece todos los puntos del mundo!!
Great neighborhood, in the center with nice restaurants and bars around. Maria is a very nice host!

María es muy atenta y está en todo! La casa está muy bien y tiene una ventaja fabulosa para el verano (tan caluroso en Madrid), y es que es muy fresca. Se duerme de maravilla y sin ningún ruido, a pesar de estar muy céntrico.
Es un espacio que recomiendo 100x100!!

It's such a great experience to stay at Maria's. She is so helpful, giving me all kinds of information. She even lent me a bike which brought so much fun! The restaurant she recommended is also perfect! Thank you, Maria!
BEST STAY EVER! I consider Maria like my aunt, very wise, knowledgeable, friendly and gave me the best information to make my stay in Madrid very memorable
Great stay at Maria's place! She is a very good host and add much value to her comfy house with plenty of advices and recommendations to visit  Madrid well.

María me hizo sentir muy cómodo nada más llegar. La casa es muy acogedora y la ubicación es muy buena: un barrio agradable, con vida y con muchos restaurantes. La recomiendo. Mi experiencia en Madrid ha sido muy positiva.

Maria is great, she would do as much as possible to help you and guide you thou Madrid !
She makes a difference in anybody stay.
Fantastic sound and light isolation in bedroom ! Great rest in a busy city

Este hospedaje realmente nos fascinó! María hizo que nos sintiéramos cómodos y relajados, desde el momento en que llegamos. La casa es muy hermosa, tiene detalles que la hacen particular y llamativa. Además de contar con ambientes bien espaciosos.
La habitación super amplia, cómoda y privada. La decoración tanto de la habitación como de la casa en general es muy original.
La ubicación también es un punto muy positivo, esta en una zona segura, con varios bares y muy cerca del metro y de los autobuses. También es accesible para encontrarse con puntos destacados de la ciudad.
Esta casa nos encantó, tiene una energía genial! Sin dudas lo recomendamos y volveríamos!

I lived in Maria's house for a month during my stay in Madrid.  I really feel like this was my home and always felt very comfortable in it.  María (the host) is an amazing person, she really has achieved a very harmonious atmosphere inside the house.  As a host, she always made sure that everything was going well.  She is also very friendly and helpful with anything regarding the house or the city, I will always remember having great conversations with her just about any topic.  Regarding the house, I can really say that the pictures represent very well what you can expect from it.  The kitchen is fully equipped and very spacious, pretty much the center of the house.  The house is very charming overall, and barrio Lavapiés (where it's located) is a lovely district very near Sol and to pretty much everything around Madrid.
