This place is truly amazing, 100% would recommend it.
Me encanto el piso buena zona en El Centro para moverse . María una persona muy amable y te viene siempre encontra para ponértelo más fácil . Volveremos . Gravias :)
Maria was absolutely lovely and the place was in an ideal location. Great value for money!

La zona es muy centrica, ideal para estar cerca del metro y de los puntos principales de la ciudad (Atocha, Sol, El Retiro, Plaza Mayor, Gran Via) a todos se puede llegar en una caminata de 10/15 minutos. La casa tiene todo en la cocina, la pieza es comoda y Maria y sus amigas siempre están disponibles para ayudar con lo que uno necesite
Un lugar ideal para estar como en casa, completamente recomendable!!! Gracias infinitas María !!!
Favoloso soggiorno di 2 mesi per lavoro... come sentirsi a casa!!!!

Maria was a wonderful host and very helpful. I had an issue with my tooth on my 3rd day there and she put me in touch with a good dentist to help and also very kindly fitted some more hanging space for the room which I did not expect at all.
The location of the apartment is great, the room being in the basement stays cool even with the hot summer temperatures that begun during my stay. Kitchen is well equipped. The other guests were also very friendly.
A great stay overall. Thanks Maria

The place is located very close to the station. The interior has nice vintage vibe. All the necessary travel goods are avaialbe in the house (towels, hair dryer). Maria was helpful and everything was well organized. I would come back again to this place and recommend it to friends.
María es una persona muy agradable y cercana. Te ayuda para k te sientas cómoda. Me encantó la ubicación de la casa y la limpieza de esta.

Perfect spot for a solo trip! This little room downstairs in Maria's place was quiet, cool at night, and comfortable. The internet worked well, and the small private patio (at the bottom of a decent-sized air shaft) was a good spot to work, read, and hang laundry to dry. The main room in the house, the kitchen, has a door that opens directly onto the street. It's here you'll run into and chat with other people staying at Maria's—she rents a couple of rooms on Airbnb. Everyone was friendly during my stay, and it was nice to come home and occasionally find someone to talk with. Close to transit, but most things you'll want to see are, at the very most, a 20-minute walk away. Recommended!

I had a great 5 weeks staying in Maria's home. First of all, Maria is a very kind lady who is always there to help. She was very responsive to any problems I had. The house is unique and inviting. My room was pretty big and had a small, private outdoor courtyard. Lastly, the neighborhood of Lavapies is a very vibrant place to live, plenty of bars and restaurants!
La casa es linda, silenciosa, y está muy bien cuidada. La ubicación es perfecta. María está muy pendiente de que todo funcione y disponible en todo momento. Muy recomendable.
Maria es una gran anfitriona, te da la seguridad y la ayuda necesaria para un visitante novato en Madrid, atenta en todo momento y con muy buenas recomendaciones de vida cultural y social.
Excelente ubicación. El cuarto es genial para verano,es muy fresco pero no le entra el sol (por lo mismo es fresco). Muy recomendable!

Logement spartiate sans fenêtre bruyant
Salle de bain vétuste partagée
Patio inutilisable
Logement très très bruyant
Just what I was expecting. Great value!

Location, location, location!
Lavapies is so bohemian & full of local bars! Everything is within walking distance! It’s near to San Fernando market & the Atocha train station. I got a glimpse of living like a local. Thank you Maria for making my stay so homey.

Súper atenta, muy limpio todo , súper cálida , me sentí como en casa .
Excelente la ubicación súper céntrico .
Sin dudarlo volvería a llegar 👌

lindo lugar para quedarse, tuve una estadia larga y siempre me senti muy comoda. El barrio es hermoso con cafes y restaurantes cercanos, es muy facil acceso al transporte publico y con lugares importantes como parque el retiro.
La casa de Maria es muy agradable y muy limpia, es una gran host!
Muy cómodo, me seti como en casa
beautiful space in a lovely area! Maria was so kind and checked in alot to make sure I enjoyed it. I had a great time 🩷

María, Chelo y Draco son adorables, con don de gente!
Algo muy importante, las personas que se alojan en el lugar son increíbles!

Un lugar muy bien ubicado y cómodo, todo muy limpio y María súper atención,
Gracias por todo, espero volver pronto
Maria siempre atenta a mis necesidades, la habitación muy limpia y ordenada. Agradeci mucho que contaba con baño privado y la zona es muy tranquila, pude descansar comodamente.

Maria est une hôte très accueillante, toujours disponible et souriante.
Nous avons passé un excellent séjour chez elle , l’emplacement de la maison est impeccable on a tout fait a pied.
Mention spéciale pour Draco 🤩

Maria è stata super gentile e disponibile.
Posizione molto centrale.
Camera pulita e casa molto ordinata.

muchas gracias por todo!!
mis amigas estaban tan contentan,
arigato!,

yoka

Bumpy initial communication on my behalf first because it was last minute and second because my phone died. Once communication was re-established we got the ball rolling. Both hosts were home to receive me and the rest was smooth. Their taverna recommendation was the most Madrid thing I experienced. I would just say thanks for making my stay comfortable.

These are the KINDEST hosts! They were so warm and welcoming to me and made my stay in Madrid delightful.

The location of this apartment cannot be beat. It's wonderful.

The only thing to keep in mind is that the actual space where the airbnb guest will sleep is in a little loft/furnished attic above the rest of the studio. It's only accessible by a ladder and the roof is quite low there so it's impossible to stand up straight. You kind of have to scoot around the whole time. Just something to keep in mind for guests who are less physically nimble and don't want to be climbing up a ladder.

That being said, I would still really recommend this place as you really can't get a better location and the hosts are so nice.
We had a nice time in Madrid and liked Bibiana and her family very much! She even got us a reservation at a local Hammam to relax a bit. (recommend it to everybody!!)

This comfortable little space is RIGHT in the heart of Madrid, just a few steps out of Puerta del Sol - close enough that it isn't a hassle, but far enough away that you don't hear the noise! We definitely recommend staying here, just note that room access requires climbing a ladder to your own private space.

The bijou loft space is in he roof of the 5th floor apartment in this old building and you can look out into the rooftops of the old centre. It has a lift and the place is very clean. We were met by Bibiana's mum who showed us the ladder which takes you to the roof. She also kindly told us about the local food market which is wonderful. The location is right in the centre. We didn't need to take the metro once

Bibiana and Gigi were very kind and gracious hosts. We enjoyed our short trip and discussions with them.

The apartment is right in the middle of the city, and it was a great place to stay while visiting the sites of Madrid.

Nous avons été très bien reçus chez Bibiana & Gigi,
Très joli appartement d'artistes, placé au coeur de Madrid.
Merci pour les bons conseils et l'accueil chaleureux.

We had a memorable three days in Madrid. The house is located in the center of Madrid, the traffic is very convenient. The room was clean and quiet, so cool. Bibiana's mom  speake  French, they are very enthusiastic and told us the local cuisine, it is recommended .thx a lot:)
Best location ever! Loved our stay in Madrid.

The room was clean and beautiful, and the location can't be beat-- close to everything! We walked everywhere, never needed to take the subway during our stay. We never met Bibiana or Gigi, but Bibiana's sweet mother welcomed us and checked us in. The loft is small and cozy with a tilted ceiling-- we enjoyed the views from their roof window.
Great location. Very hospitable hosts.  Room is small but it's as advertised.  Again great location though.

Merci pour tout! On n'aurait pas pu rêver mieux, que ce soit pour l'emplacement ou l'accueil. L'appartement très agréable est idéalement situé, à proximité de la puerta del sol. Bibiana a pu nous donner de très bons conseils et adresses pour notre séjour. Très bon moment passé à Madrid
Excelente forma de conocer Madrid. Muy buenas anfitrionas. Un placer conocerlas. Recomendable para viajar en familia.

Notre séjour de 2 nuits se sera très bien passé, l'appartement est vraiment situé en plein centre, mais au calme. Pas de problème pour le partage de l'appartement et des sanitaires, on se serait presque crus seuls.

La chambre du bas a une salle de bain privée magnifiquement rénovée et un patio joliment fleurit.
Il n'y a aucun bruit de la rue, ce qui est un grand plus car l'immeuble est en pleins centre, donc vous avez les avantages des commerces et de l'accessibilité à pied des plus beaux points d'intérêts de Madrid, sans le bruit ambiant. A savoir que j'y ai logé entre janvier et février donc les voisins ayant des fenêtres qui donnent sur le patio ne les ouvrent pas à cette saison.
Maria est à l'écoute et très réactive. Le lave-linge fonctionne très bien, et vous avez à votre disposition un panier à linge, une étendoir, et aussi un autre panier pour le linge sale.
Le coin salon m'a permit de travailler dans un calme absolu et dans un ambiance cosy.
La cuisine est très chaleureuse, j'y ai fait de belles rencontres avec les personnes qui occupaient les autres chambres.
Maria es muy amable, además de un hogar precioso, también bien tuvimos conversaciones increíbles y muy interesantes.

My week stay with Maria felt like a home away from home. She was so personable, gave me a tour as soon as I walked through the door at 9pm just fresh off of my flight. She explained exactly where everything was that I would need during my stay. The fridge had a space for me to put my things from the grocery store, there was a place for my snacks in the pantry, and the room felt like it’s own little apartment within the house. Lots of privacy with my own living room area, bathroom, patio and lots of space to put my belongings.
The bed was extremely comfortable, there was a heater in the bathroom and room (for cold days / nights). There was a blow dryer in the bathroom so I could do my hair, good wifi & extension cords to plug in multiple things in the bedroom & living room area. If I wanted to sleep in, things were quiet and comfortable. If I wanted to socialize, I would bump into her or the other house mates in the kitchen area. My favorite part of all was the doggie named Dragon. 😊
I liked the appartment, Maria was a great host, would book again
Maria was a great host and the accomodation was amazing. All in all great place to explore Madrid from!

This is a very special place! I stayed at Maria's from mid-May to mid-July and did not want to leave. The location is perfect--in between metro stops for two lines, surrounded by amazing restaurants, bars and cultural gems like Cines D'ore. The kitchen is shared and extremely well equipped. The bedroom, living room, bath and patio are all completely private. Because it's on the ground floor, the bedroom stays cool even when Madrid is boiling hot. And it's quiet--you get zero street noise. Maria is lovely and always quick to respond to any messages. I could not recommend this place more.
The place is Nice and the location is perfect! The family was welcoming! Thank You!

5th Floor (top floor) of a good located apartment building (incl. elevator)  in quiet downtown Madrid. Very friendly and helpful people. The apartment is small. Access to guest bedroom is primitive. Under the roof of de bedroom there is no possibility to stand upright. This requires a certain physical agility. The bed consists of mattresses on the floor.  Basic bathroom. It's all clean. For us a perfect spot to explore Madrid. Puerta del Sol as well as Plaza Mayor (a.o.metro station) are within 100 meters. If you are looking for a basic accommodation in Madrid downtown we definitely recommend.

The experience with Bibiana was exceptional. The apartment is located near most attractions in Madrid. Delighted to be hosted by them and also she was nice enough to help us in getting a Taxi to the next location.

Traveller seeking a nice experience should give this place a serious consideration!
It is a nice little room in the center of Madrid. Very nice people and a addorable daughter!

The house is strategically located in the heart of the city with many restaurants and shops around. A metro station is just less than 5 min walk away. Bibiana is  really friendly, helpful and is ever willing to share her knowledge and advice about Madrid. She is one of the best hosts I've met so far and also a really nice person to chat with. Also, the attic house is well-decorated and we had a wonderful experience staying there. It is really clean and comfortable and will definitely recommend this place to Madrid travellers!

The apartment is really nice, clean, and ideally located in the heart of Madrid. We were able to walk to the most important places of interest and only took the metro once. Bibiana & Gigi gave us a warm welcome, and are very friendly and helpful. The only criticism I can make is that the room ceiling is so low that it made me feel  claustrophobic on the first night (on the 2nd night I left the roof window wide open, so I was ok. But then I was a bit annoyed by the street noise). I definitely recommend this spot for a week-end.
Friendly host and nice location. Had a good time!

Bibiana is very nice person and a good host. Apartment is very close to SOL.We liked our staying. Instructions were perfect. We have reached there easily. She was not there when we arrived but doormen helped us. We met Bibiana's mother and sister. They were so nice people as well.

Bibiana was a great host! We had a lovely time in Madrid, and it was largely due to the amazing location of this apartment. Bibiana did not hesitate to provide us with anything we needed and helped to make sure we found the place. Thank you Bibiana!

Emplacement idéal (à 2 pas de Sol dans une rue plutôt calme).
Les photos n'ont rien à avoir avec la réalité (vous pouvez diviser par 4 pour les dimensions réelles par rapport à ce que vous voyez sur les photos).
La chambres est très petite, sous les combles (quand il fait 40 degrés et que le ventilateur ne marche pas ... C'est rude). Ne pas faire plus d'1m50 sinon vous ne pouvez pas être debout dans la chambre (et éviter de vous lever la nuit trop brusquement, je me suis pris une poutre ... Ça m'a rendormie directe).
L'hôte est peu aimable (n'espérez pas lui demander des conseils de visite ou autre ....).
1ère fois que je tente le concept airbnb, j'ai testé pour pouvoir échanger avec l'hôte mais c'est loupé !
Bref à part l'emplacement, aucune utilité de s'y rendre.
Great location and really beautiful apartment!!!

Bibiana and Gigi have a really lovely apartment and there is a beautiful view from the room. We arrived quite late after our flight arrived and really appreciate that they made arrangements so to ensure that we could receive the key. Would definitely recommend staying with them! The location is amazing!

Me a gustado mucho estar con mi hija en la casa de Bibi, ella es muy atenta y hemos pasado unos dias muy tranquilos en su apartamento con toda su confianza...su piso tiene muchas obras artisticas, y las vigas del techo me gustaron mucho...
Es muy centrico y eso esta bien, porque con el calor que hace en estas fechas en Madrid se agradece volver y descansar al medio dia..es pequeñito, pero con encanto.
Ademas Bibi, nos dejó estar mas tiempo, me gustó su flexibilidad...yo recomiendo a Bibi y su piso.

Bibiana was a very pleasant host with a lovely apartment home. The location is perfect for exploring the city, a 1 minute walk from the Puerta del Sol square. The attic room is very nice, the only drawback being that the ceiling is quite low in places. Overall we had a great stay.

Though I wasn't home enough to interact with them too much, Bibiana and Gigi were great, friendly hosts. Their apartment is quiet despite having numerous shops, bars, and restaurants around it. For me, the location can't be beat. I was able to walk everywhere that I wanted to go, as the farthest attraction on my to-do list was just less than 30 minutes away walking. The room is small but cozy, as described in the listing. This turned out to be the perfect place to stay for a few days in Madrid. Thank you!

Love the location
Shower and Bathroom was clean
Love the view from the attic

Me he sentido como en casa por el ambiente familiar que transmitieron los anfitriones, lástima que mi hija no tuviera más tiempo para jugar con la peque de los anfitriones. La casa se ha correspondido plenamente con la información que a priori había leído de ella. Muy buen gusto en la decoración, una casa pequeña y coqueta con una excelente ubicación.

This apartment is situated in an amazing location which makes it a perfect home base for just about any trip to Madrid. We were able to walk to all of the major attractions and even though the apartment was located in a busy area the room was always quiet enough to have a restful sleep.
Due to the gracious host and location this room is highly recommended.
Note that we stayed in the attic space and that the pictures of the room are accurate. The ceilings in the room are rather low but if you enjoy quirky spaces that are comfortable you will not regret your decision to stay with Bibiana.

Tutto perfetto!! Gente simpatica, gentile e disponibile al confronto culturale, sociale.
La casa è carinissima ed ospitale.
プラサデソルにほど近く観光の拠点としては申し分ない。BinianaもGigiもホスピタリティに溢れており、英語もＯＫ。高さのない屋根裏部屋であること、トイレや洗面所などが家族と家族と共有であること(家族が出かけた日中はリビングなども自由に使える)、それらのことを理解した上で利用するならとてもいいと思います。

Great little Good use of space but you can see that in the photos, so no surprises. The decor is very cool, arty, funky and delightful in all of that. Character and atmosphere - you won't get this in a hotel! The view from the attic is cool, stretching over rooftops to church towers and domes. Beautiful. Scampering up a ladder to the bedroom adds to the charm. Wouldn't hesitate to recommend the apartment or the host.

Bibiana's and Gigi's place is very well located. They are easy going and the apt is well organised. The room is upstairs, as seen in the pictures and there's a retractable ladder. The decoration is very nice too and i got good recommendations of places to eat.
It's a really good location and very quiet place where in a little alley at very centre in the city. And we got some very good recommend from owner.

My hosts were exceptionally warm and inviting people. The apartment was exacting as they described it, both in photos and in text. The neighborhood was rich and diverse just as they said in their listing.
Litet trevligt loft i en fin lägenhet. Läget i Madrid kunde inte ha varit bättre. Bibiana är en mycket trevligt värd och vi hade ingenting att att klaga på under vår vistelse.

Delightful hosts, friendly and welcoming, cheerful and happy and extremely polite. It was more fun for us to spend time in Madrid with their expert local knowledge.
The location of the flat is superb. We could walk almost everywhere and yet, although so close to the main central Plaza Sol, it was quiet at night.
The flat was really lovely, clean and comfortable, elegantly decorated, quite boho and full of visual interest.
Ceiling very low in part of the sleeping room, but not a big issue for us. Perhaps more tricky for taller guests.
Highly recommend, but be aware of the low ceiling in the attic bedroom.

Excellent location and lovely hosts. Gigi and Bibiana will give you all the space in their home and are very flexible in arranging things during your stay. The private bedroom is small but cosy and the flat is very clean throughout. I'd certainly recommend Gigi and Bibiana as hosts!

Bibiana was warm, welcoming, and very accommodating and considerate. The apartment is very unique and wonderfully decorated. This is a great spot from which to explore Madrid, as it is right in the middle of the city, surrounded by tons of sights, shops, bars, and restaurants, but the apartment is high enough up that you still get some peace and quiet from the room. As is shown in the photos, there is not much space to stand in the guest room, so we'd recommend the room for guests who want to get out and explore the city (which is right outside the door!) rather than spend a lot of time in the room.

Es la primera vez que usamos airbnb, la familia es superamable y feliz. Nos recomienda los sitios buenos y nos introduce como llegamos allí . Estamos muy contentas aquí. Aunque es un piso pequeño, pero es muy especial y limpio, nos gusta mocho! Y esta situado en el centro de Madrid. Lo recomendamos! :)

Charming and original apartment that couldn't be situated in a more central location. Bibiana is incredibly accommodating and a lovely host, which made for a very relaxing and enjoyable stay with them. Absolutely recommended!!

Bibi es super cálida y su casa también. Ubicada a pasos de Puerta del Sol te permite estar en el centro de todo pero con una tranquilidad que es asombrosa. Si tienen la suerte de hospedarse cuando Patricia la mama de Bibi este disponible para ayudarlos a recorrer Madrid la experiencia con ellas sera extraordinaria

We didn't have the pleasure of meeting Bibiana during our stay, but her mother Patricia took fantastic care of us.  Their home is wonderfully decorated with eclectic pieces from around the world as well as paintings of their own.  Location-wise, this is very difficult to beat, as you are in Sol with plenty of restaurants and shops nearby plus easy access to the Metro.  I'd agree with others that the ceiling height is low (it's an attic after all) and the ladder could pose a challenge if you have large pieces of luggage.  However, the location, cleanliness, and beautiful decor easily outweighed this for us.

It was a very nice experience to stay at Bibiana's house, it's located perfectly in the center close to all the touristic attractions in Madrid, it was quiet and warm, Bibiana and her mother were very welcoming and helpful, highly recommended..
Recomiendo 100% alojarse en casa de Bibiana, ella su madre y Mia hicieron que mi estancia en Madrid fuese estar como en casa.
Solo puedo decir cosas buenas de la habitacion, ha sido un fantástico fin de semana

Our experience at Bibiana & Gigi's was quite below our expectations.
Bibiana's mother, received us quite well, showing us, the room and the bathroom.
We were very excited about Bibiana & Gigi's Airbnb description & comments, but, as they never showed up, we never had the chance to benefit their good advices nor their warm welcome.
The place is tiny, and the pictures on the site are not very realistic. That is why I think the price is a bit overdone.
Otherwise, it is perfectly situated, between la Puerta del sol & la Plaza mayor.

Such a beautiful home and a lovely family. I wish my stay there could have been longer. I felt so welcomed, and everything was perfect. The home was better than in the pictures, filled with beautiful art. Bibiana helped me out with suggestions, some spanish, and was SO nice! I had an amazing and unforgettable time.

Bibianas und Gigis Wohnung könnte kaum besser gelegen sein, direkt an der Puerta del Sol und damit in Laufweite zu Cafés, Bars, zahlreichen Sehenswürdigkeiten sowie der Metro. Unsere Ankunft nach Mitternacht war kein Problem, alles war wie beschrieben - wir haben uns rundum wohlgefühlt!

I loved staying here.  The atmosphere of the home was beautiful and relaxing.  Right outside on the streets were many interesting shops, place to eat, museums, etc. Bibiana and her family are so warm, welcoming and relaxed.  They were helpful in giving directions to places and also friendly if you just wanted to chat.  Bibiana's English is extremely good. I felt very comfortable here and loved my time here.  I would have liked to stay even longer.
Genial la experiencia con Bibiana. Es súper encantadora. El sitio genial volvería a repetir.

Bibliana y Gigi were amazing hosts! Their place is perfectly located and exactly as described. The room is very private and our things were safe all day as we traveled around Madrid. I would definitely pick them again if I ever am back in Madrid.
Muy buena ideal lugar para vistar Madrid. la casa es limpia y ellos son simpaticos. Fantastico y perfecto piso.
The location is fantastic and the hosts were very nice

The room is so fantastic!! It is roof room so, I can see the night sky and listen sound if rainy.
Bibiana, her little girl and her mom are nice and kind. I felt good feeling with them.

This is my second stay here for a family member's wedding.  The true test of whether a place is comfortable is when the weather is bad and you're sick with a cold.  Although the wedding was great, it rained non stop and I caught a cold -- but spending the afternoon on the bed with youtube videos was what I needed to recover, and the room was perfect for that.

The apartment is located in the heart of Madrid (5 minutes walk to Mayor plaza), lots of restaurant and bards around. The building itself looks historical but the apartment looks exactly how the pictures shows here.
Bibiana is a very considering hostess, we have a early check-in, and super early check-out in midnight time, she has no problem with that.
Bibiana's apartment is small but lovely, full of cute decorations. Bibiana stay with her daughter. Because we leave the apartment early and back late so I don't have a chance to met with them. In the morning Bibiana and her daughter will preparing for work and school, it's a unique way to experience the local's daily life which the hotel wont supply this to you.
We stay on the attic which is a bit inconvenient to climb up and down by the ladders (narrow). and the bed is good for 2 persons to share.
In general, if you want to experience sth interesting and local with a convenient location, Bibiana's apartment is a great place to choose to stay. Bibiana is a very friendly hostess we are all enjoy our stay here!
The location was fantastic. It was within walking distance of many major cultural, historical, and fun Madrid attractions.

El apartamento es muy bonito y con encanto. Muy cerca de la puerta de sol.
Lo recomiendo si quieres ir a ver Madrid un par de días. El apartamento se comparte con los anfitriones, cosa que para nosotros no ha sido ningún inconveniente ya que Bibi y su madre nos han tratado muy bien.

Die Gastfreundschaft war ausgezeichnet. Wir haben zu Beginn einen Wohnungsschlüssel erhalten und unter dem Dach ein Schlafzimmer. Bei Fragen haben beide sehr nett und kompetent geholfen. Es war sehr sauber, gepflegt und absolut ausreichend zum Übernachten. Die Wohnung ist sehr modern geschnitten und gestaltet, was wir sehr schön fanden. Wir hatten ein Dachbodenzimmer erhalten, was mich etwas überrascht hat, da ich es nicht in der Beschreibung gelesen habe.

Me quedé con mi novio en el piso de bibiana y gigi, que son muy amables. El piso está ubicado en el centro de Madrid, no hay que caminar mucho, y casi no vale la pena ir en metro, porque todo está en distancia a caminar. La habitación es bonita, aunque muy pequeña y se vive muy cerca a la familia. Había de todo y por eso era un tiempo muy agradable! Gracias!

I had a nice time at Bibiana & Gigi's place. The apartment is very well located. I could walk to everything I needed to get to. Although the room itself was small, it was comfortable and had everything I needed.
This room was perfect for us. It was in an amazing location, and we had a very pleasant stay!
The room was great for our short stay! We enjoyed staying w bibiana and Gigi; felt right at home! Wonderful location to all sites; centrally located!!!

Bibiana and Gigi were amazing hosts with lots of knowledge of Madrid; it's history, places to go, how to get around etc. They made us feel as if we were in our own home. The location was perfect for sightseeing and going out at night to enjoy the local restaurants and bars.
Thank you both and all the best!

The ceiling is a bit low in the bedroom, but you know that from the description. Everything else about this lovely place is perfect! The home is charming - full of art and personality, the location is close to everything, the bed is firm and comfy, waking up to the bells of the church and a view over the rooftops of Madrid is a true pleasure, Gigi and Bibiana are lovely hosts and Mia is preciosa. My time in Madrid was short, but staying here helped make it really special. I highly recommend!!

La casa es muy linda, excelente ubicacion.
Fueron super amables con nosotros, y dispuestos para ayudarnos.

Bibiana and Gigi are very nice hosts, and we enjoyed staying with them. The location by Plaza del Sol is unbeatable (geographic center of Madrid, very safe and comfortable)! As you can see in the pictures, the top story apartment is very well decorated with art made primarily by the family. We stayed two nights and were comfortable in the attic bedroom.

I had a really great time at Bibiana and Gigi's for 2 nights. My flight landed at 6am in the morning and I asked Bibiana if I could drop my stuff off at her place before the official check-in time, which she was very generous about. Bibiana wasn't home on my arrival, and the lady who keeps by the door in day times at the entrance gave me the key and helped me open the door to the house.
The attic, which is for the guests, is quite spacious, and everything in the house including the bed and bathroom was clean and accessible. The bed is very comfortable, too. The window in the attic leads to a spectacular view from the rooftop. If I had to pick a problem, I would say the ceiling isn't high enough for a very tall person but I had no problem (1.65m; 5ft6)
The location of the house could not be better and Bibiana is very welcoming. I wish i had more time to get to know and talk more. I would definitely stay here again if I ever come to Madrid again. Muchas gracias!! :)

Very good location near sol metro station.
Bibiana is a very good host. we got very warm welcome. We talk and share a lot which allow us to know the culture in more dimension. Bibiana's daughter mia is cute. She can sing and dance. Its amazing experience to me.
The place was in great location that it is located at the centre of Sol and Bibiana was very nice and supportive.

I had a very good time at ibiana & Gigi Amieva house for 3 nights
and we enjoyed staying with them.
Fantastic beautiful :) we got very warm welcome.
Bibiana's daughter Mia is really cute.
And within easy walking distance of downtown.
I would definitely stay here again if I ever come to Madrid again.

the living environment is fine.maybe a bit hot for summer as in the attic there is no air con.
sad that we don't hv much time to communicate with the host
the location is perfect as it's close to the basically all touristy spots
The place was in great location that it is located at the centre of Sol and Bibiana was very nice and flexible. However it's hot in summer in Madrid and the room is in the attic.
My stay was wonderful- great communication from Bibiana and I ha no trouble with transit from the airport. Location is in the heart of Madrid. Everything was walkable and safe. It was an amazing stay

We had a wonderful time at Bibiana's home! She was very welcoming and let us drop our luggage off before check in. We enjoyed talking with her and getting her advice about madrid. The apartment is in a great location, right next to puerta del sol. We were able to walk everywhere. The room is small but perfect for our needs. We will be back!
A very nice and cosy place in great location. Love the artistic touches in the flat. We spent great 2 days there and had a great time. Word of warning though, it's VERY hot in the summer.
There is  bugs  in  bed  room and  bed  room  is  too small...   so  we  should  sleep  on  living  room.   It  is  inconvenience  but  the  house  ia  beatiful.

Me encanto el apartamento! No es tan grande pero eso lo hace acogedor! Lastimosamente no pude conocer a Bibiana & Gigi ya que estaban fuera de la ciudad pero siempre estuvieron atentos a mis preguntas desde que llegue hasta el dia que me fui. La ubicacion me parecio perfecta esta a dos minutos de plaza mayor y todo es cerca nunca necesite de taxi/metro solo para el aeropuerto. La ubicacion fue lo mejor!

일단 호스트는 정말 친절했습니다. 저희가 늦게 도착했는데도 웃으면서 반겨줬습니다.. 그런데 숙소는 솔직히 사진에 비해서 별로입니다(위치만 좋습니다).일단 다락방을 배정받아서 사용하는데 사다리를 타고 올라가야하고요 다락방이 천장이낮아서 여자도 제대로 서있지 못할 정도이고요... 게다가 방에 에어컨도 없어서 8월 마드리드 온도가 35도 이상 올라가는데.. 너무덥습니다 (밤에만 좀 시원합니다) 사진하고 많이 다르다는 점을 꼭 고려하고 선택하시기 바랍니다.
요약:
장점- 위치, 호스트의 친절함
단점- 에어컨 없음, 방이좁고 사진과 괴리감이있음

Bibi was really nice and her apartment was artistically decorated. The wifi connection was good as well. We would recommend staying at this place when it's not so hot. Also, the amount of space in the attic was a bit deceiving from the pictures on the website. We ended up staying for a night, then staying someplace else with more space and an air conditioner.
Bibiana & Gigi's flat is located in the heart of the city, her Falt is well decorated by her own pairing and decorations. We do enjoy our stay in Madrid.

The apartment was lovely and in a great location! It has everything you could need and the terrace was a huge bonus, gets the sun all day long. Soraya was a great host, very helpful and always on hand if we had any questions. Will definitely stay here again next time we're in Madrid!

L'appartement a tout à fait correspondu à nos attentes, très belle terrasse, spacieuse et luxueuse avec douche et barbecue. Sur un carrefour charmant, le quartier très gai. Accueil très chaleureux de Soraya et son mari. Appartement petit mais très propre et avec tout le confort. Nous reviendrons !

Soraya es una bellísima persona! nos  ha tratado genial, el apartamento precioso, todo reformado, y muy céntrico. La única cosa que al estar en plena plaza mayor, un poco de ruido por la noche, pero si cerrabas las puertas y ponías el aire acondicionado se estaba muy bien!!! sin duda, repetiría! aparte regenta una crepería justo al lado del apartamento que estaba muy rica!!!

This place is ABSOLUTELY beautiful...right in the heart of Madrid.  My fiancé and I had a magnificent experience staying at Soraya's place.  I can not say enough positive things about how nice the place was and how awesome the location was.

Soraya made the booking and check-in process seamless. The apartment was exactly as described- everything was perfect. We loved the terrace and enjoyed wine and cheese each night before heading out to dinner. The apartment was in an ideal location, with great shops and restaurants just steps away. Couldn't get any closer to Plaza Mayor without being right in the plaza.

We had a very pleasant time in Soraya's apartment, which is located in an absolute A-location in Madrid, only 50 meters from Plaza Mayor. Especially the roof terrace was great!! Soraya was very helpful in giving us directions to explore the city.
Stayed for a long w-e at Soraya's flat. Amazing location, spotlessy clean, safe at night and priceless terrace. Soraya was an amzing host, so available and charming!

Wonderfull appartment and location!
Soraya is very kind and attentive!
And the terace is even more beautiful in real than in pictures

Better location than this you won't get in Madrid.
The pictures are valid and the terrace is even better in real life.
Soraya is very kind and available if needed.
Can only recommend this place.
Very nice flat, in the heart of the city. Soraya was very nice with us: we arrived very late and our departure was late too and she was really wonderfull with us. We fully recommand this location!!
Our stay at Soraya's appartment was really great! The neighbourhood is very nice. Soraya is a perfect host. I would recommand this place to anyone who visits Madrid. Thanks for everything Soraya!

Genial trato con la anfitrión y genial la ubicación del apartamento. Las fotos, aunque son buenas, no le hacen justicia: precioso, coqueto y grandísima terraza. Un minuto al parking Plaza Mayor. Estoy completamente seguro de que volveremos en el futuro.
We really enjoy Soraya's place. It's cozy lovely and convenient, not far away from any place. The terrace is great!  You can always enjoy the sunshine there. It's a wonderful experience living there.

Soraya and her husband made me feel very welcome and like I had people I could count on while in Madrid. They are friendly and professional hosts who are extremely responsive and helpful. The apartment was exactly as it looked in the photos, and the location could not be better - within walking distance from almost everywhere (all the top sights) in Madrid. The neighborhood is both lively and safe and feels very festive on Friday and Saturday nights. Strongly recommend this apartment and these hosts to anyone traveling to Madrid!

Great location, fantastic experience! Definitely the  best choice to stay in and vist Madrid. The apartment is just a few steps from SOL and Plaza Mayor. Perfect for couples, the apartment has a big balcony with a view, and Soraya is so helpful.

As good as I imagined before coming in Madrid !!!
An amaizing appartment in the Madrid Downtown. Juste perfect for 2/3 people, 50metres from the Plaza Mayor, 2 minutes from de SOL Subway station .... A Private elevator, a FANTASTIC view outside thanks to this terrace, my morning coffee moment was the best of my entire life. Really, the best location you can imagine if you want to visit Madrid without spending money for subway or bus ....
Soraya is a great host, always here if you need some help !!!
Muchisimas gracias Soraya para todo ;-)

Très bon accueil. Appartement tout à fait conforme au photo et localisation idéale!
Appartement neuf, très fonctionnel.
Soraya 는 약속 시간을 정확하게 지켰고 따뜻하게 환영해 주었습니다. 숙소의 위치나 청결상태, 숙소에 비치된 물품들도 아주 좋았습니다. 특히 sundeck 는 최고였습니다. 특히 침대 매트리스는 최고였습니다.

Encore mieux que sur les photos !!! L'appartement est très mignon, très propre, joliment décoré, et la terasse est réellement la cerise sur le gateau. Même en plein hiver, nous avons pu faire la sieste au soleil, en nous laissant bercer par les bruits ambiants de la Plaza Mayor, située à peine quelques mètres au-dessous de nous... C'est un endroit magique !!!
Soraya est très accueillante et surtout très arrangeante sur les horaires d'arrivée et de départ. Elle nous a tout de suite fait sentir comme chez nous.
Je recommande à 200% !!

Apartment had a perfect location in the heart of Plaza Mayor, so it was really easy to get to other places in the city. Our favorite part of the apartment was the rooftop terrace. Wouldn't recommend staying there if you're a group of more than 2 people - there were three of us and it was snug. Soraya was really helpful and easy to get in touch with. Overall great experience, would recommend it to anyone coming to Madrid.

The apartment was very well located, we did everything by foot from there. Soraya was very responsive, helpful and welcoming. The place itself inside lacks a bit in charm, but was very clean, all brand new. It is a bit smaller than it appears on the pictures, but the terrace is really lovely, weather permitting, and the bed very comfortable.  Overall, we were satisfied with the place.
Great location. Soraya made everything very easy and was very easy to contact if any problems arose.

Beste Lage -
Supernette Gastgeber -
Schönes Ambiente-

Soraya was at our side with a welcoming smile within seconds of our arrival at her door. The location of the apartment is perfect for walking and for accessing the metro. We loved the terrace for our morning espresso and for sipping wine in the evening before going out.  We highly recommend the apartment. And the crepes !

We spent a weekend in Madrid - and loved everything about it. Soraya is the perfect host and the apartment is just lovely! It is small but very clean and nice - and you have everything in walking distance. The rooftop terrasse is fantastic! Soraya met us when we arrived and showed us the apartment. She even made sure that we could spend the last night in a very nice hotel nearby as we could only stay in the apartment the first two nights. Soraya also gave us many good tips on what to see and do in Madrid. Our very best recommendations! And hope to be back soon :-)

Absolutely beautiful apartment! It was very clean and modern. The terrace and view of plaza mayor were breathtaking. Very easy walk to everything we wanted to see. The elevator was a nice surprise. I was so happy to not have to carry my luggage up several flights of stairs. Would definitely recommend this apartment.

Soraya was a great host and her place in Madrid was in a great location! We arrived in Madrid before the apartment was ready, but Soraya welcomed us and had a place to hold our luggage while we got familiar with the city. She was very helpful in pointing us in the right direction on things to do and good local restaurants. Her crepe restaurant right around the corner was amazing as well! We did have an issue with a breaker flipping off, which left us with cold water for a couple showers, but Soraya helped resolve the issue. If you're looking for a great host, with an apartment in a fantastic location in Madrid this is the one for you!

This was an incredible apartment. From the balcony, you can see Plaza Mayor, it's a short walk to the major museum and all of the neighborhoods. The apartment was the perfect size for 1 or 2 people and had all of the amenities including refrigerator, stove and quick access to shopping. If I had to do it all over again, I would pick this apartment. Soraya is an amazing hostess and puts you at ease immediately.

Soraya was direct na ons telefoontje bij de deur van het appartement en heeft ons alles uitgelegd. Ook gaf ze ons tips om lekker te eten.
Het appartement is klein, maar meer heb je ook niet nodig. Er is zelfs een koelkasten en een kookplaat. Het dakterras is Waanzinnig. Zeker eind van de middag was het heerlijk uitrusten op het zonnige terras!

En bij vertrek konden we de bagage nog veilig stallen vlakbij.

Helemaal perfect dus.

Appartement idéalement situé pour visiter Madrid en quelques jours. La terrasse est un réel plus, une parenthèse au milieu de l'agitation de la ville.  Soraya nous a fait un excellent accueil, très disponible. A recommander sans hésitation !

Yesterday we came back in Holland after an amazing time in Madrid. We really love the city and our apartment was fantastic. It's in the middle of the centre, very comfortable and clean. Soraya is a kind person and told us everything we needed to know. We really loved the  terras on the roof with its beautiful view. We will come back in the future. Thank you so much.

The flat was incredible. A perfect oasis above the bustling Plaza Mayor. It was wonderful to be based in such a central location and with being in such a busy, vibrant city, it was wonderful to be able to relax on the private terrace but still be in the centre of all of the atmosphere.
Facilities were good. Very modern.
The host was lovely and very helpful.

Kiitos. Sijainti oli aivan mahtava. Kaikki nähtävyydet olivat kävelymatkan päässä. Huoneisto oli juuri kompaktin kokoinen ja toimiva. Terassi oli aivan mahtava nauttia aamukahvit, lepuuttaa välillä jalkoja ja nauttia auringon paisteesta. Plaza Mayorin aukealla oli joka ilta ohjelmaa. Jos joskus palaamme Madridiin, niin tähän paikkaan.

Absolutely amazing!!....This is a gem of an apartment in the heart of Madrid.,we loved everything about it.Spotlessly clean and tidy with everything you need for city living.The best thing about this apartment is the terrace, having evening drinks while you listen to the hustle and bustle of Plaza Mayor.Fantastic...
The oldest restaurant in the world Botin is right on your doorstep, as well as the San Miguel market for foodie lovers.In fact all the tourist attractions are in walking distance so, no metro needed when you stay here.I highly recommend this apartment to any age as it has the luxury of a lift.
Soraya was the perfect host speedy with any correspondence and waiting in the apartment for us on arrival.
This little Gem was the perfect start to a great 5 day trip to Madrid....
Thank you so much.
Soraya.

The location- marvelous. The room- very adequate, good value for money. The apartment decorated really nicely, artsy. Enjoyed it a lot. And those roofs! That view! :)  yes, the ceiling is a bit low, but it adds character.

The Flat is really pretty and very inspiering because of The cool decoration. Our Room was tiny, but cosy and with a great view! The Position of The House is amazing! Everything can be arrived in a few minutes! Sadly, we saw bibiana only a few minutes at our arrival and she did not explain a lot.

Neighborhood was great!  Room was such a cute room, but because of the room being in the attic. I barely could sit up, or even change my clothes in the room.  Basically, if you were to rent this room it would only be a place to sleep in.  Which I did!  I knew I was going to be out all day being a tourist and this place is the best location ever!

The host was relaxed & friendly in showing me her unique apartment under the roof of a 1870's beautiful old building with the cast iron elevator doors taking you to the 5th floor. The location is PERFECT, quiet but outside you step into the historical square half a block away bustling with people, street musicians, shops etc. Her home has fun artistic decorations!
For people who are very tall the attic bedroom is a little challenge getting up narrow stairs and unable to stand up fully, the bed could be a little softer, but the pretty view over gorgeous architectual rooftops us great! Very relaxing energy! Really enjoyed myself.

We had a great time staying in Madrid. The attic was definitely the most unique accommodation to date! It was cosy, warm & the space was small however it was full of character & the view from the window is fantastic. The location is hard to beat as well, close to the metro line & the palace. Our hosts were lovely however we didn't see much of them. Would definitely recommend.
Excelente, cordialidad y buenas anfitrionas

House was just next to the Sol square and easy to access resources you need. Living down at the old style penthouse and seeing at stars through the window on the roof was like a childhood dream come true. Cannot expect more, Thanks, Bibiana.
这是一次很棒的住宿体验。房子离太阳门广场很近，走几步就到！房东非常好。我们到的时候已经接近半夜，租车前往，可惜找不到停车场，房东马上帮我们寻找并帮忙去停车！！几次和房东交流也都感觉到他们十分热情好客。这绝对是一个留宿马德里的最佳选择。

Su trato es muy amable y cálido, enseguida te hace sentir cómoda y como en casa . Muy céntrico el lugar , cerca de los puntos principales a conocer en Madrid . Muy agradecidas y contentas . Volvería a repetir hospedarnos ahí .

Ons verblijf in Madrid was geweldig. De advertentiebeschrijving klopte precies. Het is een super gezellig en knus appartement. De slaapkamer bevindt zich op de zolder, die bereikbaar is via een wenteltrap. Mocht je het belangrijk vinden om te kunnen staan in je kamer, of vindt je een wenteltrap minder prettig, dan is het wellicht niet een ideale locatie. Voor ons was het geen probleem. De straat ligt echt op een steenworp afstand van Puerta del Sol en het metrostation. We voelden ons thuis en vrij bij Bibiana en Gigi. Alles was netjes verzorgd en het uitzicht over de daken van Madrid was prachtig.

The place is very cute, but really tiny. The room's ceiling at the highest end was too low up stand up (I'm 5'6"). The living room/kitchen is also a little too tiny for the two of us plus at least two other people to hang out. But if you're ok with that and you only need a place to sleep, you can't really do better than this. The apartment is in the perfect location (you're literally a few steps from the very center), it has a great feel and Bibiana is a great host.
La chambre était très confortable, l'appartement très joliment décoré. Nous avons été très bien accueillis. Notre séjour à Madrid s'est passé de façon remarquable.

Bibiana and Patricia are very lovely and helpful. They have made our stay comfortable and homely. Location is perfect and central to everywhere we want to go in Madrid.  Room is unique and love the old building too. Very well recommended

Bibiana e Gigi sono degli host disponibili e sorridenti. L'appartamento, molto carino, é in una posizione centralissima, perfetta per godersi al meglio Madrid.
Grazie! :)

Très bon séjour dans une famille très accueillante et discrète.
L'appartement est magnifique, avec le charme d'une famille artistique.
Nous avons eu aucune contrainte à séjourner dans cet appartement idéalement placé.
Je le conseil à tout le monde.

Merci encore à votre petite famille pour l'accueil et les sourires.
Well, I have to say it is a bit different from what we saw from the pictures, not that satisfied and a bit expensive.

La camera è piccolina (E definirla tale è inappropriato). Ottima per chi intende solo ed esclusivamente dormirci. La posizione centralissima però (2 minuti a piedi per puerta del sol) è un'ottimo requisito! Bibiana è stata cortese e disponibile :)

io e alice non potevamo trovare soluzione lmigliore per trascorrere un bellissimo weekend a madrid! l'accoglienza e l'ospitalità sono state delle migliori, la casa ci è piaciuta proprio tanto (e si vede che è abitata da una famiglia di artiste) e la mansarda dove abbiamo dormito non poteva essere più accogliente (soprattutto la mattina, quando il sole ci riscaldava entrando dalla finestra sopra il letto) :D

Świetne miejsce, świetna lokalizacja. Klimat nie odbiega od tego, co widać na zdjęciach. Mieszkanko jest ładne, z pokoju mamy widok na niebo. Przestrzeń jest niewielka, jednak układ funkcjonalny mieszkania pozwala na w miarę bezproblemowe obycie (nie przechodzimy bezpośrednio przez pokoje, w których ktoś śpi).
Wszystko utrzymane w czystości.
Gospodarze bezproblemowi, z wyobraźnią i pomocni. Zostaliśmy przyjęci w nocy (późny lot). Znają języki i umieją ich używać :) Naprawdę nic więcej nie trzeba mówić - na krótki wyjazd miejsce jest idealne, na dłuższy - może trochę zbyt ciasne.

Great place, great localisation. It's perfectly similiar to what you can see on picutres. Home is not very spacious, but its layout allows trouble-free communication (you don't have to walk through occupied areas - no way to step into someone who's sleeping when going back late).
Everything was kept clean in there!
The hosts were easy going, imaginative and helpful. We were welcomed in night time (late flight). They know languages and know how to use them :) There's really nothing to add - for a short stay in Madrid this place is perfect. For a longer one - it might be a little bit too small (depending on personal habits).

Polecam ciepło/I warmly recommend :)

-Jakub

La ubicación es inmejorable, sobre todo si vas a visitar los museos, Plaza mayor, barrio de las letras etc . Bibiana y Gigi son unos estupendos anfitriones, muy simpáticos y te hacen sentir como en casa.

다락방이 아담하고 예뻤어요
호스트도 친절하시고 위치도 좋았어요
사다리 올라가는거 무서우시면 힘드실 수도 있지만 전 괜찮았어요

Bibiana y su madre Patricia, son unas personas muy amables y relajadas, al momento de llegar ya nos sentimos como en casa.
La ubicación es inmejorable, pleno centro... cerca de todo.
Nuestro vuelo se retrasó y no tuvieron problema alguno en alargar nuestro horario de salida.
Definitivamente recomendamos este espacio!
Muchas gracias Bibiana y Patricia :)

The location of the apartment was so nice, less than a 5 minute walk from the central market.  It was so nice to be able to interact with the host and her family.  They were all so nice to us and gave us suggestions as to where and what we should do and see and eat!

If I were given the second time to visit Madrid I would without a second of doubt go for Bibiana & Gigi's! -
It is right in the heart of the city with Puerta del Sol and Plaza Mayor in minutes of walk. It is beautiful, beautiful atmospheric flat of creative individuals (not to mention the fact that it is neat and clean and well-maintained).
Most important thing, however, is the hospitality and openness of hosts. Thank you for having us!)

Thank you Bibiana - Flat was easy to find and all the arrangements went smoothly. A great little detail was that we woke up with morning sun and little birds singing  near skylight:) The flat was very unique part of Madrid!

We had a really great time in Madrid! This Airbnb is in the PERFECT location. It is extremely central, yet manages to have peace and quiet since it is on a quiet street. Although the attic is a small space, we didn't mind it because we were out touring most of the time. And, it was a very charming home with very warm people :-) A couple important tips: Don't miss the napolitanas de chocolate (chocolate croissants) from the cafe around the corner called La Mallorquina. And go on the Sandeman walking tours- they're excellent. Enjoy!

We had a lovely time staying with Bibiana. We only got to meet Gigi briefly, but the whole family were really welcoming! They gave great recommendations for places to eat and things to visit. The apartment is beautiful and arty and the attic where we slept was cosy with a comfortable bed. The location was amazing right in the city centre. Thanks for a great experience of Madrid.
Nice place!

Thanks for hosting us :-)

The appartement is well located and the neigbourhood is quiet !

See you soon maybe :-)

Muy recomendable. La estadía en la casa de bibiana y gigi fue excelente. Las dos muy amables y atentas. Nos ayudaron a planificar todo lo que queríamos ver en Madrid. La habitación muy cómoda y confortable.
Great location and hosts are very nice people

Lovely place, the room is on the top of the building, it has a window with an interesting view.
The location of the house is perfect, just a block away form the plaza

We had a wonderful time staying with Bibiana. She was kind, easy going the whole time, and very helpful in giving suggestions on where to go and what to do. The attic/loft was a little low, so it was hard to stand straight. That was no problem since we didn't spend much time in our room and slept very well. Two windows, one big window, made for cool rooftop views and great ventilation. We would highly suggest staying here.

Bibiana was incredibly welcoming and made us feel at home in her place. The location was perfectly central and walkable to any Madrid site you wish to see! The sun roof above the bed was fantastic to wake up to in the morning. Highly recommend this place for a shorter stay in Madrid, for a longer stay, the attic room may get a bit cramped with all of your things and having to climb up the ladder to get up there.
Fantastic place , design it's amazing and the department it's very clean and beautiful thanks you very much
bibianis place was lovely, welcoming and central
Bibi and Mia were lovely hosts. The space is cozy and warm and central, right next to sol metro.  Was just right for my stay.... Thanks! :)

虽然中途发生很多意外状况，最后结果是我一个人在家里住了两天，但是房东还是很积极地帮我解决问题……
房子很干净，非常有生活气息能感受一家三口丰富多彩且富有创造力的生活，家里到处贴满了一家三口共同创作的画，节日做的天花板装饰，以及各种手工小玩意。
房子地理位置很棒，坐落在市中心，两步路就是地铁站。下了楼就是taxi点，周围各种购物美食药店。
房子白天很热因为在顶楼，但马德里的晚上即使是夏天仍然非常凉爽完全不需要空调。客房需要爬梯子上到阁楼，并且阁楼顶非常矮，基本不能站立。但是作为卧室，仅仅用来睡觉，真的非常、非常赞！因为早晨的阳光直直的晒在床上，这感觉真的非常棒！【并且完全不会热，夜晚甚至直到中午，窗户都有凉风吹进。

Amazing loft apartment with lots of art and inspiration all over the place - we loved the design of the apartment. The location is great, right in the middle of everything, and while the bedroom area is small and only accessible by ladder we had no troubles sleeping. Thanks for a great stay!!

Overall Bibi is a good host and the place is in a good location but the room was not up to expectations, especially for the price. The shower was freezing, the room was unacceptably hot with no way to cool it down. It should be noted in the listing that the air conditioning is in the living room only and does not reach the loft.
Muy buena la ubicación y confortable el apartamento. Bibiana gracias por tu confianza.

The apartment is in good location (very near the metro) and comfortable.
We didn't meet Bibiana's families because they were on vacation, but we can tell that they love travelling and life in general (very interesting DIY and decoration in their living room). We love her apartment!

Babiana i jej córka Mia to dwie cudowne osoby. Mimo iż Babiany nie było w domu w czasie naszego przyjazdu, zadbała o wszystko i zamiast niej czekała na nas jej znajoma, która wszystko nam wyjaśniła. Mieszkanie znajduje się w świetnej lokalizacji, po prostu wszędzie jest blisko. Również klimat mieszkania jest wspaniały. Zdecydowanie polecam.

Bibiana was very responsive and helpful and provided me with all the details i needed. She and her family were very nice! The flat is amazing and the room is very cozy although a little hot in the summer given that is right under the roof but a fan was provided so this was easily solved :)

I DO NOT RECOMMEND THIS PLACE DURING THE SUMMER!
Bibiana is a friendly person, however, we had several issues that we have to rebook another place to stay after the first night. Her place is lovely, however, I don't recommend to stay at her place over the summer weather (weather over 100F or 35C) , here are some reasons.
1. The bedroom for guest is in the attic. The space is very limited, you can't stand up, but we were fine with that since we only stayed in the room during the night. HOWEVER!!!!! In the summer, the attic can be heat up very quickly and it feels like a SAUNA ROOM!!! It is hot and muggy as hell... seriously!!! It said that it has air condition in the house, however, it is only in the living room, cold air can't get to the attic! NO AIR CONDITION IN THE ATTIC!!!! when we were there, the weather is 104 F/ 40C, so it is really uninhabitable for anyone to stay at the attic! We didn't fall asleep until 5am, because it is TOO HOT in the attic.

2. The shower is freezing, it did not have hot water at the apartment when we were there.

3. The electric went off for the whole night, we weren't able to use fan, or recharge our phones....

We had to rebook another hotel after the first night... because we really had no other choice... the attic living environment is bad...

大家订这家之前最好考虑一下， 住了很多次airbnb， 这可能真的是最差的一次了。 小房子很温馨很可爱， 但是这并不能代替其他的硬伤： 这家给客人住的卧室是个 小阁楼， 夏天小阁楼被烤的火热火热， 像个桑拿房， 这个上面写着有空调， 但是只有客厅有空调， 冷气根本不能到达阁楼， 一点儿也不能。所以我认为这个描述真的不真实！ 我们在的时候马德里每天都有40 度一上， 几乎在阁楼上呼吸都很困难， 晚上根本睡不着！ 而且我们当晚还跳闸断电了， 连唯一的小风扇也不能用了， 手机，充电宝也没法充电。 我跟我朋友折腾到凌晨5点才睡着。 然后她家的洗澡水真的是冰凉冰凉的， 一点儿热水也没有... 她家洗澡水是要有电才有热水，虽然早上她把电闸拉好了， 但是我我一开洗澡水就跳闸！ 于是我继续洗的冷水澡... 真的很无语的... 最后住了第一个晚上后决定搬走，因为阁楼真的不适合居住， 真心不是我们矫情... 你想象一下睡在桑拿房里的感觉就知道了... 所以我真的不建议大家在天热的时候去住！

Très bon accueil dans ce pittoresque appartement conforme aux photos. Emplacement central idéal et calme. Deco personnelle et chaleureuse. Chambre cosy mais un peu chaude!
Bonne adresse! Merci

Todo perfecto, Bibiana es una chica encantadora, hizo lo posible para que estuvieramo bien. La situación del piso muy buena , perfecta para ver Madrid desde el centro y a pié.
La habitación muy acogedora y no se escuchaba ningún ruido.
Muy buena ubicación

Wij hebben een zeer fijn verblijf gehad bij Bibiana. Het appartement is zeer centraal gelegen, midden in de stad! We zijn heel vriendelijk ontvangen geweest.
Een aanrader.

Bibiana fue una excelente host, no solo se preocupó por nuestra estadia en su casa sino en toda la experiencia de nuestro viaje... fue muy amable y cordial.. Sin dada la mejor host con la que nos hemos quedado!!!! Súper recomendada !!!! El apartamento no puede estar mejor ubicado !!! Super céntrico y cerca de restaurantes, tiendas, linea del tren y del metro. Estupenda experiencia!!!!!!

La situación del apartamento es ideal, no es necesario coger metro, se puede ir a pie a muchos sitios interesantes. Bibiana es muy amable y os solucionará cualquier duda de la ciudad y os dará buenas recomendaciones para que la estancia sea más agradable.
Appartamento molto particolare ed unico, raccomandato specialmente per pochi giorni

Bibiana's flat is gorgeous, artistic, and inspiring! A really fun place to spend the weekend in Madrid. She was incredibly responsive and welcoming, and had great recommendations. The flat couldn't be better located -- I walked everywhere and didn't take the metro once in the city.

Around the area, I especially enjoyed Mallorquina (pastries and coffee for a lively breakfast), El Senor Martin (great seafood & decor), La Croquette (cosy blues bar), and the free Sandemans walking tours of Madrid.
Appartamento originale e molto accogliente. Posizione ottima.
Good experience, she is very nice ,room is so sweet, like the one you in your dearm when you are a little girl. Best location near shopping center and Metro. Thanks Bibi.

La vivienda está muy bien ubicada (centro de Madrid) y queda cerca de muchos lugares turísticos, Bibiana es muy amable y está muy pendiente de las necesidades de los huéspedes. La habitación es bastante pequeña y su acceso es algo difícil. Agradezco mucho a la host por todo.

Bibiana es un encanto de persona, alguien con la cual hablar y en pocos minutos parece de conocerla desde anos. Su casa es ciquitica , llena de luz y la energia de su ser artista. Yo me encontre' muy bien . Ademas tiene una ubicacion perfecta para moverte en el centro . Madrid deja huellas , los madrilenos igualmente . Volveria ? de inmediato .
Bibiana is an enchanted lady, artist , sparkling and full of energies . Her house is small and cozy , full of light and details which speaks about her artistic life. One of those person you click with just in few seconds seeming having known her over the years. , Her house is perfectly located in the center of Madrid, handy to anything you might need .
10 minutes from Atocha . Very strategically positioned . Absolutely recommended !

La chambre est très bien placée. Bibiana et sa fille sont très discrètes et sympas !
Dommage pour certains points :
- l'accès à la chambre est un peu compliqué (grenier, et échelle !)
- Le grenier est bien aménagé, mais on ne peut même pas être debout
地理位置特别好，地铁口，sol广场，房主也很热情，但是并不是十分推荐。首先，卧室位于阁楼上，只有一个简易的梯子可供上下，大件行李搬不上去，只能放在客厅里，客厅空间十分有限，所以很不方便。其次，阁楼空间小的可怜，高度根本无法让人站立，厨房做饭时油烟味跑到阁楼上真的让人无法呼吸。另外，整个房子的卫生条件有待提高。所以请大家三思而行。
A perfect spot if visiting central Madrid. Warm, helpful and friendly hosts. Just great.

Casa di Bibiana è centrale e comoda per qualsiasi tipo di viaggio. La camera da letto è un mini attico molto carino e riservato, tutta la casa è decorata con personalità e gusto.
Bibiana è sempre sorridente e fa di tutto per farti sentire a casa. Sono certa di tornare. Grazie mille! : )

Bibiana es una excelente anfitriona, carismática y atenta. El lugar es fantástico para sumergirse en una arquitectura tradicional con el buen gusto de Bibiana en la decoracion. La ubicación privilegiada en el centro de Madrid pudimos desplazarnos la mayor parte caminando.
Bibiana was such a great host with amazing taste. Awesome location in the center of Madrid. Close to trains and everything.
The location way too perfect, really near from all tourist area just need to walk. Bibi also really communicative and helpful. Love staying at her place, very rocommended

房子的地理位置特别好 就在太阳门广场边上
但是房间是阁楼上的小阁楼 上楼一定要用梯子 而且房间很低 无法直起身子 里面除了床和台灯没有其他家具 行李以及洗漱工作都要在楼下做好再上楼
我们呆了3天 房东正好不在 所以空间还算富裕
若是房东在 不太推荐 因为房子本身就很小 没有独立空间
另外 房间的wifi经常会断

Para empezar es un lugar súper céntrico, a 15-20 minutos de muchísimos puntos de interes como el barrio de Chueca, Malasaña, el paque del Retiro, el Palacio Real y demás, además de ser muy fácil de encontrar a la llegada desde la para de metro Sol.
Una casa acogedora, estilosa y magnífica hacen de la estancia casi un sueño, y se siente la cálidez del hogar como si estuvieras en la tuya propia.
Tiene calefacción y aire acondicionado para la comodidad de los huéspedes y un salón con sofá amplio, aunque en nuestro caso, íbamos a casa para dormir y alguna vez para comer.
En definitiva muy recomendable.
es perfecto, a menos de 2 min caminando de sol, no se puede pedir mas por ese precio, supereconomico y el trato muy familiar. La verdad que la estancia ha sido genial.

La casa de Bibiana es justo lo q buscábamos para estos días en Madrid. Céntrico y cerca de todo, a pocos metros andando de Sol. Pero a la vez es un bloque tranquilo y un piso fuera de bullicios, no parece q se encuentre donde está. Una casa con muchísimo encanto, todo en ella es arte, abuhardillada, luminosa y silenciosa. Y además, la hemos compartido con personas geniales. Sin duda si tenemos q volver, elegiríamos quedarnos de nuevo aquí.

Bibiana was very welcoming! We had no problem checking in and out, everything was fine. The flat is at the exact center of everything, me and my friend basically walked everywhere! Thanks so much for the amazing stay:)!!
Très chouette, sur les toîts de Madrid
Ubicación perfecta ;)

Bibiana y su familia son gente estupenda, muy atentos y amables, siempre ayudando. La casa céntrica justo al lado de Sol, te permite disfrutar de pleno centro y bien comunicada con transporte público. La habitación como bien muestra en las fotos es una buhardilla que hay que subir con escalera de mano. Me ha encantado conocerlos, muchas gracias!!!

위치가 정말 좋아요! 솔광장에서 걸어서 오분도 안걸리고 큰길가에 있어서 전혀 위험하지 않아요 Bibiana가 진짜 친절했어요 부엌도 편하게 사용하고 짐도 옮겨주셨어요
다만 조금 불편한건 다락방이라서 자유롭지는 못하지만 다락방에서 보는 뷰가 정말 예뻤어요 가격대비 괜찮아요
Aunque es un dormitorio pequeño, Bibiana es una excelente anfitriona y nos hizo sentir como en casa. La ubicación del apartamento es excepcional.

Apto bem localizado. Perto de tudo. Ótimo custo benefício para quem deseja ficar no centro de Madrid. O quarto aonde fiquei é no sótão do apto e de difícil acesso. Não foi um problema para mim, contudo pessoas de idade ou dificuldade de locomoção terão dificuldade. Bibiana foi atenciosa na minha chegada e me deixou muito a vontade.

Bibiana est une hôtesse formidable! Elle a su nous guider pour les meilleures endroits de Madrid à explorer et nous lui en sommes très reconnaissants! Le logement est superbe et extrêmement pittoresque et ce fut un plaisir d'y séjourner.
Vine por primera vez a Madrid y fue la mejor opcion, Bibiana es muy atenta y conoce muy bien la ciudad, la localidad no puede ser mejor a segundos de todo... un lugar muy acogedor. Recomendado 100%.
Bibiana's apartment is really great, tastefully decorated and absolutely perfect in the middle of Madrid's center. A great recommendation from me!
위치는 솔광장 중심부에 위치해 있습니다. 모근 관광명소를 도보로 이동 가능할 정도로 탁월한 위치였습니다. 호스트는 매우 친절했습니다. 지내는 동안 우리를 배려하고 있는 것을 계속 느낄 수 있었습니다. 만약에 마드리드를 다시 방문한다면 또 한 번 묵고 싶은 최고의 숙소였습니다. 옥탑방 창문으로 본 달과 별은 오랫동안 기억에 남을 것입니다.

My very first experience with airbnb and it was fantastic! Nice and lovely people in a very beautiful home in a historic buliding. My room, and the whole home is clean, cozy, quiet - meanwhile it is in the city center - and has an amazing view. Bibiana and her daughter know a lot about Madrid, it was a honour to hear from them about their city.

솔 광장 근처에 위치해 움직이는데 편했어요
다락방 창문도 좋고 다들 친절하게 대해주셨어요. 구뤈뒈 똴이 화놔 있눈뒙 읽룡이엇어요
과꿈 쀠쥐면 화좡쉴에 둘어과는뒈 쥡에는 화좡쉴이 화놔예요. 구뤼고 줘희과 윌찍 둘어과는 펴니라 그래쓸수도 윘눙뒈 쥐인들이 뇰려와서 쥐베를 안갑디다 뭐 열듀쉬쭘 들워가쉬면 똴 췬구들은 업쓸거예여. 다 좋았어요!^^

El piso de Bibiana es muy acogedor y con un toque bohemio que le da mucho encanto.
Bibiana es una anfitriona correcta y accesible.
El piso, además, se encuentra cerca de la Puerta del Sol y a dos pasos del metro y cercanías, por lo que hace que esté situado en un lugar inmejorable para moverse por
Madrid.
Muy recomendable.

This was my first time with Airbnb and I felt very cared for. Bibiana assured me I could ask for assistance anytime. The artwork is amazing. For any art lovers this is a good place to go if you wanna talk to someone about the art you saw in Madrid. Because she's the top floor the view is really nice.
Location is fantastic! The attic room is very small and we had to leave our suitcase down in the living room. Worth staying just for the location.
Alloggio centralissimo adatto a coppie di ragazzi che vogliono visitare madrid
Perfect, super central. Bibiana was by far more than accomodating. Definately would recomend!
We enjoyed our stay with Bibiana. She was a very gracious host.

The landlord's suggestions are very practical, the flat is very new, good facilities, is the 4th floor leads to the apartment of a short stairs a little oblique, need to carry the luggage, but the apartment facilities can be comparable to a hotel, very spacious terrace, the geography position is very good, in the center of the palace and Prado Museum.
房东的建议非常实用，公寓非常新，设施很好，就是4楼通往公寓的一小段楼梯有点斜，需要搬一下行李，但这个公寓的设施可以媲美酒店，露台很宽敞，地理位置很好，在普拉多博物馆与皇宫的中心位置。
Wonderful place in the center of Madrid. Host was very friendly. Well suited for a couple!

amazing location! ...this space is just steps away from plaza mayor, 5 minutes (walking) to plaza del sol, 10 minutes (walking) to plaza santa ana and maybe 20 minutes (walking) to prado museum and in the other direction from the apt, the palace! the space was very clean and the bed comfortable, which was a necessity after walking all day. Soraya was a great host and available when we needed her. the home also had AC which was a huge plus in the city heat. the deck also had a nice breeze and was a good place to relax above the commotion below. overall, great stay :)

Soroya is a very warm person and helped us a lot during our stay in Madrid. We stayed from Monday untill Wednesday in the topfloor appartment with the rooftop. Very nice appartment to stay and nice to drink a glass of wine or whatever you prefer. The appartment are very giod located and almost all sight mayor spots are on walking distance 5-15 min walking. And if some things like the bernabeu stadium is something you would like to see, it is just 3 euros from the metro station of porto do sol (which is around the corner). And it takes you no more than 20 minutes in total. Soraya left a note with some things to see/do which was very helpfull and nice, included a map where to go. Very close by are the Mercado San Miguel, Placio Real, rua de restaurantes de tapas, plaza santa ana ( which is very nice for eating and having a drink at night).
At Friday and Saterday we stayed for 2 night in the appartment on the third floor, no rooftop/ terras, but the size of this appartment is bigger and also very comfortable.
Alltogether thanks to Soraya (and her husband as well), we had a very nice stay!!
Thanks
P.S. Take a nice ice-cream in her shop around the corner, or if you want a nice panecake/ crepe
The host Zoraya was very flexible with our travel problems,  was very nice, friendly and extremely helpful!

Madrid is een erg leuke stad en het appartement voldeed zeker aan onze verwachtingen! Het ligt midden in de stad, dus alles is per voet te bereiken. Het dakterras is heerlijk, je kunt altijd naar buiten wanneer je wilt. Soraya heeft ons goed geholpen en ze heeft ons voorzien van leuke tips om te eten of te doen. Het is handig dat het appartement voorzien is van een kleine keuken, zo kun je makkelijk zelf koken. Ik raad deze plek zeker aan bij mensen die Madrid willen gaan bezoeken! Bedankt Soraya.

We had a great time in Madrid. The beautiful apartment is right in the middle of the centre of Madrid. Everything is reachable via walking. Soraya was very welcoming and helpful, she made our stay very comfortable. So we say thank you for those wonderful days.

Excelente departamento, tiene lo necesario y una gran terraza, buen internet y la ubicación fantástica.
Muy buena disposición para todo
Gracias

Todo fue como Soraya lo enuncia. El ático magnífico, comodo y prolijo con buenos detalles de confort.
La ubicación inmejorable.
Muy recomendable y además Soraya es una anfitriona perfecta y amabilísima.

The apartment was really special. The terrace made it of course wish such an amazing location. Clean, in a great state and with lots of amenities and towels, we had all we needed to have a great stay.
Thank you very much for all Soraya.

We loved staying at Soraya's place in Madrid!  It was a great location and my sister and I spent a lot of time on the beautiful balcony!  Soraya was very helpful and easy to communicate with.  Hopefully, we can go back someday!

Such a great apartment, close to Sol metro - we walked everywhere! Apartment was clean and comfortable.
Thank you for having us! Can't wait to visit Madrid again soon!

This apartment is in one word: awesome. The experience you have when you stand on top of your penthouse terrace having a quick shower is indescribable.

Sona and Soraya make you feel at home from the start, walk you to your apartment and give you a top notch service.

The city of Madrid and this apartement are both highly recommendable for any traveler! As we say in Holland: Barcelona has the beach, Madrid has the life!

A charming, clean apartment in a very convenient location right next to Plaza Mayor, and within walking distance to all the major sights of Madrid. Perfect for two people. Lovely terrace roof top to sit and have breakfast in the morning or drinks/snacks in the evening. It looks just as good as in the photos. Soraya is a very friendly and approachable host and I would definitely recommend her apartment.

L'appartement de Soraya est très mignon et idéalement placé ! La terrasse, en particulier, est exceptionnelle. Soraya et son ami ont été des hôtes très accueillants et attentionnés. Nous avons beaucoup apprécié notre séjour à Madrid et cet appartement n'y est pas pour rien !

Soraya was great - punctual, easy to communicate with, accommodating and helpful. She left good recommendations for the neighborhoods near Plaza Mayor. The apartment was clean and comfortable with a fantastic view. Perfect central location to explore Madrid.

Great location, great apartment and great host ! Soraya was easy to work with, communicative and had lots of good information for us. We met her at her shop right around the corner and she took us up to the apartment to show us around, she was always around if we had questions as well. Apartment is in a fantastic area, close to everything. We walked everywhere and rarely used the metro. Recommend the free walking tour that meets in Plaza Mayor, markets, going on a day trip to Toledo if you have time. Recommend staying here in a heart beat.... And that patio, wow !

El departamento de Soraya es muy lindo! Las fotos lo muestran tal cual es, lo mejor es la terraza, con una vista increíble a plaza mayor en la cual se puede disfrutar al máximo ya que tiene ducha para poder tomar sol o simplemente desayunar y comer ahí.
Soraya fue muy amable con nosotras y se preocupó para que llegáramos bien asi como también cuando nos fuimos, sin duda lo volvería a elegir o recomendar!
Thanks you Soraya for having us as your guests,  the appartment was great. Beutiful and in the middle of madrid. We surely recomand to everyone who comes to Madrid.

A beautiful flat in a great location. Nothing was too much trouble for Soraya and her husband who were on hand (literally within minutes!) for any query or question. The roof terrace is a beautiful oasis of calm in the heart of the city. Soraya also very kindly allowed us to keep our luggage at her business locked safely away whilst we explored the city one last time before our flight home.

We spent 3 nights in Soraya's Apartment and were absolutely delighted with it. It was immaculate and well fitted out with a modern kitchen and bathroom and coming from a Scottish summer the air conditioning was very welcome. The terrace however was the highlight and  We spent every morning having breakfast there as well as drinks in the evening. The apartment is the best city break accommodation we have had and we would definitely recommend it and hope to return next year . Unfortunately we didn't manage to meet Soraya as she was on holiday herself however she organised everything perfectly and her recommendations and local information was excellent.

The apartment is a perfect place to stay when you're in Madrid. Extremely central and with a perfect roof terrace. Would recommend this place to any couple visiting Madrid. Soraya was very helpful and all communication was smooth and swift.

Great apartment just outside the main plaza--plaza Mayor. The deck is the best feature! Lay outside in the morning or evening and relax after a long day of waking all over Madrid! Apartment interior is small but perfect for two. Anymore and you would be too cramped. Our cab driver dropped us at the wrong part of town so make sure you have the exact address from the owner before heading there. Soraya's
husband helped us out by finding us in a nearby square and personally directing us to the apartment which was very kind. We had an awesome trip to Madrid and a perfect stay at Soraya's place. Thank you!

This cute and sunny apartment has made our trip to Madrid even more special! The great balcony is really unique, with a great view, and lot of sunshine hours! Soraya has given us many recommendations, was really welcoming - all in all: a perfect stay in Madrid!

Thank-you Soraya and your husband for allowing us to stay in your beautiful appartment in Madrid we love it! It is a perfict appartment for 2 people and the bed was the most confortable I selpt in during my month travel in Spain and Portugal.
The employees at your Ice Cream Shop were very helpful with questions we had. I really enjoyed my conversation with your nephew Louko? who was a very nice young man! Best place to stay in Madrid.
un appartement magnifique avec une super terasse. on a bien profite sur cette terasse dans les sieges longues...... soraya et son mari super sympa. on recommande cet appartement vivement!

Soraya svarede meget imødekommende og hurtigt på min forespørgsel! Skrev også hvornår at vi skulle aftale de praktiske ting! Alt fungerede perfekt også da vi havde problemer med at finde lejligheden,og måtte ringe til hende kom hun omgående og hentede os! Utrolig sød,venlig og imødekommende! Vores varmeste anbefalinger til Soraya fra os alle 4!

We had a great experience in Madrid because we had a lovely stay at Soraya's home. It was a great location in Plaza Mayor! We had a wonderful time and highly recommend this beautiful home to anyone interested in having a great time in Madrid!

Wir haben 3 Tage in diesem wunderschönen Apartment verbracht. Soraya hat alle unsere Fragen vorab umgehend beantwortet. Das Apartment war sehr sauber, liebevoll dekoriert und mit allem ausgestattet, was man benötigt. Die Lage und die große Terrasse machen es unvergleichbar.
Danke Soraya.

We found the apartment as described and found the terrace deck over looking the entrance to Plaza Mayor a delightful highlight to the apartment. The apartment is centrally located close to everything we wanted to see. Communication with our host was through,  clear and easy. We would recommend this apartment to anyone and enjoyed our stay.

A wonderful apartment in the heart of Madrid! It was very easy to find and only about a 6 Euro cab ride from Atocha Train station.

Soraya was there to meet us, and had a welcome sheet ready with suggested restaurants, sightseeing, and grocery stores. The welcome sheet was very helpful and helped us avoid the touristy restaurants.

It was very easy to walk from the apartment to just about anywhere we wanted to go. I would certainly consider staying here again.
