Soraya's apartment is really great and in an amazing location! We could walk to all the places that we wanted to see, which was very convenient. And the terrace is just great!
Communication with Soraya was always fast and easy. We really appreciated the tips about the restaurants and places to go to that she gave us.
We can definitely recommend Soraya's place.

Everything was as expected or better. The apartment was in perfect location, clean and everything provided for. We were met on time by saroya's husband who explained everything we needed to know for our 4 night stay.

I had an excellent stay in Soraya's apartment in the centre of Madrid. The location is excellent and in walking distance of pretty much everything we wanted to do in the centre. The apartment was well equipped and comfortable.  Soraya was lovely and responded to all my questions promptly, and although she wasn't there to let us in she sent someone to do it and let us keep our suitcases in her shop on our last day. Overall, she was an excellent host and I would definitely stay there again if I were to come back to Madrid.

Soraya has been a great host. Our first time in Spain she made it very easy. Great location by Plaza Mayor and very clean. She was amazing through out and kept in touch. Patio is amazing to sit back and relax. We highly recommend this place to anyone who's in Madrid.
Great apartment in the center of everything. Easy walking to all the great neighborhoods/museums/parks, etc.  Soraya left us a great travel "best of Madrid" guide as well. Great spot!

Vi havde fire fantastiske dage i Sorayas lejlighed i Madrid. Den ligger top centralt og har den mest fantastiske tagterrasse hvor vi brugte mange timer. Det var hendes mand der tog i mod os og brugte lang tid på at fortælle os om byen og booke bord til os på to rigtig gode restauranter, som vi aldrig havde fundet selv.
Vi kan varmt anbefale dette sted og vi kommer helt sikkert tilbage.

Superbe sejours à Madrid, l'appartement est idéalement situé et la terrasse est juste fantastique (avec une douche)
Soraya nous a recu très tard dans la soirée mais avec le sourire.
l'appartement était propre.
La rue est passante donc bruyante avec les fenêtres ouvertes (on est dans l'hyper centre) mais on entend plus rien une fois fermées.
Madrid est une très belle ville et si nous y retournons nous irons chez Soraya!

Location, location, location. What a great spot in the heart of Madrid! Less than a 2 minute walk to the Plaza Mayor, the terrace alone makes this wonderful gem worth the stay. Despite all the hustle and bustle outside, inside the apartment was surprisingly quiet. Soraya was incredibly accommodating, giving us detailed instructions from the airport as well as a list of all the great eats within an easy walk from the apartment. If you're looking for convenience and comfort along with a wonderful host, this is your place.
Bibiana's place in in the centre of the city,a great location for feeling the energy of Madrid.There is lots to see in Madrid.

Our host was wonderful. Spoke English well.
the apartment was centrally located so it made our lives a lot easier. I would definitely stay here again !

The location is absolutely fantastic. The house is right in the middle of Puerta Del Sol (Madrid City Centre), walking distance to almost every tourist attraction. The hosts were lovely, and very responsive. They offered advice on places to visit, eat, etc. The bed was very comfortable. All in all, it was a great stay.

El trato ha sido de Primera, y el lugar aún más. La mejor ubicación para conocer todo el corazón de Madrid. Sí gustan de caminar, mejor aún, lo tienes todo a andando.
Esta será su mejor elección. 10 puntos.

Highly recommended if you want a nice and clean place near everything in the center. The place is shared with Bibiana and her daughter so don't come here for partying. Perfect for hang around and offers a private room which is big. Bibiana is super friendly so you can look forward meeting her!

Bibiana is a very friendly host and a very nice person! But to be objective the room is more for students or young people. You have to climb the stairs and then you can't stand or even straighten up. Shower is quite poor with a thin trickle of water. Anyway many advantages as location

What a perfect location, in the heart of Madrid. Everything is in walking distance and it is easy to get to by transit from the Airport. The pictures are exactly as the place is, it was very charming and the host was great.
Highly recommended

Bibiana's place is the perfect location for a few days in Madrid, it is close to everything you need to see the sights and also public transport for the airport and train station as well! We didn't get to meet Bibiana as she was away for work however she was always available online for us if we had any questions. The place was perfect, we love her very artsy apartment and the loft bedroom - be prepared that you may not be able to take your suitcase up there but it is a lovely spot to wake up and look out over the roof tops

Bibiana's place is the perfect location for a few days in Madrid, it is close to everything you need to see and to public transport for the airport and train station as well.
Bibiana's flat was inspiring: we loved her taste for art.
We arrived very late (3 o clock in the morning) and we couldn't get in touch with her because our phone didn't work: Bibiana was very kind: she was waiting for us and she made us feel immediately comfortable at her place.
Her attic/loft was a little low, so it was hard to stand straight. It' wasn't such a problem because we spend our time at her place only to sleep.

We loved Bibiana's place.  It looks just like the photos, very artsy!  The living room was comfortable for hanging out at siesta time.  The guest room is up a ladder in a low-clearance loft, but we were expecting that an found it charming.  The location is fabulous for walking around Madrid, so central yet quiet at night, even with the windows open.  There is a nice breeze that picks up in the middle of the night until the morning.
Great place near everything
Bibiana is very nice and everything worked well. The room and the location are very good.
The flat is exactly like on the pictures. The location is awesome and quiet at the same time. It is so well situated. We had an amazing time in Madrid.

El apartamento tiene una decoración genial y está excelentemente ubicado. Cerca a la puerta del sol se encuentra todo y la estación queda a solo una cuadra. Es en el altillo pero allí es muy tranquilo. Bibiana siempre está dispuesta a ayudar. Lo único que faltó fue conocernos. Muchas gracias.

We arrived late in the evening, neither Bibiana nor someone trusted from her could meet us. She told me to call her neighbors who should be aware of us, but no one answered and opened the door until we called Bibiana, so she called them and asked to enter us. They all were at home, but ignored our calls :) the flat itself is very compact, full of hosts' staff. We slept on the sofa, because it was too hot in the room with prepared bed (its like a second floor just under the roof). Cleanliness was moderate. Location is unquestionable benefit - in the heart of the city center, close to everything and full of cafes, stores, etc. as we didn't have a chance to speak with someone in personal during our stay, I felt lack of instructions/communication from host side. I believe this is related to Bibiana's own travel and not a regular thing. Overall, location is recommended to stay.

Very nice loft in the center of town the location is absolutely perfect!  At night you can't hear anything.  Very quiet.  Climbing up a pull-down ladder to the bedroom made even more unique.  Well done.

在相当于王府井地段儿
公寓楼里
遇见•艺术家的家
睡阁楼也值了[玫瑰]
ps 儿童房门口的穿衣镜超有爱
喜欢到无法自拔了～

Bibianas place is amazingly central. As it is an attic the room is not big nor too high, but fullfills all the basic requirements. Bibiana is very nice, easy to communicate with and very helpful. We had a wonderful stay!

The flat is a described even though the room under the roof is really small (maybe not ideal for tall people). It is very well located close to Puerta del Sol and still quite quiet in regards to its location!
I would recommend the flat for a short stay in Madrid!

A very quaint, lovely little apartment right in the heart of Madrid. Very nicely decorated which has a lot of personality. The loft has a great view of a church and tower, hearing the bells ring in the morning is wonderful. The loft is cosy yet relatively small. Be prepared to only be able to crouch - but ducking under the beams adds to the charm. The memory foam mattress is comfortable. Bibiana is a great host, easy to get hold of and is very relaxed who made us feel comfortable in her home. Great location, I don't think you could ask for a more central home. Would recommend this place when staying in Madrid!

Our stay at the Bibiana's place was great! She was very friendly and helpful! Bibiana is a very nice host! Her place was very bright and cozy! Great location! Really nice place to spend your weekend in Madrid!
Bibiana is a great host. The apartment is in a great location close to everything.

Bibiana forgot my stay so my arrival has been quite difficult but after everything went okay.
The room is under the roof which is a unique experience and the flat is very well located.
位置非常好，就在市中心，太阳门广场旁边。楼下很热闹。不过阁楼确实有点矮，我一米六都有点伸展不开。不过考虑到位置和价格也还是不错的。入住很顺利，房主很热情，有个很可爱的小女儿。在马德里一定背包背前面！小偷很多！

Un bon séjour et une excellente communication avec Bibiana !
Logement très bien placé, néanmoins, le coin nuit était sous les toits (nous ne tenions pas debout) donc pas tellement pratique, dommage.

Das war meine erste Buchung bei Airbnb, ich bin leider nicht zufrieden.Die Wohnung ist sauber und der Ort der Wohnung ist sehr gut, man kann alles bei Fuß erreichen aber leider das Zimmer ( kein Zimmer ) ist nicht bequem, mann kann nicht stehen, es gibt keine richtig Beleuchtung für Abend und sieht nicht so ordentlich aus wie auf dem Bild. Wir haben uns nicht sehr wohl gefühlt in der Wohnung deswegen haben wir uns nur zwischen Bett Raum, Dusche und Toilette bewegt. An dem Tag als wir angekommen sind , gab es niemand mit dem Schlüssel, wir haben eine Nachricht bekommen, um zu klingen bei der Nachbarschaft, wir haben es gemacht aber Niemand hat reagiert, wir haben sie nochmal kontaktiert und sie hat Jemand erreicht im Haus, der den Haupteingang aufgemacht hat nach fast 20 Minuten Wartezeit.
Madrid ist super
Dora

Bibiana's place is a very cost and homely feeling to it.
The decor and the setting of the house is lovely and very creative.
It is right in the centre- easy access to trainand nice places to eat in walking distance.
Bibiana is a lovely friendly host with a very easy approach.
Enjoyed the stay at her apartment.

I was at Bibiana and Pedro's place for a weekend with my boyfriend. Their place is perfectly located, literally 2 minutes away from Puerta del Sol, but anyway very quiet. A plus is also the furniture there. Pedro and Bibiana are really great hosts: the communication was great and everything worked both for checking in and out. Moreover their hospitality has been more than outstanding, giving us tips and making feel us home. Definitely recommended!

Bibiana habite un appartement chaleureux, idéalement situé au cœur de Madrid, et malgré tout très calme.
La chambre n'est réellement utilisable que pour y dormir car elle est difficile d'accès et on ne peut y tenir qu'à genoux.
It is a little smaller than what I was expecting, but it makes up with quirkiness!
Great location with small but lovely home.
Bibiana es muy buena anfitriona y el piso está muy céntrico. Perfecto para pasar un fin de semana en Madrid. Totalmente recomendable!

We couldn’t have chosen a better place to stay for our short visit to Madrid. The apartment is right in the heart of Sol, walking distance to Plaza mayor and several bars and restaurants. Getting there was very easy thanks to Bibiana. She was very accommodating with our check in and ensured we were settled in for a good night’s rest. The place has a lot of wonderful artwork by both Bibiana and her daughter. Truly appreciate their warmth and hospitality and would highly recommend Bibiana!

Alojamiento silencioso, cómodo, bastante acogedor y tan céntrico como a dos pasos de la plaza del Sol.
Su anfitriona es un encanto, muy amable y nos ha tratado fenomenal. Sinceramente, para nosotros era la primera vez que reservamos por Airbnb e íbamos preocupados, pero estamos deseando volver de visita gracias a ella.
Situacion inmejorable

Bibiana’s place is in an excellent location just a few minutes from Sol metro station, and a number of key attractions very close by, such as bustling Puerta del Sol, Plaza Mayor and Gran Via. The famous churros chocolateria is only a block away. Bibiana’s place was also very clean and the water pressure in the shower was great.
However, you should be aware that the guest room itself is up a steep set of stairs within the apartment, with minimal headroom such that you cannot stand upright in the room (and we are not tall) and need to crawl over one side of the bed to get to the other. We had seen the photos prior to booking but did not fully appreciate the size constraints until arrival.
Having said that, if you are simply looking for clean, basic accommodation in a highly convenient location, this ticks the boxes

Very cosy little flat with nice terrace and well located too. Also organisation was very good, although the owner wasn't there everything was perfectly arranged, and he was very responsive by phone and email.
Quirky apartment in central Madrid. Close to Atocha station for those who arrive via train from Barcelona and close to a couple of metro stops.

The flat in itself is very cosy, and very well situated in Madrid. There are plenty of good commerces around it where to buy good local food and eat tapas. The description provided on airbnb is very good and gives a realistic impression of the flat, and the terrace is very nice. The only small downside of the flat is the small size of the bathroom, but overall we had a great time in the flat I would definitely recommend this flat for a stay in Madrid. Furthermore, Vincenzo (the owner) was very helpful to sort everything out related to the booking at all stages of our stay.
Nice place to visit Madrid. The terrasse is perfect / Nice vien on the roof. Ideal to spend a good time in Spain.
Very nice Terrasse !!!

We enjoyed the apartment. The flat is really nice designed.
The terrace is comfortable and the kitchen perfect for cooking.
This place is just great for a small family. But it is not so good for a group of friends, as it just has one bathroom with it's entrance through the bedroom.

The apartment is amazing! Located between art museums and the really daily life of Madrid.
Very interesting the terrace.
Appropriate for a couple o for 3 people with very intimate friendship.
I've talked with Vincenzo and he was very professional and clear.
The only one problem were the towels' and sheet's smell, that was not very good. But you can talk with him and ask for change!
Great apartment with a lot of charm, a good location and a perfect terrace! I recommend it!

We really enjoyed staying in the appartment - great place, great terrace and great location. Just the right place for a family of 5. We had a fine communication with Vincenzo who was helpful all the way through. Madrid, we will be back!

Einfach alles perfekt:
Die Wohnung stilvoll renoviert und sauber gepflegt. Mit einer traumhaften Terrasse und dem eingebauten Glasdach als Zwischendecke in Schlafzimmer und Küche.
Das quirlige Viertel mit angesagten Cafes und Kneipen. Aber auch kleineren Läden, einer Markthalle und einem klasse Bäcker.
Alles kann zu Fuß besichtigt werden, es lohnt jedoch Metro oder Zug zu testen.
Der Kontakt mit Vin hat reibungslos funktioniert. Gerne kommen wir wieder. Lieber Vin, vielen Dank dass wir deine Gäste sein durften.
We really enjoyed staying in the apartment. Great terrace and great location.
Excelent location and absolutely lovely flat. Thanks!
The flat is fantastic and is a great "pied a terre" to visit by walk and feel the Madrid's atmosphere. It has been tastefully renovated and the terrasse is pleasant. Thanks Vincenzo ;)

This is a really cool apartment in a super fun neighborhood. Vin was very responsive to questions I had, and everything was fine, although good to note that you will be charged upon arrival for linens and towels and if you arrive early in the morning, you'll also have to pay a fee in cash for early check in. I was able to leave my suitcase in the apartment for a couple of hours after I checked out though, so that was great.
It is apparent that this apartment is "lived in", as some of vin's belongings are there (shower items, kitchen stuff) which maybe for some that would be a good thing...all in all it's a great rental. The beautiful view from the terrace and the skylights are the best part!
Me gustó la casa y el barrio. Mucho. Me sentí Mary Poppins en Lavapies. Es un pequeño ático acogedor y con mucha personalidad y a pocos minutos a pie de la plaza de Santa Ana que es mágica.

L'appartement de Vin est très agréable, il est est très bien équipé, nous nous y sommes senti comme chez nous ! Il est très bien situé à 2 minutes du quartier des musées et du métro, nous avons tout fait à pied avec nos deux petites filles. La terrasse est très agréable et la vue sur les toits de Madrid superbe !
Nous le recommanderons sans problème.

We had a really nice stay at Vin's house, it is a nice, original and charming flat. Exactly as the photos show it. The terraces is so pleasant. The area of Lavapies is very nice and even if we are in the city center the house is quiet and silent at night. The kitchen is huge and great to cook comfortably. We did not meet Vin but his friend Antonio who received us so gently and brought till the 4th flour (without elevator) a big luggage :) the house is really comfortable.
The bed were ok too. The house was clean and we found the products we needed. The only inconvenient is that to go to the wc you have to go through one room, so at night it is a bit bothering. For the rest everything was ok. If I need to rent a flat in Madrid, I would love to come back here !!
Todo perfecto. Ya es la segunda vez que voy y me encanta.

The flat is a fourth floor one without elevator but it worths every stair! The house is wonderful, the terrace a place where you can relax after a long day visiting the city, have a glass of wine while watching the sunset. Moreover we've found it very clean. The area is nice, you can find everything around, it's just five minutes walk from Museum Reina Sofia and Atocha Station, or 3 minutes walk to Lavapieds metro Station (which is one stop to the centre "Sol"). Hope to come back soon!

Staying at Vins apartment was just perfect.
I can't think of anything a place could offer more to make a trip just more perfect.

The location is just perfect because you can walk everywhere and it's till super tranquil and cool.
The flat has a stunning view over the city and is really carefully made up and super clean.
Vin is just a great guy and a very good communicator who has tipps and recommendation for the guests.

Can't wait to return there :-)

We really enjoyed staying at Vin's place. The neighborhood is amazing, next to the Reina Sofia museum, la Puerta des sol, La Latina...everything is in walking distance. The description of the place was accurate. The only thing we remarked is the size of the place looks bigger on the photos then in reality but it wasn't a problem. It's a good size place for 3 people.

Nous n'avons pas eu la chance de rencontrer Vin, mais il s'était organisé pour que l'on soit attendues dès notre arrivée.
Il nous avait envoyé un mail explicatif concernant l'arrivée jusqu'à l'appart.
L'appart est situé près dans le centre, dans un quartier très agréable pour se balader et très sympa pour sortir. Nous avons passé 3 jours extras la-bas et avons profité de cette super terrasse si rare à Madrid.
en bref, organisation parfaite, appart extra.
merci, nous reviendrons

Had a fantastic stay, our flight was delayed coming out but communication was easy with picking up keys, especially being able to use whatsapp which meant no cost as was on wifi. Flat was really nice and in great location and had a great recommendation for dinner round the corner. Terrace is great addition and enjoyed a few glasses of wine before dinner on the terrace.

This really is a very nice apartment in an upcoming area (Lavapies) close to the centre. Everything is within walking distance but two or three metro lines are close by as well. As is the train atation (Atocha) and the Park (Retiro).
The house itself is very comfortable, the available space is used in a very clever way, everything seems well thought about. Also the terrace is very nice, with a great view. Quiet at night also.
Communication with Vin and in our case the caretaker went very smooth all the way, which really made the experience even better.
I'd recommend this place for sure and when I come back to Madrid I'll start by looking if this place is available.

We had a perfect stay in Vins flat, he was extremely helpful with our arrangements,and when we asked  to extend our stay he had no problem organizing this for us. We were a family on holiday with mixed ages( 80 year old gran too!), and each of the sleeping arrangements were very comfortable and discrete. Its also a lovely quiet apartment, a really peaceful oasis, so we were well rested each morning. At the end of each day ,the fantastic sunsets from the west facing terrace were just beautiful. The kitchen was a great place to cook and prepare,with everything easily accessible, and I always had company and chat from whoever perched on a stool. The area was so near all the main attractions, we really enjoyed walking around,but we could also use the Metro ,as there were 2 stops nearby. We were so lazy that we would walk DOWN to Lavapies, then get off at Anton Martin on the way home, so that we were STILL walking downhill! They were both lovely busy areas to explore,and we felt safe walking home at ALL hours. Thanks Vin,its a great wee place.

Le logement était très bien situé (près de la gare d'Atocha et des grands musées) dans un quartier à la fois populaire et sympathique. Le point fort de l'appartement est son grand calme et sa très agréable terrasse avec une jolie vue étendue sur les toits et, même au loin, les environs de Madrid. L'accueil fut chaleureux et le logement très fonctionnel.

My boyfriend and I had a wonderful time at Bibianas apartment! It’s locaded in the heart of Madrid, we didn’t take any transport at all! Bibiana is lovely and gave us a lot of good tips !If it’s available, rent it!
Great location and the place is beautiful and super clean. Location is 10/10. Absolutely loved the place!
Viviana es una excelente anfitriona. Super recomendada
Hemos estado muy Agustí gracias a la hospitalidad de Bibiana
Bibiana is extremely helpful and welcoming. Thanks so much for having us!

El departamento esta en una ubicación excelente, cerca de plaza mayor y puerta del sol. Muy facil acceso a todos los lugares turísticos. Si bien la casa tiene un estilo muy particular y lindo, la habitación no nos resultó cómoda ya que no podíamos estar paradas ya que el techo es muy bajo. Se parecía mas a  un altillo que a una habitación. Bibiana fue muy amable con nosotras.

La habitacion esta en un  lindo atico, con todo lo que necesitas,  el colchon es comodo, al ser un atico  el  techo es bajito,  pero  la  ubicacion es perfecta  justo en el centro de Madrid,   caminando  puedes encontrar todo,   esta bien conectado a  tren rapido y metro,  y Bibiana  y su  Pareja  fueron muy amables y siempre estuvieron al pendiente de nosotros,  perfecto para unos dias en madrid  y disfrutar lo principal de la ciudad
Excellent location, friendly and helpful host, comfortable sleeping area with windows to open to let in cool-night air.
Bibiana siempre estuvo atenta a nuestra llegada y salida. Ubicación inmejorable con todos los servicios y lugares de atención cerca. El depto es pequeño pero acogedor.
The house is pretty and at a great location. It's close to the city center and metro station.

Очень уютная и милая квартира прям в центре. Спальня под крышей, на которую нужно подниматься по отвесной лесенке. Доя студентов будет вообще в самый раз, моему мужу было немного неловко, потому что передвигаться там можно было только на четвереньках, что есть небольшой минус.
Общем гостинной было пользоваться немного неловко, при заселении там была маленькая девочка, которая смотрела мультики и мы не поняли, будет ли она тут жить тоже)
Поэтому проводили в квартире минимально времени.
Хозяйка квартиры очень милая и приветливая.
Стоимость суммарная (с уборкой и сборами) могла бы быть суть ниже, так как на букинге за такую же цену (а то и ниже) можно снять двухместный хостел в центре с нормальными потолками:)

The attic is sort of afraid to bring stuff to upstairs. And it's gonna uncomfortable to tall people. But the house was REALLY close with plaza sol, and metro station. Interior was AWESOME. She is so kind and good communicate! I recommend her house :)

Where to start? We had an amazing time staying with Bibiana. The place is incredibly quirky and stylish, in the middle of the city centre, just within walking distance to Gran Via and  just about EVERYTHING. The space is really charming, and the bedroom/attic is the cosiest, most romantic place ever. Bibiana’s Italian is incredible and of course she speaks Spanish so it made out trip even better. Make sure to look at her fridge to find the polaroid we took with her when we left! We felt very welcome and we would be delighted to stay here again of we come back to Madrid. Highly recommended and 5 stars from us!
Lovely place and location.. highly recommended
La situación de la vivienda es inmejorable

Bibiana es una maravillosa anfitriona, hizo de nuestro viaje a Madrid una gran experiencia. Ella con su trato cordial y amable nos hizo sentir cómodas y seguras a mi y a mi hija. Su departamento está ubicado en pleno centro, todo queda cerca a pie y el metro está a 2 minutos.  Vuelvo a Madrid y seguro nuevamente a lo de Bibiana. Gracias a ella me llevo lo mejor de esa hermosa ciudad y de su gente.

The apartment was as described by Viviana in the description. Very very central for all kind of sightseeing in the heart of Madrid. Close to all major places like puerta del Sol, plaza mayor etc. The room is in the roof top and as described by Bibiana a little low in height. You cannot change clothes standing up. Which was no problem for us because we expected these circumstances. All in all it was a very comfortable 2 night stay at the place. Perfect location for e plotting the city and very fast and easy communication with bibiana. She also gave us good tips of local restaurants etc.
note: for people who require a high level of privacy, this place is the wrong decision. But anyhow I would recommend this place for 2-3 days just exploring and enjoying the city.
Thank you for everything bibiana and Pablo. Salut
Excellent location....perfect for discovering Madrid by foot if that's what you prefer like us. We didnt even take a taxi/ public transportation even once.
Un trato genial con una casa preciosa y muy bien ubicada. 100% recomendable

Bibiana fue una excelente anfitriona, nos ayudó en todo lo posible, nos hizo sentir como en casa y el apartamento es muy muy bonito, lo único malo fue el calor terrible que hizo esos días en Madrid... Ojalá podamos repetir

We stayed at Bibiana's place for two nights. We arrived late because of our delayed plane, they waited for us which was very nice. The place isn't very big and it gets pretty hot (in July), but they have air-conditioning that helps. The place is very clean and stylish. Very good location in the city centre.

Very central, perfect location for anyone. Cosy room but the air conditioning was awful so it was way too hot!! The room would be perfect in the winter, but just way too hot in the summer. Bibiana was very informative as a host and made me feel very welcome! Would return in colder months definitely
Very good location, very kind host. Perfect place to stay 2-3 night.

Quando e se tornerò a Madrid so già dove andare. Bibiana è impeccabile, una donna disponibile, simpatica, alla mano, non invadente e soprattutto un'ottima conoscitrice... io e il mio ragazzo ci siamo affezionati. La casa è piccolina ma molto bella e accogliente, ventilata anche nelle ore di punta. Non manca di niente. Ma la cosa grandiosa è la posizione, praticamente a un minuto da QUALUNQUE COSA, per non parlare della bellissima via su cui si affaccia, dove c'è di tutto. Basti pensare che in quattro giorni ci siamo girati Madrid senza mai prendere la metro.
Tutto bellissimo.
Ciao Bibiana, ci vedremo presto :*

Nos encantó pasar unos días en casa de Bibiana. Tuvimos las comodidades y todo estaba muy limpio, fuimos en temporada de verano y contaba con aire acondicionado. Esta muy cerca a todo y también al metro estación “El sol”. Fantástico! Si vuelvo a Madrid sin dudas me alojaría de nuevo aquí.

The location was perfect. Just a few minutes to one of the most typical places in Madrid, and public transport.
The flat was charming and unique.
Bibiana was friendly and welcoming. I highly recommend Bibianas place if you are going to Madrid for some few days.

We had a great stay at Bibinas place. The apartment is so cute. Everywhere you look, you find new details. Bibiana was very nice and flexible. The view from the apartment is amazing. Such is also the location. It was a pleasure. :)
estuvimos en Bibiana's casa para 3 noches y nos gusto mucho:) mobiliario interesante y perfecto lugar para visitar todo Madird.
The place is amazing and very cozzy. The host is super accommodating.
La ubicación es perfecta, el acceso al metro para ir y llegar del aeropuerto es muy fácil. El lugar es absolutamente lindo y acogedor.
ubicación inmejorable y un trato exquisito.
Amazing location. Exactly as described. Would def stay again!
El piso está situado en un sitio inmejorable, de muy fácil acceso, y una comunicación excelente a cualquier punto de Madrid. La decoración es ideal, me ha encantado.
In pieno centro, alla portata di tutto.. adatto per chi, come me, stava tutto il giorno fuori
Perfect location right in the heart of the city. House has lots of character,  the loft is small but was perfect for a quick visit to Madrid and the roof window was a plus :)

Bibiana’s apartment is located just in the heart of the city. You can reach by foot all iconic places of Madrid as traveller. She is such a friendly person...you will love her personality. Check in and ckeck out was flexible and we always were independent with our plans. Nicely decorated apartment. You can see, the owner is an artist:). I hope I’ll return here soon! I recommend Biniana!
살면서 다락방을 경험해볼일이없어서 특별한 경험삼아서 묵어봤어요! 호스트는 한시간늦꼬 ㅠㅜㅠㅠ 제가 있눈곳만 바닥부터 먼g가 그득그득했어요....잠옷에도 먼디가득

Bibiana's place is very cozy and comfortable. It is certainly well located about one block from Puerta del Sol, three blocks from Plaza Mayor, 4 blocks from Callao and about 20 steps from Calle Mayor. When i come back to Madrid, I will look this place up. Thank you!
Esperen lo mejor, el sitio está ubicado en el mejor lugar de Madrid centro, la casa es bellísima y la atención de Bibiana inmejorable, cálida.

Super Gastgeberin!
Super Lage!
Schlafen im Spitzboden unter den Dachbalken und ohne Tür.
Un emplacement au top!
Una excelente limpieza, arreglo del apartamento, y además una excelente ubicación. Bibiana es muy cálida con los huéspedes y tiene todas las facilidades necesarias

Great location and beautiful artwork. The decor was amazing. You cannot stand up in the attic but that was fine with me because we only came home to sleep at night. Lots of amazing restaurants nearby. Bibiana is very accommodating. For 10 euros you can keep your luggage there all day after check out. Thank you!

We had a very nice stay at Bibiana’s place. The apartment is very nice situated, not far from good restaurants, cafes and other nice places to be. Check-in and check-out was very easy since Bibiana was very flexible and easy-going.
The apartment is clean, cozy and has a lot of lovely details Bibiana brought from her trips around the world.
We recommend staying at the place of Bibiana and her daughter Mia.
Excelente locación, a minutos plaza mayor y plaza del sol

El alojamiento es lo más centrico posible, con personalidad propia y completamente acogedor. El trato de Bibiana es inmejorable y la comunicación con ella ha sido fluida. Puedo decir que ha sido de lo mejor del viaje de Madrid, no tengáis ninguna duda en elegirla como anfitriona. Si puedo repetiré.

It was amazing staying at her place! Totally in love with the room and the location of the apartment. Bibiana is very friendly. Would recommend it for sure and would love to book her apartment too for the future visit! 5/5 :)

Logement conforme à la description, c est un très jolie petit appartement plein de charme avec une petite chambre sous les toits. C est un véritable Airbnb C est à dire que nous vivons avec bibiana et sa famille. Je recommande pour un week end en amoureux
Lovely house!! 很漂亮舒服，電影中的房子
La ubicación es fantástica. Sin problemas con Bibiana. Todo perfecto
Muchas hospitalidad. Un poco pequeño pero muy bonito

Charming rustic space right in the middle of the action. An experience to say the least. The attic room is small, up an attic ‘ladder,’ but it was perfect for what I needed. Bibiana was a consummate host, and I’ll definitely see if this place is available my next time in Madrid.
Tanto la hospitalidad como la ubicación inmejorable, así como la limpieza y las recomendaciones realizadas fueron muy buenas
Bien ubicado, trato excelente, un alojamiento con una belleza peculiar y lleno de felicidad. Un sitio perfecto para escapar de la rutina.

Ha sido una experiencia genial. Nos estrenábamos con esto de Airbnb y nos ha gustado mucho. Localización inmejorable, la habitación tal y como se muestra en las fotos, no hay sorpresas y Bibiana ha sido una mujer encantadora con nosotros.
Muy recomendable!!
Recomendado 100%, todo muy limpio, una casa acogedora, bonitos rooftops y la cama no esta nada mal, descansamos muy bien.
Muy bien localizado! Gracias Bibiana
Sitio super centrico y preciosa la casa aparte de buen trato y hospitalidad
Perfect location in Madrid !

Estuvimos cuatro personas durante una semana en el ático de Vin y la experiencia fue muy buena. Está decorado con mucho gusto y la terraza es una gozada (creo que volveré en primavera para poder disfrutarla más). La zona en la que se encuentra de Lavapiés es perfecta, ya que está en una calle muy tranquila pero a un paso de muchos bares y restaurantes con encanto.

Le séjour dans l'appartement de Vin c'est bien passé. L'appartement est bien placé: proche de la gare et du centre ville (pas besoin d'utiliser les transports en commun).
L'appartement est exactement comme sur les photos et la terrasse est vraiment super!
We never met Vin, but the apartment was great! Such an incredibly great space. Great even for 5 of us.

I've just returned from a week at Vin's place in Madrid. Wonderful. The apartment was perfect and exactly as described. Clean, comfortable with a great terrace with views. The neighbourhood is very friendly with nice bars and cafes at both ends of the street and within easy walking distance to most areas you'd want to visit during your stay. The street itself is quiet in the evenings and perfect for a good night's sleep. Vin himself, is welcoming and relaxed and made sure everything was ready for my arrival. Cheers Vin and thanks for everything.
The place was great and we felt welcome to Vin's home. The place was exactly as it was described in the description. The neighborhood was nice and quiet.

This is a charming and well located apartment. The 4 flights of stairs are tiring but the private deck, ambiance and uniqueness make it worth the effort. The owner was accommodating and helpful. The apartment looks just like the photos and there were no surprises to the space. We had 4 people with plenty of room to spread out. Five to six people would also work really well. The noise level was low as it is on the top floor of an older building. The terrace is very serene with walls for privacy and a view over the balcony. I highly recommend staying here!  -Alicia in Seattle, WA
We had a lovely stay in Vin's apartment. Beautiful place, nice barrio, centric. Would go back:-)

Sehr gemütliche und saubere Wohnung mit einer wunderschönen Dachterasse mit Blick über Madrid. Wir haben uns zuhause gefühlt. Die Gegend ist auch sehr interessant mit tollen Restaurants und Bars.Ingesamt wundervolle Zeit gehabt.
Good host. Nice apartment. Well located. Good price. Would highly recommend

Vin's apartment is a compact treasure! It's furnished at the same time in an elegant and comfortable way and located conveniently in a quiet neighbourhood however within walking distance to main art museums (Reina Sofia, Prado, Thyssen-B.) and to good public transport connections (Atocha stations nearby). Vin himself was very helpful and clear in his communication. We had no problems during our five nights' stay in the apartment and we do highly recommend Vin's place. Thank you, Vin, for letting us feel at home in Madrid!
P.S. The stone floor is gorgeous and feels great to feet after the heat...

Vin is a friendly host who was very quick to respond to our last-minute request for accommodation. The flat is very tastefully presented, spacious, bright and the location is very central.  However, to justify the high cost that we paid, (same as any three-star hotel in the area), there are some important improvements I recommend, (and am confident Vin would accommodate). 1. Much greater cleanliness is required, this was in our mind not acceptable and easily solved. 2. A proper 3rd bed or mattress, my friend slept horribly on the one present. 3. Communicating the heavy slog up and down the 4 floors without an elevator, my friend has back issues and caused us some grief. And 4th, I seriously think it's poor form to charge us for towels and linen and late arrival when we are already paying for one of the most expensive flats in the area. Given the high price for this accommodation we simply expected more. Would I come back? Sure, but only if these requirements were met, there are many other offers nearby and competition is fierce.  Some elbow grease and a mini-investment and this place is tops!
Todo perfecto! la situación, el espacio, el descanso..decoración..y la terraza un extra que marca diferencias!
Great apartment and terrace. Location is very nice. Vin is very helpful and responsive, would definitely book again.
Beautiful flat ! Vin was very welcoming ! I recommand this flat !

My family stayed at Vin's beautiful apartment Madrid for five nights and loved it. Location was perfect and close to transportation, street life and major museums (you can go to Prado and gaze at Bosch's Garden of Eden every day!).  The terrace was great and the apartment itself is a jewel -- I'm an architect in NYC and I rarely see this high quality of design :).  And the host was very accommodating, understanding and great at communicating.  Thank you, Vin!!!

Wir haben uns in dieser Wohnung absolut wohl gefühlt, sie ist sehr geschmackvoll, liebevoll und auch praktisch eingerichtet - besser gesagt: designt. Und sie entspricht den Fotos und der Beschreibung. Zudem ist sie total zentral gelegen, wir haben Madrid komplett zu Fuß erkunden können, entspannte Pausen zwischendurch auf der Dachterrasse genossen, das Nachtleben quasi um die Ecke erlebt und dennoch total ruhig geschlafen. Vin hat uns sehr nett empfangen, alles super vorbereitet und uns mit Restaurant-Empfehlungen ausgestattet. Der Mail- und Telefon-Kontakt vorab hat ebenfalls sehr gut funktioniert. Wenn wir wiederkommen, dann sicher zu Vin.

The Great location, it's in the center, close to metro.
Good equipped kitchen, wonderful bed and terrific view from big terrace on the rooftop of Madrid, fast internet, everything necessary for everyday life is inside Vin's apartment.

Vin was a very good host. He was a great communicator, very helpful and friendly. His appartment was one of the best we have stayed in. THe location was extremely central, we could walk from central train station in 5 minutes and all over Madrid very easily. There are restaurants, supermarket and cafes everywhere. The appartment had all the facilities we needed. The one draw back was the number of stairs but as this is a loft apartment with great views, there is no avoiding that. Highly recommend staying at Vins.
We spend a very good week end. We enjoyed this beautiful flat and its amazing rooftop view!!!! The flat is fully furnished and very confortable. Moreover it is very well located in the city center!
We had a great stay at Vin's place. Clean and well located. Muchas gracias!

Fantastic apartment by Atocha, only a short walk to the city centre and right beside great cafes, restaurants and shops. Vin's apartment was perfect for us. The kitchen had everything we needed to make a delicious Christmas dinner! We especially loved having the terrace to look over the city and watch the sunsets. We highly recommend Vin's apartment and would love to return in summer.

I want to give Vin a big thanks for making our stay in Madrid and at his place a super special one. He is very friendly and helped us a lot by giving us tips to explore the best places, restaurants, and night life. He even made us a lovely dinner for me and my friend which i personally enjoyed a lot. Needless to say that his apartment is exactly how its shown in the pictures yet even nicer. Moreover, the location is very convenient and central. Shortly, it was a fantastic apartment. I highly recommend it if you are considering to visit Madrid. Thank you Vin!

A friend and me spent 4 days in Madrid in Vin's flat. It is a very very nice and quiet place. The photos are real. As you can see, the deco is really well choosed. With the terrace it was perfect even if we were in january ! No noise during the night, the sun during the day, sometimes it is difficult to leave the flat ! Vin was very helpfull for the organization and give quick answers. The borough is different from Puerta del sol or Gran via but we prefered, it seems to be more typical and you can find small pleasant restaurants around this adress. We will probably return. Thanks Vin.
We had a really lovely stay in Vin's apartment - perfect location, really well equipped place and Vin was very kind and helpful

Vin's place is a dream. It's a beautiful attic space with tons of light and great views. And wifi that worked without a hitch! (Not true in many other places I've stayed in Spain.) Plus, there was plenty of space for two couples, great books in multiple languages, and incredible views from the back balcony. The neighborhood (btwn Lavapies and the Reina Sofia) has tons of restaurants and bars open at all hours, but the apartment was nice and quiet. Finally, Vin was a great host. He was waiting for us at the apartment and made sure we felt at home.

Wij logeerden 4 nachten in dit appartement met onze 2 dochters. De wijk is perfect, het is 10 minuten lopen naar Plaza Mayor en er zijn genoeg eettentjes in de buurt.
Het is even omhoog lopen naar de vierde etage, maar dan kun je heerlijk uitrusten op het mooie dakterras met een mooi uitzicht over Madrid. De ruimte is niet groot, maar heel erg praktisch ingericht en alles is aanwezig.
Clean, fun, quirky apartment. Great location
Vin was a great host and the apartment was beautiful and located in one of the best spots in Madrid. Look forward to returning there!

Vin was a great host. He was at the apartment to welcome us when we arrived and was kind enough to give us some tips on bars, restaurants and other things to see. The apartment is lovely and just as described/photographed. It was the perfect base for our girls trip.

L'accueil de Vin a été chaleureux et il a ete disponible. Son appartement est vrai.ent agréable a vivre et totalement conforme à la description qui en était faite ! Je vous recommande un petit détour par chez lui et ce quartier animé de Madrid !
Win was a great host, the place was beautiful and the view was amazing. I'm absolutely coming back.

Had a great stay at Vin's flat - unbeatable location at a very calm downtown area with street full of life around it. Rooftop terrace is absolutely fabulous. Tastefull decoration, airy, stylish, all necessary amenities. Highly recommended, you won't regret it! Loved it at first site I saw it online - and it's even better in real life. Great selection of books. Just have to be careful with using the shower - keep it quick, as water overflows fast. Our host was very welcoming and helping me with taking large suitcases up the stairs to the attic. Will definitely stay there again when in Madrid. My 7 y.o. son was raving about the loft climbing the stairs to enjoy the see through ceiling.

Such a great flat. Atocha is a great part of Madrid, next to fresh food markets and watering holes. We walked to Plaza Mayor and other stunning places.
AlthoughVin didn't meet us he into diced us to Fran who was, for the whole time we spoke to him, the most enthusiastic Spanish man.
A quality stay. The view from the terrace is something that needs to be experienced. Madrid sits restfully off the back of Vins place.

A stylish and charming flat in a great location - we could walk all round central Madrid and enjoyed relaxing with the beautiful view when we got back. A few stairs but definitely worth it! Vin was very helpful, no problem checking in or out even though we had some travel disruption, and he provided some very good local recommendations. Everything we could have wanted - we loved it.

Very Nice Flat !!! Beautiful terrace! Very good location.
The decoration is wonderful! Very nice guest

My friend and I enjoyed our time in Vin's airbnb tremendously. The apartment has a lovely terrace with a beautiful view. We enjoyed walking around the area near the apartment. There are lots of cafes, tapas bars and shops and we were only 10 mins walk from the Atocha train station. Vin was very responsive to our queries. We found the living space, kitchen and living room very comfortable and practical. The only downsides were that there is only 1 bathroom and it is in the only real bedroom. My bed was in a cosy alcove, which was fine, but I did need to walk through my friend's bedroom to use the bathroom. For us, this was ok. But for others who need more privacy, it could be an issue. Also, the shower was broken. It held together for most of our week, and had goid pressure and hot water, but the tape fell apart the day before we left. I'm sure Vin will be fixing this. All in all we loved the cosy apartment, the neighborhood and felt Vin was a very good host.

Vin was a fantastic host it was easy to communicate and everything ran smoothly. The apparent was cool, quirky and very comfortable. The outdoor area catches the sun perfectly we will definitely be back!

Vin is a great host that cares about you feeling welcome and enjoy the city. The place is in a very lively neighborhood but in a very quiet street. The apartment has a lot of light and a small but great terrace. It is centrally located within walking distance to plaza del Sol and Atocha train station.
Just great!!!

Fantastic attic in a great location in a hit neighbouhood of central Madrid. The flat is compact but very nicely designed, very comfortable for a solo traveller or couple. The space is welcoming, bright, very quiet and relaxing, and the terrace has amazing views over the rooftops. Highly reccommended.

Vins place was great. He was super easy to get in touch with and stay in touch with throughout our stay. The place was very comfortable and clean and in a great location. Very close to museums and loads of places to eat and drink. Great little roof terrace with a nice view to relax.

Vin is a great host, responsive and available when needed. The area is a great starting point for exploring the city. Our boys loved their bedrooms. Great view from the balcony. Internet works like a charm.

The place was amazing ! Conveniently located and a very pretty place ! It is situated right at Plaza Mayor and we could feel the heartbeat of the city .She is very nice, friendly  and I will book this place again when I come back to Madrid !
El piso se encuentra perfectamente ubicado, tiene todo lo necesario, justo como las fotos y de requerir asistencia de parte de los propietarios será posible sin problema. Gracias por todo.
Decidimos repetir nuestra visita en Madrid y no dudamos en contactar a Soraya de nuevo, es un gran piso y una muy buena anfitriona. Hasta pronto.
The communication with Soraya was  easy and the appartement pleasant and clean in à very  nice spot with a beautiful terrace overlooking the local square.I would highly recommend it.....

Wow what a fantastic location. Walking distance to the big three art galleries. Really interesting neighbourhood with great foodie shops.
Found Soraya's map and neighbourhood notes/advice very helpful.
Huge suntrap roof terrace and a great little modern flat. Would definitely stay again

Localização perfeita! Tudo sob medida.
O marido de Soraya nos recepcionou e foi extremamente gentil. Extremamente recomendado.

We had a wonderful time in Madrid. The terrace is truly amazing, the apartment very cosy and the location perfectly central (very touristic but the place is quiet and you can go by walk anywhere)
Soraya was very helpful anytime we needed help, especially before, to plan our trip, which is really nice of her.
We only had little troubles with the wi-fi but maybe it's because of the construction at the time.

Soraya est une hôte exemplaire; accueillante, souriante et disponible pour tout information avant et pendant notre séjour.  L'appartement est remarquablement propre et fonctionnel.  Ce qui rend ce logement unique est son emplacement géographique, en plein centre des activités touristiques et tout près du quartier des affaires.

Soraya's apartment was absolutely perfect for 4 days in Madrid. It was in such an ideal location - you could truly walk anywhere. So close to the San Miguel Market and Plaza de Sol. It was right off Plaza Mayor and although a high tourist area, it was not too noisy. The rooftop was so charming, although, we did not have a chance to use it as much as we would like, in the summer months it would be absolutely beautiful. I highly recommend!

An exceptional apartment in the best possible location. An absolute gem. Soraya is a wonderful host, warm and friendly. Her recommendations for restaurants were excellent. Cannot recommend this apt enough. You can walk anywhere within the city centre. Staying further out may be cheaper, but you waste time and money travelling.
Perfect appartment for 2 people to enjoy sunny days in Madrid. Soraya was a very attentative host and helped out whenever needed. I would definitely come back. Thanks
Buena experiencia en el departamento :) lo único que cambiaría sería el wifi, de ahí en fuera todo genial.

The apartment was very nice!! Super location, very clean and everything provided what you need. The rooftop terras is awesome to relax and enjoy the sun. Check in and communication with Soraya and her Husband was excellent....They were very kind and helpful with everything and gave tipps for things to do etc.
We will def. stay here again!

Soraya and her husband are very nice and helpful. Their apartment is located in the historical center and it's convenient to reach the tourist attractions. We stay in the top floor and here you can enjoy the good views from their big terrace! We definitely recommend this apartment to our friends if they plan to go to Marid!

We loved staying here! It was hard to leave after a 5 night stay. Soraya and her husband were very helpful and kind. The location was within walking or subway distance of everywhere we wanted to go in Madrid. Dining and shopping options nearby abound. The apartment and bed were comfortable and clean.  The terrace was amazing.  The area is very busy late into the night so sleeping with the windows open was not an option. Once the windows were closed it was quiet.  It looks like the apartment has been renovated since the pictures were taken. The kitchen area is now bigger and has a sink and two burner induction stovetop. There was no longer a microwave. The wifi was usable but spotty at times. If we are fortunate enough to return to Madrid we will definitely stay here again!

We had a great trip and wonderful stay here. We were made very welcome by Soraya's husband Zoran who was extremely helpful throughout our stay.  The location is perfect - so central and yet really quiet with the windows closed. Lovely roof terrace looking Plaza Mayor.  The flat was tiny but perfect - comfortable and well equipped and the roof terrace stunning - especially in the evening.  Thanks so much

Soraya and her husband Zoran were amazing hosts! The apartment was in a GREAT location. Right outside Plaza Mayor and within walking distance of all the sights we wanted to see. The terrace was truly incredible (the main reason we booked the apartment). We ate dinners and drank wine on the terrace while enjoying the gorgeous Madrid weather - truly worth booking this place because of the terrace. Soraya answered any questions we had immediately and was a wonderful host. The only downside was spotty internet and the apartment was a bit small I think for four people. But we had a lovely stay and wonderful time. We will book it again next time we are in Madrid!

We had an amazing time in Soraya's flat. This is perfectly located and at a walking distance of everything. We enjoyed a clean flat and the terrace was absolutely fantastic! Soraya's recommendations were really helpful. Communication was easy. Would definitely go back. Thanks for everything.

Everything about our stay was perfect, accept de last day. Rain rain and ..yes more rain.
But Sona and her friends were a perfect host, since the appartment was not due to a arrival of any other guests (rain in may) we were allowed to stay a little longer until our departure.
The appartment itself is very well organized, just bring your clothes....
Central located in the city of Madrid. A perfect stay for a perfect price, Need I say more?

We had a fabulous stay in Soraya's apartment, very centrally located just at the Playa Mayor and only a few minutes walk from taxis and trains. The apartment is beautifully decorated and appointed and has everything you need. The balcony is superb, a lovely space to relax! I should mention too that the second (sofa) bed is extremely comfortable and every bit as good as a proper bed. Although you are right in the centre of Madrid there is absolutely no problem with noise, my friend and I slept really well. The shower is great too! Soraya is a very warm and helpful host, her communication was great and as she runs a bakery jut a few steps away she is always on hand if you need anything. This is the best accommodation I've ever booked on AirBnB and I would recommend it completely. I hope to be back soon. Thanks so much Soraya, you made our first trip to Madrid perfect!

The apartment is amazing, pictures can not do the balcony justice and the location was incredible and really central. Soraya was a great host, even though we didn't meet her personally, she arranged with a friend to let us into the apartment and she had left leaflets suggesting where to visit in Madrid and what sites are near. We would definitely recommend this apartment and would love to stay here again.

From beginning to end, this was my best Air BNB experience to date.

Before the trip, Soroya was very responsive to messages and helpful. We arrived quite early in the morning and were able to leave our bags at Soroya's business, which is just round the corner from the apartment, so that we could go for lunch before checking in at 2pm.

Soroya's husband showed us around the apartment, and was always on hand incase of any queries. The apartment is absolutely gorgeous - just as it looks on the pictures, and the roof terrace is unbelievable! It's very well stocked for everything you might need - we stayed for 5 days and didn't ever want for anything. It is quite compact - anything more than two adults and perhaps a child, and it might feel a bit cramped, but the use of space is excellent.

In terms of location, it is amazing - right next to Plaza Mayor and within walking distance of most things. There is a supermarket and taxi rank round the corner. It can be noisy at night, but that's what you get for staying in a city - personally, sitting on the terrace at night with a bottle of wine and hearing a busker play some jazz, was just idyllic!

All mod cons, and air conditioning throughout.

The only downside was the wifi connection, which is quite poor - but you're not on holiday to play on your phone/computer!

Would highly recommend and would go back in a heartbeat!

Soraya's apartment in Madrid was wonderful! We arrived early and were greeted by her husband who gave us a great breakdown of some sights to see in the area along with a map. The apartment was ready early which was great, and we arrived to a very clean and just as described apartment. The roof terrace has a great view of one of the arch entries to the Plaza Mayor and three local streets all coming together. We couldn't have been happier with our stay in madrid in Soraya's apartment!

Our host (and husband) were fabulous. They went out of their way to make sure we were happy and comfortable. The apartment was very clean with all the conveniences. Coffee and water were provided as were restaurant recommendations.  The towels and bed linens were of a great quality. We would highly recommend this accommodation without qualification.  The terrace was outstanding. Thank you very much Soraya and Zoran.

We had a fantastic time in Madrid and Soraya's apartment was absolutely perfect. It was in a brilliant location and the perfect size for the two of us. Very clean and all modern appliances. Soraya and her husband made us feel very welcome! We couldn't have asked for more! We would recommend it to all our friends.

Perfect location, beautiful terrace, Soraya and her team very helpful and nice. Highly recommended!
Thank you!

Thank you for such a wonderful place to stay in Madrid ... Location was perfect! Deck was wonderful .. Views of the city amazing!!! Everything was perfect !! Thanks for being so kind ... We highly recommend your apartment !!! God Bless you both !!

The absolute best part of the apartment was the terrace, which we enjoyed every day! It's perfect for people watching, having breakfast, and just enjoying the weather.
The apartment is well-kept and clean. The bed has got to be one of the best beds I've ever slept in, hotel or Airbnb. I loved the bed!
Sona and Soraya were both really nice people and answered all of our questions quickly.
Check in was very easy, even when our estimated arrival time got pushed back due to a delayed flight.
Location was pretty good, a bit touristy but expected. It gets pretty noisy outside but we couldn't hear it if the windows were shut.
Some minor cons: apartment is pretty small. Not a ton of areas to place luggage. Bathroom felt cramped and shower didn't drain water super fast. Toilet felt like it was going to fall off the wall every time you got up. Also wifi was painfully slow.

Love love loved our time at Soraya's place. The terrace is even more fabulous than the photo with the sights and sounds of Madrid. Soraya had thought of everything. She left a wonderful list of things to do, had a converter in the flat, blowdryer and even a bottle of water in the fridge. All the little details really made our stay extra enjoyable. Not to mention the location is in the middle of it all so you don't waste a lot of traveling time getting to and from your flat. Visit Botin, the oldest restaurant in the world, Mercado San Miguel, Plaza Mayor and so much more within 5 minutes. I would stay here again in a heartbeat and know you will love your choice if you stay here too. Soraya owns Mimi's Creperia below the flat which offered wonderful food and always someone there available to help. If this flat isn't available, she has two others in the same building that would be fabulous too! Thank you Soraya and Zoran for making our stay wonderful!

What a fabulous little apartment is this! The perfect location in the heart of the city but still well enough insulated to have a good sleep. The hosts were very welcoming and accommodating and it was great that we could park our luggage until check-in as we arrived quite early by train. It's a very cute and clean top apartment that has all the essentials and of course the huge fantastic terrace to chill out! It's small and don't expect to do a lot of cooking here but who would want to anyway in this city where you can have the most wonderful food on every street corner. We really enjoyed our days in Madrid, a gorgeous and friendly city that has so much to offer and we can highly recommend this apartment over any hotel room!

WOW!!! This apartment was amazing! I loved it so much! Even more spectacular than in the photos. The apartment is spotless. The bed was so comfortable, and the sheets and linens were very nice! The location couldn't be better.
A friend of Soraya's met me right on time at the little crepe restaurant. He was very kind and showed me around. I hope to return to this apartment again next summer...

I couldn’t have asked for a better overall experience in Mardid. The apartment is located in the very best neighborhood. Safe, clean, lively..etc. Check-in and Check-out occurred without a hitch. I would highly recommend staying here. I wish I was still there!!!
Great location; within walking distance of many sights of the city. Enjoyed the rooftop patio for breakfast and evenings. Furnished comfortably. Thoroughly enjoyed our stay.

Arrival was easy to arrange and there were no problems at all. The apartment was very clean and Soraya's husband spent the time to show us around the place and show us how everything worked. There was also lots of useful information provided in writing in the apartment. The air con was great which was really helpful for us Brits in the height of summer :) fantastic location for exploring Madrid and the terrace was great for relaxing and sunbathing. The area is central so can be loud in the evenings but the double glazing means that if you close the windows and terrace you can also get peace and quiet should you want it.

Zentraler kann eine Unterkunft in Madrid kaum sein! 2 Minuten entfern von der Plaza del Sol und der Metro. Wenn man es geschafft hat über die Dachbodenleiter zur Unterkunft gelangen wird man mit einem einzigartigen Blick durchs Dachfenster auf die umliegenden Dächer von Madrid belohnt. Auch ist es  gemessen an der Nähe zur Plaza del Sol nachts sehr ruhig und angenehm. Bibiana ist eine ausgezeichnete Gastgeberin und steht mit jedem Tip zur Seite. Alles in Allem eine einzigartige sehr spezielle Unterkunft. Wer das besondere mag und sich nicht an der platzoptimierter Unterbringung stört der wird diesen Platz lieben. Wer eine Hotelähnliche Unterbringung sucht bzw. gewohnt ist, nicht 100% körperlich fit ist und mit grösserem Gepäck reist wird sich wahrscheinlich an der fehlenden Stehhöhe in der Unterkunft und dem Zugang über die Dachbodenleiter der mit Reisekoffern kaum möglich sein dürfte und die zudem vor jeder Badbenutzung erst weggeklappt werden muss stören. Allen anderen die das Besondere lieben und einen zentralen Platz in Madrid überwiegend zur Übernachtung suchen wird diese Unterkunft unvergesslich bleiben. Uns hat es gut gefallen und wir kommen gerne wieder!

This is the most adorable apartment I’ve ever stayed in. At the end of every night it felt like coming home instead of just a room to stay in. It’s in a great location in Madrid. I would highly recommend staying here!
Bibiana is a fantastic host and opens her home with a huge heart!
Great private room! Amazing location
Excelente ubicación y Bibiana fue muy amable.

Estuvimos 4 dias en Madrid.. Bibiana nos hospedo de manera excelente. Muy acogedora y buena persona. Nos ayudo en todo sin ningun tipo de problema, y nos brindo sugerencias para nuestro viaje. Muchas gracias por todo!! La recomiendo sin dudas y mas tambien por su ubicacion!! Gracias Bibiana!!
El piso muy bien ubicado y Bibiana es un sol de persona.
A good host, fast responses, answers clearly all the questions. The flat is in the perfect location! The room is cosy, though definitely be aware of low ceiling :) Gracias, Bibiana!

Bibiana is an excellent guest, her flat his homely, clean and superbly located. We had the pleasure to chat with Bibiana and it was great exchange mixed with insiders suggestion to Madrid. Her ideas made the difference, thanks again.
Un lugar acogedor y con una ubicación única
Bibiana's place is perfect for new comers to Spain.  My wife and I were a 5 minute walk from everything, including subway for site seeing elsewhere around the city.
Ubicación inmejorable, cerca de todo!
Great host, perfect location, amazing apartment!! Thank you, Bibiana!

Bibiana’s place was an amazing find! It was right in the center of Madrid, only a quick walk away from anything and everything. Bibiana herself was also an outstanding host, very nice and easy to have a conversation with. I would absolutely recommend this Airbnb to anyone staying in Madrid.
Bibiana es súper atenta, la habitación es muy cómoda. El apartamento está cerca de todos los lugares turísticos y Bibiana  da excelentes consejos. De verdad que un placer.

El apartamento está muy bien ubicado, justo en el centro de Madrid, a dos minutos caminando de Puerte del Sol.
Bibiana nos atendió excelentemente, respondiendo a nuestros mensajes al momento y aconsejandonos de las dudas que nos surgieron.
Calidad - precio genial!

Our 4 nights stay with Bibiana was really easy going. She welcomed us when we arrived and gave as an introduction and the keys which was really nice.
The flat is very coasy and funktional and contains everything you might need. The room itself is in the attic. The bed was funktional but not really comfortably and we found it quite tiring not to be able to stand up straight and therefore crawl everywhere, due to the lack of head space.
The location could not be any better though!
Right in the city center and walking distance to everything!
Thanks for having us Bibiana!
BIBIANA est une hôte très accueillante .son logement est idéalement placé dans Madrid centre .le logement est très joli.
Buena anfitriona

Bibiana was an amazing host, very kind and friendly. Get place had a prime location, within a short walking distance from the Royal Palace, Gran Vía, Plaza del Sol, and Mercado San Miguel, as well as metro stops. Definitely recommended!

I enjoyed a lovely 3 night stay at Bibiana’s apartment. The attic room that is for rent in her apartment is small but ideal for a short trip and if you’re not planning to spend a lot of time there during in the day. The skylight in the room offers a nice view over the rooftops of Madrid. The location is fantastic, right in the centre of Madrid, close to transport links from the airport and can walk everywhere from the apartment. Communication with Bibiana prior to my stay was also very quick and well informed.

Si bien la ubicacion es excelente no lo recomiendo en absoluto , jamas hubiera contratado una buhardilla donde hay que desplazarse gateando y con acceso a traves de una escalera de pintor , siendo una hazaña poder subir el equipaje.
El piso es super peculiar y la ubicación inmejorable.

Great stay! The airbnb was very centrally located and very close to several metro lines.  I came from Puerta de Atocha and it was easy to get to the airbnb from there via metro.  The area had a lot of restaurants and lively music on the streets.  The room was very clean as well as having a lot of natural light and a pretty view out of the window and the bed was very comfortable . Bibiana was a great host; friendly and welcoming & fast responses to any questions.
nice and convinient
El lugar es muy peculiar, la habitación es pequeña, la ubicación es perfecta para caminar por las principales atracciones de Madrid, Bibiana siempre atenta a la llegada

El departamento está muy bien ubicado y eso le suma muchos puntos, literalmente puedes visitar todo a pie además la zona es muy segura, el único inconveniente es que el ático está muy reducido y por lo cual es un poco incómodo.
Bibiana es una excelente anfitriona, siempre está al pendiente y es muy amable en todo.

The place is in a PERFECT location, since it is walking distance from almost everything in Madrid. The room is a lot smaller than it looks and barely has space for you to stand upright, so I was crawling around the whole time, but you have a bed so it’s all that matters. The stairs to the room (in the attic) are a bit noisy, and the room floor boards creak, so I was scared to be waking Bibiana up every-time I had to go downstairs late at night. Bathroom was very clean and towels were offered. Overall, it’s a great place. Highly recommend. If you go in summer, make sure your pajamas are VERY thin, since it is VERY hot.

Tell location of the room couldn’t be better. Check in was smooth. We were a bit surprised by the size and condition of the flat and the room. In the room you can’t stand up and have to crawl. The cleanliness was also not completely satisfying. This wasn’t clear to us through the pictures.
Only good thing was the location. The “room” didn’t have an air conditioning, it was in the attic and it was extremely hot. The height of the “room” is like 1,5 feet so you have to crawl.
Vary artistic and romantic place in perfect location.

We had the loveliest stay at Bibiana's place. The location is beyond PERFECT, everything is reachable by foot. The apartment is very artistic and Bibiana was extremely nice and helpful! The room we stayed in was in the attic, reachable by some stairs. It was the cutest airbnb we ever have stayed in. Thank you Bibiana!

We wish we could give Bibiana 10 stars! The location could not be any better it was close to the metro and easy access to all of Madrid. She was very kind and approachable with everything.  She made are Madrid trip a breeze!

Die Lage der Unterkunft ist genial. Es ist sehr einfach mit dem Gastgeber zu kommunizieren, man bekommt schnelle und genaue Antworten.
Für zwei Personen ist die Wohnung optimal und sie hat einen coolen Style. Ich empfehle diese Unterkunft an alle weiter, welche nach Madrid reisen wollen :-)
Ótima localização e estadia ;) 5*
Excelente apartamento, cómodo y super cerca de casi todo lo turístico en Madrid !!! Recomendado al 100%
Bibi place had a fantastic location and was very clean.
Großartig. Zentraler geht es nicht. Gemütlicher auch nicht. Wir haben es richtig genossen, nach Hause zu kommen.
A small but beautiful apartment right in the heart of Madrid . You go out the front door right into the city center
Great location and no problem with communication! Very happy I've stayed there ;)
Great location, cool quirky place!
The place is at the heart of Madrid, easy to access key locations and do some shopping on the way back to the apartment.
Todo súper genial, el piso es súper bonito y Bibiana súper amable
Me encantó, excelente locación, cerca a todo. Muy recomendado
Un apartamento encantador, el trato de la anfitriona es inmejorable.
Great place, the location is just amazing.

Super zentral gelegenes Appartement. Wir hatten das „Zimmer“ gebucht (leider ist das nur ein ausgebauter Dachstuhl mit Matratze und daher super klein), waren jedoch alleine in der Wohnung , was für den Preis wiederum super war!
Unser Flug hatte durch ein Unwetter Verspätung, weshalb wir die 20€ für den Late-Check-In zahlen müssten, was natürlich ärgerlich war da wir nichts für die Verspätung konnten.
Ansonsten wirklich super Preis- /Leistungsverhältnis :)

Bon séjour chez Bibiana, la chambre est très petite et en haut d'une échelle, mais très silencieuse ! Le lit est confortable et l'emplacement très central. Bien pour un passage rapide à Madrid. Merci !

The location is amazing but that’s about it. The bed is very uncomfortable, the room is cranky and accessed through a folded ladder. It is for you if you do not have much regards for your comfort. The landlord is nice and helpful though.

Excellent location! Right by the square, with lots of cafes and restaurants nearby! As well as close proximity to the metro station. Location wise, this listing exceeded my expectations!! The loft was quite small compared to the photos. I’m 4 feet, 11 inches and I could only stand at the tallest peak. Not the hosts fault, but something I wish I would have known. My friend and I were sharing the space and it felt quite claustrophobic most of the time. It also gets very hot in the attic, but she has provided a good powered fan so once you figure how to operate that, you should be good.

Ubicación muy buena el cuarto si bien es chico es silencioso.
Bibiana muy atenta y buena onda.

Posizione davvero ottimale per godere a pieno della città!
La posizione è senz’altro il punto forte di questa sistemazione. Piccola, intima e molto bella nel arredamento. È perfetta per chi cerca un appoggio nel centro città. Ottima anche l’ospitalità di Bibiana, che vi farà sentire come a casa vostra e saprà anche darvi dei consigli per vivere a pieno la città di Madrid. Sicuramente un soggiorno molto soddisfacente!

Appartamento carino il cui punto di forza è sicuramente la posizione centralissima e vicina ai mezzi, tutti i quartieri del centro si possono raggiungere a piedi. Appartamento molto bello, per la posizione della stanza (nell'attico) c'è un po' da adattarsi ma ha il suo fascino. Lo consigliamo e speriamo di tornarci.

La comunicación y el trato de Vin excelente .
Fui con mi pareja y hemos estado muy agusto. La zona ya la conocíamos y nos encanta !!!!
Vin's place was great as usual - see my previews review. My top choice in madrid

Vin's place is very well located with easy access to many plazas, museums and places to eat. There are three beds, which is really nice. Slight downside is that the lights flickered while we were there but I think that could have been a temporary issue. Would recommend overall.
Appartement bien situé, calme, belle terrasse, clair, idéal pour un séjour de quelques jours.
Vin ha sido un buen anfitrión y el piso es tal y como sale en las fotos, muy cómodo y práctico. Con unas buenas vistas y una ubicación perfecta si tienes que moverte por Madrid.
Vin's place was great for our week mid week stay, it was comfortable and positioned within walking distance of all our intended spots.

Comfortable apartment! Perfect location! We didn't even use any transport - everything is within walking distance if you are used to walking in general )) Great view! And Vin was a very good host! Maybe just a little chilly in January, but you can use the heaters and the air conditioning, so that's not a problem!

good location near museums, park, and train station. great light during the day, but at night somewhat dark and could use more lamps. some nice architectural touches with wooden beams, glass ceiling, and skylights. comfortable and adequate for what you need while traveling.

Heaters were enough for the bedroom but hole and kitchen were cold. There was an AC in the hole but it is not enough. Other than that everything was perfect. Flat is in a quiet neighbourhood. It was clean also has a good decoration. And terace has a great view. I really recommend this place.
buen trato, buena gente, buen apartamento, buena ubicación, todo genial sin ninguna queja.

Appartement très bien placé, proche de plusieurs arrêts de métro et des musées les plus importants de la ville. Il est possible de marcher jusqu'aux endroits les plus emblématiques de Madrid (Sol, Gran vía, Prado).
appartement propre et bien équipé. La communication avec l'hôte a été très satisfaisante.
A recommander.

Tolle Lage in sehr netter, authentischer Nachbarschaft. Zwei U-Bahn-Stationen in direkter Umgebung, großer Carrefour an der U-Bahn-Station Lavapies, der 24 Stunden geöffnet hat. Viele Lokale, Bars, Cafés mit gutem Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis in direkter Umgebung, trotzdem ist die Wohnung sehr ruhig. Wenig touristisch aber trotzdem zentral. Gut erreichbar vom Flughafen mit dem Express Bus. Großer Pluspunkt ist die Dachterrasse nach Westen, also schön zum Aperitivo bei Sonnenuntergang. Vierter Stock ohne Aufzug ist anspruchsvoll aber der Aufstieg lohnt sich!

Attic near the center of Madrid
PRO:
- Position: 5-10 minutes walking from Plaza Major, 3 minutes from the Carrefour and some 24hs under the apartment.
-Vin is very nice, precise and reliable.
-Fantastic terrace on the roofs of Madrid
-The attic is really cool and welcoming
-No problems with neighbors
CONS
- The apartment has only one private room with a door, so there is not much space for privacy.
- Only one bathroom with a boiler, that barely allows you to have more than 5 showers (5 minutes each shower)
- The apartment is on the fourth floor without elevator
APPROVED

Great stay! The place and Vin were both incredibly nice. He even brought us an iron and ironing board half way through our stay. Few very minor things like hot water didn't last long and keys were a little tricky to get hang of (front door and downstairs  both) but everything else was just great. Everything was exactly as pictured, kitchen stocked with everything you'd need for a longer stay and was perfect for our two weeks in Madrid.

Wonderful flat with a great rooftop terrace.
Vin is very kind and an excellent host!
Very nice appartement with ideal location and wonderfull rooftop.
A wonderful place on the roof of Madrid, thanks a lot. We'll come back for sure. Regards

We spent an excellent week at Vins place! After a bussy day in the city it's a pleasure sit a while outside on the terrase. He is realy helpfull if needed !;) Perfect host, perfect location! I defenetly recomend! It's worth climbing up all way up till Your nice terrase!;)

PROS: Great view from the terrace. Lots of sun for people like to tan. Fun and eclectic decor. Close to some amazing restaurants and the Museo Reina Sofia. A 10-15 minute walk to Chueca and various parks and museums. Great for a couple or a family with one or two kids. Vin was a great communicator and greeted us upon arrival. A great value for the space overall. Would stay there again, but with a smaller group or with my partner. Everything we needed to make meals. A grocery store is nearby and a market which made things easy.
CONS: Just a few little things: a tight space for 5 adult friends alnd only one bathroom, but we made it work since we are like family. Lots of stairs for people that have mobility challenges. Clean, but not polished. Consider bringing your own pillows if you're picky. Needs new blinds on the skylights - very bright in the morning if you're a late sleeper and if you have someone in your group sleeping in the loft space. Perhaps an umbrella on the balcony or fix the awning for additional shade.
