OVERALL: Would DEFINITELY recommend this place to young, unpicky people (e.g. the bomhemian backpacker or hipster couple who likes to have fun in a cool space.) We had a great time and would consider staying again if ever again in Madrid. Thanks Vin!

Wir haben unseren Aufenthalt in Madrid und in der Wohnung sehr genossen. Die Beschreibung der Unterkunft stimmte gut mit der Realität überein. Besonders gefallen hat uns auch die Umgebung, die auf uns sehr lebendig und vielfältig wirkte!

Apartamento fenomenal, Vin es una excelente anfitrion. Solo nos puso facilidades pare  nuestra estancia en  su  apartamento. Ubicacion y calidad  inmejorables. Apartamento tranquilo y limpio. Nos sentimos como en nuestra casa. Nosotros cuando volvamos a Madrid no dudaremos en ir a la casa de Vin. Gracias Vin por todo. Fernando

Wonderful apartment in a great location! Very close to the train station, restaurants and main tourist attractions. Vin responded very quickly to all of our questions. The apartment was very clean and the terrace was amazing. I would definitely recommend this apartment and would stay here again!
Alles wie beschrieben! Haben uns wohl gefühlt.
Vin's place is great and it was easy to communicate with Vin. Stayed there for a business trip with colleague and everything we needed was there. Great value for money and I would definitely return.
Great place for a romantic escapade .  Close to everything...!!
Apartment is very lovely, very close to the center. I stayed there 2 days for business, it was a perfect location.

Madrid is a great stad and dat appertement van Vin ligt in the middle of the city. During our stay of four days we were able to do everything by feed. There are museums, a market, the central train station and many shopping and entertainment facilities are within easy reach.The apartment of Vin is very original. The beams of the attic are visible, many loving details and custom made work. It is cheerful. Especially the small roof terrace was wonderfull. The contact with Vin was great.
Amazing cozy apartment with an awesome terrace: The ideal place to start a morning with a coffee overlooking the city and waiting for the sun...

Vin's flat is great. Nice location. Clean and confortable. And... with a terrace :-)
Will stay there again in the near future !
Another stay at Vin's flat, and again a great experience, cute flat, lovely terrace and great neighbouhood,  recommended!

Vin was a nice host; communication with him was pleasant and he reacted very quickly to our messages.
Vin's flat is located extremely central. You can reach all points of interest in only a few minutes by foot.
Everything in the appartment looked like in the photos. Though in the very center of Madrid, the appartment is surprisingly quiet.
We stayed there with 2 persons and had lots of space; but I would not recommend staying there with more than 4 persons.
In summary: Next time I will be in Madrid, I would like to stay at Vin's place again!

Spacious, clean, quiet, centrally located, close to the major museums, shops and restaurants.
The view over the city from the rooftop terrace is amazing. The beds were comfortable and the kitchen has everything you need.
Vin was a great easy going host, attentive to our needs. A perfect place to stay in Madrid.

Precioso ático con muy buen gusto en pleno centro de Madrid. La terraza un plus, sin duda. Con todo lo necesario para una estancia estupenda. Muy limpió y luminoso. Nos sentimos como en casa. Muchísimas gracias, Vin!!
Atento cordial al igual que Fran servicial en todo momento. Repetí Lena la experiencia

Perfect location, great place.
Thank you, Vin!
Piso muy bonito! Nos faltaron toallas y la llave nos dio un par de sustos! Pero el sitio es perfecto

Good stay, excellent communication with the host, calm and central neighbourhood  and very nice view from the terrace. The only downsides were too much light in the morning and the shower. Overall would recommend this place

The apartment is in a beautiful, central location - 5 minutes walk from fantastic galleries, but on a quiet street. The terrace is fantastic - sun at all times of the day, but also covered option. You can see a huge sunset over Madrid, and eat outside. Vin was really helpful with everything, and even waited for us for 40 minutes after the agreed check in time as we were late. Highly recommend the apartment, we had everything we needed and were very comfortable.
A charming Almodovar like attic with an terrace to enjoy your morning coffee and late night wine up on the roofs. A delight!

I would stay here again in a heartbeat. It was the perfect place for my daughter and I — more than comfortable and sizeable for the two of us — and in a great location, very central and walkable to most points of interest. We loved its charm and how unique it is *and* that it’s so quiet. It was sparkling clean with towels and freshly made beds and Vin was a great host, greeting us upon arrival and responsive throughout our stay. Love this place!
Clean, exactly as described, full of books:) terrace with amazing view of  Madrid, great location - very close to city center by foot.
Another lovely stay in Vin’s apartment. Great communication and clean and delightful apartment with great views
Vins place was wonderful. Nice peaceful and quiet but a short walk away from lots of fun stuff like food and flamenco.
Vin is a very kind host! His flat is tastefully decorated and perfectly located. We felt at home. I highly recommend to book this flat. We had a pleasant in Madrid :)
Great place, great guy! Perfect location.

I stayed at 2 listings by Vin, both are amazing places and very central. Vin is really nice person who responded very well and quick to communication. I will go back there defiantly when I am back to Madrid
Recomendable para familias con niños, el sitio céntrico y tranquilo, sin apenas ruidos a la noche.

This fun flat with an amazing terrace is in a great neighborhood in Madrid. We are able to walk everywhere we wanted to go from Retiro Park to the Rastro to the Plaza Mayor and Mercado San Miguel.  I would definitely recommend this flat for an authentic experience in Madrid.

Logement atypique avec beaucoup de charme et très agréable à vivre. La terrasse est un vrai plus. La vue est exceptionnelle. Le logement est très silencieux. Le quartier est très vivant et bien placé pour les visites. Il y a des commerces à  proximité même un supermarché ouvert jusqu'à minuit. Je recommande vraiment le logement de Win.
Cozy house, great location!

Great place, super central, wonderful roof top terrace with a gorgeous view.
Vin was also very nice host.
Highly recommending this spot.

Accueil très chaleureux
Vin est top...
L’appartement est parfaitement situé dans Madrid...
Bref,c’est top
quartier agréable. appartement bien agencé, Belle terrasse. Royal en couple.
Excellent and very charming place! View is marvellous, location superb. Worth every step in the stairway!

What more can I say this place was awesome, very convenient for what I needed and looks just like the pictures. The cobble stone floor gave it that authentic feel and the view from the terrace was awesome. I will stay here again later this year.
A great apartment in an excellent location - the rooftop terrace is really nice. Vin was a great and welcoming host

This is the type of place you wished you lived in permanently. It’s the perfect open studio plan still with a private master bedroom. The rooftop patio makes the stay worth it all on its own. The neighborhood has everything - food, cute streets, and markets. We walked to many places in the city from here - central location. Would highly recommend!

Probably the best place to be in Madrid.
It is much more central than I expected.
Bibiana is very nice and always answered my questions quickly.
If you want to visit all the main points of the city, this is the place to be.

Hermoso lugar, muy coqueto su apartamento.  La Sra. Bibiana es todo amor, nos encanto la ubicación, cerca de todo, puede uno deslizarse caminando a cualquier lugar.  Mejor imposible.  Se siente uno como en casa con la Sra. Bibiana.
Bibiana was super communicative and kind. Highly recommend!

Ottima esperienza. Bibiana è stata fantastica. Ci ha accolto come se fosse stata la nostra sorella maggiore. Ci ha dato tantissimi consigli su come muoverci a Madrid e sui posti da visitare. Ci ha consigliato tantissimi locali della vera Madrid. La posizione dell'appartamento è fantastica. Vicinissima a tutto (metropolitana, locali, musei, ecc). L'unico punto non al top è stata l'altezza della Camera in mansarda che era più bassa di come ce la immaginavamo. Con con un po' di spirito di adattamento ci siamo subito abituati. Nel complesso consigliatissimo.

Bibiana’s house is cozy and nice.. excellent location, everything at walking distance. the only thing that was  inconvenient was that the guest room has a really low roof and you need to crawl which is very uncomfortable and makes it impossible to move around. The room has very basic amenities lacks fan, mirror etc.

Ottima esperienza. Il posto è favoloso in quanto ha una posizione centralissima. Nelle vicinanze trovi davvero di tutto (metropolitana, locali, divertimento, luoghi culturali, ecc.). Bibiana, poi, è stata fantastica. Gentilissima e bravissima a darci consigli su come muoverci e su come vivere al meglio la vera Madrid. Sembrava di essere ospitati da una sorella maggiore. Unico aspetto non al top:
l'altezza della Camera (in mansarda). Era um po' più bassa di come ce la immaginavamo, ma con un po' di spirito di adattamento ci siamo abituati senza problemi a quegli spazi. Nel complesso l'esperienza è stata molto positiva.

La casa di Bibiana si trova in posizione davvero comoda e strategica. Bibiana è molto  simpatica e disponibile. L'alloggio è  in un bel palazzo d'epoca. La stanza essendo in una mansarda è un po'scomoda  (dalle foto si vede) Al momento del mio soggiorno la casa era un po' disordinata e non pulitissima
Logement hyper central, idéalement situé pour découvrir Madrid le temps d'un weekend!
Location is great. Everything is comfortable. The host is very nice. You need to climb a ladder to the room. The room's a bit dusty. People who have dust allergy must bring your own medicine.

La casa di Bibiana si affaccia letteralmente su Palza Del Sol, quindi posizione centralissima!
Tanta ospitalità, simpatia e naturalezza, una bella occasione per vivere la città condividendo la casa con una host del luogo!

The location of Bibiana’s apartment is amazing! Close to everything. The room is a bit small, but manageable overall, and Bibiana is amazing! Easy going and welcoming. We felt at home immediately, and she made us so comfortable while hosting us.
Una habitación muy cómoda y en un lugar increíble- tuvimos un visita muy memorable.
Todo genial, Bibiana es encantadora. No hemos podido pasar mejor fin de semana! Muy recomendable. UBICACIÓN INCREÍBLE!
Bibiana’s place is truly in the middle of the city. Extremely easy to get anywhere you’d like. She is very friendly and the place is surprisingly quiet for how downtown it is.
Bibiana est très sympathique et réactive dans la communication! Merci :)
5 star location for exploring Madrid Centro..
Todo inmejorable. Bibiana es muy simpática y nos ha ayudado en todo lo que hemos necesitado. La casa es muy cómoda y bonita y está justo en el centro de Madrid. Nos ha encantado alojarnos aquí.
Genial ubicación! Buena relación calidad-precio. Bibiana es una persona muy natural, con mucha frescura y amable. Gracias!
Perfect location in the center of Madrid. Within walking distance from so many attractions, restaurants, and bars.
Muy bien todo! Bibiana es un encanto y el piso está muy bien ubicado.
Es muy acogedor ☺️ y con una increíble ubicación
La comunicación con Bibiana ha sido estupenda, muy amable, nos hizo sentir como en casa. La ubicación del piso es perfecta. ☺️
Superbe vue et emplacement parfait. Bibiana a été super avec nous !

Check in smooth (the mother give us the key) . Much smaller than you might expect, be careful where you hit your head, some dust can drop! The house itself is very central, the livingroom is OK (when you can use) and the kitchen can be used. We were there to spend a few days and I don't think we will spend more of those there. Bibiana herself was not very friendly to us, on the last day she even made us find the pandoro box, we finished before, under the stairs (just imagine if we didn't notice and we were going down during the night then i could not write this review)
She never explained us anything about where and how to throw the trash or how the house worked generally. On new year's day we had dinner in the room preparing everything in advance because she needed the kitchen from 7:30 pm and that we could not practically stay in the house ... The room is very small and standing was impossible (don't even think about it if you don't are an umpa lumpa).
Anfitriona muy simpática, todo bien y sin problemas !

Bibiana is a cheerful and helpful host. She can speak multiple languages flawlessly, including italian.  Her home is warm and comfortable, with a very creative and colorful atmosphere. All the essential services are good. The position is perfect, right in the city centre.

Very nice flat perfectly situated in the city center. A charming appartement !
Bibiana was very convenient and responsive :)
super bien situado

Buen hospedaje por su calidad-precio. Perfectamente ubicado en el corazón de Madrid. Bibiana es una persona excelente, amable y dispuesta a ayudar.
Lo recomiendo!
Appartement charmant, hôte très agréable, bon séjour chez l'habitant, à noter que la chambre est sous les combles

Ubicación perfecta , la habitación es pequeña pero el colchón es muy cómodo y la relación calidad precio es muy buena . Bibiana te ayuda en todo lo que puede y es muy buena la convivencia en el piso .
Para repetir !!

Mi primer viaje en solitario en Madrid y sin duda ha sido el lugar perfecto. La comunicación con Bibiana ha sido excelente y el piso es gebial, gran localización en el centro y bien equipado. Un ambiente muy agradable durante mi estancia!

This apartment is in a fantastic location. It is located within walking distance of absolutely everything we did in Madrid.

We had 4 of us the first night which was tight but it worked. The remaining days it was just my husband and I and that was perfect. We enjoyed sitting on the terrace in the mornings and the evenings.

The apartment was stocked with some basics like sugar and olive oil which made eating in for the odd meal easier. There are so many great restaurants though that we did not do a lot of eating in!

Thanks Soraya!
Fabulous location in walking distance to explore the city.loved the terrace and great shower!

I was unable to let Soraya know we were running late for our arrival but she was amazing when we finally got there. The apartment is in a fantastic location with a terrace that is perfect for breakfast in the mornings while you watch the city come to life. Very quiet and comfortable with everything you would need in a base while you explore Madrid. Plaza Mayor is less than a minute away and many free tours leave here and Puerta del Sol is less than 5 mins away with shopping galore and easy access to the metro. Definitely recommend Soraya as a host and this accomodation as a perfect base to get to know Madrid.

This apartment is fantastic, in an amazing location and had everything that we needed. The rooftop balcony was a great place to unwind at the end of the day. Soraya was the perfect host and provided some terrific recommendations for local restaurants that we tried and thoroughly enjoyed.  What a great experience this was, next time we visit Spain we will be coming back to stay here again!

Would stay there again.
Great location. Everything in order and the terrasse was the greatest.

The apartment is within walking distance of many sights of the city and in a great location. We enjoyed the rooftop patio in the morning and evenings. Furnished comfortably. Soraya was a perfect host; she makes you find information and also answers immediatly when contacted.

Soraya's communication throughout the entire process was amazing. I had a lot of questions and was always inquiring about one thing or the other and she would get back to me within minutes. I was very impressed with her accessibility.

The apartment was as described and could not have been more centrally located. Pretty much anything and everything you could need was within walking distance.

The terrace is an awesome feature which I haven't really had before in an AirBNB experience. We were able to enjoy it by having some wine with jamon y queso in the afternoon hours.

Check-in was simple. She was waiting for us in the restaurant below and everything was explained to us. Suggestions were left for us on a printout.

The terrace unit did not have a washer and dryer, but Soraya was kind enough to allow us access to the 3rd floor unit, which was vacant, in order for us to do our laundry.

Although you're in the middle of it all, and it's really loud at night in the area, being that you're on the 4th floor, the night is silent as can be up there.

Overall, we were really pleased with our stay and with Soraya. If in Madrid again, we will certainly come back here.

I was only staying three nights in Madrid and was thinking of a hotel, but couldn't find one that I liked so turned to AirBnB and found this gem of an apartment! Tucked on the edge of Plaza Mayor (you can see one of the arched entryways into the plaza from the terrace), this apartment was perfect for my husband and me. I really appreciated the exceptional use of closets and cupboards to cleverly store things. Well stocked kitchen, bathroom, plenty of fluffy towels and the best bed/pillows I have encountered apartment hopping in Europe. But the star is the terrace: it was such a pleasure to have coffee each morning and watch the city wake up and each evening over a glass of wine, watch the throngs of people strolling around and vendors hawking their wares. I can't wait to go back.
The place was beautiful and perfectly located. Everything was very nice and the terrace was very large. Highly recommend.

This is the definition of a perfect place to stay. The apartment is clean, cozy and neat with a comfortable bed, nice sitting area and an unbeatable terrace right above Plaza Mayor in the heart of the city. Lots of windows provided terrific natural light and air flow through the apartment.

Soraya and her husband were great hosts, responding to any questions we had quickly and completely. They also left a great map of the city with extensive restaurant, grocery and sightseeing recommendations that was invaluable. Their recommendations led us to one of our favourite meals in Spain at the oldest restaurant in the world and the best churros con chocolate we had in the country.

All the sites were within walking distance and we didn't use any transit through our stay in Madrid.

This apartment cannot be beat. I mentioned it before, but it's worth repeating. Sipping a glass of wine on the terrace looking down on the plaza in the late afternoon is just a magical experience.

This is the type of listing that defines why I travel with Airbnb. Can not recommend this enough.

Tout est parfait dans cet appartement! Il est petit Mais hyper sympa. La situation est top. On y reviendra! On a pas attendu pour la remise de l'appartement. 1 ere reservation avec Airbnb et ca a ete parfait
The apartment was perfectly located and had. Lovely rooftop patio that we enjoyed. Clean, bright and well appointed. A good value in a wonderful city

Soraya and Zoran were gracious hosts and we were greeted upon arrival.  This unit was cozy, comfortable for two, but the outdoor balcony added more space.  It was not a problem since were out all day every day. Since the Plaza Mayor was less than 50 steps away, it was easy to navigate the town, just look for P. Mayor.  There was a grocery close by and we were able to get our basics very easily.  Restaurants and shops were numerous so there's a lot to choose from, there's even one on the ground floor.  We had minor issues but were immediately remedied.  Since they have several units in the building, I was thinking that if we travel with friends next time, we can rent several apartments and be together in one spot yet have our own space.  I highly recommend!
Lovely location,just a few steps from the Plaza Mayor. The apartment was very quiet when we closed the windows. We enjoyed the rooftop patio!

This apartment is one of the best places to stay in Madrid - walking distance to almost everything with a stunning view. The apartment is clean with everything you need. The terrace is the crowing glory, we spent many hours there for coffee in the morning and a vino in the evening. Soraya and her staff at the cafe across the street were extremely helpful and sweet and they helped us with anything we needed.
Same as in the other apartment...

Asunto oli siisti ja kuvauksen mukainen, ja asunnon omistaja todella ystävällinen ja sai meidät tuntemaan itsemme tervetulleiksi. Asunto oli todella keskeisellä paikalla lyhyen kävelymatkan päässä keskeisimmistä nähtävyyksistä. Suosittelen lämpimästi!
Un très bel appartement, extrêmement bien situé. À recommander pour tous les couples qui souhaitent passer un week end en plein centre de Madrid. Je le recommande vivement
Great place, very clean and huge terrace just as indicated on the pictures. Friendly host and easy and uncomplicated handover of keys. We were three people and had an awesome stay!

highly recommended! Soraya's apartment is compact, modern, elegant, super well located... and offers a 5-star patio from which you can watch the street life below. shower, kitchen, bedroom all excellent. although she was on travel when we were in Madrid, Soraya was very responsive and made us feel very welcome. the apartment is about a 2 minute walk from the "Sol" metro station... meaning you can get to anywhere in Madrid v easily. I've stayed in airbnb's all over the world, and Soraya's was among the very best.

Amazing terrace and so close to Plaza Mayor. Location was very central and it was easy to walk anywhere in Madrid.
Very clean and modern apartment. There is a full bed in the bedroom and a queen sized futon in the living room.

Definitely the place to stay in Madrid. You're right next to so much including the museum of ham!!!  Soraya was a great host and her place is amazing. Unfortunately, the heat gave out the first day, but it was fixed immediately. That's the attention to hospitality that not all airbnb hosts have - but Soraya does!
This place was amazing. The balcony and area couldn't have been better. Right in the middle of everything.

Great location, lovely terrace and clean rooms. We would definitely come back.
Wifi is not suited for doing remote work. Maybe this will be fixed in the future. Its fine for holidays though!

マヨール広場で行き交う人々を上から見下ろせるほど近い場所に位置しているアパート。４歳の子供を連れていましてが、テレビでディズニーチャンネルがついており地味に助かりました。テラスは広く、とても快適。寝そべったりできるので贅沢な気分を味わいました。
部屋は4人で泊まると少し狭いかもしれないが、子供を入れて三人だったので問題なく泊まれました。
アメニティもたくさんあって本当に何不自由ない滞在でした。
Excellent central location.  The owner is very helpful.  She let me drop off my bags at her place of work downstairs prior to my check in time. Patio is great!  Apartment has everything you need.
This apartment is comfortable. great location. Small but use the space wisely. Everything works. suitable for a couple or two travelers. very cosy.
Central et animé, quartier sécurisé. Joli point de départ pour visiter et apprécier Madrid.

Best for 2 Personen in the middle of the City.
The communication to Soraya was great and very fast.
The Terrasse is not only for smoker and the apartment had always what we need. Best place to go shopping, eat Tapas and the museums are near to go. We stand there for one week in January and I mean it's a good place for a individual travel.
Heiko

We had an amazing time staying at Soraya's place. The location is perfect - right in the center of the city overlooking the entrance to Plaza Mayor. We interacted mostly with her husband, who was extremely helpful throughout our entire stay. We will definitely be staying here on our next trip to Madrid!
Amazing location and great for relaxing in the sun

This apartment is absolutely lovely - perfect location, clean, furnished with everything you need, and the balcony is an absolute must. You can hear the city, the people, the music and still relax in your own beautiful space and view. Soraya, her husband and friends were all easy to access and wonderful to meet. Would definitely visit again!
Place to be! Cosy and lovely apartment! Best sun terrace in town 🌞🌞🌞

Great location & beautiful apartment in the heart of Madrid. They were very flexible with our check-in time & helping store our luggage post-check out hours. Private deck is wonderful. Would definitely recommend & would return for another stay in Madrid! The only watch-out is that it is small, perfect for 2 people.

This airbnb did not disappoint, clean, simple, decorated very cute and I loved the balcony!!! I never met Soraya but she had a friend meet us at her cute Crepe shop and we were able to get settled in right away and everything was great. The location is incredible. It's loud because it's a popular area near Tio Pepe and the Sol Metro, but you are right in the heart of Plaza Mayor so we definitely knew that when we booked the place. The view was great, every night we sat on the balcony and watched the crowds go in and out of Plaza Mayor. The bed was extremely comfy and it was just enough space for 2 people. The bathroom is a little small, if you don't mind small spaces then this is a great place. All the amenities were there, the WIFI seemed great, never had any issues. Unfortunately, my phone was stolen outside of her crepe shop one night, so my friendly reminder is to keep everything safe and not out in the open or in back pockets, even for a second! The friend who let us into the airbnb, also called our cab for us when we left and he was very nice and helpful. Very friendly people work at Mimi's Creperia which made the experience all the better. Thanks for having us Soraya, we absolutely loved your cute place!
Can hardly find a better deal than Soraya's place!!

Our stay was absolutely perfect!  While the apartment was a bit small, it was exactly as we expected based on the pictures and description. It was comfortable, extremely clean, and well stocked with everything we needed, including umbrellas. Of course, as others have mentioned, the pictures do not do the terrace justice. Check-in and check-out were seamless, and the location was perfect. What more could you ask for?
we had a great time in madrid, nice appartment, top location, nice view. good communication wit soraya. everything was great! marc

The view from the terrace was very nice, and you could see plaza mayor. The apartment was cozy, bright, and clean. It was within close walking distance to endless restaurants, the different plazas, markets, sightseeing, and the metro. We were slightly confused with the shuttle on our way from the airport and Soraya was more than helpful when we called. She provided many exciting and delicious suggestions with easy directions on a map, and our favorites were the markets! Soraya was not available when we arrived, but her husband received us and helped with our bags. He was welcoming and didn't hesitate to tell us to contact them if we needed anything.
Muy céntrico y con muy buena atención de Bibiana. Perfecto si no eres muy alto (la habitación está en el ático)
Buen lugar para quedarse, todo muy limpio y cerca de muchos lugares para conocer, lo recomiendo 100%

Es literalmente el mejor lugar para quedarse en Madrid. Ubicacion , precio y la mejor Host. Tuvimos un problema y fue super resolutiva y comprensiva. Admirable. Limpio y hermosa decoracion y comodidad.
100% recomendale.

Esta habitación es ideal si estas de paso por Madrid y quieres conocer el corazón de la ciudad, porque esta muy cerca de todo, Puerta del Sol, Plaza Mayor, Gran Vía, etc. y moverse es muy fácil, en metro, patinete eléctrico o caminando.

La ubicación es un regalo, está justo en el centro y tienes todo muy cerca para ir caminando, tanto Gran Vía, El Retiro, Malasaña, etc.
Además, el piso es muy coqueto y estaba todo muy limpio, dispones de una cocina muy equipada.
Bibiana es muy agradable, atenta y contesta casi al instante a todos los mensajes.
100% recomendable.
Ubicación, limpieza y trato impecable. Perfecto para parejas con ganas de visitar toda Madrid y poder descansar en qualquier momento del día.
Logement très propre et idéalement placé pour visiter tout à pied.
Per chi vuole entrare nel cuore di Madrid

Great location! Cozy loft apartment. Nice and friendly hosts. We had a great weekend.
Be aware that the room is in an attic with a ladder, so not for old hips 😉
The room is very warm, when the sun is out. But the host provided a fan, which was helpful.
La ubicación es inmejorable. Está todo muy limpio y el ambiente súper cálido. Cumple con lo que promete. Bibiana y su familia son muy agradables.

La ubicación perfecta al lado de la Puerta del Sol. Pudimos movernos caminado por todo el centro de Madrid.
Bibiana, siempre muy amable. La cama muy cómoda. La buhardilla tenía vista a los techos de la Madrid antigua.
Gracias por la hospitalidad.

Bibiana was great at accommodating us, very clear directions to get to the flat and easy process for checking in and out.
The flat is in a super central location, very convenient if it’s your first time in Madrid and don’t really know your way around it.
The room is tiny and with low ceilings, however we knew we would only be there to sleep so it didn’t really bother us.
Maybe something to keep in mind if you’re planning to be around the flat for some time.. it could get a bit intense with the very small space. But overall, perfect place to spend the night and continue exploring the city!

Location is on point, close to walk to most things that are known in madrid. Place is fine, have in mind the roof is very low in the attic room. The fridge had a lot of moldy vegtables other than that clean and different flat to stay at. The communication with the host was not the best as she did not reply to my texts thru Airbnb the day before arrival so i had to call her early morning on check in day. Theres a little window in the room that i loved

La ubicación es perfecta! Si lo que buscas es una habitación simplemente para dormir, este es tu sitio.
Bibiana fue super amable en todo momento.
La habitación en sí, se encuentra en la buhardilla, entrando por las escaleras que se ven en la foto. En ella no te puedes poner casi de pie lo que dificulta un poco el moverte, pero nada grave.
Lo único negativo es que el baño estaba en obras durante el día, lo cual no se nos comunicó con antelación y hubiese sido un detalle.
La limpieza estuvo correcta.
Great flat with a sunny terrace!
Light, bright, quirky apartment in an excellent location with a fabulous terrace. My friend and I had a wonderful time and would recommend it to others visiting the city.

Perfect!  Stayed in 2 places in Madrid, 1 outside and this was by far my favorite. Stylish, convenient, comfortable. Near great restaurants and metros. Lovely patio to hangout and great space to hangout in. Perfectly equipped with whatever you need

The flat is really well located in a very special district in Madrid. It is quiet inside but very lively around.
The furniture is really trendy. It is pleasant to spend time inside and around and at a walking distance from all the best spots in the city.

Great space with good amenities, it’s comfortable with a good location. Heads up to future guests, it is up 4 flights of stairs which was no problem for us but could be for the elderly or impaired. Second thing is, call your Uber’s early if you use them, it can take a minute to get back to the area where the apartment is :)
Appartement agréable, très bien placé avec une super terrasse. La rue est calme dans un quartier animé, nous avons passé un excellent séjour.

Good location; average cleanliness; good host speed to reply; late check in fee for this place so watch out; lots of stairs; building under construction so can be LOUD in morning; kitchen appliances need attention; good value for price; would stay here again!

This is a bijoux apartment, creatively hewn out of the loft space. We particularly liked the roof terrace and the creative decor. Better still, and elevator is being installed for those that do not wish to traipse up four flights of stairs.
It is in a very lively area, close to the centre, the station and Reina Sofia, but is a peaceful, quiet haven. We really enjoyed our stay.
Note access to the bathroom is via the master bedroom.
Great location, super stylish place, intimate terrace, excellent host

La terrasse est le vrai atout de cet appartement, nous y avons passé tout notre temps présent dans l'appart. Le quartier est aussi très vivant mais pas bruyant ce qui permet de profiter amplement de l'extérieur. La cuisine est fonctionnelle. Une salle de bain et des toilettes accessible via la chambre.
L'endroit est vraiment très agréable. Et un ascenseur en construction permettra d'accéder aisément au 4è étage. Très belle vue de la terrasse où il fait bon boire son café le matin ou une bière fraiche le soir.
The place is nice but the stairs are something else. Seems like they are installing an elevator but be careful.
Vin is a friendly, organised, and helpful host. The apartment is lovely, and the outside terrace is great! A good location, and Vin's tips for the local area were a nice touch.

This place has everything you want! A great location, a stylish apartment with a thoughtful touch where you will feel homey immediately - and this amazing rooftop terrace. It is easy to spend a great time here, if you are traveling with family or friends. The access to the bathroom is through the master bedroom and the other sleeping places are only separated by curtains, which results in a lack of privacy. We did not mind that but I think its good to know. Otherwise, GREAT place!
Place is cool.  View from balcony is OK. Neighborhood is OK.
Very nice apartment really well located and equipped in Madrid. Chilling in the terrace was an amaizing Madrid experience. Totally recommended.
Great space

Vin's flat is just amazing, great decoration, the kitchen and common areas have everything you need to feel at home.
The location is also great! cool bars and restaurants around.
If you ask me what was the greatest thing of staying at his, was the books selection he owns. Bolaño and Nabokov * -*
Would definitely stay there again :))

So comfortable appartment with nice rooftop terrace in walking distance for many places. Vin, thank you one more time for hospitality and useful information regarding arrival, parking and restarauts. I'd recomend you for my friends.
Todo tal cual se ve en el anuncio. Nos recibió en persona y nos dio explicaciones de sitios cercanos para poder comer, etc... Sin duda repetiríamos
Excellent location! The apartment looks great and you can walk anywhere as it centrally situated. There is a lift, newly installed, so you don't need to go up 4 flights of stairs.

This place is by far such a beautiful spot! It was my friend and I’s first time in Madrid and couldn’t picked a better Airbnb. This place is perfect for 1-4/5 people. Easy access to a lot of main attractions as well. Vin made the booking an check in process so easy it was a piece a cake. The best part was that he lets stay past our checkout time with no extra charge as our 2nd Airbnb check in was not until 3pm. Highly recommend Vin.

Vin's apartment is nice and very centrally located and is a good place for a short term stay in Madrid. It has a pretty view over Madrid as described and a lovely terrace. For a longer stay especially in winter we would recommend it only partially.  There are radiators in the flat, but the stone floor (that definitely looks very beautiful) stays cold and the shower capacity is maybe ok for 1 person, or if one uses little water, maybe 2. The flat is smaller than it seems in the description and fotos and the equipment of the kitchen is quite basic. However a really good thing for longer stays is the washing machine that we were able to use. The furniture has already seen better times, e.g  the sofas are quite worn down. We had problems with the internet- but Vin tried and managed to solve them super quickly, which we highly appreciated. We also liked, that the apartment has a lift! We can recommend the place, but think it is probably good to update the description and/or fotos.
Un gran lugar, con una hermosa vista. Es un piso alto pero cuenta con ascensor. Vale la pena. Es un lugar comodo y con estilo en un buen barrio.

Vin's place is fantastically located, with easy access to metro, restaurants, bars).
Check-in and check-out was super easy. We could even do a late check-out (fair fee applies) which was very convenient as our flirt was late in the day.
It is listed as accommodating 7 people, however we were a family of 5 and the table only seats 4, which made meals a tight business.
The reason why I gave the place a lower star is because the bedroom really needs an upgrade, you can feel some spring in the mattress, pillows are beyond old and full of stains, and one day the duvet cover got out... the blond-stained duvet was not a nice sight. For the rate charged, the main room could get an upgrade.
Very nice place, definitely recommended!

Vin was organized, easy to communicate with and responded quickly to questions.
Location is outstanding, and the place is unique and fun, had everything we needed
Recommend to anyone looking to stay in Madrid.
Thanks again Vin
Great location and fabulous host
Adresse très recommandable : la communication avec Vin est très facile, c'est quelqu'un de très arrangeant. L'appartement correspond à la description de l'annonce. Très propre, très fonctionnel.
Amazing apartment in the Center of Madrid! Very cosy. Thank you

Amazing apartment in a fantastic neighbourhood and the terrace is awesome. What a view. Super comfortable, has everything you need. Probably my favourite place that I’ve stayed in Spain. Highly recommended, would gladly come again.

Amazing location. Could not be better. An easy walk to Plaza Mayor, Prado, Retiro Park, etc. And great tavernas and cafes and markets within a minute's walk. The location in Madrid could not be better.
The balcony is lovely with a great view and, on a bright day, is a nice spot to grab a coffee and catch your breath.
The flat itself is, to be fair, exactly as described. But do bear in mind that there is only one bedroom (through which you access the bathroom). The two other beds are fitted into alcoves with very low ceilings in the living area. They are separated by shower curtains that fall down at the slightest touch.
The kitchen is pretty basic but fine.
If you were a family or similar, I don't think this would work.
For us - a friend and I looking for a base to explore Madrid - this suited us well enough and we had a great weekend in this perfect location.
We had a great stay at Vin. The apartment is ideally placed and the terrace allows you to enjoy the evenings. We highly recommend.

Had an awesome time at Vin's place!  Great communication leading up to our stay.  Location was ideal - right in the middle of everything.  Short walk to museums, metro stops, and world class food!  Apartment was quiet at night.  Great home base for a week in Madrid.
A beautiful apartment in the sky. The elevator was so helpful. This apartment was very easy to enjoy. Thank you Vin and Nabilia!
This is a great apartment-quirky, comfortable and interesting with a fabulous view over Madrid. Ideal central location and a friendly, warm welcome from the host. Thank you 🙏

The apartment has a lot charm, is original in its setup yet very functional, the terrace is very enjoyable, the beds are comfortable and the location is great with lots of bars and restaurants and markets. Yet the street is very quiet so you can rest properly at night
The location is great. Walking distance to museums, shops, restaurants and transportation. The big terrace on the roof is a great place to hang out.
Séjour entre amis dans l’appartement de Vin qui est très central pour profiter de Madrid. Appartement climatisé et belle terrasse. Cuisine bien équipée. Vin est très sympathique.

We absolutely loved the physical location of this apartment (in a very cool neighborhood close to wonderful cafes, museums and so on), the uniqueness of the apartment's design, its comfort (the beds were incredibly comfortable and the living room and kitchen were thoughtfully arranged for great for conversation), and the lovely outdoor deck area which was such a relaxing space to sit -- truly a bonus. Beyond this, we appreciated Vin's very clear communications and his warm welcome upon our arrival. We knew exactly what his expectations were, how everything worked and how to get in touch with him with ease should we need anything. As a final comment, the elevator in this building is wonderful and quickly takes you up and down. When we are in Madrid again, we will want to stay at Vin's lovely apartment and we will recommend it highly to others.
Very cool space close to everything I needed. Vin is a great host, flexible and friendly. The location is perfect to begin Madrid wanderings from and return to as a quiet oasis.
We had a lovely stay. Great location and beautiful views. Vin was truly easy to communicate with.
Great stay, wonderful location and host
Super appartement, tellement bien situé, charmant, excellent rapport qualité prix. On a adoré.

Vin's place was amazing, and so was he. He met me at the unit for check-in and was very communicative when I needed to reach out to him. He gave a lot of good recommendations for restaurants nearby. The place was clean, on a quiet block, and the view is absolutely gorgeous as well. I needed a chill place to stay before heading back home, and this place was perfect!
Great place very recommended

Great apartment on a quiet street yet right in the middle of everything. We were a quick walk to the metro, nearby markets, and lots of restaurants and cafes. Also a pretty quick walk to the museums and Park El Retiro. The apartment felt quite spacious for the size and the terrace was perfect, even in the cooler temperatures we had during our stay.

Vin’s place is amazing in a really cool area of Madrid. There are tons of cafes, bars and restaurant in the vicinity - meanwhile the apartment is on a really quiet street so no noise from the nightlife. The apartment is uniquely designed and decorated, yet practical with all the amenities you need. We can’t wait to come back to awesome Madrid and stay at Vin’s place again!

Amazing apartment, in a great neighbourhood. Lots of great cafes and produce shops nearby, galleries at the end of the street and fun nightlife but the flat is quiet and peaceful. Vin was helpful and the apartment is cute. Dream stay!
Vin's place is centrally located but in a perfectly quiet block. Everything about his apartment is charming, comfortable and convenient. I would recommend staying here and would stay here again.

Great place! So cute… very cozy and calming space after busy day of exploring Madrid. Beautiful outdoor area with an amazing view of the city. Very quiet. Kitchen was stocked with basics and well equipped for meal preparation. We are an older couple who are on restricted diets and can’t eat out every night. The local markets were great for purchasing fresh meats, cheeses, produce and all the extras! The bed was very comfortable with loads if clean sheets, comforters and towels available …Great Great neighborhood… perfectly located and easy to manage. Vin was there to greet us and was immediately available upon request..Really nice guy who was sincerely concerned that we were happy and going to enjoy our visit..We hope to stay with Vin on our next trip to Madrid and I highly recommend you do to!!! CRDN

Posizione perfetta vicina a tutti i comfort, host gentili emetropolitana a due passi.
Ottimo per brevi pernottamenti a Madrid.

Todo bastante bien, trato correcto aunque creo que deberían actualizar los servicios de los que disponen. Cama muy cómoda e ideal para solo dormir y pasar el día en Madrid ya que la habitación es pequeña.
Very friendly host in this shared apartment.  Really beautiful and interesting decor.  Fantastic location for exploring the best of Madrid.
Excelente ubicación host muy amable 100% recomendado

Bibiana is very friendly and welcoming. The flat and the room have a lot of charme, however it is quite small. We just traveled with bags, with a suitcase it would have been difficult. The location is as central as it can be, all the interesting sights of Madrid can be reached walking.

ES:
Gracias Bibiana por nos haber recibido!!
La ubicación es perfecta, cerca de la Puerta del Sol y de las principales atracciones de Madrid, lo hemos hecho todo caminando y disfrutar aún más de las belas calles desta ciudad. El piso es super guay y acojedor, te sientes como fuera tu casa. No podría recomendar más :)
EN:
Thank you so much for having received us!!
The location is perfect, close to Puerta del Sol and from Madrid's main attractions, which allowed us to walk most of the time and enjoy even more the streets of this beautiful city. The flat is super cosy and cool, you'll feel at home. I couldn't recommend it more :)
Nice location! The apartment is at the heart of Madrid and close to everywhere. Hosts are also very welcoming

Wonderful little place in the heart of Madrid. Very clean, well-equipped, charming, and in a fabulous location. The little terrace with a view and the peace and quiet right in the center of a very lively city made it perfect. Excellent communication with Vin and Guasi. Thank you both!

This was the perfect place to stay for our weekend trip! The apartment was clean and modern yet with a cosy and chiq feeling to it! It truly met all our expectations and more! Vin was also such a friendly and reliable host and made us feel so welcome and safe! His guide to bars and restaurants in the area was also very helpful during our stay. The apartment really has the best location: in the middle of Madrids cosy and lively city life with a large variation of restaurants and bars. Yet the apartment is really quiet so you can get a really good nights sleep. Whenever we go back to Madrid again, this will be our place to stay!

Great location! Shops, restaurants near by. Easy checkin. Friendly, responsive host. Great views from terrace. Walking distance to attractions. Easy to get taxi/Uber. Cons: At the time of our booking there were 73 pics and few were accurate. Couches are stained and worn and need replacing or reupholstering. Two of the beds are lower to the floor than expected. There was no sitting or sleeping space in loft as described. The bathroom has extensive water damage with paint peelings around window. Dining room chairs have screws missing and therefore are wobbly and unsafe. Ceiling in the 2 alcove sleeping areas have severe water damage to the point of crumbling. You can’t run the heat and the washing at same time or the circuit breaker will trip and will need to be reset. This happened to us 3 times. We only did one load of laundry. The shower wasn’t draining and flooded the bathroom during our first shower of our first night (he fixed it the same day we told him about it).

Vin’s apartment was undoubtedly in the most strategic area for the kind of trip we had in mind. He was extremely responsive and accommodating. Id like to specify that we were traveling with our baby and Vin went out of his way to provide everything we needed to have a comfortable stay (without having to ask). Thank you so much!
Great host and fabulous location. Could get to the art museums.

Perfect neighborhood for exploring Madrid.  The apartment is in a great neighborhood, safe and quiet but an easy walking distance to all of the activities.  The patio was the kicker.  Perfect place to watch the sunset or have a bite.  Very nice extra!
Vin’s a great host, and his flat is top notch. Great location (loved Lavapies), with a lovely terrace and unique layout. It’s definitely worth booking if you’re lucky enough to see it available!
Espacio mágico, en la mejor ubicación posible. Vin lo hizo todo muy fácil. Totalmente recomendable.

Vin is a very hospitable host. Helpful and clear. His apartment is in the perfect part of town to enjoy Madrid to its magnificent best.
Gracias.

We had a great stay in Vin’s apartment. The terrace is what really makes the place stand out - during our stay in April we had sun on the terrace from 10 am to sunset with great views of the city rooftops.
The apartment itself matches the description. A bit worn, though, but clean.
The location in Lavapiés is very central, in walking distance to main attractions in center Madrid, and with two metro stations only 5 min. away.
The street is surprisingly quiet - even when sitting outside on the terrace we could only vaguely hear the city noise as a low rumble, even though we very just a few blocks away from busy streets.
Communication with Vin and his assistant Cindy was easy, swift and very informative, before and during the stay. Very nice to have two sets of keys.
Repetí, es muy acogedor y coincide completamente con la descrición.Muy recomendable

Terrific location. Quiet in the evenings with good double window insulation. 4th floor terrace, facing west is outstanding!  Beautiful sunsets and morning coffee. Hip, open design, best for families as 2 beds are in the open design. Kids loved it Bath is a little awkward as one has to go through master bedroom, but fine for families. Well equipped kitchen. Easy access to transportation, museums, and Centro sight seeing. Vin response time is quick. Elevator and top floor location is great! Loved our stay.

Vins place is wonderful ! Everything was as described and better . We made great use of the roof top patio along with the well equipped kitchen .
I would gladly stay there again the next time I’m visiting on Madrid !!’
Es la tercera vez que disfruto de este sitio tremendamente encantador, con una ubicación inmejorable y una terraza maravillosa. 100% recomendable

Hermoso departamento en Lavapiés, con una vista tremenda de la terraza que da a una calle tranquila aunque esté en un barrio muy movido. Vin era muy serivical y amable. Un detalle es que para ir al baño hay que pasar por el dormitorio. Además, la ventana del dormitorio no se abre, asi que hay que tener la ventana del baño abierta y dormir con la puerta al baño abierta. Lo de las ventanas no nos causó mucha incomodidad, pero es bueno saber. Nosotros fuimos con nuestra hija de 1 año y mi madre de casi 75 años, y las dos lo pasaron bien allá. En la terraza hay que estar atento con niños, pero eso siempre. En total fue una muy linda experiencia pasar unos dias en este departamento!
this was my 4th to 5th time staying at the apartment and I always enjoy my time - I always chose Vin's apartment in Madrid because it is lovely and in a great location and Vin is always so welcoming

Vin was great, terrace was the best, incredible view (after being in a few places where I couldn’t see anything, this was a must).
Nice area, thankfully not as busy as the very centre but still close enough to walk, local shops are good too.
Only real negative was the external door key was a little tricky, but Vin responded quickly and I figured it out.

Great place and a fantastic location, never needed to do anything but walk to every place I wanted in the city center. Just between the Prado and Reina Sofia museums, 10 minutes walk to each. And the balcony is great !!!
Everything was perfect!

Muy agradable departamento, muy bien ubicado. Vin está muy pendiente de todo, super accesible. La zona está cercana a pié y pocos minutos de bares, restaurantes, sitios para visitar. Algo limitado el espacio para 5 personas dado el tamaño de las habitaciones que tienen las camas en el piso y un solo baño.
mr vin was very hospitable and his flat was cozy and clean
Logement super bien placé on fait tout à pieds. Chaleureux et confirmé aux photos.

The location is truly amazing, you walk outside the front door and immediately you get a buzz and sense of the City. Lots of restaurants and bars are within minutes walking, so too grocery shops and really everything you need. 2 Metro stations linking you to the rest of the City are right there. Finally, the view from the terrace, is simply wow !

Firstly, let's talk about the location – it couldn't be more perfect! Nestled in the heart of Madrid, every corner of this vibrant city was within arm's reach. Whether we wanted to explore the historic streets of the old town or indulge in some shopping, everything was just a short stroll away, including many bars and restaurants.
The moment we walked in, we were greeted with a bright, spacious, and impeccably clean space that instantly put us at ease. The decor was stylish and modern, with thoughtful touches that added a touch of charm with a nice terrace.
But what truly sets this apartment apart is the incredible hospitality of the landlord, Vin. From the moment we booked our stay, Vin went above and beyond to ensure that every aspect of our trip was perfect. Not only did he provide us with detailed instructions on how to get to the apartment, but he also took care on us during our stay.
Muchas gracias, Vin, por una estancia increíble!
We had a super few days at Vin’s apartment which is wonderfully located to walk everywhere. The neighbourhood is full of great cafes and buzzing with local people .
everything went smooth and easy
Beautiful loft in a beautiful neighbourhood. Would definitely recommend

Loved this home and location. Very cute with private rooftop, good wifi. and great neighborhood (near so many good cafes, markets, and all the museums and train station!).
Highly recommended. Would stay here again.

Had a great stay at Vin's place! He was so responsive and helpful with accommodating an early checkin. The location is great for walking to the museums and other central attractions. Highlight is the beautiful rooftop terrace! Location is lovely and quiet for sleeping. Thanks Vin!

Love this place - so stylish and comfortable, perfect for my teenage son and I. The terrace is fabulous and we really loved the area, so many great shops, bars and restaurants and all of the hotspots are easily walkable from the apartment. Vin is a fantastic host and was flexible about check-in and out. Gracias! We’ll definitely be back!

The rooftop is gorgeous. Perfect for starting your mornings with the sunrise. Vin is a great host, responds quickly to messages, and if a friendly person. From the stone floors to the exposed wooden beam ceiling, this property is fantastic

Vins place is near the train station and walkable to local fun cafes, bars and restaurants. The outside balcony is fabulous for early morning relaxation and evening wine , tapas or a cocktail. The flooring has an old world charm about it

We had a fabulous stay at Vin's beautiful apartment! It was just as described, the surrounding area was full of shops and restaurants and bars, very walkable to the metro station. The terrace was the best part though--the view was outstanding, and it was very peaceful to have a cup of coffee out there in the morning and a bottle of wine at night. The birds flying overhead were amazing! Thank you Vin for sharing your amazing place with us! My daughter and I had the best time!

Couldn't have found a more perfect place to stay in Madrid than Vin's place. Incredible location, unparalleled view from the terrace, and an air conditioned oasis in the summer heat - all made that much better by Vin's warm and responsive hospitality. After having had a bit of a nightmare housing situation that left us scrambling to find last minute accommodations, Vin really saved the day. Thanks Vin!!!

We had an incredible stay! Beautiful apartment, excellent location, communicative and helpful host.
The only hiccup was the apartment was quite dusty when we arrived so we had to clean up before we could get cozy. But other than that, 5 stars!

We really appreciate the easy and transparent communication which made our organisation super easy. When we arrived at the place we were surprised coz it looked better in real life (especially terrace). The neighbourhood is awesome and the location is very central.

We had a great stay at Vin's place. It was perfect for what we needed, in a great location, and we especially loved the rooftop terrace. Thank you, Vin, for your proactive communication and flexibility!

Gemütliches Apartment mit prima Raumaufteilung und einer tollen Dachterrasse mit Blick über die Dächer. Vin war sehr gut erreichbar und der Check-in lief ganz problemlos. Wir haben uns sowohl im Apartment als auch in der Gegend sehr wohl gefühlt und würden hier wieder übernachten.
Very cute quirky apartment - the location is walking distance to the main attractions and many good bars and restaurants

Vin has taken me in at the last minute and saved me. The place is at a great place to walk everywhere and discover the city in the best way possible. Apartment itself is also a very beautiful place with a beautiful terrace and a kitchen. My stay in Madrid has been in a very stylish place to brag about. Vin has also been very helpful in everything I needed and my favorite person in Madrid so far!
Vin's place was great. Very quiet, close to everything, and a great space. Vin was very responsive.
Super nice host and a super nice flat. We had a fantastic stay and definetely recommend
Location, location, location. Right in the middle of everything and somehow also a quiet residential neighborhood. A cozy apartment with nice design touches and a sweet little roof deck.
Unique and cozy place close to everything. Vin was an excellent host. The place had the most stunning view on the balcony, and all the amenities you'd need. Highly recommend!

Vin’s apartment was perfect for our family of three. My partner and I enjoyed the views from the patio and cozy kitchen. Our young daughter loved the two nook areas to create a fort and art studio. There are so many incredible restaurants in the area. The neighborhood is a perfect mix of homey and vibrant. Vin was an incredible communicator throughout and we would absolutely look to stay here again if our travels find us back in Madrid.

Fantastic attic apartment in the heart of Madrid. Easy walking distance from museums, restaurants, bars and everything central Madrid has to offer. Vin is a great host and I would not hesitate to return.

Very very kind and helpful Vin, and a the apartment, a diamond in Madrid's heart.
Outstanding
Lovely spot and very responsive host.  Loved it!
Awesome stay !
De Primera!!
Buena atención y ubicación, las fotos un poco diferentes

Totalmente recomendable. La localización es inmejorable, a 10 minutos de la mayoría de los lugares interesantes. Importante que pesar de ser un quinto piso, tiene un ascensor que funciona. La habitación es una buhardilla muy acogedora perfecta para descansar tras un largo día de turismo. Todo el apartamento es precioso y acogedor y el trato ha sido super familar.
Excelente ubicación, gran atención. Bibiana (host) ha sido una persona muy cálida que ha puesto todo a nuestra disposición para sentirnos como en casa.
Genial! Ubicación espectacular, trato cercano y amable.
La ubicación es inmejorable, todo está muy bien comunicado, el Metro está a unos cuantos pasos, la comunicación con Bibiana fue muy buena.
특별한 감성의 숙소가 좋았다. 키를 놓고 나왔는데도 친절히 해결해주셨다. 스페인 가정집 느낌을 원한다면 혹은 해리포터의 심정을 느끼고 싶다면 이 곳을 추천한다.
Very nice family and great room right in the centre of Madrid!
Muy buena inquilina, atenta y respetuosa. Experiencia 10
Para repetir
Good place

We had a great Stay at the apartment and would go back any time! The hosts are very welcoming and kind and made sure our stay was as we wished it to be. They also gave us great recommendations and coffee in the morning :) The apartment is really cute and feels like home instantly. The room is located at the attic and is really cosy. We enjoyed staying in till noon looking outside the window above the bed. Thanks for the great experience in Madrid :)
I was a great stay! The place has a lot of charm and we felt welcomed. Amazing location. I recommend.

I loved my stay in Madrid. The host was warm and welcoming and great with communication. The building is wonderful. Amazing heritage elevator and stair kept in perfect condition. The home is amazing, it’s architecturally fantastic and everywhere you look are personal touches. Fun fact: You can open the rooftop window and listen to the 9 o’clock bells morning and night.
Todo fantástico! La ubicación inmejorable y el trato con Bibiana genial. Hemos pasado un fin de semana estupendo, repetiremos.
great great location!!  Hosts are very nice.
The room was clean and the flat had everything you need. However, the ceiling in the bedroom was really low and we couldn't stand up. The location was amazing and the host was very welcoming.
Compartimos solo algunas horas con Bibiana y su familia, pero ellos fueron muy amables en todo momento. La ubicación del departamento es excelente, cerca de todo.
Our stay in Madrid was amazing! Bibiana and her family were so friendly warm and welcoming. The location is ideal to visit Madrid and the bedroom was perfect for us! A great experience❤️
Excelente lugar y ubicación. Me gusto mucho la estancia.
We werden heel goed ontvangen op een top locatie. Hebben een heel fijn verblijf gehad.
Superb location, lovely loft space!  Bibiana is a great host
Posizione perfetta, casa colorata e accogliente. Ti senti a casa!
Apartamento muy acogedor, muy bien ubicado!!

We stayed at Bibianas place for 4 days and for us it was the perfect room. Everything was as mentioned. The Location is insanely good - you can reach everything by foot. Bibiana had always time to give us recommendations for restaurants or locations to Go to and she was always up for a small chat over our small daily adventures, which we appreciated.
If you are not afraid of hights, we can highly recommend Bibianas Place for your trip to Madrid! :)

Bibiana is a great host, very kind and friendly. The apartment is in a great location, very colorful and comfortable. The wifi is great for those who work from home office. We hope to come back one day.
Sencillamente muy bueno, Una gran anfitriona y su marido también.

Soraya is an excellent host. She communicated efficiently during the booking process. She met us at the apartment as planned, and spent time showing us around the place and providing tips on enjoying Madrid. The apartment is in a great location just outside of Plaza Mayor, and has a large terrace overlooking all of the activity associated with the square. This apartment is perfect for 2 guests touring the city.
An amazing apartment in a great location right in the heart of the city. Already looking to return again! :)

100% as shown in the pictures, though somehow felt larger! We were very happy with our choice of the attic flat. While the inside space was smaller than the rest of the building, it was more than enough for us to sleep, make some basic breakfast, or relax inside... and we loved the patio to enjoy the lovely weather and some coffee or a glass of wine at any time of day. Amazing people watching, and you felt really in the middle of it all with Plaza Mayor directly in front of you.
Soraya was very helpful leading up to check-in, and her husband was wonderful in getting us oriented when we arrived. They leave a fantastic list of recommendations in the area, that we used to find some really incredible eating and cultural experiences.
Everything clean and felt pretty new. Soraya owns the whole building, and she and her husband have an ice cream shop and restaurant in view, so you have comfort knowing you can get help if you need it through the app or in person.

Once again a great experience !!! Perfect location , great welcome . The view on your private terras is amazing ! Definately come back !
Many Thanks to Soraya .

This apt is perfect for two people.  It is clean, small and functional. This apt is very bare bones but that was as expected.   The main draw is the AMAZING balcony--pictures do not do it justice.  We spent the majority of our time out on the balcony.

GREAT location.  Seriously, I don't think it could have been better.  It was very quiet due to the seperate bedroom, despite being in heart of Madrid.  We loved the patio!  It was so fun to sit out there at night and listen to and watch the people down below.  The bathroom looked brand new.  The apartment is not huge but was just fine for 2 people- we had plenty of space.  The elevator was nice after a long day or with luggage, since it's on the 4th floor.
The flat is great and location couldn't be more central. We walked everywhere from the flat. The terrace is just amazing. Loved it!

This is a very nice, clean, modern and well equipped apartment with a perfect location in the hart of Madrid. The apartment was clean and the host easly received you even by late arrival. The flat is in principle designed for two persons, but by using the apartments below more persons from the same travel company can also stay there and be together.
The terrace is really comfortable and enlarge the apartment significanly.
Soraya and her husband appeared very gently and treated us well. Highly reccomendable. We will return.

The location is AMAZING, and the terrace is the highlight. But with being in the center of everything comes noise. Getting any shut eye here was nearly impossible, people are partying until all hours and it seems as soon as that ends, street cleaning and people opening their business begins. It also happened to very windy when we were here, and the door to the terrace kept slamming shut (it wouldn't stay closed). The power went out so I couldn't reach the host by wifi until I went out and found a bar with wifi. But it was addressed promptly.  Like the other reviews say, the space is tiny, but it works fine. Not much in the way of amenities - I wish even more towels had been provided. The restroom is typical of other European restrooms. Again, you are renting this place for the location and the terrace.

Super schöne Wohnung mitten im touristischen Zentrum Madrids. Die Terrasse ist genial! Super Aussichtspunkt um das Treiben zu beobachten. Und wenn es einem nach einer Weile zu heiß oder zu laut wird oder zu sehr nach Fritierfett riecht, kann man sich in die klimatisierte Wohnung zurückziehen und bekommt von all dem nichts mehr mit. Für zwei Personen ist die Wohnung absolut perfekt!
Brilliant- would definitely recommend this

Bel appartement, amusant dans sa configuration, lumineux et confortable, avec cette terrasse unique, et tout cela au coeur de Madrid.
j'espère pouvoir y revenir !
Merci, et peut-être à bientôt.
Dominique

Wow wow wow!! Absolutely amazing apartment in a brilliant location. Roof terrace is INCREDIBLE, bed is comfy, shower is great. Check in was easy and accommodating my early arrival. All round absolutely fantastic. I'll be coming back!
Soraya is the perfect host! Very kind and helpful - and then she knows everything there is to know about Madrid. My very best recommendations!
The location and terrace made this apartment exceptional. Everything was perfect and I would stay here again if I were to ever revisit Madrid.

Don't hesitate...book it! It is a wonderful apartment and right in the centre of everything.
It is well equipped and spotless.
The terrace is a gem, a real sun trap. We spent many hours on there.
Soraya has thought of everything. There was a coffee machine and the coffee pods, kettle, toaster, hairdryer and even toiletries.
The beds were really comfy.
It was easy to get to on the subway or €30 in a taxi.
All shops and restaurants are on the doorstep.
It may be a tight fit for 4 people but the terrace gives more space.
We would definitely recommend this place and return.

Recommend this apartment highly! It's small and comfortable, perfect for two or maybe three if you sleep on the sofa. My husband and I stayed for three nights and although we arrived late, we were greeted accordingly by Sorayas husband. The contact afterwards between us and Soraya was attentive. Everything you need is nearby. The apartment is very close to Plaza Mayor, Puerta del Sol, to a 24/7 super market, bars and restaurants. The best part is the terrace! Perfect to have your morning coffee while Madrid is waking up - or a glass of wine while the city goes to sleep. If you're allergic to noise maybe you should find another place, but we weren't at all bothered by locals strolling the streets until late. Also a plus: The shower is great - and there's even an elevator in the building. We will definitely try to book this wonderful and cosy apartment again during our next trip to Madrid.

Compact but very efficient and comfortable apartment.  Handy to have a fully equipped kitchen (dinnerware, cookware, etc.).  Great location - handy to many sites and the metro.  Real gem of the place is the terrace, overlooking an entrance to Plaza Major.  Great spot to wind down with a bottle of Rioja after a long day of exploring this beautiful city.

Incredible location - overlook Plaza Mayor like a King or Queen in regal splendour. Enjoy Soraya's amazing hospitality, excellent local tips, and the wonderful architecture, culture, and hubbub of Madrid. Short walk to everything, yet insulated by virtue of rooftop location.
Amazing on all fronts!
Incredible location.  Great deck and cozy space

Perfect! Perfect! Perfect!
The apartment is spotless, the air conditioner works perfectly, the terrace is spacious, located steps away from Plaza Mayor, within walking distance to major historic sites, restaurants, bars, and shopping areas.
Soraya is very responsive!
When we travel back to Spain, we will stay here again!

We had a great stay at the apartment. The arrival was smooth and Soraya gave us all the information we needed. The location is superb and everything with the apartment was as expected. We could put our luggage in her business after checking out and it works well for us. Highly recommendations

Amazing apartment in a very central location! Everything is, in my opinion, within walking distance. Soraya was very quick to reply to any questions I had and was helpful with an early check in. The roof top terrace is amazing and makes up for the small apartment. I would absolutely stay on my next visit to Madrid! No doubt about it. The apartment was newly refurbished when I stayed in it and didn't quite match the pictures.

I think everything has been said what there is to say about this apartment. It is in an amazing location right next to the Plaza and everything you need is right on your doorstep.
The flat itself is clean and tidy and has everything you need for a short stay in the city. The balcony is a fantastic feature and allows for lazy afternoons and evenings watching the world go by.
I hope to visit Madrid again and this flat will be my first port of call for a place to stay that is for sure.

Soraya's apartment is a dream! We stayed one night in the 3rd floor apartment and 2 more nights in the penthouse. Both apartments are gorgeous and have fantastic view!
Saroya has exquisite taste, she uses high quality bedding, tiles, coffee maker, etc. A/C and WIFI works great.
The location is excellent for visiting Madrid. We walked to all attractions, very convenient, plenty of places to eat and to shop. We did not need public transportation except on arrival and departure.
The roof terrace is quite big and amazing! We enjoyed our coffee in the morning. There is an outdoor shower but we didn't use it.
Saroya and her husband Zoran are truly super host! We thoroughly enjoyed our stay and highly recommend this place.

This is a  cosy flat in a very city center with a big roof terrace, well equiped and clean.  3 minutes walk from metro station Sol, close to everything! Perfectly fit for couple.  Streets around are very busy till late at night, but don't worry - the flat is well isolated from outside noise and the bed is very comfortable.

Very nice flat. Perfect for two people. We have been welcomed by Soraya’s husband who was very nice and helpful. The terrasse is amazing and the location of the flat is perfect between the Plaza Mayor and la Puerta del sol! There is everything you need for short or l’on stay. I would definitely go back there for my next stay in Madrid.
Todo bien, no esperábamos que fuese a estar tan limpio y tan bien dotado, la única pega que si ponías 2 fuegos a la vez se saltaban los plomos, pero lo recomiendo.
Soraya is a great host.

We loved staying at Soraya´s Apartment! Though it is small, it has everything you need and the huge Terrasse is a big bonus. It is perfectly maintained and clean and cosy. Soraya is a warm and caring host. The location ist perfect. If we go to Madrid again, we will always ask if this apartment is available first. Great experience. Thank you Soraya.

Das Appartement hat eine tolle Lage. Es ist zwar klein, aber extrem gut eingerichtet und die supertolle Terasse ist einfach grandios.
Die Lage ist fantastisch.

Nice little spot, very central and with a splendid terrace. However, if it’s raining hard for the entire duration of your stay, as it was for us, it’s slightly less useful! Without the outdoor space, the flat is very small, but comfortable nonetheless.
Small apartment but well-appointed and perfect for one person or a couple. The location is superb and the terrace wonderful. Soraya was very helpful with local recommendations. Would return.
Appartement impeccable et très bien situé. Il a contribué à rendre notre séjour très agréable.  C'était encore mieux que ce que nous avions espéré.

한국인이 보게 끔 한국어로 작성할께요
마드리드에 간다면 이 집을 꼭 추천하고 싶어요. 일단, 위치가 진짜 좋구요 마요르광장 솔광장 딱 걸어서1분거리입니다.
주변에 맛집이나 술집이나 유명한 보틴, 버섯요리집까지 바로 옆에있구요. 집에서 커피도 내려먹게 되어있습니다. 화장실도 너무 깨끗하고 수건도 넉넉합니다. 물론 드라이기도 있구요. 제일 좋았던 건, 베란다에 큰 테이블과 일광욕을 할 수 있는 베드가 두개가 있습니다. 요리해서 와인이랑 아랫집에서 포장해온 빠에야와 함께 매일 저녁을 보냈어요~ 너무너무 좋습니다.
한번은 문을 부셨는데... 바로 수리공이 고쳐주었어요 그것도 무료로! 수리공이 항상 주변에 있습니다. 소라야는 최고로 배려심있고 빠르게 대응해줍니다. 여기에 머무르세요!

Perfect location in the hard of Madrid. The terrace - of course - is the best feature of the small apartment: Sun from early midday to almost sunset. We would definitely come back! Thanks Soraya for your absolutely kind hospitality
This flat is just amazing for a trip to Madrid! The terrace is as spectacupar as on the pictures an the location is not to beat. Dear Soraya, thank you for the wonderful stay!

We came here for my husbands surprise birthday! I honestly can’t rate this place enough!! We loved it!!! The apartment is in a stunning location and so close to everything!! The apartment itself is great and beautifully done out and the roof terrace outside was amazing!! Soraya was fantastic with all the local information and we basically ate at the local food market everyday (best place for food and drink!!) we absolutely loved this trip and we’d definitely stay here again!! Thank you Soraya for letting us stay in your stunning place! X

Jättefin lägenhet med centralt toppenläge och fantatisk terass som vi hade möjligheten att njuta av under hela vår vistelse. Det var otroligt smidigt med tillträde då Soraya mötte upp oss i lägenheten när vi kom från flygplatsen. Otroligt läge och som sagt en fantastisk terass vilket gav oss den bästa möjliga vistelsen i Madrid.
Excelente lugar la ubicación inmejorable lo recomiendo ampliamente

The flat is perfectly located in the very center of Madrid (puerta del Sol).
All toiletries (shampoo, towels,etc.) are provided.
Bibiana is super kind and friendly.
The room is in the attic so can be quite hot in summer, however there's A/C in the room and a huge window.

Thank you to Bibiana and Gigi! This was overall a very fun experience. Unfortunately we found the place was smaller and a bit messier than it looked on the pictures. That being said, Gigi was super nice with us and even woke up with us to make his traditional Italian coffee and fresh-presses orange juice for us. Madrid was absolutely beautiful and there is no better location if you have a short stay.
Very nice hosts! Had a great time and location was close to everything.
Realmente un Super anfitrión!! Recomendado 100%

Ambiente muito bem localizado, excelente para viajantes que queiram conhecer a cidade velha de Madrid. Entretanto um pouco dificultoso para pessoas com mais idade. O quarto do porão é um pouco baixo o que dificulta a locomoção.

Very nice place,  comfy and cozy! We had 5 great days in Bibiana's house and it felt like home, very welcoming.  So close to the center of Madrid and still a quiet place. Love it and totally recommend.
Great stay in Madrid. Location was convenient and place was so cute! Building was super cool- loved the elevator!
Great location! Bibiana is a kind and helpful host, and the apartment is adorable!

Emplacement idéal, mais accès à la chambre assez sportif (échelle de grenier). Très chaud dans l'appartement en ce mois de juillet malgré le climatiseur
Nous n'avons pas eu le plaisir de rencontrer Bibiana.
La casa era stupenda e super colorata, la posizione è ottima, era pulita e c’era tutto.

Excellent location! Perfect to walk everywhere and very quiet. A/c in the attic was so necessary in 40+ degree heat!
Place was slightly cramped than in ad. Would only be comfortable for small people (squishy to get into bath room).

L’emplacement central de l’appartement est un véritable atout. Bibiana est disponible et arrangeante ce qui facilite grandement l’organisation.
La chambre est petite et sous les combles, on ne peut y tenir debout. Elle sert donc uniquement à dormir. Cependant, c’est un très bon rapport qualité/prix qui permet aux plus petits budgets de profiter pleinement de Madrid.
Merci à Bibiana et à sa famille pour leur très bon accueil.
Un piso muh bonito y en pleno centro. Bibiana fue super maja, recomiendado 100%!
Amazing location and great host

Appartement idéalement situé, très propre, très bonne communication avec Bibiana.
A recommander.

The apartment is beautiful and clean. Bibiana is a great host, always ready to help you in every situation. The apartment is situated in the center of the city (puerta del sol), and it is really easy to visit any part of it.

Het gebouw is prachtig, je waant je in een herenhuis. Er is bijvoorbeeld nog oude lift met manuele deuren, wat je niet vaak meer tegenkomt, echt schoon!
Het appartement is helemaal vanboven, onder het dak. Gelukkig is er airco, wat het aangenaam koel houdt. Het appartement is super gezellig ingericht en is netjes!
Zeker een aanrader!
🌼🌼🌼
Nos encantó la ubicación
Nice location, nice place to stay. Thank you.
Very good stay and close to all attractions.
Bibiana's place was just as pictured in her listing. The location is very central and most tourist attractions are a walkable distance. Check in and out was easy and Bibiana was very helpful.
Emplacement idéal au centre-ville de Madrid! Chambre et aires communes tels qu’attendus sur les photos. Excellent rapport qualité-prix! Nous recommandons 😊
Definitivamente recomiendo el espacio de Bibiana si necesitan de donde quedarse mientras esten en Madrid. Viviana es muy amable y el apartamento es de lo mas bonito.

Incredible hospitality
She’s awesome ❤️
