Das Zimmer unterm Dach ist für ein bis zwei Nächte völlig in Ordnung. Es ist direkt unterm Dach und über eine Dachstuhltreppe zu erreichen. Das Inserat muss schon was älter sein, mittlerweile steht dort ein Bett, man hat ein Licht, Steckdosen und eine Klimaanlage. Eine zentralere Unterkunft kann man für den Preis in Madrid nicht bekommen. Man ist direkt zwischen Plaza Mayor und Puerta del Sol.
Leider war die Unterkunft nicht sehr sauber. Gerade das Badezimmer war extrem dreckig. Es lagen überall Haare rum und auch der Boden war dreckig. Schade, weil die Unterkunft sonst echt Stil hat.
Bello hogar en una ubicación muy cerca de las principales atracciones, Bibiana es una excelente anfitriona y una persona muy agradable, volvería sin pensarlo 2 veces.

The location is really incredible. The room is super tiny but Bibiana and her family were away for the weekend so this was convenient. we were two girls visiting so it worked out well. but for a bigger guy would probably be an issue.
Mahtava sijainti ja todella mukava majoittaja! Suosittelen 👍
buena

Communicating with Biniana and her co-host was easily understood. The location was very central to a lot of other popular areas but also not too busy which is what we like. The place was comfy for a nights stay though the attic can be quite tight, best for two petite guests.

Para entrar al baño hay que hacer malabares porque la escalera a la que accedes a la habitación está justo a la entrada. La cama hace mucho ruido, es vieja e incómoda. La "habitación" no estaba limpia y no hay espacio para colocar bien las cosas.
La llegada es un poco incómoda, había una niña sola esperando a que llegara su madre. Creo que lo correcto es que se informe de eso para evitar posibles incidencias.
La señora es amable y la zona muy buena.
Excelente lugar
Ideal para descansar en Madrid.

la casa è molto carina e la location è il massimo, centralissima a 15min a piedi dal museo del Prado e meno di 5min dalla stazione metro della puerta del Sol.
Consigliatissimo
The best location for the value. We were able to walk to all the main attractions and restaurants. Apartment was clean and easy communication with the host.
Bibiana's apartment was the perfect stay for my weekend in Madrid. Easy to find and felt comfortable right away, Bibiana and her family are lovely.
¡Excelente ubicación y todos fueron muy amables con nosotras!
Muy buen alojamiento! Perfecto para las dos noches que estuvimos, super céntrico y agradable.

Great location but room is in a small rooftop attic - can only access via ladder. Would only be suitable for someone smaller and for shorter stays. Bibiana is lovely and her home is in an excellent location!
Excelente habitación! Muy buena ubicación

Buen alojamiento ubicado en excelente zona, para UNA persona q solo vaya a dormir a casa. Ya que considero que es un lugar bastante pequeño, donde vive una familia en constante movimiento y resulta tedioso usar la cocina y baños con tantas personas en casa y además invitados. Hay que tener presente que no cuenta con una cama tiene dos colchonetas bastante mullidas, no recomendada para personas que sufren de la cervical. De resto un lugar con excelente ubicación para turismo
Bibiana fue una excelente host! Nos encantó poder visitar su casa y conocerla. La ubicación no puede ser más excelente y todo lo que respecta con el alojamiento también. Estamos muy agradecidos!
非常好的地方，與照片相符，房東非常願意幫忙，美中不足的是床板輕易發出聲音，淺眠的人可能不建議。床需爬行梯子上床，半夜若是要上廁所會不方便。
We had a super great time and felt very welcomed :)
muy amables los anfitriones, me recomendaron buenos lugares para comer :)
The location is GREAT in the city center near the sol station. The room is clean and cozy. The host is really helpful, the communication is good. Very recommend.

We spend a great joliday week! Biniana was so nice and helpful and her apartment was cozy and very central located. (1 street from sol subway stop) But this airbnb is not for everybody as the room is only acessible through a ladder and the seeling is very low. But for us it was perfect.
Hemos estado dos noches y calidad-precio es ideal. Por la ubicación y para pasar la noche esta genial. Lo recomiendo.
Bibiana es muy amable, la zona es muy céntrica

Lugar muy céntrico, y ubicado en el último piso por lo que evita el bullicio de la calle. Bibiana y su familia son excelentes anfitriones. Piso luminoso y limpio. La habitación es una buhardilla con mucho encanto pero la contra de no ponerte de pie en ningún momento. Recomendable para una o dos noches.
inmejorable ubicación. inmejorable relación precio calidad
The room is in the middle of centre, it is certainly a great location. The owners are very nice, flexible and give good tips and advice about which places to visit.

The location of this AirBnb couldn't be better. It's right in the centre of Madrid and one street away from central metro lines.
The place itself is cozy and smaller than it appears in the photos but this didn't bother us. The hosts were amazing people, very friendly and gave great recommendations.
The ceilings in the loft are very low and the loft itself is up a ladder so if you have mobility issues this is not the AirBnb for you. Excellent for young people however. We also found the mattress on the bed quite thin but it was okay for a couple of nights. There is a window that opens in the loft and gives you an amazing rooftop view of Madrid in the evening.
Overall we loved out stay and would happily come back. We would encourage people to book this for their holiday.

The apartment is, as most reviews say, very small and cramped but charming and in the ideal location. We were literally smack bang in the middle of Puerto del Sol and near most major attractions or a metro ride away. The main issue we had was the space is a small cramped attic, not ideal for tall people, and the mattress was a little lumpy, pillows were quite small. But all in all the location was too good to be true and Bibiana was a lovely accomodating host, giving us recommendations for the area and attentive to any calls or messages we had. We loved Madrid!!

El apartamento tiene una localización perfecta. Puedes ir andando a cualquier lugar desde ahí ya que es muy céntrico, y está en una zona sin mucho ruido con lo cuál se agradece. Aun así, hay que tener en cuenta que todos los espacios son comunes menos la habitación y es pequeñita, lo que no puedes estar de pie en ningún momento. Por tanto recomendaría para personas no muy altas.
Ha sido un placer quedarnos con Bibiana, un amor. Gracias por todo

Bibiana est extrêmement accueillante. Dès notre arrivée, elle nous à super bien aiguillé sur les activités et la vie locale. L'emplacement est juste top, on peut tout faire et les restaurants sont superbes.
Le logement avec la famille est parfait, on ne se gène pas mutuellement et cela nous à permis de parler et d'en apprendre plus sur l'Espagne et la ville de Madrid. Je recommande fortement ce logement pour une petite escapade espagnole !!

Le logement est agréable, super bien situé et la propriétaire est très sympathique !
Nous avons eu une bonne communication et nous sommes arrivés au logement sans problème.
Le seul point négatif c'est le lit qui n'est pas confortable et le plafond qui est assez bas et on ne peut pas se tenir debout dans la chambre, mais qui est claire sur les photos.
En bref : bon rapport qualité prix ; pour passer quelques jours à Madrid, mais plus conseillé aux jeunes à mobilité préservée !
Tal cual lo que se ofrece, buena relación costó beneficio, Bibiana es muy querida y la ubicación es la mejor , en todo el centro!
Très bon accueil. Appartement central, merci!

I loved my stay at Bibiana’s place! The room was great value for money and it couldn’t be more central (a stone’s throw from Plaza Mayor). Bibiana was lovely to chat to, had some great recommendations, and was accommodating when I had questions.
El lugar tiene una ubicación increíble y la anfitriona es muy amable! :)
Attic was really a unique experience. Host is friendly and helpful with recommendations.
Excelente alojamiento y ubicación

Excelente ubicación, tal i cómo está en las fotos, muy céntrico.
Nos encanto.
Good contact with Bibiana, great location but appart a bit small especially the sleeping room
Una estancia fantastica, he ido con mi madre y no nos han podido tratar mejor. El piso era precioso y muy centrico, facil de llegar. Repetiriamos sin udarlo, la mejor anfitriona.
Great place

It had what we needed. Keep in mind the bed is in the attic and you have to climb and the roof is not high. We didn't mind it since we only only slept & use the restroom which was good. Location was amazing. Bibiana was very accommodating. We had an amazing time!
Cozy, intimate and exactly in the hart of the city!

Casa bellissima, centrale e accogliente.
Bibiana super gentile, consigliatissimo.

Wunderschön eingerichtete Dachzimmerwohnung mit ihrem ganz eigenem Charme. Das Bett befindet sich auf dem Dachboden, auf dem man allerdings nicht stehen kann. Im Sommer ist es sehr warm in der Wohnung, allerdings gibt es neben dem Bett direkt eine Klimaanlage, wodurch man es nachts ganz gut aushalten lässt.
Bibiana siempre puntual con las instrucciones, las fotos coinciden con la realidad del alojamiento, el alojamiento fue súper friendly y sobre todo buen ubicado

Die Unterkunft ist unfassbar gut im Stadtzentrum gelegen! Die Umgebung ist nicht sonderlich laut, jedoch muss man nachts aufgrund der Hitze eine sehr laute Klimaanlage laufen lassen…
Die Wohnung ist für einen Städtetrip super, jedoch auch wirklich sehr eng und klein, was aber zu zweit nicht schlimm ist. Außerdem war es wirklich sehr heiß in der Wohnung, denn bis auf das Schlafzimmer besitzen die Räume keine Klimatisierung🥵

Sehr gute Lage, allerdings ist der Schlafplatz unter dem Schrägdach nur über eine Ausziehleiter zu erreichen, die man hochklappen muss, wenn man in das Bad möchte. Für 2 grosse Leute ist das Bett zu klein. Man kann nicht stehen.
Es fehlte eine Zudecke, bzw. zwei für zwei Personen, anders als beschrieben, sollten wir den Gemeinschaftsbereich nicht betreten. Die Fotos und Angaben im Inserat sollten überarbeitet werden, damit man genau weiß, was zu erwarten ist.
Handtücher gab es, aber nicht ausreichend Toilettenpapier.
super céntrico estaba todo cerca...

Bibiana’s place is a dream come true. Her place is living art! The room was at the roof with a portal that opens. It rained the night we came and it was magical! It is located in the middle of the city, you can walk to everything. A total gem!

La locación fue excelente, cerca de los restaurantes y lugares más visitados.
El cuarto es pequeño, considera que solo es para dormir, la colchoneta un poco delgada y para accesar es solo
por las escaleras. Para ir al baño es un poco incómodo ya que hay que estar subiendo y bajando la escalera hacia el ático. Para nosotros no fué problema ya que solo llegabamos a dormir.
Consideró que faltó un poco de comunicación en cuanto a recoger y dejar las llaves ya que se necesitan para abrir el edificio.
Bibiana fue muy comprensiva y accesible. Gracias por dejarnos estar en tu apartamento.

Очень милая небольшая квартира в самом центре Мадрида. Все достопримечательности в пешей доступности. Бибиана дала нам крутые рекомендации хороших кафе в городе. Не самая удобная кровать, но для 2-3 ночей это нормально.

Casa muito bem localizada, no centro da cidade.
Infelizmente não conhecemos a Bibiana mas fomos muito bem recebidas pelo Gigi. Muito amável e flexível.
A estadia só não é tão aconselhável a quem tem mais idade e dificuldade de locomoção, pois as escadas para o sótão (quarto) são muito íngremes e o teto muito baixo, o que dificulta a deslocação de um lado para o outro.
De resto tudo perfeito!

La habitacion esta bien para no estar demasiado tiempo en casa.
La cama hacia demasiado ruido y no era muy comoda.
Bibiana was welcoming and very helpful. It was a perfect location close to plenty of shops and restaurants. Overall we had a great stay!!
We loved staying at Bibianas Place. Her and her family were nice and she also provided us with tips where to go. We would totally recommend this place for a trip to Madrid.
If you are looking for a host in Madrid- search no more! Bibiana is amazing and her place is special. You cannot get any better location than hers.
La ubicación es ideal para conocer todo el centro de la ciudad. Un lugar muy tranquilo. Ideal para llegar a descansar.

La ubicación fue perfecta; genial el entorno cerca de la plaza mayor y el mercado también había opciones de transitó para explorar afuera del entorno. La calle del Airbnb es más tranquilo pero en una zona con mucho para hacer y muchas restaurantes! Bibiana nos dio buenas recomendaciones y es muy amable!
Tanto mí hija como yo nos sentimos como en casa, Una anfitriona perfecta
Even though I couldn't stay at Bibiana's place due to an emergency, she was kind and cool with me and my wife.
... bien localisé !

empezaré con los aspectos positivos, la ubicación es muy buena y el ascensor ayuda mucho, las fotos no son tan claras, no se puede usar el sofá cama ni la tv, el acceso al cuarto es complejo pero está en el anuncio y Bibiana es servicial en general, salvó porque no brindo facilidades para dejar equipaje, tuve que buscar un lugar cercano para dejar mi equipaje y el día antes me dijo que si podía pasar temprano, lo cual no fue muy claro para mí, la cama es una total incomodidad, cruje horrible y al ser un ático no entra un colchón habitual, demasiado incómoda la cama, uno no busca tener la espalda lastimada, por este aspecto no lo recomendaría, la cama es una total pesadilla, dormimos pésimo y nos encontramos adoloridos por un colchón tan malo.
Excellent location in El Centro.  An altogether charming apartment and host.  Bibiana is the best. Highly recommended for the traveler who wants to engage with local culture!
We had an amazing time staying here! It was the perfect home base to explore Madrid.

Vin's place was awesome! It had so much character, and was a true gem in the middle of Madrid. We loved the location, and the place was perfect for my  family as we visited my daughter who is studying there. Great location, outstanding communication, and this place makes you feel like you are a local! Thank you Vin. We had an amazing time and recommend highly!
Herşey süperdi

Vin’s place has a beautiful sunny terrace with a great view, which is the absolute highlight. He used to live in the apartment, so it feels like someone’s home, which we really liked. Vin was helpful and flexible. We were there as a couple and it was comfortable and spacious. But it would be tricky for more than one couple, the other bedrooms aren’t really rooms (they are spaces off the sitting room, and will be light early in the morning), and the only access to the bathroom is through the “real bedroom”.  The bathroom is nice, except gets damp easily. That aside, highly recommended for one couple! The area is interesting and has lots to recommend it, it’s quite mixed but we liked it (and always felt safe).

Proche du centre, hôte accueillant.
Merci Vin pour tout.
Parfait pour couple avec ou sans enfant.

El apartamento de Vin es el sitio perfecto para exploración en Madrid. Cuenta con todo lo necesario para una estadía de 10 y la comunicación con Vin fue rápida y muy buena. Totalmente recomendado a cualquiera.

Stay at Vin’s! Here is why:
Best views
Walkable to all the best sights
VERY close to the parks and museums
Superb host
Amazing location and comfortable stay. Vin was helpful and communicative throughout the stay. We had a slight issue with the AC, and Vin fixed it quickly.
Muy cómodo y súper ubicado :)

Vin’s apartment was a great location. Loved being in Walking distance from so much. Really enjoyed hanging on our terrace at night and watching the sunset. Vin was a great communicator and responded quickly with questions. Would recommend!

The place was very well located (right next to La Latina metro station) and near the best restaurants and the city center. For the price it is the best you can get. I absolutely recommend the place. The host also is a very friendly person who helps you with your trips and gives you direction to the locations you want to visit in the city.

Two minor cons: 1. The internet is very slow and sometimes it gets disconnected. 2. The entrance to the first floor is very dark even in the daytime.

This was a great stay, in an excellent location and the best value you can find in Madrid. The room is very spacious and spotlessly clean, located just steps from the metro and super close to all the sites you'd want to see, but the room itself is very quiet so you'll be guaranteed a good night's sleep after a busy day. The bathroom is shared which is no problem because Ulises is like a vampire (a really nice vampire!) who works during the evenings... Which means it feels like you have your own private place to stay. Ulises is very lovely and welcoming with much better English than he would admit :) My Spanish is terrible but communicating with Ulises was easy! I definitely recommend staying here.

The room was perfect for a short stay in Madid. No A/C in the room but good breeze from the window and a good fan. It as very hot in Madrid the day I was there but the room was very comfortable. The room has access to kitchen and the bath/shower was right next store. Also, the room was right next to the La Latina subway stop and 5 minutes walk to Plaza Major.

I recommend this place.

Perfect! It was a pleasure to meet Ulises & to have stayed in his super first floor secure apartment, the location is great & this is just incredible value for the center of a capital city, there are some fantastic bars & restaurants close by, I am looking forward to my next visit even more now that I know this ideal base to explore the wonders of Madrid from, thanks dood! Hasta el proximo visitar.

The stay in the flat was very nice. the location is just perfect, right above La Latina metro station and walkable to many places.
The room was tidy and comfortable and Wifi worked well.
Ulises was waiting for me when i arrived
He was very communicative throughout the reservation and arrival process. I would highly recommend him as a host and his place and would stay there again if I come back

Hola!
It was my first trip to Spain and I had landed in Madrid. Ulises and his mother were very kind and nice to me. I had the room for myself, a set of keys to the house, very clean no noise at all and the bathroom right beside it also very clean. The BEST part its at the most happening area in town- La Latina. It's a great neighborhood which is bustling more and more the as the sun sets. Its very safe, as a lone woman traveler I can say that.
I had a lovely experience! Although his mom wouldn't speak english she was concerned and would ask me if I had any food to eat or if everything was alright.

I would highly recommend anyone traveling to Madrid to stay with Ulises.
Thank you Ulises for the fantastic stay in Madrid. :)

Ulises apartment in Madrid was very awesomely placed close to the train line and the heart of the tapas zone. A small hop from plaza major and the infamous San Miguel markets I couldn't have asked for a nicer place to stay at. Having a nice room to stay in with plenty of space and even an elevator to carry up baggage for the price I don't think his place can be beat!. Since I am definitely heading back to Madrid at some point in the future I will be looking to stay with Ulises again and to recommend him to all!

Ulises y su familia fueron muy atentos conmigo durante mi estancia en su casa.  Era una habitacion en un piso donde reside su familia. La casa es antigua en el mismo centro de Madrid, con todo lo que significa en cuanto a construccion y equipamientos; pero la habitacion estaba bien y era silenciosa, algo muy importante para poder descansar bien.  Recomiendo el alquiler de dicha habitacion.

I had an amazing time staying in Ulises apartment. It was really central ( less than a minute away from the metro station La Latina) and close to all the important sights of Madrid. My room, the bath, the kitchen basically the whole apartment was very clean and it felt like living at home. The  host and also my two roomates were really helpful with information before, during and after my stay. The apartment and room is bigger than I had imagined on the photos and my room was also a little bit seperate from the other bedrooms whicht gave me enough privacy.  The next time I am in Madrid, I will try to  choose Ulises again :) Thanks for the great stay!

My partner and I had a fantastic time in Madrid and no doubt part of it was due to our stay at Ulisses. The flat is very well located, clean, and organised with a chilled atmosphere. Ulisses is an amazing host, discreet and  relaxed. We highly recommend his place and will surely stay at his flat whenever back in Madrid. Many thanks Ulisses and hope to see you soon!  Debora and Edinho

Excelente! la habitaciòn està perfecta para estar en Madrid, muy centrica, a dos pasos del Metro La Latina, lo que para un turista esta super!!, cerca de todo, en pleno centro, a unos minutos de plaza mayor, de Sol, de los museos, todo està a la mano. Como anfitriòn Ulises, Susana y Belèn son excelentes personas, amables y muy atentas, pendientes en todo momento de atender al huesped, de verdad muy agradecido de el trato y la estadia en su apartamento. Para las personas que quieran ir a Madrid, este es el sitio idela para estar en la ciudad. Un abrazo muchachos!!!! Gracias por todo!!!

El Piso de Ulises es perfecto : buen lugar para visitar todo caminando.
Su Madre, Susana, que vive en el piso es muy agradable y disponible : pasar tiempo con ella fue un real placer !
Muchísimas gracias por todo :)

I had a great stay at Ulises' apartment. I was greeted by his mother, and the check in process was smooth and easy.

This apartment is all about the location. You are just steps away from the La Latina metro stop and directly across the street from the Mercado de la Cebada. Just around the corner you have Calle Cava Baja, which appears to be tapas restaurant central. You could eat here for days. Plaza Mayor and Mercado San Miguel are also just a very short walk away.

The apartment itself is quite basic, but it's clean and has everything you need. Don't be expecting anything modern. Also be aware that there's no air conditioner (but there is a fan) for those of you that might be finicky about the summer heat in Madrid. This was not an issue for me. It is also not the quietest neighborhood, but that's the tradeoff for being in one of the best locations of the city.

Overall, the hosts were very friendly, and I would recommend a stay here

I had nice time there. I was cheerfully greeted by Ulises. In this place there lives his mother, both are very friendly!

The room was exactly as in the picture, clean and comfortable. A place with easy reach to other locations (La Latina just on the other side of the street; the central location Sol in ~10 min of walking...).

The only problem is that there is a club downstairs, so during weekends it was loud, sometimes until 3-4 AM. No air condition, but somehow it was fine without it.

Highly recommendable!

The apartment is really located very conveniently in the heart of Madrid, very close to Madrid's famous places, near the metro station and shops. The kitchen is fully equiped in case you want to cook. Ulises and his mother Susana are very nice and helpful and gave good advices when I needed to find some specific shops/places.Also, Ulises replies immediately to any message you send him, which is greatly appreciated.  The only issue that I encountered is that I visited Madrid in abnormally hot summer (40C), and absence of a/c is the thing you might think about if the weather is forecasted to be extremely hot. However, this is the only issue I encountered, and the apartment is really great for its price. I really enjoyed the stay, and I would stay here once again if I come to Madrid.

Como en casa. La ubicación es excelente , muy cerca de los lugares de interés y a 2 pasos del metro. Muy amables y siempre dispuestos a ayudar y proponer cosas para hacer en Madrid. Recomiendo 100%. Gracias!

Debo decir que alojarme en el piso de Ulises fue la mejor decisión que puede tomar para visitar Madrid, la zona la Latina es una zona muy movida durante la noche y el día. Tienes supermercados y restaurantes a unos pasos además de tener el mercado de la cebada al frente de la casa.

Al estar en un lugar tan céntrico no es necesario utilizar el transporte público ya que todo está a una corta distancia pero en caso de querer utilizar el metro tienes una estación a unos pocos metros.

Hablando de la casa, un lugar muy limpio y la habitación es bastante espaciosa y tranquila perfecta para poder descansar en la noches. La mamá de Ulises, Susana, que vive en el departamento es una persona muy atenta y siempre está dispuesta a ayudarte en lo que necesites.
Definitivamente es el lugar perfecto para explorar Madrid :D
La ubicación del departamento es excelente. El colchon es bueno y se puede descansar. La casa estaba siempre limpia y la mamá de Ulises, Susana, fue muy amable. RECOMENDADO.
Very nice stay, I'm very happy, thank you for everything.

Disfruté mi estancia con Ulises y su madre, Susana muchísimo. Son gente muy amables y serviciales. El piso es súper limpio y tiene todo para estar cómodo. También el piso es muy cerca a la parada de La Latina. Recomiendo alojarse aquí! Muchas gracias por todo, otra vez, Ulises y Susana! Un saldo y abrazo! :)

Ulises is a great host. When I arrived he had everything ready in the room: bed sheets, towels, even some touristic material. The room and the flat was pretty clean and him and his mother made me feel really like home.
On top of that the flat is in a great location, next to lot of services and nice bars.
Only (small) minus is the noise that comes from the bar downstairs. That didn't prevent me from having a great stay though. I would come back again!
Ulises and his mom were very friendly, helpful and very easy going. Location is great. The room and the apartment were nice and homely, just as described. I had a very comfortable time.
Clean, perfect location. Nice host!
This apartment is very close to the center of La Latina, so incredibly convenient if you plan to spend time in that location. Ulises and his mother were both extremely accommodating and friendly.
exactly the same as the picture, convenient location and suit for one people.

Ulises and his mom are great host. Ulises is very polite, friendly, and accommodating. The place has everything you need from maps/guides of the city, private room, security, kitchen, and complete bathroom. Towel and hand towel are kindly provided, and also the location is very close to Plaza Major and all of the other places to see are within walking distance. Recommended!

El departamento muy bien ubicado, en la zon La Latina. Llena de bares, teatros y del mercado del Rastro que es los domingos. Limpio, calido y acogedor. Atiende y vive alli Susana, muy amable y calida, quien ademas m recomendo sitios para ir. Lo unico dificil fue que en l reserva no aclaraba el piso y numero, por lo tanto tuve que conectarme en wifi de un bar que esta abajo y mandar un mensaje. De inmediato salio Ulises a abrirme la puerta. Otra cosa es que el bar de abajo se escucha un poco y por la mañana entran mercadería y hacen ruido. Si no se es muy delicado se duerme bien. Cuena con cocina muy completa y la posibilidad de lavar la ropa de forma barata. En definitiva una buena experiencia. Gracias!
Bibiana es muy amable y el alojamiento muy bien ubicado, aunque es mucho más pequeño de como luce en las fotos.
Super Lage, sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit. Ich habe mich bei Bibiana sehr voll gefüllt. Sauberkeit eine kleine minus . Würde gerne wieder zu ihr gehen. 👍🏼

Uma ótima estadia que tivemos, único problema é que tenho mais de 1,80m de altura e não conseguia ficar de pé no quarto, mas a estadia foi incrível, muito obrigado Bibiana. Localização ótima pra quem não quer ficar pegando transporte público, mesmo no meio de tudo
Muy buena ubicación, es más pequeño de lo esperado
Bibiana fue amable! Además la ubicación es perfecta para conocer Madrid, está todo cerca y muchos restaurantes, bares y parques cercas es perfecto! También fue muy seguro y limpio.

- Anfitriona: Excelente atención y hospitalidad, siempre al pendiente de que la llegada y estancia fueran perfectas, nos apoyó bastante.
- Alojamiento: Tiene muy buena ubicación, súper céntrico, pero considerar que es muy pequeño el espacio para la comodidad de 2 personas, ya que la alcoba se encuentra en el ático y el ingreso al mismo de equipaje amplio y movilidad podría resultar complicado al viajero. Muy viable sólo para llegar a dormir.

La calidad humana de Bibiana y su familia es muy buena, es muy amigable y está dispuesta a ayudar en lo que sea necesario.
Lastimosamente, hubieron 3 situaciones que no fueron del todo buenas:
1. El baño no estaba tan limpio, la caneca de basura estaba llena y así duro durante nuestros días de estadía.
2. Sabía que se trataba del ático. Sin embargo, es mucho más oscuro de lo que se nota en las fotos.
3. El wifi es inestable en la zona del ático, por lo cual era lento.

Bibiana's place is a real gem! It's a little attic space, very simple like the photos show, but very cozy. If you're taller than 170cm be aware that you might hit your head if you're not careful,but other than that the place was great.
Bibiana was an amazing host, always worried if we needed anything and even gave us restaurant recommendations for paella and tapas, which were really good!
The flat is literally in the heart of Madrid, just a few minutes from Sol and close to all the main attractions!
To conclude, it was a really good stay and it made the trip a whole lot more special!

the host has a lovely little home! she is also very kind and helpful. would recommend :)
the location is stellar as well

Thank you Bibiana for hosting us! It was a pleasure to stay at your house and we felt like home. We really appreciate the fact that you were flexible with the check-out and you let us leave our backpacks until our flight back home <3
We wish you the best and may we meet again for another adventure in Madrid!

Without a doubt, Bibiana stood out as the best host throughout our journey. Her home exuded a powerful artistic energy, making us feel incredibly welcomed and fulfilled – it was truly amazing! Bibiana went above and beyond, even helping us arrange a pre-dawn taxi to the airport, providing valuable local tips, and engaging in delightful conversations. Her daughter was equally charming, lovely, and well-mannered.
For those seeking the utmost comfort in sleep, it's worth noting that the bed is situated in a loft, which may not be the easiest space to move around. Nevertheless, the bed itself is incredibly comfortable.
This stay deserves special recognition; it was simply fantastic, and we fell head over heels in love with it. Madrid wouldn't have been the same without Bibiana. She is an integral part of the entire experience.
We're already eager to return as soon as possible, planning to stay at her place for an extended period next time. We loved it, truly and deeply.
Los anfitriones fueron muy amables y serviciales. La habitación es muy pequeña y muy baja, no puedes ponerte de pie pero la cama es cómoda y se duerme bien
Puiki lokacija. Bibiana yra puiki Šeimininkė - patarė ką aplankyti, kaip nuvykti. Buvo labai svetinga. Esame dėkingi.
Perfect location and well worth the money. Great host who was friendly, kind and interesting.

Não poderíamos ter escolhido um sítio melhor! A localização é perfeita e a Bibiana é muito querida, sempre disponível para nos ajudar! Adorámos! Se voltarmos a Madrid, certamente ficaremos em casa da Bibiana novamente
So gracious and welcoming! I typically don’t book rooms, but felt right at home with Bibiana.

El hogar de Bibiana era muy cómodo y bonito, una zona segura y con una ubicación super ideal, ella es muy amigable y nos hizo sentir cómodos y seguros, la habitación es pequeña pero muy cómoda, sin duda alguna lo apuntamos para volver a visitarlo en otro momento

We stayed two nights at Bibianas place which is right in the heart of Madrid. It was clean and very sweet to sleep right under the roof. The location is just amazing and perfect to explore the beautiful city of Madrid. Bibiana was very friendly and we felt very like home. Thank you for the nice stay!!

I really enjoyed my stay at Bibiana's ! the apartment is well decorated and Biabana's hospitality really make the stay memorable. Only comments is that the room in the attic and somehow if you are 180cm or taller it can be a lil bit hard to stand tall but it was good for me who is 175cm tall. hope i will be back soon

Le séjour chez Bibiana s’est bien passé, toute la famille est accueillante et l’appartement chaleureux. Voyageur en quête d’intimité passez votre chemin. Emplacement idéal mais accès à la chambre assez sportif.
Agradecemos todas sus recomendaciones y gran amabilidad. El lugar es muy bonito, bien ubicado, limpio y agradable. Es artista y su apartamento tiene un toque personal muy agradable y acogedor.
Thanks! Everything was fine.
wonderful stay

Muy buena localización, fácil de llegar a todos lados, casa acogedora y exótica. La anfitriona fue muy amable y nos dio muy buenas recomendaciones. El espacio es reducido (no apto para gorditos). La vista es hermosa desde el techo. Recomendado 100%.
Buen alojamiento, muy bien ubicado, tranquilo. El único detalle es la altura para personas muy altas.
Bibiana’s place was right in the city center, 2 mins from the Sol metro station. We loved the place, nice rooftop experience and such a cozy and a beautiful place. Thank you Bibiana for hosting us!
Great host and great location, as others say the room itself is quite low. So cool to have a hatch window to look outside! Great for young people
Gracias Bibiana , todo muy limpio y muy flexible con los tiempos de check in y out , la ubicación es perfecta , cerca a la terraza Del hotel Riu
An incredibly welcoming host in a lovely old building with a charming view from the loft space. Muchas gracias for having us!
Me quedé dos días  y fue super practico para mis últimos días en Madrid. Bibiana es excelente y amigable y la ubicación es inmejorable. 100% recomendado
Wonderful! Highly recommended

Dit appartement is absoluut een van de beste locaties die ik tot op heden gehuurd heb via AirBnB. Op slechts 20 meter van Plaza Mayor is dit een perfecte uitvalsbasis voor een mooie citytrip. Het dakterras is ideaal om na een dagje slenteren even te relaxen met een glas wijn en de stad beneden te horen leven. Het is schoon en voorzien van alle gemakken en praktisch ingedeeld. Zelfs traplopen hoeft niet dankzij de lift die je snel naar de 3e etage brengt. Ook fijn als je veel gewandeld hebt door het geweldige centrum van Madrid. Ondanks dat het appartement in een heel druk gebied ligt, hoor je daar totaal niets van. Zodra je de ramen dicht doet is het volkomen stil. Door de 2 airco's kun je de temperatuur goed regelen zodat het bijvoorbeeld 's nachts ook aangenaam is. En Soraya is zeer behulpzaam met tips voor de omgeving en reageert snel en adequaat om vragen. Kortom, een echte aanrader wanneer je een paar dagen Madrid wil boeken.

This is a brilliant, compact attic apartment with a great location in the centre of Madrid. It was perfect for our 4-night stay. It is very close to the busy Plaza Mayor, but being at the top of the building, it provided tranquility and space away from the crowd.
The apartment itself is small, but well designed for two sharing, any more and it would be a squeeze. However, we had fantastic May weather and that meant the superb outside terrace space could be fully exploited, day and night. When my wife and I go back to Madrid, we won't look anywhere else.
Always a pleasure to stay here !!

Repeating the previous reviews, this space is perfect and I can't imagine a better stay in Madrid. The balcony has you right in the center of town, looking down on the entranceway to Plaza Mayor! We couldn't spend enough time out there. Inside is small but perfect for two, every corner and shelf is functional. The bed is very comfortable. We enjoyed coffee from the Nespresso machine every day, and even made ourselves breakfast using the kitchenette one of our mornings. Can't recommend it enough.

Great place to stay in the Madrid. Located at the heart of the old Madrid right next to Plaza Major. Most sights are within walking distance. We booked the top floor with the terrace. We loved it! We spent each night outside on the terrace relaxing and appreciating the sights and sounds of Madrid. Highly recommended to add the cherry on top of an already charming city.

A lovely little apartment, with a fantastic terrace.
Very centrally located and therefore there may be some noise from the street.
Can definitely be recommended if you are only two.
m

Great apartment with an unbelievable terrace. The space is more than adequate for 2 people and it is outfitted very well. We really liked the coffee machine. The location is the best, right between Plaza Mayor and Puerta del Sol. Hope to come back.

Soraya was a welcoming and great host. The location is great when you want to be in the middle of museums and other districts like Malasaña, easy access with metro. Everything was very clean. We enjoyed the terrace for breakfast and dinner, it‘s great to have that in such a central place. Recommended!

No puede haber una mejor ubcacion para visitar Madrid, el mini penthouse es maravilloso, tiene una inmensa terraza provista de muca comodidad y el interior aunque pequeño tiene todo el equipo necesario y suficiente. Lo recomiendo sin dudar.
What an amazing apartment! The balcony was just fantastic, lovely area to relax in. The location is amazing considering the price and apartment sparkling clean inside. Will definately return!
A very cozy flat in the heart of Madrid. Perfectly located with a nice terace. Everything is available what you need.
Stunning apartment and the roof terrace was definitely the highlight. Will be coming back!

At Soraya's place you can expect an apartment that is in the best area of Madrid. It doesn't get better and it is very central.  Very accessible and safe. I highly recommend it. Its a small place but the terrace takes it to the next level.  The view is spectacular and hanging out and relaxing out there was awesome. The water pressure in the shower was perfect.  The AC was amazing.  The overall cleanliness of the place was impressive.  The communication with Lukaas was immediate. We had the water heater short out during our stay and I called Lukaas and he immediately came to fix it it with a handyman around 10 minutes after I called. The location is beyond perfect because it is central to everything.  I also felt so safe staying there because the area is nice and well populated with restaurants, shops and people everywhere. The beds were comfortable. There is a refrigerator and kitchenette to make your life easier. I highly recommend it.

Petit appartement extrêmement bien situé. A distance de marche de la plupart des attractions et à 2 minutes d'une station de métro et de train.
Terrasse très agréable le matin (pas de soleil encore durant l'été) et le soir après le coucher du soleil.
Un peu petit pour 4 mais la terrasse permet d'ajouter de l'espace pour manger et se détendre.
Nous sommes très contents de notre séjour.
N'avons malheureusement pas rencontré Soraya mais elle a été très disponible auparavant par écrit.

Thank you so much for having us in your wonderful flat. It was such a great time. The flat is the exact right size for a couple and comes with an awesome roof terrace. It was clean and cozy...there are absolutely no complaints. We would recommend this flat to every young couple for a visit of Madrid.

The flat could not have been more perfect for our honeymoon! Beautiful, clean, very central, overall lovely and accommodating hosts. Soraya and her husband are true gems and know how to make you feel at home. My husband and I could not rave enough about how amazing the flat was. I had lived in Madrid in the past and have never seen a flat as beautiful as this one. The terrace was absolutely breathtaking. The neighborhood is ideal, lots of things to do and in the perfect spot. We hope to return in the future and highly recommend this place to any of our friends and family. It was a remarkable experience and a lot of that is owed to Soraya and her husband Luca! This is easily the best hidden spot in Madrid, if you do not stay here then you will be missing out!

The apartment looks just as pretty as the pictures! It is small but perfectly comfortable for two people. The apartment, stairway and entryway are impeccably clean. Check-in was easy since Soraya and her husband run a restaurant right next to the building. And the location is perfect - right in the middle of everything we wanted to see.
Of course the highlight of the space is the terrace. A perfect spot to drink your morning coffee or an evening glass of wine. The views are lovely! Highly recommend this space.
An amazing location central to everything, clean smaller place but the best feature is the large top floor patio which made the stay so worth it. I’d go back again.

This apartment was wonderful and exactly as pictured! Very clean and perfect for 2 people. The balcony really put it over the top! The location was very central and perfect to visit all the major sites. Even with being close for Plaza Mayor, noise was never a problem. Soraya was a wonderful host and provided lots a tips and restaurants to visit.

Can't beat the location, right off the main square and with an amazing terrace. Central to pretty much everything so walking to the museums and Royal palace, etc. was no problem. Apartment is clean, updated and modern. Soraya and her husband let us check in early too (luckily for us the previous guests had left early in the morning), which was much appreciated!

Located right in Plaza Mayor it was a great centrally located place. Soraya made sure to accommodate our bags as we arrived early. Very happy to have the terrace for drinks to enjoy the plaza at night. Also a plus that there is a washer in this unit.
Incredible location with a fantastic terrace. Just the right size for two. Would stay there again in a heartbeat.

Situation exceptionnelle au coeur de Madrid, place Mayor.
Une belle terrasse où l'on peut au choix ou en même temps profiter du soleil, déjeuner, faire la sieste avant de repartir à la découverte de la ville.
Appartement très bien équipé. Vous pouvez profitez de votre dernière journée, car vous disposez d'un endroit où laisser vos bagages, une fois libéré les lieux .

This place is INCREDIBLE. It is a beautiful apartment and is in an amazing location. We were able to walk everywhere, had an incredible view, and were close to so many restaurants and beautiful sites. I would 1000% stay here again. Highly recommend!
Great

Book it now! I’m pretty picky, and this place was sparkling clean. There’s lovely extra touches- like an iron and mini-ironing board, coffee, even umbrellas just in case you need them. The apartment is good for 2 people, but the terrace is 100% a trip maker. You have lovely views of the square and can enjoy a glass of wine from the comfort of home. The clothes washer was very handy. There’s about 10-15 stairs after the elevator, but they’re manageable with luggage, no problem. Soraya is so nice and has a lovely list of restaurants and her favorites in the area. Very helpful and extremely responsive. Thank you Soraya! We would definitely stay here if we get back to Madrid!
Departamento muy bonito con una terraza inmejorable. la ubicación es perfecta para conocer distintos puntos de Madrid
Very modern, great location! Really enjoyed the terrace!

Geweldige locatie midden in het centrum van Madrid. Hele leuke eettentjes heel dichtbij.
Leuk dakterras (vooral als het mooi weer is). Appartement is klein, maar prima voor twee personen.
Great location!!! Cozy European apartment...perfect for 2 people. Highly recommended​.
best location in madrid, 2 minutes from plaza mayor and puerta del sol

La estancia en el apartamento de Soraya fue increíble. La terraza es sin duda la mejor parte de la casa, desde donde se puede ver la plaza mayor. En cuanto a la limpieza, todo estaba impecable y en perfecto estado. Muy buena calefacción.
En cuanto a Soraya: puntual, atenta y encantadora.
Sin duda repetiremos!!!

If you can book it, book it now!!!! Over the last two years we‘ve stayed in various AirBNBs, and for someone like us who travel with pets is always hard having to sacrifice space or location.  However once in a blue moon we’ll find hidden jewels, such as this amazing flat with a big terrace (well proportioned to the flat) and at a great location.   It has everything you need to enjoy your stay,  it can be out and about in the streets of Madrid or enjoying a sunny day laying on its terrace.  This being our first time in Madrid our goal  was to aim for a cozy flat with the best possible location, and this is it.  Sightseeing from this location is perfect, within walking distance you’re in Plaza Mayor, Plaza Del Sol, Gran Via, Puerta de Alcalá, The Buen Retiro park (great park to take your dog for a walk, pets deserve a vacation too), The Royal Palace, and the best Museums.  After a day of sightseeing we do recommend to relax and enjoy an evening at the Mercado de San Miguel, full of tapas and wine, sangria, beer, cheeses, ham, literarily the taste of Spain. It’s not a sit down restaurant. Our last tip is to enjoy your visit and be open to experience new and fun things!

Ce lieu est une petite merveille,vrai paradis au cœur de la ville. La terrasse est magique, l'appartement lumineux, impeccable et fonctionnel. Le rapport qualité prix extraordinaire. Et la gentillesse et l'accueil des hôtes des plus chaleureux. Bravo !

Апартаменты находятся в 20 метрах от площади Майор, это самое сердце Мадрида. Несмотря на это внутри достаточно тихо =)
Все доспримечательности под рукой. Но самым большим бонусом была огромная терраса с фантастическим видом! Идеальное место, чтобы наслаждаться Мадридом!
Внутри есть все необходимое, даже хороший утюг. Огромное спасибо Сорайе за ее гостеприимство!
El apartamento esta en 20 metros de Plaza Mayor, eso es el corazon der Madrid. Pero por dentro esta bastante tranquilo =)
Todos lugares de interes estan cerca. El lugar ideal para disfrutar a Madrid! En casa hay todo lo necessrio, uncluso la plancha buena. Muchas gracias a Soraya por su hospitalidad!

Soraya was a great host! I can’t say enough great things about our stay in this apartment. The location is perfect being central to all, the place was immaculate with everything you need for your stay and the terrace was a huge bonus! Don’t hesitate to book this apartment for your stay in Madrid!

Soraya is a great! She was accommodating with a very late check-in time and even welcomed us in person. Her listing is just as described. The unit is clean and quiet with a lot of natural sunlight.  Walking around late at night is safe. Being that we were in Madrid only for 2 days, the location is great as it was in the heart of Madrid tourist attractions and the metro station was nearby. 100% recommend a stay with Soraya!

Great location, the terrace/deck is wonderful. Place is just as described--clean and small.
The apartment is above a very small outdoor bar and on a pedestrian street near one of the arches of Plaza Mayor. But--while you can definitely hear the vibrant street life 4 floors below--you can feel away from it all.
Soraya's place helped make this a truly relaxing vacation.

The view of the Plaza Mayor off the incredible terrace is just breathtaking!! This place is lovely, but the terrace is definitely a jewel. Everything you need, a lift up to the third floor, a nespresso machine—although there is food literally steps from the door!! Perfect launching point to explore all Madrid has to offer!
Great place, perfect host!

Perfect place to live in Madrid, which is very close to Sol. Bibiana is a perfect host. I love spending time with her. She recommended us some places to go, and even made a cake for us, which is very very delicious!
todo perfecto!

Absolutely loved our stay here. Amazing location, super easy to get everywhere you need, very safe neighbourhood no matter what the time. Bibiana was such a kind and friendly host, we cannot recommend this stay enough!

We loved our stay with Bibiana! She and her family were very friendly and kind. Her home is beautiful and in an excellent location within walking distance of a wide variety of activities and the Puerta del Sol train station. The room is a little small and up a ladder so may not be great for people with mobility issues but we thought it was cozy and perfect for our trip. If we visit again we’ll definitely check to see if she is still hosting!

I’d never been to Madrid and was looking for a convenient spot from which I could see a lot by foot. I loved the look of the space from pictures and the description Bibiana gave of herself & the fact that she speaks Italian, Spanish & English, making it easy to converse while at her home. I felt right at home and would definitely stay again! Grazie Bibiana!
We had a great stay here - very close to everything we needed and Bibiana is lovely!

Le logement est idéalement bien placé. Bibiana est vraiment super gentille agréable souriante accueillante et donne de très bons conseils.
La chambre est un peu basse de toit. juste à savoir.
Recomiendo la estadía en este lugar todo está muy cerca y los hosts fueron muy amables, siempre atentos a nuestras necesidades. 100% recomendado.
Loved staying here! Central location, beautiful rooms, felt very at home
We really liked to stay at Bibiana’s place. The apartment is super cozy and it is really in a perfect location to explore Madrid on foot. Finally, it was always very easy to communicate with Bibiana.

Excelente anfitriona Bibiana, muy atenta en todo momento. Fue muy lindo conversar con ella.
La ubicación excelente, cerca del metro con él.cual recorrer o moverse en distintas direcciones por Madrid.
Would definitely recommend staying here! The room is very small, however, perfect for a couple or single travelers that want to take advantage of the central location!
Everything was fine!
Alles war super! Die Unterkunft ist perfekt für 2 Personen und könnte eigentlich nicht zentraler liegen. Danke für den tollen Aufenthalt!🤩
Es un excelente lugar, muy bien ubicado, Bibiana siempre estuvo pendiente, nos sentimos como en casa.
Amazing place in such an awesome location! The little room up in the loft was perfect for us and there was a fab fan which was definitely needed in August!

Nous avons passé un très bon séjour chez Bibiana. La localisation de son appartement est exceptionnelle, et bien que la chambre soit vraiment petite (chambre sous les combles), c'est un logement parfait pour passer quelques jours à Madrid et visiter la ville. L'appartement entier étant sous les combles, il y fait assez chaud, mais Bibiana a gentiment mis à notre disposition un climatiseur. En résumé, il ne faut pas s'attendre à une chambre luxueuse, mais le rapport qualité-prix reste très bon !
Lovely place, really close to the centrum and really close to the must watch bear

Lets start with the pluses. Room is located close to Plaza Mayor, Royal Palace and Gran Via which is a very good benefit. The other pluses that I can say about my stay is that the tenement house's got elevator, the host is communicative and helpful and generally the house is clean. Unfortunately I can say that the room where is stayed was comfortable. They flat where I slept was so small and the attic roof has been inclined on a high level that I hit a wooden bar twice. The falt is so small that even a person with 5,3 ft height can stand straight. Moreover, to get to the room you have to climb up to 10 ladder steps and 5 of them are quite dangerous because yuo have a problem to place your foot correctly. To get to the bathroom you have to fold the ladder or slip through the ladder and scratch your back or chest. The bed is also not so convenient and very uncomfortable.
다락방이여서 짐을 풀고 하는게 살짝 힘들긴했지만 위치만큼은 진짜 제일 좋아서 간단한 짐을 들고다닌다면 충분할 거 같아요
Está muy bien ubicada, muy agradable la casa en general. Bibiana y su familia fueron muy amables con nosotros.
Stupendo, caratteristico e Bibiana stupenda con i suoi consigli
Well location, kind host

I’ll start by saying Bibiana and Gigi were wonderful hosts, and for the price - it was relatively ok. Our flight was delayed and they let us check in late at night since we had no other choice. I think for a night, it would be fine. More than that, I would maybe consider something else; the bathroom is in the living room, and it’s a small apt so there’s usually someone either in the living room or in the bathroom. I thought that the pics of the living room were part of the room you stay in, so I thought the room was bigger. It is really small and low roof - you can’t sit up in the bed, and climb a ladder to the room. Great hosts. Great location (next to Sol station, 5min walk to Gran Via). To sum up, I think that for a single night it’s great, and if you’re visiting Madrid for a few nights on a budget you could probably make do.
Todo muy bien,  coincide con lo que menciona
The location of Bibianas place is perfect. Right in the middle of the city all major sights were in walking distance. The room was nice and had a great view.

La habitación es cómoda, tal cual el anuncio. El recibimiento muy agradable, he estado muy poco pero me he sentido muy cómoda, como en mi casa.
La ubicación no puede ser mejor, céntrica y muy bien comunicada.

Muchas gracias Susana

Selvom jeg aldrig mødte Ulises, havde jeg en god oplevelse med at bo i det værelse, han lejer ud. Det var hans mor, som også bor i lejligheden, der tog imod mig, da jeg ankom, og jeg følte mig straks velkommen. Hun viste mig rundt i lejligheden - køkkenet er veludstyret og badeværelset er i fin stand - og forsikrede mig om, at jeg endelig skulle sige til, hvis jeg havde nogle spørgsmål eller skulle få brug for hjælp med et eller andet.
Mit værelse fungerede fint, efter mine behov, idet jeg blot benyttede det, når jeg skulle sove - sengen er ganske fint.
Om kvarteret, La Latina, kan jeg kun sige, at jeg virkelige nødt at bo her. Her er dejlige cafeer og barer, god stemning på solskinsdage. Det ligger i gåafstand til de Paseo del Arte, Plaza Mayor og Puerta del Sol, og skulle man blive træt i benene findes der en metrostation, La Latina, på Plaza de la Cebada, to skridt fra Ulises lejlighed.
Jeg mødte, som sagt, aldrig selv Ulises, men kommunikationen via Airbnb var god - han svarede hurtigt på de enkelte spørgsmål, jeg måtte have.
Alt i alt et dejligt ophold, jeg ikke kan sætte en finger på.

Mi estadía fue muy placentera, la señora Susana (madre de Ulises) estuvo al pendiente en todo momento de lo que necesitaba, muy servicial y amable. El cuarto era justo lo que necesitaba, sólo para descansar es excelente, y el piso tiene muy buena ubicación, justo en frente al metro "La Latina". Gracias y saludos.
Ulises y su madre fueron excelentes anfitriones. En realidad reservé para mi mamá y ella quedó encantada. Muchas gracias
Very welcoming and friendly place, clean and tidy, corresponds to the photos, and extremely central - in the middle of La Latina.

The room is one of three in the flat and Ulises' mom lives there too. Both Ulises and Susana made me feel welcome and use WhatsApp to navigate arrival and other needs you may have while there. Susana is home much of the time and is usually available for questions/help.

I was there for 5 weeks while studying Spanish at Eureka (also recommend the school). I felt comfortable cooking in the kitchen everyday. It is well equipped and not used much by Susana or short term guests.

Communicating with Susana was straightforward and easy, although she speaks Spanish quickly and with an Argentinian accent so I found it easier to practice Spanish with others in Madrid.

As a monthly guests, she laundered my bedding and towel every week, which was nice. The bed was simple but comfortable. Friday and Saturday nights are noisy until1am from the cafe/bar on the first floor. Ear plugs helped or you can also just luv lime a Madrileño and stay out late.

The location in my opinion is unbeatable. The price is right. Mercado Cebada across the street makes for fun food shopping, or you can hit local alimentaciónes (tiendas) for organic or conventional veggies. But YOU MUST go to see Daniel in the Mercado. He owns Maracuya, a wine bar to the right as you first enter down the steps of Cebada. He is the maestro of Spanish wine and for a few euros you will find yourself drinking wonderful riojas while snacking on bread with cheese and truffle oil wondering why you haven't lived here before.

Mi estancia ha sido estupenda!
He estado un par de noches y he descansado muy bien, la cama muy cómoda!
El piso está muy cerca de todo!!
Al llegar, me recibió Susana, madre de Ulises. A pesar de que llegué un poco tarde por el retraso del avión, ella se mostró encantadora y me explicó todo.
Recomiendo esta estancia 100%
Très bon séjour à Madrid dans la chambre mise à disposition dans l'appartement de la maman d'Ulises

Best area of Madrid in my opinion. Do not hesitate to book this place!

Second time staying here, as good as the first. Please see my previous review.
The room looks like the picture they posted on the website, so you can trust them.

Sehr freundlicher Empfang, Ulises hat uns jederzeit geholfen.
Wohnung liegt super zentral und hat alles was man benötigt.
Sehr zu empfehlen!
Realmente lo que buscaba. Muy buena ubicación y una habitación sencilla sin lujos y muy limpio. Ulises y su madre me recibieron de forma estupenda y ofrecieron su ayuda en todo momento.
My stay with Susanna was wonderful. The room was comfortable and in a fantastic location in the heart of Madrid. She was a great host.

El barrio genial, lo que queríamos para el tapeo. Susana mamá de Ulises nos atendió excelentemente.
Saludos, Nicolás de Mallorca
I didn't actually get to meet Ulises, but his mother was really sweet and the room was very large and comfortable. I highly recommend.

Ulises' place is very clean, and in a very nice location in La Latina. During my stay in Madrid I had a great time walking around the city, and this was a good central hub. I didn't interact with Ulises much, but his Mom was very friendly and accommodating. However, I don't speak any Spanish, and sometimes communication was difficult because of that. But, nothing too serious. Overall, a good stay.

This place is in a great location in la Latina, the room is as you see in the photos, we didn't use the kitchen as there are so many amazing places to eat within walking distance. There is a washing machine available for 4 euros. The bathroom needed more cleaning at times. We didn't meet Ulises but his mother Susanna was very helpful providing maps, although she doesn't speak English and our Spanish is very limited! We would recommend this place.

Ulisses não estava mas fomos recebidas maravilhosamente pela Susana, sua mãe, com um grande sorriso, muito simpatia e água fresca! A casa tem uma localização perfeita, no coração artístico de Madrid, mesmo em frente do colorido Mercado de La Cebada.
O quarto é bastante confortável e a casa muito agradável, com tudo o que é necessário para uma estadia divertida e alegre entre amigos!
Quando voltar à capital espanhola, já tenho lugar de eleição para ficar!
Recomendo Ulisses, e a sua mãe, a todos no Airbnb :)

Ulises was very kind and helpful. The apartment is in a great location at the beautiful and central La Latina neighborhood. We definitely got our money's worth. Great option for people who plan on spending most there time out doors and just need a nice quite well located room with all essential necessities.
Gracias Ulises y Susana!!

My friend and I had a wonderful experience! Everything we needed was available at the apartment, and Ulises was extremely helpful and patient with our Spanish. Would recommend it to someone looking to stay in the city center.

The room was spacious and the apartment was clean. Ulises wasn't there, but Susanna was when I checked in and she was always accessible (although we didn't interact too much). They were also very nice and let me check out late since I was waiting to be able to move into my apartment. It's in a great location too - interesting neighborhood and you couldn't be closer to the metro.

Ulises' mother, Susan, lives at the property. She and her son are genuinely warm. The place, which is clean and located in a strategic location, provides hot shower. Bed was comfy. Nothing to complain about.

We had a good time in Madrid. We didn't spend a lot of time in the loft but it satisfied our needs. It's very clean and there is no noise.
We can recommand it
Good location and bed was comfortable! Thanks for being a great host!
Good experience!

La mama de Ulises, Susana (excelente anfitriona), estaba preocupada porque llegué más tarde de lo previsto por cuestiones de horario. Ya esto me hizo sentir de que alguien me estaba esperando. Es una sensación muy agradable, sobre todo cuando se está en País estranjero.
Ulises y Susana hicieron todo lo posible para que me sintiera en casa y así fue.
Al llegar a Madrid un mes antes, tuve una mala experiencia y no quería saber nada de la ciudad. Susana logró no sólo que recorriera la ciudad, que me encantará y que me sintiera muy segura.
Estoy muy agradecida y creo que el mundo sería un mejor lugar con anfitriones como ellos.
El barrio es muy céntrico y se podía ir a todas partes a pie, que era lo que queríamos. De noche no notamos ruidos de la calle. La habitación era grande y limpia, las camas confortables.

El apartamento está ubicado en la zona centro, en donde es muy fácil, la movilidad, fue muy sencillo llegar desde el aeropuerto hasta la casa, ya que se encuentra ubicado al frente de la estación del metro.

I spent 2 weeks staying in Ulises' home shortly after I arrived in Madrid, when I hadn't yet found a flat of my own, and it was perfect! Everything was just as it appeared in the pictures and the room was very clean and of a decent size. Susanna, Ulises' mother was usually around the flat and was very friendly, helpful, and attentive if you had doubts or needed anything at all! Additionally the room is in a fantastic location, the barrio of La Latina is very lively at night with lots of cool bars and restaurants, and is just a short walk away from the Plaza Mayor and Puerta del Sol! If you're in Madrid for anything from a few days to a month I would definitely recommend a stay at Ulises' place.

The place is good but: The person in the room says she lives there, only saw her once.... careful, they become really paranoid if you don't give keys back before 11, funny thing is I was there at 10-ish and they were not there.
muchas gracias por todo ♡ tu piso es en un sitio perfecto. el cuarto es muy limpio y el baño también. además me gusta que la host tiene mapas y información de madrid.
Ulises was there to greet my friend and I when we checked in, and made us feel very welcome! Apartment was very nice and is in a really great location, would definitely stay again!

I had a lovely stay at Ulises's place! He was very responsive and his mother (who helped to check us in) was really kind and helpful. The apartment was well located, and the room was clean and exactly as described (with a surprisingly sturdy and comfortable bunk bed!). Would love to stay again.

Mi estancia en casa de Ulises y Susana ha sido perfecta, me quedé encantada! Los dos son superamables, me recibieron muy bien y me ayudaron en todo lo que necesitaba, me senti como en casa. La habitacion es muy confortable y el piso esta ubicado en una de las zonas mas bonitas de Madrid, en pleno centro, cerca de muchos sitios de interes historico-artistico.
Lo recomiendo al 100%
位置极佳 房东人超好 干净舒适！

Estuve 2 semanas con Susana, la mamá de Ulises.
Ella me ayudó mucho en mis primeros días en Madrid y su casa fue para mi un hogar. Hoy me fui y fue muy triste dejar su casa!
Mi dormitorio era grande y bien equipado.
El piso siempre era limpio y Susana estaba siempre ahí para responder a cualquier duda.
La cocina es bien equipada y todo funciona bien!
Gracias Susana! Ya te echo de menos!

Three points I want to mention
1) location, location, location
2) Great host, amazing experance
3) Value for money
Muy buen lugar para alojarse en madrid, esta cerca de la plaza mayor
Great location
房东妈妈人很好，房间小但是很干净，晚上拒绝访客！

aunque es un piso antiguo,està muy bien cuidado y limpio, la estancia es muy cómoda porque està muy bien situado en el centro de La Latina, A pesar de estar localizado en un area con mucho ambiente nocturno, el piso es tranquilo porque la habitación no da directamente a la calle.
La atención y el recibimiento fué fenomenal por parte de Ulises y su madre, en resumen una estancia muy grata.

Ulises apartment is clean, convenient, spacious, comfortable, secure and wonderful! His mother, Susana, who lives there, is helpful. Though there was somewhat of a language barrier (my Spanish is poor!), she was patient and friendly.
When I wasn't able to communicate with her, i could always message Ulises for help. It seems they have thought of everything! I was there a full week and didn't need anything that wasn't available.
The location is great, as well. La Latina has a great night life. The main strip is just behind the apartment, actually. The metro is just outside, but I actually didn't use it much. La Latina is essentially part of Madrid's center which is very walkable.
Book this room!
Very convenient location with little noise from outside. Ulises is helpful and timely with all the communication
Great location, fantastic host.
This is a really great location for your Madrid exploration! Clean and comfortable. Perfect spot for walking the city streets!
Beautiful AirBnB Room and amazing Host. The Airbnb is near public transport and at walking distant to many sites.

Really great place! Very conveniently located and very comfortable. This apartment is very close to multiple metro stops and walking distance from many sights. Ulise was a wonderful host and very helpful. Fast wifi was a plus!
La habitación es amplia con todo lo necesario,está muy limpia y es muy tranquila a pesar de estar en una zona con mucho jaleo no se escucha nada y se descansa muy bien.las camas muy cómodas.

Bibiana is a vernünftig nice host. She ist flexible with the check-in and check-out. Felt comfortable all the days in her home. Her home is in the Center of Madrid, very close to known places and lots of people arround there.

L'emplacement est parfait, tout près de la puerta del sol, dans un immeuble magnifique. L'appartement de Bibiana est très beau, très agréable.
La chambre louée est dans un petit grenier dans lequel nous ne tenons pas debout, la pièce est très bas de plafond.
Bibiana est à l'image de son lieu de vie, agréable et solaire.

Pontos positivos: 1. Bibiana foi muito atenciosa e discreta; 2. a localização é sensacional, dá pra fazer tudo a pé; 3. banheiro limpo, porém dica na sala de estar do apartamento, o que acaba por tirar um pouco do privacidade de quem usa.
Pontos negativos: 1. O espaço é menor do que aparenta ser nas fotos, se vc for alto ou estiver acima do peso, terá dificuldades para se locomover no dormitório; 2. O banheiro (parte que toma banho) não pareceu estar muito limpa.
No geral, valeu muito a pena. 🙏😊
Bibiana e sua família são muito simpáticos e receptivos. Nos sentimos em casa. O check-in foi tranquilo e a localização é excelente!
Bibiana was very sweet and communicative, she gave us recommendations for our trip and was a great host. The location is perfect, right in the heart of the city with lots to do. Would recommend!

Se encuentra en el mero centro de Madrid, buena ubicación… aunque llegamos justo en un momento donde había mucha gente y era difícil moverse con maletas. No nos pudimos hospedar por las escaleras que se tienen para subir al ático que sería el cuarto y tampoco podíamos subir las maletas porque lo cabían arriba.
Bibiana muy amable y atenta
Buena ubicación, Re céntrico.

Ha sigut una estada fantàstica. El pis és molt cèntric, acollidor i molt ben comunicat. L'habitació és més petita del que sembla a les fotos però igualment és còmode i s'hi està molt tranquil. Encara que no hem coincidit amb la Bibiana ens ha donat molt bé les instruccions i ens ha respost ràpid quan ho hem necessitat.

Muy satisfactoria,
nos encantó conocerles aunque fuese brevemente.
Bibiana y familia son personas muy naturales,
hospitalarias y gentiles.
Su hogar... "un lindo nido en el ático" donde humildemente
han hecho huequito en su buhardilla
para acomodarnos en un rinconcito pintoresco
repleto de sus buenas vibras, corazoncito y espontánea sencillez.
Apartamento lindo y cálido muy hogareño, cerca a los lugares más populares en Madrid, restaurantes y compras, algo pequeño pero está bien si tu intención es recorrer Madrid.

Quisiera comenzar diciendo que Bibiana es una muy agradable persona siempre estuvo atenta al inicio y nos di buenos consejos de lugares para visitar, sin embargo lamentablemente el lugar no era lo que esperábamos ,por la imágenes pensé que estaba mucho más amplio el lugar , por si acaso quiero que sepan que tienes que subir a un ático y ahí es donde te quedarás ingresarás por escaleras de ático y estando ahí no podrás estar de pie si mides 1.60 ya que la altura es muy pequeña y desciende , no soy una persona que se desilusiona fácilmente a pesar de eso decidimos alojar ahí al igual que por nuestro presupuesto no podíamos volver a gastar en otro lugar para hospedarnos , lamentablemente la primer noche me picaron chinches de verdad y con sinceridad quiero que sepan que no miento ni espero ganar nada de esto porque nada se me devolvió , pero si quiero informarles para que no les pase lo mismo que a mí, yo creo que no soy la primera y también se me hace muy injusto que renten algo así
Gran lugar, en el centro de Madrid

La ubicación del apartamento es perfecta, no tuvimos la oportunidad de conocer a Viviana, pero fue muy atenta al responder todo lo que necesitábamos.
El espacio es un poco más pequeño de lo que se ve en las fotos, pero se agradece la confianza.

les + : logement très bien situé !
facile d'accès, tout près du métro SOL.
bonne communication.
draps et serviettes fournis.
les - : chambre très petite et basse de plafond, accès plutôt difficile par une petite échelle escamotable.
l'ensemble des espaces est partagé, peu d'intimité.
Merci à Bibiana pour l’accueil! Nous avons passé un très bon séjour à Madrid. Le logement est très bien situé, à proximité de tout, très central. Mon fils Rémi a adoré la chambre sous les toits!

Bibiana was a great host!!!
thank u so much😍
Her place was lovely, it is really close to everything described. Bibiana was a lovely host. I would highly recommend her house to everyone.

Un lugar lindo. Buenas gente. En general nos hicieron sentir muy cómodos. Aunque en la descripción queda claro y cristalino, se hace un poco tedioso el tema de subir y bajar la escalera metálica para ir al baño. Es una buhardilla y hay que ser conscientes que no podrás ponerte de pie. Igual nosotros solo usamos el cuarto en la noche así que no se hizo incómodo.
Sehr zentral und gutes Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis. Bibiana ist sehr freundlich.
Lugar perfectamente ubicado. Bibiana nos atendió todo el tiempo y fue súper amable. Todo lo que necesitamos estuvo disponible.
Bibiana is an awesome host, her beautiful home was filled with amazing art and eclectic decorations.
Bibiana es muy buena anfitriona, nos proporcionó información y paraguas para la lluvia😄

Bibiana es una persona muy amable, nos dio muchos consejos y recomendaciones para nuestra visita a Madrid. Su casa es hermosa y muy organizada. Además nos permitió dejar las maletas antes del check in. Gracias por todo Bibiana, la pasamos muy bien en tu hogar.
Such a wonderful lady. We had a great time, she is very kind and all recommendations for nearby restaurant were amazing. Also very easy to communicate with her.

El alojamiento estaba ubicado en una zona muy céntrica lo cual era favorable para poder visitar lugares, cerca de la Gran Vía. La anfitriona fue amable, contestó los mensajes a tiempo. Cabe destacar que la habitación fue más pequeña de lo que esperábamos, aún midiendo 1,60 teníamos que estar encorvadas todo el tiempo. Para pasar a la ducha había que subir un poco la escalera de metal.
Thank you for welcoming me and my daughter into your home.  We enjoyed our stay.
Everything was excellent!! We stayed in April and just opened the windows, no need to turn on the airconditioning. Gracias Bibiana, my husband and I love it!!! 💖💖💖
Leuk huis, fijne omgeving!
Bibiana fue muy atenta y cordial, nos ayudó en todo, nos dio recomendaciones , excelente anfitriona.

el alojamiento coincide con las imagenes, su ubicación es excelente!!! es facil de llegar desde el aeropuerto, parada de metro a 100 metros y a metros de puntos turisticos. Bibiana siempre respondio rápido a nuestras consultas.
Cosy and charming appartment ! Bibiana and her family are adorable!
El único punto flojo es la escalera que conduce a la habitación-altillo
gracias bibiana por ser como SOS muy agradecido por todo , una excelente alnfitriona , gracias por todo llegué en el apagón de Madrid y nos ayudó mucho gracias

¡La estancia en el lugar de Bibiana fue increíble! Ella estuvo siempre muy atenta a que todo fuera cómodo y agradable, y fue muy amable al permitir un check-in flexible. 100% recomendado. Hizo de mi estancia en Madrid una experiencia inolvidable :)
Parfait

Estancia 100% recomendable si llevas poco equipaje, excelente ubicacion (cerca de Plaza del Sol, Plaza Mayor, Gran Via) y la anfitriona demasiado amigable y al pendiente de tu llegada. Muy acogedor y excelente para descansar.

Bibiana a été super avec nous! Nous sommes arrivées un peu plus tard que prévu, et elle nous a quand même chaleureusement accueilli. L’endroit est parfaitement placé, nous n’avons pas eu à utiliser le bus ou le métro une seule fois lors de notre visite (à part pour revenir de l’aéroport)! La station de métro Sol est à 2 minutes à peine de marche, si non les choses que nous trouvions les plus importantes à visiter se trouvaient à 40 minutes MAX de marche! Notre séjour s’est très bien passé, nous recommandons:)
Great location for how inexpensive it was. The attic is a bit cramped but if you’re just there for sleeping and showering this is a great, safe, and clean place.
Very good, would stay again!
Sumamente cordial. Muy limpio.

El hospedaje en si es muy lindo y está cerca a todo, pero es que bibiana y su familia son super gentiles y acogedores, en todo momento nos han ayudado y compartido su visión de la ciudad para que nos llevemos un buen recuerdo de esta. 10/10
Cozy Stay, but a Bit Too Warm in the Attic
Loved the location of the place. Although it was a bit cramped in the attic the apartment was very beautiful.

Bibiana was always very quick to respond and helpful if we needed her, and she seemed lovely.
It doesn't really look it in the photos, and I can't remember reading it in the description, but the ceiling is only about 4ft tall at its tallest point so it did feel quite cramped.
Bibiana did provide us with an air conditioning unit which was much appreciated in the 37° Madrid heat.
The main issue we had was that Bibiana was not actually present for our stay and she had invited her niece and some friends to stay for a concert. We weren't made aware of this until the day before we arrived but didnt think much of it. It turned out that there were 6 or 7 people staying with us and taking up most of the communal space. This made getting around the rest of the already cosy apartment very difficult and somewhat uncomfortable in certain situations, for example, the toilet is located right by the front door in the living room so we would have to squeeze past them to access it.

fuimos a pasar dos días yo y mi mejor amiga. Super bien ubicado, al lado del metro del sol.
Bibiana es un amor, super atenta y abierta conocer a otras personas con amibilidad
The place is in amazing location! Walking distance to all the major landmarks and Playa Major. Bibiana and her husband were friendly and we enjoyed sharing their apartment with them.

Contesto rápido y estuvo atenta, personalmente ninguna queja hacia ella.
La ubicación inmejorable, pero es cierto que es muy pequeño , y solo hay aire (pingüino) en el altillo y hace mucho ruido.
Como la anfitriona no estuvo, pudimos usar el resto de espacio con intimidad.
En cuanto a la limpieza, solo estaba limpio el altillo donde dormíamos y el baño con WC (la ducha estaba aparte), el resto...bastante sucio.
Si solo vas a dormir tienes un pase, pero sinceramente no recomendaría a mis conocidos.
Todo muy bien céntrico y muy amable con la entrada y la salida y poder dejar las maletas , gracias!
O quarto fica mesmo ao lado do Sol, muito central, a Bibiana responde sempre às nossas mensagens sempre que precisamos, está sempre atenta.
Had a great time at Bibiana’s apartment. Great location, air conditioning was nice and it was quiet
Sehr guter Aufenthalt, super Lage!

Super Unterkunft im Zentrum von Madrid. Wir haben fast ganz auf ÖV verzichten können. Bibiana war zwar nicht Zuhause aber wir haben uns trotzdem sehr wohl gefühlt in der Wohung. Das Zimmer ist sehr klein, aber sehr liebevoll eingerichtet. Wir würden jederzeit wieder kommen!

Great place , location and the host was amazing!
Only note; if you are old or have a disability I would not recommend it since you have to climb a stretch ladder everyday to your room.

This AirBnB has a great location. We walked to every place we wanted to see. Very close to Plaza Mayor. Very clean and Bibiana was kind and helpful. The bedroom is very cozy. Bathroom is nice and clean.

Alloggio in posizione centrale , servizio buono, molto utile la cucina.
lo consiglio per chi vuole visitare la città a piedi.
Essendo un soppalco l' ambiente risulta un po' claustrofobico e con poca privacy come viene descritto nell' annuncio.
Bibiana, Iñaqui y Mia are a super host, feel like in family, amazing location.

Olga is very nice and he was very helpful!
I enjoyed staying at her apartment for 8 nights. It is very central in Madrid.
Thank you Olga!

I only stayed for one night (I was in town for work and wanted to spend an extra day in Madrid) and found the apartment to be perfect. Olga was very responsive and answered all my questions before arrival. She even had her manager meet me to give me the keys and show me around even though she could not be there herself.

The apartment is absolutely charming, and very secure (there are 2 outer doors to which you must have the keys to enter). There is a taxi stand and Metro stop literally 1 minute walk away, so you can easily find transportation. The area is safe and right next to a lively plaza with restaurants. Of course, it is also a stone's throw away from the Royal Palace, which is a tourist must-see. I had a delightful stay and was very sad to leave!

I would recommend Olga's apartment to anyone planning a vacation in Madrid! The location is wonderful, literally opposite the Opera House (Opera metro faces the theatre), 2 mins. from the Royal Palace and Cathedral, and the beautiful labyrinth of Old Madrid.
