The apartment itself is very comfortable, with a large sitting room and comfy sofas, which is full of Olga's many books and personality.
The bedroom is very peaceful and quiet despite being so central, and the airconditioning keeps you cool on a warm Madrid evening!
A superb, secure warm place from which to experience the beauty of this wonderful city!

I would recommend Olgas apartment in every respect. It was spotlessly clean, tastefully furnished and had everything you could possibly need. Olga had prepared it beautifully and I felt very much at home. There is a metro 50 metres away, a convenience shop across the road, great tourist spots on the doorstep and many choices for eating. This sets a high standard, and I would stay here again in a heartbeat. Thank you Olga!

I stayed in Olga's beautiful apartment for the last 3 months or so. I am a student from USA and found Olga and the apartment to be a blessing! The place is located in an vibrant area - Opera. On the other side of the street were the amazing Opera House and luxurious Palacio Real. Metro, bus and taxi stands right outside - could not have asked for a better location! Olga was an excellent host. Attentive, caring, and understanding. I thank her so much for the wonderful experience I had and I hope to visit Madrid again!

I didn't stayed at Olga's apartment, I arranged it for a colleague. I can say Olga is a very professional person to deal with, it was very easy and clear to talk to her and arrange things. The person who stayed at her place said 'it's a very cosy and nice place, and lucky to have almost a library in it :)'.

We found Olga's apartment stylish and cosy and the location is very central just next to the Opera. Arrangements and correspondence was smooth and our late check in on Friday was not a problem. Apart from some noisy neighbours at nights the apartment was also relatively quiet considering the central location. We had a great stay.

Olga's appartment is very nice, and on a perfect location. Very central and close to the metro Opera. We didn't meet Olga personal, but her manager Maria was very friendly and nice.
We were almost all the time in the city, and the weather was nice, so we didn't spend much time inside, but it was very cosy there, with a lot of books in the house and nice decoration. Perfect place to discover Madrid!

I have lived in Olga's apartment for 7 weeks and everything was perfect. The neighborhood is really safe, the metro stop "opera" is few meters away and it is easy to get to different supermarkets. Moreover, even if the apartment is in the city center, it is very quiet.
Olga replies the email almost in real time, she is able to find the solution to any type of problem, even if she is not in Madrid, and the doorman of the building is always willing to help.
The apartment is really confortable and clean, and the kitchen is equipped with every kind of appliances.
Anytime I will be back in Madrid I will be willing to live in Olga's place.

I had a fantastic stay at Olga's apartment in downtown Madrid! The place is very centrally located, so it's really easy to get around and enjoy the city. The apartment is also very cozy. My stay felt like the perfect mix of being at home and vacationing in a great city!

La estadia en casa de Olga fue realmente muy buena. El piso es muy agradable, perfectamente ubicado, dotado de todas las comodidades que funcionan perfectamente. Todo estuvo genial. Sinceramente no dudaria en recomendar su piso para una visita a Madrid !

Le séjour chez Olga a été parfait. L'appartement est situé à côté de l'Opéra, idéal pour les visites de la ville, il a tout le confort et tout fonctionne sans le moindre problème. En résumé tout a été génial. Sans la moindre doute, je recommande son appartement pour un séjour à Madrid.
Edith

I enjoyed staying at Ulises's place! I arrived late so Susanna checked me in, and I really appreciated her help with the keys. She let me try unlocking and locking the doors with her so that she could make sure I could get in and out of the room and the apartment. Thank you so much for your hospitality!

Ulises was a great host. Great communication. We met his mother who let us into the flat. Although I mistakenly texted the wrong checkin time, his mother promptly came and assisted us. Two bottles broke in my luggage and she so kindly washed & placed my luggage to dry. She didn't have to do that but she did. She is one of the sweetest women I've ever got to meet.

The location is fantastic. You can walk everywhere.
The description of travel from airport to the house by Ulises is also very good. Saved me money for taxis! I used the same ticket for my whole trip!

Susana es muy amable. El piso está una zona muy buena en todo sentido y es super cómodo. Muy limpio y prolijo además de ser un lindo departamento.
Muy recomendable.
Muy bien situado, se llega caminando al centro. Muy buenos anfitriones te dan mucha información y el piso esta como en la foto. Muy recomendable.
Located in a great area, near to all sights, supermarkets, day markets, food and drink. Accommodating hosts who are friendly and helpful.
Excelente apartamento, Susana te hace sentir como en casa, súper amable y a disposición siempre para lo que necesites! Sin duda cuando vuelva a Madrid voy con ellos.

The most important point is its location, very central. I have spent several days in Madrid, of which 2 days in the city. I did not take any bus or subway. Under such high temperatures, I visited most places by walking without much difficulties. After a few days, I will be 70 years old.
Safety is also an issue when one travels alone. This place is safe, quite in the room.
Very nice room close to attractions and city centre. I was very good taken care of and the apartment was clean and nice. Thank you for the stay
Estas como en tu casa

Susana y Ulises han sido encantadores y la estancia ha resultado muy tranquila. La ubicación del apartamento es perfecta para visitar Madrid, muy cerca del metro y a poca distancia andado de los lugares más típicos del centro. La casa tiene todo lo necesario para una estancia cómoda y agradable. Muy recomendable!

We thoroughly enjoyed our stay with Ulises! The location in particular is excellent. Especially for directly engaging with the city life and night life of Madrid. As well as for travelling around the city in an efficient way. The apartment itself is equipped with a good standard of facilities and makes for a comfortable stay. There was a bit of a language barrier with Ulises' mom but that didn't take anything away from the quality of our stay. Thoroughly recommended place to stay!
Un lugar con muy buena Ubicación. Rodeado de Restaurantes, bares y Supermercados. Muy próximos a los Sitios Turisticos.  Zona muy Animada y la Estación del metro a un Brinco.

This was a perfect place to stay. It was exactly as described, and very comfortable. I didn't meet Ulises, but communication was clear and easy. His mother Susana showed me around the flat and made sure I had everything I needed. The location was great too! Thanks :)
What a place!  Smack in the middle of la latina and the metro.  It was clean and homey!  I would com back here if i come to madrid!!!  And it is such a value!!
Great location in La Latina. Walking distance from the Metro, nightlife, and restaurants. Small but cozy room. Great communication with the host
Very practical location, metro station is 10 seconds walk , area is really bsy at night with lots of places to eat round the corner.

I had a great stay at Ulises's place, from the outset he was extremely helpful with directions and helping me arrive by the Metro. His Mother checked me in, despite my limited Spanish and her limited English we muddled through and I was made to feel instantly welcome!
Muy céntrico, limpio y accesible. Recomendable para disfrutar de Madrid 😀

La ubicación es excelente, al lado de la estación de metro, excelente atención, el lugar como se describe, al lado hay muchos lugares para comer, a pocos metros de Plaza Mayor. Altamente recomendable, sin dudas, volveria a hospedarme.

This apartment is as described and is in a really great location. The metro is across the street, and next to restaurants, shopping, and more! Walkable and convenient, I would definitely recommend staying here!
gracias todo genial

Ambos muy simpáticos y disponibles. Un gusto haberme hospedado con ellos.
La habitación bonita y espaciosa.

Excelente atención por parte de Ulises y su Madre, nos han hecho una estancia muy agradable y nos hemos sentido como en casa! Muy agradables y hospitalarios.
El piso esta justo al lado del teatro de la latina, y a 1 min de la parada del metro, muy céntrico.
La habitación es tal cual en las fotos, incluso más grande de como parece, buena limpieza y colchones muy comodos!
Además teniamos wifi 24h y calefacción que con este frio nos ha venido genial! Si vuelvo a Madrid no dudaré en elegirlo de nuevo :)
Gracias por todo!
Ulises’s place is close to everything!be it by walking or taking the metro.so accessible!

It's an vary enjoyable experience.The room is large and comfortable, tiny. It 's very suitable to go to the  tourist attraction,closing to the metro station. And it's convenient to buy things and enjoy local palatable food.I would highly recommend it.

L: La habitación es mucho más grande de lo que aparece en las fotos. Es cómoda y tiene un espejo de pie! El armario es también grande, para lo que imaginaba y la calefacción nos salvo la vida. Nos recibió Susana quien fue muy amable y nos ayudo en todo lo que necesitabamos. El baño es compartido pero siempre limpio y nunca tuvimos problemas. Hay lugar donde dejar los shampoo o jabones. Me pareció un lugar genial y la ubicación es muy buena ya que el metro esta casi en frente al departamento y hay lugares donde comer cerca y baratos. Además de la feria que esta todos los domingo allí a una cuadra que venden ropa barata.
Great location and good communication, Ulinis and his mother will take good care of you.
Cuando en el frío invierno uno busca el calor de un hogar... ¡voilà!  ¡Aquí está! Es un lugar tranquilo, cerca de todo, cómodo y confortable.  Ulises y Susana son unos anfitriones de primera. ¡Bravo!
The place is just opposite to la Latina station, by 10-15 mins walking distance can arrive nice bakery and restaurant !

The room was very comfortable for two people. We were able to lock our door if we wanted to. The apartment is very centrally located and the host is very nice and approachable. Would recommend, good value.
Excelente ubicación y hospitalidad. Gracias!!

Un lugar está espectacular, súper cerca de la estación del metro, anfitriones muy amables dispuestos a ayudarte en cualquier cosa que necesites, la habitación sumamente limpia y organizada, excelente lugar!
Lovely little place, Ulises and his mother Susana are both very nice people.
Excellent location and very quick responses.

Amables, atentos a cualquier cosa, accesibles a las necesidades que les comuniques, en la puerta del metro latina, barrio tradicional madrileño, todo tipo de servicios en la zona, hasta un mercado, con ascensor, cosa extraña en este tipo de edificios de Madrid.  Solo estuve una noche
We stayed here for 2 nights and had everything we needed. Very good location and a really helpful host!

This home is very cute and charming. Suzanna is very sweet and helpful with our broken Spanish. The location is amazing and very close to public transportation and basically in the heart of the city. It was so easy to walk to all the plazas and the palace. We would stay here again!

Muy buena ubicación, justo al lado de la salida de metro de La Latina. La habitación correcta, aunque la cama un poco dura pero para una noche no está mal. Muy silencioso, perfecto para descansar. Como pega el baño está un poco descuidado, el tirador de la cisterna del water es una caña atada a una cuerda.

Todo fue perfecto. Susana y Ulises son geniales anfitriones! La casa está en el mejor punto de Madrid, cerca de todo, y sin bullicio. Podés caminar hacia todas las atracciones turísticas. La habitación tiene todo lo que necesitas, está muy cómoda. Puedes cocinarte si deseas. El baño siempre muy limpio.  Tienes todo a mano, supermercado y metro enfrente y si deseas comer algo, bajas y tienes muchos bares. Gracias por todo, y sin duda volveré.

Ulises's place was conveniently located at the heart of La Latina, walking distance to main attractions and delicious tapas! The apartment was kept sparkling clean by Susanna. Communication via sign language and google translate was amusing but Susanna was so lovely and patient. Overall it was a very pleasant stay and amazing experience to end our trip in Spain. Thank you to both Ulises and Susanna!

Ulises and his mother were excellent hosts, even though they did not speak English they still made an effort to sort out all my needs in the apartment.
The apartment is cosy, central and well located - walking distance from 2 metro stations and all the historic happening squares.
A must stay for some one who’s travelling solo first time in Madride.
Excelente ubicación y además una muy buena atención tanto de Ulises como de su madre. La habitación muy cómoda con lindos detalles de bienvenida. Recomendable 100%.

My stay at Ulises House was a nice experience. His mom was wonderful, she gave me directions to places when I needed and also provided me with the local map with the city attractions, she also put a welcome sign with my name on it in my room which was lovely. Very clean place with a great location that has not one but two metro station near by only steps away. Restaurants and coffee shops were right next to the building, and super market just across. I highly recommend it. Thank you!
An overall enjoyable stay. Great location right by the metro.

The stay at Ulises's place was great, the apartment was always clean and very well situated. Ulises gave us very good indications and was very responsive regarding the booking, the ways to get there from the airport. During our stay Susana was very kind and helpful.
Ottima posizione centrale. Stanza piccola, ideale per poche notti. Susan è un'ottima padrona di casa, gentile e cordiale con gli ospiti.
The place is so convenient and I would recommend this place to all.

Check in was smooth, was welcomed by Susana who gave me information about the main sites of interest in Madrid. The location is excellent! Just opposite the metro and also walking distance to the Plaza Mayor and Gran Via.  Ulises also prepared a personalised welcome board in the room which was so thoughtful. Highly recommended!

房东经常不在，由他妈妈负责管理(完全不会英文)。提前询问了我飞机到达时间，但是在我到达机场至艰难找到入口这段时间里完全没有回复，打电话也不通，最后是按了五分钟门铃家他妈妈才开门(第二天才回复我说昨晚他在看剧所以忘记回我了)。我朋友订的airbnb check in时间比较晚，所以想先放行李在我们房间，结果还没听我们解释就被拉到门外去一直重复着一句“不能带访客”。Check out的时候说行李可以放到下午三点半，我三点四十分到，感到很抱歉，他竟突然要收取我10欧的费用。位置较中心，房间比较干净但是厕所马桶的坐盖抬不起来(不方便男生上厕所)，host比较势利。

Un lugar perfecto para estar en Madrid! Limpio, bien ubicado, la habitacion muy comoda, bien iluminada y ventilada. Susana la Madre de Ulises, una linda persona nos ayudo en todo y nos hizo sentir como en casa. No tuvimos el gusto de conocer a Ulises pero siempre estuvo al pendiente de nosotros, nos permitio modificar la reservacion sin problema, y nos ayudo con direcciones. Nuestro vuelo se retraso y la maleta se extravio, nos esperaron aun cuando llegamos tarde y nos recibieron nuestro equipaje. Una experiencia inmejorable! Sin duda regresaremos.
Excelente alojamiento en La Latina, el corazón de Madrid. Ulises y susi, unos genios!
No pude conocer a Ulises, estuve con su mamá, Susana...una persona súper amable y agradable!
Muy amable Susana quien nos recibió unos apoyó mucho en nuestra estancia y Ulises muy atento siempre a dudas en el chat.

The place is situated really great, easy to reach anything in Madrid. Clean, cozy and comfortable! Ulises and his mom are easy to reach and great hosts, they pay attention to details and very friendly. Recommend!

Ulises was a lovely host and very friendly. The location is only a few metro stops from the city centre and only takes a few minutes to reach. The room is very standard so don’t expect any thrills or frills and in my experience it got noisy outside early in the morning. Perfect for your getaway if you are not planning to stay inside, besides a shower and sleep. My bed could have been comfier, and I couldn’t keep the window open.

We lived in Olga's apartment for a month, and we really enjoyed it a lot. It is located in the heart of Madrid, with the Opera and the Palacio Real right next door. The apartment has a cosy atmosphere and is well equipped.
The contact with Olga was super friendly, she was very helpful and replied our emails immediately. All in all we had a wonderful time in Madrid and in Olgas place!
I rented Olga's apartment for my daughter for 2 months, and my daughter said that everything was very nice. With my dealings with Olga, she was always very prompt. Thank you!

Great asset to Airbnb. Olga is a great host. Despite not being in Madrid at the time we were there in, she was always available and very friendly. Anyway, she got everything prepared so well upon our arrival, that we didn't need much additional help. We spent one month in her apartment, and we felt like at home. Very clean, light-filled, and nicely decorated.  So comfortable that we'd had like to stay for one month longer. The surrounding area is also one of the best spots in Madrid. You can go everywhere on foot. We barely didn't need to take the metro (subway). We'd repeat without hesitation.

Olga's apartment was a dream come true. It exudes an atmosphere of learning and sophistication with its many walls of books and tasteful decor. We had plenty of space to breathe and enjoy our time off our feet when we weren't scouring the treasures of Madrid. The location is ideal: very quiet at night, but only a block away from countless worthy restaurants and bars. It only takes twenty minutes to walk to Prado, Renia Sophia, or Thyssen-Bornemisza. There's a fantastic coffee shop called Coffee & Kicks only a few minutes walk away where we would get pour-overs every morning. Up the block from there you can also find a fantastic meatball joint called Bolero. Overall, a peaceful place to call home for a month in Madrid. I would definitely stay here again.
Pues dio toda la libertad para funcionar

The location for this apartment could not be better. It’s literally steps away (easy walking distance) to all major attractions (Puerta del Sol, Gran Via and Palacio Real) but far enough away from both foot and pedestrian traffic to feel secluded. The apartment is the perfect size for one or two persons especially for long stays. Mine was two months and I actually felt sad to leave it. There is a fully functioning kitchen and large bathroom w/ tub, living and dining areas and a work desk situated in a window alcove. The bed is luxurious in size and comfort and there’s plenty of clothes storage available.  Building has two elevators and apartment is on the fifth floor meaning no one above you to make noise. The apartment is a literal library – there are thousands of books shelved throughout.  Most importantly I was very comfortable and felt very safe there – Madrid in general one of the safest capital cities in Europe. Owner Olga and her accomplice Morela went out of their way to make my stay a good one. All these factors including the price make this place unbeatable. I recommend it whole heartedly.

Olga's apartment is spacious and comfortable.  We stayed for a month and it made a nice home in Madrid.  The bed is large and comfortable.  The bathroom is a good size and has a full tub and shower.  The kitchen is small but well-equipped.  The location is excellent for visiting the central city.  And one of the main Metro stops is only a 2 minute walk away so you can easily connect to the entire city.  There are plenty of restaurants, bars and grocery stores within a few minutes walk.  Communication and check in/check out was very good.  This is our second stay in Olga's apartment and we are happy to recommend it.
El alojamiento de Olga esta muy bien. Ubicacion excelente y espacio confortable y excelente trato para disfrutar de una buena estancia en Madrid.

The Olga's appartment has a perfect location. Close to the Opera, the Palacio Real, and Sol. I recommand this place.
The appartment is modern, and well equiped, perfect for a week-end or a week.
The communication with Olga, was easy, and it was a pleasure.
super

Fantastic location. Extremely noisy next door neighbors. No English language tv. Thin scratchy towels. Sheets don't fit bed very well. Lots of lovely books. Carla lives in the United States but was very available by email. Central heating on only between noon and midnight so cold in November and one space heater wasn't very effective.

La estancia en el apartamento de Olga ha sido sobresaliente. Al llegar nos avisaron que habían detectado un problema con el microondas y lo cambiaron por uno nuevo al momento. Olga y Chiara hacía un seguimiento regular por si necesitabamos algo y si todo iba bien.
El alojamiento es un hogar cálido, con todo lo que necesitas y en una situación fabulosa, a dos pasos de Ópera y del centro de Madrid.
Que buen recuerdo y experiencia nos llevamos de este alojamiento, sin ninguna duda repetiremos.

El piso es muy acogedor, luminoso y espacioso. Después de haberme quedado allí por más de un mes, puedo decir que el piso es ideal para cortas y largas distancias, cuenta con todo tipo de utensilios de cocina por si uno quiere cocinar. Es realmente un hogar. Y la ubicación es inmejorable: al lado del Teatro Real, de la plaza del Oriente y de Madrid de los Austrias. Excelentes opciones de restauración y cultura. Gracias Olga!
Great place and location!
Departamento muy acogedor, bien equipado, con buena ubicación, a una cuadra del metro Opera, muy cercano al Palacio Real.

L’appartement est très bien placé pour visiter Madrid, et le prix de 65 euros la nuit correspond tout à fait à l’offre proposée. De plus, Olga est réactive et à l’écoute des demandes, c’est appréciable.
Piso muy agradable, grande, y con una localización estupenda! Olga sabe como organizar las cosas y hemos pasado unas días muy buenas en Madrid!
Such a cosy and comfortable apartment and so close to everything. Warm, everything that we needed.

Olga's place was great.  Well-situated, lovely apartment, everything you could need.  And, if I had any questions before or during our stay, she responded right away.  If we are in Madrid again, we would definitely look to stay there!

It was really great staying at Olga‘s place in Madrid. The location is just perfect; the flat has it’s own style and everything you need is there, even „I am at home“ feeling. :) I was with my children (10 and 5) and it was also good for them - enough place for playing in the flat and great location- just 2 minutes and you are in the gardens; and area is „royal“) and clean; just 10 min - and you can explore the colorful  La Latina or go to museums or Parque de Atracciones - everything is quite close with the public transport. And Opera Metro Station in few steps from the house! In case you have any questions- Olga is always ready to help - she answers really quick and even if she is not in Madrid the communication is perfect and she has a good team of friends to organize and taking care of everything. Thank you very much, Olga, it was a really great time in Madrid!

Olga place is a home away  home. It's  warm, confortable. Great location Metro Opera 100 meters. Taxi stop 50 meters, the Palace just next door. It's city center. The best Tapas market in spain is 500 meters  away. No questions asked  next time in Madrid  I will  stay at Olga place.
Thanks for everything

Great location for exploring Madrid, we walked everywhere from this apartment but it was also very peaceful at night. Olga was very quick to reply to messages and made it easy for us to check in flexibly. Nice to stay in an apartment that feels like a home rather than a hotel room!
We had a lovely stay at Olga's flat! The location is within walking distance to the main attractions and the flat feels like home. Olga replied to all our questions promptly.
L'appartement est très bien situé et très agréable, idéal pour visister la ville
El apartamento está genial y la posición es perfecta.

It did not take me long to feel at home in Olga's apartment. I loved the feel of the apartment with all the books and the large work desk. The kitchen was equipped with everything that I needed to make meals and the bed was comfortable. You cannot beat the location, you can get to a lot of the attractions and get to the different neighborhoods by foot or jump on the metro. I ended up extending my stay because I was not ready to leave. I would stay at Olga's place again.

El departamento está muy bien ubicado, muy cerca de la estación del metro, por lo que es fácil de acceder desde el aeropuerto o desde la las estaciones de ferrocarriless.  Es un piso tranquilo y dotado de los electrodomesticos necesarios. La comunicación con el anfitrión fue fluiday clara. El apartamento no es apto para no más de dos personas. En razón a los objetos personales que tiene el anfitrión en el departamento, un niño o una pareja amante de los espacios libres podría sentirse un tanto cohibida.

Una experiencia inolvidable,
CT donde estuvimos con absoluta privacidad, pero al mismo tiempo rodeados de personajes con existencia histórica y de otros imaginarios debido a la valiosa biblioteca que atesora el departamento de Olga.
La localización ha sido otro plus, así como el edificio tan tranquilo, como la necesidad de estarlo que teníamos. Gracias Olga .

Great apartment! Looks exactly like the pictures, and great bonus of having a lift in the building. Excellent location right next to the palace and walking distance to all the great spots in "royal Madrid" - plaza mayor, mercado de san miguel, templo de debod, sol, la latina. We loved it!
so great location and so nice master , I will back Madrid agagin

Un departamento rodeado de miles de libros, insólito en una época de extrema virtualidad. Nadie puede confundirse al ver fotos de distintos lugares para alojarse, y una única imagen de este departamento. Comodo, ideal para una pareja, en un edificio que es muy tranquilo, pleno de paz y serenidad. Los servicios están completos, tanto para invierno como para verano. Olga y sus colaboradores están atentos a nuestros requerimientos, tratando de complacernos en todo lo posible. No lo duden, la dupla departamento-entorno histórico es imbatible!
Super location and very cozy apartment with everything you need!

appartement charmant confortable et tres bien situé.
bon accueil et précis.
Piso muy acogedor, en la mejor zona de Madrid. El piso tiene mucha luz y es más grande de lo que aparece en las fotos. Excelente relación calidad-precio.

The apartment is neat ,wifi works well,bathroom was fine  and the bed was comfortable. Kitchen is small but well equipped. Unfortunately we found the noise from neighbors  too high both during the day and at night  to consider using it again or recommend  it.

Olga place is amazing and  homey. I felt home and in the middle of all actions Olga is very responsive. The place itself is very central to everything, the opera is just few feet away. The apartment is a one bedroom all hard wood floors. Very Madrid in style, internet is good, English Tv and amazing music collection. This is not your typical Airbnb, it is where local intellectuals live, dine an interact. Very secure and safe. You don’t need a car or even public transportation in this apartment. Thank you Olga

Excellent location, very close to the Opera station, and just a 5-minute walk to the Sol station. Would recommend this place because of its proximity to all the central locations by walk. The Apartment is small but keep clean, and is perfect for 2 people.
Bastante aceptable, bien situado y comunicado. La cocina un poco pequeña y algún ruido de  vecinos poco educados, por lo demás bien.

This flat was perfect for us! Olga was very responsive and helpful throughout our entire stay. This flat is exactly as advertised. It is in the perfect part of town, close to EVERYTHING - including public transit & historical monuments. My husband and I were able to walk to everything. We highly recommended Olga’s flat and would absolutely stay here again if we ever come back.

a wonderful apartment, a real home, designed with exquisite taste, full of art and books. excellent location, central but quiet, in a safe, pleasant building. olga is a kind and reliable host who answers promptly to any message. only drawback: the place is so beautiful and inspiring you might just want to stay in... warmly recommended.

We had a fantastic time in Madrid while staying at Olga's apartment! Even though we didn't meet in person, communication with Olga was easy and quick, and she was a kind, responsive, and very thoughtful host. The space was beautiful and clean, and the location was perfect -- right next to Opera and within walking distance to many attractions in Madrid. I would definitely recommend this place to everyone!

I had a wonderful time at Olga’s place. Location is very good with highlights around the block and easy access to La Latina and Malasaña. If you need to work a little, the desk by the window is great.

The flat is verycomfortable and quiet although in the centre of Madrid.. everything workedwell andthe checkin was very easy as simeone was already waiting to give the keys and answer any queries I might have had
Amazing location and such a cozy apartment. I would gladly stay there again!
muy recommendable.  el alojamiento tiene buen estilo y cozy, esta en Opera (me encanta este barrio de Madrid) muy centrico todas las cosas están muy cerca. cama muy comoda!

Это замечательная квартира, очень удобное расположение (5-7 минут вверх до Гранд Виа, и метро «Опера» находится прямо под домом). Можно легко и быстро добраться до всех центральных достопримечательностей. Соседи очень дружелюбные. Тихий красивый подъезд. В самой квартире чувствуешь себя как дома, есть все удобства, и даже больше. Тем кто любит готовить в путешествиях вообще не придётся себя ущемлять. Безумно удобная кровать! Для тех кто планирует приезжать в Мадрид зимой посоветую взять с собой тёплые вещи, потому что в любой квартире которую вы снимете будет холодно, но здесь был обогреватель, который делал жизнь легче. Спасибо за приятный отпуск!
We absolutely enjoyed our stay in Olga’s apartment. Good communication, friendly welcoming, perfect location and amazing apartment.

This is a nice house overall. Olga is nice and quick to respond every question, also it has a cozy house decoration style and convinient location which only take minutes' walk to metro station.   Only little problem is house heater not strong enough to keep it warm in the winter like this times:).   Definitely will recommend friends here ~

Great location.  Next to the place and so many other spots in the city.  Direct access to the metro which allowed us to get around the area.  Provided us with so much information on things to do and was always available to answer any questions we had.  Overall great place and would recommend this location if you should want to stay in Madrid.

You could not find a better location than Olga's place for your sightseeing stay in Madrid. You are 2 blocks from the royal palace, so even when you check in at 3 pm you can still run over and see that.  This street is even on the Rick Steve's map so that makes it easier. You can walk to the Prado and back and see Plaza Mayor and Plaza del Sol. Restaurants are everywhere nearby and a little food shop across the street. Apt is clean and well equipped. Staying at Olga's really made our trip navigating Madrid a breeze.  We could see what we wanted and get back for a siesta. Highly recommend!
amazing location, close to everything, overall a great stay
A spacious apartment in a great location.

We spent three nights at Olga’s place and it is in a perfect location for us as first time visitors to Madrid. We could walk to everything we wanted to see and do and we were right in the middle of the action.
Olga’s place is on the 5th floor but there is an elevator which made access easy. The apartment is exactly as shown in the photos and feels like a real urban home, unlike many “hotelish” Airbnbs. The kitchen is small but we didn’t use it as there are so many great places to eat all around.
There is some noise in the apartment from neighbors and the outside but in our opinion it is typical city living noise, which we are used to and it didn’t disturb us. This isn’t a hotel, it’s a city home and it did make us feel like we were really living like a local in Madrid. We had some difficulty with our check in, but Olga resolved the issue for us and did everything she could to make it right, which we appreciated.
Overall a great stay and excellent value for a top location in Madrid.
Great location, very clean, very nice hosts. Overall excellent, will comeback!

El departamento está muy bien ubicado, cerca de todo. Es muy fácil llegar con el metro. La comunicación con Olga siempre fue estupenda y quien nos recibió muy amable y puntual.
El departamento tiene su encanto, muy completo, amplio y cómodo. La cocina estaba súper equipada.
good

Olga's apartment is clean, charming and located in the very center of Madrid. The perfect place from where to explore the city. Wonderful location. Clean and secure building.If you love the opera, this may be the best place for you.

Olgas lägenhet ligger väldigt bra och det är gångavstånd till de flesta sevärdheter. Transport från flygplatsen med metro gick väldigt enkelt och bekvmt, metrostation nästan utanför lägenheten. 위치, 호스트, 청결도, 가격 모든 면에서 완벽에 가까운 숙소입니다. 올가와 줄리아 두 명의 따뜻한 배려 덕분에 행복한 시간 보낼 수 있었습니다. 다음에도 꼭 재방문 할 수 있었으면 좋겠네요. 추천드립니다.

I stayed a month in this apartment and loved everything about it. The location could not be more perfect, the apartment is cozy, light and comfortable, I would always try and stay here in future trips to Madrid. I can't possibly rate this place highly enough.

It is a 1 minute walk to the Metro station, the Royal Palace, great food and bars but quiet and calm.  I loved my stay and would always try and book this apartment in future Madrid visits.

Olga's apartment was great. A central location where you were in walking distance to everything. The apartment was clean, spacious and a joy to stay in for the week. I'd definitely recommend this apartment to anyone, and would love to stay there again.

This apartment was the best Airbnb experience I have had in years. It was in a great location, clean, and because  a person actually lives there, it has character, comfortable furniture and a well equipped kitchen. I wish we could have stayed longer!

It is a great place to stay in Madrid! Opposite you have the Opera, the palace is nearby, also the shopping streets! It is a great neighbourhood and it is quiet at night! A good place to stay for a short as well as a long stay!

The location of this apartment is hard to beat, a short walk to everything you need and easy access to the metro. The walls are a little thin, so you may want to bring some ear plugs. Overall a great cozy stay in Madrid.

My stay at Olga's was great! the location is excellent and the apartment is very spacious. I will definitely recommend to my friends!
L'appartement de Olga est idéalement situé au coeur de Madrid. Il est parfaitement agencé et calme. Nous reviendrons avec plaisir!

Olga's apartment is great! The location is stunning, everything is at walking distance (Gran Via, Sol, Royal Palace). The place itself is very comfortable and cozy. I stayed here for one week combining remote work and sightseeing, I really enjoyed.
Apartamento muy acogedor en pleno centro de Madrid. Muy buena ubicación, luminoso y tranquilo. Buena comunicación con la propietaria :)

Great place to stay in Madrid, central, comfortable and affordable. Olga and Julia were excellent in hosting, they were kind and very helpful, communicanting effectevely to make any logistic smooth as possible.

Nice and clean apartment. It's in a great location, near public transport and city sights! The communication with the host was fantastic.

This home-from-home flat is in the most amazing location and has everything you need for a comfortable stay. Communication and check in were perfect. I’d certainly book again if I were going back to Madrid.

Olga's apartment is simply perfect for visiting Madrid. It'a great location, literally few steps away from Palacio Real and metro stations and also very safe. Olga's place lives up to all the reviews. Wonderful location, lovely apartment. Walk to San Miguel Market,  the National Palace, metro stops and many excellent eateries. From someone who has lived in cities for years, you won't find better accommodations from where to explore the beautiful city of Madrid. Next time I visit, I will definitely stay here!

really great apartment
many thanks

Olga’s place-her actual home-was well located, clean and filled with evidence she is an academic. The modern conveniences all worked just fine. The Opera house had a lot of taxis, which served us older ladies well, and fitter folk have a handy metro stop. A great spot for exploring Madrid. Quiet!

Piso muy confortable muy cerca del centro de Madrid. Olga es maravillosa como anfitriona, nos ayudó en todo lo que pudo.

All in all a very enjoyable stay, and I would definitely stay at Ulises' place again.

Alojamiento muy cómodo y muy bien situado a pocos minutos del centro. Todo fue tal como lo esperábamos y la estancia fue muy placentera. Ulises ha sido muy atento con nosotros y ha estado pendiente de cualquier inconveniente.

Ulisses and Susana are remarkable hosts with a clean, comfortable, well-equipped home that is really close to the heart of Madrid. I was surprised at how quickly I could get to things on foot. I also appreciated access to the kitchen and use of the washer (the latter is reasonably priced). Note for the tall: the bottom bunk in this room is pretty short (maybe 5’6” or 1.7m) so you may want to try the top instead (looked bigger but I didn’t test it out).
I enjoyed how friendly they were. I only met Ulisses briefly but he was very kind. Susana was the perfect hostess. She patiently explained how stuff in her house worked (sometimes more than once when I asked), and also gave a rundown on top destinations (also providing a map so I didn’t need to visit the tourist center). She always made me feel at home (the ‘Welcome, Adam!’ sign made me smile every time I looked at it), and we had numerous, fun conversations.
Travel is as much about your short -term home as it is about your activities. Ulisses and Susana ensure that the home part is well taken-care of.
Very clean and hospitable stay. I enjoyed it.

anfitrión súper amable , te sientes como en tu “propia casa “

Exception location.  Just off Plaza Mayor the location of the apartment is fantastic!  We stayed in the Penthouse apartment, which had a terrace that is to die for! Soraya provides excellent recommendations for local eating establishments, plus instructions for using various appliances.  We love it and if given the chance would definitely return here.  We highly recommend.

Her place is in an outstanding location - just a short walk from the apartment to Plaza Major, great nearby restaurants, the museum district, and the Botanical Gardens.  She greeted us promptly on our arrival and made sure to show us how everything worked in the apartment and other amenities associated with it.  We would definitely come back to stay here if we have a return trip to Madrid in the next several years.  Spending evenings on the terrace balcony with a great bottle of local vino watching all of the local people below is icing on the cake!

Soraya’s place was a great find! I was so happy with my selection. You can’t get a better location. It is right in the heart of the Old Town. The surroundings are beautiful and the terrace is one in a million! We enjoyed it every night. Though it is small, it provided us with everything we needed. The location is very central. We felt very safe walking everywhere. The small kitchenette was all we needed. We spent most nights on the terrace with our own store bought tapas and wine. We will definitely be returning!

Amazing location
Central
Close to everything
Rooftop deck makes for amazing morning bfast & nite drinks spot!
Wonderful location within walking distance to everything. It even has an elevator to all but the last floor!

This is a lovely oasis in the busy Plaza Mayor area. We felt at home right away and our hosts were available and responsive to our questions and needs during our stay! The apartment is perfect for a couple and the terrace is a real treasure!
Great location. Amazing rooftop.

We really enjoyed our stay in this apartment. The communication with our hosts, Soraya and her husband was very good. The apt. has a great location, right next to Plaza Mayor and Calle Mayor. The area and the building are very safe. The apt. is very clean, has two A/C units, WiFi, tour guidebooks and good hot water. Noise is not a problem, the windows and doors are sound proof. Aside from the location, the highlight of the stay is the terrace. Great spot to view the city in the morning or at night with a glass of wine. We would definitely come back.
Perfect as usual ! Great host and wonderful appartment ❤️
Lovely apartment in the center of Madrid. Terrific terrace! A bit noisy at night.

Just back from a fantastic weeks stay in this lovely apartment! The balcony is such a treasure considering the apartment is located just off Plaza Mayor. Soraya is a great host, she met us personally and made sure we were happy with everything. We spent many days relaxing on the balcony with a chilled drink, and there are so many bars and restaurants on your doorstop. Special mention to Mimi’s Creperie, we enjoyed many lovely breakfast here and it is a few steps away from the apartment. Brilliant stay, we will definitely return!
Amazing location and the private rooftop porch is impossible to beat! Can’t wait to stay here again!
Soraya’s place was centrally located in the heart of Madrid. It had all the amenities that we needed and as an added bonus her business was right downstairs for breakfast!
Great and clean place. So close to the a great plaza too!

Soraya's place was a wonderful spot for exploring Madrid. The apartment was very comfortable with AC, laundry and kitchenette. It was also easy to get around the city from our location although the immediate area was pretty busy.
What a fantastic place to stay!!! The location is unreal!!! You are right on top of everything!!! You can’t beat this location and the flat itself is wonderful!!!

The location of this apartment couldn't have been better. It was walking distance from the Prado museum, a beautiful park, and lots of fun and interesting shopping areas. It was very clean and comfortable and had an amazing terrace  that overlooks the busy streets, which was great to sit on in the evenings. We highly recommend this apartment.

This apartment is heaven!! The rooftop patio alone makes the apartment! The added bonus of laundry, plus the thoughtfulness of Nespresso, shampoo, etc., makes this the perfect Airbnb in the most amazing location!! We LOVED our stay and would absolutely recommend to anyone!

Soraya was the best with great planning, great personality and a local business owner. Who could ask for more. She also shared a bit of the local history.
The flat was perfect, cozy, bright and Modern.
The roof Top terrace was amazing morning, noon and night.
Location, well, huh, it was Perfect!
Highly recommend.
Perfect as always !!!
Beautiful place in the perfect location. No complaints at all and is a great place to stay in Madrid.
Excellent location and fantastic apartment with beautiful rooftop terrace.

Soraya y Soran son súper amables. Soran nos recibió a la hora convenida, nos dió todas las indicaciones que necesitabamos, el apartamento estaba impecable, con todo lo necesario para abastecerse: café, té, cosas de higiene, ropa blanca en cantidad, etc, y todos los servicios tal cual aparecen en la web. Elegí el apartamento por su terraza y esta es maravillosa, para asolearse durante algún descanso y para tomar una caña en las noches madrileñas.
Ya los recomendé a amigos y familiares y la única pega que pondria es la falta de un microondas. Igual esto no estaba en la página pero sería muy bueno para que la locación sea perfecta. Felicitaciones Soraya y Soran!!!!!!!

Un emplacement exceptionnel, proche de tout avec une terrasse magnifique.
Très bien équipé et décoré avec goût.
S’ajoute à cela une hôte extrêmement sympathique et accueillante.
Très bonne expérience.

Location is outstanding. The terrace makes the apartment and experience special. The terrace comes with comfortable lounge chairs and a table - perfect for relaxing during the evening! You can see plaza mayor from the terrace. Despite its central location, the apartment was very quiet as it is located on a pedestrian only street. The beds are very comfortable. Finally, the host owns a creperie around the corner and the staff are very helpful. We visited often and enjoyed their hospitality and excellent food/drinks. They offered large 3 euro glasses of wine!

We absolutely loved the location and atmosphere of this place. It was a perfect central hub for the two of us. We loved being able to see the beauty of Madrid only to come back and share a bottle of wine on the terrace and reminisce about the day. Soraya’s recommendations were wonderful as well! HIGHLY recommend and would definitely stay again.
Great spot near Plaza Mayor and Puerta de Sol. The apartment was exactly as described. Had breakfast at Mimi’s creparie every morning and wine on the terrace every night. Thanks Soroya!

Soraya’s place is awesome. Location and patio are the best. We enjoyed sitting out there each night and listening/watching the crowds from Plaza Mayor.
Don’t second guess staying here. Just book it.

Soraya’s place had everything we needed and she was quick to respond. The patio was great to read on and people watch. Even though we were in the middle of Madrid’s busiest tourist areas, it was quiet inside the building.  Thank you!

房间位置绝佳！离地铁站Sol只要步行3分钟，附近很多吃饭的，也有超市，去景点也方便。
虽然没见到房东，但房东的员工一直在帮助我们，非常感谢！
唯一不太好的是，房间空调太吵了，影响睡眠。
这个房子的最大特点就是露天阳台，我们晚上在阳台吃饭喝酒，非常有情调！
非！常！推！荐！入！住！

밤에 테라스에서 별보는 맛이 쏠쏠합니다!
2명이서 가신다면 정말 강추입니다!

Soraya is a wonderful host and we absolutely enjoyed our stay in her amazing place!  Centrally located just steps to Plaza Mayor, it’s the perfect distance to most of Madrid’s landmarks and attractions; and the roof top terrace is the perfect place to unwind after a day of sightseeing!  I highly recommend! Gracias por todo, Soraya!

An absolute gem. Tucked away right outside the plaza mayor you have the ability to step into an amazing culinary and night life scene. The apartment was very clean with an amazing rooftop patio great for enjoying a beer, wine or champagne. Will definitely stay again.

Our stay at Soraya’s rooftop flat was perfect. It’s a very cozy space but the deck makes it feel much bigger. The location is wonderful and walking distance to so much of what we wanted to see. Be sure to take in the Mercado de San Miguel, we had lunch there everyday, a foodies wet dream come true. Will defiantly stay at Soraya’ again when we come back.

Is a great place for a couple, with a great location, very close to the Plaza Mayor and Puerta del Sol, a few steps from everything, and Soraya leave us a very useful guide with recommendations about things to do and where to eat. The elevator is great help with luggage. And the terrace is beautiful.
Thank you Soraya
Outstanding location with a nice view to Plaza Mayor. The host was very helpful and the place was very nice. I would certainly stay here again!

Great clean place, in the center of so many places to see and restaurants to grab tapas and more. Very close to public transit and easy to find. I really enjoyed my stay and look forward to another stay.
Best location, nicest terrace, would higly recommend to anyone!

Great location
Very clean
Super responsive and communicative

Excellent location and Soraya was a fantastic host. The apartment was very clean and the terrace was beautiful. Would recommend to anyone visiting Madrid.

Soraya’s place is in a perfect location right next to Plaza Mayor and a few blocks away from Puerta del Sol. The location is amazing and the terrace would have been great for people watching had it not been raining while I was there! Would definitely stay here again.
Very lovely apartment with a huge terrace. Amazing central location!

Great location.
Wonderful terrace. Privacy. Relatively quite. Super comfy bed and pillows. Love the Nespresso coffee machine.

We really enjoyed our one week stay. There were some noises from the neighbors, but all together it was great. Easy and quick communication. Great kitchen. Cozy place. So lovely area with the palast and sunsets. We felt very safe and we would love to come back.
Appartement magnifique, très bien situé, accueil très agréable, très réactif. Je recommande vivement.
Molt recomanable el pis de l'Olga per visitar el centre de Madrid.

A perfect base in Madrid. Very well located  - within easy walking distance of many attractions and with with good public transport nearby to get to the others.  Olga's apartment is very homely and an oasis of calm which was great to return to the after the bustle of the city. it is very tastefully decorated and well appointed.  Communication was excellent from Olga and Jaime. Don't hesitate to book if the apartment is available.
great spot!

¡Todo muy bien! Las imágenes se corresponden con la realidad. En nuestro caso, únicamente lo utilizamos para dormir, pero tiene todo los servicios cubiertos para las necesidades que puedas tener.. (cocina, lavadora, etc.).
Por parte de la anfitriona y co-anfitrión, todo perfecto, llegábamos por la tarde - noche y no tuvimos ningún problema, Jaime nos estaba esperando. La verdad que la ubicación para nosotros ha sido perfecta.
Esperamos poder repetir en el futuro..
Hemos estado genial. Recomendable 100%!

Olga’s place was at a superb location. It was a 2 minute walk to Opera station which had 2 metro lines. It was a 8 minute walk to Gran Via where Mango, Zara, H&M and Primark where all in a row next to one another, so extremely easy for shopping.
Jaime met us at check-in to give us an introduction to the apartment and surroundings, and also gave us some recommendations for restaurants. Thanks!
Apartment was very clean and spacious.

This is a charming comfortable home, centrally located to many of Madrid’s green spaces. The home is well equipped and with easy access to many amenities. Metro nearby and supermarket. I would book this home again if available for my next stay in Madrid.

I had stayed at Olga's before on a previous visit to Madrid.  And I will sign to stay in her apartment again when I visit Madrid if the apartment is available.  Olga's place is a gem located in the best area of the city (Opera's Square next to Puerta del Sol) within walking distance to all places that matter. Clean, beautiful apartment with great decor, it is the place to be when visiting Madrid. On top of it, Olga prices her apartment well below what others in the area and offering similar amenities ask for.  Definitely a place to come back!!
Perfect location, and a perfect and very well appointed apartment. I had a wonderful stay!

Clean and lovely AirBnb apartment equipped with everything you need to feel at home. Located in Downtown Madrid, it was an easy walk to all the sites we wanted to see. It has a comfortable bed and nice bathroom. Olga and Victoria had excellent recommendations and were extremely helpful.
We had a great stay! 😃

Great place- felt like a home ( which it is), not a sterile corporate Airbnb.  Location is so good- close to a metro station, the Royal Palace and lots of dining spots. The apartment was perfect for a couple, the area and building felt elegant. I would be happy to rebook in the future.

Olga's apartment felt like a true home away from home. It was practical, clean and comfortable and felt very welcoming.
The location is perfect: in the center, but not crowded; quiet but not dull. You have many eating end entertainment options within a 5 minute walk, more than you can ever try within 10, and virtually all of central Madrid within 20. And, to speed things up, the metro is 2 minutes away.
Last, but not least, Olga and Victoria were perfect hosts. Always responsive and helpful, and very nice.
We have stayed in quite a few AirBnbs, and Olga's is our favorite.

I loved my stay in this area and Olga’s place was the perfect location to explore Madrid city. It’s close to parks, transport and has plenty of food options on the doorstep including a vegan cafe and supermarket around the corner. I really loved how secure the place is and the surrounding area is kept super clean and tidy. A really lovely introduction to Madrid. Thank you Olga and Victoria for making this an easy, pleasant stay. 🙏💚
Come essere a casa!

Nous avons passé chez Olga un excellent séjour à tous points de vue. L’emplacement au cœur de Madrid nous a permis de circuler exclusivement à pied, mais les transports en commun sont tout proches. L’appartement lui- même est très beau, confortable, chaleureux et silencieux . Un grand merci à Olga! Nous espérons avoir bientôt l’occasion de revenir dans ce bel endroit.

Apartamento muy bien ubicado a 70 metros de la estación del metro Opera. Caminando a pocos minutos de la Plaza Mayor, Puerta del Sol, restaurantes, tabernas, bares y comercios. El apartamento es amplio y con una gran cama.  Nos encantó porque todo lo teníamos muy cerca.

Olga’s place is perfect for a couple to stay when you visit Madrid. Her place is spotless, you can find everything you need during your stay. The location is at the center of central  of Madrid. A few steps walk you can see Royal palace. A lot of restaurants you can find close to her place. We are so lucky that we had found this place when we visited Madrid.

The place is exactly as described. The host was responsive and always answered my questions. The apartment is sparklingly clean and it’s quiet despite of being very central. Opera metro station is 2 min walk and has a fantastic restaurants around the place. I will highly recommend Olga’s the place for stay in Madrid.

Accueil très sympathique. Le logement est conforme à sa description. Confortable spacieux agencé avec goût. Très bien situé centre Madrid non loin des musées édifices à visiter jardins.
Je recommande sans hésiter cette hôte et ce logement.

El piso de Olga es un hogar, con un equipamiento 10 y en la mejor zona de Madrid.
Olga es una anfitriona muy atenta y dispuesta en lo que necesites. Esperamos volver pronto.
Centrally located, quiet and nicely furnished. Self contained. Comfortable bed. Great shower. It is someone’s home, not a ghost hotel.
excelente
Perfect for a night in Madrid and I would definitely stay again. Hosts were super friendly and apartment is in an excellent location.
Ulises and Susana were very friendly and helpful, and the room was exactly as expected. The location was great, too!
Todo genial. Intimidad, tranquilidad, limpieza y una atención estupenda. Recomiendo 200%

The room is located near the La Latina metro station.  It is very quiet despite being in the city center. The host Susana is very kind. There is a space to work on the computer and the Wi-Fi connection was good.
Everything perfect!! I will definitely visit again this place in my next travel to Spain.

The place was perfect located and cleaned. A very nice option for a solo traveller and the communication was very smooth.
Ulises and his mother were helpful.
Great place to stay while in Madrid. The location is perfect. Highly recommend!!!
Muy limpio y organizado, la habitación es más grande de lo que se muestra y la host es bien atenta! Bien para una persona que le guste mucho interactuar
Muy cerca de todo, excelente ubicación en pleno centro de Madrid.
El alojamiento está justo frente a la estación del Metro y es muy fácil llegar desde el aeropuerto. El lugar es muy tranquilo y seguro. Lo recomiendo.

Ulises mother was a lovely host and they were very accomodating after I was much later than planned (due to airport passport fiasco) Damn Brexit 🤦🏻‍♂️
Great location and value for money.

La habitación muy limpia y con todo lo necesario para dormir unos días. No conocí a Ulises pero su madre fue muy amable y agradable durante mi estancia. Repetiría sin duda, su situación justo al lado del teatro La Latina es inmejorable.
excelente hospedaje muy central, amabilidad de la señora Susana que fue quien nos recibió.

Ulises was very kind from the get-go. My other plans changed at the last minute and I was able to book a room at his place at the last minute with a very late arrival time. Ulises really saved the day. I did not meet him personally, but his co-hosts and mother were very gracious and helpful.  Excellent location!

Excelente lugar. Muy práctico, con cocina con muchos utensilios lo cual es útil para cocinar y un comedor muy bello. Alli vive Lolis, una señora adorable que es un amor. Todo funcionaba bien y la ubicación es muy buena. Lo único mejorable son las almohadas que son un poco duras, el resto 10 puntos!
muy bien ubicado y limpio

very nice place to be, all is near, price and quality very good, if you have to do work remotely is the best option.
Todo fue perfecto. El piso está muy bien situado, está muy limpio y tiene todo lo necesario. Ulises y Susana son muy agradables y me atendieron muy bien.
Me trataron como en casa,  Susana súper amable y dispuesta a ayudar en lo que sea. La ubicación es excelente cerca de lugares muy hermosos de Madrid, muy satisfecho!!

the 0lace is located right in a busy area, with lots of restaurants and cafes around, it is few minutes walk from most of Madrid's most attractions, Ulises and his mom were very nice people,  highly recommended.
wonderful spot, incredible location to walk everywhere and also right next to the metro (makes it easy to find it on a map!). A simple room, very clean, just what I needed. Friendly host. Thank you!

Nous avons passé un super séjour à Madrid. Suzana était souriante et accueillante, la chambre et la salle de bain propres et nous n’avons pas été gênée par les autres occupants de l’appartement. Merci encore !
El mejor lugar para hospedarte en Madrid!!!! Tiene la mejor ubicación, está super limpio y  La mamá de Ulises es una persona sumamente amable y linda :) Regresaríamos mil veces a este lugar
buen lugar para estar en madrid.  excelente ubicación.  muy buena comunicación con la madre de ulises. resolución de problemas y buena disposición. recomendado
Un lugar muy céntrico, tienes todo tipo de tiendas y monumentos históricos cerca, muy limpio y muy cómodo para pasar los días en Madrid

The place is very good: Susie is very Nice and helpful. The check in was very easy and they were very flexible with the time I arrived. Very clean place and perfect location, in a safe neighborhood and near tô The metro station, bars and supermarket.
The apt was located in the center. It has all the restaurants and bars around. But the room is not noisy. And it’s big and clean. It’s convenient to go everywhere by walk.

la posizione è comodissima perché a due passi dal centro e in corrispondenza della fermata del metrò. la camera è piccola e piuttosto spartana, si affaccia su un cavedio, in compenso è molto silenziosa
Una ubicación céntrica, Ulises y su mamá son personas muy agradables, lo recomiendo mucho si pasas unos días en Madrid.

Excelente estadía, gran comodidad, comunicación y ubicación, Susana ayuda en todo lo que necesites.

Lo primero que debo destacar de este lugar es la calidez de sus anfitriones. Siempre estuvieron a disposición de cualquier inquietud que tuviera.

muy buen servicio y atención de los anfitriones bien ubicado el departamento . muy claras las indicaciones de los anfitriones . lo recomiendo ampliamente

Ambos son excelentes anfitriones, me encantaría volver. ¡Gracias!
La pase muy bien, todo muy correcto. Susy y Ulises en todo momento te apoyan. Abrazo Susy desde Mexico.
Me encanto,muy serviciales .Fue mi 1era noche en madrileña y me sentí como en casa.

Lugar muy bien ubicado. Señora muy amable. Limpieza buena. Un lugar para pasar unas noches en Madrid y estar bien ubicado.

Un lugar con excelente ubicación, en la esquina estaba la estación metro de la latina, muy cerca a la gran vía y con fácil acceso a restaurantes, teatro, tiendas . Susana fue muy cordial y estuvo atenta a lo que necesitamos
Was greeted by Ulysses mother. She is an angel. Super attentive to everything we needed. Location was also ideal. Highly recommended

Vivienda súper bien ubicada.

Totally worth the price. Close to so many metro lines, walking distance to many attractions, and in the middle of the downtown area. So many restaurants and shopping.

I had a great stay, Ulises is very friendly and helpful!  The apartment was nice and had all the necessary amenities.  Location was also fantastic, right by the metro, within walking distance of the centro and La Latina has tons of bars, restaurants and stores.  I’d definitely come back.

Susanna fue muy agradable y me gustó quedarme en su casa y hablar con ella.

Great location, close to the metro station and walking distance from most of the main attractions.
It was a pleasure to stay in the flat of Ulises. Location is great, I got a lot of advices from his mum and all was fine. Thanks for all.

El apartamento está en una zona increíble, el centro de La Latina, frente a la plaza de la Cebada. Movimiento a todas horas, muchos bares y restoranes. Fácil de llegar del aeropuerto con dos estacionesde Metro cerca. En un primer piso con ascensor. La habitación cómoda,  el baño también. La atención de Susana muy buena, hacen que uno  se sienta acompañado. Una muy buena experiencia.
No tuve el gusto de conocer a  Ulises pero Susy siempre al pendiente, la mejor ubicación a pie puedes llegar a todos lados. En mi próximo viaje espero quedarme de nuevo ahí :)

El lugar tiene una gran ubicación! Esta a pocos pasos de la estación de Metro La Latina. Susana fue bastante hospitalaria y cordial los pocos días que estuvimos allí.
Creo que el fee que cobran por llegar de noche al check in es un poco exagerado, nuestro vuelo tuvo un retraso de 2 horas y llegamos a medianoche al airbnb, nos cobraron 50 euros por eso. Por todo lo demás, super bien!

De kamer was vrij klein vond ik, weinig ventilatie en de lades in de kledingkast waren niet echt proper, maar de locatie was perfect. De communicatie heel duidelijk. Voor een kort verblijf van 1 nacht of 2 nachten is het zeker aan te raden.

Le logement de Ulises est très bien situé, tout proche du métro et le quartier est agréable et dynamique. Il y a aussi une supérette à proximité. La mère d'Ulises qui m'a accueillie a été très gentille et m'a accueillie malgré mon arrivée tardive, bien que les frais soient élevés je trouve.
Ulises est très réactif et sympathique par messages.
L'appartement est propre et j'ai pu ranger des choses dans le frigo, la porte de la chambre ferme à clef. Dans la chambre le lit du haut est confortable mais celui du bas est trop petit je trouve (mes pieds dépassaient presque) et à ressorts, je n'aurais pas pu dormir correctement si je n'avais pas changé de lit comme mon amie n'a pas pu venir.
Il y a un bureau dans la chambre ce qui est très pratique.
C'était un logement parfait pour découvrir Madrid le temps un weekend, un grand merci à Susanna et Ulises pour leur accueil et leur flexibilité, j'ai passé un très bon séjour!

Olga’s apartment is very comfortable and is exactly as described. It would be hard to imagine a better location. Great to be so close to the Teatro Real.  Olga and her co-hosts are very easy to communicate with and very responsive. I would love to stay here again when I am next in Madrid.

Ubicación muy conveniente, bonito apartamento inusual, acogedor, hermoso e interesante. Hay muchos libros allí )) biblioteca privada personal).
Por desgracia, entrar en el apartamento no fue la mejor experiencia, pero Olga se comunicó con nosotros. Sería más conveniente si hubiera una opción de auto check in.
Tranquilo, cálido, todo está limpio. Muy cerca del centro) Al igual que la foto, todo es como se describe. El baño también es cómodo, hay agua caliente y sale rápido, fontanería de alta calidad.
중심에 위치해 이동하기 좋았고 숙소도 깨끗하고 최고였습니다. 임대 아파트가 아닌 호스트가 직접 거주하는 집이다 보니 관리가 아주 잘 되어 있습니다. 셀프 체크인은 아니었지만 victoria가 마중나와 집에 들어가는 방법을 친절히 알려주어 편한 체크인이었습니다

Anfitrióna estupenda. Se preocupo en facilitarme la llegada, e hizo todo para que todo estuviese listo cuando llegue. Siempre pendiente de como iba todo para que estuviese lo más cómodo posible.
Apartamento impecable, cómodo, céntrico y para mi, que soy grande, ducha grande.
Volveré
Beautiful homely apartment in a great location. Lovely and peaceful to return to after exploring the city. Great communication. We hope to come back!
Es mi segunda vez que me quedo en éste departamento, todo excelente. lo recomiendo ampliamente.

L’appartement était parfaitement propre, vraiment très bien situé et calme puisque donnant dans une petite cour intérieure. Merci à l’amie d’Olga qui nous a accueillie qui était très gentille ! C’était super !
Super zentral, ruhig, alles tadellos. Perfekt!

Lovely, peaceful apartment in a perfect location for exploring Madrid. We felt right at home! Check-in was easy to coordinate. Super comfy bed and great shower. Will definitely stay again! Thanks for everything

Location, location, location.
Walk to all must see places that in Madrid.

The apartment was perfect, very clean it had everything you need in it, the kitchen was fully equiped with every pan and dish you could possibly need, and although the views from the windows all of the rear of the building it works in your favour as it is not noisy at all, you wouldn't know you were in a city, no noise from neighbours either in fact the ones we saw were really nice.
There are two supermarkets both Dia in name, turn left when you exit building and keep going until the 2nd left turn, it is about halfway up on the right, the second one and slightly larger you take the 1st left walk right to the top of the road and look left and slightly back you will see it, prices are good and they are open quite late on a Sunday.
We took the train from T4 (C2 or C10) it is on level -1 of T4 you get them from the red RENFE machines on -1 cost you €2.60 each BUT you have to have a ticket each, train it to Princple Pio, take about 42 mins they run approx every 30 mins, short walk then.

Olga's place was just what I wanted. Great location, tons to do/see within walking distance and everything in the city is within an easy metro ride, plus a taxi stand across the street, if you need it. The apartment is very comfortable, had everything I needed.  The apartment is in a busy part of town (which is great for visiting) but is in the back of the building so it is very very quiet inside, a perfect respite from the city hub-bub (if you need that!).  Great/comfortable bed,  terrific bathroom (roomy, looks new, functional), etc. etc. Would definitely stay there again.  Thanks, Olga!

Increíble lugar!
Excelente ubicación, súper limpio, ordenando y con detalles únicos.
Gracias por la atención

The location couldn’t be better. In a quiet and pleasure neighbourhood, close to all main Madrid spots. You can easily reach anywhere just by walking. The flat is in a nice building, extremely clean,  with all you need for a comfortable staying. Quiet, comfortable  bed and wonderful shower with  lots of restaurants around. Olga was fantastic and helpfully, answering any questions very quickly. That’s the place to stay in Madrid, I hope to be back soon!
We started in Olga's place at the end of our 5 week European break. This was our most favourite accommodation during this time. Absolutely fantastic. Could not love it more.

Appartement très agréable et joli. Il est très bien situé,  en plein centre, et en même temps très tranquille. La cuisine était vraiment bien équipée. On se sent tout de suite chez soi. Si je reviens à Madrid, je retournerai volontiers dans l'appartement d'organiser.

We very much enjoyed our stay in the apartment and will surely choose this again when we come back to Madrid! The apartment is super cosy, very centrally located and perfect for a weekend exploring the city. Especially the book cases are a book lovers dream! We could also store our luggage in the apartment on the last day before flying back home which was particularly appreciated.
We thoroughly enjoyed our stay.  Walked everywhere to see the sights, and had some fantastic food nearby. Thanks Olga for sharing your space!

El departamento es adorable, su decoración y el equipamiento de cocina es hermoso y completo, uno se siente muy a gusto como en casa,  muy bien ubicado para recorrer caminando la estupenda Madrid, recomendable 100%, sin duda volveríamos a elegirlo.-
Very nice, clean, and comfortable place in a very nice location.  Great communication and responsiveness.  Would definitely recommend and stay here again on a future visit.

The apartment has an elevator and is an easy walk to Opera station, in a very pretty neighborhood.  Place was clean and the shower, internet, and bed were all good.  Shutters can be closed completely for sleeping, and no noise at all.  Very cozy.  Not much of a view, but for views I went outside.  All in all a great stay.

Olga’s apartment was a real gem. Wonderful location to explore Madrid. Very close to the metro but you can also walk to most places. Very clean and comfortable apartment with fast wifi. Despite being in the centre of the city the apartment is very quiet. Highly recommend and would definitely stay here again.
Wir hatten einen schönen Aufenthalt. Die Wohnung ist sehr ruhig gelegen und ansprechend eingerichtet. Sehr gute Kommunikation mit Jaime.

Todo fue perfecto. La atención de Olga y Jaime, y sus respuestas. El piso se ve hermoso en las fotos, pero es incluso más bonito y espacioso. Es un hogar, no un piso de airbnb. Gracias Olga por compartirlo con nosotros durante un mes de estancia. El baño es grande, la cocina es súper cómoda, el living y el escritorio... la mesa de comedor. Todo funciona bien y uno se siente como en su casa. El edificio y los vecinos son muy amistoso. La zona es excelente, a metros del metro Opera, por lo tanto, está perfectamente conectada y aunque es una zona muy turística, es muy tranquila. Calle Arrieta es un pequeño Oasis en Madrid Centro. Cuando cae la tarde, paseábamos por los Jardines de Sabatini hasta llegar al Templo de Debod.

Ideal position very central and close to the Palace with Dia supermarket round the corner Olga’s has a well equipped comfortable apartment 5th floor internal courtyard view so it’s very quiet excellent for sleeping we loved it and hope to return again it’s a hidden Gem
Thanks for letting us share your home

One of the best stays we had so far! Felt right at home. Location was superb, in the heart of central madrid and walkable to all main tourist attractions. I can’t recommend this place enough. Thanks so much Olga and Jaime.
Amazing home! The location is perfect, very close to the city center. The house was lovely and we felt right at home. Great communication with the hosts, we would stay here again! ❤️
Great location and super clean! Definitely a recommendation for a stay in Madrid!
Amazing stay, close by to all the attractions, definitely will stay again if given the chance to go Madrid in the future

De nuevo nos hemos alojado en el piso de Olga, es siempre nuestra primera opción cuando vamos a Madrid.
El piso es tranquilo, acogedor y con mucho más de lo que se necesita, el mejor alojamiento en el que hemos estado.
这是一段美好的入住体验，我们是三人入住，仿佛住在家里一样。房间很干净整洁，家俱使用便捷很温馨，折叠床也很舒服，卫生间洗澡水量充足。厨房设备齐全，我们做了美味的早餐，周围餐厅和超市都很方便，地段在市中心，出门几分钟就到大皇宫了，总之，非常感谢！

We loved our stay here very much! The apartment felt more spacious than it appears in the photos and was cozy, immediately making us feel at home. It was bright, quiet, clean, and nicely furnished. Conveniently located in the city center, it offered easy access to the metro, nearby restaurants, and supermarkets, as well as major tourist sites all within walking distance.
The bed was comfortable, outlets were thoughtfully placed throughout the apartment, and there were two dryer racks for indoor clothes drying, along with a drying line outside the window (though we didn’t need to use it). Everything in the apartment worked perfectly—a great shower, reliable internet, and well-planned lighting throughout the space. The kitchen was a comfortable size and well-equipped with all the necessary cooking utensils.
Although we arrived later than expected, Jaime was very accommodating, kind, and welcoming when greeting us.
Sitio centrico, bien comunicado y el apartamento estupendo y acogedor

Olga’s beautiful, tasteful apartment in Madrid was truly a home-away-from-home while we were there.  She and her colleague Jaime were extremely helpful and friendly.  Jaime met us at the building, showing us all we needed to know and answering all our questions - so much nicer than a lockbox.  The flat was immaculate, really well laid out and comfortable.  The bed was a bit larger than ours at home, and very comfy.  This was a very welcome change from company-owned, featureless, characterless flats set up for rapid cleaning.  It has been our very favourite Air BNB experience so far, and we hope to return.  Thank you so much, Olga and Jaime - it really could not have been better!
Super anfitriona Olga. Excelente todo. Una maravilla.
Todo perfecto. Centrico, limpio y buena comunicación con Olga. Sin duda se queda guardado para cuando volvamos a Madrid.

Olga & her cohosts were very easy to get in touch with and communicative.  I think this just wasn't the apartment for us. We feel bad about it, as Olga and her cohosts were incredibly nice, but in case others have similar needs, I will just explain what didn't work for us.  First, we didn't realize that this was someone's home. I know that's how Airbnb started, but we haven't stayed in a place that felt so much like someone else's personal space in > 10 years.  Some may welcome it; we felt less able to settle in.  Second, there were various scented products in the apartment - couple of reed diffusers & some perfume-y cleaning products? that set off my husband's asthma. Again, may not bother others.  We aire out the apartment, but it still lingered a bit. Also, apartment was heated by radiators, so we didn't have great control of the heat. This led to difficulty sleeping as we're used to a cool environment at nighttime. Location was perfect though, and pretty quiet. Sorry to be picky :(
We really enjoyed our stay here. Would love to come back when we visit Barcelona again.

Our first time in Madrid and we were very happy with our stay. We easily took the subway from the airport and walked everywhere. The apartment was clean and beautiful and we got a wonderful sleep because the bed was comfortable and the room was dark. Thank you!
Such a gorgeous place in the most incredibly central location, easy quick communication, would highly recommend!

Another great stay at this apartment, the location is great everything is in walking distance, if you wish to go further the metro at Opera is a five minute walk from there you can travel all over Madrid.
The apartment itself is full of everything you need to cook a meal, the apartment faces the rear of the building so city noise levels are cut down dramatically and is quite spacious for a city apartment, there is even a lift, well two actually so all in all a great place to stay.
There are two supermarkets in walking distance, a nice little bar opposite the main entrance door which does great tapas and on the corner El Cafe de la Opera, great vermouth on tap and superb food, also the mercado de san miguel, a great place for differant tapas and wine (very touristy) but worth a visit is about a ten minute walk from the apartment, and so much more, this apartment is well worth a visit.
Somos clientes asiduos y, como siempre

Excellent location in the heart of Madrid. Walking distance to everything the city has to offer and just a few meters from the Royal Palace Square!
Great host, clear and fast communication. Apartment has all the amenities needed for a comfortable stay.
Highly recommended!
Clean, spotless space. Jamie and Olga were great to communicate. I highly recommend.

volveré seguramente , la próxima vez que visite Madrid
!! sin dudas !!

If this place is available you HAVE to book it. This is not your typical airbnb, not only is the furniture and space very high quality but it’s also located in the perfect spot for experiencing Madrid. This is an incredible value find and I cannot recommend it enough!

We couldn't be happier staying in the lovely flat located in the charming part of central Madrid that's full of culture and history. The flat is bright, airy and utterly clean. Olga and Jaime were very responsive. Paula who helped with the check-in was warm and helpful. It was my family's first time in Spain and they were very happy with the flat and had such a great time in Madrid. Big thanks to Olga, Jaime and Paula for the pleasant experience.

Excellent séjour appartement idéalement situé près du Palais Royal, opéra très proche , de Gran via , on peut tout faire à pied , il y a un parking a proximité, des magasins Dia pour les petites courses .
J ai participé au semi marathon : l appartement est à 2 kms du départ et de l arrivée donc parfait
Dernier point : nous avons eu un problème de réservation dû à Airbnb et Olga à tout fait pour nous sortir de ce faux pas , elle a été vraiment super, nous la remercions encore.

Her house was very beautiful and lovely.

We used the washing machine, and it always works fine. It was very convenient for me.

마드리드에서 제일 좋은 기억이었습니다!

Espectacular. Hermoso departamento. Excelente ubicación.  Bares y restaurantes para desayunar, almorzar, merendar y cenar. Beber tragos. Zona para caminar. Cerca de Plaza Mayor y Gran Vía.  Frente al Metro. Madrid al alcance de la mano. ideal. Olga y Beatriz siempre atentas. Todo como en la publicación.  Para volver siempre.

Olga’s place was in the perfect location to be able to walk and explore most of Madrid. It was also right next to the Opera metro stop which made all of Madrid easily accessible. Her apartment was very comfortable and cute. Olga and her co-host Beatriz were incredibly responsive- we forgot our backpack with our passports in the apartment after we already checked out, and Beatriz came back within 10 minutes to let us back in and we were able to make our flight thanks to her!
Great location and price!
