Muy atentos y amigables. La ubicación es muy buena y muy bien conectada con el transporte público.

Host was extremely on top of responding in a mannerly time. Was very flexible with the check in process and extremely welcoming. Amazing location and within walking distance to every main attraction. Tons of food around location as well and extremely accessible from metro. Would definitely recommend staying here if looking for a relaxant place with extremely responsible and caring hosts.
Gracias Susana y Ulises! Me sentí muy cómoda y fue más bonito de lo que se veía en fotos, muy céntrico y siempre dispuestos a ayudarme, me volvería a quedar! Gracias !🫶🏻🙌🏻

Alojamiento agradable, muy bien ubicado, nos hemos sentido como en casa. Los anfitriones muy atentos y pendientes de las necesidades en todo momento. Seguro que volveria.

Estuve muy cómoda en mi estancia, la habitación coincide con el anuncio, excelente lugar para quedarse en Madrid y explorar todo a pie. Tuve que trabajar un día de mi estancia y el escritorio y wifi fueron bastante cómodos y útiles. Muy amables , repetiría mi estancia, gracias!

The room is cozy and clean and even though the street can be quite busy, it was quiet. Ulisses and Suzana were very friendly and attentive and gave clear instructions. The apartment is located in a great area, making it possible to walk to most major attractions very easily. Had a great stay.

Ulises is super nice and helpful.  The room is simple, but the location couldn't be better! Everything is walkable! Plus, there's e-bicycles and electric scooters all over this area to rent.  Fun restaurants and bars around the corner as well.

Me encanto la estadía en casa de Ulises, desde antes de mi llegada me brindo instrucciones claras y las opciones que tenía para llegar al lugar, su casa impecable, el cuarto tal cual como lo describió, súper cómodo,  Susana quien me recibió siempre muy cordial, súper amable, estuvo al pendiente de mi en todo momento, me dio información importante de la zona, agradezco enormemente su hospitalidad de principio a fin.
Central location, easy to walk everywhere and safe at night.  Very comfortable room and great host!

Great place to stay in Madrid, with lots of restaurants and bars in close walking distance, making for a vibrant feel. Overall we had a very good one night stay here during a transit to Barcelona. Ulises was very friendly and accommodating.

That location  is EXCELLENT to do a lot of sightseeing by  foot and the metro station is about 3 doors down.

The location of the apartment is excellent. It is close to Plaza Mayor. There is a metro station right in front of the entrance, so it's easy to arrive and move around. In the same street there is the mercado (the local market) and there are a lot of bars and restaurants nearby. You also have supermarkets and an ATM machine close.

My stay was a breeze. I had a room to myself with a desk so I was able to work during the day. They were extremely accommodating and patient with my awful Spanish. I had a friend who needed a place to crash for a day while they waited for a flight. The hosts made booking the extra guest easy.

Ulises y Susana se mostraron muy atentos a mis necesidades. Coordinamos el horario para mi llegada, me dieron indicaciones claras sobre la casa y sentí disposición para las cosas que precisé. El cuarto está bien, sirve para dormir y el piso está en el corazón de La Latina, desde ahí se puede arrancar a caminar para cualquier lado y va a haber planes para hacer.

Apartamento bien ubicado y limpio.
Ulises suele responder rápido para aclarar las dudas.
Está a 5 minutos andando de la puerta de la latina (una de las 5 puertas de Madrid).

Very responsive and helpful host. Always was able to respond to any questions occurred even though didn't speak English. The place is 30 min away from metro in downtown. The accommodation was like described-everything you need is there, clean, kitchen is available for cooking. Complimentary tea, coffee, muffins and fruits were a pleasant bonus!
Definitely recommend and will stay again once in Madrid.

A terceira vez que que hospedo no espaço de Ulisses foi sempre acolhedora como das outras vezes. O espaço é ótimo, a localização maravilhosa, na saída do metrô La latina. Recomendo muito, Suzana é uma ótima anfitriã.

During my stay I was in contact with Ulises mum, Suzanne which is incredible nice lady. Also Ulises replied to my messages imediately.

Ulises fue un muy buen host y la ubicación es perfecta, está cerca de una estación del metro para poder movilizarse fácilmente que llega directo desde el aeropuerto, aunque también la ubicación del Airbnb es lo suficientemente céntrica para caminar. Recomendado al 100%!
Excellent séjour ! Appartement très bien placé, où l'on se sent bien. Je recommande vivement.

Très bon accueil de la part d’Ulises et sa mère Susana. Disponibles et réactifs pour nos questions.

Tuve una grata estadía en el apartamento de Ulises; todo estaba muy limpio y ordenado. También me sentí muy cómodo, como si estuviera en mi casa. La ubicación es muy buena si te gusta pasear por la zona céntrica de la ciudad y además en domingo el rastro está al lado. No deja de ser una habitación simple con litera pero está todo bien cuidado, hay un buen armario y escritorio y podrás usar el baño y la cocina sin problemas. Además, el hecho de que la habitación tenga llave propia también da más seguridad. Es un alojamiento perfecto para quien desee tener una base de operaciones céntrica y poder salir a explorar la ciudad día y noche.

Only nice impressions after my stay. Large room, clean shared spaces, full-scale kitchen where you can cook whatever you want. And of course, Susana is so nice and well-spoken lady, always helpful and friendly.
Would definitely recommend.

Ulises fue muy poco claro con las instrucciones. Me dio la posibilidad de ingresar 30 minutos antes del CheckIn, pero al parecer para él tenía que llegar exactamente a la hora (a pesar de que el anuncio indica que la hora de entrada es "a partir" de una hora indicada (incluso hasta especifica penalidades por llegar tarde, lo cual hubiera sido más manejable). Nunca me dijo que si no llegaba exactamente a la hora, perdería toda posibilidad de ingresar a su piso. Me tardé 1 hora en llegar y me quedé en la calle, con maletas y con la preocupación de encontrar otro lugar. Fue un día TERRIBLE, con muchas complicaciones. Ulises fue poco flexible y para nada empático. No considera todas las complicaciones que puede tener un viajero. No lo recomiendo.

Price as well is very good in relation with this nice apartment and central location! i would definitely choose again you if i come back to Madrid again!Thank you very much for this great accomodation! 🙏🙂❤️

Nos encanto el alojamiento de Ulises y su madre, ella nos recibió muy amable y nos atendió muy bien. El alojamiento esta super bien ubicado tiene todo alrededor para poder pasar una grata estadia, el camarote que nos ofrecían en la habitación era super cómoda y nos gustó que tuviese un escritorio y bastante espacio para las maletas, el edificio tiene un ascensor por donde se pueden subir las maletas, lo cual se agradece.
Gracias Sra Susana y Ulises por hospedarnos, recomendadisimo!
Perfect location very close to the metro , quiet and comfortable

オーナーさんは丁寧に対応してくれ、立地も便利で他のホテル等の価格に比べると安価です。ドアの鍵の使い方は優しく教えてくれますが、難しかったです。
洗濯機を使用する時間が制限されていたことが残念でした。部屋に干す必要があることや、シャワーを使える時間帯が決まっていることも事前に教えてもらえるとよいと思います。

Sussy la host es de lujo. Muy amigable. La zona re bien ubicada. No es una habitación ruidosa. Pude prepararme cómodamente mi desayuno todas las mañanas. Zona segura y de mucho movimiento. Sin dudas recomiendo alojarse aquí. Gracias Ulises & Susana!
Todo imbecable y super limpio. Susi muy buena onda y Ulises siempre pendiente!
Los dueños son muy amables y la habita es bastante buena.

Dank Ulises ausführlicher Beschreibung konnte ich die Unterkunft leicht finden. Trotz der Lage mitten in der Stadt war es nachts ruhig im Zimmer. Ulises und Susana waren sehr bemüht, meinen Aufenthalt angenehm zu gestalten. Ich habe mir eine 10-Karte für die Metro gekauft, was wegen der Hitze bequemer war. Auch ein Tagesausflug nach Toledo wurde dadurch einfacher. Alle wichtigen Sehenswürdigkeiten in Madrid sind aber auch zu Fuß gut zu erreichen. Ich empfehle die Unterkunft von Ulises und Susana gern weiter.
Ulises and Susana made me feel very welcomed in their home, everything went very smoothly. I thank them for their hospitality and I would recommend to anyone who is looking for a place in Madrid
Great location, clean space, fair pricing. Perfect place to rest your head at the end of a long day exploring the city.

Gracias por todo, nos ha ido súper bien.
Hasta pronto

Die Wohnung ist in einer wunderschönen Gegend - la Latina ist traumhaft! Man hat in der Unterkunft alles was man braucht, Bett, Bad und Küche. Ich konnte nach check-out sogar meine Koffer in der Wohnung lassen und später wieder abholen, super Service.
Jeden Sonntag war ein wundervoller Flohmarkt vor der Tür und es gibt viele tolle Cafés und Geschäfte in der Nähe.

Realmente muy agradecido por las atenciones y hospitalidad de Susana y Ulises, siempre dando indicaciones y sugerencias claras y precisas.
La ubicación es ideal ya que se ubica a muchos sitios de interés y que se puede andar a pie o tomar el transporte público.
Aunque mi tiempo en Madrid fue muy poco, me volvería a hospedar con Ulises.
Muchas gracias por todo chicos!!
Susana is a very nice and polite person, actually she’s so sweet and kind that I feel that I was at home.

Un buen lugar para quedarse, a poco pasos del barrio de La Latina. Gran hospitalidad de ambos, la mejor disposición siempre y siempre respetando la privacidad. Muy recomendado  el lugar para quedarse.

Ulises’s place is very comfortable for a solo trip to Madrid. It’s in the best area of Madrids city centre with lots of restaurants and shops. It’s a guest house, so there are other rooms with guests, but it’s quiet and you can rest well at night.
Also Ulises offers coffee and tea for free - very convenient.
The host ist very responsive and friendly.

Muy buen host y el departamento esta muy bien ubicado!!
Super recomendado!

E como sentir em casa
Lugar incrível . Ótima localização.

Todo tal cual la descripción. La zona es céntrica, hay muchos restaurantes, teatro, una zona muy movida.Ulises estuvo pendiente de nuestra llegada y nos dió instrucciones precisas. Sin duda si vuelvo a Madrid me alojaria ahi.
The place was very quiet,  even though only one floor up.  It was a nice little hide-away for me for 3 days.
Muy buena ubicacion.. muy turistico! recomendado. 👍🏻
Near to the center of the city. Location is at great place. Enjoyed our stay at home

エレベーターあり、La Latina駅にかなり近くて便利です。食事をするところも宿の近くにたくさんあります。
Susanaさんは優しく迎えてくれました。トイレも写真通りで、夜も静かに休むことができました。2段ベッドの部屋に泊まりましたが、ベッドがあまり心地よくなかったことだけがマイナス点でした。
Ulisesさんはとても丁寧にチェックインの仕方を教えてくれ、滞在中とてもいい時間を過ごせました！ありがとうございました。

the location is very good and the host is very friendly and helpful. the place is clear and quite. the kitchen is normal . good refrigerator. the room is a little small and there is only one chair in it.
El anfitrión se mostró muy comunicativo y ayudó en todo momento. El alojamiento está muy bien situado, con el metro al lado. Volvería a alojarme aqui, sin duda.
My stay was wonderful. Ulises and his mom are incredibly kind and welcoming, always attentive and ready to help whenever needed. The place itself is excellent, comfortable, and centrally located.
숙소 위치가 정말 좋습니다
Excelente ubicación,  unido al cálido trato de Susana y Ulises, a los cuales les agradezco
Mi segunda vez usando este alojamiento, y sin duda repetiré ai así lo necesitara.

Great location, a cross the street from a local food market. You'll have all the street markets like Saturday and Sunday markets on the same street. Full of live neighborhood, Thank you Ulises for your hospitality.

Location: the flat is conveniently located in Madrid's La Latina area which is very well connected to the main attractions of the city. Its walkable, close to the metro station and also has many restaurants and shops nearby.
The place: its a room in a flat managed by its owners/people who live there. As expected in a budget accommodation it was not newly refurbished but well maintained nonetheless. The common areas were clean and maintained well throughout my stay. The room is spacious and has a double deck bed, desk, chair, wardrobe and mirror. Despite of being close to entertainment venues, its quiet at night so your sleep wont be disturbed.
The hosts were friendly and very responsive. Instructions were clear and there was no friction when checking in or out.
I would totally recommend it to people who are looking for a budget accommodation that is close to Madrid's centre.

I was with my sister ( she's a minor), we both thought Suzana was a cute lady and very clear explaining everything.
To be honest, the room seems smaller on the photos. thankfully we got impressed by it.
thank you Susi and Ulises
Ottima soluzione per chi vuole soggiornare nel centro di Madrid con un valido rapporto qualità/prezzo. Lo consiglio vivamente.
Ulises was a great host—super friendly and responsive. Our room was comfy and spacious, and the location was convenient.  Thanks for a great stay!

This was a great spot for two friends to crash in a bunkbed space! We had keys to our room and the place to ensure privacy and security of our belongings. Everything was clean and the host was very responsive, respectful, and accommodating. Would definitely stay again if I’m ever back in Madrid!
Tuve una estadia excelente. El trato y atencion de Ulises y Susana fue 10 puntos.   Lo super recomiendo

Susana and Ulesis are very nice people.  Treated us with kindness and attention.  Great value for the price.  Very good location, next to a theater and in the center, yet off the crowded busy tourist streets.  Gave us space in their fridge.  I would stay there again.
Un lugar muy céntrico, limpio y organizado. Volveremos a reservar esta habitación en un futuro. Ulises mantuvo la comunicación desde el día de la reserva.
Very good, central location with many restaurants and bars. Just 1 minute away from the metro station. The room was clean and private
Nocleg w bardzo dobrej lokalizacji,  uprzejmy i pomocny właściciel
This Air BnB was perfect for my short stay in Madrid. Excellent check-in instructions and helpful host
Great location, you get what you pay for. Can't use the shower past 11 p.m., wish this was included in the listing. Uncomfortable bed. However, I felt very safe as a woman staying by myself.
Espacio tranquilo y agradable para descansar, Ulises y Susana muy amables y prestativos. El barrio nos encantó tambien, con muchos sitios para comer, beber o tomar cafe con mucha ambiente
Mi estancia ha sido perfecta, la ubicación, comodidad, precio. He estado como en casa gracias a la amabilidad de Susana, un amor. sin duda repetiré

Ulises's place was perfect for the layover I had in Madrid. It is centrally located to restaurants and his mom is just lovely. Ulises was very flexibe, helpful and always quick to respond. Next time I transit through Madrid I will be back!

Cinthia´s home is both lovely, comfortable, and you immediately feel at home. She was a fantastic host, very quiet at times when I needed to sleep, feeding me a delicious dinner, and so courteous and geniune. The neighborhood is quiet, and safe, and easy to get to on the yellow line. If you have a chance to stay with Cinthia, you will truely appreciate you time in Madrid!

This was the second time I stayed with Cinthia, and that speaks for itself!  She is a fantastic host, fed me a delicious dinner, and I highly recommend staying at her flat while in Madrid!  She is a delight!  Thank you Cinthia!

I first arrived in Madrid to attend Pueblo Ingles and needed a room on short notice. Cinthia was very kind to communicate with my wife as I had no access to the internet. She is very thoughtful and was concerned about making sure I would find her location. My experience was great. She is a wonderful host who makes you feel comfortable as soon as you meet her. Very important for being in a foreign city. Unexpectedly, Cinthia shared a meal with me on my first night. That was a nice surprise.  I would highly recommend staying at Cinthia's place. Nice, clean and comfortable with good access around the city.

I am so glad I chose Cinthia’s place for my stay in Madrid. Cinthia is one of the kindest, sweetest people you will meet. I loved staying with her and her 2 adorable kitty cats. The night I got to her home she came down stairs and helped me to bring my luggage upstairs and fed me a delicious vegetarian dinner. Throughout my stay she offered me food and cookies. Cinthia is also very helpful and she showed me to the metro and where to buy a pack of 10 metro tickets (a shop right downstairs from her).
The neighborhood is very safe, I was walking alone at 11 and saw several women going for a stroll with their kids. Her home is about a 10 minute walk from the metro, it took me about 30 minutes to get to Sol (the very center). There is also a bus that stops across the street from her home, though I only took it once when I was returning from the city. It’s quite convenient because it stops right in front of the building. It was also a nice feeling to come back to her home after walking around all over.
Her home is very cute and cozy and so is the room where I stayed. She left me alone when I needed privacy but was also happy to talk with me and teach me Spanish which I really appreciate. I am very happy I met Cinthia, she will always have a place in my heart.
September 19, 2011

Oh dear Cinthia ... my stay was amazing ... light hearted laughter and love, sharing wisdom and stories ! Always a smile and offer for anything I needed. Her apartment is so beautifully and calmly decorated in in a great location for getting into Central Madrid without all the hectic of a city. I fell in love with her cats and her spirit and next time Im in Madrid Ill go for SURE ! Maybe even special trip ! Highly recommended, house full of love ! <3

Yo creo que cada viaje es una aventura, un viaje a lo más interno que externo. Madrid es perfecto opovo su cultura, las artes y mais.Mas todo lo que mi regalo más grande de Madrid era encontrar un ser humano muy especial que es Cinthia. Un amigo y su hermana, ella es mi regalo más grande de Madrid. Su hogar es un lugar lleno de paz y armonía la energía de su hogar es la magia.
Eso para mí es lo más importante, pero si quieres conocer los aspectos físicos del lugar te puedo decir que la habitación es muy cómoda y el metro está muy cerca y le llevará en cualquier lugar donde necesite ir.
Chinta amaba a mi eterno agradecimiento


I believe that every journey is a quest, a journey to far more internal than external. Madrid is perfect opovo their culture, arts and everything mais.Mas my greatest gift in Madrid was to find a very special human being that is Cinthia. A friend and sister, she is my greatest gift of Madrid. Your home is a place full of peace and harmony the energy of your home is magic.
That to me is the most important, but if you want to know physical aspects of the site I can tell you that the room is very comfortable and the metro is very close and take you anywhere you need to go.
Chinta loved my eternal thanks

Wow! just what I needed after traveling in Europe for 5 months. To find Cinthia was just perfect. Her home is calm, beautiful, colorful, peaceful. I didn't want to leave. She's a great teacher and a beautiful human being. Thank you so much for all the talks we had and what you taught me about life. Thank you for hosting me in your beautiful home and for the comfort you provided. You'll always be in my heart and in my thoughts.

Wow! Lo que yo necesitaba despues de viajar por Europa por 5 meses. Encontrar a Cithia fue perfecto. Su casa es calma, bella, con muchos colores, luz y paz. No me queria salir. Ella es una gran maestra y bella humana. Muchas gracias por todas las conversaciones que tuvimos y todo lo que me ensenaste sobre la vida. Gracias por tenerme en tu case y todo lo comfortable que me ofreciste. Siempre estaras en mi corazon y en mis pensamientos. :)

What a wonderful experience with such a kind and thoughtful person! Her place was quiet, comfortable and she even cooked a nutritious and healthy meal Very generous.. Her cats were lovely and non intrusive. Just knowing that Cinthia exists makes the world a better place.
She gave excellent directions for getting to her place and got up with me @5:30 AM and walked to the bus, getting on with me to tell the driver to make sure that I got off at Atocha and on the right bus for the airport. She looked at my itinerary, highlighted it with a pink marker, and made sure that we identified the correctr terminal, which is essential in an airport as large and spread out as Madrid's. This was so caring and supportive
I feel very blessed to have connected with Cinthia and also think that I have found a good friend. Really an exceptional experience. for me

Cinthia was a great host! She was immediately welcoming and warm, and I felt right at home with her. We had some wonderful conversations and I feel enriched by meeting her. Her place is indeed very peaceful and also comfortable, and I'm sure it has a lot to do with her.
I wish that her place was closer to the center of the city, but then she'd have to charge more for the room.

Cinthia...Muchas gracias!!!!!! Compartir esos d'ias contigo fue maravilloso, eres una persona excelente ..y lo mejor...me ense;aste cosas que s'e van a ser luz en mi camino.
Es una excelente gu'ia de la ciudad y te muestra los sitios de inter'es de la ciudad y aquellos sitios cercanos a d'onde puedes ir a disfrutar de los sitios historicos y de importancia.
Mi experiencia fue maravillosa, ideal para aquellas personas que quieren una estad'ia llena de paz y mucha luz!!!!! nuevamente muchas Gracias por tu calidez y hospitalidad!!!!!!

Oh Cinthia, what an angel you are! I had such a lovely time staying at your place and chatting late into the night. It was so relaxing and peaceful after my long stressful working days. So much nicer than staying in a sterile hotel! Let's hope you have a vacancy next time I need a place to stay in Madrid. I will be back!
Being so near to the metro station means it's so easy to get to anywhere in Madrid.

Cinthia is awesome! She could not be more kind or giving, and she was incredibly patient with my terrible Spanish speaking. I got really sick while I was there, and Cinthia gave me medicine and made me soup! She's like the Spanish grandma I didn't know I had. Her house is really cozy and a perfect place to relax after running around the city all day and night. Its really close the the Metro, which gets you anywhere you want to go in the city, and also the bus stop is just one block away if you want to take the scenic route into town. Cinthia was so helpful with directions, and she even hung out with me one day and we went to the market at El Rastro and to lunch and a flamenco show, and it was so much fun! I cannot wait to visit Madrid again give Cinthia a big hug.
Me senti como en casa! Fue un placer pasar este tiempo con Cinthia y sus gastos. No podía esperar mas qué lo qué recibí. Gracias Cinthia!

Cinthia is a caring lady with a good spirit. She shares her positive outlook on life, and this is reflected in how you are welcomed in her home. She is happy to have you at her table; I ate her delicious vegetarian cooking with her several times. She has two sweet cats; they are quite friendly. Her home is as she describes it, peaceful and calm. Though it is not in Central Madrid, the rest of the city if highly accessible by the Metro. The nearest Metro stop is a 5 minute walk and it takes 15 minutes to get to Sol, which about as center as you can get in Madrid. I stayed with her for a week, and between my excursions and her work schedule, I didn´t see her as much as if I had remained in the apartment all day. Being as giving as she is, one day, she accompanied me to Templo de Debod, Principe Pio, Plaza de España and Los Jardines de Campo Moro/del Palacio Real even though she had to go to work that evening! Staying with her also helped me improve my Spanish because she will offer unofficial leccionns (lessons). All around, she was a lovely hostess, and I´d recommend her home.

Cinthia es cariña con un buen espiritu. Ella comparte su perspectiva positiva de vida y Usted esta bienvenido en su casa. Ella esta contenta a tenerle en su mesa; yo comia muchos tiempos con ella y su cocina vegetariano es rico. Ella tiene dos gatas; ellas son amigables. Su casa es como ella dice, tranquilla y con paz. Ademas, esta no en Madrid Centro, la ciudad esta cerca a traves el Metro. La parada esta 5 minutos por pie y esta 15 minuto en el Metro hasta Sol (un sitio central de Madrid). Yo quedaba con ella por una semana y entre mis actividades y su horario de trabajo, no veia mucho porque yo no estaba en la casa todo el tiempo. Pero, un dia, ella me acompañaraba en los sitios de Templo de Debod, Principe Pio, Plaza de Españna y Los Jardines del Palacio Real. Y ella trabajo mas trade esta noche. Pues, siento que mi español es mejor porque ella hablaba con yo y correctaba mis errores. En todo, ellas es una anfitriona simpatica, y voy a recomendarle.

Staying with Cinthia was a quintessential travel experience for me. She was like family, like a sister that I hadn't seen in years.  We had a wonderful connection, full of shared interests and chatted away a whole evening.  I was nervous about staying in someone's home but my stay with Cinthia however was one of my most delightful memories during 10 days in Spain. Thanks Cinthia!

I had a very pleasant stay at the place.
Cinthia is a wonderfull guest, welcoming and warm and also helped me actively improving my spanish.
The appartement is calm, nice and well situated and corresponds to the description.
If you're looking for a place to stay in Madrid, I strongly recommend you to go at Cinthia's home !

Cinthia is super cool and very nice to her hosts.
The flat is nice and clean and the room is very comfortable!
If you go to Madrid and cant be bother to be exactly in the centre of the city I truly recommend to go here!
:)
ps. Two cats are lovely!

Cinthia is a very caring host and she really does her best to make you feel at home. We had some very good conversations. I was on a course and it was my birthday while I was in Madrid and Cinthia stayed in to make me a special meal. It was so kind. Thank you Cinthia!

Cinthia and her cats are some of most wonderful people you can meet in Madrid (at least within my short 4 days in Madrid).
She is a love-filling person who has a open, big heart.

For the price, you get a private room and a location that is so easy to get to city center via buses (one block away) and Metro (10 mins walk).

This is a residential area with a cute bar, cute bakery right downstairs, and many other amenities within 1 or 2 blocks.

The last night I was there, the wonderful Cinthia was so nice to hang out with me. We had great pizza and red wine!

thank you Cinthia

My stay with Cinthia was the best possible start to my time in Madrid. She was watm, welcoming and very helpful throughout and made me feel completely at home. I have very fond memories of the meals we shared together and the conversations we had about life, death and everything in between. Cinthia is a wonderful human being and friend and I hope to be able to see her and her two beautiful cats again very soon.

This was one of the loveliest people I´ve ever met! It was like meeting up with long lost family. Such a beautiful spirit, I felt like I´d come home after being away for a long time. This was one of the most peaceful places I've ever visited.Even her cats were Zen like. I will definitely come back.

I had a WONDERFUL time with Cinthia!! She is a gracious host! Her warmth and her open, inviting spirit made me feel right at home in Madrid. She is also an excellent cook! Cinthia prepared for us the most delicious Indian food I have ever had, and I live in New York City! I was a little sad when it was time for me to leave because I made a new friend, and it's always a little sad when friends must say goodbye to each other.

If you are reading this review and are considering staying with Cinthia while you are in Madrid, book your room now! You will not be disappointed. Cinthia's neighborhood is safe and clean, there are plenty of shops nearby if you need food, pharmacy, Western Union or a quiet place to have a cerveza. Public transportation is easily accessible: the bus is right outside Cinthia's building and the Metro is only a 10-minute walk away. So you can get to the center of Madrid very easily and quickly!

I had a wonderful time at Cinthia's, so peaceful and calm home. She was so kind and warm with me that I enjoyed so much her company and her kitties are gorgeous. Her place is very well located in a safety neigborhood besides metro station is near of... This is the first time that I use Airbnb and a success!! Thank you very much Cinthia, kisses and hugs!!

I consider finding Cinthia to stay with as my luckiest moment of my recent travels. I cannot describe enough how wonderful of a host she is - warm, fascinating company and an absolute pleasure to come home to. Within minutes of arriving at her cozy apartment, with sunlight streaming through the windows and hot tea in front of me, I sighed with contentment at truly finding a "home" for when I was in Madrid. Her space is so serene and peaceful, with a couch in the sunlight that will beckon you to stay in to relax on it if you've been busily exploring the city. Staying with Cinthia will become one of the best parts of your vacation, as it did mine!

Meeting Cinthia and staying at her place was my favourite part of visiting Madrid. She was very welcoming, and very kind. She even cooked me a meal to eat for when I arrived. She also cooked a lovely vegetarian dinner on one of the other evenings too. She has a big heart and loves to care for people, and meet new people. I was coming down with a cold, and she made sure I was warm and offered some herbal remedies to help ease it. I would recommend her place to anyone who is travelling to Madrid. Also, her cats are so cute. One would sit next to me on my bed as I was resting and doing my own thing. Which makes me miss my cat even more.
Thank you Cinthia!

I had a wonderful time staying with Cinthia in Madrid. I was a little nervous coming to Madrid on my own but Cinthia made me feel very welcome and helped me with everything I needed; she even gave me a tour of her wonderful city and came with me on public transport to help me catch my train. I feel I have made a new friend with Cinthia and hope she may get to visit Australia one day so I can repay her hospitality. The bed was comfortable and the location was very quiet and safe. I hope to stay with Cinthia again and I highly recommend her as a host...She is a good cook too! Thank you

Muy agradable mi estancia en el apartamento de Cinthia, me indicó como llegar a su apartamento desde el lugar en el que me encontraba y  a pesar de llegue muy tarde con ella (11:00 PM) me recibió con mucho gusto en la estación del metro, y al llegar a su casa me ofreció todo lo necesario para estar cómodo. La habitación es bastante cómoda y el apartamento muy bonito, además de que su gata Kartari es bastante cariñosa. El día de mi regreso me permitió salir a la hora que pudiera y mas se acomodara a mis planes, igualmente explicándome cómo y con que tiempo debía llegar a la estación del tren. Excelente anfitriona, sin duda llegaría otra vez con ella :)
A warm welcome fom Cinthia when I arrived. Her home was was my home whilst there for 2 days I felt the calm  and safeness  of her home and in the general location.....

Another great stay, I decided to extend a few days in Madrid. I wish I could have stayed longer. I'd highly recommend staying with Cinthia for anyone looking to have an enjoyable and comfortable stay!

Cinthia was very accommodating with my schedule and very helpful with directions to her place. It felt like I had known her for many years, very nice and friendly.

The location was just right since it was easily accessible via public transportation, either on the bus or metro. It is very quiet in the evening. Her cat was very friendly and loving, Kartari would sleep at the foot of my bed and was so affectionate. She gave great ideas for things and places to see. The location is very safe during the day and night. In fact, I felt safe even when coming home around 6:00AM in the morning afternoon enjoying local fiestas. Her place is very clean and tidy, I would highly recommend staying with Cinthia. In fact, I would definitely stay with her again in the future if she has availability. She is very responsive and can communicate via Whatsapp and mobile phone.

Accueil très chaleureux

This apartment was perfect. The location is great and in the middle of everything. You can walk or take the metro from here. The apartment was sparkling clean and had all kitchen wares to cook and eat. I would definitely stay here again.
Soraya's communication was perfect and our check in/out super easy.  Location is fantastic, apartment better than expected.  Can't wait to return!
Fantastic apartment with a spectacular roof terrace, the view is directly opposite one of the portal arches to plaza Mayor, quite unique. I recconend!

A cosy, well located, modern, clean and warm flat with a great balcony. Nice double bedroom with a sofa bed in the living/ kitchen space which was also very comfortable. It is a small apartment But the generous balcony takes the pressure off and gives a feeling of real space. We had dinner for us and 4 guests and it worked really well. Note: hot plate but no oven.
It is located in a Very popular part of central Madrid and any apartment in that area will experience a bit of night noise from the street life. Being on the third floor helps .
Lots of thoughtful touches like shampoo, tea and coffee, Salt-N-Pepper and oil-all the things you need but are often not there.
Soraya Could not have been more helpful and we would definitely return on another visit.
Great location, recomend it
Great location with an outstanding outdoor rooftop patio. Although there is a lift, not an ideal place for a person with mobility issues .
Excelente piso en el corazón de Madrid.

A fantastic location and apartment with the only balcony in the general vicinity that has a view to the entrance of the plaza mayor.
This is in the heart of Madrid and all of the major attractions are within a 20-30 minute walk!
There are various amenities supplied and great food locations right as you walk out of the apartment.

Soraya’s place was wonderful! It is in a prime location for walking around Madrid and the terrace is perfect for watching the hustle and bustle of the square while sipping a bottle of wine. Space is perfect for a couple and was sparkling clean! Highly recommend.
A great place to stay! Nice, private, and central in Madrid, but can get a little loud as it's right next to the Plaza Mayor. Soraya also left helpful recommendations for restaurants and attractions!
The rooftop is amazing and location is great.  The place was clean and comfortable and we enjoyed our stay.
très bon séjour, hôtesse sympathique
El alojamiento de Soraya es ideal para una estancia en la ciudad. Pese a estar ubicado en una zona muy concurrida, no se escuchan ruidos de la calle. La terraza es genial
Lovely place and great location would recommend and will definitely be  staying again.
Apartamento estupendo, localización inmejorable. 100% recomendable
Amazing place!!! ❤️ ❤️
깨끗하고 위치가 좋아요!
100% recomendable, la anfitriona muy atenta. Gracias

Outstanding location! Soraya is a great host, always there to answer any questions.
We enjoyed the sunny terrace and the impeccable cleanliness of the place.
El piso es más bonito aún de lo que se ve en las fotos. Lo cogimos por la terraza y sin mirar mucho el interior, pero está genial, es cómodo, limpio y acogedor. Ninguna pega, repetiría seguro.
Un apartamento en perfecta localización y muy confortable, la terraza genial. Atención muy buena
Very confortable and well located apartment, Thanks Soraya for your warm welcome.

This apartment was just right for what I needed, so I was happy to find it. I was surprised to learn that it is also in a prime location. Almost all my points of interests were walking distance. Another surprise is this apartment comes with a great host who I believe was very patient with me and my questions even after she took the time to share with me helpful information Madrid the location and the apartment during our introduction. Soraya and her apartment where without a doubt one of the highlights of my short stay in Madrid. If you are expecting something cozy to rest and relax after admiring the city, prime location and a host that will make sure to make you feel welcomed and at home, this is the place. I will be returning.
Location, personal touch, communication and flexibility

This place was really central and just what we needed. The view was lovely. Loads of nice restaurants and sightseeing just a walking distance away.
Soraya was very kind and helpful as well as flexible with my check in and out time. Will stay again if I ever visit madrid
Excelente apartamento lo recomiendo
Estuvimos genial en el alojamiento de Soraya, muy limpio, equipado y cómodo.  Estupendamente situado y con una terraza super agradable. La comunicación fue excelente.

piccolo appartamento in posizione centralissima, ideale per brevi soggiorni. Pulito e ben arredato, unica pecca l'accesso poiché la porta di entrata si trova in mezzo ad una rampa di scale. Bella terrazza soleggiata. Ottima scelta per visita a Madrid

El piso es una pasada con aire, sol y una terraza increíble. Todo está muy cómodo y la ubicación no podría ser mejor. Soraya es una anfitriona súper amable, me ayudó con todo posible y me hizo sentir más como una amiga que un huésped. Muchas gracias Soraya!
Amazing place, perfect location and Soraya is the sweetest!
Nice apartment, with terrace, good location
Un alojamiento muy agradable con una terraza maravillosa
It was super !! Thank you a lot the appartment is top xx
Muy bien! Ubicación perfecta. Totalmente céntrico. Es un piso muy práctico para pasar unos días en Madrid! La terraza espectacular.
Appartement fonctionnel et agréable avec sa superbe terrasse ! Magnifique emplacement !! Je recommande ++++

L’appartement est situé dans l’hyper centre de Madrid et parfaitement conforme aux photos. La terrasse est superbe.
Petit mais charmant il convient à un couple.
excelente ubicación en el centro de la ciudad, no necesitas gastar en taxi para salir a conocer y todo a minutos caminando

Soroya was a great host with a beautiful apartment - probably one of the best locations in all of Madrid! We felt blessed to stay in Soroya’s apartment with the amazing rooftop and view! Will definitely recommend both the apartment and Soroya as a hostess. Till next time!
Super hôte, réactive et gentille, l’appartement est vraiment super et totalement conforme à la description et aux photos, la terrasse est un vrai bonheur.
Très bon emplacement, Prestations conformes avec la description, la terraza est un plus.

Aunque la casa es muy bonita y esta muy bien situada, la estancia nos decepcionó un poco. En el ático hay un tubo que expulsa todos los olores del bar de abajo (con lo cual todo el día huele a marisco, tanto dentro como fuera de la casa) además de otro que todo el día está goteando agua que cae en el propio suelo de la casa. Entre estos inconvenientes, el aseo (la ducha) no funciona bien (hay problemas con el desagüe) con lo cual es bastante incómodo y muy poco higiénico

Tuvimos un problema en el baño, y nada más informar de ello a Soraya, hizo todo de sus manos parra que en esa misma tarde se solucionara sin incomodarnos. Encima tuvo el detalle de invitarnos a desayunar en compensación. Tiene una ubicación perfecta, la terraza es ideal para estos tiempos de covid y para este inicio de calor. Variedad de tiendas, comercios e incluso perfecto como punto de partida para hacer turismo por la zona. Apartamento ideal si quieres hacer una escapada romántica.

Très bon appartement, idéalement placé en plein centre de Madrid proche de la plaza de mayor.
La terrasse est très appréciée.

Amazing location in the heart of centre of Madrid. The apartment is tiny but has everything you need and the very spacious terrace with a great view makes it perfect for a city break and relax.
Super clean with available coffee, tea and water upon arrival.
Definitely worth visiting - I hope to visit it in future again . Absolutely 5 star!
Perfect location and amazing terrace !
Todo fenomenal- el piso es genial y Soraya es una anfitriona muy atenta!
Emplacement parfait avec une superbe terrasse ensoleillée ! Nous reviendrons !

la terasse est exceptionnelle , trés ensoleillée et a une vue sur une porte de la plaza.
Le logement est petit mais fonctionnel , trés bien équipé.

Appartement idéal situé au plein cœur de la ville. La terrasse est un pur bonheur. Tout est faisable à pied car l’emplacement est vraiment stratégique. De plus, L’hôte est très réactive et très gentille. Idéal pour un couple mais le canapé lit est assez confortable si besoin. Je recommande vivement et nous reviendrons à coup sûr.

Très bon séjour.
Excellent emplacement. La terrasse est vraiment parfaite.

Un très bon week-end passé dans l’appartement de Soraya. Il dispose d’une grande terrasse en plein centre ville avec une vue magnifique et est situé à deux pas de la Plaza Mayor ce qui est exceptionnel!
Il est très propre et surtout entièrement équipée. Vous ne manquerez de rien ☺️
Alojamiento en pleno centro de Madrid! Ideal para parejas, pequeño pero cómodo! Soraya ha sido encantadora y la comunicación con ella ha sido muy fácil y rápida.
Super terrasse ! Très bien placée ! Fidèle à la description
Very lovely host
Great location and place. Super clean and soraya was great

This is a great place! Perfect location, close everywhere interesting, very central, yet quiet. The rooftop terrace is the best! A perfect place to have breakfast, sunbathe and sip your wine in the evening. Soraya is a great host: very helpful, always at hand, and resourceful when it comes to inventing non-standard solutions. Thanks a lot and hope to see you again. 🥰

Nous avons passé un excellent séjour chez Soraya.
L’appartement a une situation idéale : en centre ville proche de la plaza del sol et Plaza major.
L’appartement possède du double vitrage, il est donc bien isolé.
L’interieur est petit mais fonctionnel, avec une bonne literie dans la chambre. Je recommande pour 2 personnes.
L’appartement etait très propre à notre arrivée.
Le gros plus : la grande terrasse avec table et transats donnant sur les toits de la rue piétonne.

Amazing spot! The terrace is perfect for a morning coffee or an evening glass of vino. It had everything you could need! Soraya was a great host and very helpful the whole time! Definitely one of my favorite Airbnb’s :)

Very nice apartment and very nice hote !
Me and my friend spent a nice week in Soraya's apartment with ideal location and great terrace.

Appartement très fonctionnel, très bien situé au cœur de Madrid !
Gros plus pour la terrasse !
Allez y les yeux fermés !
perfect location and great terrace

El ático es fantástico, pleno corazón de Madrid, con unas vistas increíbles desde esa terraza, espectacular todo. El trato con Soraya, fenomenal, muy agradable, solo puedo poner cosas buenas, ha sido todo fantástico!

El apartamento está ubicado excelentemente. La comunicación con Soraya es buena y el hecho de tener un check-in flexible es algo que yo valoro positivamente. El punto fuerte del piso es la terraza, un remanso de paz en pleno centro de Madrid.
L'endroit est fabuleux. La petite terrasse, un vrai régal. C'était parfait !
I highly recommend the apartment. Very well located to discover the city, well equipped. And big plus for the rooftop/terrace. Soraya was very available and helpful, thank again :)

I cannot be too positive. Cinthia made me feel incredibly welcome from the moment I arrived. She is generous and kind; she also has a lovely cat, Katari! The area is nice and safe with some shops and restaurants if you need them, and the metro stop is about a five minutes walk—overall, it is very easy and quick to get into the centre. I had a few job interviews the day after I arrived, and Cinthia helped me plan and showed me the right way to go. It's hard to list all the little things, but she has helped me settle into Madrid perfectly, and I left her very calm and welcoming house feeling grateful for my time there. When I got my job, it was a pleasure to share a meal with Cinthia in celebration, which is just another illustration of how welcoming she is. I absolutely recommend staying with Cinthia.
El lugar es muy tranquilo y de fácil acceso a metro y el sistema de bus. Cinthia es muy servicial y ofrece buenos consejos que te permiten aprovechar al máximo la experiencia en Madrid.

thank you for making me stay at your house so comfortable! cinthia :) you have a beautiful house which is located an amazing city and i enjoyed my trip here very much!! you are very generous and warm host! best host! I'm appreciate all your help and It was really fun to take a time with you!
Cinthia es muy amable, un verdadero ser de amor, me he sentido muy a gusto con ella y en la habitación. Todo limpio, y el barrio muy tranquilo.

Cinthia is one of the most generous, caring and kind Airbnb host I ever met. It was such a wonderful stay at her clean and well equipped apartment. The areas is safe and easy to get around with Metro. Her cat is super friendly and cute. Highly recommending her place.

I had such a great stay at Cinthia's apt and decided to extend my stay.
Cinthia is a great host and the apartment is quiet, clean and easily accessible to the center of Madrid. I highly recommend Cinthia's apartment.

El trato de Cinthia es muy cercano y amable. La atención es muy personalizada y la información para moverse por Madrid completa.
El barrio está bien comumicado con bus y metro.
A destacar que se puede dormir bien por la ausencia de ruidos las noches que yo estuve.

Una casa meravigliosa, tranquilla e bella, in un quartiere ben servito e moderno, con un grande supermercato nelle vicinanze, e vicino alla metro (che a Madrid funziona benissimo). La padrona di casa una persona molto interessante, carismatica e premurosa che aiuta in qualsiasi cosa. Un'esperienza da rifare e da consigliare a tutti!

Cinthia fue una excelente anfitriona. A pesar que mi llegada a su departamento fue más tarde de lo acordado (tren se atrasó), ella me estaba esperando con una gran sonrisa. Siempre estuvo preocupada de que estuviera bien y me sintiera acogida, incluso compró alimentos a mi gusto para el desayuno y siempre me preguntaba si la temperatura del departamento estaba a mi gusto (si no sentía frío)

Todo el tiempo estuvo atenta de orientarme en la ciudad. Llamó a amigos para entregarme los mejores datos y me acompañó a la parada del autobús cuando me fui de Madrid.

El departamento muy limpio, ubicado en un muy buen barrio, con estación de metro a 4 cuadras y la del bus local ubicada en la puerta de su departamento.

Si ella les dice que es mejor tomar bus para llegar a su casa, haganle caso, porque es verdad.

Sin duda mi estadía en Madrid fue muy buena, debido principalmente a Cinthia
I really enjoyed my stay with Cinthia. She is a very kind hearted person and welcomes you into her home completely. Would recommend to anybody who wanted to stay with her, either long or short term.

Hello. I´m a student from Austria and during the summer semester I study here in Madrid at the UCM Madrid. During my stay abroad I live with Cinthia in her flat. I already spent two moth here and I´m looking forward to share the apartment for another three with her.
The apartment and the bedroom are nicely decorated and very comfortable. The bedroom is your personal area and Cinthia respects very much your privacy. You can use the kitchen and the livingroom with her. I enjoy a lot living together with Cintia because she is very kind and makes a great effort to create a pleasant atmosphere. Also, she offers breakfast with organic fruit.
The apartment is located near a metrostation and you need approximately five minutes to get there. From there, it is a ten to fifteen minutes ride to the centre with the line 3.
All in all, the apartment is perfect to spend a few days or, like me, several moth here. I highly recommend it to anybody.

Cinthia was lovely and came down to meet me. She also offered me dinner and breakfast which was really nice. I had a comfortable nights stay here before I had to leave to the airport, it was just a bit further out of the city than I would have hoped.
Had a great time with Cinthia, very warm and caring host.
Cinthia was a very nice and welcoming host.

Cinthia is an excellent host. She is very welcoming, makes great effort to communicate in English if you don't speak spanish and to make you feel comfortable, and she provides good advice if you want to eat outside or look for a place to live in Madrid. Her appartment is clean and well furnished, and she respects your privacy in your room. Also a very nice person to talk to, very open-minded. Cinthia was a great host for me, arriving in Madrid for the first time with no understanding of the spanish language. The location is outside the center but near the metro line 3 so not an issue.
Casa muy acogedora, amfitriona muy amable. Estancia corta pero muy agradable en general. Volvería sin pensarlo.

Cinthia es un amor. Desde el mismo momento de hacer la reserva te sientes como si fueses a visitar a una amiga.
Te da toda la información y facilidades para que te sientas agusto en su hogar.
Los dos gatines son muy amorosos también , como la dueña :D
Disfruté mucho vivir en la casa de Cinthia. Es una anfitriona muy cariñosa y pasé buen tiempo con ella y sus dos gatos muy amables.

Cinthia is a nice lady with good heart!! I really love her story and her attitude of life. I  learn a lot from her. She has two cats. And they are very cute and beautiful. Also, the room is very clean and warm. I will back to this place soon!!!!

Muy bien comunicado con el Centro de Madrid y lo suficientemente apartado para descansar. Es una zona muy silenciosa
La casa de Cintia es acogedora y ella es estupenda. Me tenía preparada una cenita cuando llegué y tuvimos una charla muy agradable. Tiene muchas experiencias que compartir.
Totalmente recomendable

Cinthia was a delight, willing to make Chai, give advice on the best places to get tapas and how to get around Madrid. Her place is lovely and she really made me feel at home, can't recommend her enough.
Todo muy bien!!! Te hace sentir como en tu propia casa.
Cinthia es una muy buena anfitriona, amable y comprensible que se preocupa por sus huéspedes. El lugar muy limpio. Y tiene dos gatos adorables.

Posto molto vicino a una fermata della metro che porta direttamente in centro. Zona molto tranquilla e confortevole. La casa è un luogo tranquillo e accogliente e l'ospite una persona eccezionale sempre pronta a darti una mano in qualunque evenienza. È, inoltre, una fonte di conversazioni interessanti e divertenti. I gattini, poi, sono dolcissimi!

La casa es muy bonita, es acogedora y muy relajante. La habitación es grande e invita a permanecer en ella.
El desayuno es muy saludable y variado. Es todo biológico y de gran calidad. Lo mismo digo de las cosas de la casa y de la ropa de la cama.
Lo he pasado muy bien con Cinthia, ha conseguido que me sintiera como en mi casa, con la misma comodidad y libertad.
Es una anfitriona que te hace olvidar que estás de visita en su casa, transmite confianza, se preocupa y se interesa como si fueras su amigo de toda la vida.
Así me he sentido yo estos días.
Los gatos son preciosos y aunque son amigables viven mucho en su mundo y en sus cosas.
Estaré encantado de volver a su casa cuando vuelva a Madrid. El metro está a cinco minutos de la casa y enseguida estás en Sol, es una línea rápida.
El barrio me gustó, tiene bastantes árboles y me parece bastante tranquilo.

Cinthia is the best of best I have never met in airbnb,  I love her house and She is so great, make my stay in Madrid feels like home. I miss the moring orange juice and the good smell of washed cloth. This experience become a beautiful memory even better than all the good scenic spots in Madrid. I miss you Cithia, and I will definitely live with you when I come to Madrid next time. Say hello to the cats for me. Kiss Kiss

Suelo viajar por trabajo, por lo cual me apetece sentirme cómoda en los lugares donde me quedo. Cinthia me hizo sentir como en casa desde el primer momento, más que un huésped te sientes un amigo de toda la vida, al tiempo que es muy respetuosa. Inmejorables sus explicaciones para que llegues a todos lados con los trucos de quien vive en la ciudad, y un lujazo y un placer las sábanas impecables de percal. ¡Recomendadísimo!

Cinthia and her two cats are very gracious hosts! The room is cosy and beautiful. It's quite far from the center but you can easily walk just 8 mins to take the metro and then about 20 mins to central tourist spots. Cinthia is a thoughtful host; I particularly enjoyed the fresh orange juice made with the juice press in the morning, the dyson fan and filtered water in the room, and that she looked out the window to keep an eye on my motorcycle for security. Thank you Cinthia!
Corroboro lo dicho anteriromente

Cinthia es una dueña súper buena, muy muy  amorosa y comprensiva. La casa está en un barrio muy tranquilo con todo lo necesario de cerca. La habitación es muy cómoda, tranquila y limpia. No puedes esperar más.
Es muy atenta y amable! Siempre pendiente de ti, lugar muy tranquilonpara descansar

Es una casa muy cómoda y tranquila. Se encuentran Carrefour, Mercadona y Día en el barrio. Para ir al centro, el metro línea 3 es muy conveniente. Lo más importante es que la dueña Cinthia es un Ángel y cuida mucho.
Очень отзывчивая и дружелюбная хозяйка. Чувствовала себя, как дома.

Cinthia es la anfitriona ideal, de las mejores que he encontrado. Fue súper amable, me brindó su comida y ayuda con todo, es totalmente recomendable y una persona muy interesante con la que hablar. Su casa es muy acogedora y tiene mucho encanto, y sus gatos son adorables. La habitación estaba muy limpia y cómoda, con todo lo necesario y detalles cuidados.

Ha sido una estancia genial. La cama comodísina, el desayuno con productos de calidad ecológicos. Lo mejor, la anfitriona. Es todo amor y detalles. Hemos compartido unas conversaciones muy interesantes. Tiene dos gatos preciosos. Muy recomendable hospedarse en casa de Cinthia.
Cinthia 非常的体贴周到，当初预定房间的时候半夜2点了还收到她的回复，回答了很多细节，会给我准备好吃的早餐，帮我晾衣服收衣服，就想mum 一样对我无微不至的照顾，让我感觉很温暖， 如果有机会再去西班牙我还会选择住在这里

What a pleasure to meet genuine and extremely kind people like Cinthia! My trip to Madrid was wonderful, in major part due to Cynthia's tips and a few moments we shared with her and her lovely cats. The apartment itself is very cosy, so you have to force yourself to go out sometimes:-) Everything is perfectly clean, and I had everything I needed. The location is OK, quite area and 10 min from the metro station. When I come next time to Madrid, if available, I will be happy to stay at Cinthia's place, and especially to see her again!
Thank you!!
if you want to stay in a cosy house wit a warm hostess,  go to Cintia.

¡que piso más bonito! At first the flat seemed small, but after 2 days i discovered that it was no problem at all. Cinthia is really kind and spending time with her in the living room watching a movie or series is really nice. She helped me with anything i needed. If you respect her and her things, you are free to do whatever you like, and the place really quickly started to feel like home for me. Normally i dont like cats, but her cats are really nice. The area is nice and safe, and there are several parks nearby. 5 minutes of walking and you are in the metro, and close to the metro is a mall with shops and a great Carrefour. The metro arrives every 8th minut and in just 15-20 minutes you are in Sol. If you like walking i can recommend walking to Caja Mágica, or the park around Caja Mágica, Parque Lineal del Manzanares, which is a really beautiful park. There is a small hill close to Caja Mágica, and from the top of that you can see all over Madrid which is a beautiful view. If you like going to a bar to watch football and have a beer, there are many places to do so in the area too. I learned many things in the month i stayed in Cinthia´s apartment, and it has been an amazing experience. I will surely go back to this place another time.
Simplemente, excelente!

Il mio soggiorno da Cinthia è stato ottimo come quello precedente. Lei è un'ospite eccezionale, gentile, dolce e disponibilissima. Se parlate spagnolo potrete fare delle chiacchierate mai banali :). La stanza, come tutta la casa, è accogliente e pulitissima, i gattini sono molto dolce. È un ottimo luogo per chi deve spendere anche un po' di tempo lavorando, perché è un ambienti davvero tranquillo e silenzioso. Ci tornerò sicuramente :)

Soy de otra ciudad y necesitaba alojamiento en las cercanías en Madrid y Cinthia me lo facilitó por completo. Nos pusimos en contacto por chat de Airbnb y en menos de 24 h me contestó, todo fue bien y a tiempo, incluso con la urgencia que yo llevaba por temas laborales, Cynthia es muy agradable y repetiría sin dudarlo, porque antes tenia alguna reticencia porque nunca antes había estado de huésped en casa de anfitrión. La casa esta bien equipada como yo requería, lavadora, cocina... La casa es tranquila, limpia y luminosa. Recomiendo la casa de Cinthia si precisas de alojamiento en Madrid.

quiero volver ,,,no puedo decir nada más si no que quisiera volver a Madrid y puntualmente al apto / piso de Cinthia
Excelente estadía, Cinthia es muy atenta y brinda todo para pasar unos días cómodos y tranquilos. Totalmente recomendable !
Os encontraréis con alguien muy simpática, muy buena conversadora, divertida, coqueta y dicharachera.

Very attentive lady so professional. I highly recommend this host.
Thank you for your patience and help.
A calm and tranquil home
Excelente anfitriona y localización. La casa es muy tranquila, perfecta para trabajar. Cinthia es una gran persona, muy atenta, totalmente recomendable

Es un lugar muy acogedor y tranquilo dónde uno puede recuperar energías para luego
continuar con sus planes. Gracias Cinthia por la hospitalidad.
excelente anfitriona, muy comunicativa, gran soporte y guia

perfect! no other words needed for this accommodation.
The room is great, the location is fantastic, less than 30mins to get to the centre with one bus (€1.50). Metro is a 5min walk away too. The area itself is pretty too! so would recommend spending a couple hours walking around if you have the time.
Cinthia is one of the best hosts I've ever come across. She is kind, helpful and a genuinely lovely woman. There were no problems whatsoever and everything was perfect! I had such a nice time with Cinthia and loved my time in Madrid.
If you're unsure about accommodation in Madrid, I would recommend you look no further

The room is simply perfect, like in the pics. I stayed there for 9 days and Cinthia is a wonderful host and a wonderful person. she made sure to give me everything I needed, fron breakfast to laundry. the residential neighborhood is calm. you can find everything you need around

La conectividad es increíble ! un autobús pasa fuera del edificio , y el metro esta super cerca por lo que rapiditamente llegas al casco central , Super Conectivo !!!. Cinthia es la mejor mejor mejor anfitriona , podrán experimentar estar en un hogar repleto de calidez, buena energía y mucha paz . Cinthia muchas gracias por tanto cariño entregado .
Todo perfecto, como si estuviera en casa! Muy amable y atenta. Muchas gracias y hasta la próxima!

cinthia's place is great for solo travelers like me who want a place to feel safe and comfortable.  she makes sure you have your privacy, but at the same time, she always offering coffee, tea, and even fruits to me! (i got lucky; there was a farmers market nearby). there is nearby metro (train 3) and 2 bus stops (one goes to plaza mayor, the other atocha train station).  the table made it easy for me to sit/relax/write, while the closet kept me organized on day outfits to wear (lol). cat lovers will also like the company of 2 pretty feline creatures :)

Mit hat die Unterkunft gut gefallen. Die Lage ist sehr gut und Cinthia kümmert sich sehr um ihre Gäste. Falls ich wieder mal nach Madrid gehe, würde ich diese Unterkunft wieder buchen, ich kann es nur empfehlen!

A wonderfully quiet and calm place with Cinthia being a wonderful and wise woman to chat with. She was also providing me tea while I was preparing for a nearby conference and I felt comfortable like Sherlock Holmes. :-)
I will miss her and her cats and I remembered the song "Brazil" that I will certainly return here once again.
cumple al 100 porciento con lo que dice el anuncio. centicra contesta rapido el anfitrion supero mis expectativas

Si viajas solo y buscas donde quedarte, no hay mejor lugar que en la casa de Cinthia. Además de que queda cerca de comercios y de diferentes transportes llevando al centro, la casa está muy cómoda. Cinthia siempre dispuesta para todo, tanto para compartir que para ayudar (hasta les ofrece té, café, frutos bien frescos, y desayuno si les apetece). La habitación está muy cómoda y tranquila con una buena vista para relajarse. Durante el día, uno también se puede quedar en el salón que es un lugar muy lindo y tranquilo. Si les gusta los gatos, este lugar está hecho para ustedes, con 2 gatos maravillosos. En fin nada que decir sobre la habitación, todo esta perfecto.
Excelente anfitrión, es muy amable y maravillosa

Cinthia’s apartment is amazing. She was so friendly and accommodating and she cooked me a fantastic breakfast with freshly squeezed orange juice and strong coffee. The room was cool and comfortable and the bathroom was well-equipped and homely. Highly recommended.
Jag fick ett otroligt bra intryck av Cinthia trots att jag bara stannade i en natt.

Cinthia is very helpful she is willing to share information whatever  you need to travel around in Madrid (especially Transportation information). From airport to the house is a bit far but you can reach to city centre like Sol square approx 30 mins by metro (10 mins walk to the station). It is quiet neighbourhood and safe too. There is no AC in the room but Fan has. I felt warm while I was sleeping but this year summer in spain became exceptionally extremely hot. Gracias Cinthia :)

La estancia en el hogar de Cinthia ha sido muy agradable. La habitación disponía de todo lo necesario para descansar y para trabajar de manera cómoda. La cocina se prestaba con todos los utensilios necesarios para cocinar y comer, además, Cinthia pone a disposición todo lo del desayuno y se adapta a tus gustos, es genial! El baño es amplio y puedes almacenar todo lo que lleves para el aseo. El resto de la casa y sus gatos te acogen como si fueras una más! Cinthia es una persona muy agradable que te deja tu espacio pero también se preocupa de que todo esté bien y que no te falte de nada. Es muy cercana, de manera que no te sentirás sola sino que realmente, si quieres, puedes compartir conversaciones y ratos con ella.

Это было чудесно . Синтия очень добрая и общительная!
Я жил 4 дня как дома. Энергетика очень хорошая в доме, спал отлично.
Отдельное спасибо Синтия, за очень вкусную tortilla de patatas!
Удачи Вам!
Fue maravilloso!
Cinthia es muy amable y sociable!
Viví 4 días en casa. La energía es muy buena en la casa, se durmió muy bien.
¡Un agradecimiento especial a Cynthia por la deliciosa tortilla de patatas!
¡Buena suerte para ti!
Amazing flat

Small apartment with a beautiful balcony. The balcony is almost the size of all of the other living space. Not much of a living room or bedroom but it's exactly as it seems in photos. If the size of the living room and bedroom matters that much I wouldn't recommend. But if you're looking for a great rooftop to hangout just outside Plaza Mayor stay here. Location is fantastic!
Fabulous apartment & terrace, ideally located to visit Madrid !
Comfortable apartment with an amazing terrace in very central location. We had everything we needed for a lovely stay and would definitely recommend or stay again!
Great location and amazing rooftop terrace
Nice play to stay in madrid

The apartment is lovely, in a great walkable location! The terrace is wonderful to relax and sunbathe during the day or to have dinner dinner under the stars at night. The apartment is small but with everything you need and I was surprised how quiet it was once you close the windows. The stairs that go from 3rd floor are minor and most of them are actually inside the actual apartment / penthouse. Soraya was a great host and very personable and friendly.

Amazing location - literally steps away from Plaza Mayor.  This is a small apartment with steep steps.  It’s fine for two people, but will get tight with anymore.  Best thing about this place is the outdoor rooftop deck.  Amazing to enjoy morning coffee.  Great A/C too for those hot Madrid days.  If you’re looking for location, you can’t get any better!  Short walk from the Sol Metro Station.
El alojamiento es magnífico, silencioso, con vistas buenísimas a la plaza, la terracita maravillosa para ver las estrellas de noche, ha sido una experiencia maravillosa y que repetiremos sin dudar.
Casa muy limpia, la ubicación es inmejorable y la terraza espectacular, la comunicación con Soraya ha sido muy agradable.

Merci à Soraya et son mari pour l'accueil alors que nous sommes arrivé assez tard à Madrid.
appartement impeccable, superbe terrasse, et emplacement idéal, au centre de Madrid et à proximité de tout !
nous le recommandons à qui veut profiter de Madrid !

Nous avons passé un très bon séjour dans l’appartement de Soraya. L’immeuble est idéalement situé à quelques mètres de la Plaza Mayor, et le rooftop est très agréable. La communication avec Soraya a été parfaite, et tout est fait pour simplifier l’arrivée et le départ, notamment sur le fait de garder les valises. Je recommande tout à fait cette location !

We really enjoyed the place.  It is small but there was 2 of us so it was perfect.  The location is right off plaza mayor and It was an excellent location to food, shopping, and the Sol metro. Would definitely recommend for couples or even three people (theres a futon) Soraya was very attentive.
This was our best stay in Spain! The terrace is beautiful and the apartment was perfect. Definitely would recommend for Madrid.
A wonderful place to stay! Great location with easy access to all of downtown Madrid. Can’t wait to stay here again!!
What an amazing stay. If you are visiting Madrid there is truley no better option
Amazing spot to stay! Beautiful airbnb, with gorgeous patio right in the center of everything. Soraya was a fabulous host and very responsive. Would recommend to anyone!

Amazing place amazing location the best hosts. 100% I recommend it and I will be back. The rooftop is just amazing it’s the best view in my opinion and it’s quiet at night so you can sleep. The unit has everything that you need inside it’s brilliantly designed and you have a great restaurant right downstairs.

We loved our stay at this gorgeous flat in the very center of Madrid, equipped with all we needed in perfect working order. Soraya is a great and hospitable host. We highly recommend staying here for your trip to Madrid.
One of the best Airbnb's we've ever stayed out. Beautiful terrace with an outdoor shower and phenomenal location.
We had an absolutely amazing stay! The terrace was honestly our favorite part of Madrid. This is a perfect place for couples

The roof deck is amazing! We loved getting take out for some of our meals just so we could eat out on the deck and enjoy watching the people and activities going on below.  I was also surprised how quiet it was at night despite being in the busy Plaza Mayor area.  The wifi was ok and AC worked well in the warm temps.  There are tons of restaurants and shops in the area and you can walk to all the major areas of Madrid you will want to explore.  Soraya was very helpful and met us at the apt right as we arrived from the train. We can highly recommend this apartment for your stay in Madrid!
Soraya’s place is in the best location with the perfect amenities. Look no further — this is the best place to stay in Madrid.
Casa molto bella con una splendida terrazza,perfetta per due persone ! La casa è molto silenziosa , ben tenuta e pulita .

Great location, extremely well maintained and clean apartment.  The rooftop terrace is unique and provides great views of the area.  The pictures don’t do it enough justice. The crepe restaurant around the corner was fantastic (try the yogurt bowl too-fruit was fresh and delicious).
Perfect apartment for a stay in Madrid! Soraya is really helpful and easy to get in touch with.
Great location, beautiful terrace. Soraya was helpful and so kind!

This Apartment was wonderful, very clean, and located in central Madrid with a nice terrace!   Soraya was a very helpful host who provided us with a lot of tips about exploring Madrid.  We really enjoyed our time here and highly recommend the place!.
This was an absolute gem in the middle of Madrid. Easy access to all the main sights and Soraya was very helpful. Check-In & Check-Out was easy. Highly recommend this apartment.

Soraya es una excelente host. La comunicacion es muy rapida y siempre dispuesta a ayudar. Ella y su esposo llegan en menos de 2 minutos a resolver cualquier cosa. La localizacion es perfecta para ir al Mercado San Miguel, Museo del Prado entre otros, no necesitas taxi para llegar a ningun lado. Al hacer el check in Soraya te comparte un libro de sugerencias con restaurantes y atracciones que disfrutar durante la estadia, todos muy buenos. La habitacion super linda y comoda para dos personas, el rooftop es bello para darte un vino o cerveza mirando las calles y casas del corazon de Madrid. Lo recomendamos al 100%
Great place to stay! Walking distance to a lot of the Madrid spots, nice accommodations with a great balcony to watch people go into and out of the plaza. I recommend!

Soraya's apartment was perfect for our 3-night stay in Madrid. The central location allowed us to see much of the city, while always having a home base to come back to when we got tired. The terrace was the perfect late afternoon spot for a glass of wine and to listen to the city. The bedroom, while small, was extremely comfortable, and provided us with everything that we needed. We arrived a few hours before check-in, but Soraya was very accommodating to our schedule and both the check-in and check-out processes were easy. I would highly recommend Soraya's apartment to anyone looking to stay in Central Madrid.
We had the best time. The roof is amazing and there are endless things to do right outside your doorstep. Would highly recommend this apartment to anyone who wants to experience Madrid.

Highly recommend Soraya’s place. Great communication and she took care of all our needs. We had one issue and she had someone come by and make the fix within 10 minutes. Amazing location right next to Plaza Mayor. Would love to come back and stay here next time we are in Madrid.

A wonderful location and great checkin process. We loved sitting out on the terrace and listening to the street musicians and life around the plaza. We worried it might be loud inside but the windows do a great job! The place is small but perfect for us two and had everything we needed!
Great location and very helpful host.
Great location off Plaza Mayor, Soraya and her husband were attentive and helpful and provided a cool apartment with a brilliant balcony. Muchissimo gracias!

Wish we had stayed longer at  the most perfect location in Madrid .  Also having Mimi’s Cafe right below for wonderful breakfast and coffee is a extra bonus . Of course the pub at the door of the building is perfect for a nightcap on the way home .
mt bom. nada a acrescentar - muito bom mesmo!

L'emplacement est bon et la terrasse met en valeur l'appartement.
L'appartement est très bruyant (chauffage, voisins, passants noctambules...).
l'appartement est fonctionnel et sans charme. La terrasse est spacieuse et embaume la friture

Just walk around so
Much to see
Everything you need is with in minutes but definitely venture around and see the different areas
the perfect place to stay in madrid!! amazing view and very close to everything we wanted to do/see!

Fantastic apartment with an amazing terrace and wonderful view to the plaza Mayor.
We enjoyed our stay very much. Soraya is a fantastic host.
Thanks

The location cannot be any more central than this apartment. It’s a small apartment, but it has everything you need and is well stocked. It was also very warm for December.
The patio is really nice and has a great view, but sometimes smelled like food.

Perfect place for a stay at Madrid
Highly recommended

Excellent location, right in the middle of Plaza Mayor and Puerta del Sol. A great place for people who likes to walk to everywhere in the city. The apartment was ver clean, comfortable and the terrace was to die for.
Beautiful, cozy place with that terrace and view is unbeatable! Everything at your fingertips. Everyone so nice and helpful. Great to leave luggage at Mimi’s while enjoying delicious food!

Location can’t be beat, and the rooftop was absolutely dreamy. I’d recommend this place to anyone visiting Madrid for the first time. Additionally, check-in/check-out was easy, and the place was clean.
We had a great time in madrid, thanks for the stay in the lovely apartment! The roof terrace is amazing on a sunny day of which there are many in Madrid!
El mejor ático de todo Madrid , vistas de 10 pero lo mejor es la acogida de la anfitriona Soraya .
What a charming place! The balcony is huge and amazing, with great light and just steps away to the Plaza Mayor (you can see it from the balcony).
Was great!
Very easy check-in. This apartment is very close to everything! Highly recommend for a couple or small family.

WOW, we were blown away by how amazing the location of this apartment is, and by how convenient our stay was!! You can’t underestimate the ability to walk to nearly every major area of the city, including a 2 min. walk from Plaza Mayor. The place was very clean and well-equipped, having everything we needed as well as having an amazing balcony and view. Soraya and her husband made our stay in Madrid very memorable, and we can’t wait to come back soon!!
Excellent location! Everythig was super clean. Loved the terrace and having everything close by. Restaurants, bars, pharmacy...etc. Would definitely stay again. Soraya and her staff were great.
Perfect location, great terrace, no noise
Super séjour dans un appartement idéalement placé !

The air b&b is located right next Plaza Mayor. My niece and I stayed on the top floor with private access to the roof patio. The whole 4 floors building is an air b&b.
The place is super clean, super cute and very convenient to everywhere. Just watch your steps as you ascend to the top floor.
Soraya is very friendly and communicative. She operates the crepe store right across the alley so it is very easy to find her, if you need to contact her.
We highly recommend her place.
Beautiful place right in the heart of Madrid. The views from the terrace are really nice and the interior is very comfortable as well. Would 100% recommend
Amazing view and location. Soraya was readily available and assisted us when we need it, also provided a great list of recommendations.

The location of this apartment was stellar, with a great rooftop balcony just outside of Plaza Mayor. The apartment is located near a ton of places to eat and a short walk to the Metro. Soraya provided us with a ton of recommendations for our trip. Communication with Soraya was also great, which made things very easy. The apartment itself was very clean and has everything you need for a comfortable stay. We were there during Holy Week, and Soraya gave us a heads up about processions that go right past the apartment, which we were able to watch from the balcony. Her cafe, Mimi's Cafe, is a go-to for some awesome food.
We had a great stay at Santiago's house. Everything was perfect, the location, the appartement and specialy the beuatiful terrasse; and it was great to meet and speak with Santiago...
Petite maison très sympathique et mignonne ! Santiago est un hote agreable, convivial et marrant. La terasse surplombe la ville de Madrid et offre une jolie vue. Super sejour!
Se está como en casa y te tratan como en casa. Así de simple
Great place to stay in the heart of Madrid. Really intereting to speak with Santiago, really hepful, highly recommanded!!

Santiago was very accommodating of our last minute plans, we really appreciated his flexibility.
His place is in a great location, and the terraces are just a beautiful in real life as they are in his photos.

Santiago was the absolute best!!
Upon our arrival he gave us food and drinks which were much needed from our arduous journey. He treated us like his family and we never had an issue. We ended up going to every one of his suggestions and each experience was amazing. For example, el rincon has the best tortilla patatas ever and I inquired about where to get a good tortilla de patata. It was about 300 feet from his apartment and we had breakfast there every morning. We also went to his dinner suggestion which was El Molette which had thee best Tapas!
His apartment is exactly as depicted and even better. There's a great energy and two absolutely stunning terraces. And his apartment is honestly in the best location. Malasana is full of young and lively people and it is a place of great excitement. The streets are packed on the weekends with young people and eating and drinking at outside tables all over! And his apartment is steps away from this and yet we could not hear any noise when we would retire to our beds around 2 am.
All in all, Santiago is an amazing host and this apartment was a wonderful experience!

Beautiful apartment, in a vibrant and cool part of Madrid but placed in a way that the room is nice and quiet. I'm a light sleeper so the extra dark shutters were a bonus! Santiago was a friendly and accommodating host - couldn't recommend this spot highly enough
It was a nice place to discover Madrid, perfect location and a really nice roof-deck. The only negativ point about this Appartement is, that its not so welcome to bring friends in the evening.

We had a great stay at Santi's place in the middle of Malasaña. Santi gave us a very warm welcome and was very flexible about check in and check out which made things a lot easier for us since we had late flights. The apartment is wonderful and offers great views. The street is calm, but everything you need is closeby. We can definitly recommend to stay there and to meet Santi!
I had a great time at Santiago's. There was great communication and it was a great space. Great views of Madrid and I enjoyed the balcony and the hammock. Great location, many places to go near by!

I spent one week in Santiago's apartment and it was a very nice experience.
