It's really a beautiful place and the terrasses and the views are greats ! It's also very well located in the heart of Madrid, and you are very close for everything you might want :)
Place was very clean, central, and well-communicated. However, at times the atmosphere was unwelcoming. Elevator doesn't go to the apartment's floor, but the terraces are beautiful.
Ubicación excelente: andando, Plaza de España a 7 min, Sol y Cibeles a 15. La terraza grande una gozada para relajarse. Ambiente con nostalgia de ’la movida’ madrileña.
Posicion perfecta para quien quiere vivir en el barrio mas vivo y interesante de Madrid! El piso es muy limpio y cerca del centro. Hay una vista increible desde la habitacion.

Santiago's flat couldn't be located in a better place. Right in the heart of the hip area of Malasaña, there is no shortage of cool bars, interesting restaurants and relaxing cafes. Highly recommend the stay, and the roof top terrace is amazing.

Apartamento en el corazón de Malasaña, muy buena ubicación, cercana a muchos restaurantes, supermercados, estaciones de metro y bares. El departamento es muy limpio y con unas terrazas espectaculares. Santi es un excelente anfitrión, muy preocupado por que la estancia sea lo mejor posible.
Santiago's place is perfect to visit Madrid since it's in the city centre and Santiago is very nice.

If you want to be part of spanish hospitality and stay at a great place in the center of Madrid with an even greater view, go to Santiago's. He makes your visit to this beautiful city one you will rember for a long time. Also if you're a flora-lover: He has a unbelievable collection of suculants and cactuses!
Paul
It's a very simple room but there is everything you need and you can use the kitchen. We stayed in November but I think the terrace is really nice in summer time.
Mas allá de la increíble ubicación del apartamento y la hospitalidad de Santi, vamos a recordar este viaje por la increíble música a toda hora. Gracias !

Alojamiento perfectamente ubicado en el corazón del barrio de Malasaña. Santiago es un muy buen anfitrión, el piso está decorado con mucho estilo y su música es muy buena. Como pega diría que queda un poco pequeño cuando está lleno.
Pero es totalmente recomendable.
Ubicación inmejorable, cerca de todo, ideal para pasar un fin de semana en la ciudad. El piso tiene de todo y flexibilidad en la llegada y la salida. Gracias Santi!!

I did not enjoy my stay here. Maybe it was because I am American, but I did not feel welcome at all. Santi did not smile the whole time I was there and was strangely particular about where things needed to be placed. Also, there was so much dust in the bedroom I was staying in I had to leave early - my allergies and asthma flared up so badly. Also, upon arrival Santi got very angry with me for being a day late (which I communicated over messages) and said my spanish was horrible (I am an exchange student trying to learn). During my first night he played music until 2:30 AM while I was extremely tired and trying to sleep. Also, the apartment smelled bad and there was a creepy clown picture in my room.
Honestly the location was great and all the other reviews were so positive I shocked I was living with the same person. Examine other options before booking this place.

El apartamento de Santi fue perfecto para mi corto fin de semana en Madrid.  Estarás ubicado en el centro de Malasaña, con bares, restaurantes, tiendas y el metro a poca distancia.  El apartamento en sí está limpio y lleno de inspiración y, de inmediato, Santi fue súper hospitalario y fácil de comunicar.  A mi llegada me ofrecieron una cerveza y algo a comer y fue flexible con mi salida, que fue muy útil. Me quede con ganas a volver con más tiempo!  Un espacio muy chulo y un gran anfitrión, gracias Santi!
Séjour parfait , un hôte très accueillant ! Je recommande !

Santi is a very kind host, who has a nice and cosy flat in Madrid. He was always very helpful with everything. The flat is clean and the city (Bars, Shopping, etc.) is not far away. I absolutly recommend this adress, if you want to come to Madrid!

Well located, perfect for day-goers, and for sleep (good mattress and no street night noise) the room is a great value for money. Furthermore Santi is an interesting personality, passionated about music. So it was a pretty enjoyful stay. Next stay in Madrid, his room will my first choice again.

Excelente ubicación para moverse por Madrid.
Santi es un tipo súper amigable y muy respetuoso.
El lugar es todo friendly, vale la pena.
Muy bién gracias por todo.
Excelente ubicación, me sentí como en casa, Santi es un gran Anfitrión y muy amable, sin duda me volvería a alojar ahí

Muchas gracias Santi por tu ayuda y tu acogida en tu casa. El departamento esta super bien situado, ideal para caminar por todos los sitios. Santi es muy sympatico y nos ha dado muchos consejos por donde salir y visitar. Igual nos ha dejado partir mas tarde el ultimo dia.

Una experiencia hermosa en la casa de Santi! Siempre amable y dispuesto a ayudar, con una casa muy ordenada y limpia además de un gran estilo que le dió un buen extra al lugar. Hermosas vistas y muy próximo a todo. Santi destaca como buen anfitrión, súper recomendable, vale la pena y mucho!

Santi is a great host and plays some great music, his home was a great place to stay. Malasana is packed with bars and restaurants and yet you hear nothing of this in Santi's home it's very peaceful. The two terraces are great and we used both of them. The home is within walking distance of a large number of places. We walked everywhere, from Santi's place to Retiro park, the Prado Museum, the Royal Palace and all the places between them.
mein Aufenthalt war wie zu Besuch bei einem Freund. Santi hat mir tolle Hinweise gegeben in Hinblick auf Musikprogramm und Umge6

Muy buen alojamiento en un punto central de Malasaña pero que a su vez permite descansar bien ya que la habitación da hacia el fondo. Santi estuvo atento a todo lo que necesitábamos en todo momento. El apartamento es fiel
a su descripción y todo funcionó de forma correcta. Lo recomiendo.
Santiago nos recibió muy calidamente en conjunto con su hijo. El lugar es céntrico, muy facil de acceder y seguro. Nos ha encantado la estadía con Santiago!

I enjoyed my stay in Santi's place.  The place is located in the heart of restaurants and shops and historic places. The room is cozy and the apartment got so much character. Santi is a great host answering my questions, offering me coffee and cookies. He's in to music and played me great and cool  music. I would be back at the place and I would recommend it to my friends.

Un lugar muy bohemio y musical con vistas increíbles, terraza y mucha luz.
La ubicación es sensacional ya queda en la estación de metro más céntrica que puedas ver en el mapa (En serio).
Santi es un tipo bien, tranquilo muy musical y que te puede ayudar a buscar planes y lugares para disfrutar la estancia.
Santi est un hôte accueillant avec des excellents goûts musicaux ! La terrasse est superbe et l’emplacement parfait !

Nous avons passé un très bon séjour chez Santi. Son logement est situé en plein coeur de Madrid mais la chambre est calme car située en arrière de la rue.
Santi est accueillant et toujours prêt à rendre service.
Nous avons partagé un repas ensemble sur sa magnifique terrasse pleine de fleurs, c'était très agréable. De plus, Santi écoute de la très bonne musique.
L'appartement original et très singulier, près d'une place animée où boire un verre.
Nous recommandons cette adresse.

Séjour mémorable chez Santi, qui nous a très bien accueillis, mon petit garçon et moi, et nous a conseillé plein de bons plans ! L’appartement est enchanteur et on ne peut mieux situé, dans un quartier central et sympa, mais dans une rue calme.
Je suis reconnaissante à Santi pour les moments partagés.
L'appartement est parfaitement localisé, et la terrasse exceptionnelle. Parfait pour prendre le temps de se reposer

Santi es un tipo muy amigable y dispuesto a ayudarte en todo momento que te abre las puertas de su hogar y te ofrece la mejor hospitalidad, así como todo lo que tiene a su alcance,  la ubicación es genial cerca de todo, y la terraza ni que decir, espectacular.
Santi was an amazing host. He is a generous and positive guy. I enjoyed my time chilling with him. Gracias Santi!

We had a great time staying with Santi. He was responsive and helpful but also continued about his day in a way that made us feel like we weren’t intruding. The location was both private and energetic. The view from both balconies was stunning and there were shops, restaurants, and cafes nearby with the metro also conveniently close. My friend and I had a wonderful time and would recommend Santi to anyone looking to stay in Madrid

El ambiente del alojamiento fue cálido y acogedor, y me encantó cuidar de las plantas, lo que me hizo sentir como en casa. La cocina estaba bien equipada y el espacio era perfecto para trabajar cómodamente. La ubicación es ideal para explorar, y pude disfrutar de paseos diarios en bicicleta por la zona, que es tranquila y segura. Gracias Santi! tuve una estancia muy agradable que combina comodidad y una excelente ubicación.

O apartamento de Santi é extremamente organizado e limpo, e cheio de personalidade! Fiquei encantado assim que cheguei com a vista na varanda.  Santi foi solicito e me ajudou com um problema de internet no celular assim que eu cheguei.  A localização é ótima, especialmente para pedestres como eu que gostam de fazer tudo andando.  Amei conhecer Madri, e parte da experiência foi ter ficado no apartamento de Santi! Voltaria com certeza!

Santi is the best host for your stay in Madrid!
He will give you a good treat and tell you a lot of inside tips for Malasana, especially if you're interested in concerts and nice restaurants.
I'm already looking forward to coming back :)
Un piso que está en una ubicación genial para poder estar en Madrid y poder ir a todo caminando. Además, Santi siempre está pendiente para ver cómo está siendo tu experiencia.

Nos avons passé une semaine chez Santi et nous nous selles sentis comme à la maison.
Nous recommandons.
La casa de Santi es un mondo al dentro de la cuidad. Encontrar Santi es un viaje al dentro del viaje. Inolvidable.

I stayed here for a week, and the aparment is as cool as shown in the pictures. It is a very unique place, and the location is actually unbeatable. I loved the Malasaña area, and you can basically walk anywhere within 20-30 minutes.
The place was also very clean, and has everything you need.
The apartment is described as a calm and quiet place - with standard houserules (quiet between 23h - 08h), which was an important aspect when I chose to book this place. However, there was loud music played several nights. One night (friday) the host even came home around midnight with a friend, talking and playing music. The apartment is small, so this is basically happening right out side the bedroom.
There is something so fundamentally disrespectful with a host who is making a concious choise to bring people back home after being out, playing music, talking, drinking - while their guest is trying to sleep in the next room.
I would therefor not spend my money here again.
Lovely stay and great host! Excellent location!
We really enjoyed Santi’s flat, the area around it and his hospitality. It was like staying with a long roommate and his recommendations for the area were also really helpful. Thank you
Su casa es muy agradable y fue siempre muy amable. Gran experiencia :)
Santi is an excellent host. His suggestions for the local cultural life are great. He has been extremely helpful and accommodative. The property itself is located right in the city centre.

El apartamento está ubicado en una zona animada con muchos lugares geniales para salir. Se encuentra justo en el corazón del barrio vibrante, pero al mismo tiempo en una calle tranquila. Un bonito apartamento con un anfitrión amable.
Nous avons été bien accueillis et avons passé un bon séjour chez Santi

Superbe séjour chez Santi qui est un hôte charmant ! Recommandations de sorties, petit déjeuner de bienvenue et communication facile ! En plus l’appartement est placé dans un quartier très sympa !
Je recommande, merci Santi :)
a place with personality and personality, thanks for the music and experience!

Santi is such a lovely host, felt like living in a cool shared flat back in the days. It was perfect to get local flavour and a host with an interesting personal history. His welcome drinks on his beautiful terrace were awesome. Thank you for letting us stay. :)))

Santi est un personnage qui vaut la peine d’être connu!
Très accueillant, extrêmement attentionné et bienveillant.
Il a de très bonnes adresses et les partages aisément.
Super séjour à Madrid et chez Santi, on recommande à 200%!!
Santi is a top tier host. Super friendly, nice music and has some great stories. The room is also super comfortable.

We spent a week at Santis appartment in Madrid and it is a wonderful place. Well located, you can do a lot of sightseing by walking around or - if you're feet are aching - take the metro home. Lot of nice stores and bars in the neighbarhood.
We did enjoy the great roofterrasse, wonderful view to the mountains and sunset.
Santi will live with you so you share kitchen, bathroom and livingroom. It was no problem at all. And he is helpfull with tipps what to see or where to go for a glas.

Nous avons passé 4 jours très agréables, Santi nous a très bien accueilli ! C’est quelqu’un de très humains avec qui on peut parler pendant des heures !! Très attentionné il fera tout pour satisfaire les gens qu’il accueille. L’appartement est super et proche de tout ( tout se fait en marchant ) un grand merci à Santi !!!

Ich hatte einen großartigen Aufenthalt bei Santi in Madrid! Die Wohnung ist genauso wie auf den Fotos – sauber, gemütlich und mit allem ausgestattet, was man braucht. Die Lage ist super: zentral, aber trotzdem ruhig genug zum Entspannen. Besonders hervorheben möchte ich Santis Gastfreundschaft – er war immer erreichbar, hat tolle Tipps für Restaurants und Sehenswürdigkeiten gegeben und den Check-in/Check-out völlig unkompliziert gestaltet. Ich würde jederzeit wiederkommen. Klare Empfehlung!
Hôte sympathique et serviable. Tout était très propre. Joli quartier proche du centre, bien animé, restaurants à proximité.
Great stay in Madrid! In a neighborhood with lots to do around it, and also close to metro. Santi was a fun host and gave good music and local recommendations!

The perfect place for our stay in Madrid! Santi was a wonderful host, welcoming, and very generous. He even greeted us with homemade olives and beer on his beautiful terrace. The apartment looked just like the photos, and the neighborhood was vibrant, full of charm, and perfect for walking around.

Logement plein de charme, doté d’une belle terrasse avec une vue très agréable et le chant des oiseaux de ville, au cœur de Madrid, calme tout en étant au-dessus d’une place animée. Santi est un hôte disponible et arrangeant.

Santi is a colorful person and a gracious host! I had a great conversation with him upon arriving at his place, when he generously greeted me with beer and many snacks. Santi was very flexible with my check-in time (I had a delay in my arrival), which I greatly appreciated. He also sent some nearby recommendations for restaurants and things to do, and I loved the localness of these recs. And he let me do laundry for free, which I really really needed!! I enjoyed hearing about his love for music, his travels, and his life.
The location could not be beat, a ~15-20 minute walk to every attraction I wanted to go to, and a 6 min walk to the nearest metro station, so getting there from the nearest train station was easy. Yet, it was fairly quiet at night.
The place itself looks just like the pictures -- gorgeous rooftop with lush plants, lots of art. There is no AC, but the ceiling fan in the room was sufficient for staying comfortable (at least for me).
Coolest host and beautiful apartment, thanks for everything Santi, see you soon!!

Henrietta and Sebastian are very kind and helpful people. We really enjoyed staying with them. The location of their apartment is ideal. Right at the centre of Atocha, it is in a lively neighbourhood and is walking distance to the main attractions of Madrid, abundant food and shopping options around. The apartment is very large and has a lot of character. It is a very enjoyable place and the breakfasts Henrietta
prepared for us were great: excellent croissants, delicious pain au chocolat, tostada de jamon, etc.

We had one room and our own private bathroom which is pretty large and classic (not en suite though, so on the way to the bathroom you may be accompanied by a cat or two!). We could also use the kitchen and common areas. As for privacy, the apartment has two entrances, one being right at the end of the apartment, next to our room and basically only used by us.

Henrietta was very welcoming and made us feel at home. She had lots of helpful local knowledge to share and we had great chats about lots of things. The room is small but comfortable and quiet, you can't hear any street noise. The apartment is central to everything and was very easy to find. It is in a beautiful building.

Hennie and Mary Schoeman from Cape Town South Africa stayed with Henrietta in September 2011. Her advertisement and photos are spot on! It is a beautiful old building and very well situated to visit all the main attractions in Madrid. The apartment has a lot of character and charm. The bedroom is small but comfy and we had a beautiful bathroom. Henrietta also left us coffee, tea and a kettle in the room for our own use. Henrietta was very friendly and gave us a warm welcome. She took us on a tour of her home and showed us where to find everything. Henrietta served us a continental breakfast each morning and lovely percolated coffee.
We really enjoyed staying with her. We would certainly recommend the Converted theatre in the historic centre.

We stayed 5 days in Henriettas apartment. The location is top, Prado, Plaza Mayor, Puerta del Sol etc. within walking distance. The apartment is very nice, on one side is the small bedroom, facing an inner courtyard, on the other side of the flat is the large living room, inbetween the beautiful old style bathroom. We had a pleasant stay, tasty breakfasts and interesting chats with Henrietta, who knows Madrid very well. Don’t miss the "Lateral” at nearby Plaza Santa Ana with a lot of excellent tapas (one of her recommendations). Thank you Henrietta for sharing your apartment with us!

Henrietta was a great host, she serves fantastic breakfast. The bathroom was spacious and there was hot shower. The location was close to all the sightseeing and just 5 mins walk to plaza mayor. Definitely recommend to all.
Extremely nice host, that really took good care of us. The place is amazing. The bed room is not that big, but in addition to the room you have access to your own living room.

Henrietta was an awesome host!  Her place had a lot of character as you might be able to tell from the pictures!  She was an incredible resource and she truly made our trip enjoyable!  The room in the flat was a little cozy at times for my sister and me, but very quiet and comfortable!  She went above and beyond to make sure we felt at home!  Thanks Henrietta!

Henrietta was a gracious host - very warm and inviting into her home.  We had quite lively conversation with our morning breakfast that was most enjoyable. Her location was  good for walking distance to wherever we wanted to go and the metro was also close by, when needed. We definitely recommend her as a host!

We were thrilled with the character of this building. It's really charming. The location is central, and Henrietta is dedicated to helping her guests make the most of their time. Armed with plenty of advice, information and encouragement, we set off to explore the fantastic plazas, markets, museums etc. both nearby and further afield. Our time spent inside the historic building was also enjoyable, and the perfect cultural icing on the cake.

We had a wonderful weekend at Henrietta's appartment. The location is perfect to explore Madrid on foot and the appartment itself is astonishingly huge and beautiful. We had enough privacy and separate bathroom while having an opportunity to share the table at breakfasts (prepared by Henrietta!) and have nice chats over a cup of coffee.
Thank you very much!

Pros: The location is perfect to see everything. I felt very safe sleeping here. (I'm a girl). The breakfast was yummy. The 2 cats have personality and are fun. The host is great, conscientious and very helpful. The theater stairs are beautiful. Was neat to see what living in a large apartment in Spain would be like. Price point was good.

Cons: Room was on the smallish side, as was the bed. Bathroom is removed from bedroom so less privacy. One time the host had a lunch get together, and I didn't want to intrude, so didn't use the bathroom or get water to drink. If you stay, remember to bring your own shampoo/body soaps -- I forgot to bring.

Overall: Recommended. Had a good experience.

We stayed at Henrietta's appartment for 4 nights and had a blast. It's an amazing house with beautiful old features and a very homy yet luxury feel. The bed is not too big, but very comfortable and there's enough space in the bedroomcloset to put your clothes. We could use the 'drawing-room' and kitchen area to relax, but honestly we were outside most of the time. The most beautiful parts of Madrid are all within walking distance!
Henrietta is very kind and helpful too. Definitely recommend this place.

How can I put this simply? If you come to Madrid and stay anywhere else, you are really missing a magical experience!

From the time we first booked, Henrietta was in contact and provided us with a very calming and comprehensive guide to reaching the apartment - something that means so much in a new city.

My travel partner and I adored the apartment and staying with Henrietta in her home and would stay there again without a moment's hesitation!
Even the stairs to the apartment were not noticeable because we were so enchanted by this building!

Our bedroom, bathroom and lounge were comfortable and larger than anticipated. The bed was comfortable and the wardrobe space more than adequate for two women with large suitcases. The lounge was also a lovely space and is perfect for people who need a restful afternoon before a big evening.

Henrietta presented delicious coffee and pastries for breakfast, which we so greatly appreciated, along with the wonderful conversation and hot tips on cool places to visit in Madrid... which we loved!

Henrietta was also very nice about us coming home 'on Spanish time' of an evening and we even had our own entrance, which made us more comfortable to come home as we pleased. Moreover, since Henrietta knew I was allergic to her two cats, she went the extra mile to ensure there were no cat hairs about and kept all the doors shut. As it was, the house was so clean I had no problems with this.

The location was SO good, that we only bought 1 Metro ticket each, just so we could say we went on it... but for our entire stay we were able to walk to everywhere that really mattered - this was fantastic.

Madrid was a highlight of our trip thanks to Henrietta and her theatre apartment. I have recommended this place to all my friends and family and of course, recommend it to you.

Henrietta is an excellent host. She responded very quickly and even when we had to change our schedule at the last minute, she was very accomodating.

The house itself is great, very spacious and with more than enough privacy. It used to be an old theatre, which gives it a very nice touch. The location is amazing, everything is walking distance, all the large museums, the nice little shops, quite a few parks, everything you would want from the city. Henrietta was able to give us some very helpful tips to get us properly started. We had a really great time, thank you Henrietta!

Danielle and I had a wonderful time in Madrid and staying at Henrietta's amazing, labyrinthine apartment was a big part of that. The central location allowed us to walk everywhere and the back door meant that we could return late without disturbing Henrietta and her son. We enjoyed Henrietta's company and if we'd had more time would have liked to have hung out with her more.

We had a great stay in this appartment in Madrid. The house was beautiful and characteristic and at a perfect location, we didn't have to use the metro once. The room was a bit small, though we didnt have problems with that as we were barely in the house. Bed was comfortable. Henriette was a perfect host and provided us with a nice breakfast every day. In short, really recommended!

I will recommend anyone going to Madrid to stay with Henrietta. The place is central, but quiet. You have your own bathroom and sitting room.
You have a separate entrance for late at night. Henrietta goes especially to the baker's for you every morning! She is available whenever needed and pleasing. The bedroom looks bigger in the picture than in reality but it's still comfortable enough as well as the bed. One of the cats is quite chatty :-) We were very pleased with our stay.
Henrietta is very nice.  Her home is roomy and in a great location.
Henrietta is pleasant and helpful.  Her home is in a great location!  Plenty of elbow room and privacy.

What a great way to experience Madrid! A really classy apartment in the old section of town, just minutes away from the Plaza Mayor, the Puerta del Sol, and some of the best restaurants and tapas bars in the city.

Without doubt a most warm and endearing host with the ability to make you feel as though you knew each other for ages. Gorgeous mascots in Hato and WiFi added that, 'WELCOME back HOME' feel and, makes the best pots of tea. Henrietta knew the answer to all our questions regarding Madrid. What, when, where and how, as well as how much to pay for things. Nothing was too much for her. She even assisted with travel arrangements and purchasing of air tickets via internet. Location is great, really great. Absolutley recomended...

Henrietta Fielden has a very pleasant apartment close to the Plaza Mayor in Madrid  - an easy walk to the city's major attractions.  She was very welcoming and helpful. Guests have access to a pleasant and ample sitting room and a large,private bathroom.  Guests are sharing her apartment with Henrietta, but she is easy going and a pleasant host.
exceptional location close to everything, in a luxury building, quiet, protected from heat. Very good pastries. Hostess very friendly.

This room has 3 positive points. 1st the location : you are in the city center   at a walking distance of every place of interest (5min from puerta del sol). The next nice aspect is Henrietta. She will give you all the advices you need, she will prepare a really good breakfast for you every day. And to finish with, you have a clean room, a clean bathroom and even a small living room. So, we recommended it !

Que du plaisir ! Un magnifique séjour facilité par Soraya et son habitation. Parfaitement placé, au coeur de Madrid et aux portes de la plus belle place de la ville, appartement fonctionnel, propre et avec une terrasse a couper le souffle !
Merci à Soraya pour sa disponibilité et d'avoir fait au mieux pour nous arranger lors de notre arrivée tardive et départ en décalé. Merci ! Je recommande +++

Soraya’s apartment is in a great location next to Plaza Mayor. Lots of little shops, restaurants within a short walk. The rooftop patio is a very nice extra! Patio is spacious with seating and lounge area.
I do think the apartment itself would be small for 4 people. The second bed is the sofa bed in the living/common area which is also the kitchen area and the only bathroom is right in the same space. I was there with my daughter so it was perfect for the two of us.
Also the stairs are tight so if you have any physical limitations it would be difficult.
A lovely apartment in the heart of Madrid.  Has everything you need and a fantastic roof patio.

Very central…a 15-20 min walk to the Prada.   A cozy unit but used for sleeping only.  Soraya is there to assist with move in; for me solo traveler at the time, a big help!   Nespresso unit nice for morning coffee on patio👍
Good location, but the Wi-Fi is not very stable

Perfect location close to Plaza Mayor and within walking distance of all the top sightseeing stops in Madrid! The apartment was beautiful and exactly as shown in the posting, and the private terrace was even better than expected! Soraya is a great host and I highly recommend staying here if you’re looking for somewhere central in Madrid!!

The apartment is clean, well equipped and has a large and beautiful terrace. The central location near the Plaza Mayor is an ideal location to explore the city. Madrid is lively and has a nightlife to match, so don't be sensitive to noise.

Fab location, wonderful balcony where you felt you were soaking up the Madrid atmosphere. The flat was clean, access was sooo easy and also easy access to local bars, shops and restaurants. Would love to have had a longer stay....

Soraya's apartment is cozy, clean and in a central location surrounded by charming streets and cafes. Its best feature is its spacious and sunny roof deck, which is a wonderful place to have a coffee or glass of wine and watch the bustle on the streets below. Soraya is a gracious and helpful host. Highly recommended!

This is a gem of a flat—as centrally located as possible with a very nice patio to enjoy, especially for a morning coffee or a night cap. It was perfect for our few days in Madrid and would look to return to this flat on a future visit. Can’t recommend it enough

Un appartement idéal : propre, fonctionnel et super bien placé ! Et que dire de la terrasse privee ?! Waouuuhhh ! Elle est juste impressionnante ! Surtout pour ce prix…
Mention très spéciale pour la douche extérieure bien pratique tant il fait chaud à Madrid…

This apartment was the perfect place for two people to stay in Madrid. It has everything you need for a comfortable visit, including a comfy bed, a little kitchen, a nice shower, and a beautiful terrace. It is in a perfect location, surrounded by many restaurants and right near one of Madrid’s many historical landmarks, the Plaza Mayor. Soraya was extremely friendly, helpful, and communicative throughout our stay.

I have stayed at numerous AB&B’s in Madrid, and Soraya’s was perfect and the best. I needed a ‘central home base’ and this looks down on an entrance to Plaza Mayor. It is in the middle of a very touristy area, but you can quickly walk to everything and get to more ‘locals’ areas. It’s the best of both worlds. I highly recommend it, but you’ll have to beat me to it: I’ll definitely book here again.
Ohh…. the balcony!!!! Being able to start the day with a coffee outside or finish the day with a glass of wine and just people watch… PERFECT!
Perfect!! Best place ever in Madrid!
Amazing place and excellent location!
Super!
Soraya is a great host. You just can’t beat this location. Amazing views.

We had an excellent stay! The apartment is exactly as described and the location is amazing - we were able to walk everywhere. The rooftop terrace was so nice to have. This is the place you want to stay!

Soraya’s place was everything she said it was! Great location, fabulous rooftop, elevator up, and working wifi! There was access to quite a few metro stops but walkable to so much too. The space & elevator are fairly small, but it was just my sister and I being out all day and on the rooftop at night so it wasn’t at all an issue. This is a great spot.
Great location and very convenient for everything. Warm and helpful host for handling check in and any issues.

simplemente espectacular… Soraya no puede haber sido mejor host. charming, caring, nos permitió check inn a su hermoso piso en cuanto llegamos del aeropuerto… icing over the cake, Mimas Creperias… omgggg amazing
Great location and everywhere in the city was accessible! Apartment was exactly as pictured and Soraya was a wonderful host.

This unit is wonderful! As described, it is very small, but the beautiful private deck makes the space perfect for two. As others noted, the wifi is a little spotty. Madrid was very hot during our stay and the A/C kept the apartment very comfortable. Location cannot be beat and Soraya's cafe next door, Mimi's, has the best breakfast in the area.

The most perfectly located apartment to stay in central Madrid, the apartment is clean and comfortable and has everything we needed, and the rooftop terrace was just AMAZING. Can’t recommend highly enough in every possible way.

My friend and I really enjoyed Soraya's Airbnb! It's in a great location, is very clean, and just the right size. We were in Madrid recently for the heat wave and we were so thankful for the two AC units (one in each room) which worked wonderfully. Bed was very comfortable, and the most comfortable of all 3 places we stayed during our Spain/Portugal trip. The Airbnb was appointed with plenty of everything. Bathroom, shower, TV, etc all worked great. The patio was lovely in the AM and late evening hours. We also REALLY appreciated that we could drop our luggage off at her nearby cafe before check in. We arrived very early AM and promptly dropped our bags off when they opened at 9. We did the same for check out as our flight wasn't until later in the evening. The staff was very nice about this and accommodated us even though they were fairly busy. Speaking of the cafe, we highly recommend checking it out for breakfast! Great food at great prices!
Brilliant apartment, roof terrace is superb.
This Airbnb was so nice! The balcony was great and it was in a really good location.

If you're thinking of renting this, just do it. Amazing location in the heart of Madrid, and close to the metro. An incredible private terrace and an elevator up to the floor your apartment is on. Located next to great restaurants, including an excellent crêperie - we went there for breakfast every day we were in Madrid. When we return to Madrid, Soraya's will be the first place we look to rent.
Great place for a single person or couple! The deck was beautiful and worth it, however I wish the deck lights worked so we were able to enjoy it at night. Overall, great!

Our stay here was great!  Soraya and her husband own a lovely creperie and cafe right as you walk out the door.  The Plaza Mayor location is centrally located to everything we wanted to see by foot.  It's a cozy size, but if you make use of the terrace it gives you plenty of space to spread out and enjoy the picturesque view.  All appliances were well functioning, and bedding was comfy.  Highly recommend!
The best air bnb I’ve ever stayed at! Beautiful space, the terrace is truly the best and the location is perfect. Couldn’t recommend enough!
What a wonderful apartment! So clean, tidy, great views and in a superb location. 10/10 would recommend! Soraya was a fabulous host and made everything a breeze.
A great apartment in the perfect location to explore Madrid. Hope to be back soon :)

Posizione, pulizia e comunicazione ottimi! Soraya ed il marito sono disponibili e molto gentili.
Appartamento comodo con possibilità di visitare Madrid a piedi avendo attrazioni storiche e non molto vicine.
Terrazza ampia per mangiare e rilassarsi.
Possibilità di lasciare le valigie nell’attività di Soraya proprio vicino all’appartamento (con personale molto gentile e crêpes davvero squisite).
Se dovessimo tornare a Madrid, sicuramente alloggeremo qui! :)
just perfect, great location, quiet at night, amazing views from the terrace, everything wonderful!

Soraya's place was amazing. simple, and very clean. barely started inside the unit because the balcony was so perfect (space, temperature, view).
the unit was minutes from plaza Mayor and minutes to any type of food/drink you could want.
soraya's communication was also very print, detailed, clear and concise.
Nice place, convenient location, pretty small but great value!
This stay is in the PERFECT location. Small but cozy, it was the perfect place just a few steps away from the Plaza Mayor. Would stay again.
Great location! Awesome rooftop terrace!

Wow! Soraya’s apartment is amazing! The view is stunning, the neighborhood is buzzing. There’s nothing negative to say about it! Our favorite part was sitting on the balcony listening to the music and people below.
Soraya's place is the perfect location for a trip to Madrid. Situated in the middle of everything and with a fantastic roof terrace to rest and relax. Highly recommended.

Das Appartment ist einfach wunderbar, sauber, hochwertig ausgestattet mit einem kleinen Schlafzimmer mit einem sehr gemütlichen Bett und einem Wohnraum mit kleiner Küchenzeile mit einem breiten und bequemen Schlafsofa. Aus jedem Fenster hat man herrliche Blicke, die Klappladen erlauben es, gut zu schlafen. Mit dem Aufzug kommt man bis fast ganz nach oben und hat dann nur noch ein paar Stufen. Wir waren verliebt in den Blick von der Dachterasse. Man schaut direkt auf eines der Tore zum Playa Mayor. Das Bad ist klein aber hochwertig ausgestattet, die Dusche sehr angenehm mit gutem Wasserdruck. Es gibt sogar ein Bügelbrett und Bügeleisen, auf der Dachterasse versteckt eine Waschmaschine und eine Aussendusche. Wir haben in Mimis Creperie morgens wunderbar gefrühstückt und konnten unser Gepäck am Abreisetag dort lassen. Auch der Checkin bis 12:00 Uhr war sehr angenehm.

Great airbnb, perfect location! The airbnb is small but perfect for 2 people and we spent all our time at the airbnb outside on the balcony (reading, eating, people watching). There is an elevator (it is the size of a phone booth) it works great but if you are like me and claustrophobic then you will be going up and down 4 flights of stairs (I didn’t mind, it was great for burning off the sangria, gelato and tapas). There is a great restaurant just below for dinner but also Mimi’s it just to the left and the breakfast is absolutely to die for (we got ours to go and ate on the balcony of the airbnb). Everything in the airbnb worked great, was spotless and comfortable.
We couldn't have loved our time in Madrid and at this AirBnB more! The location is fantastic, the deck is unparalleled, check-in was easy & overall it really made our stay incredible. Thank you!
Soraya's place is exactly as presented. Lovely apartment and has everything you need. Close to all areas and we didn't even need public transport. Will definitely come back if ever in Madrid.

This place is as great as everyone says! Perfect location, great outdoor space, clean and surprisingly quiet at night. It is a very compact space but the wonderful balcony gives you plenty of room to relax, and also dry your clothes.
In addition this is a great value, and communication/check-in with Soraya was fast and easy.
We would love to return to Madrid and stay here again!

I loved this apartment and fully enjoyed my 2 week stay. The view from the balcony is marvelous - not just the people-watching but the architecture and design of the surrounding buildings.  There were a few communication issues that made check-in a bit difficult, but a lot of this was my mobile service that seemed not to have the capabilities my provider had promised. But Milan, Soraya's son, found me in the square (amazing!) and stored my luggage while I explored the neighborhood prior to check-in time.  I highly recommend this apartment for the convenience of the location, the comfortable bed, and that oh-so-wonderful balcony!
Super clean and well equipped small rooftop apartment right outside Plaza Mayor. The absolute gem is the large and sunny terrace which was invaluable. Apartment and host is Highly recommended!
Absolutely amazing air BnB. Feel lucky to have stayed here. Location is probably second to none
Great location. Great terrace. If it’s available book it.
Incredible location with an outstanding view on a large deck; one can drink in the Plaza Mayor from there.  Highly recommended.
This is a super great place to stay.  We thoroughly enjoyed our visit.  Such a wonderful spot located in the heart of the town.
Great location and perfect accommodation for a couple in Madrid.  The balcony was great for taking in the local chatter below and city atmosphere.  I highly recommend!
Location was amazing! Close to everything. Terrace was perfect. Had everything we needed for our stay in Madrid.
The location and view from the deck is amazing!

A lovely apartment, very centrally located. Even though it was early November we made use of the Roof terrace, perfect for an afternoon siesta or to watch the sun go down. The apartment is small but perfect for our needs. Comfy bed, fab shower and clean fresh linen.
Lots to do and see nearby. Very close to art galleries, restaurants, bars and the palace. We tried out a few of the restaurant suggestions on Soraya's very handy guide. There is no need to cook.
Look forward to coming back again.

Hands down, this is one of the nicest airbnbs I've ever stayed in - certainly the most unique. Fantastic location, very comfortable bed, lovely sheets, nice touches throughout... clean, cosy apartment perfect for the single traveller or a couple on their honeymoon :-)  The pièce de résistance is the balcony/terrace which places you right in the heart of beautiful Madrid, able to soak up the atmosphere, sights, smells all right off Plaza Mayor. Wonderful communication and assistance from Soraya and her helpers. A memorable experience.
The place was great, the host was very responsive, and the location was great.  The WiFi was hit or miss so if you have to have WiFi it could be a little bit of a problem. Loved the place.

Great location and everything was clean and as described/pictured. Easy to find and Soraya was responsive to the few questions we had. The only thing to note was the noise outside from staying so close to Plaza Mayor, bring earplugs and it is fine. We'll look for a time to come back in the spring to take full advantage of the view from the beautiful deck!
Very central, next to markets and restaurants galore.  Accommodation is just as advertised.  Cozy and modern as well.
Je vous conseille l'endroit, excellent il n'y a pas de mots pour décrire notre plaisir à profiter de l'appartement

Appartement très agréable et idéalement situé, proche de la Plaza Mayor, de la Puerta del Sol et à quelques minutes de du Palais royal.
L'hôte est extrêmement réactif et précis dans chacune des demandes.
Je recommande fortement.

You cannot beat the location! It's in the heart of Plaza Mayor, all walking distance to restaurants and shops. Although it rained throughout our stay, the view from the patio/balcony was still amazing. It was definitely worth it!
Thank you, Soraya and Milan, for making our stay a memorable one. It was a pleasure to stay in your place!
Fantastic location and very walkable to popular sightseeing locations.  Milan was very responsive and helpful.  We enjoyed our stay!

The place is super clean, cozy and comfortable. The attention to detail is perfect and the roof top patio is so relaxing, well designed and has an amazing view. Everything was perfect and the hosts are very friendly- highly recommend!
Amazing centralized location, walkable to all the major centro sites and restaurants, bars, cafes, and of course the owner’s creperie, Mimi’s, directly below on the street.
Amazing place, very central and great for walking. Will stay here again

We felt lucky to be in this location and beautiful apartment with patio. When we arrived, the friendly staff at Mimi's called Soraya, and within five mins, her son Milan was there to help us checkin! He is very informative and kind.
The elevator was spacious enough for 2 people + luggage, so a convenient feature for checkin and checkout day. Otherwise, we choose to use the stairs during our stay, they were wide enough and well-lit. Felt very safe coming home at all times, and again, loved the space!
I also definitely recommend the crepes at Mimis! (Adjacent to Condo!)

Seriously just book this stay! The best location in Madrid with a private terrace, for real just beautiful. This is right next to Plaza Mayor and close to main attractions. You’re view from the apartment is unreal and very private. If you struggle with stairs I would not book this, there is an elevator up 3 stories but you have to walk up one more circular level of stairs. Definitely worth it but just a disclaimer!
The best location easy access to everything including great restaurants and bars.

El apartamento está muy bien, mejor que en las fotos. La situación es inmejorable, está situado en un lugar muy céntrico pero está bien aislado y no se oye el ruido de fuera desde dentro del apartamento. Es pequeñito pero tiene todo lo necesario.  La terraza es fantástica. Los anfitriones tienen detalles como mantas, champús, paraguas,  aceite, etc. que hacen más fácil la estancia. Puedes dejar tu equipaje en un espacio habilitado muy cerca del apartamento antes del check-in y después del check-out.
L’appartamento di Soraya si trova in pieno centro, a pochi metri da Piazza Mayor. Nonostante ciò è silenzioso e si dorme benissimo. Il terrazzo è fantastico.
lovely terrace and very compact but we'll designed and comfortable apartment perfect for a couple right in the heart of the city. Great shops and restaurants outside the door.

Perfect location on Plaza Mayor. The rooftop terrace was fabulous for relaxing between adventures. The bed was comfortable, and the apartment was clean. Convenient that the owner owns the restaurant right next-door. Staff was able to help me when I didn’t receive instructions to enter. I would stay here again, highly recommend.

L’appartement de Soraya est très bien situé: à deux pas de l’animation de la Plaza de Mayor mais très calme. La terrasse est fantastique, un petit havre de paix en plein cœur de Madrid. Le logement est bien équipé, confortable et propre. En dehors de l’absence d’eau chaude le 1er matin qui nous a valu une douche revivifiante, mais qui a été vite résolue, tout était parfait!

Lovely apartment in just the perfect location to enjoy Madrid. The terrace is wonderful
with great views of classic Madrid.

The place was easy to find. Although a bit smaller than anticipated, we enjoyed our stay and the balcony. We arrived a bit earlier than expected, and were able to leave our luggage in the sweet shop across the way (owned by host). When it was time to check-in, we got our luggage, picked up our keys and enjoyed our stay. Thank you!
Coolest place I’ve ever stayed!

Soraya’s apartment is very well located in Madrid and provides a very nice view from its terrace. Even if it’s close to plaza Mayor, the isolation is good and we weren’t bothered at all by any noise. Very enjoyable for a short stay in Madrid

I’ve been traveling around Europe for a couple of months and this was by far the best place of the trip so far. The proximity to Plaza Mayor was amazing. The food and the sights were all a short walk away…it truly doesn’t get better!

My daughter and I had a wonderful short stay here. Milan, Soraya's son, was very helpful and responsive with any questions I had and with letting us into the apartment at check in. It was very easy to store luggage at their creperie before check-in time. The apartment is just as described and the terrace is a real bonus! Even with cooler temperatures in March, we enjoyed using the lounge chairs when the sun came out! The central location in Madrid can't be beat! Highly recommend!
Good location, responsive host
Beautiful place we are sad to have missed!

Had a great stay. Amazing location. Right in the heart of old Madrid. Lots of bars and restaurants on the doorstep. Great terrace which catches the sun. Lovely noise of activity on the terrace. Beautiful.
Great stay! Perfect view for relaxing. Wonderful location. Super helpful hosts.

I hate walking. Soraya’s place was the perfecr spot for me. Go out get some churros at san gines. Come back. Rest. Go to Botin have some roasted pig. Come back. Rest. Have some tapas at casa toni. Come back Rest. Sight seeing at retiro park or palacio real de madrid. Come back. Rest. Highly recommend.

Milan’s place was very accessible to Plaza Mayor, great restaurants and Atocha train station. Having an elevator was very helpful. The terrace was beautiful and spacious. The bathroom was modern and clean with a nice shower head. Beds were comfortable and clean. Milan was friendly and easy to communicate with. It was everything we needed, and we would happily stay there again!

What a fantastic stay! The accommodations were perfect, the location was A+, the terrace was a dream! Be sure and stop by for a crepe they were delish and the aesthetic was so lovely. Could ask for nothing more!
Mary and Ken
Amazing place right in the heart of all the action ! 5/5 Highly recommended! :)

Had a great time here, clean and peaceful with great views. We had small issues with the Wi-Fi at times but other than that everything was good. I would definitely return again on a future stay in Madrid. Thank you Soraya and Milan.

Our stay at Soraya's rooftop apartment was lovely. We enjoyed the location, and the privacy of the rooftop apartment and patio! The sounds coming from the street were charming during the day. At night the area is active but it's not too loud with the windows and door closed.
Milan greeted us for check in and helped us to make sure our delayed luggage was delivered to a safe place while we were out.
Mimi's was so good we went back for a second day for breakfast. Many thanks for such a nice retreat in Madrid!

This airbnb is amazing! The location is the best and we enjoyed lounging at the rooftop. So many great restaurants within walking distance and Soraya and her team were so kind and got us checked in easily. Must stay spot in the heart of Madrid.

Soraya's apartment, while quite small, had everything one needs for a great stay in Madrid. The apartment is perfectly located to easily walk or take the metro to all of the main attractions in Madrid. Even though it is 100 steps to Plaza Mayor, the apartment
was very quiet at night. The large deck is fabulous. We had great weather during our stay and so spent a large amount of time there.
The apartment is perfect for a couple who wish to spend sometime exploring magical
Madrid. Our thanks to Soraya and her son Milan for making our stay so memorable.

Wow !
That is what you say when you get to the appartement, go up the stairs, and step out onto the terrace.
Wow !
The terrace is amazing, a special and unique place to take in the energy of Plaza Mayor.
Would definitely return.
Thank you 🙏
Charles

As others have said before, this place is wonderful! The view was unbeatable. It was such fun to watch the crowds go by from our private roof deck—we spent lots of time there. We walked all over the city, and it was great to come home and have a glass of wine on the deck. The apartment is small, but perfectly fine for a couple. The bed was comfy, there was plenty of hot water, and the water pressure was good. Definitely recommend!
Great place, well equipped. I will say there is quite a bit of street noice, so rather than sleep just join in the party. Over all it was a great stay and I would book again in a moment.

Great place! loved our time there and wished we had stayed longer! felt like this was a great location and easy to get to from.  we missed our train and ended up flying in super late but they were super accommodating.  the place was perfect for two people and I absolutely loved the rooftop patio.  thanks for letting us stay!
Soraya’s place was adorable and extremely well located. If you get a chance to book a stay here, just do it. It was amazing.

Amazing apartment - location is second to none, we were able to quickly walk to all the main sights and the metro in Sol connected to everywhere else. Was very easy to get to from the airport using the maps app on our phones and the train lines/metro.
It was very quiet with the shutters closed and the A/C worked very well for the brief time we needed it.
The outdoor space is amazing, we really enjoyed watching everyone walk on the street below us.
We were able to leave our luggage at the restaurant across the street when we arrived early.
The in unit washer was really handy and worked well. The shower got hot almost immediately and as a 6ft tall person I had no problem using it, which is unusual in my experience for airbnbs in Europe.
I don’t think I have any negatives about the apartment at all. It’s a really great value and we’ll be staying here again when we return to Madrid.
Thanks so much!
Amazing place to stay in Madrid with very friendly hosts! Thanks for the flexible check in.

Ik kom al een aantal jaren op deze plek en het is met stip DE plek om te verblijven!!
Alles verloopt vlot en de locatie is gewoonweg fantastisch!!
Ik hoop hier nog jaren te mogen komen!

Soraya and Milan's place exceeded our expectations! We loved sitting out on the spacious deck watching the crowds. Perched above the chaos we could choose to escape or immerse ourselves at any time. I'm an incredibly light sleeper so I was nervous about the noise at night but even over the holiday with the crowds and music outside we slept very well! The windows and doors are well insulated and the AC was heaven at night!

Henrietta's apartment was wonderful and in a fabulous area for walking everywhere. On her recommendation I had an amazing night at a Flamenco club, just one street away, and enjoyed several Tapas bars. She was very helpful but the privacy was also great. Sharing breakfast was a great way to begin each day before setting out. The streets and parks of Madrid were highlights and the people very friendly!

The bed was very comfortable, a fantastic big bath tub, pastries delicious for breakfast, authentic and very historic building and street.

We had a wonderful time with Henrietta and her two cats. Her apartment is beautiful, she has the energy of three people and was so helpful with places to see and where to eat. We were even invited to her Queen's Jubilee party and were able to meet her friends. The location is central to the city center and is very quiet.

What a wonderful apartment right in the centre of Madrid we only had to use the metro once to get over to the other side of the city otherwise we could walk everywhere. The apartment itself was lovely & having our own sitting room was a bonus that we really enjoyed after a busy day in Madrid. Henrietta was a great host too with lots of tips that we definitely took advantage of and I'll certainly be in touch again next time I'm in Madrid, I don't think we could have found a place to suit us more.
Lynda

How do you describe the perfect host in one word?  Thats easy,           Henrietta . From our unexpectedly early arrival to our disgustingly early morning departure ( 5:30am ) we were treated with her special brand of hospitality. Henrietta was keenly interested that our visit to Madrid was enjoyable.Located only 10 minutes walk from nearest metro (Anton Martin) or, 5min taxi from Attocha Station (central station) is very easy to reach. Her local knowledge of venues, places of interest to visit, eat etc is fantastic. The apartment which is massive, but beautifully decorated throughout is an absolute treat to stay in. If you visit Madrid we highly reccommend staying here. Thanks Henrietta for a fantastic stay.
Henrietta is the best hostess ever. Her  flat is beautiful & very centrally loxcated. Be aware though that there is no AC & it is hot in Madrid in the summer.

A wonderful week-end in Madrid. Henrietta has a wonderful apartment in the very center. Everything is at a walking distance from the flat !
We highly recommend it.

I had the most wonderful stay at Henrietta's place for about a week during the course of my holidays. The flat is vast and beautiful and my room was so comfortable. Atocha street, which is one of the most active streets is just downstairs. Many of the city attractions are just a few minutes walk away. Most importantly, I had my Spanish lessons at Tilde, which is just at the ground floor of the same building. Henrietta is a wonderful person and she spared no effort with providing assistance.

Estar en casa de Henrietta, es estar en el centro cultural y social de Madrid, con la ventaja de disfrutar de una casa maravillosa. Un edificio que es una auténtica obra de arte y un piso enorme, de techos altos y grandes ventanas, con una decoración exquisita. La habitación es interior, con lo cual es tranquilísima, y el baño es de ensueño. Es como un viaje en el tiempo, con una bañera del siglo pasado. A Henrietta no se le escapa ningún detalle, incluido un desayuno al más puro estilo inglés, en el que no falta de nada, y compartiendo conversaciones estupendas para comenzar el día. Muy muy recomendable!!!! Eso si, si no tenéis alergia a sus preciosos gatos!!

Amazing Place at a great location.
Seperate entrance door for late nights. Spacious and clean.

We had a really good time. Host was great with lots of information.

Some days we could not wait to get back to the apartment to play with the 2 most friendliest cats in the world. HATO and WIFI.

Everything as advertised.
Would stay here again and again.

Thanks Henrieta.
Wonderful hostess; fun, lively and very helpful about places to go and things to do. Great breakfasts, lovely sitting room and wonderful fixtures in the bathroom. Plus 2 very entertaining cats!

Bonjour,

Un petit peu par choix et surtout parce que'Henrietta nous l'a demandé, je vais écrire en Français !

C'était une expérience géniale à tous points de vue :
- l'appartement d'Henrietta est parfaitement situé, nosua vons réalisé tout notre séjour à pieds, un bonheur !
- tout est vraiment bien pensé pour que tout le monde se sente à l'aise
- Henrietta prépare des petits-déjeuners parfaits et peut discuter de tout !
- nous avons adoré ses conseils et ses recommandations, elel connaît parfaitement sa ville

je vous la recommande vivement !
notre prochain voyage à madrid ne se fera que chez Henrietta ! c'est certain

merci encore à elle

Mathieu et Marie

I really enjoyed staying in Henrietta's apartment. She is a wonderful host. In addition to being helpful and attentive, she is also very friendly, but respectful of peoples' boundaries.
The location of the apartment is very convenient – I was able to walk everywhere.
I will definitely stay in Henrietta’s place when I travel to Madrid in the future.
Teresa

Our host was away on business but had made arrangements for us to be looked after by a friendly house sitter who did an excellent job and made us feel most welcome.

This spacious and elegantly furnished flat will delight any visitor, with its lovely original features and quaint (though perfectly functional) plumbing and electrical fittings. We loved it and also found it a most convenient base from which to see the sights of Madrid, many of which are within easy walking distance.

The bed is comfortable, the room is quiet and the breakfast generous. Wifi worked to perfection. Although we didn't make use of it during our 2-day visit, I'm sure many would find the guest sitting room an attractive feature.

We have no hesitation in recommending this bnb and thank Henrietta and Helen for helping to make our stay a success.

Io e il mio ragazzo abbiamo trascorso una splendida vacanza a Madrid e questo è stato possibile anche grazie all'ospitalità di Henrietta, La casa è grandissima, ubicata in un bellissimo palazzo storico, e la stanza è molto accogliente. La vera sorpresa è stata Henrietta, una padrona di casa sempre gentile e disponibile ( e simpaticissima!), ogni mattina ci comprava delle paste fresche (strepitose) dalla bakery sotto casa. Per di più l'appartamento è ubicato nel pieno centro di Madrid, a pochi minuti dalle più belle piazze e musei (la metro non l'abbiamo quasi mai usata!).
Sicuramente il soggiorno con Henrietta ha dato un valore aggiunto alla nostra vacanza, e sicuramente ci torneremo in una futura vacanza a Madrid!
Grazie ancora Henrietta per la tua disponibilità!
Ps: A fare compagnia ad Henrietta ci sono due dolcissimi gattini, Hatto e Wifi, giocherelloni e amichevoli!

It was a pleasure to stay in henrietta's house.
The building has a great architecture and Henrietta is a caring host. The breakfasts are good and the attitude has been fantastic.
I would suggest to perhaps consider a longer bed to accommodate tall guests.

It's hard to add anything to the previous reviews. Henrietta's flat is in the middle of everything and within walking distance of all attractions, restaurants and cafes. The flat itself is very interesting decorated in a stylish manner. You get a big living room for yourself, a spacious bathroom, and a nice and quiet bedroom in the back of the building. And if you're not an early bird Henrietta will provide you with fresh pastries from the local baker for breakfast. We wish we had more time, and would like to come back.

We stayed for 6 days in Henrietta's  lovely apartment in central Madrid. Henrietta is an excellent host & went out of her way to organise Pilates classes for us. The apartment was huge & our space adequate as shown in the photos. The location is fabulous. All in all, good value.

Location, location, location!  Being within walking distance of all of the major attractions in Madrid was extraordinary enough; however Henrietta was also a wonderful host, fluent in Spanish and extremely knowledgeable about restaurants and other events.  We shall always remember our stay with fond memories.

Henrietta was very helpful about places to go and things to do in Madrid.  Her apartment is beautiful, loved the entrance and stairway!   It is also very centrally located and convenient, within walking distance of the major museums.   She has a lovely sitting room and beautiful, private guest bathroom where you can shower or soak in the huge, deep tub!

Henrietta's apartment was in a great location in Madrid, walking distance to all Madrid attractions. Henrietta was very helpful and friendly. The apartment was very clean with a very spacious sitting room to relax in after a hard day's walking around Madrid streets.

Very nice place and splendid host!
A pedido de Henrietta, escrevo em português. Agradecemos a estadia em um imóvel muito bonito e bem localizado. A anfitriã nos recebeu muito bem, sua casa é muito organizada e limpa e os gatos são carinhosos e fáceis de lidar. Graças a eles, Salimar está seriamente pensando em criarmos um!
O café-da-manhã era delicioso e acompanhado de animadas conversas sobre atualidades e até usinas hidrelétricas!
Ficamos muito à vontade e a localização é sensacional, a 200m de uma estação de metrô (Tirso de Molina) e a 500m da Porta do Sol.
Henrietta, muito agradável e uma entusiasta das línguas, fez questão de aprender algumas palavras em Português e falava um espanhol muito claro. Excelente para viajantes de diversas nacionalidades. Seu filho, Sebastian, foi muito educado.

Dear Henrietta, thank you again for our time in Madrid!
Obrigado!

Oh my!  What a wonderful entree to Madrid, both in terms of our host Henrietta and her fabulous apartment.  The apartment is really well located, great food all around, party time on the streets but calm in the apartment.  Lovely bathroom, sitting room and a warm welcome in the kitchen for morning tea, many thanks.  We left our toothbrushes so now will have to come back!

Henrietta was a great host! Very friendly, excellent communication, giving precious advice about Madrid and always here to help! She was making sure we were ok which is very appreciated.

The appartment and the building exceptional, they are worth a visit alone. As advertised we had a cosy room, a bathroom and a living room to ourself and were able to use the kitchen when needed.
The breakfast was very good.

The location is perfect, in a quiet & safe street, and you can do everything by walk - should you need to take the metro it's very close too.

I recommend Henrietta's place without any hesitation!

Henrietta is a phantastic host and the flat is just amazing. The sleeping room rather small but well equipped and perfectly quiet. The location is ideal. Tall people may find the bed a bit too short. With the sitting room you will have enough space for sure and the cats are nice. If you like good coffee and pastry, you will definitively enjoy the breakfast. We received very helpful arrival information.Thanks, Henrietta!

We enjoyed very much to stay by Henrietta, who is a great and nicel hostess. We had many good chats with Henrietta over the breakfast, Henrietta has a wide knowledge about Spain, which we benefitted from.
Lars og Heddi .

Era nuestra primera experiencia con Airbnb y desde luego vamos a repetir. Henrietta ha sido una anfitriona excepcional y la casa ha superado nuestras expectativas. Al llegar nos enseñó  la casa, nos dió un juego de llaves para movernos con libertad y en la habitación nos esperaba un benjamín de cava con dos copas. Fue un muy buen comienzo. Los desayunos con sus espléndidos croissants, que puede seguir publicitando como los mejores de Madrid, han sido una maravilla, sobre todo por las animadas conversaciones de temas variados. Nos ha hecho sentir como en casa, con cacao en el desayuno incluido. La casa cumple todo lo publicitado en la web, la habitación es cómoda (aunque un poco pequeña y ya se ve en la foto de la web) y teníamos un baño grande para nosotros solos, además de una sala de estar y una entrada trasera para poder entrar y salir de noche sin molestar a la anfitriona. La ubicación es perfecta para ir caminando a todas partes y disfrutar del centro de Madrid sin preocuparse de horarios de transporte. Además Henrietta ofrece información muy útil sobre donde ir y que lugares visitar. Ha sido un fin de semana perfecto.

Our staying in Madrid (5 days) was really amazing! Henrietta is very open, very kind person, wonderful host and very interesting women. We spend a lot of time during breakfast talking about different things. Her home is perfectly placed in the very heart of Madrit. During our stay we used metro only to go from / to airport. Everywhere you can go on foot. It is hard to believe but one of the main street in Madrid is 100 metres from her house - while your place is calm and quiet. The nearest area is really very fabulous - lots of nice restaurants and tapas bar (recommended by Henrietta - go and try Lateral - only tapas, but deliciously prepared and wonderfully served!), shops, open markets. You can reach Sol and Plaza Mayor in 10-15 minutes of walk. For those who want to shop this is a perfect place, a lot of Corte Ingles (huge department store) and small boutiques.
When we came, Henrietta explained everything to us, how to use keys, entrances, where to go, what to see.
You have, for your own use big, comfortable bathroom (although it is a little ambarassing to use a bath but only for a first time), bedroom (small but there is everithing you need, even, for your comfort, electric blanket!) and elegant living room. You can use kitchen and dining room.
Breakfast served (on a fancy porcelain) by Henrietta was always very tasty and fresh, good quality juices, freshly made muesli and so on.
Not to forget about cats. Both are very friendly and very well-behaved (contraty to my cats). I really loved to stroke them. But don't be afraid, if you are not an animal lover, they don't impose themselves at all. The flat is exeptionaly huge so anybody can be alone if only wants.
The building itself is worth one sentence at least. It a rebuilt theatre and you can see the remainings of its splendor on every step.
VERY HIGHLY RECOMMENDED!
Henrietta, thanks a lot!

It was a really nice and comfortable staying in Henrietta's flat. The flat was very big and decorated very fancy! There was the living room and bathroom which only for me, and It was so nice.

Henrietta is very nice person! She gave me many useful information about madrid, restaurants, bars etc. I really recommend staying Henrietta's flat!

Henrietta is a very friendly host, the flat is so amazing and super good located. My friend and I go to all the Madrid sites by foot from the apartment!
The breakfast Henrietta prepared is very delicious!
Super recommended!

Absolutely AMAZING apartment and a fabulous host! Henrietta's home is exactly as portrayed...clean, comfortable and convenient to everything!

We walked to the Palace, the Temple of Debod, Plaza Mayor, La Rastro, Gran Via, Latin District....everything was so close, but the apartment was very quiet and peaceful - - the best of both worlds!

Henrietta was great at communicating with us prior to our arrival and gave us information on how to get around before and after our arrival. We especially appreciated Henrietta's suggestions on what to see and do while we were in Madrid...she is so knowledgeable and was very kind in sharing information.

The bed, pillows, and linens were top notch and very comfortable. We greatly enjoyed our visit and hope to stay with Henrietta again!
Henrietta nous a réservé un très bon accueil dans son bel appartement. Le petit déjeuner était convivial et délicieux. N hésitez pas à réserver chez Henrietta.

Thanks to a fabulous host I enjoyed three fabulous days in a fabulous apartment, in a fabulous historical building within fabulously easy reach of fabulous art galleries in a fabulous city.
Thank you, Henrietta: your sunny personality and attention to detail helped to make my Madrid trip as enjoyable as it was.

As first time airbnbers we couldn't have been more happy with our 5 day stay at Henriettas apartment. It was very easy to find, and a wonderfully cool and peaceful respite after our journey. It is perfectly located for exploring all Madrid has to offer. We walked everywhere - galleries, museums, parks, plazas, tapas bars, markets. But if you wanted to go further afield the metro is just a short walk away. Henrietta was a great host both before and during our stay, including helping us find out about the Mercado de Motores at Delicias (flea/craft/food market second Sunday in month - highly recommend). As previously mentioned the bedroom is small but the bed was very comfortable, even for my 6' husband, and we enjoyed chilling out in the roomy guest lounge at the other side of the apartment. It was very hot during our stay so we were grateful to be able to help ourselves to chilled water from the fridge. Henrietta kindly accommodated an early breakfast for my husband who was there on business. The bathroom is down the corridor via the dining room, we didn't, but if you mind these things you may want to bring a dressing gown. The cats are lovey, but only attentive if you want them to be. It was a real treat staying in such a beautiful building, in such a great location, with such a lovely lady. Thankyou Henrietta.

We had a very nice stay in Madrid. The location from Henrietta was really perfect for us - because you can reach everything very easy most of the time walking distance. The home from Henrietta is very, very nice in the historic center of madrid. Henrietta is a very nice an helpful person - she was always interested to help us - gave us very good tips - were we should go. Even her cats are really funny :-) The house is very clean and we had a lot of space there. We got every morning a different breakfast - it tasted very good. So we can rally recommend this place to every visitor who whant´s to be in the town :-) We will definitely come back :-) Thank you so very much for your hospitality at your place!

Lorsqu’on arrive dans le bel appartement d’ Henrietta, on est tout de suite salué par deux chats roux et qui vous suivent jusque dans la petite chambre. Le grand salon est merveilleux pour lire en rentrant d’une longue journée et la salle de bain digne d’une grand hôtel. Quant à Henrietta, elle est aux petits soins: elle nous a servi des petits déjeuners délicieux quelque soit l’heure, connaît la ville comme sa poche et peut donner toutes sortes de renseignement sur la ville. Un véritable séjour chez une amie ! Seul bémol,
le lit , qu’on aurait aimé un peu plus grand..
Notre hôte d'un naturel accueillant et sympathique nous a mis tout de suite à l'aise. les petits déjeuners en sa compagnie étaient chaque fois des moments bien agréables et utiles par ses conseils.

You can't underestimate how important having a safe and beautiful place to stay is when on holiday - staying at Henrietta's flat certainly made this clear to me! It made myself and my friend’s experience of Madrid even more wonderful. The flat was exactly as described and presented on the post – clean, classy and quirky interior in a perfect location.
Henrietta as a host was also wonderful – she provided great advice about things to do and concise information of how to get around prior and during our stay. The hearty breakfast we received from her every morning was more than enough to set us up for the day ahead. She was also a friendly, interesting and easygoing host who made us feel welcome in her home.

Henrietta’s flat is a true airbnb gem!
En fantastisk lejlighed med en hjælpsom værtinde i en utrolig godt placeret kvarter. - vi havde et vidunderligt ophold på 5 dage med lækker morgenmad.

L'accueil a été parfait, l'hôtesse très sympathique et la localité commode, très centrale. De plus les petits déjeuners copieux et de bonne qualité. On peut regretter que la chambre offerte soit très petite et le lit un peu court, la vue sur cour peu attrayante, alors que manifestement l'appartement est très vaste et que l'hôtesse pourrait mettre à disposition une chambre plus agréable.

1、位置：公寓的位置超好，位于1号线地铁Tirso de Molina站边上，从Magdalena出口出来步行3分钟就到。公寓所在的区域属于马德里市中心，步行去Sol大概5分钟，去几个博物馆、丽池公园也都是步行可达。1号线连接两大主要火车站Atocha和Charmatin，不论是乘飞机或成火车抵达马德里，到公寓都非常方便。
2、内部：公寓很大很漂亮，据说曾经是富人的家。有好几间房间，客厅非常宽敞，浴室很大很干净，厨房、餐厅都很温馨，给airbnb的租客用的卧室虽然不大，但很私密。
3、房东：Henrietta不愧为超赞房东！订好公寓后会再用email发来详细的路线指南，按照指南路痴都能轻松找到公寓；每天早上根据guest的起床时间煮咖啡，一大早特地出门到附近的面包房买可颂回来给guest当早餐，她也会一起用餐、聊天；她是英国人但西班牙语说的很好，所以也很乐意帮guest翻译西班牙语的网站、帮忙做预定、推荐景点、餐馆等等等等。总之，如有任何需要，都可以跟Henrietta说，她会想尽办法帮你。By the way, she has the typical British sense of humor, which is so adorable.
4、猫：Henrietta家有两只超可爱、超粘人的猫咪。一只叫Hado，一只叫Wifi。Hado的性格简直像狗一样，会蹲在家门口等你回来陪他玩，早上他看到你起床会跟着你去洗漱，喜欢各种蹭你的手、你的脚，还会翻过来露出肚子要你摸。Wifi比较害羞，但也很亲近人，招牌撒娇动作是像招财猫那样抬起两只爪子作拜拜状。离开的时候好舍不得两只猫咪，现在也很想念他们。
总之，在Henrietta家住了3晚，每天都非常开心，绝对是目前为止最棒的airbnb体验，到马德里来玩的话，推荐住在Herietta家噢！

拿老婆的账号怒给个好评。
1. 房子非常的nice。位置很好，紧邻1号线tirso de molina站和3号线的sol站，出行很方便。就在马德里的市中心，走路去力池公园啊，马德里皇宫啊，得波神庙什么的都在2公里以内。房子本身也很赞，据说是以前某土豪的居所，一楼的庭院还做过马蓬，地上还有马匹走过的痕迹。留给客人的sitting room非常的棒，面积大，视野也很好。独立的卫生间面积也很大，很舒适。卧室的话老实说有点偏小，如果把两个人行李都放里面会有点挤，好在房子本身很大，行李物品可以都放在其他的地方，就很好了。餐厅不错，厨房和冰箱也会给你用，很方便。
2.房主是个典型的英国马大姐。人很热心也很开朗健谈风趣幽默。每天一早会去买好可颂，按照你的要求时间做好早饭。可颂和咖啡很赞，早饭期间的聊天也很愉快，房主会用自己的故事来鼓励口语巨差不敢说话的我大胆多说，也会说一些英国和西班牙的逸事。此外房主身为翻译，精通西班牙语，包括订票啊，看斗牛啊之类的问题统统的可以找她帮忙。
3.最后要强调的是，房主养的两只猫简直不要太抢镜，长得巨胖超级喜欢让你摸他的Hado，和体型相对苗条神喵见首不见尾的wifi。每天早上起来会过来卖萌求摸，路过sitting room会进来卖萌求摸，晚上回来了会第一时间冲上来卖萌求摸。猫控萌物控的福利啊!
最后必须的说，这次的airbnb真是一次非常愉悦的体验，就好像住在一位老朋友家里一样的舒适随意开心，强力推荐！

Una experiencia inolvidable!! Henrietta nos abrió las puertas de su piso junto con sus dos gatitos (muy tiernos), un lugar súper ubicado de las atracciones de Madrid y en pleno corazón de la ciudad!! Nos encantaría volver pronto y seguro regresaríamos al mismo sitio.

Très bel appartement très bien situé et très bon accueil d'Henriette
Nous recommandons cette adresse

An amazing experience in a wonderful apartment. The location is perfect and Henrietta is a great hostess. Every detail in the historic building brings you to the essence of experiencing Madrid.
We had nine enjoyable days here and strongly recommend it for anyone wanting great accommodation in the heart of a very exciting and vibrant city.

The BEST! Henrietta was an amazing host. As soon as we booked she sent us a document with directions to the flat, recommendations on sites and food, and tips about the metro. When we got to the flat, we were blown away by how beautiful it was. The bathroom was full of everything we may have needed. Breakfast was amazing! I highly recommend this rental!

We had a perfect stay at Henriettas place! She is a perfect host, the breakfast is perfect, the location is perfect for walking to erverything. And we also appreciated the quietness although you are in the very centre of a capitol. K&G from Denmark

Nuestra estancia en Madrid ha sido inmejorable, y en parte gracias a la hospitalidad de Henrietta y su precioso apartamento. Sólo entrar al edificio te das cuenta de que es un sitio muy especial, con mucha historia. El apartamento es lo suficientemente grande como para sentir que tienes intimidad. Todo está muy limpio y en perfectas condiciones. Henrietta desde el primer momento se esforzó por hacernos sentir como en casa. Cada mañana nos preparaba un desayuno completo, servido con mucho mimo mientras los gatos nos daban los buenos días. La ubicación ha sido lo mejor, a diez minutos andando de los principales puntos turísticos: plaza mayor, el rastro, museos, sol... Recomendable 100%. Una vez más, gracias por todo Henrietta ¡ha sido un placer conocerte!

we had a wonderful stay with Henrietta, very nice building too!
The location is absolutly perfect,all historical sites, museum etc are in walking distance.
Henrietta is is also a perfect host, we feel very welcome!
Every morning a nice breakfast, warm croissants, fresh fruit!
we can highly recommend this BandB
She showed me the apartment, and advised on where to go in Madrid and she made a different breakfast every day.

We really recommend staying at Henrietta's place. The location is absolutely perfect. You are right in the centre of Madrid, with everything on walking distance. The appartment itself is really beautiful and has everything you will need. There is a lot of information on Madrid available in the appartment, which is really nice, and also Henrietta is always happy to help with tips about what to visit or where to eat. Hato and Wifi (the cats) are both also absolutely adorable! We've had a lovely first experience in AirBNB and we can definately recommend!

Henriettas place was a large part of our Madrid experience! Situated on the second floor of a fin-de-siecle building, on a quiet street, in the throb of the city!! The magnificent double staircase leading up to Henriette's apartment was magical and could have come straight out of a Harry Potter film! Henriette explained that the building had originally been a theater, which added to our fascination of the building.
Needless to say, the apartment itself was beautiful and very charming. We were greeted by Henriette and her two cats, who think they are dogs. The 3 of them immediately made us feel quite at home and we really enjoyed our stay her.

We had three lovely days in Madrid and Henrietta's home was part of our brief but intense experience. We really enjoyed the house, the cats Hato and Wifi (very friendly and nice creatures) and Henrietta's helpful information, not to mention our very pleasant and relaxed breakfasts with her. We followed all her advice (including flamenco at Casa Patas, which we really loved and warmly recommend!!) and hope to go back in some future occasion. The location of the apartment is absolutely perfect and we went on foot to all the museums in 10-15 minutes.
Elisabeth, Verona
