We had a fantastic and memorable 5 night stay with the Superhost Henrietta! Excellent communication from the get go, fantastic support and constant reassurance from her during some stressful Airbnb payment malfunction.
The place was absolutely exquisite and conveniently located within walking distance to many fabulous historical attractions, museums, restaurants, and shopping.
We couldn't stop taking pictures of the staircase which my husband said looks like a perfect location for a Hitchcock film.
Henrietta's apartment was very clean, spacious, filled with light and colors, freshly painted and beautifully decorated. Our room was cozy and quiet, perfect for resting after long days spent walking around Madrid. And the private bathroom is worthy of a king.
The most fun was the daily breakfast prepared by Henrietta and excellent strong coffee! We were lucky to be joined by her a few times and shared some stories and a some laughs. We'll be back if she'll have us ;-) Highly recommend her beautiful home and this Host Extraordinaire!

Henrietta was very kind and helpful from the moment we booked with her. She waited for us outside of her flat while we were on our way from the Metro, to make sure we found her place OK.

She was very hospitable and served us breakfast each morning, made sure we were comfortable, and suggested options for nearby attractions and dining. Her place was very clean, bright, and spacious, with a large window in the guest room... not to mention the history of the building!

We felt very comfortable staying here, and it was in a great location. Overall, I highly recommend staying with Henrietta! I cannot say enough good things about our experience with her and the flat.

Thanks Henrietta!!
Great location. The place is a little small, but it has a great balcony. Would recommend.

Amazing location with great terrace to enjoy the energy of Plaza Mayor!  This apartment is compact but the terrace is such a treat.  Shower had great water pressure.  Apartment had everything we needed for 4 nights & it was an incredible location to get to all the places we wanted to explore. Host provided great instructions and a two page list of recommendations with map.  There is a small set of steps to apartment from elevator.  However we did not find this to be an issue and the terrace makes it worth it!!

Very helpful hosts who went out of their way to assist us when our check in was messed up. We enjoyed the rooftop however found our apartment small and think it would suitable for a single guest rather than a couple. Overall a great and safe location for a reasonable cost.
Recommend!
Great location, cosy flat, amazing terrace and hosts are super responsive. Strongly recommend it!

This was the perfect location to explore the Plaza Mayor area on foot and the rooftop terrace was a gift to us after an overnight flight.  Milan always responded quickly to my questions and offered to reserve a taxi for us for our departure which was a huge help.  Would easily stay here again!

Accomodation is in a perfect situation with easy access to many attractions in Madrid.
The balcony overlooking the entrance to Plaza Major is fantastic and compensates for the size of the apartment.
Central location

We loved this location!  The apartment was as advertised.  It was small but had everything you would need.  The terrace was an added bonus and a great place to relax! Milan was great communicating with us.  We would highly recommend to stay here!!!

Great apartment, balcony is such a rare find and amazing to sunbathe and enjoy before some pre-dinner drinks.
Milan was there to greet us and was a great host!
Definitely an apartment to book and return to again and again.

AMAZING!!! This was truly the best spot in Madrid! We walked everywhere around the centro while being at Soroya and Milan’s apartment. Not only are the hosts extremely friendly and kind they helped me many time with simple questions. The balcony is stunning!!!! It’s a great place to relax, drink a wine and watch the people walk by! This was my husbands first time in Spain and this house and Milan made it the best experience! The house is perfect for 2 people! We thoroughly enjoyed our time in Madrid and we would book this apartment again!

soraya and milan were wonderful hosts - my husband and i required/requested very little, but they kindly checked in to see if there was anything we needed - the accommodations are perfect for a couple and you can’t beat the location - we took advantage of the long list of suggested restaurants and attractions provided by our hosts - a perfect apartment for an amazing visit to madrid

Wow! The balcony is just the most magical place! From morning mediation and yoga to evening dinners it was absolutely perfect. Milan is a wonderful host. I would recommend this apartment highly and would stay here again when we are next in Madrid.

Awesome terrace just off the Plaza Mayor.  Roomy outdoor space to make up for the efficient space-maximizing design of the interior.  Clear directions on how to get luggage from the car to the unit on a bustling pedestrian street.  Main bedroom was well suited for 2 and our luggage.  A/C worked GREAT on a really hot period in July 2023.  Bathroom also well sized, not big, but not tight.  Nice shower with all needed items at hand.  Living room with pull out and kitchen is really really tight.  Worked once we scooted the couch/bed back 2 inches, to the wall, to allow travel to the bathroom at night.  Fitting 4 adults here would be a stretch, but it was perfect for parents and one young adult kid.  We never used the fold up kitchen/dining table, but it looked pretty small.  Fine for drinks, but not too much more. Elevator goes up 3 of 4 flights you need to ascend.  Quality finishes and construction.   Coffee machine: Perfecto!
Terasta oturup sokakları izlemek harikaydı. Ev küçük ama çok kullanışlı ve yeterli. Konumu çok güzel. Tekrar gelmek isterim.

I came to Madrid for a six night stay with a friend and Soraya's apartment was perfect in every way! The apartment is not big but it is so much better inside than the pictures show and the terrace was huge with stunning views of the old city towards the Plaza Mayor. The whole area was buzzing with interest but very chilled at night and being so high up we were not bothered at all by noise. One thing to mention is that the electrics may trip if you put on too many things with heating elements (cooker, kettle & washing machine). And just to note that the lift key needs very very slightly pulling out in order for it to turn but you'll get the knack 😊
If we come back we would book again without hesitation!

Amazing apartment just off the main square! Great space for 2 people, lovely shower, comfortable bed and extra space in the living area. The area is busy but the apartment is quiet. The balcony was stunning! Wonderful to catch some sun or sit and have breakfast and watch the people go by. Excellent communication from the host, very helpful and instant responses. I would definitely recommend for a stay in Madrid.

Highly recommend staying here! Milan met us at Mimi’s creperia (the host’s restaurant) and walked us the 100 ft to the airbnb. The place itself was peaceful despite the bustling surroundings. Clean interior, free Wi-Fi, stunning balcony, easy instructions,  safe building, incredibly friendly host, overall a stress free visit. If I ever come back to Madrid, I will definitely be staying with Milan again.

A great place and great hosts. They were responsive to the washing machine not working (unfortunately it was too late for us to use), but set up a fix the next day.
Milan was always responsive!! The place was stocked with plenty of the towels and a bath mat unlike others in Madrid where they give you 1 towel per person and no floor/bath mat (!!). No microwave but there is a stove top where you could reheat food and a small fridge. TV and internet worked fine (sometimes spotty but no big issue) and there were AC controls for the room and living space. The beds were comfy (pull out and double) and the pillows were good- a mix of memory foam and feather! A plus!
The location is central and walkable to everything. The lanai was the best where you could enjoy the sun, drinks and people watch as they walk thru Plaza Mayor. A great find! Thank you Soroya and Milan!

This apartment is in the perfect location in the heart of the city at the Plaza Mayor! It was very easy to get around everywhere by foot. Lots of great restaurants in the area. The host has a great list of the places not to miss while visiting Madrid. The rooftop terrace cannot be beat!
Great location and value. Outside space is the best part. WiFi unfortunately did not work - only issue we had.
Amazing location, perfect accommodation.  Would 100% recommend this accommodation and now know where to stay in Madrid next time. Thank you for amazing time.

Short of having a flat right in Plaza Mayor, you cannot beat this flat! It's definitely perfect for 2 people, 3 would be tight but manageable. The flat is very bright with a beautiful terrace to take in the sounds of central Madrid. It was very clean when I arrived, and the host was very quick to provide easy self-entry instructions. There's direct afternoon/evening sun in the summer, so be sure to close the shutters before heading out for the day. Having air-conditioning certainly helps, but you don't want to leave it running all day while you're out.
I would definitely recommend this place and would stay again if available the next time I plan a trip to Madrid.
Perfect location to access Prato, Royal Palace, restaurants, and shops. Love the roof top to relax in the evenings. Very responsive host with great coffee shop and restaurant across the street.
Soraya and her co-host were very helpful any time you had a question. The Airbnb was in a great location and had beautiful views. The place was clean and in good condition.
Great location.  Great terrace.  Super.  Stay here.

Appartement très bien situé
Impeccable

What can we say? This was an amazing stay. You can’t beat the view of the Plaza Mayor, the proximity to restaurants and all activities- never more than a 20 min walk.
The apt was as described, Milan was an amazing host allowing us to drop off our bags at Mimi’s (go for a crepe!) and he even arranged for an early am taxi back to the airport for us.
We loved Madrid and wouldn’t hesitate to stay again! Thanks, Milan!!!

Great location and a lovely roof deck - sadly it rained for a lot of our time in Madrid so we didn't get to take full advantage of it. The Airbnb was well-stocked with umbrellas and other handy essentials.
Perfect place! Perfect location… more than I expect! Amazing terrace and host!
Loved it    Would recommend to anyone
Location  could not have been better.  Really enjoyed the deck and host was very responsive. Great location in the old centre.
Great location. Sitting on the balcony and listening to the sounds of the plaza made for a great experience.

The rooftop location is in the heart of Madrid.  Much quieter late night than one would expect. We would definitely book this place again. There is also a great creperie across the street for food at most hours.

Milan was great with communication, problem with the TV on a Sunday and he was there in 5 minutes. The apartment is compact but has all you need for 2 people. I know I’m stating the obvious but the terrace, the reason we booked was just the best. You have sun all day till sunset…..what a way to end the day with a glass of Rosado!
Very nice place
Thank you greay stay!

We just finished a great stay!  Perfectly located to walk to all the sights.  Balcony was a fabulous place to have coffee in the morning and a glass of wine in the evening.  We arrived in Madrid early in the morning and Soraya also accommodated us by allowing us to store our luggage at her restaurant (next door to the apartment). Highly recommend!
Really central, responsive host and good place to leave luggage if arrive before check-in

Ja amabilidad, la ayuda en todo fue excelente. Lo recomiendo
Volvería otra vez
Great communication, quick response, lovely place, great location, hosts were extremely lovely, rooftop terrace is very cozy, right by big landmarks in Madrid, extremely recommended.
Our stay was great! The location was amazing and we really enjoyed the rooftop terrace. Unit had everything we needed for our short stay. Thank you!
Great location!!! The terrace was amazing and everything was within walking distance. Thank you!!! We will gladly stay here again.
The host was very helpful, house in the heart of madrid, It has a great terrace we will come again

Excelente ubicación! Nos hospedamos en el tercer piso y hay que subir unas gradas con las maletas eso es bastante incómodo, la habitación tiene lo necesario y estaba limpia, sin embargo, al bañarse si se dura mucho el agua se empieza a salir hacia el baño. Por el resto bien.

We really loved Soraya and Milan's place. Probably the most central apartment we have ever stayed in. The central district of Madrid is literally outside your door. The apartment has a GREAT balcony for sitting out on to watch the world go by. The apartment is small but just perfect for two. Sol metro station is less than two minutes walk away but didn't use metro a lot as everything you need is close by. Great restaurants, bars, sights all only a short walk away. Milan was on hand if you needed any assistance but otherwise you are ok to enjoy this lovely apartment in beautiful Madrid.
Thank you for this stay! Everything was great.
Amazing location and views are incredible

This place was great! Our host met us out front to show us the ropes and give keys. It’s very close to lots of shops and restaurants (which also comes with a little noise at night) but it was super convenient. The balcony is cute and provides a scenic view of the bustling streets!
The apartment is beautiful and it has a great view of Plaza Mayor. It is amazing to feel that you are really in the center of the city! Thank you for your kindness and good care, Soraya and Milan.
Amazing place! Definitely recommend!

Soraya's Place was amazing! It was in a central location and easy to walk everywhere we wanted to go. The rooftop is incredible, I highly recommend having lunch or breakfast out here. Soraya put together a list of local restaurants which was so helpful and saved us so much time. We would absolutely come back next time we're in Madrid.

Milan was a fantastic host. He gave clear instructions of where to meet as the apartment is on a pedestrian street. It looked exactly as described in the listing. Everything was squeeky clean and the terrace was absolutley amazing! There was a problem with the drain in the shower and Milan was there to fix it within 5 minutes. Perfect place for 2 people enjoying Madrid. Would definitely stay here again.

Fernando was a very nice and kind host ,the took the afford the take me around Madrid by foot walking from old town to new town for 4 hours.The room was good size, with tv and shower was great too. Is easy to move around by metro from his place. Fernando was kind to let me full used of his kitchen. Highly recommended.

Graet place, great host. Centrally located, in one of Madrid´s chicest areas. Minutes to the metro, and the place has everything you need on your doorstep, including 2 gyms for which you can pay by the day, spermarket, cafes...
Fernando is vey welcoming and helpful, though as a busy professional you have space to yourself too. Would highly recommend this place for weekend stays or longer business or professionals stints.

Fernando is an amazing person. He is one of the most considerate, caring person I`ve ever met. First, i was confused about the address so he waited for me at the metro stop close to his house ( & showed me the neighborhood on the way home)
I had an allergic reaction at the beginning of my visit & he offered to take me to the hospital & calling a doctor, & prepared dinner for me as i was barely able to move.. Which helped me to get well quickly & resume my holiday.
The flat is really nice, large size living room, kitchen, dining room area, 2 toilets ..etc ( even though i stayed in the small room, but it was still a very nice size & excellent value for money) & for some reason the flat & the room looks alot better than the pictures.
The neighborhood itself is lovely with supermarkets, stores.. etc all around & the metro is 3 min walk from the house.
Highly recommended. Can`t wait till next time.. Gracias Fernando.. : D

Fernando is very warm and generous with his time. Even after working all day, he took me out on two separate tours of the city, one that included downtown/Gran Via and another at Matadero, a very cool art compound. His apartment is large and located in a very nice neighborhood, only two blocks from the metro. You won't regret staying with Fernando!

Utilize la casa de Fernando, que era como estar en mi casa, durante 12 días ya que estuve haciendo un curso intensivo en Madrid, a nivel de comunicación es excelente, metro lista a dos minutos y metro para ir a puerta del sol a 5-6 minutos (Goya) andando. La habitación es cómoda y espaciosa, la casa muy bonita y el baño excelente equipado.

Fernando es un gran anfitrión y una gran persona, amable y preocupado de tu bienestar en todo momento, te hace sentir en tu casa, vamos me hizo sentir que la casa era mía. Se preocupó en todo momento por mi bienestar y facilitarme todo, desde la entrega de llaves hasta mi partida, que celebramos con un buen desayuno.

Si vais a Madrid y quereis un sitio muy bien comunicado, con un anfitrión que esta por ti y para ti en todo momento y que además te ofrece su casa, su amistad y su trato exquisito, no busques más.

Gracias Amigo Fernando!!!

Fernando has been good-hearted, welcoming and very attentive to all of my needs.  I enjoyed great privacy as he was not at home most of the day.  The apartment is located in a wonderful area.  I look forward to staying in Fernando's apartment next time I want to rent a room in Madrid!
Fernando es el casero ideal para cualquiera que vaya a Madrid. Una casa acogedora y estupenda

Staying with Fernando was an exceptionally positive experience. I was looking for a room and have found a friend.. He's a great host, very communicative, attentive to details, generous, considerate and went out of his way to make sure I felt very comfortable. He even offered me to extend my stay with no cost and to assist beyond the scope of this Airbnb rent. The apartment is very clean (being cleaned at least once a week by a professional cleaner), very quiet and central (close to the center of the Salamanca area). I would highly recommend this place and I look forward to staying in touch with Fernando. | Quedarse con Fernando fue una experiencia excepcionalmente positiva. Yo estaba buscando una habitación y he encontrado un amigo .. Él es un gran anfitrión, muy comunicativo, atento a los detalles, generoso, atento y salió de su camino para asegurarse de que me sentí muy cómodo. Incluso me ofreció extender mi estadía sin costo y para ayudar más allá del alcance de este alquiler Airbnb. El apartamento es muy limpio (que se limpian al menos una vez a la semana por un limpiador profesional), muy tranquilo y central (cerca del centro de la zona de Salamanca). Recomiendo encarecidamente este lugar y espero poder estar en contacto con Fernando.
Fernando was a fantastic host.  Very kind, understanding and did his very best to ensure comfort for his guests.

The best host ever! He really cares about the people that live with him. He trusted me so much with his flat! The room was big enough and ahd everything that you needed to have a good stay. Even the neighboors are fantastic. Great place to stay and I hope I can stay another time at his place.

I had a great time in Fernando's house. The apartment has a great location, close to Retiro Park, and has a lot of facilities close to it. Fernando is a very nice host and will make everything to make your stay as good as possible! I truly recommend to stay at Fernando's house, if you want to have a good stay in Madrid!
A wonderful host and a wonderful apartment!

Henrietta ist eine tolle Gastgeberin. Wir haben es genossen morgens mit ihr zu frühstücken und dabei viel über Madrid zu erfahren. Wir waren zum ersten Mal in dieser tollen Stadt und sind beim nächsten Mal sicher wieder bei Henrietta! Das Haus hat ein tolles Ambiente, die Lage ist unschlagbar, mitten drin aber trotzdem ruhig. Jederzeit wieder!
Ralph & Michaela

How often do you get to stay in a converted theater?! This is a fabulous and quiet building in a good downtown area close to the metro. Henrietta is delightful and helpful - I never expected to have breakfast cooked for me! and will tell you about all kinds of things in town.
The bedroom is a nice, quiet little room, the wifi was weak through the repeater (but that may change over time), you get your own bathroom and giant sitting room (where the wifi is strong).
All in all, what a great host(ess) and location.

Henrietta is a wonderfull host. The communication before and during our stay was very good. The breakfast with Henrietta (almost) every morning was nice and tasty. During breakfast we talked about the sightseeing in Madrid, also the less touristic.
The house is wonderfull too. It is a big appartment in a quiet street in the centre of Madrid. All major attractions are within walking distant.
All together a wonderfull place to stay in Madrid!
You can't tell in the photos because it doesn't show all the spaces, but this place is huge. Killer fun host with great breakfast. Among our fav airbnbs of all time.

Henrietta's place was in the very central part of the city and an easy walk to all the points of interest, so much so that we never used the metro (though a station is located nearby). Her place was huge, the bedroom a decent size for two people, and additional private areas provided. You get a Comfey bed and light breakfest, which together with the location is great! Henrietta, Sebastian, and their two cats made us feel very welcome and would recommend a stay to fellow travelers.

Henrietta was so lovely, funny and fabulous. The apartment was totally gorgeous. My mum and I had so many laughs and will remember this experience forever. Already missing the cats. Would absolutely recommend anyone to stay if in Madrid.

Henrietta is an experienced and considerate host.
The building has a lot of history and Henrietta will be pleased to share and show you around.
We found the front sitting room to be a great place to relax, plan, review our Madrid travels.
Don't miss the Lake in El Retiro Park, especially on a sunny weekend with the locals at leisure.

Henrietta is great.  Very helpful. Bed very good. Apartment sprawling: our great sitting room was on the other end of a long zigzagging floor. Can get lost. ... Bathtub shaky, shower uncomfortable. Its an old house, with Henrietta's place on third floor, no lift, so hauling heavy luggage for older people like me can be a problem. But breakfasts were great. And Henrietta is a wonderful host, helping wherever she can. Travel light! And location cannot be better. Really! So overall: excellent.
Merci Henrietta pour votre accueil. Nous ne pourrons plus repenser à Madrid sans repenser aussi à vous!

Henrietta offered us a wonderful hospitality! If we enjoyed our stay in Madrid that's also thanks to her!
We really loved her beautiful house (part of a gorgeous building that was formerly and old theatre), her delicious breakfasts and her two cats! ***SPOILER ALERT: especially the praying one!!***
The location is super central but in a very calm street, just a few meters from Tirso de Molina metro stop.
We hope to come back soon to Madrid and be her guests again!

El lugar de henrietta no solo está excelentemente ubicado sino que es hermoso. Puesto con un gusto muy refinado. Abrigado y sobre todo la compañía de Hernieta que está siempre dispuesta para ubicar y recomendar lugares. Lo pasamos genial lo recomiendo 100%. Volveremos sin lugar a dudas.

房子是历史悠久歌剧院改建的，推开古朴厚重的大门，大厅里面沿墙面各有一个蜿蜒而上的木制楼梯，拾级而上，到达女主人家。房间简直就是宽敞明亮富丽堂皇的宫殿，我们有独立的起居室  卧室  卫生间，房间非常高非常干净整洁。热情的女主人每天为我们做早餐，丰盛美味。地理位置就在马德里市中心，步行五分钟到达主要景点，有地铁公交，非常方便。周围有超市  咖啡厅。SHOPPING更是方便，主要的购物街都能步行到达。西班牙是个热情美丽的国家，好好享受住在这里带给你美好的假期！再次感谢主人的盛情款待！

I had such a lovely stay with Henrietta.  She is an upbeat, gracious hostess who is full of suggestions and advice for whatever you might want to do in Madrid.  The flat is located in a fascinating building with quite a history.  Henrietta provides a private bedroom, bathroom, breakfast and a wonderful sitting room for those peaceful moments, as well.  Her endearing cats are welcoming, but not intrusive.  It is truly within walking distance of museums, plazas, shopping and restaurants.

Henrietta was the most welcoming host. Her home is absolutely lovely and the daily breakfast was great. She is so willing to help you find things to do in the city and is full of excellent suggestions. Her apartment is so centrally located you can get anywhere rather quickly. If you have trouble lifting things, getting your luggage up the stairs (since there's no elevator) will be difficult but other than that I have nothing but excellent things to say! I highly recommend staying with Henrietta, it will definitely enhance your time in Madrid.

Just perfect. Henrietta is an adorable host, kind, caring and very funny. We loved the place, an old stylish theatre, and the appartement, ideally located and decorated with a delicious british taste. The breakfast is succulent and the cats do the show ! What else ??! :)

Henrietta's apartment is located within walking distance to all the main attractions and sites in Madrid. Restaurants, bars, supermarkets are all within a few minutes walk, and Henrietta knows all the best restaurants and attractions nearby!
The apartment is beautiful, we enjoyed Henrietta showing us around the building and can see how it used to be a stunning theatre. The apartment is large, but very homely. The bed is comfy, and the private bathroom is very large. Each morning we had a lovely breakfast with Henrietta's home made granola, which is lovely.
Often we were joined by one or both of Henrietta's two ginger cats, who are both lovely and thoroughly enjoy scratches. If you're lucky, you'll get to see one of them do the cutest cat thing possible!
All up our stay was wonderful, we hope we can stay again in the future.
ottima colazione, molto disponibile, un solo neo la stanza un po' piccola

Best. Airbnb. Ever.
Henrietta's home is unlike anything you've ever seen--I promise. The building is historic (she'll fill you in on the fascinating details) and her apartment is so stunningly beautiful that we seriously pondered spending our 4 days in Madrid relaxing in our sitting room with the cats.
The location is absolutely perfect, there's no question that you'll get overwhelmed by the number of sights, shops, bars and restaurants within walking distance. Enter Henrietta, who will not only give you a written list of recommendations in the area but help you plan your day over a delicious breakfast that she has prepared.
This listing is an absolute gem--you're doing yourself a disservice if you stay anywhere else.

Henrietta is a wonderful host. The location of this accomodation is fantastic. We walked to all the major attractions and loved exploring the local area with its amazing array of bars and eating spots. The breakfast of home made granola, yoghurt, fruit and toast provided by Henrietta was a great way to start the day. The converted historic theatre had wide staircases that made it easy for us to carry our luggage up the two flights of stairs to the apartment. We really enjoyed our stay in Madrid.
首先，房间的地理位置很赞，几乎所有的热门景点都可以步行前往。其次，房东Henrietta很热心，给我们的旅程提供了很多的帮助。最后，房间非常的整洁漂亮，特别喜欢sitting room，可以坐在那里看书的感觉很棒！总之是很不错的体验！

We had a very good stay. The apartment had a lot of character. It was very central to everything we wanted to do and see in Madrid. It was also very clean and quiet.
Henrietta was very nice. She had very good information about Madrid. We are very glad that we met her.
Piso muy céntrico, acogedor y con todo tipo de comodidades. Henrietta es una buena anfitriona, amable y nos dio buenas recomendaciones para visitar Madrid. Recomendable 100%.

Most gracious host ever! Everyday Henrietta would ask us what time we wanted breakfast, and even with our early morning flight when leaving she got up earlier for us. I was sick one day, and Henrietta made me a pot a tea. Also she is easy to talk to and knows several languages. The place is clean and I enjoyed the bath very much! There’s two cats, which are the coolest cats I’ve ever come across! The location is excellent too, right by everything! Would definitely recommend to anyone!!!

Nice location, very central. Henrietta is a great host and takes special care. She knew I was vegan and got almond milk for breakfast. Gave good inputs on visiting Madrid. Staying in this place itself was an experience. Would stay again.

Great host! Was super helpful with check-in and check-out. Fantastic location. The cats are super adorable. Breakfast was nice- good coffee and tea. Lovely building with a unique floor plan. Definitely want to go back again!

El apartamento de Henrietta es muy bonito, está en buenas condiciones, muy limpio y lindamente decorado. La habitación es pequena (lo que sabía antes) y da a un patio interior (típico para muchas ciudades en Espana). La cama es muy cómoda. Lo que me gustó mucho fue el hecho de que Henrietta ofreciera el "sistema nórdico" de cobija, es decir un edredón con su funda que a los nordeuropeos nos gusta más que una manta con sábana. El desayuno lo tomaba acompanada por Henrietta. Durante estos momentos conversábamos de temas interesantes. Henrietta es una persona culta y comunicativa.

Een prachtig sfeervol apartement met een centrale ligging.  Henrietta is een perfecte host, geeft veel informatie van tevoren en alles is voorzien in het apartement. Wij hebben het gekozen voor de stijl en ligging en waren niet teleurgesteld.  Is zeker een aanrader!

Una bonita experiencia: casa con encanto, silenciosa, limpia y muy biensituada.
La amabilidad y la buena disposición de la dueña para con nosotros.

Appartement de caractère très bien situé au centre de Madrid. Accueil très chaleureux. Henrietta est très disponible pour des conseils de visites, achats etc et son petit déjeuner excellent. Rue tranquille et chambre au calme.
Henrietta sin lugar a duda eleva el estándar de lo que es un Airbnb. No existe un punto en la evaluación, el cual no supere con excelencia. Sin lugar a duda recomendaría hospedarse con Henrietta.

great central location, wonderful enthusiastic and knowledgeable host .
Only downside small tight bedroom-not really a problem as spent day sightseeing and only slept in it,

Henrietta tout d’abord est une hôtesse parfaite qui vous accueille chaleureusement et vous indique les lieux , activités et restaurants de Madrid . Son appartement est magnifique , vaste , confortable , calme et merveilleusement bien situé dans Madrid . Nous disposions d’un salon clair et cosy , d’une chambre calme , d’une belle salle de bains et prenions un petit déjeuner copieux en compagnie d’Henrietta tous les matins . Ces quatre jours chez elle étaient parfaits . Nous sommes comblées . Nicole et Ariane

I have never used Airbnb before and admittedly, I was nervous when deciding where to stay with my boyfriend for our trip - but the second I booked Henrietta's place, I knew that I had made a great choice.
From the start, communication was quick and easy and she sent us clear instructions on how to get to her home, along with recommendations for food and places to visit. Henrietta's place was exactly the same as it appeared in the pictures, full of character, lovely, quiet and clean.
The location was perfect, right in the city and everything we wanted to see (such as the Royal Palace and the Prado), was within walking distance - in fact, we probably walked all around the city! A mere 2 minutes away was the Plaza de Santa Ana, full of tapas bars and places to drink, a perfect place to spend the evening.
During our stay, Henrietta prepared breakfast for us every morning, including her tasty homemade granola! It was such a lovely thing to do and while eating together, she was always full of more suggestions of places for us to see during our time in Madrid. Her two cats were friendly and adorable, part of me wishes I could have taken them back home with me! She even arranged for her friend, Manuel, a taxi driver, to take us back to the airport for our flight home - saving us the hassle of finding a taxi ourselves!
Honestly, if you are scrolling through different AirBnBs trying to decide where to stay in Madrid, stop right here! Henrietta's place is such amazing value for money and we had an amazing time - hopefully we will return ourselves one day!

Henrietta和她的房子非常可爱，超级推荐。
首先地理位置一流，出门一分钟就是地铁一号线，直通火车站，五分钟到太阳门，十分钟到西班牙广场，完全步行游览大部分景点，而且附近就是非常好的餐馆！
其次，房子非常干净整洁，保持着非常好的品味和设施，住起来像家一样。Henrietta也很热情，不仅给我们做早饭，还帮我们解决各种问题，比如我们想找当地带吉他的小酒馆，她专门问了朋友推荐给我们地方！
她家还有两只非常非常可爱黏人的猫🐱，你一定会爱上它们！
总之高度推荐！

Fernanado hasta ahora no había tenido tiempo de poder compartir contigo mis impresiones. Fuiste muy amable con tu recibimiento y tus explicaciones de como llegar a tu casa y sobre los servicios que estaban disponibles para mi. Mis expectativas quedaron completamente cubiertas y sin duda llegaría a tu casa en un próxima visita a Madrid.
Siento no haber podido compartir un poco más contigo, tu esposa e hija, pero al ser pocos días, tenía que intentar aprovechar al máximo desde muy temprano. Espero hayan tenido felices fiestas.
muchas gracias por todo y hasta la próxima!
Fernando es, simplemento, un anfitrión de los que no hay. Amable, agradable, comprensivo. Ni lo dudéis. El mejor apartamento que nunca he tenido en AirBnB.

it was an unforgettable experience in Fernando's house .The apartment is located in the most elegant district of Madrid, full equipped, very quiet, cleaned and with a great shower. Fernado is really a gentleman, the day of my arrival he was very kind for many things, really a nice person which is to say happy stay in Fernando's house.

Yo me quedé en casa de Fernando por 12 días y por esto puedo asegurar que Fernando es un gran afitrión y una persona muy amable. La casa es muy ordenada y está cerca de muchos servícios: metro, autobuses, tiendas, jardínes (el Parque del Retiro es fenómenal!), restaurantes, frutarias, cajeros, etc. Desde su casa se llega con mucha facilidad a los principales puntos turisticos de la ciudad o, con un poco de disposición y se hace un día de sol, se puede ir a pie. Tuve una excelente estadía en Madrid y en casa de Fernando y lo agradezco por la ayuda, la confianza y la hospitalidad. Espero tener otra oportunidad de ir a Madrid y quedarme en sua casa más una vez, pero hablando un poco más el español!

Estuve en casa de Fernando desde el 24 de febrero al 2 de mayo y quizá no podré poner en palabras todo lo bueno de la experiencia de hospedarme en su casa.
Empezaré por los datos prácticos que todos buscamos al visitar la Ciudad. La descripción que hace Fernando de su ubicación concuerda fielmente. El barrio es encantador y seguro, con mucho movimiento de día y muy tranquilo por la noche, hay cafés, pequeños bares y supermercados, farmacia, pequeñas y encantadoras tiendas de ropa y accesorios, paradas de bus y metro caminando apenas unos minutos. Su piso es tal y como aparece en las fotografías y mucho más porque hay cosas que no pueden verse sino sentirse, y es que hay un ambiente apacible y relajado en su casa y en todo el edificio, con vecinos muy respetuosos del espacio y el descanso de los demás. Respecto a Fernando, tampoco puede apreciarse en las fotografías, su calidad humana a toda prueba, su amabilidad, calidez, respeto, confianza, generosidad en toda la extensión de la palabra, que lo hacen un ser extraordinario. Aunque estuvo ausente de Madrid en repetidas ocasiones, siempre estuvo pendiente y accesible para cualquier cosa que pudiera necesitar, dejándome todos los datos de cómo poder localizarlo. El día que llegué, después de un largo viaje de casi 16 horas, tuvo no solo el gran detalle de ir a buscarme al aropuerto y ayudarme con mi pesado equipaje, sino de preparar una deliciosa cena que fue una bendición, y después, tuvimos oportunidad de compartir los alimentos en varias ocasiones, conversar y conocer un poco de nuestras vidas. También se dió el tiempo para acompañarme un domingo a mostrarme la ciudad y otro día a conocer la increíble ciudad de Toledo! Finalmente, el día que tuve que dejar Madrid, a pesar de que Fernando tenía un día complicado, se organizó de tal manera que me acompañó al aeropuerto, ayudándome de nuevo con mi equipaje que para entonces ya había aumentado. Tuve también la oportunidad de conocer a Olga, su pareja, y aunque solo pudimos vernos en pocas ocasiones, hubo momentos para conversar y lo que puedo decir es que una gran persona, amable, atenta, siempre con una sonrisa.
Mi estancia en Madrid fue de esta forma completa, conociendo no solo una hermosa ciudad y otros lugares increíbles, sino personas fabulosas. Esperaba encontrar un lugar seguro y agradable para mi estancia, pero además de eso, puedo decir que encontré a un amigo.
Por supuesto, recomiendo absolutamente a Fernando y su confortable piso!! Es sin lugar a dudas, la mejor opción para quedarse en Madrid !!!

No tengo palabras para agradecer la amabilidad y hospitalidad de Fernando, aun cuando fue muy poco lo que pudimos coincidir, lo recomiendo al 500% el piso es excelente, la mejor ubicación de Madrid , con todo lo necesario cerca incluyendo paradas de Metro, etc. Si llegan a esta publicación y todavía no se han decidido no miren mas, quédense con Fernando en su piso, no se arrepentirá

He tenido ya varias experiencias alojándome con este sistema siempre muy positivas pero esta ha superado a las anteriores. Difícil superar la atención de Fernando, su generosidad y atención. La vivienda muy bien situada, se puede ir andando a cualquier sitio y dispone de medios de trasporte muy próximos. El barrio muy tranquilo y la habitación muy cómoda. Además Fernando te va a facilitar cualquier cosa que necesites. Una excelente opción para alojarse en esta hermosa ciudad.

I only spent 4 nights in Madrid, I wish I spent longer as I really came to love the city. Fernando is a lovely host, he was very thorough explaining everything to me, and very welcoming. The room has everything! It is quiet and peaceful, but still very close to everything. It is one of the best I've stayed in, and I'd definitely stay again if I go to Madrid again!

Una habitación amplia, luminosa y confortable. Un piso precioso en un barrio tranquilo, céntrico y hermoso. ¿Qué más pedir para una estadía excelente en la bella Madrid? ¿Un gran anfitrión quizás? Fernando es eso y mucho más: agradable, simpático, cálido, siempre dispuesto a ayudar. Realmente el lugar ideal para estar en Madrid, lo recomiendo y sólo espero que Fernando vuelva a aceptar mi solicitud de alojamiento el próximo año cuando regrese a Madrid.

I cannot speak more highly about this accommodation I had the opportunity to stay in recently.It was immaculately clean,excellent hot shower facility,just a really cosy little apartment from which to explore Madrid.As for the owner,look up the word gentleman in the dictionary,you are sure to see his picture there,a thoroughly wonderful human being!Do yourself a favour,spend a few nights there!

A mi llegada a España, Fernando ha sido una verdadera bendición,  es una persona excelente,  muy amable, presto ayudar en cualquier momento, la habitación es perfecta muy iluminada, limpia y con todo lo necesario, el vecindario queda cerca de todo lo que necesites. Recomiendo el lugar fuertemente, sin dudarlo volvería a hospedarme ahí,  gracias Fernando

Fernando fue un anfitrión ejemplar : vino a buscarme a la estación y me ayudó con mi maleta. Llegando la cena estaba preparada ! También me esperaba un plato de frutas ! Me enseñó su barrio indicándome los sitios más necesarios, como el supermercado, muy cerca de su casa. Luego se fue de vacaciones a Bilbao, pero estaba siempre disponible si yo tuviera la menor duda, y me ayudó mucho en esta ciudad que no conocía. La habitación es muy cómoda, es igualita a las fotos, hay todo lo necesario. El apartamento igual, grande, y práctico. El barrio es muy tranquilo, a 15 minutos del Retiro, de la Puerta de Alcalá, unos 20 de Cibeles. Recorri buena parte de la ciudad a pie, pero con el metro el piso está también muy bien comunicado ; Fernando me dejó un bono para la red de bici de Madrid que acababan de instalar ! Fernando es una persona muy atenta y simpática, que quiere conocer a la gente si nunca ser indiscreto. Pasé un mes genial en el piso de Fernando, consigiento cumplir con el trabajo que tenía que hacer en la capital !

as other guests have mentioned, fernando's kindness can't be stressed enough. for instance, he might offer to pick you up from the metro station at night, or walk you to the bus station in the wee hours.

You could not wish for a better host! Fernando is an amiable, sensitive, respectful and very hospitable person. He met me at the Metro so that I didn't get lost, he showed me around Madrid on an impromptu walking tour the first afternoon, shared his food with me, and generally made my stay in Madrid a wonderful experience. It would not have been the same without his kind attention to every detail. After he left for Bilboa, he entrusted the apartment to me without hesitation and even left me the use of his city bike pass. A truly amazing airbnb member.
His home is lovely and welcoming too. It is very clean and you have a separate toilet as well as the shared bathroom and use of kitchen and washing machine. The bedroom is large and cool and the bed very comfortable.
Don't hesitate to stay here. If I could give more stars, I would. Highly recommend.

The room was fantastic but the host was even better! Fernando is a true gentleman who goes above what is required to ensure your stay in this wonderful part of the city is as comfortable and fun as possible. Can't recommend highly enough.

Fernando is a great host. The room and the kitchen both have everything you need. Flat is close to metrostation, shops, supermarkets, etc.
I'll stay again in Fernando's flat, if I'll go to Madrid.

Pese a que Fernando no pudo encontrarse en la casa durante mi estancia, confió en que cuidaría la casa sin problemas y estuvo atento a cualquier duda o problema que pudiera tener.
La casa es muy acogedora, un salón amplio y con cuarto de baño para invitados.
El piso está en una zona tranquila, con supermercados y bares cerca, y los medios de transporte a primera mano.
Tengo claro que cuando vuelva a Madrid, esta será una de mis preferencias.
__________________________________________________

I had an amazing time in this house. Despite Fernando couldn't be there because of personal issues, he was so kind asking me in the case i had any problem.

Very comfortable house. Big living room, private bathroom and a full-equiped kitchen.

The area is very quiet. Also you have supermarkets and shops very close and the subway just going down the street.
Top choice in my future travels.

Fernando is a friendly and helpful person, assisting me with information before my arrival.   The house is tidy and clean, the room is equipped with good internet connection.  It is located next to Lista station and there are several buses to key attractions.   A good cafe across the street for breakfast though I did not find many restaurants for dinner. Overall a pleasant stay and I strongly recommend Fernando's home for airbnb users.

Ich kann nur Positives berichten.
Fernando hat mir genau beschrieben, wie ich vom Flugplatz in die Nähe seiner Wohnung fahren muss. An der Metrostation hat er mich abgeholt. Mein Zimmer hat mir gut gefallen. Auf dem Tisch fand ich einen Teller mit Obst und eine Flasche Wasser. Die ganze Wohnung war sehr sauber. Während meines Aufenthaltes konnte ich die Küche benutzen. Fernando war sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit. Ich habe mich richtig wohl gefühlt und werde bestimmt wiederkommen, denn ich habe noch viel zu entdecken in Madrid.
Danke, Fernando! Doris Schildkamp

This well-decorated and historic home in the heart of Madrid is an easy walking distance from the main tourist destinations. My wife and I enjoyed our discussions with Henrietta over the breakfast that she so thoughtfully prepared for us each morning. We loved our time in Madrid, and we can't wait to come back and stay with Henrietta again!
Henrietta was the perfect host. She offered great tips for restaurants and places to visit. The location is perfect. She offered a great breakfast and we loved our visit to Madrid.

If your looking for a central location, amazingly different beautiful  apartment with a friendly informative host, in Madrid, then look no further this is the place for you. Had a lovely few days here, made to feel at home by Henrietta, lots of tips on what to see and how to get there. The apartment on its own is worth the trip! Henrietta joined us for our continental breakfast each morning, which made us feel more like we were visiting a friend rather than staying in someones house. Excellent stay.

The apartment was very nice and we enjoyed our time there, if we returned to Madrid, we would stay here again.  Short walk to metro and Plaza Mayor and Plaza Sol.  Breakfast was good.  Only downside, we felt there were more stairs than than advertised, 42 total.  If you have mobility issues or large luggage this could be an issue.

Henrietta's flat is absolutely gorgeous! We enjoyed every bit of our stay. She and her son were very friendly and helpful with tips. Breakfast was provided each morning and was super delicious. The flat is walking distance to all the main sites. Would definitely recommend to anyone!

Fantastic location in the middle of everything. Small room, great bathroom, access to living room and kitchen. Very clean and fresh. Henrietta is a very kind and helpful host. Extra plus for breakfast and chat!

Have just returned from Madrid and my stay with Henrietta.   This is one of the best trips I've ever taken ;  MUCH of this due to Henrietta's advice and suggestions.  Wonderful house;  two lovely cats.  Location COULD NOT BE BETTER..   Great breakfast shared with Henriettaa; who is excellent company. All sites within the central area of Madrid are within walking distance; Never walked more than 20 minutes to get to anything.  I will be back and would not think of staying anyplace else. THANK YOU Henrietta.

Toda la experiencia en el apartamento fue inmejorable! Hernietta es muy atenta y te espera con una cantidad inigualables de detalles pensados para que tengas la mejor estadía en su hogar.
El edificio es precioso. La ubicación excelente (caminábamos hacia todos lados). El apartamento hermoso y muy limpio. La cama comodísima. Y el desayuno realmente riquísimo y variado!! Además deja a tu disposición un living divino y un baño soñado. Sin duda alguna, recomiendo y los invito a que vayan a este apartamento! Sólo se llevaran lindos recuerdos 😁

Highly, highly recommend Henrietta’s flat. Hard to imagine finding a more hospitable, kind and generous host. The flat is ideally situated in the city center of Madrid, walking distance to major sites like Royal Palace, Plaza Major, Puerta de Sol, Gran Via, Prado Museum, Reina Sofia etc... the bedroom is very comfortable and quiet, no noise at night. Henrietta provided my mother and I with a lovely breakfast every morning, which was delicious! Her cats are very friendly as well. We will definitely recommend Henrietta’s place to family and friends. Must stay!

Everything Henrietta reports regarding her charming home is true. If anything, better than she states. From the beautifully appointed sitting room and bath to the lavish sit down formal breakfasts she serves each morning a stay in Henrietta's home is definatly top drawer. This is a once in a lifetime experience right down to the last square of toilet tissue, which, by the by, is 4 ply!   I had an unfortunate experience in Madrid where I was accosted by a mugger. I could not have wished for a more pragmatic and yet comforting person than Henrietta to help me through it.

Henrietta's space was a great home base for our 3-day stay in Madrid! She was very accommodating for our early arrival which helped us immensely. She made sure to get us acquainted with the historic building's idiosyncrasies on our walk-through so there were no questions or issues during our stay. The bedroom was on the small side (which we expected) so the exclusive use of the beautiful, large, cozy sitting room was lovely. Her home is full of character (as are her cats, which I loved having around). She was very gracious with breakfast and provided many helpful tips for Madrid.

Siamo stati 3 notti ospiti nell'appartamento di Henrietta e possiamo solo dire che tutto è stato perfetto. La casa è in una ottima posizione e consente di raggiungere a piedi tutti i punti principali di Madrid ; non abbiamo praticamente mai usato i mezzi pubblici anche se la stazione del metro era molto vicina. Il palazzo dove si trova l'appartamento è molto bello, e ben tenuto ; e l'appartamento in cui abbiamo alloggiato grande, comodo e silenzioso.
Henrietta è una host fantastica, ci ha fornito molti consigli utili sulla città e sulle cose da fare per passare al meglio i nostri giorni. La perfetta colazione è sempre stata molto lunga perchè era l'occasione per farsi delle interessanti chiacchierate con Henrietta prima di iniziare la nostra giornata di visita alla città. Nessun problema di comunicazione, Henrietta si destreggia in molte lingue ed anche con l'italiano se la cava molto bene. La casa è anche allietata da due ospiti speciali : un bellissimo gatto rosso ed una piccola gattina bianca ; un piacere per noi che amiamo gli animali
Se un giorno dovessimo tornare a Madrid sarà nuovamente la nostra base di appoggio

Henrietta was a lovely host and made us feel welcome. Her cats were adorable too. The location of her place was very central - we walked everywhere and it was easy to go back for a short evening break before dinner. Thank you!

When you find a great place, a great host, and a great location you know you've hit the Airbnb jackpot, and Henrietta's place is just one of those spots. Huertas is a great neighborhood with easy access to the main shopping in Sol, a nice stroll to the markets in either Lavapies or La Latina, and with plenty of its own to explore near your place. When you're back in the gigantic apartment you can spend time down the hall in the sitting room, enjoy your shared breakfast and get Henrietta's tips on planning your day, or just marvel at the building. We'd love to stay here again!

Our fantastic stay at Henrietta’s place made our trip extra special. She immediately made us feel very welcome and relaxed, whilst providing lots of tips on the city. In particular, we enjoyed catching up with her over breakfast each morning - updating Henrietta on our adventures and chatting away. It felt more like we were staying with a relative than a b&b host! Everything is just as described - unfortunately we barely set foot in the beautiful living room as a result of it not being connected to the bedroom. That said, it’s a beautiful old building full of charm and character. Will definitely be staying again if we find ourselves in Madrid sometime in the future.
Excellent séjour chez Henrietta. A recommander sans hésiter.
Henrietta nous à très bien accueillis et les petits déjeuner sont agréables en sa compagnie. Le logement est très propre, plein de charme et très bien situé. A refaire !
Great location, close to everything. Easy access. Henrietta was a pleasure to have conversations with. Responded fast to any requests we had. We enjoyed our stay.

We have a fantastic five-day stay at Henrietta's place and we would highly recommend staying with her. The flat is ideally situated in the center of Madrid so everything - including many nice restaurants - is within walking distance. Henrietta is a very warm host and she gave us many tips of the city which is very helpful. Surely we can't miss mentioning the charming apartment which is full of characters! We'll stay with her again when we come back to Madrid :)

Our staying at Henrietta´s was an wonderfull experience. She was a great host, full of tips about Madrid and interesting information. The location of the apartment is perfect, everything is reachable within few minutes and the apartment itself is beautiful. We had our privacy and peace which was appreciated after whole day of walking and exploring Madrid.  I would definitely recomment Henrietta to future Madrid visitors and it is a place we will definitely come back to when we visit Madrid again. It was truly a home away from home.

We love to stay in AirBnB’s because it gives us a better feel of living like a local. Henrietta’s home is exactly what we like. Great location, wonderful home, and we cannot say enough good things about Henrietta’s care and hospitality. Highly recommended!
Henrietta was welcoming and charming host - we are so glad we had the opportunity to meet her. The apartment is in a perfect location with easy access to museums and restaurants.

Very friendly landlord.
She is not only helped us prepare breakfast, provided information about the surrounding tour, but also communicated with us frequently and gave us many useful Suggestions.
Then the apartment is very beautiful.
The combination of retro and fashion is very good.

Henrietta's home is stunning, from the moment you walk in off the street - full of history and with a real "wow!" factor....& in a perfect location for exploring Madrid.
We were able to visit many museums and galleries, the Sunday flea market 5 minutes away and saw parades at the Palace, as well as enjoy some lovely food and drink around the City.
She was the perfect host, giving information and answering questions we had and welcoming us into her home.
We won't hesitate to return the next time we have the chance to visit Madrid!

Henrietta , una anfitriona encantadora. Cultísima y con exquisito sentido del humor. Nos sentimos como en casa. Los desayunos, inmejorables. Cuando tengamos otra oportunidad de volver a Madrid, nos gustaría hospedarnos donde Henrietta. Gracias.
Top Lage,  familiäre Atmosphäre.... seeehr empfehlenswert
Exceptional Airbnb experience! The building is amazing and Henrietta was very welcoming. She was very helpful with a problem I had. Highly recommended!

Se trata de un piso señorial, con amplias estancias. El salón y el baño disponibles para los huéspedes son magníficos, pero el cuarto es un tanto pequeño. Esto es así porque justamente se trata de la habitación que antaño se destinaba a una criada o a un criado. Las tres estancias destinadas a los huéspedes están muy separadas una de otras y por respeto, para no  alterar los ritmos y la tranquilidad de la casa, uno tiende a quedarse más en la habitación, donde la conexión a internet es intermitente y por momentos inexistente. Henrietta es muy afable y se prodiga en un trato de mucha amabilidad. El apartamento está excelentemente ubicado. Es preferible no viajar muy cargado porque subir y bajar las dos plantas  se siente bastante al llegar y al partir. El desayuno ofrecido es muy bueno.

We had a great time staying with Henrietta.  Her apartment is very stylish and charmingly European.  The breakfasts were very special and healthy.  Best location for all tourist sites and restaurants/bars.
Comfortable bed, clean bathroom, delicious breakfast and excellent location. Thanks Henrietta for a wonderful time!

Henrietta place is very convenient (with in walking distance) to all the must see places in Madrid.  Her home is located in a converted theater that adds to the feel of the rich history of Madrid.  Not only is her home unique, so is she.  Henrietta is quick to laugh, give great recommendations and answer questions.  I would recommend her place with out hesitation.
un alojamiento cálido,en una vivienda con un estilo especial,en el  centro de la ciudad y con la independencia que desees
Güzel bir deneyimdi

Henrietta's beautiful apartment is the perfect retreat for a stay in Madrid. It's within walking distance of almost everywhere with brilliant markets and lots of little streets to wander and get lost in. It's only 20 mins walk to the Retiro, Prado and Reina Sofia. Super close to the Rastro  market on Sunday morning. The room is comfy, cosy and perfect for a single traveller or a couple and the private bathroom is so beautiful and luxurious. Henrietta is welcoming and has great conversation and stories to share. Highly recommended - on fact you should only stay here! I look forward to visiting again soon. x

El apartamento de Henrietta es espectacular. Airbnb debería permitir darle 10 estrellas!
El lugar es muy bonito y encantador, una experiencia distinta. Está en el centro de Madrid y muy cerca de los mejores lugares turísticos de la ciudad.
Por otro lado, Henrietta como anfitrión es excelente. Siempre está a disposición por cualquier consulta o duda y brinda ayuda para todo lo que uno necesite.
Realmente he tenido una gran experiencia en este alojamiento. Si viajo a Madrid nuevamente, sin duda volvería a elegir a Henrietta!!

I’ve stayed at a lot of Airbnbs around the world, and Henrietta’s place is one of the best. The location is amazing, the apartment is sprawling and beautiful, overflowing with vintage charm without skimping on modern amenities. But what sets it above the rest is Henrietta. She went above and beyond throughout my stay to make sure that I had a lovely time- making daily breakfasts at my requested time, providing recommendations and guidebooks, offering snacks for my plane ride, even lending me a hat to wear during an unexpected heat wave. Henrietta is warm and easy to talk to, and she made me feel at home right away. This is the place to be in Madrid!

Our stay was nothing short of fantastic! Henrietta was incredibly welcoming and gave us lots of suggestions for activities and sites to see. Breakfast every morning was lovely and she kindly accommodated for our dietary requirements. The flat was very central and close to all of the main sites. The room was clean and comfortable, and the cats adorable. We will definitely be back to stay again, thank you so much!
Fernando is a very friendly and welcoming host. The room is very clean and exactly like the pictures. Living with him was a great experience and i can recommend him to anyone.

Fernando as a host? = perfecto!
He came even to pick me up from the airport when I arrived after the midnight! I got a plate with fruit as a welcome. Every time I had a question, Fernando answered it paitently and gave an advice. He walked with me to the metro/bus to show me how the easiest way go to the centrum. He knows also a lot of éxtra'places where the tourists not go. Pity I didnt have time to discover them all... I also got a map how to go to the airport so I didnt loose my way in the early morning! Everything was tip-top!
The appartament: Wifi works without problems, the room was just what I needed! The connection with the bus or metro is very easy, but you can also walk to the centrum or to Retiro Park - in max 20 minuts you are there!!!
I would recommend Fernando's place with no doubt!
Gracias one time more! :)

Der Aufenthalt war großartig. Fernando war sehr nett und super hilfsbereit mit allem. Das Zimmer entspricht den Fotos, ist nicht besonders groß aber man fühlt sich absolut wohl darin. Es ist tagsüber hell und insgesamt sehr ruhig. Am Abend kann man eine kleine DVD-Sammlung nutzen (sofern man seinen PC dabei hat). Alles notwendige ist in direkter Umgebung. Das Zimmer ist für den Preis Best-Value-for-Money.

Fernando es una gran persona que te hace sentir que su casa es tu casa, es amable, respetuoso, y muy detallista, me compartio en varias ocasiones de lo comia o cenaba, hasta un descuento para el cine! Estuve un mes hospedada, y fue una muy buena experiencia que sin duda si vuelvo a Madrid me hospedaria nuevamente. La habitación es muy comoda y de muy buen tamaño con mucho espacio para acomodar tus cosas. La zona en la que se encuentra es mi favorita, esta muy cerca de todo, tiendas, supermercados y el metro muy cerca .
Sin duda él hara que tu estancia en Madrid sea mucho mejor!! Gracias por todo Fernando!!

La casa de Fernando es un hogar, tranquilo, limpio y cómodo. La situación de la casa es muy buena, en pleno barrio de Salamanca. Bien comunicado y en el centro de Madrid. .
Fernando y su pareja, Olga, son dos personas entrañables, pendientes de ayudarte en lo que puedas necesitar.
Muchas gracias por todo a los dos, mi estancia ahí ha sido muy grata.
Maria

Muy hospitalarios Fernando y Olga. Fueron unos días espectaculares, yo estaba mucho tiempo fuera recorriendo Madrid por lo que los veía poco, pero esos breves momentos siempre fueron muy buenos y me ayudaron mucho con mapas e indicaciones. Excelente.

Fernando is one of the best guests I have ever had from AirBNB. He picked me up at the airport when I arrived Madrid; he explained the house rules and the things to do in case of emergency very thoroughly when we arrived his sweet, cozy flat. He went out of town for holidays the next day or two, but he left me good tips to enjoy the city and a lot of candies and canned food. I had the apartment to myself almost the whole 19 nights I was there, but he stayed in touch and made sure everything was ok. When I asked a question he answered right away.

The apartment is located in a great area, very quite and safe, but still lots of supermarkets, bars, restaurants, small shops nearby. The transportation is great: you get several metro stops within walking distance as well as bus lines going to city centro. It's a 30 min walk to city centro if you are a walking crazy like me, I walked to city centro all the time.

The apartment is very clean. It has everything you need. I managed to cook most of my meals in the apartment. It's really like living at home, very warm and cozy. I couldn't wait to go home every day after a long day of exploring the city.

Stay with Fernando if you can, I would recommend him and his flat to everyone in the AirBNB community.

Jeg kan ikke forestille mig en bedre vært!

Min tid i Madrid hos Fernando, har været en stor fornøjelse! Lige fra den første gang jeg tog kontakt til Fernando gennem airbnb, har han været umådeligt hjælpsom, åben, flink og rar. Jeg fik lynhurtigt svar på min forespørgsel på lejemålet, og i al tiden op til min ankomst, var Fernando altid meget hjælpsom med hensyn til de praktiske spørgsmål jeg måtte have. Jeg følte mig nærmest hjemme, inden jeg overhovedet ankom til Madrid, fordi Fernando havde gjort et stort arbejde ud af at tage billeder af lejligheden og beskrive den, og fordi han gav en masse gode råd og forklaringer praktiske ting med ankomst og med selve lejemålet.

Ved min ankomst til Madrid, var Fernando også umådeligt hjælpsom. Jeg havde egentlig booket et hotel nær lufthavnen, da jeg ankom til Midnat, og ikke ville ulejlige min vært på det tidspunkt, men Fernando tilbød gladelig at komme og hente mig i lufthavnen til midnat!

Al min tid her i Fernandos hjem har været en stor fornøjelse, han er meget åben, flink og rar, og altid glad. Han er meget hjælpsom i forhold til at hjælpe med de praktiske ting her i Madrid, f.eks. med at skaffe et spansk mobil abonnement, og han har udarbejdet udførligt beskrevne kort og rutevejledninger for lokalområdet og Madrid generelt. Jeg kunne ikke forestille mig en bedre vært!

Selve lejligheden er stor, hyggelig, rydelig, ren og pæn, og med alle moderne installationer. Området, Salamanca, er hyggeligt, pænt, trygt, og tæt på byen. Jeg tror ikke man finder et bedre sted at bo i Madrid.

Det har været en fremragende oplevelse at bo som gæst hos Fernando, jeg har følt mig hjemme fra dag ét.

¡Estancia perfecta! Fernando es majísimo, vino al aeropuerto a buscarme, y toda la semana me hizo sentir como si estuviera en mi casa.  El piso estaba muy limpio, espacioso y con todo lo que podía necesitar. El barrio es muy agradable y la casa a 2 minutos del metro Lista.  ¡La próxima vez que vaya a Madrid iré otra vez a casa de Fernando.!

I couldn't have asked for a better place to stay and a better host. The room was exactly as shown as was the apartment. The location is perfect with Lista station only a short walk away. Fernando was really a fantastic host; he even came to airport to pick me up so I wouldn't get lost (highly likely for me!). I felt at home as soon at I got to the apartment. He was away in Bilbao for a lot of the time I was there so I had the entire apartment to myself but he always checked in and made sure everything was going ok. It was an usually hot month which was a struggle at times but with three fans keeping me cool I certainly managed! You have everything you need in the apartment and in the surrounding neighbourhood. I would highly recommend staying at Fernando's home; you won't regret it!

Sr. Fernando foi uma das melhores pessoas que já conheci. Além de formidável anfitrião, fez por mim o que apenas um pai faria. Minha ótima impressão começou quando ele me buscou no aeroporto com um cartaz colorido com as cores do meu país para dar as boas vindas. Apanhamos um ônibus até uma estação próxima ao seu apartamento. Durante todo o caminho me explicava tudo sobre Madrid, seus meios de transporte, o que era mais conveniente e etc. No caminho da estação até o apartamento foi me mostrando supermercados, bares e etc. Levou minha bagagem desde o aeroporto até meu quarto no apartamento. Um gentleman. Ao chegar no apartamento explicou-me o funcionamento de tudo. Desde as máquinas de lavar, Internet, chave de luz, trinca da porta, horários e dias do lixo, banheiros (deixou um lavabo só para mim), prateleiras nos armários da cozinha e geladeira , temperos, louça, tudo! Como boas vindas deixou um prato de frutas, água, azeitonas, uma entrada para o cinema e um guia da programação cultural da semana. Como trabalha em Bilbao, confiou seu lar a mim. Durante as suas vindas a Madrid não nos víamos muito porém sempre deixava um bilhete gentil na porta (guardei todos como uma doce lembrança). Fez questão de trocar meus lençóis e toalhas ao longo da estadia. Ao final desta permitiu que eu ficasse quantos dias a mais precisasse em função do meu vôo. Me acompanhou até o ônibus durante a madrugada, mas não sem antes me oferecer um suco de laranja recém feito. Não tenho palavras para agradecer a gentileza e o carinho do Sr. Fernando. Como disse antes, um pai. Fora ter este anfitrião mais que perfeito, o apartamento é uma delícia: confortável, extremamente bem ventilado (mesmo com o verão escaldante de Madrid, os ventiladores foram suficientes), chuveiro e cama maravilhosos. A localização é a melhor, em pleno bairro charmoso Salamanca, próximo a vários supermercados, bares, restaurantes, lojas, parque Retiro e estações de ônibus e metrô. E,além disso, extremamente seguro. Senti-me uma madrilenha durante este mês. Levarei no coração pra sempre Madrid e o Sr. Fernando. Espero um dia poder atribuir toda essa gentileza. Gracias por todo, Fernando y Madrid!!!

Great stay at Fernando's! I came to Madrid to do a course and stayed at Fernando's for a month. It was the perfect place to study as I had my own space and the apartment is quiet. Fernando was always friendly and very generous, and I agree with the previous comments - he met me at the airport and gave me tips for the neighbourhood and was always available if I needed anything. When he was away he kept in touch as necessary. The apartment is in a good location - nice area, and I could walk to the centre of Madrid easily each day. My room was pleasant and the apartment spacious and clean. Lots of cafés, bars and shops in the area, and good access to the metro. I would recommend staying here, it was just what I was looking for. Many thanks, Fernando!

Estive hospedada em casa do Fernando durante 2 meses e tenho a certeza de não poderia ter encontrado um lugar melhor!
O Fernando é um anfitrião excelente! Recebeu-me muito amavelmente, sempre preocupado em que eu me sentisse confortável. Por vezes partilhava comigo a sua comida (faz um "Pulpo a la Gallega" delicioso!). Apesar de passar muito tempo fora de Madrid, deixou-me todos os seus contactos para que eu pudesse facilmente contactá-lo se necessário.
O apartamento é muito limpo, calmo e confortável. Está localizado num bairro excelente, no centro de Madrid, com muitas lojas e restaurantes. Bem servido por transportes, tem uma estação de metro a 2 minutos e outra a 5 minutos.
Não tenho nenhum aspecto negativo a apontar. Voltaria a ficar hospedada em cada do Fernando!
Milan was very helpful in checking us in. We got there early and stored our carry on in their restaurant until room is ready.  He is very helpful in our questions and concerns.
Excelente sitio. Céntrico y con una buena vista en frente de la Plaza Mayor. Recomendado.
Great host, great place! It is easily excess and walkable to all the main sightseeing and shopping areas. Milan is a helpful and responsive host. We really enjoyed our stay! Thank you!

Location, location location.
It's not the biggest but as long as you're able bodied and a 'normal size' you'll be absolutely fine. Highly recommend.
Travelled with an infant (13 months) and it was suitable for 2 adults and one child (for a few nights, cooling facilities might mean any longer than 4 I'd recommend somewhere else).
Great place to stay we had a wonderful time!
Great position and view
Great place!

From the moment we arrived, our experience at this Airbnb was nothing short of exceptional. The location is absolutely prime, offering the convenience of being right in the heart of the city with easy access to local attractions. What truly sets this place apart, however, is its stunning rooftop balcony. It provided us with a unique and breathtaking view.
The host deserves special mention for their outstanding hospitality. Communication was a breeze; they were always available to answer any questions and went above and beyond to ensure our stay was comfortable and enjoyable. The combination of a fantastic host, an unbeatable location, and that extraordinary rooftop experience definitely makes this Airbnb a five-star recommendation for anyone visiting the area.

Soraya and Milan were very responsive and friendly. The check inn and checkout was easy and they let us leave our bags before check inn. The location of the apartment is excellent. It is right at the entrance of Plaza Mayor. Although it was quiet and we slept very well.

Sevgili Milan her konu da yardımcı olup bizi evimizde gibi hissettirdiğin için teşekkür ederiz. Madrid’e gelecekler için kesinlikle tavsiye ediyorum. Çok yardımcı bir ev sahibi tekrardan teşekkürler ve tekrar görüşebilmek dileği ile..

Friend and I spent 4 days here over new year. The apartment has everything you need for a short visit; good views and location is perfect for exploring Madrid's main attractions in walking distance. Only used public transport once to get us to rail station and this was so easily accessible.
The double bed is so comfortable and bedding good quality.
I see previous reviews commented on the noise - well we didn't find this and we were here for New Years Eve and we slept really well so i suppose it is what you are used too.

The apartment is really good located and the terrace is a great plus!
Unfortunately, it was an (uncomfortable) surprise to arrive and realize that it's not (at all) an apartment prepared for babies: the lobby and the lift are extremely small, so carrying suitcases + baby stroller is not an easy task; once you get to the third floor there are loooots of stairs to climb to get home; no microwave to heat the food.
Besides that, it's an amazing apartment for a couple or friends!

5* would stay again.
stayed for two nights with a colleague ahead of a work engagement. Little small but comfortable enough once you pack the sofa bed away in the morning. Location is absolutely spot on.
loved Madrid and am considering going back with my wife, will be looking to see if this place is available if I do

The apartment is in a great location with a lovely roof terrace which is perfect for enjoying a meal or a few drinks together. The fact that the owner has a restaurant a stone's throw from the apartment means that arriving before check-in is no problem as you can drop off your luggage and come back when the place is ready.

Booked the stay for the patio which was great. Good location and instructions provided made it easy to find.
Wifi basically did not work - two options are given - the first you can’t connect to and the second cuts in and out. Made it tough when you’re travelling and using wifi to navigate.
Cleanliness was OK but the bathroom wasn’t great. A lot of built of grime and what looked like black mold in the shower.
Place is very small. Didn’t mind since we weren’t there much but definitely cramped.
Great place! Super bien ubicado y limpio.

Appartement idéalement situé à deux pas de la place principale. Tout était parfait, les instructions jusqu’au départ. Au delà de nos attentes avec la mise à disposition d’un lit parapluie pour notre fille et la possibilité de laisser les bagages après le check out.
On recommande à 100%!
The apartment was at the perfect location, the balcony was an experience of its own. Definitely recommend!!
Posizione stupenda!
位置非常好，房间干净，露台很棒，还可以存放行李，非常推荐

My husband and I were visiting from US. This place was just what we needed, easy to get to, great location, all the amenities we needed. The hosts were so welcoming and even set up reservations for us for the night we arrived. They checked in just enough to make sure there was nothing else we needed and were easy to get in touch with when we needed to talk to them. It was located near various cafe and restaurants, within walking distance of plenty if tourist attractions. My only two grievances were that the wifi was extremely spotty and very rarely worked and that the parking was additional which was not mentioned in the listing, however neither of these things took away from our stay, we had an amazing time. Definitely recommend.

We loved our stay in this rooftop apartment. It was so cosy and had everything we needed. Spotless bathroom, comfy bed and the rooftop terrace was gorgeous looking out to the plaza mayor. We could walk everywhere from the apartment, lots of restaurants and shops nearby.
I did think it would be really noisy at night due to the central location but it wasn’t at all. It was fairly quiet after 12. Would recommend a stay here and would come back if I visit Madrid again 😊
The location was perfect for access to all of the tourist attractions, and transport. It was private and had all of the amenities that we needed. I’d recommend and would stay here again.
such a great place — no complaints and a beautiful location. clean, tidy apartment, with a stunning patio.

El alojamiento de Soraya es lo que necesitas para tu viaje a Madrid, la ubicación es inmejorable, la limpieza también, el metro está a 4 minutos caminando, son muy flexibles para la hora de llegada y también nos permitieron guardar equipaje a la salida, muchas gracias por todo Soraya y Milan!!!!!

LOCATION LOCATION LOCATION!
Great location in the center of it all and with a cute view. Easy checkin and checkout process overall was satisfied and would highly recommend for a stay in Madrid.

This apartment couldn't have been better located for visiting the main tourist sites of Madrid. Everything we wanted to see was within about a 20 minute walk. The apartment is about a block off of Plaza Mayor but down a side street and up on the third floor so it was very quiet. Aside from the location, the best part about the apartment was the terrace. Unfortunately for us, it rained and was very cold while we were there so we couldn't make use of it the way we had hoped. The bed was comfortable and we had all that we needed, though if you were looking to do much cooking you might find the kitchen lacking. With so many restaurants nearby, we had no need or desire to cook. Please note that while there is a very small elevator, there are still a few steep stairs to get to the apartment so I would not recommend it for anybody with mobility issues. It is perfect for two people who want to be close to the action but have a quiet night's sleep. Communication with Milan was great.

Soraya’s place was in a perfect location walkable most places are very near metro if venturing further afield. Has everything a couple could need. Terrace is amazing just like the photos, would be fantastic for a summer stay but weather was not so conducive in early March.
Just be aware there is one flight of stairs after the elevator to get to the apartment. Also if travelling with a lot of luggage there are limited storage spaces.

This is our second time renting from Milan in under a year and would rent here again in a heartbeat. We love love love this apartment. The baloney is spectacular. We were lucky and were there on Palm Sunday for the parade that went from Plaza Mayor to Sol. I am sure we had the best view of the parade in all of Madrid. Don’t hesitate, rent this apartment for a very memorable place to stay while in Madrid.

This little place is perfectly located by the Plaza Mayor… lots of restaurants and shops. Has a balcony with a great view. Didn’t get to take  advantage of the balcony as much due to the weather. Does have a lift as it is on the top floor and curvy steps going up to the final landing without rails if that is an issue for some with disabilities. The place itself is small but quaint and has everything you need. Very clean and the host is very responsive! Would definitely recommend this place for two for a short trip to Madrid!

Great location and a beautiful terrace. Easy access and good communication.
Need for some freshening up and small renovation should be done.
All in all great experience and would recommend especially because of the terrace in nice weather.
위치가 아주 좋고 호스트가 친절합니다.

Our time in Madrid was enhanced by our stay at Soraya’s apartment. The location being right outside Plaza Mayor made getting around easy. We were able to walk to nearly all the attractions we were interested in.
Likewise, Milan (Soraya’s son) made our stay easy. He was able to offer us a place to store our luggage both at the beginning and end of our stay. He also was helpful with questions we had during our stay.
This is a small apartment, but more than comfortable enough for two people. Add to that the wonderful terrace, it is an amazing find.
When we return to Madrid, we will definitely try to stay here, again.

Tolle Unterkunft im Herzen von Madrid. Perfekte Unterkunft um die Stadt und Ihre Sehenswürdigkeiten zu erkunden.
Gleich nebenan das einzigartige Frühstück bei Mimi`s und nicht zu vergessen die einzigartige Terrasse.
Auf jeden Fall eine Empfehlung für eine Unterkunft zu zweit.
Increíble lo lindo de la terraza y lo bien ubicado; cerca de todo y fácil acceso!! Nos encantó quedarnos ahí y volveríamos sin pensarlo.

Location...location...location! If you want to be in the heart of Madrid, this is your apartment. It is only a few steps to the Plaza Major and numerous other sites, restaurants and (tapas) bars.
