As great as the location was, the best feature of this apartment is the outdoor patio. It was so much fun just relaxing with a glass of wine and watching the people go into and out of Plaza Major. In the morning, it was a great place to have coffee and plan your day.
There are a couple things you might want to consider: 1) It is a very busy area and with crowds comes noise, especially in the morning when the garbage gets picked-up and the local stores/restaurants get their deliveries. For us, it was a non-factor but others may find it annoying; 2) The apartment is small. Again, this was a non-factor for me and my wife, but if you have more than two, it could get a little tight!
This is a fabulous apartment! GREAT location and incredible outdoor patio!! Thanks Milan and Soraya! Great hosts!!
Location perfect spectacular terrace view
Amazing hosts, amazing property, amazing location, 100% recommended, if you see this property available BOOK IT NOW!!!

Soraya's property is a wonderful,  traveler's dream.  It is centrally located, literally in the heart of the action, perched over a path leading into the Plaza Mayor.  The presence of their jointly owned eatery across the  way makes proximity to the host extremely convenient to access for any support.   The location is surrounded by numerous restaurant and shops.   We were in the middle of the city's vibrant scene!  The double paned windows gave great sound isolation to the outside city sounds.  There is elevator access to the top floor unit, but the stair way is steep and tight, making it a challenge for any guest who may have balance or stair climibing issues.   The bed was comfortable,  kitchen space efficient, and the large well positioned terrace was just great.  I would definitely stay again.
Perfect!
Oasis amid the hustle and bustle.   Apartment is central to everything, but the rooftop terrace exceeded all expectations.  Highly recommend.

Excellent location! Excellent value for money! Milan was a great host who responded quickly to any questions. The apartment is small and will only suit a couple, which is clearly noted in the description. Check-in was easy and clear. We loved the terrace overlooking an entrance to Plaza Mayor - never-ending people watching. Double glazing ensured quietness! Book it if you look for a perfect location with a great view. Move on if you look for a lot of space.

Fabulous City Center location , immaculate clean, beds were comfortable, balcony is a nice plus to see action below of Plaza Mayor, I enjoyed staying  here and would highly recommend this apartment . Thank you.

This is a fantastic place to stay, with a beautiful rooftop if you book the top floor unit. We enjoyed our evenings out on the roof deck and loved the central walking location to most attractions! Soraya and Milan are very easy to communicate with and provided excellent recommendations, we thoroughly enjoyed our stay and recommend to anyone visiting the Madrid area!

Fernando es un excelente anfitrión, dispuesto a ayudar en todo momento aportando ideas y sugerencias, atento a tus necesidades e intereses. Es una gran persona y descubrirlo ha sido una de las mejores experiencias que me llevo de este viaje.
La vivienda está muy bien situada, cerca del centro, con buenos transportes y en un barrio tranquilo. Por lo demás todo es tal cual se describe en el anuncio; es una casa cómoda, acogedora y limpia.
Volveré a casa de Fernando en mi próximo viaje!!!

Mi estadía donde Fernando por dos semanas fue perfecta. La habitación super cómoda, ideal para descansar o estudiar. La casa en general muy bonita y acogedora. El barrio muy tranquilo y bien ubicado, con perfecta comunicación con las estaciones de metro y autobús. Fácil de llegar desde el aeropuerto. Fernando es un anfitrión increíble, siempre dispuesto a ayudar en cualquier cosa que este a su alcance para hacer sentir a uno cómodo y como en casa.
No dudaría ni un segundo en volverme a quedar en la casa de Fernando. Excelente experiencia!

Fernando is really dedicated host, making me a bunch of small favors in a little period of time we spent together. I have really felt like home because of the host's attitude and because of the warm atmosphere of the flat as well. Room itself is spacious and well equipped. Also, the place is well located, in decent, lively neighborhood, within the walking distance to city's main attractions (yet, metro station is a corner away). Also bearing in mind its modest price, I strongly recommend this place.
Fernando is a great host. I felt exactly like home. It is a great neighborhood, very quiet, close to public transport and shops.
The friendly host, the neat and clean apartment on a quite street, sharply priced, 1 minute from the metro station... What do you need more? I'd recommend the place to anyone.

La casa está situada en uno de los mejores barrios de Madrid y todo lo que necesitas lo tienes a menos de 50 metros.
Fernando es un anfitrión excelente, respetuoso, generoso, siempre atento y dispuesto a facilitarte lavida.
Mi estancia en la casa ha sido un placer. Sin duda repetiré cada vez que venga a Madrid.
Muchas gracias Fernando

Frenando es un dueño perfecto al cien por cien! me siento muy cómoda en la casa porque Fernando es muy respetuoso a su huésped: me deja saber cuándo sale de la casa o cuándo vuelve a casa para no sorprender a la hora de que encontremos de repente. Así que mantenemos la conversación con mucha frecuencia

Ya es la cuarta o quinta vez (he perdido la cuenta), que me quedo en la casa de Fernando y como siempre me he sentido muy muy bien.
La habitación es cómoda, luminosa y alegre. La casa esta situada en un estupendo barrio de Madrid y Fernando es el mejor anfitrión de AirBNB .

La casade Fernando es muy cómoda, linda y acogedora. La habitación esta muy bien equipada. Fernando es de lo más agradable y servicial, y para nada invasivo. Muy respetuoso, incluso fue tan amable de irme a buscar al aeropuerto en la madrugada y ayudarme con mis maletas. Pase un mes allí y estuve muy a gusto. Muy recomendable! Volvería sin dudas!

Best Airbnb ever. I stayed here three weeks for a Spanish course in Barrio de Salamanca where the apartment is located. Fernando was kind enough to pick me up from the airport, a service he provides to guests staying two weeks or more. It was a big relief to have someone to meet me when I arrived, jetlagged and disoriented, and take public transport with me to the apartment.

Fernando was kind enough to provide a starter pack of fruit, veggies, drinks, and snacks, a great help for the first few days when I was still getting my bearings. It was very convenient to have a washing machine in the apartment.

He was away in his second home almost the entire three weeks I was there, but always made sure I had everything I needed and was available via text or Whatsapp when I had a question.

The apartment is in Salamanca, Madrid's poshest district, but Lista, the local neighborhood, is down-to-earth and friendly. It is an attractive urban neighborhood with lots of little shops, cafes, and bars. From the apartment it’s a five-minute walk or less to two metro stations on different lines.

El Kiosko de Pan, a bakery and cafe, is across the street and convenient for picking up breakfast and light meals. Fernando also recommended La Antigua Churrería or Chocolatería Valor, which are close by, for chocolate and churros. There are two inexpensive gyms around the corner, one that works out cheaper for stays of longer than a month and another that is better for short-term stays. The gyms offer a wide variety of classes and exercise equipment. There is also an Orange store nearby where you can pick up a local SIM card.

I’m already planning a return visit. ¡Mil gracias, Fernando!

Me alojé una temporada larga en casa de Fernando y todo fué perfecto. Fernando es muy buen anfitrión y una gran persona,  Siempre dispuesto a ayudarte con cualquier cosa que necesites y a la vez discreto haciéndote sentir muy cómodo en su casa. La ubicación, limpieza, las comodidades y el precio de la casa son de lo mejor. Recomiendo este alojamiento de verdad!
Genial, agustisimo como si durmiera en casa. Fernando es muy atento y agradable. Repetiría sin duda.

Estive em Madrid por 12 semanas para estudar espanhol e eu não poderia ter encontrado anfitrião e apartamento melhor do que o do Fernando.
O prédio fica num bairro nobre e central da cidade, conta com várias lojas, supermercados, restaurantes e bares a poucos metros, assim que se pode encontrar de tudo no bairro e ir a pé, além de ser tranquilo e familiar.
Para quem gosta de exercitar-se há uma academia a poucos metros e também uma escola de dança com aulas de pilates, yoga, ballet, etc, justo em frente ao apartamento.
O parque el retiro está a 15 minutos (a pé).
Existem muitos meios de transportes: ônibus, bicicletas e metro que foi o que eu usei porque é excelente e te leva a qualquer lado da cidade. Além disso o bairro émuito perto do centro.
Fernando foi um excelente anfitrião, sempre me ajudando no que eu precisasse e no que ele podia e me dando dicas do que fazer em Madrid.
Quando eu cheguei foi me buscar no aeroporto, assim que eu fiquei muito feliz com sua atenção.
Como Fernando tem família em Bilbao frequentemente se ausentava confiando em deixar seu apartamento aos meus cuidados.
Vivi dias muito felizes em Madrid e, sem dúvida, o lugar que fiquei bem como e a pessoa de Fernando foram fundamentais para isso, assim que recomendo o piso de Fernando e, com certeza, voltaria outras vezes.
¡Gracias, Fernando!

This place is amazing! So affordable, very clean, bright, in the most posh neighborhood, and with all necessary amenities. Fernando really is a 'super host' - he made me feel right at home. Before I arrived he sent me very clear directions to find his home and to make sure I didn't get lost. When I arrived he gave me a tour of the apartment, and left fresh fruit for me in my room. Then when I was leaving for the airport, he woke up early to walk me to the bus station, carried my bag for me the entire way, AND paid my bus fare. Would highly, highly recommend!

Muy amable y atento, la ubicación perfecta, muy céntrica y tranquila.
El departamento amplio y limpio, muy cómodo.

En el par de días que estuve en casa de Fernando me arrepentí de no haber contactado antes con él. Hoy puedo decir que se trata de un lugar para repetir, sin ninguna duda.
Fernando es una persona muy amable, atento, respetuoso. Se preocupó de mi bienestar desde que llegué hasta que me dejó en el mismo bus rumbo al aeropuerto. Absolutamente recomendable.

La casa está en una zona perfecta. Muy cerca de todo. Pero lo mejor sin duda es el anfitrión.  Fernando es un encanto y esta muy pendiente de todo. Es más aun me quedan días en Madrid y repito sin pensarlo. Muchas gracias
Eu só posso agradecer ao Fernando por ter me proporcionado uma estadia tão boa. Se eu pudesse, daria nota 1.000 para o quarto, apartamento e para o anfitrião. Obrigada por tudo!!!!

La casa de Fernando se ha convertido para mí en un hogar en Madrid, así lo siento. Esta es la segunda vez que  me alojo allí y de nuevo la he pasado maravillosamente bien. Es un piso confortable, con todas las comodidades y con la privacidad ideal para quien se aloja allí, además de estar ubicado en un lugar precioso en el barrio de Salamanca, a pocos metros del metro y de otros medios de transporte. Fernando es un anfitrión genial, dispuesto siempre a brindar información y ayuda, en todo aspecto.

Fernando was so thoughtful and friendly! He was able to meet me at the airport and gave me lots of tips for navigating the city at a bargain. The actual space was more than sufficient and clean. I had everything I needed and I would stay again if I got the chance.

Me hospedé con Fernando del 9 al 26 de octubre del 2017. En primer lugar, debo reconocer y agradecer la hospitalidad de Fernando, que tuvo el detalle de ir por mi a la estación de trenes de Atocha, ayudarme con mi equipaje y por supuesto, darme las primeras orientaciones en cuanto al uso del transporte en Madrid.
El departamento está muy bien ubicado, cercano a avenidas importantes, por lo tanto está conectado a las diversas líneas de autobus y a varias estaciones del metro, así que es muy fácil desplazarse (a pie incluso) a otros sitios de Madrid, como por ejemplo, el centro Histórico (plaza mayor, puerta del Sol, Gran vía), a la Universidad Complutense, el Parque del Buen Retiro, el Museo del Prado, La Biblioteca Nacional, y otros puntos de interés.
Amenidades de la estancia: el departamento cuenta con agua caliente todo el tiempo, cocina, lavadora, internet y t.v., calefacción; el edificio es silencioso y tranquilo, así que se descansa bien por las noches.
Fernando siempre estuvo al pendiente de cualquier cosa que necesitase, además me proporcionó recomendaciones de lugares a visitar. Recomiendo mucho la estancia con él, no sólo por la excelente ubicación del sitio, sino porque es un gran anfitrión.
Fernando is a true Spanish gentleman who desires to accommodate his guests in any way. I felt safe and welcome.
la hospitalidad, la comunicación, la proximidad, la ubicación, la calidez , el estado de la vivienda, todo muy bien , lo recomiendo

As usual Fernando was a great host. He goes out of his way to make sure you are safe and know your easy around. The flat is comfortable and with great facilities, and in a brilliant location. You can't go wrong here.
Very friendly and great location!
Fernando es un buen anfitrión. Me recomendó muchos detalles de Madrid. La casa es bonita sin duda. Todo me gustó mucho.
Fernando es un excelente anfitrión, tiene un piso muy bonito en el mejor barrio de Madrid, ideal para recorrer la ciudad. Muy recomendable, ya que te hace sentir como en casa!!!

I had a wonderful month long stay at Fernando's place. It is very close to Lista metro station and walking distance to Goya. There is a coffee shop right outside with friendly staff and great coffee. Cafes, shops and restaurants are very close by. The room was just like the photos - it is a nice, warm, comfortable apartment with everything I needed. Fernando was away most of my stay so I had the place to myself, but if I messaged him questions about places to go etc he replied promptly with detailed answers.
Perfect for the solo traveler who wants a very clean, well-located, quiet room with a desk. Fernando is very thoughtful and responsive and will make sure you have everything you need.
Fernando fue un anfitrion 5 estrellas con mucha flexibilidad para el check in y para el check out y siempre pendiente. Lo recomiendo

Localización inmejorable en un barrio con todos los servicios y medios de transporte. A pesar que no coincidí mucho con Fernando, estábamos en contacto para todo lo que pudiera necesitar. Me hizo sentir como si estuviera en mi propia casa!!!
Fernando es un fantástico anfitrión, la vivenda tiene todo lo necesario a nuestra disposición y la zona y transporte público inmejorables

Todo excelente, justo en el tiempo que me hospedé Fernando pasó más tiempo fuera pero en el tiempo que lo conocí puedo decir que es una persona educada, respetuosa y nítida. Me encantó los detalles en la habitación y su recibimiento y también tickets de descuento para el cine y las recomendaciones de donde ir a comprar comida en cuestiones de precios y calidad.
Fue increíble para mi pasar sola porque vine a estudiar y necesitaba silencio y más que nada privacidad.
Se cuenta con todo, y todo de primera si se tiene en cuenta que estamos de paso. Limpieza excelente.
La ubicación excelente; cerca de restaurantes, cafeterías, supermercados y hasta papelerías e imprentas. Todo caminando. Bueno y a quien no le guste caminar tanto, metro y paradas de buses a pocos minutos.
Totalmente recomendado.
Muy feliz con la visita y mi hospedaje.
Abrazos y saludos, Lucy.
Kaikin puolin erinomainen majoitus.
Repetí em casa de Fernando pois me faz sentir como se estivesse em própria casa

Realmente estar en la casa de fernando es sentir que estas en tu propia casa. Fernando es sumamente hospitalario, amable y respetuoso.  La casa muy prolija, limpia, no le falta ningun detalle. El barrio tranquilo y con todo lo necesario cerca. Muy recomendable!

Fernando's place is perfectly located right in the heart of the Salamanca district of Madrid on a quiet road and a 2 minute walk from the nearest metro stop, Lista. The bedroom was super clean, as were the bathrooms (one WC just for the guest and one main bathroom with shower which was shared). Fernando was so kind and showed me how everything worked in the kitchen and was available to answer any questions. I would 100% recommend this place to anyone looking for an excellent location and spotless room in Madrid!

Fernando ist ein sehr freundlicher und hilfsbereiter Gastgeber, auch wenn er nicht immer anwesend ist.Die Wohnung ist sehr komfortabel eingerichtet und bietet alles  , was man für einen angenehmen Aufenthalt benötigt.Das Gästebett ist sehr bequem und die Dusche funktioniert einwandfrei. Ich kann die Wohnung nur weiterempfehlen und würde immer wieder hier wohnen wollen, wenn ich in Madrid bin.

Good neighborhood, easy to access all landmarks (both on foot and via metro).
Place (and room) are nice and cosy. Recommended !
Fernando helped me to file a complaint to a local supermarket customer support (and to refund my money).

Fernando es muy atento, todo el tiempo está al pendiente de tu llegada y se preocupa por todos los detalles. El lugar muy tranquilo y cuenta con todo lo necesario. Muy cerca de muchos sitios y Fernando te apoya con cualquier duda que tengas. Totalmente recomendable.
Fernando es un encanto de persona, servicial, practico y tiene una casa muy cómoda y comfortable, con todo lo necesario al alcance de la mano. Volveré cada vez que venga a Madrid.

Ha sido una estancia fantastica!Fernando vino a buscarme hasta el aeropuerto para recogerme y enseñarme el camino a su casa. Un detalle que nadie hasta ahora tuvo. El piso esta en pleno centro de Madrid, en una de las mejores zonas, al lado del metro Lista. La casa es preciosa, amplia y muy limpia. Un lugar perfecto en el que quedarse en Madrid y un inmejorable anfitrion. Gracias por todo, espero  volvamos a vernos en mi proxima visita a la ciudad!

Fernando es un excelente anfitrión. El departamento es hermoso, la ubicación muy buena, cómodo, limpio y con todo lo necesario. Fernando estuvo atento a lo que necesitamos, a la vez que nos brindó espacio y privacidad. Además ha sido muy generoso con nosotros. Recomendamos su casa y volveremos si viajamos nuevamente a Madrid
Fernando was the perfect host.  He was very welcoming, and attentive to any needs.  He was very quick in responding to any emails and texts.

Fernando was an excellent host. He was very approachable, considerate and kind. He was extremely helpful with any queries i had regarding public transport/local shops etc. His home is lovely - very clean and tidy and in an excellent location. Thanks Fernando:) I really enjoyed my stay and very much appreciate all your help.

Cet appartement historique est une expérience à part entière. Henrietta est arrangeante et au petit soin. De plus, nous avons apprécié prendre l'excellent petit-déjeuner qu'elle prépare, en sa compagnie. La chambre est petite mais un salon privatif est mis à disposition. Je recommande !!

Henrietta was a kind and thoughtful host. She was respectfulof our space, provided breakfast and gave us so many great suggestions for activities to do in Madrid. We absolutely loved the house. It was spacious, beautiful and airy, and an overall pleasure to inhabit, if only briefly.
Would highly recommend staying here !

Staying here was amazing! Henrietta is awesome, and her home is beautiful. She greeted us every morning with breakfast, as well as provided many recommendations and history about madrid. This is a must stay if you’re ever in Madrid, it truly made our experience!!
Exceptional experience! Location was very convenient, room and private bathroom were very clean and functional and Henrietta was an amazing host. Would highly recommend to anyone.

Henrietta's place is absolutely lovely and the building very historic! She gave us lots of tips and great recommendations for our time in Madrid (food, entertainment, and sightseeing). Breakfast every morning was delicious and she even gave us a takeaway version for our early flight the day we left. If you're looking for a convenient but quiet place to stay in Madrid, look no further!

We loved our stay with Henrietta! The apartment is gorgeous, great location, everything we needed was within walking distance.
Henrietta was helpful and friendly. The breakfast was a great, tasty bonus!
Although in a shared apartment you will feel completely private. The rooms were clean and tidy.
Highly recommend and would not hesitate to book again if in the area!
Thank you for having us!

헨뤼에타는 영국식 영어를 구사하는 친절하고 사려깊은 호스트입니다 :) 오래되고 유서깊은 집에 이끌려 선택했고, 헨뤼에타가 체크인시 많은 설명을 해주시는데 집에 대해 더욱 감명받았습니다. 꼭 한번 머물러 보는 걸 추천드려요! 추천해주시는 맛집도 너무 맛있으니 꼭 가보세요! 2층이고 엘리베이터가 없지만 나무계단이 너무 멋있어서 감수할 만한 일이었어요.
위치는 Sol광장까지 500m(도보 5분) 그리고 대부분의 유명한 곳도 멀어봤자 2km(도보 20분) 정도의 훌륭한 위치입니다.
개인공간을 굉장히 존중해 주셔서, 혼자 사용하는 거실, 화장실, 방, 그리고 방에 가까운 뒷문 계단이 있어 늦은 시간에 귀가해도 편하게 사용하였습니다. 헨뤼에타가 아침을 챙겨주셔서(빵, 요거트, 시리얼, 과일, 주스, 커피 등) 즐겁게 얘기 나누면서 맛있게 먹었어요! 귀여운 고양이 두마리도 만날 수 있습니다! (위피, 아칼립소)
숙소로 오는 길은 Tirso de Molina 역이 좀더 가깝기는 하지만 작은 역이고 계단밖에 없어서, 캐리어로는 반드시 Sol역으로 오세요! 그리고 아침일찍 이동이시라면 Sol역은 새벽시간에 내려가는 에스컬레이터는 잘 운행하지 않으니 C. de Carretas를 따라 내려가셨다면 왼편으로 가서 엘리베이터를 이용하세요!

Henrietta's flat is nicely laid out, very clean, and extremely convenient to public transportation. Walking distance to La Pedrera and Casa Batllo. Two bedrooms would work very nicely for three people. Nice kitchen, comfortable living area. Highly recommended! We enjoyed our stay here.

The home is charming—beautifully decorated and comfortable, with the spaciousness and elegance of the
19th-century building that it is. Lots of steps to climb with one’s luggage, so keep that in mind. The bedroom is quite small, but comfortable and has everything you need. The sitting room is lovely and spacious. The location is ideal. You can walk to Plaza Mayor, el Prado and Parque del Retiro, Museo Nacional Centro de Arte Reina Sofia, and the Thyssen Museum, as well as to countless restaurants and shops.
Henrietta is a thoughtful, friendly host who provides detailed information on transportation, places to see—anything you want to know. She provides a delicious breakfast on an elegantly set table at the time of your choice. This is a wonderful place to stay.

We can thoroughly recommend staying in Henrietta’s delightful house. Henrietta is a very welcoming host and the house is in a brilliant location for exploring Madrid. The bedroom is small but well set out and comfortable and the sitting room is beautiful - perfect to relax in after a busy day in Madrid. We also enjoyed the delicious breakfast. Thanks Henrietta.

Where to begin? We had the most wonderful time in Madrid, and our stay at Henrietta‘s definitely played a role in this. The handover went smooth & she explained us all we had to know about the apartment. In addition, she also gave us some great recommendations for food and things to see/do :) If you want a centrally located, yet very peaceful and quiet place to stay, this apartment is perfect for you.
The flat was clean and tidy - it’s really an exquisite apartment that has evidently been taken care of. The bedroom is rather small but cozy - all you need for a trip to Madrid (especially if you’re out most of the time!). We really appreciated having our own bathroom with clean towels and all the amenities we needed for a 6 day stay. Henrietta also offered to make us breakfast, which we kindly accepted for some of the days during our time there - what a wonderful idea! She has two adorable cats, which we saw here and there :)
We don‘t say this often but our experience at Henrietta’s flat was impeccable and we will definitely be back next time we visit Madrid. Thank you for having us!

Amazing!!! Henrietta is a kind, helpful and very friendly host. Her apartment is in the center of Madrid. You can reach all of the main attractions by foot. The street is quiet, there are no bars in the streets of the accommodation. But you have to go only a few streets further to have a lot of bars and nice restaurant spots. Henrietta has two lovely cats. Breakfast with bread, marmelade, granola, yoghurt and coffee was included. Henrietta gave us a lot of helpful recommendations and tips for our stay in Madrid. Thanks to this great hospitality - we would always choose this Airbnb again!

Henrietta is a phenomenal host! The room is small but makes up for it in the cool building, prime location, and wonderful company. Henrietta serving breakfast each morning was very kind and a great way to start the day with good company and a plethora of recommendations for seeing the city. Five stars all around!

Het appartement combineert de grandeur van het oude theater met de Britse gezelligheid van een B&B. Het ligt erg centraal, op wandelafstand van de grote bezienswaardigheden. Vlotte en flexibele ontvangst door de gastvrouw en leuke babbels bij het ontbijt. Schitterend verblijf!

Alojamiento acogedor y único.
Anfitriona amable, atenta y familiar.
Es una experiencia y un placer hospedarse ahí.

A wonderful historical place in the centre of the city! Great hospitality! Henrietta is a lovely woman with a lot of knowledge of Madrid(where to eat ,which places to visit etc) and about the history of the place as well. She is really helpful and kind. The breakfast was delicious. We’ll be back soon 🌹
Great location, quiet, clean.  Henrietta is a lovely hostess.

We had a lovely time staying at Henrietta’s place. She was very friendly and gave us lots of great information about Madrid and her neighbourhood. The breakfast and chats were highly enjoyable too. Thanks.

Henrietta is the penultimate old fashioned bed and breakfast host. This is the experience AirBnB was supposed to be for.
The old charm of the converted theater, replete with clawfoot tub and ornamented staircase gave the flat a wonderful charm. Henrietta was lovely, spending time to give us the lay of the land with notes on a map, directing us to nearby attractions and restaurants.
A delicious breakfast of fruit, granola, toast, coffee, tea and juice were served every morning. The room was cosy and warm, and had a large window for when it got stuffy.
Henrietta gave a great welcome to Madrid. I highly recommend you stay with her!

Had a wonderful stay at Henrietta’s flat. The location was great; a short walk to local attractions and great restaurants in the neighborhood. The flat was lovely and spotless. Wi-Fi is reliable in the sitting room but not the bedroom. That was not a problem for us. The bedroom was cozy. The bathroom was not far down the hallway. The bathtub and bidet added a touch of luxury to our stay. Breakfast was wholesome and good quality. Henrietta is a fabulous host. She gave us great tips for enjoying the city. She was on hand to help us when needed. Her cats were sweet. Overall, I would recommend staying at this beautiful heritage property.
개인적으로 사용할 수 있는 응접실의 분위기가 정말 좋습니다.아침식사도 깔끔하고 맛있습니다.헨리에타님도 친절하시고 편의를 봐주시려 합니다.단점은 침실방이 작습니다.

We have just returned from Madrid and we will always have fond memories of staying with Henrietta! The location is great for a weekend getaway - all major attractions and museums are within walking distance. Apartment is absolutely unique and contact with Henritetta is wonderful. We got a lot of advice that made our stay easier and more enjoyable.

Grazie all’ospitalità di Henrietta la mia vacanza è stata indimenticabile.
La casa è la ciliegina sulla torta per vivere un soggiorno speciale.
L’accoglienza della padrona di casa è stata amichevole e divertente. Inoltre la colazione è superlativa.
Si sente l’amore, la riservatezza e la cordialità di un modo semplice e gentile di accogliere.
Grazie immensamente cara Henrietta.

Henrietta’s place was more than accommodation, it became an integral part of our memories of Madrid. Her home is more than the sum of the accurate photos, in large part due to the presence of Henrietta herself. “There aren’t enough good words,” my mother said. A gracious host of a distinctive home with a convenient location. We also loved the cats! Looking forward to repeat visits and consuming more of Henrietta’s excellent homemade granola. Many thanks!

This was a unique and beautiful stay. I loved the architecture of the building as well as her personal style. Henrietta was so helpful in the checking in process as well as how to find different attractions in town. I also appreciated her breakfast and morning chats. The apartment was so close the main walking area I never used the metro or taxis with plenty of bars and restaurants only a couple of blocks away. Highly recommend!
Great location, very center. Lovely breakfast. Cute cats. Small bedroom in a spacious apartment, enough for one or two people. Living room area is very nice, green, and well decorated.

Henrietta's place is the loveliest BnB we could have hoped for in Madrid. She's an amazing host who sent us her instructions to reach the Apartment as well as practical informations well in advance so we could plan our trip in the best way. Located in a beautiful building, the home is extremely well placed, and very quiet at the same time. Coffee shops, restaurants and museums are all within walking distance, and if you feel like it, you can always have breakfast with Henrietta who's a very sweet and interesting person.
To make things better, Henrietta's cats were also here to ask for back rubs and attention. They won't jump on your lap but will still provide most appreciated pet love.
The room is located in a very quiet and private spot in the apartment. It has its own bathroom (a few meters away in the same corridor) and also it's own front door.
If we ever think of going back to Madrid, we will for sure book Henrietta's room again, without hesitation!

L'appartamento e' molto centrale , in 10' si raggiungono tutti i luoghi d'interesse della città.
Henrietta e' stata molto premurosa nel dare consigli e fornire informazioni . La sua casa e' molto bella e piena di storia e di "carattere". La camera da letto , come si può vedere dalle foto , non e' molto spaziosa , ma in compenso si ha la possibilità di avere a propria disposizione l' intero salone , nonche' uno dei bellissimi bagni della casa.
Ci sono poi due gatti che , contrariamente alle mie aspettative , sono "molto discreti" : si notano appena , e non rilasciano odori per casa ( e' come se non ci fossero ).
Henrietta e' un host molto professionale e ci si sente come a casa propria. Buon rapporto qualita'/prezzo , rispetto alla scelta degli alberghi . Pertanto e' un posto che consiglio .
Enjoyed the place, the area, the communications, the cats, the quiet, the flexibility, everything. Will highly recommend!

Well - a classy joint,run by a classy dame who even has a classy name - would sum up Henrietta's place.! This is a unique apartment. On entering the huge  doors the sight of the double wooden staircase is truly impressive. The lack of a lift was not an issue as the stairs are easy rise. The second floor apartment is beautifully decorated,elegantly furnished with lots of quirky details.  The bedroom is compact but has lots of storage space, a comfortable bed with very good bed linen and furthermore two plump pillows each. We were provided with tea/ coffee making facilities in the room . We enjoyed the breakfasts because as well as being delicious and nicely presented it gave us the opportunity to chat with Henrietta who gave us lots of very useful information and was very warm and entertaining. We did not use the sitting room as we were out and about. Henrietta's place is incredibly well located surrounded  by bars and restaurants.Highly, highly recommended  and we will return.
Henrietta was a gracious host.  amazing location and great place to make you feel at home.

마드리드 시내 중심부에 위치한 역사적인 건물에서 생활할 수 있는 훌륭한 숙소입니다. 18세기에 지어진 건물에서 진또배기 마드리드 로컬 생활이 가능합니다. 호스트인 헨리에타는 늘 친절하게 챙겨줬고 관광에 도움이 되는 유용한 정보를 알려줘서 덕분에 머무는 기간을 더 알차게 보냈습니다. (일요일에 다녀온 플리마켓과 빈티지샵은 완전 다른곳에 온 느낌이었어요) 아침마다 먹을 수 있는 그래놀라요거트와 토스트는 정말 맛있었고 커피도 너무나 좋았습니다. 침실과 화장실이 붙어있지 않긴 하지만 덕분에 벽에 있는 다양한 예술작품을 감상할 수 있고 따로 쓸 수 있는 거실이 주는 느낌 너무너무 좋습니다. 헨리에타와 함께한 아침시간이 소중한 기억으로 남을 것 같습니다.

I had a great stay at Fernando’s abode, it has most the facilities one could hope for including kitchen and its use, washing machine, two bathrooms etc. Fernando kindly meet me on the street and gave me a good orientation of the apartment and suggestions on where to visit. The apartment is located in the Salamanca area (very close to Lista Metro and not far from Goya), it has a fruit shop across the road, mini supermarket around the corner (plus numerous tapas bars etc nearby) and a very good fresh veggie/food shop not too far away near Goya, Cortes Ingles is also walking distance as is Retiro Park.
A high recommendation and good value.

The location is perfect.
So easily accessible from the airport. Mostly escalators and a few stairs. A few minutes from Lista metro. This means you have easy access to all of Madrid yet have peace and quiet if you require.

la casa de fernando es genial para visitar madrid, a menos de 200 metros tiene el subte, sobran supermercados y tiendas en sus cercanías.adicionalmente la casa cuenta con todo lo que puedas necesitar durante tu estadía y la inmejorable atención de fernando quien es un excelente anfitrión.
sumamente recomendable.

El lugar está muy bien ubicado en una zona agradable, a unos minutos de la estación de metro o incluso se puede ir a pie al centro. Aunque no tuve oportunidad de interactuar mucho con Fernando, es muy amable y te puede recomendar sitios para visitar. La casa está muy ordenada y tiene prácticamente todo lo que uno puede necesitar. Muy recomendable.
Ubicación perfecta, piso muy acogedor con todas las garantías. Fernando amable, discreto y siempre atento. Perfecto.

se trata de un domicilio particular 100 × 100. El propietario comparte la casa y pone a tu disposición con generosidad  todos los espacios comunes. Es una vivienda típica del barrio de Salamanca muy confortable y en un vecindario tranquilo y muy céntrico. Repetiría la experiencia sin dudarlo.
Great ospitality!

Had a great time staying here during my trip to Madrid. The apartment was clean and comfortable and the deck was such a luxury. Sitting up above the city while the sun set was wonderful. The apartment was right in the heart of the Plaza Mayor, making it very convenient to go pretty much anywhere. The bed and couch were both very comfortable, the shower was great, and the space was thoughtfully set up. I would definitely want to stay here again !

El departamento es tal cual las fotos. La terraza es todo! Yo fui con un bebé y no lo recomiendo tanto con bebés porque es chiquito y tiene bastante escalera que accede al departamento. Pero el departamento es muy lindo para aprovechar la terraza en verano y la buena ubicación!
Great location with a beautiful terrace overlooking the entrance to Plaza Mayor. I would highly recommend this place if you are planning on exploring the center of Madrid.

You can’t get more central in Madrid than this apartment. It’s a perfect size for a single or couple planning to spend much of their time touring the city. The terrace is spectacular. Thanks to Saroya and her son for a short but pleasant stay.

Die Lage der Wohnung und die Terrasse sind einfach fantastisch!!!
Die Wohnung ist zwar klein, hat aber das Nötigste, was Du für einen gelungenen Städtetrip brauchst und sie war vor allem sehr sauber! Auch die Kommunikation mit Soraya und Milan war sehr informativ, schnell und hilfreich! Wer gerne Mitten im Geschehen ist, und doch alles Überblicken möchte, wie wir, der wird sich an diesem Ort sehr wohl fühlen!🤩

We loved the location, the unique setting with large rooftop terrace overlooking an entrance to Plaza Major, and the helpful quick responsive attention from Milan. Additionally, the unit was sooo quiet! Perfect for sleeping. I highly recommend if you don’t mind climbing some stairs, and want to live a bit like a local :) The location is perfectly located for exploring La Latina and surrounding areas. You will have no trouble at all finding great spots for food and drink nearby. One of our favourite spots for a craft beer was La Osita and for tapas, Lamiak, both on C. de la Cava Baja.
It was a very short stay, less than a day. But it was easy and nice.

This place is AMAZING. Right in the heart of the action. And the sun deck is perfect for enjoying the mid-afternoon lull or cocktail or both. Perfect for a single traveler or a couple. Can’t say enough great things about the place. Will definitely be coming back.
On top of that, Milan was an excellent host. He greeted us at check-in (though he didn’t have to) and he made himself available if we needed him or if we wanted recommendations. 10/10.

Nice spot in heart of Madrid, for the price it was great but definitely needed some updates - outside terrace chair were very warn & no umbrella so couldn’t sit at table mid-day. Bathroom drains all clogged but all easy things to work around. For the price it was fine but with some sprucing up it would be fantastic
Super séjour à Madrid, l'appartement est idéalement situé au centre de la ville.
Convenient location and amazing rooftop view!
Great apartment in the heart of Madrid. Excellent option.
This location and view from the terrace made our stay unforgettable! We had the best time ever. I will always book this flat when I travel to Madrid!! Perfect!!

This apartment is centrally located in the heart of Madrid, with a very large and impressive terrace. The rest of the apartment is on the smaller side, but not out of the ordinary given the central location. Our hosts were very helpful, friendly and responsive throughout our visit. I would recommend it!

Die Wohnung von Soraya war sehr schön und hatte alles was man braucht. Die Dachterrasse und Lage waren natürlich ein Highlight. Trotz der der Lebhaften Lage war es außergewöhnlich ruhig. Milan gab uns hilfreiche Tipps um uns den Aufenthalt zu vereinfachen und zu verschönern. War ein schöner Urlaub. Danke an Milan und Soraya für dieses nette Gastfreundschaft
Such a wonderful location!  The flat was very comfortable with an amazing view.  Highly recommend.
Best view I ever seen. Amazing place
This was the second time I’ve stayed here, and it won’t be that last. Absolutely love this space.
I was very happy with my stay here. The apartment is as described. The host was communicative and the apartment was clean.
A great place with an amazing terrace in the heart of the city

Great stay! The view was incredible and it was great to be in the heart of the city. It was also very helpful to leave out things at Mimi’s upon arrival prior to check-in to explore the city without our luggage.
A wonderful spot right in the heart of everything. Despite its central location, it’s surprisingly quiet and peaceful, making the balcony a perfect place to unwind. I would definitely book again.
lovely place!
Soraya’s place was the absolute best! Amazing location, apartment, and views. Really helpful host and couldn’t ask for a a better stay.
Buenísima ubicación, muy buen trato hacia el huésped y facilidades en todo momento. Repetiría.

What a fantastic stay in the middle of the Gothic Quarter, overlooking an entrance to Plaza Mayor. Located near some great eating places for breakfast, squid boccadio and delicious tapas. The deck was wonderful to sit out on and overlook the comings and goings on some very hot nights. From the apartment we walked a different direction everyday and thoroughly immersed ourselves in our surroundings.
Deck was a highlight of our stay

Soraya's apartment was one of the best Airbnbs we've ever stayed at. The apartment is cute and cozy, but the rooftop terrace is something else. The view is incredible and there is nothing better than coming back home after a walk to relax under the sky, or having breakfast there in the morning. The location is also very very good.

We absolutely loved our stay at Soraya’s lovely apartment. Milan greeted us when we arrived from our long flight and made us feel very welcome. The place was perfectly located so we could walk to our favorite activities, restaurants, coffee shops, and creperies - you must go to Mimi’s!😁 The balcony is so great… overlooking the hustle and bustle down below. Fresh air was always breezing through the apartment and the nighttime was surprisingly quiet and peaceful considering the busy neighborhood. We highly recommend!
La terraza es muy top!

Even better than the reviews suggest. Amazing location in the heart of plaza mayor. Rooftop terrace is fabulous. Very quiet at night even with all of the hustle and bustle downstairs, very little noise gets into the apartment. Best Airbnb I’ve stayed at, well worth it!

Great Location!!!
Nice rooftop deck!
Tiny place, but deck is space and lovely
This place was right in the middle of everything.  The balcony was  huge plus for lounging and looking out over one of the cooler spots of the city.

We loved our stay! Great location, incredible balcony, and right next to so many of the plazas! We stayed here for our last night in Spain, and it couldn’t have been more perfect! Bed was very comfortable as well. Milan was really responsive and helpful when we were scrambling from the airport to the apartment, which we are super appreciative of. Would stay here again and recommend to guests who are looking for a a central stay in Madrid!! Thank you for a great stay!

Lejligheden er super fin og har en virkelig dejlig tagterrasse. Vi hørte ingen larm om natten, trods den centrale placering:)
Størrelsen på lejligheden er perfekt til to personer - vi var tre og det gik også helt fint, men det var en smule trængt.
Kæmpe anbefaling!😊

This is a lovely little flat, its clean and has everything you need for your stay, and the rooftop terrace is fantastic, perfect place to watch the city wake up.
The location is in the heart of the city. You are surrounded by cafés, restaurants and bars. it's just a short walk to the shops.
we had a lovely holiday and would definitely recommend this apartment.
Don't hesitate! You can beat the location and the outdoor space was so pleasant. Bed was very comfortable, we slept so well. This was a perfect first time in Madrid. Highly recommend. Thank you!
Wonderful stay in the heart of Madrid! Easily walkable to many sights and restaurants. Rooftop was fantastic! Very quiet despite being close to all the action. Would stay here again!

Lovely apartment in an excellent location, easily walkable to everything of interest.
Small problem initially with lack of towels but this was dealt with quickly.
Loved the outside space… shame about the rain!

mooie accommodatie op toplocatie. had wat problemen met het openbaar vervoer om tot de accommodatie te geraken en kreeg jammer genoeg geen reactie/hulp van Milan. zeer goede matras en goede warme douche. heel mooi groot terras. koffie aanwezig. minpunten: zeer moeilijke communicatie met Milan, extra lakens pas bij 2de nacht, extra deken pas na heeeel lang aandringen bij 3de nacht. radiator maakt veel lawaai 's nachts, dus kon je niet gebruiken. appartement was niet proper gekuist. nog haartjes gevonden in de badkamer. lakens zijn gewassen maar vertonen plekken, geur van riolering in de badkamer. ook lawaai buiten tijdens de nacht. jammer, want toch heel veel betaald en dan mag je toch wel verwachten dat het in orde is en dat er betere service is.

By far this has been the best place I stayed so far, perfect location, lots of things to do around everything is whiting walking distance..
Location, location

Very convenient location and the host was responsive.  The pictures are all accurate but I think they do a good job of making the apartment look larger than it is.  I was traveling by myself so so wasn’t an issue but a couple may find it a little small.  But, weather permitting probably would be on the patio majority of the time.  If i could i could give 4.4 stars i would but just not quite a 5 stars in my opinion

Wir hatten eine großartige Woche in Soraya's Apartment! Na klar, es ist klein und bescheiden, aber wir kamen ja auch, um die Stadt hautnah zu erleben - dafür war es einfach perfekt.
Die Lage ist unschlagbar, so nah am Plaza Mayor, man ist in der Nähe vieler Attraktionen, guter Restaurants und Einkaufsmöglichkeiten. Zudem hat man das Gefühl, dass hier wirklich der Puls der Stadt schlägt. Es macht Spaß, von der Terrasse aus dem emsigen Treiben unten auf den Straßen zuzuschauen, bis es dann zur Nacht hin langsam friedlicher wird. Bis auf eine Ausnahme haben wir immer sehr gut durchgeschlafen, auch wenn uns das Bett etwas zu schmal war. Dadurch, dass das Zimmer zu einer ruhigen Nebenstraße liegt, ist es nachts ziemlich still, das hatten wir so gar nicht erwartet.
Der Kontakt zu Milan war angenehm und er kümmerte sich sehr nett um uns. Toll war auch, dass wir am Abreisetag noch unsere Koffer in der Crêperie gegenüber abstellen konnten.

The area was very well serviced by metro and easy to get to from the airport. There were lots of shops, restaurants and bars in the immediate vicinity, and other neighbourhoods were very easily accessed by public transport or walking. Lots of cultural landmarks like the museo del prado accessible by foot. It is a 4 minute walk to the San Miguel market too, which is a real highlight. The apartment is compact but perfect for two, and the terrace is such a gem with lovely views of the surrounding buildings and space to enjoy meals and drinks out there. The host is very responsive and helpful. If you are a light sleeper, bring earplugs as the area was noisy at night which is to be expected in such a central location. It was a lovely place to stay and a great location from which to access lots of Madrid’s great food and cultural spots.
An incredible place in a unbeatable location. We had a great experience. Soraya and Mailan were superb. Very responsive and accommodating.
Had a perfect stay here! The location is unbelievable and for the two of us we felt like we had lots of space. Thank you for such a lovely time!
Great location. I highly recommend this place. Hosts were responsive and very helpful

The apartment is what you see in the pics. Excellent in location, charm and utilities. They only downside is that Madrid is turning unbearably expensive overtime. I had a great time overall and Soraya and Milan are great hosts and super helpful. Would repeat any time.
Second stay at this fantastic location.  we bookend our Spain trip with a stay at Sorayas's place. OuOutstanding!

Some of if not the most amazing hosts i have ever experienced, helped me book a great dinner, gave me so much recommendations and was always on top of responding. They are very patient hosts who truly want you to enjoy the time you have there. You can tell they genuinely care about their guests
The apartment was perfectly located in the heart of Madrid and the beautiful balcony was amazing.

Un emplacement merveilleux ! Et une terrasse magique !
Nous nous sommes régalés.
En el centro de Madrid, lo mejor la terraza.

Fernando's place is ther best you'll find. It's perfect. Great location, great room, everything you need and a wonderful host as always.
I had a wonderful stay and was able to study. He's a superhost for a reason.
Fernando is very kind. He is so helpful that he responsed my questions quickly. In addition, my roon was cleaned every week. I spent comfortably.
Fernando ha sido un excelente anfitrión, siempre atento y dispuesto.

Fernando es un excelente anfitrión. Es la segunda vez que Voy a su casa y la experiencia ha sido nuevamente muy agradable. Excelente climatización para el invierno y una vivienda en general muy confortable y bien ubicada.
Fernando has a great place in a great neighborhood. Thank you and looking forward to see you in the future
The place was on a great location. Soraya was very helpful and available within seconds if any questions needed. I love the terrace/balcony. I will definitely recommend her place. Thank you  Soraya!

I would be remiss to not point out the terrible smell from the bathroom, maybe due to old pipes. This made our stay entirely very unpleasant. Stained bed sheets upon arrival, kitchen sink clogged, broken kitchenette table. I don’t recommend this place, despite the balcony.

We had an amazing stay in Madrid.  The apartment is really in a perfect location.  We walked to everything we wanted to see and the furthest was maybe 25 minutes.   You can walk to the Sol Metro or Train station in five minutes.  The apartment is charming and the terrace is fantastic.  Even though it was about 5 degrees C we would sit in the sun on the terrace for 1.5 hours in the afternoon to recharge before going out again.  We were able to leave our luggage across the street both before and after our stay which definitely helped.  We would not hesitate to stay here again.
Logement très bien situé avec une terrasse incroyable, les hôtes sont très réactif et arrangeants !

DE plek in Madrid voor mij.
Perfecte locatie en super vriendelijke en lieve eigenaren!
Ik kom niet voor niets al jaren terug bij mijn 2e thuis

Fantastic stay! The hosts were wonderful and everything went smoothly. While the apartment was on the smaller side, it lacked nothing – everything was smartly organized and thoughtfully equipped. The highlight was the beautiful, spacious terrace – a true gem in the heart of Madrid!
One of the best airbnbs we have ever stayed in.

Extremely great location! And great terrace. The apartment however is a very small studio with an awkward staircase that can make it seem smaller. Still perfect location where you can walk anywhere, great views. Great for 1-2 people.
Such a lovely AirBnB and great support from Soraya. I would return in a heartbeat. If anything the place is even nicer in real life!
Very cozy apartments in the heart of Madrid. An amazing terrace, a comfortable bed. We really liked to stay here.
위치가 환상입니다. 마요르광장 1분 솔광장 5분입니다. 우버타기에도 좋고 맛집들도 근처에 다있습니다. 테라스보고 이 숙소를 선택했는데 너무 좋았습니다. 다만 방이 크지 않아 딱 2명까지가 적당합니다.

This house was a last minute gem a very cute studio apartment right in the heart of the plaza I found it very convenient to walk to all my favorite restaurants, and museums! The view off the terrace is amazing especially during the night. I would recommend this place to anyone it’s a little pricey but is worth it so if you’re on a budget this probably isn’t the place for you!

Soraya’s place was absolutely amazing! We couldn’t recommend it enough!
We arrived much later than anticipated and Soraya and her team were incredibly accommodating - making life so much easier for us!
The location is fantastic - right in the heart of the city, and with everywhere in walking distance.
The flat itself was beautiful, spotlessly clean and the terrace is just fantastic! We can’t wait to stay again!
What a fabulous place. Great location. Very walkable. The apartment looks brand new and very fresh.

Eine sehr schöne, aber kleine Wohnung mitten im Zentrum von Madrid - ideal zu zweit! Die Terrasse war ein Traum. Durch die Lage im 4. Stock ist es nicht allzu laut, aber nicht komplett ruhig - man ist halt mitten im Geschehen. Leider ging das Wlan nicht, was aber nicht allzu schlimm war.
Perfekt für ein paar Nächte in Madrid :).
Excelente propiedad, muy bien ubicado, la terraza es muy buena

Diese Wohnung war wirklich etwas besonderes! Man ist mitten im Geschehen, aber wenn die Fenster zu sind, hat man seine Ruhe.
Die Lage ist wirklich top, die Wohnung zwar sehr klein, aber sie hat alles, was man für einen entspannten Aufenthalt braucht (vor allem die AC!)
Great place and location. As described.
Amazing place and hosts - everything was clean, well organized and I immediately felt like home!

Place as described. Definitely small, but the patio is large. Doesn’t really overlook Plaza Mayor but nice view all the same. Host was communicative and made check-in and check-out, including transportation to the airport, a breeze. Only real complaint was the motion sensor light that can’t be turned off. Anytime anyone moves, it lights up the whole place which is annoying at 4am if someone gets up for whatever reason. Other than that, place was very good for spending majority of time outside exploring Madrid.
The balcony/patio is incredible. Exactly what we needed for our trip to Madrid. We would recommend!!

Apartment was super clean and right near Plaza Mayor for a great location. Surprisingly, little noise bothered us from outside but it was a little noisy within the building, you could hear noises from the apartment below.
Note for the penthouse there is one floor of stairs required.
I loved the terrace and everything was new and spotless. Reservation and check in process was smooth!

Fernando was very warm and helpful providing all the instructions to arrive and tips to enjoy the city. His flat is very well located and in a nice neighbourhood. I appreciate his kindness and assistance during my stay. I will return again. Happy new year! :)
La ubicación es muy buena, muy cerca de todo y con muy buena comunicación ,  el alojamiento perfecto, y la hospitalidad de Fernando inmejorable.
Una casa linda, acogedora, me sentí en casa, gracias Fernando

Fernando era un anfitrión muy amable. La cocina, aseos y baño están fuera de las habitaciones y cuando Fernando estaba en casa era muy educado y tranquilo, no me molesta nada de compartir el piso. Gracias, Fernando!
Fernando was a very nice host. The kitchen, shower and toilets were far away from the bedrooms and when Fernando was home he was very considerate and quiet. It didn’t bother me at all to share the apartment. Thank you, Fernando!

Estaba feliz de extender mi estancia en el alojamiento de Fernando. Puedes ver mi otro comentario. ¡Gracias!
I was happy to extend my stay at Fernando’s place. You can see my previous review. Thanks!
Fernando is great, great stay!

Todo lo que ya se ha dicho sobre este piso es cierto en cuanto a ubicación, limpieza, comodidades y más aún sobre la inmejorable experiencia de estar en una casa, de sentirse en un  hogar. Estuve ahí dos meses, por estudio y ha sido el sitio ideal ya que pude a la vez descansar, estudiar y permitirme disfrutar de Madrid con tranquilidad y libertad. Fernando y su familia son los anfitriones perfectos, amables, atentos y discretos. Solo puedo recomendar el espacio y porsupuesto que volvería ahí!

Fernando is such a nice host.
He welcomed me in Atocha station, which really helped me.
He is always nice, replies to me very quickly, told me some cafes and restaurants nearby.

Un lugar agradable con buena localización y Fernando es muy atencioso.
Lo recomiendo seguramente!

You could not hope for a more hospitable host! I was very comfortable in Fernando’s apartment and his daughter was a great resource for local travel advice. The apartment is centrally located which enabled me to easily see local sites and also areas outside of Madrid.
Fernando has a wonderful place, and he is a wonderful host and person. I strongly recommend his place. :)

Nice, small room in a great location. Fernando was very communicative and met me upon arrival. Wifi was very fast. Had access to kitchen and refrigerator. Nice shower as well. Close to center of Madrid, especially El Retiro. Fernando gave me good restaurant/terraza recommendations nearby.

Fernando是一位非常貼心的房東，他還特別到機場來接我，幫我推行李到他家。。詳細解說了如何開門、開窗之後，幾乎在我在的時間他都儘量出去讓我能夠自在地使用房內的設備。晚上稍微有點熱，但也有電風扇入夜以後就會慢慢變涼。
Fernando還推薦了附近的景點還有餐廳，他真是非常貼心的一位好房東。主要的景點都幾乎走路就可以到，所以我很推薦這個地點。
Espaço maravilhoso

A comfortable room in a very good location in Madrid. Fernando communicated very well and was very helpful. Good kitchen facilities.
The room met all my expectations.
Great stay at Henrietta’s place. Great breakfasts provided, terrific central location and great instructions ftom Henrietta fir getting around

We had a great stay with Henrietta. The room was comfortable and very quiet for such a central location. Henrietta was a very warm and welcoming host. She had great recommendations for food places and made sure we were orientated to Madrid. Would recommend!

We really enjoyed our stay in this incredible flat. Henrietta is a great hostess. She provided us with great tips, was friendly, open and helpful.
The apartment is on a side street so it is very quiet despite being downtown. Many of Madrid's sights are within easy walking distance.
Thank you Henrietta !
Sabine and Alina, Munich

The best Airbnb in Madrid! Henrietta’s apartment is stunning - sprawling (so even though you’re sharing her space, it feels private), charmingly and beautifully decorated, in an amazing location (we didn’t need to take public transportation once), and, crucially, pretty cool despite the hot weather. Henrietta is a kind and charming host; she had plenty of recommendations and provided us breakfast every day despite our late wake-up times. Staying here will be a highlight of our trip. (Be aware that this is a second-floor [third-floor, in American parlance] walk-up, but the stairs are quite grand and not steep so navigating them with luggage is not challenging.)

Henrietta was so kind and welcoming. Our bus was delayed quite late and she welcomed us in anyway. She showed us many local places on a map, introduced us to her fur baby cats, and asked us what we'd like for breakfast. The location was great, off a quiet street but very central
Her home is amazing and so historical, and decorated in such a pleasant, interesting way. We felt very comfortable at Henrietta's place!
Highly recommend! Beautiful apartment and good recommendations that made it easy to get around the city
Henrietta è una perfetta padrona di casa. Precisa e premurosa.

Henrietta è un host impeccabile. Solare, gentile, molto curiosa e disponibile, è un piacere conversare con lei al mattino dopo che ha messo in tavola la sua golosa colazione. Henrietta ama l’arte e la vita e la sua casa mostra tutto l’amore per il bello. Impeccabile, pulitissima e ben posizionata, consigliata per un primo approccio alla città di Madrid.

Our stay at Henrietta's place was fantastic. She's incredibly welcoming, embodying the essence of what Airbnb is all about. The apartment is stunning and we enjoyed the lovely breakfasts and morning chats with Henrietta. The location is great, with La Latina and Sol just a short walk away. Don't miss out on the nearby Hammam Al Ándaluz. We’ll definitely come back and highly recommend Henrietta’s apartment for an unforgettable experience.

Henrietta was an impeccable host, had helped us right from the moment we landed in the airbnb in every possible manner. The airbnb clearly stands out, especially with its interiors, being very spacious and absolutely clean, in short, made us feel at home. Henrietta also cooked us some superb breakfast, and was also kind enough to guide us more on the city and also listed the ‘must do’s’. I would personally recommend this Airbnb strongly. The location is very central, almost everything is walkable from there. In short, the experience was absolutely wonderful.

Merci à Henrietta, pour son accueil.
À l’exception de la chambre que nous avons trouvée un peu petite, le logement est de très belle qualité et très bien placé.
Henrietta personne très agréable et à l'écoute. Très bel appartement propre, bien situé. Seul bémol taille de la chambre et du lit.
晚上出来上厕所的时候，猫会突然蹿出来，虽然我很喜欢猫猫，但真的会被吓到

My daughter and I stayed with Henrietta for three nights while exploring Madrid. She was very responsive with communication and flexible with checking in and out. The location is fantastic for shopping, eating and visiting the old part of Madrid. Easy walking distance to the Prado, palace and everything in between. It couldn’t have been better and we felt very safe. On a personal note, we thoroughly enjoyed meeting Henrietta and spending time chatting with her over breakfast. I only wish we could’ve stayed longer!
Wir hatten eine sehr außergewöhnliche Wohnung, mitten im Zentrum von Madrid, sehr charmant eingerichtet, sehr leckeres Frühstück und eine sehr gastfreundliche Wirtin.
A delightful stay with a very accommodating host.

Henrietta and her cat are delightful. We enjoyed our visits over a nice breakfast. Henrietta has a beautiful flat and the common areas were welcoming and comfortable. You’ll have a large private bathroom and a small guest bedroom with a really great bed. We slept well there after walking all over Madrid from this centrally located place. Highly recommend!

非常干净温馨的小屋，
可以感觉到Henri为了照顾我们的英语交流有放慢语速，非常的贴心，
早上一起吃早饭聊天，是在马德里非常愉快的回忆，
可惜跟小猫只打了个照面，时间太短没有机会更熟悉。
Superbe emplacement! Hier de choix!

Henrietta is a great host; we particularly enjoyed the chats we had with her at the breakfast table each morning. Henrietta gave us some great recommendations on things to see whilst in Madrid which made our stay even better.
Great property, excellent location with all attractions and restaurants etc. within walking distance. The property was extremely well presented and squeaky clean throughout. The only minor negative was that the bedroom we stayed in was a tad small and disjointed from the bathroom and lounge.
Would definitely recommend a stay.

We spent four days at Henrietta's house and were delighted with everything about the apartment! Henrietta is an amazing host—she treated us to delicious breakfasts and recommended wonderful places to visit. Everything in the apartment was in perfect working order, and the design was beautiful!
Enchantés par notre séjour chez Henrietta ! Accueil très chaleureux dans un magnifique appartement en plein cœur de Madrid. Nous reviendrons !

Beautiful building and apartment within a short distance from all points of interest in the center of Madrid. Henrietta is an amazing host, communicative, responsive, and knowledgeable of the city. Would definitely recommend staying here if you get the chance!

Had a wonderful stay at Henrietta’s place, beautiful home and very good location. Everything you need to visit is within walk, Henrietta also provides a lot of useful information and recommendations, thanks for the hit on the vintage shops!!  The living room and bath are spotless and well organised. Thank you again for preparing breakfast for us and welcome us with warm heart, will definitely come back and visit again!
房东Henrietta真的很好，为我们仔细介绍了房子、周边等内容，每天早上还为我们做好了早餐，房子很大很大，虽然卧室小了一些但是能够接受，还有可爱的猫咪陪伴，希望有机会还能再来，也祝Henrietta身体健康，每天开心。

A true BnB, which is so hard to find today. Hal co-hosted for the first part of my trip, but both her and Henrietta were friendly and considerate.
Easy to find, but it's up several flights of stairs with no elevator, so be aware. Plenty of restaurants nearby, including a jazz club and flamenco shows. Plus, you'll get fed in the morning before you leave!
Room is very cozy, big bags will be a challenge. Well equipped with everything I needed (although no washer/dryer). The bathroom is a little bit from the room, but not far. It's nice and big as well.
Enjoyed my stay and recommend you consider it, especially if you are solo or travel light.

Perfecte locatie.
Bijzonder gebouw: voormalig theater.
Host heeft een zeer groot appartement, vol met oorspronkelijke elementen. Sfeervol.
Zeer vriendelijke en gastvrije host.
Uitgebreid ontbijt, met interessante gesprekken.

L’appartamento di Henrietta è in posizione centrale e tranquilla. Si trova in uno splendido palazzo d’epoca, molto caratteristico. Henrietta è gentile, disponibile ed ospitale. Gli unici difetti della sistemazione sono il fatto che la camera da letto é piccolina e che il bagno non è adiacente alla camera, per il resto tutto perfetto.

Beautiful apartment and location, this was truly a unique experience. We really loved having breakfast with Henrietta every morning (yogurt, granola, toast). The apartment is beautifully decorated- the bedroom is small but you got a large living with pretty furniture (and great books!) at the other end of the apartment. The bathroom is separate from the bedroom. The location is great- 10 minute walk from the museums, and from most of the tourist sites. I would definitely recommend if you’re looking for an authentic bed and breakfast and a place full of charm.

Was very lucky to have found this location. Henrietta was an exceptional host and we felt right at home.  Loved the area and the accommodations . Easy to get to anywhere and great recommendations from her.   Would love to revisit.

Me and my friend had an amazing stay at Henrietta's. We were greeted very openly and got all kinds of advice and tips as to what to visit in Madrid. Every morning we got a real nice breakfast and Henrietta always replies quickly at the AirBnbapp. She's honestly interested in the people that visit, which I think is really valuable. The appartment also was really beautiful. We had a lovely stay.

Het verblijf bij Henrietta was precies waarvoor airbnb ooit is opgezet. Ze liet ons welkom voelen in het prachtige, stijlvolle appartement waarvan we als gast een mooie zitkamer, een ruime badkamer en een bescheiden slaapkamer tot onze beschikking hadden. Het is groot genoeg om je eigen gang te gaan en tegelijkertijd was het leuk om elkaar bij het ontbijt te spreken. De slaapkamer en het bed zijn niet zo groot, dus als je niet als geliefden reist, moet je er rekening mee houden dat je toch knus bij elkaar ligt.
De locatie is echt geweldig. Alles is op loopafstand te bereiken. Je bent in het centrum, maar de straat zelf is lekker rustig. Tenslotte was de kat een heel aandoenlijke co-host.
Bedankt voor deze fijne ervaring, Henrietta.

Staying here was an absolute treat! A gorgeous apartment with a great historical context. Henrietta was very kind and welcoming, she shared recommendations and made our trip an absolute delight! Highly recommend for your stay in Madrid!

Henrietta’s apartment was beautiful! The location was perfect and it was so easy to walk or metro to different parts of the city. Henrietta was a great host, who made a lovely breakfast and gave us lots of great tips and recommendations. If you’re visiting Madrid I would really recommend staying here!

Recomiendo que se alojen con Henrietta. El piso es precioso, bien ubicado, muy cómodo y limpio. Henrietta es una persona sumamente agradable, afectuosa y responsable. El desayuno es riquísimo y completo. Nos dio muchas instrucciones de lugares donde ir, y nos habló de la historia del edificio que es maravilloso. Henrietta, solo tenemos palabras de agradecimiento hacia vos. Ojalá podamos volver pronto. Un abrazo fuerte, y un mimo para Calipso de parte de nosotras dos.
Henrietta是很热情很周道的房东，早餐准备得很丰盛！起居室太棒了，很有西班牙特色。我们不小心弄坏了房东的钥匙，但房东很温柔没有责怪我们，还安慰不要担心，她真的是很好的人！
Henrietta was extremely friendly and helpful. Great local knowledge. Bedroom is small but we were able to put suitcases in passage that was only accessed by us.  Great location.

Wir haben den Aufenthalt bei Henrietta sehr genoßen. Henrietta ist eine sehr liebevolle und humorvolle Gastgeberin, die sehr um unser Wohl bemüht war. Der Empfang war sehr herzlich und ausführlich in den Tipps, die wir bekommen haben. Das Frühstück sehr lecker mit selbst gemachtem Granola und frisch gepresstem O-Saft.
Das Zimmer war klein aber fein, uns hat es völlig ausgereicht. Da es am anderen Ende der Wohnung lag, hat man trotz des Zusammenlebens genug Privatsphäre. Dazu trägt auch das sehr hübsche private Bad bei.
Die Wohnung ist wunderschön und ein Erlebnis an sich, wenn man etwas für Architektur und Geschichte übrig hat.
Ein großer Pluspunkt war die zuckersüße Katze Calypso, die sehr gesprächig ist und uns täglich Gesellschaft beim Frühstück geleistet hat.
Die Lage ist unschlagbar, man war mitten im Geschehen und konnte alles fußläufig erreichen - trotzdem war es ruhig.
Wir haben es sehr genossen und uns wie zuhause gefühlt, tausend Dank dafür! Wir kommen gerne wieder!

Muy linda experiencia, alojarse en un teatro antiguo reciclado en el Barrio de las Letras de Madrid. Henrietta prepara un desayuno exquisito todas las mañanas, y las charlas son super interesantes y animadas. El dormitorio es bastante chico y el baño está separado, pero el living es realmente lindo y da gusto pasar un tiempo ahí. Gracias Henrietta!

My sister and I had the most wonderful time staying in Madrid at Henrietta's beautiful and spacious apartment! Henrietta is fantastic host, her cat adorable and we really enjoyed having breakfast with her in the mornings. Henrietta was very responsive and gave us lots of great recommendations starting from the best way to travel around Madrid to restaurants, bars and vintage markets in the area.

Henrietta was above & beyond anything we could expect from a host, —she did everything she could to make us feel comfortable & prepared to take on Madrid. Every morning she made us breakfast & regaled us with great chat. Everything about the apartment is fantastic: from the decor to the wonderfully slinky, floppy, cat, Calypso. Me & my girlfriend Gaby would dole out 100 stars if we could.

Nice and clean room in a calm and safe area.
The owner is very helpfull.
He helpt me a lot with my late luggage.
Will be back.
Muy atento, situación inmejorable. Un 10
Ótima localização ótimas instalações. Bom tratamento e fino gosto.

Fiquei um mês na casa de Fernando, neste mês não houve nenhum problema. A casa é aconchegante e o quarto supriu todas as minhas demandas, a cama é ótima. Fernando e sua filha Tânia são amáveis, cordiais e atenciosos. Me senti muito a vontade, houveram períodos em que fiquei completamente sozinho por 3 dias sem problemas. Enfim recomendo muito essa casa, fui muito feliz.
Estuve un mes en casa de Fernando. La ubicación es ideal, muchas líneas de metro cerca. Habitación y departamento totalmente equipados. Todo perfecto, 100% recomendable!

La casa de Fernando es bastante cómoda por diferentes razones: la hospitalidad, la ubicación y el espacio de la habitación. Además, Fernando es un anfitrión siempre dispuesto a ayudar en lo que necesites. Lo recomiendo.

Ik heb 9 nachten doorgebracht bij Fernando, Fernando gaf me heel veel inside informatie over de stad.
Uitstekende informatie over “ hoe er te komen” vanaf het vliegveld.
De verblijfsruimte is groot genoeg voor een persoon. Om van keuken en toilet gebruik te maken loop je door hun ‘leefruimte’/ woonkamer wat ongemakkelijk voor beider privacy. Het verblijf is prima.

El mejor alojamiento que pueda haber en Madrid. El departamento es muy cómodo, amplio y tranquilo. Muy bien equipado y con una ubicación fantástica en pleno Salamanca. Fernando es un superanfitrión, por lo que se preocupa por cada detalle. Está atento a todo lo que puedas necesitar y recomendarte los mejores paseos y visitas. La habitación da a la calle, es amplia y luminosa, con lindas vistas. Todo funciona perfecto y está impecable.

El piso es exactamente como está en la descripción y en las fotos. Muy limpio y organizado y con una ubicación excelente.
Fernando es una persona muy amable y solicita, te contesta pronto y te ayuda con información desde antes de la llgada. También ha dejado alcohol gel a la disposición para descontaminación cuando uno lleva a la casa.
Seguramente volvería.

Mi hijo se ha alojado con Fernando el primer trimestre del curso universitario, que puedo decir mas favorable que hemos decidido reservar para los dos trimestres siguientes, por la amabilidad, el ambiente de estudio inmejorable, situación perfecta. Decir que mi hijo Universitario ha tenido y seguirá teniendo en esta casa el ambiente perfecto para lo se le hace necesario para cursar una carrera universitaria.  Muchas gracias Fernando por todas las facilidades y buen hacer que tienes con mi hijo. mil gracias

Mi hijo ha pasado todo el curso de septiembre a junio en el alojamiento de Fernando y el anfitrión es una persona muy atenta, respetuosa, muy educada y todos los adjetivos de buen hacer que pueda poner.
El alojamiento tiene todo acondicionado como el lo describe.
El ambiente de tranquilidad que allí se respira es el idóneo para un estudiante de universidad que se toma las cosas en serio y se que mi hijo ha sido y seguirá siendo muy feliz en el alojamiento de Fernando.
El próximo curso ya tenemos reserva para que vuelva a estar en el alojamiento y con Fernando, eso me da como madre mucha tranquilidad.
Gracias Fernando

appartamento super accogliente. posizione ottima, quartiere tranquillo, pulito, e con molte attività a pochi passi. semplicemente perfetto. il padrone di casa gentile, disponibile e preciso. non posso dare più di 5 stelle solo perché è il massimo. grazie Fernando!
Estancia muy confortable y host inmejorable. Muy amable y dispuesto con cualquier peticion.

Stayed at Alex's flat for two nights -- superb location, spacious and clean flat with wifi and all amenities (towels, soaps, kitchen items...).  Alex was a great host -- met us and showed us the flat and even offered to show us around the neighborhood; he also sent us restaurant recommendations when I asked for them and was always prompt in all correspondence leading up to (and during) our stay.  I would certainly stay here again!!

Great location, beautiful apartment to get away to for the weekend. Alex met us when we arrived and was very helpful in letting us know what was available in the area. The apartment itself is pretty spacious, with two bedrooms, a living room, a seperate "office" connected to the main bedroom, kitchen, and dining room area that leads to the bathroom and laundry room. The apartment also gets great ventilation - it's absolutely lovely to have the windows and balcony doors open with the breeze flowing through the apartment. There were 3 of us staying there (a couple plus a friend), so the size and layout of the apartment was perfect for us and allowed the convenience of cooking breakfast and having somewhere nice to relax and truly enjoy a laid-back weekend in the city. The street was quiet (even with the balcony doors open), but literally a minute walk from the closest restuarants. Definitely would recommend to others!

Great apartment and superb location, right near all the restaurants and bars and walking distance to many great other places. Alex was very helpful up to the trip and even picked us up from the airport  then showed us around the neighbourhood!

We stayed for 2 nights. Everything was great. The apartment, the location and Alex was very helpful. We booked the reservations one day earlier than our actual arrival. He accepted to change it the night before our trip.

Indeed the best Location. Everything you want to see in nearby. The big musea like Prado are around the corner. The atmosphere in the street is really nice and cosy, makes you feel at home in a minute. The appartement was big and contained everything we needed. Also no noise in the building which made us sleep like logs. And: Madrid is such fun! Great places to eat and drink and dance!
Host was really easy going and did advice places to go which we didn't even get to because there is just too much!
Great place, also for people with kids.

22 jours superbes dans un appartement et un quartier qui répondaient parfaitement à ce que nous recherchions...un endroit chargé d'histoire, à proximité des incontournables du quartier des Bourbons. Faire ce quartier à pied est un pur bonheur.

Nous avons particulièrement apprécié la disponibilité d'Alex et son souci de répondre à nos besoins au cours de notre séjour. Nous étions trois ce qui veut dire tout l'espace nécessaire pour partager mais également préserver notre intimité. Nous avons fait des jaloux dans notre groupe.

Awesome, awesome location. Right in the heart of the city, close to shops, bars, restaurants, etc. Very big place in nice condition, with everything you could need. Great, friendly host. Highly recommend!

Five stars cannot even begin to describe my experience in this flat. It really is the BEST LOCATION. It was less than a 10 minute walk from the Atocha Train station; less than 5 minutes to many local museums and a 20 minute walk to Sol. It was the perfect place with access to plenty of bars and restaurants in the vicinity. There is a great nightlife scene around the apartment. Aside from the location, the apartment accomodated my parents, my grandparents, and myself. The amenities were oustanding. The free wifi enabled my to keep in contact with everyone including friends and work colleagues back in the states. The kitchen was a huge plus, as we cooked several times. This location is close to the Anton Martin market, which has very good produce, fish, meat, and cheeses. The apartment was immaculate and very spacious. I plan on making arrangements to stay here in the future if it is available. I truly felt that I got the maximum Spanish experience as opposed to staying in a hotel. My family's feelings are mutual.

Onto another completely separate subject; Alex is one of the most compassionate, knowledgable and helpful people i have ever met. He goes out of his way to help his guests. The greatest example of this was when he took my sick father to the emergency room in La Paz hospital. My father called the emergency line and an ambulance wouldn't come. Little did we know that he had pneumonia. I called Alex explaining the situation. Even though he was sick himself, Alex offered to drive 30 minutes from his house to take my Dad to the hospital where he was expeditiously admitted to the emergency room.

After everything that transpired, I have found a friend for life in Alex. I would highly recommend doing business with him if you plan on visiting Madrid for an extended period of time. He is very fair and understanding. The flat was awesome, but my entire experience with Alex completely overshadows it in the most positive way. STAY HERE!!! You will not regret a single thing.

Alex's apartment is fantastic. It is roomy, comfortable and has about everything you could need -- two good sized bedrooms, kitchen, living room, study, bathroom, and a room with a dresser and wardrobe to out clothes and suitcases in, in addition to a nice wardrobe in the other bedroom.

The beds felt great at the end of the day and Alex has lovely sheets, towels and duvet covers.

Alex went out of his way to make us feel comfortable in the apartment and in Madrid. He took us for a tour of the neighborhood and recommended restaurants and bakeries.

The location could not be better-- just a few blocks from the prado, the reine sofia, the thyssen, a metro stop, within walking distance of the atocha train station , some elegant hotels .

The apartment is great, spacious, perfectly located. About half of our visit, there were just two of us but for the other half there were three and it still gave of us lots of room in which to live.

You are within walking distance of most of the things you will want to see and within a subway ride of the rest.

Alex worked hard to make sure we were comfortable and n=knew a little about madrid.

It was a very pleasant experience to stay at Alex's place. Alex is a very good host who really cared to make our stay as comfortable and enjoyable as possible. His house is no doubt best located to look around many of the tourist attractions in Madrid. We just walked to everywhere and could walk back home when my wife felt tired to get recharged. It has everything you need to live a few days in Madrid (kitchen, washing machine, etc) and we could shop close at supermarkets such as Carrefour Express and Dia. Lovely house. It was a 5 stars experience!
