Four adults stayed at Alex's for 4 days. Everything about the apartment was great, and the location was fantastic; we walked to all the tourist spots, didn't have to walk far to the nearest bar, but slept great (very quiet). Highly recommended.
Fantastic location, spacious flat & host Alex could not have been more helpful.  We had a great stay.
Excellent  locaition, cannot be any better. Alex was attentive. Perfect accomodaition for two couples. Next time we"ll definitely choos Alex.
A great place! Great Price! Alex a good host!

My husband and I stayed at a very lovely apartment hosted by Alex in Madrid. The location was optimal. The place was very clean and neat. The communication and correspondence was exceptional. I really enjoyed this experience and the stay. Highly recommend to anyone visiting Madrid!

My girlfriends and I celebrated our 30th in this very lovely apartment located in a very nice part of town. It was super easy to get there from the airport, taking the airport express bus only 2 euros. The Parque de Madrid was around the corner which made the morning jog possible. Also in the corner was the drop off for the Madrid Tour Bus, which s a great way to get around town and sight see. The apartment was just what we were looking for, it was very spacious and kept in excellent conditions, loved it!  Alex and his parents are excellent host. I highly recommend! :)

Thank you, Alex!  We were in Madrid just before the general strike on March 29th, and when we discovered that our flight back home to Boston had been cancelled, Alex (and his parents) were sympathetic and flexible.  We did manage to get a plane to the US on the 29th, but it was so good to know that we had a backup--Alex's apartment--for another night if we needed it.  Alex's parents were very helpful in meeting us (Alex was out of town at the time) and giving us all the information we needed for our stay.  Comfortable beds, fantastic location, (It's hard to think there's a better one in Madrid), lots of good advice in the house manual.  We lost some time while trying to deal with the repercussions of the strike, so we'll have to come back again when things are a bit calmer!  And when we do, Alex's place, with its funky, cozy, completely unique atmosphere will be the place we will stay.

We very much enjoyed our stay at Alex's apartment. There was lots of room for our family of four (me, my husband and two college age children.)   The apartment is charming; very comfortable, nicely decorated and well-equipped with everything we needed.  It is in a wonderful location, close to the major museum and plazas. We walked everywhere!  We all agreed this was a much better way to experience Madrid than staying in a hotel.  Alex was very helpful, getting back to me on email when I had a question before our visit. His dad was wonderful showing us around the apartment and explaining everything when we got there. We couldn't have had a better experience.

For sure THE best location!
Nice apartment well situated, with all mod cons.
Alex and his family are very great and helpful people.

We met with Alex's father Derek, he was a wonderful host and did a great job at showing us around the apartment and answering all our questions.  One very helpful tip was the airport express bus that is within walking distance and only charges 2 euro, definitely useful especially since we had to get to the airport for 4 am.  The apartment is amazing and spacious, right in the city center and walking distance from all the sights.  It is also in walking distance from the main train station and an info center.  I would highly recommend staying at this apartment!

The apartment was in an excellent location....walking distance to all of the main highlights of Madrid.  The piazza right outside the apartment was beautiful.  The architecture of the buildings around the apartment is beautiful.  The apartment is really big by Europe standards and is really nice inside.  There is everything that you may need on your stay....they even had coffee, tea, spices for use which was really nice in the mornings.  And Alex's dad even brought in some milk for the coffee so we would be set to go when we got there.  We were greeted by Alex's father as he was away.  He is a very nice man who showed us around the apartment and even made suggestions on where we should go and pointed us in the right direction.  They were both very accomodating on th check in and check out times which was really nice.  I would suggest this apartment to anyone.  I have staying in a couple throughout Europe and this is one of the nicest.

Excelente estadía, el apartamento tiene una localización insuperable, cómodo y a la vez en un barrio tranquilo. Tal cual aparece en las fotos y es descrito por el dueño. Durante la semana que estuvimos Alex se encontró fuera de Madrid, pero los padres se encargaron de todo y estuvieron pendientes. Recomendado.
This is a marvelous location and a very comfortable and spacious home base for exploring Madrid.    We would happily return here on future visits.

verry nice home and place. in the center of the center. never use bus or metro. ideal for 4 peaple or big familly.
thanks derek-ficu israel

A real privilege to have stayed a week in such a fine home. Very comfortable, gracious hosts, ideal location. It was our second stay in Madrid and the first in this area. Access to museums can't be beat. We laughed that the walk from the apartment to the Prado entrance was only slightly longer than the line waiting to get in first thing in the morning! Quiet, large, welcoming.

I stayed at Alex's apartment at the end of my trip in Madrid, and it was the perfect ending to a wonderful vacation. Alex was in Thailand, but he was in contact with me via email, and was so prompt at responding to my emails...which was much appreciated! His father, Derek, met me on the day that I checked in. He was so polite, and showed me around the apartment, answering any questions that I had. The apartment itself is very spacious! You feel like you are right at home in Madrid. The location can't be beat, either! I am a big fan of Retiro Park, and it is a hop, skip, and a jump from the apartment. Plus, you're right across the street from the Prado Museum. I would definitely recommend Alex's apartment, and I hope to come back and visit!

We adored our stay in Alex's amazing accommodation. The location could not have been more perfect, near museums, restaurants, parks. His father was incredibly helpful showing us the flat and available for any questions we had. I would stay here again in an instant! Thank you Alex, Derek and Concha.

Buenisimo!! We LOVED our stay in Madrid! The apartment was PERFECT! We could spread out and relax with our 2 teenage boys and everyone had their own space. And the kitchen and laundry facilities helped out a lot--being in the middle of our Europe travels. The location of the apartment could not have been better. It was just a couple of blocks from the Prado and a short walk to everything else, and enough off the busy city streets that it felt more like a neighborhood. The corner bakery about a block away became our favorite stopping place 2-3 times a day and they are now our new friends! Alex and his parents are SOOOOO helpful and so kind and fabulous to work with--going out of their way to make sure we were comfortable. We were in a "luxury" hotel in Paris right before our stay in Madrid and, hands down, our accommodations in Madrid were way way better! We would stay there again in a heartbeat--I wouldn't even think of looking anywhere else. This is a gem!

Excellent accommodation in Madrid, right near the Prado Museum and the Retiro Park--location could not have been any better! Also very close to the metro lines, which made travel to and from the train stations very easy. Many great restaurants and bars nearby. Very friendly neighbors. The apartment was spotless, spacious and lovely. Alex's father greeted us and showed us everything around the apartment. Alex was very friendly and responded quickly to any and all questions. Highly recommended. If I come back to Madrid, I would hope to stay here again. Thanks again, Alex, for everything!

El anfitrión Fernando, es una persona extremadamente honesta, servicial, cuidadosa, en todo es un gran anfitrión.
Mi hijo ha estado en su alojamiento todo el curso escolar universitario pasado y estamos muy agradecidos por el trato recibido, tanto a nivel personal, como con el alojamiento, con la ubicación, por todo.
solamente puedo escribir elogios sobre Fernando , su alojamiento y me quedaría corta.
Recomendable al 100% y espero poder alojarme otra vez allí en próximas ocasiones.
Really nice location and appartement. Fernando was very attentional and caring about my well being.

La estancia con Fernando fue perfecta.  Muy atento desde el primer contacto.  El piso muy lindo, grande, limpio y bien ubicado.  Está cerca del metro y en el barrio hay muchas tiendas para todo lo que necesita.  La habitación da a la calle, muy linda y cumplió con todas mis necesidades.  Se lo recomiendo a cualquiera que visite Madrid, o incluso para estadías más largas como la mía! Muchas gracias Fernando ☺️

Fernando ha estado muy atento y abierto a cualquier necesidad. Emplazamiento extraordinario en el barrio de Salamanca. La casa muy limpia y con todos los servicios necesarios. Buena temperatura y silenciosa para descansar.

the accommodation is as described: nice room, comfortable bed, everything very clean and Fernando is very nice and helpful.  the apartment is centrally located and you can quickly get to the city center or the airport.  the nearest metro is just a few steps away.  I can only recommend this accommodation and will try to book it when I come to Madrid again

Super nice neighbourhood, Fernando is super attentive and great host. Explains perfectly how to have best experience. Room is not so big, but clean and warm and you get great value! Definitely would recommend Fernando’s place!

Fernando is a perfect host. He is kind, welcoming and does everything to improve your stay. the apartment is so nice and the location is perfect. I have no bad thing to say about this apartment and I stayed for a month. would recommend 10/10

Es en realidad una excelente opción para hospedarse tranquila y cómodamente. Su ubicación es ideal para conocer lugares emblemáticos de la bella Madrid, además cuenta con suficientes posibilidades de transporte. El apartamento es idéntico a las fotografías, un lugar confortable y acogedor. Fernando es un excelente anfitrión y agradezco profundamente su atención, hospitalidad y confianza.

Pleasant and easy stay ! Great location of the apartment, near several metro stops and in a nice area of the city. The apartment was cozy but plenty of space, and all the amenities you could need. Fernando is very kind and will make sure you have everything you need, and good communication ! He answered ll my questions thoroughly and promptly. Overall a very easy stay !
Me sentí muy bien recibido desde el momento de mi llegada hasta la entrega del apartamento, Fernando una persona muy servicial y su apartamento es hermoso. 💯🙏🏻💪🏻

Fernando is a communicator - from the time you book til you depart you can be sure that he will provide excellent tips on dining, places to visit, even details on the 200 bus from Av. de America (when no staff was available on site to provide). Apt is about 20 min walking to the Prado, Thyssen & Reina Sofia. DId this a few times while in MAD with great weather -- definitely doable & no need to stay near centrally/near all the tourist traps. Extra nice touch on the parting gift which my mom thorough enjoyed! Thanks again Fernando!!
Fernando es un host muy sympatico y responsible y tuve una estancia en su casa con mucha placer. Quiero quedarme ahí otra vez cuando voy a Madrid de nuevo! :)
Segunda vez que me quedo en la casa de Fernando. Si viviera en Madrid, me encantaria vivir en esa casa. Buena ubicación,  buenas condiciones. Gracias (de nuevo)

A wonderful place in Madrid, where one can feel at home, at the same time in the heart of Madrid.
Fernando gives time and attention to the guest and the house, and one can feel this.

È la seconda volta che vado da Fernando. l'appartamento è sempre molto curato, pulito e accogliente posizione super comoda (3 linee di metro, bici, bus). Fernando è una persona molto gentile, discreta e sempre disponibile. Non posso che dare il massimo e ringraziare!

Mi estancia no hubiera podido ser mejor. Estuve tres semanas en el piso de Fernando y todo estuvo fenomenal. Limpieza, comodidad, respeto y sobre todo privacidad.  Coincidí pocos días con él y su pareja Olga. La habitación es más grande que en las fotos y el piso es súper funcional; tiene todo lo que una persona puede necesitar durante su estancia. Sin dudas volveré. Gracias!
Una estancia muy cómoda, ubicación céntrica y bien comunicada y ha sido facilísima la comunicación con Fernando.

Me recibió muy bien indicándome todas las pautas a seguir, lugares donde comer, supermercados y estuvo pendiente de que estuviese todo entendido. La casa está muy bien y tiene de todo. Sin duda la próxima vez que venga no dudaré en contactar a Fernando.
Perfecto, ubicación muy buena y comunicación eficaz con Fernando. Han sido 2 meses muy buenos, gracias!

Fernando tiene muchos detalles, es amable y se esfuerza porque la estancia sea muy agradable. La habitación es tal y como se ve, muy confortable. El piso es muy auténtico. El barrio,  el más elegante de Madrid. Buena comunicación, buena conexión. Inmejorable!
Fernando was a great host! Very informative and friendly. The place is very close to everything and in a great neighborhood.

Alex's place i exactly as advertised, by being right in the center of it all as far as museums go. The members of my travel group, the Nomadness Travel Tribe, had nothing but great things to say about the locale, the condition of the apartment, and how spacious it was. Highly recommended.

Derek, Alexis' father, met us at the door to give us a great orientation. The place had everything one would need. Two good sized bedrooms. A large bathroom and large kitchen. There was a balcony that overlooked some other beautiful buildings in the area. There's wifi, cable, daily trash pickup and more. There were two of us, but the place could have easily fit 2 couples or even more if some people are willing to sleep on the sofa. The area is great. It's within a block and half from the Prado. It's an easy walk to Gran Via, Chueca, Sol and Plaza Mayor. There's a little store on the corner and the tapas place below, Cerevceria Cervantes was pretty good. I highly recommend their pulpo a la gallega and tosta de marinero.

There are also plenty of nice bars and plazas within a few short blocks.

I HIGHLY recommend this place!!
Alex' place is fantastic. Perfect location, and a great, spacious apartment with everything you could possibly need. I hope to stay here again the next time I'm in Madrid.
No hay un piso mejor situado que el de Alex en Madrid, es gigante, está muy bien aprovisionado y todo le funciona. Volvería ahí sin dudarlo.

Our 5-day stay in Madrid was magical because we were lucky enough to rent this flat. The location is incredible, whether you intend to visit the most popular museums (less than 5 minutes walk) or find incredible eating and shopping venues.

The flat itself is colorful, spacious, quiet, very clean, and comfortable. You can really spread out and relax at the end of the day - I do not think Alex's pictures of the flat really convey how much space there is in this home. The kitchen was well stocked and had everything we needed to make our breakfasts and a few dinners. We were at the end of a 15-day tour, so we were glad to have the washing machine to freshen up our wardrobe.

Alex was on vacation when we were in town, so we missed out on meeting him. What we got instead were Alex's fabulous parents, who showed us around, kept in touch with ideas for dinner and shows, and immediately rescued us when we couldn't figure out the internet.

I will recommend this flat to all my friends.

This apartment was phenomenal!  the location could not have been more perfect for seeing the city.  It was clean, comfortable (even in the dead heat of August!), and provided a perfect space for us to rest up for the days/nights of seeing the sights.  If you're coming to Madrid, this is the place to be!

We had the pleasure of being met at the apartment by Alex's father Derek who was warm and helpful and put us immediately at ease. The apartment is very spacious and comfortable with all the facilities one needs. It is also brilliantly located for access to the best museums, a close walk from the airport bus and a 14 minute walk with suitcases to Atocha railway station.A note to the tall, the building is 200 years old and a couple of the doorways are only about 188cm high, so be mindful to duck when entering the bathroom and kitchen.
We stayed here for 3 days and loved it. The place is in an excellent location, right in the middle of everything. Everything was clean. I would definitely stay here again.

We really were pleased with the apartment in Madrid. It is very large with two bedrooms and has good airflow because there are windows at front and back facing into a small courtyard. There is also air conditioning in three separate rooms but we didn´t use it. The front windows look right down the street to the Plaza de Neptune, so the apartment truly is in the centre of the city. We especially liked the streets up Cervantes which had many restaurants, bars and shops and seemed very Spanish. We made good use of the kitchen and had breakfast in every morning. All three major art galaries are minutes away. It was definitely better than staying in a hotel.

We can only add to the glowing reviews already written.Apartment is comfortable,large,really lovely atmosphere and in a brilliant location. It was a pleasure to meet Alex's dad, Derek , who was at the apartment to hand over keys and welcome us.Madrid was great fun and this is a great base to go out and come back to.The three big galleries only minutes away and a truly beautiful park,Retiro,only ten minutes  walk away.Plenty of places to eat nearby and bars,despite the busy streets it was possible to get a quiet nights sleep in the apartment.Great place altogether.
clean and well furnished. perfect location. friendly and obliging host.

Our stay in Alex Ive Pérez apartment was a great experience and we enjoyed every minute.The apartment is spacious and practical with large kitchen, large living rooms, dining room and two bedrooms with comfortable beds. Everything is beautifully decorated with views to the fine old buildings. The apartment is located on the 4th floor with elevator and is located in the middle of Madrid with beautiful old houses and narrow streets and just around the corner a number of lovely tapas bars and within walking distance to both the Prado and Thyssen Museum.
Gudrun og Ole John - Copenhagen

It was a lovely stay and the best location in Madrid. Would highly recommend the place to anyone. The flat was huge and my 2 year old enjoyed running around the entire flat. Derek, Alex's father was lovely.

Alex's father, Derek, welcomed us as Alex was traveling. Derek was a lovely person and he showed us the apartment. The apartment is very spacious and clean. The location is GREAT - close to many restaurants, bars, metro. Would definitely stay there again when we are in Madrid.

Art lovers will love this location. It was perfect. Close to all the museums and galleries we wanted to visit in Madrid. Also found some terrific restaurants in the neighbourhood. The apartment was very spacious and well equipped for our 5 day stay. Alex's parents were so welcoming and gracious in their assistance. We will happilly recommend this apartment to friends planning on visiting Madrid

Alex was a brilliant host for our Madrid stay. From our initial enquiry until our departure date he and his family made sure our queries were answered and that we were well looked after. The lovely apartment is exactly as described and the location is just amazing - we could not have wished for a better set up. It was quiet, clean, spacious, cosy and just steps away from most of the key attractions in the city. Comfortable beds, great shower, lots of helpful guide books, brilliant heating system (it was chilly over the Halloween weekend!) and fully equipped kitchen. Being able to step outside and eat in great restaurants and visit the Prado in just a few minutes walk was really special! HIGHLY RECOMMENDED!

Alex was the best you could possibly expect. When we arrived, we faced a problem where the elevator was going to be out of commission in the building during the visit - a big problem as my father is getting up there and the flat is on the 4th floor. We spoke to Alex, who was working abroad, and he instantly jumped on the case - contacting the building manager to get the elevator works rearranged. It's this kind of personal touch that makes all the difference, and we couldn't be more appreciative.

The flat itself is great - perfectly located, spacious and comfortable. And with an induction cooktop to boot, it's perfect for foodies who like to hit the markets in Madrid and then cook.

I can't recommend Alex highly enough.

This is truly a great locatioin. We were two couples sharing the Suite. The Suite was very clean and we enjoyed our time spent in the Suite. However sharing a bathrrom between two couples had inherent challenges. Also the mattress in the second bedroom was somewhat soft and sags in the middle.

Our family of three truly enjoyed our stay at Alex's apt. The apt. is in a historic building with loads of old world charm, is fully equipped, and has a great wi-fi connection! It's in a perfect location to all the major art museums and convenient to the train station for day trips. We were met by Alex's father, Derek, who gave us the keys and a tour of the apt. Both Alex and Derek were wonderful to deal with and immediately responsive if we had a question.
We recommend La Daniela (just steps away from the apt.) for tapas and Casanis at Ventura de la Vega, 9 ( a short walk away) for dinner. It's a beautiful French-Spanish restaurant with delicious food, reasonably priced. Salud!

We had a great time! The apartment is in a great location, Alex and his father were super nice, and the apartment had everything we need and enough space for all 5 of us. And, it was very clean.
In short: We highly recommend it!!

This is a great place, a great location and a great host.

It seems that the beds in both rooms are new. We slept like bears. Super comfortable beds and the rooms get pretty dark which is highly appreciate (after some Madrid partying :)

Nothing not to L-O-V-E about this place.

Highly recommended.

A+++++
Perfect spot for a Weekend in Madrid. Could not be at a better location with great tapas-bars at the very corner of the building. Great host as well. Alex's father Derek welcomed us and provided us with all the necessary information. Alex him self is a very quick replier with any question one might have.
The apartment was clean and comfortable with all the necessary equipment.

This is a really good apartment. Top location, clean, plenty of room, WIFI, all facilities are available. The beds are of good quality. It does have double beds, which is fine if you're a couple, but not if you go with friends. However, this should not spoil the fun of a weekend Madrid.

Generally, I would definitely recommend this apartment.

The flat is perfectly situated for those interested in Madrid's art museums.  It is very close to the Prado and the Thyssen-Bornemisza, and close to the Reina Sofia. The other important places to visit in the old center of Madrid are within easy walking distance - the Plaza Mayor, the Puerta del Sol, the Palacio Real and the Cathedral.  The flat is comfortable and nicely decorated.  It has everything you need for a pleasant stay, including a well-outfitted kitchen.   My wife and I were there with our son, and we all enjoyed it.  The two bedrooms were comfortable, and each provided privacy. Be aware that you need to walk up one flight of stairs to reach the elevator, which will then take you to the 4th floor where the flat is located.  We had no problem in making contact with Derek, Alex' father, who was waiting for us in the flat when we arrived in town.  Derek was kind enough to show us the neighborhood, including a terrific restaurant, Casanis, where we ate 3 times during our 2 week stay.  Alex was solicitous and made sure we had everything we needed.  He came by to visit and we very much enjoyed his company.  This 2 bedroom home is highly recommended on all counts.
The apartment is very well located, in the town center. And the owner is very available to adress any question in charming way. Thank a lot to them. 100% recomanded.

vast and comfortable apartment, and so close to the prado and thyssen you nearly trip over them. rather good restaurants, bars, etc, all within 5-10 mins' walk from the flat. i did not get the chance to meet alex but his father, derek, is a charming chap. great for a family stay.

Great location and wonderful host. We enjoyed the large apartment, it had everything we needed and was very clean. The beds were  comfortable, the area is quiet for Madrid and so we slept well....nice to have a relaxing place after long days in the city!

The flat was fabulous!! A cosy home away from home. It was spotless, the beds were comfortable, the wifi dependable and the kitchen well supplied for cooking needs. The location was excellent. Safe neighborhood next to all of the museums and exhibits.

Alex's father, Derek, went out of his way to accommodate my mother (who had a broken ankle) and myself during our two week stay in Madrid. He was there to greet us at the flat upon our arrival and there to help with our very early departure - a charming and perfect host!

I would give this flat a ten out of ten rating and would love to stay here again. Highly recommended!!

Alex' apartment was ideal for our recent stay.My wife and I and our son and daughter in law were very comfortable during our recent stay.
The apartment is well set up and the kitchen has all that is required.
The central location was a great advantage and allowed us to walk to the key attractions of Madrid.
Alex' parents met us on arrival and were very quick to assist when we encountered a minor problem.
Overall highly recommended.

Alex's apartment was perfect for us. It's in a quiet historical neighborhood, close to everything in central Madrid. We walked everywhere from the apartment (The Prado, El Retiro Park, The Thyssen Museum, Plaza del Sol, Atocha Train Station etc). The apartment met all of our needs: clean, secure, quiet, comfortable, and roomy. When we return to Madrid, out first choice will be Alex's.

Wonderful apartment in an amazing location for both museums and restaurants. Alex's father Derek was very helpful, and made our stay in Madrid perfect.

This is an ideal apartment for someone who wants to see Madrid's impressive collection of art while enjoying the cafe / tapas culture.

Location, security,  comfort, space and amenities.  We were really pleased with our choice, Alex and his family have thought of everything to make your stay comfortable.  Within walking distance to Madrid main galleries and museums, central shopping precinct and train station we were able to do all that we had planned for our stay in Madrid.  We even managed a day trip to Toledo and another to Sergovia taking the extremely efficient Renfre fast trains.  The flat is well setup to accommodate two couples whilst providing enough space for privacy.  The kitchen, bathroom and laundry facilities were all of a high standard.  A great place to stay, we highly recommend Alex's place.
Nice place in a quite neighborhood. Very close to the “Lista” Metro station. Fernando worked hard to make sure everything was just right. Would recommend it for the solo traveller.

100% recomendado, Fernando esta siempre dispuesto a brindar información y guía. En cuanto a las instalaciones siempre estuvieron impecables, todos los servicios fueron positivos y conforme a como se esperaba.

I felt right at home at Fernando’s. The apartment has everything you need and the room is comfy. It also has a desk and TV that I connected with my laptop to work some days.
The apartment is in a quiet area but I was able to walk to many places. Multiple 24h hours supermarkets and public transportation options are close as well. Fernando is a very kind host who provided me with lots of useful information on Madrid. Would definitely recommend him!

La habitación es tal cual en las fotos y tiene todo lo necesario tanto para pasar unos días como para períodos más largos. Fernando es muy simpático y te pone todas las facilidades para que estés a gusto!
Localizacion muy buena. Fernando siempre por la labor de ayudar. La estancia ha sido muy agradable :)
Todo excelente, el departamento muy limpio y Fernando me ayudo con preguntas sobre madrid, transporte y recomendaciones, super recomendable
Fernando y su pareja han sido muy amables. La habitación esta cual se ve en las fotos. Todo el piso estaba muy limpio y ordenado. Un 10 para el alojamiento y para Fernando.

We found the apartment very comfortable and spacious, and in a really great location. Alex's father Derek was a great host, with lots of information and able to answer all our questions. Talking with him about the history of Spain was most helpful. His follow up email on films in Madrid was most helpful.

Would love to stay there again.

Prima appartement met alles erop en eraan (wasmachine, afwasmachine, oven, magnetron etc). Schoon.
Uitstekende locatie - alle bezienswaardigheden op loopafstan

Fine appartment with all facilities. Clean.
Excellent location - all highlights within walking distance.
A clean, comfortable and large flat with a great location for exploring the city. Alex's dad was great - provided nice tips and a little history. Overall an A+ airbnb stay. Thank you!

The stay in Alex’s apartment was my first Airbnb trial, and was a truly positive experience:
The communication with Alex was very quick, clear and pleasant. His father was a great host and a very sympathetic person, showed us the place, accommodated very flexible check-in and out times, and gave us all needed tips on transportation.
The place is fantastically located, in a beautifully restored historical building. Some of the original elements like doors have been retained, and we got the feeling of being in one of the famous Gaudi buildings. There are plenty local restaurants and cafes just downstairs and around, to get your fresh-orange-juice breakfast or tapas with the locals. The Retiro park for a wonderful morning run is 5 mins away. Both the museums and all major Madrid’s sights are on walking distance. The famous going-out street Las Huertas is only 2 blocks away.
The apartment itself is spacious and well equipped; the beds are very comfortable- we slept perfect. We found everything as described; the WiFi was also working perfect.
Altogether, I can really recommend Alex’s place- thanks a lot for the good experience, and I would definitely come back, when in Madrid again.

Alex's apartment is clean and comfortable, in an unbeatable  location right in the heart of Madrid. You can easily walk everywhere and but still have the quietest night's sleep!  We did not meet Alex but his dad is fantastic. He checked us in and out, gave us some recommendations and told us about his interesting life in Madrid. Definitely recommended.

We did not meet Alex but was met by his dad Derek. A complete gentleman I must say. When I had a bout of seasonal allergies he went out of his way to accompany me to the nearest pharmacy and helped me get the proper medication. He really saved the day. The apartment can't be more perfectly located for those who love museums. It's clean and tidy and has the only luggage room we have ever seen in an apartment. Very useful!
It is not as bright as some but since we were out in the day this was a non-issue.
Thanks again, Derek!

This apartment is exactly as advertised.  The location could not be better, we walked to all the attractions we wanted to see.  It was clean, comfortable and had everything we needed for a wonderful stay.  Derek, Alex's dad, was very acomodating when we checked in.  Madrid stole my heart, I hope to return and stay here again.

Staying at Alex's apartment was fantastic! The location is incredible - easy walking distance to many of Madrid's main tourist sites and key areas. The Prado Museum is two minutes walk away! There are lots of great restaurants and tapas bars in the area. Almost too many to choose from.

The apartment was very clean and had lots of space and a lovely energy (the building is 200 years old). It has everything you need for a short or long stay in Madrid. Wish I could have stayed for a month!

Alex and his parents were great to deal with and really responsive to all our questions.

I would highly recommend staying at Alex's apartment. It really is in the 'best location' in Madrid!

Thank you so much Alex for letting us rent your wonderful apartment. Five stars!!

Me and my girlfriend were in Alex's appartment for 2 months in August and September. While I was going to a language school (Estudio Sampere) she was taking dancing classes. Overall, we had a wonderful time in Madrid, and we would pick Alex's flat any time again.

Location: The Location of the appartment is amazing. It's so central (10min walk to Sol) and in one of the coolest neighbourhoods of Madrid: Barrio de las letras. There are a ton of bars, tablaos, restaurants and terraces to enjoy. It's also quiet in the evenings, as it is at the border of the neighbourhood, and totally safe. Then all the three big museums, prado, thyssen and sofia reina are within walking distance (5-10min). Another great thing is the closeness to the main station Atocha (15min.) wherefrom you can take the AVE highspeed train to make trips all over spain...
Distance from airport (25 min with taxi, 40min with Metro, 40min with shuttle bus). There are some smaller markets nearby to buy food and drinks. The next big supermarket (Corte Ingles) is at Sol.

Appartment: The flat is in a old building and very spacious! There is easy enough room for 4 persons (two seperate bedrooms) and the kitchen is huge. All the main kitchen tools were provided, maybe there could be some more cutlery but that's just peanuts... We felt great in there from the beginning... We took a bigger flat because we expected some friends to visit us on weekends and all guests liked the flat very much... Ah yeah, and the AC's are functioning very well (we had to use them a lot, especially in August).

Alex & Family: Alex welcomed us on the day of arrival, and showed us all the things we needed to know in the appartment. He and his father were very helpful and lovely. They also responded very quickly upon any questions we had regarding the flat or whatsoever. Also the portier was very kind and nice.

Alex responded quickly, and was very helpful. His apartment was great: large and centrally located (a few blocs from the important museums). All great neighborhoods were in walking distance. Our flight was delayed, but his father waited for us (and didn't even complain). He showed us around, and was very polite as well.

Merci à Derek pour son accueil très chaleureux. Malheureusement, alors que nous étions 4, l'appartement n'a été préparé que pour 3 personnes attendues. Le lit double n'est pas très large et on a tendance à se retrouver ensemble au centre! Mais il est très confortable.
Ceci ne nous empêchera pas de revenir avec plaisir dans ce logement spacieux et magnifiquement situé.

Was a very wonderful stay we had all the amenities of home. To do laundry was such a luxury we enjoyed the clean clothes. Your place is in the heart of the city and we could walk to all the sites. Would love to come visit again.

This is generous sized two bedroom apartment in the museum end of town. Good cafés/ restaurants nearby. Can recommend el almacen del pan just two streets away at calle moraine 39.
Derek greeted us in Alex's absence,and was extremely helpful,emailing me a couple of times with details of Real Madrid's movements. Can highly recommend this apartment,close to everything we needed.

If you want to visit all the main Madrid museums by walk, you have to stay in this flat. Moreover flat’s situated in the very literary district: in the Servantes street, very close to Institute of Servantes and Museum of Lope de Vega. This district is very beatiful and full of trees: in good weather you may walk in platan avenue or in the famouse Retiro park.  The house, where is a flat, is very old, with its own history and traditions, but it’s clean and comfortable, with elevator and concierge. The flat is big and nice. In two rooms there are big windows with wooden jalousie. The flat has a heating: it’s very usefull in winter time. We stayed here for a month with our 2-years son. The hostes provides us a baby cot. They are nice, friendly and helpful: all problemes we had they tried to solve.

Alex was a great host, always responded to questions very quickly and answered thoroughly. Very friendly and honest. We were met by Derek and everything about the apt was as stated in profile and reviews. Great location, comfy beds and everything we needed for a comfortable stay.

We have already recommended this apt to others who will be visiting Madrid. We were very happy with our stay and our expectations for our trip were exceeded with the addition of this wonderful apt.

Our stay in Alex's apartment was wonderful. The apartment is great - clean, spacious, well equipped. We had no complains at all. And it is perfectly situated in Madrid - walking distance from everywhere, can't get any better than that!
The host Alex was also very nice and helpful !

Appartment very well located, calm and clean.
Alex and Derek were great hosts, available at all times.

I'll definitely come back there.

Thanks a lot,

I stayed with Alex' place twice from early March to mid April 2014 and found it to ideally suited to some of Madrid's finest attatrctoins.  Walking the surrounding streets in early evening and returning to the apartment for a glass of wine with the balcony open is something I will always fondly remember.  Apartment has excellent beds which afforded a consistent sound night's sleep.  Alex was an outstanding host and I would rent from him again.
We enjoyed our one month stay at Alex's very much. It was located conveniently to everything you want to do in Madrid. The unit was as it is described. We will not hesitate to come back again.

My family of four had a wonderful stay at the apartment. Alex was a responsible, considerate, and friendly host.  He provided excellent communication,  responding quickly to my questions  prior to arrival and kept in touch during our stay.  The location of the flat was ideal.  The street location was quiet, though convenient commercial areas were nearby. The area felt safe, while we walked to the many neighborhood restaurants late in the evening.  Around the corner is the Rick Steves recommended tapas bars area. We walked to all the Madrid sights that we visited. The apartment was spacious, clean, and sunny in the front rooms.  It had two comfortable bedrooms with additional sleeping options available, good kitchen facilities, washer, and relaxing lounge seating and dining areas.   The apartment's description and positive reviews are true as stated.  Highly recommend.

Alex's apartment was comfortable, airy and afforded us a very pleasant stay. Alex is very genial and amenable (and very well traveled). We had an issue with the hot water not working on day 1 and he came over and helped fix it before the day ended. His apartment is over 300 years old, so it has its period charm and quirks. My favorite quirk was the clothes line where you hang your clothes to dry. Reminded me of my childhood in India.
The location of this apartment is fantastic. We walked to Retiro Park several times. We also were able to hunt out a wonderful gluten free bakery (Celicioso) that was around 10 minutes away. Our stay in Madrid was my favorite part of our trip and Alex's apartment add to that sentiment.

Great location, friendly host, and spacious flat!!  This flat is located conveniently in the center of everything: food, museums, train stations, you name it, it is probably within a 10 minute walk.  The host, Alex helped us with settling in,  recommended us food places, and walked us around the neighborhood.  He even helped us with purchasing a sim card.  The flat itself was very spacious, well equipped and good for hosting many people!  Alex also said it will be refurbished soon!!!  Overall, a great experience!

Unfortunately, I can not recommend this host. We travelled from a great distance and had a planned itinerary. Our contract check in time was 2 pm and we had booked a train to arrive at this time. My first great cause of concern occurred when the host, Alex, asked if we could change our train ticket to arrive later since he would be unable to accommodate our check in time. This, of course, was not possible for us. I suggested that he leave a key for us with the doorman or perhaps send someone else to meet us. On a positive note, he agreed to send his mother and said he would meet us after to show us house features. Despite this, he suggested it would be better for us if we simply changed our ticket. We did not change our ticket and did meet with his mother who did a good job orienting us given the language barrier. She told us, however, that Alex was very busy and could not meet us later on. This was perfectly okay since we assumed everything was in operational condition. Alex did suggest that he would meet with us the following day but only at a time that suited him. This was very difficult for us as we had excursions planned and could only meet in the morning which he could not accommodate. The next morning, the hot water was not operational. It had not been turned on. In fact, even the fridge had been unplugged showing there was little preparation for our arrival. We called Alex and he did not offer us a solution and was unable to come and fix it. He was not very empathetic to the fact that we were all taking ice cold shower. He did say that he would come that afternoon at 2pm to fix it. We stopped in the apartment to grab a few items at 4pm. The water issue had not been resolved. We sent him a message asking about it and he then told us it was not very convenient for him to come and fix the problem and tried to guide us on how to turn on the gas. In Canada, we have don't have this kind of a gas system and we were uncomfortable playing with the gas switches. He made a joke about Canada not having switches or buttons. At this point we were running late and asked him to please fix the problem. It was clear that he did not want to, so we fortunately found the switch and turned it on ourselves. We told him we fixed the problem and told him he didn't need to come. Despite this, it seemed he came anyway. This was obvious since after using the washroom, I found the toilet seat up and knew that someone had obviously been there. That was a little eerie. On a positive note, the apartment was well located. You have to be prepared to go up...

Alex was unable to greet us personally but his lovely mother, Concha, was there to show us around Alex's apartment.  She was very friendly and helpful.  Alex called in later and we found him to be a charming host who provided us with lots of useful information. The apartment is in a fantastic location, very comfortable  and, as art lovers, all the important galleries were very close.  We loved the area as it had great restaurants and was quiet when we eventually retired for the night.

This was my first time I stayed with airbnb and I was very happy about my choice! Alex's apartment is spacious yet quaint. It is extremely well located, which was nice because it was a perfect starting point to roam the city. Everything we wanted to visit is within walking distance and Alex was very helpful with advice on where to go, what to see and where to shop etc. Also, the apartment was very clean and the bathrooms seem to have been newly renovated. It is on the 4th floor of a historical building with a lift, on a lively street, although really quiet by night. Other positive points I would point to are the comfy beds and a spacious walk in closet which was very useful with all our luggage and clothes. We felt very comfortable in the cozy living room and made use of the fully equipped kitchen and dining area, though there are also a lot of great restaurants and bars on the same road. There were four of us and we were particularly happy about having two bathrooms with a jacuzzi and a hydromassage shower, since weather in Madrid was chilly.  It was the perfect place for our stay. We will for sure be returning here on our next visit to Madrid. Thank you Alex and Concha for the friendly support and warm welcome!

We had a wonderful time staying in Alex’s apartment. Excellent location, very safe. Many restaurants and tourist attractions were within walking distance.  The apartment itself is very comfortable, clean, spacious and well equipped. Alex is a great host, always open to letting him know if everything was ok (which it was). We had a great time in Madrid and part of it was thanks to the fact that we were able to stay in such a nice place. We loved the walk in closet, the newly renovated bathrooms and well… just everything! I would definitely stay here again. 100% recommended. Thank you for letting us stay in your apartment!

Yep location really is brilliant. Flat is close to El Prado and all the nice bars and restaurants near pedestrianised Huertas and only 10-15mins walk to Atocha station. The flat feels very spacious for 2 people. Bathrooms are lovely and newly refurbished and walk-in wardrobe is great. Alex was very helpful and arranged for a cleaner to visit in the middle of our 3 week stay too. It can't be helped but in an old building the noise does carry, but since we weren't partying in the flat, it didn't bother us. If you're looking for central location, good quality accommodation this is it. Definitely recommended.

This was the first time I stayed with airbnb and I am very happy with the choice I made. Alex's appartment was spacious, clean and the location was ideal. Alex was a very friendly host and I would rent from him again.

The apartment is superbly located, you can walk everywhere within 10 minutes. It is a big apartment, 2 bd 2 bath. Great showers. Although you will be in the middle of Madrid. the apartment is quiet.
Helpful host, recommendable place.
Es un espacio amplio en un lugar de lujo de Madrid. Cerca de los mejores museos, la estación de Atocha, del parque del Retiro y de mucho buenos lugares para comer.

Excellent choice!  I spent five weeks with my family (including a 5-year-old) in Alex's apartment.  The location is unbeatable, and the apartment itself is ideal: spacious, cool in summer (air conditioning and two gorgeous balconies), and remarkably quiet for such a centrally located neighborhood.  It was also great for cooking family meals (fully equipped kitchen, including a dishwasher) -- even though wonderful restaurants are just steps away.  I most definitely recommend it!!

Una excelente opción! El departamento está recién remodelado y tiene una cocina muy moderna, así como dos baños y un armario muy cómodos. El área común tiene un encanto y fue punto de reunión con mis amigos durante mi estancia de un mes en el departamento de Alex. El cuarto principal es muy amplio y fresco, había días de pleno julio que no era necesario prender el aire acondicionado y bastaba con abrir la ventana. Por otro lado, las múltiples ventanas del departamento permiten que éste sea muy iluminado. Sin embargo, su mayor atractivo es la ubicación, inmejorable: en pleno Barrio de las Letras, muy cerca del Museo del Prado, la Cibeles y Atocha. Restaurantes para todos los presupuestos y caminatas muy agradables. Sin duda es una gran opción!!

El apartamento es muy espacioso bien equipado y con todas sus comodidades. La ubicación es inmejorable, esta en todo el casco central, y prácticamente se puede ir caminando a muchos de los lugares mas frecuentados como museos, plazas, tascas. Definitivamente volvería a ir si estuviera disponible.

Alex and his apartment were absolutely fantastic! The apartment exceeded what I thought, and the pictures really don’t do it justice. It is huge by Madrid standards. Large bedrooms, gigantic bath with a jet tub, another spacious bath with a beautiful shower, an office which we used as a third bedroom, large living room, dining room, and big galley kitchen. Oh, and a massive walk in closet. We used the closet as a nursery room for my 10 month old—there was room for a crib! I can’t say anything bad about our experience. Alex was extremely kind and quick with his responses. He recommended restaurants and would answer any questions we had within a minute. I had my 5 year old, 10 month old, 11 year old, and a teenager with me, and we loved every minute of our stay. The neighborhood is quant with cobblestone streets, plenty of local tapas bars and patio restaurants, and cute boutiques. We couldn’t ask for a better place!

This is my sixth time in Madrid and I can say without reservation that Alex's beautiful house offers the best value for money among all the properties I have stayed at.
Firstly, to say it is literally impossible to find a better location in Madrid. The neighborhood is semi-pedestrianized, lively yet quiet at night. At a walking distance from practically everything you want to see in Madrid - in one of Madrid's most emblematic historic neighborhoods.
The pictures don't do justice to the apartment which is far more spacious than anything you will find in this area. It has practically everything you need for a short or long term stay in Madrid. A newly renovated kitchen, two really good bathrooms (with a spacious massage-shower thing and one of them even has a hot-tub Jacuzzi!
What my wife loved the most was the walk-in closet which meant where we could dump all of our stuff and leave the rest of the flat totally free. The living room is spacious and has a balcony facing the street in which Miguel de Cervantes is buried.
Alex was charming, checking up on us periodically and even brought a blender for cooking when we asked for one. Oh and a cleaning service is also available in the block for a reasonable hourly rate.
The only feedback I would give on this flat is that it perhaps needs a larger TV (and cable for non-Spanish speakers) and a shorter password for WiFi!
Everything else was literally perfect and I have found my ideal home for my next stay in Madrid.

This is a wonderful place; spacious, clean and in a fantastic location.  But the best thing about this place was our host, Alex, who went beyond making us feel comfortable and welcome.  This was our first AirBnB experience and it went well beyond our expectations, mostly because Alex made the stay easy and secure.  It's a definite first choice in Madrid!

Grand appartement, très bien équipé et bonne localisation
Alex est un très bon hôte, disponible à tout moment
Wonderfully responsive -- quick and thoughtful. Alex even ran out and bought us a new coffee maker to accommodate us. The apartment has lots of room, and the location is extraordinary.
This really was the best location for Madrid! Close to museums, delicious restaurants, and easy access to public transport and taxis. We had the best time!
Lo mejor es su ubicación

El apartamento de Alex es hermoso y está situado en el mejor barrio de Madrid, a una distancia caminable de museos y bares.  Tiene buenas camas y una cocina bien equipada.  Los baños también funcionan muy bien, con excelentes duchas y aires que no meten ruido.  Alex es un super crack, un anfitrión atento, culto, dispuesto y que se preocupó por recibirnos, a pesar de que llegamos muy temprano en la mañana y de que tenía el día complicado.  Volveremos, Alex!
recommended!

O Alex foi muito gentil em todos os momentos de nossa estadia. O seu apartamento é muito confortável, com bons banheiros e boa cozinha. Está localizado próximo ao museu do Prado e em uma região com muitos restaurantes.
Gostamos muito. Recomendarei aos meus amigos.
Excelente experiencia en el apartamento de Alex. Limpio, zona excepcional y comodidades como en casa. Además muy atento con sus huéspedes.

Ottimo appartamento in pieno centro con tutti i comfort come descritto sul sito. Casa grande, cucina accessoriata, bagni grandi e doccie ampie, salotto con divano grande e wifi funzionante e condizionatori in sala e nelle camere funzionante. Alex è stato molto carino nell'accoglienza e nei consigli sulla zona. inoltre cosa molto importante per noi famiglia con bambini e passeggino è stato l'ascensore, ci sono comunque qualche scalino da fare ma niente di complicato.

La estancia en Madrid en el estudio de Nuria fue estupenda! Piso super centrico, a 1 minuto de la Gran Vìa (pero sin ruidos), con TODOS los comforts y tambièn muy bien decorado. Nuria es amable y muy muy disponible. Todo fue perfecto! Gracias!

Nuria was perfect for everything :
-She replied promptly on the Internet
-She was helpful for giving directions
-She was waiting for me when we arrived
-The flat was really well located, fully-furnished and very clean also.

Muchas gracias Nuria. Llegara a tu piso la proxima vez!

Excelente el estudio, Nuria una gran anfitriona, muy atenta con nosotras y siempre disponible. El Estudio esta nuevo, completo y muy limpio. La ubicación es perfecta, cerca de todo. Altamente recomendable.

We are a Norwegian couple who stay´d at Nurias very fresh apartment for a weekend. Everything is brand new and very clean, from the kitchen too the bathroom. The studio apartment has a tv, dvdplayer, ipod-docking, kitchen-equipment, everything you need for a good stay. Nuria was the perfect host, met us in front of the apartment with keys and a smile when we got from the airport. She has even organized a shelf with maps and tourist leaflets. It can be quiet difficult to find  accommodation in Madrid which is not too pricey or too shabby in the center of Madrid. This is very central and for the standard we thought the price was good. The apartment is very quiet, and the bedroom window is facing the backyard. Since you are in the very center, there are some streets nearby who can be a bit dodgy, but if you go straight down to gran via, no trouble.

Lovely studio, really clean and cozy!!!!! Amazing location, it was very very comfy and very close to the best shopping areas, the most common tapas areas too (malasaña, huertas, la latina, chueca, etc), and the main sightseeing attractions. Nuria is awesome, she is really cute and cool, as she was very available throughout the weekend.

An amazing weekend and we are pretty sure that next time we will be located in her lovely appartment ;)

Nuestra estancia en Tafari Gran vía fue inmejorable.Nuria es muy agradable, estuvo en contacto con nosotros en todo momento.Todo nuevo, bonita decoración y la limpieza excelente,tal y como se ve en las fotos.Su ubicación es también muy buena,se puede ir dando un paseo a cualquier sitio.El apartamento,aunque esta en pleno centro es muy tranquilo,nada de ruido del exterior.Sin duda la próxima vez que volvamos,nos quedaremos aquí.

Mis padres se quedaron en el apartamento durante 2 días. La decoración es muy chula, tiene de todo, miles de toallas, todo lo necesario en la cocina, nórdico, mantas... Se está muy cómodo y holgado. Nuria es un encanto y nos dejó dos juegos de llaves para que tuviésemos más movilidad. Nos esperó el día que llegamos, nos enseñó el piso y nos atendió estupendamente. No hay ni un ruido y eso que se está a 10 pasos de Gran Vía. La ubicación no puede ser mejor. Una experiencia fantástica.

Nuria was extremely flexible and accommodating about checking in and checking out. She was extremely nice as well. The flat was quite clean and very centrally located. I couldn't be happier with our stay.
Nuria was very nice and her place is very cute and clean. It is in a excellent location!
The apartment is very nice, clean and centrally positioned. Nuria was very welcoming and kind. If you go in Madrid you have to have an apartment like this.

Nuria was great! She was very responsive leading up to our stay, and met us at the apartment when we got in to Madrid very early. I had some difficulty booking through AirBnB because my phone was off in Europe and Nuria was very helpfull, understanding and responsive while I communicated back and forth with her and AirBnB. Once we got to Madrid she had the apartment set up so well we never needed to contact her again! The apartment is much nicer than the pictures give it credit. It is in a great location just off the Grand Via, on the edge of a hip little neighborhood with restaurants and shops, and walking distance to everything else. Everthing we could need was stocked in the apartment.
The aparment is very nice, clean, and new. Nuria goes above and beyond making it comfortable and convenient. I will definitely stay here again and recomend anyone going to Madrid to stay here.

Nuria is not only an amazing person, kind and jovial. But her apartment is fantastic. It’s in Gran Via, close to Chueca and Plaza del Sol, it’s situated in one of the most lively/trendy and interesting parts of Madrid. So if you are the touristy type you’ll love the location, and if you have a bohemian spirit...this is the spot for you. The studio is excellent... clean and has a great distribution of space... it has everything you need. The bathroom and kitchen are super clean and modern, and it has a few other comfort perks, like an elevator and cable.

The only thing that Nuria needs to update, and hopefully she’s done it by the time this post hits....it’s internet service.

Overall, This is the perfect spot, for the modern traveler. I was very comfortable and pleased with her studio, plus the price is great.

Thank you,
Nuria

Un fin de semana en Madrid siempre es mejor cuando el tema del alojamiento está controlado. Y el apartamento de Nuria estuvo a la altura de lo que esperábamos. Limpio, decorado con buen gusto y con una ubicación excelente, justo al lado de Callao. Pero lo mejor, sin duda, la anfitriona, todo amabilidad y simpatía. Vaya, que intentaremos repetir la experiencia aquí en el futuro.

Great place to stay in the very hart of the Centre of Madrid, yet very quiet. Close to the Callao metro station and situated in a lively neighbourhood with plenty of trendy bars and restaurants.
The place itself is very clean, completely renewed recently and has all the facilities you need for a nice stay for 2 guests.
Nuria was very helpful and flexible about the check in and check out times and she has a great taste for decorating the place. We found also a wide range of tourist information in the apartment. I would recommend Nuria's apartment to everyone who wants to spend some days in Madrid.

Amazing stay at Nuria's place ! We were 3 guests and had a wonderful time in Nuria's great apartment. Great location hidden in a quiet street just next to Callao and Gran Via's liveliness. All amenities were provided down to the smallest details. Thank you once more Nuria.

¡Nuria es majísima! Mis padres se encuentran como en casa en su apartamento, siempre me hablan de lo limpio y bonito que está todo y de lo cómodos y céntricos que están. Nuria vino a recibirnos y nos dejó todo lo necesario para desayunar al día siguiente, nos explicó cómo funcionaba la bomba de calor y nos dió varios juegos de llaves. Es un encanto y una anfitriona genial. Ya es la segunda vez que mis padres se hospedan aquí porque es una experiencia para repetir, recomendar y recordar.

Clean, new studio with a great host that was lovely enough to wait for us, late on Christmas Eve, and even threw in some candy and drinks for weary travelers such as ourselves. A very pleasant surprise that makes Airbnb the wonderful resource that it is. Thank you Nuria!

Nuria's apartment is amazingly well located, close to ... everything ! Plaza del Sol, Plaza de Espana, Plaza Mayor, Museo del Prado... theaters, bars, restaurants... During a week, we walk very quietly in this safe area, using our Pass Turistico for the Metro almost never !
The apartment itself is lovely, super clean and very peaceful.
And Nuria, a careful hostess, welcoming us with her smile and warmness ... and delights to celebrate these precious days of Three Kings in Spain.

Perfecto! Es la mejor palabra para describir nuestro hospedaje en este apartamento. Todo muy limpio, ordenado, decorado con muy buen gusto y es tal y como sale en las fotos!
Nuria, la propietaria es una chica majísima!! Es muy amable y atenta, una perfecta anfitriona!!! Sin lugar a dudas si vuelvo a Madrid repetiré.

Hello all of you travelers,

I loved staying at Nurias, she was so nice and helpful, very easy going just great!!! I can only recommend her.The flat was very clean and wright in the center, easy to walk to all the places.
Thanks again , Nuria..para toda

Inmejorable anfitriona!
Inmejorable ubicacióndel apartamento !
Una de nuestras mejores experiencias ;o)
GRacias por todo Nuria !

The apartment is very comfortable and has everything you need with a touch of style. You can easily reach many key locations from it.  Nuria was very welcoming and kind to wait for us till late night.

Nuria’s apartment is great and so is she! The apartment is as represented in the pictures, only better: super chic and clean. What a find! Just steps from public transportation, shopping, and Gran Via – the main shopping street of Madrid. Yet the apartment is on a quiet and friendly side street. Nuria is warm and welcoming and will go the distance to make your stay a happy one. It's the ultimate Madrid experience. I will return!

¿Quieres tener una estancia inmejorable? Este es tu sitio!! Increible apartamento, muy acogedor, limpísimo, muy bien decorado y muy silencioso. Sales del mismo y caes en el corazón de gran vía, para descubrir o revivir Madrid.

Y un plus muy importante, una anfitriona increible. Muy amable, dedicada y muy flexible. Ha hecho que mi primera experiencia con Air bnb sea perfecta.

No lo dudes más... ¡Lo disfrutarás!

The apartment is fine and in the beginning the host was nice as well. But after we left (and we had never seen her before or had a chance to go over everything), she claims we had scratched the surface of one chair and now airbnb kept our security deposit. It seems like we are supposed to pay for a new chair (50€) although we are not aware of having done anything. So if you go to stay there, make sure to check EVERYTHING when moving in and report anything that looks like damage. We are kind of upset with how this came a long.

hola nuria,

i wish there was an option to give you more than 5 stars !!! people.....this place is a GEM and Nuria is one of the BEST hosts you could EVER get.

she was so kind to wait outside her apartment which saved us so much of a hassle. that was very thoughtful of her. also a welcome fruit basket was so thoughtful.

the location was marvelous and a stone's throw away from the main Gran Via

THANK YOU NURIA !!!
El estudio es una cucada, tal y como aparece en las fotos, y no puede estar mejor situado. Nuria, un encanto. Un placer haberme hospedado en él y haberla conocido.

Nuria was a fantastic host; she was a very nice person and seemed really cool. She was perfectly punctual and responsive to all messages/emails. The apartment is spotlessly clean and very comfortable. The location really can't be beat -- it's right in the middle of everything, yet it is very quiet. Highly recommended.

And now I'll try in Spanish:

Nuria fue una anfitriona fantastica; ella fue muy amable. Fue perfectamente puntual y responsiva a todos nuestros mensajes. El apartamento es muy limpio y comodo. La ubicacion no puede ser mejor -- es en el centro de todo, pero es muy tranquilo. Cinco estrellas!

Staying at Nuria's super cute place in the middle of Madrid was exciting.  I had a little difficulty finding it, but Nuria stayed in contact by phone until her friend found me!!! It was my first time traveling alone to Europe and I was a bit nervous.  I was extremely appreciative of her communication and help with transport.  I was exhausted after 30 hours flying and the apartment is almost silent in the midst of all the excitement of Madrid.  I managed to sleep almost 15 hours.   I slept through the check out time and Nuria graciously gave me all the time I needed to get myself together.  Great place and Thank you Nuria for being a great host! Mary
El apartamento es perfecto, tanto por ubicación como por detalles y como no podia ser de otra forma la anfitriona perfecta, pendiente de todo y hacerme sentir como en casa. Recomendable 100%.

Excellent apartment right near the centre of Madrid. Nuria was a great host, providing perfect instructions on the route to the place and waiting to greet us exactly as promised.

Would definitely recommend Nuria and her place as the perfect option for a couple visiting Madrid.
Perfect experience. Very good location and communication. Nice and clean flat with fast broadband. Recommended!

very friendly accommondation.
appartement is very clean. bottle of wine was in the room. free wifi. (fast)
and very important: the location is perfect!

I stayed in Nuria's apartment for 5 nights.
She received me in person, she is so nice and polite. She gave me all the information I asked her, maps, restaurant recommendations, etc. She left a basket with fruits too.
The apartment is perfectly located in Downtown Madrid, one block from Callao, one of the busiest hubs of la Gran Via. There is one subway station one block away, just be careful: if you come from Barajas Airport with luggage, you need to know that you have to take three trains, and there are too many staircases between connections (without escalators).
The apartment is very new and nice,well equipped with everything you need. There is a Corte Ingles supermarket just one block away, where I bought food and things for breakfast, so I saved a lot.
The decoration is a bit "girlish" (I am a man and was just by myself), with pinkish things everywhere, but it did not bother me at all.
The mattress was very comfortable (it is a double bed, be careful if you are used to Queen or King beds) , Wi-Fi worked fantastic, and she even has an Ipod station so I could listen my music.
Some nights were cold, I put the air heating system and it was warm in just 5 minutes

Nuria's Apartment was our first airbnb stay. What a fantastic introduction.
Nuria made us most welcome. Her Apartment oozes charm and quality. The kitchen is fitted out with everything you would have at home. The linen is a pleasure to use. The bathroom fittings are excellent, nice hot showers.

The apartment although in the heart of Madrid is so quiet you can be sure of a great nights sleep.

We thoroughly enjoyed our stay and were sorry to leave, it is so close to transport and walking distance to the top tourist attractions.

Highly recommended Alana and Mike

Nuria's apartment was the perfect place for my fiancé and I to stay for two nights in Madrid.  The apartment is impeccably clean, absolutely adorable and perfectly located, close to everything and off the street, so also very quiet. It has everything you would need, and Nuria even left us a gift of a bottle of Spanish wine. She is very warm and generous, and the whole place is charming and comfortable. It is not a huge space, but was exactly what we were looking for. We would stay there again in an instant! Thank you, Nuria, please let us know if you are ever in San Francisco!

This was my first stay in Madrid and Nuria couldn't have been a better Airbnb host.  The short version is that she is a perfect host, perfect communication, awesome flat and an amazingly easy stay.  The long version is that Nuria is a pro at hosting people.  Her flat is perfectly located to get to anything that Madrid has to offer, its literally a block off of Gran Via in the center of everything.  The flat is the perfect size for one or two people, everything is super modern and comfortable.  Awesome bathroom, great bed, great kitchen, just perfect for a tourist who needs a nice place to stay on a good budget.  Nuria was so easy to communicate with, very fast to respond and couldn't have been nicer.  She greeted us with a smile, a bottle of wine and the typical friendly demeanor that you would find from people who live in Madrid.  I wouldn't hesitate to stay here again and I would tell anyone looking on here to stop looking and just stay here, you will not be disappointed at all.
Vey very very good appartament. clean and confortable, in the center of Madrid. the place where to stay in Madrid.

The apartment is absolutely clean and modern and in the very centre of Madrid (a few minutes walk from Metro Callao).

It suitable for 2 people, but we were 3 (one childe, age 8) and we have been very well.

Nuria is a very special host. Very kind and so precious in solving a little problem at the beginning of the holiday.

Nuria, thanks a lot ! We wait for you in Italy !!!

I had a great stay, the flat is spotless and right of Gran Via which leaves you just a couple of minutes walk away from all the action in either Chueca or the Latina.

The host is great and the fruit and breakfast she left was great.

Nuria es una persona muy acogedora y su apartamento es fantastico. Todo muy limpio e impecable. Tal qual en las fotos. Hay incluso secador de pelo y toallas. Nuria nos habia preparado tambien unas frutas para comer. Posicion centralisima. Recomendado!!!

Nuria was very welcoming and she also bought some fruit for us. The apartment is simply perfect and has a great location. The apartment is fully equippedand and also has a hairdryer and plenty of towels. Recommended!!!

This apartment was amazing!! Absolutely outstanding! It's better in real life! The location was perfect, just seconds to Grand Via, the main street of Madrid. The apartment must be sound proof and is super comfortable as I slept beautifully.
Nuria is quite the decorator as everything was so pretty, neat and clean.
I loved it here!

Well where to start?? To be honest, I had a great time in Madrid thanks to Nuria. Wow she is a great host, the apartment is great. Nuria received us with a bottle of wine and fruits as amenities, the apartment is well maintain, clean, with all the equipments need it and the location is really good as well.
La verdad es que el apartamento esta muy bien equipado con lavadora, secador de pelo, wifi, plancha y mapas. Nuria es genial, nos recomendo lugar para comer que son expectaculares la verdad! No se van a arrepentir en quedarse en este apartamento.

Nuria's place was just what I needed! It's located in the perfect location. I just stepped out the door, and was off exploring! Nuria was waiting or me, outside her apartment, when I arrived. My flight was delayed a bit, and she was so very accommodating. Her place is spotless! And it is nice and peaceful in the evenings. Thank you so much Nuria! I will definitely be back!

My experience was wonderful from beginning to end. Nuria was quick to answer by any comunication form, she made available a couple of them. The flat is exactly as described. Close to metro station, bus stops and the center of town if you preferred to walk. Easy access from the bus stop and metro station even if you are carrying heavy lugagge as we were. Liked the entrance to the building with the lugagge, no stairs. Nuria has the flat in pristine condition, well provided with fresh linens and towels. Extra points for the washing machine and the rope to hang the clothes. Quiet and calm, was an oasis after a day strolling the streets. For the host: she was more than nice recommending sites, restaurants in the neighborhood, events and such;wonderful and charming. It was an integral part of our holiday experience.

Nuria es muy amable, el departamento es nuevo, limpio y está muy bien ubicado. A sólo 4 cuadras de puerta del Sol.
Ella nos recibió muy amablemente, hasta con un obsequio. Nos dijo a que lugares ir, como movernos. La casa estaba muy bien equipada.
100% recomendable

The studio apartment looks just like the photos.  It is spotless, well equipped, in a great location for the Metro & grocery stores!  We stayed 5 nights & would stay again without hesitation!  In addition, Nuria is a lovely and helpful person.
Ubicación inmejorable, limpieza perfecta y una anfitriona encantadora, definitivamente una gran opción para conocer o redescubrir Madrid.

Absolutely fantastic accomodation. Central location, spotless and modern apartment, great price.

Couldn't possibly ask for more!
Our stay in Madrid was superb, with many thanks to Nuria! She was very kind and helpful, and her place was amazing, clean, accommodating, and in a perfect location. I would recommend in a heartbeat!
Nuria is very helpful.  She was waiting for me - and in fact, came to pick me up at the metro station.  Very centrally located.  Nice grocery store close by.

Madrid ist jede Reise wert, Nuria's Unterkunft eignet sich hervorragend für eine Städtereise. Das Apartment liegt direkt an der Gran Via also wunderbar für shoppingfreudige. Mit gutem Gewissen sehr empfehlenswert!

Nuria is the most amazing airbnb host that we have ever had! She went above and beyond to make our stay as enjoyable a possible! She provided us with everything we needed so that we didn't have to ask for a thing!
The apartment is beautifully presented, clean and so welcomming so you can make the most of your stay!
We had wonderful time in Madrid and the location of Nuria's apartment and her hospitality was great contributor to that. Apartment is very nice, modern, everything required available. Thanks.
We loved our time staying  in this apartment! It was nice and central and Nuria was really lovely and sweet. If we come back to Madrid we would look to stay here again.

What a great apartment! It has everything you need, it's very well organized, new and immaculately clean. We enjoyed ourselves thoroughly!!

The location was ideal to explore the city, we should have booked more time in Madrid -it was fascinating but since we stood on 0-km i know we'll be back! And when we do return it will definitely be at Nuria's!

Nuria was a great host, easy to contact and very helpful getting oriented to the city. The apartment was perfect!

You couldn't find a sweeter person than Nuria!  Although we had a language barrier, she did her best to give us some suggestions.  The apartment was spotless and Nuria had fruit and pastries for our breakfast.  The location is also impeccable, safe and quiet.  If you are visiting Madrid, look no further!

Nuria es muy muy agradable, la agradacemos para todo : su amabilidad, la limpieza de su piso... Nos encantó quedarnos en este piso para nuestro viaje en Madrid! El piso está super lindo, muy bien ubicado y cómodo! Nuria lo preparé como si fuera para sus amigos o familia. Si regreso a Madrid, seguro que elegiría de nuevo el piso de Nuria!

We loved Madrid so so very much! What a place, we were there for four days. The flat was in such a good central location, very clean and modern. Also very quiet at night too.

Nuria was a great host, and if we go back to Madrid we'd definitely stay at her place again!

Thanks
Gareth

This was my first airbnb experience, and I couldn't have picked a better place to stay than Nuria's flat in Madrid. Nuria was out of town, but her family was very helpful in showing us the apartment. It's centrally located, very clean and was a very easy check-in/check-out process. She also left maps and brochures for the guests for exploring the city. I'd definitely recommend her apartment and would stay again!

Me and my girlfriend stayed there for a 3 nights. Apartment is in an AMAZING location in central Madrid. Walking distance to many attractions and squares. The apartment itself is very clean, very cute (perfect for girls imo) and Nuria was a fantastic host who greeted us and explained to us where to go.

She also gave us a bottle of wine and some Spanish olives!

Great location, comfortable apartment, friendly host. Don't hesitate to stay here if you're in Madrid.
We had a wonderful stay in Nuria's apartment. The studio is centrally located, in perfect condition, and made our trip to Madrid extremely enjoyable.

Excelente lugar para alojar, demasiado bien ubicado, el departamento es realmente hermoso,limpio, todo muy ordenado y lleno de detalles...
Nuria es una gran host muy preocupada y atenta.
espero volver algún día

Great little apartment, with everything we needed in a good central location. Would recommend for a single or couple for 1-7 days. Nuria kept in contact with us and made sure that arrangements were in place for us to meet Vanessa at the apartment on arrival.

Nuria's apartment was fantastic. It was very centrally located and within easy walking distance of most of the sites and virtually across the street from the major shopping area around Puerto del Sol and always bustling with activity. It's also very near to the metro with easy access to the major train stations in Madrid.

The apartment itself was cozy, quiet, clean and just as the pictures show. I would happily stay there again.

Una única palabra definiria la estancia en el apartamento de Nuria: perfecta :). si quieres pasar unos días en Madrid te recomiendo este apartamento porque la anfitriona llena de detalles la estancia, la ubicación del apartamento es en el centro( a 5 minutos de todo) y la amabilidad y atención de Nuria y familia es única.
gracias :) y espero que disfruteis de Madrid tanto como mi pareja y yo.

Paula y Adrián.

Nuria has been the perfect host!

She received us and showed us everything we needed to see and know. We even asked her for tips on where to go for dinner and all options she gave us were great!

The flat is exactly what you need if you're visiting Madrid, the location is unbeatable, right in the middle of it, walking distance to main central Madrid attractions (Mercado de San Miguel, Plaza del Sol, Museo del Prado, La Latina, Plaza Mayor...) and well connected to public transport.

It was super clean and tidy. Quiet is a good word too describe it, bed was comfortable, WIFI connection was included and Nuria was full of nice details.

Will surely go back to Tafari Gran Via next time we're in Madrid.
Great location in the heart of Madrid!  She left many cute touches around the apartment to make our stay more enjoyable.  A great host, highly recommended!
Wonderful apartment in a great section of Madrid
Excelente apartamento. La ubicación y el confort son inmejorables. Nuria es una excelente anfitriona, flexible y muy bien predispuesta. Volveremos!

El apartamento es perfecto para una pareja que quiere visitar madrid. Muy bien ubicado, nuevo y con todas las comodidades. Nuria es una chica encantadora que nos atendio estupendamente y nos dio todo tipo facilidades. Recomedable 100%

este apartamento es MUY lindo, limpio y está muy bien ubicado. Nuria es MUY atenta y MUY amable. Recomiendo este apartamento y espero (quiero) volver a quedarme ahí cuando vuelva a Madrid. Gracias Nuria.
Calificación: 10/10 .
