Thumbs up for Nuria and her flat! Nuria is a charming, friendly and helpful person. I think you cannot have a better host than her. The place is nice, modern, clean and extremely central but also calm in the night. I would recommend it for a single person or a couple. I will definitely come back!!! Thanks a lot for everything and say hello to your sweet mum;)!

Saludos
Roland

I stayed for 1 night in the apartment from Nuria but the whole experience was exceptional. We had a good chat and she showed me around her cool studio... She was very kind, open and with a lot of attention to detail. Nuria even made sure I had a bottle of wine in the fridge and some breakfast for the next morning... Thanks a lot for your hospitality!

Our stay at Nuria's apartment was absolutely lovely! It was immaculately clean and had everything we could need and more. Nuria was so lovely to meet and very friendly and helpful, and even left us some things for breakfast which was great! The location is extremely central and we could walk to nearly everything we wanted to see and do. We'll definitely stay here again the next time we're in Madrid! Thank you Nuria!

El apartamento es genial!, unas amigas y yo hemos estado este fin de semana disfrutando del apartamento de Nuria y ha sido genial, el apartamento está perfecto y bien decorado además está en pleno centro de Madrid junto a la plaza de callao.
Por otra parte Nuria es una persona encantadora y ha estado siempre pendiente de nosotras.

We enjoyed the place that was in extremely convenient location. And it was very touching that Nuria met us downstairs and explained everything. It was great to have fast Internet. The apartment was amazingly neat and quiet -it had everything you need to feel comfortable. The building has elevator that is very convenient when you have heavy luggage. It was very helpful to have city maps and other travel staff prepared by the host. We were helped by Nuria's tips to navigate the city. We definitely recommend the place.

"Must stay" if you are in Madrid. Most central, sweet place and has that little touches that make it a great one. Thank you Nuria for creating such an option on airbnb !

You are special.
Avi & Ritu, Feb 2013

The best place to stay in Madrid! I spent 9 days in Nuria's apartment and was so perfect that I could stay a year. I used to live in Madrid so I knew the apartment's location was the best in town. Very central, close to Malasaña (for me the coolest neighborhood in Madrid), one small block from Gran Via (Madrid's heart) and Sol. Nuria is a sweetheart, very gentil and with a big smile, she wait for me with a bowl with fresh fruits and candies. The place has everything that you need and much more! Now I have a home in Madrid! :)

First time as a airbnb user, and now I will definitely check airbnb before hotels.
The apartment was great, clean and ideally located. Well equipped, with all you need (plenty of towels, Clim, etc... :)
Maps of the city and discount coupons, last but not least : a decent DSL connection ! :D
Our host Nuria was really kind and always there to help us. Nuria even checked metro frequency for us because we checked in on a holiday.
A basket of fruits as a welcome, what else? :)
Next time I go to Madrid, I first check if his flat is free :)

La reserva fue para mi padre y su novia..... Quedaron felices por lo bien ubicado y hermoso del apartamento.
Nuria muy amable y preocupada de principio a fin.
Una excelente decision!
Thanks Nuria for your hospitality! It was great to meet you again although both our teams got kicked out of the Champions that day.
Great location, great place and great Host. Highly recommended for those that want to visit Madrid.
Núria es una anfitriona maravillosa y amable.
Great price/quality! Very comofort appartment, situated in few steps from the main street of Madrid. Nuria is very kind person!
Well equipped cosy apartment in the heart of Madrid's Gran Via - walking distance to metro and all major sites - Nuria's an amazing host - Muchos Gracias, Nuria!!!

Nuria was an amazing host. Her room was very clean and even had little snacks and drinks. The apartment was fully furnished and it really felt like a home. She has towels, coffee machine, washing machine and anything you can possible think of. This was my 1st airbnb experience and it won't be my last. I was very impressed. Thanks for everything!

Alegro-me em comunicar-lhes que tudo transcorreu perfeitamente em nossa estada em Madrid. O apto e  d. Nuria Hermández maravilhosos. Éla muito simpática e atenciosa, nos aguardava em nossa chegada, entregando-nos o apto que consiste de uma instalação arejada, ensolarada e silencioso; decorado com fino gosto, dispondo  dos mais modernos recursos e aparelhos necessários ao perfeito funcionamento. Localizado em região central. próximo de Estações de Metro, Teatros, Restaurantes, Igrejas, etc.,. Tudo perfeito, com mérito. Grato e abs. Marielena e Lourenço Brancher

El estudio es maravilloso, muy limpio, ordenado, acogedor, coqueto y cómodo. La localización es perfecta y Nuria no puede ser más atenta y agradable. Tremendamente servicial y encantadora. Si vais a Madrid, no dudéis en alojaros aquí. Totalmente recomendado!!

Nuria´s appartment is located centrally, steps away from most attractions in Madrid. Nevertheless is in a very quiet little street, behind the Gran Via. It´s really clean and new, and you can find everything you need. It´s very spacious for 2 adults, and even 3 can stay there comfortably.
Nuria is really kind and charming. she gave us a warm wellcome and oriented us in Madrid. She even let us check in at 8 am, that was really to appreciatte.
I would pick up this appartment again.

The apartment from Nuria is very beautiful and cosy, it's a little bit like coming home! It has all amenities what you need. The apartment is absolutely clean and pure! The location is perfect, it's in the middle of the "Gran Via" and you can reach the most important sights by walking. Also Nuria is a very nice person and very warm-hearted. Thank you Nuri, for such a nice stay in madrid!

This was my second time in the apartment and it was just as amazing as my first stay! The location is absolutely perfect, the apartment is spotless and nice and new. Nuria is a lovely host who went out of her way to make me feel welcome and to enjoy the city she loves so much. Can't wait to come back!

Nuria is as sweet as they come.

What makes the place great is the location. You simply cannot beat it. The place is not large but comfortably houses three people and has everything you need. We loved it.

nuria's apartment was fantastic! she is so sweet too, and met us at with the keys to explain the ins and outs of staying there. she made a lot of great food recommendations as well. the apartment was immaculately clean and had extra towels--something i really appreciate and don't usually encounter in airbnb rentals. the location is perfect as well. we never had to take the metro. nuria also gave the most detailed, amazing directions for getting to/from the airport. she made our stay so easy and carefree!

La primera experiencia con airbnb ha sido genial gracias a Nuria! Mucho mejor de lo esperado, me he sentido como si estuviera en casa de un amigo de toda la vida.
Nos volveremos a ver :)
Amazing appartment, great location and friendly host! Recommended for sure!
Fernando es un buen host, muy atento e instrucciones precisas. El apartamento es excelente para el precio.

Altamente recomendable!
Excelente barrio. Habitación muy cómoda y súper equipada.
Fernando es un excelente anfitrión!
Volveré cuando esté en Madrid !

Excelente lugar para quedarse en Madrid, buen barrio y con transporte publico cercano. Fernando te ayuda bastante, te da muchos datos útiles y esta pendiente de que sea una buena estancia. Recomendado 100%.
Great place to stay in central Madrid. Spacious and clean apartment, right next to metro, restaurants, supermarket. etc.

Un muy buen anfitrion, muy discreto tambien y respectable. La casa y sobre todo la cama muy comoda. En el barrio más que todo que necesitaba. Volvería y eligiera su habitación de nuevo!!! Muchas gracias!!!

Ótima estadia no apartamento de Fernando, Fernando me recebeu muito bem seu apartamento, o apartamento é bem localizado, mercados, academias, shoppings próximos, recomendo, Fernando explica tudo o que você necessita saber, recomendo sim, e prefeito voltar outras vezes, além do preço que está muito bom.

What a great stay. Fernando was extremely kind and helpful from start to finish. He really made sure that my stay was enjoyable with nice little touches like leaving some water and fruits in my room. The location is not the ‘Center’ but I preferred it like that because it’s still in a very nice barrio with great stores and restaurants that has less tourists and feels more local. Overall the quality/price was unbeatable out of all the lower cost options I saw in Madrid. Highly recommended.

Le logement est tout à fait conforme à la description. On est très bien accueilli. On se sent chez soi. Fernando est très prévenant et il donne beaucoup d'indications. Il y a plusieurs petits supermarchés tout près dont un Carrefour Bio. Des bus pour aller dans le centre sont tout près, le 1, le 74 et le 26. Le mieux est de prendre une carte de transport dans une station de métro et de la recharger avec le nombre de trajets que vous voulez. A partir de l'aéroport, il faut prendre le bus 200 (prix d'un trajet normal avec la carte, ou bien 1,5€ sans la carte). Au retour, il faut descendre dans la station de métro "Avenida de América", au 2ème sous sol, pour prendre le bus 200 (c'est là que se trouve la gare routière!). Bon séjour à vous.
Fernando是一位非常好的房东，他的家十分温馨，并且他积极为我提供了周边的所有攻略，让我的旅行变得更加轻松，同时他的家交通便利，临近市中心，周边环境很好，我向所有房客推荐他的家！

Fernando ist ein sehr fürsorglicher Gastgeber.
Das Bett war bequem. ich hatte eine eigene Gästetoilette.
Die Unterkunft war bequem vom Flughafen aus zu erreichen. Metro 8 bis Mar Crystal, dort Umstieg in Metro 4 bis Lista.
Ausgang zur Straße, in der Fernando wohnt, wird angezeigt bei U-Bahn Ausstieg.
keine 200 m zu laufen.
Kauft am Flughafen gleich eine 10-Fahrtenkarte am Automaten. Der Flughafen Zuschlag wird mit angerechnet.
Nachladen kann man die Karten bequem in Tabakläden oder auch am Automaten.

Es la segunda vez que me hospedo en el cuarto de Fernando! Y volvería!!!!
Todo perfecto!

Nota 10 para a acomodação ! Fica numa rua muito tranquila e residencial, mas ao mesmo tempo perto de tudo: bares, restaurantes, supermercados, lojas, metrô, ônibus e etc. Tudo pra você se locomover facilmente na cidade de Madrid. Muito fácil chegar ou ir até o Aeroporto daqui !
Fernando é um host muito tranquilo e amigável. Me deu várias dicas e instruções sobre a cidade. Além disso precisou viajar e deixou sua casa sob minha responsabilidade. Espero ter correspodido a altura !!
Tive uma estadia muito boa aqui. Tudo funcionou ! Teve até um kit de boas vindas com frutas e água. Não tenho nada a reclamar, ao contrário, só a agradecer !! Muchas gracias mi caro amigo !! Saludos de Brasil !!

Fernando est un super hôte !
Je recommande
Le logement est bien situé!
Tout était parfait

I totally loved Nuria's place. It's cozy and has everything you could need. The location is great too! Two metro stations few steps away (Callao & Gran Via). Plaza Mayor, Mercado San Miguel, Puerta del Sol, the Royal Palace, The Cathedral, all of them are a short walk away. It's a great location if you truly want to "live" the city.

Even though the apartment is one block away to the lively Gran Via avenue (with all the traffic, stores, restaurants and coffee shops) you could never hear any of the noise. As soon as you enter the building the noise is gone!

As for Nuria, she's a great host. She welcomed me, showed me the amenities of her flat and gave me tips to get around the city.

Thanks Nuria!

My parents stayed at Nuria's apartment for 10 days and has absolutely nothing negative to share. The location is great for tourists. close to metro, shops, restaurants.. very central!
They definitely would stay there again and recommend to all.
They also mentioned thay nuria is very kind and helpful.

We highly recommend Nuria's apartment. Ideally situated just off the Gran Via, it's walking distance to almost all of Madrid's attractions, and the area is full of tapas bars, restaurants etc. The apartment itself is immaculately appointed and spotlessly clean. Double-glazed windows ensure that, although in a lively area, the apartment is very quiet. Nuria herself was lovely - only too happy to chat and suggest places to see and things to do. We would definitely stay here again if we return to Madrid (and hopefully we will!).

L'appartement est extrêmement bien situé.
Il est super et le lit est trop confortable!! ;)
Nuria nous a accueilli très chaleureusement.
On était super content.

Recomendamos este apartamento. Es ideal por su ubicación (muy cerca de la Gran Vía y la plaza de Callao), muy tranquilo y acogedor y la anfitriona muy atenta y agradable. Nosotros fuimos a ver un musical y pudimos ir andando desde el apartamento en sólo 5 minutos. La experiencia ha sido muy positiva. Esperamos poder repetir pronto.

Nuria was the perfect host, very cheerful and helpful providing us with much local information. The apartment was very cosy and tastefully designed. Despite being in the central part of Madrid it was very quiet and it also proved to an ideal location from which to access places of interest. It was a very enjoyable stay and we would recommend this apartment and we look forward to another visit in the future.

Nuria´s flat is GREAT!!!! it is so nice, clean, tidy and well equipped, that you would feel at home. The location is perfect couldn't be better.
It also has elevator, something not so common in this kind of flats.
Nuria is incredible. She is so nice, so helpful and warm that I always feel that we were like friends. She waited us with a lot of really nice details on the flat.
I really recommend the place.
Thanks Nuria! You are awsome!

Nous avons passé un agréable séjour dans ce petit nid d'amour en plein cœur de Madrid.
L'appartement est décoré avec gout , propre et il ne manquait rien.Nous avons été très bien accueilli et nous avons d’ailleurs apprécié les petits détails comme la bouteille de cava et les chocolats pour Oscar.
Cet appartement est idéal pour un séjour en amoureux ou avec un enfant , il est très bien situé et on peut se rendre a pieds sur tous les cites importants de Madrid.
Nous le conseillons vivement!!

Hello
We enjoyed a lot our stay at Nuria s place
It was really clean nice and very well located
In the heart of Madrid.
Nuria is very Nice and welcomed us pretty well.
We had a very nice time on her small quiet appartement.
All the best
Marie

Nuria's apartment was perfect! The apartment itself has everything you can possibly need, it's clean, and so comfortable too. The location is also awesome! It's a two minute walk from two metro stations (Gran Via and Callao) but the apartment is also located right by Calle Gran Via which is centrally located. On our trip we hardly ever even had to use the metro because everything is within walking distance. The location of the apartment is perfect for exploring all of the city and it is the perfect place to come back to!
Perfect location. And delightful quiet clean well equipped apartment. Easily found. Nuria is a charming and helpful. We would definitely recommend AND stay there again should we return.

Had an enjoyable stay at Nuria's apartment in Madrid. It is small, but cosy and has all the amenities for a short stay in Madrid. The studio was spotlessly clean, and set up much like a hotel with ample towels, and built in soaps and shampoo dispensers. The location was superb, right in the heart of Gran Via and walking distance to all major sights. Nuria was a fantastic host, giving us tips on local restaurants to try authentic food, and also marking directions on a map for us to find.

We had a great stay at Nuria's apartment. The apartment has a perfect location, it is very easy to get to from the airport with the subway and easy to find. The apartment was clean and had plenty of supplies such as soap, shampoo, toilet paper, plenty of clean towels and washing up liquid. The apartment is very quiet, the windows face the back-side so there is no street noise at all. This is also the only downside of the apartment, you don't really see the sky unless you lean against the window.

Nuria was lovely and welcoming; she met us outside the apartment exactly at the agreed time. She was also kind enough to arrange so that we could use her niece's baby cot at no extra charge.

We were a family of three staying in the apartment, two parents and one one year-old and it was perfect for us. The modern elevator was a life-saver getting up and down from the fifth floor with a baby in a push chair. The kitchen was well equipped for breakfast and cooking simple dinners for us and our baby.

The location is very central with plenty of restaurants, bars, cafés and sightseeing within easy walking distance. Plenty of supermarkets close, be warned though that most are closed on Sundays. For Sunday grocery shopping we would recommend the bottom floor of El Corte Ingles which is close by.

We will recommend Nuria's apartment to anyone, and will for sure check if it is available when we get back to Madrid!

The apartment was as advertised, perfect for a couple in Madrid. The apartment was extremely clean and well cared for inside in the heart of downtown Madrid. Nuria was an excellent host, very quick to respond to any questions we had. Provided excellent, very detailed directions to get to the apartment from the airport. She patiently waited any extra 30 minutes when we were late from the airport! Would definitely stay again.
It was a lovely stay at Nurias Appartment. You have everything you need including some really good tipps from Nuria. It's located in the centre which is perfect. I would choose it again everytime

Nuria's apartment is located right in the heart of Madrid with easy access to all places of interest. It was very clean, modern and comfy with nice furniture inside. Nuria is a very kind and gentle person. Highly recommended to stay here!

Nuria was the the best thing we could ask for on our trip to Madrid. The day we got there, we booked with her and she was available last minute.
We were appreciative of all the commodities the apartment had and would stay here again if ever in the area!

Nuria was an excellent host! Communicating with her was easy and she gave us a great introduction to the flat, Madrid and nearby attractions and restaurants. The flat was as described - clean, cozy, central, and well equipped! Overall, an excellent stay and Nuria was awesome!

This appartement has a perfect location directly in the heart of Madrid but is still quiet an really lovely. Nuria was a very good host giving us information about shopping facilities, nice restaurants etc. We already got a detailed description of the way from the airport to the appartement. Further she stored our luggage during the day we left so that we could come and pick them up on the way to the airport.
In addition, the appartement was well equipped, very clean an we had lots of towels etc. We really did not have to bring anything! I can suggest this appartement to anybody wanting to have a great time in this lovely city.

I stayed at Nuria's place with my partner and we had an absolutely amazing time. The place is cosy and exactly like the pictures. It was immaculately presented and incredibly clean. The location was absolutely perfect we were right I the heart of Madrid without all of the noise from Gran Via. Nuria was a very welcoming host and she even met us early to store our bags in the apartment before it had been cleaned. I would highly recommend this apartment in Madrid it is the only place that I would stay.

Nuria's apartment is sleek modern and chic. More importantly it's very clean.  The apartment is central - most of the major sites are within walking distance (note our husband and I prefer walking over taking the metro). As a host Nuria was incredibly responsive. We weren't able to meet her in person but she made sure someone was at the apartment to meet us. She also took the time to provide us with some great recommendations. Thank you Nuria!

No doubt, it is the best airbnb apartment that I went so far.  Nuria kept good communication before and after my arrival.  The apartment is close to most of Madrid’s main attractions, few minutes walking. Definitely I recommend it to everybody.

Séjour parfait.
Appartement neuf, impeccable, calme, joli et très bien équipé.
Situation idéale au coeur de Madrid.
Nuria est attentive, d'excellent conseil pour les restaurants.

Estancia muy agradable.
El piso es nuevo, muy limpio y bonito, quieto, con numerosos aparatos.
El lugar es perfecto al centro de Madrid.
Nuria es cuidadosa y da buenos consejos (restaurantes, etc)

A very pleasant stay.
The flat is new, spotlessly clean, nice, quiet, with many appliances.
This place is perfect at the center of Madrid.
Nuria is attentive and gives good advices on restaurants.
Una experiencia inolvidable. Nuria y su apartamento se merecen un 10 , hemos estado súper agusto y todo han sido facilidades.

la estancia fue maravillosa, la anfitriona una persona super agradable, muy servicial y siempre dispuesta a colaborar con sus huespedes. El apart esta muy bien ubicado, en pleno centro de madrid y esta ambientado tal como se ve en las fotos, DE PRIMERA.

This is an excellent apartment right in the heart of Madrid. The apartment is extremely clean and well-furnished, and is in a secure block of flats. Nuria was a perfect host as she was entirely flexible to our arrival and departure times, and available to contact very easily.
Great, great, best location, helpful hostess Nuria. I will be back next year, sure !
El apartamento es agradable y está en una zona céntrica. La anfitriona es excelente! Definitivamente, recomiendo hospedarse en el apartamento de Nuria :)

Nuria was so sweet! She not only let us check in early, but she took our bags for us, provided champagne and chocolate, and helped us navigate the city. She greeted us warmly, provided us with great recommendations, and was very pleasant throughout - not to mention her adorable apartment! It was so cute, clean, and had EVERYTHING we needed. Would love to stay here again in the future. Thank you, Nuria!

Un lugar acogedor,  cómodo,  moderno,  con todo lo que se necesita para una estadía agradable.  La cercanía a la gran via permite tener cerca comercio,  restaurantes y transporte fácil.  Gran hospitalidad y amabilidad parte de su propietaria

Beautiful, clean and conveniently-located apartment! Nuria was a sweetheart, she was very welcoming and helpful and took the time to give us recommendations. We would definitely love to stay in her apartment again!

Les photos sont conformes à l'appart en réel. Tout fut parfait. Nuria est super sympa, répond super vite aux messages et super serviable. L'appart est vraiment bien place à Madrid et pour le prix vous ne pouvez pas trouver mieux.
Je reviendrai chez Nuria si j'ai un séjour à Madrid. Elle est extra et son appart est vraiment superbe. Elle fait tout pour que votre séjour se passe au mieux. Merci Nuria pour tout, à bientôt ;-)

Nuria was extremely friendly and helpful.  She showed us how to use everything in the apartment when we got there.  The apartment is exactly what we expected from the pictures.  It was plenty of room for my husband and I.  It is located right off one of the main streets in Madrid, so the location was perfect.  Nuria gave great directions to us, so we didn't have any trouble making it to the apartment from the airport.  She even had a bottle of champagne waiting for us when we arrived.  Muchas gracias Nuria!!

The perfect apartment! It is located right off of the Gran Via, which meant most things were easily walkable. We only used the metro about 5 times in 4 days (mostly because I had to visit my school in the business district).
Nuria was there to greet us warmly and help orient us. We truly appreciate her kindness!
The apartment is immaculate, comfortable, and sleek. Although we were close to the Gran Via, the apartment was very quiet. We never heard another person's voice the whole stay!
I would definitely recommend staying at this apartment to any couple or set of friends who want to be close to everything, stay in a safe area, and enjoy a clean place.

Great location and great apartment, all as advertised.
Nuria was a very helpful host
Thanks again!
Sam

Nuria was a great host. She met us at the apartment, which was spotlessly clean. She left wine and chocolates as a welcome for us. The apartment was in a brilliant central location within walking distance of all the major city sights. We really enjoyed our stay here and recommend the apartment for its very good facilities.

Un lugar ideal para pasar unos días en el corazón de Madrid. El apartamento es exactamente lo que muestran las fotos: moderno, limpio, coqueto, y ¡muy acogedor! Y su anfitriona, Núria, una persona encantadora que nos recibió con una gran sonrisa y siempre dispuesta a ayudarte y aconsejarte sobre qué visitar, dónde comer, etc.

Su magnífica situación hace que puedas visitar la ciudad moviéndote a pié por los lugares más turísticos (Plaza de Callao, Puerta del Sol, Plaza Mayor, Cibeles, Plaza de España....)

Un apartamento totalmente recomendable para cualquier viajero que quiera conocer Madrid.

Nuria was amazing! She was flexible when I changed the time of arrival adn extremely welcoming. The apartment was beautiful and she left us two little bottles of champagne, along with numerous maps and suggestions of things to do. The apartment was incredible, as was the location; walking distance from everything and close to metro stops.

Nuria met our my friend and I right on time, and gave us some great advice and recommendations, along with already having some useful tourist materials to look through. Washing machine, fast wifi, TV, air conditioning, all worked great. She was really nice and would definitely recommend her to anyone. Location is also perfect, a very short distance from Gran Via, the Main Street. Fantastic!

Amazing apartment in an amazing neighborhood, the location is great - as close as it gets to the center of the city, and Nuria was a good host, she helped us out throughout our stay with good adresses and advices. Thanks

Nuria was an excellent and fantastic host. She was very nice with us, very flexible with the time of arrival and left us a bottle of champagne !

The apartment is exactly what we expected from the pictures. It is amazingly clean and beautiful and the location is perfect for tourism.

Thank you so much for all !

Nuria was very nice with us and welcomed us warmly to her place. Everything was at our disposal as soon as we arrived. The place was very clean and well equipped. The decoration is lovely and it looks as good in real life as it does on the pictures.

The location is totally amazing. It manages to be suprisingly quiet while still in the very center of the city. We were able to visit everything we wanted to see a lot faster than we expected since we could get anywhere in a matter of minutes. In a week, we used public transport only 2 or 3 times.

Thank you so much Nuria, you deserve all the good comments. :)
Great! Central, very clean, AC, and Nuria is lovely.

We could not have been more happy with our stay in this little piece of heaven right in the middle of the city. Nuria was the perfect host and greeted us with the warmest of welcomes, making us feel at home as soon as we arrived in Madrid.
The apartment was perfectly cozy and had everything as described and more. It has everything you could ask for in a home. The size of the apartment was perfect for two people.
Madrid is a beautiful city and thanks to the location of the flat we were able to see it all by foot. Being just off the Calle Gran Via puts you right in the heart of Madrid life.
It was an unforgettable week.
Thank you so much Nuria.

Joe and Marie (US and France)
A perfect example of a great accommodation! Absolutely clean where most places will fail. The location is very central too. Everyone's review is legit. Highly recommended.

Nuria was very warm and welcoming in her communications.  Although my wife and I did not get to meet her personally, she had a friend (a very nice person) let us in and left a bottle of wine to welcome us.  The description and pictures of the apartment are accurate, except that some features of the apartment were a bit nicer than we expected.  It is surprisingly quiet, despite being in a very lively area of Madrid, so we were able to get much-needed sleep after flying in from California.  We had a lovely stay and would not hesitate to stay in Nuria’s apartment the next time that we are in Madrid.

Nuria is the best! She is so helpful and welcoming and is one of those people that makes you understand what airbnb is all about. The apartment is clean and modern, exactly as pictured with a great location. She even left us champagne and candy, what more could you ask for?
Nuria es super maja y nos ayudó con todo, el piso es limpio y moderno, justo como se ve en las fotos, ademas tiene buena ubicación al lado de la gran via. No se puede pedir mas!

An amazing apartment, great location, very helpful host, perfectly located in the heart of gran via, this apartment is very quiet, very we'll equipped and immaculately kept.
Shower, air cond, wifi were great.
Thoroughly recommended.
Thank you Nuria

Gracias a Nuria nos sentimos como en familia, muy cálida, con linda recepción.
Sin duda volvería a Madrid y la recomiendo muchísimo.
El departamento es tal como lo describe, muy bien situado, muy limpio y perfecto.
Nos queda una sensación de buena persona y muy agradable.

Nuria has been a wonderful host. I was greeted by Nuria when I was on the way finding the apartment. The photo shown on airbnb matched exactly what you expected in her cosy apartment. One would be surprised by her flowers and lovely treat from Nuria upon arrival (*secret for new-comers*).
I would highly recommend Nuria to any Airbnb users who plan to stay in Madrid !

The apartment was perfect! Perfectly clean and comforatable. Located in the heart of Madrid close to famous places and subway station. The best place to stay for a couple. Nuria is very hospitable and positive host! She met us by herself, showed appartment, suggested great places to visit and even let us to stay almost one additional day(check-out at late evening instead of morning) for free. The best impressions from Madrid!
Very Nice appartement with everything we need.  Very clean.  Perfect situation since almost everything is at walking distance.  Nuria was there to welcome us.  Very friendly and available.

Nuria is great and the apartment is perfect!!
She is a very friendly and welcoming person, always reachable, helpful and attentive. She greeted us by herself and gave us recommendations for our trip. The apartment is beautiful and exactly as shown in the pictures. It is perfectly clean and tidy and fully equipped. The location is great, in the heart of Madrid, immediately next to the Gran Via.
We had a great stay in Madrid, thank you very much, Nuria!!!

Nuria was the perfect host. She communicated really well throughout and her apartment was not only superbly situated and allowed for a quiet sleep, but it was beautifully presented, even with little gifts of welcome! Highly recommended!
Muchas Gracias Nuria...toto estaba perfecto. ..El apartamiento esta muy limpio,  cerca de todo y muy tranquilo

Nuria really made us feel at home in Madrid ! The appartement was perfect for us: central location, nicely decorated, very clean and a nice neighborhood. The appartement is in the middle of Madrid but very quite as it is in between buildings, so perfect to recover from a long day in town.

Nuria is a charming host, and her apartment is wonderful - Amazing location, just 50 meters from Gran Via, from Malansana..., very quiet, great bed and very clean and tidy, well equipped - everything you may need to cook and fix yourself a meal.
Nuria waited for us late at night, showed us the place, was very very kind, and on the day of our flight - she allowed us to stay until evening...
Very recommended!!!
Nuria was the perfect host! :) We booked really late so we had to stay in another of her Madrid houses until this one was ready, and both are stunning and in great locations. Highly recommended.

Nuria was very friendly and waited in the street for an hour, I'm really sorry for that.......
She also prepared a map and description Madrid attractions for us. I am grateful she sent champagne for us, feeling very warm
Her apartment is very comfortable and clean look same with the photos and the location is great,we stay for two day haven't use any metro or bus

Nuria was a fantastic host from start to end of our trip. She was always answering any enquiries in good time and provided us with clear and easy to follow directions in how to get to her apartment.
The apartment is very central and close to 2 central metro stops (Calleo and Grand Via) and walking distance to other areas such as Malasaña, La Latina, Opera, Sol, etc.
Another plus was that inside the apartment it is very quiet as it faces the back of building. We had windows open at night and couldn't hear a sound!
The apartment has everything you need including towels, shower creams, cleaning products, etc. And also has all kitchen appliances such as toaster, kettle, coffee machine microwave, etc. There is air conditioning aswell.
Nuria also provided tourist information and talked us through her favourite spots to go out in the city.
We had requested a later check out as our departure flight was in the evening. Nuria accomodated us by allowing us to store our bags in her apartment until the new guests arrived.
I would highly recommend Nuria and her apartment for anyone looking for a base to stay in the heart of a fantastic city.

Nuria's apartment is absolutely lovely. Very clean and the bed is super comfy. It has everything you need and is walking distance from everywhere (literally, don't purchase the all-inclusive transport ticket - you don't need it). We had a great stay and couldn't recommend the apartment more.

Nuria e' gentilissima, l'appartamento pulitissimo e funzionale, ideale per una coppia. La zona e' centralissima proprio come Nuria dice, ci si muove molto facilmente. Pur trovandosi in zona vitale e rumorosa e' silenziosissimo: il giudizio e' complessivamente superlativo!

Nuria was a lovely host! She provided thorough directions for us to get to her place, and once there she was incredibly welcoming. Her place is in a fantastic location (walkable to sites, restaurants and bars), and it was clean and comfortable for our two night stay. I would certainly stay again!

Thank you Nuria for a fantastic stay in your apartment. It's a cosy studio flat that is perfect for a couple or two friends, it's really clean and the location is absolutely great. We were no more than a 10-20 minute walk from tourist sites. There were lots of great bars, restaurants and food markets just on our doorstep and also ideal if you wanted to do a spot of shopping.

We would definitely recommend Nuria's studio :-)

Nuria è stata fenomenale, sin dal primo momento. Sempre disponibile e rintracciabile per qualsiasi esigenza, ci è venuta incontro in tutte le occasioni e ci ha anche fatto trovare qualcosa per la colazione. L'appartamento è grazioso, funzionale, pulitissimo e dotato di tutti i comfort (persino tostapane, bollitore e altri attrezzi elettronici per cucinare, oltre a una piastra nuovissima). E' perfetto per una coppia, ma può accogliere anche 3 persone. Le foto e la descrizione rispecchiano perfettamente la realtà. La posizione è ancora più centrale di quanto si possa immaginare, eppure è silenziosissimo. Non abbiamo mai dovuto prendere i mezzi per spostarci nel centro. Lo consigliamo vivamente!

Nuria made us feel very welcome and took time to explain everything.the flat was exactly as described with everything neat,clean and tidy.the location is a stones throw from the Grande Via ,so ideal for central Madrid.Nuria herself is a lovely lady,very friendly and very flexible
Allowing us to stay at the flat till early evening on our day of departure.

Nuria's apartment is very well located, 2 minutes from Gran Via & Callao Metro station.
It has a beautiful decoration as you can see in the pictures and it was super clean.
Nuria is really friendly and easy going.
Would come back anytime. I highly recommend staying at her apartment!

El piso es idéntico a las fotos, muy acogedor y todo muy ordenado y limpio. Nuria, una chica muy agradable. Se portó genial y fue un puntazo que el domingo no tuviera inconvenientes en que dejaramos el apartamento bastante tarde. Lo recomendamos y muuuuuuucho

We stayed at Nuria's apartment for 2 nights in Madrid, and our experience was fabulous ! Nuria was a great host and had come down to help with the check-in. The apartment was perfect - great location (10 min walk to puerta del sol and plaza mayor, 5 min walk to gran via metro station, lots of eating options within walking distance of the flat). The flat is exactly as shown in the pictures with all modern facilities and amenities.
Would want to stay here again if we visit Madrid in the future, would definitely recommend this to anyone visiting Madrid.

This is the second time I stayed at Tafari Gran Vía. It was as perfect as I remembered: all amenities, cleanliness, easy communication with Nuria, she was accommodation with late arrival time and personalised leaving times. The studio was as advertised, home away from home, close as it could be to metro station and busiest commercial area, no outside noise though so sleep was guaranteed. There is a supermarket, plaza, local restaurants, pharmacy, police station, private parking, all within a minute range of the studio. Heart touching to be greeted by Nuria and her welcome basket with some treats. Is definitevely my first option when booking a Madrid stay!

Nuria's apartment is centrally located behind Gran Via.  We communicated well prior to my arrival, even after we missed our train to Madrid and she had to be flexible with our meeting time.  The place looked exactly like the photos.  We couldn't figure out the AC/Heat or the washing machine but that's because we are not technologically inclined :).  Great stay for the 2 nights we were there.

Nurias Gastfreundschaft ist wie auch ihre Wohnung großartig! Das Apartment ist nicht nur genau wie es abgebildet ist - sauber, gemütlich und mit großer Liebe zum Detail eingerichtet - sondern es ist wirklich großartig gelegen, nur einen Steinwurf von allen wichtigen Plätzen und Museen in Madrid entfernt. Nuria ist eine wundervolle Gastgeberin, die einen nicht nur mit einem kleinen Sekt, sondern auch mit ihren persönlichen Restaurant- und Bartipps versorgt! Die Wohnung liegt gleich neben der Gran Via und ist trotzdem aufgrund der guten Lage in den Innenhof untertags wie auch in der Nacht absolut ruhig, perfekt für Menschen (wie mich) mit einem leichten Schlaf. Die Küche ist perfekt ausgestattet, das Badezimmer ist brandneu und die Dusche ein Traum. Es gibt wirklich nichts mehr hinzuzufügen, außer eventuell, die Tatsache (und das ist mir in meinen 10 Jahren Reisen um die Welt nicht passiert), dass das Bett fast so gemütlich ist wie mein eigenes und dass ich auf jeden Fall wieder bei Nuria übernachten werde, sollte ich nach Madrid kommen!!!

La zona es muy transitable y conectada, hay restaurantes y súper mercados al rededor, el cuarto es lindo y tranquilo, muy amplio para trabajar y descansé muy bien, el baño limpio y organizado, la cocina equipada, hermosa experiencia y Fernando es un excelente anfitrión, me dio recomendaciones y las instrucciones de la casa muy fáciles, recomendado al 100%
El alojamiento está en una ubicación inmejorable y dispone de todo lo necesario para la estancia. Fernando es muy amable, respetuoso y atento! Para repetir!

Súper excelente en todos los aspectos. Fernando es un genio total, muy atento e intachable como anfitrión. La casa súper limpia en cada rincón, la habitación hermosa, el barrio es hermosísimo también y tiene una ubicación estratégica porque está cerca del centro (se puede ir a pie o en metro) y en un barrio seguro. Está a una cuadra del metro y hay varios transportes cerca también. Sin dudas, lo recomiendo y me hubiese gustado quedarme más tiempo de lo cómoda que me sentí.
Muchas gracias por todo Fernando!

Hospedaje muy bien organizado. Muy tranquilo y tambien ideal para estadias cortas, largas. Recomendado para viajeros de todo el mundo. La privacidad y el respeto es algo muy caracteristico del lugar. Agradecido con Sr. Fernando por las comodidas, facilidades y la confianza para conmigo. Simplemente yo espero haber sido buen huesped y espero verlo denuevo. Gracias totales.
Un hombre super majo, pendiente de todo, te explica todo, flexibilidad en la hora de llegada. Un placer 😊

Todo perfecto desde el comienzo hsta el final. Fernando fue siempre atento, claro, parecido y muy eficaz en sus respuestas.En cuanto al apartamento, mejor imposible! Fernando te recibe con todos los elementos a disposición para que te sientas en casa.Sin dudas, lo  recomiendo!

Could have been any better? Definitely no.
I moved to Madrid for work and my start in the city was great, mainly because of this house.
Only shame is that Fernando already had bookings right after mine so I couldn't extend after my initial reservartion for a month!
Thanks Fernando, indeed you made someone happy in this world 👍🏼
fernando is honestly great! nice, polite, helpful. the house is great, the room is excellent! just go and enjoy! r
Fernando es un increíble host, súper atento y amable 😃 recomiendo bastante la habitación, te sentirás como en casa y la ubicación es perfecta súper tranquila y centrica

Great location.  Was able to take the train from the airport to Fernando's place.  Then all of the iconic landmarks of Madrid were within walking distance.  Fernando was extremely helpful with giving directions and advice on how to get to his apartment.  He is a very friendly and accomodating host.  The internet was very fast.  The neighbourhood is beautiful, safe and quiet at night.  I wouldn't hesitate to stay there again if I'm ever back in Madrid!
He is a great host and the place is fantastic.

The best Airbnb I have ever stayed in! Fernando’s apartment manages to be both big AND cosy and I felt instantly at home there. It’s in a very peaceful and un-touristy part of Madrid and you can get to the very centre with a 30 minute walk. It’s also very well connected by bus and metro and is an easy journey to and from the airport.
Fernando himself is an exceptional host! Incredibly polite and helpful and speaks both English and Spanish. He does everything he can to get you safely from the airport, and really respects your privacy and space if you are sharing the apartment together. He is often in Bilbao however and so I essentially had the whole place to myself. Thanks for a great stay, Fernando!

Una experiencia fenomenal! Fernando es un gran anfitrión, me ayudó y guió con todo lo que necesité durante mi estadía. Su piso tiene todo lo que uno necesita para estar cómodo y a gusto, su ubicación es excelente. Mil gracias Fernando!
Todo perfecto!

Fernando greeted me warmly and his place was great to stay at! The neighborhood was convenient to get around the city and it was quiet and safe at night. I would be happy to stay at his place again if I visit Madrid again :)

Fernando foi gentil e me deixou muito à vontade! Mostrou-se flexível para que retirasse minhas coisas um pouco mais tarde que o check out...o que me ajudou para aproveitar mais o dia. Casa organizada e com tudo necessário bem perto! acesso e bairro muito bons! recomendarei!

El alojamiento es totalmente fiel a las fotos de Airbnb. Tiene todas las comodidades. Además, está muy bien ubicado, muy cerca del metro y en un barrio tranquilo pero a la vez con cierto ambiente. Por último, Fernando es un anfitrión de 10. Muy fácil comunicarse con él y, una vez en el alojamiento, se preocupa por todos los detalles para garantizarte la comodidad. Totalmente recomendable!

Fernando is very considerate of the guests
so I was able to come here after being really comfortable
He let me know the information exactly
it was nice and comfortable also
and he recommended a lot about Madrid, so it was comfortable when traveling.
I also learned about spanish cultures.
I really want to come back when I come to Madrid
thank you !😊
Muchas gracias Nuria por todo! La buena atención, las recomendaciones sobre Madrid y por el departamento que realmente era tan lindo como decía el anuncio! Muy cómodo y totalmente equipado!

We were a group of 3 girls travelling for the first time to Spain. We had a wonderful time in Madrid and this apartment was just the cutest thing in the perfect location . The bus stop is just a couple of minutes walk away and the train station a mere 5. Nuria was wonderful in explaining the apartment and things nearby. Thank you for a great stay.

Toisen kerran vietin kaksi viikkoa Nurian huoneistossa, joka sijaitsee loistopaikalla keskellä Madridia. Todella siisti huoneisto, metrolla helppo kulkea, kaikki tarvittava lähellä. Huoneisto hyvin varustettu. Wifi toimii erinomaisesti. Vuoden päästä palaan takaisin.
La casa es tal como aparece en el anuncio. Perfecta para moverse por el centro de la ciudad. Nuria es una anfitriona perfecta. Muy limpio y silencioso. Sin duda repetiremos.

Nuria ia a great host.. Great apartment, brilliant location located in a quiet street just around gran via..
Tnx Nuria, had a great time.. Best Ronald.

Fue increíble ! Nuria es de lo más encantadora y además tiene una disposición maravillosa ! Volvería de todas maneras, además ella tiene su departamento limpio, ordenado y esta súper central!! Lo recomiendo

Simplemente PERFECTO! El piso muy limpio, la atención, el colchón comodísimo! La ubicación genial (centro de Madrid), el detalle de la botellita de cava, la predisposición de Nuria.
Sin duda lo recomiendo 100%. Gracias!!

Aproveitamos muito nossa estadia nesse apartamento. Nuria foi uma excelente anfitriã, ficamos muito felizes com sua atenção e cuidado em nos mostrar tudo e a facilidade em nos comunicarmos.
O apartamento está muito bem localizado e é muito limpo, só temos pontos positivos para comentar.
Apartamento e anfitriã estão de parabéns!

The apartment near Gran Via was perfect! A great size for one person or 2 friends/couple. Nuria had all of the amenities - soap, laundry machine, drying rack, cookware. The location was perfect too! Just off the main shopping street from Madrid, steps from the metro and a nice walk from the big museums. Plus it was on a side street so it was perfectly quiet in the evenings.
Nuria was a great host - flexible with delivering keys and offered great suggestions of where to explore. She even left a bottle of champagne when I arrived! Will definitely use this place again when I'm back in Madrid!

Super !!!! Rien à dire !! Excellent séjour ! Nuria est au top très accueillante !! Et son appartement juste magnifique, propre vraiment extra.
Il est très bien situé, à proximité de beaucoup de choses ! Magasins en tout genre, restaurants.... Nuria nous a conseillé, orienté, c'était vraiment très gentil de sa par. Elle est disponible.

Nuria, ha sido un muy buena anfitriona destacandose por tu amabilidad y hospitalidad.
El departamento es precioso, con todo lo necesario para sentirse como en casa, sin tener que preocuparse por nada.
Se nota su vocación de servicio en cada detalle.
Si dudarlo, de regresar a Madrid, volvere a elegirla.
Virginia

Nuria est une hôte tellement gentille attentionnée et accueillante !!! Son appartement est un petit trésor dans le plein centre de Madrid (très très calme en plus!). Tout est propre, bien décoré, de bon goût et surtout très COSY!!!! Vous vous sentez comme à la maison. J'y retournerai sans hésiter !!! Muchas gracias NURIA:-)!!!!!!!
Was a very warm and friendly welcome by Nuria - an attentive and lovely hostess. The apartment is located in the very city centre and had everything we needed. Just perfect!

Incredible airbnb experience. Perfect in every way. Nuria is so lovely and welcoming, the perfect host. The apartment is perfect- great size, clean, modern, AMAZING aircon and location, quiet. Would recommend to all my friends who visit Madrid and will definitely stay here again

Definitely a sweet house with wealthy equipment. I love this house so much and it's the most amazing experience in my airbnb experiences. Nuria is a very nice and scrupulous lady, I was surprised when I got to the house, especially at the moment I saw  champagne.  anyway , it would be your perfect choice if you plan to stay in Madrid.
We had an amazing time in Madrid thanks to Nuria! The apartment had everything we needed and was in the best possible location! On top of that Nuria was so welcoming! An amazing host.

Nuria's place is realy great. Clean, quiet and equipped with every thing you need. Nuria gave us a warm welcoming and was helpful with ways to get to her place and recomendations. Our flight arrived late, but Nuria had no problem meeting us at this hour.

Todo fue excelente!!!! La casa tiene todo lo que uno pueda necesitar, nosotros viajamos con nuestro bebé de 7 meses y hasta tenia una cuna para el, increíble. El piso es tal cual se ve en las fotos, esta impecable y la ubicación mejor imposible, en medio de todo Madrid, puedes ir a todos lados caminando sin problemas. Gracias Nuria, esperemos volver pronto a Madrid y a tu depto.

Excelente apartamento en el centro de Madrid. Totalmente equipado, muy limpio  y ordenado. Reservamos el mismo día y Nuria estuvo pendiente de nuestro viaje en todo momento. Fabulosa anfitriona!! Nos ofreció todo tipo de información.Para repetir... Lo recomendamos!!

We visited Madrid in August 2015. And were lucky to stay in both Nuria's apartments. The aparts are perfectly clean and very comfortable placed in the center. Nuria is adorable and extremely helpful, she gave very good advise about places to eat and to shop) As well very flexible on check in and check out hours, which is a big deal if u want to spend more time for visiting. She is doing all her best to help and it makes u feel like at home and wishing to come back) We are happy to meet such a person and for sure will come back to her apartments again.

The apartment was absolutely perfect and had everything you needed for an enjoyable stay in Madrid. The location was excellent and made it really easy to get around on foot. Nuria was a wonderful host. We would highly recommend a stay here and would do so ourselves if we returned to Madrid.

Nuria was a wonderful host! She welcomed us on arrival and showed us the apartment, and gave us some recommendations for our short stay in Madrid. The apartment was just beautiful, and extremely clean! The location couldn't have been more ideal for seeing the sights of Madrid on foot. I would recommend this place without hesitation to anyone looking to visit Madrid.

Nuria's apartment was perfect!  Very clean and comfortable.  Great location, right in the hip part of town with great shopping and bars.  She also provides us with a bottle of champagne and chocolates.  That was a very nice touch!  Very friendly and accepted our reservation very last minute.  Thanks for everything!
La experiencia con Nuria fue muy buena. Excelente anfitriona. El piso muy bonito y muy bien ubicado.
Wery nice appartement, wery well located, Nuria is an excellent host. We had a good trip in Madrid, thank's!

great Location that in the City heart! it is very conveniences to go any scenic pot! the host is very nice even she think her English is not that good, but we all satisfy and totally understand her! there are many useful tools in the flat! such as USB charger!

El apartamento de Nuria es tal y como se ve en la foto. Tan encantador como ella. Muy atenta en todo momento y todo cuidado al detalle. Hemos estado genial las dos noches que hemos pasado en él y sorprende lo tranquilo y silencioso que es estando a dos pasos de la Gran Vía.
Un placer.
Sin duda repetiremos.

Nuria was quick to respond for same day request. Apartment clean, updated with what is needed for short stay. Warning if driving as our GPS took us a block away. But called Nuria who helped. Car not needed in Madrid . Bathroom roomy and efficient. Bed mattress comfy with soft pillows to my liking. Good wifi . The location is excellent. Easy walk to Prado, puerto del sol, plaza de las Cibeles.  I wish I could have stayed longer. I hope to return to Madrid and would definitely stay at Nurias apt.

My husband and I stayed at Nuria's apartment two different times during our stay in Spain. Nuria herself is very friendly and helpful. She met us at the apartment and answered the various questions we had. She also provided us with helpful tips for getting around on the trains in Spain. She is very responsive, which is really helpful when you are trying to plan your trip or need a question answered quickly while travleing.  The apartment itself was very clean. There was even a different bed set on the bed the second time we stayed.  The bed was very comfortable. I would say it was the best bed we stayed in throughout our vacation. The location was awesome. Just a block or two from Grand Via shopping & the metro station to take you anywhere  in the city. Not to mention your right in Malasana which is such a hip & fun neighborhood...full of great restaurants and shops! I loved  wandering around and popping into the many boutiques. Don't hesitate to book here! The apartment really has all you need. A welcome respite for weary tourists at the end of a long day. Thank you Nuria for your hospitality! :)

Nuria was a wonderful hostess, very welcoming, and her apartment is lovely.  She was flexible with check-in time, and met us at the time we set to give us keys and show us around the place.  The apartment was quiet, clean and well-stocked for cooking, laundry, etc.  Location was perfect for touring Madrid on foot (we never took the subway except from the train station and to the airport).  We would definitely recommend staying here while visiting Madrid.
Es una persona encantadora y una perfecta anfitriona, estuvimos  muy agusto. es un sitio perfecto para quedarse cuando vas a Madrid.

Nuria made me feel like a friend from the start. Even though my Spanish isn't so good, she was patient and helpful with indulging my attempts to speak to her in Spanish. When I arrived I was tired and a little fed up, so the champagne and chocolate sure hit the spot.

More importantly, the listing is better than described. The location is great: Turn left twice and you're smack-dab in the middle of one of Madrid's most vibrant shopping sections. You can walk most of city from this location, although multiple subway stops are nearby, too.

Yes, it's as spotless and as cute as you see in the pictures. It's also perfectly organized and perhaps the best equipped apartment I've seen. It has everything you can think of that you'll need. I wish I'd have taken pictures of the bathroom closet to show you! May we all be so organized!

Nuria is definitely the first person I'll reach out to for lodging, when I return to Madrid. Next time I'm there, I plan to be more fluent in Spanish, so I hope we can grab lunch. She's just the sweetest!

You'll notice there are 198 reviews for this apartment, and the score is 5 stars across the board. That says all it needs to say, doesn't it?

La ubicación es excelente, el departamento precioso y Nuria la mejor anfitriona sin dudas; está en todos los detalles. Muchas gracias por todo, sin dudas la mejor opción; si volvemos a Madrid nos volveremos a ver!!
Nuria nos ha resultado insuperable,Su  calidez humana,su apartamento,la ubicacion,la limpieza,sus atenciones(dulces,etc)Todo te hace sentir rebien!!!!!  La recomendamos como lo mejor!!!!!!

El apartamento de Nuria en la calle Travesia del Horno de la Mata es lo maximo! Puro buen gusto, super funcional y la ubicacion es absolutamente inmejorable! Estar alli es estar en el centro vivo de Madrid. Nuria tiene un sentido del servicio y de la hospitalidad increibles y se ha ocupado de que este pequeño apartamento cuente con TODOS LOS DETALLES necesarios para una estadia sin complicaciones. Volvimos a Uruguay recomendandolo a todos nuestros amigos y volveremos el año entrante a disfrutarlo nuevamente. PERFECTA ELECCION EN TODOS LOS SENTIDOS (ANFITRION, APARTAMENTO Y LOCALIZACION). Gracias Nuria por toda tu delicadeza! Hugo y Angelina

El piso es tal y como se ve en las fotos, incluso algo mejor, todo esta muy nuevo, y muy limpio. La comunicación con Nuria fue muy buena. La zona es el centro de Madrid, al lado de callao, una calle muy tranquila y con nada de ruido. No tengo ninguna duda, si vuelvo a madrid vendre a este piso. Es para mi gusto, perfecto.

The best apartment in Madrid. Right in the center, took the metro only once to the Santiago Bernabeu stadium, the rest of the week we traveled by foot. Everything is close to the apartment! Nuria is an amazing host, answers quickly to messages. The apartment is clean, cozy and very equipped. Highly recommend
Bel appartemen, calme et bien situe et hôte disponible et agréable. Mais on ne voit pas le ciel de la chambre, dommage quand il fait beau !

El depto es soñado !! Llegamos y nos encanto el recibimiento con las atenciones que nos brindo Nuria. GENIA !
Es super comodo, amplio y esta super bien equipado y sobre todo super limpio. UN LUJO!
Lo super recomendamos. La ubicacion es IDEAL ! TODO ES HERMOSO!

Estuvimos 4 días en este apartamento y fue fantástico. Todo muy limpio, la decoración muy bonita, muy acogedor , es interior por lo tanto muy silencioso por las noches y con todo lo necesario para tener una muy buena estancia. Lo mejor de todo la situación del mismo, nosotros fuimos andando a todos los sitios, una maravilla. La Gran Via en la calle paralela ( Preciados, teatros, metro, ...). Situado en el barrio de Malasaña el cual tiene muchisima oferta gastronomica. Volveremos seguro!! Y por supuesto lo recomendaremos.

Mi estancia ha sido fantástica. La recomendaría 100% y volvería a repetir. Fernando es muy amable. La única cosa a mejorar (esto es solo una sugerencia) sería la almohada, que si tienes tantas contracturas en las cervicales como yo, una buena almohada la echas de menos.

Fernando es un excelente anfitrión. Es atento y servicial. Me explico todo solo llegar.
La habitación es muy amplia. La cama es cómoda y tienes varias almohadas para escoger. El armario es amplio. Hay perchas para largo, para corto y baldas.
La mesa es suficiente para trabajar con un portátil. Incluye smart TV de 22" con HDMI. La conexión a internet es muy rápida
La habitación da a norte, por lo que es fría en invierno. Hay calefacción por radiadores de agua en el piso.
Hay un aseo de uso exclusivo para el huesped. El baño es compartido con el anfitrión.
En mi experiencia el sitio de Fernando es muy recomendable. Es céntrico y tranquilo a la vez (la habitación da a la calle pero es un piso alto y una calle de un solo sentido de circulación).
Muchas gracias Fernando y hasta pronto

Hemos tenido una experiencia maravillosa en este apartamento. El anfitrión fue extremadamente claro y proporcionó instrucciones detalladas que hicieron que nuestra llegada y estancia fueran sin problemas. El barrio es fantástico, con una ubicación conveniente y una atmósfera encantadora.
El apartamento estaba impecablemente limpio, lo que realmente hizo que nuestra estancia fuera cómoda. Además, apreciamos enormemente el esfuerzo adicional de la señora de la limpieza, quien se ocupó de mantener todo en orden incluso mientras estábamos alojados.
La ubicación del apartamento es excelente, con fácil acceso a lugares de interés y servicios cercanos. Nos sentimos realmente como en casa y disfrutamos de cada momento en este acogedor lugar.
En resumen, altamente recomendamos este apartamento. Gracias a Fernando por su hospitalidad excepcional y por proporcionar un espacio tan encantador. Definitivamente volveremos en nuestro próximo viaje. ¡Gracias!

Durante tres meses, pude disfrutar de la hospitalidad de Fernando en su hogar, donde me sentí como en casa desde el primer día. Fernando siempre estuvo pendiente de mi bienestar y comodidad durante mi estadía. La habitación era exactamente como se mostraba en las fotos, acogedora y limpia, al igual que el resto de la casa. El vecindario era encantador, tranquilo y convenientemente ubicado cerca de las principales atracciones turísticas. En resumen, mi experiencia viviendo con Fernando superó todas mis expectativas y espero tener la oportunidad de repetirla en el futuro.

Una auténtica maravilla. Fernando es una persona espectacular, muy amable y un gran host que te abre las puertas de su casa y hace que te sientas como en la tuya o incluso mejor. El apartamento está en una zona privilegiada, cerca de El Retiro, ideal para una estancia larga, con todas las comodidades. La habitación es muy cómoda, con excelente Internet, TV y un escritorio ideal para trabajar. Sin duda repetiré en el futuro. Pasé 2 meses en su casa y solo tengo palabras de agradecimiento.

I enjoyed staying in Fernando’s apartment very much. The apartment is big, cozy, comfortable, clean, has everything you need. Kitchen is big, you have a dining room from the kitchen where you can eat. The room has a lot of light, big window, nice curtains, comfortable bed. Bathrooms are clean and big. The neighborhood is very good and beautiful with a lot of shops and restaurants. Closest metro station is 2 minutes away from home including other metro stations lines which are 5 minutes away. Most of the time I walked from home to the center including Royal Palace, Museum del Prado, Retiro park 10 minutes walking from
home. Fernando is a very nice and friendly person, has a good personality. He is very helpful about everything. He gives you all instructions around the city. I stayed in Fernando’s apartment for 7 days. Fernando was in Bilbao the entire time of my staying there. I will stay next time again at his place.

Great place to stay in Madrid: great location, clean and cute place, and lovely host. Fernando was very welcoming and gave me lots of recommendations. He also helped me get to the place quickly by making sure I got on the right bus and I could check in much earlier than it said in the instructions, which was great as I had had a long flight. I can only recommend this place!!
This is the second time I stay at Fernando’s. As usual, perfect from A to Z. Very friendly and helpful.

La experiencia durante unos días en el apartamento de Nuria ha sido estupenda.
La ubicación, la tranquilidad, la comodidad del apartamento y una anfitriona que desde el primer momento se mostró tan dispuesta y servicial.
Cuando volvamos a Madrid tenemos claro que repetiremos con Nuria.
Wonderful apartment in the perfect location. Highly recommend staying here!
Totalmente recomendable, situación inmejorable asi como la atención de su anfitriona Nuria, repetiría sin dudarlo.

Nuria hands down was absolutely fantastic and accommodating. She's very flexible as far as check-in/check out times and she even provided complimentary champagne as a welcoming gift. The location of her apartment was amazing! Most of the typical tourist spots are close by and walkable. If you don't want to walk, the apartment is right across the street from the Callao metro stop. Would stay here again if I visit Madrid.
Nurias apartment was great! It's my favorite Airbnb so far. It was very clean and in a great location, close to pretty much everything.

Nuria' apartment is a gem. Clean, well-equipped and an excellent location. Despite its very central location it's also amazingly quiet. Ticks all the boxes for us as a couple travelling. We wouldn't hesitate to stay here again or recommend to someone else.

La estancia no pudo ser mejor.
El piso es tal cual se ve en las fotos, todo super limpio, ubicación inmejorable y Nuria un encanto.
Cuando vuelva a Madrid me alojaré aquí de nuevo.

L'appartement est central et bien équipé. Nous avons visité tous les quartiers et tous les sites à pied, et pour les amateurs de métro la station de Callao est à deux pas.
L'appartement est propre, neuf et bien aménagé parfait pour un couple et Nuria nous a offert une bonne bouteille à notre arrivée, et a adapté les horaires d'arrivée et de départ à notre vol.
Merci Nuria, nous y reviendrons sûrement !
Un apartamento perfecto para alojarte si quieres conocer Madrid, te puedes desplazar a pie a cualquier lado y si no tienes el metro cerca. El apartamento es tal cual se ve en las fotos 👌
Perfecto,tal cual se ve en las fotos.Nuria encantadora.Sin duda repetiremos.Cerca de todo,a menos de 2 min,pero silencioso para descanso.
Recomendable!

El piso es tal cual se muestra en las fotos.
Acogedor, prolijo y muy bien ubicado.
Nuria es una excelente anfitriona.
Les recomiendo contactarse con ella para que les indique cómo acceder a su llegada.
Lo demás, es disfrutar el piso y la ciudad.
Recomendamos este piso a matrimonios en plan de vacacionar, salir de compras y recorrer Madrid y alrededores.
Gracias Nuria!

Ubicación inmejorable para éste apartamento decorado con gusto y al que no le falta nada para pasar unos días estupendos en pleno corazón de Madrid.
Dormir: Silencio asegurado .Aunque está practicamente en Gran via, la calle es trasera, por lo que no había ningún ruido ninguno y como tiene persiana, no entra luz que te despierte. Descanso completo .
Cocina con horno , lavadora..etc y baño con secador, toalla, champú,etc.
El trato con Nuria ha sido perfecto en comunicación, le estamos muy agradecidos porque pudimos entrar antes de la hora al piso, ya que se le quedó libre temprano.Y también nos guardó las maletas el tiempo necesario a la salida. Nuria es muy simpática y desprende entusiasmo y energía positiva , siempre con una sonrisa. Cualquier duda o indicación sobre la ciudad que tuvimos nos la resolvió enseguida. Se nota que cuida el apartamento y da facilidades y detalles de bienvenida para los huéspedes. Apartamento muy recomendable! :))

Es un studio , céntrico ideal para dos personas. Aprovechas mejor tu visita a Madrid.
El Studio tiene todo lo esencial para sentirte como en casa.
Está en un edificio nuevo con ascensor y nada de ruido a pesar de situarse paralela a la Gran Vía - Callao.
Volveré
La casa è centralissima e molto carina. Nuria ha organizzato il check-in per il nostro orario di arrivo. Molto consigliata!

L'appartamento è ubicato benissimo. Si gira per il centro a piedi con molta facilità. Perfettamente pulito e dotato di tutti i comfort. Sebbene in pieno centro é molto silenzioso. Il letto è alla francese, ma molto comodo.
Nuria è stata molto gentile e disponibile.
Consigliatissimo.
Nuria es muy buena anfitriona es super amable el dpto es muy tranquilo y rebien ubicado para moverse en madrid la estancia ha sido de diez, gracias nuria besos

Nuria es una persona súper atenta. Al inicio tuve un pequeño problema con el aire acondicionado en el departamento, pero ella lo solucionó el mismo día sin inconveniente alguno. El departamento está ubicado en un lugar súper centrico que yo recomendaría ampliamente, además en realidad Nuria es un encanto de persona. Totalmente recomendable.
Nuria is an excellent host. Provided some constructive feedback which she took in gracefully. Thank U Nuria!
Excelente lugar, muy limpio y súper bien ubicado. Muy amable y atenta Nuria.

L’appartement est très bien, très propre et très bien situé!
Nous sommes très contentes car tout était conforme à l’annonce.
Nuria nous a arrangé pour nous laisser les clefs plus tôt. Tout était parfait.

Posizione ottima, veramente a due passi dalla gran via, tanto che ti dimenticherai della metro. Appartamento moderno curato in ogni minimo dettaglio ,super pulito e Super tranquillo. Nuria una persona super disponibile e gentile. Veramente tutto perfetto. Assolutamente consigliato!

Die perfekte Wohnung für einen Aufenthalt als Paar. Die Wohnung könnte kaum zentraler liegen und trotz der direkten Nähe zur Gran Via war es komplett ruhig in der Wohnung. Die Küche war komplett ausgestattet und alles sehr sauber. Man wurde herzlichst empfangen und der Kontakt lief reibungslos. Gerne wieder!
房子位于市中心，去哪里都很方便，附近餐厅很多。房间十分干净，也很安静。性价比超高，强烈推荐！

Nuria sabe muy bien cómo recibir huéspedes y qué es lo que éstos necesitan.
El departamento es pequeño pero muy cómodo para dos personas. Tiene todo lo necesario, y mucho más, para pasarla muy bien. Infinidad de detalles hacen que la estancia en este lugar sea placentera. Además, está muy bien ubicado, a metros de Gran Vía, con muchas facilidades para moverse por la ciudad.
Nuria fue muy flexible con los horarios de entrada y salida, lo cual ayudó a que nuestra estadía fuera de lo mejor que hemos conocido en Madrid.
Recomendamos este hospedaje, es inmejorable.

Ubicacion:inmejorable a una cuadra de la gran via y 2 de Plaza Callao-Apartamento:MOderno, buen gusto, silencioso y todas las necesidades cubiertas y funcionando perfectamente , desde los electrodomesticos ,wifi, ascensor,hasta todo los pequeños detalles que un viajero puede necesitar.Es un espacio muy confortable para dos personas con todos los recursos necesarios para una excelente estadía!!!Sin duda ; lo vamos a  recomendar y lo volveremos a contratar.-Silvia y Ricardo
Excelente anfitriona y excelente persona. Muy atenta y el lugar esta impecable tal cual se ve en las fotos. Muy bonito apartamento
Excelente ubicación, hermoso alojamiento, tal cual las fotos.
Exactly as everyone else has said - great spot, lovely and clean, easy check in, friendly host, everything works. Perfect long weekend in Madrid! Thanks for your hospitality Nuria
Ha sido todo perfecto, la estancia inmejorable, y muy recomendable, sobre todo por la buena ubicación para poder conocer Madrid.

Nuria was perfect host. Very responsive and helpful.
Apartment was exactly as described. Clean, very well equipped and some drinks in fridge on arrival. Could not ask anything more! And location!! Apartment was in heart of Madrid. Close walk everywhere and easy access for metro. First time in Madrid and we managed to arrive from airport straight to apartment with metro.
WiFi and AC worked well. Apartment is best for two but three will fit in.
Extra mention for filter coffee machine! It’s lifesaver for Finns :)

El alojamiento en la vivienda de Nuria es perfecto. Cuenta con todo tipo de utensilios para necesidades del día a día, está en una ubicación inmejorable para turismo y se encuentra en un estado de cuidado impecable. Como broche de oro, el trato y la atención de Nuria. Muy contentos, lo recomendamos completamente
Ok todo, muy buen gusto y bien ubicádo, 10 puntos en todo
Great location, very responsive host, clean and well equipped apartment! Really recommended.

Um dos melhores airbnbs que ficamos!!! Excelente, organizado, super limpo e cuidados em cada detalhe. Adoramos e recomendamos totalmente. Sem falar da localização que é perfeita! Não teria como ser melhor a nossa estadia em Madrid!
Apartamento acogedor en pleno centro de Madrid, recomendable 100% .
En primer lugar Nuria nos recibio con una gran amabilidad!!! El departamento es tal cual lo ves en la pagina. Tiene todo lo necesario para tu estadia. Muy bien ubicado.
Un apartamento impecable en pleno centro. Muy bien equipado y comunicado. Nuria es un encanto. Gracias !

Nuria's apartment is in the perfect location to everything in the historic center. The place is close to everything that we were able to stop by and drop of stuff as needed or take a nap when we were touring the city. All the amenities are as described and Nuria is a great host able to help us with any questions we had during the check in.

Para nosotras ha sido un placer alojarnos en el piso de Núria durante nuestra estancia en Madrid. El recibimiento fue muy bueno, de hecho, nuestro avión se retrasó y ella estuvo pendiente en todo momento y dando respuestas súper rápidas. El piso es igual que en las fotos y además tiene cualquier cosa que puedas necesitar. La localización es inmejorable, en pleno centro de Madrid. Núria es una anfitriona que cuida hasta el mínimo detalle y hace que la estancia de sus huéspedes sea de lo más agradable. Sin duda, cuando volvamos a Madrid, nos gustaría repetir en su apartamento!
This apartment is great! Quiet and still in the middle of the city. I highly recommend this place and if ever in Madrid again I would choose this apatment again. Thank you Nuria for the hospitality.

Nuestra estancia en el alojamiento ha sido perfecta. La ubicación inmejorable, el piso muy cómodo, lo tiene todo muy cuco y no falta detalle para que te sientas como en casa, además de estar muy limpio. Pero lo mejor de todo es la atención por parte de Nuria, se adapta a cada circunstancia, fue muy amable y servicial. Un bonito detalle es que nos dejó refrescos en la nevera y chocolatinas, y el día de la salida como no tenía a nadie al día siguiente pudimos salir más tarde sin ningún problema, muy de agradecer. En nuestro próximo viaje a Madrid sin duda repetiremos con Nuria!
Todo de 10, sin mas!!!

Sin duda disfrutareis de vuestra estancia en Madrid en gran parte gracias al bonito apartamento de Nuria. Muy fácil de encontrar, limpio, totalmente equipada y muy céntrico. Núria nos recomendó algunos sitios que visitar y dejo unos panfletos con información y lugares de interés de Madrid en el apartamento.
Volveremos sin duda!
Ubicación y estancia inmejorable, Nuria es super agradable y está atenta  en todo momento. Repetiremos!!!
Resérvalo ya! Repetiría sin pensarlo! Súper bién situado, muy limpio y silencioso y cama muy cómoda. Núria fue súper amable y puntual.
Alojamiento muy recomendable. Ubicación y limpieza inmejorables. Nuria un encanto. Repetiremos.

Nos encantó el apartamento de Nuria. Aunque sea pequeñito, está muy bien aprovechado y cuida hasta el último detalle. Deja en él todo lo que uno necesita cuando está alojado fuera de casa. La situación es inmejorable. Nuria resolvió todas nuestras dudas al instante y se mostró abierta a cambios en la hora de salida y llegada. En resumen, todo perfecto
great location, on the heart of Chueca and Nuria is very kind and reactive

Nuria es una excelente host, super facil la comunicacion con ella! El apto es muy lindo tiene todo lo necesario y ademas super bien ubicado porque esta super centrico pero no escuchas ruido por lo que puedes descansar muy bien! Lo recomiendo bastante!
房子位置很好，离景点和地铁站都很近，房间干净整洁，还很安静 有电梯，马德里住宿的好选择，房主特别热情，屋里给准备了景点的介绍还有城市地图，如果下次去马德里，我还会选择住这里
El departamento de Nuria es tal como se ve en las fotos, muy funcional y super bien ubicado. Pasamos una excelente estancia en Madrid!
Amazing stay at the place really close to the center~ the place is clean and nice to stay
Perfecto apartamento. Muy recomendable

Excelente ubicación a metros de la plaza Callao y sin embargo en una calle muy tranquila.
Super-silencioso, limpio y muy bien equipado; con todo lo necesario para una buena estancia.
Nuria ha sido muy amable y puntual en la entrega de llaves.
Muy recomendable para una o dos personas.
Excellent location, very close to the Callao metro station but in a quiet street.
Very clean, well equipped with everything you might need.
Nuria has been very kind, and getting the key was a very smooth process.
Highly recommendable apartment for one or two persons.

El alojamiento cuenta con todo lo indispensable. Muy bien ubicado ya que a 1 cuadra hay una estación del metro y parada de un bus que hace ruta por puntos turísticos.
El único inconveniente fue que hacía demasiado calor y aunque contaba con 3 ventiladores a mi disposición, en las noches no era suficiente
Fernando fue flexible para la hora de llegada ya que mi vuelo llegó a las 5 am y cómo no había huésped el día anterior, me dejó entrar a las 8

Fernando was an excellent host and made me feel at home in his flat. The flat was spacious, well-equipped and in a lovely building. The area was fabulous; with Retiro park only a 15 minute walk and plenty of supermarkets, restaurants and cafés within 5 minutes walk. Metro was very close as well with easy access to the centre of Madrid!

Location, location, location… this room is located in the best neighborhood in Madrid hands down. You also have everything you need in less than a 5 block radius (gym, grocery store 24/7, metro station, bike-sharing hub, plenty of restaurants and coffee shops. The scenery around the neighborhood is wonderful, and is also extremely safe.
The Host, Fernando is extremely attentive and very good sharing valuable information about the city…

Fernando est l'hôte le plus organisé et attentionné qui soit.
Tout est extrêmement bien pensé et pratique. Fernando est très amical et réactif et fournit d'innombrables conseils très utiles et détaillés, avec des photos, etc. Il sait aussi être discret et silencieux, afin de respecter le repos de son client, ce qui est rarissime lorsqu'on loue 1 chambre dans un logement.
L'appartement est très agréable et la chambre bénéficie d'une grande fenêtre.
Il y a des restaurants, cafés et supermarchés à quelques mètres. Enfin, 3 stations de métro sont accessibles très rapidement à pied, ainsi que des bus vers le centre et aussi vers la gare d'Atocha. Une excellente adresse !
extremely friendly and considerate host and comfortable and quiet apartment

Fernando es una persona muy amable y detallista, a la casa no le faltaba de nada, estupenda, con todo lo necesario y muy limpia.
La ubicación es perfecta muy cerca del metro.
Sin duda repetiría.

Highly recommended for both short & long stays. It’s an accurately described room in a cozy & spacious apartment located in the west of Salamanca - ultra convenient, safe and quiet residential area with metro lines within 5 min walk. Fernando is amazingly hospitable and helpful while 100% respect his guest’s privacy.
un excelente anfitrión!!!

Pasé una excelente estancia en el piso de Fernando! está super bien ubicado y en el piso hay de todo a disposición para lo que necesites. Fernando es un excelente host, desde antes de llegar ya me dio recomendaciones de restaurantes y lugares para visitar en Madrid y además me dejó hacer check in temprano y así no tener que esperar una vez aterricé. Me encantaría volver a quedarme aquí cuando regrese a Madrid:)

It's a nice apartment in a great area of the city with many transport options. 3 Metro stations very nearby. Also buses to the centre. Both the bed and the room are  bigger than they look in the photo. Fernando is a great host who was still sending me information and tips even though he was away in Bilbao for most of the time I was there.

J'ai vraiment apprécié mon séjour à Madrid chez Fernando et Olga...
Les instructions pour arriver jusqu'à l'appartement étaient très claires, l'accueil était chaleureux et ils ont même fait l'effort de communiquer dans ma langue...
Durant mon séjour j'ai reçu beaucoup de recommandations sur les endroits à visiter à Madrid ainsi que sur les restaurants et commerces à proximité, ce qui était très appréciable (et apprécié)..!
Le logement est vraiment très propre, bien rangé, agréable et possède tout le nécessaire pour passer un séjour inoubliable...
