Le quartier est vraiment très joli et l'on s'y sent bien... En plus il est vraiment très bien situé et proche de tout que ça soit en métro, en bus ou même à pieds...
Je ne peux que vous encourager à réserver un hébergement chez Fernando et Olga et, pour ma part, c'est certainement chez eux que je reviendrai loger si j'ai à nouveau l'occasion de me rendre à Madrid... 👍
I rented this place for my son's solo trip to Madrid and he had a great time, Fernando was excellent and very helpful with everything.
Everything was absolutely perfect. Fernando was incredibly precise and clear about the instructions, always very pending and reachable. The area is perfect!

Fernando es una persona maravillosa donde desde que bajé del avión,después de 12 hrs de vuelo , estuvo siempre al pendiente y atento a mis necesidades en todo momento!
El alojamiento y el barrio son hermosos.
Cada vez que venga a Madrid quiero hospedarme con Fernando! Recomendadísimo!!!

La mejor estadía para estar en Madrid es con Fernando porque todo es un 10: anfitrión, ubicación de alojamiento, alojamiento,todo es un 10. Cuando vuelva a Madrid aquí mismo me quedaré! Se los super recomiendo!!
とても素敵な老夫婦で、親切なお二人でした！近隣のおすすめのスーパーやレストランも教えてくださりました。帰国の日は、早朝４時に起きて玄関の前まで荷物を運ぶのを手伝ってくれました。本当に優しくて、素敵なホストでした。また泊まりたいです！

Es la segunda vez que paso una temporada en el piso de Fernando, y una vez más quiero expresar mi agradecimiento por su hospitalidad y por esa preocupación tan característica suya. El apartamento sigue igual de bonito e impecable que siempre, al igual que la zona, que es tranquila y agradable para vivir. Solo me queda seguir agradeciendo y esperar poder volver pronto.
Definitivamente recomiendo este lugar a quienes busquen comodidad y un ambiente acogedor.
Fernando es un excelente anfitrion , el apartamento es grande , comodo y muy tranquilo , en una de las mejores zonas de Madrid , cerca del metro y todo tipo de comercios , gracias Fernando !
2주동안 만족스럽게 이용했어요. 사진으로 본 것 보다 방이 넓고 쾌적했어요. 숙소 근처에 까르푸, 메르까도나 마트가 있어 유용해요. 숙소가 위치한 Goya, Lista는 차분하고 치안, 교통이 좋아요. 레티로 공원과도 가까워서 러닝하기 좋았어요. Fernando는 항상 친절하게 응대해줬어요.

Esta es la segunda ocasión en la que me quedo en la casa de Fernando! Fernando es un excelente host y no tengo palabras para agradecerle por su hospitalidad y todas sus atenciones.. su habitación tiene todo lo que necesitas para una estancia a corta o largo plazo…
La casa está impecable y está muy bien ventilada. Su Wifi es muy rápido también para tele-trabajar.
la zona en la que está ubicada la casa es en el corazón del barrio de Salamanca, que francamente es el mejor barrio de Madrid. excelentemente conectado con el transporte público y con varias estaciones de bicicletas. Cerca de la casa encuentras todo lo que necesitas; tiendas de ropa supermercados, cafés, bares, panaderías, fruterías, estéticas, tintorerías, gimnasios, y un sin fin de restaurantes.
Fernando se esmera para que te sientas en casa y además proporciona una infinidad de recomendaciones para actividades turísticas en Madrid y ciudades a sus alrededores. es muy atento, cordial, y flexible. Gracias!

Nuria es una excelente anfitriona. Reserve su espacio para mi madre y una amiga y todo estuvo de 10.
Nuria se preocupo de que se sintieran comodas y estuvo pendiente de todo lo que necesitaran.
El espacio es muy bonito y limpio. Con una excelente ubicacion. Totalmente recomendable!

We want to thank Nuria for her hospitality and because she helped us last minute for a place to stay. She made us feel at home in her beautiful appartment.
Everything we needed was there and the location was amazing. It was very clean and comfortable. We highly recommend this appartment.

Nuria est une personne formidable,hospitalière très accueillante,son logement se trouve au cœur de l'animation de Madrid,entouré de grands magasins et commerces et à quelques minutes de toutes les visites ,à savoir la plasa mayor,le palais royal ,idéal pour visiter cette merveilleuse ville.
On peut pas trouvé mieux .
Je recommande vivement cette location ainsi que nuria
Encore une fois merci beaucoup nuria

El apto. de Nuria es tal cual se ve en las fotos, muy bien decorado, acogedor y súper limpio. Muy silencioso, la cama muy cómoda y una ubicación inmejorable! Súper recomendable.
Nuria muy simpática, puntual y con muy buena comunicación.
Volveremos!!

Nuria’s place is brilliantly located, allowing you to explore Madrid’s main sites entirely by foot. The confirmation was very quick and all communications from Nuria were very fast. The apartment itself is a spacious studio apartment and comes with everything you need, plus a few nice extras. It was very clean and well presented throughout. I highly recommend Nuria’s place if you are visiting Madrid!
Just perfect ! Really central (2min from the metro and the center) extremelly clean and quiet. Well equiped. Nuria was welcoming and reactive. I truely recommend !

Apartamento en una localización inmejorable, super céntrico pero a la vez tranquilo. Nuria fue una anfitriona muy agradable y atenta en todo momento. El piso contaba con todas las comodidades a pesar de su tamaño. Sin duda para repetir en próximas visitas a Madrid.

Ha sido una experiencia maravillosa, el apartamento esta muy limpio, Nuria cuida todos los detalles, tienes de todo, hasta te deja agua y unos refrescos en la nevera.
Si necesitas cuanquier cosa o indicaciones te las resuelve.
Repetiremos sin duda.

We loved staying at Nuria’s place.  The location is so centralized and we were able to enjoy walking to different attractions in the city.  I would definitely come back and stay at this apartment on my next trip.

La localización es perfecta, céntrico pero sin apenas ruidos. El piso tenía de todo, lo necesario, aunque si echamos en falta sal y aceite, un básico 😅  Sitio perfecto, anfitriona perfecta, Nuria es muy maja. En nuestro próximo viaje a Madrid sin duda repetiremos!

This apartment is insanely central, just off Gran Vía. Literally a block away from the heart of Madrid but it's still a quiet and calm apartment. It looks just like it does on the photos and Nuria is a great host who does everything she can to ensure a good stay. It's a great stay!

Lovely place, incredible location and Nuria is so friendly and helpful.
My partner and I came for a weekend getaway and we could not have asked for anything more perfect. We were within walking distance from the centre and well connected to all key parts of the city.
We will definitely come back.
Es el alojamiento ideal, bien ubicado y con todo lo necesario y Nuria es encantadora.

Super hôte !
Très arrangeante, appartement très bien placé et calme donnant sur cours intérieure.
Merci à Nuria, notre séjour était top. ❤️
Nuria fue muy amable en todo momento y muy flexible. Agradezco mucho el trato.
Muy buen apartamento en una excelente ubicación 100% recomendable
El apartamento es muy acogedor, céntrico y Nuria es muy atenta, sin duda volveremos

El apartamento de Nuria está totalmente equipado, muy limpio y con todo lo necesario. Se encuentra en pleno centro de Madrid para poder moverte por el centro andando ( sol, plaza mayor, el retiro, chueca, cibeles,etc..). Recomendable 100% para venir a conocer Madrid. A pesar de encontrarse en pleno centro de Madrid es un apartamento súper silencioso que para el descanso se agradece muchísimo.Además Nuria ha sido un encanto amoldándose totalmente a nuestros horarios. El año que viene queremos volver a Madrid y sin duda repetiremos con Nuria.

Фантастическое место для отдыха и путешествия. Апартаменты находятся в самом центре Мадрида, но на тихой улочке. Мы отлично высыпались после длительных прогулок. Квартира соответствует фотографиям. Квартира стильная с хорошей бытовой техникой и некоторыми очень домашними штрихами. Кровать очень удобная. В квартире тепло (мы были в январе), температуру можно регулировать кондиционером. Рядом с домом находятся три линии метро. Можно при необходимости добраться в любую отдаленную часть города. Мы ходили везде пешком, так как все основные достопримечательности находятся от апартаментов в пешей доступности. Поблизости много ресторанчиков, баров и есть продуктовые магазины. Мы жили в квартире Нурии целую неделю и ощущали себя как дома. Связь с Нурией была быстрой. Нурия отличная заботливая хозяйка. Однозначно рекомендуем эти апартаменты. Спасибо Нурия. Хочется еще раз вернуться.
Fantastic place to stay and travel. The apartments are located in the very center of Madrid, but on a quiet street. We slept well after long walks. It matches the photos. The apartment is stylish, well equipped with white goods with some very homey touches. Near the house there are three metro lines. If necessary, you can get to any remote part of the city. We went everywhere on foot, as all the main sights are within walking distance from the apartment. Communication with Nuria was quick. Nuria is a great hostess. We definitely recommend these apartments. Thanks Nuria. Would like to come back again.

A well located apartment, which needs to be renovated/refreshed and better cleaned. Very smelly towels as well.
Nuria is very kind and flexible, the late check-in was for free and well organized, many thanks for that!

Es bastante espacioso. Tiene todos los utensilios necesarios para cocinar. Está en todo el centro de Madrid. Muy limpio. Supermercados cerca. No le falta de nada. La comunicación ha sido muy rápida. Todo muy bien.
Lo que sale en el anuncio. Muy buen trato

Piso increíblemente ubicado, en plena gran vía, al lado de diferentes metros. Al piso no le falta de nada, horno, cafetera, lavadora, plancha, todo lo que te puedas imaginar. Nuria es muy amable y se preocupa por que estés lo mejor posible. Es para dos personas pero es super amplio para lo que nos habíamos imaginado. Muy silencioso, con ascensor y los vecinos muy amables. Si volvemos a Madrid pensaremos en Nuria !sin duda!

El apartamento es tal cual se muestra en las fotos. Está muy bien equipado, tiene todo lo que puedas necesitar. La ubicación es perfecta y nada de ruidos a pesar de estar en el centro. Muy acogedor y perfecto para pasar un par de dias por el centro.
Nuria a été précisé dans ces informations, elle est très accueillante et gentille, on reviendra

I don't really care about interior design usually, but have to say I really liked the style of this place :) That was on top of everything else being flawless and the apartment being extremely central!
Great apartment. Looks just like the photos. Very good location. Nuria was really responsive. I would definitely stay here again if ever in Madrid.

Merci beaucoup Nuria ! Très réactive, très facile d’arriver et de partir selon ses contraintes d’avion et de déplacement, Nuria est vraiment arrangeante. L’appartement est idéalement situé dans le centre tout en étant dans une rue très calme, avec tous les commerces nécessaires aux alentours.
Muy buena comunicación. El apartamento muy limpio y bien ubicado. El sistema de calefacción funciona muy bien también. Volveríamos sin duda al Airbnb de Nuria.

Brillante! Empecemos por Nuria, es una mujer encantadora y la comunicación es siempre excelente. El apartamento es impresionante. Mucho más grande de lo que parece en las fotos e ideal para una pareja. Tiene absolutamente de todo y Nuria lo cuida al detalle. Hay toallas de sobra, cambios de cama, productos de limpieza, champoo, plancha, utensilios de cocina, tendedero externo e interno... No falta nada. Además las fotos son totalmente reales y el piso está impoluto. Mencionar también que estando a una calle de Gran Vía, no se oye ni un solo ruido. La locación del apartamento es perfecta. Todo nuevo y súper limpio. El baño es espacioso y tiene ducha con muy buena presión de agua.
Sin lugar a dudas, el apartamento de Nuria será nuestra opción para la próxima visita a Madrid. La única pega es un no pudimos quedarnos más tiempo... Muchas gracias Nuria por todo. Rick y Hugo 🤗

Excellent city apartment: in the heart of the city center, quiet courtyard-side apartment. The apartment was perfectly clean and had everything necessary even  for a longer stay. Nuria responded to the messages immediately and communication with her was effortless. I just hope the apartment will be available when next time in Madrid!

Very well located, clean and cosy studio apartment. Everything is in walking distance. Smooth check-in and check-out. Nuria is a nice and reliable host. Communication before and during our stay was always very easy. We enjoyed our stay!
Sorprende que estando tan céntrico, el piso es tranquilo y silencioso. Muy próximo a lugares de interés turístico, restaurantes y comercio.

This is an amazing and very well-equipped studio, between Malasana and Chueca and just a few steps from Gran Via. It is spacious, facing an inner yard, and as such is very quiet. You can really relax after touring and partying around in Madrid, not to mention that there is an elevator available, which is rare in the center. Nuria is a great host, the communication with her was very easy and quick. I definitely would recommend her place!

Todo estuvo increíble. Nuria es una excelente anfitriona y el depa tiene todo lo que necesitas y más! 100% recomendado.
Volveré definitivamente.
Fabulous location and lovely apartment. Nuria is wonderful as well. It comes with everything you might need. Wish I didn’t have to leave
Everything was perfect Nuria is an amazing host very available for her guests and very nice person ! Thank you so much

Excelente departamento, ubicación insuperable,  todo al alcance, la comunicación con Nury fue excelente, super atenta, fascinada con mi estadía en Madrid. El departamento cuenta con todo lo que uno necesita y a pesar de estar ubicado cerca de restaurantes y bares el departamento es super silencioso, uno puede estudiar y dormir con tranquilidad

Nuria es una excelente anfitriona y nos recibió personalmente para explicarnos todo sobre el apartamento. El lugar es pequeño, ideal para 2 personas, pero muy cómodo y  bonito además de la ubicación que es perfecta para visitar todos los sitios de interés de Madrid además de hacer algunas compras =). Todo estaba limpio y contaba con todo lo necesario para cocinar.

El estudio de Nuria es aún mejor que lo que muestra en las fotos, está equipado con todo lo que se puede necesitar y esta súper céntrico, además no solo el apartamento pero el edificio es súper tranquilo y limpio,
tiene además un elevador con bastante capacidad.
Nuria es bien explicita en las instrucciones a la llegada, sin duda es una muy buena opción a considerar.
Modern, cute, central airbnb! Thanks for hosting my parents!

Nous avons passé 3 nuits et avons eu à disposition tout ce qu’il nous fallait, endroit propre et calme à 2mn à pied de la rue Gran Vía.  Ayant eu un retard sur notre vol, nous sommes arrivés tardivement mais cela n’a pas posé soucis pour récupérer les clés. Encore merci pour cela! Nuria est très gentille et réactive. Le seul soucis est que nous n’avons pas réussi à régler le chauffage, sinon tout était parfait!

I loved my time in this studio apartment. It is small, but the location more than compensates. Everything is here! Since the apartment is on the 5th floor, there is no street noise, and just a little noise from the neighbors. I stayed here a month, and I would happily stay here again.

Nuria's studio is not only well located, it is EXCELLENTLY LOCATED. We stayed for a week. When you come back from sightseeing all day long you are thankful to be back at the hotel. However, for us, returning to Nuria's studio every evening was a pleasure, because Nuria has a super cozy, comfortable place. The place makes you feel welcome every day.
It has everything you need to make your stay pleasant, the bed is comfortable, it has enough blankets, climate, if you need it (hot or cold), it has all the utensils to prepare meals. You have enough towels, and place to hang them to dry. With the windows closed you don't hear anything, and you can rest. The place is very quiet even though it is one block from Gran Vía. It is close to everything we wanted to see, we easily walked to Retiro Park, museums, restaurants, tourist attractions and shops since it is a super well located.
Nuria is also super nice, smiling and responsive person.
Truly, it was a PLEASURE to have found Nuria's place.
Amazing stay! Perfect size for two people. Nuria is super sweet as well!

I had an excellent stay at Nuria’s place. It is right off the Gran Via, close to everything but quiet. The flat is well furnished and had everything that you need to cook a meal or do some laundry. I highly recommend staying here. Nutria was an excellent host, she even let me check in a bit early as the flat was empty when my train arrived in town. I’d definitely stay here again next time I’m in Madrid!
Un alojamiento de 10 en una zona inmejorable y con una anfitriona excelente. Muy recomendable

Location of Nuria's place is absolutely fantastic, close to major Madrid attractions and restaurants. place was very clean and very well equipped. Nuria herself was communicative and really helpful. would recommend to anyone who visits Madrid.

Séjour magique : Propreté, confort, fonctionnalité - que des avantages de cet appartement, au service de vos vacances.
L’interaction avec Nuria était excellente : très gentille hôte :-)
Et l’emplacement est stratégique, à 2 min à pieds de Zara Gran Via !
Je recommande
Nuria es una anfitriona excelente, muy atenta y amable. Su apartamento está muy bien ubicado y fue perfecto para mis vacaciones en Madrid. ¡gracias!

Nuria’s place was amazing, it had everything I needed, even some power outlet converters which were very helpful coming from US. Nuria is very friendly and the location is prime next to Gran Via. I would stay here again when I come back to Madrid

El apartamento está prácticamente en Gran Vía así que la ubicación es inmejorable. Todo estaba en perfecto estado y no faltaba ningún detalle para estar cómodo y a gusto. Sin duda volvería a alojarme aquí para visitar Madrid.

Es un excelente departamento, súper cómodo, completo en vajilla, artículos de limpieza, tocador, ropa de cama y baño.Tiene todo! La cama muy cómoda
Impecable.
Excelente ubicación, a pasos de la gran vía, Zara, Primark metro
Súper recomendable, volvería sin dudarlo Nuria
Nuria merita di essere considerata super-host

De los mejores lugares en los que me quede en Madrid, no solo la ubicación y el apartamento son geniales, sino que los detalles que Nuria te deja en el apartamento y su trato hacen que la estadía sea muy placentera.
Sin dudas volvería a alojarme allí

El apartamento es muy cómodo, silencioso y está muy bien equipado, superó nuestras expectativas.
La ubicación inmejorable.
Nuria es una excelente anfitriona, gentil y bien predispuesta. Recomiendo y sin duda volvería a elegirlo.
Super Lage und tolle kleine Wohnung für ein Weekend. Großartige Kommunikation mit der Gastgeberin.
Apartment was great and comfortable! It was easy to walk everywhere. Upon check-in, we had to wait quite a bit, but everything else went smoothly.

El piso está super equipado con todo lo que se necesita y más! y todo estaba impecable. La zona es muy buena, cerca del metro y de todo.
Nuria y German se comportaron muy amablemente con nosotros! gracias🙂

Este piso es maravilloso, para dos personas perfecto!!
Muy bien ubicado y súper limpio y con aire condicionado! :)
Definitivamente vamos a volver.
Todo fue excelente, el apartamento es muy bonito y brillaba de limpio! Nuria fue muy amigable y siempre estuvo disponible para mi. Mas que 10 puntos🤩🤩🤩

Cozy flat with all you need amenities like a washer/dryer and AC. It’s also walking distance to Gran Vía and it’s great restaurants and shopping centers; you hardly need an Uber or taxi. Overall great experience and an excellent host that clearly communicates and responds to any concerns in a timely manner. I recommend this flat to anyone looking to explore Gran Via.
Great location and perfect for a working holiday. This place has all you need for cooking simple meals at home and having great wifi and a washing machine is great! Would definitely stay again.

El apto está excelentemente ubicado, a una cuadra de Gran Vía y de Primark. A pesar de que es chiquito tiene todo lo que necesitás para disfrutar tu estadía en Madrid. Gracias Nuria, espero volver pronto.
Exacto lo que se ve en las fotos. Lugar cómodo y tranquilo aunque está a una cuadra del centro turístico madrileño. Bien equipado… y bien ubicado.

Nuria es encantadora, nos ayudó con todo y estuvo presente en el checkin.
El apartamento es tal como se describe y sale en las fotos, está pulcro y tiene todo lo que puedes necesitar.
La verdad me sentí como en casa, la ubicación es una joya
Gracias por todo

I stayed in this place for more than one month. Nuria is a very friendly and responsive host. This place is very convenient, close to everything. The apartment is super clean. We had a great stay and highly recommend this place.

I recently had the pleasure of staying at Nuria's lovely apartment located right on Gran Vía in central Madrid, and it was an absolutely delightful experience. Despite its bustling location, the apartment is a serene retreat, thanks to its courtyard-facing position which shields it from the city noise. I was pleasantly surprised by how quiet it was, making for peaceful nights of restful sleep.
Nuria, as a host, was exceptional. She was incredibly responsive and attentive to any questions or requests I had, making me feel welcomed and well-cared-for throughout my stay. Her warm hospitality added a personal touch that made my experience even more memorable.
The apartment itself is a gem. Bathed in natural sunlight, it has a cheerful and inviting ambiance that made me feel right at home. The space is surprisingly spacious, especially for a solo traveler like myself, offering plenty of room to relax and unwind after a day of exploring the city.
Cute studio in the heart of Madrid centro - 1 block off from gran via, quiet due to apartment facing back street, comfy bed, recommend for central  location to walk to all sites.

I stayed in this location for 6 weeks. Even though it is located 2 min off of Gran Via opposite the Plaza Callao. it is very quiet with no street noise. Everything to do in the centro is within a few minutes walking. The metro, shopping, dining and nightlife are right there.
Nuria is the most responsive host I have ever had. On one occasion I thought I might need to go to the doctor and she was very helpful. She sent me directions to two clinics and then checked up on me for a couple of days. Happily I did not need to go but I appreciated her willingness to help.
I will stay again as I am in Madrid often.

Excelente apartamento, superou as nossas expectativas. Limpo, confortável, completo de tudo que você precisa, localização perfeita, perto de tudo. Roupa de cama e toalhas bem limpas. Nuria é um amor de pessoa, nós recebeu muito bem, super prestativa, gentil e educada. Indico o apartamento e voltaremos com certeza.

Nous avons eu des difficultés avec la compagnie aérienne Ibéria et notre arrivée fût retardée .
Nous nous sommes communiqués régulièrement avec Nuria , elle nous a super bien accueilli avec le sourire et fort sympathique. C'est super de faire connaissance ainsi et rencontrer notre hôte à l'arrivée.
Nuria nous a donné plusieurs informations sur Madrid , ses visites , ses commerces etc....beaucoup de visites peuvent se faire à pied de l'hébergement.
L'appartement est très bien situé en plein centre de Madrid dans un quartier très calme. Il est très propre, joliment décoré et comporte tout le nécessaire comme indiqué dans l'annonce. Nous avons passé un agréable séjour et je recommande l'appartement de Nuria.
Merci Nuria pour votre accueil chaleureux.

Nuria es una súper anfitriona, siempre cálida en el trato como también atenta a responder los mensajes y aportando sugerencias, el departamento es exactamente al publicado la ubicación es inmejorable. Volvería a este lugar me sentí como en casa

Nuria's place was amazing. Right behind Gran Via, literally meters away from everything you need, but still super peaceful once you are inside. Very comfortable, super clean. Nuria was a wonderful host and always responded right away. We will for sure stay there again and recommend this place 100%!! Thank you Nuria for helping making our stay excellent!
Lo tiene todo. Plancha, cocina, refrigerador, lavadora, lugar céntrico para cualquier punto. Café y agua de cortesía.

Desde o primeiro momento que fomos recebidos pela Nuria, gostamos muito!
A localização excelente - fizemos nosso roteiro todo a pé. Quanto ao apartamento, tudo impecável (eletrodomésticos e eletrônicos funcionando 100%, tudo cheiroso, louças completas) e etc
Se um dia voltarmos, com certeza veremos a disponibilidade de voltar pra lá

Alojamiento perfecto para unos días o semanas en Madrid, la ubicación es inmejorable, es céntrico y a la par muy tranquilo. El estudio es tal y como lo describe Nuria y tal y como se ve en las fotos. Limpio, con todos los servicios indicados, agradable... Y Nuria fue una anfitriona estupenda, cordial y disponible. Sin duda,  en las mismas circunstancias volvería a alojarme en su apartamento.

El alojamiento es ideal para una estancia corta o larga de 2 personas, bien ubicado, seguro, y equipado con todo lo necesario, definitivamente volvería a quedarme ahí, Nuria es muy amable siempre pendiente de cualquier necesidad.
Thank you very much for everything!IThe apartment,the location,the communication everything was how is supposed to be!Just awesome!Thank you!

Of all of the places I have stayed in Madrid, Nuria's apartment was absolutely the most wonderful. She is a very kind, flexible, and accommodating host, and I've already recommended her place to other people. 100% Stay here

The apartment has a very convenient location. Despite being central, the place is quiet and you can sleep very well. The bed is very comfortable. the internet worked perfect and it's fast. The apartment had everything I needed for my stay and more, cleaning supplies, sewing kit, shampoo, rinse cream, soap, etc. Although I didn't need to cook because I mostly ate out and was only there for a few days but the kitchen is fully equipped and the appliances I tested work correctly. And last but not least Nuria, she was very kind and flexible in coordinating check-in and check-out. Without a doubt I would rent the place again if I visit Madrid again.

Monolocale centrale in edificio adiacente alla Gran Via,al 5° piano con ascensore,tra i palazzi su corte interna. Trovato estremamente pulito e ordinato e fornito di tutto quello che può servire compreso ricambio lenzuola e asciugamani. Accoglienza simpatica e gentile da parte del cohost Sandro.
Silenzioso durante la notte. Unica molestia
i lavori edili nel palazzo dirimpetto: rumore e molta polvere che ci costringevano a tenere chiuse le finestre...

Nuestro estudio favorito en Madrid
No es la primera vez que vamos al estudio de Nuria y no será la última. El estudio es ideal, además es de los más completos en los que he estado.
Es tal como se ve en las fotos, super limpio y agradable.
Está en una situación inmejorable y a pesar del ruido de la calle, no se oye nada en el estudio. Es perfecto.
Estamos deseando volver

Nuria is a friendly helpful person. Always responsive. i had travelled for dental surgery and she was reassuring and even checked on me to see how everything had gone. She should be made a super host.
The place is small but doesn't feel claustrophobic at all. It has nice light and even when it is super central it is tucked away in a quite street so it is very silent. Location could not be better. Anything you might need is in the flat. Hair drier, potato masher, hand blender, good wifi, aircon, you name it!
I would definitely stay there again. Gracias Nuria!

Perfect in every way! Definitely the place to be in Madrid. Next time I’m in the city I’ll be coming back to Nuria’s. She’s so nice and welcoming, the studio is spacious, quiet, clean and very well located.

Nuria est très gentille ; l’appartement est très propre et accessible on a passé des bons moments moi et mon mari
Merci beaucoup Nuria
El apartamento estuvo perfecto para la estadía y bien ubicado. Nuria estuvo muy pendiente de las necesidades y llegada. Atendió rápidamente nuestras consultas.
excelente departamento, con todas las comodidades , la anfitriona super amable y calida. la zona inmejorable. es un 10! espero volver.felicitaciones

This beautiful apartment in the center of Madrid is clean and cozy, with everything you need for a wonderful vacation. It is the most efficient use of space; with every little detail you could think of for your stay. Communication with Nuria was fluid throughout our stay. The property location is very convenient, close to the Gran Via and Plaza El Callao. We would be happy to be back again anytime!

Una casa meravigliosa con tutto il necessario, biancheria pulita e profumata , posizione 10e lode ad 1 minuto alla Gran vie proprio dietro all angolo Dell hotel Atlantico , Zara e Primark
Un host eccezionale !! 5 stelle sono poche per descrivere alloggio e posizione!! Se dovessi ritornare a Madrid sarà sicuramente in questa casa !! Consiglierò a tutti
10 e lode

Un séjour parfait ! L’appartement est idéalement situé, à deux pas de la Gran Vía, de Sol, de Callao et même de Malasaña. Malgré cette proximité avec les lieux les plus animés de Madrid, le calme à l’intérieur est incroyable. Nuria nous a accueillis avec beaucoup de chaleur, et tout était d’une propreté irréprochable, jusqu’aux moindres détails. On y trouve tout ce qu’il faut, même un parapluie ou une boîte de couture. Nous avons trouvé notre pépite à Madrid et reviendrons sans hésiter. Merci Nuria !
perfect apartment! and we loved the location!
Muchas gracias

El departamento es tal cual se indica en las fotos. Limpio, ordenado, bien ubicado. Puedes hacer check out sin necesidad de la presencia de anfitrión.
A media cuadra de la Gran Vía, excelente ubicación y a su vez no se escuchan ruidos. Esta en el 5to piso, pero hay ascensor. Super moderno. Nuria es muy atenta. Tendrás todo lo necesario para tu estadía en Madrid.
A metro de las bocas de metro Gran Vía y Callao. Restaurantes cerca, shopping, paseos y más.

Nous avons passé un excellent séjour à Madrid .L’hôte était très gentille et réactive, ce qui a facilité notre arrivée. L’accès au logement était simple, et son emplacement était tout simplement parfait. Le logement était très joli , bien équipé et contenait tout ce dont nous avions besoin. Seul petit point à noter : le lit peut sembler un peu petit pour deux personnes. Mais dans l’ensemble, l’expérience a été très agréable, et nous n’hésiterons pas à revenir si nous repassons par Madrid. Un grand merci à Nuria pour son accueil chaleureux !

Estuvimos por 4 días, nos encantó el alojamiento y la zona(muy céntrico y cerca de todo) el departamento está en el 5to piso y tiene ascensor. Está al costado de Primark de la Gran Vía, hay muchos restaurantes cerca. Nuria muy amable, da muy buenas vibras y siempre estuvo atenta. El alojamiento es muy cómodo y hay de todo.

El trato de Nuria fue espectacular, desde la reservación estuvo pendiente de nuestra llegada y cuando llegamos al lugar fue muy amable.
El lugar cuenta con todo lo necesario y lo indicado, la cama muy cómoda, el aire y la calefacción funcionaron perfectamente.
El lugar está cerca de la gran vía y es perfecto para descansar.
Un plus es que tenían adaptadores para los celulares!
this was a great Airbnb. great place, great location, great host

Wir hatten tolle Tage in Madrid, für die Wohnung von Nuria der ideale Ausgangspunkt war. Super zentral - 1 Minute von der Gran Via entfernt - gelegen, alles war in der Wohnung wie angegeben. Wenn wir in der Wohnung waren, haben wir uns sehr wohl gefühlt. Und trotz der zentralen Lage war es nachts ruhig und wir konnten gut schlafen. Der Kontakt mit Nuria war immer schnell und äußerst freundlich.
Die Unterkunft ist absolut zu empfehlen.
Great location, lovely and very helpful host. Well priced. Thanks Nuria!
Excelente el depto  limpio, ordenado,  super completo, bellamente decorado, además de la muy buena ubicación!!! Nuria muy buena anfitriona. Lo recomiendo sin ninguna duda!

처음 방문한 마드리드에서의 아주 멋진 7박이었습니다. 비행기가 시간이 변경되어 늦은 시간에 도착하였지만 따뜻하게 맞이해주었습니다.
숙박에 필요한 모든 것들이 잘 갖추어져 있어서 불편함이 없었습니다.
위치는 최고입니다. 30초만에 마드리드에서 가장 번화한 거리에 도착합니다. 그리고 집은 아주 조용합니다. 2분거리에 24시간 마트도 있습니다.
유일한 걱정거리는 덩치가 큰 2명에게는 침대가 좁을겁니다. 저희는 괜찮았어요 :)

The stay at Nuria’s apartment was great! A great neighbourhood, very close to everything you need when going to Madrid - and if you want to stay in the center of the city and want a quiet night to sleep - this is the place! Nuria was a lovely host, made sure our stay with our 2 mont old baby was flawless. Thank you 🙏
Recomiendo este apartamento por su ubicación, cómodo, en un lugar muy tranquilo y a escaso 100 metros de La Gran Vía, la anfitriona Nuria muy amable.
O apartamento está muito bem localizado,.
Wir sind sehr zufrieden mit unserem Aufenthalt! Die Lage ist ausgezeichnet und dennoch ruhig.
Great stay! Highly recommend

We had such a great stay at Nuria’s apartment. While compact, it is perfect for a stay in the city for a couple of people. The location is absolutely perfect, and the apartment has literally everything you could need for a stay in Madrid. Thank you so much, Nuria! You are truly a SuperHost!!
Muy buena ubicación, céntrico pero muy silenciosa a pesar de estar a un minuto de gran vía. Limpio y con todo lo necesario.

Incredible!
Sin lugar a dudas el apartamento perfecto en el centro de Madrid.
Lo tiene todo. Es exactamente como en las fotos, todo impecable. Es increíblemente silencioso incluso estando tan céntrico. Está todo a mano. Puedes ahorrarte en transporte publico para visitar todo el centro de Madrid. Espectacular. Y lo mejor es Nuria, está atenta en todo momento que no te falte de nada. Muchas gracia por una atención inmejorable

First I think a host can make it break an airbnb,  well Nuria was the PERFECT host.  always responded right away made sure we had a good number,  met my daughter and her bf to ensure they got in ok just a while after they arrived to Spain.  The apartment was a described,  in a great location. can't say enough good things

Jon is a very generous host--he was so very helpful with everything that I needed. He was very open to share expert knowledge of interesting places to explore in this fantastic city of Madrid. He went out of his way to make sure I was comfortable, and I would highly recommend his place. The room is beautiful, with lots of light, and the apartment was spotless when I arrived. The whole house is very clean and very well maintained (Jon is very meticulous: being an excellent chef and interior decorator as well). Thanks for a great stay, and all the best.

Jon es una persona amable, atenta y dispuesta, en todo momento, a ayudar. Me sentía como en casa. Ha sido una experiencia estupenda y seguro que repito en el futuro. La habitación está muy bien - limpia, luminosa, sencilla pero bien decorada. Un barrio tranquilo donde se puede aparcar sin problemas. El transporte público (metro) a tan sólo 3 minutos es un punto más a su favor. Gracias Jon.

Jon is kind, helpful, caring and courteous. I really felt at home. It has been a great experience that I will no doubt repeat. The room is simple, but well decorated, clean, bright and confortable. Three minute walk to the public transport (underground) is a plus. Quiet neighbourhood and plenty of street parking. Thank you Jon.

This is our first time with Airbnb and we think it was really Great!
What a beautiful experience! Jon is a great men and we have a new friend now! We hope to see him and his daughter asap.
The house and the room are really clean and Jon is ready to help you for everything.
The house is quite, at only 20 minutes from the center, We advice the accomodation very much.

Staying with Jon was a pleasure and a luxury. He, his daughter and his dog Toto are the best people you could meet.

The room and all the house is REALLY clean and very well decorated ( Jon have a great taste). Is also great to have your own bathroom. Jon picked me up from the very close subway, and took care of me during my stay.

For me was also convenient that the flat is not far from the airport, because I had to be there at 5:45 am, so a taxi was not very expensive (the subway starts at 6 am).

Being fair, I highly recommend staying with Jon, is perfect!

My girlfriend and I had an amazing time in Jon's home. We had our own private room and private bathroom. The place was exceptionally clean and beautifully decorated. At our arrival, Jon waited for us at the train station, in the rain, with his dog Toto and walked us to his house (less than 5 minutes away). On our bed, waiting for us was a tray with champagne and cookies. Unbelievable! Breakfast was served every morning. Everything was fresh and delicious. Jon even baked a cake for us! On a few occasions we were even treated to lunch or dinner. And everything Jon prepared was not only typical Spanish dishes, but they tasted better than what you could find in any restaurant in Spain!
Staying with Jon has been by far the best experience we've had with Airbnb. Being so far from home, in a foreign country...Jon's attentiveness, generosity and selflessness made us feel instantly at home. The location is perfect. Jon's place is close to the airport and close to the metro and easy to get anywhere in Madrid. The neighborhood is quiet and a very nice departure from the hustle and bustle of the city. I highly recommend staying with Jon. He's not only your personal concierge throughout your visit, but you will leave Madrid feeling like he's a part of your family. We can't wait to stay with him again!

If Airbnb were to offer a training for hosts or a prize for the best host, Jon would undoubtedly be the number one choice. Jon is a complete gentleman, exemplary host, and just a wonderful person and humanitarian. I was completely pampered at his home starting with hand juiced oranges, perfect expressos and his homemade marmalade for breakfast. The apartment was immaculate and luxurious as announced. My bedroom was very nice and Jon even provided a charger and speakers for my iPhone. The bathroom was private, modern, and well decorated with the added touch of his handmade soap in shape of angels.  Jon went out of his way to host my stay including doing my laundry, personally receiving me and escorting me at the metro, providing me with computer assistance and information, and treating me to wonderful recipes from his Thermomix. And on my last day, I received the treat of learning how to make gazpacho wearing a special apron Jon provided. Staying with Jon and his endearing and polite daughter Paola was truly the best of my travel experiences in Madrid. Jon's hospitality is unwavering, enjoying my stay at his place even more on my second visit. If you want the best of what Madrid has to offer, treat yourself to Jon's place.

Fue la primera vez que alquilé una habitación en casa de un desconocido :) No llegué a conocer a Jon porque no estaba en Madrid. Jon me dejó todo muy bien preparado y pasé unos días muy tranquilos y me sentí muy bien en su casa. La localización es buena ya que está a 3 minutos del metro. La habitación da a la zona comunitaria (jardín) y es muy tranquila.

Choose this place! Jon is the best! I am a college student and my mom and I spent two nights at Jon’s place. The room is extremely clean and neat and the decorations are increditable. We felt we walked into a room of fairy tale. Even we were late to Jon’s place for 2 hours because of the flight delay. Jon still greeted us in front of the metro station at 1 am and cooked us yummy Spanish omelette. In the bathroom, Jon provided a very pretty hand craft lavender soap which is my favourite! He also did our laundry and folded all our cloths – I truly appreciate that. The coffee for breakfast was awesome and the cake was tasty. On the day we left, Jon drove us to the bull fighting place and made us a typical summer soup as well as lunch boxes. Over all, we feel very grateful to have Jon as our host and he is a great person to be friend with!

My visit in Madrid was fantastic! Jon is a unique host. You can't want more. Breakfast was delicious (he even made a cake for me), and he prepared several times dinner. He is such a excellent chef!
Jon helped me with everything I needed.

The room was just superb! Better than any hotel room. Everything was arranged so well and matched. I slept like in heaven :)

I'm looking forward to stay there again. It felt like home to me. Thank you Jon for all you did for me!

El piso está situado en una zona tranquila. La habitación y la casa son ideales, muy limpio y cuidado con mucho detalle, si bien, lo mejor de la casa es su anfitrión.
Jon es muy detallista y te sentirás mucho mejor que un hotel, su atención personalizada no tiene precio.
Sin duda, este alojamiento es muy recomendable

I stayed with Jon for a whole month because I had to work in Madrid. From the beginning, Jon was a wonderful host. Every morning he served a very delicious selfmade cake and croissants. He always asked what I would like to have for breakfast and he was very flexible when to serve it. I loved my room which was very very clean as well as the bathroom. There was always a wonderful perfume in the air and the whole apartment is decorated very tastefully. I could use the kitchen and the living room as well and Jon tried to make my stay as perfect as he could (and he succeeded!!) If you stay with Jon, definitely ask him for sightseeing tips as he has the best ideas where to go. Jon taught me so much about the Spain culture and it was nice talking to him and his nice daughter Paola (we two girls became good friends!). His dog Toto is  very well educated and I fell in love with him. The dog won't bother your stay in any way. Every Saturday Jon cleaned my room and bathroom and he washed my clothes. I really enjoyed my stay with Jon, he is a very kind person and an attentive host! I would always come back to Jon and his apartment. The apartment is also very close to the metro station and it doesn't take long to get either to the airport or the city centre. It's a calm and safe area. Jon's apartment is definitely worth a trip!
Room is as described. Should know that there are dogs and the bathroom is compact but immaculate. I had a good stay.

Pasamos casi un mes con Jon y desde el primer dia hubo un ambiente familiar entre nosotros que nos hizo la estancia muy agradable.
Todo estaba super organizado y super limpio y en todo momento Jon estuvo atento a cualquier cosa que necesitabamos.
Ademas de una excelente persona, puedo afirmar que es un excelente cocinero de lo cual disfrutamos en los desayunos de todos los días.
La casa está bien ubicada y las comunicaciones excelentes por lo que es una magnifica opción para pasar unos dias en Madrid.
Llegamos como huespedes y hemos salido como amigos. Gracias Jon.
As the rest of the guests have pointed out Jon is a great host. The house is perfectly located, besides from clean and cozy. I strongly recommed this place to stay. Wonderful !

It was a great stay at Jon's place!! I had all the time the feeling to be at home! The flat is very comfortable, clean, in a safe district and the breakfast was all the time perfect!! So the perfect place to make holidays in Madrid! But most important, I got a very good new friend!

Una primera experiencia con AirBnb genial!! Y todo gracias a Jon!!!
Excelente atención y trato para una breve estancia en Madrid.
Todo un acierto haber elegido esta opción!!

Jon was everything we expected and more...we were welcomed into his home and treated more as family, coming in as guests we left as friends. The location is ideal for those new like us to Madrid close to the metro and in a safe quiet neighbourhood... Jon gave us information on where to go to see the beauty of this amazing city and was always ready to receive a call from us if we were lost...but thanks to his good guidance we never were.
The breakfast every morning what a treat i am in love with that cake....
Definitely his place is highly recommended. Will be back much love Karen

I traveled to Madrid for work and hence had but little time in my hands to visit the city. I was hoping that by living with Jon and his family I would actually get to know the city through them. And I was so right to hope for that: I felt immediately at home (and not an alien) and welcome in this big sunny city AND this all happened thanks to Jon and his adorable Paola! Short- and long-term visitors can look forward to an unforgettable experience and to enjoying Jon's hospitality! Jon will make your stay in Madrid very special, and you are likely to leave Jon's house wishing to return very soon.Thank you, Jon and Hasta Luego! Nadi

Jon is a great host. He makes everything possible to make your stay confortable.  I felt like home. The apartment is very relaxing and the neighborhood so convenient, that's why I'm going back next week !!

Jon nous a réservé un superbe accueil: très prévenant, aux petits soins pour que tout se passe bien, un petit déjeuner digne d'un hôtel ... nous avons passé un très agréable séjour dans son appartement !
Nous recommandons vivement cet appartement.

Jon is an amazing host, with a stunning apartment (with a pool) in a nice neighbourhood. The apartment was very clean, and had everything we could ask for. Jon offered to cook anything we want for breakfast, which was very nice of him (and it was delicious!). Overall, we had a top-tier hotel experience. Would definitely stay there again!

If there is some people with the special gift of taking care of the others, John is one of them. Enter into John 's house is like entering into a very peacefull universe including the total respect of your privacy.
You will have a very clean room and bath decorated with a lot of good taste. Moreover ,you will have to deal with an excellent cooker. John is very helpful and he gave to us some tips and indicate some places to visit.
Enjoy a beautiful stay as we did into this sweat location really near the subway . Thanks to you and your nice daughter Paola.

Jp and Sylvia

First class accueil.
What a place! At Jon's home you will feel like at home and better you will find a family. In three words: warm, professional and fun.

Jon is a wonderful host. He takes care of every minute detail to make ur stay comfortable & to make u feel at home. The place is wel kept & is wel connected to the public transport. I would highly recommend his place for anyone visiting madrid.

Jon es un anfitrion excelente ademas de maravillosa persona!!
Ademas de muy a gusto me he sentido muy cuidada. Los desayunos de Jon són riquisimos, ademas de comer bien te ahorras un dinero.
Muy agradecida...

Un alojamiento ideal, cercano al metro pero lo mejor,Jon. Disponible en todo momento para ayudar al huésped, facilitando en todo momento la estancia.
Volvería sin dudarlo!!

Jon is a fantastic host! He and his daughter made me feel at home and part of their family during my three week stay in Madrid. The flat is very clean, comfortable and located close to both the metro and buses. The bedroom and private bathroom are elegant and are complete with beautiful linens and homemade soap. A wonderful breakfast is served every morning and even my laundry was cleaned every week. I felt very pampered! The best part of the stay is how thoughtful Jon is in making your stay comfortable. This was my first stay at an airbnb and this was a first class experience!
Jon is a really great host. We enjoyed our stay there a lot! The dogs are lovely. It was very quite. The location is not really close to the center of Madrid but the metro works good. Felt like home.

Jon has been very welcoming, so helpful and made me feel very comfortable. The flat is so tastefully decorated and extremely clean. Breakfast was delicious. I had a great stay. I definitely recommend Jon's as an host and I will go back.

Nuestra experiencia en casa de Jon ha sido simplemente perfecta.
Limpieza, orden, hospitalidad hasta limites insospechados, buen desayuno con bizcocho casero recién hecho por el mismo. Jon es simplemente excepcional como anfitrión.

De verdad no hay palabras para explicar lo bien que me sentí unos días en el departamento de Jon, espectacular todo como explicaba en la página, limpio, ordenado y el tan servicial en todo momento para todo, me sentí como en casa, el departamento donde está situado perfecto para visitar Madrid, sus perritos Gastón y Daniela tan tranquilos que es algo increíble y la gata Nicolása, todo bien el desayuno que me esperaba cada mañana con un cake delicioso hecho por Jon, te felicito eres un excelente anfitrión.
Ríen a dire excellent, tout propre, tout très bien organisé et exactement comme dans le photo, l'accueil magnifique vraiment digne d'un hôtel, le petit déjeuner avec sont gâteau fait maison délicieuse, j'ai passé un agréable séjour dans sont appartement avec les chiens Gaston et Daniela, et bien-sûr sa petite chat Nicolasa, sont calme, j.ai respiré calme et tranquillité, je vous recommande cete appartement.
Excellent anfitrion Jon continu comme ça.

Ya es nuestra segunda vez en casa de Jon y no es casualidad.
Nuestra primera vez salimos encantados del trato recibido y de lo cómodos que habíamos estado. Esta segunda vez no ha hecho sino mejorar esta sensación y la experiencia en la casa.
Jon es encantador, nos reservo mesa en un restaurante de la zona para uno de los días que estábamos allí y siempre está pendiente de nosotros pero a su vez dándonos todo el espacio y libertad necesarios.

Jon, en una escala del 1 al 10 merece un 20.
Siempre atento a todos los detalles, meticuloso y pulcro.
Recomiendo a Jon y su lindo hogar para hacer más placenterade tu visita a Madrid.

We often hear that we tend to excel at what we love to do: Jon is a living proof. He is the best host we've had at Airbnb or any other similar service: careful, dedicated, available, courteous. The room is exactly as described, his pets are lovely, the breakfast is awesome and the location is quiet and convenient.

Mi experiencia en casa de Jon ha sido maravillosa, es un anfitrión increíble, se preocupa por cada detalle y te ayuda en todo lo que necesites.Yo tuve que estudiar los días que estuve allí y es una casa muy tranquila, además de ordenada y limpia.  No tengo más que palabras buenas para describir mi estancia, estoy muy agradecida con Jon y con su hija, por ayudarme y preocuparse por mí, ha sido como estar en mi propia casa.
Jon was a very good host, kind and helpful. The room and apartments are as described and the breakfast was really good. I really recommend this room.

I have no words to describe how Jon is. He is without any doubts the best host we've ever met. He is nice, welcoming and very attentive. The breakfast was really full and tasty. The room is amazing, very modern and cosy and the bed comfortable. Jon is someone with a big heart and we really feel like home. Many thanks for your welcome, I recommend him 100%
Jon has set a new standard for any experience with airbnb that will be extremely hard to surpass!

No hay palabras para describir lo maravilloso que es Jon, su apartamento y sus mascotas!.
Realmente no creo que exista un hotel en Madrid que iguale su hospitalidad y amabilidad.
Cada vez que regrese a Madrid me quedaré en su Apto!!
Te queremos Jon.
Abrazo de Juan y Lina

Nuestra experiencia ha sido maravillosa. Jon nos ha colmado de atenciones y ha cuidado cada detalle. Nos hemos sentido como en casa.Si tenemos que volver a Madrid sin dudar sera nuestro lugar de desacanso. Gracias Jon.
Un enorme abrazo

Jon ha sido un anfitrión excepcional, me ha hecho sentir como en casa, ha estado muy pendiente de que mi estancia fuera agradable, me ha preparado unos desayunos riquísimos. El apartamento es encantador, muy limpio y todo perfecto. Tuve el placer de conocer a su hija el último día y tengo que decir que es igual de atenta y encantadora que su padre. Sin duda si vuelvo a Madrid me alojaré en su apartamento. Lo recomiendo 100%
Jon is a great host. Great breakfast. Allways available to  make your stay in Madrid a great experience..

Jon is an outstanding host. he made me feel at home all the time! i can only strongly recommend staying at his place and be prepared to enjoy some original English black tea! :) one of his best features is definitely his warm-hearted and welcoming nature.

Ha sido un placer ser su huesped. Todos los adjetivos que diga de el, pónganlo en superlativo. La habitación amplia, cómoda, limpia, tranquila. Y Jon un anfitrión perfecto: amable, educado, servicial y te hace la estancia agradable, dejándote tu espacio. Altamente recomendable.

Jon was a great host, he prepared an amazing breakfast for us. And told us about places to go and shared more info about the city.
Is a good place to go if you make a trip by car and stop by Madrid, because the parking is free. Although the metro is right around the corner it's a little far from the center. We only were there for 2 nights, but it can be exhausting always making all the metro line to get home. But a far from that it's a great place to stay, and Jon is very nice and friendly and can make you comfortable right away.
Muchas Gracias :)

Un anfitrion como pocas veces encontraran!!! Jon es inigualable. Lo mismo que su precioso departamento. Su calidez y su atenta preocupación porque lo pases muy bien son permanentes. Te hace sentir como en tu casa. Se preocupa por todos los detalles y facilita tu estadia en Madrid. Los desayunos que prepara son excelentes!!! Completos, ricos, variados!! Es una excelente persona!!!!
super accueil,jon super sympa beau cadre,a recommandé absolument

Jon is one of a kind guy. Respect and kindness are his middle names. He made our staying at his place very enjoyable. He took a lot of time to give us directions to places to go. We found a stranger and left a friend. His place is very close to the Madrid Metro (Subway) which we recommend to move in the Madrid area. Madrid has a metro every 5 to 6 minutes all day long. This was our first time in Spain and my wife and I loved it. If you come to Spain, do not leave without visiting Toledo. You will find it very different and with lots of old history. Jon also speaks English with a very pure English accent, so you won't have any language issues with him. If you come to Madrid and stay in Jon's place, you won't be disappointed. Have a great vacation.

I had a fantastic stay at Jon's home for three nights in May. He was really helpful and friendly with clear instructions and happy to meet me even late in the evening after my flight. He has an immaculately clean apartment and the room and bed were really comfortable. He provided a fresh breakfast every morning and a bathroom for my use only. Very good wireless. His English is excellent.
Jon was keen to make the stay as good as possible and I would have no hesitation in recommending him. If he can squeeze in the rest of my family, we may try to visit again next year! Thanks....

No tengo palabras para describir el trato que ha tenido Jon hacia mi. Estuve en Madrid por trabajo y me he sentido como en casa (si no mejor) en todo momento. Superatento y agradable y tiene una mano por la repostería que MADRE MIA! No lo dudéis ni un segundo.
Un acceuil extrêmement chaleureux. Jon a été soucieux de mon bien-être tout au long du séjour et très attentionné. Une belle rencontre!

Lugar céntrico. Alojamiento cuidado al mínimo detalle, atención de estrella michelín y sensación como si estuvieras en casa. Anfitrión esplendido, muy atento, te hace sentir especial. Fuimos mi mujer y yo y no le falta detalle. Desayuno de rey y muchas sorpresas agradables que depara. Todavía queda gente muy amable en el mundo. Volveremos

If you stay at Jon's place, you'll find out that you've made a great decision. From the time that I first made an inquiry, up to checking out of his apartment, everything went smoothly. You won't find any problem communicating in English, and Jon is very quick to respond and he addresses all your concerns. His apartment is lovely, and you'll have access to common spaces (kitchen, living and dining room). The room overlooks the garden and pool and so you'll have a restful view. The apartment is a 4 minute walk from the metro station, and if you want to go to the city centre, there's a direct line that will take you there in 20 minutes. I attended a congress at IFEMA while staying with Jon, and the daily commute through the metro was quick and easy. Breakfast is good and the cake and cookies that Jon baked were delicious. He asks your breakfast preference and will accommodate  your request. Also, whenever Jon or I would leave the apartment, he would always assure me that I could contact him if I have any concern. I could go about doing my own activities, but Jon also regularly engaged me in conversation, especially at breakfast time. Jon was very welcoming and I'm happy to have arrived as a stranger, but left as a friend.

Jon's hospitality is outstanding! This is a very comfortable and clean apartment that we shared with him and his gorgeous dogs and cat. It is perfectly positioned -  a quiet area,  3 min walk to the Metro and a great swimming pool if you're there in summer. But it is Jon's genuine warmth, kindness and great sense of humour that made our stay so memorable. His willingness to ensure you are comfortable, and enjoy Madrid, knows no bounds! His breakfast is scrumptious too. Forever grateful for this experience.

Absolutamente recomendable. La ubicació es perfecta y el trato con Jon fue siempre exquisito.
Espero poder repetir pronto!

Jon nos llenó de atenciones y esmero para que nuestra estadía en su casa fuese lo mejor.
Sobrepasó nuestras expectativas en todo.
Jon es excelente anfitrión y altamente recomendado.

Desde nuestra llegada Jon fue un anfitrión formidable.  Cabe destacar su amabilidad, su buena disposición, persona muy respetuosa y servicial. Nos dio una información clara y precisa de los lugares más emblemáticos de Madrid. La estancia en su hogar fue como si estuviésemos en casa y os recomiendo la repostería " increible". Lo recomiendo 100 %. Realmente volveré!
Una atencion espectacular y super recemdable para todos aquellos que quieran pasar dias en madrid, jon una persona super amable y atenta!
Location is great if you are interested in being close to IFEMA or airport. Hospitality is Superb.

Excelente anfitrión, buena comunicación, lugar muy tranquilo y limpieza extrema.
Jon,cuida el más mínimo detalle.

Alojamiento ESPECTACULAR, Jon es un gran anfitrión, ha sido mi primera experiencia como huésped, muy atento, amable , educado y servicial.... he aprendido muchísimo de él, ya que yo también soy anfitrión.... recomiendo su alojamiento a todo aquel que quiera estar como con su familia. Yo repetiré seguro.

Les autres commentaires que j’ai lu pour faire moi choix ne tarissaient pas d’éloges. Je ne sais pas quoi ajouter pour vous recommander ce merveilleux logement avec un hôte tout aussi délicieux, un petit déjeuner parfait ( le café délicieux) et les pâtisseries maison , une attention toute particulière, des détails raffinés ( salle de bain , chambre,) proximité au métro facile et proche de lieux stratégiques; pour tout cela et plus encore, merci.
El piso de Jon increible!!! I Jon el mejor huesped que puedas imaginar!!!

I was in madrid for work
If you like a personal touch instead of boring hotel and look for bed and breakfast kind of airbnb experience with a VERY friendly and helpfull host and you like dogs (very very quiet and friendly) ; this is the place
In 10 - 15 minutes you are in the city center by metro or at the feria conference center.
I will come back if i have to be in madrid for work again

We spent a couple of days in Jon's apartment. Jon was extremely understanding, helpful and friendly. The apartment was cozy, with the big attention to the details and functionality. The parking in the street was free of charge, the apartment was very close to the metro and airport. The pets are lovely, no doubt!:)
Everything was great and it was a really great and memorable time:)

Jon es un anfitrión excepcional, es atento respetuoso, detallista, cortes al mismo tiempo muy cercano.
Tenia la impresión de que me hospedaba en un 5 estrellas con tanto orden y limpieza.
Estoy mas que contenta y satisfecha con mi experiencia en su casa.

Staying at Jon's apartment for my trip to Madrid was easily the best decision I could have made for my vacation. My luggage was misplaced by the airline, and Jon made sure that I had all the essentials I needed and even went as far as to lend me some of his own clothes and personal care items so I would not have to go out and buy any while waiting for my luggage. The space is immaculately clean, classy, and spacious, with plenty of natural light located in a safe and easily accessible area. Upon my arrival, Jon had lunch waiting for me (which was perfect since I was starving after my flight) and had a welcome letter outlining all the information I would need to be staying in his apartment. He also sat down with me and helped me plan out my walking route within the city, highlighting some "local" spots that you will not find simply by googling. Every morning a delicious breakfast was ready for me, so I could start my day on a full stomach ready to go. Above all else Jon's friendly and easy to talk to personality made me feel comfortable and welcome in his home, and the relationship between us felt like that between friends, not solely as traveler and host. The next time I am in Madrid, I will definitely be staying here again!!

I really had high hopes, especially because of all the good reviews on here. However, the host was rude to me. He made me feel invalidated and made me cry. I couldn’t sleep at night because he wouldn’t turn on the ac, I was sweating and I couldn’t breathe. His response to me was to open the window, even though it’s hot in Madrid. The sun hit directly into my room and he never showed me how to use the darkening shades. And when I asked him about it he said “windows have shades, just like I won’t teach you how to turn on a light.” Even though I literally could not see the darkening shades at all. I kept looking but I couldn’t find it. Come to find out it was outside. I’ve never seen it like that in my life. And he didn’t help me lower them. I kept trying but I couldn’t figure it out. I felt so much frustration I couldn’t help but cry. When I called airbnb for help, they told me, “well, you realize it’s hot in Madrid?” Ugh, yes, I do. However I just came from another hot city in Spain, and I had no problems. Why? Because there was ac in the home. My problem isn’t with heat outside, it is sleeping with heat.
When I couldn’t get in the front gate, he didn’t help me, he just said “it works for me and my neighbors.” Come to find out he told me the wrong key for the gate. Others had to let me in. He made breakfast which was really nice. He has awesome pets. Helped with where I should go in Madrid. Things like that. But because of the bad things, it doesn’t make it right. The home is in a neighborhood I didn’t fully feel safe in. The home is so small it feels likes I have to walk on egg shells, especially since the walls are thin and the floor easily makes noise. I just felt like I couldn’t breathe. I felt like I had to tip toe, especially after he was rude to me. I was sweating at night, couldn’t sleep. If online it says your home has ac, then there should be ac. But he wouldn’t turn it on. He did a couple times and then turned it off after a little bit because he got cold. Even though I am still sweating in my room and literally could not sleep.
If you’re a light sleeper and sensitive to sleeping hot, I really wouldn’t recommend staying here. Especially if you really want to be closer to the center. It felt further than what it says online. Also, in the morning I heard a lot of noise outside my room and it woke me up. I loved his pets, but their constant footsteps would wake me up.
I’m never coming back.

Jon es una persona increíble y súper servicial, sin duda volveré a hospedarme con el, te recibe como si estuvieras en tu casa y te da un trato espectacular! En lo personal yo  recomiendo este espacio en un 100% ! Muchas gracias por todo amigo!

I decided to make a trip to Madrid on my own and stayed with Jon and Paola during the time. I have never had such a great host. I had my best Airbnb experience here. The room is clean, tidy and sweet. I love Jon’s pets, they are so sweet and lovely. Jon is the best host I have ever met, he’s a very nice, kind and caring person, he prepared me breakfast, gave me the map and told me how to explore Madrid, and many things like that. Everything is perfect for me, I really feel like home!

Very friendly hostess, I have wonderful day with him. his room is very clean, location is very convenience just few step to Metro, and quiet neighbors. absolutely, I will come back here if I need to visit Madrid again.
dankzij de uitgebreide info van jon optimaal genoten van onze dagen in madrid en bijna alles gezienn

It was an amazing experience. Jon is an excellent host who will make you feel at home and provide you with all amenities and tips. He takes good care of his guests and is extremely polite. He went out of the way to help me out when I was moving to Madrid and offered any help which no one would otherwise. I highly recommend his place, it’s a beautiful apartment too :)

If you want to stay in a place that you won't think twice to give 5 stars, then this is the place. Jon is an incredible person that really knows how to take care of people. I was there for around a 1 week and I felt being home since day one. Respect, cleanness and caring are what represent my stay there.

La mejor experiencia Airbnb que he tenido.
No solamente el piso es espectacular y cómodo, sino que además Jon fue el perfecto anfitrión.
Total flexibilidad a la entrada, trato inmejorable. Desayuno incluido completo.
Inmejorable.

Jhon fue el mejor anfitrión que pudimos encontrar en nuestro viaje, la atención a los detalles en todos los aspectos es inmejorable, realmente salimos muy felices de casa de Jhon, esperamos regresar.
Sus perritos te saludan todos los días con cariño y respeto son fenomenales .

Jon is the perfect host! He is very kind,  informative, welcoming and attentive to detail. Thank you Jon for your warm hospitality and for everything you did for me.
Jon is a really , really great host. I enjoyed my stay totally. The appartement was very clean and cosy - felt like home. It was my first trip ever to Madrid, but it won‘t be my last!!!
Todo perfecto, Jon es un gran anfitrion, repeteria sin duda, todo muy limpio, la habitacion iluminada y una estancia muy comoda, todo fue genial, Gracias.

Jon foi super atencioso preparando boas vindas com uma cidra, dando dicas sobre a cidade e preparando o café da manhã.

ottima ospitalità , casa molto stilizzata ed elegante . consigliatissimo , è stato un piacere soggiornare qui . grazie .

I totally enjoy the wonderful stay in Jon' home.
1. I was impressed by the welcoming etiquette, Jon is waiting for me and prepared cider and biscuit as well as the customized printed welcome letter and indications, which is like 5 star service.

By the way, as recommendation for who are searching for a good place to stay, my experience staying in different departments in Madrid in three weeks tells me re is the best without question.

Jon goes above and beyond to create a marvelous experience. It feels like visiting a friend that will help you to feel at home in Madrid. He has a lot of experience and can give you numerous tips to enjoy your stay. Jon is an amazing host!

Hola, me llamo Wendy soy Psicóloga Clínica y estuve de paso por Madrid 🇪🇸  por mi Máster, es mi primera experiencia en Airbnb y la verdad ha sido maravillosa, Jhon es un excelente anfitrión, la bienvenida ha sido muy bonita, con unos bocadillos y una deliciosa sidra de manzana 🍎, la Zona donde se ubica su casa es residencial, muy tranquila, Jhon además es una persona de calidad y calidez impresionante, prepara unos desayunos muy deliciosos, es atento a los detalles, su casa es muy bella, limpia y ordenada, sus mascotas son muy limpias y educadas, sin duda mi estancia en casa de Jhon ha sido de mucho agrado, totalmente acorde a las fotos, una casa con un estilo muy elegante, y el gran ser humano que es Jhon es algo que me llevo de Madrid 🇪🇸 a mi País , muy bonita la experiencia , les recomiendo mucho hospedarse aquí, en todos mis viajes, por primera vez estando lejos de mi hogar, me sentí como en casa 🌍😊

Jon es una persona muy amable, me hizo sentir en casa. Lo mejor es la inclusión del desayuno, el cual lo prepara a tu gusto.
Puedes consultarle lo que necesites durante tu viaje, ya que, siempre está dispuesto a ayudarte y solucionar tus dudas.
Recomendable al 100%
Jon ist ein hervorragender und sehr freundlicher Gastgeber. Wunderbares Mensch. Alles perfekt für einen Zuhauses Gefühl. Wir werden uns sicher Wiedersehen!

I have never received such a warm welcome. Jon is a wonderful man, everything was perfect, the bed was so comfortable. Every detail is important to him to make the guest feel comfortable. He will help you with anything you need. It was a pleasure to meet you and I hope everything goes well.
One of my best Airbnb experiences ever. Jon is the perfect host in all aspects. Highly recommendable.
Jon is a gentleman who always think for the guest. Very comfortable stay away the home but felt at home.

Jon was above and beyond one of the best hosts I have experienced. Jon is thoughtful, kind, and well prepared for his guests. I found a tray of cookies and cider, and a crested letter of welcome when I arrived. I looked forward to breakfast everyday as the coffee and food was delicious, and he sets a beautiful table. His recommendations were excellent. He recommended I visit Manzanares de real (a medieval castle accessible by bus) and that was really special. Jon has the sweetest pets in his home and I felt cozy in their company. The location is a very walk to the metro - you can see it from his window - and an easy destination from the airport. Would happily stay again.

Mi esposa y yo nos hemos alojado en muchos hospedajes por medio de Airbnb y podemos decir sin duda alguna que la experiencia que vivimos con Jon va a ser difícil de superar. Desde días antes del viaje Jon nos orientó con instrucciones precisas sobre cada cosa que necesitamos. Su nivel de detalle en la información es justo lo que un viajero necesita. Luego al llegar nos encontramos con un apartamento impecable, hermoso, bien decorado y sumamente bien ubicado en un vecindario muy tranquilo y muy bonito. La esa estación del metro está a pocos minutos a pie y desde ahí se puede ir a muchísimas partes en París, incluso al aeropuerto, ahorrando así mucho dinero y tiempo.
Jon es un anfitrión difícil de supera; su atención al detalle hace de su apartamento un lugar muy agradable para estar. Al llegar nos recibió con bebidas y repostería típica de Madrid y sus desayunos son deliciosos (primera vez que recibimos desayuno en un apartamento de Airbnb). Ha sido nuestra mejor estancia. Volveremos!

There are no words to describe how wonderful our experience at Jon’s place was. Unfortunately our flight was delayed so we arrived really late. Jon was really understanding and accommodating. Jon made us feel right at home, as if we were long time friends. He’s not only a fantastic host but also a wonderful person. We will surely be back when in Madrid!

Jon is a great human being plus an amazing host. Felt like home at his place and helped me so much with local instructions. His pets are so lovely & memorable, especially one of them <3
Highly recommended ! You will love his breakfasts every morning ! Everything was thoughtful by him, seriously such a detailed host, Thank you Jon !

This was the very BEST Airbnb experience I’ve ever had - from inquiry to booking, early check in, arrival welcome gift, delicious daily breakfast, arranging space for my work, and so many more thoughtfulness, WOW! Jon went above & beyond in a big way to provide exceptional experience.
The apartment is amazing, it’s beyond words can describe. Jon designed every details with great taste well blended with modernized technologies & gauges. The floor and everywhere was super clean…and the dog and cat are so lovely yet quiet.
During my stay, I enjoyed conversations with Jon and learned fascinating & touching stories. Jon is such caring person, super responsive, a truly world ambassador. I would highly recommend Jon’s place, consider yourself lucky if you could even find the availability!

Jon的住所非常乾淨，而且是個非常有生活品味的人，你會感覺到像是住在五星級酒店那般的優雅！
除此之外Jon非常貼心的準備的歡迎信(信紙很有質感❤️)以及迎賓點心、微酒精飲料；早餐時還可以嚐到他自製的早餐好吃又健康，同時也提供的他個人推薦的整個馬德里景點、美食甚至作成了地圖！
地點距離地鐵很近，如果需要叫車Jon也會協助都不需要擔心，就像你的好朋友一樣
非常享受我在馬德里住宿的那幾天，還有可愛的貓咪以及狗狗(牠們也如Jon一樣的優雅)
如果我再回到馬德里，這裡是唯一的選擇🤗

I enjoyed a memorable stay in Madrid, complimented by Jon’s exuding warmth and assistance. The welcome offering, a delightful surprise, marked the start of an enjoyable journey. The accommodation, showcasing timeless elegance in its décor and furnishings, presented a pleasing retreat at the end of the day. Would recommend highly for anyone seeking the comfort of home in a foreign city.

The flat is situated in a quiet residential area. It felt like home with a lovely friendly atmosphere, clean and tidy, at the same time cosy with the dog and cat. Jon was the perfect host being very kind and helping me to find the sights of Madrid on my first visit to the city. There was a welcoming tray of biscuits and cool cider, much appreciated! We had pleasant conversations over leisurely breakfasts.
Thank you for a memorable visit. Most definitly the place to stay for my next visit to Madrid.

Jon was a great host - very friendly, and helped me out on more than one occasion with logistical issues getting around Madrid. He even offered to do a load of laundry for me! So my stay was pleasant and the area is convenient to the metro, which is very easy to use and gets you anywhere you want to go.
My only caution is about the “sunny & luxuriously appointment” description. The apartment is quite small, the bedroom basically taken up by the bed, so there is nowhere to work, eat, etc. The bathroom is extremely small - I am a tall and slender person and there was barely enough room to get in and out of the shower.- an heavier person would really struggle. I think the place is a decent value for the price, and again Jon could not be nicer, but I think “luxury” is a strong word and an overreach here.

Jon ist der beste Gastgeber, den man sich vorstellen kann. Alles ist unglaublich sauber und gepflegt. Jon ein toller Gesprächspartner und unendlich zuvorkommend.
Die Unterkunft ist nicht in central central Madrid aber man ist mit der Metro super schnell da. Man ist super gut zur Innenstadt, Messe und Flughafen angebunden.
Ich habe mich wie zuhause gefühlt und kann diesen Ort aus tiefstem Herzen empfehlen! Wäre Jon in anderen Städten auch Gastgeber, würde ich immer dort hingehen. Eine absolute Go-to Adresse. Größten Dank dir Jon!

I don’t have enough words to describe my experience at Jon ‘s home.
Perfect in every way, the best host you will ever have.
Great breakfast, spotless apartment, good access to the metro and the best thing about this place , is Jon, friendly and a Great host.
I highly recommend it.

Next time when I visit Madrid, I will choose to stay in Jon’s home without hesitation!
For a tourist, we usually focus on transportation, food, attractions, etc., but don’t forget that what is more important than these is the local culture. As a local, Jon can not only provide you with transportation, food and other information, but more importantly, he can also share with you very authentic local culture, some very thought-provoking insights and life insights. These are more precious than anything. By the way, the transportation here is very convenient. You can go to the subway station in just a few steps and go wherever you want to go.
Don't hesitate any more, I guarantee you will come back again next time once you choose this place, just like me!

J'ai passé un excellent séjour. Jon est une personne très accueillante et aux petits soins pour ces convives. il sait parfaitement recevoir et se rend disponible à tout moment pour le confort et bien-être de ses convives. Il a su s'adapter. Je recommande fortement de vous arrêter chez lui pour votre séjour à Madrid. A titre personnel  je reviendrai pour découvrir cette ville via Jon.

Jon is very thoughtful and kind. He made me feet right at home. Over and above my expectations. It's a must repeat experience.
House is squeaky clean, comfortable and matches everything listed. Its a peaceful locality. One minute walk to metro from where you can go to anywhere in the city. Jon also gave me great recommendations. Thank you for a great stay.

Jon is an excellent host. He pays great attention to details and puts a lot of effort into making the guest feel comfortable and well attended. I was greeted with sweets and a letter with all the necessary information. The room and bathroom (private) was spotless clean, and the house looked exactly like the photos. Breakfast was served every day which was an extra gesture from the host! The room is quite small and doesn't have an AC, but the host can provide you with a fan. The house is inside a complex, so it's very quiet. The location is far from the center though, there's not much to do around. It's around 30 mins by metro, but it's located in a safe area, and well connected with a metro station 3 mins walk. Excellent value for money.

There’s a reason Jon has so many great reviews. A chic, comfortable apartment. Lovely breakfast and conversation each morning, a great shower/bathroom and a gorgeous room with a great bed.
10 mins in an Uber to IFEMA convention centre, was perfect for me. Jon is incredibly warm, friendly and welcoming. I will be back! I can highly recommend staying at Jon’s place.

Spend amazing time and talking with Jon . I really felt like home!
