He estado muy a gusto en casa de Jon. La habitación es un espacio acogedor, muy limpia, con espacio suficiente para dejar tus cosas durante la estancia y con una cama fabulosa. El baño y los espacios comunes muy limpios y ordenados, como aparece en las fotos.
Jon es una persona muy detallista y cuidadosa tanto en los detalles de la casa como en el trato hacia las personas. En todo momento estuvo muy atento de mis necesidades, de que yo me encontrará cómoda. Todo es fácil con él. Bonito detalle de bienvenida.
Jon cumple el "espíritu" de compartir experiencias entre anfitrión y huésped: tuvimos momentos bonitos en estos 3 días que estuve en su casa.
Recomienda lugares con encanto.
Está en un barrio tranquilo que está muy bien comunicado con el centro de la ciudad; metro y autobús a menos de 5 minutos de la casa. Sensación de seguridad en el barrio.
Definitivamente, es un lugar para volver!!!
Muchas gracias Jon, hasta la próxima!!!

Sin duda el mejor espació para pasar unos días en MAD.
Gracias por todo.
10/10 🤩
Tanto el anfitrión como la casa son 100% recomendables. ¡Se está muy a gusto!

Jon met us in the street and assisted us in unloading and carrying our bags to his apartment. Parking is very limited, so reconsider driving a car. Very accessible by the Metro, just a block away. Jon sat us down, made us coffee then gave a run down of the area, but most helpful he took the time to show us how to use the Metro system. Best means of traveling Madrid! Hie laid out all the places we should visit on a map which made our 2 day stay great! Plus he feed us breakfast, homemade sponge cake, orange juice and coffee, each morning. Jon became family and I highly recommend his place! We came heavy so if you are going light and need a bed and clean private bathroom this is prefect!
Jon earned 5 stars and I am proud to call him a friend!

I was spend 4 nights in Jon’s cozy and elegant apartment. The place  is close to the metro station, it's easy to get to anywhere in Madrid. Also easy to find free parking space. If I have any questions, Jon always responds immediately and gives me useful advice. He is a real gentleman. I would like to highly recommend Jon’s place, if you are looking for short stay in Madrid.

Jon es un anfitrión excepcional, siempre atento y amabilisimo. Siempre con una sonrisa.
Me hizo sentir cómo en casa desde el primer momento, con una dedicada atención en cada momento.
¡Volveré a su casa!

Jon è una persona splendida. Come la sua casa. Un luogo accogliente, sicuro e facile da raggiungere. La colazione è fantastica. Sono stata 4 giorni e mi sono sentita coccolata e accudita. Ottimi i consigli e i suggerimenti per conoscere Madrid. La metro a pochi passi consente di esplorare la città in tutta comodità. Veramente TOP!

I travel a lot, but with limited experience with Airbnb. I can tell that this has been and will be the best experience in my life!
Jon is like a father, he really cares about his guests. The map he prepared is really helpful, he recommended EI Escorial, which was not in my travel plan, but it turns out that this is really the highlight of my journey.
The room is super nice, the bed is very comfortable, and all the offerings are even better than what we can have in hotels.
I will definitely miss Jon, and of course his cat and dog. They are both very welcoming and very lovely!
I highly recommend you to choose here!

Jon est très accueillant. il nous a donné toutes les infos nécessaires pour trouver facilement le logement. nous sommes arrivés tard sans aucun problème. Nous avons passé un agréable séjour.

Jon is a wonderful host with a beautiful home! I really appreciate his efforts and flexibility in helping to make time in Madrid so special. I look forward to seeing him again!
Thank you!!
Jon is extremely gracious, helpful and welcoming host. Breakfast was included in our stay and Jon did an excellent job of preparing great English breakfast fir us on both days.

Hey Jon,
You’re a great host! I loved the breakfast and our conversations. Thanks so much for keeping my baggage for a few days; it really helped me manage my itinerary to Lisbon and Barcelona. I was impressed by the automation in your home and how clean and tidy everything was. You did an amazing job. You are indeed a super host , Looking forward to see you again !!
Thanks again!
Nos sentimos como en casa, está ubicado en una zona tranquila de Madrid y Jon es una persona muy cálida y estuvo pendiente de atender todas nuestras inquietudes

¡Fue mi mejor experiencia en el alquiler de una vivienda!
Jon es tan amable, me sentí en su casa realmente súper cuidada , tranquila y con muchos detalles para hacer mi estancia muy cómoda.
Recomiendo 100% y espero que vuelvo pronto!

Todo excelente! Jon muy atento y amable 😁

Words cannot express how wonderful my stay was at Jon’s lovely apartment. He is more than a host, he makes you feel like family. From the welcome basket and informative letter, to the homemade breakfast every morning, he pays attention to every small detail. It feels like you are staying at a high end hotel. Luxurious bathrobe, soft linens, beautiful decor. Jon guided me with a map so I could see as much as possible during my stay and was very responsive wherever I had questions or needed help. I enjoyed our morning chats and felt safe and cared for. The location is close to the Metro and in a lovely quiet neighborhood. If you visit Madrid, i highly recommend this Airbnb. Hope to visit again soon!

非常温暖漂亮的房子，房东人很热情也很好，在我入住当天为我准备了点心和啤酒，房间里还准备了浴袍，可惜我没有用到。为了让旅行更简单快乐，房东会准备一张旅行地图，让我的马德里之行很顺利。在家里住的两天很开心！宠物很可爱，居住环境也很安静，晚上不会影响到休息。离开的那天早上凌晨三点半，房东帮忙叫好了车还送我下了楼。因为我听不懂西语，房东还帮我做了翻译告诉我司机会把我放在哪里。房东真的是一个很好的朋友。我每次回家后还会帮我准备喝的。最重要的是房子离地铁很近，路线很安全，去景点很方便～他值得这么高的评价！希望你们来马德里玩可以住在他家里，他人真的超级好

¡El alojamiento era todavía mejor que en las fotos! Jon fue súper amable y atento en todo momento, se nota que le gusta cuidar al detalle cada punto para que te sientas como en tu casa. De todas las experiencias que he tenido en AIRBNB esta ha sido la mejor.
房东非常热情好客，是我们来西班牙半个月最好的入住体验。早上还为我们做了爱心早餐。会推荐给朋友入住。

This was my first time trying out AirBnb. From the moment I arrived Jon was welcoming and made every effort to try and make my stay the best it could be. Even when I missed the part where he had a cat he did everything to make sure my allergies didn't explode. When I couldn't find paella for 1 in the city he offered to make it for me at the airbnb, and it was amazing and ensured that I wasn't hungry until 10 pm. :)
I was unsure if the price was worth it in the beginning since others had found cheaper stays, but in the end I felt like it was worth it. Especially considering the state of public bathrooms in Madrid.
If I had to return to Madrid I would definitely check in with Jon first to see if he had any room for my stay.

I stayed for four weeks at Jon’s apartment and I had a great time. The apartment is nice and provides all the things you need. It’s also located close to the metro (line4) which brings you fast (ca 15 to 40 min) to wherever you need to be in Madrid.
Jon does a lot of effort to make you feel welcome and at home. He gives a lot of tips to make you holiday or workation better. For the breakfast he saw that I bought hummus, so he made fresh hummus for me. These gestures were amazing.
I can only recommend you to stay at Jon’s place, it is also possible to have a good conversation with him and easy time at home.

Jon is a fantastic host - very kind and generous.
He helped me plan my trip, made a lovely breakfast, and shared interesting insights. I'd love to visit again. Big enthusiasm - Thank you, Jon!
Great accomodation including breakfast to start the day and a very congenial host who aims to make your stay as comfortable as possible.

It exceed my expectations in every possible sense! Jon is kind, respectful, helpful and caring. The place is clean and neat, beautiful and homy. The animals only add to the charm. I have absolutely nothing to remark about. I would definitely come back for another stay at Jon's!
Jon es muy acomedido a cualquier cosa que necesites, el lugar es limpio y comodo, sin duda lo recomendaria

Jon is as good a host as they come. In summary it was a delightful experience staying at Jon’s beautiful home, where a lot of attention is given to detail. How many AirBnB have Frette towels? Well Jon does amongst other things. Pillow menu is usually found at very good hotels… and at Jon’s. Jon is an extremely helpful, kind and interesting gentleman, who is also fluent in English. The home is very quiet , and in a perfect distance from Esparanza metro, making travel very easy. Very highly recommended to discerning AirBnB’ers.

Gospodarz zapewnia wszystko co mogłoby być potrzebne podczas pobytu, jest bardzo sympatyczny i ciepły, można poczuć sie jak w domu. Zwierzęta nie narzucają się.
Jon is a proper gentleman! His home is warm and beautifully designed. I enjoyed my stay and would happily return in the future.
The stay at Jon's was comfortable. He makes you feel at home welcomes you with a warm smile. His place is very neat and tidy and his breakfast is awesome. He is an amazing host.

Jon is a great host, very hospitality. We had very good conversation and he is also very thoughtful, understand that I have to work late and ask me not to worry about disturbing them. The location is great, so close to metro. Very easy to commute. Recommended someone who would like to know more local culture and need metro close by.

Staying at Jon’s place was exquisite. He is the kindest, most caring and thoughtful host that I have ever met.
I loved the scrumptious breakfasts and lovely conversations that we shared. Thank you for everything Jon!

无须多言……住得超爽……🫶🏻🫶🏻🫶🏻
Jon超级好

Staying at Jon’s is like staying with a good friend that you have known a long time. Besides the comfort of his welcoming spirit, Jon is attentive to every detail such as local information, directions as well as making sure his contact information is given so that nobody gets lost. Jon gave me a welcoming drink and snack, morning breakfast and even offered to attend to doing my laundry. I need to note all of his small but charming details so I can add them to my Airbnb. One thing that I will not be able to copy is Jon’s personality and calming manner.

My second stay at Jon's place was just as delightful as the first! Jon's genuine care for his guests shines through in every detail—he goes out of his way to ensure your comfort, offering thoughtful assistance whenever needed. The space was impeccably clean, wonderfully cosy, and filled with charming touches, including a welcome snack and delicious daily breakfasts. If you're looking for a warm, welcoming stay with a host who truly makes you feel at home, Jon's place is perfect. I can’t recommend it enough!
Todo excelente. Jon es un gran anfitrión y sobre todo, un amigo.

Jon was proactive and really ensured an amazing experience! He was tentative and always easy to get ahold of in case I had any questions. He was warm and inviting and made me feel like a friend staying in from out of town! I was given a map and a quick guide with recommendations on what to start off my visit with. The breakfast each morning was personally selected for me and a nice surprise, Jon went above and beyond to make sure my needs were met within my schedule. The nearby metro takes you anywhere you could want to go, with very few transfers if any at all. The area is quieter and more residential and it’s a great choice  if you want a more locale experience or long term stays. Many Thanks to Jon, you gain a friend when you stay here!

We had a very lovely stay with Jon and his beautiful dog. He is a great host - gave us lots of information and made us a delicious breakfast each morning. The house is beautiful and clean, and very close to the metro making it easy to get around. Looking forward to our next visit to Spain! 😊

I was impressed by the warm hospitality and attention to detail. The accommodation was immaculately clean and tastefully decorated, providing a cozy and comfortable retreat throughout my stay. Jon went above and beyond to ensure I have everything I needed. The location was fantastic, offering easy access to Retiro and Sol station. Overall, I have a wonderful time and would highly recommend Jons place to anyone looking for a memorable Airbnb experience!

What a lovely stay.  I have never had a more hospitable or kinder host than Jon.  It’s rare to come across people like him.  The room is lovely and I always appreciate having a private bathroom.  The location was great for me right by a metro on the 4 line.  Being close to the airport also made things easier for arrival and departure.  It’s a quaint and quite residential neighborhood with easy access of only a few stops into more busting areas.

Jon was an amazing host:
- very responsive
- easy to talk to and exchange knowledge
- fulfills to all needs
- very comfortable place
- pristine breakfast
The apartment is very clean and he has an amazing sense for decorations.
You feel welcome from the first minute you arrive until the very end of your stay.
Can highly recommend to stay at Jon's.
Also, the apartment is on a quiet area. It is close to a metro station which allows you to easily reach IFEMA, the Airport as well as the city center.
Jon is a very nice man! The appartment was clean, the room and bathroom perfect. I enjoyed the sheets and the towels. I felt safe and comfortable staying here, thank you so much!
Fue espectacular la experiencia,repetiria sin dudarlo con personas como el!!!!

Jon is an excellent host. He pays great attention to details and puts a lot of effort into making the guest feel comfortable and well attended.  The room and bathroom  was clean, and the house looked exactly like the photos. Breakfast was served every day at a time that suits us. The apartment is located in a quiet neighborhood that is very well connected to the city center; the subway and bus are less than 5 minutes away from the house. Being close to the airport also made things easier for arrival and departure.

Gracias Jon por ser tan cordial conmigo la habitación el recibimiento todo espectacular
Lo recomiendo muchísimo volvería sin duda
This was a rare find, everything is absolutely valuable, especially the host’s great mood and friendliness. Will stay again.

Jon is absolutely the perfect host! He goes to great lengths to ensure you are always comfortable and well-taken care of - from his meticulously prepared breakfast, helping out with your laundry, to providing amazing recommendations of places to visit (not the obvious tourist traps!). It was my 1st time visiting Madrid and truly felt at home staying here. Already looking forward to my next visit!

Jon ist ein sehr herzlicher und aufmerksamer Gastgeber. Das Frühstück war reichhaltig und die Gespräche mit ihm haben mir sehr gut gefallen. Zimmer und Badezimmer waren sauber und sehr schön eingerichtet. Ich komme gerne wieder!

I had a truly great stay. Big thanks to Jon for being such a kind and thoughtful host. The room was clean and tidy, and the flat itself was modern with a nice personal touch. The bathroom was spotless, easy to use and completely private, which made the stay even more comfortable. One of the highlights was the breakfast, generous, delicious and prepared by Jon himself. It was the perfect way to start the day. The flat is in a quiet area but very close to the tube, so getting to the city centre was quick and easy. Throughout the stay I really felt a sense of mutual respect, which made the whole experience even better. I highly recommend this place. It’s absolutely worth staying at.

Jon's place was easily the best Airbnb I have ever stayed in! Jon was very responsive from the moment he accepted my booking to check-out time.
The apartment looks exactly like you see it in the listing, if not better. It is very clean and welcoming. Jon was there to welcome me, show me my room and was kind to offer a welcome snack which I appreciated on a hot Madrid day. The best part of the welcome package was a personalised welcome note. I felt right at home from the first minute! The room is big enough, I appreciated the private bathroom and the extra amenities in the closet.
Jon made the most amazing breakfast everyday - exactly what you need before setting off to explore Madrid! He was also very kind to print out a map and marked it with the must-see spots, where to start etc which saved me a lot of time and made it possible to see Madrid from the eyes of a local too.
100% value for money and I will definitely be staying with Jon again the next time I'm in Madrid!

Jon is a great host. Lovely
3 bed apartment with comfortable double bed: nice linen; lovely breakfast.
2 min walk to esperanca tube with direct line to city centre.
Jon could not do enough to help.

Jon is very considerate to help me from the time I checked in to the time I left. Lovely time there with lovely breakfast! And all the decorations in the house is quite elegant:) Highly recommended! Will stay there again if I visit Madrid in the future

You could not choose a better place to stay in Madrid than this beautiful apartment!  The location is perfect, next to the Plaza Mayor, Potra del Sol and the Gran Via. The apartment is cozy and we drank bottles of wine in the spacious living room with the balcony doors open to the lively street below.   The host Anouk and Carlos were extremely attentive to our requests.  the apartment beds are cozy with clean sheets and plenty of fresh clean towels.  this apartment outshines any hotel and will add to the experience of enjoying how lovely Madrid is.   We were thrilled to find such a fine apartment!!!!!
Great place close to everything. Comfortable and spacious.

Great apartment, clean, charming! very well located in the center,
very good reception, thank you Anouk! + + +
Perfect venue! Anouk was amazing :) she was so lovely & explained everything for us. We loved it here, made our stay in Madrid even better :)

El apartamento es muy cómodo y tiene una excelente ubicación, esta a metros de Plaza Mayor, a pocas cuadras de la Puerta del Sol y Gran Via.

Great place close to everything (Plaza Mayor, Puerta del Sol, Gran Via). Comfortable and spacious.

Gracias Anouk por todo!.

you not realize when you know madrid but Extremely well located apartment, there are car parks close but we found parking right next
the apartment is very well equipped with 2 air conditioners
my only concern was the lack of hot water for 7 people but with 2 showers a day and people we never lack of hot water
The internet worked very well
we spent a great weekend in madrid and housed in a great apartment

Hemos tenido una estancia muy agradable.La ubicación del departamento es excelente, los servicios son muy buenos.Es necesario cambiar colchón cama principal por algo de mejor calidad, no es cómodo por estar vencido. También hay que tener mas armarios para colocar las ropas,cómoda del dormitorio principal estaba copada por implementos del dueño del departamento. Estadía muy satisfactoria y atención Anouk excelente y oportuna.

Just outside the Plaza Mayor we had a wonderful time in the apartment, which was fully equipt and most central in Madrid. Just great! Anouk was very helpfull in giving all kind of information about shopping, dining and dancing.

We stayed in Anouke's apartment between 25 and 28 October. This was part of our MBA semester break in Madrid. Anouk was super helpful in addressing all our inquiries, hospitality and check in/check out procedures. The house is great/clean, as shown in the pictures and is located in the heart of the Madrid - close to all places that you want to see or experience (pubs, restuarants, plaza mayor, etc...). I highly recommend Anouk's house.

This was a perfect place!  Everything was ready for us, communication was perfect and the location could not have been better.  We would absolutely stay here again.  We even got to watch the processions during Semana Santa from our balcony!!
Appartement impeccable !!!! Parfait !!!!

Excellent location!!! The apartment is located steps away from Plaza Mayor, and right next to the BEST espadrille store in Madrid. The restaurants and bars are also at walking distance.

The apartment is exactly like the photos, except there is some construction happening on the outside of the building, so you cannot look out of the balcony, but that's just fine! The place is very clean, and has enough beds for 6 people to sleep comfortably.

Anouk was fabulous! She is so friendly and helpful. She was waiting for us at the apartment to give us the keys and walk through. She even gave us her personal number is case we needed anything.

The only issue is that it's loud at night. I would not recommend this place for people with kids. It is so perfectly located, that you cannot expect to be in a quiet area. Again, not really a problem for us as we could sleep through it.

Overall, I definitely recommend staying here!!

This place is fantastic. It was as advertised. Great rooms, furnishings and location. A little creepy going in, but once past the front door it was perfect. The rooms were large, the beds comfortable and the AC was a very nice bonus. Great for a family of five.

Genial lugar, literalmente al lado de la Plaza Mayor, con balcones a calle Cuchilleros, excelentes restaurantes, parking debajo de la Plaza , supermercado al frente, metro a cuadras, muy bien ubicado, espacioso, limpio, buen aire acondicionado pues en verano se agradece, nos encanto, nuestro anfitrión muy accesible con datos y muy simpático,  nuestra experiencia maravillosa, Madrid volveremos!!!!!
The apartment was spacious and clean and the location was fantastic!
The location is perfect for visiting Madrid, we had a great weekend in this cozy and quiet apartment with my friends. Anouk was very nice and helpful to us.

Casa Arco met our expectations and more. The location was ideal and the apartment provided all of the necessities and comfort one looks for when touring a foreign country.
Anouk met us at the apartment early and even insisted on carrying our bags. During our stay, she continued her excellent service and was always available to provide support and advice. We never had better service at any of the B&B's we have visited.
Special thanks to Mr.Saba who was available to show us how to use the washing machine and other equipment we were unfamiliar with. Also, to Donna who made sure the apartment was exceptionally clean and well maintained. We loved Madrid and plan on returning. Hopefully this apartment will be available for our next visit.

First, I will say that I am a tourist with no prior experience in the area. I was concerned about a lot of things. Location, price, check in, etc. I was a little skeptical. Was this the right place for us to stay?
The answer is YES. This apartment was fantastic. Perfect location. Great hosts. Everything was great. So if you are "flying blind" like I was, and not sure about booking, let me tell you that this is the place you want. Look no further. We had a great stay and would return in a heartbeat. Thanks!!

Great apartment steps from Plaza Mayor! It was very clean and had an old style Spanish feel. Anouk was very friendly and even gave us some recommendations on where to eat in the city (all of which were great). Would definitely stay here again!

We travelled as a group of 5 for a long weekend to Madrid. The apartment is perfectly located right in the heart of Madrid seconds away from Plaza Mayor. The apartment is spacious & the kitchen has everything you need if you want to eat there instead of eating out.  Anouk was really helpful & answered all our questions. We couldn't have wanted a better place to stay for our weekend break.
wonderful apartment, Would be hard to beat the location!
Anouk is a good host and is very quick in responding! Thanks for letting us to stay in your nice apartment and we all had a nice time!

JUST PERFECT !!!
Great location, really confortable, Anouk was really nice and helpfull
Thanks again for all !!!

Super appartement, idéalement situé, très confortable et super propre, Anouk est dispo et très gentille, n'hesitez pas à louer cet appert !!!
Fantastic Location in the centre of Madrid. Really close to everything Apartment totally fine.

bonjour à tous,

l'appart est très bien placé et la déco est vraiment sympa. les espace de vie sont agréables et l'accueil aussi , par contre pensez à bien regarder le règlement intérieur car nous avons dû payer 50 euros de plus car nous sommes arrivées un jour férié. De plus l'appart est un peu sombre et certaines choses sont vétustes .

Apartamento muy agradable y limpio.
Buena situación juntó a Plaza Mayor.
Duermen 6 perfectamente .
Entrega llaves y salida muy cómodo

Everything work out fine, Anouk allways replied straight after having contacted her.

The flat itself was cosy and clean, and situated right in the city center, so we could walk almost everywhere.

As we visited Madrid with a rather big group of 7 people, it was not allways easy to have only one bathroom in the flat, thus i don't recommend to book this place with a group bigger than 4...

All together we really enjoyed our trip and had a great time being at Anouk's!
Beautiful apartment, perfect location. If there was a second bathroom was perfect
Piso maravilloso y gran anfitriona!

We had a great stay in Anouk's apartment.  The location is fantastic; you are right in the middle of central Madrid, only steps away from the Plaza Mayor.  The apartment is very comfortable and there is plenty of literature on what to do, maps, and so forth.  Would stay there again.

Great place, superb location DOWNTOWN of DOWNTOWN.

Great organisation (timming, keys, housecleaning)...
Perfect location and great apartment! 9 of us went, with a bit of prior planning one bathroom wasn't a huge issue!

I booked this nice apartment for my friends, knowing that I wouldn't be able to join them on their trip to Madrid.
I organized everything with Anouk, she was great : she answered quickly and kindly, provided me with all the information I needed and confirmed that she would take care of my friends details of arrival. And she did, of course!
Regarding the place itself, I can share my friends comments: the apartment is great, really well located and nicely decorated. Their only challenge was 9 girls for 1 bathroom ;)

Our group of 10 people stayed at Anouks wonderful apartment and we really had a great time. It's situated right next to the touristic Plaza Mayor and very easy to get there. I absolutely recommend staying at Anouks apartment!

The house has a perfect location right in the Madrid centre.
Anouk was very helpful and it couldn't gonne better. It´s the perfect place for a group of friends who wants to know Madrid.

Anouk est une hôte accueillante, sympathique, et de bon conseil pour quelques bons plans sur Madrid. L'appartement est très fonctionnel et idéalement placé pour profiter de la vie diurne et nocturne à Madrid. Je recommande cet appartement pour des groupes d'amis cherchant à s'imprégner de la vie madrilène en quelques jours.

I rent this flat in Madrid for a bachelorette party. It was a really nice flat and well furnished.  It is located in the center of Madrid. So it is perfect place to discover the city or to party as you can go out and Côme back easily. I recomand this place.
Very friendly and it was a beautiful place as advertised. Right on the heart of Madrid. I would recommend to anybody
Very nice flat, perfectly located and comfortable

Anouk did an amazing job welcoming me and my five friends to Casa Arco Cuchilleros-Botin!! We were greeted ontime and given an overview of the location and house.

The location couldn't be beat!!! Located at the foot of Plaza Mayor (the center of Madrid) and surrounded by restaurants, bars and beautiful architecture. We couldn't have asked for anything more. We absolutely loved our stay and know the best spot to stay if we ever come to Madrid again. If you're lucky enough to see this available for the days that you plan to visit Madrid, book immediately!!

The apartment has a great location. About 1 minute walk to Plaza Major. We received a very nice welcome from our hosts who has shown us the apartment and tourist attractions near by. We really enjoyed staying in this apartment.

This apartment is as cool as it looks not he pictures.  The neighborhood is spectacular; you couldn't be more in the middle of the action.  The apartment itself has really nice tile floors, beautiful wood beamed ceilings and an amazing dining table and chairs.  The kitchen isn't gorgeous but it is functional, clean and well equipped.  The windows open up on to the Calle de Chuchilleros, which is filled with restaurants and people at night, which makes you feel in the middle of the action.  Nice and quiet though when you shut the double windows and want to sleep.

Anouk was very accommodating - as our time of arrival was hard to be exact until the last moment.  She was waiting for us.  She provided lots of information about the neighborhood and all of Madrid.  The apartment is in the perfect location.  Right in the heart of the fabulous spirit of Madrid.

We stayed with a group of eight girls and we had a great time!
Would surely recommend this apartment to anyone who is looking for a place in Madrid in the middle of town. The apartment is very dark and quiet in the morning even though it is the middle of the center. The shower is great, there is however no separate toilet so make sure you are in no hurry in the morning ;)

We had a great time in Madrid.

The location of the apartment is perfect: walking distance to Mercado de San Miguel, Mercado de San Anton, Plaza de Santa Ana,...

The apartment was clean and cozy, with a nice little balcony, a great kitchen and a good sized bathroom. Perfect for 4 to 6 people.

Anouk was super responsive and very nice. I would recommend this apartment to anyone who wants to stay in the city center.

Anouk saved our visit to Madrid! A last minute change in plans called for Anouk to drop what she was doing to host our unexpected stay. Her apartment was as pictured and comfortable and well located.  Anouk provided and reviewed a guide to the apartment, emergency phone numbers, the best in local restaurants, bars, grocery stores. We enjoyed our stay very much.

Anouk was a cordial and helpful hostess.  Her detailed and highly useful directions to get to the flat, and her equally detailed and useful booklet of information on the flat, the area, restaurants, bars, etc., were examples of the experience she provided.  The flat was very clean, the bed I used was very comfortable, there was a lot of storage space, and outlets were seemingly everywhere  for recharging devices. The washer worked well and the kitchen was well and thoughtfully supplied, and there was a large refrigerator/freezer.  The bathroom had storage space and granite counters.  There are even implanted red lights to warn of steps in the flat.  Clever and helpful.  The view was wonderful from the two balconies, and it was pretty cool to be in a building connected to Botin, and be a bit of a tourist attraction.  I had a great time.  Thanks, Anouk!
Anouk was very friendly and helpful. Everything is as the pictures look and great location! Would definitely stay here again!

We were made to feel extremely welcome and Anouk arranged for someone to meet us at the property and give us a run down of the facilities available at the property and the amenities available in the area.  The apartment was just superb and located in a fantastic spot to explore the city with loads of delicious eateries located on the doorstep.

Anouk is a really nice host.
She is very helpful and will give you a lot of advice about the neighborhood (restaurant, bar, museum...).
The flat is pritty nice and well maintained.

I highly recommend this flat.

I had a great weekend with 7 friends.
The apartment is stylish and well equipped.
The location is absolutely fantastic!

Posizione strategica !!
Perfetto e molto accogliente!!
Lo coniglio ;)

Beautiful, Spacious and Bright apartment, amazing location and very peaceful and quiet. Anouk was great to deal with and we could not have had a better experience staying in Madrid. if we return we would stay here again for sure.
Fantastic apartment. Perfect location. Accommodating host. Perfect place to enjoy Madrid

The appartement is very well located. You can visit Madrid without taking the metro or a taxi.
Anouk is very nice.
But, few things has to be improved:
1. There is only one bathroom for 9 people! So i will recommand the appartement for a small group
2. We wish we could have a welcoming appetizers. There is absolutely nothing in the kitchen not even a bottle of juice and we paid 50€ for the check in late.

Nice flat, very warm welcome. Great and very helpful tips (How to get there? Things to do / places to eat in Madrid etc). The Location ist absolutely perfect: Very close to Plaza Mayor in the very center, exactly the place you want to be if you stay in Madrid.

Great hostess, great location, we loved being right next to plaza Mayor.  We drove our own car and found parking in a car park under the plaza. There are so many shops and restaurants right there that it made it super easy to get anything we needed.  The apartment itself was very clean and well decorated.  Anouk speaks excellent English and was very organized. We had a backed up drain in the shower and it was quickly fixed with no fuss.   The washing machine worked great as well. The wifi was slow and spotty at times.  I would recommend this apartment to any family traveling to Madrid.

We had a really nice stay in Madrid. The appartment was big and clean. We stayed here with 6 girls and had such a nice time! The location was great and Anouk was a good host. We made clear agreements with her and we could stay in the appartement a bit longer because we had a late flight.  I highly reccommend this appartement!

Very Nice flat in the historical heart of Madrid, Very close to plaza Mayor ! We had a very enjoy weekend.
Thanks Anouk for all.

We rented this appartment in Mai for three nights. For a couple with 2 children this is a very good place to stay. The space is big enough for even 10 people. The appartment is clean, the beds are of good quality and the location is perfect! From here we could easily walk to all the beautifull locations Madrid has to offer.  Anouk was very helpfull and showed us the most important things. Besides that some usefull infomation is available in the appartment. Anouk, thank you for our pleasant stay in your appartment in Madrid!

En todo momento estuvo en contacto conmigo, recordando la llegada de la fecha. Me ofreció flexibilidad para recoger las llaves. El apartamento me lo enseñó Javier, del cual me comentó Anouk que podría ser quien lo hiciera. El alojamiento es tal cual se describe en el anuncio. Muy satisfechos con el barrio, precisamente por su situación y ambiente lo escogimos. Nota de 9 sobre 10.

El barrio donde se sitúa la casa es tal cual a la descripción de situación.
En cuanto a la casa, bastante usada con respecto ala anuncio. Un lavado de cara no vendría mal. Los sofás un tanto sucios y desgastados en la tapicería. Este tipo de casas antiguas requieren mas atención.

La casa en general debería estar mejor cuidada para hacer justicia a las fotos. Un 6 sobre 10.

En cuanto a la atención por parte de Anouk, nada que reprochar. Correcta y comunicativa.

If you want to stay in the heart of Madrid this is the place. Well appointed and steps away from Plaza Mayor. The apartment is exactly as the pictures. Despite being in the center of activities, when you are ready to rest it's very quiet. We loved the location and the apartment. Anouk and team were great with checkin.

The aapartment is in a wonderful location, right nea the Arc de Toledo and the Plaza Mayor. The marketplace is only a block away and offers all sorts of wonderful foods. Anouk and her staff were very helpful and despite the location, the apartment had darkening shades and AC and so we coud all sleep very comfortably.

Anouk has sido muy atenta con nosotros. Todo ha funcionado a la perfeccion.

La casa esta en una ubicacion inmejorable en el centro de Madrid, todo ha sido muy facil. La casa tiene todo lo que necesitabamos. Muy recomendable.

A very beautiful apartment in the heart of Madrid. It cannot be closer than Plaza Mayor !!!
We were 6 adults and the flat was just perfect. The place is spacious and looks just as on the pictures. Many thanks to Anouk and Alberto for their hospitality and for being so helpful and reactive.

Hi,

Anouk was a fantastic host. Very accommodating. Was there when we arrived to welcome us and show us around. Plus helped greatly in letting us stay to help with our late flight.

The flat itself was great. Very comfortable beds, nice bathroom and kitchen and very spacious, even for 10 people. A great location to for getting around Madrid. Would stay again, and definitely recommend.

Super séjour à casa arco !!! Anouk est très réactive pour répondre aux messages et est très agréable ! Alberto, notre hôte sur place a été très arrangeant et souriant ! Les photos sont très représentatives de l'appartement qui est celui ci très joli, très pratique ! Il est idéalement bien placé dans Madrid pour pouvoir se balader en centre ville ! Diverses commerces à proximité sont bien appréciables ! Je recommande vivement Anouk et surtout la casa arco ! A une prochaine fois !
Central location, not that good for big groups, the place looks much better in picture than in real life

Tutto perfetto!
Anouk è stata molto gentile e la comunicazione è stata mlto semplice e impeccabile.
L'appartamento corrisponde perfettamente alle immagini e la posizione è quanto di meglio si possa desiderare.
soggiorno stupendo

We were 5 friends who visited Madrid In order to releax, experience the city and watch soccer. The appartment was perfect for our group. The best thing was the central  location rigth next to Plaza Mayor. Highly recommended appartment.

We loved our stay at Casa Arco!  The location was perfect and the apartment was very comfortable.  There was plenty of room for 5 of us.  Everything was as described and there was great communication with the host.  This would be our first choice in accommodations for a return visit.
L'appartement est très agréable et extrêmement bien placé, en plein cœur de Madrid. Je vous recommande les services et l'appartement d'Anouk afin de découvrir cette magnifique ville qu'est Madrid!

Great location right next to Plaza Mayor.  Lobby was being remodeled which will help the place.  The apartment is big and sleeps a lot of people.  Anouk was responsive to communications and speaks very good English.  I would give the place an average to slightly below rating on cleanliness.

Amazing neighborhood. Anouk is a very kind person that really helped us to prepare our trip in advance, caring a lot to make sure our trip would be perfect.
The flat is awesome, the location is purely amazing, a few minutes next to Plaza Mayor - close to any central location in Madrid.

Nuestro grupo de 7 personas pasó tres días en Madrid en mayo del 2016, en la Casa de Arco de Cuchilleros, y tuvo una muy buena experiencia con Anouk. Ella fue muy clara desde antes de partir en cuanto a las condiciones del apartamento y la estadía, nos envió varios archivos con información para ubicar el lugar y llegar desde el aeropuerto, y al llegar nos mostró todo el apartamento y el libro con recomendaciones de lugares para comer. El apartamento es antiguo, algo que ella se encargó de aclarar desde entrada; la ubicación es excelente para quien quiere recorrer Madrid centro, aunque a la noche se oye bastante a la gente afuera de la calle. El wifi no siempre funcionaba bien para los 7, pero servía. En general fue una muy buena experiencia y lo repetiríamos si volviésemos a Madrid. Luego de haber conocido otros hosts, Anouk es recomendable!

Casa Arco Cuhilleros is in the perfect location!  The access to Plaza Mayor and the San Miguel Mercado is excellent.  There is so much nightlife, restaurants, sights, and shopping within every direction.  The apartment looks bigger and better in the photos.  It has a more homey and worn look in person.  The second and "third" bedrooms are small and connected. The Juliette balconies are the perfect place to people watch and enjoy views of Botin.  It's a little bit noisy at night with all of the late night activity and garbage pick up; but, if it's not too hot, you can close the windows and have less noise.  We loved the location and would stay at this place again just because of the centralized location.  It could not have been a better choice.  It is easy to find, close to everything, easy to get a taxi, and you don't really even need to leave the area to get excellent, authentic food or experience the charm of Spanish culture and Madrid.
Amazing location and great apartment, thoroughally enjoyed our stay.
La situacion del piso es buenisima!  Limpieza y comodidad. Se echa en falta otro bañito. Hemos pasado un buen finde hospedados en ese piso! Si se da la ocasion, repetiremos!gracias Anouk!
Had a wonderful time!!
Appart super bien placé respectant la description. Organisation au top. Rien à dire si ce n'est un manque de luminosité. Enjoy
Great place on awesome central location.

L'appartement est vraiment très bien situé, tout se visite à pied.
Bien équipé (même un service à fondue !) et propre.
Il parait plus grand et plus lumineux sur les photos, mais on ne se bouscule pas.
Bonne literie et grande cuisine.
Communication et accueil sympathique et efficace.
Parfaitement adapté à des grandes familles ou une bande d'amis.
Perfect place!! Right in the middle of everything :) Easy check-in. Spacious, clean and very quiet indoors. Thanks!!!!

Nice host
Perfect location
Large apartment
Great location and place. Very good communication and organisation. We booked the place for 10 people and there was plenty of space for everyone!

Un piso céntrico, al lado de la Plaza Mayor. El alojamiento cuenta con todas las comodidades para pasar unos días con amigos, familia, etc... Camas cómodas, una cocina bien equipada y un cuarto de baño con una ducha a la última.
Very comfortable and spacious apartment in a fantastic location. Highly recommended.
Great Location

Nice apartment in central madrid, near Mercado de San Miguel. Two rooms in the apartment, one with a king size bed for couple, another one with four small bed. Love the big bath room. Really enjoy here.

The apartment we liked very much. Everything was clean and well furnished. For 7 people is perhaps one bathroom rather scarce, was for us however no problem. Everything was nice clean and we felt very comfortable in the apartment. The location is perfect and most of it is within walking distance. Our late check in ran out uncomplicated.
Anouk and her friend were very helpful and always easily accessible.
Gladly I recommend this apartment further.

Great apartment - perfect for a large group or family with the lounge and dining room. Perfect location in the heart of the city. Walking distance from bars and restaurants. Would definitely stay there again!
El apartamento está muy bien, en pleno centro de Madrid. Tiene de todo, pero se echa de menos un baño más.
Schitterende locatie, vlakbij plein, metro, uitgaansgelegenheden, bars, resto,... Maar toch rustig om te slapen. In het appartement zelf is al het nodige aanwezig. Aanrader

This is a fantastic option for a group to stay in the centre of Madrid. We were 9 friends coming for a weekend, and this flat is in the perfect location, right next to Plaza Mayor and the San Miguel market. Everyone either had their own bed, or shared a large double bed, so plenty of room. The flat is beautiful and has everything you need. The host's friend Patricia gave us a friendly and helpful welcome and met us on time. They set up a WhatsApp group so that we could message ahead of arrival, and then could ask any questions while we were there. We had a brilliant weekend, and we would definitely go back and stay at Anouk's place again.
Perfectly located, clean and organized. The host is extremely professional and kind. We loved this flat.
Appartement idéalement situé au centre de Madrid, parfait pour un week-end entre amis. Je recommande vivement
Best value and location in Madrid, hands down.
La casa es tal como se puede ver en las fotos y la atencion por Anouk y sus compañeros excelente!
Excellent! Great hosts and amazing location. Highly recommended.

If you are heading to Madrid for a short stay, Anouk's place is perfect. The location was amazing and it was easy to get to different parts of town on foot. Communication was very thorough and prompt. Overall we enjoyed our stay!

Perfecte plek in het centrum. Zeer makkelijk bereikbaar te midden van het uitgaansgebied. Daar hoor je natuurlijk wel wat van 's-nachts maar is logisch als je zo centraal zit. Leuke wijken en bezienswaardigheden op loopafstand. De ruimte was prettig en zeer proper. Duidelijke uitleg en communicatie. Aanrader!
Great location at a great price!  Anouk and Patricia made us feel at home!
Contestaciones y soluciones  rapidas

L'appartement est situé en plein coeur de Madrid, à une centaine de mètres de la Plaza Mayor et du marché San Miguel, deux endroits où il fait bon séjourner.
Les hôtes Patricia et Anouk nous ont transmis toutes les informations essentielles pour que notre expérience madrilène se passe au mieux, et se sont montrées très réactives pour répondre à mes questions!
La ubicación del piso es inmejorable. No podíamos estar en un sitio más céntrico y bien comunicado. Sin duda lo mejor de la estancia.

Great place, very well-located. Perfect for a group or for families travelling around. Spacious enough to spend time home. Very dark with very few windows on the outside (only 2), which enables the place to keep fresh and quiet.
Very good contacts with hosts. Forms are not that long to fill-in though the amount of information looks too heavy...
Strongly recommended.
Todo correcto. Muy buena ubicación.

My family and I really enjoyed our stay here at Anouk and Patricia’s place. Everything is as advertised, in the middle of it all, super close to everything, and really spacious as well. Must admit, only needed it for laying  our heads, but very big and comfortable apartment. Five beds and two large couches! Room to spare plus two great balconies to open up and have a beer or two. All in all, super happy with Anouk and Patricia as well. Very quick responses to any questions we had. Super sweet team member who does the cleaning as well. Highly recommend staying here next time you’re in Madrid!!
Right in the middle of everything!

Fantastic stay! Apartment is in the most amazing location,  and is large,  clean,  and well equipped.  So many restaurants and bars near by, Plaza Mayor is a thirty second walk,  internet cafe and grocery store a minute walk away,  and all the main sights were very close. We'd definitely stay again.  Anouk and Patricia arte very responsive and helpful.  Use the taxi service they recommend for airport transfers... they were fantastic also!
Central position and provided with all the necessary stuff. Good stay.
Excelente lugar y ubicacion

Exelente ubicación, muy limpio, igual como se ve en las fotos.
cerca de restaurants, cafes,tapas bar,plaza mayor,mercado se San Miguel,farmacias,supermercafos,metro.
Definitivamente recomendado lugar para quedarse en Madrid.
Muy Buena comunicación con Patricia y Anouk.
Espero volver pronto!

This place was a DUMP.   It is falling apart and filthy.  The furniture is threadbare and filthy so the sofa is covered with a towel.  The linen is threadbare. The entire place smells musty and foul.  I was given a white table napkin which was filthy to use as a dish towel.  My cutting board had ink scratches all over it,  not one cutting knife that was sharp.  Some of the pans were so old I wouldn't use them.  The beds and pillows are old, saggy and extremely uncomfortable.  The walls are peeling, the floor runners are falling off.  The only redeeming quality was the location, which was very central.  But the building is so old, and the walls  have no insulation, so everytime anyone used the stairs or came in the front door, you could hear this while you were trying to sleeping.   This place could be good if it was completely renovated and re-furnished.
Awesome
Nice and spacious apartment in a fantastic location

Very good location close to many tourist sites. It can be a bit loud especially during weekend, but as long as you are out enjoying the city it should not bother you. The walls are a bit thin and you can hear the neighbors if they are around.
Area has many good and some ok places to eat. I would recommend skipping Sobrino de Botin and going to Casa Lucio (making a reservation is a must) for lunch or dinner as the food is way better.
Alojamiento recomendado. Limpio, espacioso y una ubicación genial. De 10.

Muy bien ubicado.
Colchones confortables, ducha excelente.
Limpio.

Fantastic location in the very centre of the city. Walking distance down to the Palace and Cathedral as well as museums. Excellent choice of restaurants and bars surrounding the apartment but not noisy at night from the street outside.
Wonderful stay if looking for an apartment as a base to explore the city, very hospitable and communicative hosts, fully recommend.

This apartment is superbly situated in the centre of Madrid, a few seconds’ walk from the Plaza Mayore. In spite of its central location it is very quiet and peaceful inside the apartment itself. The place is clean and the beds comfortable, and the bathroom has a good shower.
Cons: two of the three bedrooms are separated by a curtain only, while the main bedroom has a sort of glass-less window into the other two (probably to get some daylight in as the main bedroom does not have any windows to the outside) so the bedrooms are all not at all private and the slightest sniffle can be heard loudly by all. Not great considering I had paid for a three bedroom apartment so my baby could have her own room and therefore not be disturbed by the adults coming in late etc. We all slept badly because the baby woke often!
The apartment also has no mirrors at all except in the bathroom. Some may not care about this, but we were three girls and could have done with not all sharing the bathroom mirror to dress/apply make-up!
Lastly, although street noise does not travel into the apartment, the noise from the front door and hallway/stairs of the building DOES permeate the apartment- not something I would care about except people were coming and going at all hours of the night so I didn’t get the best nights sleep. The noise is loudest from the main bedroom.
Overall I would stay here again but not with a baby - the location was brilliant but lack of privacy and noise in the apartment is inappropriate for anyone needing a good nights sleep.
Great place and couldn’t have asked for a better location.

You cannot find a better LOCATION!  Walking distance to everything! The palace, Prado Art Museum, Puerta del Sol, El Rastro flea market.  Never needed a taxi. Groceries across the street, great cafe around the corner.  Plaza mayor is less than a block away.  Shopping, eating and drinking is right out the front door.  The apartment is large and clean.  The owners communicated very well with me.  Dont hesitate to book.

Anouk's place is wonderful- great location in the center of Madrid, next to one of the oldest restaurants and right above a barber shop. The place has many sleeping areas, all of which have comfortable mattresses and blankets. There are two small balconies that overlook a street leading in to the Plaza which provide a wonderful way to get the senses going. Overall, the entire apartment is wonderful (bathroom, kitchen, sitting area, and dining table!) and Anouk makes the stay the best. Information cards on the doors are also super helpful.
Apartamento con una ubicación increíble. 💯 recomendable para visitar Madrid!

Appartamento in ottima posizione, host puntualie seri.
Siamo stati veramente bene
Nice appartement

Lugar Hermoso Espectacular!!!! Sumamente centrico.  Anouk la host fue muy atenta a todas nuestras necesidades.  La localidad permite tener fácil acceso a las areas mas recoridas de Madrid.  EL único detalle es que para grupos grandes que deseen alojarse,  solo cuenta con un  solo baño en la casa. Por todo lo demás, fue una experiencia muy agradable. Lo recomiendo y regreso pronto.

Excellent location, right in the heart of Madrid. Walking distance to so many things but there was really not much noise from the street, which was great.
If you are a light sleeper, beware - the main bedroom sits against the internal stairwell and you hear everything, people walking up and down the stairs, the neighbour opening and closing their door, conversations as people come and go, the bell and phone ringing for the barber downstairs, so it made sleeping very difficult for me, but my partner had no problem.
It was a little dark too, not a whole
Lot of natural light, but there was a lot of lighting and we weren’t there much during the day, so not too big a deal for us.
Aside from this we could not have asked for a better location, in a big city with beautiful old buildings such as the one we stayed in, compromises must be made!

The area is loud and lively but with all of the windows closed, you can't hear a thing. Garbage men come around 2am and it is super loud! But it was fine. Great location. El Abuelo is on that street- great cafe with a good menu del día.
Walking distance to Palacio Real, Plaza Mayor and more. Highly recommend.
Muy buen lugar.
El apartamento está en muy buena zona, es amplio y cuenta con todo lo básico.

Outstanding place that is very clean and tidy! A/C worked great during our very hot August vacation!! We were able to do our laundry as well! Great location that is directly next to Plaza Mayor and a wonderful restaurant for tortillas around the corner!!! Not to mention being able to eat at the oldest restaurant in the world!!! Thank you!
location is very good.
Die Lage ist fantastisch, halt laut ist aber üblich für Madrid Altstadt. Die Wohnung ist den Jahren entsprechend gut im schuss. Wir hatten eine gute Zeit, wir geben alle eine empfehlenswert 👍

Had a great stay at Anouk's apartment! Was centrally located in a cool neighborhood. Cleans rooms and shower worked great. We rented scooters nearby and took in the whole town (really enjoyed Retiro Park). The flamenco show nearby was wonderful. They helped accommodate our late check-in which was also great since we had a long day of driving from Barcelona. The windows are old-school wooden doors which open up to a patio which overlooks the street, we really enjoyed that (P.S. worlds oldest restaurant 'Botin' and Madrid's oldest barbershop are below the patio). You'll love your stay at  Anouks!
La mejor ubicación de todas...  El apartamentoes tal huso como esta en la fotos.. Cómodo y muy bien situado..  Limpio..
Excellent appartement in the centre of Madrid!
Ubicación inmejorable. El apartamento muy acogedor

The apartment is located in a great location, right next to Plaza Mayor. Everything one might need can be found in Anouk's place, and the rooms are cozy and quite stylish. It was very easy to communicate with the hosts and the check-in process was nice and smooth. I would definitely recommend this place for your stay in Madrid.
Well located apartment but very small compared to what is announced.
This is a beautiful apartment with an incredible location. It works well for a family or large group. Beautiful dining table, Cozy. Grocery store around the corner. I would love to stay here again.
Bien piso

Our experience in this apartment was largely positive. It's in an absolutely spectacular location in Madrid, in an old building with a lot of character, and is a good value. The host gave us exceptionally clear directions on how to get there and was very communicative throughout. And overall we quite enjoyed our stay. But there were a few negatives you should be aware of.
First, the apartment gets very little natural light. In the interior bedroom it's impossible to tell whether it's night or day; the glass brick window looks into the adjoining room, not outside.
Second, the large majority of light bulbs in the track lighting were broken (often with wires sticking out), making the whole place quite dark. The wooden bench had also been broken then repaired shabbily enough so that you wouldn't want to sit on parts of it.
Third, the small street that the apartment looks over can be extremely noisy at night. We live in New York City on quite busy streets, but this level of noise was on a different level. It only occurred on only a few nights, though.
Finally, the person who checked did not give clear instructions. He was also oddly reluctant to giving us more than the bare minimum of towels and toilet paper. And strangely, the people who came to clean the apartment after we left accused us of leaving the door open on our way out (we absolutely closed the door). They didn't claim anything was missing, though, and nothing came of this.
L’appartement est super bien situé, Les hôtes sont sympathiques !!
Great apartment in the center of the City walking distance from the palace and many other attractions! Would definitely stay here again

If you're Just a tourist staying for awhile in Madrid this apartment is perfect, but we were travelling as digital nomads, and for that the apartment is super noisy, because the the location is so good that there are tourists everywhere and it's a little bit dark. But our stay was really good :)
Very nice place. Location on a central spot. Very good communication! Lovely to stay to visit Madrid.
Todo muy cómodo.
Great location for exploring Madrid and was exactly as it'd been described in the post. We enjoyed our stay very much.

Nos quedamos en el apartamento de Anouk en los primero días de octubre de 2022. El apartamento está super bien ubicado muy cerca de Plaza Mayor, el Mercado San Miguel y todos los restaurantes y bares que están alrededor. Todo estuvo super bien, tuvimos una excelente comunicación con Anouk y Patricia quienes son super amables. El apartamento está impecable y tiene todo lo que se necesita. Definitivamente me quedaré de nuevo con Anouk la próxima vez que esté en Madrid.
Apartment very well located and Patricia has been very proactive to inform about sites visits, restaurants,… Very effective communication. I recommend
Vey nice stay- all well arranged and with kind flexibility
Very lovely space. Plenty of room. Great location. Only downsides are the walls are very very thin and there is no parking so if you drive it’s pretty expensive to park near by.

Dos estrellas porque a todos nos costo mucho dormir, las camas son muy incomodas y muchas de ellas inclinadas debido al desnivel del suelo. Las ventanas no se cerraban y entraba frio y mucho ruido. El techo de la cocina necesita reparación y el grifo también. Es un apartamento muy explotado sin mucho atención al detalle.
Sin embargo, todo el equipo fue muy atento y el check in y check out fue muy fácil. La ubicación también muy buena.

Great location, amazing communication !
Very friendly and welcome!
Regresaremos pronto 🇪🇸💃🏽

Have a great time. Communication was excellent. Very friendly and useful advice. The location is great, right in the centre so easy to get around. Plenty of bars and restaurants to be found in the evening. Highly recommended!

Lo recomiendo al 100%. La ubicación es inmejorable, en todo el corazón de Madrid. El piso es súper cómodo. Está muy bien equipado en todos los sentidos. Si volvería me quedaría allí… Gracias por todo !!!
Great place right in the center of Madrid. It was the perfect spot for a long weekend with friends. Anouk and Patricia were super helpful and friendly. Thanks again!

We fortuitously arrived on the feast day of San Isidro, the patron saint of Madrid. Festivities were all around us- a parade passed in front of our door and nonstop music acts performed steps away, in Plaza Mayor.
Walkable location: Calle Mayor, 5 minutes, Puerta del Sol, 10 minutes, Retiro Park, 25.
Many popular bars and cafés are minutes away by foot.
Iconic businesses in the block- world’s oldest restaurant, city’s oldest alpargatería and barbershop.
Muy céntrico y bonito el departamento, en una zona muy bonita del Centro de Madrid de fácil acceso a muchos lugares...

Die Lage des airbnb ist sehr gut gewesen, direkt am Plaza Major. Von dort aus kann man Madrid leicht zu Fuß entdecken. Patricia und Anouk waren sehr freundlich und jeder Zeit erreichbar.

Las anfitrionas han estado pendientes de nosotras. El contacto vía mensajería móvil /chat ha sido útil y dinámico con ellas. Han facilitado información y lugares para comer/visitar.
Las habitaciones son grandes pero algunas son oscuras porque no tienen ventana exterior y por lo tanto menor ventilación (natural).
Las ventanas son de madera y cuesta un pelín cerrarlas.
Por lo demás he estado muy bien en el piso.
Gracias por la atención y predisposición en todo momento.
Hasta la próxima 😉 👋👋

Alojamiento muy bien ubicado, con buen internet para trabajar y excelente comunicación con Anouk. A mejorar la falta de mantenimiento, el colchón muy incómodo, habitación principal sin  ventanas y la mesa y sillas del comedor disfuncionales por pesadas e incómodas.

while the apartment is in a nice location, it ultimately fails in housing more than 6 people. there is only one bathroom and it feels very crammed. there is not much natural sunlight which makes it very cavernous . only one bedroom has air conditioning.
regarding the beds, they are mostly in not great condition with the bunk bed held together by tape. for what we paid for this flat, not much is reinvested into its condition. most of the other beds were camping beds. considering how pricey the property is, this doesn't seem worth it
there was no toilet roll nor any essentials (salt and pepper). the shower was clogged upon arrival.

This was a wonderful historical building located right in the heart of the old city center, close to shops of all kinds, and beautiful walks in every direction. It was spacious for our family of five, with air-conditioning and wifi. We enjoyed our stay very much!
Great place! Perfectly located, spacious and charming. My girlfriend and I worked here remotely for a week and the Wi-Fi was great, etc. Would stay here again.

Anouk was super reactive by message.
The appartment is a must concerning the location.
Great stay.
todo bien, como en la descripción

Es una casa muy recomendable para pasar unos días en Madrid situada en pleno centro.
Lugar magnifico  para pasar unos dias en Madrid.
Excellent location. Host always responded and provided recommendations. I recommend Anouk’s places to stay in Madrid.

Espaço muito agradável e acolhedor, ideal para famílias que queiram visitar os principais monumentos históricos da cidade sem necessidade de utilizar transportes ou a viatura própria, muito perto do centro da cidade, estacionei o carro no parking da Plaza Mayor onde existe a possibilidade de pagar um bilhete mais barato no caso de ser mais de um dia de parking e fica a cinco minutos da casa.
Place is nice option to stay in Mardit in bigger group of people like 6. Localization is great to go out for city center walks

Ubicación perfecta, pleno centro de Madrid. La única pega que puedo poner es que él salón es bastante incómodo ya que la sillas de madera son muy rústicas y solo hay un sofá de 3 plazas para hasta 10 personas que pueden alojarse.
Alojamiento  con excelente ubicación, todo muy cerca.

Mejor ubicación imposible, fácil llegada y el lugar es tal cual se anuncia.
Would recommend this stay to anyone! The best location and beautiful apartment, Anouk was also very helpful and responsive, 10/10!
Estarás en el centro de Madrid, todo a tu alcance.  El apartamento tiene mucho espacio y cuenta con todo lo necesario para disfrutar tus vacaciones.  Linda sala.
Out Stay at Anouk's place was perfect. Easy communication, great location and commodities. Clean and decent apartment and walkable distance from the main areas.

Ich habe ein Wochenende mit 7 Freunden in der Unterkunft verbracht. Sie war perfekt gelegen, sehr zentral und vor allem für 8 Personen ausreichend. Alles war zu fuss erreichen. Ebenso waren dort genügend Einkaufsmöglichkeiten vorhanden.

The apartment is as advertised and pictures are representative of the space. As a party of one i was quite comfortable sleeping in the bedroom and even slept until 11 AM one day (unheard of for me!) I did one full day of work, and there were many desks to choose from. Wi-Fi connection was strong for zoom calls.
The place is more functional than fancy but I’m not one to cook and hang around an apartment… I want to be centrally located and on the go all day. It was perfect for my needs.
The location is the best thing. It is comfortable and the host was very responsive. Looks like the have a good system.
Emplacement idéal, tout est faisable à pieds. L'appartement est très agréable
Great place, loved it.

Great location near the centre, although it can get noisy in the night sometimes due to the location.
Friendly and responsive host.
Location was excellent, close to everything absolutely perfect. Host was very communicative and the flat had everything we needed. Would definitely recommend and stay again.
Great host and great location.
This home really is in the perfect area, near the main town square and this amazing market with gourmet local Spanish food!
Anouk's place was amazing. The location is ideal, as it's only a few steps away from Plaza Mayor. We highly recommend this location if you want to be close to the action.
Todo muy bien!
Ubicacion perfecta, Anouk una gran anfitriona, el apartamento igual que en las fotos muy limpio y bien equipado. Volvería otra vez

Apartamento en situación privilegiada, pero que que necesita mantenimiento.

La ducha invita a no usarla, está para cambiar, no sucia, excepto el moho del techo. Solo aportan una botella de gel. No hay champú, ni secador de pelo, aunque es cierto que no lo describe, pero es algo básico y muy incomodo para un grupo.
No ponen sabanas bajo los nórdicos, si sabana bajera, pero no sabana superior, lo cual aporta muchas dudas a la hora de descansar.

The location is fantastic. You feel right in the heart of the city. But when we stayed it wasn’t very noisy. There were five of us and it felt comfortable. We had everything we needed. Once the booking was close at hand and in progress, Anouk and her team communicated quickly and well.

On ne peut pas être plus proche de la Plaza Major. Emplacement exceptionnel dans Madrid, tout est accessible à pied. Nous étions une famille avec 5 enfants, l'appartement était très adapté à notre grande famille.

estuvo como esperabamos...buena relacion precio-calidad...la ubicacion es inmejorable... en sintesis.. estuvo muy bien todo

i had a great time at alvaro's studio! the place was very nice and clean, exactely as shown on the photos. alvaro was very friendly and made me feel very welcome.
thanks, alvaro, you are a great host!

Álvaro es un anfitrión perfecto y su piso es un pequeño lujo en Madrid a un precio muy bueno. Nos dejó en la habitación una bandeja con fruta fresca. El piso tenía de todo lo necesario, incluyendo café (de calidad), té, leche e infusión. Plancha? Allí había una. Sin olvidar que las toallas son de calidad, había calefacción, el piso era silencioso, Álvaro es la discreción personalizada y el barrio es fenomenal.
La ubicación es magnífica para ir al Centro de Madrid (el Metro está a 5 minutos andando) y está rodeado de restaurantes y locales con encanto. Recomiendo sin ninguna duda el alquiler de este precioso apartamento.

Loved loved loved this place! This was the first time I used this website and I could not be happier with the whole experience. The studio was even bigger and nicer than I had expected and Alvaro was really lovely.  I hope to come back with my partner as soon as I get the chance. Thanks again Alvaro! :-)

The studio's pretty spacious for two pple, and nicely done up. If you're fairly quick with your showers, you'll have great hot water.

Alvaro is an artist, so his place reflect his amazing sense of style and space. While I stayed at his place he has been a wonderful host and kind.  He took the time to show me where to go, what to do. His place is amazing in location and spaciousness I highly recommend staying at his place.

The flat could not be better located! I had a meeting in Granvia and could walk!! I thought that having a room in the city center would be much more expensive.

That was great time in Madrid! Alvaro is the best host, really. He is very caring, attentive and kind. The place...I'm sure it's perfect location -here you can see real Spain.

Alvaro, thank you so much!

The apartment is in a great location, really close to many bars, restaurants, shops and a short walk in any direction to many attractions.

I felt very at home in the apartment, which is filled with natural light and nice little touches like the coffee machine, bottle of wine and great quality stereo.

This is what the AirBnB experience should be like every time!

Very nice and clean appartment, particularly wonderful huge and warm bed. Locateded in an interesting quarter, close to the sight seing points, easy access to public transport. Friendly and helpful host, welcomed me with a fine bottle of red wine. Thank you.

Alvaro is a great host and the place was gorgeous! He even helped me with my oversize suitcase!!! The loft is in a great neighbourhood, full of places where to eat, drink or walk around. I had a great stay and hope to be back soon!

We spend 12 nights in Alvoros place and it was great experience. Apartment is in the middle of everything and it is easy to walk everywhere. Apartment was really nice and Alvaro was a great host.  We would definitely stay Alvoros place again.

Great space - centrally located in Madrid in a very cool neighborhood, 7 mins walk to the metro. Top floor so be prepared to walk up 4 flights of stairs. Alvaro was very sweet, checking in and making recommendations but not overly nosy. The space is very artsy, with interesting decoration and books. It's kinda like staying with your artsy uncle for a weekend.

Alvaro and his wonderful apartment made our holiday in Madrid absolutely fantastic.  The location was central to everything and despite being in the heart of the action, the apartment was very quiet.  The apartment was stylish with all amenities including a hair dryer, a computer and coffee machine added even more luxury.  Alvaro was an absolute delight offering some great local knowledge of his home city which made our visit even more exciting.  I would absolutely recommend this apartment to any visitor in Madrid... don't bother looking any further!

Great flat and great location! Alvaro is a wonderful host and left the fridge full of lovely things - which was a lovely surprise! It was home from home and the area full of interesting places, cosy bars and cafes! Would definitely recommend it!

Alvaro was a super host. The most friendly host on Airbnb so far. He helped us settle in and gave us suggestions on picturesque routes through the city. He had a map prepared for us and lovely music playing in the background. Alvaro was very detailed, he had chilled water, milk, goodies, and wine in the kitchen. The apartment was clean and had a computer with free wifi in our room. I didn't have a universal converter for my devices and laptop and Alvaro quickly bought us one. On our last day, he let us keep our bags in his place so we could visit El Prado and head out to the Airport. He is super friendly person and we would recommend him to our friends.

Alvaro is a friendly and gracious host. His place is bright, spacious and very comfortable. He has an impeccable eye for detail and a tasteful aesthetic - from the well stocked fridge, original artworks on the walls to the big fluffy bath towels that he provided. He gave us many recommendations for local bars, music and galleries that we wouldn´t have found otherwise. He really knows the barrio!
We loved it so much we have already booked his apartment again for our return visit to Madrid.

Alvaro (one of the most important photographers in Spain) was a fantastic host. Very friendly. The apartment itself was great, was and photographic studio full of nice pics and photo books. I would highly recommend staying here, in the midle of cool center in Madrid "Malasaña"

Alvaro's studio is a great place to stay. we stayed for a weekend, and when we entered the apartment was a great emotion: so much light, space and good taste in decoration. the place is best option to visit the city walking or also to have a good time in the neighbourhood, very crowdy and full of nice bar and restaurant.

Alvaro was quite the gentleman.  It is pretty cool to be immersed in his photos.  The neighborhood was in a great location, and the property was immaculate.  The air conditioning worked great.  Clean sheets, clean towels.  I am very grateful to Alvaro for making our stay be pleasant.  Gracias mucho!

My friend Hannah and I LOVED staying in Alvaro's studio!!!!! It was such a treat! It felt soooooo glamorous. Alvaro made us feel so welcome, he greeted us with sangria!! Had biscuits and sweets, a fabulous selection of teas and coffee and fresh lemons. Alvaro was soooooooo helpful at offering advice of authentic and awesome experiences. He supplied us with maps, music, fluffy towels and fantastic books of art and photography. I wish I could go back this weekend and the one after.... Alvaro is THE BEST HOST EVER! And Malasana is AMAZING!!
Alvaro was the perfect host!  The flat was clean, comfortable, and convenient!  Great location and neighborhood.  We couldn't ask for a better airbnb stay.  Thanks very much, Alvaro!

I loved my stay at Alvaro's apartment, the studio is wider than what it looks in the picture and with refreshing lightening, loved its simple yet chic style which is made by this great photographer, Alvaro, who's very welcoming, friendly and generous host in each and every way...
I'd definitely go there again, not to mention the great location of the place...
Thank you Alvaro for everything :)

Manar

Alvaro is a greta host, friendly, helpful and he really knows his city. Tthough I've arrived past midnight, it wasn't a problem at all and he was waiting for me and even walked me to a place nearby after "check in".

The apartment is beautyful, stylish and clean, iMac & printer are working fine, I also loved the fresh fruit provided by Avaro. The bed was spacious and I slept really good. Allthough there is no lift for this rooftop loft, its easy to get up the stairs walking by some great examples of Alvaros fotos. The wet cell is cosy but functional. So, its a great place!

The area is also great, the apartment is located close to Tribunal Metro station in a quiet street but in a vivid area with lots of restaurants, bars and trendy clubs. The main shopping streets are located in walking distance. Just lovely!

The apartment is well located with plenty of bars and shops nearby. Alvaro is a wonderful host who recommended a great seafood restaurant to us. He lives in the building so is readily available if needed. The apartment is comfortable with air conditioning and a coffee machine. Alvaro also provided some essential supplies in the fridge to get us going which was much appreciated. Just note this is a top floor apartment so you will get plenty of exercise climbing the stairs.

Alvaro's apartment is great and we would definitely stay there again!  It has super modern design, an iMac for your use, and it's in a great location!  Alvaro is super friendly and helpful, an overall fantastic host.   The apartment came stocked with fruit, cookies, coffee, maps, brochures, and best of all, Alvaro's original photography and lots of fun photography/fashion books to look at.  The only thing we didn't like about the apartment was the shower, it consists of just a shower head right next to the toilet (i.e., no separation from rest of bathroom, so things tend to get wet), and it has a very small hot water tank (so if there are two people staying there, you need to wait a while between showers for the tank to fill back up).  However, the shower/bathroom is exactly as shown in the pictures, so it's not like we were unpleasantly surprised.  In fact, I think it's a really creative and effective use of a very small space.  Alvaro is really fun to talk to, and he even called to order a taxi for us to take us to the train station on the day of our departure.  He was super easy to communicate with, was always quick to respond to emails, airbnb messages, questions, etc., and he made checking in an absolute breeze.  Knowing that my husband is interested in photography and that we had traveled to Turkey two years ago, he invited us downstairs to his apartment to show us a beautiful photograph that he took in Turkey which is framed and hanging in his apartment.  The only other downside to the apartment is the lack of an elevator, but we certainly needed the exercise of going up and down the stairs after eating all of the wonderful food there is to eat in Spain.  And Alvaro refinished the staircase himself and it is beautiful!  Overall, a great place owned by a great person - highly recommended!!!!

Alvaro is an amazing Host. He greeted us upon our arrival even though we were late and he was having a dinner party. The studio itself is gorgeous, just as it is in his pictures. The journey up to the fourth floor without a lift isn't bad at all. We found it to be great exercise. Alvaro leaves all sorts of things in the fridge and pantry for you to enjoy.The location itself is perfect. Close to Madrid's Gran Via, which has everything you could ask for. Madrid is an amazing city and the location of Alvaro's studio makes it easy and great to enjoy.
un lugar central, agradable y animado de Madrid, un apartamento muy design y tranquilo, lo recomiendo !

We loved Madrid - and to a great extent Alvaro's loft made our stay a great city experience. Alvaro is a very caring and lovely person. When we arrived, he did not only open the door but also gave us some very cool insider infos. This way we found a perfect place for having a huge and tasty seafood plate! :)

We also really liked the way he has decorated the appartment - very stylish, high quality and still cosy.

We look forward to our next stay in Madrid - at Alvaro's place.

Alvaro is the best host you can dream of! He was very nice and very detail-oriented to make our stay in Madrid a great experience. On the first day he kindly advised us the best spots of Madrid and provided us city maps.
The flat is exactly as depicted by the pictures, very clean and spacious.
The other great advantage is its central location making all the sightseeing places really easy to access. I higlhy recommend Alvaro's flat to discover this beautiful city!

Sebastien

Ich habe im Oktober 2012 für 2 1/2 Wochen einen Aufenthalt in dem Studio von Alvaro verbracht.
Alvaro ist ein sehr angenehmer Gastgeber. Er war bei meiner Ankunft sehr freundlich und hat sich viel Zeit genommen mir Tips und gute Ausgehmöglichkeiten zu zeigen, auch ansonsten war er sehr aufmerksam und gab mir das Gefühl eher ein guter Freund zu sein als ein Mieter. Die Wohnung selber ist sehr angenehm, hell und ruhig. Das Bett komfortabel und ansonsten war alles was man braucht vorhanden.
