Die Wohngegend ist ideal um die Stadt zu erkunden. Die Wohnung ist leicht mit der Metro zu erreichen und die Verbindung zum Flughafen sehr gut.
Die vielen kleinen Geschäfte, Kneipen, Restaurants und belebten Plätze in unmittelbarer Nähe zogen mich, vor allem Abends, immer wieder auf die Strasse.
Ich habe eine sehr schöne Erinnerung an meienen Aufenthalt und es hat mich sehr gefreut Alvaro kennengelernt zu haben. Ohne zu zögern kann ich sein Studio weiterempfehlen.
Alvaro's appartment is perfectly located, very bright and very nice. Alvaro was a perfect host providing great insights and tips about the neighborhood would definetively reccomend !!

Alvaro's apartment was perfect for our short stay in Madrid, and he was a fantastic host. He greeted us and helped with our bags during the climb (the stairs aren't so bad, I promise!) He provided us with a map, and suggestions for our stay. Communication was consistent. The location is perfect - just 5 minutes away from the Gran Via (close to two metro stations). The apartment was modern but cozy, and I would definitely recommend it! Thank you for a fantastic stay, Alvaro.
perfecta ubicación y muy acogedor estudio. Gracias, Álvaro!

Alvaro was an amazing and gracious host. He offered suggestions of restaurants and museums in his charming and lively neighborhood and throughout Madrid. He was helpful and we couldn't have asked for a better place or experience. Muchas gracias and happy 2013.

When staying in Madrid there's only one address which you need to know, Alvaro's! He's the nicest most considerate man you could hope to meet and his apartment is brilliant. Perfectly located for experiencing the real Madrid with great restaurants located close by and within easy walking distance of the centre of Madrid. We could not have expected or asked for a better experience whilst there thanks to Alvaro's warm hospitality and excellently equipped/located apartment. Thanks Alvaro it was a true pleasure meeting you and seeing in the New Year together.
Muchas gracias & feliz 2013!

Thorne & Carlos

Alvaro's apartment is in an excellent location surrounded by great bars, cafes, and restaurants. It is also really easy to walk to all the tourist sites and Madrid landmarks from the flat so it's a perfect base for exploring. Alvaro is a very kind host, making sure that we were settled upon arrival (providing us with wine and snacks!) and informing us of all the local exhibitions/galleries.

I wouldn't hesitate to recommend this apartment: it was bright, spotlessly clean, warm, and well-located. The only possible downside is the wet-room which is very small and not overly luxurious, but if (like us) you are in Madrid to have fun at bars and go sightseeing, this small inconvenience wont' be a problem.

5 stars!

Álvaro's flat is spectacular. It's in the heart of creative Malasaña - lots of great shops, cafés, restaurants. Álvaro is extremely welcoming with a few little surprises ;) and can give you the scoop on whatever cultural events are going on in Madrid. Next time I am in Madrid, I'll be returning.

I will stay with Alvaro anytime I'm in Madrid.  He is a born host and is such a joy to be around.  The place is perfect for a get away and well provisioned for the traveller.  You should be capable of climbing 5 flights of stairs, and the only reason I bring it up is I know many of my fellow Americans aren't in the best shape, so better safe than sorry, right?  Finally, the location can't be better to see Madrid.

I cannot say enough about this wonderful host, Alvaro.  Unfortunately for me, I arrived with the flu and felt horrible upon arrival to Madrid.  Alvaro was so sympathetic, helpful, and sweet - even making me chicken soup!  I'm not sure how I would have survived this last part of my vacation without him.  The apartment is well appointed, in a great neighborhood, and exactly as advertised.  There are tons of snacks and complimentary drinks in the fridge and the place is very comfortable and bright.  I look forward to staying here again when I am well.  Don't hesitate to stay at this fab loft!  Thanks.
A great place to stay and the best area of Madrid to spend the time. Alvaro is the perfect host! Will come back!

We spontaneously decided to visit Madrid for a week and stayed at Alvaros apartment and we must say that this was the best decision we could have made. The apartment was really nice and clean and provided us with everything we needed for our stay in Madrid. The apartment is perfectly located if you want to walk through Madrid and do sightseeing – the subway station as well as great places to eat and go shopping are only about max. 5 minutes away. We almost did not use the subway and walked every day to all interesting places we wanted to see in Madrid. There are also a lot of great Tapas Bars, breakfast places and restaurants nearby the apartment so that always had a perfect start into the day and also had a variety of places to go for dinner. Alvaro himself was a very pleasant and courteous host. When we arrived (Sunday afternoon) he even took the time to give us tips were we should go for dinner (best Tapas ever and fish dishes ever) and explained which would be the most interesting sights to visit in Madrid so that on the next day we directly knew how to begin with our sightseeing tour. We can highly recommend Alvaros apartment for your visit in Madrid – perfect location, perfect apartment and great host. Next time we will be visiting in Madrid we will definitely try to stay here again ;) Thank you!!
All was perfect, great district, calm, the flat is clean and Alvaro is the perfect host !

Alvaro's lovely flat is the perfect place to stay if you want a pure experience of Madrid.  I cannot say how lucky we were to meet Alvaro upon check-in. He was filled with suggestions including  non-touristy local spots, current exhibitions, restaurants, and places worth seeing.  Malasaña is the perfect neighborhood to get lost -you'll find great bars, cafés, restaurants and cool shops, all within walking distance of the flat! I highly recommend staying at Alvaro's beautiful loft! He is a wonderful host - a very warm, interesting and open person who will welcome you as if you're an old friend coming to visit.  Thank you Alvaro! Gracias por todo!

This flat is ideally situated, in the heart of a lively part of Madrid. Nevertheless, the flat is very quiet!
Enjoy

Alvaro is a true host in every sense. He gave us a great insight into Madrid, and provided us with such detailed tips for Madrid we didn't even need a guide book. His place is brilliantly located, and walking distance to every where you would most likely visit. Plus there are some great places to eat right outside. Plus the apartment is well catered for, including some snacks per gratis, and not to mention features some great photography! Highly recommended!
The apartment of Alvaro was exactly as described, very nicely decorated, bright and quiet. The reception was very hospitable, Alvaro gave us lots of tips. We can recommend the apartment!

Excellent address to stay in Madrid. Very good location near Gran Via,  the shopping area and Chueca.  Alvaro is a great host, very welcoming and helpful. His flat is just like on the picture, design, comfortable and convenient. Great place !

Alvaro was an exceptional host as already described by others. He answered my last minute request immediately and couldn't have been more flexible and accommodating. He has thought of every single detail a guest might need,; delicious coffee and snacks, even shower caps! And a printer to print out train tickets or boarding passed is invaluable. I was SO impressed whe  it rained an umbrella magically appeared at my door! I have worked in tourism for many years, Alvaro is one of the most exceptional hosts I have come across. The flat is super quiet, spotlessly clean, comfortable and stylish, the bed is very comfortable. I very much liked the wet room! The area is fabulous, lovely boutiques and cafes and felt extremely safe as a woman walking back late at night by myself. Alvaro is extremely interesting to talk to and a most impressive photographer, even an original portrait of Messi pn the wall! Mil gracias Alvaro!

Like many before me, I was THRILLED to stay in Alvaro's gorgeous apartment. Not only was the place even better than it looks in the pictures (which is saying something), but what made it so special was having Alvaro as a host. He took the time to tell me all about Madrid and even came along with me to the train station when I had to leave. He's charming, generous, and makes you feel secure in a few place.

Recommend X 1000!

Great place, great location. We were fairly new to Airbnb and Alvaro was great - gave us detailed instructions on getting to the place, and spent the time to give us some great suggestions for restaurants, bars and things to check out we would never of found otherwise. A great experience.

Alvaro was genuinely a lovely host who went out of his way to make sure we were comfortable and happy at all times. The Studio was perfectly positioned in the middle of all the action. Malasana is the place to be in Madrid! The best bars are within 50 meters down the road towards Gran Via - to name a couple- La Mucca, Kikekeller (and many more in that area). The Studio is private. bright, very clean and it was great to have a fridge well stocked provided by Alvaro which was a nice touch. The Mac and printer was a massive help and allowed us to research/book events and sights in Madrid.
We highly recommend to book Alvaro's apartment if you wish to stay in the beating heart of Madrid.

I can only echo every other review - superb host, and lovely, clean and modern apartment right where you want to be. Alvaro was very helpful indeed, spending time with me peering over a map to give me suggestions for what i was interested in seeing and doing. Left me an umbrella when it looked like rain, and even helped me out by ordering me a taxi! All above and beyond the call of duty. Excellent host.

Hello All,

My wife and I just spent a week in Madrid at Alvaro's flat. Great location (great restauarants and shops all within a few minutes walk). Great flat. Great host. Alvaro even went out of his way to sit with us and suggest places to go and restaurants and pubs/clubs to eat and drink at. Really a great guy and we look forward to bumping into him again. Highly recommended!

Alvaro, is a great host and his studio is a great place to stay in a really cool and convenient part of Madrid with so much night life just a few steps away. Alvaro has given a lot of thought to what guests might want/need, full fridge, adaptors, printer and Apple Mac and fab art books too.
Communication with Alvaro was easy and fast. The apartment is very quiet, full of light and spacious.... exactly as you can see in the pictures. Thank you very much for your hospitality!

J'ai passé un très bon weekend dans l'appartement d'Alvaro
Alvaro est un hôte très accueillant et sympathique. Son appartement est très bien situé, dans le quartier de malasana. L'appartement est très sympa : propre, bien équipé et très bien décoré :)
Je compte bien réserver à nouveau cet appartement lors de mes prochaines venues à Madrid.
L'appartement est très bien placé.Alvaro est un hôte très sympathique .

Great location, very nice large studio, and the friendliest host possible. Alvaro made the check in and check out so simple, accommodating our late arrival. And gave us loads of ideas on what to do with our week end in Madrid. So welcoming! Would love to go back!
NB : the wet open / walk-in shower might not be for everyone, but is great fun!

The place was great!  Very central to everywhere I wanted to go.  Alvaro was also an amazing host.  He had food in the fridge for me and sat down and went through a map highlighting some key places to eat.  only negative is that the bathroom is a wetbathroom.  everything gets wet. It's a only a small obstalcle in and otherwise great pleace.

Álvaro es un perfecto anfitrion, me atendió muy amablemente. El apartamento es precioso y totalmente lleno de detalles, para tener una agradabilisima estancia. Su situacion es inmejorable. Totalmente recomendo. Mil gracias por todo Álvaro.

I had another fantastic stay at Alvaro's place in Madrid!

The studio is in an amazing location. It is bang in the middle of town, a the cutest tiny street surrounded by bars, restaurants, shops,coffee shops, you name it. Surprisingly though, once you are inside it is dead quiet so we slept great.

The studio is super bright, really really spacious, with lots of light and beautiful modern decor. What really made me feel like home was how when we arrived I had a proper coffee machine, milk in the fridge and even a bottle of cava... all for free.

Alvaro, lives on the apartment just bellow, so communication could have not been faster. Alvaro was warm and helpful yet relaxed in the way he dealt with us, a real joy. He was key in helping us discover some amazing little places we would have never found ourselves.

All in all, a wonderful stay and already planning another visit. Thank you Alvaro!

i had a wonderful stay in madrid. what a beautiful and lively city!
alvaro is the perfect host and his place was incredibly charming, with lots of space and awesome details to discover. whenever i had a question, alvaro was very helpful. i am already thinking about coming back to his place. highly recomendable!
thank you so much, alvaro!
très bon quartier, accueil très sympa !!!

Alvaro is very friendly and helpful, he lives in the same building, we arrived late and he was there waiting for us without charging any extra cost. He gave us plenty of tips, what to visit in the city, art exhibitions, places to have a drink...etc
The studio itself is atypical, very well located, easy to find and quiet, even though it is situated in a very animated area.

I am beyond thankful for my good luck in finding Alvaro and this gorgeous apartment. He has the eyes of an artist. This is evidenced in the quality and placement of every piece of furniture and every item set into this delightful, cheery, luminous loft. It is a happy place, a place you want to come home to, because of the passion and care taken by the owner and because the space radiates the kindness and good-spirited personality of the owner.
I had four incredibly quiet nights' sleep despite the busy location in the heart of the vibrant old town neighborhood, Malasana. The apartment is close to sights, metros, nightlife, shops, groceries, everything.
Traveling as a single woman, I was safe walking around the neighborhood at night and to the apartment. The refrigerator was stocked high with wonderful treats.
Upon arrival, Alvaro assisted me in understanding the sights, locations and what not to miss. He knows and loves his great city, Madrid; he has a great sense of humor, and is a very good person. I won't forget Alvaro and this wonderful space he has created.
Remember - no lift but generous stairs, a gorgeously fitted, interesting wet bath, and so many extras.

The studio is a great size; it is furnished with amazing and interesting things, full of guide books and information, a Mac and has a brilliantly fun wet room with shower, sink and toilet. The apartment is located in Malasana, a really cool district within walking distance of everywhere you’d want to see in Madrid. Really easy to find, really easy to stumble back to but also somewhere you feel at home the second you walk in. The fridge was full and the bottle of Cava was a lovely touch, saved us stocking up at the local supermarket for snacks.

And then there’s Alvaro; possibly the coolest and nicest host you could ever wish to meet. Not only has he photographed some of the biggest people on the planet (including Lionel Messi!), he was a fountain of knowledge and I genuinely don’t think we’d have had 1/10th as good a time in Madrid if it wasn’t for him. Upon arrival we sat down and he let us in on the secret places of the city, the nooks and crannies, the lost bars and best restaurants, and how to get to them. We’d have been lost without his advice, and we’d have wasted hours on the Metro instead of walking everywhere like he suggested. It turns out Alvaro is one of Madrid’s biggest assets in himself, and we can’t wait to come back and stay again. Much love!

Alvaro was the perfect host! upon arrival me and my partner were met by him in the flat wear he spent a good amount of time answering our questions about the city and giving us superb recommendations to eat, drink, and sight see. Aswel as this we were always able to contact Alvaro with a quick and helpful responses about Madrid! it was the perfect welcome to madrid. the apartment was great to stay in; very clean, great locations, good amenities, and a stocked refrigerator. the apartment was great to come back to at the end of the day as well as comfortable to relax in during a siesta. after traveling around Madrid i found the location of this apartment to be in my favourite area/neighbourhood. i highly recommend a stay here!! Would love to return.

The studio is very centrally located, the design of the flat is really great and many nice add-ons are available (breakfeast, good sound system, ...)

On top of it, Alvaro was very helpful and provided us with excellent advice on museums, restaurant & bars, as well as practical information about transportation.

It made our first time in Madrid fantastic!
Alvaro was a great host super kind !!I had a wonderfull wekend !the flat it s really central and super clean ;)

The Apartment: This loft is a delight. It is a spacious bright studio, nice decorated and with amazing photos. It is a place where you really feel "at home”! If you are into fashion or photography then… well you got the right books on the bookshelf to check out, if you like music, then you can plug in your mp3 and listen to a good quality of sound. The fridge is actually a mini-supermarket full of products offered by the generous owner.

The Location: Because it is all about the location, the location is GREAT! The apartment is situated at Malasana area and walking distance (5-8 minutes) from Chueca square, where everything happens during the day and night! Shopping, bars, restaurants, everything. The most important is that although the area is animated and noisy you DON’T get that at home because the apartment looks at the courtyard so you can sleep in absolute silence!!!

The Owner: Alvaro is an “Experience”; one of the coolest guys I ever met and synonym of: helpfulness, coolness, positive energy, helpful, gentle and perfect host.

Muchas gracias Alvaro!!!

Alvaro's studio is a 5 star airBNB! If you're thinking of staying here, just do it! You won't regret it. Communicating with him was very easy and quick. Alvaro greeted us when we arrived and spent an hour going through a map of madrid showing us where the tourist attractions are and his favorite spots. So helpful for our trip! He made us feel very welcomed and  safe. The studio is very clean and beautifully decorated. The refrigerator is stocked with drinks, snacks and fruits. Very nice neighborhood with different places to eat and close to shops. What more can u ask for? Sure, there are a few flights of stairs but after eating tapas all day a little cardio won't hurt ;) I would most definitely stay here again! Thank you Alvaro!

What a great place to stay. Alvaro is lovely, helpful, funny with great recommendations! The apartment is perfect, Malasaña is a beautiful neighbourhood, can't imagine staying anywhere better in Madrid!

Alvaro was a fantastic host! He was kind enough to stay up and tell us where to go in Madrid, despite us turning up late at night. His apartment was absolutely gorgeous and I would stay here again for future trips!

I had a wonderful time at Alvaros place. I spend more than a week in the studio and felt immediatly at home. The neighborhood is one of the best in Madrid at present, very hip and trendy. But as soon as you are in the studio, it is like a little island. It is quiet, bright and clean. And I have never had such a relaxed landlord - he explained me everything on arrival and gave me great recommendation for sightseeing or going out.

If I come back to Madrid, I would definitely try to stay there again. :-)

Wow! My first Airbnb experience, and Alvaro raised the bar for all next ones to come. He was so helpfull already in the booking process and even more when I got to Madrid. The apartment had many personal touches, like books, pictures, music and don't forget a filled fridge with great things. It was spacious, bright and very quiet in the best neighborhood in Madrid if you don't just want to be a tourist ;-) I will definitely be back here again and recommend it to all my friends.

First Airbnb experience and it was awesome. Alvaro is the perfect host and the apartment itself is great. The location in Malasana could not be better or trendier with the great restaurants, bars and shops in walking distance. Had a couple of issues such as wifi down for a few hours on the first day and noise from renovations next door which Alvaro was very apologetic for and was not his fault at all. Alvaro was very flexible with my last minute booking, extended night and late check out. The stocked fridge and coffee machine was a very nice and useful amenity too. Highly recommended and I'll definitely be back. I hope all my Airbnb experiences are like this one!

Wow, where do I start? Alvaro is a top guy, he provided me with some great tips on where to eat and places to see in the Malasaña area. He was very helpful and always available. The flat is amazing, I totally fell in love with it and wouldn't hesitate to use the flat next time I am in Madrid. In terms of location it is very hard to imagine a flat better situated in Madrid.  Malasaña is a great area of Madrid and within walking distance to all other cool and trendy 'barrios'. If you are not sure about where to stay then you cant go wrong choosing Alvaro's place. Thanks man...
Amazing again! If I wasn't moving to Madrid I would stay at Alvaro's every visit!

This is the second time I have stayed in Alvaro's wonderful apartment in Madrid.  As it was when first I visited, the apartment was immaculate, wonderfully decorated, and Alvaro was charming.  The neighborhood is a great jumping off point for Madrid: close to all of the main sights, including the Biblioteca Nacional where I was working.  I loved the little restaurants nearby, the artsy locals, ample coffeeshops, and many stores selling too-toos.  I completely recommend!
Great host, apartment, and location!

Me and my partner stayed at Alvaro's apartment for five nights and we really enjoyed it. Alvaro was very easy to communicate with and he was very helpful. Even though our plane was delayed, and we arrived late at night, he still took his time to welcome us and give us a lot of tips about what to do in Madrid. The apartment is located in what is probably the most interesting area in Madrid, with lots of cosy bars and restaurants and close to all the main attractions. We really recommend staying at Alvaro's place!
Awesome. Third time I stayed at this hip apartment. Love it all - esp the neighborhood. Check our biciletta cafe.

First time to Madrid & now it's my favourite European city! Partly that's bec of how friendly I found th people, without exception; & partly bec Alvaro is a great host (there were too many examples of why he's a great host to list here, but they range from th local info he imparts, his friendliness &  overall helpfulness - for example, he posted me a cap I had left at th apartment !). His apartment in Malasana is in a FANTASTIC location if you wanna experience a cool, non-touristy & centrally located Madrid neighbourhood. You won't need public transport as you can walk to all th sights & yet come home to a 'real' neighbourhood that  has a v cool, yet not try-hard, friendly vibe with everything u need in th way of supplies & entertainment. Many thanks Alvaro for making my last minute visit so easy.

Lavaro was the perfect host. His apt. is located in a great area with lots to do all within walking distance. The apt. was very clean and spacious and we felt very welcome. Alvaro also met with us and gave us some great suggestions on where to get dinner and drinks. I would def. recommend his apt. and would love to stay there again on another trip to Madrid. Thanks again Alvaro!!

Alvaro is very friendly and accommodating. He is a fantastic host from giving a lot of local info to the stuff he leaves in the fridge for you to providing shower caps for his rain shower.
The room is very nice, clean, pleasant and a lot bigger than it looks in the photos. It's also extremely quiet. Place pretty much like photos including the "wet room" (bathroom).
The apartment is also in a Great hood with bars, eateries, and little mini marts close by. All walkable to highlights. Would stay here again for sure.

My girlfriend and I had a wonderful week in Madrid.Alvaro is a perfect host,a really nice guy and a great photographer.His apartment is very stylish and clean,exactly as in the pictures.Perfectly situated in Madrids hippest neighbourhood Malasana.He gave us lots of tips where to eat and even arranged to put us on the guestlist of 2 clubs.
Dear Alvaro:muchas gracias y hasta la proxima!!!!

Alvaro is a great host. He tailored his recommendations for things I should do in Madrid based on the things I like to do. The apartment itself was nice and quiet but in an amazing neighbourhood! Great vintage shops and fab cafés and bars. I was a female travelling alone but felt really safe the whole time.

A stocked fridge and lots of cool photography books to look through make the apartment a nice place to relax in.

Alvero was an extremely charming and helpful host who took a lot of trouble in making sure I was well settled and knew useful local information
The apartment was very comfortable and stylish
I was extremely happy there and didn't want to leave !
¡Alvaro es una persona encantadora! El apartamento muy bien situado, en perfecto estado y decorado con gusto.

Alvaro is a very nice guy,he told us so many useful informations,we visited some place he introduced us,it's amazing.and restaurants is nice too.his apartment is convenient to visit all scenic spots.and the metro is very near.Alvaro is so nice,allow we stay until 6:pm.we Will live here again if we come back.

El apartamento es una obra de arte en el corazón de Madrid, lleno de fotografías preciosas hechas por el dueño, muebles modernos y de diseño, libros interesantes, muy limpio y cómodo.
Es el perfecto lugar para una pareja que busca estar bien ubicados, en un lugar bello y con un ambiente romántico y de aire jóven.
Alvaro made us feel very welcome and we do recommend the neighbourhood. probably one of the nicest quarters in Madrid and very cenral.

I stayed in Álvaro's Malasaña studio with my sister for four nights in October. The location of the apartment is great! All the bars, cafes and restaurants in Malasaña and Chueca are right at your doorstep and any sights are well within walking distance.

The apartment itself was a good size for the two of us and it was light, airy and quiet. The bathroom is small and does get wet when you take a shower, but Álvaro has provided a squeegee for that amongst other necessities. Álvaro had also stocked the fridge with some food and drinks which was a nice gesture.

Álvaro is a very friendly and helpful guy who was more than happy to give us recommendations and made us feel very welcome. I like Airbnb because there's a chance you get meet people like him - thanks Álvaro!

Alvaro was the perfect host. He was very friendly, he gave us a lot of advices and tips to visit Madrid. The appartment is super clean and very well located in the heart of Malasaña. It was perfect. I strongly recommend staying there.
Alvaro es un tipo encantador, en la nevera del estudio encontré de todo para endulzar mi estancia, el edificio es antiguo pero el estudio totalmente reformado, muy bien situado cerca de todo.

We stayed at Alvaro's studio for four nights in Nov. 2014.
Although small the feeling at this place is cozy and very home like
The location is superb. Situated in the heart of Malsana neighborhood
The hippest and coolest place for the young and young at heart.
The only reservation is the fourth floor with no elevator but with all the wine and food tasting it helps you stay in shape for the next day ;)
Alvaro was the perfect host that took his time to give us great pointers and recommendations.
We loved this place. Walked everywhere in the city never needed the metro.
So if you like being in the heart of things. And where all the action is. This is the place
M y N

Fantastico! I cannot recommend enough this lovely studio. The main reason is the gracious host Alvaro who makes you feel so welcome, offers all the advice you need and is always on hand if something comes up. The studio itself is perfectly located - close to bars, restaurants, central Madrid attractions, the metro - yet located on a quiet street so the studio is very peaceful with no noise at night.

I knew I would have a wonderful time in Madrid - Alvaro and the chance to stay in the lovely studio made the trip even better. I will be back!

El anuncio se ciñe al 100% a la casa.
Es tal cual la describe Álvaro; limpia, céntrica y llena de luz.
Álvaro además nos dio todas las facilidades del mundo con la hora de llegada y salida; Además de ser muy simpático.

Alvaro is a perfect host. I was missing nothing at all. The room is beautiful, clean and quiet in the middle of a great and lively neighbourhoud of Madrid. I will surely come back to Alvaros Apartment. Thanks a lot.
Alvaro has been a great host ! The appartment is great ! Clean and there s a lot of light! Alvaro welcomed us with great tips of madrid ! We ll come back again for sure ( if he want s us :) ) !

Host? What host? More like buddies imstead!!!!
Alvaro was simply a dream, offering all the help we needed when we did not speak any Spanish!
He was the perfect guy any foreigners could turn to in Madrid, recommending eateries, shops, directions, clubs and helping to get tickets to Football games!
Oh....and the apartment? Fully furbished with a stocked fridge, top class deco and we spent the most time in his place among the 6 cities we visited in this trip.
HIGHLY RECOMMENDED!!!!

We had a lovely time in Madrid.
The location is superb, situated in the heart of Malasana.
Close to bars, restaurants, central Madrid attractions and the metro.
But also located in a quiet street so there is no noise at night.
The apartment is very light and nicely decorated and makes you feel at home.
But that is also thanks to Alvaro, who is a wonderful host!
So friendly and helpful, with lots of useful information and tips.
He even went to the farmacia with us when I was ill.
Thank you very much Alvaro!

La casa di Alvaro è' in un bellissimo quartiere molto comoda per qualsiasi spostamento, la metropolitana è' vicina ma anche a piedi puoi passeggiare ed arrivare ovunque... Alvaro è' un host premuroso, ci ha fatto trovare il frigorifero pieno di ogni cosa è una bottiglia di vino di benvenuto...la sua casa e' ben arredata è molto carina, anche se il bagno è' un po' piccino ma è' sicuramente un esigenza per chi come me ci passa molto tempo la mattina prima di uscire...sono stata bene.
I had an absolutely lovely stay in Alvaro's studio..it's even better than the pictures - and Alvaro is a great person, very interesting, sociable, helpful, and kind. I had a great time.
Utterly adorable apartment loft ! Super comfy clean and amazing location - alvaro is charming and has exquisite taste - really the coolest little street in deeply fab Area

A studio in a very nice location, bright and spacious. A very friendly host filled the fridge with pastries, fruits and soft drinks. There is a coffee machine and a microwave, but no stove. However there are lots of nice restaurants to discover in the Chueca area.
The heating was very powerful, which is very important as it gets very cold in Madrid at times.
The bathroom is tiny, towels, shampoo, shower gel and tooth paste are provided.
4th floor with no lift, can be a bit tricky with a large luggage, however Alvaro helped me with it.
The location is just great, a little bohemian area, but walking distance to many other central areas of Madrid, just 10-15 minutes walking to Gran Via, Sol, Salamanca, Colon.
I really enjoyed the experience staying at Alvaro's place. Amazing location and you have everything available

Alvaro was the perfect host. The flat was immaculate and super stylish. It was fantastic to be welcomed by a bottle of rioja and a fully stocked fridge. And Alvaro was really helpful with great suggestions for where to get dinner, drinks, hang out, etc. If ever we're back in Madrid, we're going back to Alvaro's.

El estudio de Alvaro es divino! Descansé muy bien en él. Tiene todo lo que necesitas, además él lo llena de mimos para dejarte aún más cómodo :)
Perfectamente ubicado, a poquísimos minutos del metro, de la Gran Via, Fuencarral, pero en una calle tranquila y silenciosa. Además Malasaña es un excelente barrio para divertirse!
Sin duda alguna recomiendo este piso :)
Álvaro was very nice and helpful. The apartment is in a great location.

Álvaro was an amazing host and both the apartment and location were ideal for my stay in Madrid. Upon my arrival Álvaro provided me with excellent recommendations for cafes and restaurants in Malasaña - many of which I sampled, as well as advice for navigating the city. Over all a great trip, great apartment, great city. Highly recommended , hope to come back for another visit!

We absolutely loved staying in Alvaro's flat. The location is what makes this flat a winner – all major attractions (Prado, Royal Palace & Plaza Major) are in easy walking distance and the Malasana area is buzzing with loads of fantastic tapas bars and restaurants at your doorstep.
The flat has everything you could possibly need during your stay including a fully stocked fridge, toiletries, snacks and even dressing gowns. The bed was very comfortable and the flat was quiet & peaceful. Alvaro was extremely kind, helpful & accommodating and we can’t fault our stay – do yourself a favour and stay here!

Had it not been for this wonderful apartment and this wonderful host (Alvaro), my first experience in Madrid, and my first Airbnb experience, would not have been nearly as memorable. I came to Madrid for work alone and extended my trip for a long weekend to see the sights and get a feel for the culture. The second I arrived to the apartment in the center of Madrid's artsy, fun and centrally located neighborhood Malasan'a, Alvaro very kindly sat down and told me anything I wanted to know about the city and gave me his recommendations. His hospitality is only matched by his impeccable taste, which is seen through the details in the apartment, the stocked mini-fridge, and the bottle of wine which all come included with the apartment.

The apartment is walking distance to the major attractions in Madrid (Prado, Puerta del Sol, Reina Sofía Museum, etc.). There are boutiques, cafes, restaurants very close to the apartment which are not tourists traps. These are places where locals go for a day/night out. Despite the proximity to vibrant life, the apartment is tucked away on a side street and is quiet, which was important for the light sleeper in me.

It is difficult to overstate the role that Alvaro played in my first experience in Madrid. Throughout the trip I found myself thinking "Thank God I didn't stay at a hotel!" He lives just downstairs in a large apartment and was even available by text throughout my trip if I had any questions or even wanted to talk more over coffee, etc. By the end of the trip I felt like I found a friend.

Excellent trip!
Great studio apartment, just as shown!  Great location, very central in old Madrid, and Alvaro is especially welcoming.  I will stay again!

Alvaro was an absolutely amazing host! When I arrived he took plenty of time to share with me everything about the apartment as well as his recommendations in the neighborhood and was a lifesaver when my friend accidentally took the wrong keys. The apartment is great. Lots of light and very open and modern. The only two things that were a little challenging at times were the fact that it's on the top of a five-floor walk up and there's no separation between the shower and the rest of the bathroom. But the positives more than made up for it! Alvaro left the apartment fully stocked with everything that you could need...food, wine, toothpaste, etc. The neighborhood is super-charming as well and you can walk pretty much everywhere. I'd definitely recommend.

From the moment we booked online Alvaro was nothing but helpful.  Check in was smooth and Alvaro took lots of time to give recommendations and mark a map for us.  He is also very interesting to chat with.  The apartment wins the award for most stylish airbnb we have stayed in.  It has all the amenities you would ever need and then some.  He left us with fruit, water, coffee, tea, cookies, snacks, wine and milk.  The apartment is ideally located in a very nice neighborhood with great restaurants and bars. It is very safe and you will see tons of people out well into the late hours.  You are also close proximity to all tourist attractions.  The location of the apartment, while in a lively neighborhood, is very peaceful and quiet.  Alvaro even arranged for a taxi to take us to the airport.  I can't imagine staying anywhere else in Madrid but here!

We had a great stay at Alvaro's studio. A very warm & welcoming host, the fridge was stocked full of goodies and Álvaro took the the time to explain the apartment and the surrounding area when we first arrived.
The location is very convenient, we walked everywhere and the metro is within 10minutes walk. Quite a few nice places to eat around the apartment also. Highly recommend, thank you for making our stay in Madrid a memorable one!

Estudio magnifico, en un barrio madrileño con mucho encanto, Álvaro ha sido de lo más cercano, brindandote muchas facilidades , tanto a la hora de entrada y salida del aprtamento, como para cualquier sugerencia o recomendación sobre que visitar en la zona.
Cuida cada detalle al milímetro, toallas limpias, productos para la ducha y una nevera llena de fruta y cosas pra el desayuno! Un placer, seguro que repetiremos!

We only have good things to say about our stay in Alvaro's place. The location of the apartment is great and hip neighborhood of malasana full of restaurants and bars and super close to the shopping street which ended up being very convenient.  Alvaro was very kind and helpful  with tips and recommendations about  what to do in Madrid.  The apartment is very nice, nicely decorated and the building has great and interesting pictures taken by Alvaro himself. We had a great ti,e and we can only recommend his place.

Alvaro is a very friendly host who offers above a very nice app. within the nicest area (with lots of wonderful bars and restaurants) in Madrid also breakfast, fruits, tea and coffee and a full fridge!! Very appreciated. He gave us fantastic recommendations and I rate him and his app: 5 stars well deserved!!

Perfetto! Alvaro è stato gentilissimo, disponibile, una persona adorabile. Ci ha accolto dedicandoci tanto tempo e fornendoci ottimi consigli per vivere al meglio Madrid. Ci siamo sentiti immediatamente benvenuti e da subito come a casa. L'appartamento corrisponde esattamente alle foto, luminoso, curato, equipaggiato con tutto il necessario, non credo possa esserci luogo migliore dove soggiornare in città. La zona è centrale, sicura, comoda e facilmente raggiungibile dall'aeroporto. E' al contempo al centro di una zona autentica e viva della città e un ottimo punto di partenza per visitare ogni altro quartiere.  Assolutamente consigliato!

Alvaro's studio was a haven in the coolest part of Madrid. The bed was comfy and the modern decor pleasing on the eye. On arrival he have us a lovely bottle of Rioja and snacks.   Alvaro was extremely helpful, sitting down with us over a map, suggesting restaurants in the area and the best sights to see in the 2 days we had to visit Madrid. The bathroom is a wet room so be warned, everything gets wet and shower was powerful. The TV/ AV system has some recent films you can watch and chilled music we enjoyed listening to.

Great host! Alvaro explained everything to us upon our arrival. Though we only had one night stayed there, we arranged to visit an exhibition recommended by Alvaro which is amazing. The studio is spacious and the bed is super comfortable. Thanks for having us!

We had great time at Madrid. Alvaro's flat is perfect. Even there is no matter.
Alvaro is so kindly and he informs the best things at Madrid and best eating place.
Thanks Alvaro

Ficar no apto do Alvaro, tornou nossa visita a Madri muito mais agradavel. O Studio é otimo. As fotos retratam exatamente a realidade. As dicas do Anfitrião tornaram nossa viagem inesquecível. Cada  terraço,  cada restaurante, cada mercado.....todos excelentes. A localização é sem duvida mais um dos pontos fortes deste lugar que nos deixou apaixonados por Madrid.Recomendadíssimo....

El apartamento se encuentra en una fantástica zona de Madrid.
Con mucho movimiento de gente y ocio.
Aún así, la orientación del inmueble, hace que no se escuchen ruidos.
El trato recibido por Álvaro ha sido exquisito. Siempre dispuesto, siempre pendiente.

My wife and I had an absolutely wonderful experience staying at Alvaro's flat. It's located in an ideal location, surrounded by Madrid's hippest cafes and shops. The flat itself is very well maintained and curated its comfortable, expansive, quiet and the perfect place for respite after a long day exploring Madrid. But, the best aspect of our stay here was Alvaro.  He greeted us with the warmest welcome that any two strangers connected by AirBNB could ever get. He gave us great tips on places to check out, including nearby La Bicicleta cafe and new neighborhood eatery La Pescaderia. In sum, Alvaro, the flat, and the neighborhood are simply amazing. Thank You Alvaro.

Alvaro is a nice and helpful host. The apartment is great. It's big, it's clean and modern, the bed is fine, there's some food in the fridge, it's quiet at night. Great neighborhood. What else do you need in Madrid?
Thanks Alvaro, we had a wonderful time!

We had a great stay at Alvaro's place. It is exactly as described, we found it a very comfortable place for me and my wife, in a very nice neighborhood.  Spacious place, good bed, cool lighting, small but fine shower/bathroom. The filled fridge is a great idea and we really made full use of it, having a small breakfast every morning. Alvaro is super friendly and gave us some very good local tips for tapas, drinks, dinner, art, and a good mercado! All in all we had a great 3 days and would certainly stay again if/when we come back to Madrid!

Alvaro's apartment is awesome. Clean, well maintained, and in a great neighbourhood. Close to major avenues and the metro station as well. But what sets the apartment apart, as mentioned in many reviews, is Alvaro himself. He is the best host I have experienced with Airbnb, and he clearly enjoys hosting people in his place. He spent time telling me what I might want to do in Madrid when I arrived. And on my last day, he even joined me for lunch and a walk around the area. I stayed in three separate apartments while in Madrid, and Alvaro makes this place heads and tales above the rest.
Thanks for hosting me Alvaro!

Lovely spacious, bright studio. Great location. 5 mins from metro. Most sights within walking distance! Alvaro was the perfect host. Gave great recommendations on where to eat and drink. After I returned on my first day (when thunderstorms rolled in), I found an umbrella on my doorstop! Such a kind man. When I return, I will look to come back to Alvaros.

I had such an enjoyable stay at Alvaro's place. What a warm and friendly welcome from Alvaro when I arrived. We had a lovely chat and Alvaro gave me some good tips and took his time to explain things to me, looking at the map.
The flat is in a outgoing area : so many things to do. For eating : downstairs restaurant is really nice; Orio for delicious pinchos is a must as well. It is so easy to visit madrid from Alvaro's place: by foot , the metro, bicycle... So accessible from the airport: metro. In the evening I could relax after a long day watching a good recent film. This flat is like a cocoon where you can relax, chill out and get some energy back. I recommend Alvaro's flat when visiting Madrid.

This was a great place to stay. Alvara makes you feel really welcome and spent a long time going through places to eat and things to see, showing us on a map where abouts to go to see the best things in Madrid. Everything was as described, and the flat was very comfortable. It was especially nice having a fridge with the essential things and a bottle of wine :-) The shower was great - it was also really useful having all the esential toiletries, espeically for flying with hand luggage! The flat was very quiet despite being in a busy area. The location was really good for walking to anywhere in central madrid and was near a metro stop if you needed. I would definitely recommend this to anyone going to Madrid. Thank you Alvaro!

I loved my stay at Alvaro's apartment. I felt like a local, and it was so comfortable to come home to for a siesta after a long day walking around. The apartment is a great size, very clean, quiet, nice shower, with a few little nice treats left from Alvaro. The location was perfect - in the trendy neighbourhood of Malasana with many great bars and nice vibes right outside the door. It was also a nice short stroll (20 mins) to all of the main sights. Alvaro was a great host and recommended bars, cafes and galleries that I should visit. It was nice to have a local's input! I'd definitely recommend this place.

Nous avons été chaleureusement accueillis - Alvaro avait carrément prévu tout ce qu'il faut pour nos petits déjeuners, et il nous a même offert une bouteille de vin un prime. Il faut surtout profiter de ses conseils pour les sorties, nous avons adoré ce qu'il nous a recommandé en bars et restaurants. L'appartement est très mignon, c'est un grand studio sous les toits, au coeur du quartier Malasaña, agréablement décoré, super propre, calme, avec climatisation et plein de charme. Nous avons passés un excellent weekend. Merci mille fois!

Alvaro was the perfect host. Always available to help.
The studio is amazing, right in the center with everything you'll need close by.
To repeat for sure!
Alvaro was great. The apartment was clean and nice. It was quiet despite being in a very lively area.

A truly fantastic, spacious and cool apartment! Centrally located and within easy walking distance of Gran Via, and the many restaurants and bars which the area has to offer. A few minutes walk in any direction would take you into the vibrant hipster neighbourhood of open air plazas and street art.

Alvaro was a great and considerate host. He met us on arrival and made some suggestions as to what to do and see all over the city, as well as booked an early cab (5am!) for us on the day of departure.

I would highly recommend staying here and will definitely be back. Still so much to see and do in Madrid! :)

Alvaro is by far the best Airbnb host I've ever had in the 4 years I've been using this service!! He accepted our booking request at 11pm the night before our arrival. He welcomed us with a bottle of cold sangria, pastries, fruits, and coffee. His studio is absolutely beautiful. Clean, cozy, and well decorated. He even brought a map to show us where the main things were located and he helped us plan our day. We loved the neighborhood and the location was perfect. I would most definitely recommend staying at Alvaro's place. Thanks for everything and we hope to see you again soon :)

Alvaro oli uskomattoman hyvä isäntä ja paikka on aivan upea! Asunto on trendikkäällä alueella ja ympäristössä on lukuisia loistavia tapas- ja pintxo-paikkoja, terasseja, ravintoloita ja aamiaispaikkoja. Metrolla on tarvittaessa helppo liikkua ja matka lentokentän välillä taittuu 30€:lla.

Alvaro otti meidät sydämellisesti vastaan ja esitteli parhaimmat paikat merkiten ne samalla antamaansa karttaan. Asunnossa oli meitä varten kaikki tarvittava punaviiniä, aamiaistarvikkeita, suihkupipoa jne. myöten. Emme olisi voineet parempaa vastaanottoa toivoa! Alvaro jopa hoiti meille taksin valmiiksi lähtöaamullemme :)

Suuret kiitokset Alvaro ja toivottavasti nähdään pian!
Great appartment, wonderful location and the most warm and welcoming host! Malasana is an excellent area and Alvaro gave us great tips about the neighbourhood. Will definitely come back!

Álvaro is a fantastic host!  Incredibly nice, welcoming and super helpful.  We asked him what to do and where to go and he sat with us and wrote down a ton of suggestions on how to experience the most of Madrid.  The apartment is spacious and comfortable, with great A/C.  We had pastries and a fridge full of snacks in a little kitchenette.  Our stay at this location was ideal!  The apartment is within walking distance of all the main attractions.  No more than 20 minutes walk to see all of the main sights.  It's in a quiet little enclave, with a lot of cool shops around where you can get a coffee or a bite to eat before being on your way.  We felt right at home!

Alvaro was the perfect host! He welcomed us with a warm and friendly introduction to his gorgeous apartment. He also gave us some excellent recommendations for our short stay. He included snacks and a beautiful bottle of wine. Alvaro's apartment is in the most amazing neighbourhood and is close to everything Madrid has to offer. The apartment is the perfect amount of space decorated by beautiful art and photos. Giving Alvaro's apartment 5 stars just doesn't seem enough! Wish we could have stayed longer!

Hi Alvaro,
We had a really nice stay in your apartment in Madrid! We really liked the neighbourhood! Overall we thought the apartment was fine! It only could be a little bit cleaner, especially the floor! Also we found 2 empty condom packages.. But in the end we had a very nice stay!
Greetings Madieke and Sophie

What a great host! Alvaro was so helpful and lovely. The place is nice and cozy and easy to get around. I had my mom and my little girl with me and he was preparing everything for us three and even got little girl's  friendly movies on the tv playlist for us! A bottle of wine and pantry well stocked so we didn't even need to buy breakfast I the morning. It felt like visiting a friend's house! Recommended! Thanks for having us again!

Our 1 night stay at Alvaro's was amazing! We were greeted when we arrived and he told us where the best places to eat were. He advised us which places are a must see and even gave us a map of Madrid.
His house is amazing and super clean. It was a welcome retreat after a very busy day of touring Madrid.
We will definitely book with him the next time we are in Madrid.
Thank you, Alvaro for the great experience and stay.

Superbe expérience. Alvaro nous attendait pour nous suggérer ses meilleurs endroits dans la ville. Très facile de communiquer avec lui. Nous nous sentions à la maison. Une bouteille de vin nous a été servie à notre arrivée ainsi que plusieurs collations. Alvaro était un hôte super sympathique. À recommander grandement!

The ideal apt and location for a couple staying in Madrid for the weekend. Alvaro's place is a quaint and clean studio. Plus, he provided a half bottle of wine, water, breakfast food and delicious fruits. I didn't expect it so it was a very nice surprise!
Malasaña is a young, hip and vibrant neighborhood and the apt is close to Tribunal Metro station, Calle Fuencarral and Gran via - it's only a few minutes away.
The bathroom is a small "all wet" bathroom where everything gets wet. It's an interesting experience! Being on the fourth floor without elevators was not ideal but the AC makes up for it.
Thanks, Alvaro for being such a thoughtful and responsive host!

Our time spent in Madrid was made 10 times easier and more enjoyable with the help of Alvaro. He waited for us upon arrival and spent at least an hour sharing advice on what to do and where to visit in Madrid. His apartment was spacious, clean and in a convenient location - walking distance from everything! Definitely worth staying with Alvaro!

This was a wonderful apartment right in the centre of Madrid in an up-and-coming vibrant neighbourhood. The most wonderful part was the welcome we received from Alvaro, who warmly greeted us with a smile, a bottle of wine, fresh fruit and an amazing hour-long brief on suggestions on where to eat, what to see and how to best enjoy our time in Madrid. His advice proved absolutely priceless and we highly recommend Alvaro and his apartment for any potential traveler.

Alvaro hosting was great! From our first mail till welcoming us at the apartment and guide us to all the secrets of the fantastic area.the apartment was more than we axpected, it was clean and full of treats (wine,pastery,all kinds of shampoo...) good music.
Alvaro made us feel like home and was available for every thing that we needed

We stayed at Alvaro's apartment for 4 nights and it was exactly as it was described in pictures and reviews - clean, stylish, perfect location and great size for a couple. Alvaro was an awesome host, giving us great recommendations, flexible with check-in/out hours as much as he could, and very responsive and helpful in general. Before we came I was a bit skeptical about "the wet room" but it was no problem at all! When we will be back in Madrid we will be glad to come back again!

My wife and I are glad we chose this apartment because we got to meet Alvaro, its kind host. Yes, Alvaro is among the kindest and warmest Airbnb hosts you will ever meet and our ‘welcome’ chat with him was just what we needed to feel at home. The apartment is well set up, well equipped, and spacious. It had essentials and snacks for breakfast and an evening drink too. We had no issues during our entire stay. It’s also located very close to Fuencarral, which is a lively pedestrian-only street lined with stores. Just the walk to Fuencarral from the apartment will give you many cool hangouts. Don’t miss Bicicleta Café for its biker inspired interiors and try La Jauria for dinner or just a drink – both nearby. Cheers! : )
What a brilliant apartment in a very cool district. Alvaro was an excellent host; so friendly and very communicative. Would absolutely stay here again when I'm back in the city.

Superhost! Great apartment, just as in the pictures, including the "wet room". 4th floor, no elevators. Close to subway, to Gran Via, and to a lot of shops, bars and restaurants. Alvaro is the best! Nice tips about attractions, restaurants. He left the fridge full of fruits, jams, juices and water. And there were also bread, appetizers, coffee, milk and a bottle of wine. Much better experience than at a hotel. I highly recommend this place!

Alvaro est très sympa et son appartement idéalement place. À notre arrivé il a pris le temps de nous expliquer Madrid, les balades, les resto, les musées oubliées. Notre séjour à été réussi avec son aide. Bon plan
Outstanding host, service and appartment! Really glad we booked here, and next time we are back in Madrid we will rent this appartment again!

El studio es igual que las fotos, salvo el baño que parece más grande pero es más pequeño, es ideal para una pareja, hay que subir escaleras ese es un dato importante, tampoco tantas. El barrio esta muy bien, cerca del metro que es muy importante lo que te permite moverte en Madrid fácilmente. Alvaro fue muy amable, recibió mi maletas antes de hacer el check in, y me paso información sobre Madrid.
Perfect location! Very clean apt! Alvaro is very informative. Will come back

We thoroughly enjoyed our stay in Alvaro's wonderful studio and have no hesitation in recommending it to others. It is well located near shops, restaurants and the Metro.  As mentioned in the description, the apartment is on the 4th floor, so guests should be certain they can handle stairs. Loved the photographs in the stairwell! The studio was clean, spacious and quiet - and we found it as shown in the listing's photos. Alvaro has thought of and provided all amenities that might be needed, from robes, to coffee, to an umbrella thoughtfully left at the door on a rainy day.  Most importantly, Alvaro made us feel welcomed to his apartment and neighborhood. He was easy to communicate with and was responsive to all our messages. He also took the time to go over points of interest with us, and recommend restaurants to try during our visit. Very kind and respectful - definitely a SuperHost!
Alvaro es un anfitrion fantastico,y el piso esta en un lugar inmejorable.El detalle de la nevera con fruta,jugos,leche y el cafe con bollos son de agradecer.
Fantastic Apartment, Great location.  Alvaro was very welcoming and had stocked the apartment with snacks and wine on arrival.  Beautifully decorated.

Alvaro is a wonderful host! He received us well and suggested a number of places to visit in and around Malasaña. He was always available and happily answered any questions which we had throughout our trip. The apartment's location is perfect. It's exactly in the centre of Malasaña which is a hip neighbourhood with lots of shops and restaurants. The walk to Gran Via is short, easy, and interesting. I would definitely recommend this apartment!
Álvaro is a really nice host and his appartment, a perfect place to rest in.

We loved our stay in Alvaro's studio. It is at the top of the building with lots of light and very comfortable. There was a serious flight of stairs to negotiate but we are a reasonable fit 60 something couple and it was no problem. Our host was very welcoming with plenty of advise on what to see and were to eat. Facilities ranged from an excellent media system with music and films to an extremely well stock kitchen area. All you would need. The area is lively and buzzing with an abundance of café's and bars. We would definitely visit again.
Alvaro is a great host and suggested places to eat out. The location is very central. and the apartment is really nice.

Lovely neighbourhood, wonderful host, very cosy apartment. We really had a great time at Alvaro's studio!

The only downside are the stairs (no elevator), but even that has a silver lining in that it has helped us exercise more! The bathroom is a tad rustic, as well.

We'll definitely book with Alvaro again if and when we return to Madrid!

Alvaro was an outstanding host. He was on site to welcome us when we arrived from the airport. The studio was stocked up with refreshment, wine, pastries, juice, coffee, etc...
The studio is very well located and very quiet despite its central location. Having stayed many times in the surrounding areas, I know that it can be a busy and vibrant part of town. Alvaro's studio was so quiet you could forget you were in the middle of Madrid.
My friend and I have discussed that if we were to go back to Madrid, we would not hesitate to stay with Alvaro again.

Alvaro was gorgeous!! Marvelous person. The apartment is in the heart of Madrid in Malasaña, a place where everything can happen.
Everything was really charming in this apartment. We've even received a bottle of wine as welcom for our arrival. There was food and drinks in the fridge. Everything was perfect. Very romantic place to stay! I only can suggest it to more travelers. You'll love it! Thanks Alvaro , for your hospitality, advices, information, videos, music and of course your kindness. It was s pleasure to met you!
Álvaro ha sido muy amable y ha sido muy flexible a la hora de alojarme. Sin duda lo recomendaría.

Cool place in a nice area.
Alvaro is very friendly, the Hause is very quite.

It is easy to walk from nearest metro to his apartment and bars, cafes, nice restaurants are just around the corner.
It is very quiet at night which I really like. The bed is so spacious and cosy.

Hemos estado en Madrid por 3 días / 2 noches y el estudio de Alvaro fue, sin duda, la mejor opción para quedarnos alojados!
La habitación tiene una decoración moderna y es muy bonita, está totalmente equipada para una estadía confortable, con una pequeña "kitchnet" con cositas para comer, para hacer té, café o tostadas! Es muy confortable, calentito, limpio y luminoso.
El estudio es también perfecto para relajarse un poco, después de un día caminando, con una cama confortable, sillones, y una tele con algunas películas.
Alvaro ha sido un anfitrión estupendo, muy simpático y atento, en el día de nuestro llegada nos ha recibido y nos ha indicado algunos sitios para visitar y comer, así como informaciones sobre como irnos del estudio a los sitios. Se ha mostrado siempre disponible para ayudarnos. En el ultimo día se ha quedado con nuestro equipaje en su casa para que nos fuésemos a dar un giro antes de irnos al aeropuerto.
El estudio tiene localización estupenda, en el centro del barrio con acceso a inúmeros restaurantes, cafeterías, y comercio local, y con una estación de metro muy cercana. Además se pode llegar a diversos puntos turísticos caminando.

La experiencia fue totalmente positiva, volveremos a Madrid con toda la certeza, y volveremos a quedarnos alojados aquí! :)

I rented Alvaro's apartment for my daughter and niece, and they couldn't have been more pleased.  Communication with Alvaro was easy, prompt, and pleasant, and he made my daughter and niece feel very welcome upon their arrival.  Alvaro lives one floor down and was available if needed.  The apartment is in a nice building in a great location.  The neighborhood is popular with many things to do and restaurants nearby, but the apartment was quiet and felt very safe.  Alvaro greeted my daughter and niece with a bottle of wine and champagne, as it was New Year's, as well as some snacks.  The apartment was very clean and had everything they needed.  It was definitely a wonderful stay for them, and they recommend it highly.  Thank you, Alvaro!

Alvaro es el perfecto host para tu estancia en Madrid, conoce la ciudad y sus mejores lugares como nadie en la capital y su apartamento es sencillamente genial, con mucha luz y realmente agradable... :)

El apartamento de Álvaro es, probablemente, de las experiencias más cercanas al concepto original de Airbnb que se puedan disfrutar. Una calurosa acogida, un anfitrión dispuesto a ayudar en todo lo posible, unos cuantos detalles (bastantes) de comida de bienvenida que siempre vienen bien cuando llegas tarde. En definitiva, sentirse cómodo y a gusto.

La localización es muy buena. En pleno Malasaña, a 5 minutos caminando de Callao, con muchísima oferta de restauración, de copas, teatros, etc. a menos de 10 minutos caminando.

Tener en cuenta que es un cuarto sin ascensor, tal y como está descrito. Pero tampoco viene mal un poco de ejercicio. En cualquier caso, la escalera está perfectamente mantenida y hasta resulta agradable subir viendo las fotografías hechas por el propietario. Por cierto, muy luminoso el apartamento.

En resumen, muy recomendable.
muy bien, centrico y tranquilo

Toda la comunicación con Alvaro fue rápida ,al llegar nos recibió estupendamente y nos dio bastantes indicaciones del barrio Malasaña.
La situación es muy buena para disfrutar tanto de Malasaña , como de Chueca y zona Gran vía, estando todo a un paso.
El estudio esta muy bien, luminoso, sin ruidos,con calefaccion y aire acondicionado y con buenos detalles que no había encontrado antes en ningún otro apartamento (frigorífico con todo lo necesario para el desayuno,fruta,agua,zumos,leche,café,vino...)
Una pantalla ( no TV) con películas y música.
La cama es bastante cómoda y amplia para un pareja.
Como notas no tan positivas cabria mencionar que es un cuarto sin ascensor.
Pero como todo lo positivo gana ampliamente es un estudio que recomendaría sin ningún tipo de duda a cualquier pareja y al cual yo volvería.

Great place to stay! The apartment is in a quiet street yet minutes from a vibrant area of Madrid. It is really comfortable and has everything that we needed. We really appreciated the light and stylish decor.
We walked easily to all the art galleries we wanted to visit, soaking up the atmosphere as we went. Thank you Àlvaro for your warm welcome and advice which took us to some great bars and restaurants. Thank you for checking that we were OK with climbing to the fourth floor before confirming our reservation. We'll be back!
Muy amable, se encargo de que recibiera el sitio sin problemas, me trato como en casa y se encargo de que todo estuviera perfecto

Alvaro was a great host and spent a lot of time with us when we first arrived introducing us to the area and providing great suggestions of restaurants and other places to visit during our visit in Madrid.

The apartment was clean and comfortable, and the snacks he left were greatly appreciated.
Alvaro was a great host and the apartment was beautiful, highly recommended!

Alvaro est un hôte fantastique ! Il nous a chaleureusement accueillis et donné d'excellents conseils sur les meilleurs endroits du quartier.
Le studio est très agréable, idéal pour un couple, et super bien situé en plein cœur de Malasaña, à proximité de toutes les parties touristiques de Madrid.

We had a fantastic time staying at the studio! Alvaro was very easy to communicate with leading up to our stay and provided recommendations on where to eat and visit once we arrived. The location was within walking distance of all the tourist stuff but was located in a "real" neighbourhood far enough away that you avoided all of the typical chains and got to see the "real" Madrid. The studio was immaculate and had everything (and more!) that we needed to have a comfortable stay. The little things - like snacks, a bottle of wine and a stocked fridge - were fantastic. We had a late flight on our last day and Alvaro was flexible to let us stay late because no one was booked after us. I would strongly recommend!

Alvaro was an exception host and gentleman.  He met us as planned and eagerly explained the layout of his flat.  He proceeded to give great advice about Madrid, including excellent restaurant and bar recommendations for the neighborhood. The apartment was stylish with an artsy flare.  We appreciated the small touches to make us feel at home, like a bottle wine and fruit in the refrigerator. The Malasana neighborhood is trendy and lively, and the flat is in the center of it all. I would highly recommend Alvaro's flat to a friend.

Alvaro was great to work with, he was very prompt and helpful. We arrived late but he waited for us. As I am expecting I could not lift the bag, he helped my husband with getting the bag up 4 floors which was great and also helped us book a taxi for our early flight out. The studio was nice and in a great location. Very close to the metro and central with good dining options around. The only thing I would have liked is if the studio was cleaner but all the other things made up for it.

El estudio es tal y como se describe y se ve en las fotografías, no te llevas ninguna sorpresa. Todo muy acogedor y espacioso. Muy cómodo para una visita a Madrid.
El anfitrión, Álvaro, una persona encantadora, cuida hasta el más mínimo detalle para que te sientas como en casa.
nice apartment, good location! Alvaro is so nice and helpful! the bed is extremely comfortable, i had a good sleep in there:)

Apartamento bien situado muy luminoso y exactamente como se ve en las fotos. Limpio y equipado con lo necesario para desayunos y más.
El anfitrión muy atento aunque no tuvimos ocasiones para hablar personalmente por tener nosotros el tiempo muy ocupado

Stayed here for 2 nights in April. Very easy to find, we were met by the host himself who was incredibly welcoming and accommodating. He took the time to sit with us and answer all of our questions and recommended various bars and restaurants which we greatly appreciated.
Location was fantastic, surrounded by quirky shops, bars, restaurants and shops. We are never too far away from anything.
The apartment itself was very clean with lots of extra touches (wine, gowns, tv-movies, snacks!
Overall a fantastic experience and would well worth it.. Would highly recommend to anyone going to Madrid.
Thanks Again for a great stay

My girlfriend and I had a wonderful time in Madrid staying in this apartment. It is stylish, well equipped, clean and very well located. Alvaro makes the perfect host; very friendly and helpful and was always there if we needed him. Will stay here again next time in Madrid. Thanks again, Alvaro!
Rob

El piso es una verdadera preciosidad, tal cual se muestra en las fotos. Álvaro tiene un gusto exquisito y la casa está llena de detalles (botella de vino, snacks, paraguas en el pomo de la puerta por si llueve, geles de baño de múltiples olores, películas, libros de diseño...).  Y si a eso le añades la localización tan céntrica en pleno barrio de Malasaña, el sobresaliente está asignado. Además te aconseja sobre locales de moda, y siempre está disponible. Espero repetir en mis próximas visitas por la capital! Gracias Álvaro por tu hospitalidad!

Alvaro is a wonderful host, he spent a lot of time with us going over city and the apartment. Location is central and within easy walking distance of most city sites. The apartment is beautifully furnished with all you need including snacks and  bottle of wine.

Studio nel centro di Malasaña, a pochi minuti dalla metro Tribunal. Esattamente come da foto, lo spazio ha tutto il necessario (e molto di più!) per brevi/medi soggiorni. Ogni dettaglio è curato, dagli accappatoi agli ombrelli in caso di pioggia. Colazione e bottiglia di vino gentilmente messa a disposizione!  Alvaro è una persona squisita che si prende la briga di conoscere il suo host e consigliarlo a seconda dei suoi gusti, nel vero spirito di airbnb. Raccomandatissimo!

Très bon accueil d'Alvaro qui nous a également renseigné sur les différentes choses a faire , événements en cours à Madrid et donné de bonnes adresses.
Très appréciable d'avoir pu déposer avant des notre arrivée les valises chez lui et rester plus tard dans l'après midi comme l'appartement n'était pas reloué après. merci beaucoup

Awesome apartment, best location! We stayed a week at Alvaro's place while in Madrid. The apartment itself was beautiful specious and comfortable. MALASAÑA is the coolest neighborhood in Madrid with lots of great restaurants and shop and beautiful people . Every place is by walking distance. Alvaro is a great host, help us a lot with check in and check out times, and gave us wining tips about the neighborhood. Highly recommended!

Alvaro was a gracious host! He was super helpful in providing feedback on what to see and eat in the neighborhood as well as the rest of our travels through Spain. The apartment is centrally located with access to all the cool spots in Madrid. I would highly recommend staying here!

The host of the house is a very nice guy! He was very patient to any question about the travel and shared the ideas generously. At the first meeting, he explained a lot about the custom of the Spanish and several  nice places in the city, such as the resturant and big shopping mall. Morover, the house is very beautiful, we really enjoy the time living in that house.  The location of the house is near the central of city, so we can go any where easily. In the last meeting, the host also helped us do booking of train and print the ticket. I am sure if i will be here again I will chose that room again !!

The apartment is darling, it has great style. The kitchen/refrigerator was stocked. The bed was very comfy. The building is very convenient to many amenities and in a very hip, trendy, stylish neighborhood. There are plenty of good restaurants and shops in close proximity.  Alvaro was easy to contact and very responsive.  The apartment is up 4 1/2 flights of stairs, which can be a challenge after a full day of walking in the city. But I just kept telling myself "buns of steel, buns of steel".  I wasn't crazy about the bathroom, but you're in Europe!
Excellent host, apartment and area! Highly recommended! Close to everything you will want to see in a hip neighborhood! Thank you Alvaro for your hospitality!

Experiences like this is why I love Airbnb! When I travelled to Spain for work, I decided to go to Madrid for the weekend. I chose Al's place due to the massive amounts of positive reviews, and I couldn't have been happier with the choice.

Al is the ultimate Airbnb host, who provided me many tips on where to go, and made me feel very welcome. The apartment is in a perfect location for exploring Madrid. I bought a travel card with 10 clips, and only used one: to get there. I walked everywhere else.

As a woman travelling alone, I never felt unsafe walking around - even at night. The neighborhood is very lively, with many great restaurants and bars nearby. However, there was no noise in the apartment from the street or neighbors, it was very quiet.

The apartment is perfect for one or two people. Note that it is on the 4th floor, so you do have to climb five flights of stairs. Not a problem for me, but it may be for some. You can't cook there, but with the gorgeous tapas offered everywhere - who would want to?

Al told me about a spot where there is a brass plate marking the center of Madrid and Spain. Legend is that you should stand on it, and wish to come back to Madrid. I wished for a soon return to this gorgeous city, and when I return I will absolutely try to stay in Al's apartment again.

El apartamento fué increíble, igual que en las fotos. Para dos personas es más que suficiente y su ubicación es inmejorable. Alvaro tiene el piso muy bien equipado y es todo un encanto, se preocupó por nosotras y estuvo pendiente de que todo estuviese a nuestro gusto.

El apartamento es tal cual se ve en las fotos, yo soy decorador y aprecio muchísimo el detalle y el gusto con el que se ha realizado todo en este apartamento, Marlen es una anfitriona magnifica, estuvo pendiente de nosotros durante toda la estancia y fue muy amable en la bienvenida.
El apartamento es perfecto tanto para una estancia corta como para quedarse a vivir toda la vida :)
En definitiva, si vuelvo a Madrid no dudare en reservar de nuevo con Marlen.

Al abrir la puerta del apartamento empieza la magia. Está totalmente nuevo. Con un gusto y diseño y ejecución exquisitos. El dormitorio principal invita al descanso. Está en el extremo del apartamento, aislado de los posibles ruidos exteriores. Está decorado con mimo cuidado. Moderno y elegante. La cama es comodisima, con una ropa de cama, sabanas, colcha, etc buena calidad. El armario empotrado es muy amplio.

La zona de cocina y salón es muy bonita. Tal cual como se ve en las fotos. La Tv de pantalla plana y de buen tamaño rodeada por un marco plateado pone el colofón a un espacio muy cuidado con un sofá cama cómo.

El portal se ve que ha sido todo reformado y cuenta con ascensor. La calle y la zona es tranquila. Una calle de sentido único, con poco tráfico. Tiendas de alimentación y algún restaurante así como otros locales comerciales. Pero todo ello a 2 min a pie de callao y la gran vía.

La anfitriona se porta genial y preocupó porque los huéspedes estuviéramos perfectamente. Nos regaló una entrada doble al Reina Sofía que no está lejos del apartamento. En una pizarra mural junto al frigorífico había escrito un mensaje de bienvenida con indicaciones útiles de hospitales, policía etc de la zona, la clave del wifi (que va perfectamente).

Los detalles se ve que han sido muy cuidados. Tal vez sea una tontería para algunos, pero por poner un ejemplo, en la TV no se ve ni un solo cable!

Ah! La cafetera con cápsulas de café Nespresso y alguna de té así como los caramelos de violeta, nos encantaron.


RESUMEN: Una casa de la que uno se enamora!!!
Una estancia maravillosa. Totalmente recomendable. El piso es de los más bonitos que he visto en mi vida. Cuesta irse de él!

Excellent location, close to the major sights, 2 metro stations 5 min, shopping district, lots of restaurants& bars, Carrefore express just 3min& mini mart front of the apartment, very clean & good amenities.  Mar was very fast with communication and she was really helpful with all our inquiries and made sure everything was ok. Noisy from all the bars& restaurants on the street...but I assume many of the accommodation in the city centre with good location are not so quite.

I fell absolutely in love with this lovely, clean apartment and would definitely recommend for everyone to stay here! It is in the best location. Right below are the coolest little cafés and trendy, artsy bars. It is a very short walk away from Gran Via (Main Street) and from Fuencarral (awesome and vibey shopping strip). This is seriously the best place to stay. I am absolutely obsessed with Mar, she is so so sweet and helpful, always checking up on us to see if we needed anything and how we were going. She told us the best places to visit and always went out of her way to give us detailed answers and information for our questions - She told us how to get to certain places, giving us exact train times, art gallery times and so much more! She provided clean towels, detergent for the washing machine, coffee pods, lollies, salt/pepper and oil which made us feel right at home :) Thank you Mar for making this the best airbnb experience. Xxx

Todo fue fantastico durante nuestra estancia en Madrid.
El piso es tal y como se muestra en las fotos. Completamente renovado y diseñado con mucho gusto.
La ubicacion es fantastica y la atencion de Marlen inmejorable. Cada dia nos escribió para comprobar que todo estaba bien.
Sin duda repetiremos!!

Marlen is a very kind host that resolved my various needs.
Also she give me a information for a trip carefully.
Marlen's place is good location that is close to metro staion (callao) and Gran via, Sol square, opera...

The best area of Madrid. We spent the first night in the south of the city but after we found the quality of bars and restaurants on the flats doorstep, this was out port of call for the remainder of our stay. The flat was very nice and clean, with an excellent kitchen.

Very easy to communicate with Marlen as she responds quickly to emails enquiries. She was waiting at the apartment when we arrived and showed us around. Malasana is a lively neighbourhood and there are plenty of restaurants, cafes, shops and supermarkets on the street itself. This apartment is located on the 1st floor and it can get quite noisy at night.
What made an apartment a 5-star place to stay is the host and Marlen is a 5-star host! My kids were not well the night of our arrival and Marlen was very concerned. She provided us with a taxi number to call and recommended two hospitals just incase we needed it. Throughout the day and night till the early hours in the morning, she checked up with me constantly to see how the kids were doing. In the end, we did have to go to one of the children's hospital for emergency treatment and Marlen came over to the apartment the next day to help us translate the medical report and provided fresh linens and bedsheets for the bedroom. If not for Marlen, I would have have felt utterly desperate and alone in a foreign city and I do not speak Spanish.
