But knowing that I can always give her a call anytime at all helped calm a very stressful situation. Thank you Marlen for everything!

Awesome experience!! We fell in love with Marlen's apartment and would highly recommend staying here. Despite it's cozy size, Marlen has provided so many amenities and welcoming touches. The location was perfect for us - in a vibrant neighborhood and close to the Metro.

As a host, Marlen was perfect. She was easy to communicate with both before and during the stay. She checked in with us each day and helped with restaurant reservations. Before we arrived, she sent a list of favorite restaurants and suggestions on what to do and see. She even remembered that our trip to Spain was to celebrate my birthday.

Highly recommend staying at her apartment if visiting Madrid!

We were very glad and satisfied to stay in Marlen's apartment 6 days. The apartment is design and looks like new. The kitchen, living room, bathroom and bedroom are very well equipped. We had everything we needed. The location is great, few minutes to the subway station and 15 minutes from Plaza Mayor on foot. The apartment is perfect for 2 people. For more people it becomes a little less comfortable. If you are more than two somebody will sleep in the living room. In the evening, it's a little noisy in the living room from the street. There is not any noise in the bedroom.

Marlen is absolutely exceptional host. Very nice and helpful. She proposed and reserved for us flamenco evening. She was in permanent contact with us to help and advise us in everything.

It was for us a great stay in Madrid. Thank you very much Marlen.

Estuvimos encantados con la estancia en el apartamento de Marlen. Es ideal para pasar unos días en la capital, muy bonito, tal cual se ve en las fotografías, y situado en pleno centro de Madrid, desde donde puedes desplazarte andando a los principales puntos de interés turístico. A pesar de estar situado en una zona de marcha, la habitación resultó bastante silenciosa, y pudimos descansar sin ningún problema. Le estoy muy agradecido a Marlen por la flexibilidad ofrecida, tanto con la hora de entrada como de salida, pequeños detalles, como cápsulas de te o cafe que dejó a nuestra disposición, y el interés mostrado durante toda la estancia, preocupándose de que todo fuese bien. Como punto menos positivo, mencionaría la no disponibilidad de un segundo juego de llaves que nos permitiera, a las dos personas que compartíamos el apartamento, tener un poco más de libertad de movimientos. En definitiva, es un alojamiento totalmente recomendable y sin duda la primera opción que tendré en mente cuando vuelva a Madrid.

Very nice and clean appartment. Perfect location in Madrid city Center. Super friendly owner. For 4 people it is very small and the street is very noisy for sleeping in the livingroom (day and night). But for 2 people who share a bed it is perfect.

This apartment was spectacular! Located in the heart of the neighborhood and just minutes away from Gran Via, the location was perfect! The apartment was clean and well equipped and if we ever needed anything, Marlen was just a message or phone call away. It is exactly as it appears in the photographs...maybe even better! Expect a clean and cozy space within walking distance of anything you could possibly need. While there, be sure to check out the amazing restaurants and bars on your street or head around the corner to Le Patron for a great meal!

El apartamento está totalmente reformado y con mucho gusto, tal y cual que en las fotos. Tiene todo lo que se puede esperar para una estancia cómoda: cama muy cómoda, ropa de cama nueva, toallas, baño moderno, muebles modernos etc... Hasta una terraza con mucho encanto. La ubicación muy céntrica y conveniente. La propietaria muy atenta en todo, desde unos días antes de la llegada y durante el tiempo que mis huéspedes han estado hospedados.

El piso es tal cual se muestra en las fotos y se encuentra en una zona muy bien comunicada con todas las zonas de actividad de la ciudad. Todo está nuevo, muy bien decorado y cuenta con todas las comodidades para tener una estancia perfecta. La anfitriona está pendiente en todo momento de que todo esté a tu gusto. Un 10!

El apartamento es perfecto, tiene todo lo necesario para tener una estancia muy agradable. Además está muy bien situado, cerca de los mejores bares y restaurantes de Malasaña. El metro se encuentra muy cerca. Marlen es encantadora, se preocupa muchísimo por que tengas a tu disposición todo lo necesario. Sin duda, volveré!

The location is very central, fantastic and five minutes from where I was working. Marlen was very welcoming, patient with our questions and helpful including organising a taxi back to the airport. We went to some of her recommended restaurants (great breakfast across the road) and knew that we could contact her at any time. My guess is that for four people it would be a squeeze but for two worked very well. It can be noisy at night but being December, we had the window closed and the bedroom is furthest away (no windows of its own) so were not really disturbed by this and enjoyed watching others enjoy themselves!
Great location, nice clean cozy apartment with all the amenities you need. Mar was very nice about letting me check in early as I arrived very early in the morning

Very nice apartment! Most hospitality and friendly Marlen. Apartment very clean, good for 3 people, best location, a lot cafes and markets on this street. Very close to many places by walk. Our recommendation! You will not regret

La descripcion del anuncio coincidia totalmente con la realidad.
El anfitrion cuido todos los detalles y estuvo pendiente en todo momento de que nuestra estancia fuera perfecta.
El apartamento cuenta con una situacion excelente, en una zona con mucha vida y muy bien comunicada . Esta muy bien decorado y dispone de todo lo necesario, para sentirte como en casa!!!!
Magnífico trato de Marlén al recibirnos y despedirnos en su coqueto apartamento situado en el nuevo " soho " madrileño

We had a wonderful time in Marlens apartment. The pictures represent exactly how the apartment looks like. Marlen was waiting for us in the apartment and was very kind. She gave us tips on where to eat, where the nearest supermarket was situated etc etc. She checked from time to time with us whether we needed something or not, which  we really appreciated. Because of this we found her real easy approachable (we had some trouble with the washing machine, but this solved within 5 minutes). The apartment is delightful and very centric! We did everything by foot and only took the metro to get from and to the airport. I definitely recommend this apartment!

Marlen was very helpful and provided all kinds of information about Madrid and the way to get to the appartment.
The appartment is very well situated, clean and comfortable. I would certainly come back again when I am in Madrid

El piso estaba muy bien ubicado, limpio y nuevo. Es acogedor.
Hemos estado muy a gusto y Marlen ha sido muy atenta.

Loved it! Marlen es muy atenta y nos ofrecio ayuda y info durante nuestra estadia. El apt esta a una cuadra de la Gran Via donde queda todo. Se los recomiendo! We had a great stay. Great location. Metro stop right around the corner.

We have stayed in several airbnb on this trip to Spain/Portugal. Marlen has provided an excellent apartment for my wife and I. Everything is as described by her. It is clean, looks like new, and all things perfect. The location cannot be better- if you want to be in the center of things. Can walk to all major sites. Marlen was there to meet us, gave us her phone number and suggested we call with any problem need etc. She checked in with us to be sure all was OK. This will be our home away from home when we return to Madrid.

Once again, I had an amazing stay at Marlen's. I originally had another apartment booked but was very disappointed once I arrived. I decided to go back to Marlen's even though her apartment wasn't available for the entire duration of my trip (which is the only reason I hadn't booked the apt initially).  Marlen allowed me to check in earlier and was very attentive. I cannot recommend this apartment enough! Very clean, great location and fantastic host!

This was our first time using Airbnb and I hope everyone is as good as this experience. Great apartment which is clean and modern with everything you need, central location, and Marlen was a lovely host who went out of her way to make our Madrid experience the perfect one.

My wife and I have stayed at several airbnbs over the last 5 weeks throughout Spain. Marlen's Brand new Apartment ranks with the best. Her communication from the beginning showed that she wanted to be sure we had all information. The apartment was beautiful, terrific location for central Madrid. It was clean, everything functioning, and a welcome resting place from all the daily activity. Great grocery store across the street.Handy to all Madrid central tourist spots. Marlen made us feel at home, contacted us to be sure things were going well, and was available from start to finish if we had any questions. For two guests - this place is a real find!
We stayed multiple times. I believe we left a lenghty review one other time. Nothing new to say- she was great, location was great, we loved it!

We were extremely pleased with this apartment. The space is modern, clean, and comfortable. Marlen and her husband were fantastic hosts; she was extremely attentive and checked in by text regularly to make sure we were doing OK. The location is wonderful and in he heart of a thriving neighborhood. That said, the bedroom is far in the back and completely silent for sleeping.
All in all we highly recommend this space! We would have even extended our stay at the apartment - but Marlen had already booked someone immediately after us. Definitely take it if it's available.
Great stay.  Great communication.  Perfect location and wifi was strong.

Super fijn, fris appartementje met alles er in wat je nodig hebt. Het buurtje waar het appartment ligt is erg leuk en levendig. Marlen was heel vriendelijk en goed bereikbaar. Ik zou het appartement zeker aanraden.

El apartamento estaba super limpio, tal y como aparece en las fotos. La ubicación genial, justo en el centro pero no en el bullicio. Todo tipo de establecimientos cerca (bares, restaurantes, tiendas) y los sitios a visitar a una corta distancia a pie. Super recomendable! Marlen se adaptó a nuestros horarios de entrada y salida y la verdad es que lo agradecimos muchisimo. En casa nos ofreció café para cada dia y otros detalles que dan ese toque especial y comfortable a la estancia. Sin duda, repetiríamos.

Marlen was a very good host. The communication with her was very good and she was able to reply all my queries very very quickly. We had a late check-in due to our flight delay and Marlen was really helpful waiting us until 1am!!

The flat is SUPER central on the first floor of a very cute building with a grocery store just opposite and a bar on the ground floor. It is very stylish and everything brand new! The bar during night can be a bit noisy but come on...when you are on vacation you really want to feel the vibes of the city and Marlen's place is just perfect for that.

The flat was very well equipped (kitchen and bathroom) and is very easy accessible with public transportation and within walking distance from all Madrid attractions! We highly recommend this place for people that love city centers! Marlen thank you for everything!!!!

Mar was the perfect hostess and her apartment was adorable ... Cosy and hip in a fabulous location. Thanks Mar for your wonderful correspondence and fantastic local suggestions. Couldn't rate this Air BnB more highly for a single or couple travelling to marvellous Madrid

Absolutely loved it! Very beautiful apartment on the first floor in a great neighborhood. All the bars and restaurants there are top notch. Everything in the apartment was super comfortable. There is street noise until late so bring some ear plugs.  We look forward to a return to Madrid and staying here again.

wir hatten eine sehr schöne zeit in madrid und auch in marlen's wohnung. die wohnung ist wie auf den bildern...sehr sauber, ausgestattet mit allem, was man braucht...in einer super gegend. marlen hat uns sehr gute tipps gegeben und uns angeboten, sie immer zu kontaktieren, wenn wir was brauchen würden. bei unserem nächsten besuch werden wir zurück kommen. sehr empfehlenswert!!

We had a chance to stay at Marlene's place in late April.  The apartment is absolutely charming, romantic and just the right size.  The apartment is very clean and comes stocked with everything you will need.  It is located in a trendy neighborhood with tons of nice shops, restaurant and bars nearby.  It is also the perfect walking distance to all the tourist spots as well as shopping.  The host Marlene is very attentive and checked in with us throughout our stay. I really did not feel there is anything negative about this apartment or its host.  Highly recommend!!

El departamento es muy confortable, pasamos una estadía muy agradable. Marlen fue muy puntual en la recepción y siempre atenta al teléfono frente a nuestros requerimientos, que fueron escasos ya que todo estaba bien previsto y organizado. El barrio estupendo.

Marlen's place was beautiful, and we really enjoyed our stay.  She was very helpful in the time leading up to our stay and was great at the check-in.  Her apartment has an AWESOME location, as the street is filled with coffee shops and bars/restaurants.  It is also very close to the major streets of Madrid. Just up the street is a great square with a lot going on.  With that said, the bedroom is extremely quiet, and we were never woken up by any outside noise.  The apartment also has a great balcony.  I would stay here again in a heartbeat!

Marlen fue muy amable, nos recibio atentamente y estuvo siempre pendiente de nuestra estadia. El departamento es tal cual se lo ve en la publicación, muy bonito, limpio y la cama muy cómoda así que nos sentimos como en casa y la ubicación exelente, en un barrio pintoresco, lleno de comercios y lugares donde comer o sentarse a tomar algo. Cerca del metro aunque caminando se puede recorrer facilmente.

The apartment was exactly as advertised, updated and well appointed.  The location is great and very close to a couple metro stops, with cafes and markets nearby.  The building and surrounding area are quiet at night, and the furniture is very comfortable.  The air conditioning worked well and kept us cool.  The host, Marlen, was wonderful.  We would absolutely stay there again!

Marlen was a great host with an lovley apartment in the center of Madrid. She was very easy to communicate with. The apartment was clean and very cosy. The location is perfect. We walked to all attractions in Madrid in less than half an hour. It's quit but still close to the nightlife. Cafés, Restaurants and super markets are very close so you have all choices without spending much time. You definitely have to try the food madrid has to offer! I really liked to stay in this place and would it recommend to everyone doesn't matter how old you are. Thank you Mar. It was a wonderful week! :-)

Marlen's home was the perfect place to spend a couple of days in Madrid. Loved everything about Malasaña - its quirky little restaurants, bars and hipsters. Her apartment was close to the Callao metro station making public travel super easy.

This was a very beautiful, clean and cozy apartment (as it is shown in the pictures and with an even better feel) in an amazing location. It is very, very central and you can walk everywhere. We made the mistake to buy metro passes that at the end we did not use because the apartment is close to everything. There is also a very nice supermarket just opposite which is extremely convenient for having breakfasts and snacks at home. The street is lively with nice bars and restaurants.
Marlen is a very nice and accommodating host who made us feel really welcomed and offer to help with anything.

The only downside, which has nothing to do with Marlen of course, is that there is a lot of noise from the bars and restaurants on the street for almost through the whole night. Thus, it is very difficult for the person who sleeps on the sofa bed next to the window to have a good nights sleep. The bedroom though at the back of the house is nicely shield away from the noise.
A very small omission was that there were no middle size towels, only hand and bath ones. We are certain that if we had asked Marlen she would have provided some but at the end it was not a big thing. We are just mentioning for another time.
THIS IS DEFINITELY A HOUSE WE WOULD STAY AGAIN AND AGAIN.

This was a very cute place in a great location! We were able to walk to pretty much everything we wanted to see in Madrid and had a ton of great options at the nearby bars and restaurants in Malasanas. We would definitely recommend it to others.
everything was great - great location, clean and nice apartment. would definitely stay again/recommend it.

The appartment is really nice, clean and comfy. It's in a vibrant street with lots of nice bars and restaurants, you don't need to walk far for entertainment. Marlen is a nice host, has good tips and responds very quickly to messages/questions.

This appartment was absolutely fantastic. Mar did a great job at prepping the appartment just like a hotel. Not only were the towels properly folded and tied with a bow and the bed made perfectly, but their was even a safe for storing valuables and instant coffee by the cup available. I would definitally recoment this place to anyone!

This apartment is amazing. It is close to the city centre (3mins walk) and everything you need to see in madrid. It is also extremely clean and exactly like the pictures. We had a very comfortable time staying in the apartment. Marlen was also very nice, and constantly checking in on text if we are ok. Wifi worked great, everything was fully equipped. Totally recommend!!!
Great appartment at a central location. Al welcomed us very kindly in his wonderful loft and gave many useful tips. the neighbourhood is very nice and lively and full of good restaurants and bars.

Al was the perfect host. He greeted us warmly and gave us excellent suggestions. The apartment is exactly like the pictures, it's quiet, and located close to everything.  The only negative was the slow wifi. But we would definitely stay here again.

Al was an incredible host! My flight was delayed and I got a bit lost on the subways but he was there waiting for my arrival. He promptly took me through the immediate area and all the places he would recommend I go see.

The apartment itself was beautiful and so bright - however, there were blackout panels if you need to sleep in or sleep all day. The bed was very comfortable and the walk up wasn't bad. Overall, an incredible stay in Madrid.

This is a fantastic apartment!

It actually feels more spacious than in the pictures, the bed is superb. It is possible to complete block incoming light from the windows with roll down shades. That and the air conditioning unit make it a very pleasurable place to hang out during the summer heat, even though it is directly under the roof. Wich is actually a big plus: no noises from above! Since it is facing a courtyard the apartment is very quiet in the first place anyway.

Al is a very welcoming and helpful host who made us feel at home immediately.

We will be definitely coming back to this lovely place!
Al is probably the best host I have ever found. He is kind, open mindend, relyable friendly...He will help you with anything you need. Strongly adviced!!!

Al was a fantastic host. We chatted for about 20-30 min and he told us about his favorite spots around the city. He had little snacks and juice available which was great when we were on the go. The studio is a great size and the bed is extremely comfortable. Most crucially for us, the air conditioning was a dream!
A couple things to note, this is a serious 4th floor walk-up so prepare to climb some stairs. We didn't find this to be a problem (30s and in shape), but some might. Also, there is no separate shower space - the whole bathroom is essentially a shower like you might find in Eastern Europe. Again, not a problem, but something to be aware of.
All in all, this place was a great value right in the heart of Malasaña. We would happily stay at Al's studio again!

Al is amazing! He was easy to communicate with and provided helpful instructions before our arrival. Al was there when we arrived and even helped carry luggage! He sat with us for at least an hour helping us plan out our short stay. The apartment is delightful. Al knows how to take care of his guests and make them feel welcome. He had juice, water, a bottle of wine and snacks for us too. Bathroom amenities, robes and comfy towels and linens. The neighborhood has tons of energy and options (food, shopping, architecture, etc.) without being too overwhelming.

Flat is in great location ! Very hipster part of town with great places to eat, Al is a great host with lots of local knowledge and recommendations , we really enjoyed our stay in this flat and highly recommend staying here!
Amazing host. Above and beyond helpful. Made our stay so easy and memorable. Would highly recommend!!!

If you have the opportunity to book this apartment, do it! It's a jewel. Besides the fact that it is very well located, an amazing interior design, a very comfortable bed and a very quiet location.
The owner Al is very fast in communication, flexible and extremely social. Additionally he is a very respected artist, with an amazing experience in photography. When I come back to Madrid, this will be the first place where I like to stay.

The apartment is gorgeous, the location is superb, and Al was very friendly and helpful!

The studio is bright, spacious, and beautiful. Everything was very clean and it definitely had the touch of an artist.

The location was great - right in the heart of a thriving neighborhood, but close enough to walk to other attractions throughout the city. Lots of shopping and eating to be done right outside your door.

Al was very easy to get in touch with when we had questions, and flexible with our arrival time. He was also nice enough to chat with us a little bit when we got there, and give some recommendations for the neighborhood and beyond.

I'd definitely recommend this studio, and I hope we can return to spend a bit more time in Madrid!

Al's studio apartment was fantastic and I would highly recommend it to anybody based on the great location, bright and comfortable atmosphere and the knowledge of Al himself! We stayed in the apartment in September (just in the middle of the heatwave) so the modern air conditioning was brilliant. The location is less than a 5 minute walk from Gran Via, which is the Main Street for shopping and great restaurants. With its central location it's also within walking distance of all museums, parks and public transport(only a 5 minute walk from a metro station, which connects to the airport). The apartment itself is very spacious and incredibly comfortable. The memory foam mattress and quiet street meant we got a great sleep every night! Al was incredibly knowledgable of the area and gave us a great list of recommended attractions to see and places to eat. He also greeted is with a bottle of wine and a fully stocked kitchen and fridge. Overall a great experience and we will be returning shortly!

Al is a wonderful host, he couldn't have done more to make us feel at home and welcome us to Madrid.  The apartment is great, its light and airy and Al has thought of everything, even leaving us a brolly as there was a light chance of rain one day.  A brilliant base area for exploring Madrid, central with loads of great restaurants and bars.  Would recommend Al and his apartment and day of the week :)

如图片所看到，非常棒的一间屋子。Al是一位非常友善和为人着想的房东。主动提供了很多游玩建议。他的英文在西班牙人里面算不错的，很容易沟通。他是一位摄影师，对光有着很好的应用、屋内各种灯光的采用会让你觉得非常浪漫，还有音乐，有红酒。这次是我们的Honeymoon，他知道后还特意放了音乐。很适合夫妻或情侣住。说点实用的，去大皇宫、太阳门广场、德波神庙、英国宫都在20分钟内路程。附近还有很多中餐馆，吃不惯西班牙饭的也可以试试。

Al was very friendly and wonderful.  We arrived a bit early and guests were still in the apartment but Al let us leave our bags and gave some ideas in the area.  Churros dipped in hot chocolate were delicious.  After checking in, Al gave some great local suggestions for food and wine.  The room was light but had great blinds for sleeping.  A great first experience in Madrid.

We loved staying at Al's. Once we had climbed the many steps to this beautifully renovated dovecote, we felt instantly at home. Al provided a great welcome as well as every convenience a traveller could possibly need. He was also extremely accommodating in changing his schedule to meet ours and arranging transport for us to the airport.
The apartment is in a great central location but being on the 4th floor it was very quiet. Highly recommended.

Al was very personable, helpful, and hospitable. He made sure that he was also very available if we needed anything. My husband and I was there for our honeymoon and no regrets  with choosing this studio for our stay. The location was perfect! Being close to all the local shops and eateries was very nice! Transportation was also very accessible. Would definitely come back!

What a great Airbnb experience! Al was an amazing host. He had thoughtfully appointed the apartment with all the little things we needed to make it feel like home. When we arrived, Al spent time to orient us to the city, offering the perfect itinerary for our short time in his amazing city. He even made lunch reservations for us and called a taxi for our early morning return to the airport. The apartment itself was just as beautiful and bright in person as it was in the photos, fully stocked with everything we needed and then some. The location is awesome! Right in the heart of fun cafes, shops and bars but nice and quiet inside. We really did feel like locals with an inside scoop on where to go and what to eat. Al is a superstar and we would stay here again in a heartbeat :)
El apartamento está muy bien situado  y con todas las comodidades. El afitrión muy amable. Quizás, un poco pequeño el baño.
Perefect place. Just like described. Lots of amendities. Practical en perfect location. Hoping to come back soon. Thank you Al !
L'accoglienza di Al è stata fantastica, ci ha anche prenotato il taxi per l'aeroporto, l'alloggio è molto curato ed arredato con gusto, molto luminoso e silenzioso in posizione centralissima.

This place is pretty much in the middle of the Malasaña neighbourhood and staying there was great! It's on the very top of the apartment building (there's no elevator, you're warned ;)) and it is very spacious and bright. Even the stairway leading up to the apartment was nice (if you have been in Spain for any period of time, you'll know that many of these stairways are extremely shabby).

Al managed to accommodate our late check-in (we arrived around 11.30pm) without any problem. He was very friendly and gave us loads of tips on what to do and see (we never made it to the photography exhibition he talked about though..). There was free wine, coffee, and pretty much anything you could ask for. All in all, this is a highly recommended place to stay, and this is among the better ones I've stayed in during the past couple of years!

Decir que Álvaro en todo momento se mostró muy receptivo y nos facilito la estancia en todo lo que pudo. El "Loft" esta muy céntrico y cómodo para llegar a todas partes del centro. Pero tengo que decir que la limpieza no era correcta. para ser específicos, diré que la cocina estaba limpia por encima, el suelo no estaba limpio y las sabanas tenían pelos cuando las destapamos por primera vez. También los raíles de las ventanas estaban bastantes sucios y llenos de porquería, cosa que no es que sea importante, pero me parece que no debería de ser así. Después decir que es un 4 y 1/2 sin ascensor y aunque ya esta en la descripción, se hace un poco coñazo estar para arriba y para abajo todo el día (por supuesto es una opinión subjetiva y habrá a quien le guste subir 4 pisos y medio continuamente).

Otra cosa que no nos gusto nada es el tipo de baño que ha montado. Es un baño en el que la alcachofa de ducha esta en el mismo centro del baño, entre el lavabo y el váter y si te duchas, todo, absolutamente se moja todo. Así que te condiciona a ducharte solo, si vas a salir por la puerta después.

Como he dicho Álvaro en todo momento se mostró muy amable y también no tuvo ningún inconveniente en que saliésemos por la tarde en vez de al mediodía, cosa que le agradecemos.

This is simply the best place to stay if you are visiting Madrid. The studio is exactly like Al's description and even better.

Al is an awesome host, he gave me a map of the city and gave me advice about what to visit in a very detailed way. He was always available to give more advice or if I needed anything.

The location is also the best, it is the cool area of the city and is walkable distance to everything else. I would definitely stay here again. :)
Todo fue perfecto. Al muy amable y accesible. El apto muy bien ubicado y decorado divino.  Altamente recomendable.
Realmente todo perfecto. El estudio es espacioso y está en perfecto estado. Al nos recibió excelente y fue muy atento. Es muy recomendable!

La estancia en el apartamento de Al ha sido perfecta! Al ha estado pendiente en todo momento y la verdad es que es una gozada tener acceso a una persona que conoce la cuidad tan bien.
El apartamento esta en una zona excepcional. En pleno centro así que nos pateamos el centro de Madrid sin tener que coger transporte público ni una sola vez.
El Apartamento es precioso. Es luminoso, limpio, cómodo, amplio y lleno de sorpresas. Lo primero, cuando llegamos teníamos esperándonos una botella de rioja con sus aceitunas para picar y todo, un detallazo. Además nos encontramos con café, leche y bollos para desayunar. Realmente algo que apreciamos muchísimo ya que pudimos salir de casa ya con el café y el desayuno 'puesto'.
Le recomendaría el apartamento a cualquiera que quiera pasar unos días en el centro de Madrid y sentirse comodo de verdad.
Mil gracias Al! Volveremos! :-)

Al's place was perfect. We booked with essentially no notice and Al was quick to respond and get us in. He had a bottle of wine waiting and a bunch of snacks. The place is near the subway station, making it easy to get to from the airport. You walk out the door and there are small markets, bars, and restaurants everywhere.  The bed was comfy and the place was clean. It is on the 4th floor with no elevator which could be difficult for some, but unless you book a hotel, you are going to have stairs. I would definitely recommend his place and I hope to go back soon as Madrid was amazing. I also suggest the hop on, hop off bus to take for a day to see some of the town and its amazing architecture.

Al est un super hôte. Il nous a très bien accueilli, a pris le temps de nous donner quelques astuces et conseils pour découvrir Madrid et à été flexible pour le checkin/checkout. Le studio est très bien situé proche des restaurants de la vie nocturne et des commerces, idéal pour un couple. Je recommande vivement :-)
Great experience staying at Al's airbnb!  With a very pleasant welcome, our stay was very comfortable and enjoyable.  Would highly recommend!

Al and his apartment made my solo trip to Madrid a fun filled memorable experience. It is a unique attic loft in a very well kept apartment building. It is located in the very center of everything, great restaurant, shops, bars... Outside may get busy at night, yet, the apartment reassure you a quiet stay. I just followed Al's recommendations on where to eat, and I couldn't have eaten better!
Al, you were the best! I would definitely stay here again next time I will be in Madrid.

The apartment has an excellent location. Lots of restaurants and shops nearby. The apartment itself is beautiful, clean and compact. It is small but has all needed amenities. Marlen is very communicative and helpful as a host. We thoroughly enjoyed our stay.

Best AirBnB experience ever. Could not ask for a better host than Marlen. She responded quickly to all questions and concerns and met with us to personally check us in.

Her flat is absolute perfection - from the decoration to cleanliness and location. I can't wait to be back!

Marlen & Alfredo's apartment is cozy and clean. Located in Madrid's historical area close to attractions, restaurants and shopping areas. From the moment of the reservation Marlen supplied very helpful information, always aware even to help us with a reservation to watch a flamenco show. We enjoyed our stay there and definitely we would return.
El piso de Marlen y Alfredo es acogedor y super limpio. Esta excelentemente ubicado en el area historica de Madrid, cerca de muchas atracciones, restaurantes y tiendas. Desde que hicimos la reservacion Marlen nos proporciono muchisima information de gran ayuda durante nuestra estadia, siempre a la orden, incluso hasta para reservar para un show de flamenco. Disfrutamos mucho nuestra estancia y definitivamente volveriamos!

Marlen is a great host, providing you with her favorite places in the city and as in my case, checking if you`re doing fine when being sick.
The apartment itself is perfect. Nicely designed and decorated, it has a living room facing lively street and a very quiet bedroom on the opposite side of the flat (plus it comes with a so-much-needed AC). There`s a lot to explore around in the neighborhood and everything from supermarket to public transport is either few steps or 1-2min walk from the flat.
Recommended.
Great apartment and location! Everything was clean and Marlen is very helpful! Highly recommend!

We were very well received by Alfredo, Marlen's husband. He gave us very useful information about the city.
Marlen's apartment is one of the best Airbnb experience until now.
Apartment is very well located, near Calle Gran via and metro. Several restaurants and small markets (opened 24hours * 7) near the appartment.
Apartment is newly renovated and with air conditioning (which was really needed on these days).

Great apartment and host! The apt was very clean and contained everything a traveler needs and more! The location was convenient and within walking distance to most places. Marlen provided some awesome recommendations and was very attentive - she never took longer than a few minutes to respond to a message! My friend and I had a great stay in Madrid!

Marlen was very sweet . As soon as i booked the apartment she mailed me a list of places we would like to see around. She was waiting for us at the apartment at the time we were supposed to reach..she made us  comfortable and  acquainted with the apartment. The house was exactly shown in the pictures. She had all the necessities like washing machine ,microwave TV, etc arranged very well compared to the size of the apartment. I would give a 10 on 10 for the cleanliness..I had read reviews saying that ther is too much noise to sleep on the sofa as ther are pubs and restaurants downstairs . Well!! We dint mind it so much.  We found it very lively..And with no doubts Madrid is a place to enjoy the night life ..!! Her place was very close to the major tourist areas so we could walk and reach everywhere. Marlen also booked us a cab to airport as our flight was early morning. The building and the surrounding area was safe but its near a red light area..but that goes for the whole of central area of Madrid.. So i would advice taking a cab in the night. Overall she was a genuine, helpful and a  perfect host as I had expected.

Very lovely apartment on a fantastic street! Lots of fun bars, restaurants, and shops. Room is in the back so it is quiet. There is no AC in the bedroom so it is a little warmer than the living room which has the AC unit. This was not a huge deal as the bedroom had a fan, but if you need very cold sleeping conditions this may be a slight inconvenience. The place was very clean and won lots of nice amenities including coffee machine and basic cooking supples. Highly recommend this place and this location.

Marlen was an exceptional host.  Prior to arriving to Madrid, she provided all useful information about the city and did give more tips upon arrival.  She welcomed one at the check-in in person and offered any assistance throughout one's stay.  Her apartment was perfectly positioned - in the very city centre with all major tourist attractions on walking distance.  Apartment was clean, beautiful and equipped with modern and easy-to-use appliances.  I can warmly recommend Marlen as a host and her nice apartment for great choice in Madrid.
Superb property. Amazing location. Great  hospitality.
Muy buena la experiencia el apartamento muy bien ubicado, igual que en las fotos y muy atenta la anfitriona, muchas gracias por todo

Apartment was spotless, bed extremely comfortable, and Mar had everything there we needed for a few days madrid. Location is great and right in the heart of the city with chic lite bars and cafes - min walk. Security at the building was excellent too.

Listing was very accurate & Marlen VERY helpful.
Great Air BnB experience

We had an absolute wonderful stay in Madrid! The apartment was clean and one of the most comfortable beds we stayed in. The room was dark and quiet, no street noise at all, despite being in a wonderful part of town close to everything. Marlen was helpful with anything we needed and even called us a taxi when we left! Would highly recommend this apartment!!

Lovely apartment in a great area. Marlen was the best host we have had in our six weeks of travel. She totally went above and beyond for us. Nothing was too much trouble. Hope to return again one day as I know exactly where I would like to stay.

The apartment is clean and nicely decorated. Great location, minutes to metro station and main street Gran Via. Restaurants and bars on the same street provides plenty of choices for breakfast and dinner close-by.
Host Marlen and her husband was helpful throughout. Smooth check-in and check-out. The Rick-Steve guide book was a nice touch that we made good use of! I would recommend this place to friends.

What a wonderful hostess and apartment! Very centrally located in Madrid. We were able to walk everywhere. The apartment is situated in a lively neighborhood with some great restaurant options. There's also a market right across the street that is very convenient. Mar was such a great hostess and provided us with the BEST places to eat. She would call and make reservations for us, which was very helpful. We will stay here again when we go to Madrid. So charming!

Wonderful experience. Thank you Mar for being there for us and making our stay so comfortable. Mar's apartment is super cool. Clean and so comfortable. Everything works   Perfectly located. If I had to go to Madrid again then Mar's apartment would be the reason. Super time.

This is a lovely furnished apartment in a great location and wonderful neighbourhood. It is enough off the tourist track in a lively neighbourhood but close enough to walk everywhere. Lots of local restaurants and shops nearby. Marlen was flexible and met us when we arrived. She offered info and was available if necessary.  She explained the basics and left us coffee and chocolates. Lovely!!

Marlen greeted us early and was so easy to communicate with. The apartment was really cozy, clean, and had everything we needed for our 4 day stay. The kitchen was great as we cooked most of our meals. The location really couldn't have been any better. Directly access the street from a small grocery market, 3 minute walk from a gym, restaurants and bars EVERYWHERE. The metro was very close, but we walked everywhere. You are right in the heart of everything, but on a unique side road that is much quieter than the Main Street. Our stay couldnt have been any better!

This apartment is unbelievable. My husband and I stayed for 2 nights and were wishing that we could have stayed longer! First of all the apartment is located in the hip neighborhood Malasana. By "hip" I mean loads of creative and high quality restaurants, bars, and shops. You could spend days just exploring all the well designed spaces. We loved waking up and walking around Malasana. The apartment itself is super clean, outfitted with new appliances, comfortable, practical, and designed beautifully. My husband and I were both delighted by all of the conveniences and well executed design. There is a sweet balcony overlooking the street with a view of an old church. The apartment is perfect for 2-3 people tops in my opinion. It has all the amenities you could need from makeup removing wash cloths to a rainwater showerhead setting to an espresso machine to air conditioning ++++! I am not exaggerating when I say that we were sad to leave this place. We are restaurant and bar owners and being around here was incredibly relaxing and inspiring for us. Marlen gave us wonderful recommendations on where to eat- our anniversary dinner was spent at BAR GALLETA and it couldn't have been more perfect. Thank you Marlen and your family for creating such a comforting and charming apartment for travelers to enjoy. Checkin and checkout were simple. Communication was perfect. The building itself is beautiful and safe. The apartment is only up one flight of stairs. I can't wait to visit Madrid again and when I do- I will be staying here.

The apartment is in a perfect location very close to the Gran Via so very convenient for all the main attractions. Malasana is a lively and vibrant area with lots of bohemian restaurants, bars and shops, perfect to experience the Madrid atmosphere!. The apartment itself is beautifully designed with great attention to detail and is immaculately presented. Mar is a welcoming and considerate host, most willing to give assistance if required. Check-in was extremely  flexible and very smooth. Would highly recommend.

The apartment is very nice and clean and exactly as we expected based on the photos.  The location in Madrid is great, with a lot of nightlife and places to eat.  We also felt very safe here.  One of our favorite things apartment was the nespresso coffee and the pods Marlen provides for it! Marlen was an attentive host and checked in with us to make sure everything about our stay was ok.  The only drawback was that one of the neighbors or the restaurants had a big party one night and it was very loud.  I am a light sleeper and needed to use earplugs, and even then could still hear the party. Also, there was not enough hot water for two of us to take showers in the morning, so we had to split showers between evening and morning.
Lo mejor de la casa, sin duda, la anfitriona! Además de su excelente ubicación. Recomendable 100%.

The apartment is in a very good location, nice, clean and well equipped (washing machine, Nespresso with capsules included, etc). Absolutely worth the price. The hosts, Marlen and her husband are kind and very helpful people. They also gave very good recommendations for places nearby (specially Mercado de San Ildefonso is a great place for food just a few corners from the place).

The location is perfectly situated for exceptional food and drink, quirky independent shops and picturesque squares. Easily accessible by numerous Metro stations (Callao, Gran Via and Tribunal). The apartment is very well presented with all mod cons and was the best nights sleep I've had in ages. Would highly recommend and would happily stay again myself if in Madrid.

Fin lejlighed, der var alt hvad man har brug for, tag endelig imod Marlens tilbud om at booke restauranter i nærområdet, vi var for langsomme og alt var optaget da vi ankom. Det er et livligt og hyggeligt kvarter, husk ørepropper, hvis du ikke er natteravn!
Alt fungerede perfekt, kan varmt anbefales.
Apartment was in great location and exactly as pictured. Marlen was very helpful throughout.  Great Value.
Marlen was such a great host! Very helpful, taking care of us with great communication.

Estuvimos muy a gusto.
El apartamento es muy agradable, está nuevo y muy bien decorado.
En el mismo centro de Madrid, junto a la Gran Vía, Fuencarral etc.
Está muy limpio y cómodo y Marlene es un encanto!
Gracias por todo

Perfect location! Lots of great bars and restaurants right around the corner. Clean small apt with all you need.
Marlen was very helpful and communication was great.
Very satisfied with this booking!
Only downsides were hot water only lasted 5 min in the shower and we had to pay 20 € extra for arriving after 8 pm (which is like 3 hrs before dinner in Spain).

Muy contentos de haber elejido este apartamento en Madrid.
Inmejorable ubicacion .
Bien equipado ,agradable, comodo para pareja .las fotos reflejan muy bien la realidad .
Muchos bares y restaurantes en cercania inmediata .Si buscas mucho silencio , no lo encontraras ya que hay bullicio de los jovenes que disfrutan en la zona , especialmente los fines de semana.para nosotros no nos molesto .
Marlen es muy buena anfitriona, nos recibio muy bien y se preocupo por nuestras necesidades durante la semana.

Marlen and Alfredo made us feel very welcome! The apartment is beautiful and is an incredible location on a very interesting street, we explored all the nearby areas from here and enjoyed ourselves immensely. Thanks very much! ¡Muchas Gracias!

Marlen was the perfect host who keep in touch throughout the whole stay!The flat is lovely.It is very comfortable and extremely clean.It is located on an amazing street with lots of bars,restaurants,etc.We would definitely stay there again.
Great little apartment in a very active part of Madrid. Shops and restaurants very close. It was a wonderful experience and I would recommend it to anyone.
El piso de marlen está muy bien ubicado , la zona ( malasaña ) está llena de restaurantes y tienditas increíbles . El apartamento cómodo y lindo , como en las fotos . Muy recomendado

Had a lovely week in this cozy little apartment at the heart of Madrid. Very modern, clean, and perfect for 2 people.
Very buzzing location with many shops and endless choice to eat and drink.
Marlen is brilliant. Always available and respond immediately to any contact. Any question or request was handled kindly and quickly. Will definitely stay there again in my next visit. Highly recommended!!
Wunderbar, sauber, nett und echt tolle Nachbarschaft.

La casa muy acogedora y la anfitriona muy amable y atenta.
En general todo muy bien.

Marlen's apartment is great! It's the perfect size for one or two people. Everything is super clean and well-organized. As well, Marlen greeted me in person, and had provided a lot of information on things to do while in Madrid.

The neighborhood is off of a main street, so there's always plenty of stuff to do nearby.
Ubicación excelente, en un barrio para explorar. Departamento agradable y cómodo para dos personas, provisto de lo necesario para pasar unos días en Madrid.
Excelente!!!! Es el calificativo para el servicio, facilidades y localidad.  Definitivamente se repite.. Margen gracias por tu hospitalidad.

We had three great nights in this beautiful flat! It is perfectly situated on a really cool
Street with great restaurants and bars and in walking distance of the best parts of Madrid. Having said that, the flat is still really nice and quiet. There is a good size bedroom and bathroom but the real highlight is the kitchen/lounge area with a sit up bar, balcony and lots of useful amenities. Marlen and Alfredo were both very friendly and helpful, both leading up to our stay and during, with lots of good recommendations. We would definitely recommend this for a couple and I'm sure we will be back! Simon and Olivia

Le damos un 10 al apartamento de Marlen! Además de muy limpio, el piso está decorado con muchísimo gusto y está repleto de detalles que hacen que te sientas como en tu propia casa. La ubicación es perfecta, en una calle llena de restaurantes y bares, y a corta distancia andando de las principales atracciones de Madrid. Marlen y su marido son encantadores y se aseguraron de que todo estuviera correcto durante nuestra estancia. Esperamos volver pronto a Madrid y sin duda repetiremos. Gracias por todo!!

Marlen was aanwezig in het appartement toen wij arriveerden. Zij geeft veel informatie en is goed bereikbaar en ook heel bereidwillig om je te helpen. Zij bood aan om restaurants te reserveren of een taxi te bestellen. Bovendien stond er een flesje champagne klaar om ons te verwelkomen

Die Unterkunft passt genau auf die Beschreibung, sauber und super zentral. Im direkten Umfeld befinden sich tolle Restaurants und Bars. Die Gran Via ist locker zu Fuß erreichbar. Marlen zeigte sich als Gastgeberin überaus freundlich und engagiert. Wir hatten eine schöne Zeit!
Great place to stay! Location could not be better and the appartment is clean and modern. Last but not least, Julie & Alfredo made us feel very welcome in this beautiful city!

El apartamento es muy lindo y muy bien ubicado, cerca a gran vía y a Fuencarral y hortaleza

Marlen fue muy hospitalaria y considerada y nos ayudo con varias cosillas.....
Casa muy bonita y limpia en un barrio maravilloso como es malasaña, gracias por todo! Hemos estado muy bien y hemos ahorrado mucho en metro por la buena situación de la casa...

Such a great apartment in a fantastic location with lots of great cafes, bars and restaurants nearby. Mar was such a lovely host, made some great recommendations for places to eat and drink and very kindly made some reservations for us too!
This place is perfect for 2 or 3 people and the sofa bed is very comfy too!
Will definitely return next time we're in Madrid!
Apartment is in a great area and Marlen is great to work with.
Marlen is amazing and her apartment is in the perfect location!

Estuvo pendiente de nuestra llegada, nos esperó en el piso para explicarnos alguna cosilla del apartamento y entregarnos las llaves y durante nuestra estancia estuvo en contacto con nosotros por si necesitábamos algo.

Logement très agréable, décoré avec goût et très propre. Nous avons été très bien accueillies par Mar. Le logement est situé en plein centre, sa localisation est parfaite ! Pour ceux qui souhaiterait un logement au calme a noter que l'appartement est situé juste à côté d'un bar

My husband and I stayed at Marlen and Alfredo's apartment 3 nights and had a fantastic time. Alfredo met us because we were running a little late and he showed us the apartment and all the fabulous information they comprised for the area. The apartment has everything you could want/need and was very clean. Marlen contacted us next day to see if we needed any help with reservations or anything. She made us a reservation down the street at La Pescadera. This was great. Only thing is a little noisy as it is in a very busy bar and restaurant area. The outside noise can last until wee small hours of the morning. We had no trouble sleeping in the bedroom but someone on the pullout sofa may be bothered by noise especially on weekend. May need to stagger showers by about 5-10 minutes for sufficient hot water.

All I can say is wow. Marlen provided an exceptional experience. Her apartment was beautiful and clean, located in a trendy, bustling area of Madrid. Many places are within walking distance and it is also close to the metro. Key exchange was easy. Marlen was also easily available for any problems, dinner reservations and any other needs a traveler may have. Definitely recommended.

Marlen's apartment was perfect. It is in the 1st floor with an elevator for taking the luggage. It was spotlessly clean and very well appointed. Marlen was great with he communication and provided good information on how to get there. Our taxi did take us to the incorrect address but no fault of our host. The location is a busy street and can be noisy but the bedroom is at the back of the apartment. It did not bother us at all. There were lovely touches done by Marlen - Nespresso machine; maps; towels beautifully wrapped up. We would definitely stay here again.

Mar was a great host. The apartment is perfect for a stay right in the heart of Madrid.

Lots of great restaurants and bars just walking distance and metro less than 5 minutes from the place.

The bed is really comfortable and the living room is cozy and perfect to relax after a day sightseeing.

I would totally recommend this place for anyone spending few days in Madrid .

Wonderful apartment in a superb location. My mum felt very comfortable and enjoyed her stay. Marlen was so helpful. Everything is as depicted in the images - spotless and modern with charm. Highly recommended.

Sin duda alguna el buen gusto de Marlen hace de su apartamento un lugar cálido y acogedor para pasar unos días en el centro de Madrid. Limpieza, orden y minuciosos detalles son entre otros, los motivos por los que volvería a hospedarme en mis próximas visitas a la capital, si es que hay disponibilidad!! Súper recomendable, da gusto ver cómo hay personas que se toman esto muy en serio. Del 1 al 10... 11'5!!
Fine apparterment in a nice neighborhood. Evenings and weekends, it is noisy. Near the subway downtown Madrid. Nicely decorated. Comfortable room / bedroom. And a warm welcome.

I'll start this review by saying that Marlen is lovely and we couldn't have asked for a better host.

If you're the sort of person who insists on peace and quiet at all times then this may not be the best venue for you as the little street outside is quite busy. However, it's mostly not traffic noise, it's street noise made by the locals going about their business and for me this added to the charm of staying right in the center of a big city. Simply closing the balcony doors eliminates most of the noise. There are bars, restaurants, a supermarket and all sorts of interesting happenings within metres of the front door and I absolutely loved it.

The apartment itself was spotlessly clean and modern and felt homely rather than the usual tired, unloved look of most holiday rentals.

I highly recommend this apartment as the perfect place to experience inner city life in Madrid.

PS. If you arrive by train and don't have a lot of luggage then try to walk to the apt rather than take a taxi as the 45min walk is interesting and enjoyable and gives one a good idea of the lay-out of the area.

Marlen is a great host. She greet us professionally. We arrived early and she was kind enough to let us keep the bags in the apartment while she was doing cleaning. The apartment is super clean, and got everything that a traveler needs.

Marlen's home is beautiful and the pictures provided online are accurate. She greeted us when we arrived and gave us a tour of the apartment and all its amenities.

The apartment is a 5 minute walk from the metro and Gran Via street. There are plenty of cafes, bars and shops near by.

Prior to our arrival, Marlen sent us helpful information about her city, things to see, places to eat and more! During our stay Marlen answered all questions within 30 minutes or less and checked up on us when we had a personal issue to take care of. She was also helpful in arranging a taxi on our departure.

Overall an excellent host, a beautiful home and located in a great neighborhood. My girlfriend and I will definitely be looking to book this apartment again when we return to Madrid. You can book this apartment with confidence!

Our trip to Madrid could not have been any better!  Marlen was always connected with us offering advice on restaurants and sites in Madrid, as well as, Segovia and Toledo.  The apartment was clean and ideally situated to see all the sites Madrid had to offer.  The only drawback, as we were a family of four, was that the front of the apartment was a bit loud at night making sleeping a little bit difficult.  Thanks, Marlen! You were great!

Marlen was a wonderful host! The apartment was very easy to find, was just as clean and cute as the pictures, and had a really great and central location and felt very safe. She was very helpful with questions we had, having a cab pick us up to head back to the airport early in the morning and checked in a few times! We had to stager our showers for enough hot water like a few other guests, but that is pretty typical for that area. Highly recommended and would def stay here again!

Marlen and Alfredo are wonderful hosts with a great space in the most lively part of Madrid. Marlen checked in with us frequently to see how things were going, responding to any questions we had within minutes. The apartment itself is exactly as shown, lovely and well appointed. The street it's located on is buzzing, lined with fantastic restaurants and a popular theatre. There's also a wonderful little square just up the road that connects it to Gran Via. A grocery store no more than 30 seconds away (and directly across from our favourite restaurant) was also very useful. We would not hesitate to stay at Marlen's place again, and recommend it to anyone looking into visiting Madrid. Thanks Mar!

Marlen was a great host and made sure that we felt welcome and found everything we needed. The apartment is really nice, tidy and well equipped. The area is lively and there are a lot of great restaurants and bars very close to the apartment. We really liked the neighborhood and enjoyed our stay. Thank you Marlen!

A charming apartment! The location is fantastic and the area has many great shops and restaurants. Marlen is a fantastic host, her help figuring out restaurants made the trip even better! I would absolutely recommend staying here!

Todo perfecto. El apartamento es precioso, con todo lo necesario para una estancia cómoda. La ubicación es excelente. Marlen es una anfitriona muy atenta, nos envío información de lugares interesantes de Madrid, nos fue consultando cómo estábamos y si necesitábamos algo.

The apartment has a nice view. Very nice location in the center of Madrid. The host was very kind and friendly, she received us in  the apartment and gave us directions. The apartment is very comfortable and clean.

I had an amazing time in Madrid. Thanks Mar for the great experience, the apartment was nice and and a great location.
Will definitely coming back!
We really enjoyed our stay at Marlen' place. House was very clean and in a very convenient location. Marlen was very helpful and made sure we were well looked after.

The apartment is in the perfect location and is very modern and clean. The pictures are very accurate. We fit four people comfortably. The only small concern was that we had to shower about an hour apart because the water heater was small, but it didn't really bother us because cold showers felt good in the Madrid heat! Mar gave us amazing restaurant reccomendations...some of the best food on our trip. Highly recommend staying here.

We had a very pleasant stay at Marlen's place. The apartment was super clean, well located and very cozy. There was nice coffee, good aircon and a good shower. I would definitely recommend this place to anyone visiting Madrid.

todo ha sido perfecto, Marlen ha sido súper atenta con nosotros y hemos tenido la seguridad de que si nos faltaba cualquier cosa ella estaría allí para ayudarnos. El apartamento era justo como imaginábamos, aunque no hemos parado en nuestro viaje, hemos descansado la mar de bien en el piso y todo era muy correcto. La zona donde se encuentra el apartamento nos ha gustado mucho, hay muchísimo ambiente para la gente joven y realmente hemos estado muy a gusto.
Totalmente recomendable.

Ál is a wonderful host, the apartment is well located not far from Gran Via and all the most famous monuments of Madrid.
Outside everything is close, tabac, supermarket, bar and restaurant.
Ál help us: my girlfriend were sick, and he bring us to the chemistry taking on his personal time.
Ál, thank very much! It was a real pleasure to meet you!
An apartment highly recommended!!!
Todo tal y como se ve en las fotos
Perfect location for exploring and really comfortable place. Although only a short stay, we had a wonderful time. Ál was very welcoming and full of recommendations
Great location, fantastic studio and amazing host!
Al's place was absolutely perfect! He was so nice and helpful and would stay there again!!!

Adorei minha estadia na casa de Ál! Ele me recebeu super bem me dando várias dicas de passeios, mapas, aplicativos para melhorar ainda mais meus dias em Madrid! É perto de tudo!!! Amei! Ahhh, o chuveiro é Maravilhoso!!! Tudo melhor que nas fotos!!! Gracias por todo Ál!!! Becitos

El apartamento está decorado a la última y en una zona muy céntrica y animada (Malasaña). La comunicación con Al fue muy buena y cuando llegamos nos dio muy buenos consejos sobre bares y restaurantes locales. Sin duda lo recomiendo!

Light, spacious and arty studio in a fun and pretty neighbourhood. Close to all the main attractions - can walk pretty much everywhere. Al is a great host. He was happy to provide clean sheets when I asked and gave me some lovely scented candles in the middle of my stay. He also provided lots of tips from the 'local' perspective that really added to my experience in Madrid.

I cannot rave enough about our stay at Al's place! We arrived in Madrid to find that our previous Airbnb had cancelled last minute. We found Al's place and messaged him, he responded straight away and we were able to check in that day. He went to the extra effort to make sure our checkin was lovely even though it was so last minute. During our stay he was super helpful and gave us heaps of great advice on places to sightsee, eat and drink at.
The apartment itself is equally as awesome! Super clean, well stocked with all necessities and snacks, and amazingly decorated and comfortable - exactly like the pictures. The location of the apartment could not be any better. You are walking distance from everything in Madrid, including the shopping district and all the main tourist attractions. Walk 1 minute in any direction and you will find countless cool bars, cafes and restaurants. We stayed in Madrid for 3 nights and this location made our busy schedule so much easier! Thanks again Al for a perfect introduction to Madrid and your amazing hospitality! We highly recommend this place!
Very nice place, nice neighborhood, nice host.
AI is very kind and friendly! Thanks a lot!
Genial todo, situado en lo mejor del Barrio de Malasaña, que es de los mejores para disfrutar de Madrid, y Al, el anfitrión cuida todos los detalles
Al was friendly and helpful, and we thoroughly enjoyed our stay. If you need a clean and quaint stay close to everything, we would happily recommend this place.

Al's apartment is as pictured and in the heart of malasaña, al was an extremely helpful and welcoming guest and would definintely  reccomend! My girlfriend ended up staying there alone and Al helped her navigate the city easily.

Great spacious and full of light apartment right in the heart of the city. Al was so friendly and full of info on the best place to go and eat. The ideal stop over for a night with all you need for a snack and breakfast in the morning.
Todo fantástico, el apartamento decorado al detalle, Al se preocupa por los huéspedes dando indicaciones para comer, cenar, etc.. repetiremos seguro.

Al's place is near to a lot of restaurants and bars, but the street itself & apartment are quiet enough that I wasn't disturbed at all sleeping. Al was very responsive; when I asked questions I got an answer quickly. The place is clean, colorful and bright, the fridge was stocked with breakfast & snacks. Even better, Al had great tips for places to visit in Madrid, and took the time to draw them out on a map for me. I felt well taken care of.

Large studio in great Madrid location of Malasana with loads going on around. Fun deco, comfy bed, quiet and bright, loads of fresh clean towels and well-stocked fridge and Madrid visitor info on hand. Al was available on my arrival and departure without problem.

Excellent stay at Al's studio. Check-in was very easy as Al was there to greet us as he lives on the floor below. Room itself was very clean and the location in the Masalaña area was great- close to great restaurants and bars, and not too far from the more touristy areas.

Moderno y limpio estudio en el centro de Madrid. A pesar de su ubicación, no hay ruidos en el exterior y el anfitrión es muy agradable y servicial. Muy recomendable, sin duda, repetiría alojamiento!
Beautiful and modern place to stay, located in the city centre! Al gave me many recomendations..definitely, nice place and super host to have a great time in Madrid!

We spent two nights at Al's place. The apartment is in a lively and exciting part of the city. It's convenient for many of the places you might want to go - we walked everywhere. Al was an extremely welcoming host, and shared some good local secrets with us. Highly recommended.

A fantastic apartment in a phenomenal neighborhood. Comfortable bed, large space, nice bottle of wine and snacks. A great host who was so helpful and yet respected our privacy.   We will stay here again.  Thanks Al!

L'appartement est très propre, bien situé et la literie très confortable. Al est un hôte très accueillant mettant tout à disposition pour ses locataires. Un seul bémol serait pour la salle de bain qui est toute petite

Al is the most gracious, friendly, and welcoming host. He gave us the best recommendations and we absolutely loved his apartment and the neighborhood. We didn't want to leave and are counting the days until we can come back!

The apartment was lovely and the location was perfect!  Al left lovely snacks and a bottle of wine.  He was so helpful with great advice as to the sites to see in beautiful Madrid.  And the bed was extremely comfortable!
Apartamento singular ubicado en zona muy animada y tiendas. A un paso de Fuencarral y Gran vía. Recomendable.
L'hôte, l'appartement, la localisation... tout était parfait 👍🏼 Je recommande

We had a fantastic stay at Al's place. It was in a great central and hip location that you can walk around. Ál was very friendly, accommodating, and good with communication. We loved his recommendations on what to do in the city. The studio itself was designed well and a bigger than what I anticipated. We'd be happy to stay here again! Thanks for everything, Ál!

Al (el propietario) es encantador y si tienes algún problema o alguna duda, puedes llamarle. El alojamiento es mejor que en la foto. Es luminoso, espacioso y tiene un armario amplio. El baño está bien y la "cocina" tiene una pequeña nevera y un fregadero, así que te puedes preparar algo (como el desayuno). Buena conexión wifi, muy silencioso y a menos de 10 minutos de la Gran Vía y de la Glorieta de Bilbao. Hay varias estaciones de metro cerca. Le he dado 5 estrellas porque sinceramente creo que las merece.

This spacious fourth-floor apartment is located in a lively and hip neighborhood. Al greeted us at the apartment and was very helpful in introducing us to the space as well as the nearby businesses and restaurants. Al also kindly gifted us a bottle of wine and provided various non-alcoholic beverages, some muffins and buns, as well as a variety of spreads and condiments. The apartment is thoughtfully furnished and decorated. From the "wet room" to the living area, Al has thought of everything to make the stay more comfortable. The light in the apartment is beautiful and although it is in a lively neighborhood, the apartment itself is very peaceful and quiet.

Our stay with Al confirms why he is a super host! I cannot find something wrong with our stay and it has been one of my favorite locations in Europe! Al spoke excellent English, communicated awesome locations to visit in Spain, and supplied megan and I with wine, water, juice, and snacks. Perfect location as well as its central Madrid!
My wife and I had a great stay. All was very nice and friendly. He was available whenever we needed. Would stay again!

The apartment is very close to metro just within 5 mins walking distance. And there are many nice restaurants nearby. The host is very very nice and provided us with many useful travel info which brought us great time in Madrid. We have a nice 2 nights stay here. Will definitely stay here again in our next trip to Madrid.
Apartamento en la parte tranquila de malasaña, muy bien comunicado y con todo lo necesario para la estancia . Cerca del transporte público, bares y tiendas

We loved Al's airbnb. It was in a great location in the cute area of Malasaña. He provided us with a helpful map and gave us several recommendations! The place is lovely and has everything you may need in there! I would stay there again!
This was our second time staying at Al's stylish apartment. Again, the comfort, quietness, and location close to nice restaurants and shops is unbeatable. Highlight recommended!

It’s going to be very common to say that everything was perfect, but not saying it wouldn’t be fair.
It wouldn’t be fair neither to say that the pictures of the place are realistic : the real thing is even more magic !!
So, to be short.
⁃The flat is just splendid : cosy comfy like any home you’d dream of, decorated with tremendous good taste, pleasant to spend time in…
⁃The neighborhood : from what we’ve seen in 5 days, Malasaña is by faaaaaaar the best place to be in Madrid !  Loads of nice restaurants, shops, lovely architecture, some of a hipster atmosphere but most places are still affordable. Madrid’s brunch capital for sure ! But paradoxically, not too touristee, so you really get this feeling to live like a local.
⁃The host : Al’s welcome is warm, helpful, flexible,  all attentive to the little details that make you feel at ease.
Thank you for that…
We wouldn’t imagine to come back in Madrid without trying to stay at your place again !

Al's place is bright, fun and located in the hippest area of Madrid. The shopping, dining, drinking and nightlife options are amazing.
Al is a brilliant host, with an incredible attention to detail and style. He is also on hand to give advice on where to go and what to do.
You'll have everything you need, and much more than you expect - iron, fruit, tea, coffee, snacks, sound system, Netflix - the list goes on.
Awesome place! Book!

My partner and I stayed in Al's apartment for 2 nights in August and we were very happy with Al's warm welcome, easy check-in and recommendations for places to eat and see. The apartment is located on the top floor of a 4-story building in the trendy Malasaña area and, while there is no lift, the climb is definitely worth it. The space is artistically decorated, well-proportioned, the wet room is functional and the bed is very comfortable. The quick wifi also came in handy. We would recommend Al's apartment is a great base of operations to explore the delights of Madrid!

A lovely bright space to stay in Madrid, it's central, a couple of mins from the metro, and shops / restaurants. Al was a very accommodating host, and a lovely guy.
The space has all you need, it's well designed, bright and airy. Highly recommended
Great place and location. Al is a very nice host also

Al's studio was the perfect place to stay during our stay in Madrid. It was a 5 minute walk to the Metro and short walking distances to bars and restaurants in the area. It was never noisy at night. Al was very nice and kind. He took the time to explain how to get around the city and the sites that we should see. He also left us a bottle of delicious wine along with pastries and juices to have. Will definitely stay here again if traveling to Madrid.

High recommended!! Al's place is just as it's written and as you see- Nice facilities, complementaries and location.
(I didn't mind much about staying centro but it turned out it was perfect to walk famous sights in the city. )
I fully enjoyed my 2 nights stay in Madrid. His place is easy to find and Al welcomed me at the apartment. He's friendly, knowledgeable about Madrid's sights. It was nice to know him. If you are keen to hear local's advice, I recommend to stay in his place.

Al was a delightful host, just an overall great guy! He was accommodating to an earlier check-in, and met us personally to show us around the Airbnb, how to use the air-conditioning, TV streaming services, etc. He even left some complimentary pastries and snacks, and a bottle of wine! The attention to detail was amazing--for example, we forgot about adapters, and he had outlet adapters in the place for us to use. The space was beautiful--strategically installed windows and lighting system, high ceiling, tastefully decorated. We have absolutely no complaints at all about the whole experience. The location was ideally located, with easy access to the museums and local restaurants. Thanks for a wonderful time, Al--10/10 would recommend.

Fantastic place. Clean, spacious, close to public transport and one of the coolest areas in Madrid. One of the best Airbnb beds I've slept on. Al is a very friendly guy who is easy to communicate with at any hour. Great airconditioning for the hot Madrid weather. Be prepared to walk up four flights of stairs to get to your room. Would 100% stay here again.
Al's studio is right in the heart of malasaña, with lots of restaurants, bars and boutique stores a few minutes away. Al was very kind, and even left a lovely bottle of wine for my friend and I.

A great space in a fabulous area convenient to all the sights and cafe's and restaurants. Al was a great host and went out of his way to ensure our bags were stored because we arrived before check in time. Al was very generous in explaining everything we needed to know and was a pleasure to deal with. The apartment was particularly quiet given it's very central location. Thanks Al for sharing your apartment with us!
Fantastic studio - everything about the experience was just as described and better! Loved meeting Al and hearing his story.

Die Wohnung befindet sich im Zentrum von Madrid ( Malasana ) nördlich der
Gran Via und in Nachbarschasft zum Viertel Sol al sur. Es ist eine ruhige, saubere, helle, moderne und geräumige Wohnung an guter Lage. Al ist sehr freundlich, diskret und hilfsbeereite Gastgeber. Er gab uns hauseigene Stadtplan von Madrid mit Tipps zu Sehenswürdigkeiten, Restaurants, Bars, und Ausflugstouren. Wir hatten einen wunderbaren und unvergesslichen Aufenthalt in Madrid und liebte diese Wohnung!

Highly recommend at stay in this apartment! A clean fully self-contained apartment in a great location and ran by a wonderful host, Ál. He was very friendly, gave us a warm welcome upon arrival and provided us with a map and list of recommendations for our trip. The apartment contains every single thing you could possibly need; Ál has clearly thought of everything!

We really enjoyed our stay. The location was amazing and so was Al! Great communication and the check-in was simple. He greeted us right away and stayed to talk to educate us about the location, places to visit and recommendations. It was very helpful. The location alone was exactly what we were looking for. It was in a quieter area out of the touristy places. There was so many restaurants, coffee shops, boutiques and pubs nearby. There is also a grocery store close to pick up a few things if you wish. All the top attractions are walking distance as well. This area is very safe. In all, our stay was wonderful! Thank you Al for everything!

My stay in Al's loft apartment was short and sweet! I couldn't have asked for a better place to stay! With only 24 hours to see Madrid, I was able to walk to all the major sites from the apartment and when I wanted to escape the tourist rush, I just came back to the apartment and drank beer in the squares with the locals. Al was such a warm and welcoming host, who loves his city. I didn't do much planning for this trip, and when I asked him for some tips, he sat down with me and helped me strategize how to maximize my time in Madrid - even highlighted the must sees on a map! I couldn't have asked for a better stay!
超级好的房东，我们十一点才到 他还在窗口等我们。入住以后帮我们讲解了景点，而且延长了退房时间，省去了我们找行李寄存的麻烦。房间很宽敞 区位也很方便 可以步行到大部分主要景点。非常棒的住宿体验！
Great location. Al is a wonderful host with helpful tips for getting the most out of your time in Madrid. The coffee and snacks were a welcome touch.

Este es definitivamente el lugar ideal si quieres ir a Madrid a quedarte en un lugar espectacular, cerca a restaurantes, bares, galerías, etc. Al fue muy especial con nosotros, nos ayudó en todo momento, estuvo 100% pendiente de nosotros.
Recomiendo este lugar por su espacio, el apartamento es hermoso y tiene todo lo que podemos necesitar. Espero volver pronto!
Muchas gracias!
Una persona encantadora, educada y amable, compendia lo mejor que cabe esperar de un anfitrión, muchas gracias Al por todo y hasta pronto.

We’ve had a great stay at Al’s place. The location was super convenient within walking distance to all main tourist spots and within a trendy “hipster” area with lots of nightlife, quirky shops and great modern or traditional tapas bars and restaurants. We prefer the traditional Spanish cuisine and the area didn’t disappoint with lots of lovely tapas bars, but for those who prefer a modern twist, there was plenty of choice literally around every corner.
The apartment is as seen on pictures so very cool, with good WiFi, fully stocked kitchen / fridge and wine on arrival :-) So it was nice not having to worry about going to a supermarket to buy the essentials on our first day as everything was there. And coffee and croissants worked a treat in the mornings :-)
Al is a very friendly guy, keen to make sure you feel at home and that you enjoy your stay. We asked for recommendations of places to eat and drink and he gave us a map and marked his favourite places! Our particular favourite was a very traditional little Spanish bar - Bodega de la Ardosa which was just down the road. They served vermouth on tap and amazing Spanish omelettes / tortillas.
Can definitely recommend Al and his apartment! Thanks for a great stay! :-)

Al's place is in a beautiful old building but once you step inside it feels bright, modern and clean. The pictures don't do the space justice because it's quite remarkable. The open rafters and bright colors make it a place you want to spend time in. Al provided us with many amenities including snacks that were also unexpected. The bed is very comfortable and the TV has Netflix should you want to spend some time in one evening.
Perhaps the best part is the location in Malasana which is literally steps away from many places to shop, eat and drink. We ended up staying out late every night because there were so many fun things to do right outside our door.
We definitely recommend Al's place and will likely be back soon because there were still so many shops and bars we didn't get to try during our short stay.

We really enjoyed our stay. Al was super friendly and took the time to give us lots of recommendations of places to visit. The apartment was lovely, clean and colourful (be aware it is up several flights of stairs).  We would recommend this apartment to anyone wanting to stay centrally in Madrid. Thanks for a great stay!

This apartment is the sweetest spot in Madrid, we are so lucky to have found this on our first visit to the city and I would 100% stay here next time! Al is the most thoughtful host and will cater to your personal needs! It's a lovely little apartment in a cool location and next to the most authentic bar called Ardosa!! I would recommend you book early!!
