Goede locatie, snelle reactie en goede tips. Appartement voldoet aan de verwachtingen, stijlvol en schoon.

Al was very responsive and helpful with directions to his place. He met us when we checked-in and showed us around the unit. He lives in the building in case you need anything. Al goes above and beyond and provides snacks, drinks, maps, and converters for electronics. The unit is small, but nicely decorated and includes all the necessities for a wonderful stay. The location in Malasaña is also great for shopping, eating, and drinking.

Great location and very friendly host.  Al provided us with great recommendations for this hip area of the city and even made available an umbrella without asking due to the rain.  The bed was incredibly comfortable, and snacks and a bottle of wine were offered.  We would definitely stay here again.

Al was a very warm and friendly person. He helped us with our luggage and had thoughtfully stocked the kitchen with snacks and groceries. His apartment was clean and delightful.  However, it was his genuine friendliness that made our stay a very happy one. Thank you Al and hope to see you again soon !

This place is great, located in a central place but without any noise.
Al is a super host and very kind and very helpful with local tips.

Al stayed up to greet me even when I arrived near 1 a.m., and he spent time to chat and give me tips on what to see and do. He stocked the kitchen with all sorts of food and drink. The place was clean and had everything I needed. The only drawback was a lack of natural light -- you have to keep the blinds down due to nearby neighbors. Very convenient location within a bustling neighborhood full of places to eat, drink, shop and people-watch.

It is a cozy small apartment located in the heart of the city. I really enjoyed my stay here and found all the nice things to make me feel like home: from Netflix to breakfast. Al was very helpful with the communications and showed me the place in detail when I arrived. I will definitely stay here again.
Magnifica experiencia, repetiría, Al ha sido un magnifico anfitrión ;)
Best Airbnb I’ve stayed at and will definitely book again. White and bright cool decor and a great location!
What a trendy apartment in a old Spanish building in 1 of the best spot in Madrid with such a great host ! Al gives you tips and Madrid's life style to make your stay perfect.

Very stylish and clean place. It's in prime location, lots of hip shops, restaurants, and bars.
Best of all, our host Al is exceptionally hospitable. He went above and beyond making sure our stay was comfortable.
I will definitely be booking again with him when I return back to Madrid!

I stayed in Al's flat for two nights on a business trip. The place is easy to reach from the airport and located in a young buzzy neighbourhood which I really enjoyed hanging out in. Al gave me a super warm welcome which always makes a difference. The flat is nicely decorated, bright and comfy enough to spend some time in. Good selection of snacks too!

El apartamento está muy bien tal y como sale en las fotos ,su anfitrión es muy atento y la hospitalidad ha sido maravillosa además de todos los detalles que tiene en el apartamento,la ubicación es maravillosa
Great location, and perfect for couple or solo traveler. Al was very friendly. He made check-in easy, provided great spots to check out around the city. Definitely would stay again!
Appartement très bien situé, propre et stylisé. Al est très accueillant et de bons conseils. Vous serez chez lui comme chez vous :)

La ubicación del apartamento es perfecta para visitar el centro de Madrid, ¡esta cerca todo! El barrio esta genial. Al es muy atento y nos dio recomendaciones sobre sitios donde comer y cenar, ¡no nos faltó de nada! Muy recomendable, sin duda si vuelvo a Madrid cogere este sitio de nuevo. Experiencia 10.

Al’s flat was one of the best Airbnb’s I’ve ever stayed in. The space is awesome, the location is perfect, the bed is so comfortable and Al is a super host. He gave us a bunch of local tips of must see restaurants/bars, shopping and all were a 10/10. Al is the coolest host I’ve ever met, wish I️ got to stay here longer but I️ will definitely stay here when I return to Madrid.
Fantástico apartamento, ubicado en una de las mejores zonas de Madrid.
Encantador ático ubicado en el barrio de Malasaña, lo mejor sin duda el contacto previo directo con Al, responsable del alojamiento, que es un maravilloso anfitrión.

Se llega muy fácil desde la estación de metro. Al estuvo atento y en contacto en todo momento, nos recibió estupendamente y nos dio mapas y un panorama de la ciudad y buenos consejos! El departamento es muy bello decorado excelentemente! Muy recomendable!
Great flat,  beautiful building,  central hip location,  good laughs with Al.  Totally recommend!

I cannot recommend this gorgeous abode enough. Not only is the design of this architectural gem a beautiful sight to behold, but the thoughtful amenities Al provides (snacks, croissants, Cava, cookies, etc), central location, local tips, and warm hospitality are second to none. Al kindly carried our luggage up the stairs and was extremely communicative every step of the way. Madrid will forever hold a special place in my heart thanks to our New Year's stay here!

My boyfriend and I stayed at Al’s place for 3 nights and we loved it! The apartment has everything you need and is very quiet, stylish and comfortable. We loved the location and found a lot of great places to eat, enjoyed walking around the neighborhood and easily traveled to see the sights and museums in Madrid. Al was also very thoughtful in giving us a map and explaining the different areas we should check out. On his recommendation we saw an amazing flamenco show at a tablao, it was definitely one of the highlights on our trip.

I've stayed in many Airbnb's around the world, and this one is my favorite so far! The studio apartment is the perfect size for one person, and cozy for 2 people if you are good friends or partners (and the bed is big and SUPER comfortable). Location-wise, it could not be better—you are in the middle of the hippest neighborhood in Madrid, steps from all the cool cafes, bars and shops, and within very close walking distance to tourist-friendly plazas, markets, parks and museums.
Having the fridge and cupboard stocked with bread, fruit, coffee and tea before I arrived was a fantastic amenity to have in the morning—though the apartment is around the corner from La Bicicleta, a popular all-day cafe with good coffee, wifi and decent food if you feel like going out for breakfast. The apartment is on the 4th floor (5th floor for Americans), so if a basic level stairmaster workout scares you then this might not be the right place for you. The bathroom is a "wet room," which means everything in the bathroom gets when when you take a shower. If you've never experienced it before, it's a pretty typical setup for small flats in Europe, and ends up being less of a big deal than you might think.
Al was a friendly gracious host who really went above and beyond with suggesting fun things to do, see and eat in Madrid. He was easy to contact, very responsive, and even called to make a reservation for us at a super charming restaurant a short walk from the apartment.
I would definitely stay here again! Al is an awesome host.

Mar es excelente anfitriona. Desde el momento en que mostramos interés en el apartamento no paró de estar en comunicación con nosotras. El apartamento es hermoso, justo como se ve en las fotos, excelente localización y limpieza. Mar nos hizo sentir como en casa en todo momento. Todo lo que necesitas saber Mar lo tiene disponible para ti. Definitivamente queremos volver a Madrid pero todo va a depender de la disponibilidad de este apartamento porque nos encantó. Tres puertorriqueñas muy agradecidas. ¡Hasta pronto Mar!
Lovely apartment! Everything you needed and great location for exploring Madrid. Hosts were very helpful, even ordered us a taxi for our return to the airport. Thank you

I stayed 7 nights at Marlen's apartment.
The apartment was really well organized. The place was cleaned and extremely well prepared. It was more than described. The decoration is great. The location was perfect, right in the city center, I didn't have to use any transportation during my stay. Marlen was very helpful, if I wanted to ask something, she answered immediately, no matter when.
Next time in Madrid, Marlen's place without any hesitations.
Thank you Marlen.
Dan

The location of this apartment is great! It's close to many sightseeing attractions and Metro.
And the host was so nice. She and her husband helped us a lot!

El piso de Marlen es realmente genial. Tiene todo lo necesario para una gran estadía en Madrid.
Esta muy bien ubicado para poder llegar caminando a todas partes.
Nos hospedamos con nuestra hija pequeña y lo disfrutamos mucho.
Gracias Marlen!

We had a great stay in Mar's apartment! It was lovely and clean and had great facilities! The location is very central so we walked everywhere and didn't buy a metro ticket, although there is a station only a few minutes away! Mar was a great host and made us feel at home, thank you!!
Genial anfitriona. El piso estaba perfecto, preparado para todo. Ella es muy atenta.

The apartment is really nice, like on the pictures. Perfect for 2 people, little less space then for 4 persons. Also very clean, all you need for your stay in Madrid. The neighborhood is fantastic, walk to city center or to metro station.
High recommend!

Our stay at Mar's place was wonderful! The apartment was impeccably cleaned with attention to detail. There was even a ribbon tied around the fresh towels for us. Mar went above and beyond, not only recommending amazing restaurants but also making reservations for us! Even booking us a cab to the airport. Location was perfect. Absolutely recommend this place!
We had an amazing time here! Such a wonderful location. Will definitely be coming back and sending friends. The cafe across the street with the green shutters is delish!

We had a wonderful time in this apartment. The location was almost perfect with short ways to the metro, supermarket, bars and Gran Via. The apartment itself was very clean and equipped with everything we needed.

We had a wonderful short break in Madrid, which Marlen made so easy! The apartment was modern, clean and homely, as well as being very central. We had everything we needed, and Marlen was on hand to help us the whole time! Thank you!

We found the apartment to be fantastic. Comfortable bed and the apartment was well equipped. The location was easy to find and close to everything.
Marlen was wonderful she gave us lots of tips and made a dinner reservation for us. She was very accommodating and made our stay fantastic.

Marlen was an enthusiastic host that gave us the introduction of Madrid before our journey in Spain. The location of her apartment was awesome and perfect for exploring the central city by walking. Highly Recommended.

This is such a great apartment and the location is perfect. We fell in love with the street straight away, and with Malasana...it is such a lively atmosphere and so pictaresque. There are some great places to explore just around the corner. So many really lovely restaurants, bars and terazzas... We haven't stopped talking about Madrid since! Marlen is a great host and very helpful and responsive. The apartment is very comfortable and modern with everything you need and just standing on the terrace you can feel like you are right in the middle of things. Thanks for a wonderful stay!

Mar's place made our stay in Madrid that much more enjoyable. The apartment was clean and came with all the essentials needed. It was perfectly situated in Madrid and everything was within short walking distance. Mar was an amazing host that gave us the best restaurant recomendations and was extremely responsive. Thanks again for everything Mar xo

All ok. Marlen is a very kind person, She was available 24/24 h to help you for everything. The apartment is delicious and It is in a great place but a little small. So I suggest it for max 3 persons also because the bed sofa is not very confortable (I think was perfect for 1 person). I did not like the bedroom without windows.

This was my favorite Airbnb experience, Mar came to greet us upon our arrival,she is very easy going.
the apartment was perfect like the pic. Clean, very well designed and fully equipped.
my husband and I love this apartment!

The apartment is in the best location in Madrid! We loved the street that we were on - very lively, full of the coolest bars and restaurants, and great for people watching (bring earplugs if you're a light sleeper!). Mar's husband came to meet us at the apartment and the communication was great. Mar was super helpful - upon our request, she booked a wonderful flamenco show, and arranged a cab for us to the airport. We tried the restaurants she recommended and they were fantastic. The apartment is on the small side, but is perfect for a couple. We would stay here again.
La ubicación perfecta y el piso impoluto. Exactamente como aparece en las fotos. No dudaría en repetir.

We had a great stay at Marlen's apartment. Marlen (and her husband who met us the day we arrived to give us keys and a tour of the apartment) are both very caring hosts. Mar checked in on us, and gave us several great recommendations on where to go and where to eat in Madrid.

Her apartment is very clean and stylishly decorated! Marlen has great taste! She provides a great expresso maker with coffee pods to go along with it! While the bedroom is quiet and very comfortable at night, the pull out sofa is not for light sleepers as the living room overlooks the street which can be very lively late into the night. But overall we loved staying at Mar's, it was a highlight in our visit to Madrid!
100 % recomendable , departamento tal cual las fotos, marlene sin palabras , amabilidad total , sin duda nuestra pri ima visita a madrid. Sra ahi nuestro alojamiento
Good location for exploring Madrid. Marlen was very helpful and quick to respond. She even arranged a taxi to the airport for us. Bring earplugs if you are a light sleeper as it can be loud at night.

El apartamento de Marlen es excelente!! Tiene de todo, súper  limpio  y  ordenado para hacerte sentir como en casa. Recibimos un gran apoyo en especial de Marlen durante nuestra estadía, definitivamente son cosas que marcan la diferencia . Esperamos volver pronto!!

Excelente apartamento, recomendo. O anfitrião foi muito atencioso, ótima comunicação. O apartamento é novo, muito bonito, super limpo e com excelente localização. O prédio tem elevador, o que facilita o transporte das malas. Adorei a estadia e recomendo a todos.
L'appartement, décoré avec soin, est parfaitement situé pour partir à la découverte de la ville. Le quartier est animé sans être bruyant. C'est une adresse à retenir !

Marlen was a fabulous host. She was on call the entire time and helped orient us to the neighborhood, book reservations at restaurants and clubs, and gave us lots of helpful suggestions about sightseeing in and around Madrid. The apartment is located in a very trendy, busy neighborhood with hundreds of cafes, bars and restaurants within walking distance. Easy access to metro and all major attractions. The apartment was new, very clean, and modern. You will love staying in Marlen's apartment and Madrid!

The neighbourhood is great and very lively. Marlene was very helpful with helping us find the house. She also gave us great recommendations on where to go in Madrid and even made a reservation for us. The house is well equipped and comfortable.

Mar was very helpful in giving a lot of information about Madrid. Her husband met us and was very nice. They were both very communicative and interested in making our stay enjoyable. Great location, a bit loud for the person who sleeps in living room but all in all was a great stay.

Marlen's apartment was amazing! We arrived early and Marlen was nice enough to show us around and let us leave our bags there as we walked around to our new surroundings. The apartment is on a side street but it very active with bars, shops, and a short walk to Grand Via. Lots of shopping, entertainment, and things to do! The amenities in the apartment were great everything you needed. We had such fabulous time and would stay again.

From the perspective of someone who stayed in the master bedroom - this place was great. A bit small but big enough for two people, and there's everything you need in the kitchen - we even cooked - and the bathroom. It's well located - we walked to all the sights nearby.
If you're planning on having someone stay on the sofa-bed, I'd warn you not to. The IKEA bed is cheap and uncomfortable - coupled with the very loud street noises (garbage collection + general party area) made it extremely difficult to sleep/relax there.
So again - if you're two and staying in the bedroom, this place is great. If you're two (or more) and plan on using the sofa-bed, don't.
Great location, very nice apartment. Would stay again when visiting Madrid!

Geweldig appartement, voor max. 2 personen, op loop afstand van de Gran Via! In het straatje, ochtends heerlijk ontbijten en ook een aantal lekkere restaurants. Kortom geweldig, tip voor Marlen is bij een verblijf van meer dan 2 dagen een setje extra handdoeken neer te leggen. Dat is een mega klein detail. Wij zouden wanneer we wederom Madrid bezoeken direct dit appartementje weer boeken!
Great place. Clean, great neighborhood and great host. Even scheduled our taxi to the train station when we left. Would absolutely stay here again.

Perfect location! Lots of shopping and places to eat near by. Very clean and Marlen gave awesome recommendations for places to eat!
Heater in the bathroom helped keep warm as like most places, there is a water tank so you can't take long, hot showers.

Wonderful Airbnb! Fantastic location--walking to multiple metro stops, very central. Walk to the palace in 20min. Great restaurants nearby. Small apartment but very beautiful and clean. The living room couch pulls out and one or two smaller adults can sleep on it--my boyfriend and I were able to sleep on it, but it was definitely snug. I'd suggest two adults in the bedroom and one on the oil out couch. Hot water is a hot commodity, 5 min shower max for one person, so make sure to space out showers. Excellent wifi throughout the place! Otherwise, Marlen and her husband were amazing hosts--met us at the place upon arrival, were available for questions or suggestions on restaurants etc, and even set up a taxi for our ride back to the airport. Overall, I couldn't be happier with our stay--it was truly amazing! Next time I come to Madrid I will definitely stay with them again!

Mar's apartment has a great location, with excellent restaurants nearby. The apartment is well equipped with all the necessary amenities. She is always quick to respond to any questions and would also check in on us now and then. Strongly recommend this place!
Lo recomiendo a todos
this is a phantastic flat, small - clean - very much center -, with a warm and greatful hospitality

El piso de Marlen es, ademas de muy limpio y bien equipado, un lugar comodo, muy bien ubicado para recorrer a pie todas las atracciones mas importantes de Madrid y para disfrutar de Malasaña uno de los barrios mas interesantes y divertidos de la ciudad. Lo recomiendo 100%!
Marlen was very accessible and responded quickly to all text messages. The apartment is small but very cozy and is in a great location.
Marlene's place was great. Everything we needed, comfy bed, clean. In the new hip neighborhood in Madrid. We loved staying there!

Estupendo lugar para disfrutar de la ciudad. La casa tiene todo lo que necesitas para pasar una buena estancia.
Alfredo y Marlen son unos anfitriones excepcionales. Flexibilidad para el check in & out. Esperamos poder repetir!

Loved this apartment! The location could not be more perfect. Right in Malasaña, a few blocks from Chueca, so you're walking distance to hundreds of cool bars and restaurants at all hours. You're also 10 minutes walk from Sol, Plaza Mayor, and Plaza De España and numerous Metro stops. The bedroom is more spacious than the pictures seem and despite the size, it's pretty roomy! Would definitely stay here again!

Marlen was a wonderful host, excellent communication. The place was very central, spacious, clean and quiet. We enjoyed our stay thoroughly and would stay at Marlen's again if we're ever back in Madrid. Thank you very much.

Marlen waited for me to arrive and greeted me at the apartment.  She even checked on me during the trip.  As a single female traveling alone, I greatly appreciated this.  The apartment is beautiful and as it appears in the pictures.  I loved this neighborhood.  It was close to every thing but not "touristy".  Great restaurants, bars and shopping.   The apartment is perfect for 1 or 2 people.
Would definitely stay here when I go to Madrid again

El estudio de Al es muy centrico y perfecto si busca algo cerca de Malasaña, Gran Via y Chueca. Al es muy simpatico, ha sido disponible con todas mis pedidas y sus consejos fueron perfectos! Recomiendo fermamente esta opción en Madrid
El estudio es muy céntrico y silencioso, Al es muy atento y simpático.

Totalmente recomendable! Estudio de lujo, limpieza perfecta y encuentras todo tipo de detalles.
Al un anfitrión 10
Netjes, mooi en schoon appartement in een leuke wijk vol bars en restaurants. De gastheer heeft veel goede tips voor lokale plekken.

Al was wonderful. Super responsive, kind and attentive. The apartment had little touches like coffee, tea, wine, croissants and bread and jams for the morning and more. Very stylish apartment located right off a super cool street full of hipster / student bars, restaurants and shops. Would highly recommend if you want to experience the “lower east side” of Madrid. About 20 Mom train ride to tourist attractions.

I loved staying at Al's place! He was so flexible and accommodating. The location was perfect- I was a 15 minute walk from everything. And the place had small, thoughtful touches, which I really appreciated; for example, it was raining when I visited, and he had a high quality umbrella ready to go. Muchas gracias!

Al’s apartment in Malasaña is the best Airbnb I’ve ever stayed at. The location is perfect, the decor is beautiful, the accommodations are incredible (a complementary bottle of wine?!), and Al’s advice about the city was invaluable. I hope to be back soon.
Todo perfecto. Al es encantador. Limpieza, ubicacion, comunicación con Al inmejorable. Espero poder quedarme de nuevo en su apartamento.

Al’s place was a great retreat during my trip to Madrid. I loved the vibe of the neighborhood, with it’s hip bars and trendy restaurants. It was easily walkable to the Tribunal subway or to Sol train station. Al was a fantastic host and gave me some great tips on where to eat in the neighborhood. The breakfast and snacks were a nice touch.

Al was very attentive, super friendly & accommodating on every level!
We really enjoyed our stay, the apartment is great & really modern and in such a fantastic location to everything. Would definitely recommend to all!!

Al is an incredible host. Love all of the things he leaves for his guests to make them feel like they are at home. Food, slippers, robes, candles, umbrella.
Super responsive, friendly and knowledgeable.
What else can you ask for!?
I was thinking, due to it being a busy nightlife area, it would be loud all night but it wasn’t (interior apartment helped make that happen).
I’ll be back!

Based on my stay, Al's listing is truly worthy of such a terrific rating. A bright and airy apartment, so comfortable and with everything I needed to hand. Al is thoughtful and helpful - asking me about my trip and giving me great tips and advice. Just a few hours in to my stay I was considering when I might be able to return - which I hope to do soon! Thanks very much for a brilliant stay, Al - it was a great place to call home whilst visiting Madrid.

Al's charming studio in the Malasaña was perfect for my first visit to Madrid. It's tucked away amid the winding streets of this amazing old neighborhood, but perfectly convenient to public transport, main tourist destinations, hip local spots and more. The apartment itself was comfortable and clean, and quiet at night despite a pretty lively nightlife not far away. Even better, Al was a delightful host who took time when I first arrived to offer several great suggestions for exploring Madrid that I likely would have missed otherwise. For me this was an ideal Airbnb experience and a great way to get a taste of Madrid.
The flat is up several flights of stairs and the bathroom is compact, but that's urban living and didn't bother me at all.

Lovely, artistic apartment just as charming as pictured- stocked with coffee and breakfast supplies in the kitchen and basic toiletries in the bathroom. The bed is the most comfortable I’ve ever had in an AirBnB. There was a delicious bottle of wine, and Al was a perfect host- providing us with recommendations for eating and sightseeing. The location is excellent- easily walkable to major sights. Highly recommend this apartment!

Great studio flat in a brilliant location. As good as the photos suggest - if not better! Al was a superb host and we loved all the places he recommended nearby. We've stayed in quite a few places in the area - all of them good! - and this was one of the very best. Would definitely go back!

Al was a fantastic host -- communicating easily, waiting to greet us when we checked in late at night, providing tips and chatting with us so that we felt like instant friends. He provided a loaf of bread, butter, and honey and other goods to have snacks or breakfast. So many thoughtful touches like a nice bottle of wine, fuzzy bathrobes, ample closet space etc. The chic, loft-style studio itself is a bright, colorful place to come back and relax in after walking all over Madrid.

Al was truly the most incredible host we have ever had—so helpful, kind, and communicative! The neighborhood was hip and lively but the apartment itself was super quiet. Might I add that the bed was the most comfortable one I’ve ever slept in in Europe? I could not recommend this place more!

Al went out his way to make us feel welcome. He met us at the apartment and spent time to go over a map with us and to point out lots of great places to shop and to grab some tasty treats from. The apartment was cosy and clean and in a fantastic location. The wine and snacks were a wonderful treat when we arrived!
Al was wonderful- gave me excellent recommendations, with care- and the apartment is lovely & well located. Can’t recommend it highly enough!
Great place, Al was awesome and very helpful.
Al, spot is perfection. It’s decorated so cool and he gives you the lay of the land. We were only here a short time but was sad to leave.
Excelente localizacion en el barrio Malazaña, Al fue muy amable y atento con lo q necesitamos.  Cama comoda para descansar.
Excelente

You can’t go wrong by staying at Al’s studio! It’s spacious, clean, and extremely modern. No more than a 15 walk to basically any tourist site. Near a bunch of food. If you’re looking to treat yourself, choose Al’s place any day!

My best AirBnB experience yet.   Communication and check in was easy.   The place is very stylish, the area is the best in Madrid, which is by all the tourist stuff but also in a more local part of the city.     But the best part was Al himself, what a gem of a human, everything from the wine and treats, taking an hour  to make a map of what I should see and the biggest high five moment was when he found out I had a late flight he let me have a really late checkout (9pm) ... 10/10 highly recommended.

Al's studio in Malasana is absolutely perfect for a short stay in the city. The room is far bigger than I expected from the pictures and is designed so well with lots of great little touches. The bed is sooo comfortable! The small kitchen area is well stocked and perfect for prepping breakfast/small snacks. Al left a delicious bottle of wine and plenty of snacks for breakfast. He was super warm and welcoming on arrival, providing plenty of great local recommendations and was kind enough to store our luggage on the last day after check out. Highly recommend and hope to return one day!

Al’s home was the perfect size for myself and spouse. It was in an amazing location close to a lot of major sites but still in a very nice residential area. We started off the trip speaking to Al about some of Madrid’s history, learning local places to eat at, and a bottle of wine provided by Al. The place itself was clean, comfortable, and overall lovely. Al hospitality and location of his home certainly has put this in one of my favorite Airbnb’s I have stayed at.
Great place! Great location. Al was very welcoming and helpful. Would definitely stay again. The area was perfect.

Place is exactly how you can see in the pictures. Communicative host and amazing location. We walked everywhere. There is market near by where you can get fresh bakeries and fruit.                                                                      Two little things you need to bare in mind before booking this studio : there are no elevators and the flat is on the fourth floor. This would be a problem if you're travelling with an elderly or if you have problems with your knees. Another thing to note is that the shower is right next to the toilet seat. So after one person showers, the next one can't use the toilet. Again, not a problem if traveling solo. You can also time your shower with your travel buddy to avoid this. Two extra bonus points : 1- you can lock the studio from the inside with a massive lock. You'll be safe. 2- the AC isn't facing the bed, so you can leave it on when you're napping and you won't freeze. Overall, I recommend this place!

Apartamento muy bien ubicado. Disponibles tiendas, restaurantes y ambiente nocturno.
Ubicación en calle sin ruidos.
En referencia al apartamento la cama es muy cómoda, aunque se hubiera agradecido tener las sabanas planchadas, así como otros aspectos de la limpieza general de la casa, como el suelo, el polvo en estanterías, etc. Aún así las condiciones eran bastantes aceptables.
El baño es pequeño y no existe plato de ducha ni mampara, sólo una alcachofa de ducha fija a poca distancia del WC.
Alvaro nos recibió muy atentamente y nos permitió guardar nuestro equipaje hasta la hora de salida de nuestro tren.
Le agradecemos su amabilidad y atención durante nuestra estancia.

Me encanto el estudio de Alvaro. Lo pase súper bien y el apartamento está cerca de todo en Chueca. Me fui caminando a todos los lugares. Alvaro es muy simpático y me dio muchas recomendaciones buenas. Espero volver a Madrid pronto y quedarme aquí otra vez.

Great place in Madrid ! Lively neighbourhood, the appartement is nice, clean and well situated. Al is a very pleasent person who doesn’t hesitate to give travellers good advises to enjoy the city.  I strongly recommend it !!

Al defines superhost!! He is so kind and helpful and just a great person to talk and hangout with. He helped us find places to go and great things that were off the beaten path. The place is amazing, the area super hip. Go to kikikelker and bar sidi! Would surely come back again and again!

Honestly this is one of the best air bnb homes we have ever stayed in and cannot recommend the place enough.
The space is exactly as shown in the photos and more, it’s a beautiful loft style apartment at the top (4th Fl) of an old Spanish home that has been beautifully cared for and creatively renovated. It all has all the comforts you would want and Hal is a super host offering advise on where to eat and shop, giving us maps and books to read on the local area. His communication on arrival and check-in was outstanding and he thoughtfully left a bottle of wine and some pastries for us.
The area is superb for discovering Madrid. It’s in Malasana which is the hip neighbourhood, very retro and creative. It’s a very safe area and opposite a lovely old church and small plaza that has lots of cafes etc., it’s very easy to walk to most of the major sites and if you don’t want to walk the metro is just 5 mins away.
We will be back for sure!

Àl’s Place was so amazing and and we enjoyed every minute! Àl is an amazing host and provided us with everything we needed and then some! He is so generous! It’s a perfect location and close to everything. The space is so nice and my husband and and I wish we could’ve stayed longer! Definitely will come back when we come back to Madrid!
Fantastic host nothing too much bother. Lots of special extras. In great location area buzzing but nothing can be heard in flat. Great coffee shops and quirky bars. Would definitely recommend.

Great value. Nicely decorated studio on 4th floor of an old building. Spacious and airy with high beamed ceilings. Windows face inner courtyard so it is quiet. The location in Malasana is super hip like Williamsburg/East Village/Chelsea all rolled into one. Everything in Madrid is about a 15 minutes’ walk away. Great lively scene- even in August when the rest of madrid is vacant and sleepy. Perfect except for two things: the bathroom is tiny and in European fashion the sink toilet and shower are all together in a approx 5x5 ft space. And it’s a 4th floor walkup which is tough climbing especially after you’ve been running around all day. Very highly recommended and I’d stay there again if I’m lucky enough to revisit Madrid. Great healthy salad place, MOX, around the corner with smoothies and salads for when you get tired of tapas and beer. Four blocks away from Gran Via which is like the Broadway of Madrid.
Thanks, Al!!!

One of those perfect expériences.
Alvaro's is perfectly quiet in a perfect location in one of the most charming and animated neighbourhood of Madrid.
Communication was easy and fast. Alvaro's welcome was warm and unforgettable.
He allowed us flexibility to get in and out.
The apartment has all the equipment you might need and even more as Alvaro has added everything to make you feel totally at home: the fridge is well provided as well.
We Will be back for sure
exactly as described. maybe bigger which is not a problem :-) location is perfect in malasana and this is where you want to be. highly recommended for a couple stay.

Exactly as described and thoughtfully decorated space.  Plenty of  space to spread out, colorful/fun decor and Al was an amazing host.  He was flexible with our check in/out times.  Only wish we had more than one night to enjoy Madrid.  We would definitely stay again and recommend.
Great location and fantastic neighbour hood. Easy to walk anywhere and lots of metro stops within walking distance
Perfecto todo
Lovely location. Nice apartment. Loud on Friday and Saturday night unfortunately due to nightclub below open til 3.30am! But overall good value and nice stay

Fantastic apartment in the heart of Madrid. Marlen and her husband were fantastic hosts. Great communication. Highly recommended following Marlen's advice on restuarants and bars in thr area. Fantastic location in walking distance to all the main sights. Apartment was as shown in pictures and better.  I would recommend staying here to everyone.
Excelente lugar para pasar unos días en Madrid y vivir como uno más, perderse en los barrios más auténticos y con mucha oferta de comer y compras. Repetiré seguro!
The appartement is beautiful, as it appears in the pictures, clean and in a great neighborhood. Marlen and her husband are great hosts and we really enjoyed our time in madrid.

Apartamento en el corazón de Malasaña. Limpio, funcional y cerca de transporte publico.
Muy buena opcion para conocer el barrio de Malasña en el centro de Madrid!! Recomendable 100%
房东人很好，推荐给我很好吃的餐厅，人非常好。公寓美中不足的就是热水器，洗澡洗了一半就变冷水了。还有楼下的酒吧餐厅太吵影响睡眠

저렴한 가격에 깨끗하고 좋은 곳
근처에 슈퍼, 레스토랑 많습니다
지하철역은 도보 3분 이내.
중심가 주변이라 위치도 좋아요

El apartamento de Marlene está en una situación inmejorable para ir a cualquier parte caminando. Es pequeño pero acogedor, ideal para una pareja o incluso tres personas gracias al sofá cama en el salón.
Marlene fue muy amable y estuvo atente en todo momento.
Mar was a wonderful host. I highly recommend this apartment. And please listen to her advice on places to eat
Me encantó este piso. Limpio, cómodo, y en una zona muy cerca a todo del centro de Madrid.
Great host and great location
We had a lovely stay in this flat. Perfect for a couple or a pair of friends. Great location!

Right in the heart of the lively Malasana district.  Wonderful hosts, wonderful apartment, surrounded by wonderful shops and restaurants.  If you don't fall in love with Madrid, you are probably a robot...

Marlen's place is very clean, very organized and has a cozy feel to it. Marlen is great when it comes to communication, instructions, and checking in. I would recommend this place for future travelers. The only thing is be warned the hot water for the shower lasts 8-10mins and takes about an hour for the hot water tank to refill. Other than that her place is a great place to stay at.
Nice appartment in nice area. Great hosting.

Clean & pretty & a great location. Everything is exactly as advertised
And the espresso machine is amazing!!
Perfect! Super nice host and location. Evem a very early checkout was no problem. Thanks!

Marlen's place is really central and is located in the vibrant neighbourhood. The flat is really clean and cozy - a perfect place to stay for a couple of days in Madrid. Marlen is a lovely person and a great host ready to help with all queries.
Marlen was a great hostess. She guided us very well and responded fast. Location was really good too. Close to the transit and the main shopping street. Will definitely stay here again!

위치도 좋고 아파트도 정말 깔끔해요! 지내는데 필요한 물건들 기본적으로 다  구비돼있어요. 무엇보다 호스트한테 연락하면 답장도 바로 주고 친절해요. 마드리에 있으면서 당황스러운 일들이 몇가지 있었는데 호스트가 도와줘서 잘 해결할수 있었어요!! 중심지에 위치해서그런지 빵음 1또안뙈요. 아ㄹㄹ래층에 빠인지 까뻬인지 음씩쩜 있는떼 꺼끼 음ㅁ악+빢에 싸람뜰떠뜨는 쏘리때메 찐짜 짬못짜요. 뀌마깨 꼮챙끼쎄요!
This is a great apartment for exploring the city. You can walk to all the central sites, bars & restaurants. Apartment is modern, clean and comfortable. Great host! Would fully recommend.

This place is perfect for travelers who want to be near the night life and enjoy exploring during the day. Everything is really close and you can walk pretty much everywhere. If your legs get tired then the metro stop is also really close.
The place is on the 1st floor so carrying luggage up the stairs is easy. There is also an elevator if you need one too. The apt is facing the street so you get really good ambiance during the afternoon. However if your travel party decides to use the couch to sleep on make sure they can handle the street noise during the night because people are up until 6am and there will be lots of gates slamming when businesses are closing. If you are sleeping in the room then you have nothing to worry about.
The hot water for showering runs out pretty quickly. My friend and I take pretty short showers (5 mins) and by the end the hot water started running out (water wasnt cold yet but not at the original temp) Definitely not an issue since the shower head gives good water pressure and feels great after a long day/night.
Mar is a wonderful host and waited for our arrival to give us the tour. I would stay here again.

My experience is not useful for all, but our baby trolley was stolen by house president and Marlen does not decide anything in house. Apartment is good with small inconvenience with glasses and bed clothes. The location and renovation is good. Our occasion is: We left our trolley on the ground  floor and it did not hinder anybody, there was not any notice that we could not leave trolley. But one day we missed it because "the house authority" decided to trash it. Marlen had done nothing for return our trolley....
Everything was perfect: perfect view, perfect location, perfect communication. Thanks Marlen for everything!)

Logement très bien situé dans un quartier vivant, Marlen était une hôte accueillante qui a su répondre à nos demandes. Le logement était propre, avec le nécessaire pour passer un séjour de quelques jours à Madrid. Nous vous recommandons de choisir son appartement si vous êtes 2 ou 3 personnes.

Location is perfect! It is surrounded by restaurants and shopping. It is centrally located and is very easy to find. The apartment is clean and very nice. The host is a pleasure to work with and very gracious.

Perfect location in Madrid! Had a great time here in a really good part of Madrid. Excellent bars and restaurants. We walked everywhere and didn't both with the metro which is close by including to the Prado. Spotlessly clean and modern. Marlen was a very considerate host and we appreciated it. Would recommend.
The place is very clean centric lots of bars, taverns two blocks to gran via, Callao train station in general great experience!
Fun neighborhood. Very walkable to Sol and other major city squares. Marlen gave some very good restaurant recommendations. Don't miss Bar Galleta!

It was a great stay in Madrid. The apartment and the area are modern, hip and just the right place to experience the city. Its not touristy and you have a lot of choices of bars, cafés and restaurants :) Especially Circo just below. Marlen is great, friendly and very obliging. We will definitely recommend the place to friends and will come back when we are in Madrid.

Marlen has a wonderful apartment located near many walkable sites in Madrid. The restaurant and bar options all around the apartment were excellent, and Marlen provided us a list of great recommendations prior to our arrival. We had 3 people in the apartment and were comfortable. I would highly recommend this airbnb for its style, convenient location, and lovely host.

Fantastic apartment in the heart of Madrid.
Great location if you want to eat out and drink out at the trendy bars in the area! Walking distance to all the main city centre sites.
Nice place to stay, close to bus and train stations, clise to the gran via, very clean and comfortable, we recomend it.
Hermoso departamento muy bien ubicado. Marlen súper amable. Lo recomiendo!

This is my husband and my first trip to Europe. Marlen and her husband were so friendly and helpful during our stay in Madrid. Their apartment is walking distance to many shops, restaurants and the palace. The apartment was clean, comfortable and cozy. It is sad to leave, next time we might stay a few more nights! Such a beautiful, historic city! Thank you to Marlen for being so available to our questions and tips on how to get around. Bless you!
Bel appartement proche de la gran via de la vie nocturne. Très propre, à recommander

My boyfriend and I really liked the apartment. Great location (we walked and took the train to all the sites) in a youthful, lively neighborhood that's secure. We felt totally safe late, late at night. Good size for two people. AC is fantastic. Washer machine good too! Netflix set up on the TV if you need it. There is a grocery store directly across the street for anything you need. Main road, Gran Via, is just a 5 minute walk up the block. Marlen was a gracious host and offered us tips during our whole stay! Take her advice on restaurants (you must go to Lateral) and craft beers! 😀 This apartment made our stay in Madrid just wonderful!

Apartamento con una situación excelente en una zona llena de bares y restaurantes con mucho encanto, y con la posiblidad de desplazarse a pie debido a su ubicación central, aunque está al lado de los transportes públicos.
Extremadamente limpio y acogedor, muy bien equipado y muy confortable.
La comunicacion con Mar ha sido muy fácil y rápida y ha estado pendiente de que todo fuera bien durante la estancia.
Un sitio totalmente recomendable para alojarse en Madrid.

Lots of great things to say about the apartment. It was air conditioned, which made it a great reprieve from the Madrid heat after we saw the sights, it was highly walkable with all of the major sights 15 minutes or less away, the restaurants close by were great and affordable, and Marlen was a great host willing to help with any questions we had! Highly recommend staying here!

El piso es tal como lo anuncia Marlene en las fotos (150% reales !! ), muy bien ubicado, buenos restaurantes, a unos pasos de la Gran Vía, tiendas y teatrosde todo tipo, idealpara quien quiere divertirse por las noches, hay muchas opciones !!
El único "pero" es el ruido nocturno que de vez en cuando se escucha, esto para la gente sensible a la hora de dormir.
Gracias!
Centrally located and easily walkable to just about everything. The apartment is well-equipped, clean, and Mar was always available to answer questions. I highly recommend this place!

It was a pleasure to stay at Marlen's place. It was very central and they have a lovely place. Marlen and his husband were very kind to help us for every question or supplement request. Highly recommended. I will come back very soon! Thanks for everything

We had a wonderful stay at marlen's place. The apartment had everything you would need for a great stay in Madrid, we loved the balcony! The location is amazing and you can walk to many of the sites. Lots of food options close by! Had a great time!
It was a perfect trip to Madrid. Everything was clean, modern and the host was very friedly. If you want a silent appartment, this is not the right place to stay. Because of the noises on the street.

The apartment was clean, well decorated and supplied with all necessary appliances (toaster and kitchen utensils as well as some soap and shampoo). The location was great: a 5min walk into the city centre and walking distance to most of Madrid's attractions as well as close to a number of metro stations. The street itself is very good as there are loads of small businesses, restaurants and bars, which means you feel safe coming to the apartment late at night as there are people around. However, it means that it gets quite noisy late in the evening and early morning, especially if you are sleeping in the sofa bed. As well as this, the sofa bed is definitely not the most comfortable. Saying this, the double bed in the room is very comfy and the air conditioning in the apartment means you don't get too hot at night. In addition, Marlen and her husband were very helpful and the communication was great.
The apartment is in a great location. In the center of the nightlife and lots of great restaurants. Mar was accommodating and friendly. The place is clean and comfortable.
The apartment was beautiful and very centric. It was quick to get to the musuems we wanted to see and there were great restaurants everywhere.

We enjoyed our brief stay in Madrid. Marlen was a big part of that. The place was just as pictured and very accessible. One block over from Marlen´s place is the center of everything - shops, food, transportation, all. Marlen gave us some helpful hints about the neighborhood that helped us locate great places to eat. Our stay was super comfortable - wish we could have stayed longer.
Mar is a great host.  She can help with reservation or just highlights to see.  We would come back in a heartbeat. Apartment is very central and very clean.
Muy bonito espacio, cuenta con todo lo necesario y una muy buena ubicación. Gracias Marlen!

The location, descriptions, and home were exactly as described. Only downfall was a request to fill out paperwork when we arrived. An international airbnb traveler, this was a bit alarming at first for the guide did not mention this prior. Madrid requires to have a log of all vacation home travelers listing passport information etc. It was all fine in the end,  but discovering this at checking at 1am after traveling internationally was not fun.  Marlen and her husband explained the paperwork and allowed us to fill it out the next day which was a lot better for us post travel. Overall the home is very walkable and very great at keeping the sound from the loud street kept outside. The AC was amazing!
Great apartment in a superb location. Marlen was very helpful and we all had a great stay.

Marlen's place was exactly as the pictures showed. The place was clean, cozy, and comfortable. We really appreciated her quick responses and all the restaurant suggestions she gave. Wonderful place and wonderful host!

This apartment is perfect, it is well located and close to public transport if you need it.
Mar is more then helpful with any questions you may have.
I would stay here again if I came to Madrid!

You won't regret staying in Marlen's place. It has all the amenities you would need for a comfortable stay. There are shops, bars, restaurants, and cafes in the area. Check out the bars just outside the building or visit Cafe de la Luz, a 5-minute walk away. At most, the place is a 10-minute walk from several subway stations. You will have no trouble exploring Madrid. The street comes alive at night, but you won't need to worry about the noise. The bedroom is situated away from the street. We felt safe walking around at night and the balcony is a good place to people-watch.

Departamento pequeño pero cómodo con buena ubicación en Malasaña, el barrio es genial. Marlen es un encanto, nos atendió muy bien y estuvo pendiente de si necesitabámos algo en todo momento. Lo único que sentimos es que el cuarto no tuviera ventana pero se compensa con un lindo balcón en el living.

Great little modern apartment complete with A/C, elevator, washing machine plus close to several restaurants, shopping and the metro.  Marlen was a lovely hostess who immediately made us feel at home...she also checked on us throughout our visit to see if we needed anything or had questions.  Would highly recommend Marlen's place!
Great apartment, comfortable bed, pleasant hostess
Très bel appartement , proche du centre. Un très bon accueil de Marlen et elle se rend disponible durant le séjour. Si c'était à refaire , je n'hésiterai pas une seule seconde.
Marlen has a wonderful apartment in a great area of the city. I would absolutely recommend!

We loved our stay! The location was amazing. Everything we wanted to see was walkable. The apartment is located in a super trendy area with lots of restaurants and bars. There was also a grocery store across the street which was super convenient. We highly recommend this place!

La ubicación del piso es perfecta, muy céntrico, lo que permite visitar cómodamente la ciudad.
Marlen y su marido Alfredo nos recibieron sin problemas y ofreciendo ayuda en todo lo que necesitásemos.
El piso igual que en las fotos, reformado y muy nuevo.
Si volvemos a Madrid repetiremos sin duda!

I had an amazing time staying at this listing! Mar and her husband were very accommodating and made sure we were comfortable and had everything we needed. Mar even followed up with me during my trip to check in to see if we were okay. We got great recommendations from the host on where to visit and places to eat. Mar even called a taxi for us late night to make sure we were able to get to where we needed to in time. She went above and beyond! Overall the apartment was clean, modern, and everything we hoped for. I would totally stay here again. Highly recommend. Thanks Mar!
One of the best AirBnB's I've stayed in. Clean, central, and comfy. It made me feel like a local and Marlen was very responsive and helpful!
This is a good apartment in the heart of Madrid. Our family of three (with 6 year old ) stayed here comfortably.  Very close to great restaurants and shopping.

Excelente ubicación. Está a 2 cuadras de la Gran Vía. Desde el departamento puedes ir a todos los lugares  a pie. También hay transporte público (metros y autobuses) cercanos. Marlene fue muy amable, estando dispuesta a ayudarnos en todo momento y brindandonos mucha información. El piso es cómodo y tiene todo lo necesario para pasarla bien. Volveremos !

El apartamento está muy bien, tal y como puede verse en las fotos. Es perfecto para pasar unos días en Madrid tanto por su buena ubicación (cerca del centro y zonas de restauración/ocio) como por la comodidad y equipación (wifi, calefacción, cafetera, etc.) del mismo.

We had a great stay with Marlen! Her and her husband were terrific hosts. The apartment is in an amazing part of town, and has all the amenities we needed. I would certainly recommend anyone else to stay here. Thank you, Marlen!

Wonderful apartment in city center. Exceptionally clean and well supplied. We were able to walk everywhere we wanted to visit including the museums, Botanical Gardens, Plaza de Espana, Plaza Mayor, etc. Metro is a 5 minute walk. Wonderful market across the street for typical Spanish food and wine., coffee bars and restaurants in the neighborhood. Plus Marlen was a wonderful host. She communicated with us before our arrival and offered assistance during our stay.
Another reviewer mentioned the noise. Madrid is a vibrant city and the nightlife gets started late and goes into the early morning hours. If your goal is to experience the city as a Madrileno and a little noise doesn't bother you, this is the place for you.
Great host and great centrally located apartment in Madrid.... worthy of the 5* ratings. I wouldn't hesitate to recommend to others.

Mar's place was amazing.  a Great location with some of the best places to eat as close as the floor below the apartment.  Great shopping, and close to the major monuments.  We highly recommend this apartment.

Marlen was very welcoming.
The flat is very well situated, right in the centre.
Just a little bit noisy during the weekend in the evenings :)
Marlen was a great host!  She would check up on us from time to time.  Her place was walking distance to restaurants and public transportation.  We would stay here again.

Mar and her husband were amazing hosts! Their apartment exceeded our expectations. It was our first time in Madrid, and the location was spectacular. I think it played a big role in us falling absolutely in love with this city. The bed is big enough for two, there is a sweet little balcony that brings in lovely natural light, and a washing machine (I've found this unusual in most of my European stays and it was lovely to have the option). Mar also gave us an extensive list of her local recommendations - also wonderful and very helpful! Would absolutely recommend and I hope to be back!

Communication with Marlen was great both before and during our stay. She greeted us at the apartment and showed us around.
The neighborhood is very hip and allows you to experience Madrid like a true local. There are supermarkets, bars and excellent restaurants within a minute's walking distance from the apartment. Most of Madrid's major sites are only about 15 minutes away on foot, too. The location is perfect!
Definitely recommended for anybody visiting Madrid

The apartment is perfect!!! Just like the pictures. The balcony has an amazing view of a quirky street. Very central location and walking distance to the main areas. Nice bars and restaurants below the apartment if you're aren't looking to go far at night. Marlen was very helpful during our stay. Would 100% recommend this apartment to anyone.
Nice place! Great location!
Fantastic location in a lively neighborhood and within easy walking distance to all of the sights. Mar and Alfredo are lovely, thoughtful hosts!
Excelente ubicación y muy buena anfitriona.

You won't regret staying in Marlen's apartment because it is really great. It is really modern, clean and stylish, and everything works great. There are several excellent restaurants in the street, and it is really close to Gran Vía and most of the attractions in Madrid could be made by walking. It is also worth mentioning that Marlen is a very nice person and offered to book attractions or taxis when needed, which was awesome. Ah, and the apartment has a lift!! you won't need to go up with a heavy luggage ;) The only downside is that the boiler is small and it means you only have hot water in the shower for 10 minutes, but I have to say we were in 3 people and we had no problem at all. Quick baths, around 30 mins wait and it was ready for the next. This place is HIGHLY recommended, 5 stars!
Sehr schönes Apartment. Sehr zentrale Lage. Jedoch am Wochenende in sehr lebhafter Straße.

Marlen's place is wonderfully located in a very lively part of Madrid. It is close to many attractions, so we were able to easily walk everywhere. There are many restaurants nearby and also a market across the street if you want to eat in the apartment.
Marlen's husband met us at the apartment, showed us around, and even let us check-in a little early, which we really appreciated. The apartment was very clean and modern. We had a great time during our stay and would stay at Marlen's place again in the future.

Mareln's place was great! Just as expected. Very clean & she & her husband were very kind & helpful!
The apartment was in a perfect location. Walking distance to everything with many shops & restaurants just down stairs. The only downside to that was the noise. There was a lot of night life going on & everything could be heard from even back in the bedroom, into early hours of the morning. This was only a problem for me because I am a light sleeper.

Location was very central in a very vibrant environment, yet a bit noisy during the weekend evenings and nights. Host was great, quick responses and good recommendations. An extra kitchen towel would be great but on average I Would definitely book this appartment again or recomment to others

Первый раз пользовались услугами сайта, по этому щепетильно подходили к выбору квартиры. Квартира Марлен оправдала все наши ожидания, было все, что нужно для отличного отдыха. Расположение идеальное, в уютном квартале, в шаговой доступности от всех основных достопримечательностей (музей Прадо, Королевский дворец, площадь Sol
и др.). Отдельно хочу отметить хозяйку Марлен, всегда готовая помочь и подсказать. Спасибо за отличный отдых.
El lugar limpio y agradable, la comunicación y ayuda en todo fue de primera. Y su ubicación excelente.

Nice central apartment, the apartment is very small but comfortable, unfortunately the boiler in the bathroom is very small and it’s enough only for 5 minutes shower so is not good for more than 2 pax —- maybe not enough also for 2 ... the bed is very comfortable and price is fair ...

My boyfriend and I stayed at Marlen's place while visiting Madrid for the first time and we LOVED it. The apartment is exactly like the pictures, we knew just what to expect when we got there. It was in the absolute best location - so close to restaurants, bars, the city center, museums etc. We did not have to take a cab or public transport the entire time we were there to see anything within the city center. Marlen responds within 1 minute to any emails so if you are traveling internationally and just have wifi, you can reach her easily. The check- in was seamless and Marlen was always willing to offer suggestions about what to do/what to see/ restaurants etc. We will definitely be staying there again, we truly loved the apartment and loved Madrid!
Two things worth mentioning:
1. I had read in previous reviews about the a lot of noise in the apartment because of a bar/restaurant underneath. The bedroom sits directly on top of a bar/restaurant that does get quite loud over the weekends, until about midnight/1AM. The apartment is also on the 1st floor (1 floor off the street) and with the balcony, you can hear the noise outside all the time. We did not mind this, but it is something worth mentioning.
2. When we got there, we were told that the hot water tank is very small and that the showers can only be 10 minutes long until the water tank must fill up again (1 hour until that happens). However, after a few showers, we realized that the hot water lasts about 5 minutes (at the very most). Again, not a big deal for us, we will stay there again, but just something worth thinking about it if you like long hot showers or are staying there with more than 1 other person in regards to timing.

Loved the apartment- new and very clean. It had everything we could need during our stay. For light sleepers, be aware there is a cafe below and several more across the way and sorrounding- very noisy at night. The noise wasnt an issue for the most part as long as the bedroom door was closed. Pillows should be updated. Loved the smart tv. Marlen was very nice and helpful prior to and during our stay.

This apartment was just as described. Great location with several metro stations within 5 minutes walk and Gran Via less than 5 minutes. Everything was new and modern and Marlen and her husband were very welcoming and accommodating. We would definitely recommend and hope to stay again.

Al set me up for success by teaching me all the local haunts (and must-sees that I might have otherwise missed or skipped). His colorful place was both stylish and comfortable because he had considered all the homey touches that made it better than staying at the hotel down the street. :)  Trendy neighborhood, fabulous host, great studio!

Great location! We loved the apartment and it fit all of our needs. It’s a studio on the 5th floor and Al was great and helped us with our bags. The coffee and breakfast items were a great touch. Very comfortable queen bed! This is a great spot and I would highly recommend it!
Very nice place! Good host and perfect location!

Al's place was a perfect introduction for us to airbnb. He was most helpful with recommendations and very generous with his time. The location is excellent, we were able to reach everywhere on foot, even though we are an older couple and neither were we deterred by the many flights of stairs. Great choice!

Al is a terrific host.  He met me and helped with my luggage.  He also had the kitchen filled fruit, muffins, croissants, etc. The apartment is the perfect size with a very comfortable bed. This place met my expectations. The only downside is that the apartment is located on the 4th floor of the building and is a walk up.

Al's place is a funky space in a great location! He was incredibly generous in his advice about our time in Madrid, provided an extremely generous breakfast and snacks and communicated well. I would definitely recommend Al's place!

Essere ospitati da Àl é l'essenza dell'ospitalità AirB&b.
Le risposte alle richieste sono immediate, l'annuncio descrive molto bene l'appartamento così come fanno le foto.
La Posizione é strategica per apprezzare tanto di Madrid, anche se solo per pochi giorni.
La disponibilità di Al e la sua cortesia sono perfette, sia nell'indicare curiosità e locali della zona, sia nell'essere discreto e desideroso di lasciar vivere un'esperienza marilena completa ai suoi ospiti.
We really enjoyed our stay in Al’s place. Al’s studio is in a perfect location in Madrid. Al gave us lots of great information and was a great host.
el apto es tal y como aparece en las fotos y mejor de lo que esperábamos,  Al un excelente anfitrión, el sitio impecable y servicios excelentes y una ubicación perfecta.
Perfect place! Al is an amazing host, every detail was great 👍🏼 I would stay there again for sure!
Al was super friendly and gave so many great tips on things to do and places to go! He even helped me carry my luggage!! Great location by tons of hip bars and great restaurants!!!
GREAT studio apartment, GREAT location. Very friendly host. Would definitely recommend.
Al's place was great - comfy bed, great location, great host, lovely juice to drink, lots of hot water - perfect.

I loved this place!  It's the perfect location in Malasana and Al's is AMAZING.  He greeting me when I arrived and helped me with my (Very heavy) luggage.  He had snacks, water & wine waiting and sat down with me and gave me an overview of the area, where to go & where not to go.  He's a super cool guy.  The wet room was interesting, I had never seen anything like it.  Works great but, I was just a little concerned about blowdrying my hair after my showers.  No worries though, there is an outlet near the mirrored wall.  Al even provides slippers & a robe for comfort.  Oh, and comfort?  The bed was the most comfortable bed I have ever slept on in an AirB&B!  A++++++
The best place to stay in Madrid. Al is perfect owner. The apartment is in perfect condition, very stylish and comfortable.

Al helped make my experience in Madrid special from start to finish. The apartment was warm and inviting, with fluffy robes and slippers, fresh bread and wine chilling in the fridge. There was Netflix too, which was great to switch on when taking a break from the buzz of the city.
Al was able to recommend great places to eat and sights to see.
The apartment was in the most fantastic area, surrounded by cafes, bars and restaurants. I was travelling alone and felt safe at all times.
Thanks so much for everything. I would recommend the apartment to anyone looking for the perfect place to stay to explore the city.

The apartment is very well located, in the heart of Malasaña. Al is an excellent host! He gave us many tips for bars and restaurants. The apartment is very well decorated, cozy and very well equipped. Al left us some things for breakfast, wine, water, etc. The only thing you should keep in mind is that the apartment is on the fourth floor and there is no elevator. For people with difficulties or too much luggage, it can become a problem. Despite this, it was a very good experience! We recommend this place!

Al's apartment in Madrid is easily the best Airbnb I have ever stayed at! Al greeted my girlfriend and I on arrival and shared with us fantastic recommendations on places to see and visit.  Aside from the great advice Al provided, Al's apartment is truly spectacular and it is clear that a lot of effort has been taken to ensure perfection for guests.  Thanks for the great visit Al!

Al is very accommodating and pays attention to detail as he wanted me to feel at home in his place. Wonderful location and the place is clean and very quiet!
Just be prepared for a top floor unit if you have a lot of luggage or it’s heavy. Also, the bathroom/shower is just one space - the shower is not separate so that took getting used to!

Als place in in the centre of Malasana district full of good eateries, shops, bars. Despite that the place is quiet and we could get good sleep every night. Al's an excellent host, he waited for us and showed us the appartement, then stayed a bit longer to give us suggestions on food and sights and little tips about Madrid. He made an extra effort to feel his us feel welcome, with breakfast items, bottle of wine, snacks, candles, books, maps and what not to make our stay great! I would really reccomend this place to everyone that wants to be in the middle of a lively district and walking distance from all the main sights in Madrid!

After a series of stressful events our plans suddenly changed and we had one night in an airport to plan a whole new trip.
After deciding on Madrid, we had just a few hours before a transatlantic flight to settle on accommodations. We contacted Al late in the night (US time) and heard back almost immediately. He was so responsive and helpful. We have stayed in many AirBnB and this check in process was the most personal and enjoyable. Al sat down with us and went over a map of Madrid and gave us tips as well.
The place was just perfect for the two of us and in a very trendy part of Madrid. We felt safe coming and going and had no issues. I would stay here again. Lastly, the bed was so comfortable- and this is exactly what we needed after two nights in airplanes and airports.

A wonderful space in central Madrid close to everything.  Al is a wonderful host and very helpful and available as his apartment is only one floor below.  The staircase is beautiful and you would have to enjoy walking up stairs, this could be an issue for older travellers with heavy luggage, I didn’t mind it at all. The apartment is on the 4th or too level and it is 9 flights of stairs, so a bit of a climb.  Apartment is light and comfortable and no noise.  Thank you Al for a lovely stay.
Apartamento ideal para parejas con detalles que marcan la diferencia (desayuno y vino por ejemplo). Muy recomendable
Todo perfecto y al detalle volveremos seguro!
Great place in an outstanding location! Would definitely stay here again when I’m back in Madrid. Thanks Al!
Absolutely outstanding apartment in a great location in Madrid. Could not recommend this place more. Al was great and gave us some great advice to make our trip even more memorable.

Al sin duda alguna es un excelente host! El sitio: impecable, hermoso, buena luz, con mucho estilo. Ideal para parejas pues en realidad es muy bonito. Cama muy cómoda. Todo lo que necesitas y más. El barrio de Malasaña para mí el
Mejor sitio para estar en madrid y particularmente donde está ubicado Al aún mejor. Si quieren pasar una experiencia de película en madrid elijan este airbnb. Mi mejor estadía en madrid ha sido aquí.
Place was good. Very convenient. As described. A very pleasant stay in a good area. Ideal for one person as I was staying alone
uno de los mejores apartamentos para alojarse en Madrid,situado en el barrio de Malasaña a pocos minutos de muchos sitios de interés lo recomiendo 100x100
Al was a great host! Lots of great information about the city. Got us oriented and sent us to all the best restaurants. House was super cozy, bed was extremely comfortable. Mucho gracias!

Al is a brilliant host, and has fantastic recommendations. The apartment is in such a great location and has everything you need. Al even left us a bottle of wine which was really thoughtful, and made sure we had food and juice/coffee for breakfast.

Al was amazing. The apartment was exactly as advertised. When we first got there Al spent an entire hour giving us the lay of the land and suggesting some really cool places to visit. His apartment was in a great location close to public transportation and not too far from the airport. we purchased a 3 day metro pass and explored the entire city. Thanks again. I highly recommend this place! if we ever come back we will search for Al's apartment.
Apartamento con estilo, confortable y muyyy tranquilo. El anfitrión muy atento y dispuesto a facilitar tu estancia. Todo estupendo.
Great host and perfect location

SUPER cute space in a great area. Al was SO accomodating and allowed me to have an early check-in when I had travel problems, and was flexible with check out time as well! He gave me so many things to check out on my trip, he's a true local and a very nice person :) if you're in Madrid and need a fabulous place to stay, look no further!
Al is a great host and the place is excellent

This is a great Airbnb! It’s in an absolutely perfect location and is really nice. The bed is extremely comfy and all of the extra things in the room (robes, slippers, tv with Netflix, snacks, water, wine, etc. made it even better!! The host is so nice and gave us some great recommendations for areas to visit and places to go out. I would definitely stay here again.

Al is a great host. He left loads of breakfast bits and a bottle of wine. When we checked in, he was very flexible and gave loads of local recommendations (all good ones). The property is very central too - a short walk to anywhere of interest. Highly recommend!

Al’s place was located in the best area! We loved being able to go just a block or two and be in an authentic and hip area that wasn’t too touristy. Al was very nice and gave us great recommendations on where to check out while in town. Really enjoyed our stay!

Fantastic Studio/Space in an excellent central location with an awesome host (Thx Al). It's all been said before and I can confirm that all the previous positive comments are 100% true and correct - What a find.

Al is such a great friendly host and very accomodating too.
The apartment is super cool and very well located in Malasaña, near Chueca, Gran Via, etc.
Superb experience as a result of having a fantastic well located apartment and a uber friendly host willing to help. Top notch.
Al was a superb host, wonderful touches to the apartment and amenities, and great recommendations!
Amazing host and location!!!

My boyfriend and I stayed at Al’s studio apartment for 3 nights and absolutely loved the space as well as Al’s hospitality! I’ll try to list things ‘short & sweet’. The bed truly is EXTREMELY comfortable. The wetroom  was different for me but easy to get used to. As everyone has said, there are many stairs & no lift, but as long as you’re physically capable then don’t let that deter you! 😊  Great touches: Netflix & sound unit, nice bottle of red wine & snacks, lots of pillows to choose from, bathrobes & slippers provided, insider tips from Al. And finally...Al is such a warm and lovely host who will make your stay that much more enjoyable. Thanks for everything Al!

Lovely location, helpful host and all round good spot for a few days away
Thanks Al
okk

Absolutely amazing place and host. Al is so friendly , extremely interested in ensuring we had  all the local info and was a pleasure to meet. The room has more than expected in terms of all the little touches and luxury. The bed is so comfortable & WiFi was great. The area is great, it’s my 2nd time in Madrid but first in that area and i will return to that same area again, it’s perfect . There’s a supermarket right downstairs, a little pizza slice place just in the corner and everywhere good is walking distance

My husband and I started our Spanish journey at Al’s place. He was so warm and welcoming, and the place was so comfortable. He gave wonderful tips and suggestions for our stay, and everything always seemed so close to the apartment! The neighborhood (malasaña) was our favorite of Madrid.  (All the best food and drink was a safe/easy walk from the doorstep). The room was so stylish and the AC worked perfectly. We slept so well - the blackout curtains helped! The bed was very comfortable, and he thoughtfully provided slippers, robes, snacks, coffee, and even power adapters! He has really thought of everything. And even though the shower situation was ...odd, it wasn’t too uncomfortable.  We would definitely stay again!! Thank you, Al
Localización perfecta para una escapada en madrid. Piso confortable.
Apartment is cozy, clean and close to everything - both shopping and sightseeing!  You can literally walk everywhere.  Highly recommend for party of two!
Muy buena ubicación. Apartamento pequeño pero con todo lo necesario. Marlen fue muy atenta y responde muy rápido.

Marlen’s apartment has an excellent location and everything is workable. Katty greeted us when we checked in and Alex offered transfers to the train stations during our stay. Overall it’s a nice experience staying in Madrid for Christmas.
Muy centrico y acogedor. Ideal para pasar un fin de semana en madrid.

This apartment is just like in the pictures: super stylish, right in the center of Madrid (just behind gran via). It is amazing for a couple or 2 couples since it has a sofa that turns into a bed. It is super clean. The hosts are very nice, welcoming and are super available to speak to you and give you tips. 100% coming back next time I'm in Madrid. Thank you!

Para hacer el check-in fueron muy flexibles y amables los anfitriones, el piso estaba muy bien ubicado, se llegaba muy fácil al centro, las instalaciones son muy bonitas y muy cómodas, a mis amigas y a mi nos encantó, muy recomendable!
Marlene's place was exactly as described and we had no problem checking in. The walk to the main strip was very close. Recommended place to stay in Madrid.

Such a beautiful and cosy apartment. It was perfectly furnished and so clean. Its location is the best part : right next to the Gran Via yet in a small and quiet street. Shopping for food and clothes has never been easier ! Thank you to Marlen for being so reactive and helpful. I definitely recommend this apartment.
Restaurants and bars in neighborhood

Estuvimos muy cómodos en el piso, es tal como se aprecia en las fotos, con todo lo necesario para pasar unos  días cómodamente.La ubicación es ideal ,en una zona muy de moda en el inicio de Malasaña y muy cerca del centro de la ciudad. Hay varios supermercados cerca,teatros bares y restaurantes en la misma calle.Lo único a tener en cuenta es que es un primero, encima de un bar y en una zona muy concurrida, con lo que el ruido es inevitable en la noche de viernes y sábado.

Нам очень понравилась квартира ! Нас встретили в удобное для нас время ! Квартира расположена в самом центре Мадрида - вы будете находится в пешей доступности до всех главных достопримечательностей, включая музей Прадо и королевский дворец! Через дорогу потрясающие кафе для завтраков и ужинов ! В двух шагах полноценный супермаркет где есть все самое необходимое !
Квартира очень чистая, свежий ремонт , кровать удобная , стиральная машина , Nespresso: все к вашим услугам ... не задудьте посетить очень красивую церковь 17 ого века , которая находится через дорогу от дома ! Спасибо хозяевам за прекрасные апартаменты . Если будем ещё в Мадриде , то обязательно остановимся в этой очаровательной квартире !

Íbúð á besta stað í bænum. Þægilegt að fara í verslanir og skjótast heim á milli. Mikil líf er í Malasana á kvöldin og heyrðum við svolítið í fólki á gangi á götunni um nóttina. Annars var íbúðin hrein og Marlen hjálplegur leigjandi. Við myndum nýta okkur þessar íbúð ef við förum aftur til Madrídar á næstunni.
Super location and host! Thank you

Perfect apartment in an amazing location. The apartment is located on a small street in the very hip neighbourhood of Malasana. Cool independent bars, shops, cafes and restaurants are literally on the doorstep. Though bustling, the street never gets too rowdy and we had no issues with noise during our stay. The apartments itself is clean, compact, and equipped with everything you need, plus some great extras like the Nespresso machine with complimentary pods, and smart TV. We would definitely stay here again, and would recommend Marlens apartment to anyone visiting Madrid. Gracias!

Lovely little apartment right in the center. Walking distance to everywhere.
Marlen was great- nothing is too much trouble.
Thank you for a great stay- 100% recommend!
Mar was super helpful with recommendations and setting up reservations.  The place is tidy and well kept, and it is in nice central location.

Cute, clean and cozy! This place was centrally located in a very trendy part of the town near theaters & shops, so we were able to walk everywhere. Marlen was very responsive & extremely helpful with reservations for everything we needed, which was so great! We loved our stay & felt safe. Bed was very comfortable and there’s Nextflix on the TV which was a plus!

The place was amazingly beautiful and clean. Nicely decorated and the balcony was an extra bonus to watch the lively busy world go by. It is situated in the heart of the city centre which made it easier to get home after a late night out. Marlen has made all necessary information available and she offered her help and support in finding places or booking a taxi.
I would definitely book this place again next time. Thank you
Excelente ubicación para salir de noche! Muy lindo el departamento y rapida respuesta.
사진만큼 넓직했고, 깨끗했습니다. 침실이며 화장실, 거실, 부엌 모두 필요한 것이 모두 구비되어 있었고, 깔끔했습니다. 위치도 그란비아 역과 callao역 등 많은 역들과 5분거리에 있어 위치적으로 훌륭했습니다!
Great place in a great spot.
