This apartment was exactly what we were looking for during our stay in Madrid! The amenities were very modern and the apartment was sparkling clean and stylishly decorated! It's central location made it extremely easy to walk around the entire city and we were able to get the feeling of what it would be like to live in Madrid.  It was very easy and convenient to cook at the apartment due to being so close to two markets (one was right across the street) as well as the apartment being well stocked with dishes and appliances.  The apartment also includes a safe where we could keep our passports and other valuables and even included a durable and stylish umbrella (which came in very handy during our stay). Marlen was a great hostess and sent us an extensive list of suggested things to do and see while in Madrid. We would absolutely choose to stay here again during our next visit to Madrid!

El departamento de Marlen es precioso, tiene detalles estéticamente muy cuidados y mucha comodidad para pasar varias noches en Madrid cerca de los puntos de interés turísticos más importantes. A todos los lugares se puede acceder a pié. Sin duda volvería a hospedarme allí en mi próximo viaje a esta ciudad.

We absolutely adored Marlen’s beautiful and stylish flat in Malasaña! The location is fantastic, very centrally located and walkable. She offered tons of suggestions for places to visit; I just wish we had more time to explore! I’d definitely book with Marlen again!
Great location. Walkable to everything! Marlen responded quick to all messages and was very helpful.

El departamento es muy lindo. La ubicación es impecable, cerca de la Gran Via. Marlen fue una gran anfitriona que respondió muy rápido a nuestras dudas. La ubicación es un lujo. Lo único mejorable es que el agua caliente para la ducha no aguanta para 2 personas, pero la potencia de la ducha es buenísima.
Muy recomendable. Buena relación precio calidad.
Old charm with modern comforts in a great location. Really comfortable bed and peaceful despite being v in the heart of the old town.

Marlen was a fantastic host and her place was perfect for our needs. The location is amazing, especially for a first time traveler to Madrid. You can walk to almost anywhere of note and Marlen provided a list of great recommendations for things to do and places to eat in the area that didn't disappoint. We had a poor airbnb experience at another place in the days leading up to this stay, so it was incredibly refreshing to be at this great place that was so comfortable and had many amenities. Would highly recommend staying here to anyone!
Great location in an artsy area with local cafes and many little markets. Busy at night full of music and fun stuff!

Era la primera vez que fuimos a Madrid y la verdad que fue la mejor opción quedarnos en casa de Mar. La zona donde está el apartamento es espectacular, cerca de la gran vía donde hay muchos lugares muy lindos para comer y comprar. La distancia para ir a muchos lados como la puerta del sol es muuuy caminable, además que está muy cerca del transporte para moverte a lugares más lejos.
Mar siempre estuvo atenta a nosotros, tiene la mejor disponibilidad y te ayuda con lo que necesites.
El apartamento lo tiene todo, muy cómodo y muy limpio en un edifico muy lindo. Hay lugares al frente para comprar de comer, restaurantes y bares a un lado, y la verdad que el ruido de la calle en la habitación no se escucha nada.
La verdad que lo recomendaría al 100% y no dudaríamos en regresar a quedarnos ahí.

Perfect little space very centrally located. Very clean and comfortable. The living room (sofa bed) is noisy at night but no noise in the bedroom. Marlen was very helpful and we really enjoyed our stay!

Marlen's place is just as it is explained on her site. Beautiful and clean (aside from the old restrooms towels that were really old and smelly). The neighborhood is lively and exciting (not kid friendly). This location is close to everything.
El mejor lugar de Madrid. Cerca de todo. Lindo piso de diseño, recomiendo 100%! Marlen es excepcional

Excelente departamento muy buen ubicado, destaca por la limpieza y comodidad.
Lamentablemente no conocimos a Marlene pero nos hemos comunicado sin problema. Encontramos todo lo que necesitábamos.
Tal vez podría colocarse un calefon que permita más de 10 minutos de agua caliente sin necesidad de esperar 40 minutos.
Muy recomendable

What a great place to stay in Madrid! Centrally locally in the perfect place! A fun and modern apartment that was the perfect getaway when we came home at night. Marlen and her husband were very responsive and helpful! Would definitely recommend this Airbnb! Thank you again!
El departamento, cuenta con todo lo necesario para una excelente estadía, buena ubicación, limpieza y excelente respuesta del anfitrión, muchas gracias, lo recomiendo sin dudas.

Great apartment in a very cool and hip area of Madrid. Easy walk to the city center but plenty of shopping, bars and cafe’s right in the neighborhood. Apartment was very clean and good size.  Marlen was a very nice and communicative host.  She was easy to contact and always quick to respond to any questions.  Can’t wait to come back to Madrid!!

Just got back from a four night stay and have a great time. Unfortunately Marlen couldn’t meet us on check in but the instructions on where to get the keys was simple enough.
The apartment is in a great location and in easy walking distance of all the sights. The apartment itself is clean and has everything you need for a city break (may be cramped if four of you stayed there). The only flaw was the towels, which were old and had s slight musty smell first time they were used.
Overall we thoroughly enjoyed our stayed and would return if visiting Madrid again.

Very clean and newly renovated apartment in a great quarter of Madrid: everything is around the corner - cafes, bars, restaurants, nice squares, the city centre which is also in walking distance. The apartment is perfectly located if you enjoy going out, meeting people and in general a very lively and vibrant atmosphere.
Nice apartment close to City center.
Was a great 2 day stay. Apartment was clean and Mar was a great host that always was quick to respond.

My mother and I had a lovely stay in Madrid. Very well located apartment, but in the middle of a street of bars and restaurants so it is noisy at night. The apartment is great for a weekend but perhaps not for a longer stay. There is no window in the bedroom and the sofa bed is near the window so it can be very noisy. Very clean and the kitchen and bathroom were  good quality. Would recommend for a 2 night stay!
Marlen greeted us right on time and showed us thru the apartment. It was quite lovely and in a great location. Recommended.
Honey, clean, close to everything, just the overall perfect place ! My cousin and I had a great time :-)
Lovely apartment and great location. Would recommend if staying in Madrid
Excelente apartamento
Everything is close and very cute apartment.

As we arrived Marlen was already there to greet us and gave us a tour of the apartment. Kindly enough she brought us two big jugs of water after we thought she left. Our first impression was the apartment was clean and stylish. It's not super spacious was just enough. The building had an elevator which was great for luggage. Also appreciated the washing machine. Our only issue was that hot water in the shower only lasts about 10 minutes. Great location to so many good restaurants and shops!
Great apartment highly recommend, very centrally located and loved the little balcony to soak up the sights and sounds of Madrid!

We had a great time in Madrid. The apartment has a great location with a lot of nice cafes around the corner. The apartment is just as described and has everything one needs. We would definitely stay there again.

Marlen's apartment is perfect. It is located in Malasana the best location in Madrid and its very easy to get around the city from there. There are many stylish bars and eateries very close by but we heard no noise at all from them and slept really well. There is a supermarket called Dia which is about 5 minutes walk away, turn left out of the apartment and its up a short incline.  It has long opening hours, is excellent and sells everything including freshly squeezed orange juice and fresh coffee. Marlen's apartment was extremely comfortable and clean. It has air-conditioning and a ceiling fan in the bedroom. Communication with Marlen was instant and she left her contact number in case we needed anything during our stay. I would highly recommend Marlen's apartment and would definitely choose to stay again. Thank you Marlen.
Everything was wonderful! Fantastic location and great recommendations from our host. Questions were answered promptly and communication was great!
Un apartamento muy bien ubicado para disfrutar de la ciudad. Bien equipado y una comunicación con Marlen muy facil !

This apartment is in a wonderful location, walkable to so much of Madrid and the neighborhood spots are great. Marlen also provides great recommendations. Not the most comfortable bed, but worth it for the location and doable for a small number of nights.

A nice, small apartment with comfortable accommodations.  There was a lot of street noise from the businesses, traffic and pedestrians.  I had to keep the balcony windows open for fresh air, which let in the noise.  Otherwise, it was a pleasant stay.

Marlen’s place was just as advertised. Such a great spot. Perfect location. Close to train, museums and awesome restaurants. The place was impeccably clean. Marlen was incredibly responsive and helpful and had great suggestions for the area. Would love to stay here again!
Outstanding location, attentive host, extremely clean, new appliances. Perfect place for a stay in Madrid.  Absolutely no complaints, hope to return one day.
Apartment was in a great location and a good size for a couple. There are loads of nice bars/restaurants below the apartment. We would visit again!

There’s nothing more you could ask for! Marlen was nothing short of a great host. She was very quick to respond and her place was amazing! The location is superb and the cleanliness and comfort was simply an added bonus. I would undoubtedly stay here again  and recommend it to anyone!
Muy lindo apartamento, limpio y céntrico! Marlen es muy accesible y amable. Definitivamente lo recomendamos!!!

We enjoyed our stay in the apartment.  The area is great, lively and interesting and close to everything.  We stayed 2 nights which was fine for 4 people but longer would have been difficult as it is very compact.
This apartment is exactly what it looks like in pictures! It is very cute and in a great neighborhood. I would highly recommend staying here!
This was an awesome location in the heart of Madrid. Marlen was a great host and is able to get you anything you would need. I would highly recommend staying here

Small but clean apt on very busy noisy street.  Pretty well equipped. Bedroom has no window or ventilation therefore dark and stuffy. Shower goes cold after ten minutes and takes a long time to heat water up again. Owner did point this out to us on arrival. Late check in fee was 20 euro albeit we checked in just before 10 p.m.  also service fee of 32 euro which I'm not sure for what?  Location good.

공항에 너무 늦게 도착하고 캐리어도 찾지 못해 더 늦게 숙소 도착했는데 친절하게 그 시간까지 호스트가 기다려 주고... 전화 안되는 우리에게 캐리어 잘 찾을 수 있도록 도와줘서 첫 여정을 시작하는 우리에 큰 힘이 되었다. 또한 물이 잘 나와서 좋았고, 요리 등 뭔가를 해먹을  수 있는 시설이 있어 좋았다. 다만 주말에는 새벽에 주변이 많이 시끄러울 수 있으니 감암해야한다.

Marlen’s place is great and it’s location is awesome. We loved the vibrant community!
We intend to reserve this unit the next time we are in Madrid. That’s how much we loved it!
Great Host and Great apartment.. I recommend this place 100%!

It was very clean and comfortable.
Location was also nice as center of downtown and near the market.
Nice apartment in lively location in Malasaña
Marlen was a great host! Quick responses, good recommendations and a lovely flat. Would definitely recommend staying here!

This is a great apartment in an excellent location! The space is very clean and more spacious than expected. Close to a supermarket, metro and many cool stores and restaurants and to the main streets of Madrid. Would definitely stay here again!

Cute apartment- exactly as advertised. Yes, the water heater is small, but, there was plenty hot water for dishes and showering. The shower by the way is pretty great!
We had everything we needed and there are markets just steps away for anything else you may require.
Marlen is a gracious host and super helpful. Don’t hesitate to book. The apartment is perfectly sized for the two of us and so close to all the sights.
For a first time airb&b user it was made very easy. It is a great location and the renter was great.
Great location and stylish place. Very nice for a weekend trip!

Alojamiento totalmente recomendable, es tal y como refleja el anuncio. Entorno inmejorable. Si cabe destacar que como zona de ambiente nocturno, y ser un primer piso, el ruido de los bares se oye en la vivienda, pero para nosotros no ha sido ningún problema, si me surge la ocasión volveré a alquilar el apartamento encantado.
Localización privilegiada, detalles que marcan la diferencia y un trato cercano y muy agradable. Un absolut must!

Marlen was a great host and her apartment is so lovely! Located down a trendy looking street in Madrid super close to everything! When we needed some recommendations she was quick to reply! Definetly would recommend staying here for your trip to Madrid!!
Great unit in a great location. Comfy bed and good bathroom and kitchen. Lovely balcony out to street.

Marlen’s place in Madrid is very central and we were able to walk to as of our attractions. The communication with Mar was seamless and she was always helpful and responsive. Her place is very clean and it was a nice place to stay after a day of exploring.
The place is like is shown in the picture. Good host. I only have the opportunity to see her one time. Good communication. I recommend the apartment and the host.
Very special place and location.  Close to everything.
Great thank you
L’emplacement est idéal au cœur de la ville et dans un quartier très animé !!! L’appartement est très propre et très confortable n’hésitez pas !!
Un apartamento en el centro de Madrid, muy cómodo, limpio y con buenas instalaciones. Muy  recomendable.

Perfection! Perfect style, location and host! It was so nice to walk to the Gran Via, check out a show at night with my four year old daughter, because the location is literally close to everything! I really didn’t even need to pay for the city tour. The bed was super comfy, love the frame around the TV and all the Paris accents. Marlen thanks for everything!
You won’t be disappointed! Great experience
Clean apartment in a great location. Mar was really helpful and very quick to respond and offer suggestions etc.

Perfect apartment for enjoying Madrid’s nightlife in a trendy neighborhood with loads of bars, restaurants, cafes and little shops. The apartment is exactly as pictured with a nice view of the street from the balcony. Well equipped kitchen, and both kitchen and bathroom were very clean and in good condition. Really nice rainfall shower too. Quiet bedroom in the back of the apartment. There was a little street noise from the nearby bars, but definitely not enough to disturb our sleep. Mar was a fantastic host, checking on our arrival time and to ask if we needed anything during our stay. We picked up the key at a nearby cafe, and Mar left a detailed explanation of the various apartment features. We would definitely stay here again and will recommend Mar’s apartment to our friends.

Marlen was a wonderful host. She met us Christmas evening to ensure we got into the apartment and settled. The apartment is in a great location, easy to find. Not much hot water, but that’s a norm in these parts.

Everything went smoothly from the start. Communication was flawless, instructions and local tips highly appreciated, flat is lovely and in the perfect location, ideal for sightseeing and in proximity to the great restaurants and bars. Excellent stay; would definitely return next time I'm around. Thank you!
A localização muito boa, porém so consegue hospedar com conforto 02 pessas.
Hola. Me hospede a fines de enero, hay buena calefacción, la ubicación es inmejorable; todo a pie, pleno centro. Ascensor, agua caliente, cama cómoda, buena comunicación, limpio, todo excelente.

숙소 위치, 숙소 다 좋았지만 뜨거운 물을 쓰는건 정말 불편했어요.
히터가 작아서 60분마다 뜨거운물을 10분씩 쓸 수 있는데 여자 둘이 10분동안 씻긴 무리였고 한명이 씻고 한시간 뒤에 한명이 씻는 방식인데 너무 불편했습니다.
그 외엔 다 좋은 집입니다
Marlen is communicative with fast response. Clean apartment with good location. You can reach most of the popular areas by foot. A comfortable stay.
Todo perfecto
We had a fantastic stay at Marlen’s place. Perfect location, clean and fresh appartement, and the contact with her was pleasant. Definitely recommended!
Highly recommend this location.  Great buzz here.  Expect some music at night! Marlen was very helpful with local.knowledge and offered to make reservations etc for us.  Would return😀
Estancia perfecta. Piso muy bien ubicado y comunicación con Marlene inmediata

Marlen was great! She was very attentive and responded quickly to any of our needs. Her home was exceptionally clean and very easy to locate. I highly recommend booking with her. Apartment is in a great location to everything you need in Madrid.
The location is pretty good, the room as well. Marlen is also very kind. She has already prepared for everything about what we need. And she also helped us a lot. Really a good living experience.
Great location! Lovely flat and balcony!

Location couldn't be any better - close to all the sights, lots of restaurants and cafés and a supermarket. The apartment is modern and comfortable and has a TV with Netflix if it happens to rain in beautiful Madrid. Marlen is a great host! Extra points for the possibility of a late check out (12) :-) Overall a perfect stay!

I highly recommend staying at Marlen’s apartement. The location is great.
Perfect for couples.
It has everything you need.

Just as reviewed by others: clean and tidy, terrific neighborhood, comfortable beds, great suggestions by Mar (we ate at both places she mentioned and loved both). We travelled with our 11 year old son who loved the bakery across the street. Yum!
My stay was so amazing it was everything as advertised very clean smelled amazing , great area close to everything amaaaaaaaaaazing view ! Loved it
We thoroughly enjoyed our short stay at Marlen’s. The location was perfect and the apartment was in good shape. Would recommend staying here.

Great apartment! Close to everything. Lots of music and restaurants in the area. By BF and I LOVED the little market across the street. We had been traveling for weeks so was nice to cook with local fresh ingredients.
So many positive things. Don’t let these 2 negative items steer you away as we would stay here again and recommend it to a party of 2-3.
-Mar will warn you that the shower only has 10 min of hot water every hour. Was only and issue for us 1x.
- great to only b up 1 flight of stairs but we heard the main door slam often. Bring earplugs if that will bother you - I also suggested to mar to offer them.
Overall - great stay - we would recommend, stay again and use site bnb often so have lots of experience with hosts and houses. Mar and the apartment were great!!

Marlen's place was perfect for me and my parents. Located in chilled nice area with many options for restaurants, bars, coffee shops, supermarkets. The train station was a few blocks away too. The apartment was comfortable, even the sofa bed which I used myself. It had all the necessary amenities.
Marlen was super helpful and kind.
Overall it was great. I would definitely stay here again when I go back to Madrid.
Everything was perfect. Al is extremely nice person. Thanks for hosting us!
Al was incredibly welcoming and thoughtful. He helped us navigate the city and suggested great places to eat and visit. The apartment was also amazing! Thank you Al!
Amazing! Súper buena onda y buenísima ubicación!
Al's place is amazing, I would recommend it to anyone. Very good location to many restaurants and tapas bars. Al gives good recommendations of place close by and worth checking out.
Awesome studio in a beautiful building. Al is a perfect host and the apartment is in a perfect location. Highly recommended!!!

Place exactly as described in a great area of Madrid.  Ál met us personally and gave us great local tips around the city.  There was a small bottle of wine and breakfast items that were left out in the kitchen.  Only downside was a climb of about 4 flights of stairs, but otherwise fantastic apartment.  Would definitely stay again!

Al was the most gracious Airbnb host that I’ve stayed with.  Our luggage was left behind by the airline in our connecting airport the night we arrived.  Since we didn’t have much time to spend in Madrid, Al generously said he’d wait for our luggage delivery so that we would have time to go around.  That was such a great help to us!  His place is really centrally located.  The bed and pillows stood out for their comfort.  We had such a good night sleep here.       Highly recommend Al’s place.  He is a true superhost!
Al was a great host and his Airbnb is located at the heart of Madrid.  The pantry was fully stocked with bread and beverages. The place is very cozy as well.

Lovely studio in the heart of the best neighborhood in Madrid. Although you will find plenty of bars and restaurants in this area, the apartment is quiet. I particularly appreciated that it was very clean, the bed was extremely confortable and Al was a great host as he answered all my questions and was very helpful with my luggage. I fully recommend this place!
Cannot recommend highly enough.
Highly recommended!! nice place with a very good location in Madrid. Everything was perfectly
Lovey studio place in an outstanding location!!! Fully recommended 👍🏻

STAY HERE! Al’s place not only is lovely (he has quite a taste for decoration and interior design) but is super clean, spacious, quiet, in an excellent location (5 mins walking distance from “Gran Via” and close to everything else), and also gives you that “extra”.
He is readily available if you have any questions and takes the time to give you recommendations of where to go as well as a map and pamphlets. He offers you extra towels, slippers and a bathrobe. It’s also really convenient to have all the extra amenities that you may need such as shampoo, body wash, etc. And we loved the fact that he welcomed us with a bottle of white wine upon our arrival (we went to Madrid to celebrate my mom’s birthday).
Also, he offers you complimentary meal items in the refrigerator as well as bread and pastries. We will DEFINITELY stay at Al’s next time we visit Madrid and highly recommend you staying there.
Al fue muy amable, recomendable
The place was amazing! Señor Al was very friendly and responsive. I would say this is the best place I’ve ever stayed at using AirBnB. His recommendations were awesome, too!

Easy to find. Great location for restaurant and bars and close to metro. It was just as described. Al had lots of tea,coffee and snacks etc. Very well stocked. Also Al had a lovely bottle of wine for us on arrival. The best thing was Al had lots of tips on the best places to eat & interesting places to visit which we might otherwise never have found.
We highly recommend this place.

Wonderful studio in the heart of Madrid. Al was a wonderful host! Thoughtful touches like snacks and a bottle of wine! Apartment was charming and exactly as described. In the heart of it all and close to the metro.

Al est simplement génial!
Sont appartement est très beau et propre. Proches de tous les centres d’interêt en Madrid.
Il nous a reçu avec un bouteille d’un très bon vin espagnol et nous avions tout ce qu’il faut pour passer un très bon séjour sur Madrid.
Merci encore une fois Al pour ton accueil, gentillesse et générosité.
El ático es espectacular, super bien ubicado y AL es un encanto. Me encantaría repetir.
Posición perfecta, Al muy amable y disponible. Hemos apreciado mucho que en casa haya todo lo que se necesite, desde el desayuno hasta el aperitivo y mucho más. Volveremos!

Wonderful apartment in a great location.  Walking distance to many bars, restaurants and sights.  Al was so easy to communicate with and was very prompt.  He is such a nice guy too!  The space is on the 4th floor and you need to walk up stairs but it’s worth it.  The bed was super comfy and space was very stylish.  Would highly recommend this apartment!

Al was beyond helpful and had rapid response when we were booking with him even when it was the day before arriving. We had some last minute travel adjustments and he made everything super smooth and easy for us with our schedule as we departed for home the next day. Even though we only stayed in this beautiful area for one night he still shared plenty to do with us and didn’t skip a thing in case we wanted to indulge while we stayed regardless of our time frame. The area we were in was perfect and located close to everything you could imagine, we walked everywhere and didn’t need transit at all which was lovely. Al was always available when we needed him and had answers to any questions we had. The apartment was a dream, from the welcome wine to the artist decor, we will definitely be back to this amazing area with more time on our hands.

Probably the best location we could have asked for! Right in the heart of Malasaña which is my favorite neighborhood in Madrid. Al was an amazing host and super friendly and had so many tips for around the area. Couldn’t have asked for a better experience!

Al is an amazing host! My girlfriend and I arrived in Madrid a few hours before check-in. Al worked diligently to make sure that the apartment was available as soon as possible to accommodate us. After checking in, Al walked us through a map of the city, highlighting everything he thought we should see. His recommendations were spot on and it made Madrid the highlight of our Eurotrip!
In terms of the apartment, it's just what you will need. Prime location, clean and, even had a nice bottle of wine to top it off! :)
We will for sure stay with Al again when we return to Madrid next year!
挺好的

Al place’s is fantastic. It is located in the heart of the city, very close to wonderful, restaurants, trendy shops , delicious cafes and lovely people! Also the studio is in a neighbourhood where I felt really safe walking by myself at 3:00 am.
If you love unique shops it is the perfect place for you and if you want to enjoy the amazing Gran via, Cibeles or Callao, you can be there without public transport! Walking distance to Puerta del Sol, Paseo Del Prado, museums, etc.
The bed is reaaaaallly comfy and the AC and NETFLIX are wonderful plus to the facility.
It was a lovely night and definitely I will be back if I am lucky enough as always is booked!
Muchas gracias Al!

Al's place was exactly as it looks in the photos - stylish and clean! It had great air conditioning and he keeps the snacks freshly stocked. He gave amazing recommendations for local food, bars, and buildings to see (much appreciated as a young architect)! This is a perfect spot for people who want to experience the culture and arts of Madrid!! Highly recommend!!

We loved the place - it was comfy and cool even in fierce 36 degree heat outside! We also particularly appreciated meeting Al, who gave us great tips and advice on what to see in Madrid. Fantastic stay - highly recommended.

Great location - local and trendy vibes while being a 15-20 minute walk from the touristy areas (plaza, sol, palace, etc.). Al was super communicative and made us feel more than welcome during our short 1-day stay in Madrid.

Al’s studio apartment is absolutely fantastic! It is a light, bright and attractive space with all the amenities you need. The bed is very comfortable and the shower pressure is great! It’s a four floor walk up but it gets easier every time you do it! The location is just magic, right in the heart of Malasaña - surrounded by fantastic bars and restaurants but on a quiet little side street. I felt safe walking around at night on my own. Al’s communication is excellent and the little touches (like wine and breakfast provisions) are great. He’s a very warm and professional host. I would absolutely recommend people stay at Al’s and I hope to again.
Great location, host and apartment. Nice little treats left by Al such as a bottle of wine, snacks and breakfast items. One of my best air BnB experiences

The friendliness of your host, Al, the impeccable room and facilities, and last not least, the fantastic location in this lively part of town, with its local atmosphere not touristic, makes for a great stay at an excellent price/quality ration. Like a magnificent suite in a hotel, only more authentic. And four floors up the stairs are a good fitness training! Highly recommendable place to stay when a few days in Madrid.

Great! Clean! Safe! Central! Warm and very friendly welcome after a long journey.  He was kind and helped us with our luggage and there was fresh fruit, cheese and wine waiting for us.  Have us amazing recommendations.

Everything about this stay is truly special. Perfect location. Al is the best host we’ve ever had on AirBnb. He was very easy to communicate with, greeted us immediately upon arrival, and gave fantastic local recommendations for food and sightseeing. 10/10. Thank you Al!

Super bright and stylish space in awesome location. Loved having this as our home base during our time in Madrid.
We’d definitely stay here again, but just know the walk up is no joke! If you’re not fit or have heavy luggage, it would be very hard!
Al goes above and beyond for his guests and it shows. His personality is electric and we are so glad we went with this unit for our last night in Madrid!

This was the best AirBnB of our trip. Al was so welcoming and offered great insight into the city. The space was perfect — super clean, great location, and really cool decor. It was truly a great experience and will stay again if ever back in Madrid!

Al's place is great in a great location. If you have heavy luggage it might be challenging as there is no elevator and the apartment is on the 5th floor. It also takes some getting used to the "wet room", which is essentially one small room with a shower and bathroom in one with no partition to the toilet but not all that bad. The location is fantastic in the Malasana district, where you will find lots of restaurants and pubs. Al's place is very stylish and he is extremely helpful with lots of details such as power adapters, little snacks and even a nice wine bottle. I really enjoyed my stay and I would for sure come back. Highly recommended.

Al’s studio is in an awesome location - super easy walking distance to the hip Malasana scene and the center of Madrid. He has so many nice touches like a stocked fridge and wine. Plenty of room for two; the apartment is quite large. Lots of steps to the top but it’s worth it!
Al’s place was great!  He was flexible with our check in and gave us some recommendations for restaurants in the area. AC was great option to have and the room was quite at night.
Efficace et bien placé.
房东非常热情帮我们一起扛箱子，帮忙和Uber司机交流，房间的布置很漂亮，提供的东西是我们这次旅行中遇到最周全和贴心的

AI is an amazing airbnb owner. The best I’ve met so far! Thank you for all the complimentary snacks and for all the tips. much appreciated. the house location is perfect too! my first visit to Madrid and this has to be my favourite country yet!! amazing people and amazing shopping!!!
Great location with a awesome host. !!  Lots of stairs if your older !

El apartamento encantador,  tal y como aparece en las fotos, lleno de detalles de agradecer, muy bien situado, a 5 minutos de Gran Vía. Al un super anfitrión,  atento, de respuesta rápida,  te da muy buenos consejos a la llegada para poder aprovechar bien la estancia. Sin duda repetiremos.

Al is truly worth more than his SuperHost status. A true Spanish gentleman, who's hosting together with his impeccable flat and really deft touches of extra's like fresh fruit, juice etc. exceeded our expectations in Madrid. We highly recommend him.

This place is amazing, and Al is beyond hospitable- an awesome host. We didn’t stay long, but we will definitely be coming back longer in the future.
Great location, easy check in, beautiful flat.
Alojamiento con encanto

Al's place is fantastic. Sparkling clean and a joy to be in, quiet at night. He couldn't have been more friendly and helpful, not least as we had just had to flee another really awful place and were a bit shaken up. Cannot recommend highly enough. Great location too, and even a really nice restaurant right outside the front door (and plenty more to see and do - and eat - near by). Super host status thoroughly deserved - would go back in a heartbeat.

We really enjoyed Al’s place in Madrid, perfectly located in a lively neighborhood! Al was so helpful and responsive. He took the time to give us all the best recommendations and was extremely accommodating. The apartment was clean and felt very safe. I would definitely recommend this apartment if your looking to be in one of the best spots in town!
Amazing location, super nice and helpful host, responding immediately to msgs. It was a real pleasure to stay at Al's  apartment :)
Very kind host and perfect location!
Great apartment in a fantastic neighborhood. Everything is walking distance away. We can definitely recommend it!!
Al is an exellent host always available. Great location and confortable space.
Al es un gran anfitrión y realmente recomiendo este apartamento.
Ubicación inmejorable y de agradecer los detalles del anfitrión. Alojamiento con estilo y muy recomendable

Very clean and spacious 2 person studio in the heart of a funky neighbourhood of Madrid. The host, Al, has the appartment perfectly prepared with fruit, wine, salted crisps, fresh coffee, tea, drinks and various breakfast options, marmelades, decent butter and fresh while milk! Clean towels, VERY hot showers and lots of attention to detail: a box of kleenexes, different shampoo options, shower gel, caps... Really well done! A 5 min walk from Gran Via and the Metro system... Hard to beat, well done Al!
Muy bien ubicado en el centro de Madrid para vivir una auténtica experiencia local. A pocos metros de varias opciones de transporte público.

Cute little room on the 4th and last floor (roof) of a building in malasana. Location is the best feature of this place. Recommend for a short stay of (up to 2 people). Bathroom + shower are not ideal as they are right next to each other on an open floor that gets flooded quickly. Also woke up to a leakage in bed as it was raining 😬. Very hospitable. Nice touches.
Bonito piso, pequeño pero acogedor situado muy cerca del centro, en una zona con mucho ambiente

Todo ha sido perfecto. El anfitrión,el estudio decorado con mucho mimo y aunque esté en una zona muy céntrica de mucho movimiento....es silencioso y calentito!!!!! Todo a la perfección....lo recomiendo 100%
Fantastic location and a wonderful and friendly host!

I had a great stay at Al's place. Terrific communication, generous and thoughtful amenities, and a great location within walking distance to much of the city center as well as being a short walk to the metro.

Al's place is located perfectly in the middle of Madrid & chock full of treats like a fresh bottle of red wine, pastries, & other delicious snacks.  He is beyond accommodating & really helped us out when our luggage was lost.  His demeanor is kind, sweet, & calming.  We loved our visit & hope to do it again soon!

Al is the loveliest Host ever. His communication is perfect and makes you really feel at home. The apartment itself is very interesting and tasty decorated and the location is unbeatable. Don't miss the chance to try this authentic experience in Malasaña staying at Al's place.

Incantevole loft, posizione eccezionale, accoglienza squisita, Al è un superhost a tutti gli effetti,offre tutto quello che si possa desiderare, non c'è possibilità di trascorrere una brutta permamenza in questo graziosissimo loft!

Perfect location, easy to find, easy check-in. He literally has everything you need plus more. All his extra touches that made our stay memorable:  wine, crackers, coffee milk, bread, tons of towel, slippers and robes. I would definitely stay again. He exemplifies súper host.
Wonderful studio space, great location.  Al is a charming host.  It is up four flights of stairs.
Fantastic place, beautiful location, amazing host. Gave many amazing local suggestions and was more than understanding with the crazy situation we were in. Would definitely stay here again!

It’s not the first time I stayed at Al’s precious place in a beautiful old building in the heart of Malasaña. Like always he made my stay both relaxed and comforting. During the last months Al renovated the whole studio and made it even more cosy. The luminous space has transformed into a perfect hidden treasure and starting point for people like me who want to explore the city as well as work from home. It’s absolutely quiet even though you are non the middle of Madrid’s pulsating center. The internet connection is super fast which is crucial for me who uploads and downloads huge files while working. The new kitchen is awesome and especially the upgrade of the bathroom caught my attention. But most importantly, the place breathes an authentic Madrid feel and reflects the modernity as well as the history. I will be back soon. Thanks again for having me, Al.

I have had a wonderful stay at Al's studio. This place is bright, airy, clean, and has amazing urban style decor. The place has just been renovated and the new WIFI is super fast! Although I travel with my own laptop I enjoyed watching movies on the TV provided as it has brilliant sound and picture quality, in general, is awesome. The studio is very quiet which is amazing considering it is located in one of Madrid's most trendy areas, Malasaña, full of very cool bars, shops, restaurants... you name it! Please be mindful that the is no lift to get to the studio, I am far from fit and I managed the stairs well, I did appreciate Al carrying my suitcase up to the studio. He was incredibly attentive and helpful throughout my stay, he made a massive difference and nothing seemed too much for him. Honestly, I could not have asked for a better experience, and I am really looking forward to a longer stay soon. If you are considering a place to stay in Madrid central district this place has it all :)
Un estudio muy acogedor, situación inmejorable y con todas las cosas que se pueden necesitar para pasar una larga temporada.
super Location, sehr geschmackvoll eingerichtetes Apartment. Hell und ruhig. Al ist ein super netter Gastgeber. Alles wie auf den Fotos.

This place is fantastic, in the middle of Madrid and yet really quiet, I am a light sleeper and had no problem here at all. The description in the post is very accurate, I met AL and have to say he is extremely friendly and kind. My experience in Al’s place was just great.
Logement très central , bien équipé, j'ai apprécié l'accueil professionnel et chaleureux de AL . Vous pouvez reserver les yeux fermés , c'est une bonne adresse

Al’s place was perfect—spacious, light, and airy, and well equipped too. His attention to detail really makes the place welcoming and feel like home. It’s very well located as well, with all the bars, restaurants, and quirky boutiques of Chueca and Malasaña at your doorstep, and three different metro stops close by for your explorations further afield. Al is a wonderful host, very kind and friendly, and extremely helpful and communicative. I would definitely be delighted to stay here again!

Al's apartment is a real gem perfectly situated in vibrant Malasana district. From here you can walk to every major spot in Madrid. Place itself is well decorated and has all needed equipment. Although its central location it's very quiet and you can get good sleep there. Working AC, fast wi-fi, comfortable bed and flexible check-in and check-out hours make it perfect place for Madrid's adventure.
Muy bien equipado, muy acogedor y muy bien localizado! Y el trato con Al fue genial, muy recomendable!!!

Al is an amazing host ! The location is spectacular. Very convenient as everything is walking distance. He leaves a bottle of wine for you as a gift. The space is nice & comfortable. I will be looking to stay with al in Madrid again ! It’s on the fourth floor but I don’t mind the walk. It is in a beautiful historic building. & he was very kind to help me with my luggage up the stairs. Thanks for the wonderful stay !

We had a very nice stay in Al’s flat. It is perfectly located at the heart of an animated neibourhood, and walking distance from the historical center. The flat itself is very nice, spacious and decorated with taste, with everything you need for a short stay (including coffee and jam 🙂). Al was really nice when we arrived and easy to communicate with.
Wonderful apartment in best location in Madrid.
Al is a very friendly and helpful host! His beautiful, stylish appartment is in a great location. We definitely recommend his place‼️‼️

Nos encantó el loft/ estudio de Al!  Un lugar muy agradable, completo y muy bien ubicado! Tal y como se ve en las fotos. Nos encantó el ambiente de Malasaña, la calle tranquila y sin ruidos! La pasamos súper!!!
Anfitrión muy agradable. Piso en Malasaña reformado. A 5 minutos de Gran Vía. 4 piso sin ascensor. Ninguna queja, todo perfecto
Perfecta localización y el sitio encantador
Everything was wonderful! Great studio with everything you need. Loved the location. Al had great recommendations and is an amazing host. Thank you!
We had a great experience at Al's apartment. It's really well located, really cozy and bright. We felt like home. I hope be back some time soon!
Great place, outstanding host! There were so many little details when I arrived that made my stay much nicer than any regular airbnb. Gracias Alvaro :)

Had a wonderful time staying at Al's beautiful loft apartment.  Location was amazing, right in the heart of the city with all the main attractions within 10-15 min walk with plenty of great cafes, tapas bars, supermarkets, metro stations nearby. It was also super safe to walk around at night as a solo traveller. Despite being right in the heart of the city, it was so quiet at night and the bed was so comfortable, I slept really well. Would love to stay again next time I'm in Madrid! Highly recommend!

Al’s flat was a perfect spot for two. It is located in the fun and exciting part of Madrid, Malasaña, but off a main road so it doesn’t get to rowdy or loud. It’s on the top floor, so even if it was loud on the street, you wouldn’t hear it. I definitely recommend and will be back next time I’m in Madrid. Thanks for a great stay!

Thanks to Al to have given us opportunità to stay in apartment.
It Is full equipped with everything could be necessary during temporary stay.
Al Is very fast in comunication and kind to satisfy our needs.
Position Is good to visit the city, the pictures of apartment are real.
Thanks for all.
Maurizio
Muy bonita experiencia, el anfitrión super atento nos ayudo en todo momento. Excelente servicio al cliente, cuido todos los detalles. muy contentas y por supuesto que volveriamos.

Had a very nice stay at this cozy, small but well-equipped loft. Very good bed, enough towels, TV, fridge and some basic as coffee, thee, salt&peper, olive oil provided.
Al was very flexible about arrival and departure. Highly recommend!

Al was a fantastic host and the Apartment was amazing. It was impeccably clean and the locationis perfect! It's close to the metro and surrounded by lots of great places to grab a drink and eat. Al is very kind, friendly and he provides everything in the apartment as well as tips and recommendations for an even more enjoyable stay. Thanks so much for letting us stay at your place, we will definitelybe back when visiting Madrid again
Al was an awesome host.  The apartment location/neighborhood is really nice and close to everything.  We had an awesome time.
Couldn’t be a better location or place to stay. Water filter is such a bonus. So many small comforts that Al thinks about. Really feel at home!
Great flat in the perfect area of Madrid for going out! Everything has been as displayed and it has been a blast.
Súper estancia, airbnb top y muy acogedor

Mi estancia en el piso de Al, ha sido muy buena. El lugar donde se encuentra el piso esta muy bien comunicado para desplazarte por Madrid. Al, te atiende inmediatamente e intenta ayudarte, siempre que puede.

Lovely studio apartment and as described and shown in the photos.  Great location for walking to lots of different areas of central Madrid and also convenient for the metro.  Quiet at night despite the area itself being a hive of activity.  Well equipped kitchen for cooking as well.  Al was very friendly when I met him at check in and also very quick to respond to any messages.  I'd happily stay in the studio again.

This place was just as advertised: perfectly located in Malasaña; well equipped; comfortable; and quiet. Al is super nice and available. I would stay again in a heartbeat. I would only point out two things. 1.) There is no oven, and the stove consists of portable induction burners, so this is not going to be a place for someone who wants to cook anything fancy. 2.) It's on the fourth floor (or what we in the U.S. call the "fifth" floor) with no elevator, so be ready to get your steps in. Not a good choice for anyone with limited mobility. But it was perfect for me and I hope to go back soon!
muy buen anfitrion
Amazing stay.  Close to everything! Very safe.  Very friendly host.  Left a complimentary bottle of wine on our first day!  Would recommend for anyone traveling to Madrid!
El departamento es tal cual se ve en las fotos. Lo recibimos impecable. Nos encanto y la ubicación es barbara. Nada para criticar, impecable.

Excelente ubicación, excelente predisposición de Marlen, y un departamento con todas las comodidades!
Gracias por todo!
Ezequiel.

Great location!  Walkable to all major attractions. Cute apartment in the middle of a neighborhood with a gourmet deli and bakery right across the street!  Restaurants with a block!  Felt the local vibe!!

Great location with a huge number of bars, restaurants and shops in the immediate area and very close to main shopping area of Madrid. Marleen was very helpful suggesting restaurants in the area, all of which were great. Unit was compact, perfect for a couple, very well maintained and sparkling clean. Bedroom is at the back do didn’t hear much noise at all. I recommend this to any couple looking to enjoy everything Madrid has to offer.
Buena localización, limpio y confortable

This is a great place...close to all main attractions and walking distance to metro stations and Gran Via. Marlen, our host, was awesome. She was also extremely prompt in responding to any questions we had. That is the hallmark of a great host.
If you are thinking of staying in Madrid, look no further!

Great place in an awesome location. We loved the kitchen area and the balcony. The bedroom is really quiet and dark which is great. We‘d definitely stay here again and really recommend the apartment :)
Good value

Marlen’s place is located perfectly in middle of most tourist areas. 2 blocks to gran via, 10 min walk to palaces and plazas. We walked everywhere from the apartment.
The apartment is clean and is located right above a restaurant. I was hesitant about booking this room because of possible street noises as some reviewer has mentioned. The TV room next to the balcony can have some street noises, but once balcony door is closed, the noise becomes non issue. The bedroom doesn’t have any windows, so the noise is non existent while sleeping.
We had great time while in Madrid. Marlen was excellent in her communications and answered all my inquiries immediately.
We truly loved the apartment and would definitely stay there again.
Great location, lovely apartment!
Nothing to add

Thank you Marlen for your hospitality in letting us stay at your apartment. Very close to most places to go in Madrid and places to eat as well. Well maintained and recommended to others.
Francis and Joy
Location is great. Walking distance to Gran Via, Playa Mayor, and plenty of great restaurants, bars, and mercados.

This apartment is a little gem. It was spotlessly clean and well equipped. The location is excellent and we were able to walk to all the attractions. Mar was very friendly and helpful. We would definitely recommend this apartment.
Marlen is a wonderful host. She always provide quick responses to all your questions. Appartment location is great for exploring Madrid and within walking distance to most of  attractions.
Great flat, with good amenities in a great location. Marlen is an excellent host, who made sure we were fine at all times without being intrusive. Thoroughly recommend

We had a great stay in Marlen’s apartment - the location was perfect, really close to the city centre and easy to get everywhere! I would highly recommend the restaurant La Pescaderia (just a couple of minutes from the apartment) which was one of Marlen’s suggestions, great food/service/atmosphere and reasonably priced! Overall we had a fantastic time in Madrid and very glad we chose to stay at Marlen’s apartment!

The apartment had everything we needed and we more! The location was great- we loved Malasaña and we could walk to countless bars, restaurants, etc. We also appreciated that Marlen was always quick to respond and even helped arrange for us to get to the airport our last day in Madrid. Klein maar fijn appartement in een levendig straatje (met veel leuke restaurantjes) in een leuke wijk van Madrid (perfect als uitvalsbasis om de rest van de stad te ontdekken!). Madrid zelf vonden we ook te gek, dus als we nog eens terugkomen, zou ik zeker ook weer voor dit appartement kiezen! Het enige nadeel vond ik dat het appartement alleen de balkondeurtjes voor licht en lucht heeft en geen raampje in de slaapkamer, maar  verder heeft het appartement alles wat je nodig hebt voor een kort verblijf in Madrid.

The location of the flat is amazing. Everything is close and easy to reach... Malasaña is a neighborhood with lots of good bars and restaurants. The center is only a "jump" away! One thing i was a bit upset about is that the flat don't seem to be maintained well.
The apartment is in the centre of the city, with less than 5 minute walk to Gran Via. Mar’s apartment is very nice and it’s great value!

Perfectly positioned little apartment. Suitable for a couple. Spotlessly clean. Marlen was super helpful with great restaurant tips. The bedroom doesn’t have any windows but has a fan to provide air circulation. Aircon is in the lounge.
In summary, great value apartment in an excellent area
Marlen was a wonderful host, with a perfect spot for exploring the fabulous city of Madrid.

The apartment was perfect for me - I was travelling alone on a conference trip. The apartment is comfortable and well equipped, and it was lovely to have a balcony. The aircon worked well on days that were in the high 30s. The location in Malasana was perfect - lots of great places nearby to shop and eat, and it's less than 5 minutes to Gran Via and the Callou metro. Excellent things nearby - the ham shop just along the road, vintage shops up the road. Would stay there again.
Great space and location. Easy check in and super friendly host. Recommend for a couple!

We loved our stay in Marlen’s apartment. The space is modern, clean and well-equipped. The A/C was perfect during the summer heatwave! The location is outstanding; in a really fun part town within walking distance of many restaurants, shops and museums. We loved everything about it, including the host, and would definitely stay again. Highly recommend.
Sitio muy céntrico y agradable.  Comunicación excelente .  Repetiría sin dudarlo.

Marlen’s apartment was the perfect spot for exploring Madrid right in the centre with lots of bars, restaurants and shopping around. There is a supermarket about 50m up the street which we found really handy. The apartment it self was clean and spacious we really felt at home here
El piso tiene una ubicación estupenda para explorar a Madrid. Los recomendaciones de Marlen también son perfectos! Volveríamos a alquiler con ella sin duda.

Location is spot on.Walking distance from some of the prime spots such as Plaza de Sol and the Palace.Situated in a quiet street but just a few steps from the city centre.Very comfortable apartment.Simple but had all amenities.Loved the fan in bedroom.

Highly recommend Marlen’s place in Madrid. Location was a perfect base to explore the city! Apartment is small but has everything you would need, it was also spotlessly clean. Aircon was definitely needed and worked a charm. Thank you Mar for all of your nearby recommendations!
Can not recommend Marlen’s place highly enough. Perfect location, beautiful and clean apartment. I would absolutely stay here again.

An amazing stay in an amazing location! My partner and I really loved Marlen's apartment. Stylish, comfortable and simple. Perfect location, less than a 10 minute walk to the hustle and bustle yet far enough to be staying in a lovely simple Spanish suburb. Great restaurants, bars and cafes nearby. A wonderful apartment which made our stay in Madrid even better. Thank you!

Marlen is an excellent host. She was easy to contact and quick to respond. She was also waiting patiently for us to arrive even though we were a little late. Her place is in the centre of Madrid and close to everything. We had a great stay and highly recommend mars place.

Overall this stay was awesome. Great communication and location could not be better.
Es un apartamento perfecto para visitar Madrid, buena ubicación cerca de plaza callao y la gran vía. Muchos bares y restaurantes cerca, así  como tiendas de varios tipos
Very cute space in a nice location. Host was extremely responsive and helpful (provided recommendations and helped with questions). Would not hesitate to stay  there again.

Sparkling clean, stylish apartment with everything you will need for a short stay. Location was perfect - very close to great restaurants and supermarket but also quiet at night. Thanks for a great stay in Madrid!

Fantastic! Perfect location, nearby lots of restaurants with a supermarket close by in a lively neighborhood. Looks exactly like the pictures. Marlen took the time to greet us and also provided us with suggestions on where to go in Madrid. We visited one of her recommendations, a bar just right downstairs and loved it! Would stay here again.

This apartment was located in a great area with everything being walking distance away. Marlene was responsive & even offered to help with reservations / calling cabs! Clean and comfortable space. Other than that this place is awesome in a safe neighborhood with a beautiful view! Would stay here again.
Great place! Handy location
This place is great! Whenever I’m in Madrid it’s my first choice. Marlen’s responses are fast and she always gives extra suggestions. The place is clean, convenient and cosy!
Muy buen apartamento, la ubicación es perfecta!

Marlen is an amazing host. She's super quick with her responses. She had amazing suggestions on what to do and experience in Madrid that made our trip undorgettable. She is really helpful and makes sure you are comfortable. Thank you again, for being an amazing host! The location of the apartment is great! Walking distance to all the major tourist spots and surrounded by amazing food.
Really pretty and nice apartment!!

Marlen’s apartment was perfect for our needs. Modern but in a beautiful old building. On opening the large balcony doors we could hear the gentle buzzing vibe of life on Madrid.  Perfect location, although tourists ourselves,  a local neighbourhood with great restaurants and bars - easy walk to all attractions. Thank you Marlen.

This was perfect for a getaway for me and my girlfriend. Location was spot on, a little noisy at night but that’s expected when the location is that good. Marlen was great at communicating with us and so was Alfredo who greeted us and made sure that we had everything we needed.
Gracias Alfredo y Marlen nos salvaron el viaje

Marlen's place was tastefully decorated, spotlessly clean and well located in a buzzing, vibrant part of Madrid. Was perfect for our weekend getaway and will highly recommend her apartment to any solo / couple travellers!

We would highly recommend this apartment in Madrid, the apartment is clean comfortable and Cafes are right at the door, there is also an amazing Delicatessen accross the road with fresh fruit, cheese, cold meats.The City Centre is an easy 10 minute walk where we hoped on the Red Bus for a Tour of Madrid. Thank you to our hosts who helped to make our stay in Madrid remarkable. Kathy and Neil Australia

Marlin's apartment is lovely! Marlin and her husband were great hosts - meeting us in person, and calling the taxi (their friend David - very professional) for our very early departure from the country.  Loved our stay, and we can't wait to come back.
Great location.

Marlen's place is excellent. It's perfectly located and easily accessible to major sites. Marlen was very thoughtful and ordered me a taxi in the morning for my departure. It was exactly as described and a perfect home for your stay in Madrid.

Great apartment with amazing location. You can see from the furniture and the finishing that the apartment has been renovated recently. Because of the amazing location it has some downsides with it, there is a bar underneath and theres some noise coming for it, but it didnt really matter to us since we had earplugs (Basically I've had to use ear plugs in every Airbnb I've rented, since the city never sleeps).
Overall the apartment is the best I've stayed in Madrid and would recommend it to anyone!

Das Appartment ist bestens geeignet für einen Kurztrip nac h Madrid. Die Lage nahe der Gran Via ist optimal und wir haben uns dort sehr wohl gefühlt. Auch die Kommunikation mit der Vermieterin, sowie die Organisation des Taxis zum Flughafen waren vorbildlich. Wir kommen gerne wieder!
We had an amazing stay in this apartment. It was beautifully furnished and very clean. The location was outstanding with all the nice food places around. Would come back any time!

A great location as long as you understand the noise level associated with being in the thick of this ie. especially at night time.

We had a few days in Marlen's apartment after a big weekend at a Spanish wedding and it was such a nice cosy apartment that was exactly what we needed. We were meant to meet Marlen at the flat but our travel plans were delayed, however Marlen was quick to sort out a solution that made it easy for us to get into the flat later that day. All in all, a great stay and would definitely come back to this apartment next time we are in Madrid.
Great location! Close to the best sport of Madrid. A pretty of nice cafes/restaurants around. Could be a bit loud if you come back home before the bar below get closed.

It’s a cute little apartment, perfect for a couple of a solo traveler. Place is clean, close to public transport and very central. You can walk to most places of interest and getting to and from airport using public transport is very easy. I’d stay again if I ever came back to Madrid.
100%  recomendable... lindo apartamento, excelente ubicación y Marlen muy preocupada por todo... de seguro volvere

Very short walk to Puerta del Sol and Plaza Mayor; shopping and interesting eating places. The apartment is cosy and modern with everything you might need. Perfect for two but accommodates three comfortably.  We loved Madrid and Marlen’s place.
Marlen's place is strategically located near to madrid's shopping paradise with multiple stores such as Primark around that area. Apartment is of the right size for couple.
The flat is really good for 2 people, there is a living room and a separate bedroom with a bathrrool. The flat is very well located and is really confort and cosy. We enjoyed our stay there !

Great location.  The building looks old but you’ll be surprised once you’re inside. Nice amenities- we especially liked the washer to do laundry. The neighbors can be a bit loud at night so bring earplugs.
Hemos estado de lujo en este pisito en Malasaña. La ubicación de 10, andando a todos lados. Hemos dormido genial. ¡Muchas gracias por todo!

Mar has been really helpful during our stay! The apartment is in an amazing location!

Perfect base to explore Madrid - ideal location in vibrant neighborhood, stylish apartment (nice and warm in winter!), all the amenities you need. Super simple check in and Marlen was always contactable for help if needed. Recommend!

Excelente ubicación, divino departamento.... ideal!

El departamento está súper bien ubicado y es muy cómodo. Fácil acceso. Si van más de dos, deben considerar que el sofá cama está en el living y a la noche se escuchan los ruidos de los bares. Marlen nos brindó su ayuda cuando lo necesitamos. Muy recomendado.
Excellent proximity to Callao and everything else in historico Madrid.  The bedroom is located in the  back and was quiet and comfortable; the amenities were adequate and as described in the listing.
Cosy apartment in a great location! Marlen was quick to response to questions. This apartment is easy to get to Madrid’s attractions and the supermarket across makes it super convenient!

Great little find in a fabulously cosy neighbourhood yet only seconds away from the busier streets. Cool local shops, bars and restaurants and the most mouth-dropping church just across the way.
A real gem!
Great apartment, great host and great location. I would definitely recommend Marlen’s apartment.

Marlen was an amazing host. Extremely communicative. Amazing suggestions for food and other activities on the page of the Airbnb. well location,nice apartment

Este piso tiene una locación inmejorable si buscas acceso rápido a TODO. 2 horas después de entrar en el piso, Marlen nos solicito nuestros documentos de identidad a enviarle online. Nos negamos. Nos dijo de rellenar un formulario, le dijimos que lo hariamos en su precensia, que puede venir a al piso. No quiso.
Después de hablar con varios agentes de Airbnb, decidieron cancelar nuestra reserva sin nuestro consentimiento, guardando nuestro dinero y tuvimos 1 hora para dejar el piso, cosa que hicimos sin problema. No recomendamos para nada el piso de Marlen (nos sentimos estafados) y estamos decepcionado de la actitud de Airbnb siendo cliente desde 2014.
Really clean and well located apartment. Would recommend!
Todo genial! Un pisito estupendo para pasar un fin de semana con amigos o en pareja en todo el centro de Madrid!

Anissa et Norah

Everything was perfect! Marlen is really helpful, the communication was really easy and the apartment is beautiful.
Would stay there again!

Marlen is a great host and her appartment is perfectly adapted to visit Madrid, 10 mins walks to Sol or Ritiro, 5 mins to Gran Via, and lots of bars / restaurants nearby
We recommend this appartment !

My boyfriend and I stayed two weeks here and we loved it. Perfect location to discover Madrid! Everything was clean, and it had everything we needed. Very comfortable, even in 30 degree heat! We would definitely stay here again! Thanks Marlen
Excelente ubicación, un piso precioso y agradable, la comunicación con Marlen fue muy fluida y estuvo dispuesta a ayudarnos en todo lo posible, totalmente recomendable!
Marlen muy agradable y profesional en todo momento estuvo pendiente,por si necesitaba algo,recomendable totalmente.
Marlen's apartment in Madrid was fantastic! It had everything we needed and was in an ideal and safe location. Definitely recommend staying here!

Everything was perfect, the location is very well, you are just near to the “Gran Via”, you can visit Madrid without use the transports. Marlen is a very nice host, good communication ! The appartement was very cute, with a nice view on the street !

Couldn’t have chosen a better place to stay in Madrid! Mar’s apartment is located so centrally in one of the most exciting and hip neighborhoods in the city - it’s literally in the middle of it all. The place was also very clean, and Mar was a very responsive, accommodating host. I definitely recommend this apartment for anyone visiting Madrid!!

Great place. The location is central. and a nice newish appartment. Do stay, the shower was modern western, and it was quiet... the street can be loud but the bedroomis set back so it didn't bother us. The only drawback is the bed is uncomfortable.
Perfecta ubicación, el departamento es perfecto para ir a cualquier lugar caminando, cerca de restaurantes y bares.

Tolle Lage, nur zwei Straßen zur Gran Via. Alles sehr gut zu Fuß erreichbar!
Gemütlich eingerichtet und für 2 Personen perfekt!
Marlen tiene un piso súper limpio y cómodo ! Ubicado en el centro de Madrid, hay un montón de bares y restaurantes a lado
Amazing location, right in the heart of Malasaña and very close to Puerta del Sol. The apartment is very compact and cozy. Everything was as described.
L’appartement de Marlen en plus d’être très bien placé est très agréable ! Je recommande !!
Todo muy bien. Limpio y bien ubicado. Marlen muy amable y pendiente de nosotros.
El piso está muy bien comunicado, es un sitio acogedor y el barrio es tranquilo. Para dos personas es ideal!

Looks just like the photos and on the most quiet street surrounded by loads of amazing restaurants within walking distance. Everything you need is there! Marlen was very quick with responses and gave me great recommendations
El apartamento es impecable y lindo, bien ubicado. Lo pasamos super agusto ahi.
Good place! Clean and excellent location.
Great location !!!
Hemos estado muy a gusto, ideal para dos personas, muy bien ubicado y Mar muy atenta. Volveremos!

Marlen est une super hôte a votre disposition et surtout très gentille
L'appartement est parfaitement bien situé proche de tous les lieux phares
Idéal pour un séjour d'une semaine
Je vous recommande ce bien les yeux fermés
Bonito, comodo y muy bien ubicado. Muy buena comunicacion con Marlene

Apartamento muy bien ubicado, a pasos de la Gran Vía y una variedad de restaurantes. Hay un supermercado Día en la misma calle, muy funcional. Es cierto que se escucha ruido de la calle hasta altas horas de la noche, pero en nuestro caso (pareja joven) no nos molestó demasiado. Repetiría.

Marlen ist eine äußerst hilfreiche und zuvorkommende Gastgeberin, die alle Gragen innerhalb kürzester Zeit beantwortet. Das Apartement liegt sehr zentral - man kann fast alle wichtigen und interessanten Sehenswürdigkeiten zu Fuß erreichen. Es liegt zudem in einem sehr lebendigen Viertel mit zahlreichen Lokalen und Einkaufsmöglichkeiten ! Sehr bequem. Wer allerdings Ruhe und Beschaulichkeit sucht ist in Malasana nicht richtig (vielleicht überhaupt in Madrid nicht). Mir hat es sehr gefallen.
Lilo (69 Jahre)
Wonderful stay and great location! Very chic and clean.
Excelente lugar, y ubicación cuenta con todos los básicos necesarios. Muy céntrico el lugar.
The area is very loud and made it difficult to sleep at night. The neighborhood was also very dirty. The apartment had a washer which was very convenient.
Perfect appartement midden in de stad! Super schoon en netjes. Marlen is super vriendelijk en behulpzaam! Top verblijf gehad!
El piso está muy bien ubicado, la comunicación con Mar fue excelente, muy rápida en sus respuestas, Un poco ruidoso el vecindario, se escucha todo en las noches si estás para descansar.
Lovey apartment in the perfect location to explore the city! We loved checking out all the shops, restaurants, and bars nearby.

El apartamento es tal y como se anuncia.
Localización excepcional, limpio y organizado. Lo recomiendo ciegamente y , más aún, si vuelvo a Madrid este será el primer sitio donde busque

Marlen est formidable, elle nous a donné de précieux conseils pour un séjour agréable.
La localisation de l'appartement est parfaite pour visiter la ville à pied, comme nous aimons tant le faire.
Le logement est chaleureux et fonctionnel.
Si nous devions retourner à Madrid, nous réserverions sans aucun doute chez notre hôte.
Encore merci.
Increíble lugar a minutos caminando de Gran vía, sol entre otras.
Very nice location. Walking distance to everything you'll need.
Great location, minutes from Gran Vía. A clean, beautifully decorated, and well equipped place to stay. We enjoyed it thoroughly!
It’s small apartment with nice location and it’s good for couples .
Mi estancia fue fenomenal. Mar es una anfitriona muy amable, el piso perfecto y la ubicación excelente.
Tuvimos una buena estadía.

We had a great stay at Marlen’s place. She kindly let us check in early. The apartment was clean, cosy and at great location. Almost all of the attractions were walking distance from the apartment. I would definitely le stay there again.
Todo genial!

El alojamiento es tal cual se ve en las fotos, chiquitín pero con todo lo necesario para pasar unos días en Madrid. La ubicación es inmejorable pero tiene como desventaja el ruido inevitable por la noche por ser una zona tan céntrica. No leímos bien el anuncio y el primer día al ducharnos gastamos todo el agua caliente, de tal manera que sólo pudimos ducharnos 1 de las 3 personas que estábamos. El termo aparentemente no dura más de 10 minutos, para tenerlo en cuenta. También tuvimos un problema con las sábanas para el sofá cama el primer día, ya que en el armario no había un juego completo y resultó que estaban debajo de la cama. La primera noche fue un poco peor dormir por esa razón. Por último mencionar que a pesar de que las sábanas y las toallas estaban limpias porque se olía el olor a detergente sí que es cierto que la mayoría (especialmente las sábanas) estaban amarillentas en algunas zonas lo cual podría cuidarse un poquito más. En cualquier caso, sí que recomendamos el apartamento y la comunicación con Marlen fue fluida.
Apartamento y anfitriona perfectos. Recomendable para todo el quiera pasar unos días cómodos y perfectamente situados en Madrid.

Great location, recommended. A little small but excellent balcony view and great location to city center (15 mins).
Only drawback is that hot water only lasts 10 minutes. I would recommend taking military showers so it lasts for everyone.
Other than that, area is very safe and clean.

Great location. Host was very accommodating to check-in changes. Apartment was clean and appropriately appointed. Would recommend for one or two people for a comfortable stay - sofa bed was okay, not great.
The apartment was really nice! It's not missing anything. You feel comfortable the moment you enter. The location itself is amazing and you reach anything you desire by foot without any problems.
Recommend ! Nice place & by the Main Street Gran Via. Also helpful when I locked myself out in the middle of the night, she came and got me in matter of minutes
Nice apartment.Clean,well decorated.Great location.
Gran anfitriona, muy atenta, amable y preocupada por nuestra comodidad. Bien ubicado y con lo necesario para disfrutar de Madrid. Sin duda repetimos!

Tudo perfeito. Apenas uma questão, embora saiba-se que entra outro hóspede às 15 h, nem uma horinha conseguimos de tolerância no checkout, como nosso voo era bem tarde faria falta (contudo, deu tudo certo, pois conseguimos antecipar nosso voo para Lisboa).
La casa es tal cual la enseñan en las fotos. Muy ordenada y limpia. La ubicación también es muy buena.
A very good communication with Marla, always very caring!
Marlen's place was super clean and in a great location!

Posizione perfetta; casa bellissima.
Cosa negativa: nella doccia l’acqua calda arriva solo per 10 minuti e devi aspettare 1 ora per poterla riavere.
Host disponibile, casa attrezzata.
Grazie.
Beautiful place. Close to everything.
The apartment was just as expected and was perfect for our stay in Madrid.
SUPER céntrico; extremadamente limpio y acogedor. ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ y más!
great place center to everything you want the bakery across is great. only wish the pillows where better. but the price was great.
Todo bastante bien. La ubicación es perfecta,  solo que en el sofá cama se duerme un poco incómodo.  Por lo demás, genial.

Mar es una persona muy atenta. Ofrece informaciónimportante de la ciudad y de los sitios cercanos al estudio (restaurantes, tiendas, museos, zonas para disfrutar y conocer Madrid...)
Genial!!!!

O Airbnb é muito bom. A cama do quarto do casal é bem confortável. O espaço atende bem duas pessoas, entretanto se for hospedar quatro pessoas fica um pouco apertado. A cozinha é bem equipada, Possibilitando fazer refeições simples. A localização é excelente. O espaço porém tem dois problemas: um é a água quente do banho, ela acaba rápido e não possibilita que duas pessoas tomem banho em sequência. O outro problema é o Barulho, escutasse qualquer barulho da rua ou dos outros moradores do prédio. Caso um dia retorne para Madrid, o espaço da Mar certamente será a minha primeira opção.
Amazing Stay
We had a great time! We had some issues with check in but Mar helped us immediately. Definitely would stay again, location was excellent.
Location was good, no hot water

Mar es una excelente host. El piso estaba muy limpio y acogedor, mis hijas de 5 y 1 año lo disfrutaron muchísimo. El piso está súper céntrico, cerca de la Gran Vía y buenos restaurantes. Lo recomendados y definitivamente volveríamos.

Mar’s apartment was so lovely! It was very clean and comfortable. The location was excellent- many cute restaurants and shops immediately nearby. Highly recommend! We received such hospitality from Mar— she was a wonderful hostess!!

Mars place has a great location with easy check in by getting a key from a nearby locker. We were a group of three and one of us slept in the living room which overlooked the street. The pull out couch was comfy, but it was very loud outside (it was a Friday night) so the night of sleep was not all that restful. Just something to be mindful of it you visit on the weekend. Would not rule out this stay again, especially with just 2 people!!

We had such a lovely time in Al's place. I agree with other reviews that mention how wonderfully quiet the studio is, despite being mere steps from all the fun action of central Madrid. The space is also airy and roomy, so it is just as comfortable to stay inside as it is to go out and enjoy the city. Al is a lovely host and had great suggestions about where to eat, what to look at, what to do. He was available whenever I needed to ask a question, and I enjoyed chatting with him about Madrid, generally. I would stay here again if given the opportunity and highly recommend this lodging to a single traveler or a pair.
Great host. Lovely loft, wish the bathroom/shower were a bit bigger. Bed was very comfortable. We had a great stay at Al’s place!
super, zentral gelegene wohnung👌🏼
I would recommend Al's place. It's nice, comfortable and close to everything. It was a great experience.

This airbnb is simply amazing. It is in a perfect spot and it was truly lovely. Also the host Al was very nice and extremely welcoming. I would definitely recommend this to anyone and would stay here again! :)

L’appartement de Al est super bien situé au cœur de Malasana l’un des quartiers animés de Madrid
Accès facile depuis l’aéroport, la communication avant notre arrivée s’est faite de manière très fluide et très simple - l’appartement est très clair, bien équipé et calme . Très bon séjour dans cette superbe ville qu’est Madrid !

Superbe séjour chez Al ! Quel accueil, quelle gentillesse, encore merci à lui. Al se rend très facilement dispo pour le check-in, l’appartement est magnifique, lumineux et très bien équipé et décoré ! Enfin, son gros atout est son emplacement, au pied de Gran Via, non loin de beaucoup de restaurants et animations. Je n’hésiterai pas à revenir chez Al lors de mon prochain week-end à Madrid
Super séjour dans un quartier animé de Madrid. Al est un hôte sympathique et disponible, et le studio lumineux et très joliment décoré !

A wonderful hidden gem in Malasaña!  Al's place was incredibly cozy, clean, and quiet. The location is perfect - it's right in the middle of all the action in Madrid, with countless restaurants and bars to explore just downstairs. The bathroom is a little small, but I didn't have too much trouble with it.  And Al was a wonderful host; so kind and communicative, he added thoughtful touches throughout my stay. 10/10 would recommend - definitely book this place if you can!
Perfect appartment

Great apartment for a trip to Madrid. The location was fab. V trendy spot with a real buzz. The apartment was quiet though so no noice from the area. Perfect base to explore. Highly recommend. Host Al was super friendly and helpful.

Al’s place is perfect and Al is an amazing  person :) The flat is centrally located within walking distance of the metro, tons of bars and restaurants, the big park and several supermarkets. It’s a gorgeous apartment with everything you need!!! Thank you Al

Al was a great host, great communication and made us feel very welcome upon arriving.
The apartment had everything you need in a home away from home in a great, quiet location.
Very much recommend!
The place is beautiful and in a great location. Has everything you need and lots of light. Al is an excellent host and human. Really great experience. Highly recommended!

Great location to experience all the sights and really get into the food and bar scene in Madrid. The apartment is great and the host is very responsive to any questions or needs. I spent a week here and enjoyed every minute. This location puts you right in the center of everything so walking to any museum, landmark or restaurant is very doable. I also enjoyed that the apartment was very quiet.

Great location in the heart of Malasaña, Al’s studio is very comfortable and super quiet. Communication was swift and easy, Al was very accommodating on arrival and departure, and offered a warm and friendly welcome!

Estancia perfecta. La comunicación previa con Al fue muy fluida. Al llegar nos atendió y nos enseñó el apartamento (fantástico: limpio, luminoso y tranquilo). Además de la comodidad y limpieza, Al tiene numerosos detalles con los huéspedes (vino, café, snacks, albornoz, múltiples toallas, cojines, etc). En definitiva, un gran afitrión que hace que uno siga confiando en Airbnb.
What can I say? Maybe the best Airbnb I’ve stayed in. Clean, big, bright, perfect location, and Al was such a nice host. Only wish that I could have stayed longer.

No consigo -por vueltas que le doy- encontrar NADA que pueda mejorar más la EXCELENTE experiencia con Al como anfitrión.
Detalles cuidados y una recepción de 10 sobre 10

Al est un hôte extra, nous avons pu arriver plus tôt. Il nous a fait faire le tour, donner des conseils. Il répond rapidement et il est très sympathique. Vous faites un bon choix en réservant chez lui!

My partner and I spent an amazing long weekend in Al’s studio! The location was perfect, right in the heart of Malasaña and walking distance for all of the activities we had planned.
