The studio itself was beautifully designed and Al was an extremely helpful host, giving us great local recommendations and even looking after our luggage for us so that we could enjoy walking around on the last day. Would absolutely recommend to anyone looking to stay in Madrid!
A perfect place to stay in Madrid. Great apartment and great location.

Loved everything about this studio! Al is an amazing host- very communicative, friendly, and thoughtful. He met us for check-in and gave us some great tips about the city.
The location of this apartment is perfect! Within reasonable walking distance of everything we wanted to see in Madrid, and the Malasana neighborhood is just so fun to walk around.
The bed is comfortable, the apartment is spacious, and we definitely took advantage of the washing machine.
Only thing to note is the stairs- we had no problem, but it is a climb (and the stairs are mentioned in the Airbnb listing). But the apartment is so quiet- likely due to it being on the top floor!
Would definitely recommend!

Great place in the heart of Madrid!
Communication and service on point, worked around hours of arrival.
Al is fantastic, had a great conversation in our check-in and the wine was a great touch. The apartment had all we needed and was in a great location.

Perfect spacious studio at the heart of Madrid with great location. Everything is just top of the top: the bed and pillows are super comfortable, the towels, bathrobes and slippers (yes, there are even bathrobes and slippers) are extra soft.
Al is very communicative, pleasant and willing to help. We had some problem with hot water during our stay, Al answered very quickly and fixed the problem the next day even though it was Saturday.
In the nutshell, definitely, will recommend for the couple stay at Madrid!
Wonderful apartment, cozy, bright and very clean. The location is perfect to explore Madrid and feel like a local. Al is very generous, helpful and sympathic. Would recomend it to everyone.
Wonderful apartment with an excellent host! 10/10 would recommend

Al's studio was great for our stay. He greeted us personally for checkin and left us water, snacks, and wine. He truly understands the weary travelers. The space was clean, bright, and well decorated. Location was great. It was close to shopping and restaurants. Al is a great host!
Wonderful apartment and location for a solo traveller or couple. Very welcoming host. I would certainly stay here again.

estuvimos solo una noche, Al nos ha recibido en manera excelente, con una botella de vino blanco, café, the. Servicio 5 estrellas de verdad. El piso es perfecto, limpio, bien amueblado.
volveré
Excelente piso, fabuloso host, exquisito barrio. Nos encantó todo. Esperamos regresar pronto.
Great location and as described. Recommended.
Great stay - great location.  Very welcoming host.  Even a nice little coffee shop on the ground floor of the building next door.  Really enjoyed our stay at Al's place!
Muy lindo depto, un oasis en un barrio movido. Para quedarse unos días. Al un súper anfitrion.
Great location and definitely a vibe staying the room. Al is a great host and informative about the area.
Ótima localização
The place is everything. Location is perfect, the apartment is amazing and Al is the greatest. I can wait to go back to Madrid, and book it again. Literally in love with the neighborhood.
Al was a lovely, gracious host and his apartment is a great place to stay - walkable almost everywhere and bright. Would recommend to anyone and stay again on my next trip to Madrid.

Un super accueil du propriétaire. Appartement très bien situé. Avons pu à pieds profiter du centre ville. Tout est à proximité. Le métro tout proche, nous permet de faire Aeroport, appartement en 45 minutes avec beaucoup de simplicité.
Madrid est une ville qui sait fêter Halloween !

Al fue un host espectacular. Nos recibió con todo, y encima apenas llegue tuve un problema e hizo todo para ayudarme a resolverlo!
El apartamento está excelentemente ubicando, cerca de todo y muy muy completo!
Lo súper recomiendo, volveremos seguro!
Wonderful apartment in a beautiful and interesting area of the city. It was exactly where we wanted to be and Al was a delight who made us feel very welcomed. Would love to return.
Все отлично. Ал, очень милый и заботливый хозяин. Отдельное спасибо за кофе и вино
Would 100% recommend. Best location and incredible host

Excepcional. El piso esta en el centro cerca de todo, Gran Via a cinco minutos andando.
El piso es muy calido, limpio y sobre todo muy silencioso, se descansa de maravilla. Esta tal cual se ve en las fotos.
Al fue muy amable, nos hizo alguna recomendación gastronomica muy buena.
En definitiva un alojamiento muy recomendable.
Todo perfecto. Al siempre disponible y atento. Muy a gusto.
The apartment is calm and very well located. I highly recommend it

Increíble! ha sido la mejor elección. Alvaro es un super anfitrión! calidad de persona, muy amable, siempre está muy pendiente de que uno se sienta cómodo, es una excelente persona con la que vale la pena tomarse unos minutos (muchos), para una buena conversación. El piso es sumamente tranquilo, tiene todo lo necesario para una perfecta estadía, en lo personal me he sentido como en casa desde el primer día. Además cabe mencionar que tiene una ubicación muy privilegiada, está en Malasaña y se puede recorrer fácilmente andando los puntos de interés que Madrid ofrece, también está muy bien conectado con diferentes lineas de metro. El barrio es muy bohemio, hay muchos bares y restaurantes de los cuales se puede disfrutar y volver fácilmente al piso. Puedo recomendar 100% este piso y sé que al igual que yo, querrán volver a hospedarse ahí, ya que todo encaja perfectamente, anfitrión, comodidad, ubicación, calidad.
Yo sin duda he de repetir.
Muchas gracias y muchos éxitos Alvaro.

Al is such an amazing host. We talked for a long time and he showed us his amazing photography. The apartment is beautiful and stylish. We were able to walk to everything we wanted and there are plenty of spots to go in the immediate vicinity. Highly recommend and we can’t wait to come back!

Pisito muy romantico en Malasaña, muy tranquilo y acogedor. Hemos pasado 3 días maravillosos con nuestro pequeño perro y estoy segura que si volvemos a Madrid contactaremos con Al y repetiremos. Hemos estado como en casa.
Al is a delightful host who gave us lots of his time to make us feel welcome. The apartment is situated perfectly, very private and quiet.

What a great stay! Al was super friendly and totally set the tone for our trip. Appreciated our conversation with him and his kind words. The apartment itself and the location were fantastic. Very easy walking distance from Sol, Gran Via, and so many awesome things.

I had an absolutely amazing and very comfortable stay at AI’s place, great appartement , very nicely located with a nice neighbourhood. AI has been a great host with nice recommendations and very warm welcome !

Tudo perfeito.
O Al é muito simpático e sempre disponível.
Foi muito flexível tanto no check-in, como no check out, o que foi muito bom.
O apartamento é excelente e está muito bem localizado! Vale a pena.
Al was a great host & his apartment was lovely. I would 10/10 recommend & stay again. Everything is walking distance & if you need recommendations Al has plenty to offer.
Al was extremely welcoming and the loft was very comfortable. You are able to walk to everything. The wine, coffee, and water was a nice touch. Would highly recommend!

We had a really pleasant stay at Al’s place. Al is very flexible when it comes to check in and check out and he has a lot of good tips. The place is nice and bright and has all you need. The apartment is on the 5th floor so be prepared for the stairs.
Al is the most amazing host. He is so friendly and warm and welcomes you to his amazing studio in the best neighborhood in Madrid. When I come back, I’ll be staying here again!
What a great place! Really enjoyed meeting Al for our check in! Really fun neighborhood! Everything you could ask for!
Great apartment in the heart of Madrid.
Al is great! Greeted us and gave us the entire rundown of the place and the neighborhood. Great location with coffee, tapas, drinks super close! Would recommend!

Al was an amazing and friendly host - he let us into the building and gave us some great tips, we especially appreciated how Al recommended a paella restaurant to us prior to the trip and also helped book a reservation on the phone when I couldn't reserve a table online.
The flat itself is beautiful and located in a great area with lots of shops, bars and restaurants but still quiet so you can have a good nights sleep. It is close to metro stops so we were able to get to the magic box to watch the tennis very easily and also to and from the airport.
My boyfriend and I really enjoyed staying here and would highly recommend to others.
Lovely host, great great location, top floor so lots of stairs but a place that’s even prettier than the pics!
Apartment was great, very functional in addition to being comfortable and stylish. Great neighborhood, too! All around recommend. Al was a delight to talk to.

Al was sooo wonderful and welcoming, he made our stay in Madrid so easy. the place is spacious and relaxing, considering it's proximity to bars it's surprisingly quiet also!
wonderfully clean, well stocked and comfy. thank you Al!

Cute and clean apartment with a very comfortable bed and pillows, plus nice touches like chocolates, wine, bathrobes and slippers. Al was a very gracious host. Very friendly, good recommendations for nearby restaurants, and also quick to respond. Great neighborhood for walking around. Thanks, Al!

The apartment
Loaded with treats to welcome you. Has all the typical mod-cons (hairdryer, kettle, iron, microwave, coffee machine,etc).
Great WiFi, comfy bed and fluffy towels.
A great place to re-energise after a long day of walking. The wet room works, saves on space
The apartment is located at the top, above the host, so you do have to climb a few stairs, but this helps work off the gelato.
A really nice place to call home for a few days.
The location
Fantastic location for distance to main tourist sites. Buzzing nightlife (not that you can hear it from the apartment), tucked away and private. Lots of choice of places to eat and drink, unique shops very close by. We walked at all times and didn’t use public transport as everywhere is so accessible.
In summary, great attention to detail all round, lovely host, lovely apartment with character and some love thrown in. Would 100% recommend and return.

Could not be happier that we chose to stay at Al's place. From the beginning Al was super responsive and helpful. He even provided us with some great food recommendations when we arrived. The apartment itself was perfect for two people with all amenities as advertised. As far as location, it is perfect! Right in the middle of everything with easy access to metro as well. Even though it was right in a very busy neighborhood, the apartment itself was very quiet. Definitely book if you have the chance!

We loved our stay in Al's studio. The location is tough to beat — right in the heart of Malasana, with tons of great restaurants, shops, and bars literally right outside the door. Despite being in a bustling area, the apartment itself was pretty quiet and peaceful. It was also well-decorated, with lots of thoughtful amenities like an espresso maker, coffee, robes, slippers, and umbrellas in case of a random spring thunderstorm. Al himself was a very responsive host, friendly, and gave us some great recommendations for places to check out in the neighborhood. I'd stay there again for sure!

房子很舒服，设备齐全，房东非常热情，我们聊得很开心。特别是他给我推荐的海鲜餐馆，简直是一家宝藏店！东西又好吃又便宜，我的朋友们都极为称赞。房子的位置也非常方便，主要景点、博物馆都可以走着去，十几分钟的路。
下次去马德里一定还会住这里，如果Al还帮我提行李🧳😄😄

Al was a great host, and his place was beautiful and lovely to stay at! its in a location that is close to the metro, as well as a bunch of social areas— plus there are supermarkets quite close in case you need something quick— al was also very friendly and made sure that the checkin process went as smoothly as possible— would definitely recommend!

We had the best experience at Al’s flat. Perfect location, very nice place to stay very well furnished, clean, luminous. And I have to say that Al have been the best host ever. Very nice and friendly and it’s been a pleasure being welcomed by him. Will definitely come back!

Al was super lovely, communicative,
Helpful and incredibly quick!
I couldn’t ask for a better place!

This was a perfect choice. I totally recommend. Al is super friendly and helpful and his space is beautiful and spacious. The area is safe and very pleasant to walk around, full of charming restaurants, cafes and shops. Al also helped me by pointing out a pet-friendly restaurant and the nearest parking lot, as I was driving from Lisbon with my dogs. Thanks so much for everything Al!

Fantastic stay at Al's place right in the middle of Malasaña and wishing walking distance of everything you could want in central Madrid.  Al was a great host, who was only too happy to help, giving us recommendations.  Great guy!  Thanks for hosting.

The apartment is beautifully laid out & designed.   Everything has its place, all the necessary amenities are there, and the bathroom is a wonder of space-management, with a great shower.  The apartment is not big, but it is perfect - comfortable and light with high ceilings and lots of nice touches.   A special place with an equally special host. Location is the best, too.
Great welcome, chilled white wine and a chat. Good bed linen and piles of fluffy towels. Central location, perfect studio space for a visit to Madrid

Al's place is in an AMAZING location in Madrid. He's a very attentive host, and had the fridge supplied with water, sparkling water, wine and snacks upon arrival. The flat is clean has everything you need, along with a very comfortable KING size bed. The only item to be aware of his that it is 4 floor up the stairs, so just be aware of this. I highly recommend Al's place as a fantastic place to stay in Madrid!
tout simplement parfait

Al met us at the apartment. Shared great information about the neighborhood and restaurants, etc. He actually had a wonderful tray with snacks and a bottle of wine and there was water and milk in the refrigerator. Kitchen well appointed. Lovely and quite place. The location is AWESOME! we were able to walk everywhere we wanted to go within 10-20 minutes. Safe. Great bars and coffee and ice cream places and STORES! Just fun, lively, neighborhood!

Ál is such a welcoming host and has a wonderful place in a great location. He welcomed us with wine and snacks, and made us feel right at home. His place is tastefully decorated,  and has all the modern comforts. The bed is very comfortable. The location is also really nice, with a lot of restaurants and bars nearby. We were able to walk to a lot of places, and use the metro station nearby. Overall, highly recommended.

Al welcomed us with a well stocked fridge of wine, milk, a few types of water and walked us through some recommendations of eateries.
His apartment is beautifully decorated and we totally enjoyed watching the streaming tv. The washer cum dryer was a real convenience.
The kitchen is not only well equipped, but even more importantly, it had loads of condiments and supplies (oil, salt, sugar, soy sauce, coffee etc).

Great place in heat of city. Good value. Very nice touches to his place including wine, coffee, milk, tea, etc. nice robes and slippers to use. Very friendly guy. Recommend for couple who wants to be in center of Madrid. Five flight walk up to the loft without an elevator as an fyi and bathroom is small. Neither bothered us personally but in case either is important to folks
Incredibly nice host and very responsive and communicative.

Al's place was a joy to stay at in Madrid. Upon checking in, he led me to the top floor, offered me wine and sparkling water, along with snacks. We talked about Madrid and the sights to see, as well as a history of the building and neighborhood.
The bed was one of the most comfortable memory foam beds I've slept in. There was a small kitchen with a Bosch clothes washer. Free drinks in the fridge. Nice TV and sound system. Excellent place for one or two travelers to stay at. The layout was one long continuous studio, with a Japanese-style Shoji Blind diving the bedroom from living room and kitchen. I did not take a shower, but it's similar to wet room setups in NYC where the shower and toilet are in the same space.
The only cons about the place are that you need to walk up about 50 stairs to reach the top floor apartment, and there's no view out of the windows, as they face a small inner courtyard.

Al is an amazing human! He is incredible educated, has an artistic soul and is wonderful to talk to. The apartment was perfect for our one night stop in Madrid and the neighborhood is friendly, safe and has great restaurants and shops! Al was a wonderful introduction to Madrid!

We had a great stay here. The apartment is nice, just like the pictures. It has everything you need and then some, Al thought of everything to make a pleasant stay. We had robes, slippers, lots of towels, a great expresso machine, even plug in adaptors. The bed and pillows were extremely comfortable! The apt. was quiet. Al met us at check-in. He had 3 kinds of snacks, a chilled bottle of wine, milk, 3 bottles of water and coffee! Such a special bonus for hungry travelers! Al felt like an old friend. He was excellent at communicating. He gave us the best recommendations of restaurants close by. Al went above and beyond. We left something in the apt. and Al had it shipped to us!
Nous avons passé un très agréable séjour dans l appartement de al qui est formidable. Nous reviendrons avec joie.
This place was perfect for our stay in Madrid! It was cozy, walkable, and Al was on top of every detail! Highly recommend.

We loved everything about Al's home in the heart of Malasana. It's a great area, perfect base to walk the whole city. The studio is lovely, tasteful, with all of the amenities we needed. Al was friendly, welcoming, and flexible when we arrived early from the U.S. I'd highly recommend staying here!

A truly wonderful stay. The location is great for exploring Madrid if it’s your first time in the city. Al has the property dialed in perfectly to give you everything you need. He was super helpful prior to check in and during our stay. Our go to place when we are in Madrid.

Fantastic place, great and lively location but the flat is quiet. The welcome was top notch, the decoration very tasteful, and we really appreciated that absolutely everything was provided, from bathrobes to water, coffee etc
I would highly recommend for a couple getaway in Madrid.
If I could give it 6 stars, I would. Top 3 airbnb experiences of my life considering the value for the price. And Al is an exceptional host.

If you’re going to stay for a while in Madrid., I couldn’t think of a better place to call home. Location is central to everything the city has to offer and the neighborhood itself has so much character. Al is a great host and an ever cooler dude.

Amazing location with a neighbourhood feel. Beautiful little coffee shop below. The apartment is ideal has everything you need. Comfiest bed and best bedding I’ve had in an Airbnb. 10/10. Al was a super cool guy and was very accommodating with checkin/out times!

I have been using this platform for a decade, and Al’s place was by far the most impressive Airbnb I have ever stayed in.  The location is perfect. The design is amazing and every detail is well thought out.  I left with so many ideas for my own home.  And Al is a nice guy and very responsive.   I would recommend it to anyone looking to spend time in Madrid.
Perfect weekend in Madrid with this place!

La mejor ubicación de Madrid
Encantadas
הנכס של Al מציע מיקום מושלם, הרבה נחת ומארח נפלא! מומלץ בחום, פנינה אמיתית, לא לפספס
Thank you, Al, for a great stay!

Al was such a great host, and his loft had everything I needed for a fun weekend in Madrid. He met me at check in, showed me around the loft, and offered some great restaurant recommendations.
The location is excellent! Malasaña is one of the best neighborhoods in the city. You’ll be within minutes of interesting shops, great restaurants, and plenty of bars and coffee shops (including one right next door and a Starbucks 5 min away). There’s no need to take public transportation or Uber — you can walk to all the major sights in 20 minutes or less.
The loft itself is quiet and peaceful, and the bed was sooooo comfortable. The air conditioning is easy to use and works great, which is a must in Madrid. I would definitely stay again!

Al’s studio was great and it’s easy to understand why he is a Superhost!  He provided wine, sparkling water and a snack upon arrival. Al greeted us in person and was flexible with our arrival time. Malasaña is a lovely neighborhood with lots to do and friendly people. I highly recommend Al’s studio.

Wow- the best Airbnb experience we have ever had! If you are visiting Madrid, Al’s place is a MUST! He was extremely friendly, hospitable, and responsive from the start. He greeted us at the door with complimentary snacks & wine. His place matched the description perfectly and the location was ideal. So much to do and everything was walking distance- a truly prime location! The king bed was soo comfortable & his entire place was well decorated. We really felt at home here. It was my first time in Europe & I wouldn’t have wanted to stay elsewhere. I hope to come back to Madrid soon and would 100% rebook this Airbnb. Cannot say enough good things about Al & his apartment. Highly highly recommend staying here!! :)

We had an amazing stay at Àl’s place and would highly recommend! The apartment is charming, and the location is perfect. Great cafes (including great coffee right downstairs) and it felt like a very fun, local area of the city. It was walkable to everywhere we wanted to go, but still felt removed from the more touristy areas. I wouldn’t hesitate to book this studio again if we were back in Madrid. Thank you, Àl!

First time in Madrid and Spain and we could not have asked for a better host! Al welcomed us with warmth, kindness, and a lovely bottle of wine. Location was perfect - quiet at night but perfectly walkable for whatever you are looking for. Al was super responsive and would always be available for our questions, in Spanish for me and in English for my friend. We were very comfortable in his apartment and were able to check in early and check out late, which was helpful given our flight/train schedules. Very gay friendly as well. Would absolutely stay with Al again next time I’m in Madrid!
Alojamiento súper bien ubicado y cómodo. Al, el anfitrión muy amable, con buenas recomendaciones para la zona, nos espero al llegar. Volveríamos sin dudarlo
Al’s place is perfect in many ways- the location- the building- and the well furnished studio apt. Loved it all and can’t wait to return. Gracias, Douglas
The place is great, and it is in a great location.  The host was very friendly.  I would recommend if you stay in Madrid.

AL hat uns sehr freundlich und aufmerksam empfangen. Er ist offensichtlich kunstinteressiert. Die Einrichtung ist stylisch mit ausgesuchten Designobjekten.
Das Bett ist äusserst bequem. Die Küche sehr zweckdienlich.
Seine Typs waren hilfsreich und zutreffend.
AL‘s Unterkunft ist sehr empfehlenswert
Einzig der Nassraum ist sehr minimal. Es riecht unangenehm da vermutlich kein funktionierender Siphon besteht.
Dennoch ist die Unterkunft top.
Danke AL

Absolutely loved our stay at Al’s! As others have noted, the apartment is quiet and peaceful despite being in the thick of it all. Al was a wonderful host providing many thoughtful recommendations, and we really appreciated the little touches that he added to the apartment. Would highly recommend!

Exceeded expectations for the price. Cool location close walking distance to everything. Nice little coffee shop just below. Very friendly welcome and bottle of wine on arrival. Enjoyed our stay very much!

My partner and I had an absolutely wonderful stay here. Al was an incredible host and made us feel right at home. He provided easy directions for locating and accessing his place. The location is perfect—very close to many restaurants and shops. Truly, it had everything you could possibly need to have a fun stay in Madrid. We also appreciated the complimentary bottle of wine and snacks upon arrival. We wished that we could stay longer and hope to return to stay at this place again. Thank you so much, Al!

Our stay was absolutely incredible!!! One of the best airbnb experiences we’ve ever had. It’s an amazing location and beautiful space, and Al is so kind and helpful. We couldn’t recommend it more!! Must stay for a visit to Madrid.
Great location for visiting Madrid; off the main drag but with a host of nearby bars and restaurants. Al is a delightful host and well worth asking for restaurant recommendations

This place brings me back to old school AirBnB with the personal touches and the feeling of wonderful hospitality. Malasaña is an amazing neighborhood. Al’s place is perfectly situated, beautifully decorated, full of lovely hospitality touches, and great light. Al himself is kind and super helpful. You can tell he cares about his home. You won’t regret booking this place.

This is my 4th time in Madrid and the 2nd time at Al’s place. The only reason I didn’t stay at his the last two times I was there was solely because I was too late to book his apartment. His place gets booked very fast.
It’s situated in very lively neighborhood with lots of restaurants, cafes, stores etc, but because it’s not facing the streets, it’s very quiet and peaceful. It’s reassuring that Al’s residence is right downstairs, so you have privacy and feeling of staying with the host all at once.
Thank you for another great stay. See you again soon.

We really enjoyed our time in Madrid and Al’s apartment was in a great spot and Al helped us out with a lot of information from
Coffee shops and restaurants to transportation around the city and to and from the airport. Great guy and would recommend to everyone to stay at his apartment. Location, Location!
location is great, short walk to metro. The space is comfy, clean and very quiet. The host is very helpful and responsive.
Loved it, Al was great and the location was perfect!
Great location, wonderful space, & a friendly and thoughtful host! Was perfect

We only stayed for one night before flying back to the US but Al’s place was incredible! I wish we could have stayed longer. The bed was the most comfortable bed we slept in during our time in Spain! So comfy. The place was incredibly cozy and had good vibes. Al was so friendly, he helped us with our luggage and even had a snack and some drinks for us when we arrived! Will definitely be staying here on our next trip to Madrid!

Al went above and beyond! He accommodated us with our late check in which we greatly appreciated. We caught rain in Madrid when we visited and to our surprise there were two umbrellas out for us to use for the day which I thought was very thoughtful and sweet. The location was great, walkable to everything! My favorite part was the little café that was below. I’d highly recommend, I’ll definitely be back to visit Madrid! :)

Al’s place was exactly as shown in the pictures but better. He welcomed us with refreshments and gave recommendations for the area. Robes and slippers were provided which was such a nice touch. The bed was also very comfortable!
The location was safe, quiet and walking distance to sights you may want to see such as Gran Via and the Royal Palace. There is also a nice coffee shop downstairs from Al’s apartment.
Look no further, this bnb is the one!

This was an amazing apartment in an incredible location. The host was extremely kind and made everything so easy. It has everything you need- tv, shower, comfortable bed, organization for unpacking, kitchen, multiple sitting areas, & the cherry on top is that it's so stylish. I loved staying here and would absolutely do it again. Look no further, book this airbnb.

My stay at Al’s place was excellent! He is very friendly and knowledgeable about the area. The apartment is quiet and beautifully/thoughtfully laid out. I hope to stay here again next time I’m in Madrid!
Amazing location, one of the best hosts we've had. Would highly recommend.

The place is beautiful. Great lighting, the temperature is good even midsummer, and Al has some excellent Malasaña recommendations. The neighborhood around the Airbnb was one of my favorites to walk around in all of Madrid.
Al was an easy host - made things really smooth for us.

After about 6 months of travel, this was probably our favorite stay so far. Al was very hospitable and friendly and helpful, always responsive to messages. The neighborhood is perfect in terms of restaurants and character and proximity to public transit, many LGBT bars in the area. Al is an artist and it shows in the space in terms of the design and colors. There are blackout blinds and double glazing and a good air conditioner. One of the best mattresses we've come across. The only possible downside is that it's a 5 floor walkup, so you'll have buns of steel by the end of your visit.
Al is a wonderful, warm, thoughtful host who has excellent taste, a beautiful home and in an absolutely wonderful location.

Al’s loft was amazing, great location! He was very communicative and allowed me to check in earlier than expected as my flight arrived super early and no one stayed the night before. Just note that there are a lot of stairs, 4+ flights, so keep that in mind! Great neighborhood with lots of restaurant options!
Excelente piso muy bien ubicado con un host muy amable.

This charming spacious studio apt, on the top floor, is well designed with everything you need. Al received me for a late check-in, since my flight was delayed; and I felt very welcomed as I walked into the apt. Not only was there a lovely bottle of wine, but also included in the fridge was fresh bottles of milk, orange juice, sparkling and still water. The apt was very well equipped as described, with a couple of bathrobes and plenty of towels. The large bed is one of the most comfortable I slept on. Only caveat I had...for those with heavy luggages, be aware that it is located on the 4th floor with no elevators. The apt is located in the vibrant Malasaña, near Chueca, steps away from restaurants, bars and shopping. I highly recommend this airbnb, and would definitely come back. Thank you!
Great place to stay! Highly recommend to anyone visiting Madrid.

Al's place is a great find. Centrally located in the Malasana district. Turn left or right, all walk-able, you are heading in the direction towards something to see/do. Al's apartment is on the top floor opening to the center of the building making it quiet and full of bright light; truly relaxing and easy to get great rest. The apartment is a large studio well laid out for living vs sleep areas. It has all the amenities plus Al generously gets you started with the refrigerator filled with goodies.
Although Al is a Super Host, I think they need a Super-Duper Host designation for him. Warm, approachable, friendly, and ready to provide local recommendations. Al is a true gem, we enjoyed getting to know him and appreciated that he gave us our space.
Highly recommend. We look forward to staying next time in Madrid.
As noted in the Al's listing, this is a four-story walk up. Folks challenged by flights of stairs should be aware.

Al went above and beyond! We were welcomed with such warmth and we felt like family. My husband and I absolutely loved his restaurant recommendations and he was very helpful with other important information regarding local shops/museums. We will definitely return to Al’s place in the future!! Thank you for a wonderful time in Madrid Al!

An incredible spot right in the heart of Malasaña. Everywhere you might want to eat, drink or shop is a few minutes away. The building itself is gorgeous, and the apartment is a beautiful little studio with everything you might need. Definitely a place we'd stay when we come back to Madrid again!

Céntrico, cool, limpio, muy práctico, maravilloso. La atención de Al super cercana, es una persona muy educada y extremadamente atenta. En la estancia te encuentras muchísimos detalles. Realmente, una experiencia muy positiva. Repetiré 100%
Tuvimos una excelente experiencia. Al fue muy buen host, amigable, colaborador. El sitio es excelente. Súper cómodo, cero ruido en el puedes descansar. Muchas gracias por todas tu atenciones
Lovely introduction to Madrid, cool place, nice fluffy towels.

Loved this place.  Al, the host greeted us upon arrival.  He was very friendly and helpful.  The place was well provisioned!!!  Everything was great.  What we loved the most was the comfort of the bed.  The most comfortable bed (by far) we experienced in Spain!!!

We loved our stay at Als place it was perfect for our anniversary break.  He was super welcoming and made sure we had everything we needed.  The flat has everything you might need for a stay, the attention to detail is great and can’t recommend highly enough!

Al’s lovely studio apartment was perfect for our short stay in Madrid.  Al was very attentive to our needs and even allowed us to drop our bags early so we could explore Madrid while waiting for check in.  The location was proximal to many attractions, shopping and restaurants in Madrid Centre. The comfy robes were a nice touch! And there was a cute little cafe just two doors down.  Be prepared however, the studio is on the 4th floor and can be challenging with heavy luggage.  However, I would definitely stay again if the opportunity arises.

We had a great stay at Al's place. The flat was spacious, quiet, tasteful, practical and very comfortable. The king size bed was super comfortable. Kitchen had everything we needed. Bathroom was practical.
Al was a great host. Always prompt and helpful in communication. Gave us very good tips about Madrid and local attractions. We felt well looked after.
The flat is located in a trendy part of Madrid and a short stroll takes you to all the museums and other attractions. Several trendy shops, cafes, restaurants and supermarkets are very close by.
We had a great time in Madrid. Thanks Al!

I can’t say enough good things about Al and my experience with him! He is super hospitable and very kind, super friendly as well. The location was fantastic, 5 minute walk to Gran Via, and surrounded by small pubs or restaurants all around. There are some 24 hour convenient stores which were great. He has super clear instructions and is incredibly responsive and helpful. He is super considerate right off the bat, was greeted by a bottle of champagne, chocolate, fresh orange juice, water and milk. He had some recommendations on what to do that was nearby, and was just an overall fantastic vibe. 💕

The apartment location was perfect - close to all Madrid’s main attractions including Gran Via and Puerta Del Sol. It was clean and had all the amenities we needed during our stay. Mar made our check in easy and was communicative and helpful during our trip! All around great stay, couldn’t recommend more!

First time in Madrid and Mat’s place was in the perfect spot of Madrid’s center. Within perfect walking distance to Gran vía and just a couple min walk to most metro stations. There’s a few markets within walking distance as well to purchase groceries. Be mindful that the hot water for the shower runs for 10 min and then you have to wait an hour to have hot water again. This wasn’t a problem for us. Overall, Would highly recommend Mar’s place! Thanks Mar!
Nice neighborhood, make sure to double check check in procedure
El apto. es muy cómodo, práctico y muy bien ubicado. Sin dudas volvería
This apartment had plenty of space for my partner and I. We thought the location was great. We enjoyed our stay!
The apartment is amazing! The location is perfect and can’t recommend enough!
Apartamento como en las fotos. ¡Excelente ubicación!
All perfect, many thanks
Mar’s place is super central and super cosy! On a lovely street with loads of cool eateries and stores. Highly recommend!
Buena ubicación.
Nice apartment and good location, but beware that check-out is at 10:00am and the host is not flexible

Very lovely quaint apartment. We loved the location and the cleanliness. Lots of restaurants and bars, also close to shops. Just be aware there is a bar downstairs so if you sleep on the soft couch, there were earplugs provided or just bring your own if noise sensitive
Fantastic location, great facilities - comfy bed and lovely shower. Mar was very helpful and communicative.
Clean and well equipped apartment in an vital part of Madrid. The communication with Mar was very good. I can highly recommend this apartment.
Convenient location, clean, good for a quick stay in Madrid! Thank you Mar!
Excellent location and apartment is very clean and had everything you need
Great apartment with great location. Clean and cozy. It’s right across the street from the most amazing coffee shop and restaurants.
Great communications, great location and easy access. Mar was a very responsive host. Place is small but well stocked and as advertised. Would stay again!
Appartement confortable très bien situé pour profiter de la vie madrilène, tout se fait à pieds sans difficulté.
Muy bien. Muy comodo
The accommodation is cozy and centrally located. The interior is well renovated and clean. However, all the bedsheets provided had stains, which made us feel a bit uncomfortable.

Great apartment, in a great location. The apartment has everything you need. Lots of storage for clothes etc. You can step out the door and there is a little bakery across the road and a bar just down the road then it's a few minute walk to the main stretch with lots of shops, restaurants, roof top bars etc. we will definitely be coming back and would definitely stay at this apartment again, we didn't want to leave. Very clean and tidy.
Small, cute spot with everything you may need! Great location! Would definitely stay here again if I return :)

Key collection was a nightmare. If your new to the area like we was your have to get a taxi to collect the key and if you have cases etc The apartment needed repairs. The location is amazing right in the centre close to everything. The noise from upstairs was loud on the last night. Communication from the host was good.
Check out is early and the person collecting the key was prompt no flexibility
Great location, very reasonable. Exactly what I needed! Thanks Mar!
excelente lugar, buen anfitrión y muy buen ubicación... todo muy cerca
Very nice location, good value for your money.
Bonito piso en buena ubicación, junto a restaurantes excelentes y cerca de puntos de interés. Lo recomiendo.

Bad host,
We do not recommend this flat at all,
We have been using arbnb for 7 years, we have never found a host so rude.
She adds additionals that are made up .
Read our background as a profile, we have never had any problem with no one. But this host is a no go if you want to enjoy the beautiful Madrid.

La estancia fue normal para ser 2 noches, la ubicación del departamento es muy buena para poder llegar a todos lados, sin embargo nos pareció que pueden mejorar en la limpieza del departamento, el tema de que el agua caliente dure solo 10 minutos también fue un problema para nosotros y las sábanas para el sofá cama no estaban limpias, eso también nos desanimó.
The apartment is in a great location of Madrid, easily accessible to a lot of stores and main city center area. The apartment was very clean and modern, would definitely book again if in Madrid.
Me encantó el piso. Mar era muy amable.
Great location and price
Ok

The apartment is in a very good location, right in the shopping and major attractions of Madrid. Everything was within walking distance, whether shopping or dining. It was also very near grocery stores, and was 5mins away from the bus station going to the airport.
It is as advertised, and you have everything you need, most especially the aircon which was necessary during our visit (in August).
Mar is easy to coordinate with, and replies to messages quickly. Highly recommended.
Apartment was nice and clean, and was just as described. Really good location, maximum 20 minute walk to the main tourist attractions, and super close to Gran Via.
Great stay great location
great location. well equipped.
We had a great stay! The location is excellent for walking and using public transit. The check-in was easy.  We also felt comfortable contacting Mar if needed.
Beautiful home. Spacious and in a great location.

Perfect stay! We had a few days City trip with 4 girls and the apartment was just perfect. Everything was clean and the location was just awesome (many vegan and also gluten-free restaurants nearby, which was just perfect. We picked up the keys and also Mar had super tips for our trip :) 10:/10 recommended
very nice apartment with great location

Just as it looks online . It’s in a great position 5 minutes walk from the Gran Via. Also it is right opposite a National treasure, the church with incredible paintings inside . We even watched a Madonna being carried in procession past our balcony into the church .
Bed comfortable and everything clean . Could be a bit noisy at night as there is a bar underneath. We slept in the bedroom which is at the back so it didn’t bother us but sleeping on the sofa bed might be a problem. All in all very nice
This was our second time staying here and it was just as great as the first time. Such a great area and quick access to everything. Get arts scene in the neighborhood too!
Great appartment, good for visiting the city.  Ideal location . Host was excellent

Great location in Madrid. The apartment felt very safe, and is in a great area for exploring the city! There was maybe some things that could have been updated in the apartment, but overall it was very nice, and perfect for a young couple traveling around!
excelente apartamento, muy bien equipado y muy céntrico. Las ventanas aíslan bien el ruido de afuera. Volvería

Location, Location, Location… this apartment is in a fabulous area and no matter where you go in MAD you are always a 15-20 min walk from main tourist attractions. Very centrally located. Apartment is good value for money. Check in was not the best in my opinion. Last thing I want to do when arriving to a foreign country is lug my luggage around to go pick up the key. Granted the locker to get the key is a few minutes walk, but it was not what I wanted to do. It is a bit cramped for more than 2 people but it is doable for a short period. However the apartment is not as clean as I had hoped it to be. It felt as though it had not been vacuumed in a while… Pillows are as thin as cardboard and sheets are stained up. The walls are also quite dirty… Make sure you stagger your showers hours apart because the hot water will not last you for more than 1.
H
Beautiful location and very clean. Loved the place
Muy bien lugar, la ubicación excelente y el servicio por parte de Mar muy bien!
Nice place

Die Lage des Apartments ist super, sehr zentral, alles fußläufig zu erreichen. Dies führt jedoch mit sich, dass es abends/nachts auch lauter ist. Check-in lief über ein Schließfach. Mar hat sich angeboten, Reservierungen in Restaurants vorzunehmen, das habe ich als sehr zuvorkommend erachtet.
Leider war die Unterkunft jedoch nicht ausreichend gereinigt und für uns 4 vorbereitet, sodass wir uns nicht wohl gefühlt haben. Keine frischen Handtücher (sollten wir aus dem Bettkasten nehmen, worin alles mögliche mit aufbewahrt war) und Laken für das Gästesofa. Flecken auf Bettdecke, schmutziger Kühlschrank und Haare im Badezimmer. Auch das Sofa ist in keinem guten Zustand. Kein Fenster im Schlafzimmer.
Das Apartment hat an sich Potenzial, nur mangelt es leider an der Sauberkeit..
Lovely apartment, perfect location. Mar is a fantastic host. Thank you!
Good location

The perfect location!  This place is right in the center and close to so many sights. It was a good size for 2 people, but could be tight with 4. The hot water only lasts for 10 minutes which would be tricky with more than 2 people. All in all a good place to stay in Madrid.

die Unterkunft war leicht zu finden und die Lage ist perfekt, besser geht's nicht. wir konnten wirklich alles zu Fuß erreichen, in 2 Minuten ist man auf den wichtigsten Hauptplätzen. Aufgrund der guten Lage ist es natürlich etwas laut, vor allem da direkt darunter eine Bar ist. Aber das Schlafzimmer liegt einigermaßen ruhig. Die Küche ist so lala ausgestattet und leider war alles ein wenig schmutzig. Auch das Sofa und die Bettdecke waren schmutzig und hatten Flecken, es gab auch keinen Bettbezug. Das gab uns leider ein bisschen ein ungutes Gefühl. Mar ist immer super zu erreichen und antwortet sehr schnell, sie hat uns auch immer viele Tipps gegeben. Wenn man den Trubel der Stadt erleben möchte ist diese Wohnung super dafür.

Nice cosy flat in the heart of Madrid! Mar was very responsive and a great host, thanks for having us - she gave great instructions and came back really quickly on any queries.
Only negative I would say was that the sofa bed was quite a bit smaller than expected, but we were only there for a weekend stay.
The flat was stocked well and definitely suited our needs for our trip!
Great place to stay. Instructions in the beginning were a bit miscommunicated but overall stay was pleasant

El millor de l'apartament és la localització sens dubte. Molt útil com a punt neuràlgic, una mica menys còmode per estar-hi (sobretot sent 4 persones): hi ha poc espai amb el sofà llit obert, l'aigua calenta dura 10 minuts, i els llençols tenen taques. Molt bé la calefacció, i poc soroll a les nits per estar en una zona concorreguda. En general, un molt bon apartament si la teva idea és passar la major part del dia visitant Madrid!
Correcto
El piso está muy bien ubicado y dotado de todo lo necesario. Mar siempre estuvo disponible a responder nuestras dudas a tiempo. Súper recomendado !

For my second visit to Madrid I decided to book in the same area as the first time. It is just a 20 minute drive from Barajas airport when there is not a lot of traffic.
From Mar’s apartment you can practically walk to everywhere in the city center. This saves not only a lot of time to travel, but also money, so you can spend more on the great food in Madrid!
The apartment was good enough for the money spent, with all needed amenities available. Big plus for me was the Nespresso machine, to make my morning and evening coffee. Next time I would definitely book again if available!
Mar left the keys to the apartment in a locker not far from there. Along with the given instructions it was an easy task and checking in went without any problem. She did a great job.
Great location and the place looked just like the pictures.
Esta perfectamente ubicado, y en apenas dos minutos llegas a la gran via andando, etc...
Nos encanto el departamento todo como en la descripción

¡Increíble lugar para quedarse en Madrid!
Todo queda cerca, puedes moverte caminando, transporte público o en Uber sin problema.
El lugar es tal cual la descripción, la cama es muy cómoda y todo el espacio es muy limpio con una buena iluminación. En la noche es muy tranquilo y no hay ruido.
Mi esposa y yo nos hemos quedado en hoteles de lujo y está estancia con la atención de Al está a ese nivel.
Definitivamente recomiendo este espacio. Y nosotros seguro regresaremos.
El único tema es las escaleras si tienes maleta, prepárate para subir 4 pisos. Todo lo demás está excelente!

Al was the best AirBNB host we’ve had! Extremely responsive, gave us great suggestions for dining information about the area. The location is in a great neighborhood, the city is very walkable. The wet room/shower was different but it worked fine.
Ál was really lovely. Had great suggestions for things to see while in Madrid and the Malasaña neighborhood was great…. very lively and safe.
Can not say enough good things about Al’s place! Super stylish and comfortable. Location is perfect. And Al is a true gem of a host. Will be back again!

Al’s place was just right for the two of us to stay for a few days while visiting our son living nearby. We know the area (Malasaña) which is very popular with lots of walkable restaurants and cafés, but the apartment is very quiet. We liked the light and design of the apartment. We found the 80 steps okay.  We have recommended it to our son for other visitors.

Al met us when we arrived. He helped us up to the top floor and made sure we were able to get on WiFi. He provided us with many “must dos” while we were in Madrid to include food. We had one small issue and he was very quick to help with rectifying it. Al is incredibly friendly, funny, and helpful. The apartment was comfortable and was in a perfect location. The bed and pillows were comfortable and the shower was hot with great water pressure. Al was, hands down, the best host we’ve encountered in all our AirBnB stays! Will stay here again!
Truly amazing place to stay in Madrid! Great central location, very clean and well-appointed, and Ál was very helpful and kind. Highly recommended!

Al was a fantastic host and was there to greet us with lots of information about the area. This is a great find in a great neighbourhood. The studio apartment is very quiet and peaceful and the bed is large and comfortable so a good night's sleep after a long day sightseeing is assured. The area is bustling with lots of local cafes and restaurants to sample. Everything is within walking distance. I'd recommend Al's place in a heartbeat. Superduper hosting. Thanks Al. Oh, and it's very stylishly furnished too!

We had a wonderful stay at Ál’s place! Not only did he sit down with us and offer thoughtful and tailored recommendations to us for exploring Madrid upon check in, but he was also incredibly responsive and kind. He had many thoughtful touches in the apartment, including a bottle of wine to welcome us and nice slippers and robes. The listing looks exactly like the apartment and the space was very well designed. The bed was extremely comfortable. The kitchen contained everything we needed to prepare a meal. The apartment was in an amazing location with many shops, restaurants, and bars around. We greatly appreciated Ál’s hospitality and kindness and would strongly recommend his place!

Fijne ruimte om een paar dagen te verblijven. Leuke, gezellige wijk vlakbij een pleintje met terras en 2 restaurants. Centrum is goed te lopen. Wij hebben ook een dag fietsen gehuurd om naar de parken te rijden. Appartement is zeer compleet. Fijn bed en voldoende handdoeken en thee en koffie om te gebruiken. We hebben een leuk gesprek bij aankomst gehad met Al en hij had meerdere tips voor ons. Aanrader dit appartement!

Ótimo apartamento, perfeita localização! Fizemos tudo a pé! Fácil de encontrar, restaurantes, cafés próximos! Comunicação com Ál ótima. Ele é um querido, solicito! Ficou com nossas malas pra tomarmos um café tranquilos e ir embora.

Ál and his place were fantastic. He was able to get us an earlier check-in which was a godsend after nearly 24 hours of travel. And he even offered us food during the Spain-wide blackout when we mentioned we hadn’t pulled a ton of euros from the ATM. The apartment itself was very nice and quiet given how much is going on in Malasaña. The all-wet bathroom is a little odd but not necessarily a dealbreaker if you order your morning right. Given Ál’s help and communication, the quietness of the apartment, and the unbeatable location, it’s an incredible spot!
Al was super friendly and accommodating. Always responding to messages or questions. The flat is super well located and walking distance from restaurants and bars. We had a good time. Thanks Al!

Absolutely loved Al's place. Super walkable to all the sights, lots of restaurants and bars just steps away. The space itself was amazing...lots of natural light, very quiet, and I felt right at home. Al had the place stocked with all the essentials, and he was very friendly and communicative. I would definitely stay here again.

Al’s place was cute and well equipped with everything we needed for our 3 night stay. The location felt very safe and was close enough to many major sites or metro line that we were able to explore as much as our feet would allow!  Get to know Al, he’s a very interesting guy!  We were happy for his hospitality.

Nuestra estadía en el departamento fue maravillosa. Luminoso, tranquilo, increíblemente bien equipado, lleno de detalles y cerca de todo. Ál fue encantador y muy amable. Lo recomiendo mucho porque es un espacio muy cómodo y agradable donde encuentras descanso y silencio después de disfrutar Madrid. Volvería sin dudarlo.

Great location that is walkable to the city center and close to the Metro. The apartment has lots of natural light along with blackout window coverings for a great night of sleep.  Ál is a fantastic host and provides many additional amenities to make you feel right at home.  Thanks Ál for making our stay in Madrid comfortable and fun!

Pasamos unos muy lindos días en el depto de Al. Llegamos en un vuelo desde Argentina muy temprano y se encargó de hacer la limpieza más temprano para entregarnos el departamento antes! Muchísimas gracias!
Tiene todo lo necesario para una estancia cómoda y sin tener que preocupar ese de llevar nada (café leche jugo de naranja agua y hasta una botella de vino y frutos secos)
Siempre muy atento a lo que necesitáramos
Espero volver pronto y de verdad recomiendo este Airbnb!!!

Appartement à recommander pour les séjours dans le cœur de Madrid
Au cœur d’un quartier animé avec tout à proximité à pied, l’appartement loft situé au dernier étage d’un immeuble avec beaucoup de charme a été décoré et aménagé avec beaucoup de goût et d’attention
Àl est un hôte réactif, très sympathique et partage les bonnes adresses !
Tout cela au calme et avec la Clim ainsi que pleins d’attention pour vivre un séjour remarquable

Lo de Al cubrio ampliamente nuestras expectativas, muchas gracias Al fue un gusto conocerte.
Volveremos!
Pablo y Marisa

Al was a great host! The room was beautiful, looked exactly like the photos. Bed was very comfortable, and the amenities were all great. Al was very friendly and really made an amazing effort to make us feel at home. Would highly recommend!

Al’s place is a real gem. We were extremely comfortable and had a restful stay. Al is a wonderful host. He is warm, friendly and goes above and beyond to make his guests feel at home. He spent time with us at check in to explain everything and gave us some great restaurant recommendations. Lots of great extras that made us feel welcome-bathrobes, extra towels, stocked fridge. Highly recommend and would definitely stay again.
A great place to stay when visiting Madrid, owner is great and the appartment has a very positive aura
Un apartamento precioso en una excelente ubicación. Y Álvaro una persona excepcional. Volveremos.

Muy lindo piso en una exelente ubicación, lo recomiendo.
Aunque en algunos momentos cuando le consultamos algunas cosas a Mar no nos respondió.
Sin dudas volvería a este piso.

ótima anfitriã! mar foi ágil quando precisou me responder e sempre esteve disponível. o apartamento é ótimo, juntamente com a localização. check-in e check-out super fáceis de fazer e sem dor de cabeça (desde que você se planeje com base nos horários)
roupas de cama, toalhas e todos os demais utensílios impecáveis, já prontos para uso. tudo limpo, organizado e bem aconchegante. com certeza se eu voltar à madrid, ficarei neste mesmo apartamento. obrigado, mar! :)

Excelente localização, da pra fazer tudo a pé. Recomendo se programar para tomar banho tendo em vista que tem 10 minutos ou menos de água quente a cada hora.
Bem equipado, bons utensílios para cozinhar, apartamento ideal para 2 pessoas.
Great place and location! Everything you need and more just outside the apartment.
Parfait pour explorer et découvrir Madrid une première fois !
Buena seguridad, lugar espacioso, cómodo.  Excelente experiencia.
El apartamento estaba en una ubicación excelente. Lo tenía todo para un fin de semana. Mar nos dejó toallas y otros detalles que son de agradecer.

El departamento está bien ubicado. Es exactamente igual a la publicación.
Nosotros éramos tres y estaba bien, pero para 4 personas es muy pequeño.
Todo estaba limpio. Exceptuando debajo de sillón cuando lo abrimos para hacer la cama estaba todo lleno de polvo.
Quizás le falta algo de mantenimiento, la bacha del baño estaba algo tapada. No teníamos repasadores,ni trapo rejilla para la cocina, el rollo de papel estába terminándose
como dice el anuncio el termo es chico tres duchas rápidas no te podías dar porque el tercero ya se bañaba con agua fría.
Las instrucciones del lavarropa estaban borradas fue complicado utilizarlo, igualmente le escribí a Mar y nos guió.
Lo menos conveniente fue que le pedimos a Mar otro juego de llaves y nos dijo que no tenía. Todos los departamentos que hemos alquilado nos brindan un segundo juego.
Siendo tres adultos nos hizo falta porque nos limitó la estadía.
Y por último tuvimos problemas con el check in nos quiso cobrar
Extra que no correspondía.

El apartamento de Mar es muy cómodo, súper céntrico. Es muy fácil llegar y moverte desde ahí. Está en una zona con mucho movimiento, bares, cafés y un teatro a media cuadra. Muy limpio y el lugar es tal cual la publicación. El check out es bastante temprano (10 am) lo cual es un poco complicado si viajas con niños, pero por lo demás es todo súper! 100% recomendado

Great location, all the major locations are very walkable. Only thing to keep in mind is that the apartment is directly over a bar that remains open very late (2:00am).
Lots of noise from the patrons as well as the after hours cleaning that we were not expecting. If you are a light sleeper, be careful.
clean and good location, perfect for tourist

Un lugar precioso y céntrico a los lugares más icónicos de Madrid.
Si quieren pasar un rato agradable les recomiendo este sitio

Nos hospedamos
Donde Mar a la llegada y al final de nuestro viaje por Europa. El dpto está en una zona con mucha vida nocturna, podría ser un poco ruidoso para quienes no disfrutan de eso. Un teatro a media cuadra, bares de tapas, a 4 cuadras de Gran Vía, la estación de subte, supermercado a media cuadra, lo recomiendo totalmente. Está impecable y es tal cual se muestra en las fotos, definitivamente volveremos.
Amazing stay at Mar’s place. Everything is very close and within walking distance of this place. Would definitely stay here again.
Decent place. Close to Gran Via.
Nice place

Esta locación es Perfecta! A minutos de la Gran via, plaza del sol, metro, restaurantes, puerta de alcalá, cibeles, parque del retiro.  Me encantaría volverme a quedar. Mucha vida en las calles a todas horas y te sientes tranquila de andar a cualquier hora. Viaje sola y fue estupendo.
Easy to find, next to almost everything
Awesome location!

Please be advised that you have to walk 11 minutes away to get the key to the apartment. Had to carry around the luggage all over the city…
Stains all over the walls, not working outlets, etc. Place needs a drop clean. Host messaged me the day of to pick up a key at 2pm and check in is at 2pm so that was unclear.
Good area
Excelente airbnb! M encantó! Es mucho mas de lo q esperaba! Excelente localización, muy bonito, cómodo y limpio! Reserven sin duda alguna!
El apartamento es muy cómodo,todo funciona perfecto y la ubicación Exelente!!!Lo tomamos cuatro amigas y yo sigo alojada x 15 días más!!Estoy encantada con el piso y la ubicación!!Lo recomiendo!!!

Exelente apartamento!!!Ubicacion ideal(cerca de Gran vía,Plaza Callao,Fuentecarral,Mercado San Hidelfonso ,)Barrio es fantástico.Volveré a alojarme en esta piso cuando regrese a Madrid!!!Mil Graciassss!!!!
El piso es exactamente como se anuncia en las fotos. La ubicación ea sin duda alguna lo mejor. Mar contestó muy rápido a todos mis mensajes se ofreció a ayudarnos en todo momento.

El apartamento se corresponde con las fotos, pero la verdad para 4 personas es bastante incómodo. El sofá cama tiene sus años de uso y no era lo más cómodo por así decirlo, y del uso lo encontramos algo sucio. Tampoco encontramos ropa de cama para poner en el sofá y lo que había estaba bastante sucio, las almohadas con varias manchas. Por último, el ruido por ña noche puede hacer que no concilies el suelo fácilmente, el apartamento no dispone de persianas y la insonorización no es la mejor, pero está en pleno Malasaña, al fin y al cabo sabes donde te metes y a lo que te expones.
me pareció bastante cómodo el departamento, muy buena ubicación cerca de todo lo necesario, mar muy amable atenta en cada momento.
Airbnb was in a nice area but there was no hot water to shower at all for all 3 days that we stayed (not even for the 10 minutes listed)
Ubicación excelente y el departamento cómodo y tenia todo lo que necesitabamos! Mar super amable

Increíble lugar para quedarse en Madrid. Súper céntrico, llegas caminando a la gran vía, a la plaza callao, al Mercado de San Miguel, a la plaza de el sol. Al frente del restaurante hay una panadería, cafetería y Mercado, la calle tiene varias opciones para comer. Todo súper bueno.
Apartamento bien ubicado y limpio. Mar ha estado atenta y contestando rápido todas las preguntas, lo recomiendo.
El departamento está súper céntrico. Cerca de la gran vía y principales atracciones. Acogedor y equipado con todo lo necesario. Mar súper atenta y con respuesta a cada consulta.
Aki szereti a belvárosi forgatagot, ez a lakas kiváló. Mar gyorsan válaszolt minden kérdésünkre. Nagyon jól éreztük magunkat.

This spot is definitely in a great location and you can easily walk to the big attractions. We walked all over Madrid and didn't take a taxi once. The view is nice from the balcony and it's fun to people watch. Great location. With that said though, I wouldn't stay here again. I think the photos make it seem nicer than it is. All of the walls were extremely dirty/stained, which we found so odd. We also tried not to walk barefoot because the floors felt sticky. The headboard on the bed also looked grimy & the  couch was old & falling apart, so it was pretty hard to relax after a day of walking. We were aware of the hot water time limit (10 min shower, wait 40 mins, next person goes)  but it seemed to not last even 10 minutes, and we were even turning the water off while soaping up, etc. Overall it did not feel clean & could use updates.

Location and apartment were great. Only complaints were the lack of hot water in the apartment, and we were left with no toilet paper, shampoo, conditioner, or body wash. Other than that, I totally recommend.
Fantastic place, perfectly located. Mar is an exceptional host, very prompt in responding and provided lots of great recommendations. Highly recommend!!!
Obrigada
The place had a fantastic location. Our only complaint is that it was not very clean. Stains were on the couch and the comforter. The floor didn’t feel like it was deep cleaned.
Great location within walking distance to many sights or to lots of different metro lines to connect you to where you'd like to go.
excelente lugar lo recomiendo
Great location and host was very accommodating. She went out of her way to come to the Airbnb and help us with the washer. Very helpful and would definitely recommend!

The apartment is described as BRAND NEW. It is definitely not that!
Flooring is worn and damaged in spots, the sofa is stained, worn and torn and the walls are chipped and marked. All of this might not have been such a disappointment if it was not advertised as new.
What I could not overlook was the lack of cleanliness. The walls are filthy, curtains, sofa and throw pillows are either dirty or stained and the floor needs a good clean. After spending time in the apartment barefoot I had to wash my feet before I put my sandals on to go out.
A few days before arrival, and after the reservation was refundable, we were told to pick up the key from a lockbox that is 800m away. Not much fun after a long travel day hauling luggage around an unfamiliar city.
I will say that the host always responded to messages and was more than willing to help with recommendations or information on the area.
Perhaps she could focus some of her enthusiasm on cleaning and upgrading the BRAND NEW apartment.
The apartment has a great location, very nice and clean. Walking distance to La Gran Via! We loved it.

Excelente ubicación, muy cerca de todo y con restaurantes muy lindo a unos pasos. Mar estuvo muy al pendiente de nosotros y nos dio muchas recomendaciones locales, ademas nos ayudo con la reserva de un taxi seguro muy temprano por la mañana que nos fui de mucha utilidad.
Excelente ubicación y buena comunicación para todas las dudas y problemas.

Amazing location! The area is fantastic, plenty of great bars and resteraunts. We didn’t notice it being noisy at night, slept amazingly well, very cool with the fan and air con. Flat is very comfortable, clean and it good condition. Not brand new feel about it but it is clean. I would definitely recommend to anyone visiting, especially younger couples

sofa cama muy pequeño, es xomo para que duerman dos niños maximo de 10 años.

sabanas manchadas .

Roupas de cama, toalhas de banho limpas, cozinha completa, tem uma cafeteria bem em frente e vários restaurantes próximos, a região tem bastante restaurantes, bares e fica bem próximo a gran via.
Great place to stay, clean and easy to walk into main area, there is even a coffee shop across the street, that I love.! I would definitely stay again or recommend it.

We had a lovely time at here! We enjoyed our private garage so that we could park our car. We also enjoyed the patio on the roof top. This house is a hidden gem. I would definitely recommend this house for a family of 4. Thanks again!
We had a great stay at Mar’s apartment in Madrid! Easy check in, great value and lovely location! Highly recommend!
Great location!
Had a lovely stay at Mar’s place! Location was central to everything! Mar was great communicator and very helpful 👍

Very nice location, very close to everything. The only thing I would’ve like is that the hot water lasted longer than 5minutes and that they had extra pillow covers for the extra pillows in the closet.
Perfect location. The place was clean and tidy, very comfortable. The host was super friendly and responsive. Overall an amazing experience for a good price.
We really enjoyed our stay. Nice apartment in a great location!
La ubicación es excelente; el departamento muy pequeño, solo tiene aire acondicionado en la sala, no en la habitación principal

Departamento con excelente ubicación para visitar los principales lugares turísticos de Madrid, ella barrio es bueno con variedad de bares y restaurantes. La comunicación con Mar es rápida y clara. Recomendado !

Highly recommend staying here! Great location close to lots of restaurants and places to go. Lots of cute shops around the area too. The apartment is clean and has everything you could possibly need. The bed is also very comfortable!!

The flat is close to everything, you can reach the main highlights easily. Mar was extremely helpful and always responded very quickly. We spent 4 nights at Mar’s home, and we can absolutely recommend it for an intensive city tour. Keep in mind that the area can be pretty noisy.

En el piso de Mar me sentí como en casa. Estaba bien equipado, tiene muchos restaurantes, bares y mini supermercados cerca. Se encuentra a una distancia caminable de la Gran Vía. La anfitriona es muy antenta y siempre atendió nuestras consultas con rapidez. Me volvería a hospeda aquí.

Value for money, great and safe location, just a few minutes walk to Calle Gran Via, supermarkets and affordable restaurants open till late night. ótima localização, perto de tudo! zona um pouco barulhento à noite principalmente para quem dorme na sala, mesmo junto à janela mas compensa na mesma. cozinha bem equipada com sal, azeite, etc!

Gran  alojamiento, el espacio aunque no es mucho está bien distribuido. El baño es agradable y muy limpio.
