Very good experience in Madrid. The flat is in good quality. We had a nice trip here. The host Mar is helpful and nice.

Departamento muy cómodo, la ubicación excelente, muy cerca de la Gran Vía. Coincide con la descripción de Mar, apreciamos mucho que tení lavadora y elevador. La pasamos muy bien!! agradezco que haya dejado listo el sofacama. Recomiendo ampliamente este departamento!

Localização muito boa, Mar respondia sempre que podia, algumas coisas precisam melhorar: fluxo de água do chuveiro muito baixo. Se alguém ligar outra torneira ao mesmo tempo a água diminui ainda mais. A iluminação do quarto é muito fraca. Não há janela no quarto então a luz principal precisa ser mais forte. O apartamento não oferece forno, nao sendo possível assar uma pizza por exemplo. Duas cadeiras da cozinha estão com parafusos soltos o que pode ser facilmente resolvido pela manutenção. A limpeza do banheiro também pode melhorar pois há lodo nos rejuntes dentro do chuveiro. Na pia da cozinha há um cheiro vindo do ralo que também precisa ser resolvido.
Espero ter podido ajudar.

We stayed here during our Honeymoon trip to Madrid and could not have picked a better place and area. It’s close to mostly everything and metro stations. Great food, markets and shops within walking distance. Would stay again!
Mar’s place was a perfect deal for a great spot in the center of Madrid. Everything was within walking distance.

Muy bonito departamento, con una ubicación excelente a unas cuadras caminando de la gran vía.
Excelente comunicación con Mar, accesible y disponible.
Lo recomiendo
Perfect location. Lots of bars, restaurants, coffee shops, easy to walk to or quick uber to major tourist attractions.
Un lugar simple pero cómodo
a great place to stay in the heart of Madrid!
Nice and clean, perfectly located close to Metro.  We were met at place by a friend of Rodrigo's who explained everything about the apartment and gave us information about Madrid - great service!

Rodrigo and his cohorts were very helpful in setting up the rental, and they were there with keys and on time when we arrived.  Located right near Plaza Lavapies, the apartment is ideally located for those who want a sort of Lower East Side/San Telmo/Hoxton experience in a gentrifying bohemian/immigrant neighborhood. Like many apartments in old buildings in Madrid, it is small and not luxurious (the photographs are slightly nicer than it is), but it is appointed well  with a plasma screen TV et al, has a lovely courtyard, is well located, and Rodrigo and his associates are pleasant to work with. When we had a problem with the shower (it's poorly designed and leaks onto the bathroom floor), they quickly sent over the maid to fix the situation..
Great small apartment. Comes equipped with everything you need for your stay and the patio was fantastic and beautiful. Gracias Rodrigo.

Great apartment and we absolutely loved the location.  Very convenient to the city's major sites and a fun part of town.  The communication and meetup were excellent.  We would definitely stay here again!

Three friends from Ireland and the U.S. rendez-vous'd at Green Patio for a long weekend. A great location in the heart of the quarter.

The Apt is bright, very well cared for and in a totally charming vine covered courtyard building, in a great boho neighborhood.

Walking around the Lavapies and into other sections of central Madrid was just a comfortable stroll.

We walked out to a lunch and then to see the Guernica at the Reina Sofia on both days. Fantastic.

My communication from Rodrigo was very relaxing and reassuring as he never went more than a few minutes before replying to any question I had, even though he was out of the country at the time.

I was met by a friend/concierge with keys and a warm smile. Even though my flight was a little late-everything stayed flexible and friendly.

Everything in the apt. worked - except the Wifi password and the CD/Radio player. So that was frustrating as we really did need to get online to confirm flights out etc... The other thing is easily fixed.
All the instructions for how to use things (in English) are sent via email - so print them out as the instructions in the apt. are only in Spanish. The water heater/boiler is hot water on demand, so no having to remember to turn it on in the morning. Shower itself is rainfall showerhead and so wonderful at the end of a long day.

There were three of us and the sofa-bed in the living was very firm, which suits me very well. But there was no pillows or duvet for a third person, only a sheet and 2 "throws".

But overall the apt. is bright and welcoming; visitor ready and in a great location.

Slainthe,
Lisa

The apartment is perfect for a short stay. Very well equipped, quiet and comfortable. The kitchen has lots of pans, crockery, glassware and a microwave, coffee pot, kettle, juicer etc.
Rodrigo was a fantastic host. I called him to ask for assistance with the heating and he was very helpful. He also accommodated my request to hire a baby cot, and we arranged a later check out. He always replied to my questions very promptly. There is a supermarket very nearby.
My only slight negative was the area of Lavapies itself. It felt a bit risky late at night with groups of shifty looking men always hanging around the street corners, although I had no trouble. The apartment though felt very safe indeed and the courtyard is lovely. Lavapies is a residential area rather than a tourist area and the metro is very close. We walked everywhere though.
Highly recommended!
El apartamento de Rodrigo es ideal para una estancia corta en Madrid.  Está muy bien situado ( a pocos metros de la plaza de Lavapiés) , muy tranquilo y muy bien  equipado.  Recomendable!
Gostamos muito. O apartamento embora  pequeno é muito funcional e limpo. Estivemos 6 adultos e sentimo-nos muito bem e próximos de tudo.
Paloma fue muy amable, atenta, muy buena predisposición. El apartamento esta impecable, tal cual se ve en el anuncio, excelente ubicacón, no dudaría en volver al mismo apartamento. Lo recomiendo.

L'appartement de Paloma est très bien situé, au cœur d'un quartier très animé et très culturel a la fois. Malgré tout, l'appartement est très calme. C'est joliment décoré , très propre et fonctionnel. Paloma est adorable et vous conseillera sur votre séjour a Madrid. Excellent rapport qualité prix! Je recommande vivement!

The location of the house is amazing. It is easy to walk around to see tourist attractions, also metro station is 5 mins away. The neighborhood is quite safe, you may walk securely around in every hours.  It is a fully equipped house, you shall have everything you need. Paloma is a great host, she provides all useful information, if you need for help.
Paloma fue muy atenta y agradable. La comunicación fue muy buena en todo momento y no hubo ningún problema. El piso un 10 y la localización excelente. Lo recomiendo al 100%.
Perfect location! Apartment cleen and cosy. Comunication smooth. Far away from home we felt like at home. Thank you Paloma!

El piso está ubicado en una zona con muchas atracciones turísticas y de arte bastante características de Madrid. Muy bien conectado con varias líneas de metro. Hay cerca: supermercados, restaurantes y tiendas de diverso tipo a los que pueden acceder fácilmente.

Si planean quedarse varias semanas o meses, asegúrense antes de hablar sobre los requisitos o trámites que la ciudad de Madrid requiere y en los que necesiten el apoyo de Paloma, para evitarse una serie de inconvenientes como los que yo tuve; que finalmente logramos resolver.
El trato con Paloma es excelente. La casa estaba perfecta. El barrio pintoresco y agradable, muy cerca de museos y zonas de interés.

From the start, Paloma has been very friendly and accurate concerning the communication. Me and my friend were looking for a suitable apartment for 5 months since we were going on an exchange for our study and this apartment perfectly fitted what we needed. Since I contacted her in December, Paloma was always very in time with responding and very helpful where needed. Once we arrived in Madrid, she was so welcoming and friendly to us so we really felt at home. The apartment is small, so good for 2 persons; not more, but that was fine. All basic equipment was there. Because the apartment is not really big and Madrid is a city where you mainly live outside, we did not spend hours and hours in the apartment but we always felt at comfortable when we came home. The neighborhood has everything you need: one big and one small supermarket, a bakery, coffee-to-go and breakfast places, a gym, and of course Reina Sofia next to the apartment. The neighborhood is very multi-culti which makes it very cosy and people are very friendly. We have felt safe in this neighborhood and the street was calm. Metro lines 1 and 3 are 5/10 minutes walking and they bring you anywhere. Also walking to the city-center Sol takes you only 20 minutes and you get to see the nice parts of the city.
Paloma has been the nicest landlord you can imagine: she was very warm and kind but also quickly responding when we needed something. We had some nice conversations and she is always willing to help you and to put the extra effort. It was so nice meeting you and we miss Madrid already!
Ponctuelle, accueillante, arrangeante, donnant des conseils pour visiter Madrid, Paloma a été parfaite et son petit appartement bien agréable et très bien situé.

El apartamento es exactamente igual a lo anunciado. Está todo muy bien organizado y muy limpio. Está en una calle muy tranquila en medio de un barrio lleno de vida, restaurantes, museos, muy bien comunicado con todo. Paloma es encantadora, y hizo todo lo posible para que nos sintiéramos a gusto en todo momento. Volvería sin dudarlo

This apartment is perfect for a wonderful trip to Madrid: it is close enough to Atocha to facilitate easy day trips out of the city; it is nearby the museums to allow you to visit multiple times for short visits; the neighborhood is wonderfully lively and you will love walking the streets in the evening. Additionally, the neighborhood has everything you need, from markets to pharmacies, to hair salons.
The apartment itself is very quiet, is well furnished with comfortable beds, a great sitting-room with a nice TV, and a well-functioning air-conditioner. It is also very clean and well-organized.
Paloma is an excellent host, and will help however possible. She was very easy to communicate with, and she was extremely helpful. I highly recommend this apartment!

We stayed in Palomas apartment for 3 months while we were working and studying in Madrid. The apartment was perfect for 2 persons, with one room each, and it felt like home for the very first day. The apartment is situated on a calm street and the house is peaceful, we nearly met any neighbors during our stay. The neighborhood is a happy mix of everything; elderly people, variety of bars, both ethnic and local restaurants, old and new shops and a multicultural atmosphere. You’ll find several supermarkets and food stores close by. It is easy to either walk or go with subway to the city-center and to different parts of Madrid. The railway-station is in a few minutes walking distance which also facilitates travelling easy to different parts of Spain or to the suburban area of Madrid. The biggest museums are very close to the apartment and there are also many contemporary art galleries in the area and even on the street itself. We arrived in the end of summer and during the weekends we enjoyed the sun and had picnic in Retiro. Retiro park is also very beautiful lately in the fall with the multicolored leaves in the trees and it's located close by the apartment. The apartment has everything you need either for a short or a longer stay. Madrid is also such a lovely city with plenty of activities and you’ll always find new cafeterias & restaurants to visit. Our landlord Paloma was always answering directly to our messages and calls and helping out with anything needed.
We want to thank you again Paloma for your hospitality and we wish to see you again as we will surely be back to visit Madrid in the future!

Saludos,
Martina & Ronja (two very happy Finnish girls)

Paloma was a good host. Upon my arrival, she was waiting for me and explained in a very detailed way all house related things and places to visit in Madrid. If you need piece of advice of Madrid, it is whom to ask for.
The flat was as pictured and the position was just perfect.
Thank you Paloma for your hospitality.

Hemos estado muy a gusto en el apartamento. Es pequeño pero muy bien distribuido.
Sin duda lo recomiendo.

Paloma was a great host who gave amazing recommendations for our time in Madrid! The location was perfect for getting around, as it is a block away from Atocha station.  The apartment itself is comfortable, amenable, and perfect as a hub for getting an immediate feel for the city.  Would definitely try to stay here again the next time I am in Madrid.

Wohnung: Top Lage um Madrid zu Fuß zu erkunden, Zimmer klein und schnuckelig wie auf den Fotos, sauber, alles da was bei einem Kurztrip man braucht
Paloma: super nett, hilfsbereit, bei Fragen auch während des Aufenthalts immer erreichbar, schnelle Rückmeldung
Fazit: nur zu empfehlen

El piso era adecuado y se correspondió a lo anunciado, como ventaja es que está céntrico y se puede ir a pie a cualquier sitio también está bien comunicado por metro y bus y el precio no es muy elevado en comparación a otros piso de la zona.
Paloma es una chica simpática que respondió a nuestro correos brevemente como pega decir que nos cobró 200€ en concepto de gasto que podría haber incluido en le precio de Airbnb en un primer momento porque de saberlo tal vez hubiéramos buscado otro piso.
Además hemos tenido un problema con ella sobre unas humedades y quiere que le compensemos económicamente cuando obviamente no es nuestra culpa la aparición de éstas. Quitando estos dos molestos detalles el resto bien.
Me he sentido muy cómodo y a gusto en el piso. Paloma es una buena anfitrióna y bien dispuesta a colaborar.
Wonderfully warm host.  Gave great recommendations on places to see and eat whilst on trip to Madrid. Thanks very much would definitely recommend!!

Verhuurder was op tijd aanwezig bij inchecken. Gaf de nodige informatie over de woning. Verhuurder registreerde van alle reizigers in het gezelschap paspoort gegevens in een map welke in het appartement blijft liggen. Appartement ligt letterlijk 1 hoek van Reina Sophia museum en op 250 meter van station Atocha. Geweldig!

First time to Madrid and really enjoyed staying at Palermo's apartment. Cute and comfortable. Apartment is very quiet with no street noise heard when the windows were closed.

Loved the La Libre corner café only 1 minute walk from entrance to her apartment building. Walkable to Madrid city center as well as Retiro Park. Also close to both the metro and train station. Highly recommended.

A friend and I lived in Paloma's apartment for a month while we were rotating at a hospital in Madrid. The size of the apartment is perfect for 2 people, and we were very comfortable during our time there. The kitchen is large enough to cook regular meals there (which we did). Paloma made us feel very comfortable-- she met us at the apartment when we arrived, oriented us to the neighborhood, and was easy to reach over WhatsApp during our entire stay in Madrid. Most importantly, I LOVED the neighborhood surrounding this apartment. It may not be the best choice if you are only staying in Madrid for 1-2 days but for a longer stay it is absolutely perfect, removed from the most touristy areas of the city, and right next to Lavapies, a neighborhood with incredible bars/restaurants and very lively. I would highly recommend this apartment for anyone settling in Madrid for a longer time and hoping to really experience the culture of this exceptional city!

Excelente apartamento y anfitriona. Tuvimos problemas porque quien hizo la reservación no pudo acompañarnos pero Paloma fue muy comprensiva y amable, nos ayudó todo el proceso y tuvimos una muy agradable estancia. El apartamento es como se describe, muy limpio y acogedor, muy cerca de La estación de Atocha que es una ventaja y el vecindario es muy simpático. Pasamos una gran estancia en Madrid gracias a Paloma.

Paloma m'a accueillie très chaleureusement et a vraiment pris le temps de m'indiquer les choses que je devais savoir sur l'appartement, elle m'a donné de très bons conseils sur les visites à faire à Madrid. L'appartement bien que petit est très bien organisé, très propre et merveilleusement situé. Il est évident que c'est l'appartement à réserver si on visite Madrid !

Paloma was a great host, gave us a briefing on the apartment, neighborhood and other useful information. The apartment clean and carefree. Location is ok. Nice quiet street, close to museums, 5 min walk to the subway and convenience stores and cafes.

Paloma is an excellent host. The apartment is very central, near the train station and a lot of musea. She welcomed us and showed us immediately the map and pointed out what's interesting in Madrid. We were in Madrid for only 3 nights, especially for the El Bosco exposition, which was great by the way. The apartment was clean and cosy. I felt we could ask Paloma everything. We asked her to call a taxi to bring us to the airport in middle of the night. So, thank you very much Paloma and I'm looking forward to visit Madrid again and stay a little longer in your apartment.

La casa era exacta a las fotos, una casa muy acogedora y cómoda, perfecta para dos o incluso 3 personas.
La calle muy tranquila y a un paso de la C/argumosa, llena de terrazas y bares donde tomar un café o una cerveza.
nombreux contacts emails et téléphoniques. souplesse pour les horaires à l'arrivée. Du temps  à l'arrivée pour la découverte de l'appartement
Great location . Easy walk to anywhere in central madrid. Clean apartment. Paloma was a lot of help. Had a map to show us where everything was. Bars, Restaurants ,museums are all very close.

Vriendelijke ontvangst met goede uitleg over het appartement en tips voor wat te doen in Madrid.
Prima locatie, rustig gelegen, met metro op redelijke loopafstand en vlakbij diverse musea.
EMPLACEMENT IDEAL POUR TOUTES LA VISITE DES MUSEES PRINCIPAUX, DU CENTRE DE MADRID ET POUR PARTICIPER A LA VIE MADRILENE

Paloma was a great host very helpful give us a map of the city  pointed where everything was.The apartment was very clean and was perfect for 4 people and is close to every thing city centre, metro, restaurants, nightlife ect...

The apartment is well located, being an easy walk to most of the attractions we wished to see in Madrid and close to the metro (Levapies Station). Rodrigo had sent excellent instructions for finding the apartment and arranged for a friend to meet us there when we arrived. A slight negative was the area itself  which was a bit dodgy though we always felt safe and it did have a dog poo problem but once in the courtyard of the block, security was good and the ambiance peaceful. Inside, the apartment was warm, comfortable and well equipped, spacious living area though a bit tight in the bedroom. The shower was not consistently hot which was a little annoying after a long day out.
Good location, 10 minutes walk to Puerta Del Sol and Atocha Rail Station and close proximity to all the attractions. We enjoyed our stay at the apartment. Host was very helpfull.

Not only was the apartment well equipped, clean, and centrally located, it was also an amazing experience to have Rodrigo as a host! He was kind, attentive, spoke amazing English, and even called the apartment to check in and make sure everything was suitable. Additionally, between the firm beds and the inner courtyard (eliminating all street noise), it is an quiet and comfortable place to sleep in a very bustling city. I only hope my parents come back to visit so they can stay there again! Not one complaint on this end.

My friend and I had an enjoyable stay in Madrid in Rodrigo's flat. He and Martin were friendly and very helpful hosts. the apartment was quiet, well equipped and very central for lots of the places of interest in Madrid. We had a great Indian meal on one of the nights in a restaurant just 2 minutes walk away from the apartment.
Rodrigo was very helpful with questions we had prior to the trip and we were grateful to be recommended a safe car park near to the flat. Martin was an excellent guide over the phone, when we got lost on our way in, even managing to tell us interesting facts about the areas we were driving through! He also gave us lots of tips for fun and unusual places to visit.
Altogether a very good stay - thanks to you both!

Rodrigo and his team were very accommodating to our needs. We were able to secure the reservation quickly and they were able to arrange for early check-in, which we greatly appreciated!

The apartment is the perfect size for two, even though there is room for more. We had absolutely no issues with the wi-fi, a/c, and hot water (all very important features). The location is great too, as we were able to walk to most of our destinations from the apartment! There is a lovely courtyard with grapevines hanging throughout, and the neighbors are all very friendly and helpful as well.

Next time we visit Madrid, we would be perfectly happy staying here again! Thanks Rodrigo!

Rodrigo and Martin were really easy to communicate with offering dinner, transport and day trip recommendations all within short timeframes. The area is close to the centre of town and within walking distance to most of the iconic museums. We were 2 young females traveling and although you need to keep your wits about you, the neighbourhood was fine.

This apartment was lovely.  It was very modern, updated, and comfortable. It had a fully equipped kitchen. One nice feature was the central courtyard with plants huge grapevines overhead;  many of the tenants dined there in the evenings.  The train station was conveniently close, and there was a lot of dining nearby.  We especially enjoyed the Italian restaurant La FundaMental. Thanks, Rodrigo!

Rodrigo's apartment was great.  We had a difficult time finding the apartment due to an incorrect location on airbnb site.  Rodrigo was able to guide us in and the mistake was changed immediately.  Rodrigo was super attentive to helping us out.

Our stay at Rodrigos flat was great. The apartment is although small, very functional with a big bathroom. It is set very nice and functional. You will have everything you need even for a prolonged stay in Madrid. It is also located on a quite street and orientated towards a beautiful inner courtyard. The neighborhood around this area is very multicultural and rich in many restaurants, tapas places and bars. Many major museums are close as well downtown itself.
For the hosts I have only words of prize. Helpful and very polite, eager to give hints and tips, but fully respecting your privacy.
Glad to recommend !!!
Cheers,
V

We warmly recommend this lovely apartment in the heart of Madrid. The place is surprisingly very quiet, despite its central location. It is extremely well equipped with everything you might need for a stay in the city, including free WiFi and free calls to land phones. The apartment is also well and tastefully designed so just staying there was a delight. The owners did everything they could to ensure that we will enjoy our stay including help on getting to the place and generous assistance during our stay and planning our day trips. We travel frequently, and this is one of the best places we've ever been to!

This flat really exceeded our expectations. Beautiful building with a shared courtyard, which we dined in one lunchtime. The building has a communally-owned cat named Lolo, who kept us company. Comfy bedroom, a very nice bathroom with an excellent shower, and a well-appointed kitchenette. Rodrigo was very helpful with check-in and booking, and provides a landline phone with his number on speed-dial, in case you need to contact him.
The neighbourhood of Lavapies is a bit rough - noticeable more so than other parts of Madrid we saw. There are some shifty characters on the streets at night, and you should keep your wits about you. That said, it's a wonderful neighbourhood during the day, and it has some great local joints, like La Mina, a proper local boozer that does vermouth and excellent, very cheap gambas a la plancha. It's also very central for Madrid's main sights, as well as for Atocha station.
Overall, we'd definitely consider booking this flat again. Thanks so much to Rodrigo for a wonderful stay!

Fantastic apartment with really cool and quirky decor, in a very lively neighbourhood. The hosts were so friendly and helpful and gave us tips on where to eat and go out, which made our stay even more enjoyable and made it so easy to find some really great places to hang out. I would definitely recommend this place and wouldn't hesitate to stay here again next time I'm in Madrid.

great space in Madrid. the location is central to about anywhere you would want for restaurants and nightlife in Madrid. La Latina bars are a 5-10 minute walk. Atocha station about 10.
if you head down the hill there are plenty folks trying to sell you something in the street. head up the hill instead, to Calle de Atocha, and you are connected to the hub of Madrid.
the space is outfitted well and Rodrigo was very responsive. there is even a clothes washer. we got confused on how to work it and Rodrigo instantly helped us through.
would certainly stay there again.
A delightful apartment in a very hip and lively neighborhood. Nice courtyard and a sweet cat playing outside.
Very friendly and helpfull hosts; quiet place in great neighbourhood!
It was a really nice flat and neighbourhood. We arrived very late with our flight and Rodrigos was only very helplful and easy to communicate with!!

This is a charming flat with easy access to everything Madrid has to offer! Paloma provided great arrival instructions and was there when we arrived to give us the keys and some tips about the city. Her communication was very clear and wrote us back right away if we had any questions.

The flat is a 5-10 minute walk to Atocha Station (main train station), a 5 minute walk to the large Carefour grocery market, and an easy 15 minute walk to Sol. We had great weather so we never ended up taking the metro but there were three easy stops nearby to choose from. The apartment is a two minute walk to Reina Sofa Museum and close to the large park. Overall, this is a great place to stay. We felt safe, it was clean and is perfectly located. Thanks for everything Paloma!
Thank you Paloma, Great place

Excelente atención, pendiente de cualquier problema, el piso muy bien situado, cómodo, dotado, limpio, con encanto al tratarse de un inmueble antiguo y recién restaurado, con decoración sobria que se agradece, en un barrio de lo más castizo y bohemio,
relación calidad - precio muy buena, repetiremos.

L’emplacement de l'appartement est excellent tout comme le fut l’accueil par Paloma qui s'est montrée parfaitement disponible pour nous guider dans la découverte de Madrid.
Le prix me semble toutefois trop élevé compte tenu de la taille de l'appartement et de l'équipement mis à notre disposition. Nous avons payé 164 $CA par nuit pour 6 personnes (dont 3 enfants de moins de 3 ans) alors que la capacité maximale pour y être confortable ne devrait pas excéder 4 personnes, et ce, d'autant plus que le canapé-lit dans le salon n'est pas très confortable.
The apartment is located at a perfect location. I would personaly say one of the beat location in Madrid.

Paloma's place is well-located and quiet. The internet works well and the air conditioning and fans were much appreciated. The check-in and check-out could have been smoother as it does take some time to get in from the airport if you're taking public transportation, but Paloma was very accommodating.

Thank you for hosting. The location is strategic: near to delicious tapas, carrefour 24 hours, parks, public transport main hub (Atocha), tourist attractions such as cathedral and palace, all within walking distances.
Si necesitas un sitio en la zona, es una opción muy recomendable!
Lovely host. Very kind and helpful. The Appartement is located at a very convienient and central place. It is big enough if you want to go out and explore the city!

We spent a few days in Madrid for a festival and loved it. The apartment is so well located with the Reina Sofia just round the corner and only a few minutes walk to the Retiro park, train station and metro station. There are lots of lovely bars and restaurants in the streets around the apartment so definitely worth exploring, and frequent buses or metros to other parts of the city.
Paloma couldn't have been more helpful, both in making arrangements in advance and meeting us when we arrived. She marked up a map for us with all the places we wanted to go and helped us plan transport to the festival. She also suggested some more local places that were worth visiting and was so friendly and helpful, checking in with us every couple of days to make sure everything was ok.
We loved Madrid and even the unseasonal rain and thunderstorms didn't spoil what will undoubtedly be the first of many visits to this beautiful city. We would definitely recommend both Madrid and Paloma's apartment, you won't be disappointed. Happy holidays!

La estancia ha sido muy buena. Paloma es muy atenta y te pone muchas facilidades.
El apartamento tiene todo lo necesario para poder pasar unos días muy cómodos en Madrid y su ubicación es prácticamente perfecta.
Totalmente recomendable.

Paloma is an amazing host. She is charming and very helpful. Her place is in the heart of Madrid. The apartment is very clean with aircondinioning  and with sound proof windows.  You can walk anywhere from there. Paloma will guide you well. I defenetely want to come back to her place soon.

Great host, accurate description and pictures.  The master double bed seemed smaller than standard, mattress not the most comfortable.  Some construction work taking place on the ground floor resulted in loud hammering starting at 8AM on 2 of the morning we were there.  Good location, with lots of options on restaurants.

He alquilado para la padres y mi hermana, les gustó el piso y la zona estrena bastante bien, todo muy cerca. Todo estaba limpio y muy bien, lo único que tengo que decir es que aunque hay 6 camas, el piso es pequeño ya para 3 personas pero al final se pasa muy poco tiempo en casa. Lo recomiendo a todos

Nous avons passé un excellent séjour dans l'appartement de Paloma.
Situé dans un immeuble calme , l'appartement est très fonctionnel et la clim' est top compte tenu de la chaleur de ces derniers jours sur Madrid.
La Puerta del sol est à 15mn à pied ou en métro en 10mn.
Merci à Paloma pour sa flexibilité sur les horaires d'entrée (avion en retard de +de 2 heures ) et de sortie.
On recommande sans hésitation .

Paloma's apartment is a gem! It's much spacier than we were expecting and the beds were comfortable. The location was great too - we walked everywhere from here and never felt unsafe. We stayed in early August, so having AC to return to was the icing on top. And Paloma is a fantastic host. She was waiting for us at the apartment upon arrival, gave us a quick tour, and even gave us a map with tips (definitely listen to her suggestions! :) ). Paloma is incredibly sweet and her apartment is fantastic - we would definitely recommend you stay here and we would love to come back if we find ourselves in Madrid again!
Appartement propre et calme au cœur de la vie madrilène. Paloma est gentille et disponible. Un très bon séjour. Je recommande.

This flat is compact but perfectly adequate for up to 4 person. The location is in a quite street and block with a lovely morning cafe at the end of the street and also a couple of bars for the evening. It is a 20 min walk to the centre SOL or 5 mins if you use the electric city bikes which were great.
A recommander !
Buen sitio tranquilo, buena casa y buena atención de Paloma.
Excelente ubicación, cerca del metro, restaurantes, zona muy segura y agradable.
very central place in Madrid, we were able to walk everything. Paloma was available when we entered the appartement and there was very good communication.
El departamento esta muy bien situado, cerca de Atocha, y de todos los lugares que vale la pena visitar. Cómodo, con todo lo necesario para una estadía confortable

La casa está bien situada, y aunque el barrio es animado es también tranquilo y por las noches no hay ruido. El piso es pequeño y no recibe mucha luz, pero el espacio está bien aprovechado y tiene buenas prestaciones como la calefacción (aire acondicionado y radiadores eléctricos).
Paloma te cobra una tarifa extra en concepto de limpieza, te lo explica antes de aceptar la reserva. Estuvimos viviendo dos meses y vino una chica a limpiar dos veces, la verdad es que no muy a fondo. El baño estaba impecable, pero había detalles como los radiadores o la campana extractora en los que se notaba que faltaba darle un repaso.
Cuando llegamos Paloma nos explicó sobre un mapa un montón de información de sitios interesantes, transporte y ocio. Fue siempre muy accesible y la verdad es que contestaba al whatsapp en seguida. Por ejemplo, se nos fundió una bombilla y al día siguiente ya estaba cambiada. También nos dijo que tenía que entrar al piso a instalar la fibra óptica con unos técnicos y como le pedimos que esperase a que estuviéramos presentes lo aplazó.
En conclusión es un piso bien situado y cómodo para vivir dos personas durante un tiempo. Lo recomendaría.

L'emplacement est parfait pour vivre la ville de l'intérieur et pour accéder à la gare d'Atocha (excursions possibles vers l'Escorial et vers Tolède). Quant à Paloma, elle est serviable, disponible, souple (horaires, organisation) et souriante. Une hôtesse de grande qualité.
Appartamento ben posizionato e comodo

L’appartamento di Paloma è situato in buonissima posizione, a 5 minuti a piedi dalla fermata della metro Lavapies, dalla stazione Atocha e dal Museo Reina Sofía. La zona è vivace e multietnica ma l’appartamento è tranquillo (a parte i vicini che una notte ci hanno tenuto svegli fino alle 3 parlando a voce molto alta). Le camere sono abbastanza spaziose e i letti e cuscini molto comodi. Paloma è stata molto disponibile sia prima che in fase di check in, dandoci molti utili consigli.
Great location, quiet, with a very friendly and helpful host. Very good experience all around.  Thanks Paloma!

Paloma is an excellent host. She waited late for us to arrive and gave us lots of helpful info for our stay.  The apartment is very close to several museums and the train station.  And most important, it is close to several Metro stations to get around the city.  We definitely did not need a car.  The place was very clean and comfortable for us.

We had a nice stay in this apartment. It is close to the train and metro and  it's easy to go to the airport and  all sights in the city center. Paloma was very helpful and easy to get hold of. Nice and clean apartment.
very nice apt. it is close to atocha and lavapies metro. Paloma is very good host.

L’appartement a un emplacement idéal pour visiter Madrid, tout peut se faire à pied ou presque, la gare Atocha est à 10minutes, très pratique pour visiter les alentours (Tolède et Ségovie).
La climatisation est appréciable pour le mois d’août.
Paloma est très sympathique et réactive, très bonne communication.
Esperábamos una mejor limpieza en general, si es verdad q al solicitar q nos cambiase algunas cosas del apartamento como almohadas y sarténes no tuvimos problema y la comunicación fue fluida.

Merci Paloma pour cet excellent séjour. Votre gentillesse et prévenance y ont bien contribué.
On reviendra en mars/avril prochain, pour 1 semaine.
A bientôt

El apartamento es muy acogedor, estaba muy limpio y sobre todo muy bien ubicado.
El barrio de lavapies es una maravilla así como el restaurante que me recomendaste en la latina.
Una anfitriona y un apartamento muy recomendables.

Paloma una persona encantadora, muy amable y atenta a todo

Amazing 1 month stay; the House is perfect and Paloma is simply amazing!! Great facilities, spotlessly clean and amazing location (which was essential for me). The neighborhood is full of art galleries, supermarkets and restaurants. Great local tips and going the extra mile for anything you may need . I felt at home at once and I miss this place already. Thank you and see you hopefully next time!

The apartment is very well located, 5 minutes walk from Lavapies metro station, Atocha station and Reina Sofía Museum. The area is lively and multi-ethnic but the apartment is quiet. Paloma is really a nice person. Consigliato +++
Je recommande vivement, Paloma est très agréable. L'appartement est très bien situé, propre et fonctionnel.
Todo según el anuncio. Sumado a eso Paloma es muy atenta y siempre a disposición.
Apartmento muy pequeño, limpio y muy centrico. Paloma muy amable y puntual

very nice and cozy place.
very close to the Atocha Railway station and also to the centre city.
Muy acogedor y super céntrico... Lo recomiendo!  Paloma siempre estuvo atenta al mínimo detalle.
Great location, cute apartment. Had everything we needed. Would recommend. Good bars & restaurants close by & we walked everywhere

Paloma est une hôte réactive, agréable et flexible. Pour les non hispanophones, Paloma parle parfaitement français.
Son appartement est fonctionnel.
Il est parfaitement situé dans Madrid dans un quartier très animé mais dans une rue peu transitée et donc très calme.
Si vous souhaitez passer quelques jours à Madrid, n’hésitez pas à contacter Paloma. Je recommande fortement!
Paloma place is just perfect! highly  recomended.

Conveniently located apartment close to the train station, main museums and the historic center.  Definitely on a small side, but has everything for a comfortable stay. Paloma is a nice, responsive host and provided us with good suggestions for things to do in Madrid. Certainly recommend.

Super agradecido con Paloma, desde el inicio fue super amable y atenta. La casa es chiquita, pero tiene absolutamente todo lo necesario, estas en Madrid, no es para quedarse en la casa. La ubicación de la casa es inmejorable, queda cerca de estaciones de trenes, metros y lugares turísticos. La comida alrededor es sabrosa y calidad precio-valor adecuado.
Sin lugar a dudas, volvería a hospedarme con Paloma en mi próxima estadía en Madrid.

Perfect place And perfect hoste.
Rodrigo is a 5*airbnb member.
He helps you for everything And very reactive when you need something even if you need a football ticket for real Madrid Fc Barcelone ;) !!
The appartement was very clean and the photo as in the website.
I recommand it.

I rented Rodrigo's apartment for my parents, who were visiting us (we live in the neighborhood) from the US. Rodrigo was an extremely attentive and detail-oriented host who did everything he could to accommodate their needs. The apartment is ideal--one of the best things about it is how quiet it is. Lavapiés is a lively neighborhood, and my parents found the apartment incredibly peaceful. Rodrigo provided everything they could need, from a hair dryer to shampoo and even a bottle of wine. My parents loved having a kitchen and washing machine, too. Highly recommended.

Hemos estado unos días maravillosos en Madrid, en un sitio perfecto, en casa de Rodrigo. Un piso tranquilo, acogedor y con unas camas comodisimas. Rodrigo es un anfitrión súper amable, y eso que lo maree mucho con las llaves! Cuando volvamos repetiremos piso y anfitrión. Gracias por todas tus atenciones.

After a taxi drive to the apartment, we were welcomed by Rodrigo and Martin with great hospitality. They explained the available facilities of the apartment in detail and they were very willing to tell us about nearby locations and sights. To boot, they took us on a small walking tour to the nearby supermarket.

Throughout the remainder of our stay, they were always available for questions and to help us with any external problems we encountered.

All in all, Rodrigo and Martin were great hosts, who have an outstanding apartment to offer, which definitely added to our wonderful holiday in Madrid. 10/10 would go there again.

Martin, friend of Rodrigo, arrived on time to welcome us. He provided us with all the help and details on what we could do. The place is clean and the access to all the neighborhoods was just perfect. We could walk to many places on both sides of the town, to the museum and to a lot of restaurants. The apartment is cozy and was quite comfortable for the 3 of us. Plaza down the road has grocery stores, restaurants and easy access to public transport. You may find bunch of kids playing or fooling around in the neighborhood - however they did not bother us

Great location and clean, very comfortable apartment. Courtyard was a nice advantage to this property located in the heart of the city. Martina was waiting to welcome us even though we had a late arrival by train and showed us all that was needed for our stay. Eclectic neighborhood near shops, grocery markets and interesting restaurants, also not a far walk from Reina Sofia and Retiro park. Rodrigo was available immediately for any questions/issues we had. Would highly recommend this property.

Rodrigo and his partners were wonderful hosts. They were attentive from planning our arrival through our departure. They are extremely available and prompt about replying to small or big questions.

I was particularly impressed by their thorough check in with us at the beginning of our stay. They guided me through a check of the internet, air conditioning, etc - to ensure that everything was in working order. Then they followed up with some very good recommendations for the neighborhood.

The apartment is terrific. The courtyard in which it is situated is away from the street, making it private. It has good light, good air conditioning (important in july!), and good space. It is also decked out with everything you could need -- converter, TV, multiple coffee makers.

We had an excellent stay, due to the assistance of Rodrigo and his team. I definitely recommend it.
The neighborhood was great and the apartment was exactly as described. We had a great stay!

The apartment feels really secure and you immediately feel part of the community who live in the nearby apartments, especially when the friendly cat comes to say hello.

Check-in was easy and everything was well explained to us. There is a useful house manual and Rodrigo and Martin are just a call or an email away if you need anything. We really appreciated the little tips from our hosts including which train to catch from the airport, train times and local restaurant recommendations.

Good sized rooms and well equipped kitchen. The large and well stocked supermarket is very close by, as is the metro station.

Good location, close to the museums and Atocha station. We found that Madrid was a beautiful city to walk around and to see the main sights.
Rodrigo Is a very nice and helpful person. The place is very clean and location is very good . Very good enough for three of us^^

Zeer leuke ontvangst gehad door Martin, die ons een zeer uitvoerige uitleg heeft verschaft over het appartement en de buurt. Het is een proper en net appartementje,  groot genoeg voor ons tweetjes. Het ligt in een multiculturele , toffe buurt. Het appartementencomplex is ook zeer rustig. De Metro en een supermarkt liggen vlakbij. Ideaal dus voor ons, en we hebben dan ook genoten van ons verblijf in Madrid. Ik zou het aan ieder koppel willen aanbevelen die een tijdje in Madrid wil doorbrengen.
Excelente ubicación, Rodrigo ha sido muy amable

Rodrigo's Place was great! He and his aunt, Marina, were very welcoming and full of useful information about the area. Speaking of the area, the Lavapiés metro is literally a two minute walk, near the 24-hour Carrefour. Super convenient!
Although located in a vibrant neighborhood, the apartment itself is off the street and stayed peaceful at all hours. The apartment was clean and very comfortable. It was the perfect size for a solo traveler like myself. So perfect, in fact, that I stayed here on two separate occasions!
This place is excellent. Great location and has everything and superquiet. Rodrigo really looks after you and makes sure eyou are ok. Nice touches.like little breakfast and coffee. It's fantastic
Me encanto la atención, el alojamiento es perfecto, limpio, cómodo, buena ubicación y además me dejaron un zumo, vino y magdalenas 😍 totalmente recomendable

Really great experience. The apartment is well equipped, new, and comfortable. The washing machine works flawlessly and the bed is veeeeery comfortable.
The host is very friendly and also communicates effectively, making sure everything is perfect for your stay + giving you many tips, and helping you out with doubts and questions.
100% recommendable.

Lovely hosts! They were very accommodating and kind. Check-in was easy and very flexible and the hosts took the time to send over some great local recommendations. The apartment is very well stocked and perfectly located too. It's close to lots of bars and restaurants (and a few metro stops) while still being quiet and peaceful. You'll have a great time here.

We had an amazing stay there; the apartment was cosy&cute, practical, and with such a central location that it was really easy to wander around town. Our host was really caring and considerate. Would absolutely recommend!

Rodrigo is a super-host!  His flat is perfectly located-we could walk or take the metro to anywhere we wanted to go.  His apartment is charming-well furnished with many amenities- quiet and comfortable.  He was easy to communicate with and helped us find our way around.

Hemos tenido una estancia súper buena!
Martín y Rodrigo son muy amables, comunicados, corteses, nos daron muchas recomendaciones y siempre estaban disponibles como personas de contacto. El apartamento estaba limpio, bonito y muy bien ubicado. 100% recomendable.
Un appartement avec beaucoup de charme, propres, très bien situé. Le propriétaire donne de très bonnes recommandations et il est vraiment là si besoin je recommande.
top

La estancia ha sido simplemente maravillosa. El piso precioso, limpio y ordenado. Martin ha sido extraordinario y nunca había tenido un anfitrión tan amable y tan atento! Dispuesto siempre a ayudar y dar recomendaciones.  Sin duda me encantaría poder hospedarme ahí nuevamente. El barrio con muchisima vida, bares, restaurantes, mercados. Muchas gracias por todo Martín y Rodrigo🙏🏻😊
Die Unterkunft hat alle unsere Erwartungen erfüllt. Wir wurden reichlich mit allen notwendigen Infos für unseren Aufenthalt versorgt.

El apartamento de Rodrigo y Martín es bello, cómodo y práctico. Es fácil sentirse como en casa a los pocos días, ya que todo ha sido pensado para que la estadía sea excelente. El check in y el check out es fácil y práctico. Los anfitriones son unos genios y contestan todas tus dudas rapidísimo. Además, la zona es preciosa. Sin dudarlo, el apartamento es una joyita. La pasamos de diez!

Desde el momento cero, se comunicó con nosotros y estuvo atento para que pudiéramos llegar y entrar al departamento sin problemas. Luego nos brindó cada día recomendaciones de todo tipo para hacer en Madrid, desayunar, cenar, etc.
Nos brindó su hospitalidad de una manera como si su casa fuese la nuestra.
Volveremos sin duda, el mejor alojamiento de nuestro viaje de 36 noches !

Rodrigo and Martín are great hosts ! We had an amazing stay in Madrid. Martin offered a lot of precious recommendations! The flat is very well-located and very well equipped! I strongly recommend this accommodation.

Apartment war genau, wie im Inserat angegeben. Schön ruhig in einem Hinterhofgebäude. Der Hof ist idyllisch und schön mit Weinranken überdeckt. Als Katzenfans haben wir uns auch über die Katze des Nachbarn gefreut. Die Lage des Apartments ist perfekt, da man in wenigen Minuten an der U-Bahn Station Lavapiés ist, viele Restaurants und Cafés fußläufig erreichen kann, ebenso der Supermarkt, welcher 24/7 geöffnet ist, ist nur 3 Gehminuten entfernt.
Die Kommunikation erfolgte mit Martin, welcher auch aus der Ferne immer top erreichbar und super nett war und uns gute Tipps für Aktivitäten in der Stadt gegeben hat aber auch eine Lösung, als der Deckenventilator nicht so wollte wie er sollte. Am Ende wurde uns noch das Taxi zum Flughafen organisiert, auch das hat super geklappt. Volle Weiterempfehlung.

Rodrigo and Martin were extremely helpful and responsive at all hours. They recommended places to see, restaurants to try and also helped with taxi bookings / provided alternate options to and from the airport.
Could not recommend this more!

Appartement idéal situé à Lavapiés, quartier central de Madrid en pleine mutation, près d'un des meilleurs théâtres de la ville. A 30min à pied de Chueca. Rodrigo et Martin sont adorables et envoient plein de messages. Vous avons même eu un petit cadeau... Muchas gracias!

Der Aufenthalt in dieser Wohnung war vom ersten Moment an perfekt. Von der Organisation vor Antritt der Reise über den unkomplizierten Check-in bis zur Bereitstellung vieler, vieler Informationen über Madrid vor Ort waren die Hosts wirklich extrem engagiert, freundlich und unkompliziert.
Die Ausstattung der Wohnung war toll, sie war sauber, Bett gemütlich, Heizung lief, Fenster konnten abgedunkelt werden, es war nachts sehr ruhig, die Lage zwischen 2 U-Bahn-Linien war perfekt, um die Stadt zu erkunden. Das Viertel ist wirklich schön, mir hat definitiv alles rund um Anton Martin und der Markt dort gut gefallen. Richtung Metro Lavapies muss man an ein paar wirklich komischen Gestalten vorbei aber dort haben wir sehr schön gefrühstückt im Pum Pum Café (danke für diesen Tipp!). Zum Museum Reina Sofia sind es 10 min zu Fuß und, wenn man insgesamt gerne zu Fuß unterwegs ist, kann man eigentlich so gut wie alle Sehenswürdigkeiten von hier aus auch perfekt erkunden. Danke Martin & Rodrigo

My cousin and I had a really good time in Madrid. Partly because of the apartment. Its cosy, nice and basically has everything that u need.
The location is also really nice, in the area there are alot of nice small restaurants where u can eat typical spanish food. Its also nearby public transport spots which made it easier to travel around.
Paloma and her husband are great hosts, good in english and easy to communicate with! Would reccomend the apartment to anyone that wants to stay in Madrid for a couple of days.
Greetings Yannick
2명~3명이 묵기에 알맞고 공간도 괜찮았어요!! 그 이상이 들어오면 좁을 수도 있어요!ㅎㅎ진짜 답변도 빨리 해주시고 청결도 좋았고 와이파이도 빵빵하고 수건도 주고 위치도 좋았습니다!! 진짜 아토차 역과 가까워서 바로 렌페 타고 갈 수 있었어요!! 푹ㅡ쉬다가요! 다음에 마드리드에 가게되면 다시 여기 묵을게요! 감사합니다♡

Nette Wohnung, in der Nähe von der Innenstadt!

La localización del apartamento es perfecta para ir a visitar Madrid, todo los sitios importantes se puede llegar a pie perfectamente.
El apartamento estaba muy limpio y todos los servicios funcionaban perfectamente, así pues recomendable 100%.
Por otra parte Paloma es una anfitriona encantadora, dispuesta a ayudar desde el primer minuto.

Este alojamiento se encuentra en una ubicacion perfecta, al lado de todos los museos y al lado de atocha. Paloma es muy atenta y respinde rápidamente a cualquier duda. Muy recomendable pasar algunos dias en Madrid

Es war wirklich absolut alles in Ordnung. Ich war immer super in Kontakt mit Paloma. Das Apartment ist super zentral und man ist in 8 min mit der Bahn in der Innenstadt :) die Zimmer sind super großzügig und man kann sehr gut in den Betten schlafen. Absolut kein Lärm von außen:) also jederzeit wieder, vielen Dank auch nochmals für alles :)

Paloma, очень гостеприимный человек! Она оставила нам конфеты в подарок, всегда была на связи. Расположение удобное, в апартаментах есть все для удобства. Апартаменты подходят для 4-х человек, для 6-х они маленькие.

Pros:
-Fantastic host. Paloma is very accommodating and friendly. She gave us a map and suggestions upon arrival.
-good location. We walked almost everywhere since the apartment is central. Close to many restaurants and a big grocery store.
-kitchen has everything you need
-good value
Cons
-this is a biggie and the reason for the 3 stars. The beds are very uncomfortable. The bigger bed is on the small side, wobbly and uncomfortable. Bad sleep every night leads to exhausted days. Exploring a new city all day is tiring, even more so with bad sleep.

Le logement est très bien situé, tout est accessible à pied. Fonctionnel, très propre, nous y sommes allés à 4 adultes + 1 enfant, c'était exactement ce qu'il nous fallait. Paloma parle en outre parfaitement français et est très réactive par téléphone.
The appartment is perfectly located, everything is reachable by foot without problem. Functional, very neat, we were 4 adults + 1 child hosted, and it was exactly what we needed. Paloma speaks perfectly French and is very reactive by phone.
Gracias por todo!
Convenient
Paloma es muy servicial y atenta. Piso cómodo, acogedor y limpio. Se encuentra muy bien situado. Si vuelvo a Madrid repetiré.
Excelente ubicación y el apartamento es muy cómodo para dos o tres personas. Todo lo que uno necesita!

El apartamento está ubicado en una zona perfecta, además es muy acogedor. Cómodo para vivir un tiempo.
Paloma siempre está pendiente de nosotros y no tarda nada en contestar en caso de necesitarla.

Excellent location!
Nice, clean and quiet apartment. Paloma was very friendly and helpful, great communication and response time.
Highly recommended!
Stayed for 5 months and had a pleasant stay. The house was well equiped, small but not claustrophobic. Well located.
Very great stay in Paloma’s house ! We recommend it !
Paloma estuvimos muy cómodos en tu apartamento. Está cerca de todo. lo recomendamos

appartement bien équipé; moderne et propre.

100% recomiendo este lugar.

It was ok, AC didn’t work tho, and it was really hot
Apartamento sencillo pero cómodo, cerca de todo, se puede ir andando a todos los sitios y a 10 min de Atocha.

Wir hatten einen tollen Aufenthalt. Die Wohnung hat eine tolle Lage und ist ideal für einen Kurztrip in Madrid. Klein aber fein;) Paloma ist zuverlässig zu erreichen und es gibt eine kleine Wand an der Gäste ihre persönlichen Tipps hinterlassen. Einziges Manko, war eine Nachbarin die am späten Nachittag/frühen Abend öfter laut war...dafür kann Paloma aber natürlich nichts:) Würde Sie definitiv weiter empfehlen.

Muy buen departamento, excelente ubicación para moverse por Madrid, metro,buses y estación Atocha a pocos metros, a la vuelta del museo Reina Sofía, un barrio concurrido con lugares para tomar algo y comer, Paloma siempre atenta y pendiente, muy recomendable.

El piso está muy bien situado, en Lavapiés, se puede ir andando a todo. Es pequeño pero muy recogido. Paloma nos recibió muy bien el día de la llegada y nos escribió después para ver qué tal estábamos.
Lo único negativo que puedo decir es el tamaño de la cama de matrimonio, que es súper pequeña de largo, yo he dormido las 4 noches con los pies colgando (mido 1,77).
Por lo demás todo bien!
Paloma is a great host and answers any questions really quickly. The apartment is in a real good location and is really clean and as advertised. I’d highly recommend a stay here!

Apartamento amplio, muy bien ubicado y comunicado.
Polivalente en cuanto a espacios y movimiento de los muebles para crear un salón comedor si es necesario.
Calefacción ideal en meses de invierno !

Appartement très calme et bien situé pour visiter à pied le centre de madrid.
Commerces et restaurants à proximité .
Paloma parle très bien le français et donne des informations sur sa ville
Buen apartamento en muy buena localización. Comunicación fluida con la anfitriona.
Paloma was very helpful. The location is very good and the area is not very loud at night. I enjoyed my stay.

Paloma is a very nice person, always ready to reply before the arrive and also during our stay. The apartment is in a very nice position to visit the city of Madrid. During our stay was very silent during the day and night.
Logement très bien situé pour découvrir Madrid à pied. Paloma était très disponible et nous a donné de bons conseils pour découvrir la ville !

L'appartement de Paloma est très bien situé dans le centre de Madrid, dans un quartier calme, pour visiter la ville.
Musées Prado, Thyssen, Reina Sofia tout à pied. La gare d'Atocha à 2 pas pour aller à Tolède, les bus et métros également.
Petits restaurants et commerces tout près.
Concernant la propreté et le confort tout est nickel. Nous étions 3 adultes.
L'accueil de Paloma est également parfait, toujours à l'écoute. Une adresse à recommander.
Christina séjour du 29 mars au 2 avril 2022.
Super locatie. Vlakbij station en musea. Goede communicatie met Paloma. Schoon en rustige plek
Muy amable y pendiente de la comunicación en todo momento

Appartement très bien situé, très propre et très calme ce qui est un atout à Madrid. Cependant, l'appartement est petit pour 4 adultes et si vous êtes en surpoids ou battis comme des rugbymen, il est à éviter.

A pocos metros de Atocha, y a 2 minutos caminando al Reina Sofía. Edificio silencioso. Todas las comodidades disponibles. Se puede caminar hasta Plaza Mayor o Sol sin problemas o tomar el bus gratis 001 a pocas cuadras.
Would stay again. Great location, helpful host. Very good experience

Nous avons passé un très agréable séjour. L'appartement était idéalement situé pour nous, très propre et pratique, rien à dire! Paloma est une hôte à l'écoute, bienveillante et de très bons conseils. Nous avons adoré notre séjour et recommandons ce logement sans aucune réserve!
Lugar muito silencioso, ideal pra quem quer descansar e também para quem quer desfrutar da cidade, pois tudo está perto.

Paloma's apartment is ideally located. We walked all over Madrid and had a great time! We only took public transportation to go on a few day trips and to travel from and to the airport, so the fact that Puerta de Atocha railway station is only a short walk away, was a big plus. The apartment itself was wonderfully quiet (and despite the heatwave, cool thanks to the air conditioning!) and we absolutely adored the neighbourhood we were in. The amount of places that catered to vegans and celiacs was mindblowing. If you're looking for a place to stay in Madrid, look no further!

Notre séjour était parfait, l'appartement est très bien situé, propre et confortable.
L'accueil de Paloma était chaleureux, merci pour ses conseils, elle parle très bien français.
C'est une adresse que nous recommenderons à nos amis
Piso excelentemente ubicado, cerca de metro y cercanias. Una gran experiencia
no tengo ninguna queja,espectacular la propietaria muy atenta a nosotros. muy buena persona

El apartamento es muy lindo, tiene todo y una ubicación excelente. El trato de Paloma fue muy atento y cordial. Seguramente vuelva en mi próximo viaje.
;)
Apartamento pequeño pero acogedor. Paloma estuvo atenta en todo momento y nos ayudó a una estancia más agradable.

The location of this AirBNB is unbeatable. It’s a short walk to several types of public transit, has a full Carrefour nearby for necessities, and is very close to world-class art museums. Very walkable neighborhood, lots of good restaurants around.
The apartment is compact, mostly comfortable (see below), and it’s lovely to have a kitchen and living area available. The building has an elevator, though the apartment is only 1 floor up. Only drawback is that the bathroom, namely the shower, is very small. The shower head is low (I’m 1.53m/5’9”) and the space itself is barely enough to turn around in.
Travelers should carefully review the house rules. There are several and the hostess is specific with the care of the property. Our arrival walk-through was thorough, arguably excessively so for travel-weary guests eager to settle in. That said, Paloma’s responses are timely and she knows the neighborhood well.
Très bon logement. Très bien placé. paloma est adorable et très disponible. Merci beaucoup.

We really enjoyed our stay in Madrid and Paloma and her apartment were a big part of that. The location of the apartment is very convenient, there are three different metro lines nearby and a 24hr open supermarket.  Also it is very easy to walk to most of the major sights of the city.  Paloma was exceptionally nice and helpful to us, even offered an earlier check in for free.🙂 I can 100% recommend staying in her apartment and I hope we can come back in the future. 🙂👍 Muchas gracias!

Relación calidad precio buena, Paloma nos atendió muy correctamente y con todo tipo de observaciones y recomendaciones, el apartamento muy limpio y correcto, la ubicación del apartamento muy recomendable puedes ir a pie a todas partes de interés, también dos entradas de metro cercanas, lavapies ( carrefour express 24h) y estación del arte, museo Reina Sofía en la misma manzana y el Prado muy cerca también junto con el Parque del Retiro y jardín Botánico, Estación de Atocha a 650 m, puedes ir caminando, hemos quedado muy satisfechos, espero que os sirva de ayuda, un saludo.
Paloma was kind and responsive. The apartment was in a nice location and very clean.
Paloma is an amazing host! The place is very well located and we enjoyed our stay there very much. It was a very positive experience :) I would definitely stay again!
Great location, Paloma was very responsive and helpful, great stay!

L'appartement est fonctionnel et propre, avec un souci de décoration soignée et agréable. Nous étions 4 adultes et cela convenait bien (sans doute petit pour 6 ...)
La localisation est très intéressante pour ceux qui aiment les musées (à 2 pas du Passeo del Arte).

El apartamento es cómodo y en magnífico estado.  Cerca de restaurantes, museos, lugares de interés, supermercados, farmacias y estación del tren.  Tuvimos una situación que no tuvo que ver con el apartamento y estuvimos en comunicación con Paloma, quien nos mantuvo al tanto, hasta que quedó aclarado.
O apartamento está bem localizado, muito perto do centro e do metro. Paloma foi muito simpática, fez-nos sentir em casa.
Magnífico apartamento cercano a las mejores atracciones, museos, restaurantes y cerca de estación del tren.

Paloma è un'host gentilissima e molto disponibile. La casa ha spazi più piccoli di quanto ci eravamo immaginati guardando le foto e il fatto di avere un solo split del condizionatore obbliga a tenere le porte aperte tra le stanze. La posizione è comodissima a tutte le principali attrazioni di Madrid e ben servita da metro, treni e ristoranti. L'asciugatrice non è presente e purtroppo abbiamo sofferto di allergia dovuta agli acari della polvere. Ottima la presenza di lettino per i bimbi e di tutto il necessario in cucina e nel bagno.

Great place for us on a one week stay. Apartment is extremely well located in Lavapies, short walks from public transport, Atocha, art galleries, tapas etc. 15m walk to Plaza Mayor.
Everything as advertised. Very well equipped kitchen, good beds and bathroom, shower is small as per photos.
Gracias Paloma!

Best place you can stay in Madrid! Paloma was very kind and very responsive. Due to our flight we had a very late check in but she was willing to work with us. The apartment is clean and stocked with everything you need. It even had air conditioning. It’s located right in the middle of everything with a big grocery store near by and excellent food and drinks right around the corner. Paloma gave plenty of recommendations for the city and helped us however she could. I can’t recommend this place enough!

Paloman asunnolla on erinomainen sijainti. Sieltä on kävelymatka suurimpiin museoihin ja muutenkin erinomaiset yhteydet.
Asunto on jokseenkin karu. Olohuoneessa ainoastaan vuodesohva ja ikkunat naapuritalon seinään, mutta emme asunnossa viettäneetkään kuin yöt.
3 henkilöä asuu asunnossa erittäin mukavasti, mutta isommalle porukalle asunto on mielestäni ahdas.
Paloma on erittäin ystävällinen ja avulias. Hän vastasi nopeasti viesteihin!
Good location, tiny specially the shower. Disappointed that basics like tea/ coffee or washing machine powder not provided

Nous sommes venus à Madrird avec une collègue pour des raisons professionnelles. Nous avons apprécié l'accueil que nous a réservé Paloma avec un appartement très bien distribué entre les espaces de chacun et les espaces communs. Le réseau WiFi nous a permis de faire une visoconference.
L'endroit était au premier étage, l'appartement n'est pas très lumineux mais il est vraiment très au calme. De plus, l'appartement est géographiquement idéalement situé étant à la jonction entre deux ambiances à 2 pas de l'appartement. D'un côté, un quartier très vivant, dynamique et animé où l'on trouve plein d'endroit poir manger, boire des verres et sortir. De l'autre côté, un quartier culturel avec le musée de la Reina Sofia quasi au bout de la rue.
Donc nous avons passé un formidable séjour à Madrid et nous gardons bien précieusement l'adresse de Paloma pour recommander à nos amis et y revenir vite. Une adresse et une hôtesse idéale !

Paloma was quick to answer any questions and gave good advises about the area.
The apartment is a bit dark since the windows face the very narrow court yard where the sun doesn’t reach.
The apartment had everything we needed and it was very nice with basic needs as oil, salt, pepper etc in the kitchen.

O apartamento da Paloma é lindo! Muito limpo e organizado. É pequeno mas super confortável, cozinha bem equipada e tem várias dicas de lugares para comer e visitar além de revistas atuais da movida em Madrid.
A localização é ótima super perto de duas estações de metrô , tem vários restaurante e mercados perto além de estar bem perto dos museus mais emblemáticos de Madrid.
A comunicação com a Paloma é muito fácil e rápida ! Super recomendo para que estiver indo a Madrid!

A mitad de camino (15 minutos de paseo) entre la Plaza Mayor y el Parque del Retiro. Cerca de los grandes Museos. Paloma es muy receptiva y responde ante cualquier circunstancia. La casa es pequeña, acogedora y tranquila, con todo lo necesario para una buena estancia. Las camas son cómodas, y el baño funciona bien. Lo recomendamos.
apartament situat într-o zonă centrală și accesibila

La estancia en el piso de Paloma ha sido maravillosa. un piso pequeñito pero super limpio y ordenado. Se nota que Paloma cuida el piso por la cantidad de detallitos que tiene por la casa. Paloma ha estado muy atenta a nosotros y muy facilitadora. No hemos tenido que usar apenas el metro por lo céntrico que está el piso. Trataré de repetir el piso cuando vuelva a Madrid.
sfortunatamente Il riscaldamento non funzionava. paloma è stata molto gentile e disponibile nel cercare una soluzione ma non è stato sufficiente. grazie comunque

Paloma una Genia!!!! Se preocupo por nosotros. Su calidez y sus consejos nos sirvieron mucho en nuestra estadia. El departamento es extremadamente comodo, con todo lo necesario. Mucha tranquilidad, y excelente la temperatura. Las camas, colchones, sabanas y acolchados perfectos.  Y ademas la ibicacion es Perfecta. Gracias Paloma. super recomendable. Volveremos pronto!
La anfitriona muy agradable y el piso muy bonito y bien ubicado
Paloma was a fabulous and helpful host. The apartment is lovely and clean and was perfect for our stay in Madrid. Perfect location too. Thanks Paloma 😁

Paloma çok iyi bir ev sahibiydi oncesi ve sonrasinda güzel iletişim kurdu. Evin konumu , metroya yürüme mesafesinde tren istasyonuna yürüme mesafesindeydi harikaydı. Ev ile ilgili tek elestirim kucuk odadaki yatak rahat degildi. Salondaki kanepe büyuk ve konforlu olsa o sorunda çözülür diye dusunuyorum. Son söz olarak fiyat ve merkezi konumu ile ihtiyacimizi karsiladi hersey icin tesekkurler Paloma 😊
he estado un mes y he estado muy a gusto. Paloma ha estado pendiente en todo momento por si necesitaba algo. Ha sido un placer y si vuelvo a Madrid volvería a ir al piso de Paloma. Muy recomendable

O espaço tem excelente localização,   principal ponto positivo. E a Paloma, muito amigável e simpática. Encontra vários equipamentos para atender suas necessidades do dia a dia, como espaço para as malas e roupas.

Paloma is a great host, always responsive and making sure that the guests have a comfortable stay. The location is great, within walking distance from the most important museums and Atocha station. Lots of restaurants and cafes around the place as well.

Bon séjour à Madrid. Appartement très bien placé avec un tout à pied très appréciable.
Accueil sympathique de Paloma qui est disponible.
I love the location of this airbnb. It is very close to Atocha Train Station which I used a lot. It is close to other metro stations and other Madrid sites.

Nous avons passé un excellent séjour dans l'appartement de Paloma, lequel est calme et confortable. Paloma s'est montrée disponible pour nous accueillir et nous conseiller des adresses et choses à faire à Madrid, et la communication durant le séjour a été optimale. Nous reviendrons !

Paloma’s charming two bedroom apartment was close to all the major attractions and a 10 minutes walk from the Atocha train station. She showed us where the grocery store was at as well as a good coffee shop shop on the same street. We would stay there again when in Madrid.
Great place and great host.

Este alojamiento está en una excelente ubicación, a 5 minutos caminando del Museo Reina Sofía.
Céntrico para llegar a todos los puntos de interés.
Paloma, siempre al pendiente y muy atenta.
Paloma was very helpful when we checked in; the location and apartment were perfect!

Nice small apartment in a really cool interesting area in Madrid. Lavapiés has a lot of lovely places to eat and drink and there are good transport links with buses, metro and taxi. I was able to go for jogs in the morning at the parque de el retiro. It was super hot when we went in July but we were able to stay cool in the apartment. Our host was very kind and welcoming and we felt cared for. Would definitely stay again.
The host was amazing, she welcomed us and told us about all the things that we can do in the city.
Thanks for everything

Overall the apartment was nice but plain, the shower is really small even for spanish standards.
Thanks for all the sightseeing recommendations!
Buena anfitriona

This was a gorgeous and very clean apartment in a lovely neighborhood. It is very close to the metro but we ended up walking everywhere because it is conveniently located.  Pau&Patricia were extremely helpful as well. I strongly recommend staying in this apartment!  Thanks again for everything!

I absolutely LOVED the cozy apartment in Malasaña! The place itself had all the necessary amenities, and was a lovely place to stay. The interior decorating was great, as was the location. Malasaña is such a charming neighborhood. I would absolutely recommend this apartment to anyone visiting Madrid.

Very cosy, clean and convenient appartment in one of the nicest, livelies neighbourhoods in Madrid. Very friendly and helpful owner.

The appartment is located in a street with a lot of nice bars, so it can be pretty noisy at night, but the windows are very well isolated and with earplugs in I had a good nightrest.

I have already recommended the appartment this appartment as a place to stay when visiting Madrid.

This apartment was perfect. It was located right in the heart of Malsaña which is a super lively neighborhood with tons of great restaurants and bars. The apartment had everything and was very clean, cute and perfectly located. It is less than a block away from the metro but it´s also easy to get to all the other main attractions and areas of Madrid by foot. The owners were lovely and extremely helpful. Pau gave us a great overview of Madrid complete with recommendations of the best restaurants in the area. They went out of their way to make sure we had a good trip and were extremely accommodating.

We stayed in this apartment for 3 nights. It's clean, has nice balconies, everything you need for the life and it's so cozy!) On weekends the nightlife around the place is awesome and during the week is quite.
Pau was very attentive to us and helpfull. We would definitely come back for a longer period) Thanks for everything!

Our stay at this apartment in Malasana was wonderful! My husband and I are in our early 30s and live in Greenwich Village in Manhattan. We chose this apartment because we heard that this neighborhood was a hip area in Madrid, far enough away from the busy tourist center, but close enough to walk everywhere. We were not disappointed!
Pau was great. When we arrived at the airport, one of our bags was lost, so our arrival time at the apartment was about 2 hours later than originally planned. He was accommodating and understanding. When we finally got to the apartment, he showed us everything we needed to know, and gave us a map and neighborhood information, including some great places to grab a bite. All great recommendations.
The apartment was clean, comfortable, and cozy. It was a good size and was nicely decorated. The full length window that opened to a small balcony area was an added bonus and kept the apartment cool.
Overall, our experience couldn't have been better. Thanks Pau for everything!
Great place to stay for city break in Madrid. Pau & Paula both great hosts, gave us good recommendations on where to visit and eat. Muchas gracias!

Madrid was our last city in Spain and we finish our trip with a golden key. We find lots of interesting places and walked a lot! Pau and Patricia's place was very important in our stay. First of all, the house is very good: a huge kitchen, very nice bed and shower. And it was very clean! The location, besides to be very next to the subway, is in a very funy neighborhood, full of young people and a lot of places to eat and drink! Pau was very kind in our reception and gave us a lot of informations! We enjoyed very much our stay in Madrid and staying in Pau's place was a key point!

We had a wonderful time staying at Pau and Patrica's. They had all the essential needs and Pau is a wealth of information to create a very local traditional stay. They were very accomadating with all our needs and very attentive. Will come again and stay in the future. Thank you!

This apartment was the last place we stayed at the end of a month-long trip around Spain and Portugal. It was absolutely perfect.
We loved the neighborhood, how walkable everything was. We walked everywhere, not even using the metro except to get to the airport. There were so many good restaurants and cute shops right around the corner.
The apartment itself was ideal for us, small, cozy, but with plenty of space for two people. The bed was comfortable, the shower hot, and the kitchen stocked with everything we needed.
Great apartment in great area. Just outside the main town and tourist areas with good local restaurants, bars and cafes with short trip to centre of Madrid. Host very helpful and nice. Go stay!!

This apartment is such a fantastic deal. Clean, spacious, and centrally located, it's on a quiet and attractive block within 5 minutes of two major metro entrances, a host of cafes and coffeeshops, a large market, and some of Madrid's busiest but lowkey plazas and terrazas. It's a place to see the sights and then come home to relax. If you're wondering which neighborhood to stay in while visiting Madrid, this is it. Pau and Patricia were fantastic hosts who were flexible, informative, and genuinely interested in making sure I had the best time possible in their city. They were ready with tips and maps as soon as I got to the apartment. The kitchen is well-stocked with anything you need, the bedroom is large and comfortable, and the living room and dining room are great places to unwind after a long day out. I'd recommend this apartment to anyone looking for a home away from home on their vacation.

This is a beautiful apartment! From the moment I walked in, I knew I would love it and it did not disappoint. The first afternoon a Spanish guitarist and a few singers who apparently sometimes rent the apartment across the street had a rehearsal. I had both balcony windows opened and just relaxed on the couch listening for an hour or more. Beautiful!

The apartment is spacious, clean and most importantly, bright. It is in the heart of Malasaña so there are a million interesting little bars, coffee shops and bookstores around. Weeknights are definitely the best because there are a lot of people in the streets on the weekend. However, with the shutters and windows closed and a fan going for white noise, I couldn't hear anything and slept fine even on the most crowded of nights. I was concerned that it would be hot, but with the fan, I actually needed covers. This was when the temperature was around 90F, during the day and still warm at night.

I met Pau and had a couple of great conversations with him. He's an interesting and engaging conversationalist and it was a real pleasure talking with him.

I would definitely recommend this place!

I had one of my best Airbnb experiences at Pau&Patricia's apartment, and would highly recommend it.

Pau met us at the apartment during our late check-in, and welcomed us into his home. He had maps and recommendations prepared for us, and was ever so helpful. He made sure everything was taken care of, before leaving, and was easy to contact during our stay.

The pictures of the listing really don't do justice. It felt like home staying in this place. The apartment was clean and had everything we needed. I loved it here. You get the experience of living "a day in the life" of a local living in

Pau's recommendations on restaurants and places to go single-handedly made our experience in Madrid. He has a great taste in restaurants. La Cocina was my favourite. I wish we had more time to try them all.

The location was perfect, right down the street from a metro station, and some grocery stores. There is a bar right beside the apartment, but we never had any issue with noise or crowds. Wifi and laundry machine in the apartment worked great, no issues.

Make sure to turn on the radio (ask Pau what his favourite station is). Great music.

Make sure you learn how to open the door with the key, it's a little different in Europe, and takes some getting used to.

Very nice flat in the best area of Madrid.
Pau & Patricia are awesome, full of tips and good ideas for your trip !
I recommend !!

Such a beautiful apartment in what is now one of my favorite neighborhoods in the world. Incredibly close to the metro, shops, restaurants, and bars! It gets a little noisy at night, but my sister and I slept just fine. Pau's suggestions were fantastic... I'll have to try some of the other places on his list the next time I'm in Madrid. He was also very, very accommodating after our flight was delayed three hours.

What a wonderful apartment in a beautiful city!!! We only met Pau who was wonderful and very helpful. When we arrived, he showed us the apartment and gave us a map of the city and showed us where to go and how to get there. During our stay he even emailed us a list of more places to visit and restaurants in the area. He also gave me a list of vegetarian restaurants to try (again, very helpful).

As for the apartment, it's only about 2 blocks from the metro (no need for a car!) in a wonderful and safe neighborhood. You can also walk to the neighborhood plaza/park, restaurants, and markets.
