The apartment is very clean, bright, and has everything you need in it (pots, pans, toaster, coffee maker...)- the Internet connection works well, too! The towels and sheets are clean and the bed, sofa bed, and pillows are comfortable. If you keep the widows closed and the shutters closed while you're out during the day exploring the city, the apartment stays cool (even in June!!). The street below can get a bit noisy at night, but it didn't really bother us - if you close the windows it keeps the noise out.

The apartment is a true gem in an incredible city. If I'm ever in Madrid again, I'll definitely stay in Pau and Patricia's apartment again.

Nos sentimos muy bien acogidos, tanto por ellos como por la casa.
Todo impecable. Nuevo y límpísimo.
Muy buenas vibraciones.
La cama un 10.

El bárrio está ideal. Céntrico, moderno y muy alegre.
La gente de Madrid suele ser muy amable y educada.

Volverémos a Madrid y con un poco de suerte a este mismo apartamento.

Unfortunately, we arrived the day after Spain won the European Soccer Cup and Madrid was iin the midst of celebrations. Consequently, we circled the city for an hour as the police redirected traffic. Parking was very difficult to find as a result.  We finally arrived at the accommodation where Pau helped us with our cases to the second floor. The accommodation was adequate and centrally located, although very noisy, especially at night.  Unfortunately,  there was no breakfast. Fran and David.
Great apartment in a fantastic area. Pau was very helpful and informative when we arrived. Madrid is awesome.

We had a fabulous time in this charming Malasana apartment. Bright, airy, with a fabulous kitchen and bathroom, we especially enjoyed the little terraces off the lounge and bedroom. It was wonderful to sleep with the windows open to the sounds of the city. If you're a light sleeper or aren't used to city sounds, this might not be the best place for you as the high buildings on this narrow street do tend to echo the occasional car or truck driving through. For anyone else, though, this place is a total gem (very clean and just steps from the metro). Pau and Patricia couldn't have been nicer either, being very reachable before, during, and after our stay, and so agreeable in meeting us late on a Sunday evening. We definitely plan to return to Madrid and to stay here again!

We had a fantastic time in this apartment and it was a perfect way to see Madrid and be comfortable after getting in from the US that morning.  Pau was super friendly and helpful and had great suggestions as well as a suggestion book for things to do in the city.  The apartment was spotless and we loved the windows that looked out onto the street.  It was noisy, but we loved hearing life outside as we dozed.  It stayed very cool with the breeze and windows open. And the internet worked wonderfully.  Thank you for making our stay in Madrid wonderful!

Extremely kind and accommodating, even when I arrived earlier than expected! Great clean apartment located in one of Madrid's best neighbourhoods. Great bar and resto recommendations from Pau. Hope to be back soon!

Our stay at Pau & Patricia's place was a great experience! This was the first time we used AIRBNB and we were glad we did.
Pau really had prepared himselves well with lots of information about the city.
If you want to experience Madrid as a real native persoon, this isTHE PLACE TO BE!!!

Our stay in Pau's and Patricia's (P&P) aparment was excellent.

Even before our arrival P&P were quick to respond to my email and they provided me with directions from the train station so it was easy to find the place.

Once we arrived Pau met us at the apartment, showed us everything and left us with a binder of detailed recommendations of nearby places to eat, drink and have fun. Then he followed up with us later in the day via email offering more recommendations and checking if we needed anything. We had his number handy but didn't need to call him since we had no issues at all.

The apartment is not big (cozy is the word) but it is very clean and comfortable to stay in. There's a fully-stacked kitchnen and a washing machine (which makes a big difference after a week plus of travel). The location is amazing - right in the centre with lots of attractions within walking distance. The neighbours might be heard a bit too well at time (including some late hours of the night / early hours of the morning) but that's Madrid for you. The city seems to have its own unique "full of life" atmosphere where it's a hard to distinguish week days from weekends since almost all the time (siesta time excluded, maybe) people seem to be hanging our in cafes and bars or just (loudly) living their life at home.

Long story short: we loved our stay in Madrid. The apartment is great, the location is excellent, and the city is unforgettable. We would love to come back one day.

I had a lovely stay in the apartment of Pau & Patricia. The apartment was great and had everything I could of wished for. Pau & Patricia were very friendly and gave me lots of advice about being a visitor in Madrid. Also the price I paid was very reasonable. I would definitely stay there again and would have no problem recommending this apartment.

Emma

Ci siamo trovati benissimo,
la casa era confortevole e molto pulita, avevamo tutto a disposizione
Paul è stato molto gentile consigliandoci i luoghi dove mangiare o passare la notte, il quartiere secondo me merita di essere vissuto, e contrariamente a quando si dice con le porte chiuse non si sentono rumori o schiamazzi notturni grazie mille paul!!!!


p.s. Consigliatissimo!!!!!!

Pau & Patricia's place is a spacious, comfortable flat right in the heart of Madrid. You can truly walk everywhere from this location, and I happily did. However, a major metro stop is only 1 block away, so it's also very convenient to take the metro if you prefer.

The apartment has all the amenities you need, including a washer/dryer which was very nice for me after 2 weeks of travel. I used the kitchen a lot and it is stocked with pots and pans, silverware, and a very efficient cook-top. The bed is amazingly comfortable and even though you are on a busy street, it's easy to block the noise out with the window shutters.

Pau was very nice upon my arrival. He showed me the flat and gave me a lot of maps and information regarding Madrid. I had a great time in Madrid and would definitely stay at Pau & Patricia's place again!

If you are looking for a quiet and secluded place stay then this isn't the place for you but if you are looking for a dynamic experience of Spanish life in a cool neighbourhood then you will be in bliss. The apartment is right on the street and on a Saturday night the joint jumps but it is an exciting part of town packed with cool bars, restaurants ad stores of all kinds. The flat is really well set up and is perfectly suited to travellers who like to do some self catering and clothes washing.
Patricia was in touch by email well in advance of our stay and Pau met us at the arranged time and gave us plenty of really valuable advice about what we could do within our timeframe of our stay and then followed up via email with additional information and recommendations. A perfect and generous host. For us this was the best AirBNB experience we in Spain (of 3) and we would recommend this apartment to the right match of traveller as the perfect package.

Really lovely apartment in a GREAT part of Madrid. Pau was wonderful - he was very good at communicating with us and met our every need -gave us very helpful information, including great places to eat, which were great!  We were 4 and it was cosy but absolutely fine. Nice to have a clean,apartment with taste and character.  There is a small bar on the ground floor but we had ear plugs and did not find the noise a problem at all.  I would recommend this apartment - great quirky shops near by, metro very close and Prado etc only 20 min walk.

Pau and Patricia's place is awesome! It's in a fantastic, cool neighborhood with tons to do, and very centrally located so within walking distance to La Latina, Sol and various museums. It's also near the metro station Tribunal, and walking distance to many other lines.

Be sure to explore the neighborhood - it's a gold mine of excellent restaurants and cool bars. Pau was a very gracious host, despite our somewhat vague arrival time (we were driving), and had a whole packet of restaurant, bar and other recommendations. As other reviewers noted the street can be noisy, but with the windows fully closed it didn't keep us from sleeping.

We loved staying here, and wish we lived in their great apartment!
Great!  Wonderful host; wonderful apartment; wonderful location - what else can we say!

I only met Pau but he was beyond helpful and sweet! He met me at the apartment when I arrived and gave me many recommendations. He could not be nicer! The apartment is beautiful and the location could not be better. 2 beautiful balconies overlooking malasana streets. I felt like I was in New Orleans.

Everything was perfect. Thanks Pau and Patricia!

Our stay was perfect at Pau and Patricia's Apartment.
The apartment is very comfortable, great welcome with many information to help us enjoy our stay, possibility to cook, to make coffee... Very nice and recommended places to stay. Centrally located, closed to the subway, many restaurants and bars around... Nice area... Just one thing to know, don't forget your earplugs because the street can be noisy at night with the bars... Great experience in Madrid, we'll come back !

We stayed at Pau and Patricia's apartment for 3 days in Nov. Pau has been very helpful and communicative. He gave us a lot of tips on Madrid attractive locations, restaurants, coffee shops, markets and many others. Malasana is a very nice, lively, attractive and alternative area. We really loved going around in Malasana and enjoyed the nice atmosphere.
We really liked the apartment, where everything is available and the kitchen is perfect for making food.
We definitely recommend you to stay at this cozy apartment.

Me and my partner stayed for 2 days in the appartment and absolutely loved it. It has everything one needs and the location is perfect - everything is within a walking distance and the area is very vibrant, too. Also, Pau greeted us in the flat with lots of suggestions and tips on Madrid. As we were leaving Madrid on the evening of the second day Pau was very kind to let us stay/leave our luggage until our flight.
Would recommend this appartment for a couple or 2-3 open minded friends willing to explore Malasana and Chueca - wonderful neighbourhoods!

We stayed in the flat for 3 nights and it was perfect for a couple. The flat was very clean, spacious and comfortable. The location is great- it reminded us of East London- lots of cool little bars and places to eat. Finally, Pau and Patricia were very accommodating hosts and were very flexible. We would definitely stay again and recommend to anyone looking for a fun experience in Madrid.

Great experience! The apartment is really nice and cozy, and has all the comforts (heating, internet, good sound system for music etc.). Also, very clean and functional. The location is great as the neighborhood is very lively and rich with interesting places and nightlife. the street is a little noisy at night (and very quiet in the morning) so recommended for those who want to enjoy madrid by night. Pau is a great host, offering assistance, information and useful maps and recommendations. Definitely thumbs up!

Great, as advertised, apartment in a fantastic and lively neighborhood. Great value, clean, well-equipped, easy access to public transport and in walking distance to plenty of central spots, nightlife, etc. Pau really could not have been a better host; super-helpful and accommodating, with prompt follow-up and lots of tailored suggestions and recommendations for nearby sights, restaurants, cafes, etc. Wonderful experience overall, highly recommended and would definitely visit again.

I was in Madrid for work. Normally I take a hotel, but this place was much better. It is a clean appartment in a nice neighbourhood. Good bed, good shower and fast internet. I had a comfortable and productive time, and good information from Pau about the good spots in Malasaña.

We spent a really nice weekend on Dec 2012, with our two little daughters.
The apartment is located in the city center, in Malasaña neighborhood, the coolest in Madrid.
The street is very quiet, we all could sleep without any problem of noise. It has all facilities that you may need.
They were really charm, it was very easy to contact with them.
For sure it will be our option when we will come back to Madrid

This was a great apartment for us to rent.  Pau is a wonderful host who gives his guests maps and directions, restaurant recommendations, cultural attractions, etc. For non-Spanish speakers, Pau's English is excellent.  The apartment was very clean and quite comfortable.  It is also only a block from a metro station, Tribunal, from which you can reach that railroad center, Atocha Station, in ten minutes.  We thoroughly enjoyed our stay in this very interesting central neighborhood in Madrid.

Pau&Patricia were the perfect hosts!
They were very helpful although we arrived earlier than we noted them.
Everything was ready in the apartment for cooking and relaxing, and the location was in good distance for walking around Madird.
Thanks a lot!

My family visited me in Madrid for Christmas and we chose the right apartment. Everything you need on a normal stay was there: kitchen tools, blankets, internet etc.
They arrived with a lot of delay and there was no problem in changing the check-in time and we got a good explanation with loads of recommendations for Madrid.

We had a really great stay at the apartment!

Olá! Gostaria primeiramente em me desculpar pela demora em comentar a nossa experiência no apartamento de Pau&Patricia!
Eu e meu marido Marcos passamos bons momentos neste apartamento. Ele estava muito limpo, banheiro com chuveiro muito bom, na cozinha havia tudo o que precisávamos para nossas refeições, wifi com boa conexão. A rua é pouco barulhenta a noite, mas não nos incomodou porque chegávamos exaustou, e também era época de festas. Pau foi muito atencioso e prestativo conosco, nos deu muitas dicas e durante nossa estadia enviou mais dicas que nos foram muito úteis. Só temos a agradecer e com certeza recomendamos este apartamento e voltaríamos a ficar nele.
Gratos Rosane e Marcos.
Great place very comfortable and close to everithingh, Pau is very helpfull and acomodating. I would recomend this stay to anyone and when I go back to Madrid willbstay here again

Fantastic apartment in the best location. The place is fully equipped with anything you need, 2 minutes from the Metro station and Pau has been very helpful and flexible throughout our staying. Definitely recommended!

Lo pasamos muy bien en Madrid. El apartamento de Malasaña está muy bien situado, en una zona con mucho ambiente y con muchos sitios a los que se puede acceder a pie. Es un apartamento acogedor y está muy limpio. Es ideal para 2 personas, aunque nosotras éramos 4 y estuvimos muy bien también. Los anfitriones son muy agradables y se preocupan mucho de que todo sea correcto y la gente esté a gusto.

What a wonderful apartment, host, and neighborhood.  The apartment is an ideal size for a couple or small group traveling together, and is warmly decorated and perfectly clean.  Pau made our stay better by providing a useful listing of his family's personal suggestions for things to do and places to eat and drink around the neighborhood and the city.  His suggestions were better than most travel guides!  Finally, the Malasana neighborhood is fantastic.  So many great bars, restaurants and cafes were within a minute's walk, and the neighborhood was lively and fun.

Muchas gracias Pau! Lydia y yo estamos encantados. El apartamento es genial, muy limpio, perfectamente acondicionado y sobretodo ubicado en pleno centro de Madrid, eso me ha venido fenomenal estos días allí,...

Pau es un anfitrión estupendo, bastante atento de nuestras necesidades, facilitándonos toda la información necesaria para que nuestra estancia fuera genial.

Espero tener que volver a Madrid y disfrutar de nuevo de un lugar como este!

Gracias!

El apartamento me pareció ideal para una pareja, muy limpio, cómodo y acogedor, en un barrio que me encanta, y Pau fue muy puntual y atento. Nos gustaron mucho sus recomendaciones de restaurantes, etc. por la zona. El barrio es un poco ruidoso por la noche (por lo menos los fines de semana), por lo que no es el ideal para los que sean más delicados para dormir. Nosotros, sin embargo, dormimos muy bien y desde luego que repetiríamos.
Se han comportado de maravilla y con mil atenciones, el piso limpio y bien situado, aunque un poco de follón por las noches debido a la zona, muy recomendable!

Second time staying at Pau and Patricia's place, and just as nice and easy as the first time. Great apartment in a great location, well-maintained, and very helpful, communicative, and friendly hosts. Highly recommended if you're looking for a nice and reliable place in Malasana.

We've had a fantastic time at Pau & Patricia's place! The apartment is really comfortable and clean. The Malasana area is really nice to explore - there are lots of cafes, bars, restaurants and little shops around the corner. We used a lot of the suggestions Pau gave us and got loads of really great food! Would definitely recommend it!!

we had an excellent stay at Patricia&Pau app in Malasana. Great app in perfect place. Pau were very helpfull- gave us very usefull advices! He looked after us that was very charming. Strongly recommended!

Beautiful flat right in the heart of Malasaña! Pau and Patricia were very attentive and their tips of what to do, where to go, where to eat etc are fantastic... especially Bodega de la Ardosa (thank you for introducing me to that place and their food!) A very pleasant stay, will use them again when have friends and family coming to stay. Couldn't recommend them enough!

The apartment of Pau and Patricia is very well located! Malasana is a great area with lots of cozy bars with great atmosphere! The apartment is big enough for two, its clean and cozy. Pau gave us a lot of insider info during our stay. Definately a place to recommend!

We've had a great stay in Pau&Patricia's flat. It's very well located in the heart of Malassana so everything is very close by. the flat is perfect for two people and Pau has provided us with very usefull tips during all our stay.
I will definitely pick this flat again when I go back to Madrid.
Patricia is a great person, I didn't have any problem with her and she always there to help you. The location is perfect, I really liked.
Nice apartment in a great spot. It's close to all the bars and restaurants in the Malasana area. We also got some great tips on where to go for tapas and brunch/breakfast. Thanks for a lovely stay.

Exceptional stay at calle de las palmas. Pau was a superb host, helpful with local and logistical information. The location couldn't be better for access to local bars, restaurants and museums. The location is so good, it means many people on the street Friday nights and holidays which is noisy, but still worth the location! Malasana is a perfect blend of old and new Madrid.

We stayed at Pau & Patricia's in May and had a great time. The flat is ideally located, very easy to get to from the airport, and within walking distance of lots of bars, shops and the galleries.
Pau & Patricia also took the time to give us a list of recommendations and local tips, which we followed and had a great time. Overall a brilliant stay

We stayed for 4 days in Pau & Patricia`s apartment in Malasaña. It was our first experience with AirBnB and we never expected it to be so good!
The flat is easy to find coming from the airport, in walking distance to lots of bars and restaurants and very spacious for 2 people!

Pau already expected us when we arrived late in the evening, and he gave us a full introduction to what Madrid has to offer. Throughout our stay, he provided us with lots of great tips on where to go and how to discover even more of his city. Thanks for a lovely stay!

May 2013

Tuvimos la oportunidad de conocer a Patricia que fue una gran anfitriona. El apartamento es sumamente acogedor que hace que estés como si estuvieras en tu propia casa. Estaba en impecable condiciones de limpieza y sumado a su ubicación lo hace un sitio sumamente recomendable. Lamentablemente por una cancelación de vuelos tuvimos que partir antes de lo esperado quedandonos con lástima de no poder permanercer allí mas tiempo.
GRACIAS PATRICIA

Thank you, Pau and Patricia for sharing your terrific apartment with us even though our stay was far too short! We were on the tail end of our two week visit to Spain and returned to Madrid for the last two nights before flying home. From the warm welcome we received upon arrival -- to the detailed information you provided us about places to go, things to do and sights to see in and around Madrid -- and finally to the caring nature you showed us to ensure we enjoyed our stay -- your apartment exceeded our expectations in every way and was perfectly situated in Malasaña. Our daughter read with interest about all of the recommendations you left in the apartment. She is looking forward to exploring many of your suggestions.

Pau, you are the consummate host and we feel fortunate to have met you! We hope to visit our daughter, again, and look forward to a return stay in your apartment. We loved your beautiful city!

Pau greeted us on our arrival and showed us around the beautiful apartment. He was full of great information about where to go and what to do in Madrid, you can tell he really loves the city. He was very communicative during our stay and was always willing to help.
The apartment itself is in great location, we probably spent half the stay in the Malasana area, checking out all the awesome bars, cafes and tapas on offer that Pau recommended.
If you're staying in Madrid; stay here!

My boyfriend and I arrived to Madrid for our first time in the city and could not have been more thrilled with the quality of the apartment and the location of the neighborhood! It's a wonderful space in a cool, lively, fun area of the city with great bars, restaurants, and cafes all within walking distane. Patricia was there to let us in the apartment, show us around, and give us some great tips about the city. They both kept in constant contact with us throughout our stay, checking in to see how things were going, etc. We couldn't recommend this place more highly! :)

Our first airbnb experience couldn' t be better. Paul gave us a friendly welkom and very usefull information aswell. We loved the appartement and the neighbourhood. The appartement is nearby a subway-station, but you can easily walk to the centre.
Only at saturdaynight there were lots of people on the Calle de Palma, but with earplugs we had a good night sleep. We can recommend this appartment for sure!

Great apartment in a perfect part of town!  Hip and lively, perfect for people who want to be on the go, see the city and experience the night life.  Pau is an awesome host with a wealth of information, and will help you with anything you need. The place is clean and neat, and there's a lot of space to spread out in.  I would suggest this apartment to anyone, but especially to travelers who really want to experience a city in a trendy, busy, and eco-friendly way.  My only complaint is that we weren't there longer.

Ns avons passé une très bonne semaine à madrid , appartement bien situé et confiortable . Pau ns a donné ttes les informations dont ns avions besoin pour profiter pleinement de madrid avec les enfants !

We loved Pau's apartment - great location close to a great plaza, good coffee, food and kid friendly.  Close to a couple of metros too. We are a family of 5 and had plenty of room in his place.  Pau was really really helpful about things to do in madrid (with or without kids) and gave us lots of great tips.  We would absolutely stay in this apartment again if we ever get back to Madrid (fingers crossed!).

Pau was a wonderful host. He met us at the apartment and explained how everything worked and gave us places to see and do when in Madrid. He also had a binder with additional information that was really helpful. The apartment was very clean, bright and equipped with everything we needed. It was close to everything and in a good area. The only thing was that it was very noisy. We knew this going in so a reminder to people to bring ear plugs. We really enjoyed being there and would stay there again Thank you Pau and Patricia

El apartamento es muy bonito y esta muy bien situado en el centro de malasaña. Los anfitriones son encantadores y además de aconsejarte en la llegada,te dejan a tu disposición mapas,guías,recomendaciones de restaurantes que están fenomenal!Repetiria seguro!muchas gracias!

Everything about this apartment is great & Pau went above and beyond, inundating us with local insights and recomendations.  If you are looking for an vibrant Malasañan experience you cannot go wrong here.

Pau's appartment is in a perfect location to explore the city. You can get to any of the main tourist places in no time or just stroll through the neighbourhood. The appartment itself is very cosy and we liked staying there, even though you need some tolerance to noise on the street at night. Pau has been very helpful, easy to communicate with and gave a lot of guidance and orientation on where to go.

Pau is excellent host. he should b a travel guide gave us heeps of gr8 info - the flat is awesome has everything you nerd - great area, many local bars / shops - metro at end of street - loved thus place stay here its the best

We had a lovely time in Madrid.  Pau was very informative about the city.  He went to great lengths to make sure we were prepared for anything from museums to restaurants  bars.  Apartment is well equipped.  He was also very flexible with our checkout.  We had a very late train on the day we were leaving and did not have another client the following day so he let us keep our luggage at the apartment instead of having to pay to store it somewhere for the day.  We appreciated everything he did for us and would definitely recommend this place.

L'appartement est charmant, décoré simple mais chaleureux.
Tout le confort nécessaire est fourni. Le quartier est très sympathique, jeun et branché, et du coup, pas mal bruyant la nuit. Pau a été très disponible et de très bon conseil, tant culinaires que touristiques. On y retournera avec plaisir.

Pau's & Patricia's flat is really nice - clean, comfortable and cozy, and with everything we needed for our five nights in Madrid. The location is excellent with many great restaurants, bars, cafés and small shops just around the corner in the lovely and lively Malasaña barrio. Also, the location is perfect for exploring the rest of the city, by foot or by metro. Pau gave us a lot of valuable "insider's tips" that made our Madrid experience even better. All in all, a lovely place with a perfect host!

Idéalement situé dans le quartier Chueca, l'appartement est parfait! Bien équipé, propre et spacieux.

Pour l'accueil, Pau est présent. Accueillant et prévenant! Il a pris le temps de nous donner plein d'informations sur Madrid. En complément, des documents sont à disposition dans l'appartement! Ainsi, vous ne pourrez pas louper les bonnes adresses et les principaux lieux à visiter.

Seul bémol: le bruit de la rue! Je précise tout de même que grâce aux boules Qiès, nous avons passé des nuits tranquilles!

Petit conseil: Pensez à visiter Tolède ! 30 minutes de train depuis la surprenante gare d'Atocha.
Es war super schön! alles perfekt und toll gelegen, geschlafen habe ich schon lange nicht mehr so gut wie in diesem Bett, eifach empfehlenswert!

We enjoyed a very comfortable stay in Pau & Patricia's apartment. The apartment itself is clean, comfortable and with everything you'd need (including good heating in the wintertime). It's located in the cheerful Malasaña neighbourhood with many interesting streets, shops, restaurants and bars - lots of options for nightlife, including right across the street. And finally, Pau was a great host and provided a large selection of personal recommendations for every sort of activity imaginable in the city - sights, tours, bikes, cafes, bars, restaurants etc. All in all a great experience to stay in this apartment!
(Three guests, november 2013)

El piso de Pau & Patricia está super. The apartment is great! Muy hermoso, lindo con camas comoda esta en un lugar perfecto para quien quiere ver la ciudad y conocer  tambien la movida madrileña. Pau & Patricia han sido muy cariños dejando todo lo que es util y muchas informaciones y contestando en toda nueatras pregunta. Si vuelvaria en madrid seguro voy en el piso de Pau & Patricia.Gracias
My girlfriend and I had a very pleasant stay!

Rau nous a reçu chaleureusement à l'heure convenue , l'appartement est le reflet des photos, il est bien agencé, très bien équipé et très confortable. Il est situé tout proche de Chueca et de la Gran Via dans un quartier très animé avec tous les commerces et restaurants à proximité, je recommande cet excellent logement.

El departamento está muy bien ubicado y en perfectas condiciones, pensado y diseñado para la comodidad plena del visitante. Tiene todos los servicios en perfectas condiciones, y la atención de Pau es excelente y muy comprometida.

Our family of four arrived from the airport and left from the train station by subway. The apartment was so close to the subway station that both trips were a breeze with our bags.

Malasana is a wonderful neighbourhood full of great restaurants and even playgrounds. The apartment was complete with everything. Nice light from the street facing balconies was easily blocked out by the large wood doors - if you need to sleep during the day!

The doors also blocked out any noise at night leaving us to sleep peacefully through a Saturday and Sunday night.

Pau was an awesome host and we look forward to returning soon! Wifi was even fast and consistent.

I had a fantastic time at Pau and Patricia's place. It is amazingly well located, very comfortable, clean, spacious and airy. Pau was a lovely host, ready and waiting for me with personal guides to the city and plenty of useful information. I would wholeheartedly recommend this apartment and its hosts to anyone.

We loved Pau & Patricias flat!!! Its perfectly located with lots of small shops and restaurants around the corner. We traveld with a small child and the flat had the perfect size for us. Also it is perfectly equipped with everything to cook and to feel comfortable. Pau and Patricia were super helpfull with anything and had great recomendations for activities and restaurants.
Top address in Madrid!
el la segunda vez que me quedo aqui. piso muy agradable en una zona linda y centrica de madrid. ahora es como mi casa! muchas gracias a pau & patricia !

We had a great time staying at Pau's appartment, it is clean, well equipped and well located.
We also could rely on Pau to help us for advice concerning restaurants or activities,
I would recommend him

I had a wonderful time in Pau & Patricia's apartment. I love the buzz of Malasaña and going out in its bars & clubs, so I didn't mind that the street could be a bit noisy. The apartment is perfectly located with pretty much everything in walking distance, very clean and cozily decorated. Pau & Patricia also left us a nice guide with sights, restaurants, terraces in the apartment and really cared that we'd have a good time. Thanks! I'd always come back and stay there :)

El apartamento es muy bonito y tiene de todo, es como está descrito aquí. Pau era muy amable y siempre cuando había dudas nos respondió rápidamente.

La zona está genial,hay muchos bares y la Plaza del Dos de Mayo está al lado, tanto como un supermercado.

Lo alquilaría otra vez, gracias!!
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
The apartment is very nice and has everything. It looks as described. Pau was very friendly and in case of doubts he always responded quickly.

The area is great, there are many bars and the Plaza del Dos de Mayo is right around the corner, as well as a supermarket.

I would rent it again, thank you!

The apartments is very nice. Patricia's family member, Virginia gave us the keys when we arrived. She briefly explained a few things about the apartment. Something to ask is how the trash is disposed in the triple trash can and how you get the water heater on. The apartment is very close to Tribunal metro station, close to many places to eat, several super markets and the street is very beautiful. Madrid was very very hot during our stay and there was only one small fan in the living room. The bedroom was very hot at night and if you opened the beautiful windows and let the breeze in, you also get a lot of noise from people drinking and talking right outside, very much all over the street (noise is expected in the centre of Madrid). I keep my thermostat at 78 degrees at home, so I like the temperature being a bit worm compared to many people, but the heat in that bedroom was uncomfortable even for me. The choices are to try to sleep hot or put up with the noise through most of the night. This was the only problem for me, but a bad one since resting while traveling is very necessary. I am sure at other times during the year when the temperature is not as hot this makes the perfect place to stay. The noise can be blocked almost completely with the double doors, the place is decorated beautifully and is perfectly clean. The location is great and the view from the two beautiful balconies is very nice.

Me and my girlfriend lived in this apartment for, approximately, two months and a half. It was an amazing experience. I wish we were still there.

The apartment couldn't be better located: it's near supermarkets, shops, bars, coffeeshops and restaurants. The street has life. It's lively. Beautiful. There's always people walking. Although it's located in Malasaña and very crowded at night on the weekends, the noise is not so loud as to bother. If you don't want to hear the street sounds, just close the windows and the noise is blocked almost completely. That surprised me, and it was a good surprise.

The period i spent there i could enjoy not only the famous Malasaña nightlife at the weekends, but also the ordinary day-to-day neighborhood life: buy things at the little shops (just under the building, or in front of it), greet people at the street and breathe the tranquility that exists on the day-to-day life. It's like it is a little village inside a big city.

Furthermore, the apartment is spacious - even bigger than in the photos -, well divided, colorful and very well equipped, with all the utensils one might need. The shower, unlike other apartments i have rented in the past, does not get cold if you stay too long in a hot bath. The water, effortlessly, remains heated.

The owner of the apartment, Pau, since the beginning was always available, gentle, attentive and helpful. Whenever we asked for help, he always answered us very quickly. At our last day at the apartment, he even gave us farewell gifts.

Finally, there is nothing to complain about. I recommend it to everyone. I hope that in the future i will have the opportunity to enjoy the apartment other times. I will come back for sure. Thanks for everything, Pau. :)

Hemos estado encantados en el apatamento, cama comodísima, cocina y baño limpios y nuevos, mucha luz en la casa, exactamente igual que en las fotos. Pau ha sido muy amable y nos dejo un montón de detalles en la casa como café, filtros, gel, champú, pasta de dientes...
Situado en un sitio inmejorable, con todos los servicios al lado, mucho ambiente,... Eso sí, una recomendación: hay bares debajo así que está bien tener unos tapones a mano si vais a ir pronto a la cama!
Muchas gracias por todo!! Repetiremos!! :0)

We had a fantastic stay at Pau’s apartment. He was so attentive with us asking us how everything was going and if we needed something. The apartment is very cute, nicely decorated, everything works very well (ie heating) and is located in Malasana really close to the Tribunal underground station. The location was fantastic. Malasana is a great place to stay when you visit Madrid, is right in the centre with fantastic transport options and really cool bars and cafes. Calla Fuencarral is just 5min away from the apartment where you can enjoy the shopping experience!
I would highly recommend you to stay in this apartment.

My wife had a fantastic stay at Pau’s apartment for more that a month. He was so attentive with us asking us how everything was going and if we needed something. The apartment is very cute, nicely decorated, everything works very well (e.g. the heating) and is located in Malasana really close to the Tribunal underground station.

The location was fantastic. Malasana is a great place to stay when you visit Madrid, is right in the centre with fantastic transport options.

I would highly recommend you to stay in this apartment.

La experiencia ha sido inmejorable, Pau y Patricia  nos han dado facilidades para todo y el apartamento esta muy bien, y muy limpio. No emos tenido ningun problema y si lo hubieramos tenido, son una pareja muy atenta. No era nuestro caso, pero si es tu primera o de las primeras veces que visitas Madrid, dejan mucha informacion que viene muy bien.

Wir wurden von Pau sehr freundlich begrüßt, die Schlüsselübergabe war absolut unkompliziert, obwohl wir nach 22.00 Uhr angekommen sind. Die Wohnung ist genauso wie auf den Fotos angezeigt: hübsch, ausgesprochen sauber und freundlich eingerichtet. Für vier Personen reicht der Platz aus. Die Wohngegend fanden wir super: lebendig, voller Bars und Cafés und kleiner Läden. Auch die Sehenswürdigkeiten konnten wir  von der Wohnung aus komplett zu Fuß machen. Wir würden jederzeit wiederkommen!

I really enjoyed my stay in Madrid at Pau and Patricia's lovely apartment. The place is the perfect size for 1-2 people comfortably, if you're staying long term, otherwise, if you're only in town for a long weekend, it could comfortably sleep up to two couples, since the futon sofa unfolds into a surprisingly comfortable second bed. The location is great, although I would generally recommend it more for younger folks, because Malasaña is known for its fun and lively night scene, so it can get a bit loud during the evening and (on the weekends) into the early morning. Personally, I enjoyed the lively environment and I found that after closing the shutters and (if you're a light sleeper, keeping earplugs handy) I was able to sleep soundly every night. The metro stop is extremely close, as is a convenient taxi stand, but I found that this location allowed me to walk almost everywhere I wanted to go in the city. There is a decent-sized supermarket, and a bunch of smaller markets, convenience stores, pharmacy, and most importantly a great coffee shop (Toma Cafe) all very close by. The apartment itself has a fully stocked kitchen - stove, oven, microwave, etc. - so it's nice to have the option to cook at home on occasion while you're there. The neighbors in the building are quiet and friendly. And Pau was great! I didn't get a chance to meet his wife Patricia, but Pau was incredibly kind and helpful from start to finish. He responded to all of my emails promptly, went above and beyond by meeting me at the apartment, to check in, quite early on a Sunday morning - which I really appreciated after a red eye flight from the U.S. Pau gave me enough space to let me feel at home in the apartment, but he also made sure to send emails regularly, checking to ensure I was enjoying my stay, which I appreciated. He worked around my schedule, made sure there were extra sheets and towels for when my mom came to visit, and offered some great recommendations of places to go and things to do in Madrid. I absolutely recommend staying at Pau and Patricia's apartment!

We have stayed in Pau and Patricia's apartment for ten days, and it was very comfortable. We arrived a little early, when the flat was being cleaned by two very friendly ladies; we were able to get the keys without any problems, and Pau made sure that we had everything we needed right away. His advice about the local spots was excellent, and he was also available for any other questions during the time we stayed. The flat was exactly as described, very homely, with everything working perfectly. It's very convenient for the metro station, local restaurants, and is only a pleasant stroll away from Chueca, the central part of Madrid, and all the sightseeing spots. The area has lots of cosy cafes, bakeries, and bars. The street gets a little lively at night, but we never had any problem with that; if anything, we were also happy to stay up until late. All in all, our stay was really memorable, and we'd love to come back again!

El alojamiento es tal cual aparecía en las fotos. Un sitio muy agradable en el que nos sentimos muy cómodos con todo lo necesario para la estancia. Pau fue muy amable y nos sugirió muchos lugares a los que ir (tanto en el barrio como en la ciudad) para disfrutar del viaje. Además nos proporcionó un cuarto en el edificio donde dejar las maletas tras abandonar el piso ya que nuestro vuelo salía más tarde. El entorno del apartamento con mucho movimiento y animada. Estancia inmejorable. Lo recomiendo.

Apartamento céntrico, la mejor manera de conocer Madrid paseando. Muy confortable, limpio y con todos los detalles para pasar unos días agradables. Comercios cercanos y un ambiente perfecto para tomar algo por la noche sin desplazarse mucho.
Nuestro anfitrión se implicó al máximo en nuestra estancia y nos dejó abundante información acerca del barrio y alrededores. Esperamos repetir.

Het 'cozy apartment' van Pau & Patricia  is ons prima bevallen. Het ligt in een gezellige buurt waar het 's avonds en tot in de kleine uurtjes ook druk kan zijn. We werden prima ontvangen door Pau en kregen van hem allerhande informatie, o.a. over winkels en restaurants. Het appartement heeft twee balkonnetjes (die zicht bieden op het leven op straat), is met smaak ingericht en van alle gemakken voorzien. In nog geen vijf minuten ben je bij de metro die je bijvoorbeeld in nog geen drie kwartier naar het vliegveld brengt.

Wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt in der Wohnung. Das Bett ist hervorragend, das Bad sehr schön, die Wohnung sehr sauber, die Lage perfekt und die Gastgeber sehr hilfsbereit und freundlich. Wir würden jederzeit wiederkommen. Sehr empfehlenswert!

We had a great time exploring Madrid from Pau and Patricia's apartment. The location is perfect for exploring the city. Pau came to welcome us and show us some maps/tell us where to go. The apartment is very comfortable and clean. They are quick to answer any questions you might have. I definitely recommend staying here. The only downside is the downstairs bar can be noisy if you don't plan on staying out late. Maybe bring earplugs if that bothers you!

This was a magnificent place to stay, highly recommended! This type of small apartment I the perfect base camp for city trecking withh & without kids. Very nice, very clear, very much of everything.
The apartment is located right in the centre of area Malasana, which appears to represent the true street evening life of Madrid. Of course when there is a lot of people active, there is some noise involved, but same exists in every major town. Make the best of it, participate and enjoy!
Muy bien.  Responde a las expectativas. 100% recomendable

Beautiful apartment in excellent shape, very clean, very well maintained, and very comfortable. Location is in the heart of malasaña. This means ultra convenience for food and nightlife (which i loved), but it can also be quite noisy at night. No worries, the apartments windows are double paned and simply closing them makes everything alright. Pau met me at the apartment when i arrived and had a lot of info on local places to get a bite and a coffee. Spent a week there and loved it.

Beautiful apartment, exactly what we were hoping for - very light and airy and right in the heart of the Malasaña neighborhood (plus easy walking distance to pretty much anywhere in central Madrid).

We stayed for a month and it had everything that we needed, with a well stocked and equipped kitchen, fast internet, a really nice desk for working at etc.

Pau was great, really friendly and welcoming and responded immediately whenever we had any questions. He also sent us loads of excellent recommendations for bars, restaurants and things to do, which we wouldn't have otherwise known about.

I really liked this apartment and can highly recommend it. It is centrally located, clean and well equiped. I just felt at home the two weeks I was there.

The host was very friendly and helped me with getting around. Many thanks!

Nice and well located apartment with everything you need. Everything in the city is within walking distance. The communication with Pau went very smoothly and he was a great host. He gave us many tips about restaurants and bars, so we have fully enjoyed madrid. If we come back to Madrid we would definitely book here again.

Hello,
we spent 5 nights on the appt, everything was very good. Pau gave us many touristic details (maps and flyers...) he also bring us a baby bed for my daughter and a special room on lower floor for the baby car. The appt is really near to Gran via and Puerta del Sol espacially via Fuencerral avenue with many internationnal shops. Thank you for all, hope we'll came back another time.
Regards
Yassir
Pau muy amable y dispuesto a darte cualquier explicación que precises.  El piso está muy bien situado, es cómodo, limpio y con todo lo necesario para pasar unos dias agradables. Para repetir.

As soon as we arrived, we were warmly welcomed by Pau who directly showed us the highlights of Madrid eventhough we arrived late in the evening at his place! Special mention of his architectural knowledge of the city
Cozy appartment, at we loved the neighbourhood. Pau and Patricia are very kind and helpfull

Pau was very helpful and accommodating! Our flight was delayed and he kept in contact with us until we arrived, even though it was late at night. The apartment was in a great location, was clean, and had everything we needed. I would definitely recommend to anyone visiting Madrid!

We were welcomed by Pau, who showed us around the place and gave us all sorts of good tips about the area. The neighborhood was VERY happening - fun during the day, not so fun at night when we were trying to sleep! We had been warned about the noise from the bar downstairs, but still something to consider - was worst on weekend nights, not so bad during the week. Still, the place was great - clean, comfy, perfect location. We'd stay there again, definitely during the week!

Hi,
Busy WE in Madrid! But it was raining so much !
The flat is very well located, nice (as described on the site).
I recommend the flat for active people who like going out (plenty bars and restaurants in the street and the neighbourhood!). Do not expect to rest too much ...:)

I loved Pau's piso! It was described accurately and looked like the photos. The kitchen was fully stocked; toiletries were even available. It was close to a metro, which made traveling around the city really easy. During the stay I saw some ants, but nothing too overwhelming. Pau was great! He was easily accessible, provided recommendations, met me at his piso at our scheduled time, and accommodating to my late check-out. Thanks Pau!

Definitely recommend this place! The location great; it was close to many restaurants and stores, everything was within walking distance! It is also very close to the metro station. The apartment was also well decorated and clean. Pau was tremendously helpful! He provided a booklet of what to do, where to eat, etc. He responded very quickly to all of my messages and even gave daily suggestions of interesting events going on in Madrid!

The apartment is accurately described. It's well maintained, the furniture is generally good quality and the finishes in the kitchen and bathroom are high quality as well, so it's a small, but very nice place. It's also professionally cleaned. Pau was very helpful with our arrival and took time to tell us about the apartment and the area in general. He also had a home-made guide to the neighborhood with lots of good recommendations. The street below can get a little noisy, but the windows are double-pane and cut out most of the noise. It´s kind of a constant murmur, but nothing that kept us from sleeping.

Malasaña is one of the most interesting and active neighborhoods in Madrid. We were there for nearly five weeks before we took any form of transport. You can walk to pretty much everything in the center of Madrid.

We were very happy with this apartment!

Pau & Patricia are very helpful with getting settled in and we appreciated all of the tips and information they offered! The apartment is very comfortable, cozy, and well organized.
We were so happy to stay here. It is an excellent location for food, coffee shops, shopping, and walking distance to museums. Their place allows you to feel like a local. We stayed during some hot days so we were so happy to have an air conditioner to use at night. The apartment stayed cool during the day, perfect for siesta-ing.
There are double paned glass doors to both balconies so the noise at night just fades away and we slept great. We would definitely stay here again and look forward to it!

Thanks to you for a wonderful stay in your apartment, which felt home immediately. And of course for your engagement and support during our stay. We will return and are looking forward to staying at this cozy place again. Take care.

El piso tiene el encanto de los edificios antiguos del centro pero está perfectamente acondicionado. Es más grande de lo que parece en las fotos y está bien distribuido. El baño es moderno y la ducha espaciosa, la cocina separada del salón y muy funcional, la habitación también separada del salón y con una cama bastante cómoda. El salón tiene un sofá que se convierte en una cama para invitados bastante grande. El piso está bien aislado pero es verdad que a veces hay algo de jaleo nocturno puntual en la calle (en ese tramo de la calle no hay bares en el momento de escribir esto), aunque tampoco me supuso un gran problema. Por otro lado Pau ha sido un anfitrión estupendo, preocupándose porque estuviera todo bien, por recomendar multitud de sitios interesantes del barrio y de Madrid y por solucionar prontamente algún problemilla que hubo (culpa mía 😅).
Amazing flat in Malasana - Pau & Patricia are super helpfuld and provided good adress to eat & drink !!

El departamento es muy lindo y cómodo, pero está ubicado en una zona muy ruidosa. Si bien los dueños le han puesto vidrios dobles en las ventanas, el ruido que producen las personas que deambulan por la zona los jueves, viernes, sábados y vísperas de feriados por la noche y hasta bien entrada la madrugada, hace muy difícil poder dormir tranquilamente. Cuando más avanzada la noche, más descontrol y más ruido, muy probablemente causado por los jóvenes (y no tan jóvenes) que beben en exceso y se descontrolan. Una pena, porque el departamento está muy bien y los dueños son muy amables.

Se trata de un piso casi perfecto en una ubicación ideal. Tiene un montón de carácter en un barrio con un montón de carácter. Bueno, no es perfecto perfecto. Tiene una pequeña cocina a la que le falta un lavavajillas, por ejemplo, pero fue exactamente como se había descrito, y exactamente lo que yo quería. Si la descripción te parece bien, no dudes en confiar en que vas a tener una buena experiencia. El barrio puede estar ruidoso, pero yo nunca tuve ningún problema con eso. Pau era un anfitrión excepcional, con muchos consejos sobre el barrio y la ciudad, y siempre estaba accesible. Sin ninguna duda, volvería a quederme otra vez.

apartamento muy bien situado. comercios cerca. descripcion correcta a lo que es el apartamento. muy Buenos amfitriones. Pudimos llegar al apartamento temprano ya que llegamos es tren y al igual al salir. se adaptaron a nuestros horarios.
muy recomanable

Patricia and Pau are wonderful hosts! They were always there for me when I contacted them and their apartment is not only very beautiful and cosy but also clean and in best condition. I really loved my stay there and can only recommend booking the apartment for longer stays!
Me encantaba mi estancia, muchas gracias por todo!

A really great place to stay in Madrid center. It's perfect for long-term stays, having a full kitchen, washing machine, and plenty of living and storage space. Everything is nicely decorated and furnished, and the apartment was very clean. The location is great too, very close to multiple metro lines and tons of cafes, bars, and restaurants. As others have mentioned, the street can get loud, typically on the weekends. This didn't bother us too much but just be aware if you're a light sleeper. Communication and check-in experience was excellent.

this is a very beautiful and cozy apartment in the hip and lively neighbourhood of malasaña. patricia & pau are phenomenal hosts - kind, helpful and caring, they made sure to get in touch before my trip and inform me about the details of my check-in. pau waited for me patiently despite some delay in my arrival, gave me a friendly introduction to the apartment and neighbourhood, and stayed in touch throughout my stay making sure everything was okay. he also gave me some fantastic tips and recommendations. the place really felt like home and i enjoyed every minute of my stay. it makes me very happy to recommend highly and wholeheartedly this lovely apartment to everyone who plans to stay in malasaña.

Boligen var meget godt indrettet - med stue og soveværelse ud til vinduer til gaden og meget lys - og desuden moderniseret badeværelse samt med køkken med alle ønskelige faciliteter (herunder også en vaskemaskine). Boligen ligger i det kreative Malasaña-kvarter med mange spændende spisesteder og meget folkeliv. Jeg blev ikke forstyrret af gadestøj om aftenen/natten i weekenden. Det er også muligt at gå fra boligen til Madrids centrum. Metrostationen Tribunal er i nærheden. Pau modtog mig ved ankomsten og oplyste om boligens funktioner. Pau var også yderst hjælpsom med informationer om spisesteder og kulturoplevelser i Malasaña og Madrid gennem resten af opholdet. Jeg brugte en del af opholdet til at skrive, og jeg nød godt af det hurtige internet i boligen samt af skrivepladsen, der er ved vinduet i soveværelset. Mine største anbefalinger!

We enjoyed our month long stay in this cozy, well equipped Malasaña apartment. There are so many wonderful restaurants, pubs, bakeries, and grocery stores very close by. Pau was kind enough to let us check in early after our overnight flight from the U.S. He provided us with many great recommendations for events and happenings during the Christmas holiday season taking place throughout Madrid. We had everything we needed to cook on those nights when we just wanted to relax at home. It was so helpful having a washer/dryer/drying rack for our month long stay. There was plenty of hot water for showers, and the wifi was excellent.

Pau and Patricia's place was perfect for our stay. We were longer term and the desk in the bedroom was great for working and the wifi was really good. Pau was an amazing host who greeted us late in the night and was very communicative and responsive. He had an unlimited amount of suggestions for things to do! The place was well equipped, clean and not too cluttered. The kitchen was well equipped. The apartment is in a very hip neighborhood with everything you need within 5 min walk and the metro is only 5 min away. That being said, there are alot of bars nearby so it can be noisy especially on weekends, it didn't bother us but if you're a light sleeper it might. We would come back again and again, we loved Madrid and Pau's apartment.
Jättemysig lägenhet med fantastisk läge. Mycket centralt och populärt område i Madrid. Allt motsvarade förväntningarna. Mycket trevlig och informativ värd.

I had the pleasure of spending one month in this apartment. It is located in a vibrant and historically important neighborhood in Madrid. The location is central and I walked everywhere. Pau was a responsive host who met me at the door and continued to stay in touch throughout my stay. He has lived in the apartment and knows the neighborhood and gave me wonderful and thoughtful recommendations for restaurants, museums, and other g places of interest.
The apartment itself is comfortable with two balconies and full-length windows that open up to the street. The kitchen is well-equipped and the laundry machine worked well. I was there during the month of May so did not use heat or ac. Madrid is a lively place and this is a lively neighborhood, especially at night.
Todo hermoso no hay ni una sola queja

The Malasaña neighborhood was beautiful and fun! My partner and I fell in love with it during our one month stay in Patricia&Pau's apartment. We chose the apartment for the picturesque balcony-lined street, which remained just as enchanting for the entirety of our stay. The whole area is super walkable and there's tons to do. During the course of our stay, Pau updated us a few times with a new selection of sites, attractions, and restaurants, which gave us plenty to do during our stay. The apartment was cozy and had all necessary amenities. We didn't have any issues, but I'm sure if we did, Pau&Patricia would have taken care of it right away, they were very responsive in general. Loved Madrid! Will definitely go back one day and would definitely go back to this apartment specifically

Pau & Patricia were champion hosts!
I was very comfortable during my stay in Malasaña, a Neighbourhood which I really loved. The apartment had everything I needed, was super clean and had plenty of character.
Pau was in regular contact with me during my stay, providing plenty of recommendations. You can tell he has plenty of pride in his city.
Thanks guys!

I really enjoyed my stay in my stay in this cute and well-equipped apartment.  The apartment was perfect for my month long stay and had everything I needed.  Pau was very helpful and informative with all great suggestions for cultural places, restaurants, bars, things to do on weekend, etc.  The hosts are always available if you need anything.  The location is great as there are plenty of restaurants, bars, and shopping nearby.  You are also within walking distance of all the main tourist attractions.  I would recommend this apartment to anyone wanting to stay in Madrid and I would stay here again!

Pau y Patricia son unos anfitriones increíbles, se preocuparon mucho por nosotros, nos hacían recomendaciones, estaban al pendiente de cualquier detalle con la casa y en general tuvieron una actitud impecable. El departamento está en una zona excelente, rodeado de bares, boutiques y cerca del centro de Madrid. Tiene una estación de metro a una cuadra y media y muy cerca un par más de otras líneas. El ruido puede llegar a ser un problema, pero para nosotros no lo fue tanto. Malasaña es un sitio histórico de bares y lugares icónicos de la Movida Madrileña y mucha gente va a ese barrio a divertirse. Pedirle a ese barrio que sea silencioso, es pedirle que pierda parte de su identidad.Además, los ventanales que dan a la calle tienen tanto una ventana de vidrio como una enorme puerta de madera. Si se cierran ambas, el ruido disminuye notablemente. Gran experiencia vivir allí, en una calle tan célebre como La Palma y en un espacio tan lindo como este departamento. Vale mucho la pena.

Nous avons passé un séjour merveilleux dans cet appartement. Pau a été extrêmement réactif par message, et nous a recommandé plein d’adresses à Madrid. L’appartement est très spacieux et fonctionnel. La cuisine est très bien équipée, nous avons manqué de rien.
Un grand merci pour tout Pau et Patricia !

Beautiful apartment in an ideal neighborhood in Madrid. Pau is a truly fantastic host who provided countless recommendations for restaurants, activities, and things to do in Madrid, all while being responsive and helpful in every way. I’d recommended staying at Pau’s place to anyone who asked me about my trip to Spain. I don’t think I could have found a better place for my month long stay in Madrid.
Pau was a fantastic host and we loved the area. We would very happily stay there again.
Paula was a lovely host and the apartment is in a great location
I had a great experience with my stay, the apartment had everything I needed in a good location. Pau is super friendly and sent a ton of recommendations for life in Madrid.

Pau and Patricia communicate very well and provide excellent recommendations for restaurants, coffee shops and charming places to go to feel the heart of Malasaña. I felt very much at home in their apartment. I have stayed in and loved many different neighborhoods in Madrid, but Malasaña is the smoothest for daily living in my experience.
Lovely place in a great location. Host was super friendly and helpful

A friend and I spent a bit over a month in the flat which is located in the heart of Malasaña. It's everything we wanted and has a good location with access to restaurants, markets, transport and the sights. Pau was very helpful and accommodating during our stay. The only caveat I might mention is that the area is very lively and that includes after hours. Street noise can be heard at times but we didn't have any issue with it. We would definitely stay again.

Excelente el apartamento, la ubicación es perfecta, a un paso de todo y en un pintoresco barrio de tapas y bares, muy típico de Madrid. Impecable el estado en que lo encontramos, limpieza increíble, había tés, azúcar, jabones, lo indispensable para instalarse cómodamente. La atención por parte de César inmejorable. Para recomendar!

Cesar was very accomodating and very organized. He had multiple maps and other guides out ready for our use, already marked with great suggestions.  His apartment was very spacious and looked out onto a beautiful plaza. There were no issues with hot water, the bathroom was very modern, and the kitchen was well equipped.  The apartment is in a very safe building and in a very great area.  It is just a 10-15 minute walk away from everything and yet  a very peaceful area.  Many mini-markets and restaurants nearby.  I would definitely recommend him!!!

Cesar was an awesome host! Check in procedures are easy. He recommended places to visit. Had an easy map to read with starred restuarants, bars, places to see near the apartment. Used the map for taxi drivers as well. The place was very clean and really nice! Great location. Would highly recommend staying here. One of my favorites!
Sezar is  the hospitable person  , met, explained,  told about the well-known places. Apartments very good, pure, are near to known places: museums, palace,  subway. Everything was very   good/.
Appartement très agréable, bien équipé et bien situé au centre de madrd. lé séjour a été très agréable. notre hote nous avait aussi donné toutes les adresses utiles dans le voisinage

Cesar is very friendly and helpful host. He put an extra effort to help us navigate around the area and Madrid in general. Easy check in and out.
Great apartment, great location, very clean and safe.
We had wonderful 8 days and would highly recommend it to everyone.

We spent 3 nights in Cesar's apartment in the beginning of September'12. At arrival he provided us with a map and detailed instructions on the places to see and to eat at in the area. Extra bed was installed in the bedroom for our 3 y.o. daughter.
We liked everythig about the apartment: location, equipment, hosts.
The refrigerator could be better (the drinks were near room temperature) otherwise the apartment is spotless.
We would definitely stay there during our next trip to Madrid.

Cesar is very nice welcoming host, apartment as described, clean and nicely equipped. Location is perfect. If the windows of the leaving room are open during weekend evenings the noise from the street might be disturbing for some. Bedroom is nice and quiet

Cesar's apartment was perfect. Location, size, amenities... everything was just as we wanted to have a great Madrid experience. Cesar was a great host. We arrived very late and Cesar was there to not only meet us, but to explain where to find the best places to eat, transport, and all else in the area. From here you can easy explore all parts of Madrid and take a train to other places, like Toledo (10 mins walk to the train station).
I can highly recommend Cesar's apartment!
Thank you! I'll definitely stay here again when I come to Madrid.
Dina and Eva

Lovely, is beyond praise, location of the apartment, one of the best we had in Spain. The whole center of Madrid available by foot, to the subway is 10 minutes. Hospitable host. In the presence of all the necessary appliances. Many restaurants in the neighboring houses, where in the evening you can relax, dine or enjoy a glass of wine.

This is an excellent value for several reasons.

1. The apartment is in a wonderful location:
--It's a short walk from where the airport bus stops.
--It's near the Prado and other museums, is in a nice neighborhood, and is within walking distance of the major sites. It's also a short walk from the Atocha train station, should you want to take day trips to Toledo or to other cities close by.
--it's in a safe neighborhood with lots of good restaurants and neighborhood coffee shops and bars. There were always couples and families walking around enjoying their evening strolls.

2. The apartment is well maintained, is exactly as it is advertised and portrayed in the photos, and is super quiet. We were never awakened by outside noises, and, in the six nights we were there, if our neighbors ever made any noise, we did not hear them. The bedroom window opens to an inner courtyard.

3. Cesar is a wonderful host who will give you the information you need so that you can enjoy your visit to the fullest. He provides maps and other material for your use during your stay.

4. Considering the location, the apartment, and the amenities, the price was the best we found advertised. We would definitely stay here again.

I had a wonderful stay in Madrid with my husband and son! The apartment is very comfortable, clean, quiet and its location is perfect. It is situated near Atocha station, Prado museum and within walking distance of the main touristic sites. Cesar is a great host, easy to contact and ver helpful getting oriented to the city. Thank you, Cesar! I will definitely recommend and would happily stay there again. Julia, Gilberto e Vinicius.
Cesar thanks for the perfect apartment)) very good location) especially absinthe bar nearby)

Tanto mi novio como yo opinamos que el apartamento es perfecto para una pareja sola o con niños. Está situado en una de las mejores zonas de Madrid, y César deja a tu llegada un montón de documentación relativa a la oferta turística, gastronómica y de ocio. El apartamento está muy cuidado y es muy tranquilo. Está perfectamente acondicionado y equipado, y sólo hay que llegar y disfrutarlo. Sin duda una excelente elección.

El apartamento de Cesar está en un sitio estupendo: muy cerca de la estación de Atocha y a un paso de los principales museos y lugares de interés. Muy cerca hay fantásticos bares de tapeo, de música, de copas. Se puede ir paseando a la Puerta del Sol, a la Plaza Mayor, a las principales calles de compras. En fin, un lugar maravilloso para pasar unas magníficas vacaciones en la capital de España. El apartamento es muy agradable y luminoso. Dispone de todo lo necesario y, por si fuera poco, Cesar, su propietario, es una persona encantadora, nos dio todo tipo de indicaciones para disfrutar de Madrid y fue fácil contactar con él en todo momento. En resumen, que es un lugar totalmente recomendable al que volveremos en nuestra próxima visita a la ciudad. Gracias por todo, Cesar.

Joe and I spent four nights in Cesar and Ana´s apartment in Madrid and enjoyed ourselves tremendously.  Everything is so close, we visited the Prado Museum, Reina Sofia and Thyssen which are all very close by.  The neighborhood has restaurants and bars in every direction.  Cesar had maps and instructions in the apartment for getting around which was very helpful.  I would suggest reading them before heading off in particular to the Prado.  We walked to the train station in less than 10 minutes.  This apartment is perfectly situated, it is clean and comfortable and we felt very much at home.  We were sorry to leave.

We enjoyed our stay in the Prado Museum Air apartment very much. Well located and excellent hosting by Cesar. Provided all the information we needed to explore the neighbourhood and eat at good restaurants.

The apartment is only a 5 minute walk to the Prado museum.  We loved all of the tapas bars, restaurants a dnpastry shops in the neighborhood.  It was easy to find our way around and Cesar provided us with a detailed map of his favorite restaurants which we tried and really enjoyed.  The apartment was super comfortable and cozy, so even though the weather was rainy, we didn't mind having to stay in.

Cesar was great! The location was wonderful. Everything was as pictured and when I could't understand how to work the washing machine he was right there. There was a nice place down at the corner for a drink and great music, and a little grocery at the same corner. Perfect location to Prado, train, and everything you could need.

Comfortable and well equipped apartment in a good location near Prado museum, walking distance to Plaza Mayor and other sites in Madrid. Lots of restaurants and bars around. Cesar is a friendly and gracious host. I would not hesitate to recommend this apartment.

July 2013
Apartment is in a great location. Very close to Atocha railway station and bus to the airport. You can walk to everything and there are plenty of restaurants, bars etc. all around the apartment. No parking nearby if you come by car though. Apartment is very clean and well appointed, with good WIFI connection. Cesar is a wonderful host and gave us plenty of information and maps. We especially liked La Sanabresa restaurant. Cesar always answered my emails and SMS's promptly and nothing was too much trouble for him. I can certainly recommend this apartment and Cesar. Thank you Cesar.

We stayed in Prado apartment July 12th to 16th 2013. It was excellent. Cesar is excellent. I agree with every positive review about this apartment, and if there are any negative reviews I would strongly disagree with them.
Cesar is extremely friendly, helpful, and accommodating. He has useful tips and suggestions for making your Madrid experience a great one. He has a great passion for Spain, its food, culture, and architecture.
The apartment is perfectly situated in one of the best and most accessible parts of Madrid.
I would highly recommend this apartment.

Cesar es un excelente persona con gran amabilidad para ofrecer orientación sobre todo lo importante para hacer en Madrid.
El apartamento es amplio y muy agradable con todo lo necesario para sentirse cómodo.Lo recomendamos !!!

LOCATION: The apartment is located in the old city, shops, bars and restaurants are only a few minutes away. We felt safe and found the location very convenient!
HOST: Cesar was easy to communicate with, left maps and recommendation. Very nice man.
APARTMENT: Was very tidy and clean. The kitchen had the basic and everything we needed to do the basics.
The bathroom was clean and big and the hot water worked well.
Even though the apartment has A/C it still can get warm during the night. There is a fan that help during the night but can be a little noisy. Keep in mind we stayed late July, hence weather condition will vary depending on season.
The apartment is safe, wifi worked well and we enjoined our stayed. We would defiantly stay here again.

Idéalement situé dans le quartier des écrivains, à deux pas du Prado et du musée Thyssen, l'appartement est également proche de nombreuses places animées, de restaurants et autres bars à tapas - d'ailleurs omniprésents dans les environs, et heureusement pas trop touristiques.

L'appartement, qui est à 10 min. à pied de la Gare d'Atocha (train direct depuis l'aéroport, en 25 min), est très propre et correspond parfaitement aux descriptions (la cuisine est même équipée de produits de dépannage - alu, papier transparent, etc,). César est un hôte vraiment très serviable, polyglotte et bien renseigné de surcroît sur Madrid.

Excellente expérience!

We had a very good stay in a very well appointed and excellently positioned facility.
Cesar is an extremely generous host and went to great lengths to make sure we are comfortable. He was almost always at hand to assist and help with info regarding Madrid and supplied us with a good map of Madrid.

Cesar is a great host, caring and attentive.. The location is perfect, in a great neighborhood, centrally located yet quiet. The apartment is well-equipped, very clean and neat. The apartment building is equally clean and well-maintained, with an attentive doorman in the evening. It is only a few minutes to the Prado Museum, so my wife and I were able to easily walk there every night at 6 pm, when entrance is free of charge. I give Cesar and his apartment an enthusiastic recommendation.

Alquilé este apartamento para mis padres, inquilinos muy exigentes, y el resultado no pudo ser mejor. Cesar es una persona encantadora, el apartamento está impecable y en una localización privilegiada. Mis padres no quieren volver a probar un sitio diferente en Madrid.

We had a wonderful stay in Madrid, largely because of these excellent accommodations.  It was our first trip to Spain and so location and ease of transportation, within and outside the city, were of paramount importance.  This location is within 5-20 walking minutes of museums El Prado and Nacional Centro de Arte Reina Sofia and Atocha train station.  Our train rides to Toledo and Sevilla were a breeze.  The apartment itself is comfortably appointed and within the aromatic vicinity of countless bars and restaurants.  Cesar is very helpful and friendly.  I recommend this convenience without reservation.
Впечатления как и ожидалось хорошие. Квартира находится в центре.

I had a wonderful stay at Cesar's apartment which is perfectly located  near to Prado Museum. It is clean and comfortable. Cesar is a good host and very kind to help in any way to smooth my trip. I left my home key in the apartment and he is so fast to inform me and do whatever he can to return the key to me through DHL. I will recommend all my friends to stay at his place if they have plan to Madrid.

The apartment was in a great location. Very close to the museums and lots of nice bars and restaurants. Cesar was very welcoming and helpful. The apartment was comfortable and clean. Perfect for sight seeing in Madrid. Thank you Cesar.

What a great host, apartment and location!!! Do not hesitate to book this property, the host is very helpful and with great suggestions but never intrusive. We are very familiar with Madrid and yet Cesar gave us some great suggestions, the neighborhood map is full of great eating places at the doorstep. This apartment is so well located that we only used taxi service to and from Barajas and the Museo del Traje which is outside the city center. You can visit all the museums and attractions on Madrid's city center on foot, we love to walk and this apartment is in the best location possible to become acquainted with all of the nice surprises Madrid has to offer. The apartment itself is spotless and very comfortable with the best wifi I have ever experienced while on trips. The neighborhood views from the 2 balconies on the salon are very nice, while you have a very active neighborhood the apartment which is located on a new building has great soundproofing and the bedroom is located away from the street. If you are into funky European eyeglass frames, the coolest place in Madrid is just around the corner from this apartment at Moratin 18. There are 2 great Galician restaurants just outside the apartment which we loved, and breakfast at Rotos also just outside the apartment on Huertas was our favorite.
Book this place, I am sure you will love it too.
Thank you Cesar, we will be back!

There were great days in Prado Museum Air Apartment. Cesar provides us with all necessary information about neighborhood and local events. Everything was above the expectations. Apartment is very clean, well equipped, according to the description. We had a great vacation!

Cesar's apartment is a lovely place in a great location.  We were only a few minutes walk from the Prado and other museums.  Also, Calle Jesus is known for its concentration of restaurants.  It was nice to have a great selection of restaurants within a few minutes walking time.  Yet, despite this wonderful location, the apartment was remarkably quiet.  Cesar was waiting for us as we arrived from the train station -- also a relatively short walk away.  He gave us all kinds of information about Madrid.  He was also available to us throughout our stay and arranged for a cab to pick us up at the door on the day of our departure.  The apartment itself was comfortable and clean.  We definitely recommend staying here on your visit to Madrid.

GENIAL.
L'appartement était calme, propre, bien équipé et surtout très bien situé.
Cesar est super accueillant : il a pris le temps de nous expliquer les meilleurs endroits dans le quartier (en nous laissant une carte avec les détails).
Merci bcp, nous reviendront :-)

The apartment is located in a very central location with most tourist attractions within walking distance and also many good restaurants nearby. Cesar was a very nice and helpful host who gave a lot of good recommendations.
I can fully recommend staying in this apartment!

Cesar est très accueillant, ponctuel pour la remise des clefs et met des informations à disposition. L'appartement est très clair, très propre et bien situé pour ceux, qui comme nous, veulent visiter les trois principaux musées de Madrid (Prado, Thyssen et Reina Sophia). Cesar parle très bien le Français, nous étions en voiture et il a su nous trouver un parking. Nous y retournerons (nous n'avons pas terminé la visite des trois musées en trois jours!). Nous étions trois

Perfect location in the heart of Madrid.  The apartment is located on a nice tapas row mentioned in Rick Steve's Spain book. There are bars right across the narrow street, restaurants all over, etc. The apartment is great for a couple, or a couple with a child on the sofa bed. It's a comfortable apartment in a nice building.  We didn't do any cooking but the kitchen was fully stocked. The AC worked fine although we didn't need it much in June. Cesar came to welcome us and had prepared information for us - things to see, restaurants to try. Great host.

The Prado Museum Air Apartment and hosts Cesar and Ana were great choices for the Madrid-start of our trip to Spain. The apartment is commodious and pleasant.
