It is extremely well-located: great tapas bars and restaurants steps away; the Prado a 5-minute walk, and other major sights, parks, museums, within a 15-minute walking radius; Metro close by, as well as Atocha train station--useful for things like day-trips to Toledo; on a pedestrianized street that takes you on a pleasant stroll to Plazas Mayor and Sol in 20-30 minutes.

The hosts are wonderful; very responsive to every need. One of us experienced a very high and scary fever shortly after arrival. Cesar contacted the local clinic for us and offered to go there with us to help negotiate things if needed. Thankfully, we did not need to go, but the care, concern, and assurance that Cesar and Ana provided saved the trip for us.

We hope that we get back to the apartment in the future; we can't imagine a better base for visiting Madrid. A great place to stay.

La experiencia fue genial.
El vecindario es perfecto, cerca de todo.
El departamento es tal cual se lo ve en la fotografía, espacioso, completo, cómodo y limpio.
Definitivamente recomendaría a César, y volvería alojarme en su departamento.

The apartment was perfect for us. The location is amazing - very close to all of the major museums in a neighborhood full of good restaurants and cafes. The apartment is quiet (except for occasional city sounds) with the bedroom located on an inner courtyard, away from the street. Cesar was welcoming, and communicated with us prior to our arrival to arrange for us to come directly from the airport before the "official" check in time. He had lots of good restaurant recommendations and provides a personalized guidebook to his city in the apartment. The apartment was spotless and the kitchen was supplied with all we needed for some simple meals at home. We look forward to going back next year!

This was a great stay.

The apartment is very close to the must see attractions of Madrid (walking distance to all) and close to numerous restaurants etc.
Cesar gave lots of good advice about where to eat and what to see.
The apartment is well appointed and comfortable
Highly recommended

O apartamento tem uma localização excelente, muito conveniente e confortável, com acesso fácil a pé aos principais museus e muitos pontos de interesse de Madrid. Mesmo à justa para uma família de 4 para uma estadia descontraida.
Zona muito animada e ao mesmo tempo sossegada e tranquila. O estacionamento disponível no local é muito útil.
O anfitrião é extremamente atencioso e simpático.
Recomendo sem reservas, voltarei mais vezes.

César nos recibió con suma amabilidad. Nos dejó mapas y folletos sobre Madrid, un mapa ampliado de la zona con sus recomendaciones sobre lugares para comer y visitar y nos dió personalmente indicaciones muy valiosas.
El departamento es exactamente como aparece en las fotos: muy amplio, luminoso, acogedor y sobre todo impecablemente limpio.
Gentilmente Ana y César nos dejaron jugos, un vino, café y agua mineral.
El departamento está ubicado en pleno barrio de Las Letras a unas pocas cuadras del Museo del Prado, del Reina Sofía y del Thyssen Bornemisa. Y diez minutos caminando de Puerta del Sol. Inmejorable
En las manzanas alrededor hay muchos bares y restaurantes de tapas, así como mercadillos para hacer compras.

This apartment is perfectly located for visits to Madrid's top 3 art galleries! It is comfortable, quiet and has a lovely fig tree in the living room! Cesar is a perfect host and could not have been more helpful!
Very nice appartment in the center of Madrid. Cesar offered an excellent service and great kindness. Everything worked out fine, the appartment clean and cosy. Thanks for a pleasant stay.

Thank you, Cesar, for making the The Prado Museum Air apartment a 5 star experience.
The location was ideal for easy access to Retiro Park, the Prado, Thyssen and Reina Sophia museums.
The neighborhood offered the best variety of tapas, as well as, bakeries, restaurants and shopping . The ease of walking to Plaza Angel, Santa Ana and Plaza Mayor was a plus.
The apartment accommodated our family of 4, and is ideal for 3 - 4 adults.
I highly recommend this property.

My family and I really enjoyed this apartment at the center of Madrid.
The apartment has everything we need. Cesar was extremely friendly and hospitable. He tried to predict our wishes and did his best.
The area also has everything that we expected, with restaurants and supermarket close and easy access to public transport.
I was happy to have business with Cesar and can recommend Prado museum air apartment.
Estancia muy agradable en el apartamento de César y Ana. Céntrico junto a los museos, muy limpio y acogedor

Cesar was a great host, kindly taking account of our arrival and leaving time and providing advice about shopping and eating in the neighbourhood.

We enjoyed the comfort and security of this modern apartment which is right in one of the hearts of Madrid close the many restaurants and bars as well as the Prado museum.

The 'big three' art museums are all in walking distance as are most sights of the city. We bought a transport card when we arrived at the airport (good for metro and bus) and although we used it a little it was not really necessary. The place is a short 10 minute walk from the nearest metro station.

All-in-all a great experience!

Absolut empfehlenswert. Exzellentes Preis-Leistungsverhältnis. Optimal platziert, trotz belebter Umgebung und für Madrider Verhältnisse ziemlich ruhig. Appartment geräumig und sauber, alles Notwendige vorhanden. Sehr gute Gastgeber, freundlich und hilfsbereit. Ganz tolle Tipps (Restaurants, Lokale, Supermärkte...). Nicht einmal unsere sehr späte Ankunftszeit war für sie ein Problem. Wir kommen ganz sicher wieder!
Recomendable desde todos los puntos de vista. Excelente relación calidad-precio. Localización perfecta. Bastante tranquilo tratándose de Madrid y de un barrio tan bullicioso. Apartamento amplio y limpio, dotado de todo lo necesario. Muy buenos anfitriones, amables y dispuestos a ayudar en todo momento. Muy buenos consejos sobre dónde comer y comprar. Ni siquiera nuestra hora de llegada a medianoche fue problema. ¡Seguro que volveremos!
Cesar and Ana were good hosts. The apartment is exactly as described. It is comfortable and situated in an unbeatable central location. We highly recommend it.

El apartamento es tal cual se ve en las fotografías,  muy limpio, soleado y con lo necesario para la estancia. El portal es amplio y con un portero muy amable y atento. Los anfitriones un lujo, Ana muy amable a nuestra llegada y César también durante la estancia. La situación es buenísima,  cerca de todo y en una calle amplia y transitada pero sin ruido. Si podemos, repetiremos. Gracias  :)

Cesar was very attentive and made sure that everything was in working order. He made contact with me as soon as I made the reservation and right before I was scheduled to occupy the apartment.

The apartment description was spot on. It is centrally located and with plenty of places to eat. A few museums around the area make this the perfect spot for those interested in art. Also, the train station is a few blocks away which makes it very handy for the few day-trips that a lot of travelers take from Madrid.

Era nuestra primera experiencia porque normalmente nos albergamos en hoteles. Ha sido muy agradable y sin duda repetiremos. César y Ana nos atendieron muy bien, el apartamento está muy bien situado para visitar los museos más importantes de la ciudad. El barrio es tranquilo. Los anfitriones nos asesoraron sobre tiendas y restaurantes y nos fue muy bien. Nos sentimos muy bien porque el apartamento tiene todo lo que necesitas y está muy bien distribuido. Si volvemos a Madrid, por supuesto que procuraremos volver al mismo lugar.
Nos encantó el departamento,  excelente ubicación, buen barrio, cerca de movilización y cuenta con lo imprescindible. Con seguridad recomiendo el piso de Cesar y Ana para arrendar. Gracias!

Cesar made us feel very welcome even before we came.  He was very attentive to my questions.  When we arrived he checked in on us and made sure we knew how everything worked, answered questions and gave us many suggestions on where to eat, what to see, etc.  The building had a key to get in and that made us feel safe.  The area was great.  It was just a great experience all around.  the apartment is spacious,

Everything has been fine.
Cesar is a really pretty person.
Apartment is very nice and confortable and closest to main places. Thanks Cesar.

Très bel appartement au coeur de Madrid. Lumineux et confortable, il permet de profiter de la ville à pied (quelques minutes du parc Retiro, Musée du Prado). Cesar est un hôte adorable et accueillant. Je recommande vivement cet appartement pour toute personne souhaitant profiter pleinement de Madrid.

Cesar & Ana were super welcoming, they even gave us a wine and an electric adaptor in case we needed. They also gave us maps and references which came super handy, and messages about soccer games.
The aparment was beaituful, with everything we needed, also it was walking distance to the Museo del Prado and the Museo of Reina Sofia.
We super recomend it .
Great location, flat is clean and cosy! Thank you Cesar for being a good hostess! And lucky you are if you choose Madrid and Cesar's flat!!!

Cesar's apartment is in perfect location to visit all of the museums and other tourist attractions.  Metro and bus located nearby as are many nice restaurants and bars.  The apartment was beautiful, very roomy, and spotless.  Cesar was perfect host, going above and beyond to help us. Thank you for sharing your wonderful apartmentwith us, Judy and Frank

Cesar was incredibly responsive by email, and welcomed us upon arrival with keys and great advice about restaurants and entertainment. The apartment was spotless, comfortable, modern and wonderfully located. Las Letras is an atmospheric, historic neighborhood, close to the Prado and Parque de Retiro, with great food and beautiful plazas nearby, yet quiet enough to allow you to sleep well at night. It's only about a 10-minute walk from the Atocha train station. You couldn't find a better spot to stay in Madrid!
The fourth-floor apartment gets plenty of light and a nice breeze, but the bedroom got hot during an unseasonably warm couple of May days. There is central AC in the building, but it's also controlled centrally - the thermostat in the apartment seems mostly to run the fan. There is a separate large moveable "cooling fan," which helped a lot when we put it in the bedroom. I imagine during the summer they probably crank the central AC up higher. Cesar was very helpful and prompt in answering our questions about the cooling system and the washing machine.

Cesar was warm and welcoming and gave us a good overview of Madrid. The apartment is very comfortable and we easily felt at home there. There is good Wi-Fi and the apartment was quiet (with the doors closed), even though it faces a street which can get noisy.
Cesar provided a very useful map with recommendations for restaurants, local supermarkets as well as other shops. He also put together a guide that he put together of Madrid neighborhoods as well as the major sights, which we enjoyed reading. He was easily accessible by phone when we had questions about the apartment. The apartment is comfortable and in a wonderful location.

Cesar was at the apartment to greet us when we arrived.  He showed us around and left us maps and restaurant suggestions for the area.  The apartment was very clean and exactly as shown in the photos.  Cesar was a wonderful host!  He called taxis for us as needed and encouraged us to contact him any time of the day or night if we had a problem.  Our adapter did not work in the apartment for charging our laptop and Cesar quickly supplied us with one that worked.  We thoroughly enjoyed our stay in Cesar's apartment and would not hesitate to stay there again!

Cesar made us feel very welcome. The apartment was clean and well appointed. In a central neighbourhood, very good location. Great place to stay in Madrid, we had no issues with the accommodations. Would highly recommend to stay there.
Hemos estado muy a gusto y la localización es perfecta para quien desee estar en el Madrid disfrutando de su cultura y museos.

We just returned home after four nights in the beginning of June at Cesar and Ana’s lovely apartment. This was a fantastic airbnb experience. Cesar was a friendly, helpful host from the moment we were in the taxi to the moment we left. The apartment wasn’t ready upon our arrival so Cesar welcomed us into his home to give us information about the area along with a map and some recommendations on restaurants, and let us keep our luggage in his apartment. After traveling for 2 weeks and a hand injury, having the modern convenience of an elevator was appreciated. The apartment was very clean, just as all the other reviewers described. We were pleasantly surprised by how quiet it was at night - no street noise in the bedroom whatsoever, which made for restful sleep. Location is great because it's so central - from the apartment you are an easy short walk to the Three Big museums, Retiro Park, and the Atocha Train station for a 30-minute ride to Toledo (which we highly recommend) - yet the apartment was on a quiet, non-touristic residential street. A short walk from the apartment is a charming cafe called Matilda where mostly locals hung out, which we enjoyed for great service, coffee, toasts, croissants and Spanish omelettes before heading to the museums, since not all restaurants open so early during the week day. Cesar also set up taxi service for our departure. We really loved Madrid and needed more time there. We definitely want to return to Madrid and can’t think of a better apartment to stay than at Cesar and Ana’s.

We had a fantastic stay in Cesar's appartment in Madrid. The location is perfect - in a safe neighbourhood within easy walking distance of all the key sights and the neighbourhood itself has a good number of bars and restaurants without being too noisy. The apartment itself is lovely - very spacious and spotlessly clean. And Cesar himself is a fantastic host - we felt genuinely welcomed by him. He was prompt to meet us - even coming to find us when we got lost. He greeted us with a drink and gave us some fantastic restaurant recommendations, allowed us to leave our luggage with him and was very prompt to respond to all communication. We would highly recommend this appartment.

Te encontrarás un apartamento céntrico. luminoso y extremadamente limpio. Nuestra estancia en Madrid coincidió con una ola de calor y pudimos descansar gracias al aire acondicionado. César es una persona servicial, atenta y correcta. Si eliges este apartamento no te equivocas.

I loved Cesar's apartment -- it's in a modern (i.e., everything works!), clean and quiet building, it has elevators (great for my 2 heavy suitcases!), even had a front desk person during the day.  Inside the apartment, the living room is light and airy and the bedroom was well protected from street noises inherent in the city center.  The apartment comes with dimple keys that actually work, which is a huge relief after staying in other places where the lock of the door to the building has gone awry and it takes some significant work trying to enter the building.  Perhaps I've had once too many thrilling nights, coming home late at night and struggling at the door, having a mini-heart-attack.  No such problem at Cesar's place!  The location is perfect, very centrally located, convenient but just a few steps away from the busiest streets.  The apartment was clean and well equipped, and the bed was comfortable (so much so I overslept the morning after arrival!).  Cesar kindly gave me recommendations on where to eat and what to see around/outside Madrid, and it was also good to know he lives in the same building just in case I needed anything.  I would definitely stay at his apartment again!   Thank you Cesar!
La descripcion es correcta, el departamento esta  bien ubicado, en un barrio tranquilo
位置很方便，就在普拉多博物馆对面的巷子里，房间有点小，但是两个人住也够了，总体不错。

Cesar's apartment was lovely and in a perfect location. We did not meet Cesar, but he had someone meet us to let us in and was available to us if we needed anything during our stay. We were able to walk to everything we wanted to see. There are several great tapas bars located just outside, and we loved having them so close!
The apartment was clean, and looks just as advertised in the pictures. The only issue that we had was a mysterious odor the first couple of days. We were unable to find the source, but it seemed to go away by the end of our trip.
Overall, a great apartment in a great location!

Listing was accurate.
Cesar's friend was there to greet us - she was very helpful and welcoming.
The apartment was in good shape- everything we needed.
Excellent location - close to good restaurants, groceries, main train station and many museums.

We enjoy to stay Cesar's flat. The location is perfect to visit to Prad museum, city centre and football stadium and so on. There are many restaurants and cafe to have Spanish food.
Cesar advised us many tips about Madrid and football game. Because of him, we really enjoyed Madrid.
The flat is very bright, clean and quiet. The equipment is perfect.
We strongly recommend his flat for everybody.
Thank you Cesar!!

We cannot recommend this apartment highly enough. Cesar was a very welcoming, charming and helpful host. The apartment was exactly as described and illustrated in the photos, if not better: it was in an attractive and secure building; it was modern, very clean, well equipped and most importantly in a lovely, popular and safe neighbourhood very close to the Prado, the Thyssen and the Reina Sofia and well-served by bars and restaurants and shops for supplies and within easy walking distance of several Metro stations. And to depart, after our 3 super days in Madrid, we walked to Arocha RENFE station, wheeling our luggage, to catch the airport express. Nothing could have been easier.

Cesar was a great host, friendly, competent, and very helpful. The apartment was very comfortable. We enjoyed hearing the kids play in the park, and being able to watch the street from the living room. It was exactly as described, and the pictures accurately showed it. All in all a great spot, one block from the Prado and right in the heart of old Madrid.

Cesar and Ana are absolutely lovely and very helpful in orienting me to Madrid. They had prepared special maps with notations on recommended restaurants and grocery shopping in addition to city maps. The apartment was exactly as presented in photos, very clean, comfortable, well stocked,and truly an ideal location. Just a 10 minute walk to the train station, less than five minutes to the Prado and Reina Sofia and an easy walk to the other main venues in the city - Puerto deal Sol, Plaza Mayor and the Palacio. Very safe neighborhood with pedestrian Calle las Huertas at the corner. The next time I am in Madrid I would not hesitate to return to this charming, convenient and peaceful apartment.

Ruth from Chicago USA. September 2015

Caesar met us at the flat and showed us around, then he pointed out on local maps where the local shops etc were, recommended some cafes and restaurants, and gave us some ideas for day trips. This was very kind and much appreciated.
The apartment is modern and clean, and is really well situated for the Prado and other museums, and also for the main railway station.
It is a very good base if you are spending a few days in Madrid and want to see as much as possible.
Cesar and Ana were great. Nice house, clean and a perfect location.

Cesar  was a quintessential Airbnb host. He excepted our reservation at the last minute which is much appreciated. The house was exactly as described and he spent a lot of time explaining where we were on the map.  He was in the building and available for anything we might have needed. I highly recommend him as a host!

Conociendo Madrid sabíamos que barrio era, nos gusta mucho esta zona, está cerca de todo.
El apartamento muy bien, tal y como pone el anuncio.
Con todas las comodidades por parte de nuestros anfitriones.
Yes Cesar and Ana are very welcoming.

This was our first Airbnb experience and it proved perfect, everything worked smoothly and better than expected.

The Prado Museum Air apartment exceeded our expectations:
- the location is perfect, close to main attractions and sightseeings and in the middle of restaurants, small shops and bars
- the lay-out is just perfect for two; relatively large dining-living room, good size bedroom, working kitchen and bathroom
- the apartment was very clean
- the equipment and appliances worked fine
- heating, warm water and internet connection all working well
- since we game by car, an extra convenience for us was the availability of a car park in the same building (with additional charge).

Cesar as the owner was very attentive and helpful.

Cesar's place was great and in a perfect location for exploring madrid. There were also heaps of restaurants and shoos close by to get food. The only trouble we had was with the wifi. It was very slow and dropped in and out a lot. But overall, it was a great experience and I would recommend staying

Cesar is a really nice host! It was so easy to comunicate with him! The apartment is in a perfect location, near the train station, Prado Museum and in a quarter full of pubs and resteraunts. The flat is nice, spacious and cozy. All is clean. Absolutetly suggested to spend some days in Madrid.

P.s. If you are a runner and rent this house go to the Parco del Buen retiro (300 mt) for a running session... i did it, and it was amazing!

The apartment is very well located for anyone wanting to visit the major art museums in Madrid. The neighborhood also has many cozy restaurants within walking distance.
We had stayed at a local hotel (Vincci Soho) the year before, but for this visit we wanted something more spacious. We were greeted by Cesar's son, and we also later met Cesar who offered to help us with any questions or concerns. The apartment was clean and functional, and we enjoyed our stay. We are happy to recommend the apartment.
Lennart

Cesar's apartment is lovely and was perfect for my husband, adult son and myself.  The location is absolutely ideal: very safe with easy walking access to museums, great restaurants and many of the top Madrid sites. Cesar made us feel very welcome.

Experiencia muy positiva. El apartamento se encuentra en el barrio de las letras, pero a pocos pasos del paseo del Prado. La zona es muy tranquila, pero con los suficientes bares, cafeterías etc alrededor. En la misma manzana hay un par de cafeterías perfectas para desayunar si no te quieres molestar en hacer cosas en casa. Por tan solo dos euros, un café y tostada o bollería. En la misma manzana y en las calles de alrededor suficientes bares con tapas, restaurantes a la carta, un pequeño carrefour express y alguna que otra tiendita.
El l apartamento es espacioso, ideal para una pareja. La cocina cuenta con todo lo necesario para la estancia. El baño está muy limpio y cuenta con una buena presión de agua en la ducha. El salón tiene vistas a la calle y mucha luz. Sofá moderno, tipo piel, y limpio. Buen tamaño de televisión. El dormitorio tiene lo necesario, pero lo mejor es que tanto el colchón como la ropa de cama son cómodos y muy agradables.
El propietario es muy atento y profesional, además vive en el edificio y al menos en mi caso, eso me da tranquilidad. Si vuelvo a Madrid no dudaré en volver a este apartamento.

Eine meiner besten airbnb Erfahrungen!Cesar war sehr kompetent,außerordentlich hilfreich,und seine Empfehlungen enorm hilfreich.Insbesondere wendete er sehr viel Mühe und Zeit auf,um unsere Koffer,die auf dem Hinflug "verlorengegangen"waren,gegen viele unsägliche Widerstände von IBERIA wiederzubeschaffen - was allerdings sage und schreibe 4 (vier)Tage dauerte.
Das appartment war für uns ideal,und um Toledo,Avila und Segovia zu besuchen,konnten wir alles vom Appartment aus unternehmen.Lage zu den Museen,zum Botanischen Garten und einer herrlichen Gasse mit vielen Restaurants (Calle Huertas) hätte nicht besser sein können.Unbedingt empfehlenswert.
Unnötig zu erwähnen,dass die Ausstattung und der Komfort perfekt waren.

Ana was waiting for us. She was very nice and helpful giving us advice about places to visit (including maps), restaurants in the neighborhood and attractions. The apartment is so nice, well provided and confortable. Cesar was prompt to our requests. The location is perfect. Walking distance to museums, parks, etc. We were very happy with our selection. Thank you Cesar and Ana.
Lo qncontramos en el apartamento contratado fue tal como se nos ofreció. Cómodo y confortable, en un barrio de los más atractivos de Madrid y con César como un buen anfitrión.

César es un gran anfitrión, muy atento, con un buen tiempo de respuesta a cualquier pregunta, adicionalmente cuando nos recibió en su apartamento nos recomendó sitios para ir a comer y visitar durante nuestra estadía en Madrid, lo cual apreciamos bastante. La localización del apartamento es inmejorable, cerca del museo del Prado y en medio de calles llenas de opciones para comer y beber, adicionalmente cerca de la estación de Atocha lo cual es muy conveniente si como nosotros el plan es usar el tren para ir a otras ciudades. Si tengo la suerte de volver a Madrid definitivamente me alojaría de nuevo aquí.

Cesar was a fantastic host: friendly, helpful, and full of great suggestions. He even helped us sort out our transport. But more importantly, he showed genuine concern when I fell ill. A superb host.

The apartment was exactly as described. The big three museums are within short walking distances. (So is the starting point for the hop-on-hop-off tourist bus). For anything further afield, the Anton Martin metro station is barely a 7-minute walk. So, perfect location.

Several small shops are within 3 minutes of the apartment. So, if you want to cook a meal or two, you can get local supplies. As for cafes and restaurants, I didn't count them, but I'm reasonably sure there were at least 17 zillion within walking distance ;-)

All in all, highly recommended. Thanks Cesar for a wonderful stay in Madrid.

We had a great stay in Cesar's apartment. We were travelling with a four-month-old baby and Cesar was very kind in providing a cod with sheets for us.
His son met us on the day of arrival and gave much information about nice restaurants and interesting places to visit. There was a map with remarks waiting for us, which was very helpful.
The apartment was very clean and spacious and nicely decorated. Even the baby got a good night rest.
The location of the apartment was excellent, around the corner of the Museo del Prado and very close to nice restaurants. If we return to Madrid, we will certainly try to stay here again.

the neighbor ugh was wonderful
the apartment was clean
and the host very kind

We stayed in few places using Airbnb in different countries. This place in Madrid was the best. The description and pictures of the place was accurate. the place was clean and had everything we needed. We were greeted by Cesar's son, very nice young gentlemen. We arrived early, they let us leave our luggage in their apartment until the place was ready. Very convenient. Once it was ready, which was very soon, they called us. When we needed one extra bed, it was provided. Nice portable bed, was good for my son.

The location is good, very close to Prada museum, 15-20 min walking distance from Plaza Mayor. There is small supermarket in the same building as apartment, which is very convenient. Plenty of restaurants around. I highly recommend this apartment.

The apartment was very spacious, clean, neat and well located in the very city center of Madrid. Flat met all our requirements and we spent a great time in there. Cesar as a host was a helpful, informative and ready for any help. He provided us with all important information about a flat itself and the neighbourhood around it. Even though we arrived late at night (1.30 am) he was waiting for us to give us a key. We appreciated the fact that he left some food in the fridge, which was a decent gesture, given that we arrived in the middle of the night. We recommend this apartment a lot, because it's location gives direct access to every attraction that Madrid is offering for a tourists.
Great host! Easy to communicate with. Perfect location. Great, clean apartment. Will definitely recommend to friends and family.
Muy bien ubicado, impecablemente limpio, excelentes anfitriones. El apartamento es tal cual está descripto en el anuncio. Lo recomendamos ampliamente y volveríamos sin lugar a dudas.

Cesar was a very gracious host. Because they live in the same building they are able to take care of any inquiries you may have. The apartment is very close to the Prado and the amazing park that we were able to run in a number of times.
Thanks again Cesar & Ana

The apartment met our expectations 100% - central location, clean, spacious and quiet (the bedroom faces an inner court). As a „bonus“, some groceries were available (juice, butter, milk, olive oil, tea etc), which was very much appreciated. Wifi fully operational throughout our stay.
Cesar responded promptly to all questions I asked before coming and gave us a personal welcome on our arrival as well as a number of useful tips. Thanks again!

The apartment is in a great location and is very clean and comfortable. Cesar met us with a smile and was very helpful with information about Madrid. We would definitely stay there again when in Madrid.

Great location, great apartment - very clean, very good host. 10-15 mins walk to Prado museum, Retiro park, Reina Sofia museum, Thyssen museum, botanical garden and lots of good places to eat. Convenience store on the same building. Atocha train station 800m, lots of public transportation around. Several HOHO bus stops near by. Caesar our host was very nice, provided us maps of surrounding areas and other places we can do a day trip to like Toledo...
Provided us with coffee, milk, orange juice, tea, sugar and truvia, breads for our first breakfast. This was our first Airbnb and was a great experience!

Communication prior to our stay was excellent.  George met us on arrival and showed us the apartment features.  A Madrid guide book and maps were provided.  Milk,juice,butter, jam and a selection of breakfast buns were provided.  The apartment was perfect, clean and the washing machine much appreciated.  The location was very central with walking access to everything we wanted to see.  Plenty of excellent eating options nearby.  Cesar met us on the last day to make sure all ok, a great touch. Highly recommended and much better than a hotel.  A great introduction for us to Airbnb.
The location was super convenient for an art lover, and for those who enjoy beautiful parks. The apartment was convenient, attractive and practical for cooking.
Apartamento cómodo y acogedor. Entorno genial y muy bien comunicado por trasporte público.

El apartamento de César y su agradable esposa es muy cómodo, prolijo, con absolutamente todo lo necesario que se te ocurra para pasar una estadía altamente agradable. Tiene una muy buena ubicación, cerca de todo y en un barrio muy animado. El edificio es tranquilo y muy silencioso. Los anfitriones siempre dispuestos a hecharte una mano en lo que se necesite, geniales. Sin dudas es muy, pero muy recomendable.

Excelente ubicación, todo lo que cualquier guía recomienda visitar se puede llegar a pie.El dueño siempre estuvo disponible para cualquier pregunta y nos facilitó toda información necesaria .Al llegar nos encontramos con todo lo necesario para desayunar y más .Excelente la limpieza y todo tal cual fué acordado incluso nos permitió dejar parte de nuestro equipaje mientras íbamos para Bali.
Sin duda con mi familia volveríamos.
Every thing is Fine. Strongly recommended!
Departamento bien equipado, buena zona, Cesar y Ana muy amables y siempre dispuestos para cualquier información ya que viven en el mismo edificio.

Ubicación increíble. Departamento Súper cómodo para venir con chicos. Cesar amable y comprometido. El departamento tiene todo lo necesario para una estadia confortable. Volvería sin dudarlo y lo recomendaré a mis amigos!
Un logement idéalement situé au cœur du quartier des musées, à proximité de bons restaurants et des commerces. A recommander pour une famille, merci à César et à sa famille pour leur disponibilité.

Cesar's place is centrally located in the heart of Madrid. The apartment was clean and comfortable. This gave us a great sense of living in Madrid.
The apartment has big opening windows that overlook some side streets and a park. Very picturesque. If you stick your head out enough, you can almost make out the Prado...you are that close.
I would highly recommend using Cesar.
Appart super . Propre et très bien situé . Quartier calme . Et surtout cesar tres disponible et tres gentil . Je vous recommande grandement cet appart .
Cesar & Ana are great hosts. They were very attentive to us during our stay. The flat is very nice & quite comfortable. Excellent location for visiting Madrid.

El apartamento esta bien ubicado, en zona centrica pero tranquila. Hay muchos museos cercanos a los cuales se puede acceder a pie. Los anfitriones son muy amables y al vivir en el mismo edificio hace que esten presentes al menor inconveniente que se presente. Volveria a alquilar esta propiedad sin duda una proxima vez.

Excellent apartment. It was near everything I needed to visit. There are so many cute places to eat in and it's also close to the train station. Cesar was kind and attentive. He gave us some advice on some places to visit and provided a map as well. Thank Cesar! We had a wonderful stay! Without a doubt, I would book this apartment again.

Cesar es un magnifico anfitrión, gentil y educado nos recibió maravillosamente. La ubicación es inmejorable para recorrer todos los lugares de interés de Madrid sin siquiera tomar el metro y a pocos minutos andando de la estación de Atocha. Barrio tranquilo y con todas los servicios alrededor, incluido un mercado.El apartamento está completamente equipado, muy limpio y confortable. Totalmente recomendable.Gracias!
Lovely place, very clean, excellent location. Cesar, the host, is very sweet and easy to communicate with. I would happily return.
Great and quiet place close to everything one need to explore Madrid and near cities.

The location is amazing - you're within a 10-minute walk of the "big three"art museums while living in a regular Madrid neighbourhood. There are good restaurants within a short block in all directions. Wishing I was back there already!
Good location....great restaurants nearby...Comfortable bed...lots of room..good kitchen..Caesar and his family was wonderful.

This is an outstanding apartment, great host, amazing central location, super clean and comfortable, many thoughtful touches that made us feel extra special. We totally fell in love with Madrid and will certainly be back. Don't tell too many people...
Hemos estado como en casa. Cómodo, limpio,agradable, ubicación excelente. Los anfitriones muy atentos y amables. Para repetir, sin duda!
A perfect location and Cesar was always available if something needed to be sorted out in the two weeks I stayed in his apartment. A wonderful visit to Madrid made possible by this host.
Great host! Great communication. Location is perfect, walking distance to Prado Museum and lots of stores and restaurants.
The apartment is attractive and convenient, and very well-located for a traveller interesting in Madrid's wonderful art collections.

En plein coeur de Madrid, un appartement confortable et lumineux. On peut tout faire à pied : Musées, monuments, jardins, vieilles rues et places, restaurants typiques et magasins de produits locaux.
César est très attentionné.

Well located and clean apartment. Tons of nearby dining options, easy walk to the Prado and most other areas in Madrid. The apartment is in a secure building with an elevator and A/C. Cesar is a wonderful host, very responsive with questions and went the extra mile to ensure we knew about the time change to standard time. Would certainly look to stay here again when visiting in the future.

Perfect location next to all major museums. Excellent gated building and apartment.
Very good reception, information and permanent contact by text message.

Very good apartments! In a great location with very welcoming host. The apartments include everything you need for the nice stay. The surrounding are great with allot of food places and minutes of walk to major sightseeing location and museums! Very suggested for travelers!

Cesar e la sua famiglia sono degli ospiti eccezionali, risposte alle domande nel giro di qualche minuto, un benvenuto con quanto necessario per la colazione in frigorifero e mille consigli per godersi Madrid. L'appartamento è come nelle foto, pulito, molto centrale. Il parcheggio è un filo stretto ma la mia auto non è piccola e comunque ci è entrata tranquillamente. Nessuna nota negativa, solo un suggerimento, una luce sopra lo specchio in bagno e una seconda mensola sarebbero utili.

Great modern apartment in a quiet,safe location near museums, restaurants, and Metro station. Cesar accommodated our early arrival so that we could leave our bags and start our vacation. He got us up and running with a quick orientation of the area and off we went. Kitchen is fully functional and Cesar provided a head start with goodies for breakfast. Apartment is impeccably clean with lots of light. Take Cesar's suggestions for local dining, as you will eat and drink with the locals.
I can't imagine staying anywhere else when I return to Madrid.
Muy buena ubicacion

A fantastic apartment from which to explore Madrid. Easy walk to Prado Museum, Retiro Park, Gran Via, etc. On site parking means you can also explore the whole central region of Spain from there as well. Very comfortable and secure place, with a nice selection of bars, restaurants, and markets in the immediate vicinity. Cesar was a friendly host. We would have stayed for a month if we could! Highly recommend.

Totalmente recomendable, super limpio, excelente ubicación, mucha luz natural, César y su familia, siempre al pendiente del más mínimo detalle. Sin lugar a dudas volvería con ellos. Muchas gracias César y familia.

Accueil très sympathique de César, qui parle bien français. Il nous a bien conseillé pour notre séjour. Il habite à même étage et s’est montré très attentif pour que notre séjour se passe le mieux possible. Nous reviendrons avec plaisir dans cette appartement pour continuer à visiter Madrid ( nos 4 jours n’ont pas été suffisant pour découvrir tous les trésors de cette ville)

Amazing place, located in a great area!
10/10

Casar's place is perfect for everyone. Location is strategic, easy access to everywhere. Tapas restaurant, bars and supermarkets around the apartment. If you need parking, Caser can arrange for you (10 euro) per day.  Caser is great host and very kind. Very easy to communicate with him. I recommended Caser's place. We are happy to have a great host and accommodation last day before we leave Spain. Gracias!

César foi um anfitrião incrível. Atencioso, preocupado com o hóspede e cuidadoso nos detalhes. A localização é simplesmente perfeita. Perto de tudo. Restaurantes, lojas e museus estão sempre a um passo. Pena que eu e minha esposa não pudemos ficar mais.
Great host, great spot!

Best location in Madrid if you are an art buff. Great local restaurants/tapas, a supermarket on the ground floor of the same building, and easy walking blocks to anywhere. Cesar was extremely nice, helpful, and thoughtful who also provided some much appreciated grocery supplies to get us started after a Sunday afternoon late arrival. The only advice I would give to a train arrival with big suitcases is to take a cab for the less than a mile - it is all up hill and the streets of Madrid are both cobbled and swarming with people.😁
Great beautiful clean home that is close to popular attractions.  Very attentive and was flexible with arrival time.  Couldn’t ask for anything more during my stay.

This is a perfect home base to explore Madrid!  The apartment is beautiful, bright and airy with a nice view out over a quiet little plaza. The neighborhood is very charming, filled with many great places to eat and it’s conveniently located within 10 or 15 minute walking distance of all of the major museums and attractions in central Madrid.  Cesar is a great host who goes the extra mile to make you feel welcome, even providing a nice selection of breakfast breads and juice for his guests.  I highly recommend staying at Cesar’s place!
Brilliant location very well equipped flat and most helpful host. And if you like craft beer Be Hoppy bar is in the same street.

This is my second stay at Cesar's place and it was just as good as the first visit.  Cesar is a warm and generous host and goes out of his way to be helpful.  His place is spacious, stylish, clean and airy.  The home is in a charming, lively neighborhood that is filled with great restaurants, bars and cafes but the apartment itself is peaceful and quiet, easy to sleep at night.  I can't imagine a better location for exploring Madrid!
Lo mejor y mucha amabilidad

Excelente anfitrión, atención plena, servicio y limpieza impecable.
Ubicación perfecta para desplazamiento a pie por el centro.
Muy recomendable.

Casa extremamente limpa, muito confortável, com localização excelente e diversas comodidades a pensar no conforto dos hóspedes. O anfitrião esteve sempre disponível para nos ajudar, muito atencioso, adaptando-se aos nossos horários e necessidades. Sentimo-nos em casa! Até breve!

Expeptionaly clean apartment and without smell of cleaning products etc. Literally zero dust! People with allergies would be very happy there. Comfortable and well located. Good air con and heating. Kitchen very well equipped, including bread, water, coffee, tea, etc. Excelent for late at night arrivals. Very kind and helpful host. Highly recommended!

Cesar is bright, charming and amazingly helpful🤗. No doubts if possible we will get back to their flat. It's in the best zone of Madrid, has light space and it's really well prepared for spending both long and short term periods.
See you soon Cesar 😉

Un hôte extrêmement sympathique et bienveillant. Une position de l'appartement idéale au centre de Madrid.
Un appartement très confortable et très bien équipé.
Et donc un séjour parfait.
Merci César
Anny & Christian
An extremely friendly and helpfull host. An ideal apartment position in the center of Madrid.
A very comfortable and very well equipped apartment.
And therefore a perfect stay.
Thanks u Caesar
Anny & Christian
Ubicación inmejorable. Espacio del piso suficiente. Recomendable.
This is the best place you can choose in Madrid.  Cesar is an excelent host and the location is unbeatable.  We felt like at home and will come back soon

Cesar was great and very communicative. I was personally unable to make the trip but my son and daughter went in my place. They loved the apartment and had great things to say about the host. They also told me the apartment was in a perfect location and they could not have been happier with the accommodations.
I hope to visit Madrid soon and will be sure to stay with Cesar.
Super accueil, appartement très calme, agréable et très bien situé!
Apartamento muy centrico y práctico. Cesar fue un huesped excelente. Muchas gracias! Volveremos.

This apartment is very centrally located in Madrid. You can walk everywhere. We loved it! The parking garage is a big plus if you are driving.
The apartment itself is very spacious and has everything you need. The bed is really comfortable with good pillows and a very nice duvet.
Cesar is a very welcoming host. There were lots of nice treats as welcoming gifts. Communication is easy.
I would absolutely recommend.

Merci beaucoup a cesar qui est une personne très agreable, très serviable et dévoué! L’appartement est parfait, tout est a disposition pour un super séjour!
Merci encore !

Excellent apartment & Cesar is a very accommodating host ,
In a great location, very clean & spacious apartment .
The apartment is spotless clean. The kitchen has everything you will need. The location is very convenient. Cesar is easy to communicate with. Could not be happier!
Piso muy acogedor muy bien situado. Cesar una gran host muy amable 10/10!

O espaço era exatamente como no anúncio, gostamos muito. Cesar e Ana foram sempre muito solícitos e disponíveis. A casa é realmente muito bem localizada e completa, passamos uma semana muito bem lá, internet ótima para trabalhar, casa iluminada e silenciosa, apesar de estar numa região muito movimentada. Obrigada por tudo Cesar e Ana, recomendamos demais!

This apartment was absolutely perfect. Probably the cleanest Airbnb my husband and I have ever stayed in. Confortable bed, bedroom quiet next to an inner courtyard. The kitchen was well equipped with everything we needed for our three week stay. Would stay in this apartment again in a heartbeat. Art lovers this is definitely the place for you. So close to many museums, eateries and a supermarket too. Thanks to Cesar and his family for an incredible stay. Can't wait to return!
An extremely well placed and comfortable apartment and Cesar was particularly helpful, an excellent host.

This is one of the best places we have stayed in many of our travels. The apartment is walkable to most everything including the La Latina District. The Prada and The Retiro Park are literally right across the street. The Atocha train station is a very easy walk. The C1 from the airport goes right here and is super easy and cheap. If you haven’t been to Madrid, we highly recommend it. Friendly people, very clean, beautiful parks and great food. We stayed here for 5 nights and could have stayed longer.

Cesar's apartment is ideal for a couple spending time in Madrid. It is very well located being close to the bars and restaurants of this historic area. The Prado is about a five minute walk from the apartment and we didn't need to use public transport. Cesar and his daughter are very attentive hosts. I would recommend this apartment greatly.
Great apartment in central location

Cesar's place is awesome. Don't think twice about booking with him. His hospitality is unmatched—he bought us chocolate and cava as a gift for our honeymoon and even called a taxi for us when we left.

El apartamento de Cesar estaba muy limpio y ordenado, Cesar nos dio la bienvenida a nuestra llegada a mi y a mi familia y nos brindó muchas recomendaciones de Madrid que fueron muy útiles. La ubicación del apartamento es estratégica, cerca del museo del prado y muy cerca de paradas de metro y autobús, definitivamente volveríamos a hospedarnos en este lugar!

Todo estuvo perfecto , el departamento es grande , co elevador , cómodo , muy bonito y con lindas vistas y ventanales .El anfitrión pendiente de lo que necesites.
Espectacular !

Cesar’s apartment was a dream. I often stay in this area, but I found my new favorite host. Cesar couldn’t meet me when I arrived, but he sent this charming son Jorge to show me around the apartment. 10/10 would recommend!
We really enjoyed our stay. This apartment has a great location too.

Lägenheten är oerhört fräsch, ren och bekväm och har allt man behöver. Inga trappor in vilket var bra eftersom vi kom med 1,5-åring och barnvagn. Cesar ordnade spjälsäng och barnstol åt oss vilket vi uppskattade mycket. Både Cesar och hans son som kom och mötte oss var trevliga och hjälpsamma. Läget är jättecentralt med massor av bra restauranger men inga störande ljud hörs från sovrummet.
Departamento muy lindo, limpio y bien ubicado

I have been to Madrid six or seven times before and always stayed in apartments. This was by far the best experience I have had. The apartment was delightful; quiet, secure and absolutely spotless. The location is marvellous being within walking distance of everything I wished to see in Madrid. I did not need to take the Metro and prefered to walk everywhere.
Cesar and his family were extremely welcoming and helpful. I think their attention to detail is what has made this apartment stand out. It is fully equipped. Even Netflix is available on the widescreen tv. Usually, when I arrive, the first thing I do is to go out and buy the necessities. I found milk, butter, jam and coffee pods for the espresso machine were already provided. Instead of dashing out, I could just sit down, recover from my journey and start to enjoy my stay. Not that there is far to go to find groceries, as there is a well stocked supermarket just next door.
A wonderful stay. Many thanks to Cesar and his family.

Excelente apartamento, muito bem localizado no centro de Madrid, perto dos museus, das Portas do Sol e da Plaza Mayor. Fizemos tudo a pé. Ponto a favor foi ter garagem, a um preço favorável comparando com os parques de estacionamento do centro da cidade. O apartamento estava super limpo, muito confortável e quente (estava frio em Madrid nesta altura do ano). O César foi super prestável com tudo e um excelente anfitrião. A cozinha estava muito bem equipada. Fantástico!

This is the third time we’ve visited Madrid and the third time we’ve stayed with Cesar. I really can’t imagine a nicer place to stay in Madrid! Cesar is a wonderful host, very responsive and helpful, a warm-hearted person who always goes above and beyond for his guests! The apartment is spacious, clean, and bright, and the location is great, within easy walking distance to museums and all of the other major sites in central Madrid. Also, it’s in a vibrant, pedestrian-oriented neighborhood with lots of great restaurants and nightlife, but it is still private, four floors up, and quiet and peaceful at night with the windows closed. I highly recommend staying at Cesar’s place!

We’ve stayed in Cesar’s place several times now and can’t imagine a better location for visiting Madrid. The apartment is spacious, bright, beautiful, and comfortable; it’s easy to make yourself at home. Cesar is warm and friendly, and he responds quickly whenever you need help with anything: recommendations, restaurant reservations, reservations for airport taxi, etc. The apartment overlooks a small plaza in a pedestrian-oriented neighborhood. It can be boisterous outside, especially in the evenings, but inside, it is very quiet and peaceful when the windows are closed. The area has many excellent restaurants, tapas bars (especially Cervantes) and patisseries (especially Motteau). Also, the apartment is in a perfect location for touring; close to the metro and it’s an easy 10 to 15 minute stroll to reach all three major art museums, Retiro, and most of the other major attractions of central Madrid. Highest recommendation!

Cesar is the best host we have interacted on AirBnB. From the apartment tour on arrival, we knew something special was coming. We would like to thank Ana and Cesar for letting us stay at their place and hope to stay with them again on our next visit to Madrid.
Excelente ubicación y magnifico anfitrión.

We loved the location and the comfort, cleanliness and amenities! All walks to restaurants and meeting places for tours were interesting and walkable and we felt safe.  Cesar is very knowledgeable, friendly and accessible.  We highly recommend his place.
Amazing spot, quite literally on Madrid cultural heart. 100% recommended.

I can’t sa enough good things about our stay. The apt was exactly as described with a large living area , comfy couch to stretch out in after a long day of sightseeing and good space all around. The bed was very good and the kitchen is small, but has everything we needed. Cesar and Ana were amazing. We arrived very early in the morning and although the apt was still booked, they let us drop off our luggage at their place ( in the same building ), and cleaned it once the other guests left and let us check in early. The apt is located within walking distance to everything, but in a street that feels local. It there is a small grocery store right around the corner, which is very convenient. We had a great stay and would definitely stay here again next time in Madrid,

Great place. We were met by Cesar’s son who helped us with our luggage and explained how everything worked. The location is perfect- the whole of the centre is within easy walking distance. It’s on a busy street- lots of bars and restaurants, but the bedroom is at the back, so quiet at night. The house had everything we needed- including coffee and rolls for breakfast. César was easy to reach and he checked in with us to make sure everything was ok. I felt very welcome.
excelente todo y César muy buen anditrion

This is a great find for a family or couple vacation, if this is your first time in Madrid literally the best place to stay
Cesar and Ana were welcoming and quick to response , apartment is clean , well illuminated and street noice is not noticeable, even by being surrounded by several lively places, i would recommend venture out as those places are too expensive for what they offer
Literally a 0 hassle , quick check in and easy check out

We will definitely try to stay at Cesar’s apartment should we visit Madrid again.  We would also recommend it without hesitation. The apartment meet all of our expectations, which were very high from reading previous reviews.  The apartment was spotless, perfectly located for dining, grocery shopping and walking the city.  So much so that we never used the metro even though Cesar provided a metro card to make that possible. In addition he met us at the apartment to let us in and gave us many suggestions to make our stay more enjoyable. His communication at all times was perfect.  Most of all Cesar is a very friendly, pleasant and accommodating gentleman who we are very glad to have met.

El lugar es hermoso, limpio, cálido y acogedor. Es tal cual lo vez en las fotos.
Está situado en el mejor punto de Madrid cerca de Museos, parque el retiro, calle huertas que es preciosa y todos sus alrededores. Cuentas con metro cerca y la estación Atocha de tren.
Elvira es un gran ser humano, buena persona, generosa y de verdad terminas sintiendo cariño hacia ella.

Nurias apartment is in a great location.. Only 2 minutes walk from the Sol and 5-7 minute walk from plaza major. Lots of restaurants and bars on your doorstep but still a very quiet apartment.
The studio is a good size and very beautifully decorated. The kitchen had almost everything you would need to cook and the rest of the apartment contains other essential items such as hairdryer, adapter plug and free wifi.
I stayed here with my mum and we both enjoyed it v much. Nuria came to meet us and give us a welcome pack of leaflets and maps for Madrid and also a bottle of wine which was a lovely touch! She is a lovely lady and was on hand via text if we needed her. I would highly recommend this place. Thanks Nuria :-)
We had an amazing 48 hours in Madrid. Nuria was so kind and helpful, left us maps of the city and her apartment is beautiful. Location is perfect and we would recommend to anyone visiting Madrid.
Great apartment, nicely finished, unbelievably good location for exploring central Madrid, Nuria was a pleasure to deal with at all times, and very helpful.  Recommend.

I organised a birthday surprise for my boyfriend in Madrid... and what a wonderful stay we had in Nuria's apartment! We could not have asked for more!

Let me start by saying that this apartment was so centrally located, that we did not at all use the pre-paid metro passes that we purchased at the airport, as it was always quicker to walk! As for the apartment itself: it is brand new, with every piece of furniture and fitting being of superior quality. Nuria has done a wonderful job renovating and designing this place! It was clean, and every detail was thought of by Nuria - there was nothing we needed that was not already in the apartment - from a bottle opener to washing powder! And Nuria; what a wonderful host - she contacted me prior to our arrival and offered directions, met us at the apartment as soon as we arrived, and spent time with us giving her recommendations on Madrid, and answering any question we had. Also, she was very quick to reply to any query we had during our stay.

Thank you Nuria for our lovely stay, we look forward to returning to your wonderful apartment!

My stay in Madrid was wonderful thanks to Nuria. Not only did she provide an unbelievable, brand-new apartment in the heart of city, she was one of the kindest, most helpful people that I have ever dealt with. If you want a wonderful experience in Madrid, book Nuria's apartment!

Nuria is an amazing host, made us feel very welcoming! We stayed there for 3 days, the flat is lovely and well presented. The flat is in such prime location. All attractions are within walking distance. I will definitely recommend this flat if you come to visit Madrid !

Nuria is an amazing host -- so kind, so sweet, so gracious!  Her communications with us was perfect and she was waiting for us at the apartment when we arrived close to 22:00.  The apartment is beautiful!  It's a studio, but it feels so much bigger.  The furnishings are all brand new and the design and decoration is exquisite. The linens were fresh and clean and Nuria even left us a small bottle of Cava upon our arrival!  The wifi is very fast and the hot water is strong.  and the apartment location is perfect -- right in the heart of Madrid!  We highly recommend Nuria and her lovely apartment.  We would never consider staying anywhere else on our next visit.

Una gran elección, exquisito según calidad / precio y con una ubicación excelente. Nuria es una HOST que cuida el mas mínimo detalle del apartamento y definitivamente te hará sentir como en casa.
Un 10.
Muchísimas gracias!!

This years trip to Spain I used 3 places and Nuria was the best host of them all, She was always ready to answer my questions and all her information was great. The places she recommended for food and drinks were the best. The apartment it self was clean, fancy and comfortable.
For sure if I visit Spain again I will stay in her apartment.

Nuria fue una host estupenda: respuesta al instante, sin problemas de horarios ni disponibilidad, super amable en todo momento... Y el apartamento una pasada, cuidado al detalle (las fotos no engañan), muy cómodo (todo funciona perfectamente), y con una localización inmejorable. 100% recomendable!

If you are going to Madrid, have no doubts, stay at Nuria's apartment!
the place is amazing, extra new and rich furniture, fully equipped with everything you may need for a short vacation but also for a longer stay. Comfortable bed, bath room and kitchen, every detail has been taken in care here.
The location is definetely central, 5-min walk from Plaza del Sol, you have a lot of restaurants and bar all around.
Last but not least, Nuria is extremely kind, she made everything to help us not just for the check-in (directions, appointment, etc.) but also for the check-out (e.g she kept our luggages due to our late flight back).

Ha sido una experiencia genial y repetiría sin dudarlo.
Nuria estuvo súper atenta a todo y, de verdad, lo recomiendo.
INCREÍBLE!
Gracias Nuria.
This trip was an excellent with Nuria's help. She is so sweet and the room was exactly the same as pictures shown, and the location are so great.  Thanks
Nuria es encabtadora nos hizo sentirnos cómo en cada desde el minuto uno.El apartamento es exacto a las fotos ...un 10!!! Y la situación super céntrica andando llegamos a todas partes.
Great apartment in fantastic location. Would highly recommend.

Great place to stay: a beautiful apartment! Just like the pictures, but feels even more spacious. The room has a lovely interior decoration and with a good bed! The bathroom is perfectly clean and has a good shower. Due to double glazing silent sleeping. Good wifi; the internet is very fast!
Location is very good: right in the middle of Madrid, between nice streets, squares, tapas bars, museums and other sightseeings.
It was easy to communicate with host Nuria and she made us feel most welcome. She is very friendly and gave lots of nice tips to visit. Highly recommended!!

We has a blast staying in Nuria's flat. The apartment was exactly as described at an incredible location. Nuria was on time when meeting us and was very helpful in describing a few points of interest. We would highly recommend!!

Amazing apartment, everything was in the right place. Just a few steps from Sol the apartment is very easy to access from the subway. This is one of the best places I have stayed at, we are very fortunate to have had such a good host who made sure that we were completely satisfied.

Interaction with Nuria was very easy. We were warmly welcomed at Nuria's flat and received an introduction to the surroundings. The flat itself is exactly as shown on the pictures. Very modern and very clean. The location is just perfect: in the middle of the city center surrounded by lots of bars and restaurants. We can definitely recommend this place. Thanks Nuria for the nice stay!

Le logement correspond en tous points à la description faîte. Nuria est tout à fait accueillante, c'était un vrai plaisir.  Logement très, très propre. En plein centre de Madrid à quelques minutes de la place Mayor. Idéal pour passer quelques jours à Madrid !
El apartamento está situado en pleno centro, muy bien insonorizado y las fotos corresponden con la realidad. Nuria es una expléndida anfitriona.

Nuria was an absolute delight and so friendly and helpful! The place is so charming and beautifully, modernly decorated and equipped. The mattress was so comfortable. The place is in heart of center so it is noisy at night and it has double windows for that reason. The point is, you can't sleep with the windows open but windows closed you won't hear anything.
Thank you Nuria. Looking forward to our next stay with you.

An amazingly located and gorgeous, well-designed and decorated flat in which to spend some days exploring Madrid. Nuria was very helpful and flexible from the outset and communication was excellent.
The flat is lovely, with a fully equipped kitchenette including kettle and pots and pans. The bathroom is beautiful with a huge double shower.
Delighted with my experience with this flat and would definitely book again.
Thanks Nuria!!!

Nuria was an amazing host! She have us such a warm welcome, and spent ages recommending things for us to do despite the fact that we arrived so late. The champagne on arrival was a lovely touch! It's a beautiful apartment in an amazing location - you can literally walk everywhere! Thank you so much for everything! I'll be recommending it!

In a bustling and vibrant city like Madrid, it is very tough to find an appartment that is both peacefull  and centrally located. The place is spacious enough for two persons and, above all, very clean. The warm welcome of Nuria was in line with how I came to know the Madrileños; help- and thoughtful. The appartment has all everyday necessities. Therewith the pictures are highly similar. We will be back some day.

Apartamento céntrico, muy bien situado, con parking debajo de la casa.  Muy cuidado y limpio. La atención de César inmejorable y a mis hijas les encantó el detalle de bollería y turrones que nos dejó. Super recomendable, si volvemos a Madrid, repetiremos.
Cesar was a great host. Very helpful and friendly. Great location. Very nice Airb&b. We would definitely stay again.
We stayed at Cesar apartment and really enjoyed during our stay. It is located in the center of the city. You can find good restaurant easily. I highly recommend Cesar apartment.

Cesar fue un excelente anfitrión. Impecable el departamento. Cómodo para familia de 4. Excelente ubicación que facilita el recorrido del casco centrico de Madrid a pie. Sin dudas un lugar para volver.

Cesar's place was in a great location to explore Madrid by foot.  Walkable to the sites, downtown and el Retiro park. Many restaurants nearby.  Cesar was the most hospitable host, with tons of information and extremely helpful.  The apartment was super clean, highly recommended.

Апартаменты отлично расположены, музеи в шаговой доступности, на первом этаже здания есть продуктовый магазин , а по всему району множество ресторанов и кафе. Цезарь - прекрасный хозяин, он действительно заботится о своих гостях. Я бы обязательно вернулась сюда снова.

Wunderbare Wohnung zentral in Madrid. Wichtigsten Sehenswürdigkeiten zu Fuß zu erreichen. Tiefgarage im Haus. Toller Gastgeber, der uns bei Problem mit unserem Auto sehr geholfen hat. Er war immer erreichbar und hat sofort reagiert. Kleiner Supermarkt im Haus.
Alles bestens!
César est un hôte charmant, accueillant et prévenant. Très disponible. le logement qu'il propose est impeccable et très bien situé.
Excelente hospedagem, Cesar e sei filho Jorge foram muito atenciosos! Apartamento bem localizado e confortável, em prédio com fácil acesso aos principais museus e pontos turísticos!
When we come back to Madrid, I will stay with Cesar is the perfect place 👍

This flat was exactly like the pictures. Clean, well located near museums, and had the amenities I prize most -- a coffee maker and washing machine. The neighborhood us walkable and I felt safe all the time. I recommend this place for a Madrid stay especially if the guest wants yo go to the museums and Retiro Park.

We were welcome by Cesar’s son. He was very nice and give us a lot of helpful information and recommendations. The apartment was clean and very nice. There are many walkable attractions like the Prado Museum. I really recommend this place!

Wonderful stay. Greeted by Cesar’s son, Jorge, who was super friendly and informative. Everything worked and apartment was spotless. So close to the major museums, Atocha Rail Station and all the inner city tourist must sees. No issue with finding meals or a drink as the streets are packed with restaurants and bars. Apartment itself was surprisingly quiet. Communication with Cesar quick and easy. Lift with heavy suitcase most welcome, as was washing machine. Highly recommended.
Great apartment in great location. The apartment was quite, very clean and very well equipped. Cesar is also very nice and accommodating.
Cesar was very warm and welcome. It was very spacious, clean, and comfortable. It provided everything we needed. If we travel to Madrid again, we would definitely stay there again.
excellent place to stay. Very walkable. Took taxi from airport then walked everywhere including train station at end. Really appreciated the out the windows clothes line.
Cesar is great host, helped us with local recommendations and resturants. Helped us with taxi for airport. Beautiful house and great locality walkable to metro and train station.

Can't say enough about how fabulous both the apartment and our host were! Cesar made us feel so welcome. He gave us suggestions and directions to everywhere we wanted to go. Location is perfect! We walked everywhere because it was so close to the museums, the park, and other attractions. Also close to the train station and metro.
The apartment was lovely and very well-stocked. We had everything we needed. We highly recommend Cesar's Prado apartment for your visit to Madrid.

This is the second time I have stayed at Cresar’s wonderful apartment.
Everything was just perfect!
Wonderful host who provided great recommendations. The apartment was very clean, comfortable, and quiet in a fantastic location with lots to do nearby. Highly recommend.

We hebben genoten van Madrid in het appartement van César. Schoon, ruim en de belangrijkste bezienswaardigheden op loopafstand. Een groot voordeel is dat er een overdekte parkeerplaats beschikbaar is. We werden verwelkomt door Jorge, de zoon van César. Hij was, net als zijn vader, zeer vriendelijk en behulpzaam. Wij raden dit appartement zeker aan. Als we weer naar Madrid gaan, zullen we zeker terugkomen in dit appartement!

El apartamento de César se sintió desde un principio como estar en casa. Está perfectamente ubicado dentro del Centro Histórico de Madrid, puedes caminar a todos lados y está muy cerca de sitios de interés en la ciudad. César nos entregó una tarjeta de movilidad con algunos viajes incluidos, así como mapas y folletos que nos ayudaron a tener una mejor idea de las cosas que íbamos a visitar posteriormente. También tuvo muy buena comunicación con nosotros en todo momento. El apartamento tiene todo lo necesario para pasarlo bien, en nuestro caso para una familia de 4 nos quedó perfecto.
Cesar es tan genial como su departamento. Todo un descubrimiento . Volvere . Muchas gracias por todo

We really enjoyed staying here. Very central, very quiet. We slept very good. Cesar is very good in english conversation and very helpful.
We love to come back !

My boyfriend and I stayed in this apartment for 3 nights. Great location in an arty area of Madrid with lots of cafes and bars, some galleries and vintage shops. Right next to the Reina Sofia and Retiro park. The apartment was really lovely, clean and spacious and well equipped with everything we needed. Elena was a great host - really friendly and helpful and gave us good recommendations on where to go out. I would definitely stay again next time I am in Madrid.

Elena was an excellent host. Very friendly and taking care of us giving some advice regarding the city and contacting us during our stay to be sure that everything was going well.

The apartment was extremely clean, well located (very quite street), well decorated and with all amenities we needed.

Thank you again Elena, the next time we come to Madrid, we will certainly proceed with you again !

Romain & Fabrice

This apartment is in a fantastic location on a quiet street very close to the Puerta de Atocha train station (great if you want to visit other parts of Spain while you're there) and to other main attractions such as the Reina Sofia and Prado museums and the El Retiro park. Because it's in the central part of Madrid, it's also an easy walk to pretty much anywhere else you might wish to go. The apartment itself was very clean, well-decorated, and had pretty much everything we needed: WiFi, TV, washing machine, drying rack, towels, full kitchen. Elena and her mom, Luisa, gave us great advice on how to get to the apartment from the airport and pointed us to the supermarket nearby. One thing to keep in mind: Ask about hot water when you arrive. I stayed there with two of my sisters and we had no idea how the electric water heater worked, so we sometimes did not have enough when we took showers one after the other and didn't know to wait in between. But overall, I'd definitely recommend staying at this apartment.

Elena's apartment is great. It is in a central location 5 minutes walking distance from the main train station and the Reina Sophia museum, 10 minutes to the Prado and Retiro Park and 20 minutes to most of the major sites of Madrid. The neighborhood of Lavapies is a great mix of cultures, very cool indoor market and lots of great restaurants and cafe's. We stayed for 10 days so the washing machine was a nice extra. There was plenty of room for two of us to set up our home office during our visit.  I highly recommend staying at Elena's apartment.
Apartment is exactly as stated.  Elena was very friendly and helpful with all questions.
Elena's apartment is beautiful and in a great location. I would stay there again in a heartbeat. Elena is also an amazing host and is extremely helpful. Thanks so much Elena!

What a lovely, cosy apartment Elena has! It is a fantastic location - we walked absolutely everywhere; only had to get the metro once because it was raining. Close to everything. Everything in the apartment worked well; great shower and kitchen. Elena was very helpful, emailing information prior to our arrival and meeting us at the apartment. She also let us stay late on the day of our departure. I would definitely recommend it!

Elena's apartment was absolutely perfect. Great location, wonderfully appointed and decorated. Struggled a little with the early morning rubbish collection, but that was a very minor thing. Elena's was so helpful, both before and during our stay. So much fantastic information regarding food, transport and the area in general. Highly recommended.

Ese piso está  al lado de la Reina Sofia y dos estaciones del metro.  Tiene acceso a todo de 5 minutos caminando. Elena es una chica super simpática. Nos esperaba a la puerta y nos atendío con  mucha sinceridad.  La experiencia con Elena y el piso suyo ha sido una muy buena memoria de Madrid.

El departamento es muy cómodo y decorado con muy buen gusto, tiene todo lo necesario.
La ubicación es ideal, nos manejamos todo caminando, tranquilo y seguro.
Elena superatenta nos esperaba y no sabíamos bien el horario de llegada, muy buena anfitriona.
Súper recomendable, no conocíamos el barrio y nos encanto.
Great stay, great communication. This apartment in Madrid is highly recommendable. Clean, good location and extremely friendly host. Book it!

Los días que mi familia y yo hemos estado en el apartamento de Elena han sido estupendos.

La verdad es que a pesar de que nuestro viaje era de ocio nos hemos sentido en un ambiente muy acogedor, como en casa,. El apartamento es monísimo, cómodo, muy limpio, bien equipado, muy bien situado y la atención por parte de las anfitrionas ha sido en todo momento excelente. Por supuesto lo recomendamos y esperamos volver pronto.
Nicely decorated apartment on groundfloor, great central location with some nice tapas bars around the corner. All the nice visiting spots are walking distance. Elena was a great host!

Elena is very friendly. Though we didn't have a chance to meet with each other, she's kind to help and gave us solution. Her apartment is also nice and well equipped. The location is supper great, just walking distance to the three famous museums. We enjoyed the warm and artistic ambience of the areas nearby.

Magnifique séjour chez Elena.
Appartement très très bien situé, parfaitement équipé et une hôte fort sympathique et accueillante
Je vous recommande l'appartement à 100%

I had a very nice stay on Elena's appartment.

The place was comfortable, nicely decorated, very practical (smart layout), very good location close to going out places, in a calm street.

Elena's mother was waiting for me on time and she was helpful and friendly.

The apartment is on ground level (it has a dedicated door on the outside) and it has just one window which is on the street level, which you will probably need to keep open, since there's no A/C.

Elena is revy friendly, is been quick to reply and gives excellent information. In short, she is a terrific host and makes you feel welcome in Madrid. Her apartment is tidy, clean, light and cosy - a very nice place to rest when in Madrid. It also has everything you need in it. And it is in a quiet neighborhood even if it's centrally located. She also provided maps and suggestions for sightseeing. I warmly recommend her and her apartment! I stayed there alone but would also recommend it for couples.

We had a perfect stay in Madrid. Elena was an excellent host, friendly and prompt in communication. The apartment was clean and comfortable and had everything we needed. The neighborhood had a good, lively vibe with abundance of small groceries, bars and restaurants. The proximity to numerous museums and galleries was also a major advantage. Having such treasures just around the corner, we popped in at Reina Sofia a few times (access was free during the last opening hours).

Elena and her mother took very good care of me....not complaining when my plane was late and generously adapting to my departures times.  The apartment is perfect - with everything you might need for a short or long stay. It is impeccably clean and cared for in a quiet street.  I could not ask for better hosts.  Thank you Linda

We stayed at Elena's place during the long weekend of first of May, it is in great location, actually just behind the Museo Reina Sofia, in one of the most characteristic districts of Madrid, the Lavapies. The flat is exactly as in the pictures, nice, clean and tidy. Elena was very gentle and also explained us in great detail how to get there from the airport and waited for us, she left us with maps for the city's and the metro. It was a great choice to stay in her apartment.
Our experience in Madrid was outstanding. The apartment is very well located and near to pretty much everything! Madrid is a fantastic city

This cozy loft could not be more convenient for visitors to Madrid who want to visit all the major museums, with access to all the transportation and entertainment amenities of this great city.
The host, Elena, is gracious and very responsive with communication and information. The place is very comfortable, stylish and has all the mod-cons needed for an extended stay.

Everything worked, the place was spotless.
The street is quiet.

Couldn't have asked for nor expected a better place or location for the value. I only hope it is available my next visit to Madrid.

We had a wonderful stay and will certainly consider coming back again.
The studio apartment was just as described by Elena. We were amazed that no detail was overlooked for the comfort of the guest.
The communication was great from the very first approach to Elena. Messages were responded instantly.
We had the pleasure of meeting Luisa, Elena's mother who welcomed was to the apartment on our arrival. What a wonderful professional woman! We could have spent all day talking with Luisa.
Thank you for the welcoming amenity left in our refrigerator and to Luisa for the great bottle of wine she sent us to the apartment.
The apartment is walking distance to many places such as the museums, Sol, Atocha, theaters and many restaurants and tapas places.
The neighborhood is very cultural with a lot of art, theaters and venues, safe, clean and friendly.
Thank you Elena for bailing us out with assistance with the taxi and ensuring we made it on time to the airport.
We will be back this year and stay at this apartment.

had a wonderful stay, me and my boyfriend really loved this apartment. Elena's mother met us the first day, and she can speak English and French, so there wasn't any communicational problem. The location is super, and apartment is lovely, recommended

Wonderful apartment - definitely recommend. Elena's apartment is clean, spacious, and decorated nicely. This is the type of AirBnB that you feel good spending time in - to cook in or just relax. The bed was very comfortable and the street was quiet at night. Elena was a excellent host, check-in was seemless and she provided a plethora of brochures, maps and tips for exploring Madrid.  It was convenient to Atocha, Reina Museum, and metro stops. The surrounding neighborhood near  did seem to host a younger crowd and there was much more trash on the street than in other parts of Madrid.
Elena's place is exactly as shown in the pictures. The check in was super easy and fast and the location of the apartment is amazing. Thank you Elena!

Tuvimos que hacer una reserva de último minuto pero la estancia en el departamento de Elena fue excelente, agradezco mucho toda la ayuda brindada, el ambiente, la zona, su hospitalidad, todo estuvo verdaderamente increíble. Muy recomendado el lugar, espero volver en una próxima ocasión.
