Elena was welcoming and helpful. The location was amazing (lots of things to do and places to eat nearby). I was there for almost 3 weeks and it's the kind of place you can still be happy to go back to after a long day. Like most Spanish apartments, it's small but the space is well used. The in-apartment washer was a lifesaver. WiFi was fast, water was hot, AC worked. Elena was in contact as required throughout the trip and quickly available for any accommodations. I'll likely stay here next time through Madrid, as well.

El alojamiento de Elena es perfecto para visitar Madrid: a escasos minutos de la Estación de Atocha, se llega rápidamente al centro desde allí simplemente caminando. Además, está en una calle muy tranquila con lo que el descanso por la noche está garantizado.
La anfitriona puso todas las facilidades a la hora del check-in y check-out, de manera que pudiera combinarlo de la mejor manera con las horas de llegada y salida de mi tren. Muy recomendable.

Estupenda elección. Inmejorable situación, comunicación, estilo...
Sin duda, lugar perfecto para visitar Madrid sin tener que depender de ningún transporte público.
Volveré seguro!!

Elena is very flexible on our early arrival. She provides excellent info about everything we need to know and do in Madrid. Her apartment has everything you need to feel like home. The only thing that isn’t so good is the neighbors were very noisy at night during our stay. But overall it’s very good.

Le logement est très bien situé au cœur  de Madrid, proche de tous les lieux à visiter et des commerces. Le logement est un mini-loft, propre et bien équipé, dans une petite rue relativement calme et très typique. L'accueil ainsi que les échanges préalables ont été parfaits. Nous y retournerons avec plaisir si l'occasion de revenir à Madrid se présente.

El apartamento de Elena está muy cómodo, está muy bien ubicado en una calle tranquila pero a la vez en una zona con todo a mano. Transporte, servicios y bares. Está cerca de la terminal de Atocha y del museo Reina Sofía
Todo genial !

Está bien ubicado, 10 minutos andando desde  Atocha . Zona con muchos bares y restaurantes. La estación de metro Lavapiés es la más cercana. Respecto al departamento debo decir que se accede al dormitorio por una escalera, ya que el mismo se ubica en un entrepiso . Por lo que sugiero considerarlo en caso de tener alguna dificultad para subir las mismas , más aún con valijas. Por otro lado posee un equipo de aire acondicionado en la planta baja y un ventilador en el entrepiso
Excelente lugar, limpio y cómodo. Muy buena ubicación en la ciudad, acceso a Metro fácilmente y también de otro medios de transporte. El barrio es muy tranquilo.

Bonito apartamento, luminoso, ordenado y con poco ruido, perfecto pasar pasar unos días. Ubicación céntrica en el barrio de lavapiés, con buenas conexiones al metro.
Un 10.

Nos encantó el alojamiento de Elena y todas las recomendaciones que nos dio, el lugar está muy bien ubicado y hay muchas opciones para salir a comer o bares.
La pasamos muy bien en nuestras vacaciones en Madrid. Gracias Elena!
Elena and Luisa are very kind. The apartment had everything we needed. The location is great - walking distance to the most famous museums -  and the street is very quiet. Recommended!

Muy buena ubicación en pleno centro, súper acerca de Estación de Atocha, muchos bares y restaurantes, galerías, exposiciones…  durante nuestra estancia hubo la fiesta de Las Mayas en las calles vecinas.  Elena era anfitriona muy amable y nos di sugerencias de sitios para comer, beber y disfruta.  Estancia súper bonita, vamos a volver 👍👍👍😀😀😀

Un lugar maravilloso en el centro de la ciudad, una anfitriona maravillosa, sensible y prudente, siempre dispuesta a ayudar. Todos los lugares interesantes están cerca y se puede llegar a pie. Un poco de ruido por la noche, eso es lo único negativo. En general, unas vacaciones maravillosas, ¡muchas gracias Elena!
Todo muy lindo y limpio. Volvere!!!

O local é perto de várias atrações turísticas e de fácil transporte. Alguns minutos de caminhada e já tem restaurantes e supermercado. A mãe da Elena nos esperou, nos deu as informações necessárias e foi muito simpática conosco. É um bom lugar para ficar em Madri e seria uma ótima opção para ficarmos lá na próxima vez.

Elena y Luisa fueron excelentes anfitrionas. Su piso esta muy bien ubicado, se puede disfrutar muy bien Madrid. Contaba con tetera, tostadora, microondaas y un sofa cama nuevo abatible en el que dormí. No había ruido a pesar de ser un bajo, y para los días de calor tienen un aire acondicionado que nos sirvió bastante. Estamos muy contentos con sus atenciones, muchas gracias!

El apartamento de Elena es muy bonito , cómodo y está cerca de estación de metro , supermercados , cafés y de la estación de Atocha.
Elena es una anfitriona muy amable , accesible y responde inmediatamente ante cualquier duda . Además tiene mucha información útil en el apartamento de lugares para visitar y sitios para comer. También de cómo ubicarla a ella o a su madre.

My friend and I stayed and enjoyed our visit. the apartment was as described
and nicely decorated. The location is in the heart of the tourist area and everthing can easily be reached by walking, metro, and rail.
The host was supportive and responded quickly.
thank you, Elana!

The best experience so far! Wonderful little place, very clean, very comfortable and everything you need for a short vacation was there. The host was most friendly and professional and we will certainly return! In our opinion the place abd location was absolutely perfect. Thank you!
gentile accogliente molto disponibile alloggio perfetto non manca nulla zona molto comoda si va a piedi dappertutto. Elena e la mamma molto gentili, torneremo

El apartamento está estupendo:
Muy limpio y equipado con todo lo necesario.
La zona es muy céntrica, ideal para recorrer el centro de Madrid caminando y aun así la calle es tranquila.
Para largas estancias el sofá cama quizá sea algo incómodo pero la cama de arriba es estupenda.
Elena en todo momento ha estado súper atenta y ha sido muy amable.
Un placer haber pasado unos días allí.

notre séjour s'est très bien passé, le logement est très bien situé tant au niveau des stations de métro, bus... ainsi que de l'aéroport, navette direct en 30 mn. Elena est très sympathique et arrangeante quant aux horaires d'arrivée et de départ, nous l'en remercions. Nous recommandons vivement ce logement pour un séjour de qualité pour découvrir cette belle ville.

Accueil très chaleureux, appartement très confortable et emplacement idéal.
Grand merci à Elena.

Elena’s apartment was perfect for exploring Madrid for a week. It’s on a lovely street, close to the art galleries and Lavapies - we walked everywhere. The apartment was very comfortable and well-equipped. Elena was really helpful and friendly.

The apartment is like in the photos, very cozy. The bedroom is upstairs, a bit warmer than the lower area. The location is very good for museums, restaurants, the train, the Metro, grocery stores, etc. The bed was very comfortable. The kitchen had all I needed and the bathroom light was very good to put on make up!
Great stay.  Elena dealt totally smoothly with my changes of itinerary and a late arrival.  Cute place in a great part of Madrid.

apartamento mejor de lo esperado, siempre impecable, me senti como en casa y la estaia fue muy grata.
la anfitriona es escepcional y la ubicacion de la casa perfecta para conocer el centro de madrid.

Elvira es una Gran anfitriona y una Gran persona! Me considero muy afortunada de haber podido vivir esta experiencia de estancia en Madrid con ella. En todo momento es servicial y linda. Teneis en ella una buena amiga al llegar, que los ayudara con recomendaciones y apoyo! Su casa es un lindisimo lugar! Donde seguramente se encontraran comodos y contentos!

There is no better place in Madrid than in the heart of the city. Walking distance to everything, and only minutes to major museums.
Elvira is a wonderful host, an exceptional resource of knowledge for any traveler and has a strong foundation of English for non-spanish speaking adventurers.
Her home is magical, exactly as described and the warming personality is second to none. I've already booked another stay with her the following month upon my return and recommend this spot with immense pleasure.

Perfecto para nosotros!
Mi esposo y yo pasamos con nuestros 2 niños un mes en este apartamento de San Miguel y fue perfecto para nosotros. Fue exactamente como se anunciaba, limpio, céntrico, moderno, al alcance de todo, y con todo lo necesario. Cubrió nuestras expectativas y nos garantizó unas vacaciones como si estuviésemos en nuestra casa. Todo el apartamento esta excelente; tiene un ventajoso aire acondicionado, TAN necesario en Madrid para esta época, fue la clave de una estadía fresca y placentera. La cocina práctica y moderna. Las habitaciones impecables, espaciosas y muy cómodas; y la atención de lo mejor. Gabriel Fue excelente y muy atento a nuestras necesidades. Y siempre estuvo a la mano para ayudarnos en todo el mes, incluso con respecto a trasportación para el aeropuerto. Se esmeró por hacer su trabajo, y brindarnos detalles de la zona. Para cualquier turista lo recomendamos enormemente, está a distancia caminando de muchos sitios de interés, y los restaurantes y vibra nocturna es genial, incluso con niños pequeños. A la mano de todo. Volveríamos encantados.

It was perfect for us!
My husband and I spent one month in this apartment of San Miguel with our 2 children and it was perfect for us. It was exactly as advertised, clean, centrally located, modern, accessible to all, and with everything you need. It met our expectations and we felt like we were in our own house, even on vacation. The entire apartment is excellent, an advantageous air conditioning, SO necessary in Madrid for this time, was the key to a cool and pleasant stay. It has a practical and modern kitchen, spotless, spacious and very comfortable bedrooms, and the attention of its host was the great. Gabriel was excellent and very attentive to our needs. And he was always on hand to help throughout the month, including shuttles to the airport. He did great his job! We highly recommend it to any tourist, is within walking distance to many sights, restaurants and nightlife and vibe is great, even with small children. We would happily stay again in this apartment
The apartment was as described. Perfect central area. Host was friendly and easily contactable.

This was perfectly located for almost anything you'd want to see while in Madrid! It's above a beautiful and quiet courtyard, just a few minutes walk to mercado de San Miguel.
Gabriel was a great host and walked us trough the entire apartment, taking time to explain all the amenities and the area around us... He even provided a comprehensive list of tapas bars and restaurants of all varieties
I thoroughly enjoyed my stay and would recommend Gabriel and this elegant apartment to anyone

Contact met Gabriel was vanaf het begin goed. Bij aankomst kregen we een goede rondleiding en spraken af iets later het appartement te kunnen verlaten. Het was schoon, mooi en ruim. Erg lekker om in te verblijven!
This apartment exceeded expectations. It was modern, spacious, clean and very central. Gabriel was a great host. I felt safe and would stay there again.
Perfect location, on Plaza de Conde de Barajas, for a visit to Madrid above a friendly bar (Plaza Menor).  You won't be disappointed.

The apartment is in an excellent location, is v clean and convenient.  Gabriel was extremely helpful and has excellent communication skills.  I'm sure we will stay there again on a future visit to Madrid.
Clean, spacious, central; would stay again

Gabriel was a terrific host and he went above and beyond to help us during our stay. My husband and I both contracted Covid a few days after we arrived in Madrid (we were staying elsewhere at the time). I was very fortunate to find this lovely 2 bedroom so that we could isolate from each other. Being foreigners and not speaking the language very well, we were confused as to what our responsibilities were regarding the Covid. Gabriel found out the information for us and offered to arrange transportation to the hospital (I was that sick, even having been vaccinated) and even told me that if we needed to have someone translate to have them call him. Fortunately, the doctor spoke English pretty well and Google translate filled in the rest. Gabriel even got in touch with us the next day to see how we were feeling.
The apartment is in a lovely location! You are right above El Calamar's terrace dining which can get a bit noisy (but if you close the terrace doors you hardly hear them). There is also the Restaurant Sobrino de Botin right around the corner (we did the tour - the history and the food were both incredible). You are also very close to Plaza Mayor and San Migues Market plus dozens of other great restaurants. We didn't get to do much sightseeing this trip (I guess we'll have to come back!) but honestly just walking around in Centro is amazing. It's like walking back in time.
If I could give Gabriel and this apartment more than 5 stars, I would in a heartbeat!
Absolutely spotless and well-located. Exactly as described and as show.  Definitely will come back again!
What an incredible appartment in the best location. We would definitely book this place again - what a find.
Good apartment, right in the center
집이 예쁘고 청결합니다. 위치도 좋아요~
Great location walkable to so much. Quiet plaza makes for great location to open up balcony doors. Beds were comfortable and an amazing host! Will be back!

Great location and nice apartment, located in a charming square. Beds are comfy.
Check-in and check-out were easy.
Nice place for a weekend !

we had an amazing time at Gabriel’s Appartment. It was very easy to check in, it’s in the center of Madrid, anything you need is 2 minutes away from you. The Apartment looks even better in person! and it’s equiped with more amneties than we needed. we definitely recommend it 🧡
This is a really great and solid place to stay that is located perfectly. Great size and very comfortable, would totally recommend and would stay here again in the future!

😀great location, good size apartment, great communication, good beds.
☹️unit is directly above a restaurant and bar with all their seating outside. Open 7 days a week till late so very noisy every night.

This place has pluses and minuses. I stayed in this apartment during a work trip for which a family member joined me. The space was an excellent size and the kitchen was great for cooking. The location is touristy but also really nicely located to get to sites and restaurants. Gabriel kindly let me check in several hours early and was communicative during the entire stay. I really loved the large windows and the light. The building itself was really quiet and easy to access, and I felt very safe at the location.
Unfortunately, when I arrived the apartment was not as clean as it should be. The surfaces in the kitchen were quite dusty, as were some of the other areas of the apartment and also the floor. Gabriel offered to have cleaners come for the floor which was nice but at that point I was already in the apartment so I declined. Additionally, while this is no fault of the host, it is quite loud. The restaurant downstairs actually isn’t that big of a deal but the trash pickup and street cleaning, which happened between midnight and 5 am, was a little tough.
Very helpful people! Excellent location. Happy to be there

We enjoyed our month-long stay in this apartment. Gabriel graciously allowed us to check in a few hours early. Rosalia kindly met us in person and oriented us to the apartment and appliances. It’s spacious with comfortable furniture, lots of light from balcony doors, a good bed, and a great shower. Lots of storage space. Great Wi-Fi. The kitchen is large with more equipment than you usually find in an airbnb so great for cooking at home. Excellent location near tourist sites but also easy walking to most all neighborhoods, restaurants and bars as well as to the metro. Good windows block most sound from the courtyard restaurants but nightly street cleaning and trash collection was a little loud, as others have noted. We used white noise overnight, as we do in most cities, and we were fine. We really enjoyed our stay in this lovely place!
The apartment is great and the location is perfect. Very central.
Amazing place, centrally located. Clean, comfy beds, well-equipped kitchen. The communication with the host was good.

La ubicación es perfecta. El departamento da a una plaza muy linda que está a la vuelta de la Plaza Mayor y del Mercado de San Miguel. Se llega caminando a todos lados, es una zona muy vital sin ser ruidosa. Pasamos unos días excelentes.

Decent airbnb in a superb location
Overall great place

Endroit paisible à 2 pas du Mercado San Miguel. Resto-café santé et un autre resto typique Madrilène au rez-de-chaussée. 3 balcons face à une place tranquille.
Grand appartement propre.
Bon service d'accueil.
Nous recommandons cet endroit.
❤️🧡💛

Keurig en modern uitgeruste woning in een erg oud pand: karaktervol dus. Keuken en badkamer erg compleet (geen vaatwasser, maar waarom zou je, wel wasmachine, strijkbout, allerlei bestek en kookgerei, etc.). Woonkamer en slaapkamers met fijn licht en ook prima uitgerust, met veel kastruimte en prima tweepersoonsbedden. Per kamer heerlijk Spaans (ondiep) balkon op het noorden aan het erg rustige plein. 's Nachts hoor je soms wat opbouw- of opruimwerkzaamheden (hoort erbij, niet storend). Zeer centraal gelegen, allerlei attracties in het centrum om de hoek (pal achter Plaza Mayor), maar de plek zelf is erg rustig: wat een weelde. Net tussen 3 verschillende metrohaltes gelegen, maar heus wel op loopafstand. Absolute aanrader.

The apartment is exactly as pictured and described, clean, well furnished, and spacious. The location is amazing, everything you want and need is a short walk away. There is a great coffee shop on the plaza that the apartment overlooks, the San Miguel Mercado is up the street and all major monuments and fun neighborhoods are within 10-20mim walk. I would absolutely come back for another visit and highly recommend this apartment for a trip to Madrid.
Good location.
Fantastic place. Vibrant area, but close the balcony doors and it was peaceful and quiet. Beautiful, well equipped apartment with very comfortable beds and an overall feeling of luxury.

Apartment was great and in a very good place in the center of Madrid. The apartment was very modern inside, beds were very comfortable, and we loved the balconies. Our stay there was great. Gabriel was an excellent host.
Great place, just as described and close to everything. Very walkable area. Would definitely stay again.
I would easily recommend this area and the apartment to my friends. Quiet surroundings but everything reachable by walking.  We are grateful.

Great location. Walkable directly to places we wanted to go (c. de cava, mercado, plaza de espana, royal palace, etc) or to Metro
AC worked great, beds were comfortable. Was only noisy one night out of our weeklong stay. Very helpful that they provided 2 sets of physical keys... the "smart" lock was kind of clunky
Mind that you'll probably need to pick up additional coffee, body wash, toilet paper and other essentials if you're staying longer, but I expect that in European Airbnbs.
El mejor lugar, tienes todo cerca y los mejores lugares para comer

Appartement bien équipé, très agréable et bien situé. Celui-ci donne sur une très jolie place avec 2 restaurants très sympathiques mais aussi animés (contrepartie tout à fait acceptable).  Tout était très bien à l'exception de la procédure de contrat un peu étonnante.

Appartement très agréable et très centrale, 100m du marché San Miguel et la plaza Mayor situé dans un environnement relativement calme. Donne une place piétonne peu empruntée asse ombragée.
(Remarques à relativiser car on est au centre de Madrid...)
Quelques bars-restaurants très sympas au pied de l'appartement, notamment avec des enfants...
Je signalerais simplement que le ménage n'était pas "parfait" ...
We enjoyed staying at Gabriel's apartment. It was in the center of the city, and we walked to a lot of places. The apartment was spacious and clean.

Spent 1 week in the apartment. Everything is there if one wants to cook but due to all the restaurants less than 1 min away, we did not use the kitchen. Location is awesome; 2 min walking you reach the supermarket behind the famous market de san miguel. Plaza de mayor is 5 min walking; shopping within 15 min depending what you are looking for. Taxi are easz to get with Uber or the app Freenow and prices are still normal.
Taxis from airport had issue to find the exact place as the small side roads are not really used by cars but the main road is just 100 m from the apartment.
Strongly can recommend the place. There is a slight drawback if you have a light sleep. At around 3 to 4 am the garbish trucks collects the containers and that woke us up the first 2 nights but it was not a big issue.

The location is perfect. You are close to everything. We walked everywhere. The restaurants below are excellent. We ate breakfast at one of them every day. Highly recommended. We will stay there again when we return!

The Apartment is in a great location walkable to many sites of interest, restaurants, plazas etc. fairly close to a few metro stops as well. We enjoyed the apartment and the large doors in every room that open over the plaza that directly abuts the apartment. Directly below is the federal cafe which is rated as one of the best coffee shops in the area. Close distance to the Mercado as well which had a lot of great dining options
The host was very accommodating in letting us drop off our luggage first and then come back later in the afternoon after the room has been cleaned. The unit is on the second floor with no lift which could be a challenge for those unable to lift their bags up a flight of stairs but other than that we have no negatives.

The place is right in the middle to the entire touristy part of Madrid. We could pretty much walk to all the places. Plaza de Mayor is about 3 mins walk
The host, Gabriel, was wonderful, patient, informed and helpful. He spent almost an hour with us helping us acclamatize.
The house was pristine, organized, clean and spacious.
All in all a beautiful experience
Departamento céntrico y cómodo.
Amazing host, amazing apartment! A dream AirBnb in the heart of Madrid. Will definitely be back. Thank you!

I would recommend Gabriel’s place-clean & cheerful & in a great location. I appreciate that he allowed me to drop my bags off early. And Al, who was checking the place, was delightful.
Finding it was very difficult, however, & Gabriel need only supply clear walking instructions from the cab drop-off point or bus stop-it was very stressful- and that’s so easily solved.
Also, I recommend Gabriel communicate less throughout the stay about his damage waivers, worries about adherence to rules & ultimate departure-from the minute you arrive - & more about making for a warm & welcoming introduction to Madrid. The many electronically-generated messages were annoying and inconsistent w the typical warmth and friendliness we treasure w our Airbnb stays.

We loved the apartment, the location was perfect. Easy access to everything we wanted to do and see.
The only issue we had was our next to last day we lost power. We communicated with the office in the morning. Late in the afternoon, still without power, we were concerned about charging phones and packing in the dark and asked if they could help us in anyway. They said they would see what they could do but we never heard back from them.
Precioso espacio, cèntrico y perfecto para unas vacaciones inolvidables

The location of this apartment is unbeatable! Wre have two young kids who were able to run around in the Plaza downstairs while we hung out on the patio. The apartment itself is exactly as pictured with a lovely balcony. We would stay here again
This is a beautiful airbnb for Madrid. Close to the metro and easy to get to all of the museums and events we were visiting for. Check-in host was very kind and everyone was communicative.

Realmente nos sentimos como en casa, el departamento es súper confortable, tiene todo para tu estancia y detalles que me encantaron! Todo súper limpio y la ubicación es excelente ! Lo super recomiendo.
Excellent and beautiful.

The apartment is good, but there is an employee named Lily. I was contacted by her. She does not have any professionalism in dealing with guests. She was very rude, as she told me that if you come after 3 o’clock, you will not be admitted to the apartment, and our arrival time was at 5 o’clock.
When I told her that you did not mention that there was a deadline for entry, she said that you rented an apartment, not a hotel
Muito tranquila, apartamento atende perfeitamente 4 pessoas.
Great place!... Me gusto el apt, la localizacion es muy conveniente y comodo. Buenos anfitriones.
todo de acuerdo a lo publicitando excelente ubicación bien decorado muy cómodo. volvería sin dudar. muy recomendable

We loved our stay! Everything matched the description perfectly. The apartment’s central location made it easy to explore nearby attractions. It truly felt like a classic Madrid home, full of charm and authentic Spanish style.

L’emplacement est parfait pour tout faire à pieds
Métro restaurant supermarché visites
L’appartement est propre
Gabriel est très réactif
L’appartement se situe sur une place juste au dessus d’un restaurant donc un peu bruyant le seul point négatif
Je recommande l’appartement

The location of the apartment was fantastic and the unit itself was clean, spacious and as presented.  There is limited hot water at the apartment which is just something to consider when booking.  It was alleviated with quick showers and timing the spacing of our showers.  Gabriel was an excellent host and responsive when we had questions.  I would recommend the property based on location and how cute the apartment was.  We loved our stay at this unit in Madrid!
We had a great stay at the apartment. We will definitely stay here again when we come back!

Wow!  This is the Airbnb to stay at while in Madrid. You can't ask for a better location or a better host.  We felt extremely comfortable in this flat and wish we could have stayed longer.  Don't change anything.  Thank you!
Absolutely perfect location and space.

We stayed at Nuria's property for 3 nights in mid-June. We booked the location because of its proximity to everything we could possibly need! The property itself was beautiful and chic; clean and quiet. Thank you Nuria for your hospitality. We really enjoyed your city and will surely come again.
This is one of the best air bnb experiences we've had! Nuria is such a welcoming, lovely host. The apartment is renovated so everything is brand new.

La casa estaba realmente limpia y recogida, todo estaba en orden y no faltaba de Nada. Nuria se encargo de presentarme el cuarto y de comentarme un par de cosas curiosas sobre la calle en la que está ubicada la casa. Fue un placer hospedarme aquí. Lo recomiendo !!
Great apartment, well designed, clean, beautiful. Best of all, the location is the best in Madrid.

El Dpto es precioso, tal cual se muestra en las fotos, con todo lo necesario para una excelente estadia en Madrid. Muy bien ubicado , a 1 cuadra de plaza Santa Ana. Nuria es encantadora, siempre estuvo atenta a lo que necesitamos, nos recibió y despidió ella y nos dio consejos muy prácticos sobre como movernos en la ciudad. Sin duda volvemos!!

A fantastic flat in a great location. Your in the middle of the city and yet the flat is so peaceful, clean and calm with effective air con for when its 43 degrees outside!

Nuria was helpful and really friendly hostess would highly recommend.

El apartamento de Nuria era precioso, limpio, exacto como en las fotos, completo y con un balcón pequeño que da a una callecita de ensueño. La ubicación es ideal, un lugar céntrico, divertido y seguro. No hemos podido conocer a Nuria pero ella se mantuvo en contacto con nosotros permanentemente y se ocupó que nuestra llegada fuera perfecta. Volvería a ir sin dudar a este apartamento o a cualquier otro de ella.

What an excellent stay! The apartment is exactly as pictured - clean, new and well-decorated - and the location is truly central. Sol is a happening neighborhood, with a ton of tapas restaurants and bars at your feet. The double-paned windows made for very quiet weekdays; on the weekends, a pair of earplugs could help if you are super sensitive to noise (I am; my boyfriend is not). Even if so, don't let this be a deterrent. The place is absolutely lovely and fully equipped with kitchen gadgets, towels, washer/dryer (and the detergent for it), etc. I'd definitely stay here again. Nuria is also super responsive and welcoming - her friendliness made us feel immediately at home and she thoughtfully prepared for us a handy packet of Madrid tourist information. We loved knowing that she was looking out for us and could help with anything we might need.
Great stay! The apartment is in an excellent location with most things in walking distance. Apartment was very clean.

Perfect spot! Very central, quiet, cozy listing - couldn't have asked for a better way to end my trip! Nuria greeted us punctually and was able to accommodate our arrival time. The unit was immaculately kept and tastefully decorated better than any hotel room I've seen. All amenities were top notch it felt like home right away. Nuria spent a while telling us about the locale - where to eat, what to see, etc. There was an elevator to take us to the 2nd floor, a charming balcony overlooking the quiet street below.  I can't  say enough good things about this listing - it was absolutely perfect.
Nuestra estancia en el departamento de Nuria no podría haber sido mejor fue de 10, muy bonito muy cómodo y limpio, Nuria fue super amable, la recomiendo ampliamente.

Nuria was amazing - she was very communicative and checked-in with us prior to our arrival in Madrid. She was incredibly accommodating: we were originally scheduled to check in around noon, but due to some train availability, we had to arrive nearly two hours late; she was available and even early to meet us to let us in! Her apartment was spacious, incredibly clean, and wonderfully taken-care-of. Nuria's place is in such a convenient location for all of Madrid's sights and sounds, and we couldn't have been happier staying there. She even greeted us with a bottle of champagne and recommendations for the surrounding neighborhood! Truly a great experience and I can't recommend Nuria or this apartment highly enough for a stay in Madrid.

Nuria's apartment in Madrid was the perfect jumping off point to explore the city. The area is very lively with lots of restaurants, bars, and shops. The apartment itself was impeccable and has everything you possibly need. It's beautifully decorated and extremely clean. Nuria was a wonderful host and definitely shows she cares and loves her apartment as well as those who stay there. Highly recommend Nuria's apartment!
Nuria's apartment was perfect for our one night in Madrid. The apartment is clean, comfortable and centrally located to walk to all the sights!

Hola! It was awsome apartment. The apartment was so neat and comfy. It was in the middle of Madrid city so i could go everywhere i'd like to go by walk. And near the apartment there was a lot of tasty restraunt(paella, tapas..) , the restraunt that  Nuria told me was really good:D  Thanks Nuria. Gracias~ :)

Le logement correspond aux photos de l'annonce.
Super propre et très bien situé; soit entre La Plaza Major et Puerta del Sol. À partir du logement tout se fait à pied pour les visites, vraiment génial. Nuria très accueillante et disponible pour nous aider. Merci Nuria.

Nuria's apartment was absolutely fantastic!  Every single detail was perfect, and the place was exactly as described (adorable and spotless!) The neighbourhood was amazing - extremely central and close to tons of restaurants.  I really cannot recommend her place enough - she was an absolutely wonderful host, and I would happily recommend her apartment to anyone thinking of visiting Madrid.
Apartment was super clean and really nicely done, location is perfect and Nuria was very helpful and friendly. Would definitely recommend.

The apartment just as great as pictures! Well decorated and located in the central of the city, very convenient. Totally worth to stay. And Nuria is so warmhearted and helpful. The experience with Nuria and her lovely apartment is a wonderful memory in Madrid!

¿Qué se puede decir sobre el apartamento de Nuria?
Es perfecto.
Su ubicación es estupenda, cerca de todo y lleno de una multitud de bares y restaurantes en los alrededores.
Nuria es muy amable y siempre estaba a mano para cualquier ayuda necesaria.
En resumen, una muy recomendable apartamento. Ciertamente volveré a alquilar!

Great studio right in the center of Madrid. The place is decorated with great taste, and has everything a guest needs. The area can be noisy at night but the quality of the flat make it up for it. Nuria was super nice. Keys handover very easy. Thanks Nuria!

Nuria es una excelente anfitriona. Puntualmente estaba en el apartamento para entregarnos las llaves y tuvo la amabilidad de explicarnos todo acerca de su apartamento y del barrio.
El apartamento es muy cómodo y limpio; y su ubicación es excelente para caminar a los lugares turísticos y también para acceder a la Red de Metro.
Su ubicación cerca de bares y de buenos restaurantes no impide tener un buen dormir, ya que tiene una excelente aislación acústica.

We had a great time at nuria's place. It is very clean, modern and center located. Nuria is a wonderful host. She waited us in the apartment for a long time before we came in and she spent a lot of time explaining things to do in Madrid. I would highly recommend her and her lovely home!
The apartment was amazing and in a great location--close enough to walk almost everywhere without being overly loud.  Nuria was a fantastic host as well.
Clean and very neat, perfectly located, nice style, extremely happy of our stay.
Una anfitriona fenomenal! Se adaptó totalmente a mi horario de llegada y el piso impecable y totalmente reformado!

Nuria was very welcoming, and very convenient..she is the perfect host.

The apartment is lovely, located at the center of Madrid (Puerta Del Sol) which was very useful to visit, by walk, all city's iconic places.
The place was very clean and well furnished.

For a first time to Madrid I would really recommend her quiet place to stay !

Un apartamento fantástico en una localización inmejorable. Decorado con un gusto exquisito, muy confortable y completo y en medio del barrio de las letras, a tiro de piedra de Sol. Nuria es una anfitriona ejemplar, atenta, detallista,... Da gusto encontrarse a gente como ella por el mundo.

We were keen on visiting many of Madrid's attractions near the city center, and for that, the location of Nuria's apartment cannot be beaten. It's right near Puerta del Sol, a huge metro stop, so you can get anywhere in the city easily. The apartment is cozy but had everything we needed. We made extensive use of the washer/dryer, a welcome inclusion, as was the elevator (we had several bags with us). Nuria met us when we arrived and walked us through everything, also giving us an opportunity to brush up on our Spanish (her English is good but it'll be easier if you know some Spanish too). Later, when we had some trouble with the apartment's locks, she did her very best to help us over the phone, even late at night. We found her to be highly accessible and this helped us feel more comfortable.

We had great time in Madrid thanks to Nuria's little apartment. She waited for us patiently and very amiable.

Apartment is nicely decorated and very clean. Location was perfect and it is as the photo! Look nowhere else if you are in Madrid for couple of days.
Espectacular, muy recomendable.

We had a great stay at Nuria's apartment! The apartment is central, very clean and beautiful exactly as in the website photos.
Nuria was responsive from the moment of the initial inquiry and throughout our stay.
She waited for us at relatively late time, and patiently explained about the apartment and neighborhood including tips for routes and restaurants. She also let us check-out at the evening and kindly offered to store our luggage for few more hours.
We had a great time in Madrid and hope to stay again at this apartment.

We had a great stay in the apartment.  Nuria was incredibly helpful when we arrived – she provided recommendations for restaurants, nightlife, and sites.  We visited Madrid for New Year’s Eve and Nuria had purchased cava and made a handwritten description of New Year’s Eve traditions.  It was such a nice personal touch and helped us have a happy New Year’s Eve.  The apartment was clean/spacious and had a huge bathroom.  It was also walking distance to all of the major landmarks.  We loved our stay and would recommend the apartment to anyone visiting Madrid.

Nuria estaba esperándonos cuando llegamos a Madrid. Fue muy hospitalaria y nos agasajó con su amabilidad.
El apartamento no puede estar mejor ubicado, está en el mismo centro de la ciudad.
Está decorado con sumo detalle, tiene todas las comodidades, está recientemente restaurado y está muy limpio.
Inmejorable.

You should stay at Nuria's apartment for three reasons:

1. You will have a great host - Nuria is friendly, quick to respond, and easy to talk to.

2. You will stay in a lovely apartment - The apartment is modern, quirky, and in perfect condition.

3. You will live in a great location - The apartment is convenient, quiet, and in the centre of Madrid.

We will come back here again.

Nuria was an amazing host. She has patience and was willing to go the extra miles and accommodate my needs. She was at the apartment waiting for me and had a packet of maps and things to get around the city. She did a wonderful job with the interior design and the place looked beautiful. In picture the place looked nice but in person it looked even better. Everything I needed to stay in the apartment was available. The location is in the heart of the center but was very quiet inside, which I loved. I would totally recommend anyone coming to Madrid to stay at Nurias place. You will feel at home. Thank you soooo much Nuria for everything!
Nuria is a sweet person who wants you to feel at home.

Another wonderful long weekend spent in Madrid at this beautifully clean & well equipped apartment which enjoys a superbly central location. Made even more special by the charmingly helpful hostess, Nuria!

Nuria met us late at night due to travel delays - she was awesome. She had a bottle of wine and flowers waiting for us and gave us the tour of the flat.  The flat is awesome! Perfect for a romantic getaway, exploring the city - great!  The flat has everything you need! :)  Truly personalized service!

We had a fantastic time at Nuria's apartment. Everything was perfect, from the booking process and meeting up etc. She even left us some treats on arrival. The apartment is beautifully and tastefully decorated, the bed comfortable, the shower awesome. Everything was just like in the photos. There is lots of wardrobe storage and a hairdryer too. The location could not be better. Just a few steps from great restaurants and only a few minutes' walk to Sol. There was a bit of chatter coming from the pedestrian street below at night but with the double glazing windows this was not much of a problem afterall.
Thanks Nuria for everything.

Nuria was very friendly and easy to contact. The room was as clean as in the pictures. Like a hotel room with a kitchen. No dishwasher though. The area is very busy with shops and restaurant right on your doorstep. Didn't have issue with noice from the street. About an hour from the airport with the metro for €5 per person.
We had a great time at Nuria's place.  Great location, and we were made feeling very welcome.  Even was greeted with a nice mini bottle of champagne!

We loved Nuria's hospitality! The location of the flat was perfect for sightseeing and exploring the city. We were able to reach everything by foot and soak in the city's great flare. We would definetly recommend others to stay at Nuria's place and have an amazing time.
Nuria fue nos recibió muy cálidamente.  El apartamento está muy bien ubicado, es grande y cómodo. Su ubicación, decoración y comodidad son excelentes.

If we ever visit Madrid in the future, we will choose Nuria's home. Everything was exactly what how she described it. She was very helpful from the moment we sent her a message of interest - to the time we locked up to leave.
Nuria was wonderful! Very helpful and a accommodating.
Nuria was an amazing host. We arrived very late, but she still welcomed us with a bright smile.

A wonderful flat in the perfect location. We loved the amenities offered--most especially the washing machine/dryer!
Nuria is very warm and we were glad to meet her. The wine was a lovely touch as well!

Nuria is a very good host. It is surprised that she has prepared a welcome gift to us. She is very considerate to arrange luggage storage for us after we check out.
The apartment is same as photo and is very clean, tidy and cozy. The design of the apartment is stylish. There is heater even in the bathroom. The location is good and near the metro.
I would recommend this apartment.

Nuria was amazing from the beginning! She gave us directions from the airport to the flat which made it very easy to find. If we had any questions she was very quick to answer. When we arrived she not only welcomed us with a bottle of wine, but gave us suggestions of places to eat. Her apartment is centrally located making it easy to get to all the hot spots. Nuria is truly amazing and her flat is superb. I hope that we get to visit Madrid again soon and if we do, we will definitely be staying at  Nuria's again.

Nuria gave us a lovely welcome and was very helpful. She kindly looked after our suitcases on the last day as our flight was late. The apartment was immaculate and centrally located. An ideal location to see Madrid.
The trip in Madrid was fantastic. Thank you very much Nuria for you appartment and your kindness

Nuria's apartment was amazing!!! It was centrally located to many tourist attractions with easy access to the metro! High speed internet works great and the bathroom was very large when compared to other places that I have stayed at in Spain. Nuria was a great host and I would definitely stay at her apartment again.

Nuria was such a great host! She was easy to communicate with, and gave us the easiest directions to the apartment. She left us maps to help us enjoy Madrid, and she even left us a great bottle of wine. The apartment was absolutely beautiful. Very quiet for how close it is to all of the fun in Madrid. Restaurants and shops right out the door. A quick walk to the subway and to the plaza mayor. You can't go wrong with this apartment. Safe, clean, and cozy!

We absolutely loved staying at Nuria's apartment! In the absolute perfect spot to walk all over Madrid and plenty of restaurants to eat at right at your doorstep! The apartment is beautiful and cozy. Nuria is a fantastic host and looking forward to the next time we xan stay at this lovely apartment!

Nuria a été très accueillante, elle nous a expliqué le quartier en nous montrant des plans de la ville, comment se rendre aux différents lieux où nous voulions aller, nous avons pu faire une bonne partie de nos visites à pied car l'appartement est situé en plein centre avec e nombreux restaurants à proximité, .Le métro est aussi à proximité.
L'appartement est très propre, très pratique et moderne , il est doté d'une climatisation et la fenêtre donnant sur la rue (où ne passent pas les voitures) est à double vitrage ce qui permet une bonne isolation phonique. Tout était parfait et nous remercions Nuria qui en plus de sa gentillesse nous a offert une spécialité à déguster!
Eliane et Thierry.Juin 2016.

Nuria's apartment is just awesome. The location couldn't be more perfect: it is central but still very quiet, there are metro, restaurants and delicious pastry shops nearby. The bed is very comfortable, the Wi-Fi works well and the bathroom is spotlessly clean. Nuria is a special host, she provided us maps and recommendations and everything we coul need. I highly highly recommend this place!

Loved this place!

Fantastic location, beautiful flat and a great host. Would definitely recommend.

Nuria was a wonderful host. We arrived pretty early in the morning and even though the apartment wasn't ready (there were other guests checking out that morning), Nuria let us drop off our bags so we could enjoy the day in Madrid without toting around all of our stuff. She was available to help and very friendly! The apartment was perfectly located and had everything we needed. I would definitely stay here again if we ever return to Madrid.

This apartment was fantastic. It was very clean and had a large bathroom. It looks exactly like the pictures. The location was great. Right in the centre of all the attraction sites we wanted to visit and better yet they were all walking distance away. It was also surrounded by many restaurants/tapa bars. The host was great as well. She gave us a lot of information and was very friendly.
Nurias apartment was perfect. Was very clean and in a great location close to various food options and within walking distance to most sights in Madrid

Nuria was an amazing host. She greeted us at the door and walked us through the apartment. We followed all her food recommendations and they were amazing. The place is immaculate with quality furnishings and attention to detail was present in all components of the unit. There is a lift which was a great relief and right at the door step of Madrid central city. Best Airbnb places I've stayed in out of the 4 in Europe.
Die Wohnung liegt sehr zentral und ist mit Liebe eingerichtet. Nuria ist sehr unkompliziert und hilfsbereit. Die Wohnung ist sehr zu empfehlen und wir genossen ein wunderbares Wochenende in Madrid.

Nuria was a great hostess and available when we needed assistance, e.g. working clothes washer. The place was immaculate and the location was superb. We would highly recommend anyone wishing to stay at her apartment and would love to come again!

Nuria was an excellent host and her apartment was lovely! Nuria met us at the apartment and communication with her was great. The apartment itself is beautiful, clean, and bright. A perfect place for two to enjoy Madrid! It's in a great, central location yet nice and quiet at night. Highly recommended!

We are relatively new to Airbnb, but this experience was our best to date. From investigating districts and properties in Madrid to locking in Nuria's apt. all went very smoothly.
Nuria's apartment is fabulous - very clean and wonderfully decorated. As it is in one of the most exciting, vibrant and pretty Madrid neighborhoods, it was great to be able to open the windows for the ambience and close at night with double glazing to keep the noise of people enjoying themselves out.
Nuria offered us superb guidance and we are looking forward to a return visit to her property.

The flat is exactly as the photos , functional and well-designed but much bigger. It is spotless clean and boasts a fast wireless connection . Despite the noisy surroundings the flat has double glazing and it is very quiet . It is conveniently located within a few  so steps of SOL and within walking distance of major attractions. Nuria made us very welcome by providing lots of printed information on Madrid and a bottle of wine. Would not hesitate to stay at Nuria”s next time we come back to Madrid.
We had great time at Nuria's apartment. She is very friendly and helpful host!! That apartment is located in the center of the city and had everything we needed. Thank you for a great stay!
Fantastic flat/studio in great location.  Beautifully appointed.  Very clean and new.  Nuria is a very welcoming host.

Fantastic studio/apartment. Very clean and looks exactly as in pictures. Excellent location - a few minutes walk to Puerto del Sol (shopping) and could easily walk to all tourist attractions. Lots of lovely places to eat nearby. The apartment even had a washer/drier which really helped as we only had hand luggage allowance for a six day trip - not as easy to do with winter clothes!
Only downside was it was a bit noisy at night when the surrounding bars were closing (around 3am).
This was a great place to stay! Close to everything, clean and Nuria was the perfect host. Highly recommend to first-time visitors like myself.

We thoroughly enjoyed our stay at Nuria's apartment. The kitchen and bathroom were high-end and the decor was perfect, exactly as it is shown in the photos. We especially enjoyed all the special touches - maps, info and Spanish wine. The unit was very clean. The location was perfect and close to most major attractions so we were able to walk everywhere.
Nuria was a great host. We would highly recommend this unit was a stay in the central part of Madrid.

The location was perfect and Nuria was the perfect host.  She provided me a perfect place to stay, it was clean, very modern, and communications were excellent. The location is about 6mins walk from Plaza Mayor and easily accessible. She gave me options for checking in and check out times so I can arrange my trip at my convenience. She also gave me information and maps to interesting places in Madrid. Nuria was extremely welcoming. I hope to stay at Nuria's place the next time I am in Madrid.

Lovely place, and Nuria was very accommodating. We arrived on an early flight, and she made every effort to help us check-in to the apartment a bit earlier. The apartment was very clean, and looked exactly as shown in the pictures. The apartment is in a great central location - because of this, it's a lively area. Best to bring earplugs to ensure a good night's sleep. We had a wonderful stay.
This place is amazing!! So cute and close to everything in the city!!! All major attractions are within a mile!!

Nuria fue muy puntual, incluso nos dejo entrar antes de lo previsto al apartamento. Es muy amable y se mostró dispuesta a ayudarnos en cualquier momento, cosa que es de agradecer. Se nota que cuida hasta el último detalle del apartamento y a la hora de llegada todo se encuentra muy limpio y preparado. Repetiríamos sin ninguna duda.

Perfect acommodation for visiting Madrid.Nuria is so nice. You can walk everywhere from the appartment, is two minutes walk from puerta del sol. It's really clean and comfortable. I totally recommend Nuria's appartment.

Couldn't have asked for a better location! Just minutes from plenty of restaurants, shops and the Metro. Although it is in an old building, the apartment itself is extremely modern, cheerful and clean. The bathroom is spacious with a great shower. Washing machine/dryer was very useful. Nuria was very friendly and welcoming. One of the most satisfying Airbnbs I have stayed at and would definitely recommend to anyone. Also, our best meal in Madrid was at Inclan Brutal Bar just next door - a must-try!
Perfect place if you want to stay in the city centre. 3 minutes away from Sol. Very clean and the better restaurant rated in trip advisor is just there.

La estancia ha sido inmejorable! La ubicación, el sitio... todo! Nos preparó unos cuantos planos de la ciudad, muy útiles, de los sitios más emblemáticos para descubrir cada rinconcito de Madrid. No faltaba detalle! El apartamento estaba completo al 100%! Tenía de todo! Incluso tuvo el detalle de dejarnos un pequeño "self services" de desayuno! Agradecemos su confianza en nosotros, y está claro que va a ser recomendada, porque tanto Nuria como el apartamento son geniales! Mil gracias!

A hospedagem foi fantástica, melhor que muito hotel. Carinho e delicadeza em cada detalhe. O local é bem central, confortável e extremamente limpo e bem decorado. Fiquei com vontade de morar lá de tão acolhida que me senti.

This is a lovely studio in the heart of Madrid.  Location could not be better. We were very happy with the place and slept well, but the area is a bit noisy. That's the price you pay for such a great location. Nutria was great to work with and the place has everything you need for a wonderful stay in Madrid.

This place is so perfect! Best location possible! Walking distance of museums, excellent tapas, flamenco, and live music! The apartment is clean, comfortable, better than we expected! Nuria is a great host!
Great place and decor! The only annoying thing would probably be the noise at night.
Nuria’s place is beautiful and in a great location!

Great location, central to too many tapas bars to count and right around the corner from the NYC version of Times Sq. Basically. Nuria was very responsive and very thoughtful. The apartment was cute and clean! Would definitely recommend.
Amazing location.
Nuria es una anfitriona excelente. Su hospitalidad es indudable y sus servicios inmejorables. Recomendamos al 100% el lugar.

Wonderful place in the center of Madrid. Just around the corner from the Plaza de Santa Ana and walking distance from anywhere you might want to go to Madrid. Easy access to trains and buses as well. This place is very comfortable and has everything you might need during your stay, including washing machine, espresso machine, cleaning supplies, extra towels, etc. Nuria was also kindly accommodating for my flight times. Muchas gracias Nuria!

Soy Marta (hija de Luis Miguel; 25 años médico residente): Mi estancia en casa de Elvira fue genial. Tanto la ubicación como el piso estaban muy bien. Todo súper limpio, muy cuidado y nuevo. Es tal y como se ve en las fotos. La casa es una monada y la terraza de lujo. Elvira es una gran anfitriona. Te hace sentirte como en casa y parece que nos conociésemos de toda la vida. Simpática, sincera, amable y empática. Ideal para pasar unos días en Madrid. Sin duda, 100% recomendable.

Elvira's apartment is perfectly located, very clean and tastefully decorated. The room and bed are as advertised but small, as often in Europe. Elvira is an experienced and dedicated hostess and there is a nice breakfast in the morning. There is no air conditioning (I think) but the place is well ventilated and even on hot days it was bearable.
Overall an excellent experience. I would stay there again.

this is what airbnb dreams are made of! this was my best experience to date. elvira was the perfect host. she was responsive and welcoming, while her home is exactly as listed. very clean, comfortable and in a great location for walking to any attraction. elvira went above and beyond to make sure i was happy and even gave me a few tours of her beautiful city. would stay here again in a heartbeat!

From very far away the best airbnb I've ever been... and more than an Airbnb, its was a beautiful meeting.
The appartment and Elvira does everything to make you feel as comfortable and warmful as home. We sleep so well in this clear, quiet and clean room and enjoy so much in this big and beautiful rooftop. Moreover, there is no better location than there. Quiet but at the middle of everything ! This is so rare...
I've been all around Madrid and couldn't expect for a better point, convenient, clean, warm, and a better person to meet. Thank you Elvira

Magnifica casa. Muy bien situada, centrica. Bonita, bien decorada y con terraza. Ademas muy silenciosa para descansar, no se oye ni un ruido. Y Elvira es una magnifica anfitriona, muy atenta y afable. Muy recomendable

Such a great place to stay, easy to get to from the airport and a short walk into the centre of Madrid. The room had everything I needed. Elvira was the most generous host and made me feel completely at ease. I would definitely stay here again and can't wait to go back to Madrid!
Elvira has a very nice house in a good area off Madrid. She was very helpfull to me about information off Madrid. Nice place to stay for a long weekend.

Elvira me recibio muy bien e incluso tuve la oportunidad de conocer el barrio de las letras y aprender con sus conocimientos de historia. La casa es muy bien ubicada y la habitacion es perfecta. Fue estupenda mi primer visita a Madrid! Muchas gracias

Elvira was an excellent host, warm, communicative and helpful. Her apartment was an oasis of calm in Madrid- quiet, clean and very close to the city's best museums and restaurants. I highly recommend!
La ubicación está de lujo y el trato de Elvira te hace sentir en casa. La mejor elección que he hecho =)

The room and apartment were very clean and the location is just perfect. Within walking distance are museums (such as the Prado, the Reina Sofia, among many others); the large Retiro park; the old city center (Plaza Mayor); and many pubs and restaurants. Yet the street itself was very quiet during the night.
Elvira gave me a warm welcome and took the time to provide information about the city and locate interesting locations on a map.
So I'd definitely recommend this place.

The Appartment is just lovely. So clean and modern! It's super central, so you can do everything by feet. The street is full of bars and restaurants, that's nice. And still I slept very very well. I would always come back to this host. Nuria is such a warmhearted person :)

El apartamento está cuidado al detalle. Es súper céntrico y, aunque es una zona de bares, está muy bien insonorizado. He estado muy cómodo en todo momento y Nuria es una anfitriona espectacular! Volveré sin duda.

The apartment is well located although on a very touristy street  I did not open the balcony doors since once open it lacks privacy and I would often smell food from the restaurants below     The hostess, Nuria, was extremely not responsive   Fortunately, the issues were small and I was able to resolve without her or just let it be.  The apartment is well equipped and comfortable .

Nuria is een " spring in t' veld " dus heerlijk om te ontmoeten.
en de eerste indruk maakt je vakantie direct fijn.
Awesome location and place. Very central and simply perfect!
Nuria is a great host, very friendly and welcoming. The place is super clean, located on the one of the nicest food streets of Madrid.

Sinceramente excelente todo.
El apartamento está buenísimo y la ubicación ni hablar. Sí regreso a Madrid no dudaría en volver a elegirlo.

The place was amazing, you cannot ask for more. Everything is walkable distance: Puerta del Sol, Plaza Mayor, Gran via, El Prado etc. I highly recommend this place if you travel to Madrid. The host Nuria is an amazing person she wait for me cause I was  a little late even went to puerta del sol to help me with my luggage. My vacation on Madrid was amazing and this place  contributed significantly to make it better.
Beautiful appartment in the perfect location, everything is walking distance. Nuria was really friendly and helpful and responded quickly to any questions :)

Nuria is a great host. We had a great time staying at her place. It can be noisy at night but all good given its convenient location. The place is clean and close to everything - metro, restaurants and shopping.

Excelente apartamento para una persona o pareja. Tiene todo lo necesario para quedarse. Me gusto mucho la cama, la ducha y la ubicación es perfecta.
Nuria fue muy amable y puso todo a disposición para check in/out.
Volvería sin duda.
Excellent location and as described. Nuria and Germán were very helpful. Great location for easy access to central Madrid and night life.
非常棒的房间，我很喜欢。房东很热心，沟通顺畅
整体住宿体验非常好，房东Nuria也非常好，很感谢，还会再次入住。
El alojamiento es muy bonito y cómodo. En una excelente ubicación. Muy limpio

Nuria was very helpful and offered a warm welcome. The apartment is clean and comfortable, The bed is super nice! It is in the middle of everything, walking distance from all you need to see. Although in a tourist area and above bras the windows are very good and it isolates the noise very well so you can sleep nice.

Nuria was a fantastic host and the space was perfect for a trip to Madrid! Nuria was very responsive with any questions I had and helpful throughout.
The space is a beautiful little flat right above a lot of bars and restaurants at the heart of Madrid, right between the Prado and the Royal Palace - both only a 10 minute walk. It was clean, very cozy, and quiet especially with the activity on the street, was never an issue! Using the fob to get in/out of the building was super easy and it was always nice to come back after a morning of walking to have a nap or to sit with coffee and overlook the street.
If you’re in Madrid for a few days or a week I absolutely recommend staying here, it’s perfect for getting around and seeing the city and is close to a ton of amazing restaurants and bars.
Thank you Nuria for a great stay! If I’m ever back in the city I’ll definitely be back!

Nuria’s place was beautiful and we could not have asked for a better location. I have lived in Madrid before and the apartment is right in the middle of everything. She was also very accommodating! Would stay there again 100%.

Apartament situat în centru,relativ aproape de multe obiective turistice. Din păcate apartamentul se află într-un imobil pe o stradă lăturalnică plină de restaurante, care sunt deschise până târziu. Până la 01.00- 02.00 noaptea nu e chip să poți adormi. Gălăgia continuă până dimineața. Pentru cei care vor să doarmă, nu recomand zona (strada C. de Alvarez Gato)

Très agréable séjour à Madrid.
L'appartement est très bien situé, très bien équipé et l'hôte est très présente en cas de besoin.
Tout est très bien organisé et absolument conforme aux photos !
Nous reviendrons avec grand plaisir lors d'une future visite à Madrid.

Departamento precioso. De excelente ubicación. Atención amabilísima. Detalles de buen gusto, de buena anfitriona. Amo Madrid y te recibe Nuria " lo más" diríamos en argentina. Recomiento y volvería!!!
Muito boa a acomodação, tinha tudo na casa. Perto dos pontos turísticos, pode fazer a pé. Fácil de entrar e tem elevador. Recomendo.
Really great!
Amazing location, Nuria is great she communicated very well!

We had great time in Madrid and surrending area, the apartment is close to most tourist attrations. The location of the apartment cannot be any better, it is just in the center of everything we planed to see, very close to the major subway station SOL, and only four subway stops to the train station.
The apartment is very quiet and peaceful, with plenty of food choices near by.
The host had provided us with everything we need, made us feel right at home.
We will definately recommend this apartment to others who plan to visit Madrid.

The location is at the heart of the best dining and taverns. It is walking distance to many attractions and to the finest shopping areas. It has easy access to public transportation, including subway, buses, and taxis.  The apartment was impeccably clean, and it has all necessary amenities. The hostess was very helpful and affable.

I recommend this spot without hesitation!  Nuria--¡que amable!  We arrived early and she was able to let us in early--of course we wouldn't expect this, but she was able to arrange it and it was so nice after a long trip!  She met us at the apartment to let us in, gave advice on using the Metro, and said not to hesitate to contact her, although we didn't need to because there were no concerns and everything was great!  I think others already mentioned it's just like the photos and it's very peaceful inside despite being really close to so many bars and restaurants.  Although we were not traveling to watch Netflix, it was nice to be able to sign in on the TV and watch a little.  :-)
Gracias Nuria y Germán por todo! Apreciamos mucho este lugar muy limpio y accesible :)
Excellent apartment. Great area in the center.

the apartment and it's location were amazing! it was even bigger than it looked on the pictures, well equipped with everything you could need and we could reach everywhere we wanted to go easily on foot. there are lots of bars and restaurants nearby. evenso it was quiet once you closed the balcony doors so we had no trouble sleeping.
the only thing we had wished for was better communication from the host. when we arrived in madrid we still hadn't heard about the time of check-in and were worried that we had to find accommodation on the spot as we didn't get any answer to calls and messages. luckily, everything worked out in the end and the co-host Germán was very friendly and explained everything to us.

Nuria is a great host! Very responsive and was very flexible with my check-in! The apartment matches the description and is very well stocked. The kitchen has everything you need to cook meals, even a Nespresso! The location is unbeatable! Many bars and restaurants with a quick walk to Sol metro-will get you anywhere in the city- and a 10 min walk to el rastro on Sundays. The double windows keep the apartment cool and quiet from outside noises.
I would definitely stay again!
Great studio apartment. Very comfortable and clean. A little noisy at times with the street outside but not really an issue. Perfect location, central to all the best parts of the city.

Una excelente Opción para hospedarse en el centro de Madrid.El apartamento de Nuria es lindo y muy limpio.
La ubicación es inmejorable, cerca de todo , lo recomiendo ampliamente.
Piso comodo y muy limpio en el centro de Madrid. A media cuadra de la plaza de Santa Ana. Bastantes bares, tabernas y tiendas alrededor. Nuria siempre respondio rapidamente.
Sabanas muy deterioradas, decoracion no me gusto, almohadas no eran buenas. Tambien hay que hacer un mejor Aseo en cuarto/bano

The apartment is situated in the heart of Madrid, surrounded by plenty of restaurants, bars and night clubs. However, thanks to the double balcony doors, we were able to enjoy peace and quiet from the city's noise when we desired. Nuria was always prompt and willing to respond to our needs. Despite our late arrival, access was simple. Departing late was also a non-issue as there's an automated luggage storage facility on the adjacent street. The apartment is well-furnished and clean. We look forward to returning in the future.
Great stay, very convenient!

Great, well-equipped apartment with everything you need in the heart of Madrid! Amazing location, you are in the very center of the action, you can easily walk to all the main sights. We had a very good stay, highly recommended!!
Amazing location of the apartment. Nuria is a great host, could easily communicate during our stay.
Muy cálida acogedor piso , un poco ruidoso por ser un barrio muy concurrido , Nuria un ser humano educado que muestra mucha empatía con los visitantes .

Tanto la habitación como las áreas comunes en muy estado. Casi en el corazón de Madrid. Decir que Nuria es amable, es poco decir. Digna representante de la cordialidad madrileña. A los cinco minutos te parece que la conocieras de toda la vida. Una excelente opción para quedarse en Madrid y ¡mil gracias Nuria!
We were very pleased with the space and location.  If we are ever back traveling in Madrid we will make sure to see if this space is available. Thank you, David and Kathleen
Núria is such a lovely person, great communication. She even tried to book a reservation for me at a local restaurant. She spoke good English and made us feel at home.
Nuria is a great host and helped us feel welcome.
Great location

Five stars! My wife and daughter stayed here and loved the place. They were able to check in early. The bathroom was amazing-large towels, huge shower, new sink and toilet that were spotless. The walls and windows blocked out the street noise. There was construction in another apartment that started at 9 am on the week days, but since they were there during the holidays, they had a few days of reprieve. It was not an issue since they weren’t in the apartment that much during working hours. There was a motion detector inside the apartment at the front door that they noticed during their stay and were worried it was a camera, but as soon as they reached out to her to voice concerns, Nuria came over to show it wasn’t turned on and is only used when no guests are renting the apartment to protect her place from intruders. Nuria took the time to make sure they were comfortable and shared great info on Madrid to make the most of their stay. Nuria is a genuine and kind person.

Très bon accueil de la part de Nuria, et très flexible et arrangeante.
Un très joli studio, avec tout les équipements nécessaires, correspondant parfaitement aux photos. Appartement très propre, en plein centre de Madrid, facile d'accès dans une rue piétonne animée de bars et restaurants.
Nous recommandons cet appartement les yeux fermés !
Merci beaucoup pour ce séjour à Madrid.
Claire et Zoé.

Inmejorable estadía! Lugar centrico del barrio las Letras (de los mas lindos), bajas y hay muchisimas opciones para tomar algo y comer. Todo se puede hacer a pie, no se necesita transporte. El departamento un 10! Tiene hasta mas cosas de las publicadas, todo estaba limpio y ordenado. En fin, todo excelente, lo recomendaria y volvería.

Queremos agradecer a Nuria , una gran anfitriona , el departamento supero nuestras expectativas , todo lo necesario para hacer confortable nuestra estadía estaba. Ventanales dobles impedía cualquier ruido del exterior , el colchón muy confortable ,nuevamente gracias Nuria por permitirnos dejar el equipaje antes del horario del check-in . Lo recomendamos plenamente . Saludos
Mónica y Eduardo

Small, but very clean apartment with all that necessary inside. The only drawback is that it's quiet noisy, 2 double-glazed windows doesn't help a lot. The host is super friendly, the location is great, we were happy to spend two nights here
Nuria’s flat is very central, a perfect base to explore everything Madrid has to offer

La habitación está ubicada en una gran zona, donde el moverse era fácil por su gran ubicación, todo estaba súper limpio con todo lo necesario y hasta más (shampoo, jabón, papel, lavadora, plancha, etc.), Nuria siempre fue rápida al responder y nos trató con gran amabilidad!
Si tienen la oportunidad de reservar esta habitación, no la desaprovechen!

The flat was as described. There was some building work but Magui let us know that this was going to be happening. The flat was comfortable had all the things needed in a kitchen, along with tea,coffee and sugar. Our flight was delayed and Magui's partner waited for us. We would definitely stay again the folder with recommendations was fantastic thank you so much!

Magui welcomed us upon arrival and helped with luggage up the stairs. She Responded quickly to our requests. Original description did not clarify stairs. Apartment is easy walk to all major sights and restaurants. neighborhood bustles with Locals and tourists. Disappointing to learn that balcony was closed for renovations a few days before check in,  although owner compensated us for that.

Lejligheden var meget centralt placeret i Madrid. Tæt på nogle af de store attraktioner og god handel. Beskrivelsen af lejligheden var meget tro mod virkeligheden, og den levede op til vores forventninger. Balkonen ud mod Plaza Mayor var lukket pga ombygning, men det havde Magui informeret os om, før vi bookede. Når det arbejde er færdigt, må det være en endnu bedre oplevelse at bo i lejligheden - vi kommer gerne tilbage og får den fornøjelse med.

Magui var meget hjælpsom, tog godt imod os, og hendes lille hjemmelavede guidebog er en fin hjælpende hånd - meget betænksomt!
beautiful apartment in the center of Madrid. excellent service.Magui was very kind and welcoming

Warm welcome from Magui who was waiting for us in the apartment
smile, energy, she explains in details the way to live in the apartment and the area. a nice a detailed guide, was at our disposa to find the best place to eat, drink, visit, etc... with maps and handwriting comments from our host.
before during and after the stay, Magui did her best to adapt to the client, she has a real sens of client management, and is involved and reactive. Some professional coud copy her ! I recommend this incredible place, just above the plaza Mayor. close to everything, this cosy apartment, old spanish style, renovated is very comfortable.
位置超级好，出阳台就是马约广场，去哪里都超级方便基本步行都可以到达！房间本身空间还挺大的，厨具设施也比较齐全。还蛮不错的。洗澡需要速度，不然热水会用尽。无线网络几乎虚设，因为一直连不上所以也没有用到。
We had a very enjoyable stay, the apartment was clean and very well located.

Magui herself wasn't in madrid on the weekend that we where at her appartement, but she arranged a friend who took care of the check-in. This transition went smooth and I have to say that the appartement was beautiful!

The appartement had a balcony with an excellent view on Plaza Mayor. The rest of the appartement was nice, clean and we had lots of space.

We really enjoyed our stay in Magui's appartement!

A very cool apartment in a wonderful location! It had a fantastic view of the plaza! And just a five-minute walk to the mercado de San Miguel. Maqui was lovely and left lots of useful information for us.

Magui fue muy amable y atenta, tanto antes como después de nuestra llegada a Madrid. Cuando llegamos al apartamento nos estaba esperando para entregarnos las llaves y enseñarnos el piso. Además, nos dejó una especie de guía de Madrid, con recomendaciones de sitios donde comer o tomar algo y lugares de interés. Sin duda, volvería a hospedarme aquí en mi próximo viaje a Madrid. Totalmente recomendable por su anfitriona y por la ubicación privilegiada del apartamento. ¡Gracias, Magui!

The apartment had everything that we needed, and the decor is lovely - the photos do it justice, even though they make the rooms seem larger. The view over Plaza Mayor is excellent, and there is no noise when the window is closed.

Puerta del Sol is only a couple of minutes away, and the area around Plaza Mayor/Puerta del Sol has all essentials as well as great tourism. Gran Via and other main tourist spots are all within walking distance. Magui’s helpful ‘tourist guidebook’ has plenty of information, locations, maps, recommendations for anyone not familiar with Madrid.

The wifi connection drops out for long periods, even if you sit beside the router - clearly is not an issue of range, but connectivity down the line, although there are plenty of free wifi spots locally if needed.

We’d definitely want to live in this apartment again when next in Madrid. If you are still searching for an apartment... reserve this one before someone else does!

Thanks Magui!

What a memorable experience! The apartment was perfect! It's the most amazing location and the view of plaza mayor is truly magnificent. Every morning we'd wake up and enjoy a morning coffee and the beautiful sights and sunshine of Madrid. The apartment is spacious, with a fully equipped kitchen and plenty of space. Its kept the traditional Spanish architecture, which made it that much more enjoyable. Magui was a delight and extremely responsive, kind, and sweet. I highly recommend this bnb! Will certainly book again when I visit Madrid!

If you want to see Madrid this is the place for you. It is difficult to explain just how perfect this place is. You cannot be more centrally located. The Plaza Mayor is about three steps from the front door, and it is simply amazing. The apartment is comfortably furnished and very well maintained. Magui was always very prompt to respond to any messages, and address any concerns. She provided us with a guide book on par with anything you could buy in a shop. We loved the apartment so much as well. A perfect place to come home to after a day of exploring with a well appointed and easy to use kitchen, washing machine, and pleasant spots for sleeping and relaxing. The pictures do not do this place justice, it is amazing! As far as drawbacks I can see only two. If your used to fast internet, the WiFi is fairly slow. Secondly, it is an attic, and as a result, the ceilings are a bit low. I'm 6'5" and I have more than a few bumps on my head to show for our stay. Despite this, it was still a lovely stay.

The apartment did not meet our expectations because it looks so much better in the photographs. The place would be all right if it had a good, thorough cleaning; however, it probably has been cleaned very superficially for a long time (even some of the kitchen utensils had been put away dirty by the previous guest). Closer supervision is needed to make sure that everything is clean. Also, more towels should be made available. We were limited to one bath towel per person for a five day stay and this is not acceptable when there is no dryer. Magui is a nice girl, but telling us that we are "justitos de toallas" is not acceptable either. They should just buy more towels if they are running an aibnb. The entrance to the building was quite unpleasant, smelling of urine and of the homeless person who sat right next to it. In fact the entire area around the Plaza Mayor was in deplorable condition; I have never seen Madrid Centro so filthy. This is not the host’s fault, but had I been aware of it, I would have stayed somewhere else. The party that went on until 8am can be overlooked since it was New Year's Eve.
Thanks Magui. We enjoyed the house and the location. See you soon
Magui is super friendly and extremely responsive. I could not have asked for a better host

Die Lage der Wohnung ist einfach einmalig. Wir waren zur Osterzeit da und konnten die Oster-Prozessionen vom Balkon aus sehen. Die Übergabe hat reibungslos funktioniert. Magui ist bei der Übergabe sehr individuell auf unseren Wunsch eingegangen.  Insgesamt: tolle Wohnung im alten Wohnkomplex. Auf jeden Fall zu empfehlen! Danke für den einmaligen Aufenthalt!

El piso...pues, fantástico. La vista de la plaza, la tranquilidad.. Lo tiene todo. En el perfecto centro de la ciudad, en un lugar que tampoco los madrileños tuvieron la oportunidad de visitar..! Estuve en el piso un mes entero, lo haría otra vez, y recomiendo a todos.
Magui siempre muy disponible, asegura una comunicación sin fallos.

The flat is located in the exact center of the city. It offers views that not even locals had the chance to see, and it´s also very quiet.. Close to supermarkets, Mercado San Miguel, Latina, Sol, Royal Palace. It just has it all. I definitely recommend.
Magui always very responsive and available to accommodate needs.
Enjoy the flat!

We had a wonderful 8 days in Madrid staying at Magui 's apartment. Great views over plaza mayor and walking distance to everything. The apartment was very clean and quirky and exactly to my taste. Magui met us with a very warm welcome. I highly recommend for anyone staying in Madrid.

I had a great weekend. The flat is comfortable (beds in particular are very comfortable) and the location is fantastic. Great view over the Plaza Mayor. Magui also provides lots of good information about local bars/restaurants.

This was my first first Airbnb experience and it was a great start. First let me say that everything is as advertised. The location is superb and the apartment is quaint and comfortable with a great view of Plaza Mayor. The bedrooms are at the back, away from the bustle and noise of the plaza which is a real plus.
