The entrance to the building is ancient and not inviting but the apartment is a treat. Magui is an excellent communicator and very helpful. Since nobody was leaving the day of my arrival she arranged for her husband to meet me and let me in early. That was much appreciated after flying across the Pacific, North America and then the Atlantic.  My daughter-in-law and I really enjoyed out stay and I will be back again. Thank you Magui.

Magui was super nice. This is probably the coolest place you could stay in Madrid... right in Plaza Mayor. It was awesome to walk outside onto the balcony at all times of day and see the life of the city. The apartment was very comfortable and had everything you could need (full kitchen, tv, wifi, laundry). She even provides a great little guidebook for Madrid. Better experience than a hotel.

We loved our stay at Magui's! The location is amazing and the space was perfect for our group of 4. Magui was a wonderful host and provided everything we needed. We especially loved the windows that opened up to the square!
My in-laws stayed at this lovely property  after our wedding in Madrid with a couple of friends and had a great time! Totally recommended. Magui was a very helpful host.

Our stay in Madrid was fantastic and we loved Magui's place on Plaza Mayor!  The apartment is very spacious, clean and in a perfect location.  It also opens onto the roof of the building surrounding the plaza, and we spent each morning sipping coffee and watching the plaza come to life.  Magui was so friendly and helpful, and had a lot of great recommendations.  Would definitely stay here again!
It's in the heart of the city close to everything.  The absolute perfect location with an amazing view of plaza mayor.

Lo que nos gustó: la ubicación, las vistas a la plaza mayor.
Lo que no nos gustó: los vagabundos en la entrada del edificio, el elevador del edificio elevador.

Superbe emplacement en plein centre de Madrid avec une vue plongeante sur la Plaza Mayor ! L'appartement est rénové avec goût, il est tout équipé et pour ceux qui aiment les parquets anciens et les tomettes, c'est un pur bonheur !
A deux pas du Madrid qui bouge et à 20 minutes à pied des grands musées.
Si je devais retourner un jour à Madrid, je choisirai à nouveau cet appartement !

The house was very dusty and only spot cleaned . Air cond. At the bedroom Do not work properlly , very old. Lights were not working as well in the bedroom. Fan is old and enought to coll the room. Very hot house. Wi-Fi does not work after the kitchen area. The lift at the building is terrible, was stucked with me twice. There is no wine glasses in the house.
The guest charged 25,00 extra because I left rubbish bags in the kitchen as her only recomandation was to wash the dishes.
Very noisy building.
l'appartment est vraiment très agréable. une super localisation, on peut tout faire à pied (musées, visites, courses). Magui a été très accueillante, et nous avons passé un très agréable séjour.
Magui is a fantastic host. She was very quick to respond to questions, and always helpful. There is a great guide in the apartment for the neighbourhood, and the view over the square is great.

Had an amazing time in Madrid thanks to this apartment. It could not be better placed within the centre if you tried! Beautiful views of the Plaza Mayor at all times of day. Apartment itself was great, had everything in it that you ever possibly need, and was lovely and spacious. Magui was an excellent host. She was very warm and welcoming upon arrival and even left a great book that she had compiled with lots of suggestions for places to go to see or to eat and drink.

Lovely attic flat, very well located in central Madrid near Sol and Opera. The flat has lots of character. It has great views over Plaza Mayor. The bedrooms are surprisingly quiet as they are at the back. Very helpful introduction and information from the host. It would be a pleasure to stay there again.

What an adorable apartment in a perfect location!
We had such a wonderful trip and this apartment played a big part. To name a few things; it was clean, the towels were big and soft, the shower was always a great temperature, the air con did its job wonderfully, the wifi was definitely adequate in all of the apartment apart from the bedroom - and that was just fine, the building was old and rustic and added to the drama of the location, but the best part was the large window that opened completely up for us to go out and sit having our morning tea looking over the plaza mayor watching it come alive. I would highly recommend this residence for anybody looking for a base in the city.
Thank you Magui.
Todo más que perfecto. La mejor ubicación. El departamento amplio y completo. Magui muy cordial y amable. Sin duda mi primera opción en Madrid.

Excellent place stay. Not for those who like bland boring hotels as lots of character but still comfortable. Very clean and wonderful view of Plaza Major. Brilliant central position so could walk everywhere. Magus was very welcoming and helpful.
Pasamos unos días estupendos.
Estancia inolvidable, sitio mágico donde los haya. Sin duda será nuestra primera opción cada vez que volvamos. Un 10 en todos los sentidos! Super contentos. :)

Very good Location . In the middle from everything. Apartment was clean and can fix up to 4/5 People.
Communication was Perfect .
Amazing location/breathtaking view...comfortable, spacious, with all the amenities. Great stay!

Just returned from a wonderful few days in Madrid. The apartment is in the perfect location and is just as described and how it appears on the photos. Magui is so helpful and the is best host, could not ask for more. Thank you.

¡ Genial!
Magui es huésped perfeccionada muy simpático que hará todo para que se sienta bien. Plena de buen consejo sobre los lugares tiene visitar en Madrid.
El apartamento es magnífico y limpio con una vista exceptionelle sobre la Placa Mayor.
¡ Emplazamiento perfecto, pasamos una estancia super! ¡ Vivamente recomendamos una estancia en el apartamento de Magui!

We had a great time - Magui replies to messages almost instantly which made it very easy to arrange meeting time. Apartment is just beautiful, and the location is as good as it gets. The sleeping rooms are to the back, so it was pleasantly quiet at night :-) We loved sitting outside on the roof, watching the plaza :-) Can't wait to come back :-)

Magui organised arrival through a friend as she was abroad. It all went completely smoothly. It's slap bang in the middle of Old Madrid. You can walk almost everywhere. I'm not sure how often you'll get the chance to look down on an enormous plaza like this from your own roof top window. That's very special. If you like the un-sleek and the old (I do) you will be thrilled by the staircase before you even get into the flat. The flat has a  quirky lay-out, almost a ribbon - with one end quite far from the other. It was a damp and chilly November weekend but the storage heaters got everything warm  in a short time. Everything works well. The bed was comfy and the room cosy.  White walls and stylish bedding. The place combines old and chic. It's uncluttered, with lots of wooden cupboards and old tiles underfoot. The bed covers and cushions are fresh and stylish. Magui has left a comprehensive and well put together file listing good places to go in Madrid for shopping eating, drinking and culture. Places you wouldn't necesarily find in the guide books.

we stayed here for 4 days - two couples. A wonderful location, as central as central could possibly be.
rustic and charming, it will make your stay in Madrid memorable.
Magui has been helpful and her little book was very useful - we will be back
La afitriona nos ha recibido muy cordialmente, es una persona seria y responsable. Repetiríamos sin duda.

The apartment is perfectly situated in the central part of Madrid by the Plaza Mayor, which means that everything of interest is within walking distance. It is a lovel,y small roof apartment, with interior kept in classical spanish style. The apartment also has a small terrace. Since it is facing south, you can enjoy the sun here, and you can also enjoy observing all the people passing by on the Plaza Mayor.

If you are tall, however, watch out for small doors in the apartment :)

Magui was a great host who provided all information we needed for our arrival. She even waited for us at 0.30 in the night when we arrived :) Thank you!

All in all, if you want to experience Madrid, this apartment is a good place to start!

Magui was an absolutely fantastic host, excellent communication and speedy replies. She ensured she was there to meet us at the apartment and gave us a tour and a detailed guide to Madrid which included lots of information about local restaurants and personal recommendations. We loved the places we tried.
The actual apartment was great, quirky and full of character, lovely views of the plaza Mayor and all the Christmas lights. We were pleased to find the bedrooms were to the rear of the building and so there was no noise disturbance. The apartment was nicely furnished and well equipped, I would very much recommend a stay here if visiting Madrid. The location was so central that you can walk everywhere!

We had the most wonderful long weekend here, just before Christmas. Magui made us feel very welcome and gave us lots of great recommendations.

The location is fantastic, really central and walking distance to lots of brilliant bars and sites. It's lovely looking over the Christmas market and all the people having a great time, and the bedrooms are at the back of the flat where it's quiet. The flat has loads of character and was very cosy. Would go again in a heartbeat.
This house was absolutely beautiful! Perfect location, close to everything. Beautiful, cosy and spacious place. Would highly recommend to anyone ! Thank you so much Magui!

Magui is a great hostess. We arrived late on Christmas Eve, she patiently waited us and brought us cakes and wine which helped us survived the next morning while no restaurant open early in Christmas Day. Thanks Magui!
Great location, close to everything.

Thank you Magui for making our vacation a fantastic memory!!!   Your B&B was amazing -- so comfortable, very quaint, and a priceless view!!!  We appreciated your helpful local information.   We enjoyed walking to many great sites.  If I ever travel to Madrid again, you are the only place I would want to stay!!   Vic & Lisa
Todo muy bien

지하철역인 솔역하고 가까워서 이동이 편리했어요. 하찌만 유명한 광장 바로 옆에 위치하고 있는만큼 근처에 노숙쟈들도 굉장히 많아서 문 열때마다 불얀했구요 특히 그 현관문 옆 코너가 노숙쟈들이 오쥼싸는 곳이라서 찌린냬가 좀 쩔었어요 그래도 숙소에서 바라보는 광장 야경은 참 좋았네요 숙소는 전반적으로 깔끔하지만 오래된 곳이라 깨끗하고 신식을 원하시면 맞지 않을 것 같아요~

The appartment is lovely and right in the heart of everything.
Magui is a great host, very welcoming, made everything right for us to have a wonderful week end.

What a wonderful place! Magui is an extraordinary hostess! The apartment is extremely well equipped. It felt like being at home! The location is simply perfect! Perfect views of Plaza Mayor. We will return!
There are no words to describe how amazing is living on the top of plaza major. Me and my girlfriend we ve been in paradise for 3 days... thank u Magui!!

Un ático limpio, grande, cómodo y con un encanto rústico! Lo mejor: las vistas y dónde está situado (en el centro mismo de Madrid)
Mi pareja y yo nos hemos sentido muy agusto y repetiríamos de nuevo! Gracias por tu atención Magui!

It is a fantastic apartment central in Madrid and the balcony on the roof with my morning coffee, it was perfect
We will come back soon
great location, attic apartment in atmospheric old building
Wonderful place, and a wonderful host. We're definately coming back as soon as possible!

This apartment is amaizingly situated. All you need is very near. If you want to go shopping, enjoying Plaza Major great marketplace or see the Royal place, just walk there.
Aprtment is nice in old house. You really can enjoy the Plaza Major from over the building.
And Magui is so helpful and kind, you can't need any more. She answer even you mail almost online.

What a great couple of nights we had in Madrid. The apartment is perfect. Great location, perfect size for 4 friends exploring this wonderful city.
Magui was great! Friendly and flexible which was greatly appreciated after my trip from the airport took a little longer than expected.
The apartment really is beautiful, and has everything we could have needed. It's just a shame we weren't staying longer.
We will be back.
Xx
Staying in this absolutely wonderful place on Plaza Mayor was the icing on the cake of a perfect long weekend Madrid! Magui was the best host and it was our best AirBnB stay ever!

Magui's place is magical. It has an incomparable old-world charm yet all the needed modern amenities. The balcony which oversees the Plaza Mayor lends a view few get to enjoy. Completely recommend this comfy and memorable listing.

I really love the view from the terrace. The decor is good and apt--very Spanish! Both rooms are nice and clean, though one of the rooms smelled of fresh paint. The place also has great location. I was worried that because it's so central that it would be noisy; but it wasn't the case at all! The flat is on fifth floor, but there's an old-school elevator. Overall, place is great! Thanks, Magui!

We had a wonderful time staying at Magui's place for five nights. It was comfortable and clean with all necessary amenities. The location was very central. It was  walking distance to many sights and very close to the Metro. I would definitely recommend Magui's place to others.
Great place to stay with a very kind host. Splendid view on the Plaza Mayor, providing a continuous live theater.
Apartamento en los tejados de la plaza Mayor. la ubicación es ideal y permite descubrir la ciudad a pie. el anfitrión al verano muy buenos consejos para poder descubrir el lugar ideal en la ciudad.
Magui was a wonderful host. Checking in was easy and the apartment is exactly as she explained. The location and view of Plaza Mayor is incomparable. I will stay here again.

A great find! Maguis apartment is lovely and spacious apartment and has an absolutely perfect location! It was clean and cosy, and had everything we needed, including a book with recommendations of restaurantes, and a helpful map showning where to shop etc.
Communication with Magui was very easy, and she was kind and helpful both before and during our stay.
We were very happy to stay at the apartment and will defenitely choose it again next time we go to Madrid.
Great location. Great host.

Elvira is an incredible host! She is very knowledgable about Madrid and offered many suggestions for places to visit, none of which dissapointed. The room and bed are extremely comfortable, and she makes you feel very welcome. I definitely want to come back and stay with her again.

Elvira was an extremely helpful host and her space is heaven- could Not be a better location (my trip was all about seeing the art museums), even to get across town I didn't need the metro, everything was walkable. I felt very safe and the balcony is gorgeous. Elvira was a history teacher- so she knows everything about Madrid! Beautiful room beautiful view, elevator to apartment. Stay here!

Elvira's home is beautiful, comfortable and clean, in a nice neighbourhood which is lively but at the same time far enough away from the crowd so it's peaceful as well.
The location is very well connected - within walking distance of the tourist areas and close to the metro / Renfe as well. Elvira herself is a wonderful host who makes you feel very welcome and will take the time to help you get to know the city. Thanks for the hospitality!

Elvira was a fantastic host.  She gave me lots of help with things to see and the history of Madrid.  She also went out of her way to sort out a train ticket issue for me!  Also, the bed was very comfortable.  Thank you Elvira for a great stay.

Elvira's place is very conveniently located, walkable to most points of interest. I loved the firm mattress and clean sheets! Elvira was kind enough to offer free milk and delicious Italian coffee whenever she could :) I had a good time in Madrid.

La casa es un sueño, está perfectamente ubicada, todo queda caminando, la terraza es una delicia.
La mejor parte es nuestra Host, Elvira. Es un encanto, siempre dispuesta a ayudar, a platicar, darte los mejores tips sobre Madrid y sobre todo te hace sentir como un miembro de la familia.
Cuando vuelva a Madrid, sin duda vuelvo con ella.

Elvira's apartment is nice and central and everything I did in Madrid was easily walkable. The apartment is really nice and the bedroom nicely set up.  Elvira is extremely helpful and ensured my stay was very comfortable.  I would highly recommend staying here.

It was the perfect place to stay in Madrid. Very central, you are right in the middle of the city and can reach everything in walking distance. The place has everything you need and is really clean. I enjoyed it and Elvira is a perfect host. I would fully recommend this place for a great stay in Madrid!
Excelente ubicación y una excelente actitud de Elvira! Mucha gracias por todas tus atenciones!

Magui's place was out of this world. No hay palabras. This is the best AirBnb I have ever stayed in by far. The view is better than the photos- being able to look out on the Plaza Mayor was breathtaking. The inside of the home is just as gorgeous, there is a ton of space, and while the space is old and has a ton of character, Magui has made sure that everything inside is totally up to date. I could not have asked for anything more. Not only should you stay here, you NEED to. Magui herself went above and beyond, preparing booklets with things to see and places to eat. Again, this is the best place and the best host I have ever experienced with all of my travels. Thank you, Magui, for a perfect, unforgettable trip.

Magui was a wonderful host and her apartment is lovely.  She was there to greet us minutes after we arrived and she helped us get our heavy luggage up the last flight of steps at the top of the building after we got off the elevator.  Magui' apartment is spacious, clean, and filled with old world charm.  She had plenty of dishes, kitchen ware, bathroom supplies and bed linens for us.  She has a nice book filled with local maps, recommendations and places of interest.  She helped us arrange a taxi on the morning when we left. We can't say enough about how helpful and responsive Magui was.  The apartment is perfect if you want to be in the middle of the tourist areas of interest.  It was within walking distance of everywhere we wanted to go.  Plenty of bars and cafes nearby.  The beds were very comfortable and the bathroom was also very good.  We had a very nice stay at Magui's apartment.

Delightful and knowledgeable host. Her recommendations were helpful and much appreciated. The apartment is completely spacious and well equipped. The elevator was helpful to have  in such an old building. The apartment is very charming. Super comfortable bed. The view from the balcony is priceless.  We loved our stay!!

4 of us stayed in this lovely place. Plenty of room, nice chill out lounge area. The balcony was great, to overlook the plaza was special.
Kitchen with all necessities. Bathroom was fine. All nice and clean. Location was brilliant, central to almost everything.
Magui met us to check us in and hand over keys, she was very pleasant and offered to help in any way. All in all great trip, great place. would recommend.
Would return.

Amazing place! Highly recommend!
Perfect location. You live in the heart of the city. Great view (exectly like in the photos), good transport accessibility.
Quiet sleeping. Bedrooms are location in the center of the building. So your sleep is peaceful and tight.
Nice apartment. There's everything you need. And it is clean and neat.
And there is a book with recommended places. It is gold! There are so many helpful hints.
So it is just perfect place to stay in Madrid.
5 stars isn't enough to rate the location of Magui's wonderful apartment overlooking Plaza Mayor!  Magui gave us wonderful information on places  to  visit and  the apartment was perfect!

Logement splendide et fonctionnel ; accueil agréable et sans incidents.
Parfait !

This was a great apartment in the thriving Plaza Mayor.
Lots of action, but the bedrooms were very quiet situated at the back of the apartment. So many restaurants and major attractions within walking distance. We also felt safe in this area.
Amazing view of plaza mayor! Magui was very responsive and helpful too.

We really enjoyed our stay at Madrid. The location of the flat is perfect. Close to all the best spots in Madrid. The view on Plaza Mayor is incredible.
Magui is a very kind host. The flat is comfortable and very typical and quiet. No noise durind the night.
Great location!!  So easy to walk many of the of the points of interest

Great place in the heart of old Madrid. Close to all the entertainment, nightlife, shopping, food! Easy to reach, excellent communication with manager. Would be happy to stay in this apartment again during future visits.

Magui is wonderful host, kind and considerate. We had a great time staying in the apartment. It's old and full of character. The apartment is laid out quite nicely and is comfortable. I only wish there were more views of the Plaza Mayor, but I imagine it could get quite noisy if there were. It is nice the bedrooms do not face the Plaza, bedrooms are very quiet and in the back of the apartment. Thanks again Magui, we enjoyed our time over the weekend!

One of a kind! The apartment is beautiful and the location is perfect. Everything is close by and everywhere is within walking distance.  Everything is exactly as shown in the pictures. Very clean and has everything you will need. Our flight was one hour late and Magui was flexible and very kind to wait for us so we could check-in. She was very friendly and recommended great places to eat and visit. Amazing place to stay, we would love to come back !

Really great apartment in an amazing location. The roof views are incredible and we loved people watching in the square. We were staying with our baby and did find the stairs and lift a bit tricky. Not a good choice if you have accessibility issues. But it was such a unique experience that we thought it was worth the effort!
Estupendamente. Ubicación, limpieza, estancia, camas, vistas...

My parents and I stayed in this apartment for 4 nights. The location really sets this place apartment from the rest! It's incredibly close to everything and the view from the balcony was great. Magui was a really helpful host and so understanding even when our evening flight was delayed so we arrived in the early hours! The rooms were comfortable and though the decor of the place was slightly outdated, this did give the apartment a cosy and relaxing atmosphere. Highly recommend!

Magui's apartment is really perfect... exactly as in the pictures.
If i'm back to Madrid i'll definitely try to book this apartment again... Nice view on Plaza Mayor, and bedrooms on the other part, very quiet.
Go for it.

The best thing about this apartment is that you can sit on the roof and watch the entire Plaza Mayor.
The apartment is an old historical building, but it has all the modern amenities. Because it's at roof level, you need to watch out for the low beams if you are tall.
The neighborhood is lively, right in the middle of everything. Short taxi ride to Atocha, Prado, and etc.
Magui is very responsive. We had a good time in Madrid.

Charming, clean and spacious apartment with fantastic location and great views of Plaza Mayor.  Magui is very friendly, responsive hostess and provided great recommendations about the city. We had a great time in Madrid!
Amazing location, great views on the Plaza, I would go back anytime!

Do yourself a favour and book this place in right now!
The location is perfect. Walking distance to everything. We spent our first night in Madrid sitting on the roof, people watching and taking in Plaza Mayor, while eating the best churros in Madrid (purchased from around the corner).
Magui is very responsive and helpful - she answered every question and request promptly. Check in couldn't have been easier (even though we were running late due to issues with our rental car).
Highly recommend.

Magui has been very attentive to our needs and especially our arrival. The apartment is in a great location overlooking Plaza Mayor and within walking distance of many of the places we wanted to visit. It was good to have aircon in the 3 main rooms, especially 2 bedrooms as it was very hot in Madrid during our visit.

Our stay in Madrid was excellent! The house is very charming, well decorated, and has everything you need. The air conditioning kept us cool during the hot days and the view of the square was awesome! I definitely recommend this place when visiting Madrid.
This flat was fantastic for a group of four! Magui is extremely helpful and a wonderful host! I recommend this for anyone traveling to Madrid.

Posizione ottimale per la visita della città. Vista su plaza mayor dal terrazzamento del tetto che si raggiunge tramite la tipicha portefinestra a tetto: vale il prezzo del biglietto. Camere silenziose perché poste sul retro della casa, anche se molto piccole. Letti alla francese comodi. Non posso esprimermi sull equipaggiamento della cucina avendo mangiato sempre fuori, nè sulla climatizzazione della casa, non avendo avuto necessità di accendere i climatizzatori. Magui è un'ospite attenta e gentile. Vive non distante dalla casa ed è solerte nel farsi carico di eventuali necessità. Appartamento consigliato per visitare madrid.

I couldn't imagine a "dreamier" place. Exactly in Plaza Mayor, with a balcony that faces it. Large and comfortable rooms, fully equipped and  with air conditioners all over - perfect for the heat of august. Magui was a darling, taking good care of us and really fast in answering all messages. Made a personal guide of the city with restaurants, shops, shows and other entertaining activities - really sweet and considerate. Too bad I spent so little time in there but, once I'm back in Madrid, hopefully she'll receive me again!
Great

Magui was a wonderful host. She was always reachable during our entire stay and she even went out of her way to help us fix a small issue with the bathroom by coming to the apartment after her work hours.
The house is in a very central location at Playa Major with easy access to all Madrid sights. It is very beautiful and is much bigger than we expected. We absolutely loved our stay.

The apartment was lovely and very clean with the added bonus of being able to sit out on the roof which overlooked Plaza Mayor Square.  Magui was very helpful and if in Madrid would book this apartment again.

This place has hands down the best view of plaza mayor. Bring your coffee with you as you overlook the tourist groups and performers in the square below. Getting here is a short 5 minute walk from the sol station. One thing to look out for is the low doorways - if you're over 6 feet tall, you'll need to be prepared to duck.
A superb location and what a view. Perfect to watch the world go by. Everything inside worked as you'd expect. All in all superb.

The perfect place to stay in Madrid!  The apartment is quiet, comfortable and cosy.  It has an amazing view and is full of character, with everything you need including tea/coffee, toaster, hob, kettle, washing up liquid, shower gel etc.  The air con is very efficient, the beds are comfortable, the shower looks really dodgy but in fact it has really good water pressure! Magui is lovely, very accommodating and happy to help, and has made a folder of top tips about the city which is really useful. The location is fantastic. Right in the centre of the city, so you can head out on foot in any direction and walk everywhere. If you don't want to walk, there seems to be a constant stream of taxis just around the corner from the apartment. There is a small supermarket nearby, restaurants, bars and a fabulous market, as well as the best chocolate con churros just around the corner! I went with a friend and we both loved the apartment, the location and Madrid.  GO!

The view from this apartment is amazing.  You can people watch for hours.  Lovely place to stay with everything you could possibly want.  Magui was a very good host and made sure we were welcomed and checked we were OK.  Recommended to everyone.

The apartment was great and was as described. The view and location is great. I would recommend anyone who is visiting Madrid to come and stay here. Also Magui was a fantastic host, we couldn’t have asked for better. She was very nice and very helpful while we were there. Thanks!

The apartment is absolutely beautiful. There were nightly concerts in the plaza mayor to celebrate the 400th anniversary that we could watch from the balcony, and then if we shut the door it was totally quiet inside. Magui's handmade book of recommendations was fabulous. We had everything we needed. It was perfect.
Magui's apartment was clean, comfortable and in an excellent location. We walked to all major sites.
I've been in airbnb's on 3 continents and this was the best stay yet.  Description was accurate and you can just sit and watch into plaza mayor.  Communication was outstanding.

This conveniently located attic is comfortable and cozy. We could have stayed for a month due to all the amenities included and superb location.
The host is excellent and helpful. She provided a guide with every suggestion you can ask for. We highly recommend this apartment and will stay again in the near future. Que viva Madrid!!!!!

Un lugar mágico Magui es una estupenda anfitriona, y creo que todos los que hemos vivido alguna vez en Madrid hemos soñado con estar en una buhardilla de Plaza Mayor. Nuestra amiga venía del extranjero, de un lugar muy lejano, y queríamos sorprenderla. No es exagerado en decoración, es sencillo, pero  tiene mucho encanto, por lo que además el precio es ajustado. Perfecto, limpisimo, con todo tipo de atenciones, y para recorrer el centro de Madrid andando; epicentro del Barrio de las Letras, Sol, Chueca, Gran Via, Malasaña y Opera- Palacio Real. No se puede pedir más... Absolutamente recomendable

Outstanding location in a quaint historic apartment.  The spacious apartment overlooking the Plaza Mayor puts you right in the center of the historic part of town  & we enjoyed people watching from the terrace overlooking the square as well as the proximity to all of the sights/restaurants etc.  The apartment is very nice - well appointed and Magui the host was great to deal with.  It is on the 5th floor with elevator service to the 4th so you only have to walk up 1 flight which was not an issue.  The good size living room, dining room, eat-in kitchen and 2 bedrooms make it great for a twosome or foursome and it  would definitely be a good place for an extended stay as it feels very roomy.  If you want charm and location, this one is great!
Elvira is a great host. The place is very clean. The Air conditioning was very much appreciated when Madrid is heating up to near to near 40deg.

This place is awesome, and I can't imagine a better host than Elvira! You absolutely can't beat the location, walkable to the the train station, as well as tons of points of interest around the city. The building/apartment/room are very clean, modern, and comfortable. Elvira will tell you all about the city and give you great suggestions, is happy to chat at any time, but at the same time is also great about giving you your space.
Sin duda tendréis una visita perfecta en Madrid si elijas este lugar!

Elvira es una persona muy amable, te va a ayudar a que tu estadía en Madrid sea encantadora. Me fascinó la zona, muy cerca al tren, metro, buses, además es muy fácil llegar e ir al aeropuerto. Además es cerca a museos, parques, buenos restaurantes y sitios de interés. La habitación es cómoda y limpia. El lugar es muy lindo.
Otra visita buenísima para mi en casa de Elvira. Es una anfitriona perfecta tal como son el espacio y ubicación. Gracias Elvira!

Elvira is a very good hostess, she hastened to give me all the useful information when I arrived and gave additional explanation each time I needed it. The apartment is nicely decorated, clean and quiet. As it is really close to the center, it is possible to discover the essential walking for people who like walking of course!
Excelente ubicación y limpieza, veracidad de la información y fotos, con todas las comodidades y atención de Elvira para cualquier eventualidad.
Superb location, nice space, perfect communication and host. Overall a great stay!
Great central place. Nice atmosphere. Good value for money.

This was my first stay in a private room and it was and excellent experience. The reviews were all very positive, and I have to say they were exactly right. Elvira is a wonderful host. Her flat is lovely and the location in the Barrio de Las Letras is perfect. Super cool neighborhood and close to everything....the entrance to the Prado Museum is literally a 5 minute walk! She provided all the help and guidance I needed. The room was nice and the bed extremely comfortable. I had a fantastic experience all around and highly recommend Elvira's place.

Elvira is very hospital and welcoming! She is knowledgeable and very helpful concerning the local area and sights. The room was perfect...very comfortable. The apartment is overall fairly small, but you really can't beat the location. A perfect combination of a short walk from the Atocha station and right next to Retiro Park and fairly close walking distance from all of the sights to the west (Real Palace, etc). Tons of great food within 5 min walking distance!
Elvira is a great host. Her place is perfectly located in the historical Barrio de las Letras and close to nice tavernas, museums and other amenities. Had a great time while there

We really enjoyed our stay at Magui’s apartment. The location cannot be beat - the apartment is in Plaza Mayor (which is within walking distance of most attractions) and it has incredible views, but the bedrooms are in the back of the apartment, away from the plaza exposure, and are pin-drop quiet. The apartment was charming and very clean, and we found Magui to be a gracious, helpful, and flexible host. We highly recommend this apartment.
Very nice place. Recommend!

Magui’s place was the perfect location! We walked everywhere in Madrid and the view from the rooftop really made our trip. We spent lots of time watching the world go by, eating and drinking up there. Check in was very easy and Magui was a very helpful host. We used the recommendations she left for places to eat. We’d definitely return. Thank you!

This apartment was so amazing I wish I could give it more than 5 stars. The view into the square and the people watching it provides is incredible. The apartment itself is so clean and filled with cute details and character. The bed we stayed in was comfortable, the shower pressure was so strong,  just be careful the water can get very warm. The place was stocked with all the essentials like shampoo, coffee, tea, oil, etc. Magui is a welcoming and super responsive host. The only complaint that I have about this place is that I cannot live here myself, after my stay I was more than ready to move in.
Hard to imagine a better apartment, location, or value. A no brainer for exploring Madrid.

Great apartment, everything you could possibly need. Great communication, and tips from Magui. Really enjoyed the view, you are able step outside to a lively area but inside is very quiet. Would highly recommend!

A unique experience to stay in plaza mayor. Rustic and gave you an insight of living in the heart of Madrid and maybe what is was like there a couple of centuries ago. Magui met us on time and gave good suggestions to make our stay comfortable and how everything works in the house.

Amazing apartment and great host Magui! Roof terrace/balcony is very cool to drink, to eat, to relax. A whole historic apartment is very convenient and quiet, a big kitchen with all you need. We liked this place very much. Location is very good, 5-10 minutes walk to most interesting places, plazas, the palace and metro. 20 minutes taxi ride to the airport, public transportation is good as well.
The only problem is the Madrid local government which trashed most of Plaza Mayor with some ugly structures and construction running, most of Plaza is closed for visitors. Unfortunately this is a global problem - stupids in power ruining nice historic places, not created by them. That's sad... But you always can avoid looking down from terrace - look around - it's really cool, beautiful and unique - I would stay there again! Highly recommended!
Great apartment in a very central location. Charming fittings, especially the traditional roof. Amazing place to stay.

From the moment we arrived everything was just perfect in the flat.  It is as charming and historic as the photos look. Easy arrival and departure.  I had the smaller of the two bedrooms and it was warm and peaceful. Great views over the lively Plaza but bedrooms were quiet.  I wish we could have stayed longer.

Emplacement 5 étoiles pour ce vaste appartement de caractère qui nous a permis de passer un séjour inoubliable au cœur de la belle Madrid. Tout était parfait et Maguy nous a vraiment bien accueilli. Nous reviendrons avec grand plaisir.
El sitio es inmejorable y el trato también.
Fantastic view from the roof! Dynamic and smiling host! Perfect location. Old style furniture in the flat but perhaps part of the flat charm. Recommended

The location is amazing, in the middle of everything that you will need. The elevator is quite old and there is a stair to climb. I loved to be able to be in the middle of so many things to do and see. Very walkable and full of cafés, restaurants and touristic offices. We spent Christmas there and the apartment is cozy and comfortable for any occasion. There was a Catholic Church close by for the Christmas mass. Also the oldest chocolate house of Madrid is close by.

The apartment was all we hoped for and more. We had a little bit of trouble finding it initially because of how small the street is between Calle Mayor and the Plaza, but once we knew its location it was perfect. We felt the charm of the attic space as soon as we walked in. Magui was warm and welcoming and provided everything we needed. The rooms were clean and quaintly furnished. I loved being surrounded by all of the colors and books. The bedrooms were very comfortable, the kitchen perfectly furnished and the living room very comfortable. We saw the fireworks in Sol from the balcony and when we wanted to feel the vibe of the Plaza we opened the attic window; when we wanted quiet we just went into the backrooms which opened to a courtyard. Everything was wonderful about this apartment.

Magui’s place is a wonderful place with old charm and character. It has an amazing view to Plaza Mayor and we loved all the internal court yard windows that provided natural light. Everything was clean, accessible, and in great condition. The apartment is spacious with a lovely living area, dinning, and separate kitchen. The bedrooms are cozy and comfortable. Magui is a great host and we enjoyed staying at the place. We highly recommend it.

Cumple todo lo que propone la descripcion. Vistas increibles. Situacion perfecta para moverte por el centro. Piso amplio y espacioso. Las facilidades tanto para la llegada como la salida fueron de primer nivel. Sin duda un sitio recomendable si quieres pasar unos dias visitando la ciudad.
Magui's place is an extremely cosy and convenient place right in the centre of Madrid. We really didn't need much public transport as the location was so central!

AMAZING LOCATION with a balcony view of Plaza Mayor! My first time here I always wondered who (if anyone) lives up there—it was awesome to be one of those people for a few days! Magui was very responsive and flexible to helping us leave our bags while the apartment got cleaned as we landed early—made our first day smooth! I would certainly come back here and recommend to friends and family
マドリード好きには堪らない宿です。
El piso está en un sitio privilegiado. Es antiguo pero eso es lo que hay. Sin duda repetiría.
Magui muchisimas gracias

This quirky apartment is in a classic Plaza Major building involving a climb up lots of stairs or a tiny lift to get up to roof level. The view over the square and the old town character of the apartment are well worth it. It’s clean, well organized and the beds are very comfortable. Magui has put together a great book full of local tips on good places to eat and visit. I would definitely book this apartment again.

Excelente ubicación, piso equipado para una estancia cómoda y grata.
Magui es una anfitriona atenta y dedicada. Volvería a elegirla si retorno a Madrid.

Terrific place. The house’s history can trace back to over 300 years ago. Very Spanish style. The attic feels cozy, like the hobbits home.
Plus great location, easy access to all interesting places and very fine amenities.
Appartement avec une vue à Couper le souffle. Magui est très réactive et même loin de Madrid se met en quatre pour rendre votre séjour facile.

Such a great location.  We walked everywhere.  Even though it rained we enjoyed exploring Madrid.  It was nice to have a cozy place to return to for warm coffee and tea.  The building was very quiet and the view of the plaza is amazing.

Perhaps the best Airbnb experience I've had out of 15+ stays.
Positives:
Great location, very clean, old world charm and character, but with up-to-date appliances and plenty of plugs. This is the only place I've ever stayed outside the USA that offered a plug adaptor. Easy to use heating system, shower faucet straight forward. Comfortable mattresses. Elevator, two sets of keys, two full sized umbrellas. Bedside lamps and tables, lots of unpacking space, and lots of hooks in bathroom!!!
Negatives:
Although it is awesome to look out onto Mayor Plaza, to do so, one has to climb a few stairs, and look out a dormer window; there is a little bench to sit by the window. Without this effort, one doesn't see the view. Tub is slippery.

Magui was incredibly communicative and went above-and-beyond in terms of flexibility for our check-in. The view from the attic window/ledge is one of a kind. It's an incredibly central location and that allows you to travel throughout the city effortlessly.

A quirky apartment in a brilliant location.  After the first day I had remembered where to duck.  Warm, comfortable and everything you needed was in place. Magui was an attentive hostess and she helped us quickly when I left a piece of luggage in the apartment on the morning of departure.
Extremely central. Amazing views over Plaza Mayor. Clean. Great host. All round great experience. Thanks!
Great hospitality, communication and accommodation! Highly recommended!

This is the most perfect place to stay when staying in Madrid. It overlooks Plaza Mayor and it's so much fun sitting out on the balcony and watching all the activity. The apartment is so adorable. A traditional cozy Spanish apartment.  The bedrooms are in the back so when you are done people watching all the activity in Plaza Mayor, it is so quiet when you go to bed. Magui was a great hostess. She was meeting us at noon, but due to a delay at the airport and then the cab driver bringing us to the wrong spot, she very patiently waited close to 3 hrs for us to show up, keeping in contact with us the whole time. Then she told us we could stay longer than the original check out time as no one was coming to rent her place that day. She is such a great hostess, we loved her place and will definitely stay here again.

The location could not be better. The place is amazing. Right in the heart of the city but as private as you could wish for. Magui is well organized and helpful. If you can't have a great time here, you should probably stay home.

Great apartment with great view and great landlord. Magui was always quick response and very friendly, she prepared detailed travel guide by herself. The apartment was amazing and very clean. Dear Magui, thank you for all your help and I’m sure we will come back again.

The apartment is a beautiful old fashioned apartment in the very heart of the oldest part of town, with extraordinary views. The best I have stayed at in Madrid so far (and I write travel reviews for a living!)

Wonderful! The apartment is full of character and the location cannot be beaten. Magui was extremely helpful and even booked a taxi for us on our departure. Highly recommended; we will definitely stay again when next in Madrid.
Skøn lejlighed. Meget rent. To gode soveværelser som var meget stille, da de lå væk fra Plaza Major. Alt det praktiske fungerede perfekt. Kan klart anbefale lejligheden.

The location cannot be beat!
The main door is tricky to open, and you have to climb one flight of stairs. Otherwise, it is clean, comfortable, as described, and we would certainly stay here again.
The hostess is remarkably kind, and gives great advice. Stay here if you want to be close to the best Madrid has to offer!

This place is fantastic. Cool, funky vibe in the heart of Madrid. You can pretty much walk anywhere. Great view of Plaza Mayor. Bedroom is not on the Plaza side so very quiet despite being in the center of town. Would return again and recommend to anyone.

This is the best location ever! There is not really room to sit outside on the balcony that is running the lengte of the building, but it is still magnificent to just be outside and have the view of the whole square!
Magui is helpful and friendly, and we found everything we needed in the apartment.
The beds are comfortable, but we used earplugs some of the time when we had the windows open at night, due to neighbours talking and coming home late.

El departamento tiene una ubicación inmejorable, con una vista a la Plaza Mayor única.......es más que una vista, ya que estás dentro de la Plaza. Magui la anfitriona es muy atenta y estuvo siempre dispuesta para con nosotros, tuvimos un inconveniente personal al irnos y ella trató de ayudarnos en todo momento, aún varios días después de regresar a nuestro país siguió ayudándonos. Es un departamento para recomendar.
Superb location with literally a birds eye view of plaza mayor. We enjoyed our time there and would book again in a heartbeat!
This is a first class place at the top of a 200 year old building. Rent it, you won't regret it.

WOW!!! What an amazing place to stay in Madrid. The apartment is well maintained, clean and oh my goodness--the view!!! The noise did not bother us at all because the rooms are in the back. Everything is walking distance and easy to get to. I'd like to thank Magui for her "Guide book" and restaurant recommendation.

What a great sot.  By far our favourite AirBnB rental during our three week trip to Portugal and Spain.  The apartment oozes character with timbered ceilings, an incredibly comfortable living room space, well stocked kitchen and bedrooms that were comfortable and very quiet.  We loved being able to walk out onto the balcony and watch life go by below in Plaza Major.  You couldn't ask for a better location being in the centre of Madrid and a relatively short walk to all the key attractions.  Magui was incredibly helpful with an amazing guidebook with tons of suggestions on places to eat, drink and see.  We would definitely return!

Nuria est aussi sympathique que réactive. Le logement est idéalement situé et le mobilier est impeccable.
Merci Nuria!!!
Nuria’s appartment is the best choice if you want to visit Madrid and stay close to most of the attractions and restaurants! Perfect spot for everyone, we recommend Nuria- 10/10!
Tout était parfait. Nuria est une hôte géniale. Je reviendrai avec plaisir!

הגענו לדירה ל-7 ימים.
נוריה המקסימה קיבלה אותנו בחיוך ועזרה וענתה על כל השאלות שלנו!
הדירה הייתה נקייה ומאובזרת באופן מושלם, באמת לא חסר כלום וגם המיקום שלה היה מדהים, ממש במרחק הליכה מכיכר סול וגם מתחנת מטרו.
גם במהלך השהייה נוריה הייתה זמינה וענתה לאורך כל השהות.
בקיצור ממליצים בחום!

Great visit to Madrid thanks to Nuria's great place. The location is nice, situated in a small side street. Right in the center of restaurants, bars, shops, and close to public transportation, museums. The apartment is very cute and clean, offering a comfortable stay. And thanks to the AC it was nice and cool.
Keskeinen sijainti Madridissa. Hyviä ravintoloita lähikortteleissa. Ravintola-alueella kuuluu luonnollisesti öisiä ääniä - voi häiritä joidenkin unia. Asunto ja keittiö ovat hyvin varusteltuja.

El apartamento de Nuria está ubicado en el corazón de Madrid, a pasos de todas las atracciones que buscábamos visitar y lleno de bares y restaurantes en la misma puerta del edificio. Igualmente dentro del alojamiento no se escuchaba absolutamente nada del exterior. El apartamento cuenta con todo lo que alguien puede precisar, con una cocina súper completa y un baño muy cómodo. Mención aparte merece Nuria, que estuvo a disposición y predispuesta a todas nuestras inquietudes, respondiendo rápido y aportando soluciones a todo lo que precisamos. En definitiva, una de las mejores anfitrionas que nos han tocado.
Appartement très bien situé,  très joli et bien équipé . hôte très sympathique et réactif
A great apartment, as described. really good location - very central and lots of bars / restaurants nearby.

The host, Nuria, was a pleasure to interact with. She was very helpful! The location was perfect: within a short walking distance from most Madrid's highlights. The unit is equipped with all necessary equipment/utensils.
Great location!  Convenient to everywhere.
Great place. Fantastic position (middle of Madrid….almost). Excellent facilities, we will go again, when visiting Madrid 👌👌👌👌

Am avut o experiență grozavă la apartamentul Nuriei, chiar în inima Madridului! E un loc foarte bine îngrijit si foarte curat, decorat cu bun gust, iar spațiul e perfect pentru a te simți ca acasă. M-a surprins cât de liniștit e, deși e chiar în centrul orașului, aproape de toate punctele de interes, care se afla la câțiva pași de mers. Nuria a fost super drăguță și a răspuns rapid la orice întrebare. A fost alegerea ideală pentru a putea vedea Madridul cateva zile si cu siguranță aș reveni!

Nuria was an excellent host and very responsive. The apartment is right in the heart of Madrid and has everything we needed for our stay. We easily walked to Plaza Mayor and the Mercado de San Miguel multiple days. It’s a safe location for night adventures too. We would definitely recommend and stay again!

Nuria’s hospitality was superb. She was such a thoughtful host and we thoroughly enjoyed our stay. The apartment was beautiful and  in a perfect location, close to everything we needed. We would recommend Nuria’s place to anyone who plans to visit Madrid
Great location 4 minute walk to Sol Metro station

Appartement agréable et bien aménagé, dans un quartier pittoresques avec ses nombreux bars à tapas et restaurants, et très bien situé pour une visite de Madrid à pied.
Hôtesse très sympathique et réactive.
Провела потрясающую неделю! Спасибо большое Nuria за гостеприимство 💕

I let Nuria know when we would be there and she was there and let us in. She gave us a tour of the apartment and it looked exactly like the photos.
Nuria told us about restaurants including the one right across the walkway from the building
Nuria had an excellent place, I was worried about the bed being that I’m 6 feet, 5 inches but I slept almost as good as if it was my own bed.
My only issue that was my issue only was that I was not that good working the dryer and left my jeans in too long shrinking them!! Luckily I had other pants.
If I ever come again, I would definitely put Nuria’s apartment at the top of the list! Overall, awesome!

Nuria è stata un ottima padrona di casa: al nostro arrivo ci ha accolti fornendoci tutte le informazioni necessarie per muoverci a Madrid. L appartamento è in pieno centro storico pertanto non abbiamo avuto nessuna difficoltà a muoverci in città, si trova in una strada con molti locali ma nonostante ciò è molto silenzioso. È arredato con gusto ed è fornito del necessario e confort per il tuo soggiorno a noi è sembrato di stare a casa propria.
Ringraziamo Nuria per la sua ospitalità e consigliamo a tutti questo appartamento.
Apartamento en una ubicación inmejorable, a 3min andando de Sol. Muy bien equipado con todo lo necesario y más. Nuria súper atenta, muy amable y dispuesta a ayudar en todo lo que haga falta.

Nuria’s apartment is the BEST. You are smack in the middle of one of Madrid’s hottest neighborhoods- Las Letras, with tons of restaurants, bars, shopping and nightlife but it’s still quiet and nestled in a tiny street so never too noisy and you can sleep.
The apt is super well decorated and immaculately clean.
Nuria is one of the kindest and most helpful hosts I’ve ever met. She greeted me at the door during her own family holiday and spent time explaining everything, and was super thoughtful and sweet.
I cannot say enough nice things about this location. 10/10. I will definitely be back.
Thank you Nuria!

Excelente custo/beneficio para a localização que era perfeita. Perto de todo tipo de atração no sentido amplo, restaurantes, shoppings, atrações culturais e de lazer, etc.
Muito boa comunicação com a Nuria, fato que nos permitiu desfrutar da nossa estadia a pleno.
Great place to stay, right at the very center of the center of the center of Madrid :) Plenty to see and to do from here, as well as great transport communications!

Estivemos na acomodação na última semana de Janeiro/25. Estive com minha avó, de 80 anos, e meu filho de 05 anos. Ficamos extremamente satisfeitos com o espaço, a localização do imóvel e a hospitalidade da Nuria. Super recomendamos a estadia!

Abbiamo soggiornato in famiglia …due adulti ed un bambino di 21 mesi… Nuria ci ha accolti con grande entusiasmo e ci ha spiegato tutto.
L’appartamento si presenta come in foto… pulitissimo ordinatissimo funzionale , provvisto di qualsiasi cosa potesse servire e soprattutto in ottima Posizione per girare Madrid.
Abbiamo trovato (come richiesto) anche la culla per il nostro Lorenzo.
Soggiornare da Nuria è stato veramente come stare a casa propria!
L’ambiente inoltre era caldo e confortevole.
Qualora dovessimo ritornare a Madrid sicuramente contatteremo Nuria e comunque consiglieremo il suo alloggio ai nostri amici .
Complimenti!

Très bon séjour à Madrid
Le logement est identique à la description des photos mise sur le site airbnb
Le logement est très bien situé ( rue très passante et commerçante ) mais le logement est bien isolé des bruits extérieurs .
Nous entendons davantage les bruits de l’immeuble => voisins du dessus & d’à côté
Mise à part cela, je recommande ce logement

El departamento está impecable. Tiene todo lo necesario para una estadía en Madrid. Está muy bien ubicado. Nuria responde siempre a cualquier inquietud o inconveniente, siendo amable y tratando de ser resolutiva. Para los que tienen sueño liviano a lo mejor no sea la mejor opción ya que se escucha de los otros departamentos, y también al estar en una calle céntrica un poco del exterior.

Muy lindo departamento! Super funcional y céntrico, cerca de todo lo que uno puede ver a pié.
Nuria estuvo en contacto permanente ante cualquier duda. Super valorable!
La pasé muy bien en Madrid :)

El apartamento de Nuria es hermoso. Convenientemente localizado, estás cerca de todo. Limpio, hermosamente decorado y con todo lo necesario. Tuve un problema con mi equipaje, y tuve ropa gracias a la lavadora que había en el apartamento de Nuria. Lo recomiendo 100% y sin duda volveré. Es importante mencionar que estás en Madrid, en Madrid es imposible encontrar un lugar totalmente silencioso. Aún así, el balcón del apartamento tiene doble cristal y ayuda bastante con el ruido de la calle. Gracias Nuria!

We stayed in Nuria's apartment for one week.  She met us at check in and showed us everything we needed to know.  She was welcoming and easy to talk to.  The apartment looks exactly like the pictures.  It was very clean and we appreciated all the cleaning products she had available so we could keep her place clean.  The bed was very comfortable too.  The apartment is located on a busy street in the heart of the Sol neighborhood.  It makes it the perfect location to explore Madrid.  We loved the location!  There is some street noise in the evenings, but we knew this from previous reviewers and brought ear plugs.  My husband and I worked remotely during our stay and found the internet to be fast and reliable.  We were there during the blackout in Spain that lasted 8 hours.  Nuria came to the apartment to check on us and make sure we were okay.  I think she went above and beyond and we really appreciated her concern.  I highly recommend this apartment for your next stay in Madrid.

Nuria's apartment in Madrid was Amazing! You could not ask for a more central location. The apartment was clean, well-stocked, and a great place to come home to after a long day of exploring the city. Please pay attention to the check-in window. We arrived late, but Nuria was very gracious and kind. Great communication. You'll be lucky to get this apartment when you visit Madrid.

Nuria est une excellente hôte, sympathique, très amicale et attentive.
Son appartement est très central, à proximité immédiate de tous les centres d'intérêt de tous les commerces et restaurants : tout peut se faire à pieds.
L'appartement est joliment aménagé, très propre, avec tout le nécessaire pour y vivre plusieurs jours, très calme, malgré son emplacement central.
Nous le recommandons vivement.

bellissima esperienza, tutto perfetto
avevamo una bimba di 5 mesi e ci ha fatto trovare il lettino pronto.
ci riteniamo super soddisfatti

El apartamento de Nuria es excelente, tiene todo para una estadía como en casa. Nuria se preocupa hasta de los mínimos detalles desde los implementos de baño hasta los productos de cocina que necesitarás. El lugar estaba impecable y es muy acogedor y bien ubicado. Nuria hace la diferencia y se agradece.

Es war super schön! Die Gastgeberin war immer gut zu erreichen. Ich habe meine Wohnung geliebt. Man sollte aber wissen dass sie sich in einer sehr belebten Gegend befindet. Man hört mit geschlossenem Fenster und Türen nicht viel davon aber es ist immer etwas los. Mir gefiel das! Bin daher danke!!! Nur zu empfehlen .🤩🩷
Todo de maravillas!!!!

Thank you for the nice stay!
The apartment was comfortable and a good value overall.
The only inconvenience for us was the noise from the nearby bars, which lasted through the night and affected our sleep, though we understand that’s beyond your control.
Aside from that, everything was great. Thanks again!

My stay at this Nuria's property was perfect! The space was spotless, beautifully decorated, and had everything I needed. Nuria was incredibly welcoming, responsive, and thoughtful, even leaving a few snacks. The location was ideal, close to great restaurants and attractions. I couldn’t have asked for a better experience and will definitely love to return. Highly recommend!
Más que excelente ! Súper recomendado ! Volvería mil veces más ! Nuria es increíble host y el lugar es demasiado céntrico y perfectamente bien equipado!!! Volveré !
Logement impeccable et tres bien situé. L' appartement est fonctionnel. Je recommande.

Elvira es un encanto de señora, los lugares gastronómicos recomendados por ella un acierto total. La ubicación perfecta, a 10' de la estación de Atocha en un barrio con un encanto especial y a pocos metros de lugares emblemáticos de Madrid. 100% recomendable.
¡Volveré!
Highly recommended!
The best Airbnb in Spain!

Elvira was a kind host. She responded fast, and was thoughtful. The place is small but well equipped, it provides most of the things you’ll need. In case you’re staying for a week or more, like I did, there won’t be enough space to put your clothes. However, for short term, she provides a small side bed table with 2 drawers. You also have space to hang your jackets. Furthermore, hot water is limited so make sure you shower in less than 10 minutes. Overall, her place was always very clean and Elvira is a nice person to talk with.

Без сомнения! Если ищите комнату, то благодарите судьбу, что вам выпал этот вариант!
Все в пешей доступности! В квартире чисто. Кровать очень удобная! А Эльвира самая радушная, открытая хозяйка!

Elvira's place is exactly as pictured.  She is very hospitable and communications was quick and easy.  The location is central with 10 minutes walk to Atocha train station and 15 minutes walk to central tourist areas.  I had a great time there and would definitely stay there again.

El departamento está muy bien ubicado, fácil de llegar y cerca de todo. Estaba impecable y muy cómodo tal cual la foto. El trato de Elvira fue excelente, me hizo sentir como en mi casa, una persona muy amable y predispuesta a ayudar siempre. Definitivamente si vuelvo a madrid lo vuelvo a elegir, súper recomendable.

Elvira is a wonderful hostess and her apartment is sunny and  spectacularly located, right behind one of my favorite architectural marvels Caixa Forum, within walking distance to the train station, the Prado Museum, the Reina Sofia Museum, and the Thyssen Bornemisza Museum.  The narrow room is sparsely furnished with tons of fabulous books,  a comfy and cozy bed, and a  table.  I loved the cleanliness.  Elvira kept the apartment on the cool side to conserve energy, so you need to ask to get the temperature to your liking.  Also, plan your shower to avoid being left with no hot water while still shampoo or conditioner in your hair.  Finally, plan for your breakfasts elsewhere  because there is none available at the apartment. Having said that, the location is unbeatable for museum lovers - and it takes days to really get a chance to see the amazing collections - and those who want to take day trips.  Cheers

This is a wonderful place to stay, near some amazing parks, easy walking distance from the main train station and central Madrid.
Elvira is a very helpful host, recommending places to visit and areas of town (Malasaña) with good food to try. The room is in fact slightly bigger than it looks, and is very comfortable. If you are visiting Madrid for a few days it is a perfect base.
Location is fantastic.

Beautiful, clean and well-maintained room with nice decor. Very comfy bed, clean bathroom with nice hot shower. The place also has a lovely terrace lined with pretty plants :)
Loved the location, very close to Parque del Retiro, Museo del Reina Sofia and Royal Botanical gardens and at most 20-25 mins walk to all other major sights, Atoche station is also nearby for those not up for the walk.
Elvira was a wonderful host, very kind, friendly and knowledgable about Madrid. At check-in I received a map and many valuable suggestions to help me make the most of my trip :) Highly recommended!
Muy buena ubicación, además de ser un piso con ascensor, súper luminoso, y cercano a medios de comunicación

Elvira runs a lovely, authentic AirB&B experience where you have the opportunity, should you wish, to connect with her and experience more of the culture and hospitality that Madrid has to offer. Unlike many other AirB&B's that I've stayed in, Elvira's place is her home, however she is respectful of your needs and schedule and enjoys welcoming people into her space.
The apartment is spotless, cosy, close to the park and shopping / eating areas in Salamanca and within an easy walk to the other parts of town that you may want to visit. The garden terrace is super (although I spent too little time enjoying it) and the neighbourhood is full of quirky bars and restaurants that should be able to cater for most tastes.
I enjoyed my stay at Elvira's and if you have an open heart and relaxed attitude, you should do to. Enjoy your trip.
Ubicación ideal, un piso acogedor con una bonita terraza y una anfitriona encantadora.

Elvira's place is great. The location is impossible to beat and the room is clean and beautiful. Elvira was a very helpful host, and gave me suggestions on where to go in the city. I highly recommend for anyone looking to spend some time exploring Madrid, particularly great for museum lovers!

非常開心能入住Elvira的家，這是一個陽光充足裝飾別緻的小家，我最喜歡的是陽台，不僅能夠滿足我這位煙民的需要而且能感受馬德里明媚的太陽。在她家的三天裡，她就像媽媽一樣關心我。而且我很幸運能被邀請參加她家裡的派對，感謝她為我準備的西班牙當地的晚餐，一晚上喝了六種葡萄酒，非常棒的體驗！Elvira一家是退休了的老師，她的先生是一位英語很好的，很博學的且open-minded的人，在她家還認識了她以前的客人。非常棒的一段旅程，如果你是單人旅行且想感受馬德里當地的文化，選擇Elvira的家絕對沒錯！
I loved staying at Elvira’s. It was a great room, super close to Atocha which was nice and very walkable to city center, also lots of great restaurants nearby. She was very helpful and accommodating.

Elvira amable y atenta.
Buena ubicación cerca del metro y fácil de llegar desde el aeropuerto.
Great location and a clean quiet room. Also, Elvira is very helpful and very responsive.

I really enjoy my time in Madrid thanks to Elvira, she was a wonderful host, making me feel  like at home. I think this one has been the best experience I had at an Airbnb. I strongly recommend her as a host, she was always attentive to anything I needed during my trip. The room was beautiful, well equipped, has an extraordinary location, and was always sparkling clean. Me encantó conocer a Elvira, ella es una anfitriona maravillosa, siempre atenta a cualquier cosa que necesité durante el viaje. El Airbnb no puede estar mejor ubicado, cerca de sitios de interés, restaurantes y cafés. La habitación muy limpia, con todo lo necesario.

This place is in a great location, close to Atocha station to go  to the airport with the  expres shuttle. Then very nearby are 3 museums that are a must see. A bit further all the other Madrid attractions. The room/bed is of decent size for a solo traveler and found the place to be clean. A great value for a traveler like me that goes out all day to discover the city.

The apartment is gorgeous, brilliantly located, with lots of space, an awesome view and a really comfortable bed. Although it’s completely central there was no noise at night. Magui and her husband were really helpful with local tips and arrival/departure, even though we had some delays and confusions. We loved it; it’s a really special place to stay in Madrid.

My husband and I couldn't have been happier with Magui's lovely apartment. Beautiful and charming inside (mind your head if you are tall, like my husband!), with amazing views over Plaza Major. The wifi connection was very good. The flat was spotlessly clean inside, crisp linen on the beds and lovely fresh towels in the bathroom. The shower looked quite old but was much more powerful than the one in the hotel we'd stayed in before! Magui warned us that the boiler was quite small so it was possible we could run out of hot water if we took long showers, but we found there was plenty.  There was coffee and a nice selection of teas available in the kitchen. There was also olive oil and some herbs and spices available if you wish to cook. I made pasta one night and donated some dried oregano to the collection.  Nothing was too much trouble for Magui, she was a perfect host.  Many thanks, Magui! We will certainly be back to stay one day.
Magui's place is awesome and has a fantastic location. It offers stunning views of the Plaza Mayor and is very well furnished. I'm definitely coming back!      :)

This is a very unique space in an old building that has been beautifully preserved! We loved the quaint layout and the privacy between sitting area and bedrooms was nice. It had everything we needed and plenty of space for us and our 2 teenagers. It felt like we were staying at a beloved relative’s house with all the homey touches. But the best of all was the view overlooking Plaza Mayor! We sat out on the roof edge with our wine and just enjoyed people watching! And when we closed the window, all sounds were blocked so it was never noisy to sleep. Absolutely recommend it for people who enjoy unique, historical stays. Would love to come back sometime for an extended stay!

This flat is absolutely awesome! Everything is in walking distance, metro is a couple mins walk, and the view overlooking plaza mayor is just amazing! If I’m ever in Madrid again I’ll be staying here.
Great central location close to the transportation. Awesome view of the square. Owner is very responsive to communication and had a wonderful time. Would recommend to anyone.

Nice location, everything is clean and neat. Two comfortable beds although would not recommend for very tall people. Plenty kitchen supplies. Great view of the plaza with a magical sunset. Very nice host and has a very detailed guide of the city.

We had a very lovely stay at Magui’s apartment. The apartment is immaculate, spacious and welcoming.
Magui is a thoughtful host and it shows in lots of little details throughout. The apartment is well supplied with everything you could possibly need for you stay. We wished we could have stayed longer ..
The stairs up to the fifth floor and a few low beams to watch for in the apartment added to the ambience and is well worth it for a stay in this lovely character filled apartment with the best view in town! Highly recommend Magui’s apartment.

This place is in the best location with an amazing view! The host is incredibly helpful and available and is an asset to newcomers to Madrid. The place is beautiful and better than advertised. Cannot recommend highly enough!

We had a great stay at this apartment overlooking Plaza Mayor.  You can’t beat this location for people watching and walking to all the places in central Madrid!  Plenty of space and Magui was very helpful during our check-in.  The guidebook provided for restaurants, cafes, and nightlife was a nice touch and made it easy to find a great place from a local perspective.  Would definitely consider staying again!

Couldn’t ask for a better location for a weekend in Madrid. Myself and a friend had a great time here- would definitely be plenty of room for 4 people also. The balcony allows for a great view of the plaza. The air con in the apartment is much appreciated in the heat!
Beds were really comfy.
Apartment clean and well presented- would definitely recommend this place!

It is easy to see why Magui is a super host. She is awesome and the apartment was even better than described. It is right in the middle of everything. Very easy to get to all places of interest by food. Plaza Mayor was beautiful and while busy at night, we never heard a peep from inside. Magui was very helpful in providing tips on places to eat and things to do. She was quick with communication and genuinely wanted to make our stay as enjoyable as possible. Would highly recommend staying here when in Madrid.

This apartment is not only a roof over your head, or a comfort bubble, is an experience. The best location in town, in the heart of the heart of Madrid, easy to get everywhere from there. The house still has some of its initial 1851 features, which adds to the charm. Very convenient division of sleeping space from the living one, so that everybody can go by their daily routines as they please. Fully equipped, nicely decorated, so pleasant to stay in that we had problems in leaving it. :)
Maguy is a real gem: very kind, prompt, knowledgeable and accommodating.
All in all, a very pleasant experience that I am oh so ready to replicate anytime!

The accommodation was excellent!  Great location overlooking the beautiful Plaza Major and convenient to Madrid's sights.  The unit was well equipped with coffee, teas, sugar, salt. pepper, oil, vinegar, and some herbs and spices.  Clean, very well appointed, the AC and internet was great. Magui met us in person and took time to explain the household set-up and nearby sites for us to visit.  Book there - you will not be disappointed!

This apartment is in a wonderful location and is even better than the pictures. Even though you are centrally located over a busy square, the apartment is peaceful and quiet. Magui was quick to respond to questions. There was an excellent book of suggestions that was very handy.

WOW--this apartment is amazing and is so much more than what you see in the photos and read in the description.  The apartment is in a perfect location, right at Plaza Mayor.  There's a lift but there are a few stairs to go up to get to the apartment.  The photos don't do the apartment justice--the place is very spacious with a large living room space and a cute small hallway leading up to the balcony that literally overlooks Plaza Mayor.  There's a small table, chair, and stool to use when we wanted to hang out on the balcony and people watch. This is an attic apartment so you are at the very top with views of the whole plaza.  The back of the apartment is where the kitchen, 2 bedrooms and bathrooms were located.  Magui provided everything you needed with kitchen utensils, basic cooking needs (olive oil, salt, pepper, tea, coffee) dish soap, detergent, etc.  The bedrooms were a good size and perfect for a short stay and the bathroom was also a nice size for two people.  There were plenty of AC units to keep the bedrooms and essentially the whole apartment cool.  The location is perfect so everything was walking distance or 5min walk to the metro and bus.  Magui was very communicative and was lovely in showing us around the apartment upon our arrival.  She also provided a great binder of information for shopping, dining, places to see, etc.  Overall, it was a wonderful stay and would love to stay here again.

This is a fantastic apartment in a fantastic location.  It's clean and quiet, and everything is beautifully laid out.  Old style Madrid, beams and tiled floors.  I would definitely stay here again.  The location is amazing.  This is in the attic, the lifts leave you 1 floor below but the stairs to the floor above are good with decent lighting.  There's a narrow balcony outside the living room window, and there's a table and 2 chairs so you can sit out with a drink and enjoy the views below.  Magui's communications were great when we got there, and everything we needed is supplied in the apartment.  I'd recommend it to anyone.

We strongly recommend the flat of Magui. First and foremost because it is well-located and contains everything that you need. Very good air condition and a flat very well equipped. Secondly we were well received and had excellent contact with Magui. A perfect place to stay for our holiday. Peter and Claus

El lugar de Magui es, simplemente, espectacular.
Bello por donde se quiera.
Ofrece una de las vistas más hermosas de Madrid.
Great location and view of the Plaza Mayor. Very comfortable and quiet. Book it before someone else does !!

this place is awesome! the host went above and beyond providing us with recommendations. the place is amazingly cute and roomy! the patio is small but so adorable and the view is amazing. location was right next to everything walking distance. we had a great stay and would recommend this apartment to anyone

What a wonderful place to stay when visiting Madrid!  Magui provided so many amenities and gave many suggestions that added to our vacation. She left us a book with favorite restaurants and things to do. In addition, she took the tone to show us how everything worked in the apartment, so we had no worries for the week we were there. The location is truly perfect because you are a 20 minute walk from nearly every important destination in the city. Every morning we grabbed a cup of coffee and a bite to eat at Mercado San Miguel. Every evening we could chose from a wealth of top notch restaurants. And the apartment is so quiet, outs hard to believe it's a short elevator ride down to Plaza Mayor.  We highly recommend this wonderful airbnb!
A great place! A private space! And the host's hard work made our stay easy! We left to go home with a smile and beautiful memories!

Excellent location, clean, and convenient to all transportation.  Just a few minutes walk from the train station.  It was quiet in the apartment once all the windows were closed which was great being in the middle of the square.  I would definitely recommend staying here.

The location of this place was perfect!  Close to anywhere you would like to visit while visiting Madrid.  We were greeted by a friendly face when we arrived.  The apartment made us feel comfortable when we rested and the overall experience was quite pleasing. Thank you so much!

the apartment is ideally located in the old city and has easy access within walking distance to most of the interesting sites that Madrid has to offer. We would certainly try to stay here again should we be fortunate to return to Madrid.
Our hostess was very accommodating, rearranging her schedule to meet ours. She also spent time going over various amenities of the apartment and making suggestions as to sites to see and where to eat.

What an amazing apartment in an amazing city. Plaza Mayor is at the centre of things and the apartment on the top floor provides a great place to based to enjoy everything the city has to offer, or to just sit on the balcony and people watch in the square. The main attractions of Madrid are all within walking distance. Apart from getting to and from the airport we were able to see the city on foot. You'll also find Lime electric scooters scattered all around the city if you want to nip around in a far more fun way.
The flat is well specified with everything you need, including wifi and 2 bottle openers! Both bedrooms have aircon which even in September was essential.
I can't think of a better way to enjoy a wonderful city.
Great place and host!
Magui was warm and welcoming and delightful, and her place was PERFECT. Such a great spot, in easy walking distance of everything you’d ever want to see. Loved it.
Amazing location with a birds-eye view of Plaza Mayor.  Wonderful, communicative host.

Ein sehr nettes Appartment mit perfekter Lage für Stadtbesichtigungen. Der sehr schmale Balkon in der 5. Etage lässt wunderbar den Blick auf den Plaza Mayor frei. Sauberkeit und Kommunikation waren sehr gut. Beide Schlafzimmer gehen zu zwei unterschiedlichen Innenhöfen. Bei einem der beiden kann man das nächtliche Leben anderer Hausbewohner miterfahren.
Alles in allem eine sehr nette Wohnung für nicht zu große Madridbesucher mit perfekter Lage. Wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt und können sie sehr empfehlen.

This was a charming apartment in a great location. Just steps off the Plaza Mayor. The 5th floor was accessed by an elevator to the 4th so only one floor to walk up. There was a bistro table and 2 seats on a small balcony area overlooking the Plaza for incredible views. We thoroughly enjoyed our stay here.

A lovely apartment in a great place with excellent views of all the activity in Plaza Mayor (people watching is fascinating!).  Very well equipped, clean and comfortable.   The bedrooms (situated to the rear of the apartment) were quiet and cool .  Magui lived up to her reputation of being a  super host and provided all the information we needed plus gave us some excellent recommendations about places to visit including her 'top tip' for a Flamenco show which we loved. We hope to return to Madrid in the not too distant future and, as well as recommending this apartment to our friends,  will make this our first choice of place to stay.
