My friends and I had a wonderful stay at Magui’s Plaza Mayore apartment. The apartment itself is so charming and characterful, and it’s really well set up. The beds are very comfortable and the towels smelled beautifully clean (which isn’t always the case!). The balcony is a little slice of heaven; we had breakfast pastries and coffee out there, and basked in the sunshine whilst the plaza below buzzed. It was honestly perfection! And Magui was really responsive and accommodating — I couldn’t have had a better experience. All in all, loved the space, loved the location, and will most certainly try and stay here again when I next return to Madrid!

Adorable apartment overlooking the Plaza Mayor. Place has lots of character and a wonderful view. Perfect location in the heart of Madrid for visiting everything. Magui and Carlos were very accommodating and pleasant to work with...they even let us keep our luggage there all day on check-out day since no one was coming in that day. Elevator was great for bringing luggage up/down...only had to deal with stairs on the last floor. Only downside might be for super tall people as the doorways from room to room are on the low side (not an issue for us, since no one in our group was tall).  Would definitely stay here again.!!
the best

El apartamento está muy bien y muy céntrico para ir a pie a casi todas partes.
Repetiría.
Magui fue muy atenta con nosotros y nos facilitó mucho la estancia.
Really great and central place to be. Everything is accessible by foot, many restaurants and visits around. Perfect place to feel Madrid atmosphere. I will definitely come back.
This is an amazing apartment with an unbeatable location. Magui is a great host who went above and beyond to make sure our stay was perfect!

the stay at maguis place was great!
the apartment is clean, beautiful and settled in a wonderful location

The location was great with a great view of the Plaza Mayor.  Very short walk to Puerta del Sol to catch the Metro.  As other reviewers have said, it's true that even when things may be a bit noisy in the Plaza, the bedrooms are very quiet.  Magui was a great host and very friendly and accommodating.  Gracias Magui!
It was a lovely stay at a great location.  Old world charm with modern day amenities.  We would definitely stay at this residence again when visiting Madrid.
房子超级好看！每个角落都适合装B拍照！设施齐全，地理好！旁边的圣米格尔市场有各种tapas,生蚝，甜品，酒，好吃又好看！

We enjoyed our stay at the charming and historic flat in Plaza Mayor.  The flat had a great view of Plaza Mayor and we enjoyed watching the street performers at the Christmas Market.  Despite the central location, the flat is very quiet.  The flat was well stocked with soap, tea, and coffee.  We would highly recommend to anyone looking to stay in the center of Madrid in a historic location.

This is a great place if you want traditional Spanish living
Excellent location and Magui was great at responding every time I mailed her ,would stay again when in Madrid very comfortable traditional spatious a partment

Prachtige plek, geweldig uitzicht. Echt oud en daarom uniek om hier een paar dagen te kunnen verblijven. Grappige, niet logische maar daardoor heel charmante inrichting. Magui is een top host, erg communicatief en behulpzaam.

This was by far one of the best airBnB experiences I've had. Nothing can beat this location, where sitting on that terrace people watching actually felt warm in the sun even in the middle of January. The apartment itself had everything I needed for a comfortable stay, including a full kitchen and a good sized bathroom. Magui was warm and instantly made me feel at home. She not only has local tips, she made an entire book of tips and is happy to share her personal favorites. Again because of the location, I was within walking distance to everything and anything of interest, including being steps away from Chocolateria San Gines and Mercado de San Miguel. Didn't need the metro once. Though I admit I was tempted to just stay in and sit for hours on that terrace. Already dreaming of the day I can come back.

In addition to its perfect location and awesome view of the plaza, the flat is extremely spacious. Magui was in constant contact before and during our visit. Well appointed kitchen for eating in.  Comfortable bed. Very quiet during the night.
Great location with tons of charm!
Perfecto! Y Magui super simpática!
what a great apartment! spacious and the location cant be beat. Definitely will be back

Une localisation top, une vue sur la Plazza Mayor unique. Un appartement propre et typique.
Une hôtesse disponible et attentionnée

This is the fantastic place.  It is located right above one of the landmarks in Madrid, the Mayor Square.  Everything is within walking distance.  Magui's place is charming and clean.  you got everything you can think of.  We arrived after midnight but still got a very smooth check-in.  Hope we will have a chance to visit back.

地理位置一流
有电梯，但是差一层要自己拎着行李
注意上下电梯时保持安静，要不可能遭到邻居投诉，我们碰见晚上有人敲门，没敢开。不知道什么人。

Excellent location; easy short walk from the train station. Apartment is spacious, and although just off the plaza, was very quiet.  We enjoyed sitting on the terrace and watching people down on the plaza. Our host was very friendly and took time to show us the apartment. She also has a book of her recommended restaurants that came in handy. I would highly recommend staying here!

Magui es encantadora y el apartamento muy acogedor.
Repetiremos seguro!
Beautiful location

We had great days at Maguis in Madrid. First I was worried about the noise since the location is at the main plaza but it was completely relax. Quite at night and beds super conformable. We got everything needed for our stay and Magui replied all my messages very quickly. We would defenetely come back.!

I would highly recommend this apartment. Location is just fabulous, close to every thing in Madrid. This apartment has a character. If you are tired of faceless hotel rooms and  would like to stay in a place that has a feel of an old Madridian apartment right in the center of the city with modern comfort then this is the place for you.  I really liked the living room and its little balcony with the view on the Plaza Mayor. Bedrooms are not large, but with comfortable beds and enough closet space.
thank you very much. you were wonderful number 1

A great welcome, in a great place, in a great city !
Thanks to Magui and her warm welcome.
The flat is perfect in all points.

Incredible location with a an amazing view over the Plaza Mayor and a small table to enjoy a coffee watching the buzz and life of the square! Great restaurants recommendations and warm welcome from Magui that has been quick and helpful in all communications. The rooms are small and if you are tall you better mind the head but a truly authentic experience in the heart of Madrid!! Totally recommended!

Great location! very affordable! very comfortable!
Appreciated supply of kitchen necessities for cooking

Remarkable location.  Comfortable and spacious place with fantastic view of the Plaza Mayor from the balcony.  Bedrooms also surprisingly quiet and secluded.  Host provides great local restaurant recommendations and other help as needed.  Highly recommended.

마드리드를 둘러보기에 가장 최적의 위치가 아닐까 싶다. 다니다가 힘들면 언제든 들러 쉴 수 있었다.
그리고 숙소는 사진 보다 실제로 보는 것이
훨씬 멋지다. 마요르 광장을 내려다 볼 수 있는
공간도 인상적이었다.
(온수탱크를 유념하시고 샤워하세요! 그리고 쓰레기 처리는 정해진 시간에 밖으로 나가면 바로 찾을 수 있으니 걱정 마세요)

Great place in a great location! The 5th floor apartment was perfect for our visit. It's in the middle of the city, so there are a lot of people out and about, but it was quiet when the windows were closed. The little patio looking out onto the square was a great place to sit and eat breakfast, lunch, or dinner. The place is big enough, and has enough pots, pans, and dishes to have friends over for dinner (which we did). Our friends really enjoyed going onto the patio to look down at the square. The apartment is exactly what is described. Magui was there to great us upon arrival and showed us around the apartment and explained her guide to the city. We didn't have any problems, but if we did I'm sure she would have been very responsive. I would definitely stay here again!
Great location and great apartment. Apartment has a cool layout and plenty of space for family or friends to spread out. Minutes from most major attractions and excellent dining options very close by

Magui’s attic space was clean and comfy, the bedrooms were quiet, and the view of the plaza from the little dormer window is lovely. The location couldn’t be better!  Magui is helpful and communicative.  I would point out that heat is spotty.  Each bedroom has a heat/cool unit, though in one bedroom I had to use a plug in radiator, which was fine.  In the kitchen there’s no heat.  The dining room has a heater which partially heats living room.  It was chilly when we were there in April. I’m not sure if you could stay warm in winter.  Given decent weather, it’s a charming and homey place to be.

Best location in Madrid by far. Right at the top level of the Plaza with a lovely authentic feel to the huge apartment.
We felt at home every time we arrived back from a long day of sightseeing.
Eating food or drinking coffee on the balcony overlooking the plaza was a great way to start and end each day.
Do not stay at a hotel or any other place.
Book this one
An amazing location right on the plaza with great views and super convenient. Could not recommend more!
Would highly recommend this to anyone visiting Madrid. This was our best Airbnb experience so far. The apartment and location are great and Magui is a wonderful host.
Excelente ubicación, el apartame yo tiene todo lo que necesitas para sentirte cómodo, como en casa. La vista es hermosa.

Magui, was an extremely attentive and helpful host, with lots of advice.
The accommodation was traditional and just what we wanted in the central location. It was very clean and had all of the amenities that we needed.
There lots to do on foot from the apartment, which is a huge bonus and with Magui’s top tips, you couldn’t have asked for more.
Magui even allowed us to leave our bags in the apartment for a few hours on the day of leaving, which was a huge help, not having to cart them around; thank you Magui.
Best location in Madrid, great host
The appartment is very nice and clean with a nice view on the Mayor square. Everything you need is available!
这真的是我住过最舒服的民宿，房子大 温馨 基本设施这么都有，还给我准备了牛奶和冰水，地理位置也超级好 就在马约尔广场，早上 傍晚坐在阳台拍拍找他比景点都美，周边吃的 买的齐全 ，我们还自己做了两餐饭，厨房用着超爽，真的非常棒.物超所值！

This was an awesome place to stay in Madrid. The location could not have been better, right at Plaza Major, an incredible view of the plaza. The apartment was perfect with everything one could need. Magui is a doll. So sweet and helpful. I can highly recommend staying here.

An amazing, interesting, quirky, well equipped place. It’s in a fantastic central spot, close to a wonderful market & interesting sights. The apartment has the best view ever looking down into the magical Plaza Mayor.

Mejor de lo esperado.
Excelente ubicación.
Muy buena la presentación del alojamiento.
Limpio.
La preocupación de Magui por recibirnos se lo agradecemos.

A fabulous space in an ideal location. Surrounded by restaurants and bars with a view over the square.
Great tips on places to go and flexible check-in.
Highly recommended
Everything according to what was describeb

Absolutely fantastic stay. Magui was great communicating start to finish. Had a small issue with the toilet and Magui turned up immediately and fixed the problem. Really good view and a great location. Very charming apartment with lots of character. The weather was hot 30-35 and despite this, The air conditioning worked fantastic.
Fully recommended.
Excelente lugar céntrico, vistas bellísimas de plaza mayor y con facilidad para accesar a cualquier servicio

This apartment was the best we could have hoped for. The location was amazing just above the square with a lovely balcony. Plenty of room and very clean. WiFi worked perfectly.  2 spacious bedrooms with a kitchen , dining room, living room and balcony overlooking mayor square.  Loved our stay in Madrid.  Communication was excellent. We were able to find the entrance easily and were greeted by Magui immediately.  She gave us perfect instructions and gave great advice for places to go.  Also air conditioning wall units in every room. Everything was updated and very clean.

Amazing location and the view from the roof top is jaw dropping.
We enjoyed this very well maintained 17th century appartment, really cozy and convenient.
Our baby stroller was too big to fit in the elevator and this was a bit of a pain, also de elevator stops in the floor below, so we wouldn't recommend it for babies.. but we will definitely return when our child is a toddler.
The San-Miguel Market is just a minute away, and we enjoyed this a lot, the appartment is noise-isolated well enough for having a calm stay, but make sure to ask if there is remodeling work going on in the floor below, if you want to take a siesta it will be perfect otherwise.

The apartment is definitely right there in Plaza Mayor which is the center of the action.  Even with that,  there was no crowd noise as the apartment is even larger than what the pictures show.  The apartment looks traditional and had a dining room and breakfast room.  It was perfect.

Magui’s place is just perfect! I really appreciate that it is right in Plaza Mayor because it makes it easy to find when you arrive and throughout the day as you are wandering about. It is also incredibly quiet while still being right in the action. The two bedrooms were dark, cool, and fantastic places to sleep. The space is very large and clean. I would highly recommend this space. Magui was really responsive and helpful. Thank you!!!

This apartment is all about location. We were able to walk everywhere and enjoy the entire city. One of our favorite parts of staying here was watching Madrid from our private balcony. Morning, noon, and night. Being on Plaza Mayor was the best. I can’t recommend it enough.
And the bedrooms are near the back so away from the noise of the square (in case you are worried about that).
Finally, even though this apartment is all about location, we also fell in love with the space. It’s a warren of little rooms with special touches. Very comfortable and also well thought out. The first night we were delighted by the fairy lights that are set up by the door to the balcony. Perfect.

The apartment treated us wonderfully! We loved the character throughout the home and spending the time looking over the plaza. We were greeted with a warm welcome and felt right at home! Highly recommend this apartment, you won’t be disappointed!

You couldn’t ask for a better location, overlooking Plaza Mayor.  The apartment is stylish, very traditional with everything you will need to have a comfortable stay.  The apartment is as described on the Airbnb site, Magui responded to all communication very fast.  Magui advised some great places to eat, we had the best time.

Great space on the Plaza Mayor. Easy access to all the great sites in Madrid. Plaza Sol, plaza Isabelle, the Latino quarter, San Miguel’s and Gines Chocolate. Everything is right there. Magui is a very good host and here apartment is homey and very comfortable.

Das Apartment liegt bestens direkt an der Plaza Mayor, die Aussicht auf den Platz vom kleinen Balkon im Dachgeschoss ist fantastisch.  Das Apartment ist recht großund verwinkelt, aber wunderschön in einem sanierten Altbau. Große Menschen aufgepasst: Stoßt Euch nicht den Kopf an der niedrigen Decke. :-)

If a quirky place full of character with one of the best views in Madrid is what you want, then look no further. It was an absolute pleasure to stay here. Magui is a fantastic host who has gone above and beyond the call of duty for us.  Cannot recommend this place highly enough
Excellent Location! fantastic view of the Mayor Plaza Square, Great loft layout with excellent character, a great way to enjoy Spain.

Location location location!  An apartment directly in the Plaza Mayor with a tiny roof deck space great for people watching and a bottle of wine.  We were central to all major sites in Madrid.  Magui was extremely responsive and helpful.  A bit of renovation construction in the apartment downstairs but there were no workmen on the weekend and the noise was not too bad.  It did not interfere with our stay or love of the apartment. Hopefully, they will be finished soon. The apartment itself has a ton of old world charm. The elevator was a nice bonus as were the air conditioners. We highly recommend this apartment for your Madrid stay. We would gladly go back again.

The apartment was the perfect place to enjoy Madrid. Even though it was in the busy plaza, it was surprisingly peaceful and serene.  Bedrooms cute with comfy beds.  So much to do in Madrid but make time to hang out in this space!

Magui’s apartment was very clean and comfortable. The location is ideal, very close to the Metro, major attractions and lots of restaurants and plazas. There is a book in the apartment with great recommendations. Everything was sparkling clean. Our favorite part was a small balcony with a bistro table and a coupe of chairs facing Plaza Major! My husband and I sat there in the mornings with our coffee and in the evenings with a glass of wine, and it was absolutely magical! Magui herself is very sweet and responded to all our questions very quickly and kindly. Great great place and a fabulous host!

Magui is very nice. The house is very large with a wonderful balcony where we can see beautiful views. And the location is very good. It is very convenient to take metro or bus. All in all, we think it a nice experience and thank for the host very much.

The place had a lot of character, it had a beautiful ceiling; in keeping with the age of the building and we loved everything else about it.
However it had all the amenities and it’s location was just incredible; it is right on Plaza Mayor with almost all attractions in walking distance.
If we visited Madrid again we would definitely see if this place were available....and Mercado San Miguel was 5 minutes away...could not ask for anything better...
Excelente hospedaje! Magui fue súper atenta! La ubicación es perfecta!
Lo recomiendo!!
숙소의 청결함과 위치의 편의성, 호스트는 매우 좋았으나 건물이 좀 오래되어 어둡고 답답한 느낌이 있었습니다

You wouldn't expect a place in such a central place be this amazing, but it is! Such an interesting layout, lots of thoughtful touches all around and of course the view facing Plaza Mayor. Magui was super helpful with everything and I felt like a dear guest.

I would highly recommend this location.  It was perfect, but the crowning achievement is Magui!  She is a spectacular host, answering many questions prior to our arrival, providing lots of local tips, and such an easy check-in process.  Outstanding all around!

Magui is a great host she is very knowledgeable, personable and very responsive.  We have thoroughly enjoyed the Apartment.  The patio overlooking the square was my favorite part of the apartment.  Really felt like you are in a house.  Love the rustic labyrinth-like configuration of the Apartment!  Magui’s place is a 15 minute maximum walking distance to most attractions.  You made mine and my son’s first time visit to Spain an unforgettable one which we will share with our friends and love ones.  We shall be back 😀 Much love to you Magui - Luis and Luis

We had a wonderful stay.  For us, the central location in Plaza Mayor was perfect.  The apartment was spacious and just as pictured.  The terrace is very small but it is nice having morning coffee there and watch day turn into night while sitting there.

When you read through reviews, it can be hard to determine the 'fit' for a great visit but don't hesitate!! The location is amazing, it is clean, comfortable and everything you want when you are travelling. Plus the bed was the best we had the whole trip!! As well, Magui is a truly helpful and wonderful host!!

It’s a good size place . The Plaza Major is busy day and night . Oh , don’t fall for that tune that you can’t eat till after 9pm . But , there were tons of restaurants opened early hours . I mean some very good ones.....

This place is so special, and Magui is a wonderful host! She was so kind, patient, and responsive with our messages. We had high expectations of this spot from the listing, and it exceeded even those expectations! The pictures are exactly what you get but being in the space it will become more! If you are thinking about staying here just book it! It is central to everything and there is nothing like sitting out on the balcony watching everything happen down below. We would love to stay again once we come back to Madrid!
Good
The place was perfect! They even let us drop off our bags early so we didn’t have to drag them around town. Magui went above and beyond to take care of us.
Atmospheric apartment with great location.  Makes you feel like a true 'Madrileno' rather than just another tourist.
Magui contacted me a few days before we arrived and responded to all my questions very quickly. My wife and I loved this apt. It is absolute perfect location, clean, everything you’d want

This place is amazing. Being able to be in the heart of the city with everything you need right there was a blessing because I traveled with my elder aunt. She loved overlooking the Plaza Mayor. This place is an absolute gem. Can not wait to return.
Magui was an excellent hostess and waited for us as our plane was delayed too.
This has to be one of the best places we’ve stayed for a city break - great location, everything we needed, well priced and a warm welcome and good tips from Magui. Thank you!

Este apartamento esta probablemente en la mejor ubicación de Madrid , las vistas son increíbles y se puede ir andando a practicante cualquier atracción turística. Las camas son cómodas y por la noche no se escucha ningún ruido por lo que se duerme muy bien  aunque las piezas son pequeñas. Magui fue una gran anfitriona y nos hizo sentir como en casa.

This apartment is in an ideal location!! It is so charming and Magui is so responsive. We enjoyed our time in Madrid even more knowing that we had a great place to go back to after exploring the city.
A beautiful, eclectic rooftop apartment with an amazing terrace balcony overlooking the square below.  Location was central to shops and restaurants in the area and very comfortable.

We really enjoyed our stay at Maguis place.
The location is perfect, all the main highlights are within walking distance.
The apartment itself is very spacious, clean and above all very authentic.
Communication was very quick, Magui is a good host and there's a nice book in the apartment with her personal recommendations on the city.
Just as Madrid itself, we consider this place a big recommendation!
Great location,  property great, lovely host!
Magui was extremely helpful, clear, punctual and kind.  Our stay was magnificent and already planning to return

About the apartment: A wonderful apartment with a charming little balcony that looks directly out onto the square. The apartment is clean, it has everything needed to enjoy your stay in Madrid. Ideal location for walking to all places in the city.
Lovely host, with a smile and a quick response to any message or question.
In summary, if the apartment is available on your dates, don't think twice and just book it before someone else invites it ...

Magui’s place is amazing! It is located in center of Madrid, we can explore so much just by walking, so much restaurants to try, and just 4 minutes walking to Mercanto de Miguel, which we go there every day!!! Magui put together a book with her collections of her favorite restaurants, places to visit, and how to get around. She greeted us at the apartment and went through the place thoroughly, and it is something special because we know she wants us to be comfortable staying at the place. We will come back again to Madrid and stay at Magui’s place for sure!!!!
Right in the heart of it all, yet our place was super quiet at the end of our day!  Magui was so very nice and she made sure all our needs were met. I would highly recommend a stay here!!

Localização excepcional. Hospitalidade, cordialidade. Apartamento silencioso, apesar de ficar em local movimentado.
Estava frio, mas tinhamos bom sistema de aquecimento.
Foi tudo ótimo.

El departamento parece un ático salido de una novela del siglo XIX. Fue muy interesante. Y nos encantó mucho la distribución de las habitaciones similar a un laberinto. También fue muy agradable disfrutar la vista de la Plaza Mayor desde la madrugada hasta la medianoche, sobretodo con el mercado navideño. Además la Sra. Magui es muy simpática y nos explicó todo lo necesario para nuestra estadía. Feliz navidad y hasta pronto.
Magui es una gran afitriona y el apartamento es supabien!

Magui is an exceptional host! Every detail you could imagine is captured in her beautiful space and she is extremely hospitable! Magui made our stay extra special by providing excellent recommendations and making us feel right at home during our first visit to Madrid! Very highly recommended! Thank you again for an amazing experience!!!!

Amazing location in the midst of the hustle and bustle of plazas del Sol and Mayor. The most amazing aspect was the ability to return to our quiet “nest” after busy days. The rooms were so quiet and quaint. Living in such an historic area for a few days was like traveling back in time.
Great place in fantastic location. Host is delightful

Magui’s flat was the perfect location in the center of everything!! The views from terrace were a perfect spot overlooking the plaza in the morning with cafe’ or in the evening with Vino!! We could easily walk to fantastic dining, shopping and festivities!!

Great apartment in Plaza Mayor! The apartment is cozy and very spacious given its location. The terrace offers an amazing view of the plaza and the location is close to many interesting (and delicious) places. We really loved our stay here!
Amazing apartment really well equipped, great location and amazing views over Plaza

Magui's place is absolutely perfect!  We loved sitting on the balcony and watching the hustle and bustle of the plaza. It's a wonderful and convenient location near many sights, restaurants, and bars.  We would 100% book this room again - we hope to come back to Madrid and stay here again!  Thank you for helping us have a wonderful experience!

The flat is amazing!! It is so cute, clean, and in such a great location! There is a booklet with helpful tips on where to eat, etc, it was a tremendous help! Very close to Atocha train station, fantastic museums like El Prado, and some great mercados.  Magui is a great host and quick to respond to questions, etc.  I hope to visit Madrid again in the future and stay here, I would highly recommend this flat to friends planning a visit!

An awesome human being
Kind aware considerate

Elvira es muy atenta, muy agradable y divertida.
Nos lo pasamos genial intercambiando idiomas.
Su piso siempre estaba perfectamente limpio.
The place is very well located.

Elvira's airBNB is practically a hop and skip away from major museums in Madrid, Madrid Atocha train station, Park Retiro (Madrid's #1 attraction) AND the airport bus terminal. What more could you ask for?! This airBNB's prime location allowed me to pop in throughout the day for outfit changes, a quick siesta or use of the wifi. Elvira greeted me when I arrived and reviewed a map with me to show me highlights of the city, inclusive of walkways, restaurants and neighborhoods - I would keep that map on me at all times to make the best of my Madrid travel. I also appreciated all of the books in my room adding some character and charm to the space versus other rooms that can be quite sterile.
Terrific location, especially for the major museums, and easy to reach from the airport. Very clean and quiet and Elvira is a knowledgeable and responsive hostess.
In the very center of Madrid, the most charming host in a very cosy apartment. Nice tips and clever conversations. Thank you very much Elvira. I’m sure I’ll come back.

Do not stay here!! After reading positive reviews, I booked Elvira’s apartment. However, after my first next, she canceled the reservation for my second night without informing me and did not respond to any of my messages. A complete disaster and hassle to find a place to stay at 930pm for that same night

Elvira es una persona encantadora.
Excelente anfitriona, esta en todos los detalles para que tu estancia sea increíble. Ubicación excelente.
Limpieza y detalles maravillosos
Volveria siempre.
Excelente anfitriona
A nice place with the best location possible and a host with an outstanding hospitality. I definitely recommend. :)
Excelente anfitrión, amabilidad increíble.  Una estancia por demás agradable

It was fantastic to live here !
Love it ! Friendly ! Elvira ia a Super Host !!! ❤️

I want to first note that this listing is not truly a private room. There is no lock and key, and the host will enter your room while you are out. We had a bad start when I initially arrived to check in. I thought that I had left some of my belongings behind at my last airbnb only to find that she had moved my belongings in the restroom without my knowledge. Additionally, on the same day I had discovered that she is very particular about cleanliness. I had learned quickly that she was not able to address her concerns in a calm and civil manner about a matter which was as simple as having water on the floor in the bathroom (which I had quickly cleaned with my own towel). I have never had a host lose her cool and raise her voice at me for a matter that needed a quick fix. Aside from the personality conflicts, I generally had a good stay at this location. She was very attentive and would (with the exception of not knocking on at least one occasion before entering my room) respect my privacy while I was staying in this listing. The apartment is very secure and the area has many cafes and galleries that are walking distance.
Great location and Elvira is a wonderful host.

Elvira is an amazing host, warm and lovely woman.
I had the best time of my life in her Airbnb.
Highly recommended.
Pour une personne seule, c’est le lieu rêvé. Elvira est une charmante hôtesse. Si je retourne seule à Madrid, c’est chez elle que j’irai.
Our experience at Elvira’s was great overall. The apartment was clean and nice, the location was AMAZING, and Elvira made the check in and out process so easy.
Very recommended, beautiful hostess, clean environment, convenient quality of life,
Excelente hospedaje, Elvira un ser humano maravilloso, muy agradecida por todo el apoyo

Elvira's place looks exactly as on the pictures. The room is relatively small but the bed is big enough and very comfortable. Everything was very clean. Elvira was very helpful, responsive, and very kind. The location is great, all important sightseeing spots are on a walking distance.

Pretty nice location for visiting Madrid, I reach everything I wanted by foot (it was a weekend trip to see the major spots). The area has some nice restaurants and bars, the big park close to the apartment is amazing.
Elvira was a decent host, everything worked fine. The room was like the pictures suggest.

Elvira’s place is really fantastic I like it. The room is clean in it’s in a great location close to every thing. Elvira is a nice women likes to help me in anything I wanted. And I love talking to her and know new thing about their culture

Elvira was a warm and welcoming host who made my time in Madrid very nice. I loved the suggestions she made for where to eat and will be staying in touch with her every time I come back to Madrid. Thanks Elvira!

Magui was extremely helpful from the moment we started communications with her months before our stay.
Magui met us at the apartment and gave us a thorough review of the apartment; she also left some very helpful tips for our days in Madrid.
The apartment is as advertised and is in an amazing location. Well worth it.
Thanks Magui!

Magui’s place  is in a great location on the Plaza Major for exploring the city. The apartment is as described and amazingly quiet given the location. The only negative was the toilet which appears to block up easily. We enjoyed our stay.

Magui´s place was great, we had an outstanding time there. A key factor for us was the location directly at Plaza Mayor since it´s a very iconic site and close to one of our favourite foodie spots, the Mercado San Miguel. Magui´s apartment definitely did not disappoint, not only was it clean and had all things necessary, but the ability to basically open up the tiny door and  sit at the terrace above Plaza Mayor is just awesome. Magui has been a great communicator as well, so we highly recommend her and her place. Enjoy!

The apartment is located in the heart of Madrid, amazing view and super convenient to go anywhere by feet. Magui greet us in the apartment and it is extremely warm. If we come to Madrid again, we will stay Magui's apartment for sure.
马桂的公寓位置极佳，出露台就正对着马约尔广场，可以看广场日落，离两个地铁站也分别就300米，游人很多，各经典都步行很近，马约尔广场、马德里皇宫、太阳门广场、英格里斯百货、还有一个美食中心(我忘记名字了)，大大小小商店食肆不计其数，英格里斯负一层就有大型超市，可以买菜做饭。公寓在顶楼，面积也有80平方米，两个房间，景观很好。马桂亲自在公寓等我，介绍一切，很热情，超赞
Very well located, cant dream better. The view on the plaza mayor is priceless :)
We have just returned from a brilliant weekend stay. The apartment is lovely and the location is great. The view from the roof was spectacular! Magui was a brilliant host! We will return!

Incredible stay in the cutest apartment overlooking Plaza Mayor! I had a very nice stay. I would 10/10 recommend this place. Magui was very hospitable and flexible with my arrival and departure times. Thank you again so much!!
Wonderful view from the window
Agradable y cómodo lo recomiendo 😀😀😀
마요르 광장이 한눈에 들어오면서 매우 아름다운 집입니다. 강력 추천합니다
Very good A+++++
Stunning location with lots of character + very comfortable. Everything you could want within 200m.
Appartement vraiment en plein cœur de Madrid, la communication avec Magui était très simple, un endroit parfait pour servir de bas pour la découverte de Madrid!

A secret quirky treasure in an unbeatable location ..
Great hostess who goes above and beyond ...
Las fotos del ático son fiel reflejo de lo que te vas a encontrar. Y lo que no ves en ellas, lo tienes en la multitud de armarios de que dispone la vivienda. No le falta detalle.
El piso es precioso, amplio, limpio, con todo lo necesario. Un lugar con encanto y mucha facilidad para comunicarse con la anfitriona. Repetiría
Una casa preciosa y muy acogedora. La sensación es la de estar en una casa rural en pleno corazón de Madrid. Y Magui cuidó varios detalles para hacernos sentir aún más como en casa

Everything was just perfect! Magui is super kind and always willing to help. The apartment is beautiful, connectivity is awesome (in case you also need to work), location cannot be better and the view is amazing. 10 out of 10!
Great
Super emplacement avec vue sur la Plaza  Mayor. Appartement propre et Magui une super hôte.

Cannot recommend this place highly enough!! Absolute PERFECT location (those photos do not exaggerate—the views of the square below are incredible!) We didn’t use the metro, but it would have been super convenient. This apartment had everything you could possible need (including a THICK book of personalized recommendations!). Super clean (so important during COVID!), and Magui couldn’t have been more flexible and easy to communicate with! Do check out this charming jewel if you get the chance - you won’t be sorry! :)
Un diez. Soy de Madrid pero vivo en Buenos Aires. Decidimos quedarnos unos días en el alojamiento de Magui, y realmente nos encantó. Se lo recomiendo a todo el mundo
A perfect place for a cozy stay in Madrid. The apartment truly has character and is equipped with everything you need. A lot of space and nice bedrooms. The view over plaza mayor is unbeatable!
Ha sido una estancia corta pero muy agradable. La casa tiene un encanto especial, la ubicación perfecta y Magui estuvo muy atenta en todo momento. Volveremos!

Appartement charmant et très bien placé, avec une petite terrasse agréable.
Le séjour a été parfait.

Nous avions réservé chez Magui, mais malheureusement un dégât des eaux a quelque peu modifié notre séjour. Ni une ni deux, Magui a trouvé une solution et nous a proposé un AirBnB de remplacement qui avait tous les critères de l’initial + une chambre. Je venais à Madrid pour une hospitalisation, il me fallait donc absolument 2 chambres et un ascenseur, Magui a trouvé la perle rare à deux pas du premier appartement, nous n’étions donc pas déboussolés.
Merci pour vos services rendus, votre accueil, votre amabilité et surtout votre réactivité Magui !
À bientôt je l’espère,
Ophélie

Una joya en el corazón de Madrid, un punto de partida para cualquier plan y un refugio al que regresar para coger aliento y volver a sumergirte en el bullicio.
Merece la pena.
Las vistas sobre la plaza mayor increibles.

Sitting out on the small roof deck and watching the crowds and activity in the plaza was amazing.  The apartment is surprisingly comfortable with the sleeping and kitchen separated by the living area with a hallway.  Close to everything and highly recommended.

This is a really nice, well kept, unique apartment which is comfortable and gas everything you need. You're right in the center of town and have an amazing view of the Plaza Mayor. I would definitely stay here again!
Sadly had to cancel trip but communication was easy. Am hoping to reschedule for next year.

Great apartment on Plaza Mayor. Comfy beds and strong air conditioning in the bedrooms which is necessary for a hot Madrid summer. Loved the chairs and table overlooking the plaza. Fun people watching almost any time of day or night.

Die Wohnung ist genau wie auf den Bildern abgebildet. Viele schöne verspielte Details, super Lage, der Blick auf den Plaza Mayor ist traumhaft. Magui ist super freundlich und Hilfsbereit. Wir waren zu dritt unterwegs;)

I was surprised at how much I liked this apartment and wish I could have stayed longer. Its a charming balance of rustic and old and renovated modernity where it counts. The windows, kitchen, bathroom, and air-conditioning are all modern. The apartment is bigger than I expected, although the bedrooms are on the small side (but adequate). Of course, the location couldn't be better and the sitting on the small terrace above Plaza Mayor can't be beat. This apartment is definitely a gem. Magui was very responsive and waited for me when I was late for check-in. Overall, a great experience.
The apartment on Plaza Mayor was the best ever! Such a charming space with enough room for a family, kitchen, living area, view of Plaza Mayor and even a reading nook fit for a Hobbit!
The view from the balcony was amazing. The apartment was exactly as described, would definitely stay again!
Quién no ha soñado con dormir en un ático de la plaza mayor? Sueño cumplido, la casa es preciosa, cerca de todo, vistas espectaculares y limpia. Todo han sido facilidades, recomendable totalmente.

We had a wonderful experience in Magui’s Plaza Mayor apartment.  The location could not be better and we loved the ability to sit on the balcony overlooking the plaza each night. Even in the extreme Madrid heat (over 40C) the air conditioning kept the apartment cool and comfortable.   I highly recommend this as a place to stay and Magui as a wonderful host.

Very beautiful, charming and unique apartment. It had everything we needed. Beds are comfortable. The location was the best, lots at nice restaurants around, the Royal palace was in walking distance , the famous San Gins chololateria was in walking distance. I would definitely come back and stay there again. Loved the place.
Amazing stay at Magui’s appartement ! She was really nice and responding during all the stay. The location of her appartement is simply the best of Madrid : I highly recommend it 👍🏻
Sejour parfait dans ce magnifique appartement à la vue inégalable et extrêmement bien placé !! Spacieux, propre et très bien équipé. Magui est adorable. Allez y sans hésiter !!
Great location and the flat was exactly as expected. View was awesome.
Incredible and adorable apartment over plaza mayor! Magui was AMAZING from allowing early check in to helping us with airport transportation.

A wonderful place to spend a week! Easy walking to a lot of sights, and close to Sol Metro for access to day trips. We are in shape and had no problems walking to the Prado or other museums. Nice and quiet at night with good a/c. We enjoyed sitting on the little balcony right on the square.
Beautiful appartment in a heart of Madrid. Highly recommend
Great location, clean, had everything we needed. Magui was a wonderful host!
The place is full of character and in a the heart of the city. Would highly recommend!

A beautiful cozy apartment in an unbeatable location, the views of Plaza Mayor from the roof top balcony are unbeatable. The location is perfect for walking to all must see sites in the center of Madrid and close to a metro station, so you can get to wherever you need to go.
This is the perfect apartment to explore Madrid. It is beautiful and has a great little balcony over looking the square. Magui was a great host and very responsive. We will definitely stay again
Amazing location and clean flat! Would recommend to couples and group of friends!
If you’re over 6ft tall “watch your head!” Enjoy a night in with a cool glass of cava or step out onto the main square then see where your feet take you. It will be unforgettable.

We absolutely loved staying in this charming & historic apartment on Plaza Mayor. So much character and history but it’s been updated very nicely and everything works great. Having 2 bedrooms is a luxury and we really appreciated the blackout curtains and how quiet it is when the windows are closed. The little deck is no awesome for having a glass of cava while checking out the lively scene in the Plaza. Location can’t be beat with tons or restaurants and sights within walking distance or the metro is a great option too. Having the elevator is very nice too.
Highly recommend and hope to return!

The apartment is in the attic, but extremely cute and comfortable. The view of the Plaza on the balcony was amazing! The apartment is literally within walking distance to shops, restaurants, shows and the famous chocolate with churros place. Magui was very quick to respond and accommodating when our check-in time had to be changed and she checked in with us to make sure we had everything we needed. Would stay here again.

Nuestra estancia fue perfecta. El piso es increíble y con la mejor ubicación! Nos encantó la comodidad y el estilo del piso. La perfecta forma de vivir una expriencia Madrileña! Además, la recepción y atención fueron excelentes! Seguramente volveríamos a quedarnos la próxima vez que estemos en Madrid.

El lugar es excelente, tal como está descrito. Muy bien ubicado, cerca del metro, con una vista espectacular de la Plaza Mayor. Es un espacio muy grande y bastante cómodo, no van a estar apretados. Estaba limpio, ordenado y bien equipado.
Magui fue muy amable y hubo muy buena comunicación. 100% recomendado.

Maguis apartment is superb. Location couldn’t be better for everything. Plaza Mayor square is wonderful and the view from the balcony is great for people watching! Magui is very quick to answer questions you may have and is a very good host
Amazing very clean so helpful fast at replying to everything. Even had espresso pods for the morning! So many amazing food places around the apartment!
This was a wonderful apartment and Magui was extremely helpful and easy to reach throughout the entire process.
Excelente!
Genial!
Wonderful apartment, wonderful location and wonderful arrangements!
Great host! Thank you,Elvira for hosting my colleague!😊

Beautiful place and amazing host! I can definitely recommend to stay here in this ‘good-vibe’ apartment of Elvira. It is super central and so stylish, clean and comfortable. Loved it and will gladly come back.
Lugar muy recomendable. La anfitriona cercana y amable. Ubicación inmejorable.

Elvira is a lovely host - she invited me in late in the evening as my flight landed at Madrid airport after check-in hours- and her home is very well located. Whether you are in for a city center stroll or a walk through the park, it is right next door.
I rented the one person room which was quiet at night and has a comfortable bed. There is a small but cosy workplace which I used all three nights, next to a bookcase that I love. I felt welcomed and enjoyed it. Thank you Elvira!

Elvira is an incredible person and an incredible host. This place quickly became my second home and I can't wait to come back.
The apartment is spotless, the location is perfect, and the hospitality is unmatched. It was all- round an amazing place to stay.

Excellent value for an AirBnB. Elvira made me feel right at home as I was moving from the US to Madrid for a science job. Helped me get around the city, helped me learn some Spanish, provided some great coffee. Generally spoiled me and made me feel like a part of her family while I stayed.
Beautiful, clean apartment in a great part of the city for living or visiting. 10/10 would recommend.

Estancia de 1 semana inolvidable- ***Gracias Elvira***
Elvira es una anfitriona excepcional, una mujer culta y abierta que sabe hacerte sentir como si estuvieras en casa. Estoy encantada de haber compartido muchos buenos momentos con Elvira.
Supo facilitarme la llegada indicándome todo lo que tenía que saber. Su casa está muy bien ubicada , en el autentico barrio de las
Letras y a 5 minutos Del Prado y del Reina Sofía.
La habitación es tal como sale en las fotos y se duerme muy en la cama.
Para una estancia madrileña de calidad, recomiendo a 100% alojarse en casa de Elvira.
¡Hasta pronto!

Elvira es la anfitriona perfecta! Y su piso es maravilloso. Toda la estancia ha sido muy agradable y realmente me he sentido como en casa. La limpieza y ubicación del piso son inmejorables. Repetiré pronto!!
Fantastic place! Very homey, location is awesome and very well connected. We plan to go back and stay here when we go back to Madrid.

I can't recommend this place enough! Magui has thought of every detail to make our stay as comfortable as possible. The apartment seems like it came out of a fairytale book. We loved the location, easy to walk everywhere and get to the metro. Plus, it is always easy to find in case you get lost since so many streets lead to Plaza Mayor. The beds were a great size and so comfortable, adequate amount of bedding to stay warm. It is a very unique stay that anyone should experience if visiting Madrid!
Apartamento precioso, ubicación inmejorable, vistas increibles y Magui encantadora y haciendonos todo muy fácil. Para repetir sin ninguna duda..

FANTASTIC PLACE! We stayed at this gem for five days, and we absolutely loved the place. Sparkling clean. The location was perfect. Easy route to almost everywhere. And almost impossible to get lost if you can find a way to Sol Plaza. Tons of restaurant options nearby, and groceries within a short walk.
The flat itself is beautiful and spacious with lots of working/reading spaces. I had to work while staying here- and absolutely loved the living room space. Still enjoy the scenery of Sol Plaza, at the same time, can be away from the crowd. We had taken out coffee/churros/foods in busy hours and enjoyed them in the living room as we are in the cafe. I think this is an extra plus while traveling in the pandemic. You can avoid a bigger crowd when you want and still enjoy the vibes; then you can easily go out at night when it gets less busy.
Perfect location with all of the amenities. This combined with expert guide advice makes any trip to Madrid a breeze.

muy bonito apartamento, ubicación inmejorable.
todo tal cual lo prometió.

Wonderful cozy apartment right in the center of Madrid. Great view of Plaza Mayor. Loved all the thoughtful touches on making our time there easier with condiments, coffee, tea and more. Even a Christmas tree as we were there the week of Christmas. Thank you!
Ideal Madrid location and a host that made us feel warmly welcomed, especially over the holidays.

Magui's flat at Plaza Mayor is just the perfect choice for those who want to stay in the middle ok Center Madrid, just inside one of the most famous and important location ok this city. We definitely recommend it. Drinking a coffee in the little table Magui keeps on the flat's terraza was one of the best experience we got in Madrid.
Rien à reprocher à cet appartement. Une localisation parfaite pour découvrir Madrid et un appartement ou l'on se sent comme a la maison.
Beautiful apartment! Perfect location.

Amazing view of the Plaza!
It's a 5th floor walk up. The elevator goes to the 4th floor but it's tiny and only goes up. A little inconvenient to run and drop stuff off and go back to exploring, and the street was hard to find. Those are the only negatives.
Everything else was amazing! Clean, perfect location, lovely little balcony perfect for 2. Host accommodated early check in and even though we got very lost and we were late, was very kind to us. Copies of passports were needed during the stay (not an issue) but I wasn't on my phone while there so that became a small issue but overall AMAZING. I would stay here again and again!!
Been to Madrid a few times and this is the best spot I've ever stayed.

Un apartamento con unas vistas privilegiadas y la ubicación es perfecta.
Cama comodísima, nada de ruido... Un 10!
Excellent location and apartment.  Very cozy and extremely clean.
Lugar estupendo y limpio , inmejorable ubicación y la atención de Magui sobresaliente.
Unique stay in Madrid! Everything was great, thank you
Amazing place. Literally overlooks plaza mayor. Would recommend to anyone staying in central Madrid to try. Awesome host, awesome experience, unbeatable views.

El apartamento es tal cuál el anuncio, es muy acogedor y está preparado tanto para invierno como para verano.
Estaba muy limpio y la ubicación es inmejorable. Hemos estado con nuestra hija de 2 años y hemos estado genial. Perfecto para pasear por el centro y disfrutar de Madrid
La comunicación con Magui ha sido muy buena, y nos ha dado todas las facilidades tanto en la entrada como en la salida.
Un sitio idea para visitar Madrid. Además Magui tiene todo perfectamente organizado.  Volveremos !
excelente ubicacion en plaza mayor, Location ! , cerca de todo para visitar madrid, depto amplio con 2 dormitorios y cocina completa , living y espacio  para sentarse en el techo mirando la plaza !
The apartment is fantastic! Awesome location, great views from the terrace and contains everything you need. Magui is kind, friendly and flexible.
Todo fantástico. Muy recomendable.
Close to everything. Host was very responsive. Will recommend.

This hidden gem has the perfect location to explore all of Madrid. Close to points of interest. The host Magui was wonderful to work with regarding our stay. Clean building and room. A+++. Would definitely stay again.

Amazing stay in this beautiful apartment. Central location in the beautiful setting of Plaza Mayor with stunning views from the small balcony.
Would definitely recommend and stay here again.
Easy check in and great communication.
Super charming and fantastic location!
Everything was perfect!

Great location for seeing Madrid. Very warm and welcoming apartment with Spanish flair. Magui was outstanding as she communicated with us and got us settled in to the apartment. She made getting a taxi to the airport a non-issue. We will stay again.

Amazing space in an amazing historic building! You’re in a wonderful character filled, attic level, two bedroom apartment a with of view over the plaza Mayor - fantastic! Fully equipped kitchen, modern bathroom, wonderfully comfortable bed and seating areas and a large dining room table. There are several food/grocery stores within a five minute walk and a ton of cool bars and restaurants. We loved it, will be back and will recommend to all of our friends!

Wow - the views from the balcony … the bohemian flair… the historic wonderfulness of the apartment with an updated bathroom - so much to love here. The apartment is just as described and much more spacious than we anticipated. We loved the balcony for morning coffee and a late afternoon break.  The kitchen is incredibly stocked with everything you may need including oils and spices, along with a few goodies the host left us and some extra bottles of water. The host is great at communicating and responding along with being helpful. Would definitely stay here again.

Nous avons passé un excellent séjour. Le logement très calme et sa situation sur la place est un pur régal. On peut rester des heures à observer ce qui s'y passe. En plus, il est spacieux et très propre. La communication avec Magui était parfaite. Bref, nous mettrions encore plus d'étoiles si c 'était possible....

Appartement très bien placé et suffisamment grand pour 2 adultes et 2 enfants. Vous profiterez de l'animation de la ville depuis la petite terrasse sur le toit et le calme dans les chambres pour dormir. Magui a été très disponible pour nous renseigner et nous aider.

Lo primero, destacar la atención de Magui, una anfitriona atenta y familiar como pocas.
El apartamento tiene una ubicación fantástica en pleno centro de Madrid, ideal para disfrutar sin depender de coche particular. Aunque el salón (muy amplio, por cierto) da a la Plaza Mayor no se escuchaba ruido, y las habitaciones dan a interior para más tranquilidad.
Muy bien cuidado y renovado, con un estilo de casa rural muy acogedor.
Sin duda lo volveremos a tener en cuenta en próximas visitas a Madrid.

The perfect place, I know it is mention in other reviews, but Magui’s place is in the heart of Madrid!
Remember that “Madrid vive de noche” (Madrid lives at night) but the peacefulness that it offers is fantastic once inside. The view is fantastic and everything is 5 mins away, literally.
Magui was prompt and informative. She really is the best.
Best ever.
Magui is a lovely, communicative host, who took very good care of us. The apartment is beautifully charming, well maintained, and perfectly located. We would love to stay here again.
Would absolutely stay again! Can’t beat the location, feels like a home. An easy walk to a lot of activities in Madrid and the apartment is welcoming, comfortable and clean.

What an awesome apartment! It was the perfect location for exploring Madrid. The balcony was just a lovely spot to enjoy the atmosphere of Madrid. The apartment had everything we needed for our stay. Magui was a great hostess! We highly recommend this apartment.

Beautiful character apartment with amazing views over Plaza Mayor. We sat out on the balcony every night enjoying the atmosphere. The apartment itself was much larger than we expected which was a nice surprise and it was equipped with all necessary amenities.
There was tea, coffee etc available in the apartment and there were some items in the fridge which was a nice touch. There were maps and guide books also available which was brilliant.
Magui the host was really good with her communication and very helpful. Overall we loved Madrid and the apartment made our trip all the more magical. Superb.

WOW. There is no better location. The place is charming and spotlessly clean. a modern bathroom is appreciated mixed with the charm of the old old building is amazing. Comfortable beds and very spacious. We walked to everything and enjoyed our little roof top table over the plaza for concerts as we were there during a festival. Be prepared to duck your head in some doorways if you are tall. I will be back. Madrid is a very enjoyable safe fun city and this is the place to stay!
Fabulous place to stay. Excellent location and a brilliant helpful host. I would definitely recommend it.

If you will be in Madrid and need a place to stay, YOU MUST BOOK MAGUI'S PLACE!!!! Do not even look at other options, seriously!!! My daughter and I just concluded our stay there and we couldn't have been happier (or luckier) to stay there! I don't even know there to start, but suppose it's location, location, location! Her place was so central to everything we wanted to see and do (easy walk to most or quick taxi if needed). The placement on the 5th floor provides the BEST views overlooking Plaza Mayor, so much fun to people watch and take it all in.
The place itself is delightfully decorated and most impressively it's a great size! There's the terrace for dining or viewing the activities in the plaza, a cute little living room, dining room, then a good size hallway takes you to the back of apartment for the kitchen, two bedrooms and bathroom.
The unit was so quiet even being on the plaza (thanks to double paned windows) and the beds were super comfortable. Those two points were key for me since I'm such a light sleeper and have back/hip issues if I sleep on a firm bed.
Her place has every amenity, A/C, washer (and a drying line) all toiletries, cooking items, wi-fi, tv, etc.
Elevator gets you up the first 4 flights, and then you walk up the last flight. She has a book with great recommendations, maps, other books, too. We took her suggestion and dined at Cafe Central and they had the most amazing band playing that night (Red House Revival), you have to check them out!!
All in all, our stay her was PERFECT and I cannot recommend it highly enough, ONE OF THE BEST AIRBNB's I'VE EVER STAYED AT!! Super happy customer :-D

Väldigt mysig och charmig lägenhet med optimalt läge för en weekend i Madrid! Sovrummen var tysta och svala, och den lilla balkongen med utsikt över Plaza Mayor gav lägenheten lite extra guldkant. Tack Magui och Milena!
Extraordinary location right in Plaza Mayor! Well loved home with everything we needed. Loved this home!!
The absolute best! Magui is amazing in every way - beyond helpful and kind. The apartment is incredible - once in a lifetime views. Unforgettable experience!

Great apartment in great location. Although on a main plaza, noise not an issue.  Extras like coffee, chilled water and kitchen items were appreciated.  Comfortable beds. Great shower.  Loved our stay in Madrid!
We had a great stay at this lovely apartment, and the location is perfect!

Even though we visited Madrid during a heatwave with temperatures near 40 degrees Celsius, the apartment was cool with effective air conditioning. The kitchenette was cute and well stocked. The bed was a bit firm for my taste, but fine.
It was so much fun to sit on the rooftop balcony and watch the activity of the square! There was a breeze up there so it was quite tolerable. We liked being at the center of the city so we didn’t need to take any public transportation to get where we wanted to go. Magui was very helpful and accommodating with her guidebook. I’d love to return!
Great!

The apartment was fantastic. The view, of course, and being able to sit far above the Plaza and watch the goings-on, were terrific. In addition, the apartment was great - very comfortable, quiet, charming. Communication with Magui was easy and great. She went out of her way to accommodate our schedule. And she left a notebook about Madrid (with recommendations) that was really helpful. My husband and I would stay again in this apartment in a heartbeat.
Excelente anfitriona muy atenta que te hace sentir en casa y te ayuda a disfrutar la estancia.

Altamente recomendado! El piso de Elvira es acogedor y organizado y ella hace todo lo posible para que nos sintamos como en casa. La habitación es como el anuncio y la cama es muy cómoda. La limpieza de todo el lugar es muy buena, incluido el baño. Además, Elvira es una anfitriona encantadora, interesante y muy agradable para hablar.

Sehr tolle zentrale Bleibe und eine äußerst freundliche Gastgeberin die Keine Wünsche offenlässt. Hat mir sehr geholfen bei allen Informationen die man für einen gelungenen Trip nach Madrid braucht. :)

If you are coming to visit Madrid I highly recommend booking with Elvira. As soon as I booked she was extremely helpful in giving directions to her home, the best way to communicate, and organizing a check in time. Her home is exactly as described and pictured. If visiting in the winter time she is sure to keep it warm enough for comfort. Elvira went out of her way to pick up a city map and show me the easiest/quickest/safest ways to maneuver around the city by foot. She highlighted the attractions she suggests the most and explained each of the different areas of Madrid (nightlife, best food, shopping, etc.) Staying in her BnB felt more like staying with a friend rather than a stranger. 10/10 from me!

Excelente ubicación.
Comodidad y limpieza son un 10.

Elvira est une hôte exceptionnelle. Son accueil est particulièrement soigné, l’appartement très agréable, la chambre très confortable. La localisation est de plus exceptionnelle pour profiter des nombreux charmes de Madrid tout en résidant dans un quartier très calme. Je recommande les yeux fermés !

Elvira's flat is a safe heaven in the middle of bustling Madrid. Perfect location for travellers, comfy bed, quiet and above all the very welcoming Elvira. She made the trip outstanding. Her place is a good reminder of the original spirit of airbnb. Highly recommended!
Todo perfecto y muy recomendable! Pase una semana muy agradable con Elvira.

Thanks Elvira! Your apartment is perfectly located on a quiet street for those who want to be within a few minutes walk of the Reina Sophia Museum (Picasso's Guernica), the Prado, Parque del Retiro and Museo Thyssen. And Plaza Mayor is approx. a 20 min walk (uphill!).
Es un departamento limpio, bien ubicado, la señora Elvira estuvo muy atenta!

My (almost) two weeks at Elvira’s place were absolutely great: first reason was Elvira’s charming beautiful personality, and the second reason was just being ultimately in the heart of Madrid all the time. I could recommend Elvira’s place even to best friend. Everything was perfect, I could ask about anything and get detailed information, what is so extremely important in the new city.
The view from my room on the Madrid rooftops was a cherry on the top.
Thank you, dear Elvira, you are a wonderful host.
Todo bien :)
Ubicación perfecta para llegar a todos los lados. Habitación confortable, y la atención cercana. Los anfitriones encantadores. Para repetir.

Elvira und Ihr Lebensgefährte sind sehr nette Gastgeber. Die Wohnung war sehr sauber und Elvira war sehr fürsorglich. Das Bett war super bequem und das Zimmer schön und ruhig. Zudem ist die Lage ein großer Pluspunkt. Das Zentrum ist Fußläufig erreichbar. Ansonsten sind öffentliche Verkehrsmittel gleich um die Ecke. Die Wohnung ist umgeben von Restaurants, Bars, Museen und Parks. Ich habe mich wie Zuhause gefühlt. Danke dafür. Ich hoffe wir sehen uns bald wieder. Liebe Grüße

Elvira ist eine tolle Gastgeberin und ich hatte 6 wundervolle Tage in ihrer schönen Dachgeschosswohnung über den Dächern von Madrid. Elvira hatte mich gleich zu Beginn mit tollen Tipps über Madrid versorgt, die sehr hilfreich waren.
Die Wohnung ist absolut zentral und ruhig im Museumsviertel von Madrid gelegen. Das Zimmer ist hell und freundlich und das Bett sehr bequem. Es fehlte dort an absolut nichts und bei schönem Wetter konnte ich sogar ihre schöne Dachterasse genießen inmitten von Zitrusfrüchten und anderen Pflanzen. Vielen Dank Elvira für diese schöne Zeit und auch die Gelegenheit wieder Spanisch zu sprechen. Un abrazo Bárbara

Elvira was very helpful. We had nice chats with her, and she provided many useful tips about Madrid. Her apartment is in an excellent location and within walking distance to major museums like Prado, Reina Sofia, and other sights to visit. Comfortable bed. Overall, I was very pleased with my stay.
Elvira is a wonderfully kind host. Her apartment has a beautiful garden terrace and the room is very comfortable. The location is also perfect for exploring Madrid.

Elvira is a wonderful host. She is very hospitable and assists you in knowing a lot about the city. She has given plenty of suggestions and always checks up on me about how my day was in the city. Very caring and the apartment is well taken care of.  Everything is superb! The location is great - walkable to all the places to go to and the apartment is clean and very comfortable to stay in! Will definitely stay again when I go back to Madrid! :)
Elvira’s apartment was very clean, close to everything, highly recommend. Elvira is super attentive and will help you with whatever you need. Great host, great area.

Elvira is very nice. Her apartment is well located for access to the museums or a walk to Plaza Mayor. I found that the taxis were cheaper then Uber or Bolt and they are easy to catch near the apartment.

This is a wonderful stay - great host, great location. The neighborhood really can't be beat - so much in walking distance. Elvira was so accommodating and even made me coffee every morning which was much appreciated! The room is very comfy and the terrace can't be beat.
Very nice room and location in Madrid!

Such a great experience! The apartment was in a great location, right across the street from Retiro Park and the Prado Museum. Elvira made me feel so welcome in her home and was great company as well! I would definitively recommend anyone to stay here while visiting Madrid.
This is a great option for solo travelers. Elvira is an attentive host and her place is conveniently located near major Madrid attractions.
Staying with Elvira was nice. She was very welcoming. The place is shared and so you get to have Elvira's charm as well. Clean spot. Good for what I needed, which was a place to crash

Elvira es un amor. Se toma el tiempo de explicarte la ciudad y los lugares que debes ir.
Ame tomar cafe y charlar con ella. Me hizo sentir que estaba acogida. Su apartamento esta muy bien ubicado, cerca de las zonas mas bonitas de Madrid.
Elvira es una excelente host, atenta en la comunicación antes y durante el viaje. Tiene el piso en impecables condiciones como en las fotos. Es muy amable, la recomiendo.

Extremely attentive throughout the whole stay.
Good location

Elvira is an excellent hostess. Her penthouse apartment is located only 10 minutes from the Prado and Thyssen museums, 5 minutes from the Royal Botanic Garden and there are great tapas restaurants and Motteau, a coffeeshop bakery, 5 minutes away. This was an excellent experience.

Elvira is my favorite host! Staying at her place in Madrid was wonderful - there's beautiful natural light in her guest room especially in the afternoons, a really nice shower, and a fantastic plant-filled terrace to sit out on and enjoy coffee or lunch. Elvira is warm, welcoming and super knowledgeable about the city. Can't wait to come back and visit.
Si quieres pasar unos lindos días en Madrid, en un barrio súper lindo y en casa de una anfitriona inmejorable, sin duda debes considerar alojarte en lo de Elvira

Cuando busco un alojamiento en una casa , habitación privada siempre me fijo en la descripción personal y reviews ya que además de estar alojado, compartir un espacio común si encuentras un buen host ...multiplica tu experiencia y recuerdos. Elvira es muchiíisimo más especial que sus reviews y que su descripción, es curioso que en dos días te puedes sentir como en casa en un sitio. Gracias Elvira por todo! Has sido gran parte de que este finde  sea tan bonito para mi. Nos volveremos a ver! Eso seguro!

Elvira hizo de mi viaje por Madrid el viaje de mi vida del que tenía muy altas expectativas y se cumplieron a la perfección. En su casa estuve de maravilla. Una casa de la que mimaba con su cariño y su gran perfeccionismo. Una casa muy acojedora cuyos estilo y decoración estaban en sintonía completa con el barrio donde se ubica, El Paisaje de la Luz. Ubicación idónea para visitar a pie las joyas de Madrid, entre ellas, Museo del Prado, Museo Reina Sofía, Parque de Retiro, museo Thyssen....etc.
Elvira es una persona de la que nunca se olvidaría, contagia a sus huéspedes de su risa increible y su enamoramiento por su amado Madrid y regresé a mi Argel completamente loca por Madrid.

Elvira’s place was right in the heart of Madrid and was walkable to all the major places that I wanted to visit like the Prado Museum. It was a short 10 mins walk from the train station and there are many cafes around the area as well. Elvira has been nothing but welcoming and warm during my stay! She helped gave me directions and recommendations to places to visit, and was always glad to welcome me home at night to talk about my day. I would recommend her stay to all solo travelers! :)
Simplemente perfecto, esta muy bien ubicado y te sentirás muy a gusto con Elvira. Definitivamente volveré en mi próxima visita a Madrid.

Very nice place in a fantastic location! Definitely would stay here again. Patio overlooking Plaza Mayor is great for a morning coffee or watching the sun go down. Plenty of space. And can’t beat the location.
Fab apartment, fantastic location and lovely host

Magui was extremely helpful both before arrival and after. Our flight was delayed by a day, so I messaged her (plenty of time before) and she immediately refunded one night of the cost of the accommodation. When we met her at the apartment she gave a very thorough and clear tour of the property. Then, when it came to checking out, she was flexible and allowed us to leave slightly later as the next guests weren't arriving until the following day. She did everything she could to make our stay a real pleasure, which of course it was!

마요르광장이 내려다 보이는 곳입니다
위치가 상당히 좋아요
왠만한 곳은 다 걸어갈 수 있을 정도로 중심가에 있어서 좋았습니다
건물 자체가 오래되어 영화에서밖에 보지 못 했던 것 같은 엘리베이터와 연극세트처럼 생긴 집이에요
하지만 주방과 화장실은 리모델링으루해서 불편한 것이 없었어요
전체적인 청소상태는 좋았지만 주방 참장 안의 그릇들이나 수저 요리도구 등의 위생상태는 좋지 않았어요
그리고 수세미가 너무 낡아있었어요
키친타월이나 티슈가 없어서 화장실휴지로 사용해야 해서 불편했습니다 구비하면 좋을 것 같아요 화장실 휴지도 조금 넉넉하면 좋겠습니다
거실과 한 방의 에어컨은 개비된 지 그리 오래된 것 같지 않아 괜찮았는데 나머지 방 하나의 에어컨이 너무 오래된 탓인지 시원한 바람이 나오다가 더운 바람으로 바뀌곤 해서 해결을 원했지만 저희가 있는 동안은 그냥 지냈습니다 호스트에게 이 내용을 전달하였고 곧 문제를 해결할 것이라는 답을 들었어요 잘 고쳐지길 바랍니다
Magui was very accommodating. We had a wonderful time and the apartment was situated in a great location. With the extreme heat wave in Madrid having an air conditioner was very valuable.

Magui the host was fantastic, very warm and welcoming. She gave us a lot of information on the area and a fantastic list of point of interests and eateries that are walking distance. Enjoyed chatting with her while we were dropping off luggage.
Perfect place, great location and very good value. Everything we needed for our stay was there in the apartment.
Would say there again....

This place is great. Hard to beat the location overlooking Plaza Mayor. The apartment itself was spacious and clean with a cool layout and extra characters with the dark wooden beams. Our host was very nice and open to communicate before, during, and after and she clearly wants her guests to enjoy their stay in Madrid.

This place is amazing, if you want to come to Madrid I truly couldn’t recommend this house enough. Obviously the best thing is the location, it literally looks over the entire plaza and is so central to the city. Everything in the house was very clean and worked perfectly - the AC was a godsend. And Magui was a fantastic house, she was so welcoming and kind. Perfect place!

Was a great stay in the Plaza Mayor in Madrid. The "attic" is laid out with a living area that has a small balcony that overlooks the plaza. In spite of that the noise was not bothersome in the unit. There were two bedrooms and a nice kitchenette. Air Conditioning kept it cool enough in spite of the high August heat.
Magui was super helpful and accomodating. Highly recommend.
Just a fabulous location - hard to get better than this.  Comfortable, Metro nearby, just off a beautiful plaza.  Hope to return.
Wonderful home… everything was fantastic! Will definitely stay again

A fantastic apartment for staying in central Madrid.  The location is perfect with a small balcony overlooking Plaza Mayor.  Very clean and excellent facilities, very good air conditioning which was much appreciated in the August heat.  Even though it's in a busy part of Madrid the bedrooms are located to the rear of the apartment so very quiet and no noise from the square.  It was a perfect place for us to stay for our long weekend eating and drinking our way around Madrid's bars and restaurants!

Logement totalement conforme aux descriptifs et même plus. Vue sur la Playa Mayor magique.  Appartement très bien agencé, literie confortable et  silencieux. Vous pouvez louer sans aucune réserve. Nous y reviendrons c'est une certitude.
Magui is a good person and a great host - her communication is prompt and friendly and she is helpful with local advice.
Appartement très original situé dans un quartier central de Madrid. Tout s’est bien passé et nous avons apprécié la réactivité de Magui à nos sollicitations.

The listing was even better in person and my family and I never wanted to leave. Check in was super smooth and the apartment was immaculately cleaned. The view was amazing and the centralized location was perfect for exploring Madrid.
Great location, easy check-in, solid place. Would stay again!

Amazing is an understatement. This place is fantastic. Even better than the pictures.
Loved being able to sit on the terrace in the morning and evening and just enjoy the people chatting and walking.
Magui is an amazing host. Made sure we were taken care of and stayed in contact throughout our stay. Just wish we could have stayed a little longer!

Amazing place right on the plaza. The balcony provided a perfect place to sit for morning coffee. Located a short walk from both train systems, Magui's place is the perfect home base to see Madrid from.

Magui is a great host and very welcoming. The apartment is in a great location and well equipped and very clean. We would definitely stay again and recommend this apartment to anyone wanting to visit Madrid.

The location could not get any better than this flat. My mother and I were able to walk to many shops, restaurants, markets, the Royal Palace and the Prado Museum from here. The flat is so artistically decorated with a balcony with a beautiful of Plaza Mayor. We will definitely be back!

Magui’s place was much better than what we were expecting. Our stay was perfect. We really loved everything about the property the vibe, the coziness, beautiful view from the balcony and the location near everything. We left and we are already wanting to go back.
Also, Magui is an amazing host. The communication with her was easy and effective.
Everything was great! Location, apartment, Maqui. I highly recommend

I stayed at Magi’s  with my family and we had a great time in her apartment ! It is very well located, not only because is literally at La Plaza Mayor, but also, is very close to the metro station. The place is super comfy, clean and big ! Magi was very nice with us, and gave us a lot of nice tips to go around the city ! Definitely would stay again there !
Perfect stay caring hosts

The apartment is unique, located in the center of Madrid in an historical building with extraordinary view at Plaza Mayor. Spacious and comfortable for 4 persons. Also, the communication with Magui was perfect! I definitely recommend it!

tudo perfeito, ótimo em tudo que pretendemos em madrid.
perfeito, super recomendo.

I had always wanted to stay in one of the apartments overlooking Plaza Mayor and this charming apartment was perfect! I wish we could have stayed longer. The apartment is beautiful, the view on the plaza mayor is amazing and the rooms are super quiet due to the fact that they are located on the opposite side. We enjoyed our stay so much. On top of that communication with Magui was smooth. Magui was super arranging with us for the checkin and for the checkout, we really appreciated this. Would recommend 200%.
Great location in a very beautiful rustic apartment. Lots to do in the surroundings and a very beautiful view of the Plaza Mayor.  Definitely would recommend this place for your stay in Madrid.
위치가 너무 좋고 이런 곳에서 머물 수 있다는 것에 매우 만족합니다. Magui는 너무나 친절하고 자상했어요. 기대이상으로 방은 너무 좋았어요. 생각보다 시끄럽지도 않았고요. 또 오고 싶어요🤗
Yet another brilliant stay made even more special by all the wonderful Christmas lights and of course shopping. We will be back thank you Magui x
Muy bien todo! Sin ningún reparo en todo lo que necesitamos! Para repetir en algún momento! Un saludo a Magui!!

Magui met us at the property and was very welcoming, despite our flight being delayed for over an hour. She had used the time to put a Christmas tree and decorations up.
The property was spotlessly clean and comfortable. It rained most of our visit so it was great to have a warm and cosy apartment to come home to.
The location overlooking Playa Mayor was amazing. All of the main sites were in walking distance.
Absolute perfection. Recommended without hesitation.

You are here for the ridiculous views. The iconic photo from the table says it all.
The attic is actually on the 5th floor and the table and chairs is on the roof so you can't get higher. The lounge is under the slopped roof.
It is a character attic with nooks and crannies in abundance. Magui is a wonderful host.
Central to all the major attractions.
The location and view of Plaza Mayor was fantastic. We enjoyed our stay very much! Thank you Magui!

La Ubicacion es muy buena, ese pequeño balcon con vista a Plaza mayor es perfecto.
Camas muy comodas, ambientes antiguos con estilo.
Seguro regresaremos a este alojamiento.
Magui was a great host. Very easy to communicate with and super helpful. The place was great to stay in and we’d love to come back if we return to Madrid.

Evin konumu bundan daha iyi ve güzel olamaz. Etrafında keyifli restoranlar , kafeler , her yere yürüme mesafesinde . Kısacası kalınabilecek en güzel konum. Otel’de kalsak bu kadar keyif almazdık.

This apartment was incredible - the amenities, location, cleanliness, everything was perfect! Magui was so helpful and friendly too! We had a great time and will return soon!
마요르 광장이 내려다보이는 굉장한 위치. 친절한 스텝. 집도 충분히 넓고 편안했습니다
Maguines amorosa y soluciono todas nuestras inquietudes

아주 다른 느낌의 숙소를 경험했다.모든것이 완벽했고
