난방도 훌륭했다.

Honestly, this place was truly amazing. The location was amazing. It was directly in the center of the city in an active plaza. When you had the doors closed, you couldn't hear a peep. I was working remotely and it had many places to sit and work. Magui was always so friendly and came by weekly to change bed and bathroom linens. We loved our morning coffee and evening cocktail on the rooftop. I highly suggest this place to stay if you are ever in Madrid. We would definitely return.

Mooi, gezellig en comfortabel apartement op wat ongetwijfeld een van de mooiste locaties van Madrid is. Het uitzicht op de Plaza Mayor vanaf ons miniterras zullen we niet snel vergeten. Magui is een perfecte gastvrouw.

We loved our 3 night stay at this apartment.  It is a very old apartment so lots of character, but with a fully and newly renovated kitchen and bathroom.  It is located right in the middle of the action, overlooking Plaza Mayor so very convenient for sightseeing and to use the metro, but it was high enough to be very peaceful and the bedrooms were very quiet.  Magui was a great host - very responsive, gave us great instructions and recommendations, and the apartment was nicely stocked with everything you'd need for a short stay.  Great value for money!
Perfect location, apartment and host; the views from the apartment were amazing. Highly recommend. Would definitely stay again!

This place was amazing. Loved the decor, which represented old World charm. The location was perfect, we walked to diferent tour sites, restaurants and shops. walkable distance to the Royal Palace. Magui was very responsive and maintained comunication the whole time. I would definitely stay here again. Highly recommended!

Incredible place. Family of 4 (kids 10, 12). First time in Madrid and could not have picked a better location or place. Was right in the heart of Madrid and steps away from the metro but you could never tell by how quite it was when the windows were closed. All sights a 20 minute walk or a 10 minute metro. Host was very welcoming and place was very clean and felt like a home. would stay here every time.

He estado súper confortable en casa de Elvira. El piso es muy tranquilo y con todos los equipamientos, además de muy bien ubicado. Muchas gracias por todo Elvira, en particular tu amabilidad y simpatía.

Elvira was such a warm and welcoming host. She communicated really well about how to get to her place, and gave me a ton of local recommendations. She is very kind and cares a lot about her guests. I would definitely recommend staying here while in Madrid. Her place is the perfect location to see the city as well.

The apartment is in the centre of Madrid city, it’s very close to everything. You can walk to most of the tourist attractions. The room is neat and cozy, has a big window with nice view.
Elvira brings a lot of joy to my trip in here. She is the most warm and loving hostess, and she recommended nice places to visit in Madrid.
10/10 this place is strongly recommended.

Elvira was so warm and welcoming and really helpful with suggesting places to visit and things to do and see in the city. The apartment is beautiful with a sunny private room. Really comfortable and a great location being so close to all the art museums and walking distance to bars and restaurants.

I loved the location and safety of my stay. It is located within a short walk of many main attractions in the city and great places to eat. The area is safe and Elvira communicates quickly. I loved it!
Elvira es verdaderamente amable! me encantó el alojamiento y volvería sin dudar !
Muy bueno!

1. The location of this house is the best for people to visit the Prado, the Reina Sofia and the Tyssen. It takes about five minutes to walk to these three museums.
2. The room is cozy and quiet,and the terrace is beautiful, with orange and lemon trees that entertain the visitors.
3. The host is very kind and smart, so her recommendation made my stay more enjoyable.
Elvira is an extremely welcoming host who helped me with my travel plans and gave recommendations. I loved her terrace. Her place is ver well situated.
Elvira was very kind. Her place was clean and comfortable

Pros: Clean room and bathroom. Sunny terrace. Good walkable location. Elvira did give me a map and explained a lot of the surrounding streets and what there is to do which was nice.
Cons: Elvira was very strict on turning lights off. She walked into my room without knocking at night to turn the light off. Also specifies which light to use in the bathroom. I paid for my stay which should cover the electricity bill, so I should be able to use the lights at my discretion. If it doesn't, then I would recommend increasing the price of the listing. Elvira was also strict about closing the window shade when I left during the day, "otherwise the apartment gets too hot." The hot water in the shower runs out pretty fast. The terrace is nice but there's no actual view. There's no trash bin in the room or the bathroom so you need to throw your trash away in the kitchen. That might seem like a silly complaint but it would be quite the inconvenience if a girl is on her period..
Elvira was a wonderfully communicative host with lots of helpful recommendations for things to do in Madrid.
Great stay at Elvira. the flat is extremely well located and Elvira is a lovely host!

You can not beat this location for sightseeing in Madrid. The major art museums are practically right outside, and nothing is more than a 20 minute walk. Plenty to see and do. Elvira is a lovely host and I felt like the experience was much like a home stay and not just a hotel. If you don't want that level of interaction, this is not for you, but if you like to authentically get to know a local this is a wonderful place to stay. Also, great wifi for remote work.
Elivira was a very nice and sweet host! I felt very welcome. She is very helpfull for giving directions and she really naturally enjoys hosting guests.

Elvira的公寓位置非常好 方便去任何地方
感谢Elvira的贴心帮助
Thank you, Elvira, for my best 3 days in Madrid! Your recommendations about where to go were really helpful, the room is do cute and it was a real pleasure to know you)

Having stayed in Madrid for several weeks, I can honestly say you won’t find a better place to stay than in el barrio de las letras. The apartment is beautifully kept and very central to big things around the city, including el rastro, el prado, the reina Sofía museum and much more.
I genuinely enjoyed staying here and speaking with Elvira. She was very very sweet and accommodating toward me; she provided me with names of must-see locations and explained how to navigate the city.
I felt very welcomed to Madrid!
I had. Really wonderful stay with Elvira! Her place is in a fab location, it has a lovely terrace and is very clean. Elvira is lovely and even helped me with my Spanish! Would 100% recommend!

Hello!
This place was very convenient and safe. The house is very cozy, and it's clear that the hostess loves it and has created her own little nest there, which is pleasant to admire. Elvira has a beautiful terrace with plants, and having morning coffee there is especially enjoyable. I think this place is suitable for people who respect the place where they live and abide by the rules given to them. Elvira is very practical, so in this place, you will primarily use the soft ambient light from the lamp and natural light from the window. It can get hot in the morning, but you can open the window and turn on the fan as the air conditioner is rarely used because its the central air conditioning system and you don’t have separate one in your room. Overall, I am satisfied with my experience.
Thank you

Una experiencia maravillosa, una anfitriona de primer nivel, atenta en todo, historiadora de su  lugar y muy buena consejera para que te rinda más el tiempo de tu estadía. Una gran estadía que me encantaría repetir

아주 행복한 여행을 했습니다! Elvira는 굉장히 친절하고, 저를 가족처럼 대했습니다. 지도를 주면서 도시를 설명했고, 야경과 볼거리 등을 제게 추천했습니다. 그녀의 집은 아름답고 깨끗합니다. 멋진 테라스가 있고, 방은 사진과 일치합니다. 아주 편안하게 숙박할 수 있었습니다. 다시 마드리드에 온다면, 또 이 집에서 쉬고 싶습니다. 그녀는 최고의 호스트입니다.

Bodde hos Elvira i en månad och jag har haft en fantastisk upplevelse. Elvira tar emot dig i sitt hem vid ankomst och tillsammans med en karta berättar hon om det olika sevärdheterna som finns samt mycket bra rekommendationer på museum och restauranger.
Elvira är både välkomnade och omhändertagande, hennes lägenhet är jättefin och ren. Terassen är helt magisk. Mitt i stan men ändå lugn.
Rummet man bor i är ljust och fint, precis som på bilderna med utsikt över takåsarna.
Skön säng med bra madrass men för mig lite för hård .. när jag nämnde det för Elvira så beställde hon en mjuk och formbar bäddmadrass som hon la ovanpå ordinarie madrassen och efter det så sov jag helt underbart.. vilken service och så otroligt omtänksamt av henne.
Jag var i Madrid för att studera spanska och Elvira hjälpte mig genom att prata med mig och korrigera när jag sa fel.
Jag rekommenderar verkligen er att boka detta boende i Barrio Las Letras, *****
Tusen tack Elvira, jag kommer tillbaka snart !!
Super nice location and sweet apartment especially the lovely balcony.

Elvira es una dueña muy amable y comunicativa. Tiene consejos y trucos utiles si quieres descubrir Madrid al máximo. Su casa es cómoda y limpia, además tiene excelente ubicación. Todo es como en las fotos. Recomendado.

La estancia con Elvira fue increíble, es una anfitriona perfecta. Siempre estuvo al pendiente de lo qu necesitará. La habitación es tal cual como se muestra en el anuncio y Elvira es un gran ser humano, amable y respetuosa, sin duda volvería a quedarme en casa de Elvira.
Elvira offers a lovely and pristine stay in a convenient yet quiet location. She is very helpful and kind.
Una bella experiencia :)
Muy recomendable la estancia. Espero volver pronto!

Tuve el placer de alojarme en la habitación que alquila Elvira durante el fin de semana del puente de Diciembre. Debo destacar la ubicación y comodidad de la habitación sobre todo. Además Elvira resulta ser una mujer sumamente agradable y educada con quien pude compartir interesantes y profundas charlas que aportaron mucho a mi estadía en Madrid. Sin lugar a dudas si volviera a Madrid volvería a alojarme con ella. Disfruté mucho mi estancia!
Elvira was a good host. She was very attentive and had good recommendations for restaurants and stuff to do in the area. Place was as pictured in the photos and very clean.

Elivra's place is just as described. Aesthete, maximalist but organized. I loved my room, very comfortable bed with a big window to let the sun and warmth in.
The apartment building is walking from Pl. De. Atocha, so you can take the Carcanias from Madrid Airport. Other bus stops/Metro are nearby. Just note the apartment is at slight incline up, like everything else in Madrid. Also, it's helpfully located almost in the middle of the Art triangle. The big 3 art museums are walking distance.
Elvira is a gracious and generous host, she gave me good description of the neighborhood right at arrival with a cute little map. Very helpful. She also gave me a small handbag because the museums ask to checkin in backpacks. Will recommend her place to stay.
Elvira is a perfect host. Helped make my stay in Madrid special with lots of advice and recommendations.

I stayed with Elvira for almost two months while learning Spanish. The apartment is exactly as shown in the photos, lots of light and with a beautiful terrace. The bed is very comfortable and it is in a peaceful location. Everything is very clean and tidy which is how Elvira likes it and that was perfect for me. Elvira is so accommodating and generous. She was very patient with me and helped a lot with my Spanish. I would definitely stay here again!

Elvira’s flat was in a great location it was very quiet and peaceful. Very comfortable single bed in a small room and I shared the bathroom with Elvira. There was a balcony that I could sit in and I was able to make myself tea.

I wish I could have had as positive an experience as some of these other reviews. The place is very clean and nice but here are a few things I wish I would have known before booking. Because it is a shared space be sure to clarify expectations before you commit. Once I was there, Elvira had many additional demands of how I should accommodate her needs which I did without argument. Yet I did not find she was willing to accommodate what was important to me without implying my requests were unreasonable even when they were afforded to me by Airbnb policy.

If I could give 10 stars, I would!! Elvira was such a wonderful host to me and made my visit to Madrid comfortable, informative, and fun. The place is extremely walkable — lots of museums, restaurants, and neighborhoods to explore by foot. Elvira is just so lovely & welcoming, and she gave me the best recommendations and tips about what to do in the area. Really enjoyed my stay here. Thank you Elvira!
Elvira war eine sehr nette Gastgeberin, das Zimmer sehr gemütlich und die Lage der Wohnung ist perfekt. Vielen Dank Elvira!!
Espectacular por donde lo mires.

Gracias por la generosidad con las recomendaciones y tips sobre Madrid. Elvira fue muy amable, su casa es un pequeño rincón tranquilo en una ubicación optima para moverse por los puntos claves de la ciudad. La limpieza, impecable!. Gracias.

Elvira has a wonderful home. There is a beautiful terrace nice for morning coffees or reading. The interior is full of interesting paintings and regalia like a mini museum. But the best part was Elvira herself. She is such an interesting, intelligent person to share a conversation with. She made me feel right at home. I highly recommend staying in her room!
Muy buena ubicacion y cumple con lo que dice en la descripcion, ademas que Elvira fue muy atenta en todo momento

I enjoyed staying with Elvira at her Airbnb. It is very centrally located, close to cafes, galleries and gardens. Elvira was very helpful and responsive I enjoyed our chats very much much. Highly recommended

I had a wonderful stay with Elvira: She is a really kind and welcoming host - we shared lots of nice conversations, she always made sure I had everything I needed and made me feel right at home. The apartment is beautiful, clean and in a great location, with cafés, restaurants, museums and Retiro Park right in front of the door. Would love to come back!
Elvira是历史知识和对马德里城市的了解非常丰富。 房间不大但是非常整洁，是一个很好的房东
Very safe and lively location near the top 3 museums, perfect for exploring! Also, the room was clean and exactly just like pictures. Highly recommend!

greet place, Elvira is well educated introduced me to The arts in Madrid, gave me a bus card, breakfast very pleasant, never felt stranger in her property, Very clean All spotless, respectfully. We had perfect conversations , as I learnt earlier Spanish German english. I travel and she loved good food Fresh fruits and green teas. I have nothing negative to say, I would have a bit More Time there. thanks giving for been so kindness.

What a beautiful place to stay! The apartment was just as the pictures, if not more beautiful. Elvira was a wonderful and friendly host. She made me feel very at home during my week stay. The area was perfect and walking distance to 3 top museums. Highly recommend!

Durante toda la estancia me he sentido como en casa. Elvira es un ejemplo de cuán enriquecedora puede ser una experiencia de trato directo. Además el enclave de su apartamento es inmejorable, la habitación acogedora y muy luminosa, siendo aún así lo más reseñable la facilidad que Elvira te brinda. Recomiendo totalmente la estancia, superará con creces tus expectativas. En mi caso me llevo no solo el disfrute de una estancia excelente sino que un recuerdo y una experiencia de lo más gratificante.

A great spot to stay while solo traveling! Elvira is an amazing host. She is very kind and knows a lot about the city of Madrid as well as its history. Her place is clean with a comfy bed and in a great location- walking distance to almost everything. Definitely recommend!

Mi estancia en casa de Elvira fue simplemente excelente. La ubicación es inmejorable, en pleno Barrio de las Letras, una zona tranquila pero a solo 5 minutos a pie del Parque del Retiro, de grandes museos y muy bien conectada con el transporte público. Además, en 5-10 minutos andando se llega a la Puerta del Sol, Gran Vía y otros puntos de interés.
La habitación es súper luminosa y cómoda, con una cama amplia y muy confortable. Todo el piso está muy bien equipado, tanto la cocina como el baño, lo que hace que la estancia sea muy agradable. La terraza es un gran plus: perfecta para disfrutar en casi cualquier época del año, y lo que la hace aún más especial es su precioso jardín, que Elvira cuida personalmente con mucho cariño.
Elvira es una anfitriona encantadora, siempre dispuesta a dar excelentes consejos sobre la ciudad, y su conversación es amena y enriquecedora.
Definitivamente, si vuelvo a Madrid, repetiré. ¡Lo recomiendo totalmente!

This was the first time I stayed in a room in someone’s house through airbnb and I had a great experience, Elvira made me feel right at home, her place was very comfortable and clean and the location very close to the train station as well as close to several museums. The place was quiet even though was close to some of the main streets which is a big plus for me.  I also found Elvira’s company very enjoyable she is delightful to talk to and willing to share her knowledge about places and their history. I would definitely stay at this place again .
She was a great host. Helped me understand the city and neighborhood by explaining with a map and also gave a transportation card which was really nice of her.

My first time in Madrid, and I couldn’t have asked for a better experience. Elvira was incredibly helpful every step of the way—her hospitality made everything so easy. The house was lovely, and the bed was super comfortable. I felt right at home. Highly recommend!
Buen lugar para una estadia de varios dias en Madrid

Elvira is a great host (I only wish I coul speak Spanish better to talk more with her). The room is clean and quiet, which is not an easy thing to find in the very center of Madrid. Most of the Spanish capital's attractions are within the walking distance, and what is not is easy reachable with its public transportation. Highly recommended.
This was a great place to stay. Elvira is an excellent host with great recommendations to make the most of your time in Madrid. The apartment balcony was a bonus as a very pleasant place to relax.
What an amazing location, beautiful apartment and friendly host!  5 stars on everything!

Mein Aufenthalt bei Elvira war sehr schön, die Unterkunft hat meine Erwartung voll erfüllt. Ich habe gleich zu Beginn viele Infos zur Stadt bekommen, das was sehr hilfreich für meinen ersten Madridbesuch. Zwischendurch gab es immer wieder nette Gespräche, sehr schön, wenn man allein reist.
Die Lage der Wohnung ist großartig, viel fussläufig erreichbar, man ist aber auch schnell an der U-Bahn.
Vielen Dank für die gute Zeit!
Muy bien ubicado, puedes hacer todo caminando. excelente anfitriona, cálida, amigable y atenta.
Excelente persona, como en casa
My son and I loved this place. It was perfect for us. Great location and Magui was very helpful. I would come here again in a heartbeat!
The location is excellent. The checkin process was easy. There is one small window/door with a view of Plaza Mayor.  The remainder of the windows open up to a close view of other apartments.
What an amazing location in an adorable apartment!  Magui was the kindest host ever!   We are so grateful to have rented from her and would highly recommend her place!!!
Una casa estupendo! Es mas grande que otras apartamentos, dos gran dormitorios! Muy bien. También la pequeña terraza es perfecta!

This place is a gem! Situated very centrally and overlooking Plaza Mayor, this apartment is located in great walking distance to markets, restaurants and the metro. The place itself is clean, quaint and surprisingly quiet given the location. Magui was brilliant as a host - incredibly responsive to our needs, friendly and informative. Very happy with the stay and would stay again.

This was a great, large, charming 2 bedroom apartment with an excellent location. Magui was very helpful and adjusted to our late afternoon arrival. I will certainly stay here on my next trip to Madrid.

Apartamento con buena ubicación , vistas a la plaza y dormitorios tranquilos , ya que daban al otro lado de la plaza.
Fiel a las fotos y a la descripción que dan.
Magui siempre atenta y muy amable. Respondía muy rápido a los mensajes.
Volveríamos , sin duda! :)

This place is fantastic! The view over Plaza Mayor provides constant people watching entertainment, day and night. It’s the most unique view I have ever had in the over 40 Airbnbs I’ve been to. The apartment itself was comfortable and functional with lots of character. The beds were firm and comfortable and there was ample room to unpack and put away clothes. We appreciated being able to do laundry and hang our clothes outside to dry. There are tons of great restaurants in the area with lots of recommendations from our amazing host, Magui. We walked to everything including museums, parks and bars with tapas. Magui was extremely responsive and helpful. This place is a once in a lifetime experience!

Diese Wohnung ist ein Traum und kann wärmstens weiterempfohlen werden. Wir haben es sehr genossen. Alles tip top sauber. Der Empfang war herzlich, wir fühlten uns wie zuhause. Sehr gerne kommen wir wieder! Vielen Dank! :)

L'appartement correspond à la description faite.
Il est très propre, très bien placé .
Une petite fenêtre avec un petit balcon donne sur la Plaza Mayor . Les fenêtres des chambres donne t sur une cour intérieure donc les nuits sont calmes.
La communication avec Magui a été très facile.

Nuestra estancia ha sido estupenda.
Desayunar con la vista a la plaza mayor es todo un lujo.
El edificio es precioso y la casa muy bonita.Las camas muy cómodas y a pesar de estar en el centro de Madrid,es muy tranquilo.
Ha sido un placer alojarnos aquí
Magui ha sido muy amable y ha estado pendiente en todo momento.
También tuvimos el placer de conocer a Carlos y a Rafaela y poder hablar con ellos un rato.
Todo fue perfecto.
Muchas gracias a los tres
Recomiendo totalmente este alojamiento

Quaint apartment in the loft of the Plaza Mayor buildings. Magui wasn’t around when we checked in but her friend Milena was very friendly and funny (all via a translate app!)
Would recommend to others and happily stay again.
Estancia buena, sin ninguna pega. Repetiría

This is the second time that we stayed at this beautiful apartment, and if I come back to Madrid, I will stay there again. Everything is comfortable here and the kitchen is well equipped. The apartment is right in the middle of the action in Madrid, and you can walk to all the major sites. Magui is a super host for a reason. She is very responsive and helpful and has many recommendations for places to go and places to eat. The view of Plaza Mayor is amazing! We were there for a festival and enjoyed viewing the festivities from above without having to deal with the crowds. Stay here. It's an awesome place!

Magui was very welcoming on our arrival and patient as we were delayed due to traffic from the airport.
The apartment is in a fantastic location for walking to all the best sights; 20 minutes to the Prado and Parque de El Retiro in one direction and 10 minutes to the Royal Palace in another!
Lots of dining options right off the doorstep and a small grocer about 300 meters.
The apartment was great for our family of 4! The photo's accurately show the apartment (we feel the apartment is even better in person!) and the beds / pillows were comfortable. We loved having our morning coffee and our evening cocktail at the end of a long day on the small balcony. Balcony was also fantastic for people watching below!
The temperature during our stay was around 20C so we didn't need the air conditioning but can see if the weather was hotter, it would be a necessity and luckily this apartment has an a/c unit in most rooms.
We would totally stay again on a return trip to Madrid!!
Thank you, Magui. We had a great time in Madrid, and part of it is because of your place!

Great location overlooking Plaza Mayor. Very fun to get a bottle of wine and sit on the patio overlooking the plaza. Magui had a lot of local recommendations for places to eat nearby that were delicious. I would definitely stay here again!
Incredible apartment in the most breathtaking of locations. Spacious, homely and Magui was the most consummate of hosts. I wouldn’t hesitate to stay here again.
This place overlooked the plaza and was amazing! Magui was an amazing host from start to finish! Highly recommend

We had a great stay in Magui’s apartment ! The location couldn’t be beat, in the heart of the action but very quiet in the apartment. The apartment was spacious and had lovely historic features but modern bathroom and kitchen. It was very clean and great communication with Magui if we had any questions.
We would highly recommend staying in this apartment !

Very central location close to many things to do walking distance! Metro nearby that can take you to the other places that you may want to go. A plus is there is an elevator -
It goes only to the 4th floor and you only go up stairs one flight.
Cute little balcony to the inside if the square.
Good AC and space comfortable for up to 4 people.
Highly recommend!
One of the best places I have stayed. Loved everything about it and would give it 100 stars if I could. Definitely worth the stay if you are heading into Madrid!!

We had such a wonderful few days at Magui's apartment. Everything was as described and we felt right at home. The view from the roof terrace and being able to sit outside was a treat at the beginning and end of the day. All basic provisions were provided, we were comfortable and Magui was responsive to any e-mails that were sent. We highly recommend Magui's place and will stay again when we return to Madrid. Really wonderful!
Great location and comfy space.

Couldn’t have imagined staying in a better location in Madrid. It was walking distance to many sights and restaurants. The apartment itself was a quiet and comfortable space to unwind after a busy day. The best part for us was looking out over the plaza at night from the balcony. Would recommend this place to anyone going to Madrid!

Perfect location - better than the pictures! The view over the square was fabulous. Beautiful characterful property. So quiet and yet in the heart of Madrid. Well airconditioned despite the sweltering heat of summer. Plenty of room for a family of four.
We stayed for three nights - I would highly recommend

We enjoyed our stay and the location is in the center of everything in Madrid. 20 minute walk to Prado, 15 minutes to Plaza de Oriente, and the average walk was about 10 minutes . Of course we have a great view of Plaza Mayor.
The apartment has an elevator, washer and air conditioning. Didn’t hear any noise from the plaza in the evening.Highly recommend.
Was a great stay perfect location
Hermoso departamento, completo y equipado, Magui siempre fue súper amable y atenta, volvería sin pensarlo !
Magui is super responsive and always clear and friendly in her replies. She was really flexible with our arrival time and helpful when we had problems with the train from the airport.
Kjempefin leilighet og perfekt lokasjon. På taket av Madrid! Kan anbefales og vi kommer gjerne igjen :)
Lovely hosts, great location, definitely recommend :) 10/10
Just the perfect spot to stay in Madrid.  Right at the heart of things and loved watching the world go by from our balcony.  Will definitely be returning.

El apartamento de Magui es una de las mejores opciones para quedarte en Madrid. La ubicación es inmejorable, la viste desde su balcón a la plaza mayor es hermosa. Cuenta con aire acondicionado en las habitaciones para refrescarte del calor (fui en pleno verano). Definitivamente volvería y lo recomiendo!
Great location! Walking distance to all major attractions.
This place was amazing. The location, the apartment, and the experience - I highly recommend this place.

All about location!! From Magui’s place we could walk everywhere we wished to visit, come back for a break from crowds and heat in the afternoon, head back out for dinner, and have the best view possible overlooking late night revelers in the plaza. Magui was super helpful and we enjoyed our stay!

Perfect stay in Madrid! I was able to walk everywhere and always felt safe. Lots of great restaurants in the immediate area, or within 10 minutes walk if you want to venture out of the Plaza Mayor area. The apartment was clean and quiet, and it had everything I needed for my stay. Magui was very helpful and responsive. Thank you so much!

Magui’s place is a little step back in time tastefully decorated with authentic touches and in a perfect location. My partner and I both commented that we could easily live there.
Magui is such a lovely person and very responsive and helpful at all times. We would highly recommend Magui’s place for a try in Madrid.
Roslyn and Paul

Fantastic location, nothing better than having a morning coffee overlooking the Playa Major or watching the lightning at night.
Easy to get around Madrid fro here and the flat had oodles of character.
Also such a lovely host.
Thank you!!

This Airbnb was a very historic and unique experience! It was spacious and had a lot of seating. The balcony  overlooks one of the main attractions in the city, which was amazing. There are restaurants and shops all around the Airbnb. I would absolutely stay there again! It was by far one of the coolest air B&Bs I have ever stayed at! It truly felt like you were immersed into the Madrid culture, just by being in this home. The elevator worked perfectly. The host was kind and left recommendations. If you are over 6 feet tall, then you need to be careful with the door entryways because the door entries are short.

This is by far the best Airbnb I’ve stayed at in quite some time. The location was excellent, the host was easy to communicate with, being able to store our luggage a bit early was super helpful, and the place itself was beautiful. The view was incredible and if I’m ever back in Madrid, I’d happily stay here again.

Ubicación y vistas insuperable!!
Un auténtico acierto
excellent property in a superb location. it's an old apartment so that needs to be taken into account, but it is quiet despite being on a main square. I will hopefully go back one day

This was one of our favorite Airbnb experiences ever. The apartment was spacious and, while somewhat quirky, very useful, quiet, and comfortable with everything you need. The location is the star with everything you could want in Centro within walking distance and an unbeatable view of the Plaza Major. Highly recommended.
What an awesome stay! The view of Plaza Mayor was incredible. We loved the unique layout of the apartment. Beds were comfortable and air conditioning was great.

꺄끗한 침구와 멋딘 리빙룸이 인상적이고
발코니가 너뮤 좋았어요

Excellent stay. Very comfortable. Great communication. Highlight was at 11.30 am on 12/10/23 the National Day military overflow began. Perfect view from the balcony. Suggest that you advise anybody on staying on the National day in the future to be on the balcony at that time. It really was impressive.

Eine fantastische Unterkunft. Der Blick auf den Plaza Mayor ist traumhaft. Viele Sehenswürdigkeiten sind fußläufig zu erreichen. Restaurants und Lebensgeschäft in der Nähe. Wir haben uns in der Wohnung sofort wohlgefühlt. Wir würden die Wohnung sofort wieder buchen.

SUCH a cozy spot in an exceptional location overlooking Plaza Mayor via balcony table & chairs for 2. The 2 bedrooms are located far from the plaza for quiet sleep. Perfect! Checkin was seemless and very accommodating (I changed the time last minute) -thank you! The well equipped kitchen had some essentials (spices. oil, coffee & tea, oats) that we appreciated. Can’t think of a thing I would change!

Couldn't have asked for a better co/host Magui was fantastic and very helpful,the apartment was lovely as per photos,very cosy,quiet and right in the  heart of Madrid.The coffee shops and restaurants were in abundance with the metro within 5mins walking distance which linked you to the rest of Madrid. Perfect week away at the perfect place to stay.

Très bon accueil et quartier idéal.
L'appart était top pour passer un week-end entre amis au plein centre de Madrid !
La casa estaba muy bien, en buena zona y limpia. El sofá-cama no sirve para dos personas, haría falta uno más amplio.

This apartment was perfect for 7 people, it was just like in the pictures and the location was even better than we thought: several restaurants really close and you could walk everywhere. Ramon was very friendly and helpful! I highly recommend this place. Gracias Ramon!

Great! Everything was just perfect.
The concierge of the house welcomed us really friendly and showed us the apartment. The flat is situated in a stunning location in the very center of Madrid with a beautiful view over Plaza Santa Ana.
The apartment is spacious equipped with nice furniture.

Fantastic apartment, perfect for our long weekend in Madrid. Everything as described. No issues at all. Very central, lovely Plaza view, spacious and comfortable apartment. There were 5 of us staying there, plenty of room. Check in and check out was smooth. We had a wonderful stay and would definitely recommend. Hope to return in the future. Thank you for a great experience.

The apartment was spacious and comfortable for our family of 5. The location was very close to many restaurants and bars. The Metro is a short 10 minute walk away. We purchased 3 day passes which made getting around Madrid very easy. Thank you Ramon for your hospitality.

DURANTE NUESTRA ESTANCIA NOS SENTIMOS COMO EN CASA. LA CASA NO PUEDE SER MAS CÉNTRICA, ACOGEDORA Y PRACTICA. TODOS LOS ENSERES ESTA EN BUEN ESTADO. LOS COLCHONES SON COMODISIMOS Y LA ROPA DE CASA ESTAB MUY LIMPIA.

El apartamento esta muy bien, tal cual aparece en las fotos. La ubicación es perfecta. Se puede ir andando a casi todas partes. Hay un montón de opciones para comer o cenar en sitios chulos a un paso. Para repetir y recomendar.

Świetna okolica, mieszkanie fajnie urządzone. Właściciel mieszkania bardzo pomocny i uczynny.
Polecam!

Apartamento muy bien ubicado, descripción y fotografías adecuadas a la realidad, perfecto para una estancia corta. Encontré el late chack-in ligeramente caro pero en general tengo una buena impresión.
It's a really good place. Location is near to the metro station. The apartment is lovely and good to live in. Love it!
Great apartment in very central spot. Host accommodation and helpful on arrival. Had a brilliant time in Madrid.
All fine and great host's hospitality. Thanks a lot

The apartment is located in one of the buildings overlooking Mayor Place so the location is perfect.
It is a rustic house and our stay was very pleasant. Definitely recommend and we will stay again when we return in Madrid.
Fantastic accommodation. Lovely home in a great location. Would highly recommend.

We loved our stay here. The house was charming. It was sparkling clean and well stocked with everything we needed. The beds were really comfortable. The host was very kind and was great at communicating. We loved looking down in Plaza Mayor from the balcony. We highly recommend this airbnb.
Stayed hear twice. Great location, amazing host, fantastic views, extremely clean,  the host was extremely helpful. Thank you for the most amazing stay.

This rental blew us away!! If you’re staying in Madrid, YOU WANT THIS AIRBNB!!!!!
We were impressed by the size of the space, the updated bathroom and ease of access (see: ELEVATOR to the 5th floor). Having roof access to view the plaza was great as well!!
Amazing space, friendly people and soooo close to a ton of great bars/restaurants.

마요르광장이 보이는 훌륭한 위치
깨끗하게 코지하게 정돈된 관리
집은 따스했으며 넒은 공간
특히 공동호스트인 magui님과
의사소통이 원활하였음
그녀는 정말로 친절하고 환상적임
다음에 마드리드에 방문시 재방문의사가
있음

This house is overlooking at Plaza Mayor, exactly as in the photo. It is on the 5A floor where the lift only reaches 4th floor. So just another flight of stairs to climb. The house is unique with the necessities in place. Location wise is unbeatable, lots of restaurants downstairs and walkable to many attractions!

I have traveled for decades to Madrid and always walked the Plaza Mayor wondering what it was like at the top. This apartment is a rarity in both its original old world Spanish charm and the unique privilege of its rare terrace view. Well outfitted in each quirky corner, the access to the best of Madrid is immediately outside your door. Just fabulous.

Having been to Madrid a number of times, once we learned from AirBnB that the property was on Plaza Mayor, we knew we had found our place. Sure enough, the second we walked in, we we fell in love with the 18th century architecture of the flat. Our host, Magui, was very accommodating, even leaving us a list of her favorite restaurants, pubs and cafes in the area. But the ultimate experience came when we stepped out on the balcony after sunset and gazed down at the grounds all alight with bright Christmas kiosks hawking holiday goods and a 4-story crimson red Christmas tree just outside our window. Our location was a pleasant stroll from the Royal Palace, Cava Baja, and other central points of interest. If you're coming to Madrid, I couldn't imagine staying anyplace else. Whenever we return, we'll definitely rebook this storybook posada if it's available.

Apartament molt còmode. Les habitacions silencioses i els llits confortables. El saló per descansar és molt ampli. El bany és adequat i la dutxa funciona molt bé. La cuina neta i ben equipada.
La zona molt cèntrica. Per això no és tranquila, hi ha molta gent al carrer.

Muy buena ubicación y excelente el piso. Muy céntrico y cerca de todo!
Todo muy limpio y ordenado.
Repetiré sin dudarlo

Excellent place. Has a warm bohemian feel.  Lovely host.  Easy stay.  The little balcony over looking Plaza Mayor was a nice touch for coffee in the morning and to end the day.  Very quiet with the windows closed.
Super cute and cozy and location couldn’t be better. recommend 100%

We (two adults and one 4-year-old) had a lovely stay at this apartment. The location is truly exceptional -- while you are close to everything and have an incredible view of the Plaza, the layout of the apartment (with the bedrooms on the opposite side) ensures a quiet and peaceful sleep. Magui was very helpful and responsive. We would gladly stay here again!
Acogedor muy centrico . Volveremos sin dudar!!!

Amazing views from top! Nearby all the activities & train stations. We walked to most places. Magui was very nice & informative when she checked us in. The home was more spacious than I thought and the beds were comfortable. We loved being so close to all the fun events happening in the Plaza & nearby Puerta del Sol. Just some small advice: the elevator is a bit narrow & may be difficult for strollers. Once you reach the top, you still have another floor of stairs to climb, so having a stroller made us anxious. Also, no dryer. We hung clothes around to dry them within a day. But other than that, don't hesitate! BOOK it! Wonderful, beautiful, & close to everything!

부모님과 함께 방문했는데 부모님도 대만족한 너무 깔끔하고 예쁜 숙소였습니다!! 마요르광장 근처인데 저희가 갔을 땐 크리스마스 시즌 지나고여서 조용했어요. 숙소에서 내다보는 마요르광장이 정말 너무 예뻤습니다. 호스트도 너무 친절하게 숙소에 대해 안내해주셨고 응답도 빨랐습니다. 주변 맛집과 좋아하는 산책로도 정리해서 안내해주셨는데 너무 친절하고 좋았어요! 다음에 마드리드에 가게되면 또 예약하고 싶은 마음 100%입니다 :)
Such a fantastic location! Really enjoyed staying here.
Sitio con una ubicación espectacular y unas vista a la plaza inmejorable, seguro que repetiremos.
The host was so amazing and flexible. My mom and aunt had a wonderful time and the location made their trip super comfortable to get to all places of interest.
The apartment was lovely. It was very quirky and had everything we needed. It was very well located and very close to all the places of interest. We had a lovely weekend.
It was perfect 😍 Very central, close to every place we wanted to visit 😎.

This was the most fantastic place to stay.
So central.
The apartment is really well appointed and has everything you need.
Our host was amazingly helpful with everything and responded super fast.
I couldn't fault any of it.

It's like a nest, perched above Plaza Mayor. You know when you think as a traveller, "What would it be like to live there?" and you are pointing to somewhere marvelous? That's Carlos's place.  I've never been happier with an airbnb. This cosy apartment is also well laid out. It rambles from room to room, more than you can see from the photos. Each room is complete: a real dining room, a real living room, a real kitchen with a dining nook. Bedrooms fully equipped. You can feel the life of the people who enjoyed it before it became a rental. It feels like a home.
체크인부터 체크아웃까지 하나하나 친절하게 안내해주신 덕분에 편안하게 있다가 갈 수 있었습니다!! 역사적인 곳 내부에서 숙박을 한다는 경험 흔하지 않을텐데 좋은 경험이었습니다.
Really good place. Right on the main square with endless bars and restaurants in walking distance. Magui was very helpful. Clean and zero noise. Would stay again.
Being right in Plaza Mayor is iconic. We never found it noisy because the bedrooms are not facing the Plaza.

This airbnb is a wonderful place to stay. It's right on top of the Plaza Mayor, in walking distance from many of the places we wanted to visit in Madrid. Carlos and Magui was very communicative, and the place was wonderful.

도착 할 때 아이가 아팠었는데 많은 도움을 주셨고 걱정도 해 주셔서 고마웠습니다. 체크인때도 친절하게 알려주셨습니다.
숙소도 깨끗하고 창문으로 보이는 마요르광장과 위치가 너무나 좋았습니다.
체크아웃 할 때도 도움을 주셔서 감사했습니다. 덕분에 집에 잘 올 수 있었습니다.
기회가 된다면 다음에도 또 방문하고 싶습니다.
Hermosa casa! Nos encanto! Cómoda la ubicación y súper atentos en su atención tanto el anfitrión como su co anfitriona!!! Gracias por todo! Volveremos!
great place to stay
마드리드 구시가지의 중심부에 위치하여 여행하다가 틈틈이 중간에 숙소에서 쉴수도 있고, 숙소가 넓어서 여유가 있어서 좋습니다. 냉난방시설도 좋습니다.

Set atop the Plaza Mayor, this amazing apartment was exactly as described. Magui and Carlos were super helpful and responsive and the location was unbeatable!! Would absolutely stay here again when back in Madrid. Highly recommend.
Carlos’s place was amazing.  Wine on the balcony at night and coffee in the morning. I can’t wait to return.

Location is amazing and you can’t beat the view ! Just be aware , the terrace is very small . Super quiet at night which was a big surprise considering the location .
Very charming rustic attic.
The elevator was a huge bonus !!
Highly recommended, thanks to all the people involved to make this stay awesome. Sent from this dimension. Lol.

The location of the property is fantastic. You can walk to all the main attractions. Also a lot of restaurants nearby. Magui is very helpful. Our flight to Madrid arrived in the morning and she allowed us to check in earlier so we did not have to wait until the normal check in time.

We had a great stay in Madrid at this Airbnb. The location was perfect for a 2 night stay with of course the gorgeous views of Plaza Mayor. I stayed with my wife and two daughters ages 15 and 13 with now issues. Communication was fantastic throughout with great recommendations of what to do in Madrid when we got there. The apartment was clean and had everything we needed. I would highly recommend this Airbnb to anyone thinking of visiting Madrid.
Un lugar muy agradable, muy bonito, muy confortable, comodidad y una vista espectacular

Beautiful and characterful flat on Plaza Mayor. Magui was very responsive and accommodating, even when the train was delayed by over an hour and she had to come back to the flat to meet us on arrival. The beds were really comfy and the flat had everything required for our short stay. Would definitely return!

Very central and very charming Apartment!
Great view at Plaza Mayor.

This was our second stay in this apartment, and we will be back. Let that stand as enough to tell you that we were very pleased with this apartment.
The first visit was in 2017 and there have been several nice upgrades since then like some kitchen upgrades, new A/C, and the lock for the downstairs door is new. (This last was our only real frustration last time as the lock before was older and took some fiddling with. Now, it's open easy as can be!)
Our train from Valencia was cancelled, and we had to scramble to get new tickets. The host was quick to respond to my messages and updates, and was very kind to make check in very flexible.
If you want to be close to most everything you want in Madrid, this is your place.
The place was conveniently located and pretty quiet. Everything worked as expected and the host was very responsive. Clean bedrooms and bathroom, nice hot water and the beds were comfy. Great area.

If location is everything, this is the place. Located at Plaza Mayor. A short walk to the Palace. Restaurants right outside. Close to the metro (Sol station). Has an elevator but you still need to walk up one flight, in case you're not able. Close to Stow your bags as well.

The location was perfect and living within view of plaza mayor was a real treat
Hopefully we will get to come back to this beautiful city and when we do we will try to book this flat again!
Thanks for everything Magui!

We enjoyed our stay at the apartment.  The kitchen and bathroom had everything we needed for our stay.  The beds were comfortable and hosts were responsive.  The elevator was broken most of our stay, so be prepared to carry luggage up/down 5 floors. We loved the views of Plaza Mayor, and being right in the center of everything.

Wow! This place was just incredible!  With a balcony overlooking the Plaza Mayor, it doesn't get any better than that. So many great restaurants, the San Miguel Mercado, the Palace, cathedral, etc.... all in walking distance! Magui our host was lovely. Very responsive and she had so many local recommendations. The place itself is very spacious and charming with historic elements like exposed beams in the kitchen.I would stay here in a heartbeat again.

la vista del lugar es espectacular! inmejorable
Además puedes llegar caminando a todos lados
Great location for our travels. Everything was within walking distance in a beautiful city. Thank you for making it available to us.

Ich habe mich gleich willkommen gefühlt. Die Wohnung ist gemütlich und heimelig eingerichtet. Perfekt für 4 Leute. Die Dachterrasse auf die Plaza Major ist ein Highlight. In der nahen Umgebung ist alles vorhanden. Wir waren nur zu Fuß unterwegs und haben alle Sehenswürdigkeiten besucht. Wir haben unseren Aufenthalt sehr genossen und würden jederzeit wiederkommen.
This place was is beautiful, loved the location and the view. Would highly recommend. Great host.

Charming spot in an unbeatable location overlooking Plaza Mayor with easy access to pretty much everything you can imagine - food, entertainment, transportation. You can literally walk out the front door and sit at one of the restaurants in the Plaza within 60 seconds if you don’t feel like walking far. Kitchen was stocked with everything you need. Entire place was clean, there’s AC in both bedrooms and main area plus really comfortable beds! Magui made check-in easy and let us check in as soon as we arrived. Highly recommended! Far more interesting than any hotel room you’ll find - highly recommend!

I had a great experience and the host was very responsive and friendly. The apartment was clean and comfortable as well. The location is fantastic. This is a professionally run AirBnB, so it doesn't exactly feel like a personal home. But that was fine for my short stay and it had everything I needed.

Some things to know:
- Internet was a bit flakey, so if that's important to you for work remotely (as it was for me), you should double check that they've resolved that.
- The square can be very loud on the weekends, until sunrise.
Fantastic place and great hosts. Wish we could have stayed longer.

Muy buena estadía. La casa muy limpia, muy amplia y correspondía fielmente a las fotos.
El barrio realmente lindo, y el edificio es precioso.
Lo recomiendo absolutamente.
Solo eche de menos el manual para el uso de los electrodomésticos, ya que nos costo regular la temperatura de la calefacción.
Isabel la Portera, también fue muy gentil guardándonos las maletas hasta la salida de nuestro vuelo.

It 's a really nice place for our five people to live. The apartment  is close to SOL. There are many gourmet food nearby. Two bathrooms are easy for us to save time. Of course the sheets and towels are all clean. The concierge is so cute although she cannt speak English ,she tried to use the phone application to inform us the important informations of the room.
Es la segunda vez que tengo a Ramón de anfitrión y la verdad es que es un lujo. Te sientes como en tu propia casa, con todo a mano y sin que falte de nada. Recomendadísimo.
O apartamento de Ramón é ótimo, limpo, muitíssimo bem localizado e tudo funcionou conforme combinado. Ramón é muito organizado, ainda produziu uma apostila com dicas. Recomendamos!

Very nice apartment in a very good touristic location. Convenient to every attraction and a lot of restaurants and bars nearby. And the apartment had everything required and good internet connection. Strongly recommended:)

The apartment was charming and beautifully located. As described there were two bedrooms, two bathrooms, a living room, and fully equipped kitchen. One bedroom is large and bright, with a big window. The other is a good size, but only has a small window opening onto the building stairway - so little light and some noise from neighbors. The apartment is set up to sleep lots of people, with extra beds in each bedroom and in the living room - though that would be a bit cramped. Everything was very clean and nicely set up.
The apartment is up on a high floor, offering light and great views of Plaza Santa Ana. There is an elevator.
The location is really ideal. Plaza Santa Ana is filled with cafes, restaurants, and tapas bars. One of the best is across the street from the apartment building. There are small grocery stores down the street (but beware they open late 9-10am, and stay open late 10-11pm).
You are within easy walking distance of major sites, the big museums, the palace, the markets, and wonderful side streets for shopping and fun.
I would totally recommend this apartment and happily go back again.

Location is perfect! The flat is as desacribed in the photos, with very comfortable beds and at walking distance to everything. Arrival and departure were fast and, although I didn`t get to know him in person, it was easy to communicate with Ramón. I would definitely stay there again and highly recommend it.
Piso muy acogedor en el centro, luminoso y con buenas vistas. La zona es bonita pero muy turística, demasiado para mi gusto... La casa estaba muy limpia y en muy buen estado, ninguna queja.

We stayed at Ramons place for a week in march and everything was really fantastic! For us (four people) was very convenient, that there were two bathrooms and the plaza santa ana is really in the mittle of the old town and so you can reach everything between the kings palace and the prada per pedes. Very clean and comfortable appartement, we can highly recommend!

The apartment in Plaza de Santa Ana is comfortable and its location in Madrid excellent for foreign visitors to this beautiful city. The view over the Plaza, especially at night, is magical.

Being on a popular square, however, meant that noisy revelry was evident thoughout the night and into the early hours of the morning.

Unfortunately, our considerable pleasure with the apartment and with Madrid was seriously tempered when, after we had left Madrid, Ramon attempted to charge us a significant extra fee without any indication of what it was for. When we questioned airbnb about it, we were told it was a late fee and that, in our circumstances, was inappropropriate.

We felt that Ramon's behaviour on this matter and in regard to his response to our advice to him during our stay that there were problems with the washing machine in the apartment were somewhat intimidatory.

As a result, we would not recommend this apartment to others.

This appartement has an excellent location, is clean, has everything needed to stay self-contained but als has loads of restaurants and cafe's in front of its house door. Everythings was very uncomplicated, communication beforehand and check-in super easy. Definitely a good place to stay at when wanting to stay in the heart of Madrid.

Diese Unterkunft können wir uneingeschränkt weiterempfehlen! Der Kontakt zu Ramon war sehr gut und das Apartment entsprach genau der Beschreibung. Es war sauber, gepflegt, schön eingerichtet und seine zentrale Lage ist ein weiteres Plus. Zahlreiche Sehenswürdigkeiten sind von der Plaza Santa Ana aus fußläufig zu erreichen, Supermärkte liegen in unmittelbarer Nähe. Auch viele Bars und Restaurants sind in dem Viertel zu finden. Durch deren Besucher ist es nachts und frühmorgens allerdings mitunter etwas laut - vielleicht der einzige kleine Nachteil. Ansonsten würden wir bei einem weiteren Madrid-Besuch diese Wohnung unbedingt wieder mieten!

We absolutely adored Ramon's apartment. It was clean and spacious in a fabulous location with great views of the square below. We were fortunate enough to be able to watch the Easter parade on Good Friday from the balcony which was pretty special. The furniture was all of a great quality and we loved the corner sofa.
We stayed as 2 couples so it was great having 2 bathrooms, there was plenty of hot water available without having to wait (very important for us girls who take ages washing our hair)
.We would definitely 100% recommend this apartment and would love to stay again on a future visit to Madrid.

Ramon arranged for someone to meet us and introduce us to the apartment and its facilities. The apartment was exactly as listed and was extremely comfortable. The location in plaza Santa Ana was absolutely perfect and close to good shopping, galleries & tapas.

Our experience was fantastic!  Ramon was super responsive and attentive.  He made sure he was n contact and met us when he said he would.  Theaprtment was PERFECT!  Location is PERFECT, clean, all the amenities needed and even the big bath towels were a nice added touch.  It was 5 girls and we all loved the nighborhood and the view from the apartment was great.  We would open the balcony every morning and simply gaze outside at the busy street below and the buz of Plaza Santa Ana. Everything in the partment was clean and there was even ice in the freezer (a bonus I thought).  And, we really appreciated the reference guide on Madrid Ramon created for his guests.  That was a great listing of places to go, see, where to eat, etc.  By the end of the trip, the girls and I sad we would love to live in madrids, but specially live in Ramon's apartment. Great job Ramon!

The person who received us gave us a very brief explanation of the apartment and its contents.
The neighborhood was lovely, Plaza Santa Ana has a wonderful atmosphere. It can get noisy though, particularly as the weekend approaches.

Abbiamo soggiornato in questo appartamento ad aprile 2015. Arrivate in ritardo di un'ora, per problemi di volo, ci è stata subito chiesta la late fee di 30 euro, prevista e dunque giusta, ma come impatto iniziale non ottimo. Per il resto l'alloggio è davvero bello e confortevole, in una posizione ottima comoda per raggiungere i posti più interessanti della città e circondata da locali molto carini e accoglienti. Ci sono due stanze da letto e due bagni, un divano letto in salotto e una cucina. Vista sulla piazza meravigliosa. Alcuni accorgimenti in più potrebbero essere presi, come far trovare i letti fatti, che arrivando la sera tardi farebbe piacere, e lasciare a disposizione degli ospiti del caffè e the per colazione e almeno una saponetta nei bagni. Per il resto ci è stata dimostrata massima disponibilità anche nel lasciare i bagagli in appartamento dopo l'orario di check out, consentendoci di girare ancora un pò la città senza il bagaglio al seguito.

There were 6 of us traveling and this place was large enough to accommodate us comfortably. It was in a great location and it was very easy to communicate with the host. A big plus is that there is an elevator in this building which made carrying luggage up several flights of stairs easy. This house is centrally located which is great for walking to all the sites, restraunts and shopping but the trade off is that it is very loud most of the night.

Appartement excellemment situé dans Madrid, quartier très agréable et très central pour visiter la ville. Immeuble de bon standing, appartement tout à fait conforme à la description, grand salon, chambres spacieuses, très propre et accueil très agréable.

This flat is located in a great neighbourhood of Madrid with lots of shopping, restaurants and services nearby.  Comfortably accommodated our family of four (two adult sons).  Back room with two beds very quiet and master bedroom with ensuite nice and roomy.  (Need to fully close the window shutter doors and run the air conditioning in the master bedroom to block out the street noise at night as the flat is located on a busy square.)  However, great location with everything in easy walking distance, including underground transit stations.  Photos are representative of unit and it was clean and well-equipped.
Ramon did everything he could to make us feel comfortable. Awesome guy!

Ramon's apartment in Madrid is in great location. It is close to all major sightseeing attractions. It provided us with a comfortable stay for the 2 nights we were in Madrid. Ramon's friend who greeted us, gave us a quick explanation of the apartment before we were off sightseeing. Staying over the weekend, the Plaza Santa Ana is very noisy at night, but that is only a minor issue.

This apartment is in a great location, close to everything that we wanted to see and do. We walked everywhere. It is a clean, spacious apartment, with every amenity that we needed. The beds are comfortable and suited our party of 3 people well. We loved having the doors open onto Plaza de Santa Ana. The front bedroom can be a little noisy at night but double glazed windows certainly helped. Our host was available to give us help when needed. A really enjoyable stay.  Highly  recommended.

Wir waren ein verlängertes Wochenende in dieser schönen, zentral gelegenen Wohnung. Der Kontakt mit Ramon war sehr gut. Vor Ort war alles bestens organisiert. Die Wohnung ist wie die Bilder es wiedergeben sehr geschmackvoll eingerichtet.
Wir können Ramos und seine Unterkunft gerne weiterempfehlen.

La vivienda está muy bien situada. El anfitrión nos trató muy bien. La descripción de la vienda se ajusta a la realidad. Pero una de las habitaciones es interior con una pequeña ventana que da a la escalera de la comunidad. Aún así no está mal.
Ramon's apartment is gorgeous, and it's perfectly located. We had such a wonderful time there. Thanks Ramon!

Although we didn't actually meet Ramon, we wee greeted by the very friendly and accommodating Marco. We arrived earlier than our check in time and were allowed to leave our luggage in the apartment so we could continue with our day.  The apartment building has a concierge as well as a lift so you do not have to worry about carrying heavy bags up the stairs! The apartment itself is beautiful - comfortable beds and lovely decor throughout. The air conditioning works throughout the apartment and the facilities were clean and adequate for our needs. By day the area is mellow but still with lots to explore... by night it is transformed into a bustling area with loads of restaurants and bars to explore. Its only about a 7 minute walk to the direct centre with great pit stops (i.e. restaurants, bars, cafe's, pharmacies) on the way. The architecture in Santa Ana is extremely beautiful and we found ourselves taking photos of everything. Ramon provides a guide in the flat which we found extremely helpful in guiding us throughout our travels. I will be coming back to Madrid and staying in this apartment again - a great gem in a beautiful part of the city!

Location very easy to find with Garmin as it is on a very popular downtown plaza (Santa Ana). We were met by Marcos who answered all our questions. The A/C works great and there is one in each bedroom and family room.  Well appointed kitchen was easy to do our own cooking in.  The beds are of decent quality and we slept well.  Nice bed linens and plenty of towels.  Elevator was great!
Fabulous.  Everything was as advertised.

The apartment is located in a beautiful old building on Plaza Santa Ana right in the city centre of Madrid. We bought day passes for public transport but in the end didn't make use of them because you can walk anywhere from the apartment. The apartment is beautifully decorated, just as on the pictures, and has everything you need. Ramon and his friend Marco accommodated us perfectly. I'd come back any time.

Our family had a great experience at Ramon's apartment in Plaza Santa Ana in Madrid. Ramon was extremely accommodating. He met with us upon our arrival and showed us his beautiful apartment. The apartment was large enough for a family of four, had two nice sized bedrooms and two full bathrooms, and a great view overlooking the plaza. The apartment was centrally located and a very quick walk to the Prado, El Retiro Park, Plaza Mayor etc. We were very happy with our stay. There was many local restaurants to choose from within quick walking distance too. I highly recommend Ramon's apartment as it was an excellent experience for us.
Lovely apartment as described and perfect location.

Spectacular apartment with gorgeous views! There is no better location or comfortable apartment for experiencing Madrid. We had four staying in the apartment and extended family visiting for meals (10 total) and it held everyone comfortably. The Plaza Santa Ana view is remarkable and the beds and furniture very comfortable (even for larger-size guests). The shutters work for holding the plaza noise at bay and the a/c was sufficiently cold during the hottest heatwave in many years.

There were some functional issues that were irritating, but didn't dampen our fun. The showerhead in the small bathroom was completely broken, the a/c in the small bedroom leaked a good deal of water and dropped ceiling material, and the air compressor outside the main bedroom 'honked' at random intervals all night long. For a longer stay, this would be problematic.

Ramon and Marco were very nice and pleasant to deal with. A great home-base for a Madrid vacation.
The place is very dirty and smell smoky. No shampoo, no soap for showering. I wouldn't suggest this place.

The apartment felt smaller than the pictures.  There were nice comfy sheets and comforters thanks!  The air conditioning motors made so much intermittent wining the first night that we turned the master and living room air conditioners off the next two nights and the noise stopped.   Appliances in the kitchen were modern.

The apartment was wonderful and was exactly as shown in the pictures. Large living room with natural light, over looking the plaza. The central location was excellent, right in the plaza Santa Ana and so close to the plaza del Sol which made walking everywhere easy and there are so many great restaurants right around the corner. There is also a small super market less than a block away.
The wifi and air conditioning work great!
We were met at the apartment by Marco, who showed us around the place and helped us get oriented with a map of the city. Very accommodating with our preference for check-in and check-out times! Overall a great stay in Madrid!

Nice apartment in a very convenient and happening location.  The apartment was exactly as described and very clean.  During very hot weather, the air conditioning was great at keeping the place comfortable.  The elevator was a welcome amenity as some places do not have one.  Communication with Ramon and Marco was good and very clear.  This place is a good option if you are visiting Madrid.

Die Wohnung ist sauber,sehr schön mit tollem Blick auf den Platz Santa Ana. Alles so wie auf den Fotos. Die Lage ist super, direkt in der Nähe gibt es schöne Bars und Clubs. Wir waren das erste mal in Madrid und sind begeistert. Leider war die Zeit zu kurz um alle schöne Plätze zu besuchen. Shopping Freunde haben genügend Gelegenheit, das ein oder andere schöne Stück zu kaufen.
Wir kommen gerne wieder und können die Unterkunft jedem empfehlen. Kontakt zu Roman war gut, alle unsere Fragen wurden beantwortet.
We had a very nice holiday in Madrid! The apartment was very nice and gave us the comfort we were looking for. The host was great and helpfull. made as feeling very welcome over there.

My family and I stayed at Ramon's flat for two nights, and we have nothing but great things to say about the flat, location and the host(s).
While most of my communication prior to arrival was with Ramon, Marco was the one who handled our check in and was the point of contact during our stay in Madrid.
Both Marco and Ramon were fantastic. Patient, helpful and very approachable. One of the lights in the bathroom needed repair and we needed an iron, Marco had it arranged within two hours of being notified.
The flat itself is true to the pictures. Immaculate, tastefully furnished and with a gorgeous view.
The flat overlooks Plaza Santa Ana, full of tapas bars and activity. Plaza Mayor/Prado/Retiro are all walking distance.
Great experience! Will definitely come back!

We had a great stay in Ramon's flat, which is very well located and equiped. We didn't see Ramon but were welcomed by his friend Marco. It's a spacious, authentic and comfortable flat, perfect for a family of 4. There is a public parking underground under Santa Ana Plaza. We definitely recommend it !
Beautiful apartment in a great location in Madrid. Lovely decor, top floor with lift. Perfect for our stay in Madrid. Thanks Ramon!

Très bon accueil de notre hôte. Quartier très agréable. Appartement très agréable.
Nous avons passé un excellent séjour et nous gardons cette très bonne adresse.
Merci.

We have nothing but wonderful things to say about our experience in Madrid and Ramon's apartment.  It was exactly as pictured on the website. Beautifully decorated and more than enough space for three or more people. Beds comfortable and bathrooms clean and worked well. The position of the apartment is wonderful in scenic Santa Ana square with all sorts of food in easy walking distance. We highly recommend the fabulous flamenco performance right next door at villa rosa!! Marco who welcomed us on Ramon's behalf was so helpful and was there when we arrived as organised.  He even came to our rescue when we had trouble with the keys!! Such a gentleman.

Tha apartment islocated near the sol stationand there are many resturant near the apartment。It is very large and tidy and all equipment insclude。。。our fmaily like to stay more days
Ramon is reply very fast when everytime i have question about the apartment。
Marco is very nice and helpful that he also introduce some place for us to go a visit。
I will recommendthe apartment to my friends who visit Madrid。

OVERALL: Would definitely stay here again, and would recommend to friends. Providing (extensive) detail below for those that want it.

GREETING/LOCATION: Marco met us at the apartment and was very friendly. Experience upon arrival was great! Home looks as photos show, and location is excellent. Balconies are a huge plus - views of Plaza Santa Ana are excellent! We looked at options near Plaza Mayor and Sol, and are so happy we stayed at Plaza Santa Ana... very central without being in the very heart of the crowded tourist-filled areas.

APPLIANCES: Wifi works well, as do the appliances. Range is electric, microwave and dishwasher work fine, fridge/freezer is sizeable for Europe. Didn't use clothes washer but a small one is there. TV works although we didn't use it. Water pressure and temperature was excellent.

INTERIOR/BUILDING: This place has the charm of original flooring and has a bit of wear and tear, so don't expect a super modern brand new place... it looks like the pictures but a little more worn. Elevator works very well and is quite modern (note there are ~5 steps from entry door to the elevator if that matters to you). There are two sets of keys which make splitting up easy for a group. There are serious deadbolts on the door to apartment which is nice for feeling safe.

STREET NOISE/BEDS: When windows and shutters are closed, you really cannot hear the streets below. For people sensitive to noise, I would bring earplugs as other reviews mention noise issues when sleeping. Beds are quite firm as well - just something to note.

A/C AND BATHROOM NOISE: when A/C is running, you can hear it outside the main bedroom as it is on the adjacent balcony. We ran them during the day and shut them off at night. Weather was nice enough to leave windows open and we slept despite the noise from the street below. Bathrooms are not as private in terms of sound as in the US, but that is the norm in my experiences in Europe.

OUR GROUP/OTHER: My wife and I stayed there with another couple and it was very comfortable. We used the fridge and dishes/utensils daily and the dining table is a great place to sit, eat and plan your activities around the city. There is a useful handbook in the apartment explaining the basics like when to take out trash, etc. Makes all the logistical aspects very easy.

Thank you Ramon and Marco for a great experience!
Sehr gute Lage mitten im Zentrum von Madrid! Hat alles gepasst und die Wohnung war gut ausgestattet und sehr sauber! Schluesseluebergabe war ebenfalls sehr unkompliziert und flexibel.
The welcome experience was extremely friendly and helpful.  We felt very well cared for throughout the stay.

We had an amazing stay in Madrid courtesy of our gracious hosts, Ramon and Marco.  The space was gorgeous and spacious, and located in a great area. It was easy to find, safe, and in a fun spot. One of my favorite moments was opening the living room balcony doors on our first morning and being greeted by the sunshine above and Spanish conversations below. The apartment is in a lovely older building but has all the modern updates, conveniences and aesthetics that could possibly be desired. Both Ramon and Marco were extremely responsive and easy to work with, as well. They had a great guidebook with recommendations and other helpful literature for tourists that was greatly appreciated. I would absolutely stay in this exact apartment again and would highly recommend it to anyone looking for a beautiful space to count as  home base while exploring this fabulous city.  A very enthusiastic 5 stars.

We enjoyed our stay in Ramon's apartment. Ramon communicated with us in advance of our stay to make sure we were met on arrival, which all went to plan. We appreciated the information about retaurants and other facilities in the area. The apartment is bright and airy and reasonably quiet considering its position overlooking the Plaza Santa Ana. The beds were comfortable and the wi-fi worked well - a strong signal pretty much all the time.  The position of the apartment is fantastic as it is sited halfway between the major museums and the Plaza Mayor and Royal Palace, so it was easy to walk everywhere.

Perfect location with easy access to tapas bars ( about 50-60 within 100m) shopping, tourist buses, trains etc. Very nice apartment that was comfortable and secure. The plaza is quite noisy at night but this did not worry us as we were keeping similar hours to the locals. We would definitely stay here again.

Bueno debo emitir una evaluacion de este apartamento, pero no encuentro las palabras. Excepcional, o fabuloso? creo que es poco. La descripcion del mismo y su ubucacion supera con creces lo que es en realidad. Agradezco mucho a Ramon su apartamento, fué un enorme placer haberme alojado ahi, y si puedo lo volvería a repetir. Simplemente : GRACIAS
Alles wunderbar. Die Unterkunft war sauber und liegt fantastisch.

Amazing apartment in an amazing location! It is ideal to explore Madrid and relax from all the sightseeing, shopping eating :-)
Communication with Ramon was easy, he is very friendly and nice.
De ontvangst was prima en gastvrij. Communicatie en afgesproken tijd was oog keurig. We hadden tickets voor een evenement besteld en die waren al door de gastheer in ontvangst genome.

Nos ha encantado este piso, nos hemos sentidos muy cómodos y muy a gusto.
Calidades de primera y equipamiento muy completo, no falta ningún detalle.
Decorado con mucho gusto, muy luminoso, y a un paso de los museos y lugares de interés .
Se lo recomiendo a todo el mundo. Anfitrión muy atento y agradable.
No dudaré en volver a alojarme aquí en mis próximos viajes a Madrid. Gracias!!!
Positive experience. Good place, beautiful old building, good location with many restaurants. Perfect for a couple of days in Madrid.

Lovely apartment, just as described. True to images.
Like other guests, Ramon's friend Marco met us outside the apartment and took time to show us around its features. He was great and contact and communication with him was easy and very prompt.
Great location, professionally organised system and would thoroughly recommend.

We loved staying at your apartment!! It was very comfortable for the four of us. The location was perfect with the plaza right out our front door and close to shopping and our daughter's apartment. At the end of the day it was great to sit at one of the restaurants on the plaza to enjoy a glass of wine or cerveza to recount our day in Madrid. We were very comfortable and never had to turn on the heat. Marco was great when we arrived and gave us extra towels, since we were there for 2 weeks.
This apartment was very nice, clean, and well-equipped for a family of five.  It is in a great location for touring Madrid.  Ramon is a good host and communicated well with us.
We were met promptly on arrival. The apartment is very central and in a lovely plaza. The apartment is new, clean and spacious. We loved our stay here.
솔광장에서 가깝고 시설이 좋습니다. 특히 엘레베이터가 있어서 캐리어 운반이 편리했어요. 여러 곳의 숙소를 이용하고 있는데 엘리베이터가 있었던 곳은 여기 뿐이었어요. 다른 욕실에 샤워하는 사람이 있으면 욕실에서 뜨거운 물이 잘 안나와서 기다렸다가 해야합니다. 그점만 조금 불편했을 뿐 숙소도 따뜻하고 편리하고 아늑해서 다음에도 또 이용하고 싶은 숙소입니다.

Our experience was great!  The flat was in a great part of town, and as advertised, was spacious and very clean.  Communication with Ramon was excellent, and they were right on time to meet us, give us the keys, and show us the flat.  We would recommend this listing to anyone!
It's a great apartment with great location. Most hot spots we can go there by walk. And just beside the subway which is very convenient for us. We had a great days here. Thanks a lot.

Ramon's friend Rafa met us in front of the apartment and was extremely helpful in giving us local knowledge. The guidebook has a very detailed list of places to eat, drink and visit. The apartment is in a very good location making it easy to travel around the city. I would recommend getting the tourist travel card. Very cosy and spacious apartment. Definitely would recommend

Apartment Santa Ana Provence Classy is very good located next to the ME Hotel and looks exactly like on the pictures. It was a perfect choice for me and my friends (6 persons). Decor is very modern and comfortable.

Ramon was a very good host. Our communication was clear and helpful. I will come again! Thanks Ramon

We were welcomed by Marco, who nicely showed us around the apartment, and gave us a couple of city tips.
The apartment is very spacious upto 6 persons, and has very nice interior, living room and bedrooms. The kitchen is very complete equiped with high quality pots and cutlery. The apartments central location is perfect, just getting outside the door you are in the middle of Madrid. By its central location at night yelling or singing of people from the cafes could occur on the front side.
We really enjoyed the classical architecture of the building, Villa Rosa.

Die Wohnung entsprach der Beschreibung und der Fotos. Sie ist in sehr guter Lage, mit öffentlichem Parkplatz direkt vor der Türe. Ramon und Marco (der und die Schlüssel brachte) sind sehr freundlich und antworteten stets prompt. Die Wohnung ist sehr zu empfehlen.
El departamento esta muy bien ubicado , es muy cómodo y en perfecto estado . El departamento en el aviso esta descripto tal cual es.

El departamento está muy bien ubicado, en la plaza Santa Ana, una plaza histórica y hermosa de Madrid.
El departamento es cómodo y tiene todo lo que se necesita para unos cuantos días en Madrid.
Ramón fue muy amable y un buen anfitrión!

La comunicación con Ramón ha sido fantástica, el piso es todavía mas bonito y acogedor que en las fotos. La situación es fantástica, muy céntrico, lo cual es perfecto para moverte.
Estaba muy limpio y muy bien equipado.
De agradecer que hubiera hasta infusiones ( Fernando se puso malo y le vino muy bien)
Al final nos recibió Marco, muy amable.
Ramon and Marcos were great hosts. He met us right away on the first day and was very helpful in introducing us to the city. Awesome place and great location.

We had a great time in Madrid and had no problems with the flat.  It's in a great location, is nicely put together and well looked after.  I'd also say that Marco was great at communicating in advance.

La estadía fue muy agradable. El apartamento es grande, luminoso y práctico. Los ventanales dan a la plaza Santa Ana que tanto de día como de noche ofrece muy lindas vistas.
El lugar tiene todos los accesorios y electrodomésticos necesarios como para facilitar la estadía.
Nos recibió Rafa que fue muy amable, nos dio recomendaciones de lugares a visitar, que ver y dónde comer.
Lo recomiendo.

사진과 소개의 내용이 그대로 였으며, 숙소 이용 및 주변 관광에 대한 친절한 설명, 다른 도시 이동 방법 등 호스트의 설명은 매우 친절했으며, 주변 마트 및 환경, Sol 광장까지의 접근성 등이 매우 좋았습니다. 특히 그 무엇보다도 숙소의 현대식 시설 및 설비가 매우 깨끗하고 좋았습니다. 친구 또는 가족 단위 여행 어떤 형태라도 만족할 만한 곳이라 생각됩니다.
Great flat, great location!
Excelente apartamento en una muy buena ubicación. Muy bien equipado. Me quedaría aquí de nuevo.

The apartment was in a fantastic central location - it was clean and matched the description. Ramon was very responsive and flexible when our flights were delayed. Overall, a fantastic experience and a perfect apartment to explore the city.

My husband, daughter and I stayed in Ramon's place for two nights and we loved it. The apartment was really lovely, it had great bedrooms and the lounge and window terrace had an amazing view right onto the plaza.  Roman's friend met us and gave us a great orientation to the apartment and the local area. We would highly recommend this apartment to anyone! Thanks Ramon.

Amazing apartment in the centre of Madrid. Apartment was clean, and had everything needed for a great stay. Check in was very easy and Ramon was always on hand if any help needed. Location is fantastic right in the centre nod Madrid surrounded my fab bars and restaurants. Would definitely visit again

Nous avons passé un excellent séjour à Madrid chez Ramon ! L’appartement est idéalement situé : le quartier est animé et sûr, toutes les commodités à proximité, tout peut se faire à pied, et c’est très pratique de pouvoir y repasser entre 2 visites pour se reposer.
