Il est situé dans un bel immeuble ancien, avec un parquet en point de Hongrie et de belles fenêtres : il est lumineux et la vue du séjour sur la place Santa Ana est très agréable à tous moments de la journée. L’appartement est confortable avec tout ce qu’il faut : les 2 salles de bain avec WC sont très pratiques. Ramon a été très réactif et efficace lors des échanges pour la réservation (il parle un excellent français !). Nous avons laissé sans le savoir quelques dégradations (notre fille ne nous avait pas prévenus), mais nous avons pu nous expliquer et trouver un arrangement avec Ramon.
Nous reviendrons avec plaisir.

Un piso maravilloso en el centro histórico de Madrid. La cocina tiene todo que necesitamos, el comedor tiene una mesa grande y sillas para seis personas y el salón con las sofás es muy cómodo. Todas las lugares interesantes están muy cerca y no necesitas coche, bus o metro. La próxima vez en Madrid vamos a alquilar este piso de nueva.

The host Ramon is very nice, kept good communication. The apartment is as described, nice and clean, in a good location in Madrid. Walk to all attractions. The restaurants in the square are not very good, there are some much better around. Some noise in the midnight. We enjoyed staying there very much. Thanks Ramon.
Very professional Airbnb operator. No issues here!  Apartment as described was accurate and the location excellent.
Very nice experience. Well located, the apartment have every thing we need and we were be very welcomed.

We had a wonderful stay in Ramons appartments.  The location was excellent for walking to everything. There were two couples and we were very comfortable with two bathrooms in this well equiped and spacious apartment. Loved Santa Anna Plaza below for food and entertainment. We will certainly recommend this apartment.
Lovely location in Madrid! Ramon was an amazing host with recommendations that went above and beyond! The apt is gorgeous and restful, overlooking a vibrant city square.
Muy céntrico y con todas las comodidades. 100% recomendable.
Apartment very well located, met our needs fully, we were welcomed by Rafa. Certainly we return in this apartment.

Stayed with friends for one night on the end of a business trip. Really great apartment in an awesome location. Would absolutely stay here again when next back in Madrid!
Love Plaza Santa Ana, sounds obvious, but just be careful of leaving belongings on tables when eating/drinking in the square - people will try and swipe them.
The apartment is great, well located at Santa Ana Plaza, close to every spot. The host is very friendly, he tells us many good places to go.

We were a group of 4 adults and 2 children and stayed in Ramon's apartment for 3 nights on our first visit to Madrid. It was absolutely wonderful. The apartment was very clean, the kitchen was well equipped and the location was perfect. It was within walking distance to most of the main tourist attractions in Madrid and there were great cafes and tapas bars right at our front doorstep in Plaza Santa Ana. The adults slept in the bedrooms and the kids (4yr & 6yr) were happy on the sofa bed in the lounge. I would definitely stay here again if we come back to Madrid. Thanks Ramon and Marco!

De las mejores estancias que he tenido. El apartamento está impecable, en maravilloso estado, muy cómodo y tiene excelente ubicación. El anfitrión siempre está disponible y tiene todo muy organizado. ¡Muy buena experiencia!
Grandiose Lage im Herzen von Madrid, tolle Aussicht auf die Plaza Santa Ana. Sehr schöne helle Wohnung, ideal für 4 Personen. Check-in und Check-out waren freundlich und unkompliziert. Gerne Wieder!

Ramon communicated well before, during and after the stay. The location is perfect, may be the best location in the city- restaurants, cafes and shopping is all within a few steps from the front door.
Me ha gustado mucho el apartamento .Volveremos a solicitarlo el nuestro próximo viaje a Madrid

Ramon's apartment was absolutely perfect for our visit to Madrid. Really comfortable, modern interior and such a great location. This was the first time I had booked accommodation through Airbnb and was a lite nervous. However, both Ramon and Marco were very helpful, friendly and were great with messaging us prior to our stay and answered any questions really quickly. I would definitely recommend this apartment.

Le logement de Ramon est très bien situé avec la place Santa Ana juste en bas de l'immeuble. C'est idéal pour sortir manger ou pour visiter la ville. L'appartement est très fonctionnel et bien équipé. Dommage que la seconde chambre ne donne pas sur l'extérieur.
Nous avons été très bien accueulli dans un très bel endroit :)
Appartement superbe et très bien placé

We had a great stay at Ramon's place. It was a perfect base to explore Madrid. The apartment is in a cool building and was surrounded by great restaurants, bars, etc. Everything was within walking distance. Communication before and during our stay was excellent as well and check in and out was super easy and smooth. We would definitely stay here again!

Great location, comfortable apartment with all basic facilities. Handy to have the flamenco place just next door if y are looking for something cultural. A small playground right in front of the part,net if you are travelling with young kids.  Easy access to metro stops, retail shops and plenty of good eating joints. Will definitely recommend to others. We were a family of 4 (2 young kids).

Was a lovely place. Air-con in both bedrooms and also common area which was great. Wifi was good even with multiple people on at the same time. Kitchen is well equipped. We had a great stay and at check in we were walked through the property to make sure we knew where things were. Location is also fantastic with it overlooking a plaza/square. 2 bathrooms is also a great plus

Ramon and Marco were great. They made everything very easy.  Plaza Santa Ana is a perfect location that puts you in the middle of everything.  There is an underground parking lot across the street if you have a car.  They offer discounted parking for more than 3 days.  I would definitely stay here again.

Fabulous! I could live here for the rest of my life! Grab this place if it is available. It's beautiful, huge, bright, clean, quiet, great A/C, and walking distance to all the main sites. Santa Ana Square is in the middle of everything. Really enjoyed looking out the balcony toward the Square. Lively day and night scene. You will love it .

This is an excellent apartment for anyone who wants to be in the middle of the action in Madrid. The location is perfect!

Ramon and his team communicated very well throughout the arrival process and checking in and out was seamless. Highly recommended!

This apartment and experience couldn't have been better. This was our first time using AirBnB and it was wonderful. We were traveling with our 7 month old son and wanted some space and a good location. This place delivered. The location is fantastic. Walkable to everywhere in Madrid and the plaza below is lovely. Ramon was great to work with and very fast to respond. We would absolutely stay here again!

We really enjoyed our stay here. It is in an excellent location. Walking distance to most sites of central Madrid. Plaza de Santa Ana is a major night spot so be aware that you will hear the city life at night but it did not lessen our experience. The apartment has everything you need including a washing machine which was great because we were travelling with kids.
Ramon meet us outside, showed us everything we needed to know as well he had a booklet of all the local attractions, restaurants and must do's. The place is awesome

Beautiful Airbnb in a fantastic location. We didn't realize how great Plaza Santa Ana was until we got there. The apartment itself is spacious, and it's quite lovely to have the windows overlooking the plaza. Bathrooms were clean, and we appreciated Marco checking us in and providing lots of suggestions for places to go for food, drink, and sight seeing.
neighbourhood excellent.  Second bedroom very ordinary but location made up for it.  This doesn't show in photos.

Sehr gute Lage in sehr schönem Stadtteil Madrids umgeben von vielen Bars. Ausstattung und Zustand entsprechen den Fotos und der Beschreibung! Kommunikation und Schlüsselübergabe lief perfekt und unkompliziert!
Estupendamente!!!

Muy bien por la localizazion del piso.
Comoda la permanencia.
Muy bien localizado.  Es exactamente como lo muestran las fotos.  Todo salio perfecto.

Amazing location!! Everything is within walking distance. A bit noisy since it's a busy area but otherwise no complaints. Ramon is a great host and quick to answer any questions. Would definitely stay here again!
Nice apartment with a very good location.

Ramon was very helpful.
The apartment is lovely - very good value and very clean!
The area is great - right in the heart of Madrid with everything walkable.
Tanto el apartamento como la zona donde esta ubicado son perfectos, si regreso a Madrid no dudaré en repetir.

We were five people, the location was great, the apartment was very comfortable and clean.
It made our vocation great.
Thanks from all of us.

Nuestra estancia fue estupenda, estuvimos muy cómodos y Ramón fué muy atento con nosotros. El piso es muy bonito, limpio y está perfectamente ubicado. La zona es perfecta, está justo en la plaza de Santa Ana.
El apartamento es muy bonito y acogedor y la situación inmejorable. Lo recomiendo. Ramón nos ha facilitado todo lo que le hemos pedido y hemos estado como en casa.

L appartamento e ' bellissimo , arredi nuovi , stile shabby chic , cucina accessoriatissima . I letti sono molto comodi ( nella cameretta però uno dei due cigola ..., ) . La vista dalle grandi finestre è fantastica e la posizione è centrale e comoda a tutto .

Mi familia de 4 nos pasamos 6 días en el apt de Ramón. El local es espacioso, con dos cuartos y dos baños. La seguridad del edificios así como del apt como tal es buenísima. Nos sentimos seguros todo el tiempo. El apt esta muy céntrico, a 4 cuadras del metro parada sol. Millones de restaurantes al rededor! La pasamos divino, gracias Ramón!

Piso con excelente ubicacion. El piso en directo es incluso mejor que en las fotos.Viajamos con niños pequeños (2 años) muy silencioso a pesar de estar en una plaza bastante animada. Fuimos en tren, pero hay parking publico cerca con un descuento. La comunicación con el afintrion muy fluida y con respuesta casi instantánea. Un lugar perfecto para conocer Madrid, incluso con niños pequeños. Repetiremos

Piso super lindo y bien ubicado !!
Todo fue prefecto, a pesar de : un checkout mas temprano que a las 12:00 / y una cucaracha en el salon.

It is a very nice house which located in the center of Madrid. It is very close to the railway station and a lot of clubs and bars. Also, the equipment is perfect as well! In a word, it's a good choice to live here and enjoy our journey.

Ramon is great! Always super responsive. Even before we had booked the place he always answered questions promptly; he remained that way through our stay.
The apartment is also great- space, location and value. I would definitely recommend staying here/come back. Gracias!

Excelente apartamento, tal como sale en las fotos. Baños limpios, piezas bien cuidadas, buena cocina, bastante grande y muy bien cuidado, pero por sobre todas las cosas la ubicación era excelente! Podías acceder a todos lados a pie, restaurantes, lugares de interés, etc. Por otro lado Ramón muy preocupado y con muy buena disposición.
De ser posible volvemos felices.
Everything was great.
Very nice clean apartment in the city center. We can almost go to everywhere by walk. The host is nice too and prepared coffee and tea for us. Thank so much.
很有韵味的老楼，非常好的地点，到所有主要景点都很近，王宫、太阳门广场、prado博物馆等等，都是十几分钟的步行路程。公寓位置很巧妙，客厅刚好可以看到圣安娜广场，景观视线不错。广场地下还有一个停车场。

We were in 7 so a fairly large group but the space was just right! Perfect location looking over plaza santa ana and could walk to all the main sites very easily. Apartment was clean and decor was lovely. Would definitely chose the apartment again! Thanks!
Nice place to walk every spot. The host and his friend Marco respond very fast.

Ótimo apartamento. Próximo a tudo. Tivemos dificuldades pra andar de carro na região do apartamento, pois não é permitida a entrada de carro para não residentes, e isto não nos foi informado previamente, causando grande transtorno. A única possibilidade é usar estacionamento oficial e caríssimo, por 30 Euros a diária.
Há barulho dos bares à noite, mas já sabíamos e não chegou a incomodar tanto. Tudo muito limpo e bem decorado. Utensílios necessários ao dia-a-dia disponíveis. Recomendo, porém desde que não utilize carro.

Gorgeous apartment in a wonderful location. The host was waiting when we got there. Overlooking the plaza it's close the museums, the renfe  station. The neighborhood can be loud at night, but that's because your steps from great food, drinks and entertainment. This is the apartment I'm showing off when I tell my friends about my visit to Spain.
Appartamento molto carino e comodo consiglio a tutti di venirci senza pensarci 2 volte

Ramon was out of town for the weekend so his friend Marco checked us in. He made sure we were all set, gave us some travel advice and of places to eat!
The apartment itself is fantastic, super central in the city, really clean, modern and tidy! Exactly as advertised. One of the best airbnb apartments I have stayed at. Thank you Ramon!
El aparramento es amplio y cómodo ,tiene dos baños así quw que para un grupo grande es muy cómodo

Le aconsejo a todos el apartamento de Ramon. Muy bien situado, hicimos todo de pie, que sean los mas famosos sitios turísticos de Madrid o los lugares de fiesta. El apartamento fue muy limpio y contiene todo el necesario para aprovechar su temporada.

The apartment has everything you need and feels like home.  Location is perfect and we walked everywhere.  We were also able to cook a meal in one night.  Clean and comfortable.  Would stay again.  Thanks Ramon!
As I mentioned, the apartment is located in a perfect spot on a small plaza, close to larger plazas, metro, Renze, museums and plenty of night life.

Santa Ana Square was closer to the main sights than I had expected. We loved the view from the living room. The square was full of life at night until 3-4 am but we had counted with it thanks to previous reviews. The beds in the smaller bedroom are more ideal for kids but the sofa bed was nice in the living room. The apartment is stylish, light and spacious and  well-equipped. We enjoyed being there very much.

One of the best airbnb experiences I've had all over the world!!! The apartment was specious, clean and centrally located with a gorgeous view of Plaza Santa Ana! In walking distance to Plaza Del Sol and flanked on all sides by amazing restaurants and cafes. Catch a Flamenco show right downstairs! For anyone who enjoys an all night lively scene, this listing is ideal! Taxis are easily available on any of the 4 street corners and the building is safe and clean. Carlos greeted us in front of the building, made communication seamless, helped us with our bags, and answered any questions we had about the city. A great host! The water in the bathrooms had great pressure and temperature. Spacious closets and the main bedroom was very comfortable. A very home feel at this gorgeous listing! Thank you so much and we'll be back!
Nice and clean appartment with a great view on Santa Ana Square. Everything was very well organized by Ramon. Would definitely recommend this place.

This was a beautiful apartment, right in the middle of Madrid. Everywhere we wanted to see were walking distance: Prado, royal palace, Reina Sophia, etc. There are tons of great restaurants and groceries near by as well. I highly recommend this place. We look forward to coming back here when ever we are back in Madrid

The apartment is located in the Plaza Santa Ana, which is a lovely square with restaurants, bars, and a very active night life. The neighborhood is very centrally located, and has many supermarkets within walking distance, two nearby subway stops, and interesting places to visit in every direction. Nothing that we wanted to see ever seemed like it was more than a 15-minute walk.
The apartment itself is very nice and was the perfect size for our family of four. It has a great view of the plaza, comfortable couches and beds, and a well-equipped and spacious kitchen. We would definitely like to stay here again the next time we visit Madrid!

Good apartment.
Recommendation

Spacious, comfortable, well-lit and well-equipped apartment located on a lively plaza within minutes of public transit and with easy access to main tourist attractions and shopping areas. Plenty of heat and hot water. Grocery stores nearby if you want to stock up. The plaza can be noisy at night but it's part of the charm.

Die Lage ist am St. Anna Platz super: zentral und trotzdem ruhig, mit Metro (Sol) alles easy erreichbar. Die Wohnung war sauber, check in + check out war unkompliziert (auf sms an Ramon folgt schnell eine Antwort). Im gleichen Gebäude befindet sich Parterre ein Flamenco-Lokal. Wir haben dort einen schönen Abendessen mit tollen Flamencotänzern auf der Bühne verbracht. Auf jeden Fall empfehlenswert. Im Quartier gibt es viele gute und gut besuchte einheimische Ess-Lokale (für Abendessen nicht zu spät ankommen, sonst ist alles bereits voll!). Bei unserem nächsten Besuch werden wir bestimmt erneut bei Ramon buchen.

We had a wonderful stay on Plaza Santa Ana in Madrid. Ramon was very prompt with communication from the start. We were able to check in slightly early which was very helpful. The street noise could be loud which was to be expected given the location, but we slept very well with ear plugs. We appreciated that the apartment was near the Sol subway station. There are also many wonderful restaurants immediately in the area.

We had a fantastic stay in Madrid - the apartment is ideally located for travel, eating, shopping or just people watching.  Everything was as described by Ramon who was a perfect host responding immediately to all my questions. Apartment is spotless and well equipped throughout.  We'll certainly be back and would highly recommend this accommodation.

Wonderful.  Ramon's apartment is just as depicted and described.  The location is perfect, overlooking Plaza Santa Ana, at the heart of Madrid.  The apartment was clean, and well stocked and organized.  There is, of course, some street noise -- but less than one would expect, and certainly not an issue.  (You are staying in the heart of one of the world's great cities, after all.)  Ramon's communication was awesome from start to finish.  In sum, I highly recommend this apartment!
Appartement confortable, très bien situé pour visiter Madrid  à pieds ou par d'autres moyens.Appartement bien équipé.Lieux animé jour et nuit par moment.

Highly recommended. This stay exceeded our expectations in every respect and was by far the best of our entire two-week trip to Spain. The apartment itself is exceptionally large and comfortable and well-furnished. The location high above the Plaza Santa Ana could not be any better for sightseeing. The apartment is exactly as described and the linens, beds, wifi, bathrooms, kitchen, etc. were all very good.
Check-in and pre-arrival communication were perfect. We did not meet Ramon but his friend Marco made us feel very welcome. Extremely professionally run Airbnb.

Muy bien ubicado, muy limpio, muy bien decorado. Tiene todo lo indispensable para cocinar. El único inconveniente es que al ser tan céntrico, se oye ruido de la calle por la noche. Ramón es muy amable y responde enseguida a los mensajes

The apartment was immaculate, check in very easy and Ramon is a very responsive host. Very central location, excellent food and within walking distance of many key locations. Would highly recommend this apartment and would very happily revisit in the future!
Tolle Wohnung, wunderbare Lage! Gerne wieder!
호스트와의 의사소통이 잘되었으며, 숙소의 위치 및 구조가 탁월했습니다. 상당히 만족합니다
Really nice flat at the beautiful Plaza Santa Ana. We were in six and enjoyed our stay in Ramon's apartment very much!
A perfect location, a really well appointed place and an incredibly helpful host. Couldn't have asked for more in Madrid!
This place is located in the very center of the city, so there is no need for transportation unless you don't like walking much. The place was clean and comfy.
Muy buena atención.

This apartment is amazing! Centric location, easy check in, close to 24 hr taxi station and near metro. The place is very spacious and convenient for big groups. I highly recommend it if you want to be near the action. Host responded quickly when I emailed him regarding an AC issue.

Location, location, location... is awesome apartment and the view of the plaza is great! Will definitely stay here again! The second bedroom was a bit tight but once you put the two beds together absolutely not an issue. The living room and kitchen are super spacious. Decoration was simple but tasteful. The master bedroom is very comfortable. If visiting Madrid, stay here and make sure you make reservations and have dinner at Inclan Brutal Bar literally around the corner en Callejon del Gato. Ramon and Marco were super efficient and attentive to every need we had.

What a fantastic apartment! Big, clean, beautiful and comfortable. Great utilities (shower, dishwasher, washer/dryer), awesome view of Santa Ana and super convenient location for both touring around Madrid or simply going out for dinner & drinks. The only caveat is that the flamenco place next door downstairs is quite loud starting at about 11p until about 2am.
Ramon is a very helpful and communicative host!
Highly recommend.
Très bel appartement, très bien situé

We loved this apartment! Location was perfect, right in the heart of Plaza Santa Ana. Walking distance to all major attractions/sites, restaurants, shopping, public transportation. Apartment was beautifully decorated and had great amenities. Nice secure building. Ramon's friend Carlos who met us at the apartment was very nice and helpful. My cousin who lives in Madrid said we found an awesome apartment in a terrific location. We couldn't agree with him more!  I would highly recommend this apartment, and when we come back I'd definitely stay here again.

I did not meet Ramon, but his friend Marco made check in easy.  Place is exactly as shown in photos.  We had no problem with noise from the square, which was full of activity.  Location is very convenient.  I'd definitely stay here again.
Great place. Great apartment. Great communication. Will defiantly stay again.

We loved everything about Ramon's place. We were not able to meet Ramon but his friend Carlos was a great host in his stead. Being in Plaza Santa Ana, it was right smack in the center of activities. The major places we wanted to see were all within 20 mins of walking distance. There was no need to do the hop on-hop off bus tour. Plaza Santa Ana was full of life every night but the noise level was not a problem for us.
Consigliatissmo.- Gentilezza, cortesia, ed appartamento fornito di ogni comfort.

Excellent apartment, very nice, cozy and spacious.  Everything was very clean and in working order.  We had a great time.  Check-in was easy and smooth, we didn't met Ramón, but his friend Carlos was very nice and helpful.  The apartment is located in front of Plaza de Santa Ana, just 3 blocks from Puerta del Sol metro station.  If we return to Madrid, this is definitely a place will consider again.
Thank you for a lovely stay - sorry it was a late check in and thanks for being so patient
Great Location! Walkable distance to all the main spots we wanted to visit. It had everything we needed. Loved hanging out on the balcony and watching Plaza Mayor from above.
Position position position had a lovely stay at Carlos place thank you

This is one of those times that the photos really dont do it justice. Not so secretly wishing that you could give up your day job and be a penniless writer in the 20s? Come live out your dreams. Cheap for the location, excellent amenities  easy check in and extremely responsive host. My only regret is not staying longer.

If we come back to Madrid we would definitely stay here again!  The location was unbeatable, the interior of the apartment with its exposed beams was charming, the washing machine was easy to use and modern and we appreciated the updated bathroom.
Altamente recomendado.
Fantastic place to stay! Amazing location!

Fun, historical, old building. Location is amazing! Beautiful view of Plaza Mayor from a very small balcony (perfect for a morning coffee for two!)
Carlo's was on holiday, but his friend Milena was wonderful and made check in easy and explained everything and provided local information on Madrid.
It is a small place, but location is amazing within waling distance to Museums, Palace, Retiro Park, Gran Via/Fuencarral/Horteleza.
Wonderful place in the heart of Madrid.  The host is wonderful and very accommodating.  Would highly recommend.
Thank you, we enjoyed the stay a lot

Nos atendió Magüi,súper encantadora con mucho detalle y siempre pendiente a todo con instrucciones y cosas claras.
Sobre el apartamento no hay palabras para describirlo es perfecto y una gran oportunidad de disfrutar de plaza mayor de esa forma ya que es única
Place was amazing with a beautiful view, and the host was very helpful and responsive
The property is a perfect for all pilgrims who are bound to visit our Lady of Fatime. Very close to everything.  Highly recommended !
The apartment was in a great location, had all the necessary amenities, host was responsive and had great recommendations. Would stay again.

The apartment is charming! It has an artistic vibe. As soon as we arrive, we all felt inclined to draw or write poems. It has a great location because it is in the heart of Madrid. As soon you step out, you can start experiencing the historic Madrid with its fun restaurants, shops, gourmet market, churches, and plazas.
We had a lovely experience! Thank you!
Tutto come descritto , la posizione è fantastica e l’appartamento aveva tutti i comfort di casa.
Very nice place. It is also very convenient since there are many stores and restaurants nearby.

Staying at Carlos's apartment was great! The location (right on Plaza Mayor) was so convenient and cool – being able to go through a window to the roof of Plaza Mayor and overlook the entire square was so special.
Very responsive to messages, they helped us check-in after our flight was delayed. It was a great stay overall!

Carlos’s apartment was just lovely.
It was amazing to overlook the hustle and bustle of Plaza Mayor at the little pink table and chairs out on the balcony. Yet it was very quiet and peaceful to sleep at night.
The air conditioning gave most welcome respite from the heat outside.
So many bars and restaurants nearby.
We were met by delightful Magui who showed us round the apartment - she was so friendly and welcoming. - thank you!
We’d love to come back and highly recommend this quirky apartment.

Beautiful apartment in a beautiful area. Feels like home from home and has everything you need. Perfect location to explore the city. We loved sitting out watching over the square as the sun set.
We would highly recommend this apartment.
We had such a great time at this lovely flat. So central and convenient as well as being homely with everything you could possibly need.

This flat was extremely cute & exactly as pictured. It was in a great area, very walkable! Lots to do & eat around it. AC in each bedroom & a very spacious shower! I would definitely stay here again. Everything was clean & the hosts were responsive with many recommendations.

It was my dream come true to stay on Plaza Mayor! The balcony is the perfect place to enjoy your coffee in the morning and glass of wine in the evening. The bedrooms are on the side of the apartment away from the plaza and are completely quiet at night. The kitchen had everything we needed to prep dinners. Appreciated the washing machine since we were halfway through our trip and needed to refresh. Powerful shower. Our host left tons of recommendations for local things to do and eat! Thank you so much!

The apartment is in a great location. Very convenient to walk to sights and restaurants. The house is cozy and the beds are comfortable. If you’re tall, be sure to duck your head when you walk around inside. Nice to have an elevator to the 4th floor so we only had to walk up one flight. Even though it’s on a busy plaza it’s quiet inside.
Wonderful place.  Easy access to everything.  The apartment was better than we expected.  Lots of room and overlooking the plaza.  Well worth it

My husband and I stayed for four nights and thoroughly enjoyed our visit. There is only AC in the bedrooms and living room. We never used the kitchen but did use the washer. Easy to use. Being in Plaza Major gives you opportunities to walk to numerous things. We never took a taxi except to bullring. Great place. Greta home to experience the Spanish culture. Would definitely stay again.

Excellent place and location.
The host was very helpful and friendly.
No problems in any front. Excellent stay
Skøn og charmerende lejlighed lige midt i centrum af Madrid. Dejlig tagterrasse med udsigt over Placa Mayor. Vil helt sikkert gerne tilbage 😀
Cool, funky old place. Great place to explore Madrid from.

Vi have en fin weekend i madrid. Alt fungerede fint.  Carlos var meget imødekommende og venlig. Vi fik fra start til slut al den information vi skulle bruge. Super god lejlighed til 2#3 voksne personer, fint indrettet og med en suværen beliggenhed. Lejligheden var ren og havde alt hvad vi skullle bruge over en weekend. Check ind var personlig, det syntes vi godt om. Check ud var også meget nemt. Alt var fint hele vejen igennem. Hvis jeg skulle tage en enkelt ting ud, en ting der skiller sig ud, er det lejlighedens beliggenhed på Plaza Mayor. Næste gang vi vil tage til Madrid vil vi helt sikkert forsøge at leje denne skønne lejlighed igen. En super fin far og søn weekend til fodbold i Madrid. Tak til Carlos for en god service.

A Magui foi quem nos recebeu. Super atenciosa.
O único detalhe sobre a acomodação é que a cama tem conforto médio e é pequena.
Excellent as always. Thanks :)
Great location. All the amenities. Highly recommend.

This is a great place to stay right in the heart of the city. We loved watching the square from the balcony. The host was very responsive arriving in 20 minutes when we had a problem. Would stay again!
Great location and looks just like the pictures. Would use again.
Fantastic place right in the heart of Madrid. Absolutely worth it!
Enjoyed my stay at Carlos’s apartment. Was close to everything!  Magui was very helpful showing me around the apartment and gave local recommendations. We enjoyed our stay. Would recommend to anyone.
A beautiful, charming apartment in the perfect location. Easy to find and great communication.
amazing place to stay. we felt like in heart of Madrid. nice weather to walk.

Had a great experience at this wonderful Airbnb! The location was great and we loved being able to stay in such a historical place. We also appreciated the book filled with restaurant and shop recommendations.

La estancia ha sido perfecta, tal como se describe. Muy cerca de todos los sitios de interes y el sitio ubicado en la calle Mayor perfecto. La vivienda tenia todo lo necesario. Si tengo que poner un solo pero lo haria con el tema de que parece que debido a las alfombras y al sofa la existencia de algun acaro que hizo la estancia de mi mujer un pelin molesta, pero por lo demas todo ok

We loved this quirky, delightful apartment with a rooftop balcony out to plaza mayor.  The home is spacious, comfortable, and full of unique architecture and features.  The hosts were so friendly and helpful.  We would absolutely stay here again.

Ha sido un placer disfrutar de un fin de semana navideño en casa de Carlos. Poder disfrutar de las mejores vistas de la plaza Mayor en un apartamento súper acogedor ha sido una gran suerte y la atención, inmejorable. A destacar el detallazo de permitirnos dejar nuestras maletas más allá de la hora fijada. Muchísimas gracias.
The apartment is in a noisy - but fun - area in the Plaza Mayor. A 15 minute walk away from almost anything you could want to do in Madrid.
Beautiful view.
It was very cute.

This place is beyond cute and in a wonderful location. From here all you need to is basically walk or take the Metro if you wanna go really far (which I loved). The only thing here is that the shower head is very small so if you're used to a lot of water pressure you won't find it here. I don't even think this detail was significant enough to lower a rating but just significant enough to mention. I would definitely stay here again.
Absolutely magic place. Located in one of the most emblematic plazas in Madrid. Yet quiet and peaceful bedrooms. History and convenience combined. Fantastic experience.
Great location! Communication was very good. I would stay here again.
Correcto. Sitio céntrico y bien de precio para como estaba Madrid por Fitur

Magui also gave us good suggestions for cafes and places to go, which gave a great start for our trip.

This place was incredible! Magui was such a flexible and responsive host. The apartment is close to everything and right in the middle of Plaza Mayor.

All of our dealings were with Magui and not Carlos. She was very helpful and friendly. We enjoyed our stay here very much. Unfortunately, it rained much of our stay so couldn’t use the tiny terrace area. It was great to have a washing machine in the kitchen, which was fully stocked. There was a living room, dining room, eat-in kitchen, 2 bedrooms, and bathroom with shower. I could watch the TV in the living room without disturbing my friend in the bedroom. There was an elevator to the 4th floor and you had to climb stairs to the apartment on the 5th floor as mentioned in their advertising. Since the apartment is right on the Plaza Mayor, the taxi can’t drop you off in front of the building but just a short block away at the corner. Magui does supply the directions, be sure to follow them exactly. We walked to and from the Royal Palace which is great. Many places to eat nearby. The Prado and the Renia Sophia museums are a good walk away. Highly recommend staying here.

The apartment was absolutely lovely, very comfortable and homey. We truly enjoyed sipping wine on the balcony while watching the folks below. She gave us perfect directions to tell our taxi driver, so we had no problem finding the place (although I needed to be a bit insistant with the taxi driver, who felt he could let us off anywhere). I truly wish our stay wasn't so short (just 2 nights) because we were so happy with the restaurants she recommended, we wanted to try them all! My next trip to Madrid I will absolutely choose her apartment.
beautiful apartment, in a great location

My wife and I loved this Airbnb! It was in an amazing location with everything close by. The Airbnb itself was comfortable and unique.

This apartment is adorable! It feels very warm (I mean, emotionally; the apartment does have air conditioning!) I think a lot of the style and décor are original, but the bathroom and kitchen are updated and modern. It is right in the center of the old part of town and easily walkable to many interesting sites, restaurants, and markets. Despite being right on Madrid's major plaza (in fact, the apartment buildings served as the bounds of the market), we found the apartment to be very quiet, especially   the bedrooms.

Raul is very good communicator to support us, he responds all the questions and also helped to solve the check in issue we faced. The place is perfect and bed rooms are on the other side of plaza then they are quiet. In general it is good.
Wonderful, thank you!

One of the cleanest & coziest places I’ve stayed.   Beds are very comfortable and the apartment is very quiet at night.. we had no issue with outside noise even though the apartment is located on the plaza.   Raul responds quickly to any questions. We our coffee on the balcony every morning.. loved that!  Highly recommend this charming bnb!

Wonderful apartment with space to gather, and also space to have quiet time. A beautiful view from off the main living space, and well appointed apartment. We loved staying at Raul’s beautiful apartment in Madrid. The place was extremely quaint and traditional but with a modern bathroom and plenty of space. Very clean home and very well located./ great place to stay very centralized and close to many must see parks, monuments, and museums.

100% Recomendable, muy céntrica y la casa es esta perfecta, muy limpia y muy bien decorada te sientes como en casa. El trato con Ramón perfecto, nos responde muy rápido a cualquier duda que nos a surgido. Sin duda volvere

Ottimo posizione, appartamento curato e nuovo. Abbiamo avuto un piccolo problema con la caldaia che è stato risolto in maniera tempestiva ed efficiente, Consigliatissimo.

posizione superlativa se volete stare in centro. a cinque secondi da plaza major con vicinissime due linee di metro e molte delle attrazioni principali della città.

se la collocazione é il must, per noi évstato molto spiacevole la rumorosità dell'appartamento (non dall'esterno, ma rumori interni dalla caldaia molto rumorosa ma anche da tubature, impianto di areazione ecc che creavano sempre un rumore di sottofondo molto forte nell'appartamento che chiaramente nel silenzio della notte diventava ancora più fastidioso).
altra nota negativa per il nostro appartamento che era al primo piano e sotto ha un ristorante, era il costante odore di "cucina " che si sentiva.
per il resto, come detto, la posizione é super strategica, l'appartamento é abbastanza curato, il bagno molto bello e spazioso (il letto matrimoniale forse un pó troppo piccolo, o forse in Spagna utilizzano misure diverse da quelle italiane).

L’appartement est situé juste en face de l’accès à la Plaza major . Il ne peut pas être mieux situé ! Nous avons tout fait à pied : lé palais royal et la cathédrale sont à 10min à pied par exemple, lé musée de la reine Sofia à 20 min etc...
Notre appartement était Propre , fonctionnel et très agréable . La salle de bain était propre et la cuisine est assez grande et bien équipée ( cafetière, four, lave vaisselle, frigo) . L'appartement est équipé d'une télé connectée et du wifi.
Le linge de lit , les serviettes et un kit de nettoyage sont fournis ce qui plutôt très agréable pour un court séjour?
L'entrée est sécurisée et le check in est automatisé. En cas de soucis, vous pouvez communiquer par whatsapp et les réponses sont immédiates . Je recommande sans hésiter !
Je recommande aussi le service de transfert proposé entre l’appartement et l’aéroport 24h/24 ( environ 35€ lé trajet pour 4 avec 4 bagages ) !!!
Je recommande sans aucune hésitation et nous choisirons sans aucun doute Luis pour un prochain séjour à Madrid !

The apartment is in a great location, lots of restaurants and supermarkets nearby. Walking distance to several tourist spots like the plaza Mayor, Mercado San Miguel, la Gran via. The apartment is very cozy and nicely renovated on the inside. Washer and dryer included was a nice addition. The only issue we had was during the self-checkin but the host responded back in less than 2 minutes and resolved it immediately.

Lo mejor del lugar de Luis es la ubicación, cerca a todos los puntos de interés del centro de Madrid y en un edificio renovado que está muy bien. El acceso, el check-in y la comunicación con Luis son un plus, el proceso de ingreso es muy sencillo y el apartamento cómodo, con elevador y todo lo que se necesita para una estancia placentera. La cama y el sofá cama muy cómodos. Un lugar que sin duda volvería a buscar en una próxima visita a Madrid.

Everything was great - location was awesome as it was in the centre of Madrid. Plaza Mayor is literally within 30 secs of walking. It was clean and everything was as described in the posting. I'd stay here again if I visit Madrid again.

Great place with all the amenities and perfect location. Couldnt have asked for a better place to stay in Madrid.

Our experience was PERFECT. Check in was so easy and smooth and I’d leave a 6/5 for location if I could. We didn’t need to take a car or scooter anywhere. Everything was walking distance away and the views from the bedroom and the main area are to die for. When I go back to Madrid I will certainly be choosing this Airbnb again.

A clean and cozy apartment in the heart of Madrid. We stayed there a few days and it was marvelous. The place is nicely renovated and very comfortable. It has all the amenities needed (full kitchen equipment, washer, A/C, we got towels, sheets, soap and conditioner, etc.). The place is literally across the street from Plaza Mayor. It is a walking distance from most of Madrid's historical sites and museums.
We enjoyed the place immensely and will recommend it wholeheartedly.
Uli
Excellent location!

Este Airbnb es parte de un edificio de varios apartamentos renovados administrados por el mismo grupo. En el que nos quedamos era espacioso para 4 personas y contaba con aire acondicionado tanto en la sala como en la habitación. Talvez si faltó contar con sal, pimienta y aceite de oliva. Por otro lado, la ubicación en sí es inmejorable y ya solo por eso cumple en relación precio calidad.
Repetiría.

Fantastic apartment right in the middle

The apartment itself is perfect for a short stay and ideal for a couple. It’s particularly impressive considering the reasonable price. I would absolutely recommend staying here and the air con was certainly a life saver!
Excelente apartamento y ubicación, muy lindo y limpio, seguro regresaré a hospedarme de nuevo

The place that we stayed at was different than the pictures on the listing. However, the setup was the same and it had all of the amenities. The best things about Luis’ place is the central location, working A/C (it was wonderful during the 100 deg heat wave!), and the cleanliness.

excelente ubicación,comunicación, limpieza y comodidad.

Perfect location.  The apartment is right in the heart of Madrid , but very quiet. Check in was so easy, great communication. Madrid is marvelous!
Such an amazing location - apartment was clean and full of light. We loved our stay
Luis’ appartement is located at the best possible spot to visit Madrid. Everything is on walking distance, tourist attractions as well as restaurants.
Nuestra estancia fue estupenda, la atención de Luis fue oportuna y amable, gracias por todo, sin duda repetimos este lugar.

Beautiful little apartment central to everything and right across from The Plaza Mayor. Little things like enough toilet paper and bin liners were provided. We enjoyed our stay and would recommend to anyone wanting to visit Madrid to stay here. Wendy
Excelente ubicación,todo genial
El apartamento es muy cómodo y la ubicación es excelente!
Third time here, always a pleasure. The appartement is very nice, the communication is top notch, and the price very affordable. Thank you!
Excelente estancia con todas las facilidades y una ubicación perfecta. Muy recomendado.

Super indico o local. Nota 1000.
Fomos muito bem atendidos, imprevistos aconteceram e eles prontamente nos auxiliaram. A localização é mto boa. O apartamento estava super limpo, cheiroso, tem tudo o que diz no anúncio, bem decorado. Deu tdo certo. Qdo voltarmos a Madri certamente iremos tentar o mesmo local.
Great location. Clean. A little noisy from inside the building. Very little street noise. Good value.
Enjoyed this place! Very clean and at the center of the city. Will be back!

Nous avons passé un magnifique séjour dans l’appartement! Il est idéalement situé se trouvant à moins de 10min à pied de plusieurs lieux historiques, juste derrière la plaza Mayor et à 3min de la Puerta del Sol.
L’arrivée et la sortie sont autonomes mais il est très facile d’obtenir les clés et la communication est très fluide avec l’équipe d’Aspasios par mail ou messages.
L’appartement en lui-même (nous avons eu la chance qu’il soit au 5ème étage) était très lumineux et très bien insonorisé côté rue grâce aux doubles vitrages. Tout le nécessaire était présent et la déco super sympa. On s’y sent vraiment bien!
Nous reviendrons avec plaisir lors de notre prochain séjour à Madrid!!

Top! L’appartement est super bien situé.
Propre, et confortable.
En revanche la rue peut parfois être bruyante, puisque c’est une rue vivante.
Très arrangeant pour les bagages que nous avons pu déposer avant l’heure d’arrivée afin de nous balader. Super communication, et très disponible !

De passage à Madrid pour un long week-end en famille, nous avons séjourné chez ASPASIOS. L’emplacement est top, tout près du métro, de la Plaza Mayor, de la chocolaterie San Gines, même le Palais Royal est accessible à pied rapidement.
La contrepartie de cet emplacement central est le bruit la nuit. Nous étions au premier étage au dessus de la porte d’entrée, je pense que c’est mieux à des étages plus élevés.
L’appartement est très bien équipé (électroménager, gel douche et shampoing, kit de nettoyage) et l’arrivée se fait très facilement avec le check-in automatique.
La communication avant le séjour était très bien, mais une fois sur place pas toujours optimale.
Le transfer proposé depuis l’aéroport est de très bonne qualité.

A lovely apartment in the center of Madrid.  Clean, renovated and equipped with everything you need for cooking and living.  The problem is it is located on the first floor and there was noise from the street.  But it should probably pay for an apartment on a central street

In general, we were happy about the place. Location wouldn't be better. Apartment was clean and secure as well. Kitchen was full of appliances. Luis was responsive to all our questions.
Only negative issue was the bad smell coming out of bathroom.
We couldn't leave our luggages for extra couple of hours in the apartment as check out time was 11 am. There was no reception available to take care.
I would recommend the place.

We really enjoyed this stay - the apartment was big enough for 4 people. Location cannot be beat. Some street noise, if you're sensitive - but delightful if you're not. Just a perfect place to land in Madrid.

Perfectly clean. Your own little flat. I was impressed by details like hooks in the bathroom, an iron, a whizzer in the kitchen. I was initially a bit disappointed as it wasn’t the flat in the photos and it felt a bit bare at first but we came to love it. Position is perfect, right next to Plaza Mayor, the best chocolate and churros in town, the market hall, the palace. We walked everywhere. Double glazing is very effective against noise from busy street. We were there in November of course. Highly recommended. Excellent value.
Tudo excelente.
The apartment is in an excellent location. Plenty of great shops and restaurants, walking distance of Sol Metro station, convenient taxi rank just outside along Calle Mayor.

Appartement super bien situé, très confortable et bien équipé en plein centre de Madrid, très facile d'accès, tout est faisable à pied. Il y a de très bons restaurants et bars juste à côté, ainsi que des supermarchés. Nous étions 3 adultes et sommes restés du jeudi à dimanche, nous recommandons fortement.

Luis place was very comfortable, clean, with all amenities. Great location, easy access to any attractions, bars, shops, metro stations (5 to 10 minute walk). One thing against is that the apartment it's in front of a main street which is very loud at late night. Luis was very responsive and check in/check out process was very easy. I recommend his place.

The apartment is at very strategic and perfect location which is close to many restaurants and cafes (there is a cool fusion food market/bar nearby called San Miguel, in a very nice building), close to groceries, close proximity within Sol metro station about 3 to 4mins walk from the exit so it’s super convenient, and just right opposite plaza and many shopping outlets!! Can’t be better, we just love it.
The apartment on the inside was very cosy, spacious and we felt like home. We had everything we needed. Luis was very accommodating and we were allowed to check in early at 12 because the apartment was ready, no cost at all! Checking in was contactless and easy!! No problem at all!! Thank you so much Luis.
If anyone is travelling within a few days it’s good to get a single metro card for 10 trips which is allowed to use by multiple pax. Just have to scan your card a few times for eg, if you are with 2pax so just use similar card to scan 2 times for a single trip and it’s cheaper!!
Fantastic stay in a great location! Very clean and well maintained apartment thank you Luis!

Loved the apartment! Super clean, right next to Plaza Mayor and all the other beautiful attractions. Nice furniture, has everything you need for a stay in Madrid!
However, the Wi-Fi in our room got disconnected all the time and had to wait for water boiler to use shower. And you can hear noise from the other apartment and outside.
Anyway, would definitely recommend

Bell'appartamento in una zona perfetta per raggiungere tutti i luoghi di interesse. 나라 5개 숙소 9개 이용한 것 중에 위치 면에서 가격 면에서 전부 제일 좋았습니다. 다만 볼게 없는 마드리였다는게 아쉬운정도... 자동체크인도 신기하고 숙소 깔끔하고 난방 잘 되고 정말 좋습니다! 나중에 온다면 꼭 다시 이용하고 싶네요!!

La descripción es lo q es (Yo no leí bien)
Pero las fotos te muestran 2 apartamentos diferentes y eso confunde.
La realidad es q es un lugar para 1 pareja y si tienen niños los puedas poner en el sofá cama.
NO es para 4 adultos, porque aunque puedas acostar a 4 personas, NO hay espacio para maletas, no hay espacio en el baño, no hay espacio para guardar, en fin para 4 Adultos, NO ES CÓMODO.
Acepto mi responsabilidad al no leer bien y haberme guiado por las fotos.
Más si creo importante en el anuncio, solo pongan las fotos del que es.

Appartement identique à la description , très propre, le meilleur emplacement qu’on puisse espérer au cœur de Madrid .Le seul point négatif c’est l’heure  d’accès à l’appartement que je trouve tardive( 16h  ) , avec l’inexistence de service de conciergerie ce qui nous a contraint à chercher une consigne et payer presque 100 euros pour l’arrivée et le départ .

Excelente anfitrión. Incluso nos consiguió el transporte que requerimos al aeropuerto.  El lugar excelente. Cercano a Plaza Mayor, mercado de San Miguel, Chocolaterias, restaurante Casa El Botin.  volvería al mismo lugar sin duda

Ramon's place was in a central location, located in Plaza de Santa Ana, close to a lot of restaurants and within walking distance to many attractions, grocery store, and cafes. Javi, the person that helped settle us in to the apartment, was very thorough in showing us how things worked in the apartment and shared local tips.
Ramon's place had an amazing view of Plaza de Santa Ana and was surprisingly quiet for being in the midst of it all. Muchas gracias for sharing your beautiful space with us, Ramon. We truly had a great time.
This is a perfect location, great check in communication, apartment was great, clean and comfortable.

Great location. Very comfortable and clean apartment with beautiful furniture.
Great host. Absolutely recommendable.

Un lugar bello. Muy bien ubicado frente a la plaza Santa Ana rodeado de restaurantes y bares
Muy bien equipado, decorado con muy buen gusto y confortable
Sin lugar a dudas un lugar a elegir para quedarse a disfrutar de Madrid. Muchas gracias por tu hospitalidad Ramón!

We absolutely loved the location and the apartment was perfect for the four of us!! I would highly recommend the place if you’re traveling with a family of 4 or 5. The space might be a bit tight for a bigger group. After spending 4 days in Madrid we feel that Plaza Santa Ana is possibly the best location you can stay in - there are lots of shops and restaurants within walking distance and it’s close to lots of attractions and points of interests. We definitely want to stay at the same place next time we’re in Madrid.
Wonderful place! We were able to walk anywhere and there are many shops and restaurants within a few blocks from us. The apartment had everything we needed.
Awesome place to stay with a sweet interior and great location.

Ramon's apartment on the Plaza Santa Ana is a great location.  It is very centrally located and we were able to walk to everything we wanted to see.  The five of us had more than enough room in the apartment and loved staying there rather than a hotel.  Gonzalo, who let us into the apartment, was extremely helpful.  He advised us which grocery store had the best prices and gave us excellent recommendations for restaurants.  We hope to return to Madrid and, if we do, we'll stay in the same place again!
Estuvimos alojados mi familia y yo, inmejorable sin duda y volveremos a repetir estancia. Excelente a todos los niveles

If you are looking for a place with space, this is your place.  Two full Bedrooms and bathrooms, a kitchen, dinning and living area.  It has a great view of the Plaza d Santa Ana from the balcony where every morning you can watch the  city come alive.   It is clean  and comfortable.

Lovely apartment right off St Ana plaza! Perfect or families and groups!
Friendly warm welcome from Gonzalo

Location could not be beat.Cose to everything and Plaza Santa Ana had several nice restaurants to grab a bite to eat or drinks. The apartment was as pictured and the communication and attentiveness were excellent. They arranged for transfer service to and from the airport and when we had some trouble with the internet, it was fixed promptly.
Todo en perfecto estado. Repetiremos sin duda.
Very nice and clean place. As a family, We really enjoy.

Perfect location, nice flat, easy check-in and check-out. Thank you for the recommendations for the places to eat. A small bad thing - 1 room has a window to the staircase so you here your neighbors coming back late at night :) But anyway - highly recommended!

Terrific location overlooking Plaza Santa Ana. A very nice, clean apartment for a family of 4. At times it was a little noisy - trash trucks - but it was only a minor disturbance. I would book it again in a heartbeat!
Sitio genial. Muy limpio y buen trato.

Great location, beautiful apartment. Bring your own toiletries as non provided.
Would stay here again

Ramon’s place was spotlessly clean , in a very central location , numerous bars and restaurants right there . Rooftop lounge at Melia hotel was fantastic, pricey but you pay for the view.
Only thing to think about is the noise level we were there on a weekend and the apt looks right out at Plaza Santa Ana, it was pretty noisy all night , then when the bar goers retired , the people who clean and deliver supplies begin. So if you are a light sleeper think about it. On the other hand to be able to watch all the goings on in the plaza was fun, and we were there for a full moon which was amazing.
Wonderful Piso.  Great Location. Ramon was very responsive and helpful prior and during our stay

Appartement très bien situé avec un parking à côté (env. 30€ la nuit) et pleins de sympathiques et typiques restaurants/bars/boutiques.
Hôte très réactif et disponible.
Une chambre n'a pas de fenêtres mais des "saut-de-loup" par contre elle a l'avantage d'être au calme au contraire de la chambre principale qui donne sur la rue animée toute la nuit durant le weekend en tout cas.
Une machine à laver le linge est à disposition et gratuitement ce qui nous a été très utile pour laver nos affaires après une Spartan....
Merci.

The  Apartment exceeded our expectations. it was in a perfect location overlooking the Santa Ana plaza which meant we could walk to  the sites , restaurants and the grocery stores. An elevator was great for the luggage.  The apartment was updated and very clean and the new windows made the apartment quiet as the square got busy at night. Ramone was a great host and met us upon arrival.  We would rent this apartment again. !

Ramon’s apartment was absolutely beautiful! The view into Plaza Santa Ana is spectacular. I would caution potential visitors to read over the late check in fees, we unfortunately had to pay €30 extra for being late due to traffic. Overall, it was a great place, and I would definitely stay again! Gracias!

Lovely big appartment tastfully decorated on a perfect location with nice view over the square.
Just be aware that the second bedroom is smaller and has 2 single beds separated by a nightstand.
As mentioned before, sometimes it can be a bit noisy but this is to be expected when you stay right in the middle of the lively city center. This wasn't a problem for us (earplugs ;-) )

The location of the apartment is the best part. Very central, about 10-15 min walk from major sights and just a few min walk from Sol metro that is one of the main Metro stations. You can certainly get to the apt from the airport without having to use a taxi. There is also a small grocery store just a short walk away. We arrived on a Saturday so there was some noise from the Plaza below so just be prepared. Sunday night and a weeknight were much quieter, though.
We had a group of 5 adults and the apt was just the right size for our group (I think it would be a bit tighter if there were more adults). The lift was useful. One of the showers has two clotheslines so that was useful for doing a wash since we packed lightly. Apt was clean and as pictured. Ramon was a responsive host and understanding when I mixed up my check-in time and arrived later than planned. Overall, we had a good stay.

Apesar de equipado, acabamos comprando taças de vinho e deixamos no apartamento pois não tinha. O anfitrião respondeu sempre que precisamos. Voltaríamos a hospedar com certeza!
Apartamento muy céntrico, amplio y luminoso. Muy recomendable.

Good location close to Atocha train station (20min walk, 6min cab), Prado museum (14min walk), the royal palace (15min walk), and Plaza del Sol (shopping, 7min walk). From puerta de Atocha, I recommend to take a cab for 6 euros. We walked with our luggage, not realizing it was an uphill climb along Calle de Atocha.
The apartment is clean, cozy and spacious with good control of the heat which was needed in March. Good Wifi. Two bathrooms was helpful for our group of 5 although it is hard to ventilate bathrooms in these old buildings. The beds are not the comfiest. Elevator was useful for getting luggage up and down.
Plenty of restaurants, shops, convenience stores and supermarkets in the area. We had all our meals in and around Plaza de St Ana, and there is a swing in the square which kids love to use. You can have a coffee or tapas at a table there while keeping an eye on your kids playing on the swing.
Our main problem was the party goers in the square, making noise or requiring emergency services until 2-4am. We did not sleep well the three nights we were there. Perhaps with ear plugs it could have been bearable.

That was my third stay in Kristians Apartment for work apointments.
The apartment is always clean and tidy. Also the location is perfect for the city.
Thank you for the geat time here.

Best ever place to explore Madrid from! Super central flat - we just walked everywhere in minutes - Sol, the La Latina area, Museums, shopping, bars and restaurants etc. Huge thanks to Kristian for making this totally hassle-free and for recommending best local places to explore and hang out in the evening.
There was absolutely everything in the flat,like home; clean and tidy, perfect. Will defo stay again!

Kristian was a great host. Communication before arrival was easy and understandable and the key hand-over was perfectly organized. Kristian even offered to show me around Madrid the same day. The apartment was nice and clean and well equipped. Moreover it was located very centrally - so even for a short stay perfect to have a look around the city center. If it would have been possible, I would definitely have staid more than one night. I can highly recommend this place.
Thank you Kristian!
Muy buena experiencia. El piso estaba en muy buenas condiciones y limpio. Kristian fue muy amable. Repetiré sin duda.

A fantastic place! The apartment is superbly located, well fitted out and very comfortable. We only had the opportunity to spend one night there, but we wished we could have stayed longer!

Kristian was very welcoming and communication before our stay was excellent. He provided some travel tips a couple of days before we arrived to help us navigate from the airport to his apartment - very helpful!

I would recommend this apartment to anyone who wants a great place to stay in Madrid.
Apartment was as advertised located in a nice area of town
It was a pleasure staying at Kristians. The place was nice and he was very flexible regarding checkin time. I'd be happy to stay there again.

kristian è stato disponibile, gentile e ha fatto di tutto per rendere piacevole il nostro soggiorno. ha risposto positivamente alle nostre esigenze. la posizione dell'appartamento è ottima e consente di visitare gran parte dei luoghi di interesse a piedi.

Kristian was a life saver! We changed our accommodations last minute and Kristian was very helpful and understanding of my unhappiness at our previous reservation. We only spent 1 night but wished we were in town longer. We were given a map and relevant information about the surrounding areas and places of interest. Monuments and museums were all in walking distance. Apartment was clean, comfortable, and is even better than pictures. Apartment was close to everything including restaurants, bars, ice cream shops (for the kids), and plenty of reasonably priced souvenir shops. Burger King, KFC, and McDonalds were close by and 2 Metro stations in walking distance. The apartment has a good sized refrigerator for our family of 5 and the kitchen, bathroom, AC and WiFi were fully functional. We had to do laundry and found all the necessities needed for this venture in the apartment. We absolutely loved Kristian's apartment and would recommend it to anyone and everyone, especially with school aged kids like us!
I had a great time . Our host were very informative and helpful. They answered quickly when we needed help. The location was the best part surround by many things to do!!

Prima Wohnung im vierten Stock eines Altbaus, nahe dem zentralen "Sol" gelegen. Die Einrichtung ist neu, modern und schick. Es gibt zwei Schlafzimmer (einmal Doppelbett, einmal Etagenbett) und ein Schlafsofa im Wohnzimmer.
Wir waren als fünfköpfige Familie - mehr Personen sollten es nicht sein...

Really welcoming, has everything for a baby.
The owner described us the places to go, really nice.
The flat was clean and really well placed.

L'appartement est tout à fait correct et conforme au descriptif. Il est spacieux et propre. Le gros plus : son emplacement à quelques pas de la place Mayor et du marché San Miguel.
Si nous n'avons pas rencontré Kristian, la communication a été très fluide avec ce denier et nous avons parfaitement bien été accueillis par ses amis, très à l'écoute de nos besoins et disponibles.

Kristian is an amazing host. I run my own business and he helped me out with talking to the customs office to sort it out. He also let us store our stuff for a bit after we checked out. Awesome! Muchas gracias Kristian and take care!

Perfect location, close to absolutely everything. Well equipped  flat, the single beds will do fine for most ppl, unless you have back problems.  could be more comfortable. Ramon was very helpful. Great time.
Ubicación estupenda si quieres visitar el centro.

Great apartment in a great location.  The apartment has a well-stocked kitchen if you want to cook for yourself.  Bedrooms were comfortable with extra blankets.  Note that as of April 2022, there was a washing machine in the kitchen and a dishwasher.  Our family felt secure in the building, and it would be impossible to beat the location—great food right out the door.  The subway is a 5 min walk.  The neighborhood felt safe, and we had no problems.  While big cities in Spain are always noisy at night, it was not excessive even on a holiday weekend.  The apartment sleeps four very comfortably.  There is excellent water pressure in the shower, and the hot water works great.  One shower has easy access, and the other is harder to step into.  Our family would stay here again.

Un lugar céntrico, amplio a 5 minutos de Sol. Perfecto para 6 personas y cuenta con dos baños.  Muchas facilidad para comer y encontrar todo lo que necesites. Abajo hay un lugar de flamenco espectacular! Recomendamos este apartamento definitivamente volveremos :)!
Great location and comfortable / cute apartment

Prachtig appartement aan het geweldige St Ana plein. Alle voorzieningen aanwezig en conform de foto's. Aan het plein meer dan genoeg restaurantjes, waar je heerlijke tapas kunt eten. Gezellige drukte elke dag. Van het plein nauwelijks geluidsoverlast. Wel van het straatje met een barretje aansluitend aan het appartement. Daar kwam waarschijnlijk veel jeugd samen, die tot in de vroege uurtjes feest bleven vieren. Ramen open op de slaapkamer was daardoor geen optie. Verder een prachtig oud pand op een uitstekende ligging. Alles te voet bereikbaar.

Lage für Stadtbesichtigung ist topp, auf der Plaza St. Ana ist ordentlich etwas los!
Wohnung für 4 Personen super, gerne wieder!

Très bon séjour chez Ramon, appartement très bien placé, propre. Ramon est arrangeant pour les départs et arrivées. Appartement dans un immeuble ancien  : petite chambre un peu bruyante car donne sur la cage d’escalier.

Location was overlooking Plaza de Santa Ana convenient to several good restaurants and grocery store nearby. We took the Metro from the airport and then walked 20 minutes downhill to ATOCHA train station. The beds were very comfortable. We enjoyed opening the windows and sitting overlooking the plaza when in the room. Communication was good.
El apartamento es bastante grande, cómodo y tiene una ubicación inmejorable. Repetiremos sin duda.

Ramon's place was in such a great location. It was our first time in Madrid and we were in the middle of all the action. There is no lack of food options, the metro is super close, and there are so many sights within a couple minutes walk. Ramon was super communicative. We were met by Rafa who showed us how to get in the building, where to find all that was needed, and gave us some great recommendations for restaurants. The AC was so nice as well. Would definitely stay again! Thanks so much Ramon!
Excellent emplacement. Facile d’accès ( boîtier automatique si arrivée tardive).Appartement conforme au descriptif, très spacieux et très propre. Climatisation dans chaque pièce.

We loved this apartment. This was our first stop in Europe for this trip. The space is clean and just as pictured. Location couldn’t be better. Everything we wanted to do was easily in walking distance and the spot above the plaza was ideal for popping out for a bite or a drink. Despite the view over the plaza we didn’t find it to be loud. Only problem for us was that we didn’t get our check-in information before leaving LA despite asking for it twice. Ditto at London layover which made for a stressful flight as we landed very late after delays and many extra hours en route.  Once Airbnb was contacted it was cleared up asap (much appreciated). Assuming this is not the norm,  would recommend this rental.
A great stay in Madrid, no complaints!

Ramon’s apartment is very conveniently located just off Plaza Santa Ana, a charming square in the heart of old Madrid. we had a wonderful stay there and would definitely come back again! The apartment was clean and very comfortably accommodated our family of 4. The easy access to all the sightseeing around Sol and Plaza Mayor, as well as being close to excellent restaurants (especially the tapas places on Calle Huerta a few minutes from the apartment) made for a very pleasant stay in Madrid!
Beautiful apartment, amazing zone

Great location and value, plenty of places to eat, groceries, nightlife and everything within walking distance, great place and just like you see it on the pictures! Ramon was always very responsive and the check in was very smooth, the place has extras like hair dryer, iron, moka pot , etc. we would stay here again 👍🏻
Super Lage für Stadtbesichtigung, Ausgang und Shopping. Ich kann die Unterkunft bestens empfehlen.
Excelente ubicación, un lugar muy limpio, y comunicación 100%
great location, very comfortable for 2 couples and 1 child.   host was v responsive .  everything within walking distance

Highly recommended!  Fabulous location, with a great view of Plaza Santa Ana, and the sun rising over the theatre in the morning.  The flat was very clean, spacious, and comfortable.  Ramon responded to messages very promptly, and Lili met us at the front door and showed us everything necessary in the apartment.  Easy parking under the plaza, and also easy to pull the car over across from the flat to unload/load luggage.  Thank you Ramon!
Highly recommended - very central , clean and super responsive host

A wonderful apartment looking over the square!
Great cleanliness and communication was fab.
Easy key pick up as given clear direction.
Central location with easy access to everything
All in all fantastic would love to come again!
Excelente ubicación, el piso muy bonito y amplio, totalmente recomendable, estuvimos en encantados!!!
Lejligheden ligger dejlig centralt og er gammel og charmerende. Der var en muggen lugt fra badeværelserne og man skal selv købe brusebadssæbe, shampoo og supplere med toiletpapir.
alojamiento espacioso, con una buena ubicación, aunque la zona un poco ruidosa debido al ambiente, la estancia a sido correcta.

El departamento de Ramón tiene una ubicación súper cómoda, a corta distancia caminando de muchos atractivos de la ciudad. Más allá de esto, no puedo no mencionar que nos desilusionó que los muebles y la decoración del departamento no coincidían con lo que muestran en las fotos publicadas. Y no me refiero a un detalle, sino prácticamente todo. Y esto es algo que yo personalmente evalúo antes de alquilar un departamento. Más allá de esto, el balance es positivo.
Very good location

The location is great! Close to everything you'd want to go do - we walked everywhere. Public transportation near by and easy to access as well. The Airbnb was clean, and Ramon always quick to reply back with any questions. Would recommend this to anyone!

Prachtige lokatie
Super appartement
Geweldig👌

This is a great apartment.  Everything you need in the kitchen, comfortable and spacious.  We managed to walk everywhere really easily, even with two children.  The restaurants in the square were really nice, supermarkets nearby and easy to walk to the train station and metro.  We stayed just over a week and the apartment is quiet but on Saturday and Sunday nights it was quite lively outside until quite late.
Location was great and centrally located to everything.  The host was excellent very communicative.
Klasse Appartement in toller Lage. Alle Angaben stimmen. Leider nachts etwas laut, aber bei geschlossenen Fenstern ist es ok. Würde es jederzeit wieder buchen.

This apartment was well suited for anyone who loves the hustle and bustle of urban life. though there was a lot of social activity in the square  it was lovely most times to hear human voices rising like a chorus yet absent most times of vehicular traffic.  we liked the old world style of the building and apartment...and imagined that the likes of Ernest Hemingway and Jean Paul Sartre may have lived there! Ramon always responded to our emails promptly but we never actually met Ramon. Other people let us into the apartment  and had other interactions with us. many airbnbs prepare a list of things to do restaurants to go to etc.....so we were disappointed that Ramon had no recommendations or any information prepared for his guests.

The apartment is located in a historical lovely building, very clean, a nice size for 4 people. We really enjoyed our stay, I would strongly recommend it. It's at a great & central location which can be a little noisy on the week-end.

A really amazing spot to explore Madrid. Everything is within walking distance, including metro stations. The apartment is fantastic, very spacious and a great view of the Plaza de Santa Ana. The coffee machine was a real treat!
Great place to stay
Planning a return visit in the future

Ramon was extremely responsive.  The location is great, a very nice view of the Plaza.  We wanted to see a Flamenco performance and it turns out there’s a very good one right next door.  Highly recommend the apartment and Flamenco!
This apartment was perfect for my husband and me and our twin 17 year old daughters. Great location to walk to everything with fabulous restaurants right outside the door. We had a great trip.
Excelente ubicación y muy buena comunicación

Appartamento ottimo per 4 persone, spazioso, arioso, con 2 bagni. Posizione strategica per visitare la città, sia a piedi che con la metropolitana (stazione Sol). Ideale anche per chi vuole divertirsi la sera, pieno di locali per mangiare e bere.   Da tenere presente che è un pò rumoroso nelle ore notturne, ma con le finestre chiuse accettabile. Grande disponibilità dell'host per  risolvere i problemi. grazie Ramon
un área muy agradable se nos permitió usar todo todo se podía usar muy limpio la abuela limpió muy bien muchas gracias siempre me pondré en contacto con usted en cualquier caso

Ramon’s AirBnB was clean, comfortable, and fit the description. It was easy to get there transportation wise and Ramon have all the information we needed to check-in with plenty of time time in advance. There was an elevator which made going up the stairs super easy. Lovely time, wish we could have stayed longer.

If you are looking for a place that is literally where everything is happening this is the place for you.  Lots of amazing restaurants with al fresco dinning right outside your door and shopping close by.  You can buy groceries down the street.  If you have a car the parking garage is in the plaza also.  It’s a great location!!!
Fantastisk lejlighed, med en helt utrolig beliggenhed.

We hebben genoten van het fijne appartement. Mooie locatie op gezellig plein. Goede communicatie over en weer met eigenaar. Tip: Neem oordopjes mee voor de nacht i.v.m levendig plein tot in de late uurtjes.
Great location and clean place!
Center location, restaurants, clubs right outside of the apartment.
Excellent location, pleasant place in heart of Madrid. Nice host, apartment clean and well equipped. Highly recommend.

If you are looking for a Madrid city experience, this is the place. Located on popular Plaza de Santa Ana, this apartment overlooks city life. Lots of activity day and night, most of the sounds of the city are blocked by double pane windows and shutters. However, some of the building neighbors are up late and can be heard in the apartment.
Ramon and Jacob were very helpful getting us settled in and provided everything we needed. The apartment was large and easily accommodated two couples. The kitchen was well equipped with china, silverware, cookware and nearly new appliances. Look for the "special" coffee mug - it gave all of us a good laugh.
Overall a very nice apartment with a great host in a great location.
Nuestra estancia ha sido inmejorable, repetiremos!!
Great location

This was a great place for the four of us to explore Madrid. Located in a great area that is easily walkable to many spots as well as catching the metro to places further out. You get to stay in a building that is older so thin walls but gives you an experience of city living.

The location is excellent.
The apartment was ok. Smaller than expected.
The air conditioner was making a loud noise every 10 minutes during the night. Wouldn’t figure out what it was.
Overall ok experience in a great location

This place has the best location!! The plaza is right there. Filled with life, restaurants and cafes. And the apartment wasn’t noisy which I found surprising. It’s very specious, and the beds are comfy. The air conditioners work so good too! Our stay there was very nice. I do have to say is a bit tricky to find the place though.. Maybe because we don’t live in Madrid. Also you have to fist find the keys in a lock box but is very close to the apartment. Like one block or so. Ramon was responsive and polite. It’s a beautiful apartment, if you want a place very close to everything then this is it. 🥰
Perfect Location for a City Trip to Madrid!

La ubicación es increíble, el piso tiene la opción de abrir las ventanas hacia la plaza de Santa Ana e integrarse con la ciudad o de cerrarlas por completo y aislarse en silencio con aire acondicionado, además de estar a solo unos pasos de la gran vía. Acceso por elevador o escaleras y buena iluminación y ventilación.
Très bel environnement facile à trouver et tout est à proximité. Le logement est très bien.
Had a great time in Madrid.  The apartment was in a great location.

Beautiful place in probably the best location in Madrid! Excellent restaurants just steps from the front door! Multiple very well functioning AC units to escape the hot August Madrid heat. Walk to everything. Thank you for a great stay.

Beautiful comfortable apartment. In the middle of the old town with lots to do and see. The host was wonderful. Allowed early check-in, was helpful in answering questions, very responsive. Definitely recommend!

Amazing stay for our family of four in a fantastic location. The air conditioner was appreciated as it was incredibly hot in Madrid during our trip. The apartment was beautiful and quiet, with plenty to do in the area. Ramon was a friendly and responsive host. Would absolutely recommend!

שהינו בדירה פחות מ-24 שעות, בהמתנה לטיסה.
בכל מקרה התקשורת הניקיון והמיקום היו מצויינים

La ubicación de este apartamento es increíble literalmente está cerca de todo: Restaurantes increíbles, tiendas de conveniencia, áreas comerciales y lugares turísticos. Definitivamente nuestra familia tuvo una estadía genial. Ramón es un excelente anfitrión siempre estuvo pendiente y las instrucciones fueron claras. Recomendamos este apartamento a cualquiera que quiera pasar un tiempo genial en Madrid.

The apartment is situated in plaza Santa Ana, a great meeting place,surrounded by restaurants and bars.Puerta del Sol is a short walk away..
The apartment is comfortable,kitchen well appointed,beds are of good quality.The entrance,lift and apartment were well attended and clean.
All in all a great place to stay.
Ramon has a very nice and clean space and was extremely responsive and kind. The location was amazing!
El apartamento es amplio y muy limpios. La ubicación es lo mejor, cerca de todo lo que visitar en Madrid!
Great place and host!

The place is quite confusing to find at first. Really read the check-in instructions carefully. The lockbox for keys are not on the same building. The actual apartment building is at the end of the block which has the #15 on the address BUT there’s another building that’s also #15 a few steps before the right one. We went to the wrong one first and had a bad encounter with one of the residents. Lol
There’s also 4 keys to get to the apartment. 3 regular keys and a key fob for the elevator. Which means it’s a challenge to figure it all out at first but that also means it’s super secure.
