It’s like solving a mystery at first. I will recommend to the owner to put numbers on the keys as to which order it should be used. The biggest confusion for me was that on the floor where the apartment is, there is an unmarked door that leads to 3 apartments.
Super clean and spacious. Super responsive owner/property manager.
great location

Very responsive host.
Great location for visiting Madrid - we walked everywhere.
Santa Ana Plaza can be noisy through the night- if you are a sensitive sleeper- but great for eating out and atmosphere.
Very comfortable beds.
Amazing stay, very responsive. Will be booking again!

The flat is in a great location, lots to do nearby and good area for restaurants and bars.
One downside is the master bedroom can be a bit noisy when trying to sleep as the street can be noisy until the early hours of the morning.
The flat also could use a fresh coat of paint as it’s obviously been a number of years since the pictures were taken but overall it was fine.
Lovely place with great views of the busy square. Lots of restaurants, Great location and highly recommend.

Ramon was very responsive and accommodating. The building is charming, and the location is excellent - walk to the Prado Museum, Puerto del Sol, Plaza Mayor. Plaza de Santa Ana is lively with many restaurants in the square and nearby. We had a great stay.

Ramon war gut erreichbar und hat uns schnell mit den nötigen Informationen versorgt.
Die Wohnung bietet alles was man braucht, auch wenn sie etwas anders möbliert ist, als auf den Bildern erkennbar. Einige Kleinigkeiten könnten mal aufpoliert werden. Alles in allem haben wir uns wohl gefühlt.
Die Lage ist perfekt um von dort aus die ganze Stadt zu erkunden. Nachts ist es etwas laut, da die Wohnung direkt an einer viel belebten Plaza liegt. Uns hat das nicht gestört, aber wenn man seine Kids dabei hat, ist es vllt. nicht ideal.
Danke für den schönen Aufenthalt!

Gracias por todo Ramon, la ubicación de apartamento es muy céntrica y logramos llegan sin problema con late check in. recomendaría tener algunos insumos como cafe instantáneo para una rápida llegada. el check out es estricto en hora, pero se entiende por la limpieza de lugar. No dudo en recomendarlo para estancias más largas de una noche. el elevador es un plus cuando llevas maletas. graias por todo!
Great location!

Lugar excelente para fazer tudo a pe no centro de madrid, em frente a Praca de SantaAna que e muito agradável com facilidade de taxis,bolt, e metro quando se precisa deslocar. Habitação ampla e confortável

The apartment is very charming and an excellent central location overlooking the bustling Santa Ana Plaza, which is full of outdoor restaurants and tapas cafes. It's also very close to Plaza de Sol, a central market square, and all the central monuments.
The downside to that is the noise. Even with closed windows and shutters, revelers from the nearby all-night bars could be heard, especially from the main bedroom which faces the square. It didn't affect the sleep of the heavy sleepers in our family, but did bother the lighter sleepers. Also, the apartment was well equipped with dishes and such, but had no staples at all (i.e. no salt and pepper or any spices). There was a washing machine but no dryer. Overall we had a lovely visit.
Gran descubrimiento, volveré seguro !!

Great location, nice flat overall. Just some minor things I didn’t like, such as the floor having small holes/gaps in it, being squeeky, the beds were not really comfortable en there was a window in the bedroom, connecting with the staircase, which let in a lot of light while sleeping. There was no way to block the light.
Other than that, it was a nice place to stay.
Wonderful spot and host was excellent. Lots of places to eat and enjoy! We will be booking again in the future

In viaggio con amici, ci siamo trovati molto bene!
È stato possibile fare il check-in la sera tardi in totale autonomia, Ramon è sempre stato disponibile a fornire tutte le info richieste!
Walkable. Good location. Spacious apartment.

クリスマスシーズンだったので少し騒がしかったですが、レストランや観光地へのアクセスがとてもいい場所なので仕方ないと思います。
部屋がとても暖かかったです。
Ramonさんがいつもメッセージにすぐに返事をしてくれたので助かりました。
Great location and place was as described.

Excellent location and a great place. Has everything you’re looking for to be centrally located. Ramon was very responsive regarding my questions. Clean home and walkable to all main spots. Would recommend.

Great place, very comfortable for our family of 5, comfortable and big sofa cama, kitchen with many appliances, two bathrooms (great!), etc… Many restaurants close by and very lively neighborhood. Close to Puerta del sol and Plaza Mayor. Everything walking distance.
房子算是我这几天最喜欢的一套房子了，市中心，楼下就是的士站。房东态度很好，内部很温馨
Alojamiento muy central y comodo

Excelente ubicación! De fácil acceso a todos los puntos importantes de Madrid. El departamento es tal cual las fotos, estaba todo impecable. La comunicación con Ramón fue muy buena.  Sin duda, volvería.
Nous avons passé un très bon séjour

The apartment was very clean and spacious. It was well located being in the heart of Madrid and easy walking to all the sights. We visited in January so it was not too busy or noisy, but I imagine it could get very busy and noisy in summer. The kitchen had everything we needed including cooking pans etc but we didn’t use them as there were so many restaurants and cafes and nearby. There was a dishwasher and washing machine. The furniture was comfortable. The beds and pillows were firm, which we liked, but others might prefer softer pillows and mattresses. The two bathrooms were clean with one having a separate shower which was useful as one of our party fell on day one and couldn’t use the shower in the bath. Overall we enjoyed our stay and would happily return again.

Genial , de inicio a fin
Buscaría peros,,, pero no encontraría ninguno
Great stay. Great communication. Centrally located. The apartment is very comfortable and nice. Loved it. Would definitely stay here again.

Ich hätte mir bei Ankunft Shampoo gewünscht. So mussten wir sofort extra los und einkaufen. Es waren alle Reinigungsmittel sowie Waschmittel vorhanden. Leider gab es keine Tabs für die Spülmaschine. Das ist auch eine Kleinigkeit und hätte den Aufenthalt für uns deutlich angenehmer gestaltet.
Excellent apartment in a great location
Great flat in great location. Great for families! Would definitely go back there.

Superbe emplacement. Appartement spacieux et propre. Je recommande.
Quelques améliorations cependant :
- chambre qui manque d’insonorisation, on entend l’extérieur
- pas de boîte à clé indépendante à l’entrée, c’est la femme de ménage qui nous a accueilli et, en demandant à arriver plus tôt (1h avant), il faut lui donner un pourboire
- pas de service bagagerie comme indiqué sur l’annonce
I only stay one night, Love the location.  The view to Plaza Santa Ana was priceless.
L'emplacement est idéal, l'accueil parfait. Mais nous n'avions pas réalisé que la fenêtre de la petite chambre donnait sur la cage d'escalier.
algún problema con wifi. ubicación excelente, muy cómodo

Comunicazioni con l’host solo per messaggio, mai visto. Istruzioni per il check in e out precise e chiare. Il quinto letto era il divano nel salone, letto da fare con le lenzuola in armadio.
Posizione fantastica per girare tutto a piedi.
Mi aspettavo un po’ di accoglienza, almeno una bottiglia di acqua, bagnoschiuma sotto il lavello della cucina…!
Great location!  Walkable to everything.
Acomodação perfeita em localização, limpeza, charme, conforto! Ótimo custo-beneficio; super indico e agradeço ao nosso anfitrião Ramón.

Valentina, Ramon’s representative, was very nice and helpful with check in. A bath towel and hand towel were provided for everyone. My only suggestion in that regard would be to provide a washcloth for each person also.
The location is perfect. Just a short walk from Puerta del Sol. There are plenty of restaurants to choose from also with many different and fun things to see and do.
Ramon was a wonderful host and we had a fantastic time at the flat, would recommend to everyone!

This place was a nice find, the airbnb is in a great location. The host let us check-in a bit early and was very communicative. The small downside was there were some bugs in the bathroom the morning after we showered, could just be some bugs due to humidity in the bathroom, but it wasn’t a huge concern. I would recommend this place for a family or a group of 4 friends .
Muito bom,recomendo
Me gustó el hospedaje estaba súper ubicado, con muchas opciones para comer, viaje con mi bebé y tmb con la cuna nos la pasamos bien. Tiene elevador y todo limpio
This apartment is in the perfect place, straight outside is a square with many restaurants and bars. The apartment was exactly as described, would definitely recommend this place to anyone.

What an absolute gem of an apartment. The space is bright and beautiful. The view of the plaza is so nice and a reminder of being in lovely Madrid. The space was perfect for our needs and the host was extremely responsive. I wish we could have stayed longer.

Appartement très bien situé, tout est faisable à pied, hôte réactif et appartement très propre et conforme à l'annonce. A deux minutes à pied de la Puerta del Sol. Attention, l'appartement est situé dans une rue très animée de la ville si vous aimez le calme, l'isolation sonore n'est pas optimale.

I stayed at Kristians apartment with three friends in August 2015 and wow did we have a good time. When we arrived, Kristian was waiting wirh a big smile and sat us down to give us some of his favorite restaurant recommendations in the neighborhood (each one was on point) in addition to some of the main attractions to go to. The apartment was very clean and beautifully furnished, nice ac and he was kind enough to have coffee and tea available for us to make ourselves. The apartment was in a very central location that had a great balcony view and the double padlocked doors made us feel very safe. If we come back to Madrid, would definitely stay with Kristian again!

Kristian's apartment was beautiful and was located close to all the main attractions. He welcomed us himself and recommended some amazing places to visit in Madrid. I would love to visit Madrid again and stay at his apartments.
Great place. Very clean and spacious. Kristian was very helpful

Great communication from Kristian all the way. The apartment absolutely suited our needs, spacious, bright and a fantastic location with no need to take public transport during our short stay. Everything was provided and check in went very smoothly, we really enjoyed our stay in Madrid and would recommend Kristian's apartment to anyone.
Very good location! Kristian was really helpfull and flexible. Will come back!
Booked Kristian's place again. Great experience.
Amazing apartment in the heart of Madrid! Comfortable! Don't doubt it!

Kristian and his girlfriend were great. Helped us to organise a very last minute booking and were very accommodating with maps and early check-ins! also very fast to respond to queries. The place was lovely and right on the doorstep of Madrid historic centre. Would recommend 100%

Didn't get to meet Kristian but we were welcomed by Annie.  She made us feel very comfortable and was so very helpful.  The apartment was ridiculously close to everything including Plaza Mayor.  We traveled with our elderly parents and it was extremely convenient for us to see the sights.  The apartment was nice and good light.  Highly recommend!
Great location to see Madrid, easy check in, and very nice, updated apartment. The bunk beds aren't too comfortable, but the flat is modern and very nice.

Nous avons passé un très agréable weekend dans l'appartement de Kristian qui est bien placé, en centre ville, très comfortable et correspond bien à la description donné sur le site. Kristian est agréable et curtois, il a partagé avec nous quelques idées pour les visites de la ville, que nous avons beaucoup apprécié. Il s'est également montré très flexible pour les horaires d'arrivée et de départ ce qui nous a facilité l'organisation.

Absolutely stunning flat In a brilliant part of Madrid.  Kristian is a fab host and I'll be looking him up to go out for a beer with him next time I'm in Madrid.  Stay here if you can - it's excellent!

Kristian's apartment was in a perfect location to explore Madrid on foot.  We enjoyed a beautiful view from the apartment windows. The apartment itself has a lot of character and everything you need for a nice stay. Kristian was very helpful in providing insights about attractions and communicated very well throughout the process. Thank you Kristian for the great experience!

It is a lovely apartment with everything one needs and full of light!!! Looks exactly like in the pictures, in a very centric location in the historical part of the city. Kristian is very helpful and available to his guests, was very easy for arrival and departure.
Had a great time, highly recommended!!

Wat een geweldig appartement midden in het centrum van Madrid! Heel ruim, zonnig, schoon en gezellig ingericht. Alle bezienswaardigheden zijn wandelend te bereiken en de pleinen vol met terrassen liggen om de hoek. We zijn hartelijk ontvangen en Kristian had goede tips over restaurants. Wanneer we deze geweldige stad nog eens bezoeken, komen we graag terug in het appartement van Kristian.
Great location, immaculately clean, reasonably priced, comfortable and cute. Kristian was attentive, flexible and very helpful. The balconies were fantastic as well. Thanks Kristian!
We were very well welcome in an perfect localisation. Christian gave us his flat to leave our luggages before to leave.

Très bon accueil par Kristian et Anna. Des bons plans donnés.
Appartement très propre correspondant à nos attentes.
Très bien placé.
C'était parfait!
Merci beaucoup
Kristian was a great host. Welcomed us and provided very useful information about Madrid. His place was immaculate and perfectly located for guests to explore Madrid.

This was our first AirBnB experience and we did not know what to expect.  Kristin was very welcoming and visited with us personally as we arrived and on a few occasions when we requested.  The apartment worked out well for our needs.

C'était parfait.
L'appartement est superbement bien placé, du coup tout se fait à pied (Plaza Mayor, Puerta del Sol, Gran via, Plaza de Cibeles, Le palais royal, ...).
Kristian et sa copine sont très très accueillants, très souriants, ils nous ont filé pas mal de bons plans et ils sont bien flexibles dans les horaires.
C'est simple, si nous revenons à Madrid, nous n'hésiterons pas à revenir chez Kristian.

The flat was perfect and really looks like the pictures. Clean and tidy. It is very well located, exactly in the center of Madrid and very close to all we needed : restaurants, hammam, shopping area... Kristian and his girlfriend were very welcoming and flexible. I definitely recommend you to rent this flat if you can.
We had a fantastic time in Madrid, a beautoful city with friendly people and lots to do.

Wonderful location, in the center, close to the Plaza Mayor, the big museums (Prado, Thyssen-Bornemisza, Reina Sofia), the opera…
Everything we visited we could do by foot.
Although in the middle of the center, it is a very quiet apartment.
The apartment is very clean, two separate bedrooms, very well equipped kitchen, very fast internet.
Good help of the host: welcoming, departure and practical information.

Super appartement spacieux pour 6 personnes et tres bien situé : a 2 minutes a pied de la puerta del sol. Kristian est tres sympa, il a pris le temps de discuter avec nous et de nous expliquer les differents endroits a visiter a Madrid. Il nous a aussi fait benéficier d'un checkout tardif etant donné qu'il n'y avait personne apres nous.
Excelente ubicación y equipamiento, cercano a todo, se puede recorrer la ciudad caminando desde ahí. El piso tiene de todo lo necesario, y Kristian nos dio muy buenos datos.

Kristian's place was great accommodation for our stay in Madrid. It was well located and easy walking distance to all the major sights. When we arrived, it was clean and had the basics provided. Kristian's girlfriend checked us in and was helpful with a map and information regarding transportation to the airport. Kristian had timely responses when we asked questions and accommodating with check out. The apartment felt secure and the street was fairly quiet. Would definitely recommend to anyone!

Kristian was really helpful and provided lots of information on how to get to his apartment. He also took lots of time to show us around the apartment, and gave us information on what to do in Madrid. We were really happy with our stay there. I would definitely recommend this apartment.

Kristian's home was amazing and so very convenient. In the heart of Sol, near Plaza Mayor and the very delicious Mercado San Miguel, we couldn't have asked for a better location.
Even better, check in was very easy and Kristian was always available to answer any questions. Our check in times did not align with Kristian but they have a lock box set up which we loved since it gave us wiggle room with customs and traffic. And despite not meeting us personally (which really isn't necessary for us), Kristian sent his girlfriend over later to make sure everything was good and give us some great tips on Madrid, transportation and the great food scene!
The apartment comes with everything you need and if you need something extra like an ironing board, since Kristian and his GF live next door, you'll get it in a jiffy.
The building is lively and the walls are thin but nothing a good pair of earplugs (or a glass of good Spanish Rioja!) can't solve. We would stay here again in a heartbeat. The apartment is true to the photos, extremely clean and so charming.

Excellent location near Puerta del Sol gives easy access from MAD via train while still being a quiet location off the square. Apt is on the 4th floor serviced by a lift.
All amenities on site, great view from the Windows, and separate sleeping spaces for groups. Great value, very clean and close to everything.

I loved Kristian's place. The house is fully equipped and within walking distance of all major sights. Night life is just within your reach as well as main services. Great place to be to see Madrid. Go and enjoy!!!
Kristian provided us a lovely clean apartment that was a short walk from many beautiful sights to see. He also provided a map and marked up all the sights to see which was very useful.

Piso genial,excelentemente situado, ordenado con mucha luz, muy nuevo y con todo lo necesario para una estancia tranquila y cómoda.
Creo que no es necesario buscarle nada malo, todo perfecto.

La estancia en el apartamento de Kristian fue corta pero muy agradable, nos recibió Annie (su novia) y nos explicó lo necesario para la estancia en el apartamento.
Trato muy atento y personal, en la nevera había agua embotellada, podías hacer café y té. Las habitaciones grandes.
El apartamento está situado en el mejor sitio de Madrid para conocer la ciudad a pie, muy cerca de la Plaza Real, de Sol, del mercado de San Miguel, ect...
Sin duda volveremos y recomendaremos el apartamento a nuestras amistades.

Un saludo grande.
Beatriz.

The apartment is very nice and overlooks a quiet square.  It's central, close to Sol and Plaza Santa Ana, where many restaurants and bars are.  Annie helped me check in on the morning of my arrival.  My flight was really early and she let me drop the luggage off first.  The place was very clean and comfortable, as pictured, but overall on the small side.  Perfect for one or two people.  The only issue I had was that wifi kept dropping in and out and required resetting the router.  When I texted Annie she always responded promptly.
Awesome place, super centrally located. She went through a map with us and told us cool places to go which was so nice. We also loved Mercado San Miguel- awesome place
Apartamento muy acogedor,con todas las comodidades y con una localizacion perfecta. Repetiremos seguro!

The pictures accurately describe the apartment, which is nicely renovated, and very conveniently located about two blocks from Puerta del Sol and the same distance from Plaza Mayor. It felt very safe, with a new front door and security lock. We found it clean and well set up. The kitchen had all the basics. Good bathroom. Good heating and air conditioning. The living-room/dining-room is quite generously sized and comfortable. It should be noted that there are about 12 to 15 steps up to the elevator from the street level. Kristian was very welcoming, flexible with schedules and responsive, and he helped us with getting our luggage in and orienting us about the neighborhood. We would definitely recommend this apartment to our friends.
El piso esta muy bien. Bien ubicado. Cerca de todo. Muy recomendable. Repetiremos fijo
Kristian and his girlfriend were extremely nice to us during our stay. The room is very clean and pretty. The location of the apartment is in the city center so it is very convenient!
Very good. See our review for Dec 15

tres bon accueil de Kristian. Tres reactif avant le depart, beaucoup d infos a notre disposition. Tres bel appartement tres bien situe dans le quartier de Sol proche du coeur de Madrid. Les photos sont semblables  a la realite. Gentille attention de Kristian qui avait mis de l eau au frigo pour notre arrivee. Nous avons passe un tres joyeux noel , MERCI

Appartement très bien situé dans le centre de Madrid.
Accueil chaleureux et efficace de Kristian qui a été disponible pour toutes nos questions pendant le séjour.
Très bon séjour en famille (5 avec 3 enfants jeunes adultes) à Madrid, pas besoin de prendre le métro pour se déplacer.
A recommander pour un séjour touristique.

Kristian was very welcoming and helpful. He was able to point out lots of useful addresses nearby. The description of the appartment was very accurate. Our stay was during New Year celebrations, so the whole city was noisy (including the neighbours). The local area was like much of the rest of the centre of Madrid and it was just a short walk to many sites of interests.

Kristian was an excellent host! We had great communication since the beginning and he help us literally in everything we needed! The pictures of the apartment are really accurate and the location is awesome! Really close to plaza mayor (2 min) and puerta del sol (5 min). We had a perfect stay, I definitely recommend this place and if I come back to Madrid I will definitely stay here again!
Thanks for everything Kristian, it was a pleasure!

Kristian is a great host, very gracious and welcoming. The flat was clean and well prepared on our arrival and is as pictured on the website. The kitchen is well equipped. Kristian had lots of suggestions for activities, provided a map and made himself available if we needed anything. I would recommend this apartment to others.
One thing to note: to access the elevator, you must go up a flight of stairs.

Ubicación extraordinaria. La Plaza Santa Ana y sus alrededores te dan muchas opciones para comer, beber algo y relajarte para terminar el día. A pesar de lo concurrido de la zona, sus ventanas opacan el ruido externo.
Cerca puedes encontrarte con Cibeles, Puerta de Alcalá, Gran Vía, Plaza España, Palacio Real, Plaza Mayor, Puerta del Sol. Todo lo puedes recorrer caminando.
Camas y baños cómodos. Si van más de dos personas, genial porque tiene dos baños. Dos cuartos con camamas cómodas. Hay frío, tienes calefacción. Hay calor, tienes aire acondicionado.
El lugar super limpio. Cocina, cuartos, baños y sala de estar. Muy cómodo.
Ramón es un muy buen anfitrión. Está super pendiente de tu llegada y con las explicaciones que da, no hay manera de que no encuentres el sitio.
Honestamente, cuando vuelva a Madrid, no perderé tiempo buscando posibles hospedajes. Llegaré aquí sin dudarlo.

La posizione è perfetta.
A pochi passi da Porta del Sol e dalla Metro.
Ci sono anche molti ristoranti e bar tra cui scegliere e divertirsi.
Sono stati forniti due teli da bagno (di cui uno non proprio pulito) e un asciugamano per le mani per tutti. Il nostro suggerimento sarebbe quello di fornire un telo doccia ed un asciugamano viso per ogni persona.

Wonderful!
Would definitely stay here again! Centrally located , just perfect!
Beautiful apartment!
Highly recommend

Inicialmente tivemos dificuldade na localização do apartamento, mas depois o checkin com a assistente de Ramon funcionou bem. Percebemos em seguida a falta de um item básico (toalha), que não pode ser compartilhado, e solicitamos imediatamente a Ramon. Infelizmente, a resposta só veio horas depois, já tarde da noite , e a toalha só foi entregue no dia seguinte. O manual do apartamento mencionado por Ramon não foi encontrado. Por fim, algumas fotos que mostram os móveis do apartamento são diferentes dos móveis que encontramos, em especial nas salas e nos quartos.
Clean, upscale building in a perfect location to walk thru downtown. The apartment is spacious for 4 people and beds are comfortable. 100% recommended

spacious apartment, central location in a very lively area, which means it can be loud at night, but no problems with earplugs. small room at the back has only a little window facing the staircase. Towels are provided, looked clean despite some old stains. There is no luggage dropoff but very convenient lockers are located at only 3 mins walking from the building.
Ramon and his team made this trip extremely easy and comfortable.
Ramon was a great host. Check in and check out was easy and no hassle.  Communication with Ramon was attentive.  Location was fantastic. Would recommend Ramon’s air bnb.

Wie immer ist die Lage entscheidend, und die Lage der Wohnung ist für touristische Zwecke einfach genial! Alle Sehenswürdigkeiten sind fußläufig erreichbar. Zudem ist die Wohnung sehr geräumig, komfortabel eingerichtet und gemütlich mit vielen stilechten Elementen aus der Bauzeit des Hauses in erster Hälfte des XX. Jahrhunderts. Als ein kleines Manko kann man das Geräuschpegel aus dem Fenster über die ganze Nacht betrachten, aber wenn man die Fenster schließt stört es kaum, schließlich gibt es in jedem Raum eine Klimaanlage.
Also, voll zu empfehlen!
Great stay
Bel appartement très bien situé, bien équipé, propre. Je recommande!

Fantastic apartment, in a great location, set on a lovely Plaza and only two minutes walk to the heart of Madrid. We had a wonderful stay, the apartment had everything we needed. It was very clean and well decorated, the bathrooms were great as was water pressure in the showers, aircon worked perfectly too.
Ramon was very attentive and communicated very well before and during the stay, check in and check out were very easy. Would definitely recommend.

Ramón
Was a great host and great to workout any issues we had during our visit.
He was a fabulous host
Brilliant location, attentive host. Pull out sofa bed also comfortable. NB no food essentials in the kitchen (e.g. oil, salt, coffee etc.) but well equipped otherwise. Would recommend.

Loved this apartment! In the heart of Madrid lots of restaurants nearby as well as nightlife. Beautiful views from windows as well. Ramon was also very responsive as a host. Would definitely recommend!

Recomiendo a todos la casa de Ramón, ya que la ubicación es realmente excelente para moverse a pie por el centro de Madrid, está muy cerca de todo y alrededor hay muchísimos restaurantes.
El único inconveniente es que por la noche hay un poco de ruido siendo cerca de Plaza de Santa Ana pero muy soportable.

ubicación buena, vivienda tal cual lo descrito, la parte negativa  lo poco receptivo del anfitrión le solicitamos poder entrar antes ya que el vuelo de salida era mucho antes de la hora de salida, no se mostró receptivo tampoco a poder dejar las maletas hasta la hora de entrada a las 15 00 solicitando  o un pago de 20 eur o check in a las 15 00. y cuando llegamos avisandolo previamente de que estabamos comiendo e iriamos nos indica que avisemos cuando estuvieramos alli por la app llegamos avisamos pero no daba respuesta teniendo que contactar con airbnb y al llamar nos abrieron rápidamente. También en la habitación de los niños ( camas gemelas) había en el suelo al lado de la mesilla de noche una pastilla azul tirada y el envoltorio de un Ferrero roche.
La ubicación es muy buena, estuvimos muy cómodos, solo hay un detalle que el edificio tiene un olor muy desagradable cuando entras a él, pero ya en el departamento no detectamos ese mal olor

ola Ramon, super logement, très bien situé. Madrid accessible à pied depuis la Place Santa Anna
Nous étions ravis de notre séjour chez vous
si nous devons revenir, avec plaisir s'il est disponible

Great location in an area full of restaurants and overlooking the Plaza Santa Ana. Ramon provided clear entry instructions which was important as I arrived late at night. The apartment itself had plenty of space and was comfortable. Was handy to have a clothes washing machine.
It was a fun place to stay in Madrid. We were able to walk everywhere and there was flamenco right next-door to us.

Place needs some work. Air conditioner in bedroom doesn’t work. Water drips out onto floor all night. Kitchen floor very soft in places. Furniture could use an update. Could have used more towels. Only 1 dishcloth and dish towel. No facecloth.
Location was great!
Es muy cómodo, se siente uno como en Casa; las habitaciones y los espacios son muy amplios
Excelente ubicación, muy tranquilo y con opciones de restaurantes, bonito y cómodo departamento

Localização excelente, espaço amplo.
No entanto, na página da hospedagem dizia poder deixar as bagagens antes do checkin e depois do checkout, e o anfitrião não autorizou. Tivemos que pagar a taxa de 40 euros para deixar em um local.
Além disso, o ar condicionado começou a vazar na segunda noite.
Un piso con distancia caminable a todo el centro. Es tal cual las fotos y Ramón muy diligente y amable.  Recomendado

The apartment is in the heart of the plaza. The views from the windows overlook the square with people walking all around and the beautiful theater in the background. The apartment was large enough for four, and we enjoyed our stay. Will stay again!

3rd floor spacious apartment (with elevator!) within walking distance (<5 mins) to Sol metro. Lovely open plan kitchen/dining/living room space. We were 3 adults and a 5 year old, 2 year old and 5 month old staying for a week so having 2 bathrooms (one with a bath for the kids) was helpful. One adult was on the pull out sofa bed and had no complaints about comfort. We opted to take our own travel cot as there's a charge of 8 euros/night otherwise which is unfortunate. It was nice to have 2 sets of keys as well, meaning we could split up as a group easily. I read some complaints in the reviews about it being a bit noisy, but we didn't find it so bad, a bit rowdy on the Friday and Saturday nights but nothing you wouldn't expect in the city, and didn't keep any of us from our sleep. There were plenty of towels, washing up liquid, and dishwasher tablets. I certainly would stay again.
Hemos estado muy agusto!

Ramon nous a bien guidé et a été un hôte réactif et professionnel.
L’emplacement est idéal pour découvrir Madrid.
Il faut tout de même signaler que l’appartement est assez bruyant. En effet on entend absolument tout ce que se passe dans l’immeuble et les appartements voisins.

Très bon emplacement, d’où on peut tout faire à pied.
Appartement très agréable.
Communication très fluide avec Ramon
这个住处非常好，有电梯，钥匙就在附近的钥匙盒可以拿到。厨房锅碗瓢盆，刀叉勺都有，也有洗衣机，洗碗机。楼下有很多种类餐厅，家乐福小超市，Dia超市等。附近逛街购物非常方便，去太阳门广场不到10分钟。很喜欢这里，下次来还住这里。房东很热情，提供了很多的帮助。
Great apartment and host! Super central and clean!

O apartamento do Ramon estava impecável. Perfeitamente localizado, numa praça em que há muitos restaurantes, bares e entretenimento, com distância pouca de diversos marcos da cidade, recomendo para qualquer pessoa que queira visitar Madrid.

This is the perfect place to stay in Madrid.  I came with friends and would also recommend it for families or couples.  Central to everything.  Food, drinks, site seeing close by.  Absolute best location, right in plaza Santa Ana.  I would not even consider staying anywhere else for my next visit to Madrid.
La communication avec Ramon était très facile. L’appartement est beau et propre et idéalement placé pour visiter Madrid. Nous sommes très contents d’y avoir séjourné.

A little noisy from the street below but that didn't bother us after a tiring day. Great location within walking distance to most interesting sites. Fully equipped apartment for our comfort. Responsive host who was kind enough to allow us to check out a little later. Will not hesitate to recommend.
el piso está en el centro, se puede ir andando a todos los sitios, muy bien comunicado. igualito a las fotos, todo muy limpio, volveríamos sin dudarlo.
The host was incredibly kind, and the house was excellent. This has been an amazing journey! I will definitely recommend this place to any friends visiting. Thank you so much!
Todo perfecto
Great location in the centre of Madrid. Apartment is large with two bathrooms and two bedrooms. Perfect for our family. We would recommend for a comfortable stay and access to the city.
Bel appartement, placé en plein centre, hôte très réactif
Todo perfecto! Hay un feedback rápido con Ramon. El apartamento está genial ubicado y limpio. También hubo flexibilidad con el check out. Lo recomiendo 100%! 😁

Somente temos que agradecer os dias mágicos no seu apartamento. Desculpe por termos esquecido a mochila, mas você resolveu prontamente. Queremos muito voltar ao seu apartamento, foi tudo maravilhoso! Melhor localização, impossível! Que você tenha um 2025 abençoado!

Great location at the middle of old city 10-15 min from all main places.
The apartment locates at the area full of bars, restaurants etc and it should be noisy but the noise is really loud even beyond my expectations; truly speaking all night long. So be aware if you are partygoer it’s 100% for you.
Apartment is clean but definitely needs renovation.
No tea, sugar, water, shampoo.
Generally the only real positive impression is the location only.

Muy buen alojamiento en
Zona céntrica de Madrid! Lo recomiendo 100%
Todo muy cómodo. Gracias!

在马德里老城中心，走路就可以到各大景点，我们基本都是走去景点的，大皇宫，太阳门，普拉多博物馆，地铁都没有坐过。房子有两个房间，四张床，主卧很大带卫生间，客卧有两张单人床，客厅还有一张沙发床，房子有双层隔音隔热，开了暖气很暖和，我们一家四口住的很舒服。由于就在市中心，对面是个广场，周末会有很多人，噪音还是会有，不过对我来说还行，工作日就没什么噪音了。房子是老房子，地板走起来有声音，其他的都很完美，我们很喜欢。
Thankyou very much Ramon.

Todo excelente
Muy buena comunicación
Recomdable

Ramon was a great host. The apartment was just like in the photos. Beds were comfortable. Enjoyed relaxing in living room after days out walking and before eve meal close by. Overlooked Plaza Santa Ana which was great. Plenty of bars and restaurants. Walked to everything we did. Did a walking tour , walked in Retiro Park, enjoyed Plaza Major, Royal Palace, The Prado Museum , Sorolla exhibition, the flea market on Sunday, visiting some churches. A great break. Would enjoy coming to this conveniently located apartment again. 4 of us came in Feb. Thanks very much Ramon! Very responsive host
Wonderful flat, I visited with my mother and aunt and they were both enchanted
Great location, very central and beautidul building. A bit dusty. Not dirty, but room for improvement. Still recommend to stay.
Simplismentebmaravilloso  tudo!!
Super recomendo a estadia pela localização estratégica
Repetiria, solo el checkout me parecio muy pronto
Great location that is within walking distance of many tourist attractions and destinations! Clean and safe space.

This place was fantastic for our family of 4. Well appointed, very clean and spacious. Also located in a very convenient spot, walkable to everything. Lots of great restaurants nearby (we loved Distrito Burgers - kids requested this place twice). It was rainy during our stay, but we were delighted to see there were extra umbrellas for us to use. This is a beautiful unit and we loved working with the hosts. Would not hesitate to stay here again!
Great location. Great space with plenty of room. Close to everything.

Un apartamento muy bueno,limpio y con todos los servicios; la ubicación no puede ser mejor, vas andando a todo el centro de Madrid. Los dormitorios amplios y muy confortables. En general muy recomendable,

Que apartamento maravilhoso!!!! Com vista para uma praça , impecável. Roupa de cama e banho branquinhas, fofas e cheirosas. Tem muitos restaurantes na rua e nos arredores, e fica a 2 quadras da estação Sol do metrô e a 4 quadras da Gran Via. Super bem localizado! O anfitrião é um amor. Ficamos hospedados em março de 2025 e estava 12° graus mas o apartamento tem aquecimento o que nos manteve quentinhos. Apartamento amplo e aconchegante. O anfitrião nos providenciou sabão para a máquina de lavar roupas, papel higiênico e sacos de lixo. Ficamos hospedados em 6 pessoas: 2 idosos, eu e meu esposo e nossos 2 filhos. Meus sogros ficaram em um quarto, eu e meu esposo ficamos na suíte maravilhosa e nossos 2 filhos no sofá cama da sala. Tem elevador. É seguro, confortável, limpo, aconchegante, excelente! Muito obrigada por todo o capricho, atenção e dedicação. Com certeza nós vamos ficar lá novamente e já indicamos para outros amigos ficarem lá. Parabéns, amamos vosso apartamento. Sucesso!
Un lugar perfecto para una familia pequeña muy cerca de la plaza del Sol y de muchos lugares, conectividad con todo en general lo recomiendo me volvería a hospedar.

Lovely spotlessly clean apartment right in the centre of Madrid. Transport links and shops close, as you’d expect, and there are endless restaurant choices on the doorstop. Easy check-in too. Highly recommended.

Great place for our stay in Madrid. Very central and within walking distance of all attractions and places of interest. We truly enjoyed our stay and hope to be back. Also, Ramon was excellent and always responsive and clear. Thank you!!!
Very good

Beautiful apartment in a great location. Most things are within walking distance.
The neighbourhood is full of character and has a lot of bars and tapas. Would stay again!
recommended
Excellent location. 10 to 20 minute walk anywhere we wanted to go in the city.

We very much enjoyed our stay in the Apartment. It was a lovely place and in a great location. Ramon was very helpful and answered any queries very promptly. He was very proactive in keeping us informed.

The place has easy access to the train station and facilitates easy walking of the whole downtown tourist area. There is some noise at night if leaving the windows open, but it is tolerable and that was a known from the beginning. Overall an excellent stay - we would choose this location again if staying in Madrid.
Nice spacious apartment, slightly busy square and windows didn’t eliminate noise but that’s expected central Madrid

4.5-5
The apartment was in a great location. It’s a beautiful building and the apartment does look like the photos. The only downside is that one of the rooms is very small (which we knew) but the wall is also very thin, so at random moments of the night we would hear this loud vibration, every so often, all throughout the night. My husband is a heavy sleeper so it wasn’t too bad, but for me it was a little bit annoying. Other than that, the area is very quiet! The plaza in front is beautiful and we had a great stay.

Die Lage von Ramons Appartement ist perfekt. Es ist nur wenige Gehminuten von vielen Attraktionen und der UBahn Haltestelle Sol entfernt. Ramon war sehr kommunikativ und hat uns rechtzeitig über alles zum Check in informiert. Wir konnten sogar unsere Koffer vor dem Check in Zeitpunkt in der Wohnung abstellen. Die Küche war gut ausgestattet. In den Bädern gab es einen Fön und Duschgel. Handtücher waren ebenfalls ausreichend für uns vier vorhanden. Die Wohnung ist groß und geräumig. Es war sehr sauber. Einziges Manko ist, dass die Klimaanlage nachts ein wenig laut war. Allgemein ist die Wohnung aber in einer ruhigen Gegend gelegen. Insgesamt hatten wir einen wunderbaren Aufenthalt.

This is a lovely apartment right in the heart of the bustling Madrid scene.  The interior features stylish, vintage charm and lots of light alongside modern amenities--notably AC, which is essential for Madrid summers. Ramon was quick to communicate and had someone waiting for us when we arrived to let us in the apartment. We were only there for a night but it would make a great home base for your Madrid adventures.

A great location. A large and well furnished apartment for two couples. A lovely, homely place to relax after a full day of site seeing activities. Shops, restaurants, plazas on the doorstep.
We had a fantastic three days/nights in Madrid.
Lovely flat, stunning location. Check in nice and easy.
Loved Ramon's brilliant apartment - would recommend checking it out. Well-located, well-decorated and close to authentic squares and bars, it's a must!

Ramon's place is in a great location near a lot of restaurants and very close to Sol station, which is a great hub for getting to major train stations and the airport. It was very easy to walk to museums and El Retiro Park without needing to take a bus. The space felt very large with high ceilings and lots of natural light. We loved how it still had the charm of an older apartment (wood floors, original windows, fireplace, etc.) but was updated enough to be comfortable. It was nice having an elevator big enough to get everyone up and down with luggage, and the bathtub was a nice bonus.
Great location in the middle of Madrid with everything right on your doorstep.
Great find! Amazing location. In the middle of everything. Host was great at communicating and the apartment was well appointed and comfortable. Air conditioning worked well. Good value.

Very lovely place in a lively area.  We enjoyed the high ceilings, the location and open living room.  Lite sleepers beware though as there was some sort of loud buzzing noise every so often in the apartment (something Electrical or due to airconditioning?). and the twin beds were a bit hard.   It’s is a great rental space if you are great sleepers!

ヨーロッパらしい美しい落ち着いたアパートで、友人とゆっくり過ごしました。リビングルームが広く、くつろげました。ACもあり、疲れが取れました。窓が素敵。
エレベーターがあって荷物の持ち上げが楽でした。一泊で残念！また来たいです。
Molto centrale e comodo. Ampio appartamento.

Ramon was very responsive and his place was very nice, and comfortable. The only thing we didn't particularly enjoy was the noise outside the apartment, but that is nothing anyone could help. The apartment is in a very central location, which made it very easy to get places, but it also made it very busy late into the night.

Muy buena comodidad, limpieza y ubicación.
El anfitrión Ramon siempre está pendiente de alguna duda, es muy atento
욕실 샤워부스에 배수가 잘안되고 물이 새어나온다. 그리고  에어컨 성능이 약하거나 냉매 부족으로 시원하지가 않다. 또한 방음이 안되어 엽 집 소리가 다들리고 무슨 소리인지 소음이  시끄럽게 들린다
Had a fabulous time in Ramon’s apartment.
El piso de Ramón fue maravilloso, amplio y cómodo, gentilmente accedió a darnos late check out en nuestra estadía, muy recomendable

Overall this stay was very good! There is a large kitchen space and the living room has a pullout couch that can comfortably sleep a person. One bedroom has two single beds and the other bedroom has a queen bed and a master bathroom. The other bathroom is in the hallway. There was laundry and dishwasher as well as other needed appliances. Our only concern was lack of counter space in the bathrooms, including in the showers.
Great location and perfect for our short visit.
The location is fantastic, but the beds in bedroom 2 could be more comfortable. Everything else was great.

Ramon fue muy atento y resolvió dudas prontamente. Se agradece que haya sido flexible con el early check in . Sin embargo, el día de llegada, nos entregaron las llaves 45 min después de la hora oficial, y tardaron en contestar. El lugar estaba limpio y con muy buena ubicación. El sofá cama no es muy cómodo. De los 3 aires, dos no enfriaban propiamente, aunque Ramon se mostró dispuesto en enviar un técnico. Lamentablemente no se encontró la causa del fallo.

Ramon’s apartment is a perfect place to explore Central Madrid. We were two adults and two teenagers and found the place to be spacious, comfortable and very cool in Madrid’s summer. We would definitely stay again.
Was amazing, definitely coming back
muy buena ubicación y aseo en el apartamento

Gracias a Ramón y su apartamento , pudimos pasar una gran noche en Madrid. Justo al frente está Plaza Santa Ana, muy cerca de Sol y Gran Vía, perfecto para cerrar el viaje haciendo compras y comiendo comida española en las diferentes terrazas.
El vuelo ha llegado temprano unas horas antes del check in y Ramón nos permitió dejar el equipaje.
El proceso de llegada autónoma fue muy simple y con instrucciones claras
excelente ubicación, el departamento, cómodo, limpio y muy cómodo lo recomiendo al 100%
很好。
住宿的地方有洗衣机，但没有烘干功能。房子属于老房子了，走路的时候地板会有声音。隔音一般，可以听到隔壁的声音。有一天晚上睡觉的时候，一直能听到像电钻一样的声音，一个晚上都没有休息好。间隔一会就会发出声音。但地理位置还是比较便利的，步行也能去到很多地方。

Lugar muy centrico cerca de estacion de metro a 200 mts, cerca de plaza del sol, plaza mayor y otros lugares no se requiere casi moverese en metro ya que esta todo caminando en centro historico de Madrid , departamento amplio y ameno

Es tal como se señala y muestra en la pagina, nada distinto.
Todo bien

We spent a weekend in January with the five of us in Kristian's appartment. We were kindly welcomed by Kristian's girlfriend, who also gave us some tips for nice places in Madrid.
The appartment is just like the pictures. It was very clean, had comfortable beds, decent shower, just everything we needed, and was easily big enough for five people to move around. Best of all, it was an absolutely perfect location in the centre of the city, it's great to be able to explore the whole city on foot. I would gladly stay again at Kristian's place.

Cristian ha sido un anfitrión excelente, pendiente de todos los detalles para hacer de nuestra estadía en Madrid  una experiencia fabulosa. El apto esta muy bien ubicado, cómodo, limpio y acogedor. No dudaría en volver a este lugar.

By far, the best experience for a first time visitor to Europe. The apartment was perfect with all the amenities you would need. Everything was very clean and linens freshly washed. The location was right in the center of the historic part of Madrid and many famous sites were close to walk to.
Kristian was the best host! He took the time to explain the location of tourist sites and great places to eat. The last night, Kristian took us to a local restaurant and bar to close out the Madrid experience. He has become family and we are so lucky to have met him.
Kristian was great. The apt was nice for 3 people. Would recommend for staying in Madrid.

Kristian was very helpful from the moment I arrived at his apartment in downtown Madrid. He was friendly and welcoming, and showed us on a map many places we might want to check out. The apartment was great, very clean, and had all the essentials and more (soap for dishes, shampoo, clean towels, etc). It is also in a perfect location -- a 2 minute walk from Puerta del Sol which means you get the proximity to a popular area and metro, but on a quiet side street.

Kristian and his girlfriend Annie were also both very accommodating, as they let my friend and I leave most of our luggage at their own apartment for a few days while we went to Málaga, and by chance had another apartment in the same building for us to stay at, last minute, for our last night in town.

I highly recommend them if you want a pleasant stay in Madrid for a good price!

We were made to feel very welcome on arrival. Our host spent time talking us through everything we needed to know (including maps & recommended places to eat). They also provided us with an additional box of toys / games for our 2 young children. The apartment was as described and in good condition. We had a very comfortable stay (4 nights) - the location was also ideal for us as it was really close to the main tourist attractions.
Kristian and Annie were so welcoming and helpful.  We loved their central flat- very warm and comfortable, full of sunshine  (which sums up our whole experience!)  Thank you Kristian.

Kristian ci ha accolto cordialmente, dandoci utili indicazioni sulla città.
La posizione della casa è ottima: centrale ma tranquilla, abbiamo potuto girare la città a piedi. la casa è come descritta, in tre siamo stati bene. La consigliamo.

Hemos pasado unos días espectaculares en Madrid, en gran parte gracias al departamento de Kristian, donde paramos. La ubicación es inmejorable, el departamento es súper cómodo, y tiene absolutamente todo lo necesario: cocina completa, wi-fi, aire acondicionado, baño privado con agua caliente, y sobre todo, una excelente isonorización. La atención de Anis fue excelente, también. No tengo ningún aspecto negativo para comentar. ¡Gracias por todo!
Great location, very comfortable apartment

Check in and check out were handled with ease. Kristian was easy to communicate with and he fixed issues that arose. The apartment was as described and pictured. The back bedroom was somewhat noisy with internal building noises, ie, doors slamming, late night activity in other apartments. The location was very central and close to many attractions of Madrid.
Great experience. Kristian was there waiting upon our arrival and made sure every detail  was taken care of.

Kristian was a perfect host and made sure to meet us promptly. The apt was clean. He told us where to eat and places to see. He was very helpful and friendly. We had a late plane so he let us keep our luggage with him until we were ready to leave. Highly recommend.

Lo mejor fue Kristian! Super simpático y complaciente... En cuanto al piso extremadamente hermoso, pleno centro, y muy limpio... Lo único negativo que puedo agregar es que el ascensor, al ser muy viejo el edificio, a veces funcionaba y aveces no... Volvería sin dudas.
El departamento está bien ubicado y está bien, cumple su función. Lo recomiendo.
Great please, easy to communicate, great value, I highly recommend!

It was a great experience at Kristian's apartment. Very clean, large, well equipped and very well situated. Near to Puerta del sol. You can reach the most places on foot. The apartment was also very quiet. There is a supermarket one street away where you can buy a lot of things to very good prices. I recommend this apartment to everyone who wants to have a great stay in Madrid. Thank you Kristian I hope I can meet you next time. Greetings
El apartamento está muy bien ubicado  central pero en una zona tranquila. También estaba limpio y bien cuidado. Gracias Kristian por todo durante nuestra estancia.

This Airbnb was perfect for our short stay in Madrid. My husband, 2 friends and I stayed here 23-25 May 2016. The location is perfect and easily accessible from the airport (we took a taxi). Restaurants and tourist sites within walking distance. The space is clean and tidy. There is an elevator. We opened the balcony doors each evening for cool air. It was a nice space for 4 adults. Kristian could not be there to greet us, but he sent someone very capable and he messaged us to make sure we were settled. I would recommend this stay!

Hemos tenido una estancia perfecta en  Madrid. Kristian es un anfitrión muy amable y simpático. El apartamento es perfecto, muy limpio , decorado con muy buen gusto y con todo lo necesario. Nos encantó. Seguro volveremos en nuestra próxima visita a Madrid.

Kristian's flat is excellent. Perfectly located bright and neat. He was very kind to help coordinate check in and out allowing us to leave our bags extra time. He provided an overview of the city and some cools tips for food and drinks as well. Definetely recommended!
Ha sido un gran anfitrión,  la descripción del apartamento es exacta y la situación del mismo es inmejorable. Has sido una muy buena experiencia. Gracias Kristian.

Kristian welcomed us as soon as we arrived in Madrid, even though it was hours before check in. He stored our luggage for us and communicated with us thoughout our stay. Whenever we needed help, he was there with advice and kind words.

The apartment was in the best location possible to get around the city. Close to a train and metro stop and tapas galore. We covered so much each day and rested well each night in this quiet but lovely apartment.

Loved every minute!!

Hi I stayed in Kristians apartment for 2 nights, it has a superb location, very central. The apartment was exactly the same as shown in the pictures and Kristian was a very nice host he really helped in getting around Madrid.

Estupendo anfitrión. Tuvimos que llamarlo a la 1:00 de la madrugada porque se nos olvidaron las llaves, y nos lo solucionó rápidamente.
El apartamento está muy bien y en una ubicación inmejorable.
Un placer haber estado ahí.

Kristian was a wonderful host and the apartment was fantastic .... the location superb.  We were a few minutes walk from Plaza Mayor and then to Mercado San Miguel.  We left our car at Madrid Long term parking and took the metro in because parking in Madrid is not only difficult to find but also expensive.  Loved Kristian´s apartment!
Nice place, centrally located.
El departamento de kristian es muy bonito y tiene todo lo necesario. La ubicación es muy buena y kristian como anfitrion realmente es genial. Muy recomendable. Gracias kristian, volveremos!!

Kristian  could not meet us because he was traveling but Laila was friendly and welcoming. The apartment is perfectly outfitted and located, everything was within easy walking distance, and was very comfortable for my family of four.   It was the first time in Madrid for all of us and we loved it!!

Kristian was a great host and the apartment was perfect. He met us at the apartment even though he was just arriving in from France. He checked in on us a couple of times and he gave me a prompt reply when I asked him for some last minute restaurant advice. The apartment is a 5 minute walk to Plaza Mayor and less than 10 to the Sol metro. Tons of restaurants and bars and truly the heart of Madrid.
The beds were comfortable and excellent AC and water pressure. The TV didn't have English channels but this was not a problem for us, he just hooked up an HDMI cable and streamed US channels. I wouldn't hesitate to book the apartment again.
Kristian greeted us, gave us a tour of the apartment and offered some great local tips.  The apartment was spotless, modern and filled with amenities.  The boys really enjoyed the bunk beds!

Fantastic location in heart of Madrid. We were able to walk absolutely everywhere and felt like locals.
The apartment is light and fresh and the air con was great as it was very hot for the few days we were there.
Beds were really comfortable and check in and out were smooth. Kristian even allowed us to leave luggage at his place until it was time to go to the airport in the evening. The kitchen is small with basic equipment. We còoked once, but really prefered to eat out. Highly recommended.

Had an excellent stay in Madrid at Kristian's apartment! The location is perfect for visiting Plaza Mayor, Plaza del Sol and many other tourist areas. The room was clean, well equipped and nicely decorated. Kristian was a friendly host and accommodated our needs. Can't wait to return to Madrid one day!

No podríamos haber encontrado un mejor departamento para visitar el centro de Madrid, combinó una excelente ubicacion con toda la funcionalidad necesaria para mi familia de 4 y con unas excelentes vistas que hicieron mas completa la sensación de estar viviendo en Madrid, gracias Kristian!

This apartment was beautiful and jut as the photos depicted. We had a fantastic, clean, comfortable stay in the heart of Madrid. It is as central as you can get with plenty of things to do within a 5minute walk! The metro station is a few minutes away which gets you to anywhere in Madrid.
Highly recommend staying at Kristian's apartment if you're visiting Madrid.

Onca again, Kristian was phenomenal. This is our second time staying at Kristian's and we had a great experience, the apartment was very comfortable, impeccable, and ideally located.  You are a 7-10 minute walk to the Plaza Mayor and restaurants. We will continue to stay at Kristian's.
Quiet, clean and spacious 2 bedroom flat located conveniently in the city center of Madrid. We had a great stay. Thank you K.

Sadly I didn't get to meet Kristian but my parents raved about how he received them with such kindness even though they arrived very early. He also gave great advice for things to do and was helpful when we couldn't figure out the wash. All in all a great trip!

Kristian was a wonderful host. He communicted with us beforehand and gave us precise directions for the apartment, and once he greeted us he gave us a city map with several recommendations for attractions, restaurants, bars, and full day trips outside of Madrid. The apartment is spacious, has great lighting, and is exactly as described in the pictures and description. The apartment building was two blocks from Calle de las Huertas, which is the place to go for food and drinks. It's right in the center of the city, making a walk to anywhere you'd want to go only at most a 12 minute walk away.  Air conditioning is provided, but there's a great breeze through the large windows and as temperatures dropped at night, we never needed it. There's a metro stop at the end of the street, but taxis are prevalent, so transportation is very easy, either with luggage or without. Kristian lives in the same building, so he was easily available if we had any questions or issues (which we didn't). I would definitely stay here again, and highly recommend you do the same.

The apartment was very comfortable and our family was very satisfied for this apartment.
Location was also good because it's near by sol, mayor plaza and other famous places.
Everything we need was well furnished in this apartment, so we felt very comfortable in our travel in Madrid.
And Kristian was very kind to us and informed us everything we need to know.
We are 7 people(family) and this apartment was suitable for us.
Thank you, Kristian :)
매우 깨끗하고 좋은 시설의 숙소입니다. 이곳은 시내의 중심과 매우 가깝습니다. 버스와 지하철 관광지로부터 매우 좋은 위치입니다. 주인은 친절하고 조용하며 우리의 여행을 적극적으로 도와주었습니다. 마드리드을 여행하시는 분들께 이 숙소를 추천합니다. 최고입니다.

Very well located, very good communication from the start and was exactly what we were looking for, for a one night stay in Madrid.
Next time I return, I would happily try to stay at Kristian's again.
Kristian was a fantastic host.  He met us exactly on the agreed upon time and was quite helpful, especially with the wonderful restaurant suggestions, especially Ginger!

We really appreciated Kristian and his excellent apartment. It is perfectly situated, clean and with great amenities. Kristian, himself was very kind and took time to tell us of the sites and secrets he'd discovered himself. Thank you so much for a very successful stay in Madrid. Good luck in the future.

Kristian house very good position^^
And
Kristian is frendly and fun~!
Very recommended house^^

Kristian nous a accueilli à l'appartement. Il nous a conseillé plusieurs endroits sympathiques et a pris le temps de nous indiquer les lieux à ne pas manquer. Des bouteilles d'eau fraîches nous attendaient à notre arrivée. L'appartement est très confortable, à deux minutes de la Plaza Mayor, 10 minutes du Prado et du Palais Royal à pied. L'appartement est calme et propre. Vous trouverez tout à côté : pharmacies, supermarchés. Nous reviendrons avec plaisir. Un grand merci à Kristian !

Nuestra experiencia aunque corta, ha sido muy gratificante. El apartamento nos ha gustado mucho, de hecho ya lo hemos recomendado a unos familiares que en breve van a ir a Madrid. La ubicación, perfecta pues está muy comunicada, y dispone de medios de transporte públicos muy cercanos. El trato del propietario ha sido excelente. Esperamos volver.

We have had a great time in Madrid. Thanks to Kristian, he was very helpful with tips. He responds to questions very quickly and knows the city very well. The apartment is right downtown and very comfortable and clean. Thanks again Kristian!

Merci à Kristian très sympa et disponible. L'appartement est conformé aux photos et idéalement placé.
Très bon rapport qualité prix.
Great space in a very convenient location. Kristian was an awesome host who made sure we had everything we needed and made sure we knew all the best spots to visit while in Madrid
Flat very well located and very pleasant just a little bit nosy. Kristian is a perfect host. Thanks for all.
Kristian was very hospitable. Was able to assist us in telling us the highlights to see in Madrid. Place was very comfortable clean and cozy. Felt very safe in the neighborhood
A fantastic apartment in a brilliant location, very close to all the centre (about 5mins from Plaza Major).

Kristian was very welcoming. His command of German, English and Spanish was amazing - I guess he knows more languages too. His knowledge of the city was very helpful and saved us lots of time.

The listing was exactly as expected. Lovely apartment with the basic requirements and a few extras. Wi-fi was great.

We are 6 people - the beds were adequate for us, and the sofa bed was the most comfortable we have ever used. We would definitely stay here again the next time we visit Madrid, and will recommend this listing to our friends.

The location was brilliant. We could walk to most of the places we wanted to visit, and for the rest we took the hop on bus tour. The metro system in Madrid is great and this apartment was very close to the main station of Sol, plus other stations near by. There is a supermarket 200 metres away, and even a hardware store very close if you break your reading glasses !!

With plenty of cafes and restaurants nearby, this is a great neighborhood. Now we know Madrid better, we still would come back to the same place as a base.

L'appartamento è in ottima posizione a due passi dal centro e comodo ai servizi pubblici. Kristian è stato molto gentile al check-in fornendoci informazioni precise su come raggiungerlo. L'appartamento è all'interno di un palazzo che ospita altri locali in affitto e di questo conviene tenere conto perché il rischio è di avere vicini rumorosi. Purtroppo la nostra seconda notte è stata alquanto disturbata da vicini che hanno fatto parecchio rumore. L'appartamento corrisponde bene alle foto pubblicate.

Both the host and the apartment were excellent. The apartment is nicely appointed, comfortable, and very well located. Kristian took time to get us oriented to the area and gave us several dining recommendations which we thoroughly enjoyed. He was accommodating in every way, even when we arrived unexpectedly as a party of three instead of two. We would definitely recommend this sunny apartment for a stay in Madrid.

Kristian's apartment was the perfect place for our stay in Madrid. It was clean, well furnished, and exactly as described. Plus Kristian's recommendations on place to see were all outstanding. Great visit.
Nice apartment, everything was clean. Great central location. HD tv channels, wi-fi. AirCon only in lounge. Situated on 4th floor of building, with elevator up. Reccommended for family of 5 like us.

Kristian was a great host from being there on our arrival timetable to giving us information on great places to visit and eat. He made himself available whenever we had questions and went out of his way to make us feel welcomed. his place is right in the middle of almost all the important sites in the capital and it is all within walking distance.

Kristian was not in Madrid but sent us details for parking very close to his apt which was most convenient and outlined how to gain access to the apt. He also advised us of the Low Cost Parking option which proved economical at 10 euros per day. The location is extremely convenient to many of the main attractions of Centro within walking distance. Kristian emailed us to ask if we needed any further info during our stay and included suggestions regarding neighbourhood restaurants and bars.

Kristian's place is absolutely beautiful! He was helpful and had great communication. The house was clean and very comfortable! The location is fantastic as well- just a couple minutes from a few major plazas and great food. We recommend the bath house at round the corner if you have time!

The accommodations are in a great spot.. about 1 block from Plaza Mayor..restaurants, shopping.  Easy to find taxi or bus to places not walkable.  The apartment was well appointment, comfortable and had AC as we were there during excessive temperatures.  It was nice to have coffee and tea provide.  The is a supermarket a block away. Note that there is a short flight of stairs to the lift.

Absolutely beautiful apartment in central location. We only stayed for 1 night but would have loved to stay for much longer. Kristian was extremely helpful before and after we arrived and made sure we had everything we needed. We will definitely come back here again.
It's a great place , great location. Host was helpful and very responsive . My parents loved the city and apartment
房间干净 位置很方便

Our stay in Kristian's place was very smooth. The apartment is in an excellent location, being within walking distance to all the major sites. It was also helpful that the apartment was close to Sol which is a handy metro stop and close to both the Mercado San Miguel for fancy food and a couple of supermarkets for more basic items. The apartment Would be perfect for a family of four. It was a little tight for a family of five. We didn't meet Kristian, but Laila was there to greet us and ensure that we knew where everything was. Overall, staying here was a good experience.

Kristian was an excellent host. We tried a couple of his restaurant recommendations and they were superb. Kristian wasn't able to meet us on arrival but provided excellent instructions and was in email contact with us during our stay.
If you want a central point in Madrid, close to many attractions then this is the place. We will return and have no hesitation in recommending this apartment to others.
We absolutely loves our stay. Perfect location and Kristian was very helpful and gave us recommendations for where to go eat. Highly recommend.

Stayed 2 nights at Kristian's appartment at the end of a month in Spain. Clean,  comfortable and quiet in a great location that's handy to everything. Easy to walk everywhere and plenty of food places nearby. Appartment is bright and airy and very pleasant to come back to after a busy day sightseeing. Would certainly stay here again if we come back.
A great clean, nice, cozy, place. Perfectly situated, at a good walking distance to explore the city. The host was really nice and informative. We will definitely be coming back!
The flat is lovely, very well situated and also very clean! Kristian was very helpful, super quick to reply and Laila who gave us the key was the nicest!  Definitely recommend staying at Kristian's!

Our stay at Kristian was fantastic. The apartment is very well located, clean and comfortable. The one thing we really like about it is that is was very quiet. That by itself is hard to find at a central location in Madrid. Very happy with our stay.
Loved both the apartment and the location. Kristian had made sure all was well prepaired for us, including restaurant  recommendations etc. We had a wonderful stay!

Hosts communication was excellent and proactive. He advised us on clear directions on how to get from the airport to the apartment, and on restaurant recommendations, without us even asking. Beautiful place!!! Would definitely stay there again.

We were met by Laila who was warm and welcoming with big smile and only too happy to carry bags etc: Laila also showed us the facilities and explained about things to do and places to visit. The apartment is in the ideal location for walking the city and having easy Access to buses, taxis and trains . The apartment is secure and on the fifth floor ( with lift) and has a pleasant outlook over the city . It was also very clean and nicely presented . A very good stay for us and good communication with Kristian throughout was excellent . Highly recommended by us : Dean and Annie from Australia.

We were given instructions to access the apartment so did not meet Kristian.  The loft was spacious and comfortable,  providing all we needed for our visit as well as being very close to many historic buildings, parks and squares.  The flat was quiet with perhaps some minor street and neighbour noise but we slept well and were able to enjoy the time we had to explore Madrid.

Location, location, location! Sunny Loft sits in the perfect location with everything so close together and easily reachable within walking distance. There's a square just one block from the apartment building with lots of cafes for a quick chocolate con churros snack or breakfast, restaurants and bars, supermarkets (good for stocking the fridge). Puerta del Sol is within a 10min walk, Plaza Mayor and Mercado de San Miguel, the historic Botin restaurant is just a stone's throw away, you'll be surprised how close they are (maybe within 5 mins)...it an easy walk, you can't complain! La Latina station was another short walk too. We enjoyed a nice Flamenco show at a taberna and a traditional Spanish dinner located along a small alley in front of Mercado de San Miguel and walked back to the flat.
Kristian's loft flat was really comfy, clean, has a small kitchen and bathroom but very efficiently laid out, a nice view from the balcony facing a quiet street at night. Highly recommend!
Logement conforme à la description , emplacement idéal à madrid, pas de bruit dans la rue. A part le petit soucis de clefs à l'arrivée et à la sortie, rien à redire.

We had a great experience! We were welcomed by a friend of Kristian's who took the time to go over everything in the apartment as well as sit with us and show us a map and where to go. The apartment was very centrally located, as well as very clean and comfortable. Kristina sent us some great recommendations for food, which did not disappoint!

Once we overcame the surprise of the rather neglected street appeal of building front and then stairwell, the apartment itself was light and airy. It is not spacious but we had ample room for the three of us. Its equipped with bedding, towels and kitchen equipment and very clean. Its advertised for 6 people but two would have to sleep in the lounge/living area which we felt would make it rather cramped: its doubtful that the hot water supply would last for six showers. The couch is very comfortable. The large terrace doors are a feature as they let in light and air and provide a view over the trees and streets below. They are double glazed, which kept the apartment warm during cooler days.
The location is excellent. This makes the apartment a real winner. Very close to Plaza Sol and even closer to Plaza Mayor, within easy walking distance of many of the galleries, museums, eateries and shopping areas.
Unfortunately we did not get to meet Kristian on either occasion that we stayed at his apartment but he was responsive to messages.

Kristian es un excelente anfitrión, nos dio toda la información necesaria para llegar al apartamento, recomendaciones sobre restaurantes y atracciones cercanas. El apartamento esta muy bien ubicado, muy cerca a todas las atracciones del centro. Es una excelente opción para alojarse en Madrid. Lo único negativo es que los vecinos hacen mucho ruido en la noche, especialmente en fin de semana se incrementa.

Kristian was terrific and communicated with us prior to the trip providing great directions to the apt via metro or taxi.  we met with Laila at check-in who was very sweet and knowledgeable and spent a considerate amount of time orienting us to the neighborhood and local sites.  We used Laila's map and directions throughout the trip.  The location is very central and a short walk to a major metro stop.

A wonderful place to stay in Madrid! The host was friendly and helpful, full of great suggestions. We were right in the center of everything! It was a spacious and clean apartment. I would definitely stay here in the future should I return to Madrid. :)
This place was alright. Good location for accessing resturants. Clean place and the host gave us great recommendations and was easily accessible.
Fantastic location, was able to walk to all major attractions. Great communication before and during stay.

Lugar perfecto para pasar unos días en la capital, sobretodo con niños, más céntrico imposible.
La chica que nos recibió, Laila muy amable.
We had a great time in Madrid. The flat was lovely, functional and in a perfect location. Thanks Kristian.
Très bien situé, avec le "renfe" super rapide depuis le terminal 4 mais pour moi maximum 6 personnes
Great location, very centrally located. All major sites are easily accessible, multiple close metro stops. Host gave great intro tour and was very available if we needed anything!

Kristian's home was a perfect spot for our family's 5-day visit to Madrid.  Our arrival was easy and were met by Kristian's friend. The location was great, with restaurants, shopping, sights, train stations, metro, etc. Everything you need is within walking distance. The loft is as pictured. It's on the 5th floor, with a lift, but great exercise for the kids using the stairs. There was enough room with 2 kids to have space to play and they enjoyed the bunk beds. The living room was spacious and the couch can fit 4 people comfortably. The kitchen is well appointed and functional to cook at home. We enjoyed our stay and recommend Kristian's flat.

We had a lovely 5-night stay at Kristian's place over Christmas. He was busy so his friend Laila checked us in—she didn't speak much English but pointed out all the points of interest on a map, and recommended a few places for food, etc. Kristian followed up with an email right after we checked in with his list of recommendation, which was well appreciated.
We had to walk up a flight of stairs to get to the elevator; since the elevator stops in between floors, we had to walk up another half flight of stairs to get to the apartment. The stairwells were wide, so it wasn't a problem at all, but I'd take note if you need to avoid stairs at all cost.
Our stay was great, and the apartment was as described. There was one double (I'd guess it's Queen) bed in one bedroom, and bunk beds in the second bedroom. The kitchen was well equipped, with all the utensils and tableware we needed. The apartment was only a 3-minute walk from a grocery store, so there's no problem if you wanted to shop and cook yourself.
Overall, a wonderful stay at a great, clean apartment!

I think Kristian believes what he provides is comfortable enough for clients to be satisfied. In this trip we used AirBnb for our stays in Madrid (earlier arrival), Granada, Seville and Ronda. The places we stayed were far better than Kristian's.

I believe Kristian overprices his place. We stayed in a Madrid AirBnb apartment in a better location (closer to Plaza del Sol), a better building (Kristian's building was run down), much nicely furnished and whose rate was better priced.

Two days before we arrived I got a message from Kristian than he would not be able to meet me and my family when he arrived and gave me the contact of the person who was to show us in. He then mentions that under no condition were we to ring any apartment room nor mention his name when we arrived. He reiterates in a second message that we were not to mention his name or look for him when we arrive. This I found very strange. Aren't AirBnb hosts supposed to be up front or not even under suspicion before they are even considered?

We arrived to an apartment being fixed, shower leaked and affected the wall of one room. Imagine our surprised when we walked into the apartment to be met with a worker in the bathroom, and dirt on the floor.. We were not even told about the problem before we arrived yet we were in touch with Kevin on the day of our arrival. His answer to having the problem fixed was that he was responsible to Airbnb to make sure his apartment was what was describe in the profile. I had to remind him that he also had a responsibility to me, his client, to make sure I got a place that I had paid for. I suspect he did not want to cancel my reservations because it would mean less money paid him yet having to fix it up because of a probable new client after our stay.

We checked in December 29 at 2pm. The workers had to return the next day for a "5 minute" painting job for the wall affected. Kristian said it was ok to leave the apartment the next day while the workers came back as he guarantees that he knows them. Who in their right mind would leave the apartment with all your luggages in sight. I do not even know Kristian from Adam. Even yet after mentioning that we were not to mention his name to anyone in the building. The "5 minute" work turned out to be 1 hour and 30 minutes. The workers came at 12 noon and left almost 2pm leaving only half of our planned stay in Madrid to enjoy ourselves. Also, we could not sleep in the wood affected because paint was being dried and the smell and dust aggravated my husbands cough.

I mentioned my disappointment to Kristian and he blames me for not trusting him that he guaranteed his workers.
Central location, very comfortable with conveniences at hand.  Easy to find, super markets close by as well as restaurants.  The flat arrangements very good.

El departamento es muy lindo y limpio, tal como en las fotos. La cocina muy completa. La ubicación es excelente, Está cerca de todo.
Gracias Kristian por todo!! pasamos unos hermosos días.
Very nice place, easy to get to and from. Kristian very easy to communicate with, definitely recommend.
Good apart near many atractions the Madrid ...
Lugar estrateguicamente localizado para recorrer los principales puntos turisticos de Madrid.
Céntrico y cómodo.

We spent a very good time in Madrid and the place we stayed, Kristian's apartment, was perfect for us.
Very well placed in Central Madrid and everything was at hand: restaurants, museums, plazas, supermarkets, shopping centers. No need of public transport.
Very good value for money, accurate informations, flexible late check in, very good advices how to get there and about restaurants.
Thank you very much Kristian and hopefully you will have available this apartment for us next time in Madrid.
George and family

Spacious for 4 person.
Cozy and warm place.
Near the sol square and the other metro station.
地理位置不错，去景点都比较方便
Labai gera vieta , centras.
Right in the center of the city, with easy access to Plaza Mayor.
Departamento cómodo y muy bien ubicado.
Our stay at Kristian's was great! His place is very nice and in a great location. Definitively would recommend a stay there.

Absolute perfect location! Walking distance to great neighborhoods, restaurants, shopping etc. Would definitely recommend staying here. We were six girlfriends staying for 3 nights; space-wise not a problem if you know each other well!. One small thing is that there is not enough warm water for six to shower at the same time, so make sure to split up:) Kristian is very communicative and informative, a great help indeed.
Comunicación rápida y fluida. El piso impecable. Lo ha hecho todo muy fácil.

We had such a great time staying in Kristian's apartment. His friend greeted us and was very nice. She did not speak English but we had two Spanish speakers who could talk to her.
