The apartment was very clean and absolutely adorable! Kristian also left a map that showed all of the nearby sites and museums. The apartment was centrally located so we were able to walk everywhere. The day we checked in Kristian sent a message with some suggestions for lunch and/or dinner. We tried one of the restaurants and it was delicious! The only thing I'd note for people to keep in mind when they stay is that the hot water heater is small so only about 2 people were able to take short showers in a row. Even with that small issue, it was such a great place to stay. I will definitely try to stay here again next time I'm in Madrid.
Such a fabulous location! The apartment had everything we needed for our two night stay. It was very clean and comfortable. We will definitely stay there again next time.
Excelente mi estadía  en lo de Kristian

The apartment was perfect.  Plenty of room for the three of us, and more if needed, three beds and couch is very comfortable.   TV has variety of channels including English.  two supermarkets within 5 minutes walking.   Plaza Mayor just down the corner.  Excellent

Ubicación inmejorable. 2/3 minutos caminando a la Plaza Mayor y 4/5 minutos hasta la Puerta del Sol. Apartamento confortable y limpio. Kristian siempre en contacto y sugiriendo lugares para visitar y donde comer. Muy recomendable.
Magnífica ubicación, el apartamento acogedor, limpio y amplio.
An unbeatable location with great views out over the square below - we loved waking up and opening the doors to the balconies and listening to people milling about below. Really handy. Thank you!

Pasamos genial. El apartamento está muy bien y su ubicación es genial, cerca de lugares que hay que visitar, mucha vida a toda hora, en la noche tiene una plaza muy cerca y muy linda donde se puede pasear y comer rico.

The location of this apartment is outstanding. As a family of 5, we found it difficult to find something in Madrid that could accommodate us. Although it was a tight fit, it was comfortable and suited our needs. Kristian was easy to communicate with and despite a few check in dramas, were very quickly resolved which was excellent. His suggestions for dining etc were impressive and spot on - I highly recommend following his suggestions! We were in Madrid over Easter and the down side was the apartment next door (which Kristian said is normally very quiet) threw parties 3 out of 5 nights and played their loud music all day and night. Kristian tried to resolve the issue which was admirable but there wasn't a lot he could do. He was extremely apologetic and as horrified as we were. For a family with young children, the parties into early hours of the morning impacted our Madrid experience. Other than that, this was a great little apartment in a great location.

This is a great location. Walking distance to the Plaza Mayor and numerous restaurants. Kristian's sunny loft has a great view from the balcony, is very clean and the air conditioner and fans keep the place cool.

Though I didn't have the chance to meet Kristian, my overall experience at his listing was great. The checkin process was carefully coordinated through his friend, and communications was often and helpful. The location of the listing was very central. The listing itself was comfortable, with a good amount of common space, and large enough windows to keep the overall listing well ventilated. I really enjoyed the fact that so many amazing restaurants and shops were within a 5 minute walk!
Try it you will like it
Alojamiento muy bien situado, en el centro mismo de Madrid. A dos pasos de la Puerta del Sol y de los principales atractivos que ofrece la ciudad. Así como de acceso al transporte público.
We loved the place! Clean and good location plenty room... highly recommended:)

Great spacious apartment with the best of locations; close to the hectic Sol square but at the same time the apartment was located on a fairly quiet street. Plus the sealing on the balcony doors were really good, which was really important in order to keep the noise away from the streets. (I've had previous experiences in Spain with really bad sealing in windows and doors)
Apartment was very clean and fresh and had everything you would need from a vacation home. A 5th floor apartment with an elevator, a nice bonus for lazy people.
Muy bien
O apartamento de Kristian está altamente recomendado por mim. Tem uma localização excelente, pertinho de tudo e do metrô. Além de ser um excelente anfitrião, dando suporte imediato

We had a wonderful stay in Madrid at this apartment.It is very well furnished and location is awesome.I would definitely recommend it for stay.
Would want to come again!

このアパートは素晴らしい場所にあります！歩いて3分でマヨール広場やサンミゲル市場にソルにも5分で行けます。プラド美術館、ソヒィア、王宮、街のどこでも歩ける距離です。今までいろんな街を旅しましたがマドリッドが一番レストランの数が多いし面白いし楽しいし毎日がお祭りのようでした、これもKristianのアパートが素晴らしい場所にあったから経験出来ました、本当に楽しい場所にあります。タクシーもアパートの前を沢山走ってます。治安も良いので女性にもおすすめです、夜も静かで良く寝れます、それとアパートには調味料、洗剤、シャンプーなど全てが揃っています。　
困った時の連絡も丁寧でした、皆さんにお勧めしたいアパートです。
Kristianありがとうございました、毎日楽しく暮らせました。
Perfet position in the centre of madrid！The apartment is quite clean and very suitable for family！

Kristian's home was perfect for our family of 5, cozy and comfortable. The neighborhood and surrounding area are perfect for enjoying the real culture in Madrid. Everything we did was nearby and within walking distance. Kristian gave us a few suggestions of things to see and places to eat and they were all wonderful. Thank you for a great visit to Madrid Kristian.
Great location!
Excelente anfitrión
Place was great.  Location was , close to everything.  The woman who cleaned the apartment and let us in was wonderful and very helpful.

Kristian's home was nicely decorated and had good location. Just a bit of a struggle since you still have to take the stairs even with the elevator, but Kristian was honest about that fact. Overall a good stay!

Kristian's flat is in central Madrid in a fantastic location, easily accessible to key venues, metro and great restaurants. The flat is spacious, as described, and surprisingly quiet considering its location in central Madrid. The host, Kristian, was very accessible and helpful. We had a wonderful visit to Madrid and can't wait to return!
Der Apartment ist super. Kristian war immer hilfsbereit.und wir hatten alles in der Wohnung was man braucht für den Aufenhalt in Madrid. Ich kann es  weiter empfehlen !!
Nice and clean apartment- good location

Great flat, great host.
Perfectly located in central Madrid with everything you could need for a lovely stay.
Kristian is a super host - excellent coms from end to end.
Would go back in a heartbeat.
This was a great place to stay in Madrid. Central but not too busy... perfect for my family of 4 (my kids, 7 and 9, loved the bunk beds!) I definitely recommend this place.
I booked the apartment for two collegues who were really happy with it. Thank you!

Kristian's apartment is a lovely and comfortable. He has everything you'll need for a stay of several days. It's in a lively neighbourhood, close to concerts, tourist sites and very accessible by public transit.  He gave very clear instructions on how to get to his place as well as where to find the keys (he was out of town at the time). We would stay here again.

Hemos pasado unos fantásticos días en casa de Kristian.
Muy recomendable. Excelente ubicación, de fácil acceso y a pocas cuadras de la puerta del Sol.
Se accede fácil al aeropuerto y a la mayoría de los sitios de interés.
El apartamento está muy cuidado, limpio y todo tal cual las fotos.
Cuando vuelva a Madrid trataré de volver a hospedarme allí.
La casa muy bien, todo muy agradable y excelente lugar para quedarse en Madrid!

Location is convenient to access all places and the building is a bit old but the apartment is clean and it's perfect for up to 4 ppl.  Just need to take turn for a hot shower.  Kristian is really nice even I don't have chance to meet him but he was very helpful.

Kristian's place is great! It is the perfect "home base" for a couple or small family traveling to Madrid to explore. Check-in was very easy, and although we never met Kristian he was very good and timely when communicating with us. Kristian gives lots of wonderful advice and recommendations for what to do, where to eat and how to get around. Thank you Kristian for a wonderful stay!!
Kristian's place is very easily reachable by public transport & the apartment was in a great location, easily reached either by metro or by walking.
Overall, this place did the job. Location is great but there were too many drunk people at night that slept in the streets through the morning

This is a nice house in a great location.  It's right in he heart of the city with parking garages, restaurants, shops, tourist attractions, and more close by.  My family enjoyed the stay and will probably book with Kristian again if we take another trip into Madrid.

Location is perfect, so close to everything. Apartment is bright and clean. Kristian was not in Madrid while we were visiting, but was always accessible to us if we had any questions. Would definitely recommend a stay here and if I'm ever back in Madrid, I would stay with Kristian again without a doubt.
Netjes,dichtbij alles bij. Hebben hier gelogeerd met 3 kinderen en is super goed mee gevallen

We really enjoyed Kristian's place in Madrid. It's a great location and walking distance to everything. It was also nice that the apartment had air conditioning, after spending a hot summer's day roaming the streets of Madrid.
Appartement très bien situé, les photos sont très parlantes pour se faire une idée de son espace. A proximité du centre et au calme.
Great location. We were able to walk to all the sights, shops and restaurants. Kristian was very helpful host, and gave us great recommendations! Can't wait to stay again.
Ubicación comodidad amplió bien equipado
The place is clean and located perfecty in a hart of Madrid center.

Merci Kristian pour cet excellent logement.
L’appartement est idéalement situé au centre de la ville à quelques minutes seulement de tout.
Nous y avons passé un excellent séjour et y reviendrions avec plaisir.
Merci pour tout
Philippe & Famille

Kristian's place was the perfect place to stay in Madrid. It's in a perfect location and close to Puerta del Sol and Plaza Mayor. 2 bedrooms - one double bed and the other has bunk beds. Definitely recommend staying here!

Wow!  What a perfect location in the center of Madrid!  We could walk everywhere and had quick access to the main sites, the Metro, and even Atocha Railway Station.  Also, taxis were a few steps away.  Everything was clean and the air conditioning was working well on the hot days and nights.  We were able to wash our clothes and hang dry on a rack that was provided.  All in all, we would definitely return to this wonderful apartment.  Thank you so much Kristian!

Le logement est idéalement situé et proche de toutes les commodités. Kristian s'est montré disponible et réactif à tout moment et Laila qui nous a reçu se montrer très arrangeante est ouverte. Nous avons apprécié le petit lit et la baignoire pour le bébé mis à disposition ainsi que le local pour garder nos affaires en toute sécurité après avoir effectué le check out. Merci à Christian et Maella pour la recommandation concernant les must see de Madrid! Nous reviendrons avec plaisir!

Kristian's apartment had a terrific location in Madrid close to all the best bars and restaurants. Kristian was super accommodating because my flight arrived earlier than the normal check in time. I would definitely stay in his apartment during my next visit.

We had a great time on this fabulous location
Keep the hard work
Gabriel

Great location, just a few minutes walk from the main square. Appartment was clean and had all the basic equipment needed. Nice and quiet during the night, with no street noise. Highly recommend Kristian's suggestion of the tapas for 2 in ViCool.

Departamento amplio y muy luminoso. Ubicacion ideal. Kristian nos envio indicaciones por mail de como llegar e incluso arregló para que Laila (quien nos recibio) lo hiciera antes de la hora del check in, y pudieramos entrar. El barrio es muy ruidoso pero el departamento, si se cierran las ventanas, aisla bien los ruidos del exterior. Las paredes no aislan mucho, ya que se escucha conversar a la gente de los de otros deptos. La cama no resulto muy comoda, pero no fue un problema importante. La unica desventaja que encontramos fue la limpieza, los pisos tenian polvo, resto de comida debajo de una cama y un charco seco frente a la cocina donde se pegaban los zapatos al caminar, de algo que se habia derramado y no se limpio. Encontramos manchas en una de las toallas de lo que parecia maquillaje o similar. Mejorando un poco la limpieza es un lugar super recomendable.
Thank u very much!!

Great apartment in a fantastic location-  you can easily walk to most places yet the street is quiet. Laila was very prompt and helpful during the check-in and flexible about check out time. Gracias Laila por tu flexibilidad y ayuda! Kristian gave us good tips for eating and parking.

The 4 of us stayed at Kristian's. The apartment was close to shops and metro. We pretty much walked to all the major attractions in Madrid. Kristian was amazing in providing accurate direction to the apartment and recommended nearby restaurants to check out.  I would definitely return if I was to visit Madrid again.
El apartamento esta genial y muy bien situado , Laila la chica que nos recibió un encanto. Sin duda cuando vuelva a Madrid repetiré
El piso está super céntrico, impoluto y es muy acogedor. Y la atención del dueño tanto en los preparativos del viaje como durante la estancia, absolutamente inmejorable.
Für einen Aufenthalt in Madrid absolut zu empfehlen. Top zentrale Lage.

El apartamento de Kristian está muy bien ubicado. Es un sitio muy céntrico y muy cómodo. Cuenta con todo lo necesario para sentirse a gusto. Kristian estuvo siempre atentos a nuestros mensajes y a nuestra llegada.

Location of this flat is great and Kristian gave us very detailed instructions on how to get there. We found it with no problems. Even though it is so close to everything it is still very quiet and peaceful. We didn’t actually meet Kristian, Laila let us in. Laila is sweet and very patient. My husband knows a little Spanish and I know just a few words so she had to repeat herself multiple times for us to get what she said.
Great location, it’s in the middle of everything, easy to come and go.  Apt was clean.  Thanks to Kristian who suggested some good restaurants...Vi Cool was delicious.
Great location! Close to a ton of restaurants, bars, and shops.
Great appartment, amazing location. Go for it, you won't be disappointed.
Kristian’s apartment is fab - very central, well equipped and comfortable. He responded to a couple of queries really quickly and helpfully. Lovely weekend in Madrid.

Kristian’s place is very central to Madrid having all tourists places nearby and walkable to most of the places. All good cuisines are close by. Had watched wonderful Flamenco show nearby..and lots of tapas within very close proximity..Laila was very helpful with her suggestions and check in as Kristian was away..will recommend to anyone who likes to have a short visit in Madrid
Great apartment, excellent location

Die Wohnung von Kristian hat eine perfekte Lage um viele Sehenswürdigkeiten, Restaurants und Shoppingmöglichkeiten zu Fuß zu erkunden. Auch die Nähe zur Metro und Bahnstation Sol war super zur An- und Abreise vom Flughafen. Wir hatten für 3 Personen ausreichend Platz, die Wohnung ist ruhig trotz Ihrer zentralen Lage.
Muy real el anuncio, ubicación perfecta y estancia muy agradable.

Great space in a great location. My family (w/ 2 kids) spent three nights in the loft while we explored Madrid. We thought the space was perfect.
The location could not be better. It is located near restaurants and attractions. It is close to two metro stops. However, we walked to most attractions because of its central location.
We would stay here again.
Great location, walking distance to restaurants, shops and bars. Very attentive host with great suggestions. Building in a secure location.
Very good location. Small hot water heater. Need to take very quick showers.
Good communication and attention. Good location
Todo genial
Ubicazione fantastica e abitazione con qualche cosa da migliorare ma nel contesto Buona comunicazione con l host molto precisa e puntuale

Kristian was very prompt in his replies via text whenever we had a problem or a question.
Location wise - fantastic- 7 mins to everything.
However, as a family with 2 young children, we were disappointed with the apartment itself- the photo in the picture does not reflect the apartment- it is not as spacious or bright as it looks.
The apartment is also housed within a hostel - so it was not very suitable for a family - lots of noisy neighbours and loud parties.
If you just needed a place to sleep in a good location, then this place would work. However, the place could do with a good upgrade.
We hope that Kristian would take the comments positively as he is actually a good host.
Local muito bem localizado. Apartamento super limpo e confortável. Check in facilitado pelo proprietário.
Great location! Thank you kristian we enjoyed our stay

Located in the heart of the city, the appartement is very nice. We were 6, everything was great (just a little bit difficult for 6 persons with the warm water in the shower). Kristian and Leïla were very welcoming and gave us some tips for visits and restaurants. Thank you !

Communication with Kristian was excellent. Getting the keys was simple and appartment had great location. First night (fri-sat) there was loud music coming from the neighbours so taking airplugs with you  might be a good idea. Of course sleeping in a big city always include some noice so that is no surprise. Metro located very close and easy access to everywhere.
地理位置好，就是床品需要改善

El apartamento tiene una buena situación muy cerca de sol y se encuentra en buenas condiciones. Sorprende la entrada del edificio, que comparte con un hostal, un poco descuidada y sucia. La escalera del piso no tenía luz, pero lo solucionaron en el mismo día. La casa en su interior es práctica y cómoda, aunque yo cuidaría un poco más los detalles y la limpieza, especialmente de los cuadros.

L’appartement de Kristian est idéalement placé pour visiter Madrid!
Kristian vous sera de bon conseil et est très réactif!
Merci pour ce séjour madrilène!

Kristian is an excellent host! He gave us all the detailed information regarding the apartment before we start our trip, also his recommendation for food is really nice! He is really helpful even during midnight! The apartment itself is central located, easy to go to everywhere in Madrid, elevator is working good, and you can’t hear the street noise during the night. So if you want to visit Madrid mostly by foot, this is the one that you should choose! Thanks so much Kristian!

A fantastic position in the city, 5 mins walk from San Miguel Market, Plaza Mayor, and Puerta del Sol. And a room to leave our bags after we checked out so we could enjoy our last day in Madrid. Very efficient communication and check in/our. Thanks

Excellent emplacement pour visiter Madrid à pied. Tout est à proximité. Épicerie et transport à quelques minutes seulement.
Kristian répond bien aux communications.
Internet fonctionne bien.
Le bruit de l'extérieur ne nous a pas dérangé, surtout que la chambre principale est à l'arrière.
Malheureusement Kristian n'était pas disponible pour nous recevoir, mais nous avons croisé Laila qui nous a remis les clés, mais n'a pas eu le temps de nous informer sur le logement et les choses à voir et à faire. Kristian nous a envoyé un courriel le lendemain pour nous recommander des restaurants.
Attention! l'annonce mentionne qu'il n'y a pas de marches ou escaliers pour accéder à l'ascenseur. Il y a plusieurs marches pour y accéder et ensuite il y a d'autres marches pour accéder à l'appartement. Nous sommes retraités et avions des valises pesantes et mon mari a un problème de dos, ce qui n'était pas l'idéal.
L'état intérieur de l'immeuble a un gros besoin d'entretien. Un trou dans le plancher à la sortie de l'ascenseur, escaliers brisés, etc...
Le logement n'était pas aussi propre que les photos le laisse croire. Literie à améliorer et propreté général de l'appartement. Moisissure dans le bas de la douche à l'intérieur et extérieur.
Aucun poste anglophone ni francophone sur le cable.
Si tout ce qui vous importe est l'emplacement, je recommande définitivement cet appartement.

O apartamento de Rúben está muito bem localizado muito perto de vários pontos turísticos e interessantes. As portas do Sol ficam muito perto, uns 5 min a pé. No fim da rua fica também a praça santa ana cm muitas esplanadas.
O apartamento e muito amplo e cheio de luz no quarto e sala.
Não se houve barulho nenhum.
O meu quarto não era grande mas era suficiente.
A wc era muito bom, com um design actual é impecável. Chuveiro ótimo
Não me servi da cozinha mas estava completa, a sala e grande e espaçosa.
Fiquei cliente.
Conheci o proprietário, Rúben, muito tio simpático e atencioso
Recomendo vivamente
Ruban has a big apartment. I had my own bathroom which was appreciated. He received me well at the time I needed. My stay was short but comfortable. Thank you.
Todo ha sido cómo está anunciado, en buena zona y una habitación cómoda.
Very clean and centrally located accommodation. Friendly and helpful host.

El alojamiento de Rubén es estupendo. Situado a un minuto de la Plaza de Santa Ana, en pleno centro de Madrid y con comunicación a todas partes. Rubén ha sido facilitador en todo momento de información, llegada etc. Un anfitrión excelente. La habitación y el baño estaban muy límpios, la cama muy cómoda y la habitación muy tranquila y agradable. Repetiría sin lugar a dudas.
Cómodo, espacioso, tranquilo, mu limpio y mu bien ubicado. Rubén está atento a cualquier cosa que necesites. Pasé unos días mu agradables allí.

Perfect neighborhood to stay in! There are many restaurants and bars but not noisy. Everything you want to see is in walking distance. There is an elevator but you will need to carry your luggage up some of the stairs still. Ruben was very kind and offered recommendations. The bathroom was also very clean and he supplied bath soaps, towels & a blow dryer! I will definitely be coming back to stay here!
Excelente ubicacion y el departamento es muy confortable. Recomiendo 100%

Un Piso Amplio y modernizada en el centro de Madrid, Ruben es muy amable y atento, y estuvo en la casa cuando hicé el check in
me ayudó a tener todas las nececidades,
hay aire acondicionado, ventilador si necesitas y el baño es amplio,
y aunque el lugar es muy central no habia tanto ruido de la calle,
muy recomendable 👍🏽

Excelente, gran ubicación y Ruben es muy atento.
Un placer mi estadía.
Entire stay was great! Spacious room, nice flatmates, and very well located. I walked everywhere and felt safe as a solo traveler.

Had an amazing time! Perfect location in the center of Madrid and yet, at night you did not hear the noise from outside. Ruben was amazing from start to finish, very attentive and easy to communicate with. The place was clean, had everything necessary to enjoy my time. Definitely recommend staying there!
Gran localización junto a Plaza Santa Ana, en pleno centro.. Habitación funcional y cómoda. Rubén muy atento y amable.

Ruben was such a great host, the location was perfect, everything you need all within walking distance. I had such a great experience and he was such an attentive host. Would definitely book again if i'm visiting Madrid.

A wonderful spot. Conveniently located. QUIET. Many restaurants within a few minutes walk.
Ruben is very friendly, very responsive, and was kind enough to let me store my bags while the room was being cleaned.
Totally recommended!!

Logement super bien situé, près de tout à pied. En même temps, il est tranquille car la chambre donne sur la cour intérieure. Ruben nous donne accès à la cuisine et au (grand) salon. J’y retournerai sûrement lors de mon prochain passage à Madrid!
La estancia en casa de Rubén ha sido muy agradable,sin ruidos y la cama genial, está situada en una zona estupenda de Madrid y Rubén un encanto,sin duda volvería a repetir.

Very central place, everything is walking distance. The host is great, gave me great recommendations and very welcoming.
Thank you Ruben!
Je recommande !

Ruben was great, extremely helpful and his place was fantastic, centrally located to everything and nice and quiet when time to sleep.
I recommend Ruben’s place for any first time visitor to Madrid.
A beautiful apartment in an even more beautiful city.
Muy recomendable. La ubicación es perfecta y la comunicación con Ruben fue excelente. Todo muy fácil y agradable.
Really nice flat. Best location. Really good recomendations from Kristian.
Great location for Madrid and Kristian was responsive in making sure we had everything we needed!
Apartamento estratégicamente ubicado, limpio y cómodo. Cuenta con todas las facilidades necesarias para una estadía cómoda.

Superb location, we could walk to everything very easily. Communication with Kristian was excellent and he responded quickly to any questions and gave great recommendations for places to eat and watch Flameco.
The apartment was clean and comfortable. We were a group of 5, so space was a little tight, but perfectly adequate for us. We had no problems with noise either from the other flats in the building or from outside. A great place to stay close to all the main sites.

The location is excellent. Very close to all touristy sites. We had a problem with our internet during our stay , it worked only on one device, Kristian tried to fix it but it was not resolved during our stay. Very convenient amenities , especially with the washer.
Drawback is the a lot of steps to the lift ( elevator), and to the apartment, if you have limited mobility, this could be a problem.
Great place to stay, right in the center of Madrid. Will come back again. 5 stars!

Bra och ren lägenhet med väldigt bra läge. Nära till Sol och Plaza Mayor. Även gångavstånd till mysig la Latina med mycket mysiga Tapasställen.
Tv-kanalerna fungerade inte när vi var där. Enligt Kristian berodde det på problem med takantennen efter senaste veckans storm och att husägaren inte hunnit fixa det. Även lite problem med spolningen från toaletten. Men som helhet var vi väldigt nöjda med lägenheten. Vi var en familj med två barn som hyrde stället.
The apartment is in a great location for exploring the central area of Madrid. Many restaurants, cafes and shops are nearby and you can walk or utilize public transportation to go anywhere easily.
公寓位置離地鐵sol站約5～8分鐘步行距離，另公寓雖有電梯，但還是有ㄧ小段樓梯要爬，住宿期間雖然沒見到房東，但有任何問題均可透過電話或留訊息很快獲得解決，房東也很熱心的推薦附近不錯的餐廳

La ubicacion es realmente inmejorable. Punto neurálgico, cerca de todo a pie y en metro. Es sin dudas un gran espacio estratégico para conocer Madrid. El apartamento es cálido, acogedor, luminoso y con todas las comodidades. La limpieza perfecta, los servicios de lavarropas y microondas son de gran utilidad. Los primeros dias tuvimos inconvenientes con la señal de wi fi pero Kristian nos envió personal técnico para solucionarlo y valoramos su preocupación y rapidez, ya que si bien no lo conocimos personalmente, estuvo permanentemente atento a cualquier inquietud. Volveríamos a elegir este apartamento en caso de regresar a Madrid
Fantastisk beliggenhed, vi kunne gå til alt! Lejligheden var ren og pæn og Kristian var super nem at komme i kontakt med. Klart anbefalelsesværdigt.
Had a nice stay. Thank you. Everything went fluently and we got some great restaurant suggestions from the host. The location is absolutely perfect!
Great Stay in a great City. Thanks to Kristian

Kristian很热心 房子位置很中心很方便 布置也很温馨 风景很好
Thanks again for your lovely house！

Lovely apartment in a very central location. We had a great time and found everything we needed within a 10 minute walk from the door. Kristian was an excellent host and responded to all messages quickly throughout our stay.
Love the place, nearby everywhere, easy to communicate with! Thanks!

Since Kristian could not be there to check us into the apartment as he was away for the weekend. He had instructed us to call his friend Laila who did not pick up the call for almost an hour.. we sent couple of whatsapp messages hoping that she will reply.. we tried calling her .. no answer from either from Kristian or Laila.. we waited at Madrid station for about an hour, we tried again on whatsapp call and this time she answered and asked us wait for 20 mins so that she can reach the apartment.
When we reached the apartment, Laila was kind enough to let us into the apartment and gave us few tips to get around few places.. Apartment itself is in VERY BAD state.. especially the furniture which is old and squeaky.. quality of bedding should match the price we pay.. apartment floor was very dirty and dusty.. when we sent messages to Kristian about cleaning the floor, to our utter disbelief, he asked us to send the pictures and we did so.. no response from him..
Overall, for families this is a no no place..
Good news is that, they have a place to keep your bags if you want to go around after you check out.. we thank Kristian for that..

Cute apartment, centrally located. Loved keeping the balcony doors open for fresh air and sounds from the street below. Kristian was responsive to all of my questions and gave recommendations for local eateries.
Kristian had a an awesome place with great views. Loved the little touches and close location approximately to all the main places & food options. Would book again. Thanks Kristian.
Een fijn appartement om de stad te gaan verkennen. Heel centraal gelegen in een rustige straat. Kristian reageert snel en adequaat. Wij hebben het goed gehad!

This place is in a great location. It’s walking distance to Plaza Mayor, Gran Via, Plaza Santa Ana, and Atocha. The apartment is way smaller that what it appears on the photos. We were there 2 days so it was ok. I mean the mattresses are stiff and the pillows are worn. But, again we were just there for 2 days.  The space is good in my opinion for a family of 3. The hosts are very attentive and responsive. I have no complains about them. Kristian and Laila were a phone call away.
Cute, comfortable place, close to Plaza del Sol and the metro station.  Kristian was very quick to communicate with us.
We appreciate the apartment and its location. Everything went good. Thank you very much Kristian for your advice.
Great location

The apartment is not located on or in the Puerto del Sol but on a side street a few blocks over. This is fine because the Plaza Mayor is nicer and about the same distance. There is a grocery store around the corner open until 11pm. The washer in the kitchen works well but the clothes are then air dried on a rack typical for Europe. Kristian was out of town and had a friend clean the apartments and let us in. That went well. Please be aware that the apartment is somewhat long in the tooth. As some other reviews indicate, the beds and pillows and linens are worn. The mattresses are thin and worn. The area is fun so be aware of street noise late into the early morning hours. The AC took about a day to fully cool the apartment. I did not experience that the ac was working well. Kristian did try to help but the unit is not strong. Or it could be the days were 100 degrees Fahrenheit. The elevator is great. When you open the street door there is an overwhelming stench of urine. Also, there was often a homeless person sleeping on cardboard outside the door. We did not feel unsafe or threatened in anyway. The neighborhood seems safe and lively.
Easy access to the all the sightseeing places. Safe  neighborhood!
Great apartment in the middle of the city
This is a great apartment. The location is truly excellent. The apartment has everything you need. Kristian is an excellent host.

Si buscas un apartamento en madrid este es una de las mejores opciones, tienes cerca mucho sitios importantes como puerta del sol, plaza mayor, etc. Si tienes cualquier problema, Kristian te responde en pocos minutos
Buen apartamento muy bien situado. Kristian muy atento y disponible. Seguramente repito en esta estancia cuando vuelva a Madrid. Saludos Kristian y buena suerte!
Très beau voyage à Madrid ! L’appartement est irréprochable. L’hôte est très réactif et ses informations très précises. Je recommande.
Nice location in the center of Madrid. We didn't meet Kristian but he made sure our checkin and checkout were smooth
Excellent stay, great host, perfect location!
Really great little home, in a fantastic location !
Departamento muy bien ubicado cerca plaza mayor, puerta de sol,mercado San Miguel parking a una cuadra a euros 35. Kristian tuvo flexibilidad y colaboración.el depto es cómodo para 4.

Kristian очень внимателный хозяин, всегда на связи. Квартира уютная, чистая, есть все необходимое для комфортного проживания. Расположена в самом центре Мадрида.
Kristian is very attentive host, always in touch. The apartment is cozy, clean, has everything you need for a comfortable stay. Located in the center of Madrid.
Todo correcto según se describe
Sweet comfortable apartment perfect for a family with 2 kids, in a perfect location!
Apartment was as advertised with a great location just down from Plaza Mayor.  Clean, comfortable, safe and quiet and great for families.
Una excelente opción si lo que se está buscando es una buena ubicación ya que está muy cerca de puerta del sol y es muy fácil el trasladarse desde ahí a otros puntos importantes de la cuidad.

Appartement très très bien placé et au calme, les photos sont bien représentatives mis à part que l'appartement n'est pas aussi lumineux mais c'est un détail. Climatisation uniquement dans le salon. On a pu avancé le check up, poser nos bagages et récupérer les clés à 11h donc c'était juste parfait pour nous (1 seul jeu de clé, c'est rare et ca peut être embêtant parfois). Voilou un bref et agréable séjour à Madrid mais qui avec cet appartement central nous a permis de faire pas mal de chose et bien profiter !

Kristian did not reply to our messages upon our arrival. We waited nearly three hours to check in to the Airbnb. This prevented us from making our scheduled activity as we did not have a place to store luggage. Beware! The AC and internet are lousy as well!
Las sugerencias son fantásticas, muy amable y dispuesto a ayudar en lo que puedes

Great location and near all of the major sites. Apartment was small and can become a little stuffy during the summer because it is cooled by only one air conditioning unit in the living room. But overall it was a nice place to stay for my family of 3.
The cleanness, convenience and comfort of Kristian ‘s flat will surely make your trip more excited and happier.
Appartement très bien situé, très agréable et calme.

Lovely apartment in the heart of everything! We felt very secure it is in a nice neighborhood. Very sunny and warm apartment. Will recommend the host! Fast communication and easy check in and out. 10/10
Great location, great host and it all helped to make our stay a great one in Madrid
Great place in a great location! If you come in the summer it may be a little hot so make sure you turn on that AC unit in the living room. The ones in the rooms don’t work.

Very nice apartment, good location. The apartment is part of an rental apartment complex located close to Plaza del Sol and Plaza Mayor. Kristian was very kind and Laila (that received us) was very kind and helpful.
Nice apartment in a great location.
Little nice place in the centre of Madrid close to everything
El apartamento muy cómodo y grande, lo único malo fue la cama muy ruidosa y la entreda no es acorde al apartamento... kristian un anfitrión genial y muy atento! Lo ubicación es de destacar, gracias
Todo bien
Great place and great location. Really enjoyed our stay.

Appartement is precies zoals op de foto's en voldeed aan onze verwachtingen. Schoon appartement en alle benodigdheden waren aanwezig. We werden hartelijk ontvangen en kregen nuttige tips. Centrale ligging midden in het centrum. Prijs-kwaliteit verhouding is zeer goed.
Great value for the place, fairly good walking distance to many bars and restaurants, a little noisy at night time from the street but its madrid!

A great place to stay whilst visiting Madrid. Amazing location and the host was great at offering tips for places to eat and visit. Kristian was quick to reply to questions and was easy to deal with throughout the booking process.
Accomodation was clean and comfortable with a small lift to get you to the apartment. Not for people with mobility issues as you have to walk up a flight of stairs to get the lift but no problem for our stay. Would not hesitate to book again.

Un espacio lindo, muy limpio y muy cerca de los puntos de interes puedes llegar caminando a la plaza mayor, a la plaza del sol, al mercado san Miguel, al palacio real de madrid y a varios lugares mas que hacen magico a Madrid.
kristian un muy buen anfitrion siempre atento y respondiedo rapidamente a mis dudas.
Ampliamente recomendado

Kristian was very flexible on arrival and departure schedules, it is convenient not to visit with luggage.
The apartment is very sunny and well located. I recommand it !
Saludos,altamente recomendable ..Comodo, completamente equipado, espacioso, luminoso y una ubicacion privilegiada.
Great location

Great apartment in a great location of Madrid. Within a couple minutes of walking you can find yourself in Sol or Plaza Mayor where you can find shops, restaurants and lots of history. You'll love it!
The location of this apartment couldn't be better. It seemed like it was just a short walk to everything my group wanted to do. The place was very comfortable and clean. I would stay here again.

SUCIEDAD EXTREMA
Ducha mohosa, toallas apestosas, sábanas sucias, suelo pegajoso, lleno de pelos negros y hasta unas lentillas pegadas en el suelo de la habitación.
Planta muerta y llena de hongos, menaje de cocina pobre, viejo, escaso y mugriento. Wifi con potencia ridícula, en finca vieja.
Sin ascensor para todas las plantas, ideal para viajeros con maleta (nótese la ironía).
Anfitrión inexistente, ya que no ha hecho ni entrada ni salida... en resumen, experiencia para no repetir.
Perfect location for a short stay in Madrid with easy check-in. Kristian let us store our bags for as we had a late flight and was very helpful and accommodating.
Buena limpieza y situacion. Muy reducido para 6 personas. No hay persianas ni porticones, mucha claridad para dormir en el sofa-cama.
위치, 깨끗함, 호스트와의 커뮤니케이션 뭐하나 부족한게 없습니다! 다시 방문하고 싶어요
Todo genial!
Buena ubicación y comunicación. Limpieza y comodidad. Respuesta rápida y atención por parte del propietario. Ofrecen el servicio de guardar el equipaje. Cuando volvamos a Madrid, repetiremos.
Beautiful and clean place! Kristian was a great host. Location was perfect as well. Highly recommend
Great place, next to all things happening in Madrid culturally and for entertainment
Great location. Modern. Very close public transportation. 24H supermarkets really close by. And great attention from the host.
L'appartement est très fonctionnel, idéalement placé pour tout faire a pied. Tres calme également. Des commerces a 100m dont un ouvert 24/24. On reviendra !
Hemos pasado una linda estancia en el departamento, la ubicación es muy buena y el apartamento cómodo y limpio. Volveria.
We had a pleasant stay in this very well located staff. Kristian is really reactive and even gave us the  possibility to store our luggages after the check time which was very appreciated

Ha resultado una estancia muy agradable. Un apartamento bien equipado en una localización inmejorable. No pudimos conocer a Kristian por problemas en nuestro horario de llegada, pero fue fácil contactar con él en todo momento.
Muy bien ubicado, súper buena comunicación, nos ayudó en todo, nuestra estadía en Madrid fue maravillosa!
It was okay for a bachelor
Gran servicio y ubicación inmejorable. Altamente recomendable para quienes quieran conocer Madrid, desde el Centro de la Ciudad . .  . Gracias Kristian
El departamento tiene una muy buena ubicación, a pesar de ser céntrico es tranquilo para dormir. En condiciones para pasar una o dos noches para cuatro personas.

We (2 adults, 2 ten year old boys) stayed for 3 nights and the apartment was great. Fabulous location with everything on your doorstep. Communication with Kristian was great and check-in was perfect. Thanks

Más o menos lo que esperaba. r
Recomendable porque la zona es buenísima y el lugar es acogedor.
いいところです

L’appartamento e molto carino, la posizione ottima! Nel complesso ci siamo trovate molto bene, unica pecca la pulizia generale, abbastanza scarsa; mancava il sapone per i piatti, i bicchieri erano appiccicosi e c’era polvere ovunque. Ad ogni modo, per brevi soggiorni, lo consiglio!
Kristian is very gentle and the house is in a very comfortable position for visit the city
We could not have asked for a better location! Just a de minute walk to all the major sites and museums! The apartment was comfortable and safe in a wonderful city. We would stay there again.
Inmejorable ubicación en el barrio más divertido de Madrid!

This location was centrally located and lit up and safe at night! The building does have an elevator which is a big plus!
It was very cozy!

Lovely quiet apartment in great location near the centre of Madrid. Very close to shops, metro, restaurants and some of the major tourist destinations. Kristian was very helpful and the apartment was clean and had a lift which is useful. Perfect for 4 people (little bit squeezy for 6)! Nice view too.
El departamento de Kristian es muy como y amplio. Fuimos 4 adultos y no tuvimos problemas. Queda muy cerca de SOL y caminando de todas las otras atracciones

La ubicación para visitar Madrid es inmejorable,a escasos 15min de todo, cercano al transporte público y en una zona muy tranquila.
EL estado del piso correcto. Sin duda si vuelvo a Madrid repetiria!!

Super Lage, sehr gute und schnelle Kommunikation, sehr gute Empfehlungen.
Wir (54 J., 54 J., 14 J. und 18 J.) waren sehr zufrieden.
Kristian is a really good host. The apartment is in the city center, nearby all museums and train station. It's big and comfortable. I highly recommend it.
Good and comfortable stay!
Very good location, okay to stay for a couple of days
Kristian is detailed oriented and an accommodating host.  Wonderful recommendations and fabulous communication.  I would highly recommend this apartment while visiting Madrid.  Thank you!

Logement confortable et bien placé ! A proximité de pas mal de centres d’intérêts mais à la fois en retrait des zones d’animations ( bar restaurant) ce qui permet d’avoir pas mal de tranquillité !
Échanges avec Kristian très facile !

Excelente ubicación, apartamento cómodo y central para una estadía familiar!
Súper recomendado
Appartamento molto carino e pulito. super comodo per spostarsi senza metro in ogni direzione Host molto gentile

The apartment by kristian is great.  we had a great stay there.  the location is perfect.  everything was clean.  Kristian is very helpful and did everything to make sure we had a great stay.  He also provided us with great tips.  Thank you for everything.
Excelente localização, facilitou muito a mobilidade entre os principais pontos turísticos.
We had a lot of fun staying at Kristian's place. It was close to the town center, very clean and comfortable.

El dpto de Kristian es como se ve en las fotos, iluminado y cómodo. Esta muy bien ubicado cerca de Plaza Mayor y puerta del sol. Nos recibió Iván muy amable y nos dio todas las indicaciones. Disfrutamos mucho la estadía, lo recomendamos y volveríamos!!

Appartement conforme à la description.Très bien situé car dans le centre mais dans une rue assez calme.
Nous avons beaucoup apprécié de pouvoir stocker nos bagages dans l’immeuble même après la remise des clés.Nous avons également apprécié la ponctualité pour le checkin et le checkout

Un departamento con una ubicación inmejorable, muy tranquilo, limpio y seguro. Tiene lavadora de ropa que quedó genial! La atención que ofrecen es inigualable. Definitivamente ya quiero volver. Calificación 100!!

Great Place to be. Everything Good. Kristian communicated very well. He gave Great ideas  for food. Kitchen is small and not perfect for 5 people...but for Basics okay. Being downtown means some noice ...but at all the Location is perfect. We come again

Kristian's place is great value for money. The flat is convenient walking distance to most of the old city landmarks as well as The Prado and the main Atocha Station. Our host gave us recommendations to local bars etc. Thanks Kristian
The apartment was conveniently located to Plaza Mayor and other attractions!  Kristian/Ivan are very responsive and great hosts.
Estuvimos muy cómodas en el apartamento esta muy bien ubicado y tiene de todo.
buena ubicación

Nuestra fantástica experiencia en la ciudad comienza en este maravilloso apartamento, con una ubicación perfecta, a distancia caminable a los sitios de interés en el centro y a la estación del metro para acceder a la estación de tren.
Recomendamos este apartamento al cien por ciento.
Muchas gracias Kristian.
Great place, great location and great service. If you’re staying in Madrid I recommend this place!

We had a fantastic vacation in Madrid and renting this place was a very big part of it. Our family of 4 felt comfortable and had enough space, all was very clean. Of course July is very hot so we were very glad to have air conditioner in the apartment. Location was great for us since was very close to lots of metro stations and other transport but honestly we mostly walk everywhere since it is a walking distance of all mayor areas. Very busy area but tons of locations to eat and all open until late.

We are so grateful for the baby amenities that were offered and allowing us to drop our bags early. That made such a difference when traveling with a baby. Also the A/C in the main room worked well, and it was a great hairdryer. Kristian was also very quick to respond. Great location in Madrid!
Great apartment, amazing location and really clean. Thanks Kristian!
Great location near Puerta del Sol. Check in was very simple.

Everything was perfect at Kristian's place ! Very close to la puerta del Sol, very clean room. The district is as safe as the apartment. Kristian was available for any further questions. Quite efficient service!
Great location and nice apartment!
Amazing location and very helpful at check in and with suggestion on tourist opportunities in the area.
Host was proactive and responsive. AC in main room only was ok, even though it was hot weather during 1 night stay. We were able to check in early. Sofa bed was large and comfortable

Très beau logement ! Il est surtout très bien placé, nous n'avons pas pris le métro de la semaine, il est à 3 minutes de la Plaza Mayor et à 1 min d'un supermarché ouvert 24h/24h. Au 5e étage avec ascenseur (un étage à monter) et climatisé. Attention toutefois à la chambre qui donne sur la rue n'est pas silencieuse, on entend un peu les bruits de la rue (ce n'est pas trop dérangeant mais à y penser si vous avez le sommeil léger). Nous avons dû descendre le micro-ondes du dessus du frigo pour l'utiliser car il était inateignable sinon et lorsque les baies vitrées sont fermées, il fait assez sombres car elles sont teintées (ce qui permet de garder l'appartement frais, nous n'avons pas allumé une seule fois la clim pendant une semaine en plein milieu du mois d'août). Je vous recommande quand même ce logement les yeux fermés. Bien que Kristian ne soit pas présent à Madrid, il nous avait fourni des indications très claires pour entrer dans l'appart et est resté joignable et réactif toute la semaine. Très bon plan !

Kristian ha sido muy atento y agradable, encantador.El alojamiento está muy céntrico, muy cerca de la Plaza Mayor, de turismo, del metro, de parking, de restaurantes, supermercados...Kristian nos ayudó en todo momento, facilitándonos nuestra estancia y nos aconsejó lugares...El piso es muy acogedor, cómodo, limpio, confortable y para nuestro gusto está decorado con mucho estilo y encanto.Precioso.Aunque está muy céntrico es una zona muy tranquila para poder descansar y el sofá cama es muy cómodo.Cuándo volvamos a Madrid, porque Madrid nos ha gustado muchísimo nos encantaría si está disponible poder alojarnos allí de nuevo.Muy recomendable.

Appartement très bien situé pour visiter le centre de Madrid à pied. Très bon rapport qualité prix et très bons conseils pour les meilleures adresses de tapas et de lieux pour sortir.
Notre séjour Madrilène a été un vrai régal !

Kristian's place is no doubt the best location if you want to explore Madrid city center without all the noise and clamor. Towels (bath and face) and linen were clean. And nothing can beat natural sun lighting in the living room in the morning. We were definitely delighted with surprise at all the good food places Angel recommended especially the nearby Mercato St Miguel for the tapas and wine experience.

Overall, BRAVO to Angel for such warming Madrid hospitality. We definitely enjoyed our stay there.

When you are planning a trip overseas - you know the fact that you are in another country alone will be an amazing experience. Fortunately for my friend and I, we got the pleasure of staying with Angel and Nacho. As such, our trip was exponentially amazing and memorable. They are excellent hosts that welcomed us into their beautiful flat with open arms. They are a wealth of knowledge when it comes to their culture and food and we enjoyed getting to know more about places we were planning to visit. When we were not walking less than 10 minutes to all major sites from their flat, we enjoyed wine and many laughs with our gracious hosts. We left Spain with our bellies full, a smile on our face and memories to last a lifetime. Highly recommended!

What's the catch?? There is NO catch! Angel and Nacho's apartment is immaculate and is better when you see it in real life (if that is even possible!).The apartment is exactly where they say - walking distance to everything! It's great having a central location to everything for 1st time tourists and regular visitors. The apartment was spotless, the free wi-fi was extremely fast and whatever you needed the boys catered for, for example, flamenco shows, shopping districts and authentic (and tasty!) restaurants. Seriously... this is definitely 5 star living conditions and service, and this is coming from someone who has stayed in 5 star hotels.  Never in my wildest dreams would I have thought that someone could find a place like this on airbnb... but i guess some dreams come true. Angel and Nacho's hospitality is next to none and I know where I will be staying next time I return to Madrid. I highly recommend - 5 stars all the way! =)

I feel so fortunate to stay with Angel & Nacho in their home! It is truly a beautiful home filled with lovely art & lovely people. They were both kind, welcoming and helpful during my stay! Highly recommend!

There was no air conditioning in the room, but advertisement indicated that the rental was air-conditioned. To his credit, he did provide us with a fan on the second night. This was the only thing that prevented from me giving Angel 5 stars.

But for that issue, Angel was absolutely wonderful. The place was as pictured. Angel arranged for Flamenco dancing (which was great). No problems checking in, responsive to the issue, etc.

Nous sommes restés 4 jours a Madrid chez Angel et notre sejour s'est super bien passé! L'appart est incroyable, très grand, joliement decoré, comme sur les photos! Angel et son compagnon partaient en vacances quand nous sommes arrivés, alors nous avons eu l'appart pour nous tout seul, c'était genial. on peut tout faire a pied depuis l'appart, il est vraiment très central, très pratique!! Je vous conseille cette adresse, en plus Angel et son compagnon ont plein de bonne adresses de restau,  des conseils sur la visite de Madrid, ils sont vraiment accueillants et agréables! Bref, ce sejour, c'etait la grande classe!!
Angel and Nacho were great hosts, they will make sure your get the most out of Madrid. The room in their apartment was very nice, with a great location.

One word "Fabulous"!!! We only stayed one night at Ángel/Nacho's place and we wished we had spent more time with them. The flat is absolutely gorgeous, decorated with exquisite taste (to the tiniest detail) and so central (10 min walk to Sol) but quiet at night (to preserve your sleep). Angel and Nacho are passionate about life/arts/languages and therefore very welcoming: tailored breakfast to your taste with delicate homemade jams (me encantaba la mermelada de ciruelas!) and if you need advice on places to see or convivial restaurants for dinner, just ask them!!! This is definitely the place to be in Madrid !! We will come back no doubt about that!! Muchas gracias chicos ^_^

We are more than happy to have made the choice of staying in Angel's apartment. He treated us like friends, telling us a lots of interesting stories about the city, giving us good and tailored recommendations to explore places of our interest. When we were hurrying to the train station, he saw us off from the balcony to make sure that we are going in the correct direction. Surely I will stay in his apartment when I revisit Madrid.

We had a wonderful time staying with Angel and Nacho.  They are caring hosts and the room was very comfortable with a 5 star private bathroom.  The apartment is easy walking distance from the centre of Madrid and most of the places we wanted to visit including the Prado Museum.  Angel and Nacho are fun to chat with and were happy to share their local knowledge.  They helped us book great restaurants, and to see some superb flamenco at a local music club.  By the end of our three day stay we felt we had friends in Madrid.  As we chat about our travels there always seems to be a big smile on our face when we talk about our time staying with these good people.

You simply could not ask for a more charming, gracious and generous pair of hosts! My husband and I spent one week in Angel and Nacho’s fabulous apartment in October 2013, and it was without a doubt our favorite of all the places we stayed on our trip to Spain. They’ve anticipated everything you could possibly ask for: peaceful room, comfy bed, luxurious spa-like bathroom with ample hot water and cushy bathrobes, cozy kitchen, copious breakfast featuring their own delicious homemade citrus marmalades, reliable WiFi, a printer for your boarding passes, etc. (I probably shouldn’t mention this, but...) Angel even did a load of our laundry!  And what a perfect base from which to explore Madrid! Nearly everything you want to see -- the “Big Three” museums, El Rastro flea market, the Chueca, Malasaña Las Letras and La Latina party zones, etc. -- is only a few minutes’ walk from the apartment. And at the end of a long day of sightseeing, you will find yourself really looking forward to coming “home” to a pair of friends who are genuinely interested in hearing about your day. Definitely a 5-star experience!
Angel was a lovely host who was very attentive and helpful.  The location is phenomenal, and we very much enjoyed our stay.

Angel and Nacho lived up to all the praising commentaries people have left. They are super cool caring and helpful. i would definitly reccomend, and the bed was more confortable than most beds ever slept on. guarantees deep reharmonizing dreams.  you have my validation.. enjoy

We thoroughly enjoyed our stay. The apartment has a brilliant location, right in the middle of all the best sights. The apartment is beautiful and very well cared for. We felt welcome and at home, Angel and Nacho are very helpful, kind hosts. Highly recommended.

Scrivo in italiano visto che Angel finora ne ha ospitati pochi, e considerato che conosce bene la nostra lingua. Abbiamo apprezzato tantissimo la stanza con il bagno grande, SILENZIOSISSIMA e riservata. Del posto, della ricchezza di servizi e della disponibilità grandissima di Angel e Nacho hanno detto gli altri e non possiamo che confermare. Consigli, prenotazioni, arance ed altro sono il valore aggiunto dell'ospitalità del nostro Hidalgo. Permanenza Super!
Would highly recommend the place. We spent 5 fantastic days in Madrid. Since it was raining a lot during our stay we developed a habit for siestas in a very private and quiet bedroom.

I have been traveling for almost a month in Europe on airbnb. Angel and Nacho have set the standard for what an airbnb place should be like. The location is unparalleled.  The room is spacious. It's equivalent to a $400 hotel room! Thank you Angel and Nacho for a wonderful stay.

Immeuble qui semble majoritairement dédié à la location Airbnb donc assez bruyant avec des locataires qui claquent les portes en pleine nuit. Les communs sont vieillots.
D’autre part nous avions signalé venir à 5 personnes, et nous n’avions que 4 couchages, le canapé lit n’était pas préparé (ni draps ni oreiller)... heureusement que notre plus jeune fils n’est finalement pas venu!!!
La localisation est bonne, pratique pour visiter Madrid.
Bilan mitigé donc...

El edificio es el típico antiguo madrileño, el apartamento muy moderno y cómodo con aire acondicionado que funciona excelente, envidiable ubicación y la posibilidad de estar 4 personas muy cómodas, está en un 5to piso pero un elevador funcional
Appartement très moderne dans le centre de Madrid, à proximité de tout ce qu'il faut ! Autonomie agréable, nous n'avons manqué de rien, si nous revenons à Madrid, nous retournerons chez Kristian 😁
El apto divino, con Linda vista. Facilidades para dejar maletas luego del checkout ya que nuestro vuelo salía de noche. Recomiendo

Appartement très bien situé au centre de Madrid à quelques pas de la Place Mayor. 5em étage avec ascenseur. Accueil réalisé par une professionnelle qui gère l’accueil, la propreté etc…. des différents appartements en location Airbnb de l’immeuble. Contact facile avec celle-ci sans plus. 2 chambres dont une donnant sur la place. Celle sur la cour est très calme. Climatisation efficace. Équipement général correct qui mériterait un petit coup de bricolage pour certains ( joint de salle de bain, fixation du robinet etc….) mais rien de très gênant. Un très bon rapport qualité prix il me semble. Et vraiment situation géographique idéale!! Bonne continuation. Damien

El piso era limpio y acogedor. Hemos tenido algun fallo que entendemos que son cosas de mala suerte y muy puntuales. Calidad/precio es muy buena opción y si volvemos a Madrid le daremos otra oportunidad. El contacto con el anfitrión fue fácil
Parfait, personne très gentille
Hemos pasado unos dias muy agradables en el apartamento. La situacion es magnifica y aunque por fuera no tiene un aspecto muy bueno, luego es tranquilo y limpio. Volvere a repetir
belle appartement au plein de centre de Madrid  historique vous pouvez visite tout les site à pied .
Muy bien ubicada

Amazing stay!! I can't recommend this place enough. The apartment is super central (only a few minutes from Plaza de Sol) and the view from the living room is incredible.
Kristian was super responsive and helpful. 100% recommend!

Ubicación ideal para conocer el centro de Madrid, apartamento con todas las comodidades, carrefour y lidl en la misma calle.
Muy recomendable calidad precio.

Great central flat - would highly recommend. Super clean, great check in with Jen who is very friendly and helpful. The only hiccup is that we were told there were a few stairs to access the flat from the elevator, which I was ok with… however there was actually around 15 steps at the base of the building which you need to take before you even get to the elevator. This should have really been disclosed as it’s not easy going all that way with a stroller and baby!
Piso céntrico y limpio.
This apartment was very nice, location excellent, attention too.

Perfect location to explore the centre of Madrid. Perfect communication with  Kristian. A bit noisy but this was also due to some road works in front of the building. And after all you are in the heart of a big city.
Amazing location, great balconies and lighting. Close to everything and great restaurants. Good communication and ability to store luggage after check out. Would recommend.
great place! great location! very flexible check in and check out - thank you very much!!

situación del apartamento inmejorable. Vine a Madrid por negocios y me fue perfecto. recomiendo.

Location, location, location!! Great area easily accessible to all of Madrid by Metro, bike, taxi, and walking. Paid parking is next door although I didn't use. There are so many restaurants and bars in the area with short walk to Sol Plaza. The apartment was comfortable with great views in a building that has several other Airbnb apartments. The street was somewhat busy but when the windows are closed it is quiet. My only complaint was that the towels smelled like mildew (hopefully hosts will replace with new). I couldn't find the iron but there is an ironing board (I didn't ask the host as ditched the effort to iron some shorts). Apartment is on 5th level but there is a small lift available after going up one flight of stairs. Hosts were very responsive to requests.
Bed - 3/5 thin mattress but ok, old sheets
Bath - 3/5 some mildew in the shower grout, Hot water was very good
Hair Dryer - 5/5, full size/power
Views - 4/5, great street view on small square and if you look around to the right you can catch a glimpse of the sunsets
Safety - 4/5, good security locks, as always be aware of surroundings when entering or exiting building
Good price for great location!
Very centric location, close to "Sol" and "Plaza Mayor" in the heart of Madrid. But also relatively quiet, very clean and comfortable. We really enjoyed our stay here.

El trato es muy bueno y la ubicación genial.
la cuestión es la calidad de la casa, que es menor de la esperada.

This location was perfect for being central in Madrid - we were able to walk most places and public transport is widely available close by. The bright lighting in the apartment made our stay more enjoyable. The hosts were also very easy to communicate with! Would stay again :)

Todo perfecto.
Los anfitriones son muy agradables y están atentos en todo momento.
La casa está muy bien ubicada y la zona es muy tranquila.

This is a perfect spot to stay.  Close proximity to everything and the entire apartment was perfect for the 3 of us.  Beautiful apartment and great host.

Nos ha encantado el piso, justo lo que necesitabamos. Jen, quien estaba encargada del proceso de check in y check out, super gentil y hospitalaria, siempre respondiendo a nuestros mensajes y preguntas super rapido.

Muy buena estadía, Kristian y Yen atentos a lo que necesitemos, pasamos la navidad en familia,  super cerca de todo. Recomiendo, el apto surtido con pequeñas cosas que te evitan tener que comprar. Ubicación  ideal.
Nice loft apartment in a very convenient location.

Exceeded our expectations! Large enough to accommodate a family, yet cozy enough for a young couple. Safe and secure access. Fantastic location; easy accessibility to everything we wanted or needed. In addition to the proximity to train stations and a short walk to other highly popular sites, the immediate neighborhood has restaurants, shops, a small plaza, and even 24-hour grocery stores. Additionally, the host was communicative and very responsive to our needs. Would return.
Incredible location, check in was super simple!
Great stay here!

Great location, walking distance to most everything. Bunk bed and living room sofa are a bit hard to sleep on. Everything else was great.

The flat is situated in a wonderful part of town. It’s walkable only 5-10 min away. We really enjoyed this close proximity to chill in plaza Mayo and have a choice of very good restaurants. The flat is comfortable, the bed was nice with good soft sheets. Thank you kristian
magnifique séjour, ANGEL nous a très bien accueilli, appartement superbe,  nous nous sentions très bien, mieux placé cela n'existe pas nous recommandons vivement cette adresse
Angel was an extremely warm and welcoming host. He gave us some great tips on where to go in his neighborhood. The apartment is lovely and very well-located.

Hemos estado este fin de semana en casa de Ángel. La experiencia ha sido inmejorable, a pesar de no haber estado los anfitriones. En todo momento, Ángel ha estado pendiente de nuestra comodidad.
La casa es preciosa, y la habitación y baño son muy espaciosos. Además, la situación en el centro de la ciudad, junto a la tranquilidad de la calle, la hace más atractiva aún.
En resumen, tanto Angel como la casa son muy recomendables.

Angel knew we'd want to stay more than 2 nights in his and Nacho's stunning apartment when we made our booking and he was so right! Sadly two nights and one day was all the time we had at the end of our holiday but we're both kicking ourselves! The apartment defies description, (more like a luxury hotel) the hosts gorgeous and funny, (Angel often had me in stitches) and the location cannot be beaten for convenience, beauty and points of interest. Another thing that sets this listing, (and these hosts) apart is their adoption of a true bed and breakfast experience. A table is set every morning for breakfast with everything you might need including oranges for squeezing from their Orchard in Seville! All in all... an amazing experience that we cannot wait to repeat again but next time for longer! Thanks guys!
Our stay in Angels flat was splendid. Beautiful bedroom and fantastic bathroom. And the flat was cool. We met Angel just once, he was really friendly.

Angel and Nacho were wonderful. They gave us guided travel directions to their front door and we were welcomed warmly upon our arrival. The bedroom and bathroom were spacious, spotless, and decorated with lovely art. Our stay couldn't have been more comfortable. Upon our arrival Angel and Nacho took time to acquaint us with the area (on a map), provided museum and restaurant recommendations, and made sure we were comfortable before they went about their plans. Their flat/apartment is so well located to everything that would be of interest to anyone. Literally one can be at any significant site in less than 15 minutes walking. Breakfast time was unscheduled, relaxing, and a delightful room in which to plan our daily activities. We couldn't have been happier or felt more comfortable. We highly recommend Angel and Nacho's Airbnb to everyone.

A great apartment in a great location. Despite a 5 hour delay in our flight, our hosts stayed up until 02:30 to greet us! Furnishing us with all sorts of tips and advice for things to see and do during our 5 night stay they could not have been more welcoming. The location of this apartment is pretty close to perfect for the centre of Madrid, but not exactly "next" to the Plaza Mayor which is 4-500 yards away, but pretty well in the centre of the centre. The bedroom with spacious ensuite bathroom is peaceful, with no street noise at all. A small niggle would be nowhere comfortable to sit in the bedroom, and as the living area is a single (quite fantastic and wildly beautifully decorated and dressed) huge "L" shaped room, it might have been hard to find some privacy had our hosts not actually been away for the rest of our stay.
That aside, this is a really great place to stay and enjoy what Spain's capital has to offer (which is a lot!! so pace yourself and get into the siesta groove, it makes best use of your energy.....).

Angel and Nacho's b&b is beautiful! Excellent location, large private room and ensuite, I loved the building and the the way the apartment is furnished / decorated.
Angel is a fantastic host who was helpful in directing me around Madrid and also re-routing my journey through Spain and Portugal as I did not have the most ideal itinerary at first, I am 4 cities into my new journey and loving every moment! Thankyou so much Angel!!
I had a wonderful stay!

Gorgeous accommodation and very central. Lots of helpful advice from Angel. If you want to experience the grandeur of old Spain then this is the accommodation for you. Very clean. Very elegant and very welcoming. Certainly a five star recommendation. Many thanks Angel. Philip and Anne

Angel is very professional; kept me up to date throughout throughout the entire process. He recommended some terrific places to eat and go in Madrid.
Angel's Airbnb is magnificent ! Very clean, elegant and welcoming. His apartment is close to all the amenities and major attractions. Will definitely stay again. Thanks for the hospitality and warm welcome Angel!

I don't think it would have been possible to make us feel more welcome! We were greeted by Angel and Nacho and were immediately made to feel welcome and relaxed. While my step-daughter went out exploring, Angel and Nacho invited me to tea and spent over an hour telling me about Madrid and recommending great places for dinner.

The room/house was very comfortable and clean. We had everything we needed and more. The location was great!

I noted on the airbnb site that they had offered cooking classes in the past. I asked about this and even though they had a busy social calendar they squeezed in a lunch (I know this isn't the right word in Spanish-lol) with us. We prepared a nice meal in their home and enjoyed great conversation and delicious food. Angel even indulged us by preparing barnacles and showing us how to eat them. It was great fun!

I sincerely hope our paths cross again...

I don't have enough nice things to say about my stay here. Even though he was on a holiday of his own, Angel checked in daily to make sure I has everything I needed, even booking me a front row seat at a flamenco show nearby (which was a highlight of my trip). The apartment is impeccably decorated, and I had everything I needed for a comfortable stay, including the use of their kitchen. Angel and Nacho have set the bar high for my future airbnb visits. I will definitely book with them the next time I'm in Madrid!
El piso es hermoso, es un experiencia perfecta de Madrid. Ángel y Nacho, aunque no tuve el placer de conocerlos en persona, fueron unos hosts excelentes, atentos y cuidadosos.

Angel and Nato are wonderful hosts. Angel has a wealth of ideas and his guidance made our short stay in Madrid absolutely fantastic. The apartment is beautiful with very detail designed to perfection. A lovely old building with superb period features.
We were made so welcome and our hosts couldn't do enough for us.
A real gem. Thank you so much for making our stay perfect.
The location is perfect. The apartment was clean. Angel was interested in making me feel comfortable. I strongly recommend Angel and his accomodation.

Fantastic!!! Great place, quiet location yet right in the heart of everything!!! Angel is a very considerate, has great taste and all around helpful!! We like it so much and is looking the date now to go back again!!
Host made use feel most welcome.  Property description and location as per what was advertised.

Great location. Walking distance to Plaza Mayor. Host allowed us to drop our bags off prior to check in which was very helpful! We had a marvelous stay and communication with Jen (friend of host) who gave us wonderful restaurant recommendations.
The pictures are not super accurate of what the apartment looks like. The beds were not comfortable
Stayed one night, smooth check-in all good

Fantastic apartment in a fantastic neighborhood. We had everything we needed and even A/C!
Clean, easy to find, close to groceries, close to nightlife, close to major city monuments.
I would 1000% recommend to book this Airbnb!

The apartment was located conveniently one block away from metro and next to many breakfast places and markets. The location was a good base, while being in a safe neighborhood for family. Since it was close to Placa Espanya, we finished our activities for Montjuic on first 24 hours.
Everything was clean and renovated. The shower was good size. This place was my kid’s favorite airbnb. The office persons were friendly and helpful.

Very pleasant apartment with good air and light. Ideal for a family, location is very good. Several grocery stores are close by.  Bathroom shower is tiny but functional. Kitchenette is adequate, minimal pots/pans/dishes. Jen is very helpful.

The place was quaint and had a warmth to it. Really liked the place for it's connectivity and proximity to the market and Gran Via.
Overall a very nice stay and really liked the property.
👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻

Cheap interior in a old building. AC is available only in the hall. Bedrooms were very hot and small. Location is convenient for tourist attractions.

We really enjoyed our stay. Great location close to the Plaza Mayor and San Miguel Market and so many other things. Besides that our stay was great and the host had great recommendations and communication.
Great communication and easy access. The apartment was conveniently located close to the main attractions and safe.
Had a great stay in Kristian's place. Everyone was really helpful, location is absolutely perfect to explore Madrid. No problem highly recommending.

The apartment is good, located in the city center. The metro station is near as well as supermarkets. The place is clean and is similar to the photos provided. We stayed for 1 night only, but would gladly stay for a longer time in future.

The place is located in a central spot accessible to many shops you may need and it’s about 10min walking distance from Puerta de Sol. It isn’t accessible to wheelchair. You must climb stairs before getting to the elevator. Just check with the host prior your arrival to know which door number will be ringing because it isn’t provided in the instructions and there are several apartments in the building.

Ubicación perfecta, en el centro de Madrid, a un paso de Sol, Plaza Mayor, Gran Vía, Rastro, Latina, ... Precio adecuado, teniendo en cuenta que nos encontramos en fechas navideñas. No hemos tenido ningún problema, por lo que no necesitamos contactar con Kristian en ningún momento. Nos abrió Jen, una persona muy agradable y dispuesta, que nos permitió dejar las maletas antes de la hora del check-in, para poder visitar Madrid sin equipaje. Repetiremos!

The place was outfitted well and everything worked well. Jen the Host was very nice too and she explained well how everything worked to me. Thank You!
The Kitchen was great to cook. Heat worked great. Hot water great. Secured building. Good walkable location. The washer worked well. Sofa was comfortable
Only one issue I had so I’ll mention that the shower is super small- something that can’t be changed though. Great central location a few minutes walk from Tirso De Molina metro stop, also close to Sol. Spacious apartment for a quick stay in the city.

La ubicación es inmejorable, realmente puedes llegar a cualquier lugar solo caminando. La calle es tranquila y a tan solo una cuadra puedes encontrar vida nocturna si lo deseas. El departamento es muy cómodo y con elevador, solo hay que subir un tramo de escaleras para llegar al elevador. Las vista desde las ventanas es muy bonita y se disfruta de la estancia.

las fotos del piso están muy bien hechas. Nos decepcionó un poco. No estaba limpio, los colchones de las camas como si no hubiesen, se notaba el somier de la cama. El baño estaba sucio, pelos de otros ocupantes, el agua de la ducha casi no salía. La cocina los utensilios sucios, había comida como azúcar abiertos y en mal estado. Algunas toallas con manchas sospechosas. Cuando dejas la maleta para que te la guarden en la consigna pueden acceder otras personas ya que están a la vista y tienen acceso a otro piso. Debería tener un espacio específico con llave. Lo único que nos gustó fue la ubicación y Jen nos recibió bien.

Bunkbed was unsleepable and had to sleep on floor and sofa, which weren’t any better
Walls very thin, could hear noise/talking/music from neighbours and people on the street
Heater didnt work, kept it on with closed doors and had no effect.
AC didn’t work, same situation as with the heater.
Bathroom taps were detaching and not fixed in place.
Sofa was also visibly dirty.
Both bedroom doors were too long for the floor so they scraped when you tried to close and were very difficult to open and close.
For main bedroom, bed had to be moved so that the door could close.
Lugar muy cerca de todos los sitios turísticos.
Great value for city centre

Very conveniently located near city center and walkable to Plaza Mayor, Anton Martin market, San Gines Chocolatier, even something further like Prado Museum, Basilica church or Royal Palace.. Apartment was also clean with running hot water, washing machine, heater, and fridge. However, the main entrance door was so heavy and we needed to climb a bit of stairs before reaching a tiny elevator and then climb another short flight of stairs to reach apartment. Was quite a struggle for two of us with luggages. Also, bedroom doors were quite stuck to floor and needed to be pushed harder to close or open. A new set of hairdryer could be a great addition too 😉. Overall, it was a fussfree check in and check out + superb location to first timer in Madrid to walk and explore
Exactly what we expected

Kristian’s place is in a prime location for visiting many places of interest in Madrid. The place was quite well maintained with proper facilities. However, some of the doors were difficult to open/close and the floor was a little sticky. Overall, it was still a pleasant stay for us.
The place was as listed and was at great location. Many restaurants near by and very walkable to anywhere here I’m Madrid.
Apartamento muy central, cerca a sol, gran vía; es un quinto piso el edificio es viejo pero el apto es confortable, muy buena actitud de Jen la encargada.

Kristian was incredible! She and Jen were so accommodating and flexible to our changes in check in and check out schedule, including luggage storage. This was a lovely little place with clear instructions and a fantastic location in close proximity to major sites and metro stops!

Unsere Übernachtung war sehr angenehm. Es war alles vorhanden, was wir benötigt haben. Die Lage war direkt zentral und somit alles fussläufig erreichbar. Das Ausladen war über eine kleine Parkinsel gegenüber des Appartements möglich. Danach haben wir in einem nahegelegenen Parkhaus über Nacht geparkt. Der Fahrstuhl beginnt ab der ersten Etage, sodass wir einige Treppen mit dem Gepäck überwinden mussten. Ansonsten ein sehr gutes Preis-Leistungsverhältnis und eine sehr empfehlenswerte Unterkunft für diese zentrale Lage in Madrid.

La verdad que todo perfecto, como dice el anuncio. Buena ubicación, llegada flexible y se amoldan a nuestros horarios, no se escucha ruido de la calle y todo muy limpio.
También hay flexibilidad en cuanto a dejar el equipaje, ya que eso nos ha venido muy bien.
La única pega que le pondría es que no hay papel higiénico, echamos en falta una escoba y recogedor, y más toallas. Fregona sí hay pero sin friegasuelos. Por todo lo demás, genial.
Great place. Very centrally located. Checkin was easy and host available upon need. Would recommend

Le logement de Kristian est idéalement placé pour un we et la visite de Madrid.

Buena localización, puedes caminar a todas partes, limpio.
