마드리드 시내에 위치하여 도보여행이 가능합니다 근처 주차장의 요금이 비싼편이고 차가 들어오기엔 길이 좁고 사람이 많아 대중교통을 이용한다면 좋습니다.

Angel and Nacho were such gracious and friendly hosts. We arrived later than we had anticipated, necessitating a change in their plans to accommodate us and they did so with style and grace.

Their exquisitely decorated apartment in a lovely, classic Madrid building is exactly as you see in the pictures, as are all listed features. Elevator works beautifully. Location is absolutely perfect, 10-15 minute walk maximum to the museums. 5 minutes to Plaza Mayor. Great café for pastries 1 block away. Bedroom is very large, the bed is Very comfortable (important to me!), aircon works great. Huge bathroom with plenty of sink counter space and makeup mirror. Everything Very clean. Angel and Nacho gave us some great Madrid sights and restaurant recommendations. My husband and I had a great conversation with Nacho about the economy and politics of Spain which we really enjoyed. We also engaged Angel in a discussion about Spanish history. Such interesting people! We had a very enjoyable stay in Madrid with Angel and Nacho and highly recommend staying with them.

Though we arrived later than we anticipated, both Angel and Nacho welcomed us with smiles and open arms. Both the guys where kind enough to point out all kinds of useful information. There are three major galleries and many great restaurants an tapas bars within a short walk from there home. Angel and Nacho took the time to sit with us and share a number of interesting stories about Spain and Spanish history.
Their place is absolutely beautiful - Tastefully decorated with art and antiques, we felt like we were on the set of a classic film. Our room had a large private on-suite. The bedroom was large with a very comfortable bed.
Overall very organized and super nice hosts. Wish we could have stayed a little longer!

Angel was a great host. He had some good tips for getting to know Madrid and some areas around, like Toledo. He was really friendly.

The apartment is very central, easy to get to from public transport. You are a five minute walk from Plaza Mayor and most of central madrid.

The apartment is gorgeous. It is definitely the most luxurious room I've seen on airBnB and could be listed for more money than Angel is asking for. It felt like a nice hotel.
Great experience - Angel and Natcho are very welcoming and go out of their way to make you feel at home. I would very much recommend staying here - very central location and nice quiet room.

Angel and Nacho were wonderful hosts and the accommodations were superior to all others we stayed at during our visit to Spain. The apartment was full of beautiful art work and antiques. We only wish we had more time to get to know our hosts even more!

Angel and Nacho were such helpful and friendly hosts even though we only met them for a few hours before they left for a trip. They gave us lots of good tips and advice on how to enjoy Madrid, they even made reservations for us to restaurants and shows. The apartment is very beautiful and filed with lots of beautiful antiques, the bedroom and bathroom are very clean and spacious and the bed very comfortable. The apartment is situated in a very nice safe area and is centrally located. We loved staying at this apartment and hopefully one day we will return.

Y'a que "Super" je veux dire!
Angle est super gentil et super sympa ! L'appartement est super joli et super placé !
Notre vacances est super bien finir grace à nous avons choisi l'appartement de Angle !

Wonderful, spacious apartment! Well equipped and at only a short walk to the main attractions in Madrid. Despite being so central, the apartment is very quiet.

Angel's neighbor was extremely accommodating over check-in, while Angel stayed in touch at all times. I am sure I will return and highly recommend this fabulous and central apartment in Madrid.

Valerie has a fantastic taste and her beautiful flat reflects her elegance and cosmopolitan style. She recieved us long after midnight with a welcoming smile. The quiet room situated in an upper class living area with en suite bathroom was impeccablely clean and comfortable Only a 10 min car drive from the airport (taxi fare 20 €) makes this room the perfect match for a weekend trip.
And once you've tasted Valeries home made peach jam you really feel like home.

Buena estancia en el apartamento de Valerié y una chica muy agradable. Aunque no esté ubicado en el centro está bien comunicado con parada de autobús al lado de casa y parada de metro a 10 mins andando.

Staying in a very quiet private room with bathroom in a wonderful historical building with elevator in one of the best neighbourhoods of Madrid, having almost every interesting spot within walking distance (e.g. the Prado and Reina Sofia museums) and getting lots of recommendations and a helping hand by very charming hosts whenever you need it - what else can you ask for?
I had a wonderful stay and will keep Madrid in good memory! Thanks to Angel and Nacho!

This was our first experience with accomodation trough airbnb. overall a very good experience. description and pictures of the accomodation are accurate. location is super, all major attractions are on walking distance. the hosts were very nice an welcoming. tips and advise are usefull for newbies to madrid, it certainly improved our trip. we had a lot of privacy as the hosts were away for most of our stay.

I had a marvelous time staying with Angel, a most considerate host. The room/apartment and location is superb, almost everything on the must see list is within 15 minutes (or less) on foot including Atocha Station. If he offers oranges I suggest eating lots of them as they may come from his families places near Valencia. Cannot say I have ever been much of a fan of oranges until trying them freshly dead.

Nacho y Ángel son dos personas increíbles, con una gran calidad humana y que te hacen sentir muy bien desde el primer momento, siempre están preocupados de cada detalle y siempre están dispuestos a dar los mejores consejos para que la experiencia en Madrid sea lo mejor. Sin duda el anuncio se queda corto con lo hermoso de su apartamento, es hermoso (digno de una revista de diseño). El barrio es muy centrico, en solo unos pasos estás en el corazón de Madrid. Además es muy privado, muy silencioso, sin duda volvería a repetir mi experiencia con ellos. La habitación es super cómoda, el baño muy bonito, considero que muchos hoteles estarían celosos del espacio que han creado Nacho y Ángel!!!

Great experience to stay in Angel & Nacho's home. Stylish antique rooms & super convenient location to any spots. Angel is so thoughtful and helpful, giving me the tips & recommendation, and book the seat for me for flamenco show & restaurant. Everything is perfect!! Thank you Angel & Natho, you made my trip to Madrid special!

Valérie's place was comfortable and very clean. She was attentive and helped us find places to go in Madrid. A difficult situation arose at one point and she dealt with it very well and professionally.

Valérie was one of the greatest hostesses! Very friendly and helpful. Her place was very beautiful and clean and she made sure we had everything we needed from the beginning on. The breakfast she made every morning was a nice surprise and another proof of her generous hospitality. It's been a very pleasant stay in Madrid. Thank you!

Valérie was very kind and gave very useful tips to get know the neighborhood. The room is quite comfortable with en suite bathroom and it was imaculated clean.  The apartment is surrounded by a great green park and it's within a calm area, as it's in a private condominium. Less than 10 min from the airport (by car).
No pude haber elegido mejor lugar para hospedarme por este mes, Valerie es l mejor anfitriona del mundo 😃, súper recomendado

Recomiendo este alojamiento a todo aquel que busque un lugar tranquilo, muy bien ubicado e impecable. Además el piso es precioso, tiene un encanto especial que se aprecia nada más entrar por la puerta. Valérie es una anfitriona muy atenta y amable.

L'appartamento di Valeriè è super cool , la stanza è molto carina e perfettamente pulita.
Valeriè è simpatica e disponibile. La possibilità di effettuare il check in e il check out in qualsiasi orario è veramente comodo. Super consigliato
Très accueillant, lit confortable, lieu sécurisé et au calme.

Valerie was an amazing host. She has her own business, but was so willing to be available for my arrival and departure, to have breakfast,  and even to show me some of the amazing sites in Madrid. Her home is a haven of peace, quiet and beautiful things everywhere! The room is lovely and private with a beautiful bathroom. I would recommend highly

Very tidy and lovely AirBnb room equipped with everything you need. A good bed and nice bathroom. The communication was super easy and quick and the place looks exactly like it does on the picture. Valerie is a great host and it was very nice to chat with her during breakfast. It was a short stay, which we ejoyed very much! Parking was possible inside the building complex she lives in.

We only got to stay one night, but it was very comfortable. Valérie was very flexible with our check-in which was great. She is very friendly and made us toast and jam in the morning. There was a private bathroom connected with our room and air-conditioning in the room. A little far walk to the metro, but she suggested some convenient buses that were closer that go to the city center.

Ha sido un placer compartir estos días con Valérie en su preciosa casa. Valérie es una persona muy amable y me ha hecho sentir como en mi casa. La casa es muy cómoda y bonita y Valérie es muy especial. Muchas gracias de nuevo por la hospitalidad. Espero volver pronto!
Room and private bathroom were comfortable and clean. Valerie was easy to communicate with and gave us all the info we needed. Definitely enjoyed our stay!

Chambre bien située et une hôtesse qui nous a fourni des informations très utiles sur les endroits à visiter en ville et en région. Stationnement sécuritaire et des restaurants près. Aéroport à quinze minutes en auto. Hôtesse multilingue
Una gran hospitalidad, recomiendo mucho la casa de Valerie, una gran persona
Valerie has a very nice quiet space and she went out of her way to help us. Thanks Valerie! Rick and Suanne
Excelente sitio, fácil de llegar y salir en transporte publico, Valerie una excelente anfitriona.
Un joli appartement amménagé avec beaucoup de gout. Séjour très agréable.
Muito bom

La habitación y el baño impecables. Valérie súper agradable y servicial, se puede conversar de cualquier tema.
Si no eres de Madrid te sugiere sitios donde poder ir. Repetiría la experiencia.

El alojamiento de Valérie es muy agradable y acogedor. La habitación es espaciosa y el baño grande. Excelente localización para eventos y congresos en la zona. Valérie es además muy amable, súper recomendable!

La habitación está impecable, es muy amplia. Valérie es encantadora. El edificio está situado en el interior de una propiedad privada. Es muy tranquilo. Cerca, hay varias paradas de bus para poder desplazarse.
very good room with private bathroom on a porch apartment in Madrid. Valerie is very helpful and supportive. I will recommend this place
La anfitriona es muy amable y puntual. La habitación es amplia y limpia. Los colchones son cómodos. El baño tiene de todo y está limpio. No hubo problemas con aparcamiento.
Corta estancia pero muy agradable. Todo perfecto

Un alojamiento cómodo y muy limpio. Habitación con baño privado. Armario, calefacción, aire acondicionado… todo lo que necesitas. 15 min andando hasta una parada de metro y uber al centro por unos 12 €. Sitio ideal para pasar unos días. Anfitriones amables dispuestos a ayudarte en lo que necesites.

Valerie’s accommodation was one of the best we ever had. She is such a warm person and always ready to help you when needed. We spent the New Year’s in Madrid and we also got to spend part of the night with her, Fernando and their friends and we really enjoyed the night. The apartment is located really close to the bus station and 10-15 minutes to the metro station- you have to cross a park to get to the metro and this was, in fact, the best way to start our day- it is a super quiet and relaxing park and sitting in the sun for 15-20 minutes charged us for the entire day.
The room has a private bathroom with all the necessities and the view was also something that we enjoyed every day.
Valerie was kind enough to let us use anything we needed from the kitchen, left us coffee if she was out before we woke up and she also offered us cups of tea when we returned from the city. The apartment itself is super cozy and hospitable.
Another strong point is the fact that it is located in a private condominium and right next to the park, which makes it super quiet.
Couldn’t have hoped for something better for our trip to Madrid.
Thank you, Valerie and Fernando!

Todo en el alojamiento de Valerie es inmejorable. La habitación te permite un descanso e intimidad perfectos, la limpieza es impecable. Se respira mucha paz y bienestar en todas las estancias y todo está decorado con muchísimo gusto. La comunicación con valerie es excelente. Hemos tenido el placer de compartir algún tiempo con ella y ha sido muy agradable . Sin duda volveré a hospedarme allí si vuelvo por la zona . Gracias por todo .

Super encantado de la estancia en el hogar de Valérie. Todo muy limpio y bien organizado. Piso tranquilo, dentro de una urbanización privada, pegado a un parque. On top, está decorado con muy buen gusto! Ella es muy simpática y disponible :)  super recomendado

Es una mujer muy agradable, se molestó en enseñarnos por Internet zonas cercanas para salir o visitar.  La habitación es enorme y muy bonita con una cama grande super cómoda.  El baño está impecable y es muy grande también.  Nos dio opción de usar la cocina, que por cierto, preciosa cocina, para mi la quiero!  Tengo que volver en unos meses por la zona y sin duda si está libre  volveré.
Todo estupendo
Piso muy limpio y acogedor, al lado de un parque precioso y cerca del metro. La habitación es cómoda con baño privado. Recomendable!

The room was clean and super comfy.
Definitely would stay again

Valerie’s apartment is beautiful and full of character. I really enjoyed staying there and Valerie and her son were so friendly and generous! Perfect for conferences close by and easy transport to the center with the metro just a walk through a lovely park. Definitely recommended for a stay in Madrid!

I stayed with Valérie for one month during a work trip in early summer. She was the perfect hostess - generous, accomodating, willing to help, and interesting. The room was perfect - with high quality fittings and private bathroom. I had everything I needed for my stay, as was listed here on AirBnB. The location suited me as it was nearby my workplace, and not too far from the centre by bus 146 or by Metro from Suanzes. Having a beautiful park nearby even inspired some early morning jogging. The pool is only open during the summer season, 11-21 hrs but is also perfect for a refreshing after-work swimming session. It is shared with other residents within the gated complex, but was never busy in the evenings. Just outside the gate is an excellent bakery, where I enjoyed more than one delicious breakfast. I had a very comfortable stay at Valérie's and would highly reccommend  it!

El alojamiento de Valérie está sensacional!!!El apartamento es precioso y la habitación cumplió todas mis expectativas, limpia, bonita, con un magnífico cuarto de baño privado.
Está muy bien comunicado en autobús y metro, perfecto para moverte oír Madrid.
El proceso de llegada muy sencillo y Valerie siempre atenta a ello

Habitación espectacular, con baño privado, muy limpia y acogedora. Valérie fue muy agradable y atenta desde el primer momento. Además se adaptó a nuestra hora de llegada y de salida. Repetiría sin duda!!!

The apartment is located at a quite, nice and green spot. The room was as is in the pictures. Both the room and the bathroom were very clean and very comfy. The bus line 146 heads directly to the city centre from the front of the private development. Transportation during our stay was easy. Valerie is a very helpful host with whom you may enjoy nice conversations. She has been super nice to us during our stay. She provided local information upon our arrival which had been very helpful throughout our stay. I would definitely recommend staying at her place for those who would like to enjoy Madrid.

Dentro del ritmo frenético de Madrid, el alojamiento de Valérie es un oasis. Tanto el apartamento como la propietaria desprenden calma y es una zona muy tranquila. Parece que sea imposible que en 30 mint de autobús estés en el centro de Madrid.
Para llegar al metro hay un paseo ( 15mint) por un parque muy bonito.
En general una relajante elección a un paso de una entretenida ciudad.

Valérie is de perfecte host.
Je voelt je er direct thuis.
Heel mooie plaats. Heel goede locatie. Heel goede tips.
Volgende keer Madrid komen we terug naar hier.
Estuvimos muy cómodos y Valérie fue muy amable en todo momento. El apartamento muy agradable.

Very nice and clean space, conveniently located,
Thank you

Notre séjour chez Valérie a été au-delà de nos espérances. Nous avions eu du retard avec notre avion à l'aller, et Valérie nous a attendu et a été très compréhensive. Dès que nous sommes arrivés dans son logement, nous avons senti qu'il y avait de la bienveillance. Valérie n'a pas hésité à nous conseiller, nous renseigner sur la mobilité à Madrid et les endroits sympas à découvrir. La chambre qu'elle nous a confié possède une salle de bain privée ce qui est très agréable. Bus et métro sont très proches et même si son logement n'est pas directement dans Madrid, ça vaut vraiment le coup de faire un peu de marche pour rejoindre les transports. Si vous aimez discuter, croiser des gens et être proche d'un parc, c'est LE bon plan. Merci pour tout Valérie.

Valérie ha asistido perfectamente con la organización de la llegada y durante la estancia.
La habitación y el baño estaban relucientes, nos sentíamos como en casa. La cama y las almohadas eran súper cómodas (incluso para mi estando embarazada!).
Volveríamos siempre. Gracias!

Had a restful overnight stay here during a recent trip to Madrid.  Everything was as described in the listing.  Valerie quickly responded to any questions and was flexible about check-in timing and bag-drop.

Ha sido un gran estancia. Valérie se mostró pendiente en todo momento para ayudarnos. El alojamiento,precioso, limpio, la habitación era muy amplia, el baño privado era grande y estaba reluciente. Nos ofreció bajar a la piscina porque hacía muchísimo calor y nos ofreció toallas para ello. Nos indico muy bien donde desayunar y como movernos por allá. Hay una parada de autobús justo la casa que te lleva directamente a Callao, asi que muy bien comunicado y con muy buena zona para aparcar.
Sin duda, si tengo que volver allá, volvería a este alojamiento.
Habitación y baño impecables y con todo detalle, súper silecioso para dormir profundamente. Valérie siempre atenta a los mensajes y trato perfecto. Sin duda recomendable.

Las dos semanas que he pasado en casa de Valérie, me he sentido muy cómoda, compartiendo conversaciones con ella en algunas ocasiones.
He podido disfrutar de tranquilidad y libertad de movimientos: Ha sido una estancia muy agradable.
Agradezco a Valérie su amabilidad.

La zona es residencial, muy tranquila y bonita.
El piso está decorado con mucho gusto y la habitación es suite con su propio baño, con mucha intimidad y confort. El colchón muy cómodo, algo que valoro mucho.
Valerie es una perfecta anfitriona.
Lo recomiendo 100%

We had a lovely airbnb stay here. Valerie was so kind and helpful. She communicated well and it was a super easy check-in process.
The room had everything we needed, and the living room/kitchen is very comfortable. Both my friend and I worked during our stay and desk spce was available with fast WiFi.
I would highly recommend this airbnb!

A great experience! Our hosts were welcoming, helpful, and charming. The flat was lovely and our private accomodations
were very nice. The location was good, very near Puerta del Sol and Plaza Mayor.






a

Excelente la habitación y la ubicacion del departamento de Angel y Nacho. Buen gusto en la decoración y limpieza impecable. Lo mejor de todo es la predisposición y amabilidad de ambos para todo lo que necesitas. Sin dudas volvería a hospedarme en este lugar.

Valerie fue una excelente anfitriona y siempre al pendiente de lo que necesitamos. Muy agradable ella y su alojamiento. Bien comunicado con el Metro y el autobús. Un poco complicado para llegar pero nos ayudó a solucionar el tema. Limpieza en ña habitación y Valerie muy receptiva. Volvería sin duda.

This was exactly what I needed. Valerie was very helpful and responsive. The room was super clean and quiet. On the recommendation of Valerie, every morning before work, I went to the superb  Santagloria Coffee & Bakery. Thank you very much Valerie for everything and sorry we didn't chat more.
En general todo muy bien, la habitación es como la describen y la anfitriona es increíble
Habitación y baño privado muy limpio. El colchón y la almohada eran muy cómodos y descansamos mejor que en casa. Ningún ruido.

El alojamiento de valerie es tal y como se describe, nos dejó entrar antes de la hora indicada para que pudiésemos dejar las cosas y poder disfrutar de la ciudad tranquilamente. Al día siguiente nos hizo el favor de poder irnos más tarde ya que yo tenía que acudir a un curso y tenía que estar allí hasta tarde.
La zona es muy tranquila para descansar y ella es muy amable!!

Valérie is a five-star host. The room offers sufficient privacy thanks to the integrated bathroom. It is comfortably furnished and you immediately feel at home. Valérie is easy to reach and responds promptly to questions before and during your stay. I was very satisfied and would come back at any time. I can only recommend the room and Valérie as a host to everyone.
Το δωμάτιο και η τουαλέτα ήταν παρά πολύ καθαρά. Η Βαλέρια ήταν πολύ φιλική και μας πρότεινε Ωραια μέρη για να πάμε. Το συστήνω.

Valerie and Alexis are extraordinary Airbnb hosts in Madrid. Their warm welcome, constant availability before and during the trip, and helpful demeanor truly made the stay exceptional. Highly recommended for a memorable and comfortable experience!

Valérie felt instantly like a family-member instead of an airbnb host. She was super welcoming, warm and inviting and went out of her way to help me with certain things I needed during my stay. I am forever grateful to her.

personalmente, me ha ido bien la localización. Si bien es cierto que me preocupé ya que se trataba de mi primera reserva y no me respondía al llegar al aeropuerto. Pero una vez me respondió pude llegar al lugar sin casi problemas. Al no saber que se trataba de una urbanización privada, no sabía si podía acceder con el Uber al interior, la tuve que llamar.cuando llegué, había unos amigos tuyos, cenando, pero se mostró muy amable conmigo fue muy buena anfitriona

Valerie's place was beautiful and spotless. Best thing is the dedicated T&B. Had a little bump during the check in but Valerie was very communicative and assisted us all the way.  Arrived very late, we haven't had dinner yet and she also gave us a great recommendation.  Our stay was very brief as we have to leave early the next day, but we had a good night sleep as the bed was very comfortable.  Host was also generous with beverage and use of some things in the kitchen. Highly recommended!

Mi estancia en el apartamento de Valérie en Madrid fue excepcional. Fui recibido por su hijo Alexis, quien fue extremadamente amable y educado. El apartamento estaba impecablemente limpio y la luminosidad del lugar lo hacía aún más acogedor. Me sentí increíblemente cómodo durante toda mi estancia. Sin duda, recomendaría este lugar a cualquiera que busque un alojamiento acogedor y bien cuidado en Madrid. ¡Gracias por una experiencia maravillosa!

Merci à Valérie pour la qualité de la prestation de son logement
Lors de notre séjour nous avons été souvent à l’extérieur et nous avons profité des espaces que pour la nuit
En tout cas nous sommes ravies de notre séjour (lieu accessible, sécurisée, un appartement très bien équipée, notre espace privatif très apprécié avec une bonne literie, tout le nécessaire de salle de bain à disposition)
Merci à Valerie pour ses conseils avisés sur Madrid, les lieux touristiques à découvrir et les informations pratique
Le bus devant la résidence est un plus à moindre coût pour rejoindre tout les zones souhaitez
Merci également à son fils, Alexis, pour nos brefs échanges et son sourire.
Nous recommandons et nous n’hésiterons pas à revenir.
Bonito, limpio y acogedor
very friendly host

Great room. Actually more like a hotel with an amazing private bathroom. Valérie is very helpful and responsive. The district is much nicer than on google maps. It’s private, good quality building, nice surroundings, huge beautiful park just nearby. Metro is 20 min walkable and a bus station is just near the building. 5 min ride to the airport by a cab. Best place for a short term visit.
Estancia amplia, limpia y zona muy tranquila. En todo momento dispuestos a orientarte
Valerie和她的家人很友好，家里很干净，房间舒适整洁，有独立卫浴很方便。小区环境很好很安静，也很安全，推荐！

Excelente lugar de Valérie, totalmente recomendable. Su ubicación esta en un entorno seguro y con mucha  áreas verdes para disfrutar de paseos. Su ubicación esta perfecta para tomar el autobús o metro que te mueve por todas las atracciones de Madrid.

Chambre très confortable, propre et calme.
Valérie est très sympathique et nous a mis à notre aise.
A 30 min en bus du centre mais très facile d’y accéder le bus (possibilité de prendre le billet dans le bus avec carte bleue) est direct de l’appartement au centre.
Quartier très calme même la nuit aucun problème d’insécurité.
Estancia agradable. Todo tal cual se había ofertado. La anfitriona ha sido muy amable.

Valérie es una excelente anfitriona. La habitación es preciosa, es como si se estuviera en un hotel. El recibimiento fue ameno, Valérie nos indicó lugares donde podríamos ir a comer, fue muy amable y simpática. Su casa es hermosa, súper recomendada.

The place is within a garden/green zone which we appreciated very much. The room is impeccably clean, comfortable and the entire apartment is well decorated. Valerie is such a nice host and we wish to stay with Valerie again whenever we are back in Madrid. 💖
Vi nød 3 herlige dage,  det var et perfekt sted, vi kan kun anbefale at bo her hos Valerie

We had to catch a flight out of Barajas and needed a place close to the airport.  Usually that means a hotel, but finding this place with Valerie was a much better option.  Nice room with great bed, large well appointed private bath.  The room was just inside the entry door, so you felt you could come and go without disturbing the host.  Her kitchen was a dream, and she was totally cool with us storing food in her fridge and preparing our evening meal.  Location, although near the airport, was great for walking around.  We think we would stay here again, and not for airport access, but also for visiting Madrid sights.  You could easily take the metro into the city center, see the sites, then return to this quiet haven at night.
Alojamiento muy cómodo, todo muy ordenado y cuidado. Zona muy tranquila
alojamiento impecable, habitación grande y con baño propio que le da un plus de comodidad. la cama era muy cómoda, zona muy tranquila y todo muy limpio, recomiendo el alojamiento de Valerie al 100%
Valerie was really friendly and an amazing host! The perfect place for anyone going to Madrid.
Todo correcto
Everything was great with the stay. The place was in a very nice and quiet neighbourhood. Valerie was very welcoming, friendly and always willing to help with suggestions.
Appartamento pulito e carino in zona comoda all'aeroporto
Fácil acceso, transporte y restaurantes, Valerie es muy atenta y servicial
She is great woman with great hospitality....i will repeat the trip.....wonderful ...
La habitación está muy bien, el baño genial, Valerie un encanto. La urbanización donde se encuentra esta muy bien. Todo perfecto, calidad precio espectacular, volveremos seguro.

La estancia ha sido muy corta de un día, pero muy agusto y cómoda. Valerié es una mujer agradable y comunicativa según llegamos nos enseñó su casa y nos dejó todo a nuestra disposición.Tiene una casa muy bonita, una cocina chulísima,amplia y cómoda y la habitación donde dormimos sencillamente perfecta con su propio baño que no compartes con nadie. Por cierto, el colchón y las almohadas nuevos y comodísimos.
Sin duda es una casa que recomiendo y que si tengo la oportunidad volveré a repetir.
Un saludo Valerié gracias por todo.
Valerie’s home is very nice and clean! She is a great host for a trip to Madrid, particularly if you are hoping to stay near the airport. Would recommend!

Todo perfecto. El apartamento de Valerie es muy bonito, la habitacion preciosa, comoda, muy tranquila y muy limpia.
Valerie muy atenta y amable en todo momento.
Sin duda volveremos en nuestro próximo viaje a Madrid
Totalmente recomendable.

appartamento molto pulito in un contesto residenziale alle porte di Madrid da cui è facilmente raggiungibile il centro città. Valerie è stata un host molto gentile e ci ha fornito molte informazioni utili che abbiamo apprezzato.

Valérie was an amazing host, very helpful and responsive. The place was amazing and very clean.  The room was very comfortable just like home. The place is easy to find. Thank you Valérie for all your support.
Valérie is the great host with super nice apartment and everything for you safety and cozy staying in Madrid.
Excelente atención de Valérie
Recomendable 100%

Valérie vous accueille dans son appartement situé dans un quartier plaisant et dans une résidence sécurisée.
Le centre ville est très facile d'accès bus (en face de la résidence), métro à peine un peu plus loin.
Pas de soucis, Valérie vous donne toutes les explications nécessaires, très réactive, présente tout en étant très discrète.
Séjour très agréable.

A fantastic place with an exceptional host!
I loved my room – it was incredibly clean, cozy, and offered so much privacy. I felt completely safe and right at home. After a long, exhausting trip, I needed a safe, spotless place to rest, and Valeria’s place was just perfect.
She went above and beyond to accommodate me, even allowing me to stay as long as possible before my red-eye flight to Dubai. Valeria is truly a thoughtful and flexible host, and I’m so grateful for her kindness.

Valerie is a great host. She were there to welcoming us and help us to find our flight in her computer. She also gave us a ride to the airport for 20£. Her apartment is very close to the airport. She has a beautiful apartment and the room has a private bathroom inside the room which we love it. We enjoy the short stay with Valerie. We appreciate her attentions.
Alojamiento perfecto para un fin de semana en Madrid. La estancia estaba según lo esperado. La anfitriona nos trató con mucha amabilidad. Muy recomendable.
If you're lucky enough to find Valerie's place available, take it. Comfortable, convenient, reasonably priced and Valerie is a gracious hostess.
Nice place, Friendly host, clean cozy apartment  Highly recommend

ESCEPCIONAL!!
Me causó buena impresión desde el primer instante antes de realizar la reserva, y cuando llegué al piso la sensación que tuve fue superior mis expectativas, fotos y descripción auténticas totalmente. Nos recibió muy amablemente y nos ofreció su casa como si realmente fuese la nuestra, Valérie es excepcional no solo como digna anfitriona sino personalmente: flexible con los horarios, te informa puntualmente sobre cualquier duda y está abierta a cualquier gestión que necesites. Servicio de recogida/traslado al aeropuerto opcional 20€. No se pude pedir más!! Volveremos.

Mi recomendación 100%.
El mejor sitio para sentirte cómodo y seguro.
Valerie transmite total confianza y serenidad. Es una anfitriona magnífica.
Soy anfitriona y me ha encantado vivir la experiencia esta vez como huésped.

El apartamento está en una urbanización tranquila, y la está casa decorada con buen gusto. Es amplia y luminosa, no le falta nada!!

Valérie ha sido muy correcta y flexible con nosotros, lo cual se agradece mucho.
Si quieres visitar el centro de Madrid, puede que parezca que está lejos.. pero en transporte público está bien comunicado, y al final, la zona residencial y la seguridad de ella lo compensan. Recomendamos 100%.

Valérie ha sido una huésped fantástica. Hemos ido por un curso de un solo día y la ubicación nos ha venido de maravilla porque estaba muy bien conectada para llegar y salir desde Barajas.
La casa con una limpieza impecable, fácil de ubicar, en una residencia privada.
La habitación amplia, con todas las comodidades.
Nos ha recibido y estado muy atenta.
Gracias

El apartamento de Valérie es precioso, muy cuidado y muy limpio. La habitación es amplia, el baño estupendo, y te sientes muy cómoda.
Valérie es muy amable. Ella no estaba cuando me alojé, pero me recibió una amiga suya que era encantadora, y que me hizo sentir como en casa.
Sin duda repetiré si tengo que viajar de nuevo a esa zona de Madrid. Un 10!!

Family of 4 having a few days to explore Madrid.
Pros:
- Great location in terms of accessibility to nearby sites of interest and restaurants. More than plenty of options around. Walking distance to most of the city center attractions.
- Fantastic Response by Kristian and Jen. Good recommendations for nearby needs.
- The building has a lift, even though between floors, it certainly helps when coming fully loaded with big suitcases
Cons:
- The entrance of the building could be a bit shocking; especially arriving to find some guy sleeping next to it and some other urinating in the corner..
- The towels of the flat are in dire need of change; unless of course, the guests are looking for a deep exfoliating experience ;)
It’s an apartment well connected to the attractions
Bien cerca del Sol.

Place was as described and very close to the plaza mayor. Lots to do. It was a little smaller than I expected with the main bedroom not having any space for an opened suitcase. There are a lot of stairs to get to the unit. A lot! There is a lift, which is helpful but was not functioning when we checked out, so getting all of our baggage down was problematic.
Other than that we were happy with our stay and Jen was very responsive and helpful.

The apartment is exactly as it is posted. Don't expect anything fancy, but the value for money is great.
The location couldn't be more central and the host is extremely responsive and flexible.
The only downside was the doors were a bit tough to get into with the key and the elevator wasn't always working as expected so we had to walk the stairs which was ok.
Kristen had a storage locker for us to put our things in after checkout which was super helpful.
If you looking for a home base in Madrid the value is great.

Location, location, location!! Great location next to Puerta del Sol and Plaza Mayor and this several train stations. Very good. Would recommend. Only would recommend air conditioning for the nights that are a little hot.
Ottima posizione in centro.  Tutte le attrazioni facilmente raggiungibili a piedi. La signora Jen  sempre pronta ad esaudire le nostre richieste.

Reactive host, very good location in historical town centre, quiet and well insulated 2 bedroom apartment thanks to efficient double-glazed windows. We enjoyed the delicate carillon from the nearby church at 9am, though.
The double bed in the room behind is comfortable. Large wardrobes in both rooms. Kitchen equipment complete with all necessary appliances; just add a couple of towel hooks to make it even more practical.
As it is an old building, the floor is not perfectly even which can cause a feeling of "dizziness" when waking up.
Also, the access to the lift is located 1/2 floor (8 to 10 steps) above the street or apartment's level.
The biggest virtue of the apartment is that it is in a very good location. It was clean and the Host was nice and helpful.

The apartment is in a centric location. The apartment does need a lot of maintenance. The doors to both bedrooms don’t open or close well. The master bedroom need paint. The a/c was not working well. The elevator in the building was not working well.
Great location and clean. The space was a little small, but convenient.
Everything was brilliant!!

We enjoyed our stay at this accomodation as it was very central. However unfortunately there was big construction across the road going on 24/7 which we were not warned about and kept us awake at night. The wifi also wasn’t stable. The sofa bed also disconnected through the final night making it difficult for 2 people to sleep.

Todo genial, ubicación inmejorable, apartamento com lo necesario, limpio y con aire acondicionado. Anfitrión atento y solucionando dudas y evebtuales problemas.
Recomendable 100%.
old building but renovated and clean apartment. Great location

We loved staying at Kristian’s apartment! It was in an incredible location, with the plaza mayor a two minute walk away and all the major spots in Madrid no more than a 20 minute walk away. The apartment was lovely and spacious with enough beds to sleep 6 comfortably as we were a party of 5. There was air conditioning in the living room only however there were powerful fans that kept the rooms perfectly cool during the days and evenings for other areas of the house. Kristian and his colleague were lovely and were very informative about every aspect of the flat! We loved all the extras we were provided with, for example slippers and hygiene items. The only thing about this flat was that the Wi-Fi did not work very well but there was very good service in the flat so we were all able to still use our phones without many issues. We loved every minute of our stay and will definitely return! :)
Great host. Bnb is right in the centre of Madrid making it easy to go sight seeing and shopping.
Amazing location! Very comfortable and clean
Clean and spacious.
Todo perfecto 🙌 muy recomendable 👌
Apartamento lindo, tudo como descrito, fomos recebidos pessoalmente por anfitrião, local excelente com parking muito próximo e Carrefour 24hs, excelente custo benefício, muito obrigado

Apartamento com localização muito boa, perto dos principais atrativos. Camas confortáveis e apartamento muito bem limpo. Check-in e check-out muito fáceis. Comunicação rápida e gentil. Todas as comodidades presentes
Pontos negativos: com o calor de Madri, os quartos ficam bem quentes. Os ventiladores não deram conta de refrescar. Porém, não reclamamos pois dormimos apenas uma noite. O banheiro também é um local bem quente, pois não tem ventilação, bem exaustão.
Contudo, foi uma hospedagem bastante agradável, principalmente pela facilidade de deslocamento na cidade a partir do apartamento.
Todo bien , buena ubicacion

Good little apartment in a very central location in Madrid - ideal for visiting the city. I would say that if there are more than four of you, it is a little crowded. Also the air-conditioning is clearly quite old and seems to struggle to keep the place cool. If you are taking children, be aware that the curtains are quite thin and hence the light gets in early. Otherwise, all was good.
Muy bonito, excelente ubicación, tenés todo lo que necesitás para iniciar tu visita a Madrid de la mejor forma.

Jen was exceptionally responsive and helpful! She provided places to go and restaurant suggestions and was very helpful and flexible at check in, and check out. excelente lugar, solo falta un poco de pintura en el techo pero lo demás excelente, muy buena ubicación y Jen muy amable y con mucha empatía.

Apartamento con una situación perfecta. Las instrucciones han sido ágiles y claras. El apartamento parece más grande en las fotos, pero nosotras éramos 5 y el espacio estaba bien. La verdad que para una escapa a Madrid es ideal porque está en el centro de todo y tiene todo lo neceserio. Si vuelvo repetiré.

siamo stati a madrid 4 giorni i 5 amici, L' aloggio rispetto alle foto è più piccolo, Il bagno per 5 persone è insufficiente e senza finestra e non c'è un areatore, Un po' scarsa la dotazione degli asciugamani (su richiesta ha poi provveduto a fornirceli).

nel complesso siamo rimasti soddisfatti.

Staying at Angel's place was a wonderful experience. The residence is in the third floor a pittoresque house from 19th century, perfectly located and surprisingly quiet with a spacious floor plan. Furnishing makes you feel home and noble at the same time. It is warm, stylish, cosy, beautiful and has maybe a touch of the style of the House of Bourbon. As a host Angel was super nice, gave good advice and even made a reservation to a great flamenco club. If I had to spend a year in Madrid, I'd choose this place to live in!

Angel was the type of host that keeps me coming back to airbnb.  He shared his excellent knowledge about the area, helped me feel comfortable the entire time, answered my questions, and enlightened my experience.  Thank you!

Excelente experiencia, la ubicación es perfecta y la habitación también, ampliamente recomendable. Desafortunadamente no pude conocer a Ángel pero se las arregló para que tuviera todo lo que necesitaba.

My stay with Angel and Nacho can be summed up in one word..."PERFECT!" It. Was. Perfect.

Great location in the middle of all the big things to see. Their place was stunning, warm and comfortable. They were so inviting you almost feel like family. They helped me with my plans and even set up some reservations for me to see Flamenco and have a wonderful dinner! I couldn't of asked for more!!!!

Thank you to you both! It was a pleasure staying with you!

I had an excellent stay, faultless really. Ideal location, comfortable bed, great wardrobe space !! Angel always responded to my queries very rapidly. I highly recommend this accommodation and hope sincerely to return very soon.

Angel and Nacho went out of their way to make us feel welcome. Nacho even broke out his aunt's homemade pacharan to share with us our first night there. Their apartment is very large, tastefully decorated, and the room is very comfortable. They had excellent recommendations for our various needs in the neighborhood such as laundry, restaurants, ATM locations, etc.

Great communication. Before my arrival, i had many recommendations where better to go, when i can visit museums for free, how to get to Toledo. Unfortunately, i did not had a chance to spend more time with Angel and Nacho. It is a lot of maps and another information at the room. It is a great location, as all main points in Madrid in walking distance. Flat is in old building with old architecture planes – you can feel Madrid from inside. Flat is very big with a big windows. Room is comfortable with ensuite bath, both are spacious. It is very clean. I felt like at home, with a worm welcoming and support with every single question. It was a perfect experience, especially for me, as i never rent a room before, flats only. Thank you

The first and the best airBNB experience. Being that it was my first airBNB experience, I was a little skeptical and hesitant. What convinced me was the good reviews left by previous guests of Angel. Well, here's another great review. It was a pleasure staying at Angel's place. He really makes you feel at home. He treats his guests like family. He is very helpful and knows the city very well. The place is nice, spacious and is close to every single tourist spot. Angel is very neat as evidenced by his place... Very well decorated. Overall it was a great experience and would stay there again when I go back to Madrid.

Angel是个很好的房主，我们在陌生的环境感受到了家的温暖，虽然我的英语一般，西班牙语也不太会,Angel都会耐心的帮我解决问题，让我在马德里的几天特别舒心。当房主知道我们是去度蜜月后还在房间里精心的准备了中文的纸条和香槟，让我们倍感欣喜。房间很漂亮而且干净舒适，每天早上房主还会准备早餐放在餐桌上，以备我们随时起床就可以吃。旅游很疲惫对睡眠的要求会很高，因为我们的床很舒服所以每天我都能保持很好的状态去我想去的景点。Angel还帮我们预定了很棒的餐厅让我们在西班牙吃了很浪漫的一餐。还帮我们定了想看的球票，让我们享受了一场足球盛宴！我们还会一边喝红酒一边聊天，特别有家的感觉。我们住的地理位置十分方便，想去的景点几乎走着都能到。这是一次毕生难忘的经历，下次再来西班牙我一定还会住在这里，朋友如果去马德里我也会强力推荐的！因为真的很棒！

Angel was away for the first few days that we stayed in his amazzzzing place but communicated with us all the time which made our stay easy. He has a truly fabulous apartment with every detail catered for ( even had out the Australia power adapters waiting for us!)  lots of great restaurant recommendations, and booked us a great table for flamenco.  He and Nacho were absolutely charming, the apartment was spotless, spacious and delightful.  Would stay here again in a heartbeat.  Thank you Angel.

This is a very elegant & tasteful apartment ideally situated to explore Madrid. Angel & Nacho are relaxed, charming & welcoming hosts who will happily share their local knowledge. The room is large & well appointed with a comfortable bed, lots of wardrobe space & capacious ensuite bathroom. There is air conditioning which we did not need. We would highly recommend Angel & Nacho's place for an excellent Madrid experience.

Excelente ubicación, Kristian fue muy amable y atento con nosotros.

Buena ubicación, restaurantes, cafés, tiendas, teatros, espectáculos , todo alrededor y caminando. Pronta respuesta de los anfitriones. Hay que subir un piso para tomar el ascensor, si no eres una persona mayor o con poca movilidad es una excelente elección
Anfitrión muy agradables.  El alojamiento tiene muy buena ubicación.
Excelente estancia!
Good place recommend for price
Great Airbnb! It was clean and the layout was nice. The location was great! Very close and walkable to everything we wanted to do. Also felt very safe here!
Kristian's apartment is exactly as described, really well located, and equipped, as a host quickly responded to all of our questions, 100% would recommend

Kristian ha sido increíble,  un anfitrión excelente. comunicativo y comprensible. nos ha ayudado en todo, incluso hacer una entrada de última hora y en la madrugada.  el apartamento es excelente,  tiene todo lo necesario para una estadía buenísima.  cómodo y super limpio.  nos fue muy útil para nuestra estadía familiar.  les recomiendo encarecidamente.
perfetto

Kristian was an amazing host and very communicative! We had such a great time and the apartment was so nice. It’s a in a perfect location and walking distance from restaurants and shops. Would definitely stay here again and highly recommend!!

Kristian and her team were incredibly accommodating. The location is within walking distance of all the major attractions and restaurants. I highly recommend staying at this Airbnb. They had a crib set up for our 13-month-old baby and were also flexible with a few extra hours for checkout, which was a big help as traveling with a baby can be challenging when it comes to timing.
Me encantó el apartamento, preciosa vista, cómodo y super amables que nos guardaron el equipaje por unas horas. Tiene ascensor lo que es algo super positivo!

I will keep it fact based. Location is great. The unit is not as photographed and needs significant maintenance (mold in the living room and bathroom). TV also didn’t work for the kids. They attempted to fix but it was not resolved.

Totalmente recomendable alojarse aquí, un lugar céntrico e increíble. 10 de 10
Sus anfitriones super amables todo el tiempo.

I had a wonderful! The location is fantastic—surrounded by great restaurants and just a short walk from all the main attractions. If you're looking for a perfect base to explore the city, I highly recommend this place!
very nice and responsive host, it was ideal location for us
Excelente anfitrion..Jen nos a atendido muy bien.son muy amables.buena comunicacion y excelente ubicacion

Apartamento céntrico con 2 dormitorios,salón,cocina y baño.
Agradecí las indicaciones respecto a aparcar en el centro de Madrid.Tenia unas dudas de cómo y donde hacerlo y me indicaron muy bien del parking más cercano.
Buena experiencia

Un apartamento muy bonito y limpio. Merece totalmente la pena, lo recomiendo muchísimo. Las únicas pegas son que las puertas tanto del portal como de la casa están viejas y no van muy bien y que la zona donde está ubicada es algo peligrosa.  Sin embargo, en relación calidad-precio es un 10
Todo ok. Comunicación buena y amable. Gracias.
좋아요

El cuarto vale muchísimo la pena, pero sobre todo Valerie la anfitriona es lo mejor del lugar. Sin duda vale la pena y si vuelvo a Madrid aquí me quedaré. Si estás buscando pasar la noche cerca del aeropuerto y a buen precio está es la opción. Y si buscas tener un buen lugar a un buen precio sin importar la distancia también recomiendo.
Quiet and safe area, the accommodation is very tidy with private bathroom. Also, the hostess is a very warm and sociable person😌
优雅温柔的女性，舒适宜人的房间。感谢接待。

Valerie is a gracious host! Friendly, respectful and very very helpful. She was very proactive in communicating and was very kind with offering help and recommending us fun activities and cool places to visit.
the room was spotless and well kept. there is a bus stop right outside the community and has good connectivity with the city via both bus and car. just beware lying down on that bed because it is so comfy you will fall asleep right away :P
We highly recommend this place for all the amenities and comfort but most of all because of Valerie.
Sin duda, de los mejores Airbnbs en los que he estado. Acojedor, limpio, cómodo, y Valérie muy atenta, disponible pero también dejandote tu espacio. He estado muy a gusto. Merci!
Perfecto, una anfitriona amable y atenta a las necesidades del huésped.

I stayed overnight at Velarie’s place… everything was as described and Velarie was a kind and hospitable person. Highly recommended if you are stopping over in Madrid and need a place near the airport
No tengo mas que valorar es una anfitriona excelente...
It's good experience for me to live in this house during my journey in Spain. Great and clean room, and the Ms Valérie  is very kind and provide the support to me.
It was all as I saw in pics, very pleasant stay.

Valérie fue muy amable y estaba todo genial. Además nos dio recomendaciones de Madrid, de lugares que visitar y restaurantes/ bares donde podíamos ir.
Lo recomiendo!
Great host, great room

Nice and comfortable place, close to the airport. Valerie is very kind, speaks English very well and provides an airport pick up and drop off service.
The apartment had a nice big swimmingpool as well. Restaurants and supermarket nearby.
Great room in a quiet neighborhood. Valerie greeted us and was very kind, hospitable and helpful for any questions we had. Thank you!! Definitely recommended.

Valerie is very kind. The room with private bathroom was very comfortable. In the area are some nice restaurants and we also enjoyed the swimming pool.
Valerie picked us up at the airport very late and dropped is of very early. That was wonderful!

Valérie es una anfitriona fenomenal. En todo momento estuvo comunicativa y fue muy clara en las instrucciones.
Es muy recomendable el alojamiento y Valerie como anfitriona.
Muy recomendable
Muchas gracias
Valerie was very welcoming. Her apartment is comfortable, with good restaurants, supermarket and beautiful park nearby.

Nous avons passé un très agréable séjour, Valérie est très accueillante, et la chambre est très confortable et très belle.
C'est une belle adresse pour visité Madrid.
Je recomande à 100%
Ideale locatie in Madrid, dichtbij vliegveld en snel in centrum met de metro

We are a family of four, travelling with out two daughters aged 6 and 9. Malena's apartment was as described. The kitchen and bathroom though small were adequate. We arrived late and Malena was not able to meet us but her colleague waited for us. We were delayed due to plane delays and although she spoke no English she was delightful and showed us all aspects of the apartment.
There was a power failure while we stayed and Malena dealt with the situation admirably, honestly and kept us up to date with the situation.
The area around the apartment has some great little tapas venues. Overall a neat apartment in a handy location and a lovely host. Thanks for letting us stay, Melana.
The was friendly and showed us around the area.
The place is great.  Wonderful location.  Lots of room.  The owner met us there and even bought us a beer!  Highly recommended.

Estupenda experiencia en Madrid.
El piso muy acogedor y en una zona muy bonita, bien comunicada y céntrica.
Malena es una perfecta anfitriona, así como su madre Noemi y su marido. Todos encantadores y siempre dispuestos y atentos. Así es un placer viajar con toda la familia.
Han sido tres días muy completos por Madrid y una primera experiencia para repetirla sin dudarlo.
Gracias por hacernos la estancia tan fácil.

Al principio todo iba bien. Mis amigos estuvieron muy a gusto ahí. Ya que reserve la casa para ellos. Cuando fuí a despedir a mis amigos y para entregar yo las llaves y comprobar que todo estaba bien, no estaba Malena sino su Madre, le preguntamos si todo estaba bien y nos dijo que si. Después Malena la hija me llamó por teléfono para pedirme la fianza porque decía que la casa estaba sucia y quería cobrarnos los dos niños pequeños que acordamos no pagaban. Finalmente no reclamo nada. Alegó que la casa estaba sucia porque habían dejado dos vasos sucios en el fregadero y todo revuelto, cuando le pregunte me dijo que una lamaparita estaba fuera de lugar, pero esta la usaron mis amigos de lamaparita de noche porque no habia en la habitación, y cuando llego la madre para devolverle las llaves, nos lo dijo y la colocamos nosotros mismos en su sitio. Me quede con muy mal sabor de boca porque se quisieron aprovechar de nosotros. Me alegro de que al final comprendiera que habiendo una tarifa de limpieza, no podía reclamar nada, menos por dos vasos fuera de sitio. Pero lo de los niños ya fue algo fuera de lo normal. Lo primero que le pregunte antes de reservar es si podían estar 2 niños y ella me dijo que si, y se ofreció a tráeles un futón para los 2 niños que terminó en 1 colchón de 90. En cuanto a la casa esta en una muy buena ubicación. Para 3 personas es lo ideal.

Malena was a great host, always made sure that me and my partner where okay and everything was okay. The Flat was lovely nice little balconies, lots of light during the day!

the surrounding area was great for us, very vibrant, lots of restaurants and bars around 2 mins walk from the flat, with the metro a touch further.

Definitely worth a visit if you want value for money and being very close to the centre of Madrid

Malena è stata molto carina nell'accoglierci, l'appartamento è molto carino e confortevole inserito in un condominio silenzioso e curato, il letto matrimoniale, il bagno e la cucina un po' piccolini.
La casa è vicina ad un parco dove i bambini possono giocare e vicina al quartiere "La Latina" molto carino e dove andavamo a cenare tutte le sere

Malena un excelente anfitriona. Totalmente atenta. Nos dejo hasta comida para prepararnos el desayuno y un pote de Nutella!
excelente ubicacion y departamento muy comodo. Gracias por todo!

El piso es tal como se ve en las fotos, muy limpio, y está ubicado en un barrio muy céntrico de la ciudad, a 5 minutos andando del metro La Latina. Súper hogar para una estancia en Madrid ..Gracias Malena!!

nice flat nearby all the scenic spots, only the rooms are a little small for 4peoples, 2-3 are perfect. '
nice host even we didnot meet face to face, even help to find a nearest parking lot.

Malena was super responsive and attentive. All our communication was through email - it was great. All logistics were smooth and she left some breakfast stuff for our first morning, which was really really nice. Lots of contact numbers in a note in the apartment, which was helpful (taxis, etc.).
The apartment is amazing, super clean building, beautiful location - close to everything! And the apartment was great, lovely and very comfortable for 4 people, everything you need. I highly recommend it and will go back next time I'm in Madrid.
Muy buen apartamento todo tal cual se describe, muy linda zona, tranquila

Malena was really nice and responsive. The apartment was perfectly located and very clean. However, the pictures are a bit nicer than the actual place regarding the natural light, few items of decoration and it looks more spacious on picture. But again, Malena was lovely and even leave some food for breaksfast.

Malena made the key pickup easy. The apartment is lovely, very cozy & located in a great area! Very close to parks, restaurants & the heart of action in Madrid. All of the best of the city within 15-20 minute walking distance. A lucky find for me, I would consider staying in Malena's place again!

We had a good time staying in Malena's apartment. We found the location to be convenient - walking distance to the main parts of old Madrid. The apartment itself is in an older building but is recently renovated. Kitchen and bathroom are very modern. There were 4 of us: two adults and two teenagers. It was a bit tight, but still quite comfortable. We liked that there was a proper dining table for 4 people. Having a modern aircon during hot summer days was also a big plus. Malena and her husband Javier made us feel welcome. We arrived late and tired, and Javier met us and even brought us few bottles of cold beer, which was very nice. All in all positive experience.

We (me and two friends) spent a wonderful 6 weeks at Malena's place. It is in a quiet area of La Latina (my favourite neighbourhood in Madrid), but is still close to the metro, shops and restaurants. It's a very nice apartment and the location is superb - quiet but still central. Ideal for 2-3 people. Malena is a great host, who can help with anything (i.e. finding a cleaner for those that stay in the flat for longer, etc..).
La estancia fue muy buena en todos los sentidos. Malena fue muy atenta y el piso cumplió con todas nuestras expectativas y necesidades. Muchas gracias  por todo Malena!
La pasamos genial!  un lindo sitio con ubicación estratégica - para conocedores -! lo que necesitábamos para disfrutar Madrid por 10 días!  un abrazo,  Gustavo
Apartamento muy cómodo y limpio. Muy cerca del centro. Ideal para descubrir la ciudad.
Un 10.

What can I say... it was superb!
The apartment was perfect for us. The beds were excellent and the bathroom new and modern.
The hosts went above and beyond with their help with local suggestions to restaurants, bars and even a great cab driver...Just great!
The neighborhood was quiet even though it was close to everything. Great cafes as well as top Madrid restaurants walking distance from the apartment.
Excelente lugar para pasar unos días. Es cercano a una parada de autobús y la comunicación con Malena es muy buena.

We were 4 and really enjoyed our stay at Malena's house. Very comfortable, with all the amenities needed. Close to La Latina area, where there's a lot of bars and restaurants. Walking distance to the Royal Palace. Very safe neighborhood, quiet but very close to night life. Metro stop (Green Line) La Latina was the closest metro stop (5-6 minutes walking distance). Malena communicated well with us. We had a great time and recommend her place!

Malena's place is a very nice and clean apartment. Its location is a good compromise if you want to be close to the downtown (10min by walking) and in a quiet environment.
You'll find everything you need in the neighborhood : bars, restaurant, bakery, supermarket and even a flamenco show !
Malena was here to answer to our questions, she did everything to make us feel comfortable.
Thank you Malena !

Lovely apartment in great setting. Malena was highly communicative throughout the process. This is a quiet residential area but right on the edge of La Latina a lively part of town with plenty to do. You can easily walk to the bars and restaurants, or in 15m walk to the Casa de Campo park to get out of the city.
El apartamento es perfecto en un lugar ideal. Malena comunicó todo lo necesario con nosotros durante el proceso. Es una zona residencial tranquila, pero muy cerca de la parte animada de La Latina. Llegas andando a la zona de bares en breves momentos, o en 15m a pie estás en la Casa de Campo descansando de la ciudad.
Malena's place is amazing, great area, very comfortable, and beautiful. We had a great time in Madrid, much in part due to Malena's apartment. I would definitely stay again!
She's friendly and flexible. Very helpful and easy going.

Malena was very helpful with everything, responded really quickly. The flat is slightly smaller that we expected from the pictures and the 4th bed is actually a mattress that get pulled from under another bed, but it was a minor inconvenience. The flat has a fantastic location, walkable distance from all the sites. Overall, we had a fantastic time and I would really recommend staying in this place.
Piso acogedor, con muy buena ubicación y muy recomendable.

Very nice flat with personal touch in quiet little side street. Comfy furniture, good beds. Well equipped kitchen with basic foods & drinks to start off with.
Super market round the corner, bars and Metro stations in walking distance. Friendly and and quick responding hostess. Would book same flat again on return to Madrid.

We enjoyed our stay in Madrid.
Angel his apartment is great place to be in as its perfectly situated city center and the interior kept amazing us. The rooms are comfortable and cool.
Angel was very helpful and ensured our stay was pleasant. We definitely recommend Angel and his apartment for a stay in Madrid.
Thanks Angel for having us!!
Adithia & Sieger

Such a shame we didn't manage to meet Angel as w e would like to thank him personally . All of his instructions and advice regarding where to visit worked so well.
The apartment was perfect! So close to all the sights, transport and so many places to sit and relax.
His neighbour was there to meet and greet us. The apartment was clean, tidy and had all amenities we could possibly need. We would certainly come back again!

We had a lovely stay at Angel's. The apartment is even more beautiful in person, and Angel and Nacho went out of their way to be gracious hosts. They gave us several recommendations for sightseeing and eating out, and helped us get a reservation at a restaurant nearby. The location of the apartment couldn't be better. Centrally located, we were easily able to walk to all the major landmarks. Angel and Nacho really know and love their city, and helped us make the most out of our trip. We hope to stay with them again next time we visit Madrid.

Die Wohnung ist genauso wie beschrieben, ein wirkliches Kleinod Mitten im Zentrum von Madrid, dazu absolut ruhig.
Ángel und Nacho sind sehr warmherzig und hilfsbereit, wenn man Fragen hat, Tipps braucht, usw. Völlig unkomplizierte, liebenswürdige und humorvolle Gastgeber.
Man fühlt sich gleich zu Hause und willkommen.
Angel est un hôte très agréable et efficace : il va à l'essentiel, donne des bons tuyaux et parle 6 langues (dont le français sans accent, impressionnant!)

Our stay at Angel's and Nacho's house in Madrid was superb! The place looks even better live than in photos, it feels like an expensive hotel, it's centrally located, very stylish and clean. Unfortunately, we didn't get a chance to meet our hosts in person but we spoke on the phone. They know the city very well and gave us some great tips on restaurants (we recommend La Veronica- thanks to Angel's Connections we got some free wine:) ), jazz concerts and Tapas. All in all, great stay! Thank you Angel and Nacho for arranging everything for us so well :)
Loved the apartment and the location!

Nous avons passé un excellent séjour chez Angel et Nacho qui nous ont réservé un très bon accueil détendu et chaleureux.
L'appartement est magnifique, propre, décoré avec gout. L'emplacement central est idéal pour visiter Madrid sans avoir les inconvénients de le vie urbaine...
Bref allez y les yeux fermés, vous ne le regretterez pas!!

Angel and Nacho were excellent hosts! They went beyond the norms of taking good care of us, making recommendations, setting up reservations, and insight to the culture of Madrid. The location is perfect easy walking to all the major sites. It provided easy access to any transportation you need, like the metro and central train station (Atocha). There home is absolutely beautiful. Our quarters were quite, clean, and comfortable. Again, Nacho and Angel were perfect host sand we'd stay again if in Madrid.

Angel and Nacho's apartment is one of the most beautiful apartments I have stayed. The location is walkable to all major places in Madrid and the host came forward to recommend places to visit including #casapatas for flamenco night which should not be missed. The house is so beautiful that you would just love to stay there and not move out. I would recommend staying at angel & nacho' apartment in Madrid. Loved it.

Angel and Nacho made us feel very welcome and were more than ready to answer our questions and help us make plans. The apartment is very beautiful, comfortable and clean and the location was convenient to get to many venues.
We spend a very nice time in Madrid. Angel is an amazing host, so helpful and kind. The apartment is wonderful! Everything is great!

We spent 2 nights at Angel and Nacho's fabulous apartment. The location is perfect and we were able to visit so many places on foot. Angel and Nacho are amazing, we can't thank them enough for sharing their home with us :) extremely helpful for all the best food and sights in Madrid.  Our room was very private with our own on suite bath and cleaner than the best hotel accommodations we have ever visited. We cannot recommend this place enough! We hope our paths cross again sometime.

Angel and Nacho were great hosts. Angel was there to meet us and provide us with fantastic recommendations on where to eat, places to visit, and things to avoid. Their apartment is beautiful and very conveniently located near Plaza Mayor, a metro stop, and is pretty much walking distance to everything in the city.

I don't have one negative thing to say about my experience at Angel's. Not only were Angel and Nacho hilarious, they were extremely accommodating. We loved all of their recommendations and advice.
Their home is beautiful, spacious and clean. We had a little private air conditioner that we thoroughly enjoyed.
In addition to all of this, their home is centrally located and (assuming you know where you're going), it's very easy to walk everywhere from their home.
Staying here was one of our favorite experiences throughout our entire trip to Spain.

We très agréable à Madrid. L appartement d Angel est magnifique et idéalement situé dans le centre de Madrid. D autre part, Angel est de très bon conseil et de très bon service pour nous proposer et réserver des activités, et il maîtrise parfaitement le français ! Donc nous recommandons sans réserve.
Tiery et Valerie

A very nice apartment, in a beautiful and authentic madrilene building.

The location is perfectly central, we did everything without taking the metro nor taxi.

Angel gave us really good advices.

Even if he was not on site, we were welcome by housemaids who took care of us.

I definitely recommend Angel's place!

L'appartamento è molto pulito, accogliente e logisticamente perfetto: in 10 minuti si raggiungono sia la fermata Opera sia La Latina, il supermercato Dia è in fondo alla strada e in 15 minuti a piedi si raggiungono sia Plaza Mayor che il Palacio Real.
Malena è molto attenta e risponde prontamente alle richieste di informazioni.
L'appartamento è funzionale ideale per 3 persone.
Malena was great and the place worked out perfectly!

Appartamento davvero molto bello e ben tenuto, situato in una via tranquilla ma comodo per raggiungere fermata della metro o il centro a piedi.
L'unica pecca l'acqua della doccia spesso non veniva calda, era ad intermittenza calda/fredda.

Ubicación inmejorable. Malena es un encanto!! siempre ha estado disponible. Rápida respuesta vía teléfono. Nos ha dado muchas facilidades. Hemos estado muy bien en su apartamento. Lo recomendamos seguro! Hasta nos ha dejado los juguetes de sus hijos, para que jugara el nuestro!

마드리드 3박 4일 머물렀습니다. 총3명
숙소위치 좋습니다. 저흰 걸어서 관광생각이라 숙소에서 멀리까진 1시간밖에 걸리지않습니다. 많은 불편함은 없습니다.
개인살던 아파트라서 조미료,수저,포크,접시,컵,와인잔,파스타볼,냄비,드라이기 다있습니다. 젓가락 챙겨가면 좋아요.
욕실 주방 전부 사용하라고 하지만 저는 칫솔,치약,샴푸,린스 등등 따로챙겨가 썼네요. 그게 양이나 사용면에선 편해요.
도보 5분거리 마트있어서 좋은데 저녁 8시면 문닫는거같습니다. 삼겹살도 구워먹고 카레도하고 잡채도 하고했는데 환풍기 있어서 괜찮구요 다만 후라이팬이 작습니다. 볶음요리 2인분까지 나올정도입니다.
냄비는 라면 3-4인분까지 끓일수있는 크기입니다. 욕실은 넓어서 좋네요.
2인침대는 크고 1인침대에는 애기방이라 그런가 키크시면 조금불편합니다(183이상)
1인침대 이불은 침대밑 열면 도움침대꺼로 쓰시면 좋습니다. 수건은 소중대 3개준걸로 기업합니다.
바로 옆에 사람이 살아서 노래를 스피커로 튼다거나 크게 떠들거나 하진 못해요!
이용하실때 꼭! 내집이다 생각하구 이용해주세요. 호스트를 위해서라도..

What a find in the heart of Madrid! We traveled with a 3 year old and Malena's apartment was just perfect for us. Location is close to the city centre and main attractions. It's in a very quaint part of Madrid and there are beautiful plazas all around for food/drinks/catching some sun.
Apartment was brilliantly clean and well equipped. Everything you need in a small space and very tastefully decorated. It was wonderful having a small open kitchen for family meals as well. Malena was such a helpful host and even left us a pint of milk for our little one as we arrived late in the evening. Thanks so much for your hospitality Malena!

El piso está muy bien. Es muy bonito y tiene a tiro de piedra el Palacio Real. Además, alrededor hay muchos parques con zonas de juegos para niños, un supermercado, buena comunicación, etc.
Lo único es que si se es sensible al ruido, debajo de la habitación principal hay un bar y por la noche se escucha lo que hacen (risas, cubos de basura, etc.). Durante el día ningún problema.
This is a great space. With all the amenities you need and nice decor. The apartment was very clean, easy public transport everywhere, great neighbourhood, walkable to many restaurants and stores.

Marlena ist eine tolle Gastgeberin. Sie kam uns beim Check-In und Check-Out sehr entgegen, sodass wir später kommen und gehen durften. Vielen Dank Marlena.
Die Wohnung liegt sehr zentral. Viele Sehenswürdigkeiten, wie z.B. der Palast sind zu Fuß schnell zu erreichen.
Würden diese Wohnung jederzeit wieder buchen.

El piso es chulísimo, limpio, cada detalle muy cuidado, silencioso y en una zona inmejorable si quieres explorar la ciudad a pie. La comunicación con la propietaria es excelente, fluida y muy fácil. Súper recomendable.
great stay in a location that is easy to get to and from

This was a lovely apartment, in a nice quiet area of Madrid, yet still close to attractions and the metro. The apartment is older so has lots of original features, yet has a new bathroom and kitchen. Overall it is very comfortable and has a home from home feel.

We loved staying in our Madrid home away from home. The place was well appointed and felt cozy and comfortable. We felt like a part of the neighborhood. It was well located and efficiently laid out. The host was helpful and had great recommendations.

Malena is a great host, she is always here to answer any question or to offer her help.
Her apartment is very well located, very clean and well arranged. We came here for the second time, and for us, it is definitely the best place to stay if you want to visit Madrid without stress.
Thanks for all Malena.
Un séjour correct sans problèmes !
A great base to explore Madrid. My parents and I had a great couple of days in Malena's place which is a real home away from home. Thanks

In Malena's house you will find everything you need to cook and some things like oil, salt and pepper, then towels to paper towels, hair dryers and much more to spend a carefree holiday.
The house is close to the royal palace and halfway between the opera districts and La Latina and is convenient both for the subway and because it is close to everything.
We felt like home.

El piso de Malena es genial. Está cerca del centro y también del río Manzanares, ideal para descomprimirse de la urbe. El piso es muy acogedor y nos sentimos desde el primer minuto como en casa. Por la noche no hay nada de ruido y pudimos descansar estupendamente.
Very traditional and clean flat.  Malena was a lovely host. Location is superb, just a stone throw away from all the great bars and la latineo! Thank you.
La ubicación del piso es muy buena para visitar la ciudad, el piso es correcto, al igual que el trato con la dueña.
The thing that stood out about this accommodation was the location. Right in the center, it was ideal, especially for tourists like us. The apartament felt like home from home for us.

We loved Malena’s place - it’s conveniently located in the center of Madrid, the area is quite which is definitely a plus.
The apartment is very cosy, equipped with everything you need - appliances, all kinds of kitchen utensils, small but necessary things like salt, oil, tea etc are all there. There is a double bed (though not a big one) in one bedroom, two single beds in the other - rather small bedroom without a window, the couch in the living room can not be used as bed - so the apartment would be good for 3, max 4 people.
Communication was excellent, Malena was always in touch and very helpful. She was also understanding about our late check-in time.
There was an issue with the shower drain that unfortunately was not resolved, but other than that everything was perfect!
Muy bueno el departamento, con todas las comodidades que uno necesita.  Completo de utensilios y artefactos. Excelente la limpieza. Silencioso de noche, ideal para descansar.
A small but very well located flat in the center of Madrid.

The small and well maintained apartment good for 2-3 pax, is very well located just south of Palacio Real to visit the historic center and enjoy the nice restaurants near Plaza Paja. It is a 30 min walk to the museum area at Paseo del Prado. We enjoyed our stay there. Some disturbance due to noise from the bar below.

Totalmente recomendable. La casa está muy bien ubicada y con todos los servicios. Malena, la anfitriona, no nos puso ninguna pega de llegada ni salida. Y respuestas muy rápidas
Muy, muy recomendable
Very nice flat in a super location. Great for three people and staffed with everything you need for an easy stay in Madrid! Definitely a place to come back to again!
We had a great stay at the apartment.  Very clean and homely with the right amenities and location.  Will recommend to visitors to Madrid.

We had a great stay in Malena apartment.
Clean and every facility you could need for your stay.
Great area with shops, restaurants and bars within minutes and handy for public transport .
Lovely new bathroom with a super shower
The host even arranged for my son to pick up the keys and deliver a crib for our grandchild the day before our arrival which was so thoughtful of her. She also kept in touch throughout .
Would definitely stay again.

Great location, very close to everything! The apartment is clean, main bedroom is spacious with a little balcony. Smaller room is fine for one person. The building is clean en looks nice as well. Kitches is well rested and has everything you need, bathroom as well! We really felt home!
Apartamento con estilo, ubicación fantástica, buena distribución del espacio, súper cómodo, con todo lo necesario para pasar una estadía en Madrid, recomendado 100%.
It was the best decision, top location, very nice, very clean, excellent communication with Malena
Apartment was very clean, stylish and located near Royal Palace.
Very clean and cosy appartment, close to city centre, shops, restaurants and other sightseeing places. Malena is very communicative. Stay without any problems or worries. Thank you Malena!
No hay duda. Estupendo.
Fantástica ubicación, cerca del Palacio Real, apartamento limpio y con todas las comodidades, Malena fue una anfitriona perfecta. Lo recomiendo.
Appartement très propre et très bien placé ! L’hôte est à l’écoute et disponible

Malena est extremement réactive et sympathique. L'appartement a tout le confort, il est vraiment pourvu de tous les équipements nécessaires, et est chaleureux, la localisation est bonne, le prix tout à fait honnête pour Madrid, qui reste une ville chère. C'est dommage, les voisins ont apparemment un gros souci d'isolation phonique et peuvent être discourtois extremement rapidement (j'étais en voyage seule et j'écoute principalement du jazz, évidemment pas à fond la caisse). Autre petit point : l'appartement est un petit peu sombre. Mais une fois de plus : séjour agréable.
Gracias !!!! mil Gracias 10 puntos todo!!!!  Algún día volveremos!!!!

This place was perfect for our needs. It is very close to the palace and city center. There is a grocery just two blocks away where we were able to get cheese, bread, and fruit. We left a jacket in the apartment after check out and Malena was very accommodating to work with us to get it back.

lugar tranquilo, bastante amplio, en lugar único de Madrid, y encantador. más o menos  simétrico non el palacio Real tomando el punto medio del Viaducto como centro de simetría.Anfitriones muy amables. lugar limpio y acogedor.
The location is incredible. close to downtown. Malena is an amazing host, always online and super flexible. I highly recommend her accommodation.

Malena es una persona de trato agradable y fácil comunicación.
El apartamento es tal como se ve en las fotos. Magnifica ubicación.
Excelente ubicación buen internet, la cocina bien equipada incluso con las necesidades basicas como cafe sal azucar etc. Muy recomendable
Very good place, not so far from everything

Muy acogedor, totalmente completo y a un paso de la catedral de la Almudena y el palacio Real,  pero en zona tranquila, la comunicación con Malena 100%, en resumen todo perfecto! Totalmente recomendable!
El apartamento nos pareció estupendo.  La zona inmejorable: céntrica pero tranquila.  Práctico, cómodo y limpio.  La anfitriona fenomenal

Malena's place is the perfect one if your down to explore the city for a couple days. The neighborhood is quite and perfectly close to the center, you are there within minutes. Malena reacts quick and is open to make everything working out as good as possible. Definitely recommend this appartement to everyone who is exploring the Capital.
Un lugar muy acogedor con una ubicación inmejorable y todo lo necesario para que tu estancia en Madrid sea inolvidable.

We loved a location: quiet and safe area.
Fully furnished apartment and outgoing host!

Nice apartment and good location, no noise
Malena is very nice and she is very careful
I recommend
Très bon séjour! Tout était comme prévu! Je recommande :)
Acogedor apartamento centrico pero tranquilo

Malena’s apartment is perfect! Great location: you can easily walk to most attractions from there, lots of cafes and restaurants, but at the same time it’s a quiet neighborhood. The apartment is clean, very homely and doesn’t feel like a “standard” Airbnb apartment at all. Malena is always ready to help and reacts to the messages asap. If we came to Madrid again, we’d definitely love to stay here again!

This apartment is in an excellent location, about a 5 minute walk from plaza Mayor and is surrounded by plenty of bars and restaurants. Malena was very friendly, offered us restaurant suggestions and greeted us when we arrived. The apartment is small but perfect for 2 or 3 people and the building has an elevator too. I would definitely stay here again!
Buena ubicación, bien atentos
