The place was just what we needed for a 1 night stay in the Sol area. We were able to experience some amazing food and drink. Many local attractions and beautiful streets to walk around and explore from here. The host was extremely communicative and very helpful to us when we accidentally left something behind. Thank you again!

El apartamento está muy bien ubicado, en todo el centro.
Hubo muy buena comunicación con Kristian, muy amable y respondía inmediatamente.
Departamento amplio, limpio y ordenado, nuevamente regresaría

El anfitrión fue muy amable y proporcionó las instrucciones precisas para llegar a su apartamento. Jen es una chica encantadora. El piso era tal cual se describía en la app, estando en un  distrito en pleno centro de Madrid, a unas pocas cuadras de Sol y Plaza Mayor, en un quinto piso, con grandes puertas que dan a pequeños balcones. Tiene ascensor pero no a pie de calle, sino que hay que subir unas escaleras hasta el primer piso para acceder al mismo, así que no sería accesible para personas con movilidad reducida u otras discapacidades. Tiene 2 habitaciones, wifi, un baño con ducha, agua caliente y fría, cocina con cafetera eléctrica, sala con muebles cómodos, los servicios necesarios para estancias largas, una cama grande y una litera. La cama suena mucho cada vez que uno cambia de posición . La limpieza y organización excelente. Ropa de cama y toallas planchadas olorosas. Se ve que son profesionales. Sin dudas recomiendo este hospedaje y me gustaría poder repetir. Thanks.
Buena ubicación y cómodo departamento

Excelente opción para quedarse en Madrid !! Muy buen ubicación !! Caminado llegas a puntos estratégicos e importantes, el departamento cuenta con todo lo necesario !! Nosotros fuimos con una bebé y sin problemas !! Kristian muy amable y muy accesible, apoyando en todo momento !! Muy recomendable
Great location, needs some work the place.

No es la primera vez que me alojo con ellos y no va a ser la última. Amfitriones muy atentos y comunicativos, apartamento cómodo y cuidado. A tener en cuenta que hay que subir un pequeño tramo de escaleras para poder acceder al ascensor. Nos vemos a la próxima!
This place is fairly average, but the location is killer.

Departamento mucho peor de lo que muestran las fotos. Está muy mal mantenido y pésimamente decorado. La ropa de cama huele a vieja. Supongo que hace tiempo no se lava el acolchado. Las toallas parecían repasadores grandes con un olor a suciedad imposible de usar. La luz del baño anduvo sólo el primer día. El microondas no tenía la bandeja giratoria (inusable). Encima en la puerta del edificio el municipio está repavimentando veredas con lo cual a las 7:30 empiezan los martillos neumáticos a trabajar (es una obra que lleva meses, podría INFORMARSE en la reseña). Imposible descansar. Los muebles son de lo peor. No tiene cortinas blackout en el comedor ni en el dormitorio que da a la calle. El departamento que está contiguo lo habitan unos orientales que dejan la puerta siempre abierta y cocinan con un olor muy intenso.  No lo recomiendo. No volvería. Busquen en la zona algo mejor
Ótima estadia, anfitrião atencioso e lugar é tranquilo. Recomendo e irei retornar mais vezes.

Small and basic apartment that was fine for our 3night stay. The location is what you are paying for here with Plaza Mayor minutes walk away and easy access to Sol metro and lots of shopping for teens. Great grocery store just down the road. Aircon in main area and fans for bedrooms. Yes they were resurfacing the beautiful cobbled street but you’re on the 5th floor and it didn’t disturb us at all. Helpful recommendations from the host.

Good communication with the host. You are within 10-15 min walking distance to the center of the city. We had a party of 6 and the the elevator helped out tremendously with all of our luggage. It was a little hard to find due to street construction, but once we did, it was a comfortable stay.

El piso de Kristian está genial!
Es un piso de 2 habitaciones con posibilidad de ocupación para 6 personas en pleno centro.
La ubicación inmejorable, a 3 minutos andando de la puerta del sol, a 7 de la plaza mayor… una gozada.
Además de esto, el piso está muy bien, nos dejaron gel, productos básicos para higiene.
La comunicación ha sido muy buena y han sido super amables y flexibles tanto la hora de llegada, como la de salida; sin duda recomendable!!
Muchas gracias!
Increíble ubicación y amabilidad de los anfitriones. Sin duda volvería a hospedarme aquí.
все дуже сподобалось. центр міста, все в пеший доступності.

Kristian respondió siempre rápido a nuestras consultas. Se preocupó porque tengamos una estadía cómoda. El departamento estaba en muy buenas condiciones. la ubicación es ideal para recorrer la ciudad.
Buena ubicacion, limpio y acorde al anuncio.
excelente, todo!!
Excelente alojamiento en Madrid! Bien ubicado y con todo lo necesario para pasar una estadia comoda!

Definitivamente me volvería a quedar,  el lugar es super céntrico, y ordenado. El único problema sería con el aire acondicionado, ya que solo aclimata la sala, en los 2 cuartos se sentía calor a pesar que habían ventiladores, de ahí todo muy bien. Se agradece por que dan la opción de guardar tus maletas, algo que muchos otros lugares no lo permiten.

Kristian’s place is close to all major attractions s in Madrid and very well kept and it was very convenient for a family of 4.  She and her co hosts are very responsive at any time of the day. Was very proactive with recommendations of restaurants and things to do and also with driving g instructions to the place.  Overall recommend this place.

Amazing location and great house!
The owners were very attentive to us
fomos.muito bem atendidos, local dentro de nossas expectativas, certo q voltaremos!
Excelente communication
Muy amable y siempre en comunicación con Gen, me sugirió dónde comer y qué podíamos visitar, son muy atentos, espero regresar el siguiente año con los abuelos!!! Muchas gracias

Super fácil de caminar a donde sea desde el depa.
Check in con clave y super claro.
El anfitrión atentisimo siempre.
El depa limpio, con un aire acondicionado central (Hay que dejar abiertas las puertas en la noche, sinó el cuarto pequeño es sofocante).
En general los interiores están muy de departamento de renta, los colchones seria lo que creo que pudiese mejorar.
En general una estancia buena, para estar en plein centro de Madrid.

Logement idéalement situé, à quelques pas de la Plaza Mayor et du métro. Bien insonorisé. Très bonne communication avec l'hote. Petit bémol sur la qualité de la literie, pas très confortable + les fourmis dans la salle de bains.
Great location, few minute walk from plaza mayor. Clean and matched the photos, only downside was one of the rooms had no electricity.

Being myself airbnb host in Paris, I must admit that Angel and Nacho have the best room in this site, in a huge and sublime apartment, decorated with taste, authenticity, class and elegance. In addition, this apartment is in perfect condition and spotlessly clean. This apartment is located in a beautiful building in a great, central location, next to Plaza Santa Ana, Plaza del Sol, Plaza Mayor, and also near the popular Lavapies and tirso Molino, younger neighborhood and multicultural . Unfortunately, I did not get a chance to meet them because they were not in Madrid, but I keep good memories of our conversation, the apartment in which you feel really privileged. In addition, Angel and Nacho knows perfectly all the nices places and restaurant to visit. In any case, it's certainly the place to stay in Madrid, and I would stay again. Again thank you guys, you are fabulous.
Etant moi même airbnb hôte à Paris, je dois reconnaitre qu'Angel et Nacho ont une des plus belle chambre de ce site, dans un immense et sublime appartement, decoré avec goût, authenticité, classe, et élégance. De plus, cet appartement est en parfait état et d'une propreté irréprochable. Cet appartement est situé dans un très bel immeuble, dans un quartier super, central, à côté de la Plaza Santa Ana, Plaza del Sol, Plaza Mayor, et aussi à côté du populaire Lavapiès et tirso de Molino, des quartier plus jeunes et multiculturels. Je n'ai malheureusement pas eu la chance de les rencontrer car ils n'etaient pas à Madrid, mais je garde que de bons souvenirs de nos conversation, et de l'appartement dans lequel on se sent vraiment privilégié. De plus, Angel et Nacho connaissent parfaitement les lieux, et restaurants qu'il faut visiter. En tout cas, c'est certain, c'est ici qu'il faut sejourner à Madrid, et j'y reviendrais certainement. Encore merci les gars, vous êtes fabuleux.

We stayed in Angela and Nachos lovely elegent appartment for 4 nights in August.The appartment is in a fantastic location very central and within walking distance of everything(we do enjoy walking)!!
They are 2 very enthousiastic guys who gave us lots of tips and advice about their beautiful city.They made our trip to Madrid even more enjoyable.!We will definately stay there again.

Just back from a 5-days stay in the apartment of Angel and Nacho. It's very well located, at walking distance to plaza Mayor, Sol, plaza Santa Ana, ... but there are also 2 metro stops nearby. The apartment was clean, spacious and so quiet. I only met Angel and Nacho on the last day and they are just great. Very helpful and happy to give you advise on all sort of things. Truly recommend staying here.
The apartment is like a palace and Angel gives great advice on where to go and eat

We enjoyed meeting Angel and Nacho who were wonderful hosts. Their apartment is stunning- beautifully decorated, clean, quiet and comfortable. The location is great- close to excellent restaurants, tapas bars, flamenco, museums and the train station.
Staying in their apartment made our trip to Madrid memorable.

Angel is very warm host providing all necessity and information for our stay.  Angel has an amazing apartment with great location (10-15 minutes walk to major tour attractions), very nice interior design, spacious room with ensuite bathroom.  We had an very enjoyable stay in Madrid.

Wonderful time in Angel's home. This is the perfect location in Madrid. The room is 5 star; spotlessly clean, and the hosts could not be friendlier or more accommodating. They provided information on all the local eateries and even booked me and a friend into Casa Patas - front row seats to watch flamenco - an experience i will never forget. Thank you !
It is a nice stay in Angel & Nacho's apartment. Perfect location and amazing decoration, they are super nice and friendly. Will definitely stay there again.

This is a fabulous place to stay Angel and Nacho are such lovely, freindly people they made us feel very welcome and relaxed, always ready to give advice on where to go and showed genuine interest in us.  The apartment is in a really good location so close to every thing as well as being very clean and comfortable.  Madrid is such a beautiful city and to stay in their apartment just helped to complete a wonderful experience. Angel also booked us front row seats at the Flamenco and trust me it is truly an experience not to miss.

La chambre est grande, très propre et bénéficie de sa salle de bain indépendante qui est de très belle dimension. L'emplacement est parfait pour visiter Madrid et je ne peux que recommander cette location. Merci à Angel pour son accueil, sa disponibilité et ses précieux conseils.

The location of this apartment is excellent - the neighbourhood seems safe and it is very central, and most sights are within (15-20 min) walking distance. There is no street noise, though you might hear the neighbours talking below if they are on their balcony/have their window open.

The apartment is in a classic old building, including a central elevator with a pair of manually operated doors. The rooms in the apartment are modern and clean, as well as heated.

As hosts, Angel and Nacho are very welcoming. Angel especially is passionate about Madrid and keen to share and discuss what he knows, as well as make suggestions on places to go and what to see, though in a couple of cases it would have paid for us to do some prior research ourselves too (we had some trouble with trains we were told would be easy to get seats on, for example).

Unfortunately we did not see all that much of our hosts as we were out all day, but they were very considerate and conscientious, and managed to organize for someone to let us in despite us providing arrival information at short notice (note that this is not encouraged).

Angel's home was absolutely delightful!  It is so cozy, perfectly decorated, and the room we stayed in was very roomy and comfortable. Although we didn't get to meet Angel, we had the best time! His home is within walking distance of everything you would ever want or need.  We will be returning to Madrid and will definitely stay with Angel again!

Perfect place and location. We spent here 6 days and they were perfect. You can find everything you need inside and have a very quick move towards city centre. Food store and some well rated tavernas are reached in few minutes on foot. I recommend this place to couples or small families.

We had a lovely stay at Malena's place. Location-wise it was perfect, just a short walk to historical old town and still it was a quiet street. Apartment was clean and check-in easy. Also communication with Malena was super easy and everything worked very well. I can easily recommend Malena and her apartment to everyone who travels with a friend or one family member. :)
A really lovely apartment near so many great things. I loved the little balcony.

Hote disponible et serviable,qui nous a même réservé le taxi pour le jour du départ
Appartement idéalement situé et tres bien équipé
Le tarif est justifié
Nous y reviendrons sans la moindre hésitation

La estadía fue excelente.
El departamento es igual a la fotos: muy limpio, muy bien amueblado, cómodo y bien equipado para preparar el desayuno, el almuerzo o la cena. Las camas son muy cómodas y nuevas. Es muy iluminado y con una linda vista. Está cerca del metro (tan sólo 5 minutos a pie), cerca de Plaza Mayor, del Palacio Real, etc. y de muchísimos lugares para comer.
Malena es una genia! Super atenta y con un trato muy amable que nos dio la bienvenida y todo el tiempo estuvo disponible para ayudarnos.

Todo super.
Excelente departamento. Además de una ubicación de lujo tiene todo lo necesario para disfrutar de la estadía.
Malena estuvo muy pendiente de nuestra llegada y sus recomendaciones fueron muy útiles.
Seguro que volvemos

Malena was a wonderful hostess - warm, friendly, and welcoming. The apartment is lovely, recently renovated, and located in a wonderful neighborhood. A couple of minutes from two lovely cafes, a 10-minute walk from El Rastro flea market, and many transportation options immediately available. I would definitely stay here again!
Отличное месторасположения! Очень приятный и тихий район. Близко до центра и суеты. Все было удобно . Очень советую всем!!!
Malena was a great host and we had an amazing stay! Felt like we were home with a great location.

Perfect location. Nearby you will find historic buildings, bars & restaurants.
Quite place & super comfortable bed. Flat is well equipped . Malena was very helpful

Le séjour chez Malena s'est très bien passé. L'appartement est très bien placé, proche des lieux d'intérêt. Nous nous sommes souvent déplacées à pied.
Malena est très sympathique et arrangeante.
Nous reviendrons sans doute et nous conseillons cet appartement.
Ubicación perfecta, Malena muy atenta y facilitando todo para pasar una buena estancia en Madrid.  Recomiendo 100%. Mil gracias.

L’appartement est fidèle aux photos. Il est très propre et très bien situé. Nous avons quasiment tout fait à pied.
Melena a été une hôte très disponible et arrangeante.
Je vous recommande cet appartement lors de votre passage à Madrid :) !

Malena was a great host, check in and out was easy. Place as in photos, spacious with a dining, living room and two bedrooms. Malena’s place was walking distance to La Latina metro, super convenient.  2 large supermarkets at La Latina and the mercado was superb! Near a park which was nice. Walking distance to the Royal Palace and Almudena Cathedral, Plaza Mayor and El Rastro. Would come back for sure.

Apartamento sencillo y modesto, limpio y agradable. Quizás algo caro para lo que es. Muchas opciones de restaurantes alrededor y a tan solo 15 minutos andando del centro de la ciudad. Malena estuvo muy pendiente de todo y la comunicación con ella fue fabulosa.
Piso muy acogedor y centrico. Todo perfecto! Muchas gracias Malena! Hasta la proxima!
El alojamiento era perfecto de tamaño limpieza y comodidad. Muy cercano al centro y a zonas de restaurantes y bares. El trato con Malena muy bueno y rápido. Muchas gracias por todo!!

Muy buena ubicacion cerca del palacio real. Es un primero asi q se oyen los ruidos de noche, coches pasar y gente hablando. El alojamiento se ve q vive alguien y tiene sus cosas allí, le faltaba una limpieza mas profunda. Aunque tiene poco superficie es muy amplio y está muy bien aprovechado y tiene todo lo necesario. La comunicación con la propietaria fue muy buena.
Thank you Malena
nos hemos sentido como en casa. la ubicación es perfecta y la zona tranquila. Malena es muy buena anfitriona, nos ayudo en todo momento
This apartment was wonderful! Very nice location, excellent host, and well equipped.
La ubicación excelente y tranquila. Al tratarse de un alojamiento de persona particular, era como estar en casa de un amigo, con todo lo necesario.

the apartment is delightful and situated in an incredible neighborhood, brimming with options to indulge in the best of madrid's cuisine. it's very peaceful, perfect for both work and relaxation. the impeccable service from malena, who is always attentive regardless of the hour, adds to the overall charm.

Malena was the perfect host. She was always kind and gave great recommendations for Madrid. The location is perfect and walking distance to important locations. We stayed for a month and felt at home.
Very good location, good hosts, good trip.

Excellent location. Cozy, beautiful place. Little hiccup in the beginning with a room but host addressed it immediately. Host communicates extremely well. Makes you feel at home. Quiet hours are pretty strict even after 7am. Would recommend.

We had a very pleasant stay, the house is homely and has everything necessary for a stay with children. We loved the location with bars, restaurants and supermarkets within walking distance - walking into central Madrid is only about 15 minutes. The host was responsive and helpful. I would choose to stay here again - many thanks !!

Allotjament super ben situat, net i molt tranquil, justet d’espai però nosaltres només el volíem per dormir, així que perfecte. Vam trigar un pèl a rebre la informació del pis i, per això, la persona que ens rebia es va haver d’esperar més del compte, però per nosaltres tampoc va ser un problema.

Giriş saatinde anlaşmazlık olmasına rağmen kısa sürede çözüm sağlandı. Evin konumu çok iyiydi. Mutfakta kullanılabilecek gereçler mevcut. Nevresim, yastıklar ve havlular daha temiz olabilirdi, biraz koku vardı. Genel anlamda evin ruhunu ve enerjisini sevdik. Malena’ya teşekkürler.
Todo perfecto, la ubicación es muy buena está cerca de lugares muy buenos para comer y puedes caminar fácilmente a todos lados, me gustó mucho! Y Malena estuvo atenta en todo momento.
Malena fue muy amable y accesible todo el tiempo que estuvimos en Madrid. El piso situado en una zona muy tranquila fue perfecto para nosotras.volveremos!

The apartment is well located. Easy to get around, close to Plaza Mayor, Palacio Real and Cathedral, Basilica de San Francisco, as well as local groceries, park, and restaurants. It's very homey and cosy, like staying at someone's home instead of a purpose built Airbnb. Malena is a very friendly host!
Great location. It was just what we were looking for in our first trip to Madrid!
todo perfecto
Schöne Wohnung in der Nähe von allem

Excellent location and the air conditioning was a lifesaver in the heat. Host was very kind and responsive.  This is like staying in a homey atmosphere.  Close to groceries and do not miss Basilica of San Francisco very close by and stunning.
Vary nice apartment in a great location. So much to see in the area. The apartment was well equipped. Very good communication with the host.

Beautiful flat, responsive host.
We had a comfortable stay. I would highly recommend.

This is a very nice apartment in a beautiful area of Madrid. It is away from the crowds, but within walking distance of the major sights. There are also good shops and restaurants nearby. The apartment had all necessary amenities and some handy extras such as olive oil, coffee, herbs and spices etc. Malena was a responsive and helpful host. Highly recommended.
Super logement, fonctionnel et bien équipé, au centre de Madrid. Plus moderne et lumineux que sur les photos! Hôte très réactive et bienveillante, on recommande.

Posizione ottima, palazzo storico, appartamento arredato con gusto e funzionalitá! la comunicazione con Malena é stata sempre rapida, precisa e ci é venuta incontro sugli orari sia di check in che check out, davvero prezioso!
Lo straconsiglio!!!
Buena ubicación. Alojamiento perfecto para 3 personas. No se puede pedir mucho más.
Great local neighborhood to be close to tourist sites and yet be away from the crowds. The apartment is lovely. We would love to stay here again when we return to Madrid.
Gute Unterkunft
Bom apartamento, anfitriã gentil.
Apartamento cómodo y limpio. Anfitriona amable y atenta.
óptima localização
Konumu çok güzeldi, bir çok turistik noktaya yürüme mesafesindeydi. Ev de ihtiyacımız olan her şey vardı. Düzenli ve konforluydu. Malena oldukça yardımsever bir  ev sahibi teşekkür ederim

les plus : Emplacement idéal pour visiter Madrid, le quartier LA LATINA est très vivant et parfait pour sortir à Madrid.
L'appartement est confortable est accessible et le contact avec Malena agréable
Très bon séjour, nous recommandons

very quiet place, the building have elevator that give A+. relaxing,  If you like to go Grand Via right there in the corneryou have a bus 148 only 2 stop and you are in the Middle of Madrid. this building have elevator must building doesnt have . I had been in airbnb in madrid this apartment was one of my favorite. Saludos from USA
Hemos pasado un fin de semana muy agusto. el piso está en una zona muy tranquila y cerca de la Latina. repetiría.

Séjour agréable dans l'appartement de Malena. L'appartement est propre, très bien situé et dans un quartier relativement calm proche du centre. Malena est très serviable, communique bien et est flexible quand à l'heure d'arrivé et de départ. A recommander !

Die Unterkunft ist in einem sehr schönen Viertel gelegen. Dort ist es ruhig und es ist trotzdem nah an allen Sehenswürdigkeiten. Malena war eine sehr nette und freundliche Gastgeberin. Uns hat es sehr gut gefallen und wir würden die Wohnung auf jeden Fall weiter empfehlen.
Vielen Dank, Malena!

Wir wurden sehr herzlich empfangen, die Wohnung und Umgebung wurden uns sehr gut erklärt, die Lage ist hervorragend im Viertel La Latina gelegen, welches ruhig und gleichzeitig sehr zentral und fußläufig zu Sehenswürdigkeiten und guten Restaurants ist. Auch die Busverbindungen waren direkt in der Nähe sowie Supermärkte.
Empfehlenswert ist die Basilika San Francisco, die am Ende der Straße liegt.
An der Straßenecke ist eine nette, authentische Bar. Wir haben nur morgens Cafés vermisst, welche meistens geschlossen waren.
Wir hatten insgesamt wirklich einen tollen Aufenthalt in Madrid! :)
Nous avons passé un séjour très agréable chez Malena. Nous recommandons !
Amazing place to stay in Madrid, with a walkable location and very comfortable space inside! Will definitely stay here again when we’re back!

Echt de perfecte plek om Madrid beter te leren kennen. Vanuit dit adres kan zowat alles goed te voet. De musea, het paleis, de vele restaurants en theaters, allemaal binnen tien minuten lopen. En mocht je even (figuurlijk) de weg kwijt zijn, dan zijn Angel en Nacho de perfecte gastheren die alle informatie hebben en desgewenst heel veel voor je regelen. Topstek!

Madrid kan je nooit te veel worden als je hier logeert, het elegante huis geeft rust als je uit de drukte komt en de gastheren doen alles om je als gast welkom te laten voelen. De kamer met ruime badkamer zijn bieden alle comfort. De buurt, zo dicht bij Plaza Mayor en Plaza de Santa Ana, is inspirerend voor iedereen die van uitgaan en kunst houdt, een aanrader als je van Madrid wil genieten en de leefstijl van de oude én jonge generatie Madrilenen wil leren kennen

超级棒的房子，简直可以说是住在博物馆里，房主收集各种收藏品，房间里有个人卫生间，超大超软的床。位置极佳，离马约尔广场、太阳广场都很近。房主很nice，推荐的local restaurant味道都极好，怪不得能成为超级房东。推荐！
Great house with great location. Highly recommended!
Lovely apartment in great location. Highly recommend.

I had a short but wonderful stay in angel's place. The room is clean and spacious, and the location of the house is amazing, there were all walkable distance to most of tourists spot from their place. Besides, there were so many awesome restaurants and shops nearby. Angel and nacho are very welcoming and friendly, they let me check in early and waited for me for 1 hours due to the traffic problems. Anyway, I will definitely go back to this place for my next madrid journey!

Ángel es un anfitrión nato que habla varios idiomas casi igual de bien que el español :P y Nos hemos sentido muy bien en su casa, y no sólo porque la ubicación es perfecta y muy cómoda para conocer Madrid sino porque realmente te sientes muy a gusto, estar en un sitio así hace que te sientas menos turista y algo más madrileña.  La habitación tiene todo lo que necesitas y perfecta para descansar (el colchón es fabuloso y el baño muy amplio). Nosotras nos lo hemos pasado fenómeno y nos ha dado tiempo a disfrutar de la ciudad de un modo muy auténtico gracias a todos sus consejos y sugerencias. E 'stato un piacere essere nella vostra casa con voi condividendo piccoli momenti di risate e buone vibrazioni! A presto!! Tanti baci per te e piu per Nacho :P

Un alojamiento en un lugar perfecto para visitar el centro de Madrid, ángel en todo momento preocupándose porque todo estuviera a gusto y siempre dispuesto a aconsejarnos para que todo saliera perfecto.
Mucho mas que recomendable el alojamiento y sin palabras del anfitrión.
Las pequeñas dudas que tenia me la resolvió al momento.
Las fotos de la habitación no le hacen justicia todo decorado con muy buen gusto.

Extraordinaire! Tout était parfait. Angel a pensé à tout pour notre confort.
L'appartement est très bien situé et très calme.
Nous reviendrons avec plaisir chez eux.
Elise

Angel and Nacho are amazing hosts. I am personally an Airbnb host in Manchester but felt a bit inadequate after I experienced the hospitality and passion Angel and Nacho had offered to us. Their great qualities have taught me a lot.
As soon as we arrived, they gave us a very warm welcome and talked through a few recommendations in Madrid, which was very nice of them. The room is spacious, luxurious and clean with an amazing ensuite bathroom. The location of the apartment cannot be better; it is right in the centre near Plaza Mayor and Sol. Very close to many top restaurants in Madrid including Ana La Santa and Lhardy, which are the ones we went dinning. Lhardy is one of the oldest restaurants in Spain and was extremely difficult to reserve a table during busy Christmas time. Angel kindly helped us with table reservation; our dinning there added so much more delights to our journey. For that, I am forever grateful for Angel's help. Angel also recommended us to go to Toledo which we did. We could not like the historic town more. We stayed there on Christmas day; it was quiet and holy and we were lucky enough to join the Mass in Toledo Cathedral and to witness sunset and moon-rise. Absolutely amazing!
There is so much more that I could carry on complimenting their greatness and kindness as hosts. I would definitely recommend anyone to get a chance to stay with them in their elegant apartment.

The first thing you will notice upon beginning your stay with Angel is beauty of his home. It's size and spaciousness are undersold in the ad. Angel was very nice and helpful, and his English was very good which helped a lot. The location couldn't have been better either. I would definitely recommend this host.

Angel was very responsible and tolerant, and his friend was also nice to us. The room is no that bright as it is interior. But it is very comfy and cosy with a really big and clean bathroom. The position of the house is great, as the house is very near Puerta de Sol. The building seems to just get renovated, clean and beautiful. What we like most about it is the elevator, which is very european and interesting.

Angel is a great host. He sent me a list with some tips in the city, and they are really good! He is very flexible and helpful. He booked for us last minute flamenco show and we got great seats. The apartment is very nice and very well situated. You can just walk to the majority of places! The room was comfortable and there was a big private bathroom. The room looked a bit less spectacular than on the picture as its windows give on the courtyard.

Angel was really helpful in accommodating our early arrival in Madrid and although he was away for the weekend, we met his neighbour who let us in and was very kind. The apartment is in a great location - walking distance to Sol and La Latina and round the corner from the Metro. We had a great time there and would definitely recommend Angel to others looking for a place in Madrid. many thanks.

The apartment is very clean and comfortable, and the location could not be better. I was there 3 nites for my business trip and really enjoyed my stay. Angel is a great host too, helped me a lot with info about things to see and do, and helped me with my work too. I strongly recommend the apt to people who really want to have a real experience in Madrid and business travelers too!

This place is elegant. Entering the building will transport you back into the 20th century. There is a lift (somehow the term “elevator” does not seem appropriately descriptive for this device) to take you conveniently up to the apartment. It may not be like one that you have seen before except in old movies, but it works quite well.

When you enter the Apartment through its very large door, you will be back in the 21st century. It has been renovated and modernized, and the interior decoration is beautiful. Your bedroom/bathroom unit is one corner of the apartment; so you have complete privacy. The bed is comfortable and the room is quiet. There is some closet space where you can hang your clothes and some drawer space as well. The bathroom is well equipped. The full length bathtub has a shower head.
Angel is a very gracious host. He provided us with a written “small guide” before we arrived which contained valuable information about the area. He will visit with and chat about various topics if you like, or he will respect your privacy. We enjoyed talking with him on a variety of topics, and thoroughly enjoyed our stay in Madrid at his apartment.

The apartment is located conveniently within fairly easy walking distance of at least four great art museums including the legendary Prado. The restaurants which Angel recommended were consistently excellent.

We considered this place to be good value for our money and we recommend it very highly.
Very good location ,very good apartment ,very nice host,everything is comfortable.

Angel and Nacho were good hosts who did everything they could to help us, both before our trip and during.  For example, they got us reservations in the second row for an authentic flamenco show right around the corner from their place, which was a truly exceptional performance.  We also enjoyed the one evening our paths crossed and we got to chitchat about similarities in our interests and lives.  If what you are looking for is a very comfortable room inside a grand apartment, where you can come and go as you please, then Angel's place is a great find.

Angel的房子很棒！里面有不少东方元素的陈列，房子很大，很漂亮！而且房子离Sol很近，下楼走几步就有超市和很多购物的地方，对于游客来讲，是个非常好的选择；希望下次来还可以住这儿。Angel's house is great! There are a lot of Oriental element of the display, the house is very big, very beautiful! And house close to the Sol, down a few steps where there are supermarkets and lots of shopping, for tourists, is a very good choice; Hope can also live here next time

We had a great time at this apartment. The location is fantastic, quiet while in the heart of the city center. A lot of things to see are at walking distance. Angel gave a lot of nice tips on things to do and good restaurants. If you love flamenco music, make sure you visit Casa Patas which is literally in the backyard. It was excellent. Highly recommended!
Angel was a great help to orgaize in advance, manage arrival and onboarding. 5 stars of 5 - we would be happy to come back again!

Angel and Nacho were wonderful hosts. They went above and beyond to make our stay pleasant, made us feel welcome, and were extremely helpful. The accommodations were immaculate and cozy, the location perfect... I am very happy with our choice and would hope to be welcomed back again.

Angel är mycket trevlig och gjorde att vi kände oss välkomna i hans våning. Vi anlände på kvällen och Angel hjälpte oss att hitta en bra restaurang för kvällen. Vi hade varit i Madrid tidigare och känner staden ganska bra men hade ändå hjälp av Angels rekommendationer av restauranger osv.
Lägenheten ligger i ett lugnt kvarter och att gå till Madrid centrum tar ca 5 minuter. Det finns gott om trevliga ställen att äta frukost inom några minuters gångväg.
It was really nice experience staying at Angel's home. Excellent house location and kind help from Angel.

The house is beautiful like a 5 star hotel, although we did not meet Angel in person, he send msg to us to ask if there are any advices needed from him. The house is just 8mins walk to Sol plaza so it is convenient.

Before we arrived, Angel provided a thorough list of recommendations which was great. He met us when we arrived and made us feel very welcome and gave us good advice on how to make the most of our time. The bed was very comfortable, the bedroom was quiet and private, and the en suite bathroom was a big plus. His apartment was very centrally located, making exploring historical Madrid easy and fun. We especially loved the flamenco show right around the corner, which Angel helped reserve for us! This is the kind of stay we hoped for when using airbnb!

PRECIOSO LUGAR MUY BIEN UBICADO.

Après une arrivée quelque peu tardive (bien malgré nous), le séjour se déroula sans encombre.
La chambre, très calme, dispose d'un lit on ne peut plus confortable.

Angel nous réserva deux places à casa Patas pour un authentique spectacle de flamenco. Que d'émotion !...

La pluie s'invita mais Angel, notre ange gardien ;-), nous prêta un immense parapluie qui nous permit de déambuler dans les rues de la capitale sans nous soucier des caprices de la météo.

Durant ces cinq jours et demi, j'avoue m'être sentie madrilène dans l'âme...

De retour en France, j'ai le mal de Madrid...

Appartement magnifique et très central: les grands musées sont accessibles à pied. Chambre très spacieuse et très calme, salle de bains privative et confortable. Un endroit très chouette à 50m à peine de l´appartememt où l´on peut prendre de délicieux petits-déjeuners. Un accueil très chaleureux. Tout pour passer un excellent séjour !!!

It's a lovely apartment, in the center of Madrid surrounded by nice restaurants and cafes. We really appreciated Angel's suggestions and we highly recommend the flamenco show.
We would definitely recommend this place!

Elegant and charming is the best way to describe this apartment and our hosts. If you are interested in staying in comfortable, clean, elegant, room located in a great area, we highly recommend staying here. Angel was helpful, sending recommendations before we arrived and making great suggestions while we were here. He was charming and a pleasure to meet.

Although this apartment does have a central location, it has some serious issues and, as a result, I cannot recommend it. Given the ratings on this property, I had expected it to be excellent, however, do not be mislead -- for the price you can do better.

1) The guest bedroom became inundated daily with very heavy cooking smells from the kitchen. These smells cannot be aired out because the only window faces the inside courtyard of the building which is also where the kitchen vents to.

2) The guest bedroom was very dusty. As a result, we could not turn on the air conditioner without getting itchy eyes. I also noticed that, in the morning, there would be a bit of dust settled on my phone.

Angel and Nacho were the perfect hosts! They provided us with lots of great information about Madrid and Spain in general. They will be sure that you are experiencing the best parts of Madrid, such as where to get REAL paella and what tourist traps to avoid!
The apartment is beautiful and is in a fantastic location. We were able to walk to everything we wanted to see, but if you prefer the metro that is also nearby and easy to use.
The bedroom was great as well - probably the best we have stayed in. It is located at the back of the apartment so it is very quiet. The bedroom was very spacious and clean with a large private bathroom. We felt very at home!
We would definitely stay here again and would recommend it to anyone traveling to Madrid.

Living in this *stately building* itself is a great experience- feels like time traveling back to the ancient times. It offers convenient modern living though, with 24hr hot water etc.
Angel and Nacho are warm and energetic hosts, offered most sensational guide to the Madrid city. Do read it - " it's important ".
Excellent location, minutes to Sol, Plaza Mayor and everything.
Exceptional.

We had very good time in Angel apartment.
The place is very cosy, quiet, ... very well decorated ! In fact, it is lovely.
Angel was very helpfull, trying to organize our stay in Madrid (tips for good restaurant, place to go out ...).
The place is very well situated. Close to place many places of interest within walking distances( Plaza Mayor, Prado Museum, El Rastro ...).
We had the opportunity to hire electric bike ( using the public bike rental service) close to the apartment ( just by Anton Martin Station ) . And this was a very good way of moving in this town.
thank you ... I hope to see you next time !
Thanks such, we have wonderful first time airbnb and Spain experience.

This was a great stay for us. Angel and Nachos' home is lovely and they've thought of all details to make your stay a pleasant one. Angel & Nacho were away on travel when we arrived, but their housekeeper was available to welcome us.
Recommendations of restaurants and attractions are included in the room as well as with the reservation information.
We met Angel and Nacho a few minutes before departing and I they were really friendly and welcoming. We’ll definitely book this home again during our next visit to Madrid.

Highly recommended. The place is beautiful with large well-furnished rooms and very neat and clean. Location is excellent, close to Atocha train station and and also close to Plaza del Sol. Easy walking distance to shopping areas, nice restaurants and cafes. The host, Angel, as well as Nacho were both very friendly and helpful. We enjoyed our stay and wished we could have stayed longer.

This flat was beautifully decorated and located in the central of Madrid. Just ten minutes walk to Mayor Plaza and some museums. The landlord is friendly and helpful. He recommended the flamenco show which was amazing.
Nos facilitaron todo,  la ubicacion excelente, super comodo el departamento. los anfitriones muy amables.

Our experience couldn't have been better! Angel was incredibly accommodating and very helpful in recommendations on where to go. We would have never gotten to experience Madrid like we did without him! The house was incredible, very clean and the location was perfect. We will definitely recommend to our friends and family! Thank you for making our stay in Madrid so special!

Angel and Nacho were my favorite amongst our hosts in Spain. They were very accomodating to us and gave us a lot of very helpful information even before we arrived in Spain. His home is very elegant, classic and so lovely to live in. Very nice location too. Short walk to Plaza Mayor and Royal Palace. It's a very good experience.

The house was incredibly lovely and it was perfect location to get around the city. Angel was very accomodating and provided feedback on any questions I had. Too bad I didn't get to see him in person. I will definitely stay at his place when I go back to Madrid

We enjoyed our stay very much. High class accommodation in very specious and spotless clean environment. Angel and Nacho are very kind and friendly landlords. Our welcome was great and we were feeling to stay at home from the first minute of our stay. Once again in Madrid we would definitely stay again at this wonderful and quite place in the town center of this great city.
Fantastic place ! Great location and magnificent host !

Angel is a great host. He kept the place really clean and beautiful. The location is perfect, walkable distance to almost everything you want see and do in Madrid. It's safe to walk around in the neighborhood at night. It's quiet as well for a good night of rest. I will come back here for my next Madrid visit!
The description of the place was accurate, Angel make sure I will have every thing I needed,the room was spacious , very organized and  clean! The house is goergeous and fantastic location .
Great location, even better hosts! Thanks again!
Angel was a great host and had a beautiful home. His home has everything that is needed and is in a central location. I highly recommend this listing.

Brilliant accomodation both in terms of the apartment itself which is in a lovely historical building in a great neighbourhood & the insights provided by Angel that really made staying in Madrid so interesting. Highly recommend this property.

Angel & Nacho were great hosts.
They gave recommendation of where to shop, explore in Madrid. Thanks to friendly and humorous hosts, we felt at home. It was nice staying at elegant, old European style house. Location was perfect.
Best experience with Airbnb. Angel and Nacho is very nice and helpful, the house is gorgeous, location is great you can walk to nice restaurants and plaza Santa Ana is cross the street.
We like the apartment very much! Everything is ok! We enjoyed stay in Madrid !

Angel has a wonderfully stylish apartment with old world charm and elegance. The location of the apartment is absolutely perfect for seeing Madrid by foot, enjoying the local Plazas and delicacies. Angel is the perfect host and booked attractions or anything we required during the stay. A perfect apartment, perfect host!

El lugar perfecto en Madrid, es hermoso el lugar de Angel, cerca de todo y lo mejor: La atención del Anfitrión.
La experiencia será inolvidable y claro que regresaremos.
Un abrazo!!!

Angel is super nice host I have ever met. The apartment is located in the center of Madrid, which has a quite tasteful decoration style. Angel is the real Angel for me, who helped me to find the parking place with patience, took me as a friend to help me a lot.
It's a super great experience to choose Angel's apartment, I had a very good trip. Thanks a lot!
Had great stay in Madrid. Very helpful and friendly host. Would definitely recommend this lovely apartment

Estadía increíble.
Se puede resumir nuestra estadía en esas dos palabras, ya que desde que llegamos a Madrid Angel demostró su preocupación por nosotros.
Los días previos al viaje estuvimos en contacto para coordinar la llegada, luego una vez que llegamos al aeropuerto estuvo en contacto con nosotros y posteriormente al llegar a casa nos dio una calida bienvenida y nos recibió de forma muy cálida.
Nos mostró su departamento y la habitación donde nos quedaríamos, que por cierto estaba perfecta, ordenada, amplia, cómoda, limpia, etc, al igual que el baño. No hay ningún reproche en cuanto a lo que ofrece Angel por la web, todo se cumplió de forma extraordinaria.
Luego tenemos la ubicación, que sencillamente es espectacular, a pasos de la Plaza Puerta del Sol, nos permitió ir caminando a todos los lugares de interés, cerca de la Plaza Mayor, Mercado de San Miguel, Parque del retiro, etc, de verdad una ubicación privilegiada en una ciudad como Madrid.
Solo puedo recomendar el lugar y agradecer a Angel su cordialidad y hospitalidad, ya que logramos sentirnos como en casa!

Be prepared to walk into a wonderful artistic world when walking into Angel's home.  Angel was a wonderful host. Comunication before arrival was responsive and accurate. The accomodation, advice and location is excellent. Highly recommend staying here. Very special. Much apreciated.

The location was perfect and host is very helpful and comunication was also good :) we had a good time in madrid.
호스트도 친절하고 번역기 돌려가면서 설명도 해주시고 집도 넓고 좋았습니당!
房东非常热情！热情的推荐了周围的各种好吃的餐厅和周围旅游。有一个word指南。交通：出了Atocha火车站打车8欧的样子，步行也就900m。离开时房东帮忙叫了出租车固定单价30欧。生活周边便利，周围有个Dia很近。去Plaza Mayor相当近，步行去大王宫也很近。屋内属于精品个人收藏，很安静。整洁干净。非常推荐。周围好吃的地很多，不用做饭。

Great location, clean and comfortable room, nice host. Angle and Nachio speaks very good English, gave us very good advice on where to go and to eat. We enjoyed staying with them as a Spanish. Thank you for everything.
We had a very nice stay at Angle' house. The room is clean, quiet and comfortable. The location is great, we will back to their place if any chance come to Madrid again.
잘생기고 친절한 호스트가 반갑게 맞이해 주었습니다. 다시 기회가 된다면 머무르고싶은  숙소입니다

Angel made us feel very welcome before we even arrived. He provided us with this comprehensive document full of great suggestions of where to eat and what to see. You could tell that he is very proud of his city and wants to share his lifetime's worth of experience. This was invaluable. The space was everything described and more. Aside from beautiful accommodations, it was very comfortable, and centrally located. We wished we had stayed an extra couple of days to take in more of Madrid. Muchos Gracias Angel & Nacho.

Ángel y Nacho son excelentes anfitriones, respetuosos y siempre dispuestos a orientarte y apoyar a que tu estancia sea la mejor. Su piso excelente!!! les doy mi máxima puntuación. Chicos los veré pronto y seguro cuando vuelva a Madrid buscaré alojarme en su hogar. Un gran abrazo!

I had a great stay at Angel's beautiful home. It is clean and very quiet for good sleeping. And the location would be hard to beat. Finally, Angel and his partner are gracious, friendly and interesting.

I had an excellent stay at Angel's and Nacho's apartment in downtown Madrid!  The location was great and the place was very clean and comfortable.  Best of all, the hosts were super gracious and friendly recommending local activities and restaurants. Would definitely stay here again! Cheers!

Casa bellissima, camera pulita ed accogliente. La posizione è strategica,si può raggiungere tutto a piedi. I proprietari gentilissimi: già al momento della prenotazione Angel invia una piccola guida con alcune informazioni su luoghi da vedere, ristoranti da provare, immancabile la serata di flamenco che consiglia e prenota per voi se interessati.
Una volta arrivati a Madrid sono sempre disponibili e danno molti consigli, sempre super!
Grazie per aver partecipato nel rendere speciale la nostra permanenza a Madrid, consiglio a tutti di fermarsi da voi!
This host was most gracious, welcoming, and unimposing. My stay was perfect.

This most welcoming and gracious host provides a beautiful quiet haven in the center of Madrid--a perfect retreat from the buzz of the city. The lovely private room is in a gorgeous and spacious apartment full of light and kindness. I can't wait to return.

Angel is a super nice host! He did his best to help me and made my stay feeling like being home. The room is very spacious and clean. It has everything you need. The bathroom is inside your room, so it's very convenient. Also the bed is very comfortable. Angel's apartment locates in the very center of the city, so basically you can walk to anywhere you want. I really enjoyed my stay there! Angel's place is highly recommended!

Angel and Nacho's apartment is beautiful and it is a real treat to stay in such a lovely place. The private room and ensuite bathroom are spacious, very clean and comfortable. Nacho and Angel are very kind and welcoming hosts. Highly recommend a stay here!

Angel and Nacho were wonderful hosts. Their house is absolutely stunning with a lot of history attached to it. They made sure our stay was comfortable by providing us with detailed information about the city, different restaurants, and activities. My sister and I tried a couple of restaurants from their list and it did not disappoint. We were glad to have met them and chat for a few minutes. Very knowledgeable and kind people. The day we had to leave, Nacho was kind enough to book a cab for us in advance to take us to the airport. Thank you for a wonderful stay Angel and Nacho :)
Muy buen anfitrión. La pieza donde nos hospedamos es muy agradable y grande.
good

Es más que recomendable, destaca por su amplitud, limpieza y situación, Ángel es un gran anfitrión aunque no pude verle, se preocupó de mi llegada, me dio indicaciones sobre el lugar y facilidades en el horario de salida
I had a great time!!! Definitely i highly recommend Angel and his place. He is a súper great host! I will be back soon. The place is amazing and beautiful, close to metro and great places to know.
Totally recommend Angel is a great Host

Hemos pasado una estancia fenomenal ! El piso es perfectamente ubicado, a menos de 10 minutos andando de todos los sitios turísticos (monumentos, museos) y en un barrio lleno de restaurantes y bares. Es muy tranquilo, limpio y decorado con muy buen gusto.
Aunque desafortunadamente no hemos visto a Angel, nos dio todas las informaciones prácticas para preparar el viaje y se preocupó de nosotros los días en que nos quedamos allá.

Nice place to live full of arts. Angel gave us some useful advice so that we could understand this city better. I do recommend this accommodation to other guests. If possible, I would like to travel to Madrid again and visit Angel as friends.
Angel和他的房子一样充满艺术气息，他本身自己也非常帅气、睿智。他通晓多国语言，在临行前他给了我们很多的出行建议。尽管相处不多，仍然非常感谢他。
Perfect apartment with the best location in Madrid and enthusiastic，kindly host which help us so much. Thank you Angel (the couple ), i will come back soon.

I had such a fantastic three days in Madrid and was instantly made to feel at home in Angel and Nacho's beautiful apartment. The location is perfect - right around the corner from Plaza Mayor but tucked down a peaceful little side street. I walked everywhere! Angel sent me some tips beforehand for what to see and where to eat etc. and was there to greet me when I arrived. This was my first airbnb trip and city break on my own - I loved it! :)

Angel prima di essere Un host perfetto è una persona meravigliosa insieme a Nacho! La sua casa è incantevole, elegante e signorile. Il posto è perfetto per girare la
Città a piedi tanto che noi non abbiamo preso mai la metro. Pernottando a casa di Angel ti senti uno del posto. Angel e Nacho danno dei consigli preziosi che bisogna assolutamente seguire. La stanza è dotata di tutti i comfort necessari. Se abbiamo amato Madrid è sicuramente anche per la loro calda e amorevole accoglienza !

in any aspect, PERFECT.
Among many things, I want to tell you is about the host.
He is amazing.
having deep knowledge regarding the city, he may suggest valuable guides and tips.
It goes without saying that the room is also great.
it reminds me of a Yves Saint Lauren's apartment (see documentary film "L'amour fou".)
His one is spanish version of that.

Gracias para todo Angel and Nacho！Everything is perfect here and we really enjoyed our stay! If this is your first time to Madrid, Angel's gorgeous house would be your best choice ever! It's close to almost everywhere and really gets everything around, supermarket día, banks, farmacia, shops, retaurants, metros, buses... And the whole flat is just like a museum that everything has a story to tell, but wish we have more time with you artists!
Definitely will come back again next time and hopefully will be neighbors by the end of the year! All the best!

Angel and Nacho's home was museum caliber with a mix of antiques, beautiful paintings and hip contemporary classics. Your cozy private bedroom is decorated with lovely paintings, high ceilings, ornate moldings and a beautiful old world marble bathroom. The location is perfectly situated on a quiet street near cafes, shops, theaters and two metro stations. We will remember them and their exquisite house with fondness.

Excelente ubicación. Tanto la habitación como el baño es grande. Angel envía al correo electrónico las recomendaciones en inglés. En cuanto al acceso al piso para ingresar con las llaves, es medio difícil abrir la puerta, pero una vez que intentas varias veces se logra abrir.

Amazing place and super nice host. The house has lots collections just like an museum. Me and my friend both think that the most amazing experience of Madrid is staying in Angel's house. Angel is a very nice person and help us a lot. Highly recommend to stay here!
房间超级棒，有自己的厕所，房子就更好了，跟皇宫一样，有非常多的收藏还有中国字画！很棒的居住体验。房东也是超级好，非常健谈，而且很帮忙也热情。强烈建议哈哈～

Mon séjour à Madrid avait fort mal commencé... Heureusement qu'Angel était là !!!
Idéalement situé, la chambre est spacieuse, confortable et tres propre. Angel est effectivement un superhost, toujours disponible, chaleureux et accueillant. Il est toujours de bons conseils et a su guider mes pas dans cette ville magnifique. Je recommande vivement et y reviendrai. Hasta luego !
Angel在我们到达之前就主动联系我们，房间跟照片一模一样，十分豪华奢侈有品味。不巧的是遇到房东出差，但是房东也非常及时的用whatsapp联系我们，而且进行各种指导，十分感激，我们的要求房东都尽量满足。非常棒！

The best airbnb experience that I have ever had in the past few years. Angel and Nacho provided a spacious and beautifully decorated bedroom with an attached private bathroom in their urban mansion in the middle of Madrid. (Though their place is a 2-bedroom apartment with 2.5 bathrooms, I would call it an urban mansion due to its size, location and elegance.) Of course, everything else they offered and suggested was of a very high quality, from mattress to restaurants to flamenco show. Most importantly, Angel and Nacho were very friendly. I will definitely stay here again next time I visit Madrid. Mucho gracias, Angel y Nacho!

Angel y Nacho son unas personas extraordinarias. Encantadores. Su casa es preciosa e impecable. Está en un punto estratégico de la ciudad. La lista de indicaciones para llegar hasta casa y de sugeridos dentro de Madrid es acertadísima. Los restaurantes que recomiendan, deliciosos. Fue una experiencia magnífica.

Let me start by saying that this place is gorgeous! Very clean, classy, and big! I'm talking chandeliers, a piano, etc.!
The room I stayed in was perfect! Very spacious and had its own (equally spacious) bathroom.
Pros:
-it is literally center city. Everything is at walking distance which saved me a lot of money on transportation.
-amazing restaurants in the area. Be sure to call ahead and reserve a table. Otherwise, good luck!
-Angel was amazing! He was not at home as he was away on a trip and even from a distance he managed to make my life so much easier. He called people he knew at local restaurants and events and getting me in. He even scheduled my cab ride to the airport the day before. It's no wonder he's ranked as a super host.
-Angel provides a very thorough and helpful guide. READ IT IN DETAIL! It's very helpful.
-the bed was super comfortable and you could sleep in peace because it's very quiet.
Cons:
-literally none! My first time in Madrid was a success and Angel had a lot to do with that.

Angel was extremely gracious and helpful, going out of his way for us. The room and bath in his elegant apartment are large and have all the amenities needed. The location is walking distance to the Prado and other museums. We highly recommend this place to anyone visiting Madrid.

If you're heading to madrid then you need to stay here! Angel and Nacho's luxury apartment is huge and beautiful, like no other airbnb you have ever seen. They are super nice and gave us a lot of local advice about our trip which is going to improve the quality of our holiday. The room is gorgeous, the bed large and super comfortable. You have your own bathroom which is very large and well appointed. You won't find a better place to stay in Madrid, we wish we booked longer. Thanks guys!
위치도 좋고 (주요 관광지 도보 가능) 아름답고 안락하고 쾌적한 숙소였습니다. Angel의 가이드도 정말 유용해요. 친절한 호스트와 넓고 깨끗한 숙소, 위치 등 모든 것이 완벽합니다. 부모님께서도 정말 만족스러워 하셨어요. 다시 마드리드에 갈 때에도 꼭 이용할 계획입니다.
Angel gave us a lot of helpful advice. Very good experience. Highly recommend.

Hands down the best airbnb we have ever stayed in. Angel and Nacho were incredible! Friendly, warm, welcoming and gave us so many incredible tips on where to eat and things to do. They took such good care of us and we highly recommend this place to anyone looking to spend some time in Madrid.
great

We had a wonderful 3 days with Angel and Nacho in June this year.
They are such lovely guys and very knowledgeable. The apartment is just
beautiful. You will be staying in a large private bedroom with a large private
ensuite bathroom. Bedroom has its own air conditioning. They are on the third
floor but there is a cool old world lift. Location could not be better. Ask Angel to
book a table for you for the Flamenco show at Casa Patas - street just adjoining.
This was the highlight of our trip to Madrid. This is a very special home to share so
please don't hesitate. I'm very confident you will love it.

Angel and Nacho are really nice, they gave us briliant recomendations and we spent a great time at their place. the apartment is really comfortable and the location is perfect. if we go back to Madrid, will be our first choice
Very central location with easy access to everything. Angel and Nacho are great hosts! They have a very beautiful home. Highly recommend!
Ubicación y calidad en el alojamiento
Excelente habitación y baño, muy limpio y comodo. Departamento a 5 min del metro, muy centrico y el anfitrión si bién no tuve la oportunidad de conocerlo, siempre estuvo pendiente de mis consultas!

Thank you very much to Angel and Nacho hosted my stay in Madrid, it was excellent in almost every aspect in terms of location, neighborhood, actual room and the overall decoration.
All these I believe previous guest had mentioned numerous. I was delighted by the knowledge of Angel knows where to eat good food, in 2 days time, I have went to 3 restaurant (La Mucca, La Veronica and La Barraca) Angel recommended and all
Offers great food. Thanks to Angel's help to made booking with Casa Patas Flamenco and was given a seat close to the stage, I think all the fascinating and charming of Spain, half hide within Flamenco.
Once again, very much appreciated for your kind help. Such an engaging host to give me advise, all these moment had left in great memory.

Angel's place was one of the best AirBnb homes I've visited.  As others have mentioned, it's a very large apartment with awesome decor.  The location really can't be beat - you are less than 10 minutes' walk from the best of Madrid.  The apartment was clean, the room has its own private bathroom, and it felt completely safe.  Angel's suggestions for food and activities were also top notch.  I'd absolutely recommend this place to anyone coming to Madrid!
位置超赞，距离最好的景点都可以步行完成。而且周围购物就餐嗯方便。最值得提的是房子超级漂亮，大卧室大衣柜大卫生间，房间里香香的，强烈推荐。

I stayed for two nights. It's a pity that Angel was out of town during my stay but he arranged the checkin and out smoothly and easy. His guidebook is exhaustive of all good places to visit and kept me busy everyday. His apt is very clean and has a/c and you can notice a lot of details in the room to taste. And it's a safe quiet area walkable to central while is next to metro and train. Can't expect more.

Belle chambre. Appartement très bien situé. On peut tout faire à pied.
Accueil chaleureux
Nous recommandons vivement

Though we didn't get to spend much time with Angel as he was away traveling, for the brief time we met he was a charming and gracious host who was easy to contact despite being away. His home was beautiful, clean and spacious and in an excellent location. I would highly recommend Angel's place for anyone looking to stay in Madrid, and wouldn't hesitate to come back the next time I visit!

Unfortunately Angel wasn't around when I visited Madrid.  But he checks on me all the time and made sure I had everything I needed.   He was really nice, attentive and got me wonderful seats at the Flamingo show.  The house is gorgeous, and spotless.    He is one of the most amazing host I have ever encountered.

Angel was a great host and was very helpful in every aspect. Me and my daughter felt very comfortable staying in his apartment. The apartment is so close to all important tourist places in Madrid. Will definitely return.

집이 깨끗하고 방안에 개인 욕실이 있어 편합니다. 지내는 동안 호텔에서 지내는 느낌이였습니다.
건물에 엘리베이터도 있어 편했습니다.
위치도 좋아 어디든 걸어갈 수 있었습니다.

A lovely well-kept apartment residence in the center of old Madrid, with easy walking to transportation, various neighborhoods, markets, charming restaurants, the Plaza Mayor, and the beautiful palace and gardens. Communication with Angel was excellent, and he attended to our every needs; he was gracious to allow us to stay and extra few days when our flight back to Atlanta was cancelled due to hurricane Irma.  Definitely recommend his home!

Highly recommend. The accommodation is clean, comfortable and private and the hosts are awesome. If you want to know where to go they are the right people to ask and this place is within walking distance to everything. We felt privileged to stay here.
房子本身很棒，房东的英语很好，而且很热情有耐心。第一次在家里同住，但一点也不尴尬。住在angel家里是这段旅行最美好的体验之一。
친절하고 깨끗하며 엘리베이터가 있어서 편해요. 근처 번화가는 다 걸어서 갈수있어 좋았구요. 새벽에도 사람이 좀 있어서 다니는데 무섭진 않았어요.

Angel is very helpful and thoughtful. He gave us many good recommendations. Besides, he speaks very fluent English and easy to communicate. His house is chic and spacious, just like a small museum. Hope we have smilies home in the future.

Best host we ever meet!!!
Angel is friendly and thoughtful, and his apartment wow...is exquisite, too shame we only booked 2 nights!
슈퍼 호스트의 스페인 집을 체험하는 것은 정말 가치있어요! 호텔 같은 개인실에 멋진 게스트.. ㅠㅠb 앙헬은 매우 친절하고 연락도 빨라서 전혀 불안하지 않았어요. 다시 간다면 또다시 묵을거예요~~!

고급호텔 못지않게 아주 넓고 깨끗합니다. 고즈넉한 분위기에 멋진인테리어가 눈에 띕니다
Angel도 너무 친절해서 덕분에 아주편하게 기분좋은 여행이 되었습니다. 영어도 아주 잘통하며, 조금 일찍 도착하였는데 이른체크인도 가능했습니다.
솔광장에서도 가까워서 이동할때도 캐리어를 끌고 충분히 이동가능했습니다

Angel sent me a note about Madrid traveling advices and it was useful. We also booked wonderful flamingo show with his help.  It seems he knows everything about the city from traffic to food, it helps a lot.
Ubicacion excelente....pulcritud absoluta y predisposicion incondicional de sus moradores para cualquier inquietud y/o consulta. Muy recomendable. Ampliamente satisfecho.
Angel’s place is amazing.  Extremely clean and comfortable with a large bathroom.  Read the info he sends after booking!

La casa está ubicada en un lugar central, silencioso, junto a plaza mayor. La habitación es privada, excelente, aseada, organizada. La casa es hermosa y los anfitriones siempre están atentos a tus necesidades.
Angel's place is gorgeous and as pictured. The location is unbeatable and amenities are plenty. Would highly recommend to any travelers looking to get an authentic Madrid experience.

First, I really can't stress enough how elegant and beautifully kept Angel's home is. It is an incredible place to spend time - and filled with unique and stylish objects and art.
The home itself is in a very central location, just off a Main Street. The guest room and guest bath are in the rear, however, so it is remarkably quiet for and comfortable for sleeping.
Angel and Nacho were away for most of my stay but I was happy to meet them before I left - wonderful and thoughtful hosts who are happy to share their Madrid with guests.
Thank you for having me as your guest - I can't wait to return!

Me and my friend had the privilege to stay at this beautiful apartment in the heart of Madrid. Angel's apartment is like no other, if you're into art then you'll love the interior. Everything is clean and spotless. Angel provides very useful tips for your trip such as places to eat, and visit and avoid. Overall, I'd really recommend staying here as everything is ideal.
Excelente ubicación!
La habitación está muy bien, la hospitalidad increíble, definitivamente volvería a quedarme allí
Angel家很有品味！屋子像个小艺术博物馆 喜欢艺术的人能和他聊很久呢！房东英文很好 声音很有磁性！感觉耳朵要怀孕了！我朋友感冒了 还很贴心的给了我们药。真的非常棒的入住体验！！！下次来马德里还会选择住这里❤️

Foi a minha primeira experiência de viagem pelo airbnb e confesso ter acertado na escolha.  Me senti muito acolhida pelo Angel, super anfitrião. Excelente apartamento muito bem localizado.  Foram dias de sonho realizado e certamente recomendo e voltarei.
A nice, comfortable place and very central to most of the objects of interests. Angel is a trustworthy and extraodinary helpful host! :-))))

Our stay at Angel's has been the best amongst all the AirBnB's I have stayed till date for various reasons. Angel is the most helpful and responsive host. His house is immaculate and a museum in itself. His house manual doesn't miss a thing and if you were to follow it, you will be ensured of a great time in Madrid. He was super accomodating for both our check in and check out times. He will ensure your safety and go out of his way to lend you help. The house cannot be more prime. It is close to everything. Did I say the house is a museum!!! (It has all the amenities required) and don't forget to take a quick tour around :)
Thank you so much for all the love and hospitality Angel. You made our trip unforgettable. We will visit you again for sure.
The place was absolutely fantastic! Location, room, cleanliness, comfort of bed, etc. Highly recommended. Angel was great as well!

It was amazing experience! The Appartement is wonderful and classic! The owner Angel is so nice and helpful to us. We just followed his advice and had three wonderful days in Madrid! Please do not miss Angel and his Appartmemt in Madrid!

Angel and Nacho’s place is stunning. The photos don’t do it justice. Great, friendly host with useful tips on local amenities who went out of his way to ensure we had a great stay. Can’t recommend strongly enough!
P.S. thank you for the oranges!

너무깨끗하고 크고 좋았어요.
단점을 구지찾자면.. 문여는게 살짝 뻑뻑하다는점?(금방 익숙해져서 방법만 알면잘열리긴 했습니다) 1층 문 나가는법을 몰라서 한참 헤맨점이에요.. (옆에 버튼누르셔야되요.. 스페인어를몰라서 누르란말인줄모르고 손으로 열다가 손톱나감ㅠ)
호스트가 여행으로 안계서서 거의 못마주쳤는데, 처음 안내해주신 친구분 Vincent 도 너무 친절하게 알려주셔서(현관문여는법까지 연습시켜주시고ㅎㅎ) 감사했습니다
아, 라디에이터가 작동안해서 살짝 춥긴했어요.. 그게먼가 문제가있었던가본지 여행다녀온 호스트가 알고 미안하다고 하시더라구요.. 스페인 첫숙소라 원래 스페인은 이정도는 이렇게 방에 난방을 안하고 지내는구나.. 했지만 이불이 두꺼워 잘때는 따시게 잤습니다. 침구가 너무좋아 덕분에 꿀잠잤네요ㅎ
첫날부터 공항에 캐리어가 도착하지않은 문제가 있었는데 계속 신경써주시고 본이아니게 공항에서 제가아니고 호스트께연락이갔는데, 여행중이신데도 불구하고 중간에서 연락도 잘해주셔서 무사히 짐도찾고 잘지내다갑니다~
다음숙소로는 호텔을잡았는데 왠간한 호텔보다는 시설이 더 좋았던거같네요 ㅎㅎ
위치도 너무 좋아요~ 솔광장 바로근처고 왠간한데는 다 가까워서 걸어다녔어요ㅎ

El cuarto que renté de Ángel, es precioso, como su departamento. Todo está en perfectas condiciones, el baño excelente, y su hospitalidad extraordinaria.
La ubicación es buenísima en el centro histórico de Madrid, porque está en medio entre El Prado y El Palacio Real. Caminas prácticamente a todos los edificios históricos. Además sus recomendaciones y atenciones fueron buenísimas. 👍
Great Host! Great Location! Quitly room ! Easy to any places~ you must love this places. Highly recommend!!
Angel es un excelente anfitrión, siempre estuvo atento a nosotros. El piso impecable y acogedor y muy bien ubicado. Lo recomiendo totalmente.

Angel y Nacho are fantastic hosts and provide lovely accommodations in the “heart of Madrid “. I highly recommend. Fabulous !
Thank you!
Ciao
Kalli

Angel 은 매우 카리스마있고 멋진 호스트였습니다. 집은 너무나 근사했고, 깔끔했습니다. 매트리스도 매우 편안해서 잠을 자고 일어나면 여행의 피로가 풀렸습니다. 호스트가 만들어준 가이드북도 여행에 많은 도움이 되었습니다.
위치도 매우 좋습니다. 지하철은 도보 4분정도면 갈 수있고, 광장, 산미구엘 마켓, 마드리드 왕궁 모두 도보로 가능합니다.
Best experience in Airbnb, will definitely come back again. Angel is just like an old friend, good advise, in time feedback. Thanks!
Angel's house is amazingly beautiful. Himself is very nice and active in helping me such as booking restaurants, offering tips, etc. Definitely worth it! Will come back if have the chance!
房子地理位置优越，去哪都很近，边上有个小广场可以吃吃喝喝很方便。房子很大，有自己的卫生间，但是要注意的是没有一次性拖鞋和牙刷牙膏，其他都很完美！房东回复及时，英文很好，沟通顺畅，非常热情！

There isn’t enough space in this whole website to express my gratitude for an amazing and unforgettable stay in Madrid!
To start, their hospitality is bar none, and I could write a book on how gracious they were from the moment I made the reservation until the second I left to return home.
Their home is exquisitely appointed, from modern details to museum pieces as it is welcoming in every aspect, delicious smell and the tranquility you would not imagine in the middle of a busy city, it’s a spa too! The gorgeous bathroom, beautiful lines, comfortable bed and intimate but spacious.
Like I said when I started, there is not enough space here to write a simple review, much less one about my new and special place in Madrid.
I hope to be back soon!!
Y en Español! Not hay palabras! Sin ninguna excepción, este es el mejor Airbnb que he estado desde que comenzamos a usar Airbnb en nuestros viajes!
Un placer de estadía y los mejores dueños de Airbnb que he conocido hasta el momento! Hala Madrid y volveré!
위치,청결,호스트의 신속한 응답,정보제공 모두 완벽했습니다.
100% recomendable, una habitación de lujo. Ángel un gran anfitrión siempre preocupado por todo.

Great hosts and very caring! Thank you so much for looking after me Angel & Nacho. The location is fantastic and I love everything about the  apartment. It’s so close to the shops, restaurants, public transportation . I will definitely coming back again!!!!!
Fantástico lugar, la ubicación perfecta!
It is a beautiful apartment in a wonderful location, it is hard to beat
Angel is a great host; he has a great place.

Angel is the best Airbnb host we have ever met! His home is stunningly beautiful and welcoming to weary travelers. He willingly gives great recommendations on where to eat and Flamenco shows. We love him and hope to be back soon. Highest recommendation.

Angel is an amazing host who makes my first Airbnb experience unbeatable. His lovely home is in the centre of all the attractions. If you want to have a different way to explore Madrid, Angel’s place is the best and smart choice.

I absolutely loved everything about my experience at Angel’s. The location is perfect to get around Central Madrid i was able to walk to many places and take the metro to others. Angel was attentive to all detail needed  and provided excellent service all while he was away. I recommend Angel’s place.
地理位置很好，去太阳门广场火车站地铁都很方便，非常想见帅气迷人的房东，可惜他去旅行了，他家很大很漂亮，非常有格调，是西班牙最漂亮的民宿了，赞
房东服务周到贴心，回复及时，并提供了许多游玩建议。房子位置离地铁站很近，到哪儿都方便。房子很漂亮，房东很帅气，如果下次到马德里我还会选择这家民宿。

Angel and Nacho are both one of the loveliest people I met during my trip!
Angel sent me a few pages of instructions on touristic attractions, restaurants, what to do & not to do and how to get to the place in detail.
They are caring, wanted to get to know you, gave me local tips as soon as I arrived.
The place is lovely, decor is outstanding, lots of personal touches through out the whole place.
Such a nice place, it is a must stay place in Madrid no doubt!!
don't miss out!
房东的豪宅在西班牙马德里的中心地带，距离马德里皇宫走路十四分钟，距离西班牙广场也只要十分钟左右，非常方便，房子很大也很舒服，只有一个房客，也有独立卫生间，不需要喝别人share。房东很有品味，家里有很精美的画和一些收藏。特别是房东非常的热情，如果你要住这里，一定要让房东帮你预定家里附近的弗拉明戈舞蹈秀，你一定不会后悔。
Excelente lugar no lo duden tomarlo

My friend and I had never travelled to Spain before, and Angel’s place was perfect for us! Close to downtown. Great tips for what to do and where to go. Clean, eclectic, and cozy. If we’re ever in Madrid again, we will definitely stay with Angel again!
Excellent hosts, very helpful and friendly,  location is absolutely perfect, close to sights and restaurants,  a must stay place anytime we are back in Madrid!

what an amazing host, and an even more amazing house in a fantastic location. initially thought the description is too good to be true, but it is spot on and simply amazing. Thanks a lot for the hospitality guys, it has been a pleasure to meet you!

Angel was so caring and kind, very communicative and helpful. He provided  us with a very detailed and well thought out guide for restaurants and things to do. He knows many establishments personally and offered to make reservations for us, which really made our stay very special. The only downside is that we did not get to meet him and his partner in person but we still feel like we’ve made some wonderful friends!

Angel was a great host and very detailed in his guidance and very responsive through out the trip. He was great with local tips as well. My favorite was his lead on the flamenco show. It was amazing!!! In addition, the accommodation itself was quaint and very clean. It was very centrally located. We were able to walk to most places.
Thank you Angel!
It was a good start to our vacation!

Angel’s apartment is lovely and I had a perfect stay. He was out of town but very communicative, and the housekeeper greeted me for a very smooth check in. The apartment is stunning and clean, and in a perfect location to either walk to sights or take the metro. I’d recommend his place to anyone, and would certainly stay there again!

You and your partner are such high class, well-educated and behaved couple. Been treated as a family member, and I’m that kind of guest always like to ask a little helps, most important they solved all in a perfect way!
Their home much more than 🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟.
Apartamento com localização excelente. O quarto é muito espaçoso, assim como o banheiro e tudo muito limpo e organizado. Pessoalmente é ainda melhor do que nas fotos. Super recomendo.

We enjoyed our stay in Angel”s place in Madrid very much! The location is so central to everything and the apartment itself is located in a small street off the main road, so it’s very quiet indoors. It’s such an amazing building with an authentic old fashioned lift and high ceilings and doors and staircases! It’s like traveling back in time! The room is very spacious with a huge bathroom with a good supply of hot water for showers! The air conditioning is also very good for a peaceful sleep!
Angel is very helpful with tips for restaurants and things to do, we met on our last day and Angel and his partner were so lovely to talk to and made us feel very welcome and at home!
Angel is kind enough to let us store the chocolates in the fridge till we leave. And Angel also booked a taxi or us to go to the train station.
I would recommend Angel’s place to anyone and would stay here again!
Thank you once again, Angel!

Amazing home with even better hosts! Angel & Nacho went above and beyond in their hospitality and generosity. My girlfriend and I have made new Spanish friends out of our hosts. The home itself is amazingly furnished and the room is very large with a beautiful bathroom. Perfect location for exploring Madrid too! We will definitely be back and suggest anyone staying here for the best possible Madrid experience.
한국분들 여기추천입니다 일단 깔끔하구요 위치도 좋구요 호스트가 체크인두 배려를 해주었습니다 저는 호스트를 보진 못했지만 신속한 응답 짱짱맨 근데 방문을 잠그진못해요 하지만 노프라브리모
줘는 별뤄였워여
This place is amazing. Five star quality in the heart of Madrid. Hosts ensure your stay is more than comfortable and very memorable. Definitely will be back! Marina. Australia

Zeer goed gelegen in het centrum van Madrid. Op wandelafstand van de Plaza Major ( niet gaan eten en drinken daar ;-), maar net verder in de Mercado San Miguel!!!
Alle bezienswaardigheden zijn op wandelafstand!
Van de accommodatie zelf kunnen we zeggen: een hartelijke ontvangst, zeer mooie kamer in een karaktervol pand!
Angel en partner zijn zeer leuke hosts waar iedereen zich mee kan vinden!!
Lees zeker de tips die ze bij jou reservering geven, zeer waardevol!!

Angel’s place is exquisitely decorated - right down to our private bathroom, which is one of the nicest we’ve been in, anywhere - and it is spotlessly clean. He loves Madrid and wants his guests to experience the best it has to offer. English speaking guests are in perfect hands with Angel’s excellent English and sincere enthusiasm. We really appreciated him making reservations for us to attend an amazing  flaminco performance with front row seats at Casa Patas and dinner at Laveronica. He even reserved a taxi for us to the airport, despite being out of town. We walked to everything from this wonderful location and were always happy to return to this impressive apartment. The bed too was super comfortable.

Angel’s place is exactly as advertised - a sparkling clean and well-maintained room in a historic building near Plaza Mayor. It’s located near tons of amazing restaurants and bars as well as the three major art museums in Madrid. Angel was a fantastic host - he arranged for someone to help me check-in and was home the next day to make sure I was doing ok. His knowledge of Madrid and the neighboring cities in Spain is second to none. MAKE SURE YOU READ HIS TIPS! He will send you a word doc to your email account with some suggestions - the restaurant suggestions are extremely helpful. He was also extremely responsive and did his best to treat me like a true guest in his place. This is the place to book in Madrid. Gracias Angel!
The room is very spacious, clean and comfortable. He provides a lots of useful advice to us, which helps us a lot in our stay.
房东很有魅力，还会讲很多门外语，给我们推荐了很多旅游的tips，非常负责。房子就在市中心sol，交通很便利，房间装修很有品位，居住体验很棒，既安静又舒适，推荐给你们！

Fantastico lugar, tal y como se puede ver en la foto.  Los anfitriones inmejorables, en todo momento pendientes de hacerte sentir como en casa y ayudarte en lo que necesites. Sin duda uno de los mejores sitios en los quehe estado. Recomendable 100%
这是一个很棒的房子！可惜我们在马德里的时间太短，没能和Angel好好聊一聊，这是个遗憾。房子很大很干净，布置得很有格调，设施齐全。Angel很细心，会询问我们一切是否顺利，住的是否舒服，需不需要帮忙。总之，如果你来马德里，我强烈推荐Angel的家，你会喜欢的。

Angelのアパートメントはおしゃれなインテリアで、華やかな気分になりました。水回りやリネン類も清潔で、快適に過ごすことができます。プラド美術館をはじめとする美術館、王宮、ショッピングエリア、フラメンコを楽しめるタブラオ、ピンチョスを楽しめるバルも徒歩圏内でとても便利です。Angelは親切、フレンドリーで、ショッピングの提案をしてくれたり、各種予約にも気軽に応じてくれます。３日間と短い滞在でしたが、本当に忘れらない素敵な思い出になりました。また近いうちにAngelのアパートメントでマドリードでの休日を過ごしたいです。

You’ll be perfectly positioned in this luxury apartment. It’s a short stroll to some the best art galleries in the world plus some of the best authentic Spanish restaurants and bars. A day train trip to Toledo is an easy added adventure.

Exactly as advertised.  Angel was very responsive leading up to my stay and was there to meet me on my arrival.  Apartment is beautiful, room is clean and comfortable.  And it’s in the perfect location in the city.  Highly recommended all around!

Staying with Angel was wonderful. The apartment was beautiful and he had so many great suggestions about interesting things to see and do in Madrid and the surrounding areas. He was a wonderful host and I would absolutely stay with him again.
I had a great stay at Angel's place! The location was great and the apartment is beautiful.
非常好的住宿体验！房东的房子真的可以说是豪宅了，非常有当地风情！而且还是当地的保护建筑！非常值得体验！房东人也很好！推荐
Absolutely amazing place
