This is an outstanding apartment with a very friendly, thoughtful and helpful host. Close to many great cultural amenities, restaurants and nightlife. Highly recommended.
Darragh (Dublin)
非常棒地理位置很好，就在市中心，推荐给你们

Logement superbe, exceptionnellement bien placé, et quel accueil ! Tout était parfait. Merci infiniment Angel pour tous tes conseils. Nous reviendrons avec plaisir !
Je recommande sans hésiter !! A bientôt j'espère :)

L’appartement correspond parfaitement a la description et est idéalement placé dans Madrid.
Angel est super dispo pour qu’on se sente a la maison. Une vraie expérience Airbnb comme on les aime. Je recommande vivement.
Angel人非常好哦，回复很迅速！房子真的超级大超舒服了，完全能感受一下西班牙当地人的生活状态.也很喜欢装修风格，可以明显感觉到房东是个热爱生活爱旅游的人.然后房子地理位置也很好，去最近的英格列斯百货和索菲亚、普拉多博物馆都只要步行十分钟左右。坐地铁出行的话走到太阳门广场就五分钟超级方便了.唯一遗憾就是房东临时有事出去了没遇见，希望以后有机会能再相遇：）
Do not have a chance to meet Angel face to face, but the apartment is really good and beautiful.....Definitely recommended...

First and foremost The apartment is stunning, beautifully decorated, with tremendous grandeur. The building is old with wonderful features.  The room was well decorated and thoughtfully arranged, with an excellent large ensuite.  Although located in Centro close to many restaurants, and major sites, it was also quiet.  Good restaurants for breakfast nearby too.  All in all I was extremely happy to be able to stay with Angelo and Nacho in their beautiful home, and benefit from the excellent suggestions and local knowledge.  All in all a great place to stay!

I spent there four days.Angel’s place is very clean,room is more larger than I thought.His house looks like a gallery or art museum.There are many beautiful paintings on the walls,different styles.I found Subirachs’s metal engraving,I’m his fans.
There are several supermarkets nearby,Metro station is only 300meters away, I can go to Prado Museum on foot.
Unfortunately, Angel was out during I stayed there,when he came back,I fell asleep. I had no chance to talk to him.But he asked his neighbor to help me.When I had any questions,Angel always gave me many useful information.If I came to Madrid again, I will choose there again.

Una estancia perfecta.
Limpieza, ubicación y una atención y comunicación a la altura.
Perfect place to stay in Madrid, as Angel as a host. Higly recomended.

Tenía una estancia súper bien en el piso de Angel! Es un piso muy bonito y cómodo y tiene todo lo que se necesita! No he conocido Angel en persona pero ha organizado todo con un vecino y ha sido muy atento llamando y informando me por teléfono! 100% recomendable!!!

Solo female traveler review here. In a great location, I never had to use the taxi in town. The location of the apartment was quiet which I loved so very much so you can sleep! Angel gave me forever great traveling tips, he is quick and responsive.
本当に素敵なAngelsさん達と、お部屋に滞在できて幸せでした！gracias！

We spent a great weekend here. The location makes it so easy to get around, the space is very stylish and clean and Angelo knows the importance of communication and is always willing to help.
Highly recommend!

El Piso de Ángel está increíble, parece sacado de una revista de arquitectura, con mucho estilo, todo impecable y bueno la atención de los anfitriones increíble! Se han tomado el tiempo para conocernos un poco y hacernos muy buenas recomendaciones, la habitación es de muy buen tamaño con un baño enorme y una cama comodísima, cuando vuelva a madrid no me lo pensaré dos veces para volver a hospedarme con ellos.
Lovely room and great recommendations
地理位置极度优越，方便，大部分地方都步行可达，非常方便。房子大大超出预期，简直可以奢华来形容，非常有品位，非常喜欢。我发朋友圈后几乎所有人都非常赞叹希望能够推荐给他们旅行，当然，我极力推荐了。也很感谢Angel的热心帮助，虽然因为飞机晚点造成一些不便，但很感谢信任把家交给我们，真的宾至如归，这是我这么多年旅行这么多国家所定的Airbnb最爱，因为这个家而更爱西班牙，马德里，欢迎来中国旅行

The Home is beautiful and spacious.  The pictures of its grandeur are accurate. The location is excellent for walking to all Points of Interest, restaurants, entertainment . Central to everything you could ever want. The Host is warm  and charismatic and easy to communicate with.

This is a perfect place to stay to visit Madrid. Angel and Nacho are kind and generous and the location couldn’t be better. The room is lovely and the apartment is beautiful. I would definitely come again.

Angel and his partner are super kind! The house is sparkling clean and super stylish! I had a wonderful stay in this house, I went to two restaurants that Angel recommended, they are both quite nice! Cannot recommend more!

Staying at Angel's place is definitely my highlight spot in Madrid.  Excellent location. Clean and safe.  The building itself is very decent. I like the elevator a lot;)  Angel gave me great advice beforehand and we kept in touch while my stay.  Highly recommend!!!
We had a great stay! The location is amazing and so was the room. Above expectations to say the least!

这里的位置非常棒，无论去哪里都非常方便。
屋主介绍的饭店也非常地道。另外由屋主介绍的弗拉明戈餐厅真是一级棒，绝对推荐！

The location is great. The main scenic spots are almost within walking distance.
After you paid, Angel will send you an email with his advice for living, you must read it carefully and take with you.
地理位置很好，装修有格调，是个很棒的豪宅。
Angel很热情，也很耐心，我忘了告诉他时间，耽误了他的工作，但是他都及时跟我沟通了，房子很漂亮，装修的很艺术，卫生间特别大，地理位置超级方便。
地段很好，房东英文很棒。

We had a wonderful time at Angel and Nachos home. They are wonderful hosts and immediately made us feel at home. Although we only met them briefly, they were always there to help, give us tips and book us local restaurants and shows. We followed a lot of their recommendations which were great and Angel even got us last minute front row tickets to an amazing Flamenco show which was one of the highlights of our trip. Their house is absolutely beautiful, a place you do not want to leave with a stunning art collection and tasteful interiors filling every room. There are lots of small details to discover, from the small old vases and bottles in the bathroom to the grand entrance hall of the building and the very unique art deco elevator - every corner makes you feel you are entering a museum rather than an aparment building. The house is in the perfect location, right in the center but still very quiet for a restful nights sleep. We thoroughly enjoyed our stay at Angel and Nachos home and cannot recommend it enough. We only stayed for a short weekend but hope to be back soon to discover more of this beautiful city.
Angel is quite nice and his place is clean and like a art gallery. The location is super good.
干净整洁，房间很漂亮。

Conforto, estética, localização. As maiores qualidades desta acomodação.
Além de ser acessível por elevador. Coisa rara em Madri.
Great host and fabulous place

Angel’s was a wonderful home base during our trip. The building is very cool with an interesting elevator. It is centrally located, near the metro and nice cafes and tapas. Angel was so helpful and easy to communicate with. Highly recommend!
Excelente lugar!! Cerca de todo!

位置非常好，基本就是马德里的市中心的位置。机场打车半小时内。atocha打车几分钟吧。周围地铁站走路五分钟吧。
房子很大，你可以使用厨房洗衣机等，装修的也非常艺术气息。
房东给了非常大的帮助，从游玩建议到餐馆推介，最后一天早上去机场的taxi也是房东前一天帮我们打电话预定好的。
第一天晚上去了房东推荐的一家餐馆正好碰到房东在那喝酒，哈哈，然后就帮我们安排了座位。Prada a tope.请记住这家店！因为真的非常好吃！我们后来连续三晚都去吃了，服务员都熟了，哈哈。
Perfect base for exploring Madrid. Great hosts in wonderful apartment

Es un sitio completamente fabuloso, Ángel es un anfitrión de primera, muy amable y preocupado que llegues bien y que tú estancia sea perfecta.  Con limpieza y orden impecable. Queda céntrico, cerca de todo! Lo recomendamos completamente hizo que cerremos con broche de oro nuestro viaje !!
Angel is the best host. Amazing and stylish apartment with great location. We had a wonderful stay!

The hosts are very thoughtful, caring and gentle. They have provided us with lots of help, especially when my friend had an injury, they were more than just nice hosts.
The place is very stylish. We love how big the bathroom is but the bedroom is slightly smaller than we expected, and the room in general looks a bit too dark despite we turned on the lights. But we would like to come back and will recommend this place.

Angels place was in a great neighborhood walking distance to everything you need to see in Madrid. His place is clean and nicely decorated.  The room has a private bathroom and a/c which is necessary in the summer.   The building is beautiful and has an elevator. Overall perfect for what we needed
Angel家真的很有品位，每个角落都有装饰，住着非常舒服。房子处在市中心，出去玩也很方便。Angel给我们了游玩建议，很好的房东。
特别豪华的房子，来马德里一定要住他家！！里面的装饰让人难以忘怀，主人很有艺术气质
Angel was very responsive to my inquiries about Madrid and had great suggestions about things to do and places to eat in the area. The room in the apartment was clean and roomy.
Fantastic Apartment, Great Location, lovely host, we want to keep it a secret so we can book again.

We're so glad we stayed at Angel's place. The location was so central -- we could easily walk to a lot of sights and restaurants, including Mercado de San Miguel, Plaza Mayor, and even Retiro Park. The room was comfortable with good closet space and bathroom was huge! Angel and Nacho weren't home when we arrived but their housekeeper welcomed us in and showed us around. She didn't speak any English but it didn't end up being a problem. Angel and Nacho came back on our second night there and despite coming back from a long trip, they took the time to sit down and talk to us, which we really appreciated. The guidebook that Angel sent was incredibly detailed and helpful, so make sure to read it all. Angel also made a reservation for us to see flamenco at a place just behind their apartment. Our seats were great and the show sublime -- definitely make time for it. Overall, we had a lovely stay and we'd recommend Angel's place for sure.

I should rate 6 stars to this apartment. The location is perfect, only 8 mins walk to the Plaza.
The apartment is elegant and classy, the bedroom has a large ensuite.
The owners were having the holiday somewhere else but responded very quickly.
The owners would provide a comprehensive booklet for the visitors including restaurants and drinks. They also booked me a local flamenco show which was only 1 min walk from the apartment.
I would like to suggest anyone else to stay here.

I was blown away by the decor, architecture and size of the place. The art, the feel of it all. The room was great. Loved the special touches. Angel wasnt there but it as if he was. Communication was on point. From the large, iron getting door to the unique and stylish elevator. Loved it. The bathroom was almost as big as the room. Everything that was promised was delivered with more. Great stay. Will definitely stay there again. All positive feedback. Host was friendly and helpful from the beginning. Loved the packet with recommendations.
Great host in wonderful apartment!!
非常好看的公寓，主人装饰很花心思。地理位置非常优越，交通便利，步行10分钟可以到达太阳门广场，步行15分钟到普拉多博物馆和索菲亚皇后艺术中心。没有遇到host略有遗憾，希望下次还有机会拜访。

Angel has the right name....and he is one! I arrived feeling exhausted and with a migraine... his communications to me were impressive even though I was delayed getting back to him. His housekeeper let me in and was very welcoming so I could sleep for hours to feel better! He stayed in contact each day to check in and for that I am grateful as I was traveling alone.  The room is lovely and so is the bath. Every detail conveys a skilled combination of old and new world.  Beautiful aesthetics and close to everything. Extremely happy!
Beautiful space. Perfect location central to everything.

Angel is a funny and careful landlord，there was no barrier to communication between us. His house is clean, tidy and artistic，It is in the center of Madrid, close to atocha  station, the Madrid palace and the main square. Angel has some thoughtful tips for us and recommend some very good restaurants for us. All in all, we had a great three days in Madrid because  of Angel we liked the city better. If you are planning a trip to Spain, I recommend his house.
Muy cómodo, con un anfitrion muy atento.

This was such a lovely place to begin our trip through Spain! An ideal location from which to explore Madrid - walking distance from Atocha station and all the sights. Angel was incredibly attentive and helpful via message - booking us last-minute tickets to the flamenco and arranging for an early-morning taxi. Unfortunately he and Nacho were not at the property in person so we never got to meet them, but we can highly recommend staying here. They even left out an Australian power adaptor in case we didn’t have our own! The nearby laundry area on the same floor can be a little noisy at times, but it didn’t affect our sleep and it is a small price to pay for such a luxurious room in a wonderful location. Thank you Angel and Nacho!

화장실이 깨끗하며 수고는 안전하다는 느낌을 받았으며, 위치가 좋다.
단지 간편한 식사를 할 수 있는 공간이 제외되어 있어 아쉽다.

Estupenda ubicación. Estilo. Es una habitación con baño privado en un piso de muy buen gusto y con todas las prestaciones. Huele un poco a hogar después de haber permanecido en otra clase de alojamiento. Hermosa como Madrid.

This apartment is big and comfortable. We were deeply impressed by the collections. The locations is great, near to the station of Tirso de Molina and Sol. Angle gave a lot of useful tips and suggestions, including restaurant, transportation, etc. It is a pity that they were out of city this time.

Ángel es muy amable y muestra plena disposición para atender todas tus dudas y necesidades.
La habitación muy amplia y limpia, ademas de cómoda y con todas las facilidades.
El piso es muy bonito y seguro y la ubicación inmejorable. A unos pasos de la Plaza San Jacinto, la Plaza del Sol y la Plaza Mayor.
Definitivamente me hospedaría con Angel a mi regreso a Madrid.
The place is beautiful and very spacious. Angel provides great recommendations for places to go. Location is a short walk to Plaza Mayor. Just great experience all around. Would definitely recommend.
It is the best Airbnb we had lived in Spain. Angel and his partner are really nice to us. We felt warm and kind. And the house is pretty cool. We love it so much.

I don't think a location could be more central than Angel's beautiful apartment. It's a short walk to the biggest reasons to visit Madrid, and also to the metro for anything a little further out. Angel and Nacho are wonderful hosts who are eager to help you get the most out of your visit.

Angel’s place is the perfect place to stay in Madrid if you love beauty, comfort and a great location. We were near the golden triangle of art (Prado, Thyssen-B and Reina-Sofía museums) and well as the Hamman baths and great tapas restaurants and the Buen Retiro park. I loved waking up in quiet then going out to find Madrid in full swing near by. Angel was a fabulous host. Being a very good communicator and giving us many tips (including the Best restaurant - La Sanabresa) and overall looking out for our wellbeing. I recommend Angles place as THE place to stay while you are visiting Madrid.

Gorgeous apartment like a small museum with a very good location! It's 5 mins walk to the Sol and 8 mins to the Plaza Mayor. And the room is big and clean. Angel is quite nice and always online for any of our questions :)
Stylish room, spacious bathroom and a fabulous location! We enjoyed the small touches that made our stay even more comfortable then we expected. Great communication too!
Angel's place is great! The home is beautiful, historic and well kept. Location is also ideal. I would highly recommend and would gladly stay again.
天使哥是一位很有品味的艺术家，和一般专门装修做民宿的房东不一样。家里收藏了很多有趣走又品味的东西，比如各种绘画作品和古董钟表。除了收藏，天使哥还是建筑设计师兼画家，他还给我展示了他收藏的毕加索的绘画作品。关于住宿方面，这里真的是应有尽有，住这里真是很值了！
地理位置非常好，房间也很干净，房东也很友好，一切都很好五星好评

La casa de Ángel está en el centro de Madrid pero al mismo tiempo la habitación que alquila es muy tranquila, sin ruidos exteriores. La cama es cómoda y el baño muy amplio. Aunque no conocimos  a Ángel personalmente, la comunicación con él ha sido muy buena tanto antes como durante nuestra estancia y nos hemos sentido muy cómodos en su casa, impecablemente decorada.

Angel’s place is exactly as it described. Perfect location and beautifully decorated. It is on a quite street but close to all major attractions. I walked in the early hours and during night after 9 pm. Never felt unsafe. Angel and Nacho are wonderful hosts and I had chance met them. They made me feel like I was staying with friends. The whole experience is just perfect. I wish I could stay longer there.

Habiter chez Ángel à Madrid fut un privilège.
Un incontournable de la communauté Airbnb.
Hélène et Pierre
Excellent séjour chez Angel. Je recommande fortement !

We have stayed in AB&B's in many places. Angel's place takes first place. It is absolutely the cleanest, quietest, safest, toniest, coolest place ever. And, it is elegant and Beautiful as well.
This centrally-located place is a very short walk to the train station, Sol. Plaza Mayor, Gran Via and the Prado. We bought a Metro card but didnt use it much because we were so near to every thing
---Tim and Ruthie Hast

天使真的人如其名，简直不能更好了！其他地理位置设施我就不赘述了。说3个点:
1. 因为航班早到，所以我们比预期早了2小时入住；
2. 我朋友在巴塞罗那的hugo boss买衣服被多刷50欧，我们到了马德里发现问题但马德里的boss不受理，是天使出面给总部打电话发邮件协调；
3. 我们是圣诞元旦期间去的，马德里店铺大部分休息，天使找朋友预定了超好吃的跨年大餐。
以上这些天使都是非常发自内心 真诚地在帮助我们，因为有了他和Nacho，整个西班牙之行被点亮了❤️
Angel is a great host,Fabulous apartment,Great location. Will definitely be booking again!!

Look no further just book Angel’s place already! Some of my personal favorites: art everywhere in the apartment, delicious tap water, convenient/central location, outstanding hospitality...the list goes on. Also Angel is a lot of fun :)

If I can state it as simply as possible- it was beyond better than I had expected! You will not find a better home that is situated near everything in the city center, and you will not find better hosts. I would definitely return.
excellent

Fantastic place to stay in Madrid, it’s basically at the middle of the most important spots in the city, so you won’t need to spend money in any kind of transportation cause you can reach everywhere just by walking couple minutes from Angel’s house.
House is super clean, confortable and high stylish decorated.
SUPER RECOMMENDED

Angel’s home is in an excellent location for exploring all that Madrid has to offer. Although we didn’t get chance to meet him he provided great tips for our stay. Would definitely recommend staying here.
房子位置很好，周围就有很多有名的餐厅，包括火腿博物馆。走路去火车站15分钟左右。晚上酒吧很热闹。卫生间很大，洗热水澡很方便。房间不能外带食物哦。房东英语很好，交流很顺畅，也很热情，会推荐很多好吃的好玩的。因为是和房东一套房子，感觉也比较安全。我们晚上到的比较晚，房东一直等我们。
Wonderful and very experienced hosts, amazing location, and great value. Definitely recommend!
I had a great time in Angel place, his recommendations mack my trip just better to explore the city and everything around Madrid, I highly recommend his place

La casa di Angel è veramente perfetta per una visita a Madrid: l'appartamento è stupendo e arredato con gusto e la camera è pulita ed accogliente, con un bagno molto ampio e comodo.
A questo vanno aggiunti 2 "plus" particolari:
- il primo è la disponibilità di Angel che fornisce tanti consigli e informazioni sia nei giorni che precedono il soggiorno tramite una comoda guida in inglese che invia via mail, sia via whatsapp durante i giorni di permanenza nel suo alloggio.
- il secondo è la posizione super-strategica del suo appartamento: la metropolitana è a 100m da casa e tutte le principali attrazioni di Madrid (musei, piazze e monumenti) sono tutte entro un raggio di 20 minuti a piedi.
A questo aggiungo che è stato davvero un piacere chiacchiare in italiano con Angel (lo parla benissimo!) e che spero di tornare ancora a Madrid nel suo appartamento!
Unique house in the very centre of Madrid. Ángel was very welcoming and flexible, we had a great time :)

This is an absolutely amazing place. It surpassed our expectations! What a beautiful place with exceptional decor! Perfectly located in central Madrid with easy access to all main attractions and plenty of restaurants and shops around. The best part was Angel. His hospitality, courtesy and personality makes this spot the best there is. Angel’s professionalism and attention to our needs were superb in all aspects. We will definitely be back in Madrid and we will stay at this great place again. Thank you Angel for EVERYTHING.
Take care!
Nannette

My stay at Angel’s place was perfect! He was very attentive and kept in touch throughout the listing even if he wasn’t at home for a few days. He even offered some advice on where to go for some nice experiences throughout Madrid and was very helpful. I would love to come back to his place :)

Ángel es un anfitrión impecable, tiene todo perfectamente organizado para la llegada a su casa dándote todo tipo de explicaciones para cualquier duda que te pueda surgir, una vez en el alojamiento. Ángel ha estado pendiente  en todo momento de todos los detalles y necesidades recomendando lugares , tanto para la cena como para los desayunos, cerca de la vivienda. Nos ha encantado su casa y su ubicación no puede ser mejor. Todas las fotos son fieles a lo que te encuentras en la casa y por supuesto, alabar el buen gusto en su decoración,  todo ello ha hecho que nos hayamos encontrado muy cómodos y con ganas de repetir en nuestra próxima escapada a Madrid.
This place is so lovely! Location is perfect, super close to everything! Angel was such an amazing host, super helpful and always checked in with me. Highly recommend staying here!
Good location. All good!
la habitacion muy bonita, amplia y muy bien decorada, un magnifico baño y super buena ubicacion, gracias Angel por estar pendiente, esperamos volver pronto!!

This listing is everything it said it would be and more! Very well situated just a few minutes walk from all of the museums and the palace, it is on a quiet side street with zero noise. Also just a stones through from neighborhood restaurants with very little tourist traffic. Easy to walk, but also easy to find a cab when needed. Again, just a perfect stay…
Beautiful apartment, nice room, comfortable bed, big private bathroom in the center of Madrid. Angel was friendly and welcoming. I would love to go back.
Great place, central location
Amazing location & beautifully decorated! Angel is very accommodating and quick to respond

Perfekte Lage, sehr sauber, extrem freundliche und hilfsbereite Gastgebern, besser als ein 5 Sterne Hotel. Um diesen Preis kann man nirgendwo so zentral übernachten, die Wohnung ist wunderschön und sehr ruhig, was sicher selten ist in Zentrum von Madrid. Ich kann mir nur mehr vorstellen zu übernachten in Madrid. Das Vertrauen die sie in Menschen haben ist erstaunlich....das wird man erst verstehen, wenn man die Wohnung sieht!
Danke nochmals für alles!

Angel was delightful   The room spacious with a very comfortable big bed.  The jewel of the suite is the bathroom.  Large beautiful with a shower/tub.  lots of light.  I will stay with Angel on my next trip to Spain.  Unless the word gets out about what a great space it is and he's booked solid.
Sehr hübsches Zimmer in guter Lage. Angel ist super nett, unkompliziert und immer da wenn es Fragen gibt.
thank you.

Absolutely gorgeous room with spacious bathroom in amazing location.  Angel was incredibly gracious, welcoming and helpful.  I will definitely be back and would say that this was my favorite place to stay out of 60 different places in the last 3 months.  Highly recommend Angel and his Air Bnb.

Honestly this is by far the nicest Airbnb I have ever stayed in! The location is unmatched for the price! All the parks and gardens and a few of the main attractions are within distance! Extremely beautiful Airbnb with amazing decor! Angel was an amazing host and was extremely funny! I can see why his a a super host! I totally recommend this a solo traveler or even a couple of all ages. Anytime I’m ever back in Madrid this will be my spot if open! Thanks again for everything Angel!

Habitación privada con baño en un edificio señorial, muy bien cuidado y super céntrico!!! Reservé el alojamiento para mis padres y la verdad que han venido encantados!!! Buena y rápida comunicación con Ángel!! lo recomendaría sin duda ;)
Visiting Madrid is a beautiful memory, in so many ways. (And I would love to have a "La Rollerie" around the corner. ). Thank you for being a great host & guide, Angel.
Angel is the kind of host who wants to make sure that you have the perfect stay, very easy to reach and helpfull at all times!

I stayed in Angel and Nacho’s beautiful home for 2 nights and really had a great time. The apartment itself is really something, lots of great touches and very well decorated. The room is huge and nicely done as well, but the best part is the cavernous attached bathroom (with bidet!). The location is very central yet quiet and the hosts were very helpful. Highly recommend!
We had a lovely stay! Realy nice room with all the facilities you need. Quite place and very close to the city centre of Madrid! Perfect place to stay for a lovely weekend in Madrid!

Bellissimo appartamento in pieno centro a Madrid, posizionato in modo strategico ed eccellente per visitare la città, se hai pochi giorni come noi. Ti permette di conoscere la vita di Madrid in poco tempo e godere della sua vivacità. La casa di Angel è silenziosa, accogliente, arredata con gusto, ordinata e pulita; avevamo una camera spaziosa con bagno grande privato e potevamo usufruire degli altri spazi fra cui la cucina per prepararci una tisana o un tè. Noi ci siamo sentite a casa!  Angel poi è un hostel gentile disponibile e reattivo nel rispondere ad ogni tua richiesta o domanda. Per qualsiasi cosa puoi contare su di lui! Inoltre conosce molte lingue fra cui l'italiano che parla benissimo. Se vieni a Madrid non farti scappare questa location! 😉
Angel was a lovely host, the room is beautiful and situated in a great central position. also Angel gave us great suggestions for places to eat and visit. highly recommended!

I have never had a better host.  Eager to make sure we had a smooth check-in and generous with travel tips for the trip after we left Madrid.  The room was perfect and amazingly quiet and relaxing.  The location could not have been better, with countless wonderful destinations only a few minutes walk in any direction.

Angel es una persona que desde el primer momento nos ha hecho sentir como en casa ( a mi y a mi hija ). Nos ha recomendado sitios para ir a comer y siempre ha acertado. Cualquier duda que he tenido me la resuelto al momento. Para Laia y para mi la valoración que hacemos tanto del alojamiento como de Angel es excelente!
Impressive,the best choice of Madrid

I have to say it was amazing.
During our three days staying, Angel was always helpful with everything he can do for us. Really appreciate it.
The room was sparkly cleaned and the decorations made you feel so special.
We are here to celebrate our Tiger New Year. I have to mention one special companion Tigre. She was so cute with warm welcoming.
We were very happy and thankful about everything.

Ángel and Nacho are great hosts, both of them very welcoming. The room is comfy, and the apartment is very well decorated, with a superb location.
It is a 100% recomendable.
Angel's house is like a museum! Very beautiful decoration and spacious bedroom and bathroom. The communication, recommendations and everything was great!
Localización perfecta, habitación súper limpia y cómoda. Ángel siempre muy atento y proporcionando recomendaciones para que tus días por Madrid sean magníficos.

Amazing stay! Location is pure perfection. Will definitely be going back. Angel is a spectacular host, his communication was 20/10 and the apartment is beautiful. Super comfortable bed, great shower and everything you could need for a good stay. Did I mention location?! You can’t beat it. Enjoyed so much I can’t wait to go back.

Perfect airbnb. Probably the most stylish apartment I have stayed in. Lovely room, huge beautiful bathroom, and very comfortable bed. Perfect location, and friendly helpful hosts. I also really like that they are renting a room in their home, as airbnb was originally intended, not running a hotel. Thanks Angel!

Staying at Angel and Nacho's place was nothing short of wonderful. The apartment is beautiful and Angel was great at communicating, allowing for a very smooth trip. Angel was flexible and understanding with check-in and check-out and gave great recommendations both before our trip and during. I would definitely recommend staying here and am excited to hopefully go back again in the future!

Excelente estadía! Increíble lugar, súper limpio, cómodo y muy bien ubicado.
La atención de ángel fue excelente, en todo momento pendiente de que estemos cómodos y ayudándonos en todo.
Súper recomendable para quienes quieran ir a Madrid. Sin dudas volveremos.

Angel’s place was everything I could dream about and more. Location was great, room and bathroom were spacious, bed was comfortable. My delayed flight arrived early, and Angel found a way to get me into the apartment even though they were out of town for a weekend. Quiet street and all places to visit are just a short walk away. On my last day, Angel arranged me a taxi and it was waiting downstairs as promised. Could have not asked for a better host and a nicer place to stay. Thank you!

Confirmo todo lo positivo que puedes leer sobre este alojamiento.
Aprecié sobremanera la tranquilidad pues la habitación no da a la calle.

HIGHLY RECOMMENDED!!
- Perfect location.
- super clean and shining bathroom.
- room was clean, spacious and beautiful.
AMAZING experience!
thank you Angel & Nacho for the warm hospitality and the best local tips ever!!!
you are lucky to be hosted there!
We hadden niet helemaal door dat het een kamer bij iemand thuis was. Maar ondanks dat wel fijne tijd gehad. Super mooi appartement en chille locatie.
Such a lovely place, it was my mom who stayed there and she couldn’t be more happier !!!! I highly recommend 🌸

Hemos estado de fin de semana , la ubicación del piso es inmejorable estas en el centro y a pocos minutos de Puerta del Sol , Plaza Mayor , Gran Via etc , todo y eso es muy tranquilo no se escucha ningún ruido y se duerme genial. es una habitación con baño dentro de un piso enorme y precioso , comunicacion rapida y veraz con Angel. No dejeis de visitar la Rollerie para desayunar , esta al lado y sus desayunos son de escandalo.

Top location. Top apartment, and top host’ s. What else can you ask for? If We could give it a 100 stars we would.
Angel pays attention to every detail within the room and is quick to answer any question you might have. We would definitely stay here again.

Angel's place is in a superb location especially if you are looking to explore the old town and go for walking tours. There are plenty of food options and shops around.
Entry and check out was easy and simple, and e really enjoyed our comfy room with good shower water pressure, hot water and a soft bed. Plus, the house is clean and very elegantly decorated. Simple things but when you are tired they are all that matter!
Ottima posizione per conoscere la città, bellissimo appartamento; gentile, attento e disponibile Angel
Angel muy atento a explicar todo para que sea lo mas sencillo posible
Una casa en el casco de Madrid, con tranquilidad y estilo acogedor y superior. No nececitas visitar el  palacio real después de haber visitado la casa de Angel!

Una maravilla de viaje, cortito solo dos dias. El alojamiento de Angel es increible, perfecto para conocer Madrid una ubicacion inmejorable y el piso es tal como esta en las fotos. Ademas de eso yo resaltaria tambien lo antento y bien organizado que tiene Angel como anfitrion su alojamiento. No pudimos conocernos pero parecia que nos conociamos de toda la vida. Gracias Angel y Nacho volveremos seguro y vamos a recomendar siempre vuestro alojamiento. Un abrazo.

Fui recibida por Fatdja una encantadora señora sonriente y servicial. El departamento es tal cual muestran las fotos deliciosamente decorado y ubicado en un súper lugar. Fácil de acceso y todo a disposición.
El cuarto bello y muy cómodo, lo recomiendo. Ángel encantador y con buena comunicación. Gracias Ángel por la estadía.
One of my favorite Airbnb bookings so far .

The house was amazing and located close to many attractions. The host is not around during our stay and he always check on us to make sure everything is fine. He also recommended some nice restaurants and  places to us. Highly recommend Angel’s Airbnb.

I couldn’t recommend Angel and the apparent highly enough. The bedroom and the bathroom are absolutely gorgeous (as is the entire apartment, of course). It’s located so centrally that all the central neighborhoods are within walking distance. Angel is super quick to respond to any messages and always very helpful and welcoming. I can’t imagine staying anywhere else in Madrid.
Absolutely amazing, Angel and Nacho are such lovely people and so friendly. Everything was perfect and location was superb! they gave us great recommendations to eat at and were so easy going!
We had a wonderful stay in Angels apartment! Its exactly as shown on the pictures and is perfectly located! Angel is very helpfull, we didnt meet vut had good contact!

Un gran anfitrión, todo es tal cual como se ve en las imágenes, el sitio está muy bien ubicado y se puede llegar a los principales sitios turísticos a pie. Angel siempre estuvo pendiente de nosotros, es muy servicial y fue fácil la comunicación. Es un sitio muy recomendado para pasar un excelente rato, sin duda volvería a hospedarme ahí cuando vuelva
Muchas gracias, Angel! Disfrutamos mucho las recomendaciones:)
What a fantastic location! Safe, clean, and equipped with all you need!!
Highly recommend this Airbnb when visiting Madrid. Angel sets the standard for super host.
Host was very responsive, had great recommendations. Location was great, walking distance from most locations. It was a good experience 👍🏼

Angel’s place is amazing! The location could not be any better for sightseeing. You can walk to all places. The neighborhood is safe and the room is clean and very homey. The private bath is a great touch. I will be a returning customer!
优美，干净的地方。房东很热情，TIiggy也特别可爱！
Highly recommend this Airbnb! The room was spacious and beautiful and the location was excellent. Very helpful host with lots of great recommendations. Would definitely stay again!

The house was very clean and the bathroom was as spacious as the room. And it has nice location. The elevator worked very well.  And Señora Fatna, who cleans the house, was very kind and sweet! Ángel was very responsive and he was so kind to check how I'm doing in Madrid. No complaints, highly recommendable!👍

Our stay was amazing. Angel was really responsive, he replied instantly if we had any questions or issues. The place was immaculate and really good location. Unfortunately we didn’t get to meet angel, but this was the only fault I could find!
Angel was a great host. Very helpful with information about the city. Great location. Walking distance to many attractions.

This place is amazing. It is located in the very heart of Madrid within walking distance to everything. The room and the bathroom were very clean and nice. We felt very comfortable and relaxed here. Angel (the host) went above and beyond to make sure we are welcome and our stay is pleasant. Right after booking I received a Word document with major recommendations re places to see, food to try, restaurants, entertainment - it was very informational and to the point. During our stay Angel was out of town, but he was always available via WhatsApp to answer any of our questions and gave us a lot of additional information. I would highly recommend this place and definitely would stay here again If we are in Madrid.

Angel and his flat are amazing - 10/10 stay and my advice is that if available, you book right away. Excellent location, beautiful apartment, great host 🙂 will look to stay here again whenever I’m in Madrid next!

The stay with Angel was really nice! The location is perfect :) Angel answers quickly and friendly. Unfortunately we couldn't use the bathtub because of the waterproblem now in Spain.  In addition, he keeps an eye on how much electricity you use, etc. For example, we had left the light on in the hallway and received a message about it. I get it somehow, but you also feel a bit watched.

Angel is a wonderful host - great communication and he gave us some fantastic restaurant, cafe and museum recommendations. The location is excellent, and we didn’t take a taxi the entire time we were in Madrid as we were able to walk everywhere we wanted to go, including to and from the train station. Angel was very thoughtful and made a fantastic effort to ensure we enjoyed our stay. Thank you for having us in your gorgeous home, Angel!
Angel is a 5 Star host!  We appreciated how easy it was to directly communicate with him.  He even arranged our taxi pickup on the day of our departure! Angel's home is beautiful!  Gracias por todo!

We loved Angel’s apartment. It was beautifully decorated, perfectly located and just what we needed for our days in Madrid! Angel was super responsive and gave some great recommendations. Definitely recommend!

Fantástico alojamiento, situado en una zona privilegiada, muy cercana a los puntos de mayor interés del centro de Madrid.
Todo muy limpio y ordenado. La decoración espectacular, combinando artículos antiguos con otros modernos. Ángel nos facilitó muchísimo la estancia desde el primer contacto para la reserva. Sin duda, volveremos a alojarnos en su casa en próximas visitas.

I had a great experience at Angel's place! The apartment is centrally located in a lively but quiet area that is ideal for exploring the surrounding neighborhoods. Madrid is all about walking so a centrally located home base can really improve your visit! Everything in the apartment was exactly as described and Angel goes out of his way to make sure you have everything you need. I highly recommend this place!
Todo estuve increíble- la ubicación, habitación, communication. Dueños muy amables y buenas vibras en el piso y con todo. Gracias!
Angel’s place is just lovely and the location could not be more perfect. Really enjoyed our stay in Madrid. Anja

L’appartamento è bellissimo!! Il letto è comodissimo . Angel è davvero molto presente, mi ha chiamato tutti i giorni per sapere se stavo bene e se avevo bisogno di qualcosa. C’è silenzio . È davvero confortevoli. Uno dei migliori posti dove dormire e con l host presente
We had a lot of fun here! Angels place was beautiful and has a great location! I would recommend coming here!
Would definitely recommend
The place is super nice and exactly as described. The location was also very good right in the center of all the spots and very close to plaza mayor.

This is a wonderful place to spend your time in Madrid! It is clean, roomy, and in a perfect location. The hosts communicate well and go the extra mile to make you feel at home. We liked it so much that we are staying again as we end our Spain trip by flying out of Madrid. Book it!!

El cuarto de huéspedes con baño privado está en un departamento grande todo hecho con estilo. La ubicación es perfecta, central y al mismo tiempo tranquila. Comunicación y check in fácil.
Gracias Ángel,ha sido un gusto de pasar tres noches en tu sitio.

The room and ensuite were just as described/pictured. Clean, spacious and extremely comfortable. The house is beautiful (incredible artwork everywhere you turn!) and location can't be beat for exploring Madrid - walking distance from everything. Angel is a very attentive host who wants to ensure you have a great experience; he was quick to respond to questions and offered great recommendations prior to arrival. Highly recommend!

Nuestra estadía en Madrid estuvo increíble. Ángel súper atento y siempre con buenas indicaciones y recomendaciones de la ciudad. Tiene una excelente ubicación, gracias a lo cual pudimos recorrer todos los sitios de interés a pie y también comer en los mejores lugares. El barrio es tranquilo, y desde la habitación no se escucha ningún ruido exterior. Muy recomendable. Sin duda volveremos en cuanto tengamos la oportunidad!!
Angel was a very thoughtful and generous host. He made me so welcome and was very helpful. His place is beautiful, very comfortable and in a perfect location for exploring Madrid.
The most beautifullly decorated airbnb I have ever stayed in, impeccable taste. Responsive, detail- oriented and considerate hosts. Comfortable, beautiful and well- situated 🌟

This place feels like a palace, a genuine palace. There are high ceilings, beautiful floors, antique furniture, great wood, an antique elevator, a sweeping staircase. The room has lots of space, and the bathroom, even more. You should read what he sends you, because I didn't, and it was quite helpful, especially in recommending a truly great panaderia around the corner, La Rollerie, which we patronized three times during our stay because it was so fabulous. Angel was quite flexible, which counts for a lot when you're traveling and make last-minute changes, which I did, and which he accommodated (and he didn't have to!). The location is half a block off Calle Atocha, a major street, and it puts you in the middle of everything. He keeps the apartment a bit chilly for our tastes, but that's understandable because, as he says, heating costs have gone up by a factor of five since the start of the war in Ukraine and he hasn't raised his rates.

Angel’s is a great host and person, very friendly and attentive
He’s house is beautiful, the location is perfect, you can walk pretty much anywhere and it’s close to Atocha

Tuvimos una estadía Excelente en lo de Ángel, un anfitrión de lujo. Súper atento, la mejor predisposición y buena onda. Su depto refleja su buen gusto y amor por las cosas bellas y su atención como host fue insuperable. Realmente me sentí como en casa. A quienes vayan a Madrid se los recomiendo. Por mi parte, cuando vuelva voy a quedarme allí. Todo 11 puntos. Excepcional.

We had a lovely stay at Angels apartment. The location was brilliant the the decor gave the place great character. Angel was out for the weekend and was extremely helpful helping us access the apartment and giving us recommendations for things to do in Madrid. The only thing that made us feel less relaxed were the security cameras around the apartment. Though I completely understand wanting to ensure his home is being looked after, it did give the impression that we were being watched and listened to. Of course there weren’t cameras anywhere in the room. Overall the stay was great though, particularly for a busy weekend.
bel appartement et l'emplacement est top.
Tolle zentrale Lage, Zimmer genau wie in den Bildern, Angel jederzeit erreichbar und super hilfsbereit :)

Angel's place is a rare gem in Madrid. within a stone throw of the museums, theatres, live music locals and restaurants of the center. The room is very quiet which is a real bonus in such a busy neighbourhood. Angel is a top host that knows the area very well and  will make you feel at home.  The room and bathroom are spacious. Angel's place is definitely a very good place to stay in el Barrio de las Letras.

A pesar de no coincidir con Ángel, estuvo todo el tiempo pendiente de que mi estancia fuera perfecta y me sintiera como en casa. El piso increíble. La habitación y el baño amplios. Muy confortable. Estaba todo impecable. Está en pleno centro, en una zona muy concurrida y con todos los servicios y accesos al lado. Y además la vivienda es totalmente silenciosa y se descansa estupendamente.
100% recomendable. Sin duda.

La chambre (avec sa luxueuse salle de bain et toilettes privées) que propose Angel est parfaite ! Lit confortable, grande armoire, lampes de chevet, etc... et la décoration faite de tableaux et d'objets anciens mérite le détour !
La quartier est hyper central, à deux pas de la Plaza Mayor, du Palais royal, de la Puerta del Sol, et à quelques minutes à pied des musées incontournables (Le Prado et les oeuvres de Jérôme Bosh, El Greco, Vélasquez, Rubens...) et celui de la "Reina Sofia" (le Guernica de Picasso, des Dali, Robert et Sonia Delaunay...)
Des dizaines de restos sont également à un jet de pierre de l'appartement, et Angel propose sa sélection des meilleurs, avec beaucoup de gentillesse et dans un français parfait...
Bref, une véritable adresse coup de coeur, avec accueil amical et chaleureux aux antipodes de la tendance actuelle (hôte branché bizness gérant 18 studios à coup de meubles Ikea passe-partout et de boitiers numériques pour les clés !).
Je recommande vivement !

Angel was super helpful from the start - we received a guide document from him with recommendations for everything - transport, food, activities - flamenco show that he recommended was worth every penny. The location of the flat is brilliant, it was clean and goregous. The only "issue" is that the room is quite dark with little-to-no day light. However, due to our short stay and staying in the flat for little time over these few days, that was not too troubling. Overall - a great place to stay for a very reasonable price.
Angel reageerde proactief en aardig; hij regelde een taxi, de huishoudster ontving ons. Het appartement is groot en mooi. We voelden ons er op ons gemak.

angel 의 숙소는 매우 훌룡합니다
