Hemos estado un fin de semana en casa de Ángel y hemos estado muy a gusto! Él no estuvo, pero nos dejó todo preparado y estuvo pendiente de nuestra llegada y salida, todo perfecto. La habitación es tal cual las fotos, fantástica. El baño super limpio y agradable. Hemos ido a pie desde la casa a visitar todo lo que teníamos previsto. Un lujo en el centro de Madrid. Gracias Ángel, seguro que repetimos!!
Really lovely private room. Great location. Wonderful host. We will be back.

房東人很好～讓我們提早入住
幫助我們許多👍👍👍👍

Loved my stay! I would definitely go back if I could. The apartment and the room are beautiful, the location is perfect and walking distance to everything. Angel was very friendly and helpful. All positive 👌🏻😊😊😊
Great location-very walkable to sightseeing and museums!
Excelente lugar para disfrutar de Madrid. Está todo muy cerca. Ángel fue súper atento y estuvo al pendiente de todo. Su hogar es demasiado cómodo y lindo.
마드리드에 온다면 또 이용할 의향 있습니다! 아주 넓어요~ 화장실도 넓고 굳!!
Un spot maravilloso, súper buen ubicado si visitas Madrid por primera ocasión, y ángel es un excelente anfitrión

The room is clean and the position is nice, but Angel has very bad attitude. At first, we ask for an extra quilt because we have two people sleep on one bed, Angel didn’t give us and said he never heard someone need extra quilt for more than 10 years, if you don’t want to live you can go.
Then the gate of Angel’s home is really hard to open, so I ask for neighbors help, at first neighbor said he can’t open other people’s home door, I told him I live in Angel’s home, he immediately agree to help me and said you are not the first one ask for help, I have been help a lot of people open that door, then neighbor taught me how to open it efficiently
I don’t know why there are so many good comments, but I really need to tell truth.

Angel was a lovely host and communication was instant, he offered recommendations and checked up on me and my friend. Location was spot on, walking distance to everything and the home was a dream to stay in! The room and bathroom were as spacious as they looked in the pictures, so much room!! If I ever come back to Madrid, Angels home is where I'm at! Honestly don't hesitate to book this place if it's available! Can not fault anything!

숙소의 위치, 시설, 호스팅 전반이 훌륭합니다.
1. 위치는 어딜 가든 도보로 이동이 가능할 정도로 좋습니다. 마요르광장, 아토차역 모두 가깝습니다.
2. 시설은 소개된 내용과 다르지 않습니다. 인테리어가 인상적이었고, 곳곳에 호스트의 취향이 돋보입니다.
3. 호스트인 Angel은 오랜 기간 슈퍼호스트로 자부심을 갖고 있고, 운영과 관리가 안정적인 인상을 받았습니다. Angel이 보내준 메일에 담긴 정보는 아주 유용합니다. (꼭 활용하세요!)
Angel의 숙소는 장기간 머물고 싶다는 생각이 들게 했습니다. 마드리드를 방문하는 분들께 추천합니다.

Angel is such a gem. He was really helpful with directions and surroundings. He was friendly, attentive, and went beyond our expectations. His beautiful home was spotless clean. The bathroom was spotless clean.  The bed was very comfortable, and the room was really quiet. He has very good taste in decoration. Ángel will responsive with messages. He is a great person to rent from. We would highly recommended. We will come back to Madrid and rent from him again for sure!!! Thank you very much for our amazing time and experience, Angel! Until next time.

웅장하고 우아한 숙소분위기에 깔끔하고 넓은 화장실이 좋았어요
문 여는게 좀 어렵긴했지만 익숙해지면 쉬워짐

Alloggio stupendo, ci siamo sentiti come a casa. Angel è molto amichevole ed ospitale e parla perfettamente l’italiano. Casa nel pieno centro di Madrid. Esperienza da ripetere che consiglio caldamente.

Angel’s place was very clean and comfortable. This was our first time in Madrid, and Angel was very responsive, helpful, and gave a list of recommendations. The location is in a great spot of Madrid, and we were able to walk to all of our restaurants and activities.  Definitely worth the money.
Angel was a great host and his place is amazing!
Angel 이 늦은 시간 체크인에도 불구하고 너무나 친절하게 맞이해주셨어요!! 빨래를 했어야 했는데 너무 잘도와주시고 추천해주신 식당도 마드리드 여행에서 가장 맛있게 먹었어요!!! 화장실과 방이 정말 깔끔하고 시내에서 가까워서 모든 마드리드 관광지까지 걸어갈 수 있어요. 기차역까지도 걸어갈 수 있어서 접근성 정말 최고입니다!!!!

Beautiful room with nice hosts 👍
Location was amazing, perfectly private and beautiful room, bathroom was also great, bed was perfectly comfortable. I’ll definitely book this airbnb again next time I visit Madrid. Angel gives many useful informations about Madrid. It was really helpful for us enjoying Madrid.
Fabulous host, very friendly and helpful. A fun couple. Definitely recommend. Great location. Stunning building, beautiful interior.

El alojamiento cumplió altamente las expectativas,  es un departamento precioso, lleno de arte y con un estilo que te hace transportarte a otra época. Ángel siempre fue muy atento, flexible con la hora de entrada y salida, con excelentes recomendaciones para el turismo, aunque no tuve la fortuna de conocerlo en persona, estuvimos en comunicación. Recomiendo ampliamente su hospedaje, seguramente volveré.

a very pleasant stay at Angels pad
area felt classic downtown which I think suits the younger age bracket

Nous avons adoré notre séjour chez Angel !!
L’appartement est incroyablement bien situé et est magnifique. La chambre et la salle de bain privative sont de haut standing pour un Airbnb.
Angel est très avenant, très réactif et très sympathique. Ses recommandations (de restaurants en particulier) nous ont été d’une grande aide.
Je recommande vivement ce logement !

Angel’s place is tastefully decorated, the room and the private bathroom were clean and very spacious, it felt like home.
The location is amazing, very close to most attractions, museums, markets, subway/ metro and lots of restaurants.
Angel offered great restaurants recommendations and provided prompt responses to all my inquiries.
Would love to return to Madrid and stay here again.
Tutto perfetto, host super gentile e disponibile!! consigliatissimo!!

Nuestra estancia en la Casa de Ángel fué muy positiva
La habitación es muy amplia con baño privado y muy silenciosa
no se escucha ningún ruido de la calle por lo que se descansa muy bien.
Es una casa acogedora, muy bien ubicada junto a la Plaza del Angél
y la Plaza Mayor.
Ángel es un gran anfitrión siempre pendiente de nosotros.

¡Me encantó! Una habitación preciosa y grande. Baño de lujo y muy grande. Super limpio. Ubicación inmejorable, para mí, la mejor zona en Madrid. Angel siempre estaba pendiente y contestaba rápidamente. Solo me quedé 2 noches pero fue una experiencia maravillosa. Y aunque he visitado Madrid muchas veces, esta visita me dio ganas de regresar pronto. Muchas gracias!

Angel was extremely helpful through my 3 day visit.
The welcome pack which I made sure I read x1000 times had all the necessary information and great recommendations.
The accommodation is perfectly placed near enough the tourist hotspots however also touching distance from the more traditional choice of venue.
Would 100% recommend and will hopefully be back soon to see the boss man.

숙소가 사진과 같고 엄청 멋있어요!
엘레베이터가 있어서 편했고
주변 관광지랑 다 5-10분 거리라서 좋아요!
It’s a great place. Everything is in walking distance and his place is also beautiful and clean:)

Great stay at Angels place last week. Unfortunately our flight was delayed but we contacted Angel and he was able to sort us getting to the room with limited hassle. A brilliant location, lots of really good recommendations and guest guides. Pleasant stay and would recommend to others looking for a place to stay! Thank you.

El apartamento de Ángel luce como en las fotos, nos pareció un bello gabinete de curiosidades. Está bien ubicado, muy cerca de bares y restaurantes, y a unos minutos caminando del Museo del Prado y Reina Sofía. Ángel fue amigable y estuvo atento a nuestras necesidades, nos sentimos como en casa. Lo recomendamos ampliamente.
房子位置非常好，就在市中心，基本景點都可以步行到達，房間乾淨舒適，休息的很好。Angel 回覆往往非常及時，還貼心準備了一份周圍遊玩以及餐廳推薦清單！希望下次來馬德里還能有機會住在這兒！

Une véritable pépite en plein cœur de Madrid. Nous avons pu tout visiter à pied. L’appartement est très calme, la chambre et la salle de bain sont spacieuses et conformes aux photos. La climatisation fonctionnait très bien (important quand il fait 35 degrés)
Angel n’était pas présent pendant notre séjour mais très réactif par messages.
Nous reviendrons avec plaisir !

Angel's place is very nice. The location is good, within walking distance to most of the cool things in Madrid. I think it was a bit pricy for the size, but that's sort of just Spain in July/August when half of Europe comes here for vacation. Good place!

Angel was very responsive and attentive to any queries or recommendations for things to do and see in Madrid. His welcome notes were super helpful to navigate from the airport.. to where not to eat “garbish” paella 😄 The location is perfect, the bedroom and generous bathroom were spotless and the apartment super stylish. Thanks for a great stay.

Unfortunately I didn’t get to meet Angel in person. He was beyond accomodating and attentive. Always thinking of us and giving us recommendations for restaurants etc. His house is gorgeous and we very much felt at home. Would definitely return!

Excelente Hospedaje, tal cual como se describe en el corazón de Madrid. Se puede ir andando a casi todos los sitios turísticos (10-20 min). La Habitacion es espaciosa y el baño muy amplio! Muy recomendado!

I loved staying here. Communication with Angel was immediate and very informative. He introduced me to life in Madrid/ Spain and he has excellent taste in restaurants. I would stay here again for his wonderful company alone.  The best host I have ever had. The place was perfect for me. The room and bathroom are sizeable and look amazing. The location is perfectly placed between major attractions and fantastic bars/ restaurants/ clubs without any noise issues.

Tout fut parfait, l’appartement, comme Angel, bien qu’il ait été retenu hors Madrid. Il a répondu et même devancé nos questions.
Un seul regret : N’avoir pu faire sa connaissance en vrai….
Il connaît parfaitement sa ville et nous avons toujours été satisfaits de ses conseils. Laissez vous accueillir par Angel. Vous ne serez pas déçu !
Perfect stay and brilliant host

Gracias Angel y Nacho por la hermosa estancia que pasamos en el apartamento. Es muy amplio y con muy buen gusto. Muy bien ubicado para conocer los rincones bellos de Madrid. Gracias por la amabilidad recomendaciones y sin dudas, volveríamos a elegirlos. Abrazo, Flavia y Ricardo

We loved our stay at Angel and Nacho’s home. The bedroom with private ensuite was very comfortable and tastefully decorated. The location is perfect for access to many restaurants, local transportation, and we used the hop on-hop off bus for a couple of days to see as much of Madrid as we could. Angel offered so many recommendations for our visit, and checked in with us regularly to see if we needed anything. Thank you Angel and Nacho for welcoming us into your beautiful home.
너무 예쁘고 위치도 가깝고 정말 좋은 숙소였습니다! 다시 마드리드에 온다고 해도 여기에 묵고 싶을 정도로 괜찮고 호텔같이 넓어요 한국인분들 추천합니다

정말 최고의 숙소였습니다. 한국에서 볼 수 없는 이국적인 대저택같은 사진에 끌려 예약한 숙소였는데 정말 숙소를 나가기 싫을 정도로 너무 훌륭한 숙소였어요! 집이 굉장히 고풍스럽고 럭셔리하면서 멋있고 방을 포함한 집 전체가 깔끔하고 정돈되어있었어요. 호스트분도 굉장히
친절하셨고 소통이 빠르고 잘 돼서 정말 좋았습니다. 다음에 기회가 되면 또 숙박하고싶네요 😊 (귀여운 고양이도 키우십니다. 너무 예쁘고 귀여워요🐈 선물로 직접 따다 주신 오렌지도 달고 맛있었습니다. Thank you Angel👍)

The room is very beautiful and clean. The location is perfect with close proximity to every major attraction as well as a local neighborhood vibe. Less than 10 mins Taxi from the Atocha Train station. Angel and Nacho were super hospitable and welcoming. They waited for us at night for our check-in and gave us local restaurant recommendations.  They also made accommodations for us to store our luggage until the evening time. Angel was very responsive and we can always get him quickly by text. We had a wonderful time in Madrid. This place is highly recommended!

Best location, very nice and cozy place to stay! Unfortunately I couldn't meet Angel in person but he always responded fast and checked if everything is okay. I won't hesitate to stay at this place again when I visit Madrid next time.
La ubicación está excelente, todo muy cerca caminando, Ángel siempre mantuvo buena comunicación con nosotros, la habitación limpia, lo recomiendo muchísimo!
房东很热情！！！

Hermoso espacio para descansar y con súper facilidad de acceso y moverte a diferentes lugares. Tienes privacidad todo el tiempo pero no significa que Angel no esté al pendiente, todo lo contrario se preocupa porque tu estancia sea de total agrado. Sin duda volvería!!

La experiencia en casa de Angel ha sido estupenda. Él es amabilisimo, dispuesto a ayudar siempre y a recomendarte mil sitios por descubrir. La habitacion y el baño son muy amplios. La ubicacion perfecta.

Merci à Angel et  Nacho pour l accueil et tous les conseils prodigués.  L emplacement est super , tout est à proximité et il est possible de se rendre à pied partout dans Madrid. La chambre est conforme à la description est très calme. Angel et Nacho peuvent vous conseiller sur tous les bons restaurants ou commerces où vous rendre . merci à eux et à bientôt, car nous n avons pas fini de visiter Madrid.
Angel always gave good advice, recommended nice restaurants and places to go. He’s kind and friendly! Make this trip more memorable.

Merci encore à Angel pour son accueil et son appartement somptueux, très propre et très calme dans un quartier très agréable!! Très réactif par message concernant l’organisation des clefs, merci pour les nombreux conseils et l’attention toute particulière de commander un taxi pour mon retour très tôt !

Súper el piso de Ángel fabuloso la habitación muy acogedora y limpia, la ubicación excelente y Ángel una persona maravillosa muy pendiente de nuestras necesidades el recibimiento muy grato su Hermosa hermana nos tenía un ramo de flores para celebrar nuestros 40 años de casados mil gracias 😊 y abrazo gigantes siempre estarán en nuestros corazones

Good place, with everything what you need for a couple, you are really close to everything around Madrid, and Angel was always able to answer any questions.
I really recommend it!
Had a fantastic time Angel's place. The room was comfortable, the host was friendly, and the location was perfect. Highly recommended!⸻
Exelente estancia, más que exelente anfitrión 10/10

Angel was the perfect host. The place was immaculate. Very gracious but relaxed. Had everything I needed during and after daily adventures. Convenient to so much within walking distance and extremely close to a very useful metro station. Terrific price for the location, security, and standard. Gracias Angel! When I’m in Madrid again, I’m definitely calling you up.
Angel was very helpful. We slept well on a comfortable bed.

Il soggiorno da Angel è stato ottimo! L'appartamento è in un posto molto comodo per visitare il centro città e facilmente raggiungibile con i mezzi di trasporto pubblico. La stanza era in ottimo stato, pulita e con i confort necessari. Ma il plus sono stati i consigli di Angel che ci ha dato ottimi consigli sui posti da visitare e sui ristoranti dove mangiare evitando i posti turistici e garantendoci una vera esperienza Madrileña. Grazie! Speriamo di avere occasione di tornarci!
친절하고 깨끗하고 편리했습니다. 덕분에 기억에 남는 마드리드 여행이 되었습니다 감사합니다
We stayed at Angel’s place for 7 fun filled days, the last leg of our month long trip across Europe.  We could not have been more pleased with the host, the accommodations and the location!

앙겔 아저씨는 정말 정말 친절하고 여행자들에게 우호적입니다. 숙소의 위치는 어디든 걸어갈 수 있고, 가까운 지하철역이 있어 지하철이용이 매우 편리합니다. 운이 좋다면 고양이를 만날 수 있습니다. 고양이는 정말 사랑스럽습니다. 다만 빛이 많이 들지 않아 채광에 예민하신분들은 이 점을 유의하세요. 그렇지만 화장실이 넓고 밝기 때문에 괜찮습니다. 정말 좋은 위치에 있으니 추천합니다!

Ángel was a great host, he provided useful information about the surroundings and options for transportation. The place is in a great area, close to a lot of stores and restaurants. The room and bathroom  are spacious and the bed very comfortable. I will recommend Angel’s place to friends and family.

La casa y la habitación están decoradas con sumo gusto y se corresponden totalmente al anuncio. El baño es espacioso y la limpieza impecable. La zona es muy céntrica y bien comunicada, puedes moverte fácilmente a pie si lo deseas. No pudimos conocer a Angel en persona pero fue amable y disponible en todo momento.  Muy recomendable!

Angel was amazing! Our flight was delayed and we couldnt make it to the check in on time, yet he offered an alternative that allowed us to settle into the apartment as soon as we arrived. We were also able to comfortably finish our last shopping trip before going to the airport, since we were welcomed to leave our luggage at the apartment and come back as needed, even after the official checkout time.
Angel is a respectful and friendly host, and we felt like we were staying at an old family friend’s place.
The apartment is conveniently close to one of our favorite coffee shops and the Tirso de Molina metro station- you will be connected to the city centre’s most popular spots after a short walk from their home.
We strongly recommend staying at Angel’s home- just make sure you are an open communicator to make it extra easy to coordinate your arrival and departure 💖
Thank you Angel for making our short and hectic weekend so much easier!

Angel is very kind and responsive. He gave us local recommendations and was very proactive with helping us. Everything was clean and very spacious. We loved staying here! We recommend this place to everyone. We are hoping to come back and stay here again 🤩

Angel’s place is very spacious and comfortable for us (2 of us and we are out most of the days) and is at a central location for us to get around easily
He was very communicative and attentive throughout the stay.

Ángel fue muy atencioso todo el tiempo. Nos envió indicaciones de restaurantes previamente y respondió prontamente todas las veces que necesitamos. La casa es muy bonita y limpia. El cuarto es exactamente como en las fotos. La localización es perfecta para conocer todos los puntos principales de Madrid caminando. El único punto es que por la noche puedes oír los vecinos, pero no fue un problema por nosotros después que acostumbramos. Me quedaría allí novamente sin dudas!
Très bien situé! Hôte très agréable et réactif.
Angel è stato molto preciso nelle indicazioni. Trovare l'alloggio è stato molto semplice: appartamento splendido, silenzioso, pulito e molto centrale.
房子非常漂亮，让我们感到震惊。房间很大，卫生间也很大。非常干净。离车站和繁华区域非常近，附近还有超市。房东回应很快，沟通顺利。非常愉快的一次出行。

El alojamiento de Angel es super cómodo, limpio y muy bien ubicado. Está solo a unas pocas calles de Puerta del Sol . Angel es un muy buen anfitrión, a pesar de que no pudimos conocernos en persona siempre estuvo pendiente desde nuestra llegada y hasta nos reservo un taxi el día de nuestra partida qué fue muy temprano.
Todo lo que puedo decir del lugar son cosas positivas .
Le doy las gracias a Angel por la buena estancia wue pasamos allí.

Angel was incredibly kind from the minute I booked (months in advance) until we checked out of the room. The apartment is beautiful and in a quiet neighborhood close to the Museo del Prado and nearly everything else in the city. We had an amazing stay, and I would happily stay at Angel’s place again.
干净整洁，地理位置极佳，性价比很高！房东热情乐于助人，房间很漂亮

Don’t think twice if this listing is available for your visit to Madrid - just book it. Had the most amazing time staying with Angel and Nacho.
If you enjoy interior design, you’ll love this apartment that is so elegantly put together. The living space is so great to relax in.
The apartment is located in the thick of all the action in Madrid and you can pretty much walk to every major attraction and restaurant. Angel and Nacho also gave me some amazing local tips.
Highly recommend!
Angel was very communicative and gave a lot of advice and always checked on us to make sure we had everything we need. Even gave us a great guide to the local area. Highly recommended stay.
숙소는 예측한대로 좋았고 안락합니다. 호스트 엔젤도 빨리빨리 대응해줘서 편안했습니다. 추천합니다.
Muy buena ubicación, muy limpio, de fácil acceso. La habitación es cómoda pero la imagen muestra una habitación más grande de lo que realmente es. Angel excelente anfitrion
약속보다 늦게 도착했음에도 신속하고 정확하게 응답했다. 그리고 끝까지 친절하게 안내해줘서 너무나 감사했다. 그리고 여행에 도움을 주고자 노력했으며, 좋은 정보도 제공해주었다. 숙소는 사진과 완전히 동일했으며 깨끗하고 조용해서 휴식을 충분히 취할 수 있어 행복했다

Angel’s place matched the description and was a fantastic place for our Madrid stay. It seems like we only had to walk 15 to 20 minutes to anything we wanted to do! Angel was a great host - helpful, proactive, and responsive. We highly recommend & would love to stay again. Gracias!

We loved this exquisite Airbnb. So happy Angel accepted our request to book. As the first impression of Madrid we were able to experience a beautiful part of Madrid-vibrant, walkable. historic and for us, a short walk to The Prado and many places to eat. The apartment is a delight to the senses with stylish appointments, curated art works, beautiful furniture and terrie location. We did not meet our hosts but nonetheless communicated regularly with Angel ensuring we were comfortable and ok.
This is a special listing. Stylish, stunning, great locale and for us, the perfect start to our 3 week holiday.
Thank you for making your home ours for a short, yet memorable moment.

Thank you Angel . The accommodation had loads of atmosphere and was exactly what we love . Thank you very much to Nacho for being there and your prompt support and recommendations were invaluable . Thank you

we really enjoyed our stay at Angels. The apartment is in a wonderful character filled apartment block right in the heart of the city. We walked from his place to restaurants and tourist attractions almost the entire time even thoughthe metro is within 5 minutes walk. Angel is always friendly and helpful. We would love to return.
사진과 똑같아요! 위치도 좋고 무엇보다 청결해서 좋았습니다~ 문제가 있으면 호스트가 빠르게 응답해주시고 해결해주셨어요! 제 실수로 체크인 시간을 잘못 말씀드렸는데 호스트덕분에 원활하게 체크인 할 수 있었습니다! 감사합니다

Angel è stato gentilissimo e amichevole dal primo momento ! Ha dato consigli ed è sempre stato disponibile su qualsiasi cosa . L’alloggio è davvero in una posizione ottima . Abbiamo girato sempre a piedi ,ovunque siamo andati .
Unbelievably central location and walking distance to everything!

So far in our 6 weeks of travelling throughout Europe this has been our favourite AirBnB as it provided the priceless experience of living in a local home. Not only that, the place was beautiful in all aspects. The host is extremely responsive and helpful. The Location was also perfect.

Excelente habitación para pasar unos días en Madrid, la ubicación es perfecta, puedes llegar a varios lugares turísticos caminando sin problema, la habitación muy linda, al igual que el baño, siempre estuvo al pendiente durante mi estancia y con los pequeños inconvenientes que tuve me ayudó a resolverlos pronto, totalmente recomendado!

A localização do AirBnB é incrível, próxima aos principais pontos turísticos de Madrid, com muitas opções de bons restaurantes, cafés e mercados por perto. Além disso, tivemos uma incrível recepção feita pelo Nacho. Ángel é um anfitrião extremamente gentil e proativo, sempre perguntando se estava tudo bem e se colocando a disposição para nos ajudar, além de ter dado diversas dicas sobre como aproveitar melhor Madrid. O quarto é grande, com um ótimo banheiro e uma boa cama. Excelente custo-benefício. Se estiver em dúvida com um AirBnB mais barato porém mais distante, considere a economia de tempo e dinheiro ao se hospedar com Angel.

A estadia foi ótima, o Angel e o Nacho são uns amores.
A casa tem uma localização ótima, próxima dos principais pontos e tem um metrô bem pertinho também o que facilitou muito a nossa viagem.

Excelente alojamiento!! El lugar muy céntrico de todas las partes de Madrid! Cómodo y limpio, la comunicación fue excelente
Completamente recomendado!!

Angel is a very friendly and caring host. We appreciated that he would always check on us when my husband got sick.
His place is very convenient. The best location. Walking distance to most attractions and restaurants.
The room was clean and comfortable. We enjoyed our stay at his apartment. We would stay here again if we go back to Madrid.

Ángel y Nacho la estancia estuvo increíble, confortable, tranquila y segura. Si Ustedes lo permiten Me quedaré sin duda cuántas veces pueda venir a España. La habitación es muy cómoda y el baño impecable con todo lo necesario para sentirse como en casa. Cerca de sin fin de lugares de interés y de la estación de tren de Atocha, el mercado San Miguel, La Plaza Mayor, etc. Casi frente a la propiedad está un lugar muy limpio y rico para desayunar.
Súper buen lugar para hospedarse!

Ángel fue increíble con nosotros su piso está en una excelente zona cerca de los puntos más importantes y estar en el piso es como estar en un museo muy bonito todo, Ángel fue amable y muy atento, muchas gracias por todo espero regresar nuevamente contigo en un futuro

Angel fue un excelente host, siempre comunicativo y comprensivo. Provee una genial guía sobre consejos y recomendaciones de restaurantes. La ubicación es ideal, estaciones de metro a corta distancia y muchos restaurantes a su alrededor. La habitación fue tal cual en las fotografías y la limpieza impecable. Es un plus poder admirar la decoración exquisita del hogar, es como un pequeño museo.
Great host and wonderful location! Angel was amazing!
친절하게 안내해주시고 많이 챙겨주셨습니다. 추천합니다!
방이 아늑하고 분위기가 좋아요. 엔젤씨 대신 나쵸씨가 체크인 도와주셨는데 엄청 친절하셨어요. 솔광장에서 걸어서 10분거리라 접근성도 좋아요.

Les + : la chambre est grande, agréable, tout comme la salle de bain, magnifique. Tout est meublé avec classe, et rien ne vaut de rester dans un vrai appartement italien, dépaysement garanti.
Les grandes qualités de l'endroit sont l'emplacement très central et aussi les recommandations d'Angel et sa sympathie, trés réactif et de bons conseils pour le tourisme.
Le - : Pas grand chose vraiment, juste que les fenetres de la chambre donnent sur une petite cour pas lumineuse, et que le ballon d'eau chaude est un peu juste pour prendre deux douches de suite, même sans y rester 10 min. Ce sont des détails, et de toute façon pour ce prix là, impossible de trouver mieux si vous aimez le charme italien et le confort, c'est ici que vous devez rester. Bon séjour.

We had an incredible stay at Angel & Nacho’s home! The apartment was super cute, spotless, and felt very safe and secure. Angel was an amazing host—welcoming, thoughtful, and always responsive.
He even brought us fresh oranges and coffee, which was such a nice touch! He also gave us great recommendations on things to do in the area.
Our room was perfect, and everything about the stay exceeded expectations. If you’re looking for a comfortable and well-located place in Madrid with a fantastic host, this is it.
Would absolutely stay here again!
호스트님이 매우 친절하고 젠틀하세요. 욕실과 침실은 정말 깨끗하고 따뜻한 물도 잘 나와요! 3일 묵었는데 정말 편하게 있었어요.^^ 완전 추천합니다!
맞이해주시는 분이 정말 따뜻하고 친절하셨어요!! 집도 멋스럽고 안락했습니다!

좋아용
주변에 추천 가능!

Beautiful apartment, lovely room and great bathroom. The location is ideal, short walk from all main attractions and lots of restaurants nearby.
Angel was super responsive and a friendly host. Would highly recommend!

The apartment’s location is perfect for a short stay in Madrid. It’s conveniently close to restaurants, a metro station, and just a few minutes’ walk to several popular attractions.
The apartment itself is clean, spacious, and has a classic design. The room is large, with an equally spacious bathroom, complete with all the amenities you need.
Angel is a wonderful host. Although I felt a bit embarrassed about being extremely late for my check-in, Angel handled the situation with great tact, gently guiding me on Airbnb etiquette. From there, he was always quick to respond to my questions and was incredibly helpful throughout my stay.
I would definitely book Angel’s apartment again the next time I’m in Madrid.

Angel's apartment was, for my own experience and standards, like a home away from my own home. Very spacious and grand, tastefully decorated with a mixture of wonderful furniture and art pieces; antiques, modern and contemporary styles in total harmony. The privacy of the room was excellent and the whole place invited me to enjoy spending a little time at home too. Understated luxury with a very relaxed and civilised service. A place to return.
!
Ottima esperienza, Angel è stato disponibile e presente per ogni evenienza. l’appartamento è molto bello, pulito e in posizione strategica, vicino ad ogni punto di interesse

Angel est très cultivé, attentif aux détails et de bon goût. Il a me donne de conseils personnels pour visiter. Ils sont tous amicaux. Malheureusement j’y habite seulement 2 jours et nous n’avons pas de chance pour communiquer plus profondément. À bientôt peut-être!
Ángel verdaderamente es un súper anfitrión. El departamento es bellísimo, la habitación súper cómoda. El baño es muy amplio. Nos sentimos como en casa.
Great host and very accommodating.
Angel è un bravissimo host, disponibile e sempre pronto a darti un consiglio non scontato su Madrid! fidatevi di lui e non ve ne pentirete, se torneremo a madrid sappiamo sicuramente dove dormire :)
位置非常优秀，去各景点很近。不足之处是房间比较封闭

Angel's apartment was in a great location close to many restaurants and interesting places, but the room was nice and quiet at night. Angel was a great host and was very responsive and pro-active. He had a nice list of suggestions and was very helpful. Would definitely stay again. Thanks Angel!

El alojamiento de Angel está en el centro de Madrid, 5 minutos caminando a Plaza del Sol, todo lo que necesitas está cerca del alojamiento, Angel siempre pendiente, sin duda volvería, 100% recomendable.
Great location and walkable to all major sites in Madrid. Host was very friendly and responsive. The home is absolutely beautiful!
Excelente anfitrión. Inmejorable ubicación.

Kaunis huone ja kylpyhuone ihanassa vanhassa talossa. Todella rauhallista, mitkään äänet eivät kuuluneet sisään paikan keskeisestä sijainnista huolimatta. Koko Madridin keskusta on kävelymatkan päässä. Aamiasravintoloita muutaman minuutin kävelymatkan päässä useita. Majoittaja  Angel on uskomattoman ihana. Tänne tulisin uudestaankin.

Angel's home is like a history museum! It's filled with meaningful collections and is incredibly spacious—definitely an interesting experience for Asian travelers. During our stay, there was a major power outage in Spain, and Angel did his best to help us and even prepared some snacks. Their cat is elegant and adorable. The room was clean and spacious; although we occasionally heard a neighbor singing in the shower in the afternoon, it was very quiet at night for sleeping. Highly recommended for anyone visiting Madrid!
Me encantó la estadía , muy bien ubicado y muy cómodo, Angel fue un excelente anfitrión, siempre pendiente y con excelentes recomendaciones.
Angel was a great host, very friendly, the room was clean. We will definitely stay again with him.
Excelente ubicacion, y muy lindo alojamiento. Angel siempre siempre estuvo atento a nuestras necesidades como pedirnos el taxi al aeropuerto.
Ángel fue un buen host. El lugar es bonito con una excelente ubicación, cerca de restaurantes y zonas turísticas.
We had a lovely stay! The room was cozy, clean, and peaceful. The location was also fantastic and Angel was a great, very helpful host. Definitely recommend!
열쇠 사용법이 미숙해서 좀 헷갈리긴 했지만 정말 만족스럽습니다! 위치도 만족스럽고 무엇보다 가격대비 방의 크기 및 청결도가 훌륭하네요. 호스트 분도 답장이 신속하고 정말 친절하세요!
Alojamiento hermoso, repleto de arte y buen gusto, lo recomiendo sin ninguna duda....

Merci Ángel pour l’accueil, hôte très sympathique et d’une grande réactivité. Logement à proximité à pieds de toutes les commodité, très pratique! La chambre était soignée et propre. Je recommande à 100%.

El  lugar es perfecto, buenísima ubicación, super agradable el lugar, descansas de maravilla, limpio y ordenado. Angel es muy amable y atento, recomendaríamos para quedarte en Madrid agusto y teniendo todo muy céntrico.

Ángel and Nacho are true Superhosts on Airbnb! From day one, Ángel reached out to ask if I was familiar with Madrid and sent me a list of places to visit and restaurants to try. That was the first sign I had made the right choice.
The room and bathroom were even better than in the photos! The bed was super comfortable, and the bathroom was fully equipped with shampoo, conditioner, body wash, fresh towels, and a hairdryer.
The location is very tourist-friendly — walking distance to the main attractions and also close to the metro.
Thank you for these wonderful days, for making me feel truly at home in a different country and in an apartment that wasn’t mine but definitely felt like it.
One last thing: they even offered to book a taxi for my ride to the airport! Without a doubt, Ángel and Nacho are the reason I enjoy booking with Airbnb — you get to connect, share experiences, and meet amazing people.
Angelo was a great host who had excellent communication. He was also very helpful when we missed our connecting flight. The place is beautiful and in a central location. Highly recommended.

Host is nice
Place is nice and meet my expectation
Well done

We had a wonderful stay in Madrid for 2 nights! The apartment is perfectly located right in the center, so we could walk everywhere and really enjoy the city. The place itself was very clean, comfortable, and had such an authentic charm. Our host was amazing - super friendly, helpful, and genuinely caring, which made us feel very welcome. We really appreciated all the local tips and kindness. Overall, a fantastic stay - highly recommended!

El alojamiento está muy bien ubicado, en una zona céntrica y conveniente. El espacio es amplio, cómodo y el baño estaba impecable, grande y bien equipado. Tiene todo lo necesario para una estadía agradable. Ángel fue un anfitrión muy educado y amable.
Lugar muy céntrico y muy bien comunicado.
Pasamos unos dias maravillosos en el piso de Ángel y Nacho. Absolutamente cómodo, limpio, y fantástico por su ubicación privilegiada cerca de TODO. Sin dudas volveríamos a contratar.

I wholeheartedly recommend Óscar's place. It is comfy and clean. The apartment is in a killer location - tons of shops and nightlife within a few blocks. Óscar was an incredibly warm gracious host. He was eager to ensure that all of our needs were met and even had a friend come with him to help translate the apartment introduction.

We stayed in Oscars flat in the heart of Madrid and it was fabulous! It was very modern but cozy at the same time and the location couldn't have been better. A 2 minute walk from the Sol Metro stop and many other things. Oscar had the whole flat set up for us and even left a few treats too! He was also very helpful for anything else we needed such as places to eat, drink and dance etc... Also places to see! Couldn't have had a better experience, wish we had stayed there longer!
Our stay was very nice. The apartment is among the cleanest I've used through airbnb and was in a top choice location in Madrid. A great choice!

Our stay was fantastic! The location was perfect, the apartment was very clean and beautifully decorated. We arrived on a very hot Madrid day and Rut was waiting for us with cold bottles of water and a box of cookies--nothing could have been nicer.

Rut and Oscar's apartment is by far one of the biggest highlights of accommodation I've had in my entire travels through Europe. They were so attentive, friendly, welcoming - Rut even met us halfway up the stairs (it's up 5 flights, no elevator - be warned) with three bottles of water. The apartment is very central, comfortable, clean and provided with the softest bath sheets.

Not only is their apartment great value, Rut & Oscar are wonderful hosts. Making us feel welcomed and part of the family. I'm never staying anywhere else in Madrid but here.
Very convenient location. Oscar provides a very nice urban space right in the middle of the city.

The apartment is very clean and has all you need for a stay in Madrid.
The Apartment is perfectly situated in the heart of Madrid, it's only a one minute walk to the Plaza Mayor. For food lovers, there is the Mercado San Miguel just across the street. Metro Sol is a 5 minute walk.
Host Oscar is very kind and is happy to help you if you need anything in or around Madrid.

Oscar's place is tiny yet mighty! It was the perfect place for us to stay during our all too brief visit to Madrid. Getting there from the train station was very easy. Oscar's girlfriend greeted us warmly and get us situated in the apartment very efficiently. She even helped us carry our stuff up the long flight of stairs (we love places with stairs to help us work off all the tapas, but not a place if you have trouble with stairs).

The apartment was adorable! The design makes very clever use of a pretty small space, and it's so nicely decorated and equipped that it really feels much larger than it is. Our teenage daughter appreciated having her own cool little room with the great bunkbeds that fold in and out. The place was very very clean throughout. There were a number of really nice touches that made us feel so welcome and respected...a tin of delicious cookies, cold sodas and water in the fridge, fresh flowers, etc...like a 4 star hotel only way less expensive!!

The location of Oscars apartment was incredible. You just step outside and the heart of Madrid is RIGHT THERE! The Plaza Mayor is literally right across the street, while we were able to walk to the Palace and the Prado in about 15 minutes. There is no end of stellar cafes, bars, shops for all tastes and budgets in this neighborhood. It was really perfect for us. We felt we'd lucked out, again!

This was the last place we stayed during our 5 week trip to Europe...and one of 5 places we booked via AirBnB...all were excellent! I don't think we will ever stay at a hotel again!

Very nice and functional flat ! Clean, quiet and air-conditioned. Downtown, from there, you can reach any area in Madrid !! Two steps from mercado san miguel, plaza del sol, la latna... Best place for tourists like us !!!
Furthermore, Rut & Oscar are the perfect guests ! Welcomed with a great smile, soda & water (by 38°C, it was more than fine), they were kind, caring. and reactive for each of our request !

La localización es realmente muy buena, a 5 minutos andando de sol. Ideal para una o dos personas. Además estaba todo bien cuidado y la comunicación con el host fue buena, siempre estuvo disponible y dispuesto a facilitarme la estancia.

We loved this apartment!  It was perfect for our one night stay in Madrid - very centrally located.  We LOVED the neighborhood, especially since we only had about 24 hours to explore so we weren't going to really go too far, just walk around and see what was close.  Oscar and Rut were so wonderful and accommodating, they left us fruit and cookies and let us leave our bags in the room even though we arrived before the arranged check-in time.  The place was very clean, with a simple, small but efficient layout and nice modern look.  It was exactly as pictured in the photos. The only down side was the construction currently going next door and up on the roof above,  but all was quiet at night, it was only a problem when we tried to rest in the middle of the afternoon after arriving.  I think it's the perfect place to stay in Madrid - we would certainly rent it again if we returned!  Thanks Oscar & Rut!

on a passé de superbes journées a madrid, endroit stratégique, trés centrale, l'appartement propre le luxe quoi, rien a dire, apropos de l'hote es trés gentille adorable et aimable un véritable accueil lui et sa femme. merci encore oscar a la prochaine.

The apartment has a perfect location for sightseeing in Madrid. It's small, yet, big enough for 2-3 people to stay. It was very clean but there was barely any natural light. The owners were very nice and greeted us and helped us with our luggage upon our arrival. Our only issue was that they didn't warn us about the construction going on and we were woken up at 8 am by construction workers yelling and drilling right above us. After we complained to the owners they sincerely apologized and gave us a partial refund. Overal it's a great place to stay. If I were planning another trip, I would just check with the owners if the construction is still going on.

Rut was a wonderful host. Check-in and check-out were very easy. Rut let us leave our bags at her own personal apartment (in the same building) before check-in time since our train came in early, and after check-out time since our train didn't leave til nighttime. She could have easily told us to leave our things elsewhere, but she decided to make it as easy for us as possible. Thank you, Rut!! She and Oscar were responsive to emails and very accomodating with our odd timing schedule. The apartment was very clean and very stylish. Don't let the fold out beds in one room scare you - they are very comfortable. The apt is small but we did not find it uncomfortable for 4 people. It looks exactly like the pictures. It's in walking distance to all the museums (Prado, Reina Sofia, Thyssen-Bornemisza, etc) and to many bars and restaurants (Plaza Mayor, Plaza del Sol, Plaza de Santa Ana). Great apartment, great hosts, great location!

I will forever remember this perfect location in Madrid. Not only was it located in the heart of the city, but Rut was the sweetest host possible. We had to arrive early and leave late, yet she let us keep our bags in her home (located two floors below). She also left us milk, cookies, and fruit in our room!

While the space was small, it was effective and efficient. We didn't lack anything during our stay. Just keep in mind-- this apartment is on the fifth floor, and there are no elevators. Also, if you plan on watching tv or relying on internet technology, things were at times spotty.. not a big deal for us.

If we were to come back to Madrid, we would definitely stay here again!

We stayed here for 3 nights, and we loved it. Rut and Oscar were fantastic hosts and very friendly! We were met with with cold bottles of water, which was very welcome in the 35 degree heat, and they quickly responded to any questions or concerns that we had. The location of their apartment is perfect as well - right down the road from Puerta del Sol, around the corner from San Miguel Market, across the road from Plaza Major and close to everything else. The apartment is clean and cute, and the bathroom is modern.

The only slight downsides to the apartment are:
- the apartment is up 6 flights of stairs. This is not generally a huge issue, but it can be tiring after a long day of walking around!
- people over 6 foot tall may hit the wall at the end of the bed with their feet. I'm 5'10'', and my feet almost hit the wall.
- only a couple of the channels on the TV work. Not a big issue if you're not there for long, but could be annoying if you are staying for a long time. Could be a result of the construction.
- the construction work next door is incredibly loud, and starts at 8am every week day and goes until the end of the day. The construction is literally all around the apartment - to the side, at the back, and on top. Until the construction ends, you will be unable to sleep in past 8am.

Despite these issues, we loved our time there, and would definitely stay again. Thanks!
